Exodus9:20 Lowo olesabayo ilizwi le Nkosi phakathi kwenceku zikaFaro wenza izisebenzi zakhe lezifuyo zakhe zibalekele ezindlini; 
Exodus9:21 kodwa lowo ongabekanga inhliziyo yakhe elizwini le Nkosi watshiya izisebenzi zakhe lezifuyo zakhe ensimini. 
Exodus9:22 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Yelulela isandla sakho emazulwini, ukuze kube khona isiqhotho elizweni lonke leGibhithe, phezu kwabantu laphezu kwezinyamazana laphezu kwemibhida yonke yensimu elizweni leGibhithe." 
Exodus9:23 UMozisi waseselulela intonga yakhe emazulwini; i Nkosi yasiletha imidumo lesiqhotho; lomlilo wehlela emhlabeni; le Nkosi yanisa isiqhotho elizweni leGibhithe. 
Exodus9:24 Kwasekusiba khona isiqhotho, lomlilo uzixubanise esiqhothweni; okunzima kakhulu; okungazanga kube khona okunjengakho elizweni lonke leGibhithe selokhu laba yisizwe." 
Exodus9:25 Isiqhotho sasesitshaya elizweni lonke leGibhithe konke okusegangeni, kusukela ebantwini kusiya ezinyamazaneni; lesiqhotho satshaya wonke umbhida weganga, sephula sonke isihlahla seganga." 
Exodus9:26 Kuphela elizweni leGosheni lapho ababekhona abantwana bakoIsrayeli kwakungekho isiqhotho. 
Exodus9:27 UFaro wasethuma wabiza uMozisi loAroni, wathi kubo: Ngonile ngalesisikhathi; i Nkosi ilungile, kanti mina labantu bami sibabi." 
Exodus9:28 Ncengani i Nkosi, ngoba sekwanele, ukuze kungabi lemidumo elamandla lesiqhotho; besengiliyekela lihambe, lingabe lisahlala." 
Exodus9:29 UMozisi wasesithi kuye: Nxa sengiphumile emzini, ngizachaya izandla zami e Nkosi ni; kuzaphela imidumo lesiqhotho kasisayikuba khona, ukuze wazi ukuthi umhlaba ungowe Nkosi." 
Exodus9:30 Kodwa wena lenceku zakho, ngiyazi ukuthi kalikayesabi i Nkosi uNkulunkulu." 
Exodus9:31 Kwasekutshaywa ifilakisi* lebhali*; ngoba ibhali yayisesikwetshini, lefilakisi yayisithela amaluba." 
Exodus9:32 Kodwa ingqoloyi lespelite* kakutshaywanga, ngoba kwakungakavuthwa." 
Exodus9:33 UMozisi wasephuma emzini evela kuFaro, wachaya izandla zakhe e Nkosi ni; kwasekusima imidumo lesiqhotho, lezulu kalabe li sa thululeka emhlabeni." 
Exodus9:34 Kwathi uFaro esebonile ukuthi izulu lesiqhotho lemidumo sekumile, wengezelela ukona, wayenza yaba nzima inhliziyo yakhe, yena lenceku zakhe." 
Exodus9:35 Njalo inhliziyo kaFaro yaba lukhuni, kazabayekela abantwana bakoIsrayeli bahambe, njengalokhu i Nkosi yayitshilo ngesandla sikaMozisi." 
Exodus10:1 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Yana kuFaro, ngoba mina ngenze inhliziyo yakhe yaba nzima lenhliziyo yenceku zakhe, ukuze ngenze lezizibonakaliso zami phambi kwakhe," 
Exodus10:2 lokuthi ulandise endlebeni zendodana yakho lendodana yendodana yakho ukuthi ngenze kabuhlungu kumaGibhithe lezibonakaliso zami engizenze phakathi kwawo, ukuze lazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Exodus10:3 UMozisi loAroni basebesiya kuFaro, bathi kuye: Itsho njalo i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wamaHebheru, ithi: Koze kube nini usala ukuzithoba phambi kwami? Yekela isizwe sami sihambe, bangikhonze." 
Exodus10:4 Ngoba uba usala ukuyekela isizwe sami sihambe, khangela, kusasa ngizaletha isikhonyane emngceleni wakho," 
Exodus10:5 njalo sizasibekela ubuso bomhlaba ukuze ungawuboni umhlaba, sizakudla insalela yokwaphephayo, okwalisalelayo esiqhothweni, sidle sonke isihlahla esikhulela wena ensimini." 
Exodus10:6 Sizagcwalisa izindlu zakho lezindlu zezinceku zakho zonke lezindlu zawo wonke amaGibhithe, oyihlo abangazanga basibone laboyise baboyihlo, kusukela ngosuku ababakhona emhlabeni kuze kube lamuhla. Wasetshibilika, waphuma kuFaro." 
Exodus10:7 Lenceku zikaFaro zathi kuye: Koze kube nini lo esiba ngumjibila kithi? Yekela amadoda ahambe, akhonze i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wawo; kawukazi yini ukuthi iGibhithe isichithekile?" 
Exodus10:8 UMozisi loAroni babuyiselwa kuFaro; wasesithi kubo: Hambani likhonze i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu. Ngobani kanye labo abazahamba? 
Exodus10:9 UMozisi wasesithi: Sizahamba labatsha bethu labadala bethu, lamadodana ethu lamadodakazi ethu, lezimvu zethu lenkomo zethu sizahamba, ngoba silomkhosi we Nkosi." 
Exodus10:10 Wasesithi kubo: I Nkosi ibe lani ngokunjalo, njengoba ngizaliyekela lihambe labantwanyana benu! Bonani ngoba kulokubi phambi kwenu." 
Exodus10:11 Kungabi njalo! Hambani khathesi, madoda, liyikhonze i Nkosi, ngoba yikho elikudingayo. Basebebaxotsha ebusweni bukaFaro." 
Exodus10:12 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Yelula isandla sakho phezu kwelizwe leGibhithe, ngenxa yesikhonyane, ukuze senyukele phezu kwelizwe leGibhithe, sidle wonke umbhida welizwe lakho konke isiqhotho esikutshiyileyo." 
Exodus10:13 UMozisi waseyelula intonga yakhe phezu kwelizwe leGibhithe; i Nkosi yasiqhuba umoya wempumalanga elizweni, lonke lolosuku lobusuku bonke; kwasekusithi ekuseni, umoya wempumalanga wenyusa isikhonyane." 
Exodus10:14 Isikhonyane sasesisenyukela phezu kwelizwe lonke leGibhithe, sehlela emngceleni wonke weGibhithe, esinzima kakhulu. Phambi kwaso akuzange kube khona isikhonyane esinjalo njengaso, futhi kakuyikuba khona esinjalo emva kwaso." 
Exodus10:15 Ngoba sasibekela ubuso belizwe lonke, kwaze kwafiphazwa ilizwe; sadla wonke umbhida welizwe laso sonke isithelo sezihlahla isiqhotho esasitshiyayo; kakusalanga lutho oluluhlaza esihlahleni, lombhida weganga, elizweni lonke leGibhithe." 
Exodus10:16 UFaro wasephangisa ukubabiza oMozisi loAroni, wathi: Ngonile e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wenu lakini." 
Exodus10:17 Khathesi-ke ake lithethelele isono sami okwalesisikhathi kuphela, liyincenge i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ukuthi isuse kimi lokhu ukufa kuphela." 
Exodus10:18 Wasephuma kuFaro, wayincenga i Nkosi." 
Exodus10:19 I Nkosi yasiphendula umoya wentshonalanga olamandla kakhulu owenyusa isikhonyane, wasiphosela oLwandle oluBomvu; kakusalanga sikhonyane lesisodwa kuwo wonke umngcele weGibhithe." 
Exodus10:20 Kodwa i Nkosi yayenza lukhuni inhliziyo kaFaro, kazabayekela abantwana bakoIsrayeli bahambe." 
Exodus10:21 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Yelulela isandla sakho emazulwini, ukuze kube khona umnyama phezu kwelizwe leGibhithe, ngitsho umnyama ophumputhekayo." 
Exodus10:22 UMozisi waseselulela isandla sakhe emazulwini; kwasekusiba khona umnyama wobumnyama elizweni lonke leGibhithe insuku ezintathu. 
Exodus10:23 Kababonananga, futhi kakusukumanga muntu endaweni yakhe okwensuku ezintathu; kodwa kubo bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli kwakukhona ukukhanya emizini yabo." 
Exodus10:24 UFaro wasembiza uMozisi wathi: Hambani likhonze i Nkosi, kuphela izimvu zenu lenkomo zenu kuzagcinwa, labantwanyana benu bazahamba lani." 
Exodus10:25 Kodwa uMozisi wathi: Lawe ubonika imihlatshelo leminikelo yokutshiswa ezandleni zethu, esizayenzela i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu." 
Exodus10:26 Njalo lezifuyo zethu zizahamba kanye lathi, kakuyikusala emuva isondo; ngoba sizathatha kuzo ukukhonza i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu, ngoba kasikwazi esizakhonza ngakho i Nkosi size sifike khona." 
Exodus10:27 Kodwa i Nkosi yenza lukhuni inhliziyo kaFaro, njalo kafunanga ukubayekela bahambe." 
Exodus10:28 UFaro wasesithi kuye: Suka kimi, uziqaphele, ungaboni ubuso bami futhi; ngoba mhla ubona ubuso bami uzakufa." 
Exodus10:29 UMozisi wasesithi: Ukhulume ngokuqonda, kangisayikubona futhi ubuso bakho." 
Exodus11:1 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Ngisezakwehlisela kuFaro lakulo iGibhithe inhlupheko eyodwa; emva kwalokho uzaliyekela lihambe lisuke lapha; ekuliyekeleni kwakhe lihambe uzalixotsha lokulixotsha lisuka lapha ngokupheleleyo. 
Exodus11:2 Ake ukhulume endlebeni zabantu, ukuthi bacele, ngulowo kumakhelwane wakhe, lalowo owesifazana kumakhelwane wakhe, izinto zesiliva lezinto zegolide." 
Exodus11:3 I Nkosi yasinika abantu umusa emehlweni amaGibhithe. Futhi indoda uMozisi waba mkhulu kakhulu elizweni leGibhithe emehlweni enceku zikaFaro lemehlweni esizwe. 
Exodus11:4 UMozisi wasesithi: Itsho njalo i Nkosi ithi: Phose phakathi kobusuku ngizaphuma ngiye phakathi kweGibhithe; 
Exodus11:5 Lawo wonke amazibulo elizweni leGibhithe azakufa, kusukela kuzibulo likaFaro elizahlala esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi, kuze kube kuzibulo lencekukazi engemva kwelitshe lokuchola, lamazibulo wonke ezifuyo." 
Exodus11:6 Njalo kuzakuba khona isililo esikhulu elizweni lonke leGibhithe, esingazanga sibe khona esinjengaso, lesingayikuba khona futhi esinjengaso." 
Exodus11:7 Kodwa ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli inja kayiyikunyikinya ulimi lwayo, kusukela emuntwini kusiya ezifuyweni, ukuze lazi ukuthi i Nkosi iyehlukanisa phakathi kweGibhithe loIsrayeli." 
Exodus11:8 Lazo zonke izinceku zakho lezi zizakwehlela kimi, zingikhothamele zisithi: Phuma wena lesizwe sonke esikulandelayo. Langemva kwalokho ngizaphuma. Wasephuma kuFaro ekuvutheni kolaka." 
Exodus11:9 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: UFaro kayikulizwa, ukuze zande izimangaliso zami elizweni leGibhithe." 
Exodus11:10 OMozisi loAroni basebesenza zonke lezizimangaliso phambi kukaFaro, kodwa i Nkosi yenza inhliziyo kaFaro yaba lukhuni, kazabayekela abantwana bakoIsrayeli baphume elizweni lakhe." 
Exodus12:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni elizweni leGibhithe, isithi:" 
Exodus12:2 Le inyanga kayibe kini yinhloko yezinyanga, ibe kini ngeyokuqala yenyanga zomnyaka." 
Exodus12:3 Khulumani kunhlangano yonke yakoIsrayeli lithi: Ngolwetshumi lwalinyanga bazazithathela ngulowo iwundlu, ngokwezindlu zaboyise, iwundlu ngendlu." 
Exodus12:4 Uba-ke indlu incinyane kakhulu ewundlwini, kakuthi yena athathe lomakhelwane wakhe, oseduze lendlu yakhe, njengobunengi bemiphefumulo; ngulowo njengokudla kwakhe, lizabalela iwundlu." 
Exodus12:5 Lizakuba lezinyane elingelasici, eliduna, elilomnyaka owodwa; lithatheni ezimvini loba ezimbuzini." 
Exodus12:6 Njalo lizaligcina kuze kufike usuku lwetshumi lane lwaleyonyanga, njalo ibandla lonke lenhlangano yakoIsrayeli izalihlaba kusihlwa." 
Exodus12:7 Bazathatha-ke okwegazi, bakufake emigubazini yomibili lekhothameni, ezindlini abazalidlela kuzo." 
Exodus12:8 Njalo bazakudla inyama ngalobobusuku, yosiwe ngomlilo, lesinkwa esingelamvubelo, lemibhida ebabayo baza yi dla." 
Exodus12:9 Lingadli okwalo kuluhlaza kumbe kuphekwe lokuphekwa ngamanzi, kodwa yosiwe ngomlilo; inhloko yalo lemilenze yalo, kanye lemibilini yalo." 
Exodus12:10 Njalo lingatshiyi lutho kulo kuze kube sekuseni, kodwa okusalayo kulo kuze kube sekuseni lizakutshisa ngomlilo." 
Exodus12:11 Ngokunjalo-ke lizalidla, inkalo zenu zibotshiwe, izicathulo zenu zisenyaweni zenu, lendondolo zenu zisezandleni zenu; lizalidla ngokuphangisa; kuliphasika le Nkosi." 
Exodus12:12 Ngoba ngizadabula phakathi kwelizwe leGibhithe ngalobubusuku, ngitshaye wonke amazibulo elizweni leGibhithe, kusukela emuntwini kusiya enyamazaneni, ngizakwenza izigwebo kubo bonke onkulunkulu beGibhithe; mina ngiyi Nkosi." 
Exodus12:13 Legazi lizakuba kini yisibonakaliso ezindlini lapho elikhona; nxa ngibona igazi ngizadlula phezu kwenu, njalo kungehleli kini inhlupheko yokuchitha, mhla ngitshaya ilizwe leGibhithe." 
Exodus12:14 Njalo lolusuku luzakuba kini yisikhumbuzo; njalo lizalugcina lube ngumkhosi e Nkosi ni; lizalugcina ezizukulwaneni zenu ngokomthetho wanininini. 
Exodus12:15 Insuku eziyisikhombisa lizakudla isinkwa esingelamvubelo. Yebo ngosuku lokuqala lizakhupha imvubelo ezindlini zenu; ngoba wonke odla okuvutshelweyo kusukela kusuku lokuqala kuze kufike usuku lwesikhombisa, lowomphefumulo uzaqunywa usuke koIsrayeli." 
Exodus12:16 Njalo ngosuku lokuqala kuzakuba khona inhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele, langosuku lwesikhombisa lizakuba lenhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; kungenziwa msebenzi ngazo, kuphela lokho wonke umphefumulo okudlayo, lokho kodwa kungenziwa yini." 
Exodus12:17 Ngakho gcinani izinkwa ezingelamvubelo; ngoba ngalona lolosuku ngikhuphile amabutho enu elizweni leGibhithe. Ngakho lizagcina lolosuku ezizukulwaneni zenu ngesimiso saphakade. 
Exodus12:18 Kweyokuqala, osukwini lwetshumi lane lwenyanga kusihlwa lizakudla isinkwa esingelamvubelo, kuze kufike usuku lwamatshumi amabili lanye lwenyanga kusihlwa." 
Exodus12:19 Insuku eziyisikhombisa kakungaficwa imvubelo ezindlini zenu; ngoba wonke odla okuvutshelweyo lowomphefumulo uzaqunywa usuke kunhlangano yakoIsrayeli, loba engowemzini loba engowokuzalwa elizweni." 
Exodus12:20 Lingadli lutho oluvutshelweyo; emizini yenu yonke lizakudla isinkwa esingelamvubelo. 
Exodus12:21 UMozisi wasebiza bonke abadala bakoIsrayeli, wathi kubo: Hudulani lizithathele amawundlu ngokwensapho zenu, lihlabe iphasika," 
Exodus12:22 lithathe ilixha lehisope*, liligxamuze egazini elisemganwini, lininde ikhothamo lemigubazini emibili ngegazi elisemganwini; lina-ke, kakungaphumi muntu endlini yakhe kuze kube sekuseni." 
Exodus12:23 Ngoba i Nkosi izadabula ukutshaya amaGibhithe; nxa ebona igazi ekhothameni lemigubazini yomibili, i Nkosi izadlula phezu komnyango, ingavumeli umchithi ukuthi angene ezindlini zenu ukutshaya." 
Exodus12:24 Njalo lizagcina le into, kube yisimiso kini lakubantwana benu kuze kube phakade." 
Exodus12:25 Njalo kuzakuthi lapho lifika elizweni i Nkosi ezalinika lona njengokukhuluma kwayo, lizagcina linkonzo." 
Exodus12:26 Kuzakuthi-ke lapho abantwana benu besithi kini: Iyini linkonzo elilayo? 
Exodus12:27 Lizakuthi-ke: Lo ngumhlatshelo wephasika le Nkosi, eyedlula phezu kwezindlu zabantwana bakoIsrayeli eGibhithe mhla itshaya amaGibhithe, wophula izindlu zethu. Njalo abantu bakhothama bakhonza." 
Exodus12:28 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebehamba, bayakwenza njengalokhu i Nkosi yayibalayile oMozisi loAroni, benza njalo." 
Exodus12:29 Kwasekusithi phakathi kobusuku i Nkosi yatshaya wonke amazibulo elizweni leGibhithe, kusukela kuzibulo likaFaro elalizahlala esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi kuze kube kuzibulo lesibotshwa esasisentolongweni, lamazibulo wonke ezifuyo." 
Exodus12:30 UFaro wasesukuma ebusuku, yena lenceku zakhe zonke lamaGibhithe wonke. Kwasekusiba khona isililo esikhulu eGibhithe, ngoba kwakungekho ndlu lapho okwakungelamufi khona." 
Exodus12:31 Wasebiza oMozisi loAroni ebusuku, wathi: Sukumani, liphume phakathi kwabantu bami, lonke lina labantwana bakoIsrayeli, lihambe liyekhonza i Nkosi njengokutsho kwenu." 
Exodus12:32 Thathani lani izimvu zenu lenkomo zenu njengokutsho kwenu, lihambe; futhi lingibusise lami." 
Exodus12:33 Njalo amaGibhithe ayebakhuthaza abantu ebahaluzelisa ukuthi baphume elizweni, ngoba athi: Sonke sifile." 
Exodus12:34 Abantu-ke bathatha inhlama yabo ingakavutshelwa, betshata imiganu yabo yokuxovela ibotshelwe ezembathweni zabo." 
Exodus12:35 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenza njengelizwi likaMozisi; bacela kumaGibhithe izinto zesiliva lezinto zegolide lezigqoko. 
Exodus12:36 I Nkosi yasibapha abantu umusa emehlweni amaGibhithe, aze abanika izicelo zabo. Basebewaphundla amaGibhithe." 
Exodus12:37 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesuka eRamesesi besiya eSukothi; amadoda angaba zinkulungwane ezingamakhulu ayisithupha ahamba ngenyawo, ngaphandle kwabantwana." 
Exodus12:38 Kwasekusenyuka labo lexuku lenhlobonhlobo, lezimvu lezinkomo, lezifuyo ezinengi kakhulu." 
Exodus12:39 Basebebhaka izinkwa ezingelamvubelo ngenhlama abayikhupha eGibhithe, ngoba ingavutshelwanga, ngoba baxotshwa eGibhithe, ngoba babengelakulibala, futhi bengazilungiselelanga umphako." 
Exodus12:40 Isikhathi sokuhlala-ke kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli abasihlala eGibhithe sasiyiminyaka engamakhulu amane lamatshumi amathathu. 
Exodus12:41 Kwasekusithi ekupheleni kweminyaka engamakhulu amane lamatshumi amathathu, kwathi ngalona lolosuku wonke amabutho e Nkosi aphuma elizweni leGibhithe." 
Exodus12:42 Kuyibusuku bokulindelwa i Nkosi kakhulu ngokubakhupha elizweni leGibhithe; lobu yibusuku be Nkosi, bokulindwa kakhulu yibo bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli ezizukulwaneni zabo." 
Exodus12:43 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi loAroni: Lesi yisimiso sephasika. Kakho owezizwe ongalidla; 
Exodus12:44 kodwa sonke isigqili sawo wonke umuntu, esathengwa ngemali, nxa usisokile, ngalesosikhathi sizakudla kulo." 
Exodus12:45 Owezizwe loqatshiweyo bangadli kulo. 
Exodus12:46 Lizadlelwa endlini yinye; ungakhupheli phandle kwendlu okwenyama, ungephuli thambo lalo." 
Exodus12:47 Inhlangano yonke yakoIsrayeli izakwenza lokhu. 
Exodus12:48 Uba owemzini ohlala lani egcinela i Nkosi iphasika, kabasokwe bonke abesilisa laye, abesesondela-ke aligcine, uzakuba njengowokuzalwa elizweni; kodwa kakho ongasokwanga ozalidla." 
Exodus12:49 Umlayo munye uzakuba kowokuzalwa elizweni lakowemzini ohlala phakathi kwenu. 
Exodus12:50 Bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenza njengalokhu i Nkosi yayibalayile oMozisi loAroni; benza njalo. 
Exodus12:51 Kwasekusithi ngalona lolosuku i Nkosi yabakhupha abantwana bakoIsrayeli elizweni leGibhithe ngamabutho abo. 
Exodus13:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Exodus13:2 Ngingcwelisela lonke izibulo, elivula loba yisiphi isizalo phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, elomuntu lelenyamazana, lingelami." 
Exodus13:3 UMozisi wasesithi ebantwini: Khumbulani lolusuku eliphume ngalo eGibhithe, endlini yobugqili; ngoba ngamandla esandla i Nkosi ilikhuphile lapha. Njalo kakungadliwa isinkwa esilemvubelo." 
Exodus13:4 Ngalolusuku liyaphuma ngenyanga kaAbhibhi. 
Exodus13:5 Njalo kuzakuthi lapho i Nkosi isikungenisile elizweni lamaKhanani lamaHethi lamaAmori lamaHivi lamaJebusi, afunga kuboyihlo ukukunika lona, ilizwe eligeleza uchago loluju, uzagcina linkonzo ngalinyanga." 
Exodus13:6 Insuku eziyisikhombisa uzakudla izinkwa ezingelamvubelo, langosuku lwesikhombisa kuzakuba khona umkhosi e Nkosi ni." 
Exodus13:7 Izinkwa ezingelamvubelo zizadliwa ngensuku eziyisikhombisa; njalo kakuyikubonwa kuwe okuvutshelweyo lemvubelo kayiyikubonwa kuwe kuwo wonke umngcele wakho. 
Exodus13:8 Njalo uzatshela indodana yakho ngalolosuku usithi: Ngenxa yalokho i Nkosi eyakwenza kimi ekuphumeni kwami eGibhithe. 
Exodus13:9 Futhi kuzakuba kuwe luphawu phezu kwesandla sakho lesikhumbuzo phakathi laphakathi kwamehlo akho, ukuze umlayo we Nkosi ube semlonyeni wakho; ngoba ngesandla esilamandla i Nkosi ikukhuphile eGibhithe." 
Exodus13:10 Ngakho uzagcina lesisimiso ngesikhathi saso esimisiweyo iminyaka ngeminyaka. 
Exodus13:11 Njalo kuzakuthi lapho i Nkosi isikungenisile elizweni lamaKhanani, njengokufunga kwayo kuwe lakuboyihlo, isikunike lona," 
Exodus13:12 uzakwehlukanisela i Nkosi konke okuvula isizalo; lalo lonke izibulo lomqegu wezifuyo olazo, amaduna azakuba ngawe Nkosi." 
Exodus13:13 Lalo lonke izibulo likababhemi uzalihlenga ngewundlu; kodwa uba ungalihlengi, uzalephula intamo; lalo lonke izibulo lomuntu phakathi kwamadodana akho uzalihlenga." 
Exodus13:14 Njalo kuzakuthi lapho indodana yakho ikubuza ngesikhathi esizayo isithi: Kuyini lokhu? Uzakuthi kuyo: Ngamandla esandla i Nkosi yasikhupha eGibhithe, endlini yobugqili." 
Exodus13:15 Ngoba kwathi uFaro ezenza lukhuni ukuthi asiyekele sihambe, i Nkosi yabulala lonke izibulo elizweni leGibhithe, kusukela kuzibulo lomuntu kusiya kuzibulo lezifuyo; ngakho ngiyahlabela i Nkosi konke okuvula isizalo okuduna; kodwa lonke izibulo lamadodana ami ngiyalihlenga." 
Exodus13:16 Njalo kuzakuba luphawu phezu kwesandla sakho lamafilakteriyu* phakathi laphakathi kwamehlo akho, ngoba ngamandla esandla i Nkosi yasikhupha eGibhithe." 
Exodus13:17 Kwasekusithi uFaro eseyekele abantu bahambe, uNkulunkulu kabakhokhelanga nge ndlela yelizwe lamaFilisti, lanxa yayiseduze; ngoba uNkulunkulu wathi: Hlezi abantu bazisole nxa bebona impi, babuyele eGibhithe." 
Exodus13:18 Kodwa uNkulunkulu wababhodisa abantu ngendlela yenkangala yoLwandle oluBomvu. Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenyuka besuka elizweni leGibhithe behlomile. 
Exodus13:19 UMozisi wasethatha amathambo kaJosefa wahamba lawo, ngoba wayebafungisile lokubafungisa abantwana bakoIsrayeli esithi: Isibili uNkulunkulu uzalihambela; futhi kalibokwenyusa lapha amathambo ami lihambe lawo." 
Exodus13:20 Basebesuka eSukothi, bamisa inkamba eEthama, ekucineni kwenkangala." 
Exodus13:21 I Nkosi yasihamba phambi kwabo emini ngensika yeyezi ukubakhokhela endleleni, lebusuku ngensika yomlilo ukubakhanyisela, ukuze bahambe emini lebusuku." 
Exodus13:22 Kayiyisusanga insika yeyezi emini, lensika yomlilo ebusuku, phambi kwabantu." 
Exodus14:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Exodus14:2 Tshela abantwana bakoIsrayeli ukuthi baphenduke, bamise inkamba phambi kwePi-Hahirothi, phakathi kweMigidoli lolwandle, phambi kweBhali-Zefoni, maqondana layo limise inkamba elwandle." 
Exodus14:3 Njalo uFaro uzakuthi ngabantwana bakoIsrayeli: Badidekile elizweni, inkangala ibavalele." 
Exodus14:4 Njalo ngizayenza lukhuni inhliziyo kaFaro, ukuthi axotshane labo, ngibe sengidunyiswa kuFaro lebuthweni lakhe lonke, ukuze amaGibhithe azi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi. Basebesenza njalo." 
Exodus14:5 Kwathi sekubikiwe enkosini yeGibhithe ukuthi abantu babalekile, inhliziyo kaFaro lenhliziyo yenceku zakhe yaguquka mayelana labantu, basebesithi: Kuyini lokho esikwenzileyo, ukuthi siyekele uIsrayeli ahambe angasisebenzeli?" 
Exodus14:6 Wasebophela inqola yakhe, wathatha abantu bakhe laye." 
Exodus14:7 Wasethatha inqola ezingamakhulu ayisithupha ezikhethiweyo lazo zonke inqola zeGibhithe lenduna eziphezu kwazo zonke. 
Exodus14:8 I Nkosi yasiyenza lukhuni inhliziyo kaFaro inkosi yeGibhithe, wasexotshana labantwana bakoIsrayeli, kodwa abantwana bakoIsrayeli baphuma ngesandla esiphakemeyo." 
Exodus14:9 Kodwa amaGibhithe asexotshana labo, amabhiza wonke, izinqola zikaFaro, labagadi bakhe bamabhiza, lebutho lakhe, abafica bemise inkamba elwandle, eceleni kwePi-Hahirothi phambi kweBhali-Zefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Kwathi uFaro esesondele, abantwana bakoIsrayeli baphakamisa amehlo abo, khangela-ke, amaGibhithe ehamba ebalandela, basebesesaba kakhulu. Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebekhala e Nkosi ni;" 
Exodus14:11 bathi kuMozisi: Kungoba kwakungekho mangcwaba yini eGibhithe ukuthi usithethe ukuze sifele enkangala? Kuyini lokhu okwenze kithi, ukusikhupha eGibhithe?" 
Exodus14:12 Kayisilo leli ilizwi esalikhuluma kuwe eGibhithe sisithi: Siyekele ukuthi sisebenzele amaGibhithe? Ngoba bekuzakuba ngcono kithi ukuthi sisebenzele amaGibhithe kulokuthi sifele enkangala. 
Exodus14:13 UMozisi wasesithi ebantwini: Lingesabi; manini liqine, libone usindiso lwe Nkosi ezalenzela lona lamuhla; ngoba amaGibhithe eliwabonayo lamuhla, kalisayikuwabona futhi ephakadeni." 
Exodus14:14 I Nkosi izalilwela, lina-ke lizathula." 
Exodus14:15 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Ukhalelani kimi? Tshela abantwana bakoIsrayeli ukuthi baqhubekele phambili. 
Exodus14:16 Wena-ke, phakamisa intonga yakho, welulele isandla sakho phezu kolwandle uludabule, ukuze abantwana bakoIsrayeli bahambe phakathi kolwandle emhlabathini owomileyo." 
Exodus14:17 Mina-ke, khangela, ngizayenza lukhuni inhliziyo yamaGibhithe ukuze angene ngemva kwabo. Njalo ngizadunyiswa ngoFaro langebutho lakhe lonke, ngezinqola zakhe, langabagadi bamabhiza bakhe." 
Exodus14:18 Njalo amaGibhithe azakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi sengidunyiswe ngoFaro, ngezinqola zakhe langabagadi bamabhiza bakhe." 
Exodus14:19 Njalo ingilosi kaNkulunkulu eyayihamba phambi kwebutho lakoIsrayeli yasuka yayahamba ngemva kwabo; lensika yeyezi yasuka phambi kwabo, yema ngemva kwabo," 
Exodus14:20 yasisiza phakathi kwebutho lamaGibhithe lebutho lakoIsrayeli. Njalo yayiliyezi lobumnyama, kodwa yakhanyisa ubusuku, okokuthi elinye kalisondelanga kwelinye ubusuku bonke." 
Exodus14:21 UMozisi waseselulela isandla sakhe phezu kolwandle; i Nkosi yalwenza ulwandle lwahamba ngomoya olamandla wempumalanga ubusuku bonke, yenza ulwandle lwaba ngumhlabathi owomileyo; amanzi asesehlukaniswa." 
Exodus14:22 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebengena olwandle emhlabathini owomileyo; njalo amanzi aba ngumduli kubo ngakwesokunene sabo langakwesokhohlo sabo. 
Exodus14:23 AmaGibhithe asexotshana labo, angena ngemva kwabo, wonke amabhiza kaFaro, inqola zakhe labagadi bamabhiza bakhe, phakathi kolwandle." 
Exodus14:24 Kwasekusithi ngomlindo wokusa, i Nkosi yakhangela phansi ebuthweni lamaGibhithe isensikeni yomlilo leyeyezi, yalidunga ibutho lamaGibhithe;" 
Exodus14:25 yakhupha amavili ezinqola zawo ukuze zihambe nzima, aze athi amaGibhithe: Asibalekele ubuso bukaIsrayeli, ngoba i Nkosi iyabalwela imelene lamaGibhithe." 
Exodus14:26 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Yelulela isandla sakho phezu kolwandle ukuze amanzi abuyele phezu kwamaGibhithe, phezu kwenqola zawo laphezu kwabagadi bawo bamabhiza." 
Exodus14:27 UMozisi waseselulela isandla sakhe phezu kolwandle; ulwandle lwaselubuyela endaweni yalo eyejwayelekileyo emadabukakusa; amaGibhithe asebalekela kulo; i Nkosi yasiwathintithela amaGibhithe phakathi kolwandle. 
Exodus14:28 Amanzi asebuyela, asibekela izinqola labagadi bamabhiza, lebutho lonke likaFaro elalingene olwandle ngemva kwabo; kakusalanga loyedwa kubo." 
Exodus14:29 Kodwa abantwana bakoIsrayeli bahamba phezu komhlabathi owomileyo phakathi kolwandle; njalo amanzi aba ngumduli kubo ngakwesokunene sabo langakwesokhohlo sabo. 
Exodus14:30 Ngokunjalo i Nkosi yamophula uIsrayeli ngalolosuku esandleni samaGibhithe; njalo uIsrayeli wabona amaGibhithe efile ekhunjini lolwandle. 
Exodus14:31 UIsrayeli wasebona amandla amakhulu i Nkosi eyawenzayo kumaGibhithe. Abantu basebeyesaba i Nkosi, bakholwa e Nkosi ni, lakuMozisi inceku yayo." 
Exodus15:1 Khona oMozisi labantwana bakoIsrayeli bahlabelela lelihubo e Nkosi ni; bakhuluma bathi: Ngizahlabelela i Nkosi, ngoba iphakeme isibili. Ibhiza lomgadi walo ikuphosele olwandle." 
Exodus15:2 I Nkosi ingamandla lehubo lami, isibe kimi lusindiso, lo nguNkulunkulu wami, ngakho ngizamdumisa, unguNkulunkulu kababa, ngakho ngizamphakamisa." 
Exodus15:3 I Nkosi yindoda yempi, i Nkosi libizo layo." 
Exodus15:4 Inqola zikaFaro lebutho lakhe ikuphosele olwandle, lokhetho lwezinduna zakhe lwacwiliswa oLwandle oluBomvu." 
Exodus15:5 Inziki zabasibekela; behlela ekujuleni njengelitshe. 
Exodus15:6 Isandla sakho sokunene, Nkosi, sidunyisiwe ngamandla; isandla sakho sokunene, Nkosi, sisiphahlazile isitha." 
Exodus15:7 Njalo ngobukhulu bokuphakama kwakho uchithile abakuvukelayo; uthumele ulaka lwakho oluvuthayo, lwabaqeda njengezidindi." 
Exodus15:8 Langokuvuthela kwamakhala akho amanzi abuthelelwa; impophoma zema njengenqumbi; izinziki zajiya enhliziyweni yolwandle. 
Exodus15:9 Isitha sathi: Ngizaxotsha, ngifice, ngehlukanise impango; isiloyiso sami sizasutha bona, ngizahwatsha inkemba yami, isandla sami sizababhubhisa." 
Exodus15:10 Waphephetha ngomoya wakho, ulwandle lwabasibekela; batshona njengomnuso emanzini alamandla." 
Exodus15:11 Ngubani onjengawe, Nkosi, phakathi kwabonkulunkulu? Ngubani onjengawe olodumo ebungcweleni, owesabekayo ezindunyisweni, esenza izimangaliso?" 
Exodus15:12 Welulile isandla sakho sokunene, umhlaba wabaginya." 
Exodus15:13 Ukhokhele ngomusa wakho lesisizwe osihlengileyo; wa si hola ngamandla akho endaweni yakho yokuhlala yobungcwele bakho. 
Exodus15:14 Izizwe zizwile, ziyathuthumela; umhelo ubabambile abakhileyo beFilisti." 
Exodus15:15 Ngalesosikhathi izinduna zeEdoma zizasanganiseka, iziphathamandla zakoMowabi, ukuthuthumela kwazibamba, bonke abakhileyo beKhanani bazancibilika." 
Exodus15:16 Ukwethuka lokwesaba kuzabehlela; ngobukhulu bengalo yakho bazathula njengelitshe, size sichaphe isizwe sakho, Nkosi, size sichaphe isizwe osithengileyo." 
Exodus15:17 Uzabangenisa, ubahlanyele entabeni yelifa lakho, indawo oyenzileyo, Nkosi, ukuthi uhlale kuyo, indawo engcwele eziyimisileyo izandla zakho, Nkosi." 
Exodus15:18 I Nkosi izabusa kuze kube phakade lanininini. 
Exodus15:19 Ngoba ibhiza likaFaro langena olwandle lenqola yakhe labagadi bakhe bamabhiza, i Nkosi yasibuyisela amanzi olwandle phezu kwabo, kodwa abantwana bakoIsrayeli bahamba emhlabathini owomileyo phakathi kolwandle." 
Exodus15:20 UMiriyamu umprofethikazi, udadewabo kaAroni, wasethatha isigujana esandleni sakhe; bonke abesifazana basebephuma ngemva kwakhe, lezigujana lemigido." 
Exodus15:21 UMiriyamu wasebaphendula wathi: Hlabelelani i Nkosi, ngoba inqobe ngodumo. Ibhiza lomgadi walo ikuphosele olwandle." 
Exodus15:22 UMozisi wasemkhokhela uIsrayeli eqhubeka esuka eLwandle oluBomvu, baphuma baya enkangala yeShuri; bahamba insuku ezintathu enkangala, kabatholanga manzi." 
Exodus15:23 Kwathi lapho befika eMara babengelakuwanatha amanzi eMara, ngoba ayebaba; ngakho ibizo layo lathiwa yiMara." 
Exodus15:24 Abantu basebekhonona bemelene loMozisi besithi: Sizanathani? 
Exodus15:25 Wasekhala e Nkosi ni. I Nkosi yasimtshengisa isihlahla, asiphosela emanzini, amanzi asesiba mnandi. Yabamisela khona isimiso lesimiselo, lalapho yabalinga," 
Exodus15:26 yasisithi: Uba lilalela lokulalela ilizwi le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu, lenze okulungileyo emehlweni ayo, libeke indlebe emilayweni yayo, ligcine zonke izimiso zayo, kangiyikwehlisela phezu kwenu lasinye sezifo engazehlisela phezu kwamaGibhithe; ngoba ngiyi Nkosi elelaphayo." 
Exodus15:27 Basebefika eElimi lapho okwakukhona imithombo elitshumi lambili yamanzi, lezihlala zelala ezingamatshumi ayisikhombisa; basebemisa inkamba khona emanzini." 
Exodus16:1 Basebesuka eElimi, lenhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli yafika enkangala yeSini, ephakathi kweElimi leSinayi, ngosuku lwetshumi lanhlanu lwenyanga yesibili emva kokuphuma kwabo elizweni leGibhithe." 
Exodus16:2 Lenhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli yakhonona imelana loMozisi loAroni enkangala. 
Exodus16:3 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesithi kubo: Kungathi ngabe safa ngesandla se Nkosi elizweni leGibhithe lapho sasihlezi embizeni zenyama, lapho sadla isinkwa sasutha; ngoba lisikhuphele kulinkangala ukuze libulale lelibandla lonke ngendlala." 
Exodus16:4 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Khangela, ngizalinisela isinkwa sivela emazulwini; labantu bazaphuma ukubutha isabelo sosuku ngosuku lwaso, ukuze ngibalinge ukuthi bazahamba ngomlayo wami yini kumbe hayi." 
Exodus16:5 Kuzakuthi-ke ngosuku lwesithupha bazalungisa lokho abakulethileyo, njalo kuzabe kuphindwe kabili kulokho abakubuthayo insuku ngensuku." 
Exodus16:6 UMozisi loAroni basebesithi kubo bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli: Kusihlwa, khona lizakwazi ukuthi i Nkosi ilikhuphile elizweni leGibhithe;" 
Exodus16:7 njalo kusisa, khona lizabona inkazimulo ye Nkosi, ngoba izwile ukukhonona kwenu limelene le Nkosi. Thina-ke siyini ukuthi lisikhononele?" 
Exodus16:8 UMozisi wasesithi: Lapho i Nkosi ilinika inyama yokudla kusihlwa, lesinkwa ekuseni, ukuze lisuthe, ku ngoba i Nkosi izwile ukukhonona kwenu elikukhonona limelene layo. Ngoba thina siyini? Ukukhonona kwenu kakumelananga lathi, kodwa kumelene le Nkosi." 
Exodus16:9 UMozisi wasesithi kuAroni: Tshono kunhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli uthi: Sondelani phambi kwe Nkosi, ngoba izwile ukukhonona kwenu." 
Exodus16:10 Kwasekusithi uAroni esakhuluma kunhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli, bakhangela ngasenkangala, khangela-ke, inkazimulo ye Nkosi yabonakala eyezini." 
Exodus16:11 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Exodus16:12 Sengizwile ukukhonona kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli; batshele uthi: Kusihlwa lizakudla inyama, lekuseni lisuthe isinkwa, njalo lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Exodus16:13 Kwasekusithi ntambama kwenyuka izagwaca, zasibekela inkamba; lakusisa kwakulomlalela wamazolo uzingelezele inkamba." 
Exodus16:14 Kwathi umlalela wamazolo usuwenyukile, khangela-ke, phezu kobuso benkangala into eyisigaqa encinyane, incinyane njengongqwaqwane emhlabathini." 
Exodus16:15 Kwathi abantwana bakoIsrayeli be zi bona bathi omunye komunye: Kuyini lokhu? Ngoba babengazi ukuthi kuyini. UMozisi wasesithi kubo: Kuyisinkwa i Nkosi elinike sona ukuze lidle. 
Exodus16:16 Le yinto i Nkosi elilaye ngayo yathi: Ngulowo lalowo kabuthe kuyo okulingene ukudla kwakhe, i-omeri* ngekhanda, njengenani lemiphefumulo yenu, ngulowo uzathathela abasethenteni lakhe." 
Exodus16:17 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenza njalo, babutha, omunye okunengi lomunye okulutshwana." 
Exodus16:18 Sebelinganise nge-omeri*, lowo owayebuthe okunengi kabanga lokusalayo, lowayebuthe okulutshwana kaswelanga; babutha, ngulowo lalowo okulingene ukudla kwakhe." 
Exodus16:19 UMozisi wasesithi kubo: Kakungabi lamuntu otshiya kukho kuze kube sekuseni. 
Exodus16:20 Kodwa kabamlalelanga uMozisi; kodwa abanye batshiya kukho kwaze kwaba sekuseni, kwasekuphethuza impethu, kwaba levumba. Ngakho uMozisi wabathukuthelela." 
Exodus16:21 Bakubutha ukusa ngokusa, ngulowo lalowo okulingene ukudla kwakhe; lapho ilanga selitshisa, kwancibilika." 
Exodus16:22 Kwasekusithi ngosuku lwesithupha babutha isinkwa esiphindwe kabili, ama-omeri* amabili ngamunye. Njalo zonke izinduna zenhlangano zeza zamtshela uMozisi." 
Exodus16:23 Wasesithi kuzo: Lokhu yikho i Nkosi ekutshiloyo: Kusasa yikuphumula, isabatha elingcwele le Nkosi. Bhakani elizakubhaka, lipheke elizakupheka, konke lokho okuseleyo lizibekele kugcinwe kuze kube sekuseni." 
Exodus16:24 Basebekubeka kwaze kwaba sekuseni njengokulaya kukaMozisi. Njalo kakubanga levumba, kwakungelampethu kukho." 
Exodus16:25 UMozisi wasesithi: Dlanini lokhu lamuhla, ngoba lamuhla kulisabatha le Nkosi; lamuhla kaliyikukuthola egangeni." 
Exodus16:26 Lizakubutha insuku eziyisithupha; kodwa ngosuku lwesikhombisa, isabatha, kakuyikuba khona kulo." 
Exodus16:27 Kwasekusithi ngosuku lwesikhombisa abanye babantu baphuma ukubutha, kodwa kaba ku tholanga." 
Exodus16:28 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Koze kube nini lisala ukugcina imilayo yami lemithetho yami? 
Exodus16:29 Bonani, ngoba i Nkosi ilinikile isabatha, ngakho ilinika ngosuku lwesithupha isinkwa sensuku ezimbili; hlalani kube ngulowo lalowo endaweni yakhe, kakungaphumi muntu endaweni yakhe ngosuku lwesikhombisa." 
Exodus16:30 Ngakho abantu baphumula ngosuku lwesikhombisa. 
Exodus16:31 Indlu yakoIsrayeli yasibiza ibizo lakho ngokuthi yimana; njalo kwakunjengenhlanyelo yekhoriyanderi* emhlophe, lokunambitheka kwayo kwakunjengezinkwana eziyizipatalala eziloluju." 
Exodus16:32 UMozisi wasesithi: Le yinto i Nkosi elaye ngayo ukuthi: Gcwalisani i-omeri ngayo igcinelwe izizukulwana zenu, ukuze zibone isinkwa engalinika sona ukuthi lidle enkangala ekulikhupheni kwami elizweni leGibhithe." 
Exodus16:33 UMozisi wasesithi kuAroni: Thatha inqayi eyodwa, ufake kuyo i-omeri* eligcwele imana, uyibeke phambi kwe Nkosi, igcinelwe izizukulwana zenu." 
Exodus16:34 Njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi, uAroni wayibeka phambi kobufakazi ukuze igcinwe." 
Exodus16:35 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli-ke badla imana iminyaka engamatshumi amane baze bafika elizweni elakhiweyo. Badla imana baze bafika emngceleni welizwe leKhanani. 
Exodus16:36 I-omeri-ke* iyingxenye yetshumi ye-efa*. 
Exodus17:1 Inhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli yasuka enkangala yeSini, ngamalombolombo abo, ngokomlayo we Nkosi, bamisa inkamba eRefidimi; kodwa kwakungelamanzi okunatha abantu." 
Exodus17:2 Ngakho abantu bamsola uMozisi bathi: Sinike amanzi, sinathe. UMozisi wasesithi kubo: Lingisolelani? Liyilingelani i Nkosi?" 
Exodus17:3 Abantu basebesomela amanzi lapho, abantu bangunguna kuMozisi bathi: Wasenyuselani eGibhithe ukuze usibulale thina labantwana bethu lezifuyo zethu ngokoma?" 
Exodus17:4 UMozisi wasekhala e Nkosi ni esithi: Ngizakwenzani kulababantu? Sekukancane ukuthi bangikhande ngamatshe. 
Exodus17:5 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Dlula phambi kwabantu, uthathe kanye lawe kubadala bakoIsrayeli, lentonga yakho owatshaya umfula ngayo, ithathe ngesandla sakho, uhambe." 
Exodus17:6 Khangela, ngizakuma lapho phambi kwakho phezu kwedwala eHorebe; njalo uzatshaya idwala, kuphume-ke kulo amanzi ukuze abantu banathe. UMozisi wasesenza njalo phambi kwamehlo abadala bakoIsrayeli." 
Exodus17:7 Wasebiza ibizo lendawo ngokuthi yiMasa lo kuthi yiMeriba ngenxa yokusola kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli langenxa yokuyilinga kwabo i Nkosi besithi: I Nkosi iphakathi kwethu yini loba hatshi? 
Exodus17:8 Kwasekufika uAmaleki, walwa loIsrayeli eRefidimi." 
Exodus17:9 UMozisi wasesithi kuJoshuwa: Sikhethele amadoda, uphume uyekulwa loAmaleki; kusasa ngizakuma engqongeni yoqaqa, lentonga kaNkulunkulu izakuba sesandleni sami." 
Exodus17:10 UJoshuwa wasesenza njengokutsho kukaMozisi kuye, walwa loAmaleki. OMozisi, uAroni loHuri basebesenyukela engqongeni yoqaqa." 
Exodus17:11 Kwasekusithi lapho uMozisi ephakamisa isandla sakhe, uIsrayeli waba lamandla; kodwa lapho wehlisa isandla sakhe, uAmaleki waba lamandla." 
Exodus17:12 Kodwa izandla zikaMozisi zaba nzima, ngakho bathatha ilitshe, balibeka ngaphansi kwakhe, ukuthi ahlale kulo. OAroni loHuri basebesekela izandla zakhe, omunye engapha lomunye engale, ukuze izandla zakhe ziqine lize litshone ilanga." 
Exodus17:13 UJoshuwa wasemchitha uAmaleki labantu bakhe ngobukhali benkemba. 
Exodus17:14 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Bhala lokhu egwalweni kube yisikhumbuzo, ukubeke ezindlebeni zikaJoshuwa ukuthi ngokwesula ngizakwesula ukukhunjulwa kukaAmaleki ngaphansi kwamazulu." 
Exodus17:15 UMozisi wasesakha ilathi, wabiza ibizo lalo ngokuthi: UJehova-nisi;" 
Exodus17:16 wathi: Ngoba isandla siphezu kwesihlalo sobukhosi se Nkosi, i Nkosi izakuba lempi imelene loAmaleki kusukela kusizukulwana kusiya kusizukulwana." 
Exodus18:1 Kwathi uJetro umpristi weMidiyani, uyisezala kaMozisi, esezwile konke uNkulunkulu ayemenzele khona uMozisi loIsrayeli isizwe sakhe, ukuthi i Nkosi yayimkhuphile uIsrayeli eGibhithe," 
Exodus18:2 uJetro uyisezala kaMozisi wathatha uZipora umkaMozisi emva kokumbuyisela kwakhe," 
Exodus18:3 kanye lamadodana akhe amabili; obizo lenye lalinguGereshoma, ngoba wathi: Ngangingowemzini elizweni lemzini;" 
Exodus18:4 lebizo lenye linguEliyezeri, ngoba uNkulunkulu kababa wayelusizo lwami, wangikhulula enkembeni kaFaro." 
Exodus18:5 UJetro uyisezala kaMozisi wasesiza lamadodana akhe lomkakhe kuMozisi enkangala, entabeni kaNkulunkulu lapho ayemise khona inkamba." 
Exodus18:6 Wasesithi kuMozisi: Mina, uyihlozala, uJetro, ngiza kuwe lomkakho lamadodana akhe amabili elaye." 
Exodus18:7 UMozisi wasephuma ukumhlangabeza uyisezala, wakhothama, wamanga. Basebebuzana impilakahle; bangena ethenteni." 
Exodus18:8 UMozisi wasemlandisela uyisezala ngakho konke i Nkosi eyayikwenzile kuFaro lakumaGibhithe ngenxa kaIsrayeli, yonke inhlupheko eyabehlela endleleni, lokuthi i Nkosi yayibakhulule." 
Exodus18:9 UJetro wasethokoza ngakho konke okuhle i Nkosi eyayikwenzele uIsrayeli, ukuthi yayimkhulule esandleni samaGibhithe." 
Exodus18:10 UJetro wasesithi: Ibusisiwe i Nkosi elikhulule esandleni samaGibhithe lesandleni sikaFaro; eyakhulula lesisizwe ngaphansi kwesandla samaGibhithe. 
Exodus18:11 Khathesi sengisazi ukuthi i Nkosi inkulu kulabo bonke onkulunkulu, ngoba endabeni abazigabisa ngayo yayiphezu kwabo." 
Exodus18:12 UJetro uyisezala kaMozisi wasethathela uNkulunkulu umnikelo wokutshiswa lemihlatshelo; kwasekusiza uAroni labo bonke abadala bakoIsrayeli ukudla isinkwa loyisezala kaMozisi phambi kukaNkulunkulu. 
Exodus18:13 Kwasekusithi kusisa uMozisi wahlala ukwahlulela abantu; njalo abantu bema phambi kukaMozisi kusukela ekuseni kwaze kwahlwa. 
Exodus18:14 Kwathi lapho uyisezala kaMozisi esekubonile konke akwenzela abantu wathi: Iyini linto oyenza ebantwini? Uhlalelani wedwa, labantu bonke bemi kuwe kusukela ekuseni kuze kuhlwe?" 
Exodus18:15 UMozisi wasesithi kuyisezala: Ngoba abantu beza kimi ukubuza kuNkulunkulu. 
Exodus18:16 Nxa belendaba, beza kimi, njalo ngahlulele phakathi komuntu lomakhelwane wakhe, ngi b azise izimiso zikaNkulunkulu lemithetho yakhe." 
Exodus18:17 Uyisezala kaMozisi wasesithi kuye: Into oyenzayo kayinhle. 
Exodus18:18 Isibili uzazidlakaza, wena-ke lalababantu abalawe; ngoba linto inzima kakhulu kuwe, kawulakukwenza wedwa." 
Exodus18:19 Khathesi lalela ilizwi lami; ngizakweluleka, njalo uNkulunkulu abe lawe. Wena kawube ngowabantu phambi kukaNkulunkulu, wena ulethe izindaba kuNkulunkulu," 
Exodus18:20 ubafundise izimiso lemithetho, ubazise indlela abamele bahambe ngayo, lomsebenzi abamele bawenze." 
Exodus18:21 Futhi wena ubone phakathi kwabo bonke abantu amadoda alamandla, amesabayo uNkulunkulu, amadoda eqiniso, azonda inzuzo engalunganga, uwabeke phezu kwabo, induna zezinkulungwane, induna zamakhulu, induna zamatshumi amahlanu, lenduna zamatshumi;" 
Exodus18:22 ukuthi zahlulele abantu ngaso sonke isikhathi; kodwa kuzakuthi lonke udaba olukhulu zizaluletha kuwe, kodwa lonke udaba oluncinyane zizalwahlulela zona, ukuze kube lula kuwe, njalo zizathwalisana lawe." 
Exodus18:23 Uba usenza linto, loNkulunkulu ekulawula, uzakuba lamandla okuma, njalo labo bonke lababantu bazabuyela endaweni yabo ngokuthula." 
Exodus18:24 UMozisi waselilalela ilizwi likayisezala, wenza konke ayekutshilo." 
Exodus18:25 UMozisi wasekhetha amadoda alamandla kuye wonke uIsrayeli, wawabeka inhloko phezu kwabantu, induna zezinkulungwane, induna zamakhulu, induna zamatshumi amahlanu lenduna zamatshumi." 
Exodus18:26 Zasezibahlulela abantu ngaso sonke isikhathi; zaletha kuMozisi indaba ezinzima, kodwa lonke udaba oluncinyane zalwahlulela zona." 
Exodus18:27 UMozisi wasemyekela wahamba uyisezala; waya elizweni lakibo. 
Exodus19:1 Ngenyanga yesithathu emva kokuphuma kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli elizweni leGibhithe, ngalelolanga bafika enkangala yeSinayi." 
Exodus19:2 Sebesukile eRefidimi, bafika enkangala yeSinayi, bamisa inkamba enkangala; uIsrayeli wamisa-ke inkamba khona phambi kwentaba." 
Exodus19:3 UMozisi wasesenyukela kuNkulunkulu. I Nkosi yasimemeza kuye esentabeni isithi: Uzakutsho njalo kuyo indlu kaJakobe, ubatshele abantwana bakoIsrayeli uthi:" 
Exodus19:4 Lina libonile lokho engikwenze kumaGibhithe, lokuthi ngalithwala phezu kwempiko zenkozi, ngaliletha kimi." 
Exodus19:5 Ngakho-ke uba lilalela lokulalela ilizwi lami, ligcine isivumelwano sami, khona lizakuba yimfuyo ekhethekileyo kimi kulazo zonke izizwe; ngoba umhlaba wonke ungowami;" 
Exodus19:6 njalo lizakuba ngumbuso wabapristi lesizwe esingcwele kimi. Yiwo lamazwi ozawatsho kubantwana bakoIsrayeli. 
Exodus19:7 UMozisi wasesiza wabiza abadala babantu, wabeka phambi kwabo wonke lamazwi i Nkosi emlaye wona." 
Exodus19:8 Bonke abantu basebephendula kanyekanye bathi: Konke i Nkosi ekukhulumileyo sizakwenza. UMozisi wasebuyisela amazwi abantu e Nkosi ni. 
Exodus19:9 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Khangela, ngizakuza kuwe eyezini elinzima ukuze abantu bezwe nxa ngikhuluma lawe, lokuthi bakholwe kuwe kuze kube nininini. UMozisi wasebikela i Nkosi amazwi abantu." 
Exodus19:10 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Hamba uye ebantwini, ubangcwelise lamuhla lakusasa, bawatshe izembatho zabo," 
Exodus19:11 babe sebelungele usuku lwesithathu; ngoba ngosuku lwesithathu i Nkosi izakwehla phambi kwamehlo abantu bonke phezu kwentaba yeSinayi. 
Exodus19:12 Uzabamisela abantu umngcele inhlangothi zonke uthi: Ziqapheleni ukukhwela entabeni, lokuthinta ewatheni layo. Wonke othinta intaba uzabulawa lokubulawa;" 
Exodus19:13 Kakulasandla esizayithinta, kodwa sibili uzakhandwa ngamatshe loba sibili uzatshokwa; loba inyamazana loba umuntu, kakuyikuphila. Lapho uphondo lwenqama lukhala isikhathi eside bazakwenyukela entabeni." 
Exodus19:14 UMozisi wasesehla entabeni waya ebantwini, wangcwelisa abantu, njalo bawatsha izembatho zabo." 
Exodus19:15 Wathi ebantwini: Lungelani usuku lwesithathu; lingasondeli kowesifazana. 
Exodus19:16 Kwasekusithi ngosuku lwesithathu sekusile, kwakulemidumo lemibane leyezi elinzima phezu kwentaba, lelizwi lophondo olulamandla amakhulu; kwaze kwathi bonke abantu ababesenkambeni bathuthumela." 
Exodus19:17 UMozisi wasebakhupha abantu enkambeni ukuyamhlangabeza uNkulunkulu; basebesima ngaphansi kwentaba. 
Exodus19:18 Intaba yonke-ke yeSinayi yathunqa intuthu, ngoba i Nkosi yehlela phezu kwayo ngomlilo; njalo intuthu yayo yenyuka njengentuthu yesithando somlilo; intaba yonke yasizamazama kakhulu." 
Exodus19:19 Kwathi ilizwi lophondo liqhubeka lisiba lamandla amakhulu, uMozisi wakhuluma; njalo uNkulunkulu wamphendula ngelizwi." 
Exodus19:20 I Nkosi yasisehlela entabeni yeSinayi, engqongeni yentaba; i Nkosi yambizela uMozisi engqongeni yentaba; uMozisi wenyuka-ke." 
Exodus19:21 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Yehla, ubaxwayise abantu hlezi bafohlele e Nkosi ni ukubona, njalo abanengi babo bawe." 
Exodus19:22 Labapristi labo abasondela e Nkosi ni kabazingcwelise hlezi i Nkosi ibadumele. 
Exodus19:23 UMozisi wasesithi e Nkosi ni: Abantu bangenyukele entabeni yeSinayi, ngoba wena usixwayisile usithi: Misa umngcele wentaba, uyingcwelise." 
Exodus19:24 I Nkosi yasisithi kuye: Hamba wehle, ubuye wenyuke, wena loAroni elawe; kodwa abapristi labantu kabangafohli benyukele e Nkosi ni, hlezi ibadumele." 
Exodus19:25 UMozisi wasesehlela ebantwini, wabatshela." 
Exodus20:1 UNkulunkulu wasekhuluma wonke lamazwi esithi: 
Exodus20:2 Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho eyakukhupha elizweni leGibhithe, endlini yobugqili." 
Exodus20:3 Ungabi labanye onkulunkulu phambi kwami. 
Exodus20:4 Ungazenzeli isithombe esibaziweyo loba yiwuphi umfanekiso wokusemazulwini phezulu, loba wokusemhlabeni phansi, loba wokusemanzini ngaphansi komhlaba;" 
Exodus20:5 ungakukhothameli, ungakukhonzi; ngoba mina i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, nginguNkulunkulu olobukhwele, ngiphindisela ububi baboyise phezu kwabantwana, kuze kube se sizukulwane ni sesithathu lesesine sabangizondayo," 
Exodus20:6 kodwa ngibenzela umusa abayizinkulungwane zabangithandayo lezabagcina imilayo yami. 
Exodus20:7 Ungaliphathi ngeze ibizo le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho; ngoba i Nkosi kayiyikumyekela engelacala ophatha ibizo layo ngeze. 
Exodus20:8 Khumbula usuku lwesabatha, ukulugcina lube ngcwele." 
Exodus20:9 Insuku eziyisithupha uzasebenza, uwenze wonke umsebenzi wakho;" 
Exodus20:10 kodwa usuku lwesikhombisa lulisabatha le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho; ungenzi loba yiwuphi umsebenzi ngalo, wena lendodana yakho lendodakazi yakho, inceku yakho lencekukazi yakho lezifuyo zakho lowemzini wakho ophakathi kwamasango akho." 
Exodus20:11 Ngoba ngensuku eziyisithupha i Nkosi yenza amazulu lomhlaba lolwandle lakho konke okukukho, yasiphumula ngosuku lwesikhombisa; ngalokhu i Nkosi yalubusisa usuku lwesabatha, yalungcwelisa." 
Exodus20:12 Hlonipha uyihlo lonyoko, ukuze insuku zakho zelulwe elizweni i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ekunika lona." 
Exodus20:13 Ungabulali. 
Exodus20:14 Ungafebi. 
Exodus20:15 Ungebi. 
Exodus20:16 Unganiki ubufakazi bamanga ngomakhelwane wakho. 
Exodus20:17 Ungafisi indlu kamakhelwane wakho, ungafisi umkamakhelwane wakho, lenceku yakhe, lencekukazi yakhe, lenkabi yakhe, lobabhemi wakhe, njalo loba yini ekamakhelwane wakho." 
Exodus20:18 Bonke abantu basebebona imidumo lemibane lelizwi lophondo, lentaba ithunqa. Kwathi abantu bekubona bathuthumela, bema khatshana;" 
Exodus20:19 bathi kuMozisi: Khuluma wena lathi, njalo sizakuzwa; kodwa uNkulunkulu kangakhulumi lathi hlezi sife." 
Exodus20:20 UMozisi wasesithi ebantwini: Lingesabi; ngoba uNkulunkulu ufikile ukuze alilinge, lokuze ukwesabeka kwakhe kube phambi kwenu, ukuze lingoni." 
Exodus20:21 Abantu bema-ke khatshana; kodwa uMozisi wasondela emnyameni onzima lapho uNkulunkulu ayekhona. 
Exodus20:22 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Uzakutsho njalo kubantwana bakoIsrayeli uthi: Lina selibonile ukuthi ngikhulume lani ngisemazulwin i. 
Exodus20:23 Kaliyikwenza kanye lami onkulunkulu besiliva, njalo onkulunkulu begolide kaliyikuzenzela." 
Exodus20:24 Ngenzela ilathi lenhlabathi, unikele phezu kwalo iminikelo yakho yokutshiswa leminikelo yakho yokuthula, izimvu zakho lenkabi zakho. Kuyo yonke indawo lapho engilenza ibizo lami ukuthi likhunjulwe khona ngizakuza kuwe ngikubusise." 
Exodus20:25 Kodwa uba ungenzela ilathi lamatshe, awuyikulakha ngamatshe abaziweyo; ngoba nxa uphakamisela kulo insimbi yakho yokubaza, uyalingcolisa." 
Exodus20:26 Awuyikukhwela phezu kwelathi lami ngezikhwelo, ukuze ubunqunu bakho bungembulwa phezu kwalo." 
Exodus21:1 Le yimithetho ozayibeka-ke phambi kwabo. 
Exodus21:2 Uba uthenga isigqili esingumHebheru, sizasebenza iminyaka eyisithupha, kodwa ngowesikhombisa sizaphuma sikhululekile ngesihle." 
Exodus21:3 Uba safika sisodwa, sizaphuma sisodwa; uba sithethe, umkaso uzaphuma laso." 
Exodus21:4 Uba inkosi yaso yasinika umfazi, esizalele amadodana kumbe amadodakazi, umfazi labantwana bakhe bazakuba ngabenkosi yakhe, njalo sizaphuma sisodwa." 
Exodus21:5 Kodwa uba isigqili sisitsho lokutsho ukuthi: Ngiyayithanda inkosi yami, umkami labantwana bami, kangiyikuphuma ngikhululekile;" 
Exodus21:6 inkosi yaso izasiletha kubahlulel i, ibisisiletha emnyango loba emgubazini, njalo inkosi yaso izabhoboza indlebe yaso ngosungulo, siyisebenzele-ke kuze kube nininini." 
Exodus21:7 Njalo uba umuntu ethengisa indodakazi yakhe ukuze ibe yisigqilikazi, kayiyikuphuma njengalokhu izigqili ziphuma." 
Exodus21:8 Uba singayithokozisi inkosi yaso ezimisele sona, izasenza sihlengwe; kayiyikuba lamandla okusithengisa esizweni semzini, njengoba esiphethe ngenkohliso." 
Exodus21:9 Kodwa uba esimisela indodana yayo, izakwenza kuso njengelungelo lamadodakazi." 
Exodus21:10 Uba ezithathela omunye, ukudla kwaso, isigubuzelo saso lokuhlala kwaso ndawonye kayiyikukunciphisa." 
Exodus21:11 Kodwa uba ingasenzeli lezizinto ezintathu, sizaphuma ngesihle ngaphandle kwemali." 
Exodus21:12 Otshaya umuntu aze afe, uzabulawa lokubulawa." 
Exodus21:13 Kodwa uba ebenga m cathamelanga, kodwa uNkulunkulu ekwenze wahlangana lesandla sakhe, ngizakumisela indawo ukuthi abalekele kuyo." 
Exodus21:14 Kodwa uba umuntu esukela umakhelwane wakhe ambulale ngobuqili, uzamsusa elathini lami ukuze afe." 
Exodus21:15 Otshaya uyise kumbe unina, uzabulawa lokubulawa." 
Exodus21:16 Loweba umuntu, amthengise, loba eficwa esandleni sakhe, uzabulawa lokubulawa." 
Exodus21:17 Othuka uyise kumbe unina, uzabulawa lokubulawa." 
Exodus21:18 Njalo nxa amadoda esilwa, enye itshaye enye ngelitshe kumbe ngenqindi, kodwa ingafi kodwa ilale embhedeni," 
Exodus21:19 uba ilulama itotobe phandle ngodondolo lwayo, leyo e yi tshayileyo izakhululwa. Kodwa izahlawulela isikhathi sokungasebenzi kwayo, izayelaphisa lokuyelaphisa." 
Exodus21:20 Uba-ke umuntu etshaya isigqili sakhe kumbe isigqilikazi sakhe ngenduku size sife ngaphansi kwesandla sakhe, sizaphindiselwa lokuphindiselwa." 
Exodus21:21 Kanti nxa silulama usuku kumbe insuku ezimbili, kayikuphindiselwa, ngoba siyimali yakhe." 
Exodus21:22 Njalo nxa amadoda esilwa, atshaye owesifazana okhulelweyo aze aphume umntwana wakhe, kodwa kungelangozi yokufa, izahlawuliswa lokuhlawuliswa, njengokubeka kwendoda yomfazi phezu kwayo, izahlawula njengokumiswe ngabahluleli." 
Exodus21:23 Kodwa uba kulengozi yokufa, uzanika umphefumulo ngomphefumulo," 
Exodus21:24 ilihlo ngelihlo, izinyo ngezinyo, isandla ngesandla, unyawo ngonyawo," 
Exodus21:25 ukutshiswa ngokutshiswa, inxeba ngenxeba, umvimvinya ngomvimvinya." 
Exodus21:26 Uba-ke umuntu etshaya ilihlo lesigqili sakhe kumbe ilihlo lesigqilikazi sakhe alibulale, uzasiyekela sihambe sikhululekile ngenxa yelihlo laso." 
Exodus21:27 Uba-ke etshaya izinyo lesigqili kumbe izinyo lesigqilikazi likhumuke, uzasiyekela sihambe sikhululekile ngenxa yezinyo laso." 
Exodus21:28 Njalo uba inkabi ihlaba owesilisa kumbe owesifazana abesesifa, inkabi izakhandwa lokukhandwa ngamatshe, lenyama yayo ingadliwa; kodwa umnininkabi uzayekelwa." 
Exodus21:29 Kodwa uba inkabi ibijwayele ukuhlaba mandulo, njalo kufakaziwe kumniniyo, kodwa engayilondolozanga, ibisibulala owesilisa kumbe owesifazana, leyonkabi izakhandwa ngamatshe, lomniniyo laye abulawe." 
Exodus21:30 Uba inhlawulo ibekwa phezu kwakhe, uzanika imbadalo yokuhlengwa komphefumulo wakhe, njengakho konke okubekwe phezu kwakhe." 
Exodus21:31 Loba ihlaba indodana kumbe ihlaba indodakazi, kuzakwenziwa kuye njengomthetho lo." 
Exodus21:32 Nxa inkabi ihlaba inceku kumbe incekukazi, uzanika amashekeli* esiliva angamatshumi amathathu enkosini yayo, lenkabi ikhandwe ngamatshe." 
Exodus21:33 Njalo uba umuntu evula umgodi, loba uba umuntu egebha umgodi angawusibekeli, kuwele kuwo inkabi kumbe ubabhemi," 
Exodus21:34 umninimgodi uzahlawula, abuyisele imali kumniniyo, kodwa efileyo izakuba ngeyakhe." 
Exodus21:35 Njalo uba inkabi yomuntu ilimaza inkabi yomakhelwane wakhe ize ife, bazathengisa inkabi ephilayo, behlukaniselane imali yayo, behlukaniselane efileyo futhi." 
Exodus21:36 Kumbe uba kusaziwa ukuthi inkabi ibijwayele ukuhlaba mandulo, kodwa umniniyo engayilondolozanga, uzabhadala lokubhadala inkabi ngenkabi, kodwa efileyo izakuba ngeyakhe." 
Exodus22:1 Uba umuntu eseba inkabi loba imvu, ayihlabe kumbe ayithengise, uzahlawula inkabi ezinhlanu ngenkabi, lezimvu ezine ngemvu." 
Exodus22:2 Uba isela lificwa lifohlela, litshaywe lize life, kakulacala legazi kuye." 
Exodus22:3 Uba ilanga seliphumile phezu kwalo, ulecala legazi. Lifanele ukubhadala lokubhadala; uba lingelalutho, limele lithengiswe ngenxa yokweba kwalo." 
Exodus22:4 Uba okwebiweyo kuficwa lokuficwa esandleni salo kuphila, loba inkabi loba ubabhemi kumbe imvu, lizabuyisela kuphindwe kabili." 
Exodus22:5 Nxa umuntu edlisa insimu kumbe isivini, angenise izifuyo zakhe zidle ensimini yomunye, uzabuyisela ngokuhle kwensimu yakhe langokuhle kwesivini sakhe." 
Exodus22:6 Uba kuqhamuka umlilo, ulumathe emeveni kuze kutshe inqumbi yamabele loba amabele amileyo loba insimu, othungele umlilo uzahlawula lokuhlawula." 
Exodus22:7 Uba umuntu enika umakhelwane wakhe imali loba impahla ukuze akulondoloze, njalo kwebiwe endlini yalowomuntu, uba isela litholwa lizabuyisela kuphindwe kabili." 
Exodus22:8 Uba isela lingatholwa, umninindlu uzasondezwa kubahluleli ukuthi kafakanga yini isandla sakhe empahleni yomakhelwane wakhe." 
Exodus22:9 Ngalo lonke udaba lwecala, ngenkabi, ngobabhemi, ngemvu, ngesembatho, ngakho konke okulahlekileyo, umuntu atsho ngakho ukuthi ngokwakhe, udaba lwabo bobabili luzakuza kubahluleli; lowo abahluleli abamlahlayo uzabuyisela kuphindwe kabili kumakhelwane wakhe." 
Exodus22:10 Uba umuntu enikela kumakhelwane wakhe ubabhemi loba inkabi loba imvu kumbe isifuyo nje ukuthi akulondoloze, besekusifa loba kulimala kumbe kuthunjwe, kungelamuntu obonayo," 
Exodus22:11 isifungo se Nkosi sizakuba phakathi kwabo bobabili, ukuthi kelulanga isandla empahleni kamakhelwane wakhe; njalo umniniyo uza s emukela, kayikubuyisela." 
Exodus22:12 Kodwa uba yebiwe lokwebiwa kuye, uzamhlawula umniniyo." 
Exodus22:13 Uba idatshuliwe lokudatshulwa, kayilethe ibe yibufakazi, kayikubuyisela edatshuliweyo." 
Exodus22:14 Uba-ke umuntu eseboleka ulutho kumakhelwane wakhe, beselulimala loba lusifa umninilo engelalo, uzahlawula lokuhlawula." 
Exodus22:15 Uba umninilo elalo, kayikuhlawula; uba beluqatshiwe, lulande ukuqatshwa kwalo." 
Exodus22:16 Uba-ke indoda iyenga intombi emsulwa engakhombanga, ilale layo, izayilobola lokuyilobola ibe ngumkayo." 
Exodus22:17 Uba uyise esala lokwala ukumnika yona, uzabhadala imali njengelobolo lezintombi ezigcweleyo." 
Exodus22:18 Lingayekeli umthakathikazi ukuthi aphile. 
Exodus22:19 Wonke olala lenyamazana uzabulawa lokubulawa. 
Exodus22:20 Ohlabela onkulunkulu ngaphandle kwe Nkosi kuphela uzatshabalaliswa. 
Exodus22:21 Njalo ungamcindezeli owezizwe, ungamhluphi, ngoba lalingabezizwe elizweni leGibhithe." 
Exodus22:22 Lingacindezeli lawuphi umfelokazi kumbe intandane. 
Exodus22:23 Uba ubacindezela lokubacindezela, yebo, uba bekhala lokukhala kimi, ngizakuzwa lokuzwa ukukhala kwabo," 
Exodus22:24 ulaka lwami luzavutha, ngilibulale ngenkemba, labomkenu babe ngabafelokazi labantwana benu intandane." 
Exodus22:25 Uba useboleka abantu bami imali abangabayanga abalawe, ungaziphathi njengombolekisi kubo, ungabeki inzalo phezu kwabo." 
Exodus22:26 Uba uthatha lokuthatha isembatho sikamakhelwane wakho sibe yisibambiso, sibuyisele kuye lingakatshoni ilanga;" 
Exodus22:27 ngoba siyisigubuzelo sakhe sodwa, siyisembatho sakhe esikhumbeni sakhe; uzalala phakathi kwani? Kuzakuthi-ke lapho ekhala kimi, ngizamuzwa, ngoba ngilomusa." 
Exodus22:28 Lingathuki onkulunkulu, lingaqalekisi induna yabantu bakini." 
Exodus22:29 Lingaphuzisi isivuno senu esigcweleyo lomhluzi wenu wezithelo. Uzangipha izibulo emadodaneni akho. 
Exodus22:30 Wenze njalo ngenkabi yakho la ngemvu yakho; kuzakuba lonina insuku eziyisikhombisa; ngosuku lwesificaminwembili unginike khona. 
Exodus22:31 Lizakuba ngabantu abangcwele kimi; ngakho lingadli inyama edatshulwe egangeni yizilo, iphoseleni inja." 
Exodus23:1 Ungawuphathi umbiko wamanga, ungafaki isandla sakho lomubi ukuze ube ngumfakazi wobubi." 
Exodus23:2 Ungalandeli abanengi ngezinto ezimbi, ungafakazi ecaleni ukuze weyamele kwabanengi uliphambule." 
Exodus23:3 Lomyanga ungamzweli ecaleni lakhe. 
Exodus23:4 Uba uhlangana lenkabi yesitha sakho loba ubabhemi waso kuduha, uzakubuyisela lokukubuyisela kuso." 
Exodus23:5 Uba ubona ubabhemi walowo okuzondayo elele ngaphansi komthwalo wakhe, uyekele ukumkhulula, uzamkhulula lokumkhulula laye." 
Exodus23:6 Kawuyikuphambula ukwahlulelwa komyanga wakho ecaleni lakhe. 
Exodus23:7 Bana khatshana lendaba yamanga, ungabulali ongelacala lolungileyo, ngoba kangiyikumlungisisa okhohlakeleyo." 
Exodus23:8 Njalo kawuyikwemukela isivalamlomo, ngoba isivalamlomo siphumputhekisa ababonayo, sonakalise amazwi abalungileyo." 
Exodus23:9 Futhi kawuyikumcindezela owezizwe; ngoba lina liyayazi imizwa yowezizwe, ngoba lalingabezizwe elizweni leGibhithe." 
Exodus23:10 Njalo iminyaka eyisithupha uzahlanyela isiqinti sakho, ubuthe isivuno saso." 
Exodus23:11 Kodwa ngowesikhombisa uzasilalukisa sibe lifusi, ukuze abayanga besizwe sakho badle, lalokho okuseleyo inyamazana zeganga zikudle. Wenze njalo ngesivini sakho lemihlwathi yakho." 
Exodus23:12 Insuku eziyisithupha uzakwenza umsebenzi wakho, njalo ngosuku lwesikhombisa uphumule, ukuze kuphumule inkabi yakho labobabhemi bakho, kuvuselele-ke indodana yencekukazi yakho lowezizweni." 
Exodus23:13 Lezintweni zonke esengizitshilo kini qaphelani, lebizo labanye onkulunkulu lingaliphathi, kaliyikuzwakala emlonyeni wakho." 
Exodus23:14 Kathathu ngomnyaka uzangigcinela umkhosi. 
Exodus23:15 Umkhosi wesinkwa esingelamvubelo uzawugcina, insuku eziyisikhombisa udle isinkwa esingelamvubelo njengokukulaya kwami, ngesikhathi esimisiweyo senyanga kaAbhibhi; ngoba kuyo waphuma eGibhithe; kabayikubonakala phambi kwami bengaphethe lutho." 
Exodus23:16 Lomkhosi wesivuno, izithelo zokuqala zomsebenzi wakho, owuhlanyeleyo ensimini; lomkhosi wokubutha ekupheleni komnyaka, lapho usubuthile umsebenzi wakho ensimini." 
Exodus23:17 Kathathu ngomnyaka bonke abesilisa bakho bazabonakala phambi kweNkosi uJehova. 
Exodus23:18 Kawuyikunikela igazi lomhlatshelo wami kanye lesinkwa esilemvubelo. Lamafutha omkhosi wami angalali kuze kuse. 
Exodus23:19 Ikhethelo lezithelo zokuqala zensimu yakho uzaliletha endlini ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho. Ungapheki izinyane echagweni lukanina. 
Exodus23:20 Khangela, ngithuma ingilosi phambi kwakho ukuze ikulondoloze endleleni, ikuse endaweni engiyilungisileyo." 
Exodus23:21 Uqaphele phambi kwayo, ulalele ilizwi layo; ungayicunuli, ngoba kayiyikuthethelela iziphambeko zenu; ngoba ibizo lami liphakathi kwayo." 
Exodus23:22 Kodwa uba ulalela lokulalela ilizwi layo, wenze konke engikutshoyo, sengizakuba yisitha sezitha zakho, ngiphambane labaphambana lawe." 
Exodus23:23 Ngoba ingilosi yami izahamba phambi kwakho, ikungenise kumaAmori lamaHethi lamaPerizi lamaKhanani lamaHivi lamaJebusi. Njalo ngizababhubhisa." 
Exodus23:24 Ungakhothameli onkulunkulu babo, ungabakhonzi, ungenzi njengemisebenzi yabo; kodwa ubachithe lokubachitha, ubhidlize lokubhidliza izinsika zabo eziyizithombe." 
Exodus23:25 Lizakhonza-ke i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu; njalo izabusisa ukudla kwakho lamanzi akho, njalo ngisuse isifo phakathi kwakho." 
Exodus23:26 Kakuyikuba khona okuphunzayo lokuyinyumba elizweni lakho. Ngizaphelelisa inani lensuku zakho. 
Exodus23:27 Ngizathumela ukwesabeka kwami phambi kwakho, ngiphambanise bonke abantu ozafika kubo, ngenze izitha zakho zonke zikunike isiphundu." 
Exodus23:28 Ngizathumela olonyovu phambi kwakho abazaxotsha amaHivi, amaKhanani lamaHethi phambi kwakho." 
Exodus23:29 Kangiyikubaxotsha phambi kwakho ngomnyaka owodwa, hlezi ilizwe libe ngamanxiwa, lenyamazana zeganga zikwandele." 
Exodus23:30 Ngizabaxotsha phambi kwakho kancinyane kancinyane, uze wande, udle ilifa lelizwe." 
Exodus23:31 Njalo ngizamisa imingcele yakho kusukela eLwandle oluBomvu kuze kufike elwandle lwamaFilisti, njalo kusukela enkangala kuze kufike emfuleni; ngoba ngizanikela esandleni sakho abakhileyo belizwe; uzabaxotsha phambi kwakho." 
Exodus23:32 Ungenzi isivumelwano labo labonkulunkulu babo. 
Exodus23:33 Kabayikuhlala elizweni lakho, hlezi bakwenze ukuthi wone kimi; uba ukhonza onkulunkulu babo, ngeqiniso kuzakuba yisifu kuwe." 
Exodus24:1 Yasisithi kuMozisi: Yenyukela e Nkosi ni, wena loAroni, uNadabi loAbihu, labangamatshumi ayisikhombisa kubadala bakoIsrayeli, likhonze likhatshana." 
Exodus24:2 Njalo uMozisi yedwa uzasondela eNkosini, kodwa bona kabayikusondela; labantu kabayikwenyuka laye." 
Exodus24:3 UMozisi wasesiza wabatshela abantu wonke amazwi e Nkosi lokwahlulela konke; bonke abantu baphendula ngalizwi linye bathi: Wonke amazwi e Nkosi ewakhulumileyo sizawenza. 
Exodus24:4 UMozisi wasebhala wonke amazwi e Nkosi. Wavuka ekuseni kakhulu, wakha ilathi phansi kwentaba, lensika ezilitshumi lambili, ngokwezizwe ezilitshumi lambili zakoIsrayeli." 
Exodus24:5 Wathuma amajaha abantwana bakoIsrayeli, anikela iminikelo yokutshiswa, ahlabela i Nkosi iminikelo yokuthula yamajongosi." 
Exodus24:6 UMozisi wasethatha ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yegazi, wayifaka emiganwini; lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yegazi wayifafaza phezu kwelathi." 
Exodus24:7 Wasethatha incwadi yesivumelwano, wayibala ezindlebeni zabantu. Basebesithi: Konke i Nkosi ekutshiloyo sizakwenza silalele." 
Exodus24:8 UMozisi wasethatha igazi, walifafaza phezu kwabantu, wathi: Khangelani igazi lesivumelwano i Nkosi esenze lani mayelana lawo wonke lamazwi." 
Exodus24:9 Basebesenyuka oMozisi loAroni, uNadabi loAbihu, labangamatshumi ayisikhombisa kubadala bakoIsrayeli," 
Exodus24:10 basebebona uNkulunkulu wakoIsrayeli, langaphansi kwenyawo zakhe kwakukhona oku njengomsebenzi wamasafire* agandelweyo, lanjengamazulu uqobo ngokucwengeka." 
Exodus24:11 Kodwa kaselulanga isandla sakhe kuzo iziphathamandla zabantwana bakoIsrayeli. Sebembonile-ke uNkulunkulu badla banatha. 
Exodus24:12 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Yenyukela kimi entabeni, ube khona; njalo ngizakunika izibhebhe zamatshe lomlayo lemithetho, engikubhalileyo ukubafundisa." 
Exodus24:13 Wasukuma-ke uMozisi, lenceku yakhe uJoshuwa; uMozisi wasesenyukela entabeni kaNkulunkulu." 
Exodus24:14 Wasesithi ebadaleni: Silindeleni lapha size sibuye kini; khangelani-ke uAroni loHuri balani; olezindaba kasondele kubo. 
Exodus24:15 UMozisi wasesenyukela entabeni, leyezi lasibekela intaba." 
Exodus24:16 Njalo inkazimulo ye Nkosi yahlala entabeni yeSinayi; leyezi layisibekela insuku eziyisithupha; yasimbiza uMozisi ngosuku lwesikhombisa iphakathi kweyezi. 
Exodus24:17 Njalo ukubonakala kwenkazimulo ye Nkosi kwakunjengomlilo oqothulayo, engqongeni yentaba, emehlweni abantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Exodus24:18 UMozisi wasengena phakathi kweyezi, wenyukela entabeni; njalo uMozisi waba sentabeni insuku ezingamatshumi amane lobusuku obungamatshumi amane." 
Exodus25:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Exodus25:2 Khuluma kubantwana bakoIsrayeli ukuthi bangithathele umnikelo; uzathatha umnikelo wami kuye wonke umuntu, onhliziyo yakhe imenza avume." 
Exodus25:3 Njalo yilo umnikelo ozawuthatha kubo: Igolide, lesiliva, lethusi," 
Exodus25:4 lokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, lokuyibubende, lokubomvu, lelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, lo boya bembuzi," 
Exodus25:5 lezikhumba eziphendulwe zababomvu zezinqama, lezikhumba zikamantswane, lesihlahla sesinga," 
Exodus25:6 amafutha esibane, amakha amafutha okugcoba, lawempepha ethunqayo elephunga elimnandi," 
Exodus25:7 amatshe athiwa ngama-onikse*, lamatshe okubekwa e-efodini* lesembathweni sesifuba." 
Exodus25:8 Njalo kabangenzele indlu engcwele ukuze ngihlale phakathi kwabo. 
Exodus25:9 Njengakho konke engizakutshengisa khona, isibonelo sethabhanekele, lesibonelo sempahla yalo yonke, lenze njalo-ke." 
Exodus25:10 Njalo bazakwenza umtshokotsho ngesihlahla sesinga; ubude bawo bube zingalo ezimbili lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili, lobubanzi bawo yingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili, lokuphakama kwawo yingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili." 
Exodus25:11 Uwuhuqe-ke ngegolide elicwengekileyo, uwuhuqe ngaphakathi langaphandle, wenze phezu kwawo umqolo wegolide inhlangothi zonke." 
Exodus25:12 Uwubumbele ngokuncibilikisa futhi amasongo amane egolide, uwafake emagumbini omane awo, ukuze amasongo amabili abe kolunye uhlangothi lwawo, lamasongo amabili abe kolunye uhlangothi lwawo." 
Exodus25:13 Njalo uzakwenza imijabo ngesihlahla sesinga, uyihuqe ngegolide," 
Exodus25:14 uyifake imijabo emasongweni enhlangothini zomtshokotsho, ukuthwala umtshokotsho ngayo." 
Exodus25:15 Imijabo izakuba semasongweni omtshokotsho, ayiyikukhutshwa kuwo." 
Exodus25:16 Ubusufaka emtshokotshweni ubufakazi engizakunika bona. 
Exodus25:17 Njalo uzakwenza isihlalo somusa ngegolide elicwengekileyo, ubude baso bube zingalo ezimbili lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili, ububanzi baso yingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili." 
Exodus25:18 Ubususenza amakherubi* amabili ngegolide, uzawenza ngomsebenzi okhandiweyo, avele emaphethelweni womabili esihlalo somusa." 
Exodus25:19 Wenze elinye ikherubhi livele ephethelweni lwaloluhlangothi, lelinye ikherubhi livele ephethelweni lolunye uhlangothi, uzakwenza amakherubi evela esihlalweni somusa emaphethelweni womabili aso." 
Exodus25:20 Lamakherubi azakwelula impiko zawo ngaphezulu, ambomboze isihlalo somusa ngempiko zawo, lobuso bawo bukhangelane; ubuso bamakherubi buzakhangela isihlalo somusa." 
Exodus25:21 Njalo uzasibeka isihlalo somusa ngaphezulu, phezu komtshokotsho, ufake emtshokotshweni ubufakazi engizakunika bona." 
Exodus25:22 Ngizahlangana-ke lawe lapho, ngikhulume lawe ngingaphezu kwesihlalo somusa, ngiphakathi kwamakherubi amabili aphezu komtshokotsho wobufakazi, konke engizakulaya khona kubantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Exodus25:23 Uzakwenza futhi itafula ngesihlahla sesinga; ubude balo bube zingalo ezimbili, lobubanzi balo yingalo, lokuphakama kwalo yingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili." 
Exodus25:24 Uzalihuqa-ke ngegolide elicwengekileyo, wenze kulo umqolo wegolide inhlangothi zonke." 
Exodus25:25 Uzakwenza kulo inhlangothi zonke ibhanti elingangobubanzi besandla, ulenzele ibhanti lalo umqolo wegolide inhlangothi zonke." 
Exodus25:26 Ulenzele futhi amasongo amane egolide, uwafake amasongo emagunjini amane asenyaweni zalo zozine." 
Exodus25:27 Amasongo azakuba ngasebhantini ukuze abe zindawo zemijabo, ukuthwala itafula." 
Exodus25:28 Njalo uzakwenza imijabo ngesihlahla sesinga, uyihuqe ngegolide, ukuze itafula lithwalwe ngayo;" 
Exodus25:29 wenze futhi imiganu yalo lenkezo zalo lezitsha zalo lenditshi zalo abathela ngazo, uzenze ngegolide elicwengekileyo." 
Exodus25:30 Uzabeka-ke etafuleni izinkwa zokubukiswa phambi kwami njalonjalo. 
Exodus25:31 Uzakwenza njalo uluthi lwesibane ngegolide elicwengekileyo; uluthi lwesibane luzakwenziwa ngomsebenzi okhandiweyo, isidindi salo, lezinti zalo, imbizana zalo, induku zalo, lamaluba alo, kuvele kulo." 
Exodus25:32 Njalo izinti eziyisithupha zizaphuma enhlangothini zalo; izinti ezintathu zoluthi lwesibane kolunye uhlangothi, lezinti ezintathu zoluthi lwesibane kolunye uhlangothi." 
Exodus25:33 Imbizana ezintathu ezenziwe zafanana lamaluba esihlahla se-alimondi* kolunye uluthi, isiduku leluba; lembizana ezintathu ezenziwe zafanana lamaluba esihlahla se-alimondi kolunye uluthi, isiduku leluba; kube njalo ezintini eziyisithupha eziphuma oluthini lwesibane." 
Exodus25:34 Oluthini lwesibane kube khona imbizana ezine ezenziwe zafanana lamaluba esihlahla se-alimondi*, iziduku zalo lamaluba alo;" 
Exodus25:35 kube lesiduku ngaphansi kwezinti ezimbili ezivela kulo, lesiduku ngaphansi kwezinti ezimbili ezivela kulo, futhi isiduku ngaphansi kwezinti ezimbili ezivela kulo, njengezinti eziyisithupha eziphuma oluthini lwesibane." 
Exodus25:36 Iziduku zazo lezinti zazo zizavela kulo, lonke lube ngumsebenzi munye okhandiweyo wegolide elicwengekileyo." 
Exodus25:37 Uzakwenza futhi izibane zalo eziyisikhombisa, njalo bazalumathisa izibane zalo, bazazenza zikhanyise ehlangothini oluphambi kwalo." 
Exodus25:38 Njalo indlawu zalo lemiganu yalo yomlotha kuzakuba ligolide elicwengekileyo. 
Exodus25:39 Kalwenziwe ngethalenta* legolide elicwengekileyo, kanye lazo zonke lezizinto." 
Exodus25:40 Nanzelela-ke ukuthi uzenze njengomfanekiso wazo, owatshengiswa wona entabeni." 
Exodus26:1 Uzakwenza-ke ithabhanekele ngamakhetheni alitshumi elembu elicolekileyo elenziwe ngentambo ephothiweyo lokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu, ngamakherubi*; uzawenza enziwe ngumuntu oyingcitshi." 
Exodus26:2 Ubude bekhetheni elilodwa bube zingalo ezingamatshumi amabili lesificaminwembili, lobubanzi bekhetheni elilodwa zingalo ezine; wonke amakhetheni alingane." 
Exodus26:3 Amakhetheni amahlanu azahlanganiswa, elinye lelinye; lamakhetheni amahlanu azahlanganiswa, elinye lelinye." 
Exodus26:4 Uzakwenza-ke izihitshela ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka emphethweni welinye ikhetheni, ekucineni kwenhlangano, njalo ngokufananayo wenze emphethweni wekhetheni ekucineni, kunhlangano yesibili." 
Exodus26:5 Wenze izihitshela ezingamatshumi amahlanu kwelinye ikhetheni, lezihitshela ezingamatshumi amahlanu uzazenza emphethweni wekhetheni elikunhlangano yeyesibili; izihitshela zikhangelane." 
Exodus26:6 Njalo wenze ingwegwe zegolide ezingamatshumi amahlanu, uhlanganise amakhetheni elinye lelinye ngengwegwe, ukuze kube lethabhanekele elilodwa." 
Exodus26:7 Wenze futhi amakhetheni ngoboya bembuzi abe lithente phezu kwethabhanekele; uzalenza ngamakhetheni alitshumi lanye. 
Exodus26:8 Ubude bekhetheni elilodwa zingalo ezingamatshumi amathathu, lobubanzi bekhetheni elilodwa zingalo ezine; amakhetheni alitshumi lanye alingane." 
Exodus26:9 Njalo uzahlanganisa amakhetheni amahlanu abe wodwa, lamakhetheni ayisithupha abe wodwa; lekhetheni lesithupha uzalipheqa phambi kwethente ngaphambili." 
Exodus26:10 Wenze-ke izihitshela ezingamatshumi amahlanu emphethweni wekhetheni, ekucineni kwenhlangano, lezihitshela ezingamatshumi amahlanu emphethweni wekhetheni elihlanganisa elesibili." 
Exodus26:11 Wenze futhi ingwegwe zethusi ezingamatshumi amahlanu, uzifake ingwegwe ezihitsheleni, uhlanganise ithente libe linye." 
Exodus26:12 Njalo okuseleyo okwedluleleyo kwamakhetheni ethente, ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yekhetheni eseleyo, izalengela ehlangothini olungemuva kwethabhanekele." 
Exodus26:13 Njalo ingalo ngapha lengalo langapha kulokho okuseleyo ebudeni bamakhetheni ethente, izalengela emaceleni ethabhanekele ngapha langapha ukulisibekela." 
Exodus26:14 Uzalenzela ithente isembeso sezikhumba eziphendulwe zababomvu zezinqama, lesembeso sezikhumba zikamantswane phezulu." 
Exodus26:15 Njalo uzakwenza amapulanka ethabhanekele ngesihlahla sesinga, ame," 
Exodus26:16 ubude bamapulanka buzakuba zingalo ezilitshumi, lobubanzi bepulanka linye bube yingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yengalo." 
Exodus26:17 Ipulanka elilodwa lizakuba lemisuka emibili, ihlanganisiwe omunye komunye; wenze njalo kuwo wonke amapulanka ethabhanekeleni." 
Exodus26:18 Uzalenzela-ke ithabhanekele amapulanka, amapulanka angamatshumi amabili ehlangothini lweningizimu olukhangele eningizimu;" 
Exodus26:19 wenze njalo izisekelo ezingamatshumi amane zesiliva ngaphansi kwamapulanka angamatshumi amabili, izisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwepulanka linye zibe ngezemisuka yalo yomibili, lezisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwelinye ipulanka zibe ngezemisuka yalo yomibili," 
Exodus26:20 njalo amapulanka angamatshumi amabili ehlangothini lwesibili lwethabhanekele, uhlangothi lwenyakatho," 
Exodus26:21 lezisekelo zawo ezingamatshumi amane zesiliva, izisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwepulanka linye lezisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwelinye ipulanka." 
Exodus26:22 Njalo wenze amapulanka ayisithupha ehlangothini olungemuva kwethabhanekele ngentshonalanga," 
Exodus26:23 njalo uzakwenza lamapulanka amabili awengonsi zethabhanekele ehlangothini olungemuva," 
Exodus26:24 njalo abe mabili ngaphansi, azaphelela langaphezulu ndawonye, esongweni elilodwa; kuzakuba njalo ngawo womabili, abe ngawengonsi zombili." 
Exodus26:25 Njalo azakuba ngamapulanka ayisificaminwembili, lezisekelo zawo zesiliva, izisekelo ezilitshumi lesithupha, izisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwepulanka elinye, lezisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwelinye ipulanka." 
Exodus26:26 Uzakwenza njalo imithando ngesihlahla sesinga, emihlanu ibe ngeyamapulanka akolunye uhlangothi lwethabhanekele," 
Exodus26:27 lemithando emihlanu ibe ngeyamapulanka akolunye uhlangothi lwethabhanekele, lemithando emihlanu ibe ngeyamapulanka ehlangothini lwethabhanekele, ehlangothini olusemuva ngentshonalanga;" 
Exodus26:28 lomthando waphakathi, phakathi kwamapulanka, uzadabula kusukela ekucineni kusiya ekucineni." 
Exodus26:29 Njalo uzawahuqa amapulanka ngegolide, uwenze amasongo awo ngegolide, abe zindawo zemithando; uyihuqe imithando ngegolide." 
Exodus26:30 Uzalimisa-ke ithabhanekele njengomfanekiso walo owawutshengiswa entabeni. 
Exodus26:31 Uzakwenza leveyili ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu, lelembu elicolekileyo elentambo ephothiweyo, kube ngumsebenzi wengcitshi, lamakherubi*;" 
Exodus26:32 uzalilengisa-ke ensikeni ezine zesinga, ezihuqwe ngegolide, lengwegwe zalo zegolide, phezu kwezisekelo ezine zesiliva." 
Exodus26:33 Njalo uzalilengisa iveyili phansi kwezingwegwe, ukuze ungenise lapho, ngaphakathi kweveyili, umtshokotsho wobufakazi; leliveyili lizalehlukanisela phakathi kwengcwele lengcwele yezingcwele." 
Exodus26:34 Uzabeka-ke isihlalo somusa phezu komtshokotsho wobufakazi engcweleni yezingcwele," 
Exodus26:35 njalo ubeke itafula ngaphandle kweveyili, loluthi lwesibane maqondana letafula ehlangothini lwethabhanekele ngaseningizimu, ubeke itafula ehlangothini lwenyakatho." 
Exodus26:36 Uzakwenza isilenge somnyango wethente ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu langelembu elicolekileyo elilentambo ephothiweyo, umsebenzi womfekethisi ngenalithi." 
Exodus26:37 Usenzele-ke isilenge insika ezinhlanu zesinga, uzihuqe ngegolide; ingwegwe zazo zibe ngezegolide, uzibumbele ngokuncibilikisa izisekelo ezinhlanu zibe ngezethusi." 
Exodus27:1 Uzakwenza-ke ilathi ngesihlahla sesinga, ubude bube zingalo ezinhlanu, ububanzi bube zingalo ezinhlanu, ilathi lilingane inhlangothi zozine, ukuphakama kwalo kube zingalo ezintathu." 
Exodus27:2 Njalo uzakwenza impondo zalo phezu kwengonsi zalo zozine, impondo zalo zizavela kulo; ubusulihuqa ngethusi." 
Exodus27:3 Njalo wenze izimbiza zokususa umlotha walo, lamafotsholo alo, lemiganu yalo yokufafaza, lamafologwe alo enyama, lezitsha zalo zokuthwala umlilo, uzenze zonke izinto zalo ngethusi." 
Exodus27:4 Ulenzele-ke iziko lethusi elenziwe njengembule, wenze phezu kwembule amasongo amane ethusi engonsini zalo zozine;" 
Exodus27:5 usibeke ngaphansi komphetho welathi phansi, ukuze imbule lifinyelele phakathi kwelathi." 
Exodus27:6 Ulenzele ilathi imijabo, imijabo yesihlahla sesinga, uyihuqe ngethusi;" 
Exodus27:7 lemijabo ifakwe emasongweni, imijabo izakuba-ke enhlangothini zombili zelathi, ekulithwaleni." 
Exodus27:8 Ulenze ngamapulanka ligubheke, njengalokho wakutshengisa entabeni, baza l enza njalo." 
Exodus27:9 Njalo uzakwenza iguma lethabhanekele, libe sehlangothini olungeningizimu lamakhetheni elembu elicolekileyo lentambo ephothiweyo, ubude bohlangothi lunye bube zingalo ezilikhulu;" 
Exodus27:10 lensika zawo ezingamatshumi amabili lezisekelo zazo ezingamatshumi amabili zibe ngezethusi, ingwegwe zezinsika lezibopho zazo zibe ngezesiliva." 
Exodus27:11 Ngokunjalo-ke ehlangothini olungenyakatho ebudeni, amakhetheni azakuba zingalo ezilikhulu ebudeni, lensika zawo ezingamatshumi amabili lezisekelo zazo ezingamatshumi amabili zibe ngezethusi, ingwegwe zezinsika lezibopho zazo zibe ngezesiliva." 
Exodus27:12 Lebubanzini beguma, ehlangothini olusentshonalanga, kuzakuba khona amakhetheni azingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu, insika zawo zibe litshumi lezisekelo zazo zibe litshumi." 
Exodus27:13 Lobubanzi beguma ehlangothini olungempumalanga ngasempumalanga bube zingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu. 
Exodus27:14 Lamakhetheni olunye uhlangothi azakuba zingalo ezilitshumi lanhlanu, insika zawo zibentathu, lezisekelo zazo zibentathu;" 
Exodus27:15 lakolunye uhlangothi amakhetheni abe zingalo ezilitshumi lanhlanu, insika zawo zibentathu lezisekelo zazo zibentathu." 
Exodus27:16 Emnyango weguma kuzakuba-ke lesilenge esizingalo ezingamatshumi amabili, esil okuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu lelembu elicolekileyo lentambo ephothiweyo, kube ngumsebenzi womfekethisi ngenalithi; insika zaso zibe zine lezisekelo zazo zibe zine." 
Exodus27:17 Zonke insika ezizingelezele iguma zizabotshwa ngesiliva, ingwegwe zazo zibe ngezesiliva lezisekelo zazo zibe ngezethusi." 
Exodus27:18 Ubude beguma bube zingalo ezilikhulu, lobubanzi bube zingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu inhlangothi zombili, lokuphakama kube zingalo ezinhlanu zelembu elicolekileyo lentambo ephothiweyo, lezisekelo zazo ngezethusi." 
Exodus27:19 Zonke izinto zethabhanekele emsebenzini walo wonke, lezikhonkwane zalo zonke, lazo zonke izikhonkwane zeguma zizakuba ngezethusi." 
Exodus27:20 Wena uzabalaya-ke abantwana bakoIsrayeli ukuze bakulethele amafutha acengekileyo emihlwathi agigelwe isibane, ukuze enze isibane sivuthe njalonjalo." 
Exodus27:21 Ethenteni lenhlangano ngaphandle kweveyili eliphambi kobufakazi, uAroni lamadodana akhe bazasilondoloza kusukela kusihlwa kuze kube sekuseni phambi kwe Nkosi; kuzakuba yisimiso saphakade ezizukulwaneni zabo, ngenxa yabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Exodus28:1 Wena-ke sondeza kuwe uAroni umnewenu lamadodana akhe kanye laye, phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, ukuze bangisebenzele njengabapristi, uAroni, uNadabi loAbihu, uEleyazare loIthamari, amadodana kaAroni." 
Exodus28:2 Umenzele-ke uAroni umnewenu izembatho ezingcwele, ezobukhosi lezokucecisa." 
Exodus28:3 Wena-ke khuluma labo bonke abahlakaniphileyo ngenhliziyo, engibagcwalise ngomoya wenhlakanipho, ukuze benze izembatho zikaAroni zokumehlukanisela ukungisebenzela njengompristi." 
Exodus28:4 Lalezi yizembatho abazazenza; isembatho sesifuba le-efodi*, lebhatshi, lesigqoko esilamabala, iqhiye, lebhanti; bamenzele uAroni umnewenu izembatho ezingcwele, lezamadodana akhe, ukuze angisebenzele njengompristi." 
Exodus28:5 Bona-ke kabathathe igolide lokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu lelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu. 
Exodus28:6 Basebesenza i-efodi ngegolide, okuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, lokuyibubende, okubomvu, lelembu elicolekileyo lentambo ephothiweyo, umsebenzi wengcitshi." 
Exodus28:7 Sizakuba lezichibi ezimbili zamahlombe, zihlangane emaceleni aso womabili, ukuze sihlanganiswe." 
Exodus28:8 Ibhanti elelukwe ngobungcitshi le-efodi lakhe, esikulo, lizakuba njengomsebenzi walo, liyinto yinye, ngegolide, okuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, lokuyibubende, lokubomvu, lelembu elicolekileyo lentambo ephothiweyo." 
Exodus28:9 Njalo uzathatha amatshe amabili ama-onikse*, ubaze kuwo amabizo amadodana kaIsrayeli," 
Exodus28:10 ayisithupha kumabizo awo phezu kwelinye ilitshe, lamabizo ayisithupha aseleyo phezu kwelinye ilitshe, njengokuzalwa kwawo." 
Exodus28:11 Njengomsebenzi wombazi wamatshe, njengokubazwa kwendandatho elophawu, uzawabaza amatshe womabili, ngamabizo amadodana kaIsrayeli, uwenze amiswe ezisekelweni zegolide ezitshiliweyo." 
Exodus28:12 Njalo uzabeka amatshe womabili ezichibini zamahlombe ze-efodi*, amatshe esikhumbuzo ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli; loAroni uzathwala amabizo abo emahlombe akhe womabili phambi kwe Nkosi, kube yisikhumbuzo." 
Exodus28:13 Wenze lezisekelo ezitshiliweyo zegolide," 
Exodus28:14 lamaketane amabili egolide elicwengekileyo, uwenze ukuthi abe njengamagoda, umsebenzi ophothiweyo, amaketane aphothiweyo uwabophele ezisekelweni ezitshiliweyo zegolide." 
Exodus28:15 Ubususenza isembatho sesifuba sokwahlulela, kube ngumsebenzi wengcitshi, uyenze njengomsebenzi we-efodi, ngegolide, okuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, lokuyibubende, lokubomvu, langelembu elicolekileyo lentambo ephothiweyo uzasenza." 
Exodus28:16 Kasilingane inhlangothi zozine, siphindwe kabili, ubude baso bube yikwelulwa kweminwe, lobubanzi baso bube yikwelulwa kweminwe." 
Exodus28:17 Njalo uhlele kuso inhlelo zamatshe, imizila emine yamatshe; umzila wesardikisi*, itopazi* le-emeraldi*, umzila wokuqala." 
Exodus28:18 lomzila wesibili ube lerubi*, isafire*, lendayimana," 
Exodus28:19 lomzila wesithathu ube lejasinte*, i-agate*, le-ametiste*," 
Exodus28:20 lomzila wesine ube lebherule*, le-onikse*, lejaspi*; amatshe la azasekelwa ngegolide ezisekelweni zawo ezitshiliweyo." 
Exodus28:21 Lamatshe azakuba lamabizo amadodana kaIsrayeli, alitshumi lambili, lamabizo awo; njengokubazwa kwendandatho elophawu, yilelo lalelo lebizo lalo; azakuba ngawezizwe ezilitshumi lambili."
