Exodus28:22 Wenze-ke esembathweni sesifuba amaketane aphothiweyo omsebenzi wegoda egolide elicwengekileyo," 
Exodus28:23 wenze futhi phezu kwesembatho sesifuba amasongo amabili egolide, uwafake amasongo amabili emaceleni womabili esembatho sesifuba." 
Exodus28:24 Ufake amaketane amabili egolide aphothiweyo emasongweni amabili emaceleni esembatho sesifuba; 
Exodus28:25 kodwa izihloko zombili zamaketane womabili aphothiweyo uzifake ezisekelweni ezimbili ezitshiliweyo, uzibeke ezichibini ze-efodi, phambili kwayo kanye." 
Exodus28:26 Uzakwenza njalo amasongo amabili egolide, uwafake emaceleni womabili esembatho sesifuba, emphethweni waso ongaphakathi kwe-efodi." 
Exodus28:27 Wenze futhi amasongo amabili egolide, uwafake ezichibini ezimbili ze-efodi, ngaphansi ngaphambili kwaso, eduze kokuhlangana kwazo, phezu kwebhanti elelukwe ngobungcitshi le-efodi." 
Exodus28:28 Bazabophela-ke isembatho sesifuba ngamasongo aso emasongweni e-efodi ngentambo eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, ukuze sibe phezu kwebhanti elelukwe ngobungcitshi, njalo isembatho sesifuba singakhumuki e-efodini." 
Exodus28:29 Njalo uAroni uzathwala amabizo abantwana bakoIsrayeli esembathweni sesifuba sokwahlulela phezu kwenhliziyo yakhe, nxa engena e ndaw eni engcwele, kube yisikhumbuzo phambi kwe Nkosi njalonjalo." 
Exodus28:30 Uzafaka-ke esembathweni sesifuba sokwahlulela iUrimi leThumimi*, njalo kube phezu kwenhliziyo kaAroni, nxa engena phambi kwe Nkosi; ngakho uAroni uzakuthwala ukwahlulelwa kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli phezu kwenhliziyo yakhe phambi kwe Nkosi njalonjalo." 
Exodus28:31 Uzakwenza ibhatshi lonke le-efodi ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka; 
Exodus28:32 njalo sibe lesikhala sekhanda ngaphakathi kwaso, isikhala sibe lomphetho osizingelezeleyo, umsebenzi owelukiweyo, sibe njengesikhala sebhatshi lensimbi, ukuze singadabuki." 
Exodus28:33 Lemiphethweni yaso wenze amapomegranati* ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu, emiphethweni yaso osizingelezeleyo, lamabhera egolide phakathi kwawo asizingelezeleyo," 
Exodus28:34 ibhera legolide lepomegranati, ibhera legolide lepomegranati, emiphethweni yebhatshi kuzingelezele." 
Exodus28:35 UAroni kasembathele-ke ukukhonza, lokukhenceza kwaso kuzwakale lapho engena e ndaw eni engcwele phambi kwe Nkosi, lalapho ephuma, ukuze angafi." 
Exodus28:36 Uzakwenza njalo incence ngegolide elicwengekileyo, ubaze kuyo ukubazwa kwendandatho elophawu: Ubungcwele e Nkosi ni." 
Exodus28:37 Uyifake phezu kwentambo eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, ukuze ibe phezu kweqhiye, ibe ngaphambili kweqhiye." 
Exodus28:38 Izakuba sebunzini likaAroni, ukuze uAroni athwale ububi bezinto ezingcwele, abantwana bakoIsrayeli abazazingcwelisa, kuzo zonke izipho zabo ezingcwele; njalo izahlala isebunzini lakhe, ukuze bemukeleke phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Exodus28:39 Uzakweluka njalo isigqoko ngelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu elilamabala, wenze leqhiye ngelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, lebhanti, umsebenzi womfekethisi ngenalithi." 
Exodus28:40 Wenzele-ke amadodana kaAroni izigqoko, uwenzele amabhanti, lezingowane uwenzele, kube ngokobukhosi lokuceca." 
Exodus28:41 Umgqokise zona uAroni umnewenu lamadodana akhe kanye laye, ubagcobe, ubehlukanise, ubangcwelise ukuze bangisebenzele njengabapristi." 
Exodus28:42 Ubenzele labokabhudula bangaphansi belembu elicolekileyo okusibekela inyama yobunqunu, aqale ekhalweni afike emathangazini;" 
Exodus28:43 njalo uAroni lamadodana akhe bawagqoke lapho bengena ethenteni lenhlangano kumbe lapho besondela elathini ukukhonza e ndaw eni engcwele, hlezi bathwale ububi, bafe. Kuzakuba yisimiso esilaphakade kuye lakuyo inzalo yakhe emva kwakhe." 
Exodus29:1 Yile-ke into ozayenza kubo ukubehlukanisa ukuthi bangisebenzele njengabapristi. Thatha ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, lenqama ezimbili ezingelasici," 
Exodus29:2 lesinkwa esingelamvubelo, lamaqebelengwana angelamvubelo ahlanganiswe lamafutha, lezinkwana eziyizipatalala ezingelamvubelo ezinindwe ngamafutha, uzenze ngempuphu ecolekileyo yengqoloyi;" 
Exodus29:3 ukufake esitsheni esisodwa, ukusondeze ngesitsha, kanye lejongosi lenqama ezimbili." 
Exodus29:4 Usondeze uAroni lamadodana akhe emnyango wethente lenhlangano, ubagezise ngamanzi;" 
Exodus29:5 uthathe izembatho, ugqokise uAroni isigqoko, lebhatshi le-efodi*, le-efodi, lesembatho sesifuba, umbophe ngebhanti elelukwe ngobungcitshi le-efodi," 
Exodus29:6 u m thwalise iqhiye ekhanda lakhe, u m thwalise umqhele ongcwele phezu kweqhiye." 
Exodus29:7 Uthathe amafutha okugcoba, uwathele ekhanda lakhe, umgcobe." 
Exodus29:8 Usondeze lamadodana akhe, uwagqokise izigqoko." 
Exodus29:9 Ubabophe ngamabhanti, uAroni lamadodana akhe, ubabophele izingowane, lobupristi bube ngobabo ngesimiso saphakade. Ubehlukanise-ke uAroni lamadodana akhe." 
Exodus29:10 Uzasondeza ijongosi phambi kwethente lenhlangano; njalo uAroni lamadodana akhe babeke izandla zabo enhlokweni yejongosi; 
Exodus29:11 ubusulihlaba ijongosi phambi kwe Nkosi emnyango wethente lenhlangano," 
Exodus29:12 uthathe okwegazi lejongosi, ulifake empondweni zelathi ngomunwe wakho, uthululele lonke igazi esisekelweni selathi." 
Exodus29:13 Uzathatha idanga lonke, lamahwahwa aphezu kwesibindi, lezinso zombili, lamahwahwa aphezu kwazo, ukutshise elathini." 
Exodus29:14 Kodwa inyama yejongosi lesikhumba salo lomswane walo ukutshise ngomlilo ngaphandle kwenkamba; kungumnikelo wesono. 
Exodus29:15 Ubusuthatha inqama ibenye; njalo uAroni lamadodana akhe babeke izandla zabo phezu kwenhloko yenqama. 
Exodus29:16 Ubusuyihlaba inqama, uthathe igazi layo, ulifafaze elathini uligombolozele." 
Exodus29:17 Uyiqume inqama ngeziqa zayo, ugezise imibilini yayo lemilenze yayo, ukubeke phezu kweziqa zayo laphezu kwenhloko yayo," 
Exodus29:18 utshise inqama yonke elathini. Kungumnikelo wokutshiswa e Nkosi ni, kuluqhatshi olumnandi, umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Exodus29:19 Uzathatha inqama yesibili; uAroni lamadodana akhe babesebebeka izandla zabo phezu kwenhloko yenqama. 
Exodus29:20 Uyihlabe-ke inqama, uthathe okwegazi layo, ulifake eqwangeni lwendlebe kaAroni, leqwangeni lwendlebe yokunene yamadodana akhe, lesithupheni sesandla sabo sokunene, lezwaneni olukhulu lonyawo lwabo lokunene, ufafaze igazi elathini uligombolozele." 
Exodus29:21 Uthathe okwegazi eliselathini lokwamafutha okugcoba, ukufafaze phezu kukaAroni, laphezu kwezembatho zakhe, laphezu kwamadodana akhe, laphezu kwezembatho zamadodana akhe kanye laye, ukuze abe ngcwele lezembatho zakhe, lamadodana akhe lezembatho zamadodana akhe kanye laye." 
Exodus29:22 Uthathe enqameni amahwahwa, lomsila ononileyo, ledanga, lamahwahwa esibindi, lezinso zombili, lamahwahwa aphezu kwazo, lomlenze wokunene, ngoba iyinqama yokwehlukaniswa;" 
Exodus29:23 lesinkwa esiyindilinga esisodwa, leqebelengwana elilodwa elesinkwa esilamafutha, lesinkwana esiyisipatalala esisodwa, esitsheni sezinkwa ezingelamvubelo esiphambi kwe Nkosi," 
Exodus29:24 ukubeke konke ezandleni zikaAroni lezandleni zamadodana akhe, ukuzunguze ukuze kube ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Exodus29:25 Ukuthathe ezandleni zabo, ukutshise phezu kwelathi phezu komnikelo wokutshiswa, ukuze kube luqhatshi olumnandi phambi kwe Nkosi; kungumnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Exodus29:26 Uzathatha isifuba senqama yokwehlukaniswa engekaAroni, usizunguze sibe ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi, njalo sibe yisabelo sakho." 
Exodus29:27 Uzasingcwelisa isifuba somnikelo wokuzunguzwa lomlenze womnikelo wokuphakanyiswa ozunguzwayo lophakanyiswayo, okwenqama yokwehlukaniswa, okwalokho okungokukaAroni lokwalokho okungokwamadodana akhe;" 
Exodus29:28 njalo kuzakuba ngokukaAroni lokwamadodana akhe, kube yisimiso saphakade kuvela kubantwana bakoIsrayeli; ngoba kungumnikelo wokuphakanyiswa; kuzakuba ngumnikelo wokuphakanyiswa ovela kubantwana bakoIsrayeli, eminikelweni yabo yokuthula; umnikelo wabo wokuphakanyiswa e Nkosi ni." 
Exodus29:29 Lezembatho ezingcwele zikaAroni zizakuba ngezamadodana akhe emva kwakhe, ukuze agcotshwe embethe zona, lokuze ehlukaniswe embethe zona." 
Exodus29:30 Insuku eziyisikhombisa umpristi endaweni yakhe, ovela kumadodana akhe, uzazembatha, nxa engena ethenteni lenhlangano ukukhonza e ndaw eni engcwele." 
Exodus29:31 Uzathatha-ke inqama yokwehlukaniswa, upheke inyama yayo endaweni engcwele." 
Exodus29:32 Njalo uAroni lamadodana akhe bazakudla inyama yenqama lesinkwa esisesitsheni emnyango wethente lenhlangano," 
Exodus29:33 badle lezozinto okwenziwa ngazo inhlawulo yokuthula, ukubehlukanisa, ukubangcwelisa; kodwa owemzini angazidli ngoba zingcwele." 
Exodus29:34 Njalo uba kusala okwenyama yokwehlukaniswa kumbe okwesinkwa kuze kuse, tshisa okuseleyo ngomlilo; kungadliwa, ngoba kungcwele." 
Exodus29:35 Uzakwenza njalo-ke kuAroni lakumadodana akhe njengakho konke engikulaya khona; insuku eziyisikhombisa uzabehlukanisa. 
Exodus29:36 Insuku ngensuku unikele ijongosi lomnikelo wesono wenhlawulo yokuthula; uhlambulule ilathi lapho ulenzela inhlawulo yokuthula, uligcobe ukuze ulingcwelise." 
Exodus29:37 Ulenzele ilathi inhlawulo yokuthula insuku eziyisikhombisa, ulingcwelise, lelathi lizakuba yingcwelengcwele; konke okulithintayo ilathi kuzakuba ngcwele." 
Exodus29:38 Yilokhu-ke ozakunikela phezu kwelathi: Amawundlu amabili alomnyaka owodwa insuku ngensuku njalonjalo. 
Exodus29:39 Elinye iwundlu uzalinikela ekuseni, lelinye iwundlu ulinikele kusihlwa," 
Exodus29:40 lengxenye yetshumi yempuphu ecolekileyo kuxubene lengxenye yesine yehini* yamafutha agigiweyo, lengxenye yesine yehini* yewayini kube ngumnikelo wokunathwayo, welinye iwundlu." 
Exodus29:41 Lelinye iwundlu ulinikele kusihlwa, wenze kulo njengomnikelo wokudla wekuseni, lanjengomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo, kube luqhatshi olumnandi, umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Exodus29:42 Uzakuba ngumnikelo wokutshiswa njalonjalo ezizukulwaneni zenu, emnyango wethente lenhlangano phambi kwe Nkosi, lapho engizahlangana khona lani, ukukhuluma lawe lapho." 
Exodus29:43 Lalapho ngizahlangana labantwana bakoIsrayeli, njalo kungcweliswe yinkazimulo yami." 
Exodus29:44 Njalo ngizangcwelisa ithente lenhlangano lelathi, ngizangcwelisa loAroni lamadodana akhe, ukuze bangisebenzele njengabapristi." 
Exodus29:45 Ngizahlala phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, ngibe nguNkulunkulu kubo." 
Exodus29:46 Bazakwazi-ke ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo, eyabakhupha elizweni leGibhithe ukuze ngihlale phakathi kwabo; ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo." 
Exodus30:1 Uzakwenza lelathi lokutshisela impepha, ulenze ngesihlahla sesinga." 
Exodus30:2 Ubude balo bube yingalo, lobubanzi balo ingalo, lilingane inhlangothi zozine; lokuphakama kwalo kube zingalo ezimbili; impondo zalo zizavela kulo." 
Exodus30:3 Njalo ulihuqe ngegolide elicwengekileyo, ingaphezulu yalo, lenhlangothi zalo ezilizingelezeleyo, lempondo zalo; wenze kulo umqolo wegolide olizingelezeleyo." 
Exodus30:4 Wenze njalo amasongo amabili egolide, ngaphansi komqolo walo, enhlangothini ezimbili zalo; wenze enhlangothini zalo zombili; azakuba zindawo zemijabo ezokulithwala ngayo." 
Exodus30:5 Njalo wenze imijabo ngesihlahla sesinga, uyihuqe ngegolide." 
Exodus30:6 Uzalibeka phambi kweveyili elingasemtshokotshweni wobufakazi, phambi kwesihlalo somusa esiphezu kobufakazi, lapho engizahlangana khona lawe." 
Exodus30:7 Njalo uAroni atshisele kulo impepha elephunga elimnandi ukusa ngokusa, eselungise izibane uzayitshisa;" 
Exodus30:8 lapho uAroni elumathisa izibane kusihlwa, ayitshise; yimpepha eqhubekayo phambi kwe Nkosi ezizukulwaneni zenu." 
Exodus30:9 Linganikeleli kulo impepha engejwayelekanga kumbe umnikelo wokutshiswa kumbe umnikelo wokudla; njalo lingatheli kulo umnikelo wokunathwayo. 
Exodus30:10 UAroni uzakwenza inhlawulo yokuthula empondweni zalo kanye ngomnyaka, ngegazi lomnikelo wesono wezinhlawulo zokuthula; kanye ngomnyaka uzakwenza inhlawulo yokuthula kulo ezizukulwaneni zenu; liyingcwelengcwele e Nkosi ni." 
Exodus30:11 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi yathi: 
Exodus30:12 Lapho uthatha inani lonke labantwana bakoIsrayeli, njengokubalwa kwabo, bazanika ngulowo lalowo ihlawulo ngomphefumulo wakhe e Nkosi ni, nxa ubabala; ukuze kungabi lenhlupheko phakathi kwabo, nxa ubabala." 
Exodus30:13 Bazanika lokhu, wonke odlulela kwababaliweyo, ingxenye yeshekeli*, njengokweshekeli lendlu engcwele - ishekeli lingamagera* angamatshumi amabili - ingxenye yeshekeli ngumnikelo e Nkosi ni." 
Exodus30:14 Wonke odlulela kwababaliweyo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, anikele umnikelo we Nkosi." 
Exodus30:15 Abanothileyo bangadlulisi, labayanga banganciphisi ingxenye yeshekeli, lapho linikela umnikelo we Nkosi, ukwenzela imiphefumulo yenu inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Exodus30:16 Uzathatha imali yenhlawulo zokuthula ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, uyinikele inkonzo yethente lenhlangano, ukuthi ibe yisikhumbuzo sabantwana bakoIsrayeli phambi kwe Nkosi, ukwenzela imiphefumulo yenu inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Exodus30:17 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi yathi: 
Exodus30:18 Uzakwenza lenditshi yethusi yokugezela elonyawo lwayo lwethusi, ukugezela kuyo; uyibeke phakathi laphakathi kwethente lenhlangano lelathi, uthele kuyo amanzi," 
Exodus30:19 njalo uAroni lamadodana akhe bagezele kuyo izandla zabo lenyawo zabo. 
Exodus30:20 Nxa bengena ethenteni lenhlangano bazageza ngamanzi, ukuze bangafi, loba besondela elathini ukukhonza, ukutshisa umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Exodus30:21 Ngakho bazageza izandla zabo lenyawo zabo ukuze bangafi; njalo kuzakuba kubo yisimiso esilaphakade, kuye lakunzalo yakhe ezizukulwaneni zabo." 
Exodus30:22 I Nkosi yakhuluma futhi kuMozisi yathi: 
Exodus30:23 Wena-ke, zithathele amakha aqakathekileyo, imure* elizigelezelayo elingamashekeli angamakhulu amahlanu, lekinamoni* elilephunga elimnandi ingxenye yalokho, elingamashekeli angamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amahlanu, lekalamu* elilephunga elimnandi elingamashekeli angamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amahlanu," 
Exodus30:24 lekhasiya* elingamashekeli angamakhulu amahlanu ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele, lamafutha omhlwathi alihini*;" 
Exodus30:25 wenze lokhu kube ngamafutha angcwele okugcoba, amakha axutshanisiweyo njengokwenza komenzi wamakha; azakuba ngamafutha angcwele okugcoba." 
Exodus30:26 Uzagcoba ngawo ithente lenhlangano lomtshokotsho wobufakazi," 
Exodus30:27 letafula lezitsha zalo zonke, loluthi lwesibane lezitsha zalo, lelathi lempepha," 
Exodus30:28 lelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa lezitsha zalo zonke, lenditshi yokugezela lonyawo lwayo;" 
Exodus30:29 ukungcwelise ukuze kube yingcwelengcwele; loba yini okukuthintayo kuzakuba ngcwele. 
Exodus30:30 Ugcobe laye uAroni lamadodana akhe, ubangcwelise ukuze bangisebenzele njengabapristi." 
Exodus30:31 Ukhulume kubantwana bakoIsrayeli uthi: Lokhu kuzakuba kimi ngamafutha angcwele okugcoba ezizukulwaneni zenu; 
Exodus30:32 angabothelwa emzimbeni womuntu; njalo lingawenzi anjengawo ngokwenziwa kwawo; angcwele, azakuba ngcwele kini." 
Exodus30:33 Loba ngubani owenza anjengawo, loba ewafaka kowemzini, uzaqunywa asuke ebantwini bakibo." 
Exodus30:34 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Zithathele amakha amnandi, isitakete* leonika* legalibanu*, amakha amnandi lenhlaka ecengekileyo, kube yizabelo ezilinganayo;" 
Exodus30:35 wenze kube yimpepha, amakha axutshanisiweyo njengokwenza komenzi wamakha, itswayiwe, icengekile, ingcwele;" 
Exodus30:36 uchole okwayo kucolisiseke, ubeke okwayo phambi kobufakazi ethenteni lenhlangano, lapho engizahlangana khona lawe; izakuba yingcwelengcwele kini." 
Exodus30:37 Kodwa impepha ozayenza, lingazenzeli yona njengokwenziwa kwayo; izakuba ngcwele kuwe, yenzelwe i Nkosi." 
Exodus30:38 Loba ngubani ozakwenza enjengayo ukuyinuka, uzaqunywa asuke ebantwini bakibo." 
Exodus31:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi yathi: 
Exodus31:2 Bona, ngibizile ngebizo uBhezaleli indodana kaUri indodana kaHuri owesizwe sakoJuda;" 
Exodus31:3 ngimgcwalisile ngoMoya kaNkulunkulu, ekuhlakanipheni lekuqedisiseni lelwazini lakuyo yonke imisebenzi yobungcitshi," 
Exodus31:4 ukuthi aqambe imisebenzi yobungcitshi, asebenze ngegolide langesiliva langethusi," 
Exodus31:5 ekubazeni amatshe ukuwafaka, lekubazeni izigodo, ukwenza yonke imisebenzi yobungcitshi." 
Exodus31:6 Mina-ke, khangela, nginike uOholiyaba indodana kaAhisamaki owesizwe sakoDani kanye laye; lenhliziyweni yakhe wonke ohlakaniphileyo ngenhliziyo ngifake inhlakanipho, ukuthi benze konke engikulaye khona," 
Exodus31:7 ithente lenhlangano, lomtshokotsho wobufakazi, lesihlalo somusa esiphezu kwawo, lempahla yonke yethente," 
Exodus31:8 letafula lezitsha zalo, loluthi lwesibane olucwengekileyo lezitsha zalo zonke, lelathi lempepha," 
Exodus31:9 lelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa lezitsha zalo zonke, lenditshi yokugezela lonyawo lwayo," 
Exodus31:10 lezembatho ezifekethisiweyo, lezembatho ezingcwele zikaAroni umpristi, lezembatho zamadodana akhe, ukusebenza njengabapristi," 
Exodus31:11 lamafutha okugcoba, lempepha emnandi yendawo engcwele; benze njengakho konke engikulaye khona." 
Exodus31:12 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Exodus31:13 Wena-ke, tshela abantwana bakoIsrayeli uthi: Isibili lizagcina amasabatha ami; ngoba lokhu kuyisibonakaliso phakathi kwami lani ezizukulwaneni zenu, ukwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi elingcwelisayo." 
Exodus31:14 Ngakho gcinani isabatha, ngoba lingcwele kini; olonayo uzabulawa lokubulawa; ngoba wonke owenza umsebenzi ngalo, lowomphefumulo uzaqunywa usuke ebantwini bawo." 
Exodus31:15 Insuku eziyisithupha kwenziwe umsebenzi, kodwa ngosuku lwesikhombisa kulisabatha lokuphumula, lingcwele e Nkosi ni; wonke owenza umsebenzi ngesabatha uzabulawa lokubulawa." 
Exodus31:16 Ngakho abantwana bakoIsrayeli bazagcina isabatha, balilondoloze isabatha ezizukulwaneni zabo, libe yisivumelwano esilaphakade." 
Exodus31:17 Liyisibonakaliso phakathi kwami labantwana bakoIsrayeli kuze kube nini lanini; ngoba ngensuku eziyisithupha i Nkosi yenza amazulu lomhlaba, kodwa ngosuku lwesikhombisa yaphumula, yavuselelwa." 
Exodus31:18 Wasemnika uMozisi, eseqedile ukukhuluma laye entabeni yeSinayi, izibhebhe ezimbili zobufakazi, izibhebhe zamatshe, zibhalwe ngomunwe kaNkulunkulu." 
Exodus32:1 Abantu sebebonile ukuthi uMozisi uphuzile ukwehla entabeni, abantu babuthana kuAroni bathi kuye: Sukuma, usenzele onkulunkulu abazahamba phambi kwethu; ngoba uMozisi lo, indoda eyasikhuphula elizweni leGibhithe, kasazi ukuthi yehlelwe yini." 
Exodus32:2 UAroni wasesithi kubo: Qamulani amacici egolide asendlebeni zabomkenu, zamadodana enu, lezamadodakazi enu, liwalethe kimi." 
Exodus32:3 Bonke abantu basebeqamula amacici egolide ayesendlebeni zabo, bawaletha kuAroni." 
Exodus32:4 Wawemukela ezandleni zabo, walibumba ngesikhali sokukhanda, wawenza aba lithole elibunjwe ngokuncibilikisa. Basebesithi: Laba ngonkulunkulu bakho, Israyeli, abakukhuphule elizweni leGibhithe." 
Exodus32:5 UAroni eselibonile wakha ilathi phambi kwalo; uAroni wamemezela wathi: Kusasa kuzakuba khona umkhosi we Nkosi. 
Exodus32:6 Basebevuka ekuseni kakhulu, banikela iminikelo yokutshiswa, basondeza iminikelo yokuthula; abantu bahlala phansi ukudla lokunatha, basebesukuma ukudlala." 
Exodus32:7 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Hamba wehle, ngoba abantu bakho owabakhuphula elizweni leGibhithe bonakalisile;" 
Exodus32:8 baphambukile masinyane endleleni engabalaya ngayo; bazenzele ithole elibunjwe ngokuncibilikisa, balikhonza, balihlabela, bathi: Laba ngonkulunkulu bakho, Israyeli, abakukhuphule elizweni leGibhithe." 
Exodus32:9 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Ngibabonile lababantu, khangela-ke, bangabantu abantamo zilukhuni." 
Exodus32:10 Khathesi-ke ngiyekela ukuze ulaka lwami lubavuthele, ngibaqede; kodwa wena ngizakwenza ube yisizwe esikhulu." 
Exodus32:11 Kodwa uMozisi wancenga ubuso be Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakhe wathi: Kungani, Nkosi, ulaka lwakho lubavuthela abantu bakho owabakhupha elizweni leGibhithe ngamandla amakhulu langesandla esiqinileyo?" 
Exodus32:12 Kungani amaGibhithe ezakhuluma athi: Wabakhuphela ububi ukubabulala ezintabeni, lokubaqeda ebusweni bomhlaba? Phenduka ekuvutheni kolaka lwakho, uzisole ngobubi obumelene labantu bakho." 
Exodus32:13 Khumbula uAbrahama, uIsaka loIsrayeli, inceku zakho, owazifunga wena kizo wathi kuzo: Ngizakwandisa inzalo yenu njengezinkanyezi zamazulu, lalelilizwe lonke engikhulume ngalo, ngizalipha inzalo yenu, njalo bazalidla ilifa lalo kuze kube nininini." 
Exodus32:14 I Nkosi yasizisola ebubini eyayisithi izabenza ebantwini bayo. 
Exodus32:15 UMozisi wasetshibilika wehla entabeni, lezibhebhe ezimbili zobufakazi esandleni sakhe; izibhebhe zazibhalwe inhlangothi zazo zombili; zibhalwe ngapha langapha." 
Exodus32:16 Lezibhebhe zazingumsebenzi kaNkulunkulu, lombhalo wawungumbhalo kaNkulunkulu, ubazwe ezibhebheni." 
Exodus32:17 Kwathi uJoshuwa esezwile umsindo wabantu beklabalala, wathi kuMozisi: Kulomsindo wempi enkambeni." 
Exodus32:18 Kodwa wathi: Kakusumsindo wokuklabalala kokunqoba, njalo kakusumsindo wokuklabalala kokunqotshwa; ngizwa umsindo wokuhlabelela." 
Exodus32:19 Kwasekusithi esesondele enkambeni walibona ithole lokugida; ulaka lukaMozisi lwaseluvutha, wasezilahla izibhebhe ezandleni zakhe, waziphahlazela phansi kwentaba." 
Exodus32:20 Wathatha ithole ababelenzile, walitshisa emlilweni, walichola laze lacoleka, walivuvuzela emanzini, wabanathisa wona abantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Exodus32:21 UMozisi wasesithi kuAroni: Abantu laba benzeni kuwe ukuze ubehlisele isono esikhulu kangaka? 
Exodus32:22 UAroni wasesithi: Kalungavuthi ulaka lwenkosi yami; wena uyabazi abantu ukuthi ba tshekele ebubini. 
Exodus32:23 Ngoba bathi kimi: Senzele onkulunkulu abazahamba phambi kwethu; ngoba uMozisi lo, indoda eyasikhuphula elizweni leGibhithe, kasazi ukuthi yehlelwe yini." 
Exodus32:24 Ngasengisithi kubo: Loba ngubani olegolide, kabaliqamule. Basebenginika lona. Ngasengiliphosela emlilweni, kwasekuphuma lelithole." 
Exodus32:25 Kwathi uMozisi esebonile abantu ukuthi babengabambeki (ngoba uAroni wabayekela bangabambeki ukuze bayangeke kwababengabavukela)," 
Exodus32:26 uMozisi wasesima esangweni lenkamba, wathi: Loba ngubani ongowe Nkosi, keze kimi! Kwasekubuthana kuye wonke amadodana kaLevi." 
Exodus32:27 Wasesithi kuwo: Itsho njalo i Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli ithi: Ngulowo lalowo kahlome inkemba yakhe ethangazini lakhe, adabule aphenduke esuka esangweni esiya esangweni enkambeni, lalowo lalowo abulale umfowabo, lalowo lalowo umngane wakhe, lalowo lalowo umakhelwane wakhe." 
Exodus32:28 Amadodana kaLevi asesenza njengelizwi likaMozisi; njalo kwawa ebantwini ngalolosuku abantu abangabazinkulungwane ezintathu. 
Exodus32:29 UMozisi wasesithi: Lizehlukanisele i Nkosi lamuhla, ngoba ngulowo lalowo ubemelene lendodana yakhe amelane lomfowabo, ukuze aphe isibusiso phezu kwenu lamuhla." 
Exodus32:30 Kwasekusithi kusisa uMozisi wathi ebantwini: Lina lenze isono esikhulu; khathesi sengizakwenyukela e Nkosi ni; mhlawumbe ngingenza inhlawulo yokuthula ngesono senu. 
Exodus32:31 UMozisi wasebuyela e Nkosi ni wathi: Maye! Lababantu bonile isono esikhulu, bazenzele onkulunkulu begolide." 
Exodus32:32 Khathesi-ke, uba uthethelela isono sabo - kodwa uba kungenjalo, ake ungesule egwalweni lwakho olubhalileyo." 
Exodus32:33 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Owonileyo kimi ngizamesula egwalweni lwami. 
Exodus32:34 Kodwa hamba-ke, ukhokhele abantu baye lapho engikhulume lawe ngakho; khangela, ingilosi yami izahamba phambi kwakho. Kanti mhla ngiphindisela ngizaphindisela isono sabo phezu kwabo." 
Exodus32:35 I Nkosi yasibatshaya abantu ngoba babenze ithole, uAroni ayelenzile." 
Exodus33:1 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Hamba wenyuke lapha wena labantu owabenyusa elizweni leGibhithe, uye elizweni engalifungela uAbrahama, uIsaka loJakobe ngisithi: Inzalo yakho ngizayinika lona." 
Exodus33:2 Njalo ngizathuma ingilosi phambi kwakho, ngixotshe amaKhanani, amaAmori, lamaHethi, lamaPerizi, amaHivi, lamaJebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Uye elizweni eligeleza uchago loluju; ngoba kangiyikwenyuka phakathi kwakho, ngoba uyisizwe esintamo lukhuni, hlezi ngikuqede endleleni." 
Exodus33:4 Kwathi abantu sebezwile lelilizwi elibi, balila; njalo kakulamuntu owafaka izigqizo zakhe;" 
Exodus33:5 ngoba i Nkosi yayithe kuMozisi: Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Lingabantu abantamo zilukhuni; ngisenyuka ngiphakathi kwakho ngokucwayiza kwelihlo, ngizakuqeda. Ngakho-ke khupha izigqizo zakho kuwe ukuze ngazi engizakwenza kuwe." 
Exodus33:6 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebezihlubula izigqizo zabo kusukela entabeni yeHorebe. 
Exodus33:7 UMozisi wasethatha ithente walimisa ngaphandle kwenkamba, khatshana lenkamba; walibiza ngokuthi lithente lenhlangano. Kwasekusithi wonke odinga i Nkosi waphuma waya ethenteni lenhlangano elalingaphandle kwenkamba." 
Exodus33:8 Kwasekusithi lapho uMozisi ephuma ukuya ethenteni, bonke abantu basukume, beme kube ngulowo lalowo emnyango wethente lakhe; bakhangele emva kukaMozisi aze angene ethenteni;" 
Exodus33:9 njalo kwakusithi lapho uMozisi esengene ethenteni, insika yeyezi yehle, ime emnyango wethente; ibisikhuluma loMozisi." 
Exodus33:10 Lapho bonke abantu beyibona insika yeyezi imi emnyango wethente, bonke abantu basukume bakhonze, kube ngulowo lalowo emnyango wethente lakhe." 
Exodus33:11 I Nkosi yakhuluma-ke kuMozisi ubuso ngobuso, njengomuntu ekhuluma lomngane wakhe. Wasebuyela enkambeni, kodwa uJoshuwa inceku yakhe, indodana kaNuni, ijaha, kasukanga phakathi kwethente." 
Exodus33:12 UMozisi wasesithi e Nkosi ni: Khangela, uthi kimi: Yenyusa lababantu; kodwa wena kawungazisanga ozamthuma lami. Kanti wena uthe: Ngiyakwazi ngebizo, futhi uthole umusa emehlweni ami." 
Exodus33:13 Ngakho-ke ngicela, uba ngithole umusa emehlweni akho, ake ungazise indlela yakho, ukuze ngikwazi, ukuze ngithole umusa emehlweni akho; ukhumbule futhi ukuthi lesisizwe singabantu bakho." 
Exodus33:14 Wasesithi: Ubukhona bami buzahamba lawe, ngikuphumuze." 
Exodus33:15 Wasesithi kuye: Uba ubukhona bakho bungahambi lami, ungasenyusi lapha." 
Exodus33:16 Ngoba kuzakwaziwa-ke ngani ukuthi ngithole umusa emehlweni akho, mina labantu bakho? Kakusikho yini ekuhambeni kwakho lathi? Ngakho sizakwehlukaniswa, mina labantu bakho, kubo bonke abantu abasebusweni bomhlaba." 
Exodus33:17 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Lale into oyitshoyo ngizayenza, ngoba uthole umusa emehlweni ami, njalo ngiyakwazi ngebizo." 
Exodus33:18 Wasesithi: Ake ungitshengise inkazimulo yakho. 
Exodus33:19 Yasisithi: Mina ngizadlulisa bonke ubuhle bami phambi kwakho, ngimemezele ibizo le Nkosi phambi kwakho. Ngizahawukela lowo engizamhawukela, ngibe lomusa kulowo engizakuba lomusa kuye." 
Exodus33:20 Yathi futhi: Ungebone ubuso bami; ngoba kakho umuntu ongangibona, aphile." 
Exodus33:21 I Nkosi yasisithi: Khangela, kulendawo ngakimi lapho ozakuma khona edwaleni;" 
Exodus33:22 kuzakuthi-ke lapho inkazimulo yami isedlula, ngizakufaka esikhexeni sedwala, ngikusibekele ngesandla sami ngize ngidlule;" 
Exodus33:23 besengisusa isandla sami ubusubona ingemuva yami; kodwa ubuso bami kabuyikubonwa. 
Exodus34:1 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Zibazele izibhebhe ezimbili zamatshe njengezakuqala; ngibe sengibhala phezu kwezibhebhe amazwi ayesezibhebheni zakuqala owaziphahlazayo. 
Exodus34:2 Ubusulungile ekuseni, wenyukele entabeni yeSinayi ekuseni, ume phambi kwami lapho engqongeni yentaba." 
Exodus34:3 Njalo kungenyukeli muntu kanye lawe, futhi kungabonakali lamuntu entabeni yonke; njalo izimvu lezinkomo zingadli phambi kwaleyontaba." 
Exodus34:4 Wasebaza izibhebhe ezimbili zamatshe njengezakuqala; uMozisi wasevuka ekuseni kakhulu, wenyukela entabeni yeSinayi, njengoba i Nkosi imlayile, wathatha esandleni sakhe izibhebhe ezimbili zamatshe." 
Exodus34:5 I Nkosi yasisehla eyezini, yema laye lapho, yamemeza ibizo le Nkosi." 
Exodus34:6 I Nkosi yasisedlula phambi kwakhe, yamemeza yathi: I Nkosi, I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu, elesihawu elomusa, ephuza ukuthukuthela, levame ububele lobuqotho," 
Exodus34:7 egcinela abayizinkulungwane umusa, ethethelela ububi lesiphambeko lesono, engayikuyekela lokuyekela olecala, ephindisela ububi baboyise phezu kwabantwana laphezu kwabantwana babantwana kuze kube sesizukulwaneni sesithathu lesesine." 
Exodus34:8 UMozisi wasephangisa, wakhothamela emhlabathini, wakhonza." 
Exodus34:9 Wathi: Uba-ke ngithole umusa emehlweni akho, Nkosi, akuthi iNkosi ihambe phakathi kwethu, ngoba yisizwe esintamo lukhuni, uthethelele ububi bethu lesono sethu, usithathe sibe yilifa lakho." 
Exodus34:10 Yasisithi: Khangela, ngenza isivumelwano; phambi kwabantu bonke ngizakwenza izimangaliso ezingazange zidalwe emhlabeni wonke laphakathi kwezizwe zonke; labo bonke abantu ophakathi kwabo bazabona umsebenzi we Nkosi, ngoba kuyesabeka engizakwenza lawe." 
Exodus34:11 Zigcinele lokho engikulaya khona lamuhla; khangela ngizaxotsha phambi kwakho amaAmori lamaKhanani lamaHethi lamaPerizi lamaHivi lamaJebusi. 
Exodus34:12 Ziqaphelisele ukuthi ungenzi isivumelwano labakhileyo elizweni oya kulo, hlezi kube ngumjibila phakathi kwakho." 
Exodus34:13 Kodwa amalathi abo lizawadiliza, lensika zabo eziyizithombe lizaziphahlaza, lezixuku zabo lizazigamula;" 
Exodus34:14 ngoba kawuyikukhonza omunye unkulunkulu; ngoba i Nkosi, ebizo layo linguBukhwele, inguNkulunkulu olobukhwele." 
Exodus34:15 Hlezi wenze isivumelwano labakhileyo elizweni, nxa bephinga ngokulandela onkulunkulu babo, behlabele onkulunkulu babo, lomunye akunxuse, njalo udle okomhlatshelo wakhe;" 
Exodus34:16 uwathathele amadodana akho kumadodakazi abo; nxa amadodakazi abo ephinga ngokulandela onkulunkulu bawo, enze lamadodana akho ukuthi aphinge ngokulandela onkulunkulu bawo." 
Exodus34:17 Ungazenzeli onkulunkulu ababunjwe ngokuncibilikisa. 
Exodus34:18 Umkhosi wesinkwa esingelamvubelo uwugcine; insuku eziyisikhombisa udle isinkwa esingelamvubelo njengokukulaya kwami, ngesikhathi esimisiweyo senyanga kaAbhibhi, ngoba ngenyanga kaAbhibhi waphuma eGibhithe." 
Exodus34:19 Konke okuvula isizalo kungokwami, lalo lonke izibulo eliduna elezifuyo, inkomo kumbe imvu." 
Exodus34:20 Kodwa izibulo likababhemi ulihlenge ngezinyane; uba-ke ungalihlengi ulephule intamo. Lonke izibulo lamadodana akho uzalihlenga; njalo kungabonakali muntu phambi kwami engaphethe lutho. 
Exodus34:21 Uzasebenza insuku eziyisithupha, kodwa ngosuku lwesikhombisa uphumule, ngesikhathi sokulima lekuvuneni uzaphumula." 
Exodus34:22 Uzagcina umkhosi wamaviki, izithelo zokuqala zesivuno sengqoloyi, lomkhosi wokubuthelela ekuthwaseni komnyaka." 
Exodus34:23 Kathathu ngomnyaka wonke owesilisa uzabonakala phambi kweNkosi uJehova, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
Exodus34:24 Ngoba ngizaxotsha izizwe phambi kwakho, ngiqhelise imingcele yakho; njalo kakuyikuba lamuntu ofisa ilizwe lakho nxa usenyuka ukuyabonakala phambi kwe Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho, kathathu ngomnyaka." 
Exodus34:25 Unganikeli igazi lomhlatshelo wami kanye lokulemvubelo; futhi kakungasali kuze kuse umhlatshelo womkhosi wephasika. 
Exodus34:26 Ikhethelo lezithelo zokuqala zensimu yakho ulilethe endlini ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho. Ungapheki izinyane echagweni lukanina. 
Exodus34:27 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Zibhalele lamazwi, ngoba ngokutsho kwalamazwi ngenzile isivumelwano lawe loIsrayeli." 
Exodus34:28 Njalo wayelapho le Nkosi insuku ezingamatshumi amane lobusuku obungamatshumi amane; kadlanga sinkwa kanathanga manzi. Yabhala-ke ezibhebheni amazwi esivumelwano, imilayo elitshumi." 
Exodus34:29 Kwasekusithi uMozisi esehla entabeni yeSinayi, lezibhebhe zombili zobufakazi zazisesandleni sikaMozisi esehla entabeni, uMozisi wayengazi ukuthi isikhumba sobuso bakhe sasikhazimula ekhuluma laye." 
Exodus34:30 Kwathi uAroni labo bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli bebona uMozisi, khangela-ke, isikhumba sobuso bakhe sakhazimula, basebesesaba ukusondela kuye." 
Exodus34:31 UMozisi wasebabiza; loAroni lazo zonke induna zenhlangano babuyela kuye; uMozisi wasekhuluma labo. 
Exodus34:32 Njalo emva kwalokho basondela bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli; wasebalaya konke i Nkosi eyayikukhulume laye entabeni yeSinayi. 
Exodus34:33 Kwathi uMozisi eseqedile ukukhuluma labo, wafaka isimbombozo ebusweni bakhe." 
Exodus34:34 Kodwa lapho uMozisi engena phambi kwe Nkosi ukukhuluma layo, wasisusa isimbombozo aze aphume; esephumile wakhuluma kubantwana bakoIsrayeli lokho akulayiweyo," 
Exodus34:35 labantwana bakoIsrayeli babona ubuso bukaMozisi, ukuthi isikhumba sobuso bukaMozisi sakhazimula. UMozisi wabuyisela isimbombozo ebusweni bakhe, aze angene ukuyakhuluma laye." 
Exodus35:1 UMozisi wasebuthanisa inhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli, wathi kubo: La ngamazwi i Nkosi ewalayileyo ukuthi li wenze." 
Exodus35:2 Insuku eziyisithupha kuzakwenziwa umsebenzi, kodwa ngosuku lwesikhombisa kuzakuba yibungcwele kini, isabatha lokuphumula e Nkosi ni; loba ngubani owenza umsebenzi ngalo uzabulawa." 
Exodus35:3 Lingabasi umlilo ngosuku lwesabatha kuyo yonke imizi yenu. 
Exodus35:4 UMozisi wasekhuluma kunhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli esithi: Yile into i Nkosi eyilayileyo isithi: 
Exodus35:5 Thathani phakathi kwenu umnikelo ube ngowe Nkosi; loba ngubani olenhliziyo evumayo kawulethe, umnikelo we Nkosi, igolide lesiliva lethusi," 
Exodus35:6 lokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu, lelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, loboya bembuzi," 
Exodus35:7 lezikhumba eziphendulwe zababomvu zezinqama, lezikhumba zikamantswane, lezihlahla zesinga," 
Exodus35:8 lamafutha ezibane, lamakha amafutha okugcoba lempepha elephunga elimnandi," 
Exodus35:9 lamatshe ama-onikse*, lamatshe okubekwa awe-efodi lawesembatho sesifuba." 
Exodus35:10 Labo bonke abalenhliziyo ehlakaniphileyo phakathi kwenu kabeze benze konke i Nkosi ekulayileyo; 
Exodus35:11 ithabhanekele, ithente lalo, lesifulelo salo, ingwegwe zalo, lamapulanka alo, imithando yalo, insika zalo, lezisekelo zalo;" 
Exodus35:12 umtshokotsho, lemijabo yawo, isihlalo somusa, leveyili lesembeso;" 
Exodus35:13 itafula, lemijabo yalo, lezitsha zalo zonke, lezinkwa zokubukiswa;" 
Exodus35:14 loluthi lwesibane sesikhanyiso, lezitsha zalo, lezibane zalo, lamafutha esikhanyiso;" 
Exodus35:15 lelathi lempepha, lemijabo yalo, lamafutha okugcoba, lempepha elephunga elimnandi, lesilenge somnyango emnyango wethabhanekele;" 
Exodus35:16 ilathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa, lesihlengo sethusi elilaso, imijabo yalo, lazo zonke izitsha zalo, inditshi yokugezela lonyawo lwayo;" 
Exodus35:17 amakhetheni eguma, insika zalo, lezisekelo zazo, lesilenge sesango leguma;" 
Exodus35:18 izikhonkwane zethabhanekele, lezikhonkwane zeguma, lentambo zazo;" 
Exodus35:19 izembatho ezifekethisiweyo zokukhonza endaweni engcwele, izembatho ezingcwele zikaAroni umpristi, lezembatho zamadodana akhe, ukusebenza njengabapristi." 
Exodus35:20 Lenhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli yaphuma phambi kukaMozisi. 
Exodus35:21 Beza-ke, wonke onhliziyo yakhe eyamvusayo, laye wonke omoya wakhe owamenza wavuma, baletha umnikelo e Nkosi ni emsebenzini wethente lenhlangano lowenkonzo yonke yalo lowezembatho ezingcwele." 
Exodus35:22 Beza-ke abesilisa kanye labesifazana, bonke abavumayo ngenhliziyo, baletha iziceco lamacici lendandatho lamasongo, zonke izinto zegolide; laye wonke owazunguza umnikelo wokuzunguzwa wegolide e Nkosi ni." 
Exodus35:23 Laye wonke okwatholakala kuye okuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu lelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu loboya bembuzi lezikhumba eziphendulwe zababomvu zenqama lezikhumba zikamantswane bakuletha. 
Exodus35:24 Wonke owanikela umnikelo wesiliva lowethusi bakuletha kungumnikelo we Nkosi; laye wonke okwatholakala kuye izihlahla zesinga ezawo wonke umsebenzi wenkonzo baziletha. 
Exodus35:25 Labo bonke abesifazana ababehlakaniphile ngenhliziyo baphotha ngezandla zabo, baletha okuphothiweyo, okuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, lokuyibubende, okubomvu, lelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu." 
Exodus35:26 Labo bonke abesifazana abanhliziyo zabo zabavusa enhlakaniphweni baphotha uboya bembuzi. 
Exodus35:27 Lezinduna zaletha amatshe ama-onikse* lamatshe okubekwa, awe-efodi lawesembatho sesifuba," 
Exodus35:28 la makha lamafutha awesibane, lawamafutha okugcoba, lawempepha elephunga elimnandi." 
Exodus35:29 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli bawuletha umnikelo wesihle e Nkosi ni. Bonke abesilisa labesifazana abanhliziyo zabo zabenza bavuma ukulethela wonke umsebenzi i Nkosi eyayiwulayile ukuthi wenziwe ngesandla sikaMozisi. 
Exodus35:30 UMozisi wasesithi ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli: Bonani, i Nkosi imbizile ngebizo uBhezaleli indodana kaUri, indodana kaHuri owesizwe sakoJuda;" 
Exodus35:31 imgcwalisile ngoMoya kaNkulunkulu enhlakaniphweni, ekuqedisiseni, lelwazini, lemisebenzini yobungcitshi yonke," 
Exodus35:32 lokuthi acebe ubungcitshi ukusebenza ngegolide langesiliva langethusi," 
Exodus35:33 lekubazeni amatshe okufakwa, lekubazeni izigodo, ukusebenza emisebenzini yonke yeminwe ngobungcitshi." 
Exodus35:34 Ifakile laye enhliziyweni yakhe ukufundisa, yena loOholiyaba indodana kaAhisamaki owesizwe sakoDani." 
Exodus35:35 Ibagcwalisile ngokuhlakanipha kwenhliziyo, ukwenza wonke umsebenzi wombazi, lowengcitshi, lowomfeketisi ngenalithi, ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka langokuyibubende, ngokubomvu langelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, lowomeluki; besenza wonke umsebenzi beceba ubungcitshi." 
Exodus36:1 UBhezaleli loOholiyaba basebesenza, lawo wonke amadoda ahlakaniphileyo ngenhliziyo okukuwo i Nkosi ifake ukuhlakanipha lokuqedisisa ukwazi ukwenza wonke umsebenzi wenkonzo yendawo engcwele, njengakho konke i Nkosi eyayikulayile." 
Exodus36:2 UMozisi wasebiza uBhezaleli loOholiyaba layo yonke indoda ehlakaniphileyo ngenhliziyo i Nkosi ifake inhlakanipho enhliziyweni yayo, wonke onhliziyo yakhe eyamvusela ukusondela emsebenzini ukuwenza;" 
Exodus36:3 basebesemukela kuMozisi wonke umnikelo, abantwana bakoIsrayeli ababewulethele umsebenzi wenkonzo yendlu engcwele ukuwenza. Bona-ke babesaletha kuye iminikelo yesihle ukusa ngokusa." 
Exodus36:4 Bonke abahlakaniphileyo ababesenza wonke umsebenzi wendlu engcwele basebesiza, ngulowo lalowo evela emsebenzini wakhe, abawenzayo." 
Exodus36:5 Basebekhuluma kuMozisi besithi: Abantu baletha okunengi kakhulu okwedlula okwanele ukusetshenzwa komsebenzi i Nkosi elaye ukuthi wenziwe. 
Exodus36:6 UMozisi waselaya ukuthi bedlulise ilizwi enkambeni lisithi: Kakungabi lendoda kumbe umfazi owenza futhi umsebenzi ngomnikelo wendlu engcwele. Ngalokhu abantu banqatshelwa ukuthi balethe; 
Exodus36:7 ngoba okokusetshenziswa kwakwanele kubo, ukuwenza umsebenzi wonke, kwaze kwasala." 
Exodus36:8 Labo bonke abahlakaniphileyo ngenhliziyo phakathi kwalabo ababesenza umsebenzi wethabhanekele benza amakhetheni alitshumi; ngelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lentambo ephothiweyo lokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu, ngamakherubi* wawenza, umsebenzi wengcitshi." 
Exodus36:9 Ubude bekhetheni elilodwa babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili lesificaminwembili, lobubanzi bekhetheni elilodwa babuzingalo ezine; wonke amakhetheni ayelesilinganiso sinye." 
Exodus36:10 Wasehlanganisa amakhetheni amahlanu elinye lelinye, wahlanganisa amanye amakhetheni amahlanu elinye lelinye." 
Exodus36:11 Wenza izihitshela ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka emphethweni wekhetheni elinye, ekucineni ekuhlanganeni; wenze njalo emphethweni wekhetheni elisekucineni, ekuhlanganeni kwelesibili." 
Exodus36:12 Wenza izihitshela ezingamatshumi amahlanu kwelinye ikhetheni, wenza lezihitshela ezingamatshumi amahlanu emphethweni wekhetheni, elisekuhlanganeni kwelesibili; izihitshela zazikhangelene, esinye lesinye." 
Exodus36:13 Wenza ingwegwe zegolide ezingamatshumi amahlanu, wahlanganisa amakhetheni, elinye lelinye ngengwegwe; ngalokhu kwaba lithabhanekele linye." 
Exodus36:14 Wenza amakhetheni ngoboya bembuzi abe lithente phezu kwethabhanekele; wawenza amakhetheni alitshumi lanye. 
Exodus36:15 Ubude bekhetheni elilodwa babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amathathu, lobubanzi bekhetheni elilodwa babuzingalo ezine; amakhetheni alitshumi lanye ayeyisilinganiso sinye." 
Exodus36:16 Wahlanganisa amakhetheni amahlanu wodwa, lamakhetheni ayisithupha wodwa." 
Exodus36:17 Wenza izihitshela ezingamatshumi amahlanu emphethweni wekhetheni elisekucineni ekuhlanganeni, lezihitshela ezingamatshumi amahlanu wazenza emphethweni wekhetheni elihlanganisa elesibili." 
Exodus36:18 Wenza ingwegwe zethusi ezingamatshumi amahlanu, ukuhlanganisa ithente, ukuze libe linye." 
Exodus36:19 Wenza isifulelo sethente ngezikhumba eziphendulwe zababomvu zenqama, lesifulelo ngezikhumba zikamantswane phezulu." 
Exodus36:20 Wenza amapulanka ethabhanekele ngesihlahla sesinga, amiyo;" 
Exodus36:21 ubude bepulanka babuzingalo ezilitshumi, lobubanzi bepulanka ngalinye babuyingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili." 
Exodus36:22 Ipulanka elilodwa lalilemisuka emibili, ihlangana omunye komunye; wenze njalo kuwo wonke amapulanka ethabhanekele." 
Exodus36:23 Wenza amapulanka ethabhanekele, amapulanka angamatshumi amabili ehlangothini lweningizimu ngaseningizimu;" 
Exodus36:24 wenza izisekelo ezingamatshumi amane zesiliva ngaphansi kwamapulanka angamatshumi amabili, izisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwepulanka linye zibe ngezemisuka yalo yomibili, lezisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwelinye ipulanka zibe ngezemisuka yalo yomibili;" 
Exodus36:25 wenza amapulanka angamatshumi amabili ehlangothini lwesibili lwethabhanekele, ehlangothini lwenyakatho," 
Exodus36:26 lezisekelo zawo ezingamatshumi amane zesiliva, izisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwepulanka linye, lezisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwelinye ipulanka." 
Exodus36:27 Wenza amapulanka ayisithupha ehlangothini lwethabhanekele ngentshonalanga," 
Exodus36:28 lamapulanka amabili wawenzela izingonsi zethabhanekele ngasemuva; 
Exodus36:29 ayengamaphahla ngaphansi ehlangene, ephelele phezulu, ngesongo linye; wenze njalo kuwo womabili, ezingonsini zombili." 
Exodus36:30 Njalo kwakulamapulanka ayisificaminwembili lezisekelo zawo zesiliva, izisekelo ezilitshumi lesithupha, izisekelo ezimbili, izisekelo ezimbili ngaphansi kwepulanka linye." 
Exodus36:31 Wenza imithando ngesihlahla sesinga, emihlanu eyamapulanka ehlangothini olunye lwethabhanekele" 
Exodus36:32 lemithando emihlanu eyamapulanka kolunye uhlangothi lwethabhanekele, lemithando emihlanu eyamapulanka ethabhanekele, ehlangothini olungemuva ngasentshonalanga." 
Exodus36:33 Wenza umthando waphakathi udabule phakathi kwamapulanka, kusukela ekucineni kusiya ekucineni." 
Exodus36:34 Wahuqa amapulanka ngegolide, wenza amasongo awo ngegolide, azindawo zemithando, wayihuqa imithando ngegolide." 
Exodus36:35 Wenza iveyili ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka langokuyibubende langokubomvu langelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lentambo ephothiweyo, walenza laba ngumsebenzi wengcitshi lamakherubi*." 
Exodus36:36 Walenzela insika ezine ngesinga, wazihuqa ngegolide; ingwegwe zazo zazingezegolide; wazibumbela ngokuncibilikisa izisekelo ezine zesiliva." 
Exodus36:37 Wenza isilenge somnyango wethente ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu, lelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lentambo ephothiweyo, umsebenzi womfekethisi ngenalithi;" 
Exodus36:38 lensika zalo ezinhlanu lengwegwe zazo; wazihuqa izihloko zazo lezibopho zazo ngegolide; lezisekelo zazo ezinhlanu zazingezethusi. 
Exodus37:1 UBhezaleli wasewenza umtshokotsho ngesihlahla sesinga, ubude bawo babuzingalo ezimbili lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili, lobubanzi bawo babuyingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili, lokuphakama kwawo kwakuyingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili." 
Exodus37:2 Wawuhuqa ngegolide elicwengekileyo ngaphakathi langaphandle, wawenzela umqolo wegolide inhlangothi zonke." 
Exodus37:3 Wawubumbela ngokuncibilikisa futhi amasongo amane egolide enyaweni zawo zozine, kuze kuthi amasongo amabili ayekolunye uhlangothi lamasongo amabili kolunye uhlangothi." 
Exodus37:4 Wenza imijabo ngesihlahla sesinga, wayihuqa ngegolide." 
Exodus37:5 Wayifaka imijabo emasongweni enhlangothini zomtshokotsho ukuthwala umtshokotsho. 
Exodus37:6 Wenza isihlalo somusa ngegolide elicwengekileyo, ubude baso babuzingalo ezimbili lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili, lobubanzi baso babuyingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili." 
Exodus37:7 Wenza amakherubi* amabili ngegolide, wawenza ngomsebenzi okhandiweyo, avela emaphethelweni womabili esihlalo somusa," 
Exodus37:8 elinye ikherubhi livela ephethelweni lwaloluhlangothi, lelinye ikherubhi* livela ephethelweni lolunye uhlangothi; wawenza amakherubi amabili evela esihlalweni somusa evela emaphethelweni womabili aso." 
Exodus37:9 Amakherubi* elula impiko ezimbili ngaphezulu, embomboza isihlalo somusa ngempiko zawo, lobuso bawo babukhangelene; ubuso bamakherubi babukhangele isihlalo somusa." 
Exodus37:10 Njalo wenza itafula ngesihlahla sesinga, ubude balo babuzingalo ezimbili, lobubanzi balo babuyingalo, lokuphakama kwalo kwakuyingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili." 
Exodus37:11 Walihuqa ngegolide elicwengekileyo, walenzela umqolo wegolide inhlangothi zonke." 
Exodus37:12 Walenzela ibhanti elilingana lobubanzi besandla inhlangothi zonke, wenzela ibhanti lalo umqolo wegolide inhlangothi zonke." 
Exodus37:13 Walibumbela ngokuncibilikisa amasongo amane egolide, wawafaka amasongo ezingonsini ezine ezazisenyaweni zozine zalo." 
Exodus37:14 Eduze lebhanti kwakulamasongo, indawo zemijabo yokuthwala itafula." 
Exodus37:15 Wenza lemijabo ngesihlahla sesinga, wayihuqa ngegolide, ukuthwala itafula" 
Exodus37:16 Wazenza izitsha ezaziphezu kwetafula, imiganu yalo lenkezo zalo lenditshi zalo lezitsha zokuthulula, ngegolide elicwengekileyo." 
Exodus37:17 Wenza uluthi lwesibane ngegolide elicwengekileyo; ngomsebenzi okhandiweyo walwenza uluthi lwesibane, isisekelo salo, lesiqu salo, imbizana zalo, iziduku zalo, lamaluba alo, kwakuvela kulo." 
Exodus37:18 Lengatsha eziyisithupha ziphuma enhlangothini zalo, ingatsha ezintathu zoluthi lwesibane kolunye uhlangothi lwalo lengatsha ezintathu zoluthi lwesibane kolunye uhlangothi lwalo." 
Exodus37:19 Egatsheni olunye kwakulembizana ezintathu ezenziwe zafanana lamaluba e-alimondi*, isiduku leluba; lembizana ezintathu ezenziwe zafanana lamaluba e-alimondi kolunye ugatsha, isiduku leluba; kwakunjalo ngengatsha eziyisithupha eziphuma eluthini lwesibane." 
Exodus37:20 Njalo kwakukhona eluthini lwesibane imbizana ezine ezenziwe zafanana lamaluba e-alimondi, iziduku zalo lamaluba alo;" 
Exodus37:21 kwakukhona-ke isiduku ngaphansi kwengatsha ezimbili ezivela kulo, lesiduku ngaphansi kwengatsha ezimbili ezivela kulo, lesiduku ngaphansi kwengatsha ezimbili ezivela kulo, kuzo ingatsha eziyisithupha eziphuma kulo." 
Exodus37:22 Iziduku zazo lezingatsha zazo zazivela kulo; konke okwalo kwakungumsebenzi munye okhandiweyo wegolide elicwengekileyo. 
Exodus37:23 Wasesenza izibane zalo eziyisikhombisa, lezindlawu zalo, lemiganu yalo yomlotha, ngegolide elicwengekileyo." 
Exodus37:24 Walenza ngethalenta* legolide elicwengekileyo, lazo zonke izitsha zalo." 
Exodus37:25 Njalo wenza ilathi lempepha ngesihlahla sesinga; ubude balo babuyingalo lobubanzi balo babuyingalo, lilingana inhlangothi zozine; lokuphakama kwalo kwakuzingalo ezimbili; impondo zalo zazivela kulo." 
Exodus37:26 Walihuqa ngegolide elicwengekileyo, ingaphezulu lemiduli yalo inhlangothi zonke lempondo zalo; walenzela-ke umqolo wegolide inhlangothi zonke." 
Exodus37:27 Waselenzela amasongo amabili egolide, ngaphansi komqolo walo, ezingonsini ezimbili zalo, enhlangothini ezimbili zalo, ukuba yindawo yemijabo yokulithwala." 
Exodus37:28 Wayenza imijabo ngesihlahla sesinga, wayihuqa ngegolide." 
Exodus37:29 Wenza amafutha angcwele okugcoba, lempepha ecwengekileyo yamakha alephunga elimnandi, njengokwenza komenzi wamakha." 
Exodus38:1 Wenza-ke ilathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa ngesihlahla sesinga; ubude balo babuzingalo ezinhlanu, lobubanzi balo babuzingalo ezinhlanu, lilingana inhlangothi zozine, lokuphakama kwalo kwakuzingalo ezintathu." 
Exodus38:2 Wenza impondo zalo engonsini zalo zozine; impondo zalo zazivela kulo; walihuqa ngethusi. 
Exodus38:3 Wenza zonke izinto zelathi, izimbiza lamafotsholo lemiganu yokufafaza lamafologwe lezitsha zokuthwala umlilo; zonke izinto zalo wazenza ngethusi." 
Exodus38:4 Walenzela ilathi isihlengo sethusi esenziwe njengembule, ngaphansi komphetho walo, sehla saze safinyelela phakathi kwalo." 
Exodus38:5 Wabumba ngokuncibilikisa amasongo amane engonsini zozine zesihlengo sethusi, abe zindawo zemijabo." 
Exodus38:6 Wayenza imijabo ngesihlahla sesinga, wayihuqa ngethusi." 
Exodus38:7 Wayifaka imijabo emasongweni enhlangothini zelathi ukuze lithwalwe ngayo; walenza lagubheka ngamapulanka. 
Exodus38:8 Wenza inditshi yokugezela ngethusi, lonyawo lwayo ngethusi, ngezibuko zabesifazana abasebenzayo, abasebenza emnyango wethente lenhlangano." 
Exodus38:9 Wenza leguma; ehlangothini oluseningizimu ngaseningizimu kwakukhona amakhetheni eguma ayengawelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lentambo ephothiweyo, izingalo ezilikhulu;" 
Exodus38:10 insika zawo ezingamatshumi amabili lezisekelo zawo ezingamatshumi amabili zazingezethusi, ingwegwe zensika lezibopho zazo zazingezesiliva." 
Exodus38:11 Lehlangothini olungenyakatho ingalo ezilikhulu; insika zawo ezingamatshumi amabili lezisekelo zawo ezingamatshumi amabili zazingezethusi; ingwegwe zezinsika lezibopho zazo zazingezesiliva. 
Exodus38:12 Lehlangothini olusentshonalanga kwakukhona amakhetheni azingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu, lensika zawo ezilitshumi lezisekelo zawo ezilitshumi; ingwegwe zezinsika lezibopho zazo zazingezesiliva." 
Exodus38:13 Lehlangothini olusempumalanga ngasempumalanga ingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu. 
Exodus38:14 Amakhetheni kwelinye icele ayezingalo ezilitshumi lanhlanu, insika zawo ezintathu lezisekelo zawo ezintathu." 
Exodus38:15 Lakwelinye icele, kwakukhona ngapha langapha komnyango weguma amakhetheni azingalo ezilitshumi lanhlanu, insika zawo ezintathu lezisekelo zawo ezintathu." 
Exodus38:16 Wonke amakhetheni eguma inhlangothi zonke ayengawelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lentambo ephothiweyo. 
Exodus38:17 Lezisekelo zensika zazingezethusi, ingwegwe zezinsika lezibopho zazo zingezesiliva; ukuhuqwa kwezihloko zazo kwakungesiliva, lazo zonke insika zeguma zazilesibopho sesiliva." 
Exodus38:18 Lesilenge somnyango weguma sasingumsebenzi womfekethisi ngenalithi, ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu lelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lentambo ephothiweyo; ubude babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili, lokuphakama ebubanzini kwakuzingalo ezinhlanu, kuvumelane lamakhetheni eguma." 
Exodus38:19 Insika zawo ezine lezisekelo zawo ezine zingezethusi, ingwegwe zawo zingezesiliva, lokuhuqwa kwezihloko zawo lezibopho zawo kungesiliva." 
Exodus38:20 Lazo zonke izikhonkwane zethabhanekele lezeguma inhlangothi zonke zazingezethusi. 
Exodus38:21 Leli linani lezinto zethabhanekele, ithabhanekele lobufakazi, ezabalwayo njengokulaya kukaMozisi, umsebenzi wamaLevi, ngesandla sikaIthamari indodana kaAroni umpristi." 
Exodus38:22 UBhezaleli indodana kaUri indodana kaHuri owesizwe sakoJuda wasekwenza konke njengalokho i Nkosi ibimlayile uMozisi; 
Exodus38:23 njalo kanye laye kwakuloOholiyaba indodana kaAhisamaki owesizwe sakoDani, umbazi wamatshe, lengcitshi, lomfeketishi ngenalithi ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu lelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu." 
Exodus38:24 Lonke igolide elasetshenziswa emsebenzini, kuwo wonke umsebenzi wendlu engcwele, ngitsho igolide lomnikelo wokuzunguzwa, lalingamathalenta angamatshumi amabili lesificamunwemunye lamashekeli angamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi amathathu, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele." 
Exodus38:25 Lesiliva sababalwayo benhlangano sasingamathalenta alikhulu lamashekeli ayinkulungwane lamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi ayisikhombisa lanhlanu ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; 
Exodus38:26 kwaba libheka* ngekhanda linye, ingxenye yeshekeli, njengokweshekeli lendlu engcwele, kuye wonke odlulela kwababaliweyo, kusukela kwabaleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu; abazinkulungwane ezingamakhulu eziyisithupha lantathu lamakhulu amahlanu lamatshumi amahlanu." 
Exodus38:27 Njalo kwakulamathalenta alikhulu esiliva ukubumba ngokuncibilikisa izisekelo zendlu engcwele lezisekelo zeveyili, izisekelo ezilikhulu ngamathalenta alikhulu, ithalenta ngesisekelo." 
Exodus38:28 Lokwama shekeli ayinkulungwane lamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi ayisikhombisa lanhlanu wenza ingwegwe zensika, wahuqa inhloko zazo wazenzela izibopho." 
Exodus38:29 Lethusi lomnikelo wokuzunguzwa lalingamathalenta angamatshumi ayisikhombisa lamashekeli azinkulungwane ezimbili lamakhulu amane. 
Exodus38:30 Wenza ngalo izisekelo zomnyango wethente lenhlangano, lelathi lethusi, lesihlengo sethusi elalilaso, lezinto zonke zelathi," 
Exodus38:31 lezisekelo zeguma inhlangothi zonke, lezisekelo zesango leguma, lazo zonke izikhonkwane zethabhanekele, lezikhonkwane zonke zeguma inhlangothi zonke." 
Exodus39:1 Langokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu benza izembatho zomsebenzi zokusebenza endaweni engcwele; benza njalo izembatho ezingcwele ezazingezikaAroni, njengalokhu i Nkosi ibimlayile uMozisi." 
Exodus39:2 Wasesenza i-efodi* ngegolide, ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, lokuyibubende, lokubomvu, langelembu elicolekileyo lentambo ephothiweyo." 
Exodus39:3 Basebekhanda izicantalala zegolide, bazisika zaba yizincingwana ukuzisebenzisa phakathi kokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka laphakathi kokuyibubende laphakathi kokubomvu laphakathi kwelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu; umsebenzi wengcitshi." 
Exodus39:4 Basenzela izichibi zamahlombe ukusihlanganisa; sahlanganiswa emaceleni aso womabili. 
Exodus39:5 Lebhanti le-efodi lakhe elelukwe ngobungcitshi elikulo, liyinto yinye, njengomsebenzi walo, ngegolide, ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka langokuyibubende lokubomvu langelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lentambo ephothiweyo, njengalokhu i Nkosi ibimlayile uMozisi." 
Exodus39:6 Balungisa njalo amatshe e-onikse*, bawabeka ukuze azingelezelwe ngezinto ezitshiliweyo zegolide, abazwa njengokubazwa kwendandatho elophawu, ngamabizo abantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Exodus39:7 Wasewabeka phezu kwezichibi ze-efodi, abe ngamatshe esikhumbuzo ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus39:8 Wenza isembatho sesifuba ngomsebenzi wengcitshi, njengomsebenzi we-efodi, ngegolide, ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu lelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lentambo ephothiweyo." 
Exodus39:9 Sasilingana inhlangothi zozine, benza isembatho sesifuba saphindwa, ubude baso babungangokwelulwa kweminwe, lobubanzi baso babungangokwelulwa kweminwe, siphindiwe." 
Exodus39:10 Basebefaka kuso imizila emine yamatshe; umzila wesardikisi*, itopazi* le-emeraldi*; umzila wokuqala;" 
Exodus39:11 lomzila wesibili, i-emeraldi*, isafire* lendayimana;" 
Exodus39:12 lomzila wesithathu, ijasinte*, i-agate* le-ametiste*;" 
Exodus39:13 lomzila wesine, ibherule*, i-onikse* lejaspi*; ayezingelezelwe ngezinto ezitshiliweyo zegolide lapho afakwe khona." 
Exodus39:14 Lalawomatshe ayengokwamabizo amadodana kaIsrayeli, alitshumi lambili, njengamabizo awo, njengokubazwa kwendandatho elophawu, ilelo lalelo ngokwebizo lawo, ngokwezizwe ezilitshumi lambili." 
Exodus39:15 Benza njalo esembathweni sesifuba amaketane, umsebenzi ophothiweyo, ngegolide elicwengekileyo." 
Exodus39:16 Benza izinto ezimbili ezitshiliweyo ngegolide lamasongo amabili egolide, bafaka amasongo amabili emaceleni womabili esembatho sesifuba," 
Exodus39:17 bafaka amaketane amabili egolide emasongweni amabili emaceleni esembatho sesifuba. 
Exodus39:18 Izihloko ezimbili zamaketane womabili bazifaka ezintweni ezimbili ezitshiliweyo zegolide, bazifaka ezichibini ze-efodi ngaphambili kwaso kanye." 
Exodus39:19 Benza lamasongo amabili egolide, bawafaka emaceleni womabili esembatho sesifuba, emphethweni waso, oseceleni kwe-efodi ngaphakathi." 
Exodus39:20 Benza njalo amasongo amabili egolide, bawafaka ezichibini ezimbili ze-efodi, ngaphansi, ngaphambili kwaso, maqondana lekuhlanganeni kwaso, phezu kwebhanti elelukwe ngobungcitshi le-efodi." 
Exodus39:21 Basebebophela isembatho sesifuba ngamasongo aso emasongweni e-efodi ngentambo eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, ukuze sibe phezu kwebhanti elelukwe ngobungcitshi le-efodi, ukuze isembatho sesifuba singakhumuki e-efodini; njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus39:22 Wasesenza ibhatshi le-efodi ngomsebenzi owelukiweyo, lonke ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka;" 
Exodus39:23 lesikhala sebhatshi sasiphakathi laphakathi kwaso, njengesikhala sebhatshi lensimbi; isikhala sasilomphetho osizingelezeleyo ukuze singadabuki." 
Exodus39:24 Lemiphethweni yebhatshi benza amapomegranati* ngokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu, kuphothiwe." 
Exodus39:25 Benza lamabhera egolide elicwengekileyo, bafaka amabhera phakathi laphakathi kwamapomegranati emiphethweni yebhatshi inhlangothi zonke, phakathi laphakathi kwamapomegranati," 
Exodus39:26 ibhera lepomegranati, ibhera lepomegranati, emiphethweni yebhatshi kuzingeleze, ukusebenza, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus39:27 Basebebenzela oAroni lamadodana akhe izigqoko ngelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lomsebenzi owelukiweyo," 
Exodus39:28 leqhiye yelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, lezingowane ezinhle zelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, labokabhudula bangaphansi belembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lentambo ephothiweyo," 
Exodus39:29 lebhanti lelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu lentambo ephothiweyo lokuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lokuyibubende lokubomvu, umsebenzi womfekethisi ngenalithi, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus39:30 Benza lencence yomqhele ongcwele ngegolide elicwengekileyo, babhala phezu kwayo umbhalo, ngokubazwa kwendandatho elophawu ukuthi: UBUNGCWELE ENKOSINI." 
Exodus39:31 Babophela kuyo intambo eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka ukuze ibotshelwe eqhiyeni ngaphezulu; njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi. 
Exodus39:32 Waphela-ke umsebenzi wonke wethabhanekele lethente lenhlangano; njalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli bakwenza njengakho konke i Nkosi eyakulaya kuMozisi; benza njalo. 
Exodus39:33 Basebeletha ithabhanekele kuMozisi, ithente, lazo zonke impahla zalo, ingwegwe zalo, amapulanka alo, imithando yalo, lensika zalo, lezisekelo zalo," 
Exodus39:34 lesifulelo sezikhumba eziphendulwe zababomvu zezinqama, lesifulelo sezikhumba zikamantswane, leveyili lesembeso," 
Exodus39:35 umtshokotsho wobufakazi lemijabo yawo lesihlalo somusa," 
Exodus39:36 itafula, zonke izitsha zalo, lezinkwa zokubukiswa," 
Exodus39:37 uluthi lwesibane olucwengekileyo, izibane zalo, izibane ezihleliweyo, lezitsha zalo zonke, lamafutha esibane," 
Exodus39:38 lelathi legolide, lamafutha okugcoba, lempepha elephunga elimnandi, lesilenge somnyango wethente," 
Exodus39:39 ilathi lethusi, lesihlengo sethusi elalilaso, imijabo yalo, lazo zonke izitsha zalo, inditshi yokugezela lonyawo lwayo," 
Exodus39:40 amakhetheni eguma, insika zalo, lezisekelo zalo, lesilenge sesango leguma, intambo zalo, lezikhonkwane zalo, lempahla yonke yomsebenzi wethabhanekele, wethente lenhlangano," 
Exodus39:41 izembatho zomsebenzi zokusebenza endaweni engcwele, izembatho ezingcwele zikaAroni umpristi, lezembatho zamadodana akhe ukuze basebenze njengabapristi." 
Exodus39:42 Njengakho konke i Nkosi eyakulaya uMozisi, ngokunjalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli benza umsebenzi wonke." 
Exodus39:43 UMozisi wasebona umsebenzi wonke, khangela-ke babewenze njengokulaya kwe Nkosi, babenze njalo; uMozisi wasebabusisa." 
Exodus40:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Exodus40:2 Ngosuku lwenyanga yokuqala, ngolokuqala lwenyanga, uzamisa ithabhanekele, ithente lenhlangano," 
Exodus40:3 ubusufaka lapho umtshokotsho wobufakazi, umbomboze umtshokotsho ngeveyili." 
Exodus40:4 Ungenise itafula, uhlele okuhlelwayo phezu kwalo; ungenise uluthi lwesibane, ulumathise izibane zalo." 
Exodus40:5 Ubeke ilathi legolide lempepha phambi komtshokotsho wobufakazi, ulengise isilenge somnyango wethabhanekele." 
Exodus40:6 Ubeke ilathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa phambi komnyango wethabhanekele wethente lenhlangano," 
Exodus40:7 ubeke inditshi yokugezela phakathi kwethente lenhlangano lelathi, uthele amanzi lapho." 
Exodus40:8 Umise iguma inhlangothi zonke, ulengise isilenge sesango leguma." 
Exodus40:9 Uthathe amafutha okugcoba, ugcobe ithabhanekele lakho konke okukulo, ulingcwelise lempahla yalo yonke, njalo lizakuba ngcwele." 
Exodus40:10 Njalo ugcobe ilathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa lezitsha zalo zonke, ulingcwelise ilathi, njalo ilathi lizakuba yingcwelengcwele." 
Exodus40:11 Njalo ugcobe inditshi yokugezela lonyawo lwayo, uyingcwelise." 
Exodus40:12 Usondeze uAroni lamadodana akhe emnyango wethente lenhlangano, ubagezise ngamanzi." 
Exodus40:13 Ugqokise uAroni izembatho ezingcwele, umgcobe, umngcwelise, ukuze angisebenzele njengompristi." 
Exodus40:14 Usondeze amadodana akhe, uwagqokise izigqoko," 
Exodus40:15 uwagcobe njengalokhu ugcobe uyise, ukuze angisebenzele njengabapristi; kuzakuthi-ke ukugcotshwa kwabo kuzakuba kubo yibupristi obuphakade kuzizukulwana zabo." 
Exodus40:16 UMozisi wenza njengakho konke i Nkosi eyayimlaye khona; wenza njalo. 
Exodus40:17 Kwasekusithi ngenyanga yokuqala ngomnyaka wesibili ngolokuqala lwenyanga ithabhanekele lamiswa. 
Exodus40:18 UMozisi wasemisa ithabhanekele; wabeka phansi izisekelo zalo, wamisa amapulanka alo, wafaka imithando yalo, wamisa insika zalo." 
Exodus40:19 Wendlala ithente phezu kwethabhanekele, wabeka isifulelo sethente phezu kwalo phezulu, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus40:20 Wathatha wafaka ubufakazi emtshokotshweni, wafaka imijabo emtshokotshweni, wafaka isihlalo somusa ngaphezu komtshokotsho phezulu." 
Exodus40:21 Wangenisa umtshokotsho ethabhanekeleni, wamisa iveyili lesembeso wambomboza umtshokotsho wobufakazi, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus40:22 Wasefaka itafula ethenteni lenhlangano, eceleni kwethabhanekele ngenyakatho ngaphandle kweveyili," 
Exodus40:23 wahlela isinkwa ngohlelo phezu kwalo phambi kwe Nkosi, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus40:24 Wafaka uluthi lwesibane ethenteni lenhlangano, maqondana letafula, eceleni kwethabhanekele ngeningizimu." 
Exodus40:25 Walumathisa izibane phambi kwe Nkosi, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus40:26 Wafaka ilathi legolide ethenteni lenhlangano phambi kweveyili," 
Exodus40:27 watshisa kulo impepha elephunga elimnandi, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus40:28 Walengisa isilenge somnyango wethabhanekele. 
Exodus40:29 Wabeka ilathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa emnyango wethabhanekele lethente lenhlangano, wanikela kulo umnikelo wokutshiswa lomnikelo wokudla, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus40:30 Wabeka inditshi yokugezela phakathi kwethente lenhlangano lelathi, wathela lapho amanzi okugeza." 
Exodus40:31 UMozisi loAroni lamadodana akhe bagezela kuyo izandla zabo lenyawo zabo; 
Exodus40:32 ekungeneni kwabo ethenteni lenhlangano lekusondeleni kwabo elathini bageza, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Exodus40:33 Wasemisa iguma lazingelezela ithabhanekele lelathi, walengisa isilenge sesango leguma. UMozisi wasewuqeda umsebenzi." 
Exodus40:34 Iyezi laselisibekela ithente lenhlangano, lenkazimulo ye Nkosi yagcwalisa ithabhanekele." 
Exodus40:35 Ngakho uMozisi wayengelakungena ethenteni lenhlangano, ngoba iyezi lahlala phezu kwalo lenkazimulo ye Nkosi yagcwalisa ithabhanekele." 
Exodus40:36 Lalapho iyezi lisenyuswa lisuka ethabhanekeleni, abantwana bakoIsrayeli baqhubekela phambili enhambeni zabo zonke," 
Exodus40:37 kodwa lapho iyezi lingenyuswanga kabahambanga kuze kufike usuku lokwenyuswa kwalo. 
Exodus40:38 Ngoba iyezi le Nkosi laliphezu kwethabhanekele emini, lomlilo wawuphezu kwalo ebusuku, phambi kwamehlo endlu yonke yakoIsrayeli, enhambeni zabo zonke." 
Leviticus1:1 I Nkosi yasimbiza uMozisi yakhuluma kuye isethenteni lenhlangano yathi: 
Leviticus1:2 Khuluma kubantwana bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Nxa umuntu wakini esondeza umnikelo e Nkosi ni, lizasondeza umnikelo wenu ovela ezifuyweni, ovela enkomeni, loba ovela ezimvini." 
Leviticus1:3 Uba umnikelo wakhe ungumnikelo wokutshiswa ovela enkomeni, uzanikela iduna elingelasici, alinikele emnyango wethente lenhlangano, ngokuthanda kwakhe, phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus1:4 Uzabeka isandla sakhe enhlokweni yomnikelo wokutshiswa, njalo wemukelelwe yena, ukumenzela inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Leviticus1:5 Uzalihlaba ijongosi phambi kwe Nkosi; lamadodana kaAroni, abapristi, azanikela igazi, afafaze igazi elathini inhlangothi zonke, elisemnyango wethente lenhlangano." 
Leviticus1:6 Uzahlinza umnikelo wokutshiswa, awusike ngeziqa zawo." 
Leviticus1:7 Njalo amadodana kaAroni umpristi azafaka umlilo elathini, ahlele inkuni phezu komlilo." 
Leviticus1:8 Amadodana kaAroni, abapristi, azahlela-ke izitho, inhloko lamahwahwa, phezu kwenkuni ezisemlilweni ophezu kwelathi." 
Leviticus1:9 Kodwa imibilini yalo lemilenze yalo uzakugezisa ngamanzi; njalo umpristi uzakutshisa konke elathini, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa, umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo oloqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus1:10 Njalo uba umnikelo wakhe uvela emhlanjini, owezimvu loba owembuzi, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa, uzasondeza iduna elingelasici;" 
Leviticus1:11 uzalihlabela eceleni kwelathi ngenyakatho, phambi kwe Nkosi; njalo amadodana kaAroni, abapristi, azafafaza igazi lalo elathini inhlangothi zonke." 
Leviticus1:12 Uzalisika ngeziqa zalo, lenhloko yalo lamahwahwa alo; lompristi uzakuhlela phezu kwenkuni ezisemlilweni ophezu kwelathi." 
Leviticus1:13 Kodwa uzagezisa imibilini lemilenze ngamanzi; lompristi uzakunikela konke, akutshise elathini; kungumnikelo wokutshiswa, umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo oloqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus1:14 Uba-ke umnikelo wakhe e Nkosi ni ungumnikelo wokutshiswa owezinyoni, uzanikela umnikelo wakhe uvela emajubeni loba amaphuphu enkwilimba." 
Leviticus1:15 Umpristi alisondeze elathini, atshuphune inhloko yalo, alitshise elathini, legazi lalo likhanyelwe eceleni kwelathi," 
Leviticus1:16 asuse isidlelo salo lensiba zalo, akulahle eceleni kwelathi ngempumalanga, endaweni yomlotha," 
Leviticus1:17 aliqhaqhe ngempiko zalo, angalehlukanisi; umpristi alitshise-ke elathini, phezu kwenkuni ezisemlilweni; kungumnikelo wokutshiswa, umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo oloqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus2:1 Lalapho umuntu enikela e Nkosi ni umnikelo wokudla, umnikelo wakhe uzakuba ngowempuphu ecolekileyo; abesethela amafutha phezu kwawo, abeke inhlaka kuwo," 
Leviticus2:2 awulethe kumadodana kaAroni, abapristi, acuphe kuwo isandla sakhe esigcweleyo impuphu yawo ecolekileyo lokwamafutha awo, kanye lenhlaka yawo yonke; lompristi atshise isikhumbuzo sawo elathini, umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo, oloqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus2:3 Lokuseleyo komnikelo wokudla kuzakuba ngokukaAroni lokwamadodana akhe; kuyingcwelengcwele eminikelweni ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo. 
Leviticus2:4 Nxa uletha-ke umnikelo womnikelo wokudla ophekwe eziko, kawube ngowamaqebelengwana angelamvubelo empuphu ecolekileyo ahlanganiswe lamafutha, loba izinkwana eziyizipatalala ezingelamvubelo ezinindwe ngamafutha." 
Leviticus2:5 Uba-ke umnikelo wakho ungumnikelo wokudla ophekwe ngomganu oyincence, uzakuba ngowempuphu ecolekileyo engelamvubelo, ixubene lamafutha." 
Leviticus2:6 Uwuhlephune ube yizihlephu, uthele amafutha kuzo; kungumnikelo wokudla." 
Leviticus2:7 Uba-ke umnikelo wakho ungumnikelo wokudla ophekwe ngembiza, kuzakwenziwa ngempuphu ecolekileyo kanye lamafutha." 
Leviticus2:8 Njalo uzaletha umnikelo wokudla owenziwe ngalezizinto e Nkosi ni; nxa ulethwa kumpristi, uzawuletha elathini." 
Leviticus2:9 Umpristi uzathatha emnikelweni wokudla isikhumbuzo sawo, asitshise elathini; singumnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo, oloqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus2:10 Lokuseleyo komnikelo wokudla kuzakuba ngokukaAroni lokwamadodana akhe; kuyingcwelengcwele eminikelweni ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo. 
Leviticus2:11 Kakulamnikelo wokudla elizawuletha e Nkosi ni ozakwenziwa ngemvubelo, ngoba kawuyikutshisa langayiphi imvubelo loba ngaluphi uluju umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Leviticus2:12 Umnikelo wezithelo zokuqala lizawunikela e Nkosi ni, kodwa kawuyikutshiswa elathini kube luqhatshi olumnandi." 
Leviticus2:13 Lawo wonke umnikelo womnikelo wakho wokudla uzawutswaya ngetswayi; njalo ungavumeli ukuthi itswayi lesivumelwano sikaNkulunkulu wakho lisweleke emnikelweni wakho wokudla; kanye leminikelo yakho yonke uzanikela itswayi. 
Leviticus2:14 Uba-ke unikela umnikelo wokudla wezithelo zokuqala e Nkosi ni, uzanikela kube ngumnikelo wokudla ezithelweni zakho zokuqala amabele amatsha ayizikhwebu ezosiweyo, amabele achotshoziweyo ezikhwebu ezintsha;" 
Leviticus2:15 uthele amafutha kuwo, ubeke inhlaka phezu kwawo; kungumnikelo wokudla." 
Leviticus2:16 Umpristi uzatshisa-ke isikhumbuzo sawo, okwamabele achotshoziweyo awo lokwamafutha awo, layo yonke inhlaka yawo; kungumnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Leviticus3:1 Uba-ke umnikelo wakhe ungumhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, nxa enikela okwenkomo, ingabe iduna kumbe insikazi, uzawunikela ungelasici phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus3:2 Uzabeka isandla sakhe enhlokweni yomnikelo wakhe, awuhlabe emnyango wethente lenhlangano; amadodana kaAroni angabapristi azafafaza-ke igazi phezu kwelathi inhlangothi zonke." 
Leviticus3:3 Uzanikela okuvela kuwo umhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo, idanga, lamahwahwa wonke asemibilini," 
Leviticus3:4 lezinso zombili lamahwahwa akuzo asezinkalweni, lamahwahwa angaphezu kwesibindi uzawasusa lezinso." 
Leviticus3:5 Njalo amadodana kaAroni azawatshisa elathini phezu komnikelo wokutshiswa ophezu kwenkuni eziphezu komlilo; kungumnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo oloqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni. 
Leviticus3:6 Uba-ke umnikelo wakhe ongumhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula e Nkosi ni ungowomhlambi, iduna kumbe insikazi, uzawunikela ungelasici." 
Leviticus3:7 Uba enikela iwundlu, libe ngumnikelo wakhe, uzalinikela phambi kwe Nkosi," 
Leviticus3:8 abeke isandla sakhe enhlokweni yomnikelo wakhe, awuhlabe phambi kwethente lenhlangano; amadodana kaAroni azafafaza-ke igazi lawo phezu kwelathi inhlangothi zonke." 
Leviticus3:9 Uzanikela okuvela kuwo umhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo, amahwahwa awo, umsila wonke ononileyo ewuquma eduze lomgogodla, ledanga, lamahwahwa wonke asemibilini," 
Leviticus3:10 lezinso zombili lamahwahwa akuzo asezinkalweni, lamahwahwa angaphezu kwesibindi uzawasusa lezinso." 
Leviticus3:11 Umpristi uzakutshisa-ke elathini, kuyikudla komnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Leviticus3:12 Uba-ke umnikelo wakhe uyimbuzi, uzawunikela phambi kwe Nkosi," 
Leviticus3:13 abeke isandla sakhe enhlokweni yayo, ayihlabe phambi kwethente lenhlangano; amadodana kaAroni azafafaza-ke igazi layo phezu kwelathi inhlangothi zonke." 
Leviticus3:14 Uzanikela okuvela kiyo umnikelo wakhe, umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo, idanga, lamahwahwa wonke asemibilini," 
Leviticus3:15 lezinso zombili lamahwahwa akuzo asezinkalweni, lamahwahwa angaphezu kwesibindi uzawasusa lezinso." 
Leviticus3:16 Njalo umpristi uzakutshisa elathini, kuyikudla komnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo, kube luqhatshi olumnandi. Wonke amahwahwa ngawe Nkosi." 
Leviticus3:17 Yisimiso saphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu, emizini yenu yonke, sokuthi lingadli ngitsho amahwahwa lagazi." 
Leviticus4:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus4:2 Khuluma ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Uba umphefumulo usona ngokungazi umelana loba yiyiphi imilayo ye Nkosi, engafanele ukwenziwa, wenze okumelene lomunye wayo," 
Leviticus4:3 uba umpristi ogcotshiweyo esona, kube licala ebantwini, uzanikela ngesono sakhe asonileyo ijongosi ithole lenkomo elingelasici, e Nkosi ni, libe ngumnikelo wesono." 
Leviticus4:4 Uzaletha ijongosi emnyango wethente lenhlangano phambi kwe Nkosi, abeke isandla sakhe enhlokweni yejongosi, alihlabe ijongosi phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus4:5 Njalo umpristi ogcotshiweyo uzathatha okwegazi lejongosi, alilethe ethenteni lenhlangano." 
Leviticus4:6 Umpristi uzagxamuza-ke umunwe wakhe egazini, afafaze okwegazi kasikhombisa phambi kwe Nkosi, phambi kweveyili lendlu engcwele." 
Leviticus4:7 Njalo umpristi uzafaka okwegazi empondweni zelathi lempepha elephunga elimnandi phambi kwe Nkosi, elisethenteni lenhlangano, athululele lonke igazi lejongosi phansi kwelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa, elisemnyango wethente lenhlangano." 
Leviticus4:8 Lawo wonke amahwahwa ejongosi lomnikelo wesono uzawasusa kulo, idanga, lawo wonke amahwahwa asemibilini," 
Leviticus4:9 lezinso zombili lamahwahwa akuzo asezinkalweni, lamahwahwa angaphezu kwesibindi uzawasusa lezinso," 
Leviticus4:10 njengalokhu kususwa kiyo inkabi yomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula. Umpristi uzakutshisa elathini lomnikelo wokutshiswa. 
Leviticus4:11 Kodwa isikhumba sejongosi, lenyama yalo yonke, lenhloko yalo, lemilenze yalo, lemibilini yalo, lomswane walo," 
Leviticus4:12 yebo, ijongosi lonke uzalikhuphela ngaphandle kwenkamba, alise endaweni ehlambulukileyo, lapho okuthululelwa khona umlotha, alitshise phezu kwenkuni ngomlilo. Lizatshiselwa lapho okuthululelwa khona umlotha." 
Leviticus4:13 Uba-ke inhlangano yonke yakoIsrayeli isona ngokungazi, lendaba ifihlwe emehlweni ebandla, benze ulutho olumelene loba yiwuphi wemilayo ye Nkosi, okungafanele ukwenziwa, njalo babe lecala," 
Leviticus4:14 lapho isono abasone bemelene lawo sesisaziwa, ibandla lizanikela ijongosi ithole lenkomo, libe ngumnikelo wesono, lililethe phambi kwethente lenhlangano." 
Leviticus4:15 Njalo abadala benhlangano bazabeka izandla zabo enhlokweni yejongosi phambi kwe Nkosi, lejongosi lizahlatshwa phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus4:16 Umpristi ogcotshiweyo uzaletha-ke okwegazi lejongosi ethenteni lenhlangano," 
Leviticus4:17 lompristi uzagxamuza umunwe wakhe egazini, afafaze kasikhombisa phambi kwe Nkosi, phambi kweveyili," 
Leviticus4:18 afake okwegazi empondweni zelathi eliphambi kwe Nkosi, elisethenteni lenhlangano, athululele lonke igazi phansi kwelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa, elisemnyango wethente lenhlangano." 
Leviticus4:19 Uzathatha-ke kilo wonke amahwahwa alo, awatshise elathini." 
Leviticus4:20 Enze kulo ijongosi, njengakwenze kulo ijongosi lomnikelo wesono, enze njalo kulo. Umpristi abenzele inhlawulo yokuthula, njalo bazathethelelwa." 
Leviticus4:21 Njalo uzalikhuphela ijongosi ngaphandle kwenkamba, alitshise njengalokho walitshisa ijongosi lokuqala; kungumnikelo wesono webandla." 
Leviticus4:22 Nxa induna isona, yenza ngokungazi okumelene loba yiwuphi wemilayo ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu wayo, okungafanele ukwenziwa, njalo ibe lecala," 
Leviticus4:23 kumbe isono sayo esone imelene lawo sisaziswa kuyo, izaletha umnikelo wayo, izinyane lembuzi, iduna elingelasici," 
Leviticus4:24 ibeke isandla sayo enhlokweni yembuzi, iyihlabe endaweni lapho okuhlatshelwa khona umnikelo wokutshiswa phambi kwe Nkosi; kungumnikelo wesono." 
Leviticus4:25 Umpristi abesethatha okwegazi lomnikelo wesono ngomunwe wakhe, alifake empondweni zelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa, athululele igazi lawo phansi kwelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa." 
Leviticus4:26 Lawo wonke amahwahwa awo uzawatshisa elathini njengamahwahwa omhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula. Ngalokho umpristi uzayenzela inhlawulo yokuthula ngesono sayo, njalo ithethelelwe." 
Leviticus4:27 Uba-ke loba ngubani wabantu belizwe esona ngokungazi, ngoba esenza okumelene loba yiwuphi wemilayo ye Nkosi, okungafanele ukwenziwa, aze abe lecala," 
Leviticus4:28 kumbe isono sakhe asonileyo sisaziswa kuye, uzaletha umnikelo wakhe, izinyane lembuzi, isibhuzikazi esingelasici, ngesono sakhe asonileyo." 
Leviticus4:29 Uzabeka-ke isandla sakhe enhlokweni yomnikelo wesono, awuhlabe umnikelo wesono endaweni yomnikelo wokutshiswa." 
Leviticus4:30 Njalo umpristi uzathatha okwegazi lawo ngomunwe wakhe, alifake empondweni zelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa, athululele lonke igazi lawo phansi kwelathi." 
Leviticus4:31 Lawo wonke amahwahwa awo uzawasusa, njengalokhu amahwahwa esuswa kuwo umhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, lompristi awatshise elathini abe liphunga elimnandi e Nkosi ni. Ngalokho umpristi uzamenzela inhlawulo yokuthula, abesethethelelwa." 
Leviticus4:32 Kodwa uba eletha iwundlu lomnikelo wakhe libe ngumnikelo wesono, uzaletha elisikazi elingelasici," 
Leviticus4:33 abeke isandla sakhe enhlokweni yomnikelo wesono, awuhlabe ube ngumnikelo wesono, endaweni lapho okuhlatshelwa khona umnikelo wokutshiswa." 
Leviticus4:34 Njalo umpristi uzathatha okwegazi lomnikelo wesono ngomunwe wakhe, alifake empondweni zelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa, athululele lonke igazi lawo phansi kwelathi." 
Leviticus4:35 Lawo wonke amahwahwa awo uzawasusa njengalokhu amahwahwa ewundlu esuswa kuwo umhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, lompristi awatshise elathini phezu kweminikelo ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo. Ngalokho umpristi uzamenzela inhlawulo yokuthula ngesono sakhe asonileyo, njalo uzathethelelwa." 
Leviticus5:1 Umphefumulo, uba usona-ke usuzwe ilizwi lesifungo, njalo ube ngumfakazi, kumbe ukubonile loba ukwazi, uba ungakukhulumi, uzathwala ububi bawo." 
Leviticus5:2 Loba uba umphefumulo uthinta loba yiyiphi into engcolileyo, loba iyisidumbu senyamazana engcolileyo, loba isidumbu sesifuyo esingcolileyo, kumbe isidumbu salokho okuhuquzelayo okungcolileyo, lanxa kufihliwe kuye, kube kanti ungcolile ulecala." 
Leviticus5:3 Loba uba uthinta ukungcola komuntu, loba kuyini ukungcola kwakhe angcola ngakho, njalo kufihliwe kuwo, lapho usukwazi uzakuba lecala." 
Leviticus5:4 Loba uba umphefumulo ufunga, ukhuluma ngamawala ngendebe zawo ukwenza okubi loba ukwenza okuhle, loba kuyini umuntu angakhuluma ngakho ngamawala ngesifungo, njalo kufihliwe kuwo, lapho usukwazi uzakuba lecala kokunye kwalokho." 
Leviticus5:5 Kuzakuthi-ke nxa ulecala kwenye yalezizinto, uvume ngalokho okonileyo," 
Leviticus5:6 ulethe umnikelo wawo wecala e Nkosi ni ngesono sawo osonileyo, ensikazi emhlanjini, iwundlu loba izinyane lembuzi, kube ngumnikelo wesono, umpristi abesewenzela inhlawulo yokuthula ngesono sawo." 
Leviticus5:7 Kodwa uba isandla sawo singafinyeleli okwanela imvu, ungaletha e Nkosi ni ngecala lawo olonileyo amajuba amabili loba amaphuphu enkwilimba amabili, elinye libe ngumnikelo wesono lelinye libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Leviticus5:8 ubusuwaletha kumpristi ozanikela elingelomnikelo wesono kuqala, atshuphule inhloko yalo entanyeni yalo, kodwa angakwehlukanisi," 
Leviticus5:9 afafaze okwegazi lomnikelo wesono ehlangothini lwelathi, legazi eliseleyo likhanyelwe phansi kwelathi; kungumnikelo wesono." 
Leviticus5:10 Elesibili uzalenza libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa njengokwesimiso, lompristi amenzele inhlawulo yokuthula ngesono sakhe asonileyo, njalo uzathethelelwa." 
Leviticus5:11 Kodwa uba isandla sawo singafinyeleli emajubeni amabili loba emaphuphini enkwilimba amabili, lowo owonileyo angaletha umnikelo wakhe ingxenye yetshumi ye-efa* yempuphu ecolekileyo ube ngumnikelo wesono; angabeki mafutha phezu kwayo, angabeki nhlaka phezu kwayo, ngoba ingumnikelo wesono." 
Leviticus5:12 Njalo uzayiletha kumpristi, umpristi acuphe-ke kuyo isandla sakhe esigcweleyo kube yisikhumbuzo sayo, akutshise elathini, phezu kweminikelo ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo; kungumnikelo wesono." 
Leviticus5:13 Ngalokho umpristi uzamenzela inhlawulo yokuthula ngesono sakhe asonileyo lakuyiphi yalezizinto, njalo uzathethelelwa. Njalo kuzakuba ngokompristi, njengomnikelo wokudla." 
Leviticus5:14 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus5:15 Uba umphefumulo uphambeka ngesiphambeko wone ungazi umelana lezinto ezingcwele ze Nkosi, uzaletha umnikelo wawo wecala e Nkosi ni, inqama engelasici emhlanjini, elesilinganiso sakho sentengo samashekeli* esiliva ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele, kube ngumnikelo wecala." 
Leviticus5:16 Lalokho okonileyo okumelene lento engcwele uzakubuyisela, wengezelele kukho ingxenye yesihlanu yakho, oyinike umpristi, lompristi awenzele inhlawulo yokuthula ngenqama yomnikelo wecala, njalo uzathethelelwa." 
Leviticus5:17 Uba-ke umphefumulo usona, wenze okumelene lomunye wayo yonke imilayo ye Nkosi, okungafanele ukwenziwa, lanxa ungakwazi, kube kanti ulecala, njalo uzathwala ububi bawo." 
Leviticus5:18 Uzaletha-ke kumpristi inqama engelasici evela emhlanjini, elesilinganiso sakho sentengo, kube ngumnikelo wecala, lompristi uzawenzela inhlawulo yokuthula ngokuphambanisa kwawo ophambanisa ngakho ungakwazi, njalo uzathethelelwa." 
Leviticus5:19 Kungumnikelo wecala; ngeqiniso ulecala e Nkosi ni. 
Leviticus6:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus6:2 Uba umphefumulo usona, uphambeke isiphambeko e Nkosi ni ukhohlise umakhelwane wawo mayelana lalokho okunikelwa kuwo ukuthi ukulondoloze, loba mayelana lesibambiso sesandla, loba ngokuphangiweyo, loba umcindezele umakhelwane wawo," 
Leviticus6:3 kumbe ufica lokho obekulahlekile, uqambe amanga ngakho, ufunge amanga, loba kukuphi kwazo zonke lezo izinto umuntu azenzayo, one ngakho,"
