Leviticus6:4 kuzakuthi-ke ngoba onile elecala, uzabuyisela impango ayiphangileyo, loba lokho owakuzuza ngokucindezela, loba lokho okwanikelwa kuye ukuthi akulondoloze, loba lokho obekulahlekile akuficileyo," 
Leviticus6:5 kumbe kukho konke afunge amanga ngakho; uzakubuyisa ngesiqokoqela sakho, engezelele kukho ingxenye yesihlanu yakho, amnike lowo engeyakhe ngosuku lomnikelo wakhe wecala." 
Leviticus6:6 Njalo uzaletha umnikelo wakhe wecala e Nkosi ni, inqama engelasici emhlanjini, elesilinganiso sakho sentengo, kube ngumnikelo wecala, ayise kumpristi," 
Leviticus6:7 njalo umpristi uzamenzela inhlawulo yokuthula phambi kwe Nkosi, njalo uzathethelelwa, loba kukuphi kwakho konke akwenzileyo alecala ngakho." 
Leviticus6:8 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus6:9 Laya uAroni lamadodana akhe uthi: Lo ngumlayo womnikelo wokutshiswa. Kungumnikelo wokutshiswa ngenxa yokutshisa phezu kwelathi ubusuku bonke kuze kuse, lomlilo welathi uzabhebha kulo." 
Leviticus6:10 Umpristi-ke uzagqoka isembatho sakhe selembu elicolekileyo, lokabhudula wakhe wangaphansi welembu elicolekileyo uzamfaka emzimbeni wakhe, athathe umlotha umlilo usuqede umnikelo wokutshiswa elathini, awubeke eceleni kwelathi." 
Leviticus6:11 Abesekhulula izembatho zakhe, embathe ezinye izembatho, akhuphele umlotha ngaphandle kwenkamba endaweni ehlambulukileyo." 
Leviticus6:12 Lomlilo ophezu kwelathi uzabhebha kulo, ungacitshwa; njalo umpristi uzabasa inkuni phezu kwalo ukusa ngokusa, abeke kuhle umnikelo wokutshiswa phezu kwalo, atshise kulo amahwahwa eminikelo yokuthula." 
Leviticus6:13 Umlilo uzabhebha njalonjalo elathini, ungacitshi." 
Leviticus6:14 Lalo ngumlayo womnikelo wokudla. Amadodana kaAroni azawunikela phambi kwe Nkosi, phambi kwelathi." 
Leviticus6:15 Njalo uzacupha okwayo isandla sakhe esigcweleyo, emputshini ecolekileyo yomnikelo wokudla, lemafutheni awo, lenhlaka yonke ephezu komnikelo wokudla, akutshise elathini, uqhatshi olumnandi, isikhumbuzo sawo, e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus6:16 Lokuseleyo kuwo uAroni lamadodana akhe bazakudla, kuzadliwa kungelamvubelo endaweni engcwele, lokhu bazakudla egumeni lethente lenhlangano." 
Leviticus6:17 Kakuyikubhakwa ngemvubelo. Kuyisabelo sabo engisinike kuminikelo yami eyenziwe ngomlilo; kuyingcwelengcwele, njengomnikelo wesono lanjengomnikelo wecala." 
Leviticus6:18 Bonke abesilisa ebantwaneni bakaAroni bazakudla. Kuyisimiso esilaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu, esivela eminikelweni ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo; wonke okuthintayo uzakuba ngcwele." 
Leviticus6:19 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus6:20 Lo ngumnikelo kaAroni lamadodana akhe abazawunikela e Nkosi ni ngosuku lokugcotshwa kwakhe; ingxenye yetshumi ye-efa* lempuphu ecolekileyo ibe ngumnikelo wokudla njalonjalo, ingxenye yayo ekuseni lengxenye yayo kusihlwa." 
Leviticus6:21 Uzakwenzelwa emganwini oyincence ngamafutha. Uzawuletha uxutshanisiwe, unikele ngencezu ezibhakiweyo zomnikelo wokudla, zibe luqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus6:22 Lompristi wamadodana akhe, ogcotshiweyo esikhundleni sakhe, uzakwenza. Kuyisimiso saphakade e Nkosi ni. Uzatshiswa ngokupheleleyo." 
Leviticus6:23 Wonke-ke umnikelo wokudla wompristi uza tshiswa ngokupheleleyo, ungadliwa." 
Leviticus6:24 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus6:25 Tshono kuAroni lakumadodana akhe uthi: Lo ngumlayo womnikelo wesono. Endaweni lapho okuhlatshelwa khona umnikelo wokutshiswa umnikelo wesono uzahlatshwa khona phambi kwe Nkosi; uyingcwelengcwele. 
Leviticus6:26 Umpristi owunikelela isono uzawudla; uzadlelwa endaweni engcwele, egumeni lethente lenhlangano." 
Leviticus6:27 Konke okuthinta inyama yawo kuzakuba ngcwele; lofafaza okwegazi lawo esigqokweni, lokhu afafaze kikho wena uzakugezisa endaweni engcwele." 
Leviticus6:28 Njalo imbiza yebumba okuphekelwe kuyo izaphahlazwa; kodwa uba kuphekelwe embizeni yethusi, kayiphalwe ihlanjululwe ngamanzi." 
Leviticus6:29 Wonke owesilisa kubapristi uzawudla. Kuyingcwelengcwele. 
Leviticus6:30 Kodwa loba yiwuphi umnikelo wesono okwegazi lawo lingeniswe ethenteni lenhlangano ukwenza inhlawulo yokuthula endaweni engcwele kawuyikudliwa; uzatshiswa ngomlilo. 
Leviticus7:1 Lalo ngumlayo womnikelo wecala. Uyingcwelengcwele. 
Leviticus7:2 Endaweni lapho okuhlatshelwa khona umnikelo wokutshiswa bazahlabela khona umnikelo wecala, legazi lawo uzalifafaza elathini inhlangothi zonke." 
Leviticus7:3 Lawo wonke amahwahwa awo uzawanikela, umsila ononileyo, ledanga," 
Leviticus7:4 lezinso zombili lamahwahwa akuzo asezinkalweni, lamahwahwa angaphezu kwesibindi uzawasusa lezinso;" 
Leviticus7:5 lompristi uzakutshisa elathini kube ngumnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo; kungumnikelo wecala. 
Leviticus7:6 Wonke owesilisa kubapristi uzawudla; kawudlelwe endaweni engcwele, uyingcwelengcwele." 
Leviticus7:7 Njengomnikelo wesono unjalo umnikelo wecala; umlayo wayo munye. Umpristi owenza inhlawulo yokuthula ngawo, uzakuba ngowakhe." 
Leviticus7:8 Umpristi onikela-ke umnikelo wokutshiswa womuntu, isikhumba somnikelo wokutshiswa anikele ngawo sizakuba ngesalowompristi." 
Leviticus7:9 Lawo wonke umnikelo wokudla obhakwe eziko, lakho konke okulungiswa epaneni loba emganwini oyincence, kuzakuba ngokwalowompristi onikele ngakho." 
Leviticus7:10 Lawo wonke umnikelo wokudla ovutshwe ngamafutha kumbe owomileyo uzakuba ngowamadodana wonke kaAroni, enye njengenye." 
Leviticus7:11 Njalo lo ngumlayo womhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula awunikela e Nkosi ni. 
Leviticus7:12 Uba ewunikela ube ngumnikelo wokubonga, uzanikela kanye lomhlatshelo womnikelo wokubonga amaqebelengwana angelamvubelo ahlanganiswe lamafutha, lezinkwana eziyizipatalala ezingelamvubelo ezinindwe ngamafutha, lamaqebelengwana empuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, ekhanzingiwe." 
Leviticus7:13 Ngaphandle kwamaqebelengwana uzanikela isinkwa esilemvubelo kube ngumnikelo wakhe, lomhlatshelo womnikelo wokubonga weminikelo yakhe yokuthula." 
Leviticus7:14 Njalo uzanikela okwawo okukodwa okuvela kuwo wonke umnikelo kube ngumnikelo wokuphakanyiswa e Nkosi ni; lizakuba ngelalowompristi ofafaza igazi leminikelo yokuthula. 
Leviticus7:15 Kodwa inyama yomhlatshelo womnikelo wokubonga weminikelo yakhe yokuthula izadliwa ngosuku lokunikela kwakhe, angatshiyi okwayo kuze kube sekuseni." 
Leviticus7:16 Kodwa uba umhlatshelo womnikelo wakhe uyisithembiso loba umnikelo wesihle, uzadliwa ngosuku anikela ngalo umhlatshelo wakhe, lokuseleyo kuwo kudliwe lakusisa;" 
Leviticus7:17 kodwa okuseleyo enyameni yomhlatshelo ngosuku lwesithathu kuzatshiswa ngomlilo. 
Leviticus7:18 Njalo uba okwenyama yomhlatshelo weminikelo yakhe yokuthula kudliwa lokudliwa ngosuku lwesithathu, okunikelayo kayikwemukeleka, kakuyikubalelwa kuye; kuzakuba yisinengiso, lomphefumulo odla okwayo uzathwala ububi bawo." 
Leviticus7:19 Lenyama ethinta into engcolileyo kayiyikudliwa, izatshiswa ngomlilo. Kodwa mayelana lenyama, wonke ohlambulukileyo angadla inyama," 
Leviticus7:20 kodwa umphefumulo odla inyama yomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, engeye Nkosi, lokungcola kwawo kuphezu kwawo, lowomphefumulo uzaqunywa usuke ebantwini bawo." 
Leviticus7:21 Njalo uba umphefumulo uthinta loba yini engcolileyo, ukungcola komuntu, loba inyamazana engcolileyo, kumbe loba yini engcolileyo eyisinengiso, abesesidla okwenyama yomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula engeye Nkosi, lowomphefumulo uzaqunywa usuke ebantwini bawo." 
Leviticus7:22 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus7:23 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Lingadli lakanye amahwahwa enkomo kumbe awemvu kumbe awembuzi. 
Leviticus7:24 Kodwa amahwahwa esidumbu senyamazana, lamahwahwa enyamazana edatshuliweyo angasetshenziswa loba kuwuphi umsebenzi, kodwa lingawadli lakanye." 
Leviticus7:25 Ngoba loba ngubani odla amahwahwa enyamazana abanikela ngayo umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo, lowomphefumulo odlayo uzaqunywa usuke ebantwini bawo." 
Leviticus7:26 Futhi lingadli lagazi lakuyiphi imizi yenu, elenyoni loba elenyamazana." 
Leviticus7:27 Wonke umphefumulo odlayo loba yiliphi igazi, lowomphefumulo uzaqunywa usuke ebantwini bawo." 
Leviticus7:28 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus7:29 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Lowo onikela umhlatshelo weminikelo yakhe yokuthula e Nkosi ni uzaletha umnikelo wakhe e Nkosi ni uvela kumhlatshelo weminikelo yakhe yokuthula. 
Leviticus7:30 Izandla zakhe zizaletha iminikelo ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo, amahwahwa lesifuba, uzakuletha lesifuba, ukusizunguza sibe ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus7:31 Umpristi uzatshisa-ke amahwahwa elathini, kodwa isifuba sibe ngesikaAroni lesamadodana akhe." 
Leviticus7:32 Lizanika-ke umpristi umlenze wokunene, ube ngumnikelo wokuphakanyiswa ovela emihlatshelweni yeminikelo yenu yokuthula." 
Leviticus7:33 Lowo phakathi kwamadodana kaAroni onikela igazi leminikelo yokuthula lamahwahwa uzazuza umlenze wokunene ube yisabelo sakhe. 
Leviticus7:34 Ngoba isifuba sokuzunguzwa lomlenze wokuphakanyiswa ngikuthethe ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, emihlatshelweni yeminikelo yabo yokuthula, ngakunika uAroni umpristi lamadodana akhe, kube yisimiso esilaphakade, okuvela ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli." 
Leviticus7:35 Lokho kuyisabelo sikaAroni lesabelo samadodana akhe esivela eminikelweni ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo, mhla ebasondeza ukusebenzela i Nkosi njengabapristi," 
Leviticus7:36 I Nkosi eyalaya ngakho ukubanika, ngosuku eyabagcoba ngalo, okuvela ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli. Kuyisimiso esilaphakade ezizukulwaneni zabo." 
Leviticus7:37 Lo ngumlayo womnikelo wokutshiswa, womnikelo wokudla, lowomnikelo wesono, lowomnikelo wecala, lowokwehlukaniselwa, lowomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula," 
Leviticus7:38 I Nkosi eyamlaya ngawo uMozisi entabeni yeSinayi, ngosuku alaya ngalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli ukuthi balethe iminikelo yabo e Nkosi ni enkangala yeSinayi." 
Leviticus8:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus8:2 Thatha uAroni lamadodana akhe kanye laye, lezembatho, lamafutha okugcoba, lejongosi lomnikelo wesono, lenqama ezimbili, lesitsha sezinkwa ezingelamvubelo," 
Leviticus8:3 ubuthanise inhlangano yonke emnyango wethente lenhlangano. 
Leviticus8:4 UMozisi wasesenza njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuye, lenhlangano yabuthana emnyango wethente lenhlangano." 
Leviticus8:5 UMozisi wasesithi enhlanganweni: Yiyo le into i Nkosi elaye ukuthi yenziwe. 
Leviticus8:6 UMozisi wasesondeza uAroni lamadodana akhe, wabagezisa ngamanzi." 
Leviticus8:7 Wasemgqokisa isigqoko, wambopha ngebhanti, wamgqokisa ibhatshi, wamfaka i-efodi*, wambopha ngebhanti le-efodi elelukwe ngobungcitshi, wa li bophela kuye ngalo." 
Leviticus8:8 Wamgqokisa isembatho sesifuba, wabeka esembathweni sesifuba iUrimi leThumimi." 
Leviticus8:9 Wamthwalisa iqhiye ekhanda lakhe; wabeka phezu kweqhiye, ngaphambi kobuso bayo, incence yegolide, umqhele wobungcwele, njengalokhu i Nkosi yayimlayile uMozisi." 
Leviticus8:10 UMozisi wasethatha amafutha okugcoba, waligcoba ithabhanekele lakho konke okuphakathi kwalo, wakungcwelisa." 
Leviticus8:11 Wafafaza ngawo phezu kwelathi kasikhombisa, wagcoba ilathi lezitsha zalo zonke, lenditshi yokugezela lonyawo lwayo, ukukungcwelisa." 
Leviticus8:12 Wathela okwamafutha okugcoba ekhanda likaAroni, wamgcoba, ukumngcwelisa." 
Leviticus8:13 UMozisi wasesondeza amadodana kaAroni, wawagqokisa izigqoko, wawabopha ngamabhanti, wawathwalisa izingowane, njengalokhu i Nkosi yayimlayile uMozisi." 
Leviticus8:14 Wasesondeza ijongosi lomnikelo wesono; uAroni lamadodana akhe basebebeka izandla zabo enhlokweni yejongosi lomnikelo wesono. 
Leviticus8:15 Waselihlaba, uMozisi wasethatha igazi, walifaka ngomunwe wakhe empondweni zelathi inhlangothi zonke, wahlambulula ilathi, wathululela igazi phansi kwelathi, walingcwelisa ukulenzela inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Leviticus8:16 Wathatha idanga lonke, lamahwahwa esibindi, lezinso zombili lamahwahwa azo, uMozisi wakutshisa elathini." 
Leviticus8:17 Kodwa ijongosi, lesikhumba salo, lenyama yalo, lomswane walo wakutshisa ngomlilo ngaphandle kwenkamba, njengalokhu i Nkosi yayimlayile uMozisi." 
Leviticus8:18 Wasesondeza inqama yomnikelo wokutshiswa; uAroni lamadodana akhe basebebeka izandla zabo phezu kwenhloko yenqama. 
Leviticus8:19 Waseyihlaba, uMozisi wafafaza igazi phezu kwelathi inhlangothi zonke." 
Leviticus8:20 Waseyisika inqama ngeziqa zayo, uMozisi watshisa inhloko lezitho lamahwahwa." 
Leviticus8:21 Wagezisa imibilini lemilenze ngamanzi, uMozisi watshisa inqama yonke elathini, kungumnikelo wokutshiswa oloqhatshi olumnandi, kungumnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo, njengalokho i Nkosi yayimlayile uMozisi." 
Leviticus8:22 Wasesondeza enye inqama, inqama yokwehlukaniswa; uAroni lamadodana akhe basebebeka izandla zabo phezu kwenhloko yenqama." 
Leviticus8:23 Waseyihlaba, uMozisi wathatha okwegazi layo, walifaka eqwangeni lwendlebe yokunene kaAroni, lesithupheni sesandla sakhe sokunene, lezwaneni olukhulu lonyawo lwakhe lokunene." 
Leviticus8:24 Wasesondeza amadodana kaAroni, uMozisi wafaka okwegazi eqwangeni lwendlebe yawo yokunene, lesithupheni sesandla sawo sokunene, lezwaneni olukhulu lonyawo lwawo lokunene; uMozisi wasefafaza igazi phezu kwelathi inhlangothi zonke." 
Leviticus8:25 Wasethatha amahwahwa, lomsila ononileyo, ledanga lonke, lamahwahwa esibindi, lezinso zombili lamahwahwa azo, lomlenze wokunene," 
Leviticus8:26 wakhupha esitsheni sezinkwa ezingelamvubelo esasiphambi kwe Nkosi iqebelengwana laba linye elingelamvubelo, leqebelengwana elilodwa lesinkwa esilamafutha, lesinkwana esisodwa esiyisipatalala, wakubeka phezu kwamahwahwa laphezu komlenze wokunene;" 
Leviticus8:27 wakubeka konke ezandleni zikaAroni lezandleni zamadodana akhe, wakuzunguza kwaba ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus8:28 UMozisi wasekuthatha ezandleni zabo, wakutshisa elathini phezu komnikelo wokutshiswa, kwaba yikwehlukaniswa okoqhatshi olumnandi, kungumnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Leviticus8:29 UMozisi wasethatha isifuba, wasizunguza saba ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi; saba yisabelo sikaMozisi senqama yokwehlukaniswa, njengalokho i Nkosi yayimlayile uMozisi." 
Leviticus8:30 UMozisi wasethatha okwamafutha okugcoba lokwegazi okwakuphezu kwelathi, wakufafaza phezu kukaAroni, phezu kwezembatho zakhe, laphezu kwamadodana akhe, laphezu kwezembatho zamadodana akhe kanye laye. Wamngcwelisa uAroni, izembatho zakhe, lamadodana akhe, lezembatho zamadodana akhe kanye laye." 
Leviticus8:31 UMozisi wasesithi kuAroni lemadodaneni akhe: Phekani inyama emnyango wethente lenhlangano, liyidle lapho lezinkwa ezisesitsheni sokwehlukaniswa, njengokulaya kwami ngisithi: UAroni lamadodana akhe bazakudla." 
Leviticus8:32 Lokuseleyo kwenyama lokwezinkwa lizakutshisa ngomlilo. 
Leviticus8:33 Njalo kaliyikuphuma ngomnyango wethente lenhlangano, insuku eziyisikhombisa, kuze kufike usuku okuzagcwaliswa ngalo insuku zokwehlukaniswa kwenu, ngoba uzalehlukanisa okwensuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus8:34 Njengoba enzile lamuhla i Nkosi ilayile ukukwenza, ukulenzela inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Leviticus8:35 Ngakho lizahlala emnyango wethen te lenhlangano insuku eziyisikhombisa, imini lebusuku, ligcine imfanelo ye Nkosi ukuze lingafi; ngoba ngilaywe njalo." 
Leviticus8:36 UAroni lamadodana akhe basebesenza izinto zonke i Nkosi eyazilayayo ngesandla sikaMozisi. 
Leviticus9:1 Kwasekusithi ngosuku lwesificaminwembili uMozisi wabiza oAroni lamadodana akhe labadala bakoIsrayeli. 
Leviticus9:2 Wathi kuAroni: Zithathele ithole, inkonyana yenkomo, libe ngumnikelo wesono, lenqama ibe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa, okungelasici, ukusondeze e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus9:3 Lebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uzakhuluma uthi: Thathani izinyane lembuzi libe ngumnikelo wesono, lethole, lewundlu, abe lomnyaka owodwa, angelasici, abe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa," 
Leviticus9:4 lenkabi lenqama zibe yiminikelo yokuthula, zihlatshwe phambi kwe Nkosi, lomnikelo wokudla oxubene lamafutha; ngoba lamuhla i Nkosi izabonakala kini." 
Leviticus9:5 Basebethatha lokho uMozisi akulayayo bakuletha phambi kwethente lenhlangano; lenhlangano yonke yasondela, yema phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus9:6 UMozisi wasesithi: Le into i Nkosi elilaye ngayo lizayenza; lenkazimulo ye Nkosi izabonakala kini. 
Leviticus9:7 UMozisi wasesithi kuAroni: Sondela elathini, wenze umnikelo wakho wesono lomnikelo wakho wokutshiswa, uzenzele wena inhlawulo yokuthula lokwabantu; ubususenza umnikelo wabantu, ubenzele inhlawulo yokuthula, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus9:8 UAroni wasesondela elathini, walihlaba ithole lomnikelo wesono owawungowakhe." 
Leviticus9:9 Amadodana kaAroni aseletha igazi kuye, wasegxamuza umunwe wakhe egazini, walifaka phezu kwempondo zelathi, legazi walithululela phansi kwelathi;" 
Leviticus9:10 kodwa amahwahwa, lezinso, lamahwahwa esibindi omnikelo wesono wakutshisa elathini, njengalokho i Nkosi imlayile uMozisi." 
Leviticus9:11 Kodwa inyama lesikhumba wakutshisa ngomlilo ngaphandle kwenkamba. 
Leviticus9:12 Wasehlaba umnikelo wokutshiswa; lamadodana kaAroni amnika igazi, waselifafaza phezu kwelathi inhlangothi zonke." 
Leviticus9:13 Amnika lomnikelo wokutshiswa ngezitho zawo lenhloko; wasekutshisa phezu kwelathi. 
Leviticus9:14 Wagezisa imibilini lemilenze, wayitshisa phezu komnikelo wokutshiswa elathini." 
Leviticus9:15 Wasesondeza umnikelo wabantu, wathatha impongo yomnikelo wesono eyayingeyabantu, wayihlaba, wayinikela yaba ngumnikelo wesono, njengowokuqala." 
Leviticus9:16 Wasondeza umnikelo wokutshiswa, wawulungisa njengokwesimiso." 
Leviticus9:17 Wasondeza umnikelo wokudla, wagcwalisa isandla sakhe ngokwawo, wakutshisa phezu kwelathi, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wekuseni." 
Leviticus9:18 Wahlaba inkabi lenqama zibe ngumhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula owawungowabantu; lamadodana kaAroni amnika igazi, owalifafaza phezu kwelathi inhlangothi zonke." 
Leviticus9:19 Lamahwahwa enkabi lawenqama, umsila ononileyo, le danga elisibekelayo, lezinso, lamahwahwa esibindi," 
Leviticus9:20 asebeka amahwahwa phezu kwezifuba; wasetshisa amahwahwa elathini; 
Leviticus9:21 kodwa izifuba lomlenze wokunene uAroni wakuzunguza kwaba ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi, njengokulaya kukaMozisi." 
Leviticus9:22 UAroni wasephakamisela isandla sakhe ebantwini, wababusisa. Wehla ekunikeleni umnikelo wesono lomnikelo wokutshiswa leminikelo yokuthula." 
Leviticus9:23 UMozisi loAroni basebengena ethenteni lenhlangano; baphuma bababusisa abantu, lenkazimulo ye Nkosi yabonakala kubo bonke abantu." 
Leviticus9:24 Kwasekuphuma umlilo uvela phambi kwe Nkosi, watshisa phezu kwelathi umnikelo wokutshiswa lamahwahwa. Bonke abantu bathi bekubona lokhu bamemeza, bawa ngobuso babo." 
Leviticus10:1 Amadodana kaAroni, oNadabi loAbihu, asethatha ngulowo lalowo umganu wakhe wokutshisela impepha, afaka umlilo kiyo, abeka phezu kwawo impepha, anikela umlilo ongejwayelekanga phambi kwe Nkosi, eyayingawalayanga wona." 
Leviticus10:2 Kwasekuphuma umlilo ovela phambi kwe Nkosi, wawaqothula, asefela phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus10:3 UMozisi wasesithi kuAroni: Yilokhu i Nkosi eyakukhulumayo isithi: Kulabo abasondela kimi ngizangcweliswa, futhi phambi kwabantu bonke ngizadunyiswa. UAroni wasethula." 
Leviticus10:4 UMozisi wasebiza uMishayeli loElizafani, amadodana kaUziyeli uyise omncane kaAroni, wathi kibo: Sondelani, libasuse abafowenu phambi kwendlu engcwele, kuze kube ngaphandle kwenkamba." 
Leviticus10:5 Basondela-ke, babathwala bembethe izigqoko zabo kwaze kwaba ngaphandle kwenkamba, njengokutsho kukaMozisi." 
Leviticus10:6 UMozisi wasesithi kuAroni lakuEleyazare lakuIthamari, amadodana akhe: Lingembuli amakhanda enu, lingadabuli izembatho zenu, hlezi life, lolaka lwehlele phezu kwenhlangano yonke. Kodwa akuthi abafowenu, indlu yonke kaIsrayeli, balilele ukutshisa i Nkosi ekuphembileyo." 
Leviticus10:7 Lingaphumi ngomnyango wethente lenhlangano hlezi life, ngoba amafutha okugcoba e Nkosi aphezu kwenu. Benza-ke njengelizwi likaMozisi." 
Leviticus10:8 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuAroni isithi: 
Leviticus10:9 Unganathi iwayini lokunathwayo okulamandla, wena lamadodana akho kanye lawe, nxa lingena ethenteni lenhlangano, ukuze lingafi; kuyisimiso esilaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu;" 
Leviticus10:10 lokwehlukanisa phakathi kokungcwele lokungangcwele, laphakathi kokungahlambulukanga lokuhlambulukileyo;" 
Leviticus10:11 lokufundisa abantwana bakoIsrayeli zonke izimiso i Nkosi ezikhulume kubo ngesandla sikaMozisi. 
Leviticus10:12 UMozisi wasesithi kuAroni lakuEleyazare lakuIthamari, amadodana akhe ayesele: Thathani umnikelo wokudla oseleyo eminikelweni ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo, liwudle ungelamvubelo eceleni kwelathi, ngoba uyingcwelengcwele;" 
Leviticus10:13 njalo liwudlele endaweni engcwele, ngoba uyimfanelo yakho lemfanelo yamadodana akho, esivela eminikelweni ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo; ngoba ngilaywe njalo." 
Leviticus10:14 Kodwa isifuba sokuzunguzwa lomlenze wokuphakanyiswa lizakudlela endaweni ehlambulukileyo, wena lamadodana akho, lamadodakazi akho kanye lawe; ngoba kuyisabelo sakho lesabelo samadodana akho; kunikwa kuvela emihlatshelweni yeminikelo yokuthula yabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Leviticus10:15 Umlenze wokuphakanyiswa lesifuba sokuzunguzwa bazakuletha leminikelo yamahwahwa eyenziwe ngomlilo, ukukuzunguza kube ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi; kuzakuba ngokwakho lokwamadodana akho kanye lawe, kube yisimiso saphakade, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus10:16 UMozisi wadingisisa impongo yomnikelo wesono, khangela-ke yayitshisiwe. Ngakho wathukuthelela uEleyazare loIthamari, amadodana kaAroni aseleyo, esithi:" 
Leviticus10:17 Kalidlanga ngani umnikelo wesono endaweni engcwele, ngoba uyingcwelengcwele, futhi ilinikile wona lina ukuze lithwale ububi benhlangano, libenzele inhlawulo yokuthula phambi kwe Nkosi?" 
Leviticus10:18 Khangelani, igazi lawo kalingeniswanga phakathi e ndawe ni engcwele. Ngabe isibili liyidlile e ndawe ni engcwele njengokulaya kwami." 
Leviticus10:19 UAroni wasesithi kuMozisi: Khangela, lamuhla sebenikele umnikelo wabo wesono lomnikelo wabo wokutshiswa phambi kwe Nkosi, kanti izinto ezinje zingehlele! Uba bengidlile umnikelo wesono lamuhla, bekuzakuba kuhle emehlweni e Nkosi yini?" 
Leviticus10:20 Esezwile lokho uMozisi kwaba kuhle emehlweni akhe. 
Leviticus11:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni isithi kibo: 
Leviticus11:2 Tshonini ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli lithi: Nanzi izinto eziphilayo elingazidla kuzo zonke inyamazana ezisemhlabeni. 
Leviticus11:3 Konke okwehlukanisa isondo lokwehlukanisa isondo kabili lo kwetshisayo phakathi kwenyamazana, lokhu lizakudla." 
Leviticus11:4 Kodwa lezi kaliyikuzidla kulezo ezetshisayo kumbe kulezo ezehlukanisa isondo: Ikamela, ngoba liyetshisa, kodwa kalehlukanisi amasondo; lingcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:5 Lembila, ngoba iyetshisa, kodwa kayehlukanisi isondo; ingcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:6 Lomvundla, ngoba uyetshisa, kodwa kawehlukanisi isondo; ungcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:7 Lengulube, ngoba iyehlukanisa isondo lokwehlukanisa isondo kube kubili kodwa kayetshisi; ingcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:8 Lingadli okwenyama yazo, lingathinti isidumbu sazo; zingcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:9 Lezi lingazidla kuzo zonke ezisemanzini: Zonke ezilempiko lamaxolo, emanzini, enlwandle lemifuleni, lezo lingazidla." 
Leviticus11:10 Kodwa zonke ezingelampiko lamaxolo enlwandle lemifuleni, phakathi kwazo zonke ezibhinqika emanzini laphakathi kwaso sonke isidalwa esiphilayo esisemanzini, ziyisinengiso kini." 
Leviticus11:11 Yebo, zizakuba yisinengiso kini; lingadli okwenyama yazo; kodwa lizanengwa yisidumbu sazo." 
Leviticus11:12 Konke okungelampiko lamaxolo emanzini, kuyisinengiso kini." 
Leviticus11:13 Lezi-ke lizanengwa yizo phakathi kwezinyoni; kaziyikudliwa, ziyisinengiso; ukhozi lelinqe lengqungqulu edla inhlanzi," 
Leviticus11:14 lomzwazwa, lohelwane ngohlobo lwalo," 
Leviticus11:15 lonke iwabayi ngohlobo lwalo," 
Leviticus11:16 lesikhova, lomandukulo, lenkanku, lokhozi ngohlobo lwalo," 
Leviticus11:17 lesikhova esincinyane, letshayamanzi, lesikhova esikhulu," 
Leviticus11:18 lesikhova esimhlophe, lewunkwe, lelinqe elikhulu," 
Leviticus11:19 lengabuzane, ihemu ngohlobo lwalo, lemvenduna, lolulwane." 
Leviticus11:20 Zonke izibungu ezilempiko ezihamba ngezine ziyisinengiso kini. 
Leviticus11:21 Kodwa lezi lizazidla ezibungwini ezilempiko ezihamba ngezine ezilemilenze ephezu kwenyawo zazo ezeqa ngayo emhlabeni; 
Leviticus11:22 lezi lingadla kuzo: Isikhonyane ngohlobo lwaso, lonyelele ngohlobo lwakhe, lediye ngohlobo lwalo, lentethe ngohlobo lwayo." 
Leviticus11:23 Kodwa zonke izibungu ezilempiko, ezilenyawo ezine, ziyisinengiso kini." 
Leviticus11:24 Langalezi lizangcoliswa; wonke othinta isidumbu sazo uzakuba ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe. 
Leviticus11:25 Njalo wonke ophakamisa okwesidumbu sazo uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:26 Yonke inyamazana eyehlukanisa isondo, kodwa ingehlukanisi isondo kabili, njalo ingetshisi, ingcolile kini; wonke oyithintayo uzangcola." 
Leviticus11:27 Konke-ke okuhamba ngezidladla zakho, phakathi kwazo zonke inyamazana ezihamba ngezine, zingcolile kini; wonke othinta isidumbu sazo uzangcola kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:28 Lothwala isidumbu sazo uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe; zingcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:29 Futhi lezi zizakuba ngezingcolileyo kini, phakathi kwezihuquzelayo ezihuquzelayo emhlabeni; ubuchakide, legundwane, legwababa ngohlobo lwalo," 
Leviticus11:30 lontulo, lembulumakhasana, lombankwa, lesiqhuza, lonwabu." 
Leviticus11:31 Lezi zingcolile kini phakathi kwazo zonke ezihuquzelayo; wonke ozithintayo sezifile uzakuba ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe. 
Leviticus11:32 Konke-ke ewela phezu kwakho enye yazo isifile kuzakuba ngokungcolileyo, lokwasiphi isitsha sesihlahla, loba isembatho, loba isikhumba, loba isaka, lasiphi isitsha okusetshenzwa ngaso; kuzafakwa emanzini, njalo kuzakuba ngokungcolileyo kuze kuhlwe; khona kuzahlambuluka." 
Leviticus11:33 Layo yonke imbiza yebumba ewela phakathi kwayo enye yazo, konke okukiyo kuzakuba ngokungcolileyo, njalo lizayibulala." 
Leviticus11:34 Ekudleni konke okudliwayo afike kukho amanzi kuzakuba ngokungcolileyo; lakuphi okunathwayo okunganathwa phakathi kwaloba yiyiphi imbiza enjalo kuzakuba ngokungcolileyo. 
Leviticus11:35 Konke-ke okuwela kukho okwesidumbu sazo kuzakuba ngokungcolileyo; iziko loba isitofu, kuzaphohlozwa, kungcolile, futhi kuzakuba ngokungcolileyo kini." 
Leviticus11:36 Kodwa umthombo loba umgodi aqoqene khona amanzi uzakuba ngohlambulukileyo; kodwa okuthinta izidumbu zazo kuzakuba ngokungcolileyo. 
Leviticus11:37 Njalo uba okwesidumbu sazo kuwela phezu kwenhlanyelo ehlanyelwayo ezahlanyelwa, ihlambulukile;" 
Leviticus11:38 kodwa uba okwamanzi kufakwa enhlanyelweni, lokwesidumbu sazo kuwela phezu kwayo, ingcolile kini." 
Leviticus11:39 Uba kusifa-ke enyamazaneni eyikudla kini, othinta isidumbu sayo uzakuba ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:40 Lodla okwesidumbu sayo uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe; lothwala isidumbu sayo uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:41 Lazo zonke ezihuquzelayo ezihuquzela emhlabeni ziyisinengiso; kaziyikudliwa. 
Leviticus11:42 Konke okuhamba ngesisu, lakho konke okuhamba ngezine, kuze kube yikho konke okulenyawo ezinengi, phakathi kwazo zonke ezihuquzelayo ezihuquzela emhlabeni kaliyikukudla, ngoba kuyisinengiso." 
Leviticus11:43 Lingazenzi linengeke langakuphi okuhuquzelayo kuhuquzela, lingazingcolisi ngakho ukuthi lingcoliswe yikho." 
Leviticus11:44 Ngoba ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu. Ngakho zingcweliseni, libe ngcwele, ngoba ngingcwele. Lingazingcolisi langakuphi okuhuquzelayo okuhuquzela emhlabeni." 
Leviticus11:45 Ngoba ngiyi Nkosi eyalenyusa lisuka elizweni leGibhithe ukuthi ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu. Ngakho banini ngcwele, ngoba ngingcwele." 
Leviticus11:46 Lo ngumlayo wezinyamazana lezinyoni, laso sonke isidalwa esiphilayo esibhinqika emanzini lakuso sonke isidalwa esihuquzela emhlabeni," 
Leviticus11:47 ukwehlukanisa phakathi kokungcolileyo lokuhlambulukileyo, laphakathi kokuphilayo okungadliwa lokuphilayo okungadliwayo." 
Leviticus12:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus12:2 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Uba owesifazana ekhululeka, abelethe owesilisa, uzakuba ngongcolileyo insuku eziyisikhombisa, njengensuku zokwehlukaniswa kwakhe esemfuleni uzakuba ngongcolileyo." 
Leviticus12:3 Langosuku lwesificaminwembili inyama yejwabu lakhe izasokwa. 
Leviticus12:4 Khona ezahlala okwensuku ezingamatshumi amathathu lantathu egazini lokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, angathinti lutho olungcwele, angangeni endlini engcwele, zize ziphelele insuku zokuhlanjululwa kwakhe." 
Leviticus12:5 Kodwa angabeletha owesifazana, uzakuba ngongcolileyo amaviki amabili, njengokwehlukaniswa kwakhe; uzahlala insuku ezingamatshumi ayisithupha lesithupha egazini lokuhlanjululwa kwakhe." 
Leviticus12:6 Lapho sezigcwalisekile insuku zokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, ngendodana loba ngendodakazi, uzaletha iwundlu elilomnyaka owodwa, libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa, lephuphu lenkwilimba kumbe ijuba kube ngumnikelo wesono, emnyango wethente lenhlangano, kumpristi," 
Leviticus12:7 ozakunikela e Nkosi ni, amenzele inhlawulo yokuthula; khona ezahlambuluka ekopheni kwegazi lakhe. Lo ngumlayo walowo obeletha owesilisa loba owesifazana." 
Leviticus12:8 Kodwa uba isandla sakhe singatholi okwanela imvu, uzathatha amajuba amabili loba amaphuphu amabili enkwilimba, okunye kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa lokunye kube ngumnikelo wesono, lompristi amenzele inhlawulo yokuthula, aze ahlambuluke." 
Leviticus13:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni isithi: 
Leviticus13:2 Umuntu, nxa kukhona esikhumbeni senyama yakhe ithumba loba uqweqwe loba ibala elikhanyayo, njalo esikhumbeni senyama yakhe kube yisifo sobulephero, khona ezalethwa kuAroni umpristi kumbe kwenye yamadodana akhe angabapristi." 
Leviticus13:3 Umpristi uzakhangela-ke isifo esikhumbeni senyama; uba uboya esifweni sebuphenduke baba mhlophe, lokubonakala kwesifo sekutshone kulesikhumba senyama yakhe, kuyisifo sobulephero. Umpristi esemkhangele uzakutsho ukuthi ungcolile." 
Leviticus13:4 Kodwa uba ibala elikhanyayo esikhumbeni senyama yakhe limhlophe, lokubonakala kwalo kungatshoni kulesikhumba, loboya balo bungaphendukanga baba mhlophe, umpristi uza m valela ol esifo insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:5 Umpristi uzamkhangela-ke ngosuku lwesikhombisa; uba, khangela, isifo sisemi emehlweni akhe, isifo singaqhelanga esikhumbeni, umpristi uzamvalela ezinye insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:6 Umpristi uzabuya-ke amkhangele ngosuku lwesikhombisa; uba, khangela, isifo sifiphele, lesifo singaqhelanga esikhumbeni, umpristi uzakutsho ukuthi uhlambulukile; luqweqwe. Njalo uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ahlambuluke." 
Leviticus13:7 Kodwa uba uqweqwe luqhela kakhulu esikhumbeni emva kokubonakaliswa kwakhe kumpristi ngokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, uzabonakaliswa kumpristi futhi." 
Leviticus13:8 Uba umpristi ebona ukuthi, khangela, uqweqwe luyaqhela esikhumbeni, umpristi uzakutsho ukuthi ungcolile; kuyibulephero." 
Leviticus13:9 Isifo sobulephero, uba sisemuntwini, uzalethwa kumpristi." 
Leviticus13:10 Njalo umpristi uzabona, khangela-ke, kukhona ithumba elimhlophe esikhumbeni, seliphendule uboya baba mhlophe, futhi kulenyama entsha ephilayo ethunjeni," 
Leviticus13:11 kuyibulephero obudala esikhumbeni senyama yakhe; umpristi uzakutsho-ke ukuthi ungcolile, angamvaleli ngoba engcolile." 
Leviticus13:12 Uba-ke ubulephero buqhela kakhulu esikhumbeni, lobulephero bugubuzela isikhumba sonke sa lowo ol esifo, kusukela ekhanda lakhe kuze kufike lenyaweni zakhe, njengokubona konke kwamehlo ompristi," 
Leviticus13:13 umpristi uzabona ukuthi, khangela, ubulephero bugubuzele inyama yonke yakhe, uzakutsho ukuthi ol esifo uhlambulukile; konke kuphendukile kwaba mhlophe; uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:14 Kodwa mhla kubonakala kuye inyama ephilayo, uzakuba ngongcolileyo." 
Leviticus13:15 Lapho umpristi esebone inyama ephilayo, uzakutsho ukuthi ungcolile; inyama ephilayo ingcolile, iyibulephero." 
Leviticus13:16 Kumbe uba inyama ephilayo ibuye iphenduke ibe mhlophe, uzakuya kumpristi." 
Leviticus13:17 Lapho umpristi esembonile ukuthi, khangela, isifo sesiphenduke saba mhlophe, umpristi uzakutsho ukuthi uhlambulukile ol esifo; uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:18 Inyama layo, nxa kukhona kuyo, esikhumbeni sayo, ithumba, selipholile," 
Leviticus13:19 lendaweni yethumba kube lokuvuvuka okumhlophe kumbe ibala elikhanyayo elimhlophe libomvana, kuzatshengiswa umpristi." 
Leviticus13:20 Uba umpristi ezabona ukuthi, khangela, ukubonakala kwakho kutshone kulesikhumba, loboya bakho sebuphenduke baba mhlophe, umpristi uzakutsho ukuthi ungcolile; kuyisifo sobulephero, siphume ethunjeni." 
Leviticus13:21 Kodwa uba umpristi ezakubona ukuthi, khangela, kakulaboya obumhlophe kukho, lokuthi kakutshonanga kulesikhumba, kodwa kufiphele, umpristi uzamvalela insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:22 Uba-ke kuqhela kakhulu esikhumbeni, umpristi atsho ukuthi ungcolile, kuyisifo." 
Leviticus13:23 Kodwa uba ibala elikhanyayo limi endaweni yalo, lingaqheli, kuyisibavu sethumba; umpristi uzakutsho-ke ukuthi uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:24 Kumbe inyama, uba kukhona esikhumbeni sayo umtshiso womlilo, lokuphola komtshiso kulibala elikhanyayo elimhlophe libomvana kumbe limhlophe." 
Leviticus13:25 Lapho umpristi eselibonile ukuthi, khangela, uboya bebala elikhanyayo buphenduke baba mhlophe, lokubonakala kwalo litshone kulesikhumba, kuyibulephero, buqhamuke emtshisweni; ngakho umpristi uzakutsho ukuthi ungcolile; kuyisifo sobulephero." 
Leviticus13:26 Kodwa uba umpristi eselibona ukuthi, khangela, kakulaboya obumhlophe ebaleni elikhanyayo, lokuthi kalitshonanga kulesikhumba, kodwa lifiphele, umpristi uzamvalela insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:27 Langosuku lwesikhombisa umpristi uzambona; uba liqhele kakhulu esikhumbeni, umpristi uzakutsho ukuthi ungcolile; kuyisifo sobulephero." 
Leviticus13:28 Kodwa uba ibala elikhanyayo limi endaweni yalo, lingaqhelanga esikhumbeni, kodwa lifiphele, kuyikuvuvuka komtshiso; umpristi atsho-ke ukuthi uhlambulukile, ngoba kuyisibavu somtshiso." 
Leviticus13:29 Njalo nxa owesilisa loba owesifazana elesifo ekhanda loba endevini," 
Leviticus13:30 lapho umpristi esebonile isifo ukuthi, khangela, ukubonakala kwaso kutshonile kulesikhumba, njalo kulezinwele ezilithanga ezinciphileyo, umpristi uzakutsho ukuthi ungcolile; kuluqweqwe; kuyibulephero bekhanda loba obendevu." 
Leviticus13:31 Uba-ke umpristi esebone isifo soqweqwe ukuthi, khangela, ukubonakala kwaso kasitshonanga kulesikhumba, lokuthi kakulanwele ezimnyama kuso, umpristi uzamvalela ole sifo soqweqwe insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:32 Langosuku lwesikhombisa umpristi uzabona isifo; uba, khangela, uqweqwe lungaqhelanga, futhi kungekho kuso inwele ezilithanga, lokubonakala koqweqwe kungatshonanga kulesikhumba," 
Leviticus13:33 uzaziphuca, kodwa uqweqwe angaluphuci, lompristi uzamvalela ol oqweqwe ezinye insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:34 Langosuku lwesikhombisa umpristi uzabona uqweqwe; uba, khangela, uqweqwe lungaqhelanga esikhumbeni, futhi ukubonakala kwalo kungatshonanga kulesikhumba, umpristi uzakutsho ukuthi uhlambulukile, njalo uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ahlambuluke." 
Leviticus13:35 Kodwa uba uqweqwe luqhela kakhulu esikhumbeni emva kokuhlanjululwa kwakhe," 
Leviticus13:36 umpristi uzabe esembonile ukuthi, khangela, uqweqwe seluqhelile esikhumbeni, umpristi kangadingi inwele ezilithanga; ungcolile." 
Leviticus13:37 Kodwa uba emehlweni akhe uqweqwe lusemi, lenwele ezimnyama sezimilile kulo, uqweqwe selupholile, uhlambulukile; lompristi uzakutsho ukuthi uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:38 Njalo owesilisa loba owesifazana, nxa kukhona esikhumbeni senyama yabo amabala akhanyayo, amabala akhanyayo amhlophe," 
Leviticus13:39 nxa umpristi ebona ukuthi, khangela, esikhumbeni senyama yabo kulamabala akhanyayo afipheleyo amhlophe, kuyimpunza equbukayo esikhumbeni; uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:40 Lendoda, uba ikhanda layo lingaselanwele, ulempabanga, uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:41 Uba-ke ikhanda layo lingaselanwele eceleni lebunzi layo, ulempabanga ebunzini, uhlambulukile." 
Leviticus13:42 Kodwa uba kukhona isifo esimhlophe sibomvana empabangeni kumbe empabangeni esebunzini, kuyibulephero obuqubuka ebumpabangeni bayo kumbe empabangeni esebunzini layo." 
Leviticus13:43 Lapho umpristi esembonile ukuthi, khangela, ukuvuvuka kwesifo kumhlophe kubomvana empabangeni yayo kumbe empabangeni esebunzini layo, njengokubonakala kobulephero esikhumbeni senyama," 
Leviticus13:44 uyindoda elobulephero, ungcolile; umpristi uzakutsho ukuthi ungcolile kakhulu; isifo sayo sisekhanda layo." 
Leviticus13:45 Umlephero, esikuye isifo, izembatho zakhe zizadatshulwa-ke, lekhanda lakhe lembulwe, njalo ambomboze indevu zendebe yakhe yangaphezulu, akhale athi: Ngcolile, ngcolile!" 
Leviticus13:46 Zonke insuku isifo sikuye ungcolile; ungcolile, uzahlala yedwa, indawo yakhe yokuhlala izakuba ngaphandle kwenkamba." 
Leviticus13:47 Njalo isembatho, nxa isifo sobulephero sikuso, esembathweni soboya bemvu, loba esembathweni selembu elicolekileyo," 
Leviticus13:48 loba ezintanjeni eziqondileyo kumbe ezintanjeni eziqumayo zelembu elicolekileyo kumbe ezoboya bezimvu, loba esikhumbeni, kumbe kukuphi okwenziwe ngesikhumba," 
Leviticus13:49 futhi isifo siluhlazana loba sibomvana esembathweni loba esikhumbeni loba ezintanjeni eziqondileyo loba ezintanjeni eziqumayo kumbe kuyiphi into yesikhumba; kuyisifo sobulephero, njalo kuzatshengiswa umpristi." 
Leviticus13:50 Umpristi uzakhangela-ke isifo, avalele okule sifo insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:51 Akhangele isifo ngosuku lwesikhombisa; uba isifo siqhelile esembathweni loba ezintanjeni eziqondileyo loba ezintanjeni eziqumayo loba esikhumbeni, loba kuwuphi umsebenzi owenziwe ngesikhumba; isifo siyibulephero obuvukuzayo; kungcolile." 
Leviticus13:52 Ngakho uzatshisa isembatho loba izintambo eziqondileyo loba izintambo eziqumayo zoboya bezimvu loba ezelembu elicolekileyo kumbe loba yiyiphi into yesikhumba okukuyo isifo; ngoba kuyibulephero obuvukuzayo; kuzatshiswa ngomlilo. 
Leviticus13:53 Kodwa uba umpristi ebona ukuthi, khangela, isifo kasiqhelanga esembathweni kumbe ezintanjeni eziqondileyo kumbe ezintanjeni eziqumayo, kumbe loba kuyiphi into yesikhumba," 
Leviticus13:54 umpristi uzalaya-ke ukuthi bawatshe lokho esikukho isifo, akuvalele ezinye insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus13:55 Kuzakuthi umpristi, sekuwatshiwe, abone isifo ukuthi, khangela, isifo kasiphendukanga ukubonakala kwaso, lesifo kasiqhelanga; kungcolile. Uzakutshisa ngomlilo; kuyikucutheka kohlangothi lwakho lwangemuva loba uhlangothi lwakho lwaphambili." 
Leviticus13:56 Kodwa uba umpristi ebona ukuthi, khangela, isifo sifiphele emva kokuwatshwa kwaso, uzasidabula esembathweni, loba esikhumbeni, loba ezintanjeni eziqondileyo, kumbe ezintanjeni eziqumayo." 
Leviticus13:57 Kodwa uba silokhu sibonakala esembathweni loba ezintanjeni eziqondileyo kumbe ezintanjeni eziqumayo kumbe loba kuyiphi into yesikhumba, siyaqhela; uzakutshisa ngomlilo lokho esikukho isifo." 
Leviticus13:58 Kodwa isembatho kumbe izintambo eziqondileyo loba izintambo eziqumayo kumbe loba yiyiphi into yesikhumba okuwatshileyo, uba isifo sisukile kukho, kuzawatshwa okwesibili, kuzahlambuluka-ke." 
Leviticus13:59 Lo ngumlayo wesifo sobulephero wesembatho soboya bemvu kumbe selembu elicolekileyo, loba izintambo eziqondileyo loba izintambo eziqumayo, kumbe loba yiyiphi into yesikhumba, ukutsho ukuthi kuhlambulukile kumbe ukutsho ukuthi kungcolile." 
Leviticus14:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus14:2 Lo uzakuba ngumlayo womlephero ngosuku lokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, ukuthi uzalethwa kumpristi." 
Leviticus14:3 Umpristi uzaphuma-ke ngaphandle kwenkamba. Uba umpristi ezabona ukuthi, khangela, isifo sobulephero seselaphekile kumlephero," 
Leviticus14:4 umpristi uzalaya-ke ukuthi kuthathelwe lowo ozahlanjululwa inyoni ezimbili eziphilayo ezihlambulukileyo, lesigodo somsedari, lokubomvu, lehisope*;" 
Leviticus14:5 umpristi alaye ukuthi enye inyoni ibulawelwe embizeni yebumba phezu kwamanzi agobhozayo. 
Leviticus14:6 Inyoni ephilayo, uzayithatha lesigodo somsedari, lokubomvu, lehisope, akugxamuze lenyoni ephilayo egazini lenyoni ehlatshelwe phezu kwamanzi agobhozayo," 
Leviticus14:7 amfafaze lowo ozahlanjululwa kubulephero kasikhombisa, atsho ukuthi uhlambulukile, ayekele inyoni ephilayo ikhululekile endle." 
Leviticus14:8 Lalowo ozahlanjululwa uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, aphuce zonke inwele zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, ahlambuluke; emva kwalokho uzangena enkambeni, kodwa ahlale ngaphandle kwethente lakhe insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus14:9 Kuzakuthi-ke ngosuku lwesikhombisa uzaphuca zonke inwele zakhe, ikhanda lakhe lezindevu zakhe lezintshiya zakhe, yebo, aphuce zonke inwele zakhe, awatshe izembatho zakhe, ageze umzimba wakhe ngamanzi, ahlambuluke." 
Leviticus14:10 Langosuku lwesificaminwembili uzathatha amawundlu amabili amaduna angelasici, lewundlu elisikazi elilomnyaka owodwa elingelasici, lengxenye ezintathu etshumini zempuphu ecolekileyo kube ngumnikelo wokudla, kuxubene lamafutha, lelogi* eyodwa yamafutha." 
Leviticus14:11 Umpristi ohlambululayo uzamisa-ke indoda ezahlanjululwa lezinto phambi kwe Nkosi, emnyango wethente lenhlangano." 
Leviticus14:12 Njalo umpristi uzathatha elinye iwundlu eliduna, alinikele libe ngumnikelo wecala, lelogi yamafutha, akuzunguze kube ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi;" 
Leviticus14:13 ahlabe iwundlu endaweni lapho okuhlatshelwa khona umnikelo wesono lomnikelo wokutshiswa, endaweni engcwele; ngoba umnikelo wecala ungowompristi njengomnikelo wesono; uyingcwelengcwele." 
Leviticus14:14 Umpristi uzathatha-ke okwegazi lomnikelo wecala, umpristi uzakufaka eqwangeni lwendlebe yokunene yalowo ozahlanjululwa, lesithupheni sesandla sakhe sokunene, lezwaneni olukhulu lonyawo lwakhe lokunene." 
Leviticus14:15 Futhi umpristi uzathatha okwelogi* yamafutha, akuthele esandleni sompristi sokhohlo." 
Leviticus14:16 Njalo umpristi uzagxamuza umunwe wakhe wokunene emafutheni asesandleni sakhe sokhohlo, afafaze okwamafutha kasikhombisa ngomunwe wakhe phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus14:17 Lokuseleyo kwamafutha asesandleni sakhe umpristi uzafaka eqwangeni lwendlebe yokunene yalowo ozahlanjululwa, lesithupheni sesandla sakhe sokunene, lezwaneni olukhulu lonyawo lwakhe lokunene, phezu kwegazi lomnikelo wecala;" 
Leviticus14:18 Lokuseleyo kwamafutha asesandleni sompristi uzakufaka ekhanda lalowo ozahlanjululwa. Ngalokho umpristi uzamenzela inhlawulo yokuthula phambi kwe Nkosi. 
Leviticus14:19 Umpristi uzanikela-ke umnikelo wesono amenzele inhlawulo yokuthula lowo ozahlanjululwa ekungcoleni kwakhe, lemva kwalokho ahlabe umnikelo wokutshiswa," 
Leviticus14:20 Njalo umpristi uzanikela umnikelo wokutshiswa lomnikelo wokudla elathini. Ngalokho umpristi uzamenzela inhlawulo yokuthula, njalo uzahlambuluka." 
Leviticus14:21 Kodwa-ke uba engumyanga, lesandla sakhe singa ku finyeleli, uzathatha iwundlu elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wecala lokuzunguzwa ukumenzela inhlawulo yokuthula, lengxenye eyodwa etshumini lempuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha kube ngumnikelo wokudla, lelogi yamafutha," 
Leviticus14:22 lamajuba amabili loba amaphuphu amabili enkwilimba, isandla sakhe esingakufinyelela, njalo okunye kube ngumnikelo wesono lokunye kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa." 
Leviticus14:23 Langosuku lwesificaminwembili uzakulethela ukuhlanjululwa kwakhe kumpristi, emnyango wethente lenhlangano, phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus14:24 Umpristi uzathatha-ke iwundlu elomnikelo wecala, lelogi yamafutha; njalo umpristi uzakuzunguza kube ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus14:25 Ahlabe iwundlu elomnikelo wecala; njalo umpristi athathe okwegazi lomnikelo wecala, akufake eqwangeni lwendlebe yokunene yalowo ozahlanjululwa, lesithupheni sesandla sakhe sokunene, lezwaneni olukhulu lonyawo lwakhe lokunene;" 
Leviticus14:26 njalo umpristi uzathela okwamafutha esandleni sompristi sokhohlo; 
Leviticus14:27 umpristi uzafafaza-ke okwamafutha asesandleni sakhe sokhohlo kasikhombisa phambi kwe Nkosi ngomunwe wakhe wokunene; 
Leviticus14:28 njalo umpristi uzafaka okwamafutha asesandleni sakhe eqwangeni lwendlebe yokunene yalowo ozahlanjululwa, lesithupheni sesandla sakhe sokunene, lezwaneni olukhulu lonyawo lwakhe lokunene, endaweni yegazi lomnikelo wecala." 
Leviticus14:29 Lokuseleyo kwamafutha asesandleni sompristi uzakufaka ekhanda lalowo ozahlanjululwa, ukumenzela inhlawulo yokuthula phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus14:30 Njalo uzanikela elinye lamajuba loba elamaphuphu enkwilimba, kulokho isandla sakhe esifinyelele kukho," 
Leviticus14:31 lokho isandla sakhe esifinyelele kukho, okunye kube ngumnikelo wesono lokunye kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa, kanye lomnikelo wokudla. Lompristi uzamenzela ohlanjululwayo inhlawulo yokuthula phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Leviticus14:32 Lo ngumlayo ngalowo esikuye isifo sobulephero, osandla sakhe kasifinyeleli ekuhlanjululweni kwakhe." 
Leviticus14:33 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni isithi: 
Leviticus14:34 Lapho selifikile elizweni leKhanani engilinika lona libe yimfuyo, uba ngifake isifo sobulephero endlini yelizwe lelifa lenu," 
Leviticus14:35 umninindlu uzakuza ambikele umpristi, esithi: Kubonakala kimi kungathi kulesifo endlini." 
Leviticus14:36 Umpristi uzalaya ukuthi bakhuphe okusendlini, engakafiki umpristi ukubona isifo, ukuze konke okusendlini kungangcoli. Emva kwalokho umpristi uzangena ukukhangela indlu." 
Leviticus14:37 Lapho ebona isifo, khangela-ke, uba isifo sisemidulini yendlu, sil amagodigodi aluhlazana loba abomvana, lokubonakala kwawo kutshonile kulomduli," 
Leviticus14:38 umpristi uzaphuma endlini aye emnyango wendlu, ayivale indlu insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus14:39 Njalo umpristi uzabuya ngosuku lwesikhombisa; uba ebona ukuthi, khangela, isifo sesiqhelile emidulini yendlu," 
Leviticus14:40 umpristi uzalaya ukuthi bakhuphe izitina esikuzo isifo, bazilahlele ngaphandle komuzi endaweni engcolileyo," 
Leviticus14:41 njalo uzakwenza ukuthi indlu iphalwe phakathi inhlangothi zonke, babesebethululela uthuli abaluphalileyo ngaphandle komuzi endaweni engcolileyo." 
Leviticus14:42 Babesebethatha ezinye izitina, bazifake endaweni yalezozitina, njalo uzathatha olunye udaka ayibhade indlu." 
Leviticus14:43 Kodwa uba isifo sibuya futhi siqhamuke endlini emva kokukhupha kwakhe izitina, lemva kokuphalwa kwendlu, lemva kokubhadwa," 
Leviticus14:44 umpristi uzabuya; uba ebona ukuthi, khangela, isifo sesiqhelile endlini, kuyibulephero obuvukuzayo endlini; ingcolile." 
Leviticus14:45 Njalo uzayidiliza indlu, izitina zayo, lezigodo zayo, lalo lonke udaka lwendlu, akukhuphele ngaphandle komuzi endaweni engcolileyo." 
Leviticus14:46 Lalowo ongena kuleyondlu zonke izinsuku eseyivalile uzakuba ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe. 
Leviticus14:47 Lalowo olala kuleyondlu uzawatsha izembatho zakhe; lalowo odlela kuleyondlu uzawatsha izembatho zakhe. 
Leviticus14:48 Kodwa nxa umpristi esengenile lokungena abone ukuthi, khangela, isifo kasiqhelanga endlini emva kokubhadwa kwendlu, umpristi uzakutsho ukuthi indlu ihlambulukile, ngoba isifo seselatshiwe." 
Leviticus14:49 Lokuze indlu ihlambuluke, uzathatha inyoni ezimbili, lesigodo somsedari, lokubomvu, lehisope*," 
Leviticus14:50 abulalele enye inyoni embizeni yebumba phezu kwamanzi agobhozayo," 
Leviticus14:51 athathe isigodo somsedari lehisope lokubomvu lenyoni ephilayo, akugxamuze egazini lenyoni ebuleweyo lemanzini agobhozayo, afafaze indlu kasikhombisa," 
Leviticus14:52 ahlambulule indlu ngegazi lenyoni langamanzi agobhozayo langenyoni ephilayo langesigodo somsedari langehisope langokubomvu," 
Leviticus14:53 ayiyekele inyoni ephilayo iye ngaphandle komuzi endle. Ngakho uzayenzela indlu inhlawulo yokuthula, njalo ihlambuluke." 
Leviticus14:54 Lo ngumlayo waso sonke isifo sobulephero, lowoqweqwe," 
Leviticus14:55 lowobulephero besembatho, lowendlu," 
Leviticus14:56 lowethumba, lowokhwekhwe, lowebala elikhanyayo," 
Leviticus14:57 ukufundisa mhla kungcolile lamuhla kuhlambulukile. Lo ngumlayo wobulephero. 
Leviticus15:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni isithi: 
Leviticus15:2 Tshonini ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli lithi kubo: Ileyo laleyondoda, nxa kulokugobhoza okuphuma enyameni yayo, ngo kugobhoza kwayo ingcolile." 
Leviticus15:3 Lalokhu kuzakuba yikungcola kwayo ngenxa yokugobhoza kwayo. Loba inyama yayo iyagobhoza ngokugobhoza kwayo loba inyama yayo isimile ekugobhozeni kwayo, kuyikungcola kwayo." 
Leviticus15:4 Wonke umbheda alala kuwo olokugobhoza uzangcola; layo yonke into ahlala kuyo izangcola. 
Leviticus15:5 Njalo loba ngubani othinta umbheda wakhe uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:6 Lohlala entweni ahlale kuyo olokugobhoza uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:7 Lothinta inyama yalowo olokugobhoza uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:8 Uba-ke olokugobhoza ekhafulela ngamathe ohlambulukileyo, uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:9 Laso sonke isihlalo senyamazana agada kuso olokugobhoza sizangcola. 
Leviticus15:10 Laloba ngubani othinta loba yini ebingaphansi kwakhe uzakuba ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe; loyithwalayo uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:11 Laloba ngubani olokugobhoza amthintayo engahlambululanga izandla zakhe ngamanzi, uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:12 Lembiza yebumba olokugobhoza ayithintayo izabulawa, laso sonke isitsha sesigodo sizahlanjululwa ngamanzi." 
Leviticus15:13 Lapho-ke olokugobhoza esehlanjululwe ekugobhozeni kwakhe, uzazibalela insuku eziyisikhombisa zokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, awatshe izembatho zakhe, ageze umzimba wakhe ngamanzi agobhozayo, ahlambuluke." 
Leviticus15:14 Njalo ngosuku lwesificaminwembili uzazithathela amajuba amabili loba amaphuphu amabili enkwilimba, eze phambi kwe Nkosi emnyango wethente lenhlangano, akunike umpristi." 
Leviticus15:15 Umpristi uzawanikela-ke, elinye libe ngumnikelo wesono lelinye libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa; ngalokho umpristi uzamenzela inhlawulo yokuthula phambi kwe Nkosi ngenxa yokugobhoza kwakhe." 
Leviticus15:16 Indoda, nxa kuphuma-ke kuyo ubudoda bokuhlangana, izageza umzimba wayo wonke ngamanzi, ibe ngengcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:17 Njalo sonke isembatho laso sonke isikhumba obukuso ubudoda bokuhlangana sizawatshwa ngamanzi, sibe ngesingcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:18 Futhi owesifazana indoda elele laye ngobudoda bokuhlangana, bobabili bazageza ngamanzi, babe ngabangcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:19 Njalo owesifazana, nxa kulokugobhoza, ukugobhoza kwakhe enyameni yakhe kuligazi, uzakuba sekwehlukanisweni kwakhe insuku eziyisikhombisa; njalo loba ngubani omthintayo uzakuba ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:20 Lakho konke alala kukho ekwehlukanisweni kwakhe kuzangcola; lakho konke ahlala kukho kuzangcola. 
Leviticus15:21 Njalo loba ngubani othinta umbheda wakhe uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:22 Njalo loba ngubani othinta loba yiyiphi into ahlale kuyo uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:23 Loba-ke ibisembhedeni loba entweni ahlala kuyo, uba eyithinta, uzakuba ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:24 Njalo nxa indoda ilala lokulala laye, ukwehlukaniswa kwakhe kuzakuba kiyo; isizakuba ngengcolileyo insuku eziyisikhombisa, lawo wonke umbheda elala kuwo uzangcola." 
Leviticus15:25 Njalo owesifazana, uba ukugobhoza kwegazi kugobhoza insuku ezinengi, kungeyisiso isikhathi sokwehlukaniswa kwakhe, kumbe uba kugobhoza okwedlula isikhathi sokwehlukaniswa kwakhe, zonke izinsuku zokugobhoza kokungcola kwakhe, uzakuba njengensuku zokwehlukaniswa kwakhe, abe ngongcolileyo." 
Leviticus15:26 Wonke umbheda alala kuwo zonke izinsuku zokugobhoza kwakhe uzakuba kuye njengombheda wokwehlukaniswa kwakhe; njalo loba yiyiphi into ahlala kuyo izangcola, njengokungcola kokwehlukaniswa kwakhe." 
Leviticus15:27 Njalo loba ngubani othinta lezozinto uzakuba ngongcolileyo, awatshe izembatho zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:28 Kodwa uba esehlanjululwe ekugobhozeni kwakhe, uzazibalela insuku eziyisikhombisa, lemva kwalokho uzahlambuluka." 
Leviticus15:29 Langosuku lwesificaminwembili uzazithathela amajuba amabili loba amaphuphu amabili enkwilimba, akulethe kumpristi emnyango wethente lenhlangano." 
Leviticus15:30 Umpristi uzanikela-ke elinye libe ngumnikelo wesono lelinye libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa. Ngalokho umpristi uzamenzela inhlawulo yokuthula phambi kwe Nkosi ngenxa yokugobhoza kokungcola kwakhe. 
Leviticus15:31 Ngalindlela lizakwehlukanisa abantwana bakoIsrayeli lokungcola kwabo, ukuze bangafeli ekungcoleni kwabo, lapho bengcolisa ithabhanekele lami eliphakathi kwabo." 
Leviticus15:32 Lo ngumlayo walowo olokugobhoza, lowalowo okuphuma kuye ubudoda bokuhlangana, aze angcole ngakho," 
Leviticus15:33 futhi lowesifazana ogulayo ekwehlukanisweni kwakhe, lalowo ogobhoza ngokugobhoza kwakhe, owesilisa lowesifazana, langendoda elala lo wesifazana ongcolileyo." 
Leviticus16:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi emva kokufa kwamadodana amabili kaAroni ekusondeleni kwawo phambi kwe Nkosi, asesifa." 
Leviticus16:2 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Khuluma kuAroni umnewenu ukuthi angangeni langasiphi isikhathi e ndaw eni engcwele ngaphakathi kweveyili, phambi kwesihlalo somusa esiphezu komtshokotsho, ukuze angafi; ngoba ngiyabonakala eyezini phezu kwesihlalo somusa." 
Leviticus16:3 Elalokhu uAroni uzangena e ndaw eni engcwele: elejongosi ithole lenkomo, libe ngumnikelo wesono, lenqama ibe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa." 
Leviticus16:4 Uzakwembatha isigqoko esingcwele lelembu elicolekileyo, lokabhudula wangaphansi welembu elicolekileyo uzakuba senyameni yakhe, azibophe ngebhanti lelembu elicolekileyo, athandele ngeqhiye yelembu elicolekileyo; lezi yizembatho ezingcwele. Ngakho uzageza umzimba wakhe ngamanzi, azembathe." 
Leviticus16:5 Lakunhlangano yabantwana bakoIsrayeli uzathatha izimpongo ezimbili zembuzi zibe ngumnikelo wesono, lenqama eyodwa ibe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa." 
Leviticus16:6 Njalo uAroni uzanikela ijongosi lomnikelo wesono elingelakhe, azenzele inhlawulo yokuthula lokwendlu yakhe." 
Leviticus16:7 Athathe impongo ezimbili, azibeke phambi kwe Nkosi emnyango wethente lenhlangano." 
Leviticus16:8 UAroni uzakwenza-ke inkatho phezu kwezimpongo ezimbili, enye inkatho ibe ngeye Nkosi lenye inkatho ibe ngeyeAzazeli." 
Leviticus16:9 UAroni uzasondeza-ke impongo okuphezu kwayo inkatho ye Nkosi, ayenze ibe ngumnikelo wesono;" 
Leviticus16:10 kodwa impongo okuphezu kwayo inkatho yeAzazeli uzayibeka iphilile phambi kwe Nkosi ukwenza inhlawulo yokuthula ngayo, ukuyiyekela ihambe njengeAzazeli enkangala." 
Leviticus16:11 Njalo uAroni uzasondeza ijongosi lomnikelo wesono elingelakhe, azenzele inhlawulo yokuthula leyendlu yakhe; ahlabe ijongosi lomnikelo wesono elingelakhe." 
Leviticus16:12 Athathe umganu wokutshisela impepha ugcwele amalahle omlilo avele elathini phambi kwe Nkosi, lezandla zakhe zigcwele impepha elephunga elimnandi echolisisiweyo, akulethe ngaphakathi kweveyili," 
Leviticus16:13 abeke impepha phezu komlilo phambi kwe Nkosi, ukuze iyezi lempepha lisibekele isihlalo somusa esiphezu kobufakazi, ukuze angafi." 
Leviticus16:14 Athathe okwegazi lejongosi, alifafaze ngomunwe wakhe phezu kwesihlalo somusa empumalanga; langaphambi kwesihlalo somusa uzafafaza okwegazi kasikhombisa ngomunwe wakhe." 
Leviticus16:15 Abesehlaba impongo yomnikelo wesono engeyabantu, alethe igazi layo ngaphakathi kweveyili, enze ngegazi layo njengokwenza kwakhe ngegazi lejongosi, alifafaze phezu kwesihlalo somusa laphambi kwesihlalo somusa." 
Leviticus16:16 Ngalokho uzakwenzela indawo engcwele inhlawulo yokuthula, ngenxa yokungcola kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, langenxa yeziphambeko zabo, ezonweni zabo zonke. Futhi uzalenzela njalo ithente lenhlangano, elihlala labo phakathi kokungcola kwabo." 
Leviticus16:17 Kakungabi khona lamuntu ethenteni lenhlangano, ekungeneni kwakhe ukwenza inhlawulo yokuthula e ndaw eni engcwele aze aphume, esezenzele inhlawulo yokuthula, leyendlu yakhe, leyebandla lonke lakoIsrayeli." 
Leviticus16:18 Uzaphumela-ke elathini eliphambi kwe Nkosi, alenzele inhlawulo yokuthula, athathe okwegazi lejongosi lokwegazi lempongo, akufake empondweni zelathi inhlangothi zonke;" 
Leviticus16:19 afafaze okwegazi phezu kwalo kasikhombisa ngomunwe wakhe, alihlambulule, alingcwelise ekungcoleni kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Leviticus16:20 Lapho eseqedile ukwenzela indawo engcwele ukubuyisana, lethente lenhlangano, lelathi, uzasondeza impongo ephilayo;" 
Leviticus16:21 uAroni abeke-ke izandla zakhe zombili enhlokweni yempongo ephilayo, avume phezu kwayo bonke ububi babantwana bakoIsrayeli, leziphambeko zonke zabo, lezono zabo zonke, akubeke enhlokweni yempongo, a yi yekele ihambe ngesandla sendoda efaneleyo, iye enkangala." 
Leviticus16:22 Impongo izathwala-ke phezu kwayo bonke ububi babo, iye emmangweni owehlukanisiweyo; njalo izayiyekela impongo iye enkangala." 
Leviticus16:23 LoAroni uzangena ethenteni lenhlangano, akhulule izembatho zelembu elicolekileyo abezembethe ekungeneni kwakhe e ndaw eni engcwele, azitshiye khona," 
Leviticus16:24 ageze umzimba wakhe ngamanzi endaweni engcwele, agqoke izembatho zakhe, aphume, enze umnikelo wakhe wokutshiswa lomnikelo wokutshiswa wabantu, azenzele yena inhlawulo yokuthula leyabantu." 
Leviticus16:25 Lamahwahwa omnikelo wesono uzawatshisa elathini. 
Leviticus16:26 Lalowo oyekele impongo njengeAzazeli uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze umzimba wakhe ngamanzi, emva kwalokho angene enkambeni." 
Leviticus16:27 Kodwa ijongosi lomnikelo wesono lempongo yomnikelo wesono, ogazi lazo langeniswa ukwenza inhlawulo yokuthula e ndaw eni engcwele, zizakhitshelwa ngaphandle kwenkamba; babesebetshisa izikhumba zazo lenyama yazo lomswane wazo ngomlilo." 
Leviticus16:28 Lalowo okutshisayo uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze umzimba wakhe ngamanzi, emva kwalokho angene enkambeni." 
Leviticus16:29 Kuzakuba yisimiso esaphakade kini: Ngenyanga yesikhombisa ngolwetshumi lwenyanga lizathobisa imiphefumulo yenu, lingasebenzi lamsebenzi, owokuzalwa elizweni lowemzini ohlala njengowezizwe phakathi kwenu." 
Leviticus16:30 Ngoba ngalolusuku uzalenzela inhlawulo yokuthula ukulihlambulula; kuzo zonke izono zenu phambi kwe Nkosi lizahlanjululwa. 
Leviticus16:31 Kulisabatha lokuphumula kini; njalo lizathobisa imiphefumulo yenu; kuyisimiso saphakade. 
Leviticus16:32 Njalo umpristi ogcotshiweyo, owehlukaniselwe ukusebenza njengompristi esikhundleni sikayise, uzakwenza inhlawulo yokuthula, agqoke izembatho zelembu elicolekileyo, izembatho ezingcwele," 
Leviticus16:33 enzele inhlawulo yokuthula indawo engcwele ngcwele, lethente lenhlangano, lelathi uzakwenzela inhlawulo yokuthula, labapristi labantu bonke bebandla uzabenzela inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Leviticus16:34 Lokhu kuzakuba yisimiso esilaphakade kini, ukwenzela inhlawulo yokuthula abantwana bakoIsrayeli kanye ngomnyaka ngazo zonke izono zabo. Wenza-ke njengokuba i Nkosi yalaya uMozisi." 
Leviticus17:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus17:2 Tshono kuAroni lakumadodana akhe, lebantwaneni bonke bakoIsrayeli, uthi kubo: Leli yilizwi i Nkosi elaye ngalo isithi:" 
Leviticus17:3 Loba ngubani wendlu kaIsrayeli ohlaba inkabi loba imvu loba imbuzi enkambeni, kumbe ekuhlabela ngaphandle kwenkamba," 
Leviticus17:4 engakulethanga emnyango wethente lenhlangano ukunikela umnikelo e Nkosi ni phambi kwethabhanekele le Nkosi, igazi lizabalelwa lowomuntu, uchithile igazi; ngakho lowomuntu uzaqunywa asuke ebantwini bakibo." 
Leviticus17:5 Ukuze, lapho abantwana bakoIsrayeli beletha imihlatshelo yabo, abayihlabela endle, bayilethe e Nkosi ni emnyango wethente lenhlangano, kumpristi, bayihlabe ibe yimihlatshelo yeminikelo yokuthula e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus17:6 Njalo umpristi uzafafaza igazi phezu kwelathi le Nkosi emnyango wethente lenhlangano, atshise amahwahwa, abe luqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus17:7 Njalo kabasayikuhlabela amadimoni imihlatshelo yabo, ababephinga ngokuwalandela. Lokhu kuzakuba yisimiso esilaphakade kubo ezizukulwaneni zabo." 
Leviticus17:8 Tshono-ke kubo uthi: Ngulowo lalowo wendlu kaIsrayeli, lakowemzini ohlala njengowezizwe phakathi kwabo, onikela umnikelo wokutshiswa loba umhlatshelo," 
Leviticus17:9 angawulethi emnyango wethente lenhlangano ukuze awenzele i Nkosi, lowomuntu uzaqunywa asuke ebantwini bakibo." 
Leviticus17:10 Njalo ngulowo lalowo wendlu kaIsrayeli, lakowemzini ohlala njengowezizwe phakathi kwabo, odla loba yiliphi igazi, ngizamisa ubuso bami bumelane lomphefumulo odla igazi, ngiwuqume usuke phakathi kwabantu bawo." 
Leviticus17:11 Ngoba impilo yenyama isegazini; mina-ke ngilinike lona phezu kwelathi ukwenzela imiphefumulo yenu inhlawulo yokuthula; ngoba kuligazi elenzela umphefumulo inhlawulo yokuthula. 
Leviticus17:12 Ngakho ngathi ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli: Kakungabi lamphefumulo kini odla igazi; lowemzini ohlala njengowezizwe phakathi kwenu kangadli igazi. 
Leviticus17:13 Njalo ngulowo lalowo ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, lakowemzini ohlala njengowezizwe phakathi kwabo, ozingela inyama yenyamazana kumbe inyoni edliwayo, uzathulula igazi layo, aligqibele ngenhlabathi." 
Leviticus17:14 Ngoba kuyimpilo yenyama yonke; igazi layo lisempilweni yayo; yikho ngathi ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli: Lingadli igazi loba ngelayiphi inyama, ngoba impilo yayo yonke inyama kuligazi layo; loba ngubani olidlayo uzaqunywa." 
Leviticus17:15 Futhi wonke umphefumulo odla ingcuba kumbe inyamazana edatshuliweyo phakathi kwabokuzalwa elizweni kumbe phakathi kwabemzini, uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze ngamanzi, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe; emva kwalokho uzahlambuluka." 
Leviticus17:16 Kodwa uba enga zi watshi, engagezi umzimba wakhe, uzathwala ububi bakhe." 
Leviticus18:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus18:2 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu. 
Leviticus18:3 Lingenzi njengokwemisebenzi yelizwe leGibhithe lapho elalihlala khona, lingenzi futhi njengokwemisebenzi yelizwe leKhanani engililetha kulo. Lingahambi ngemithetho yabo." 
Leviticus18:4 Lizakwenza izehlulelo zami ligcine izimiso zami, ukuhamba kuzo. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus18:5 Ngakho lizagcina izimiso zami lezehlulelo zami; okuthi uba umuntu ezenza uzaphila ngazo. Ngiyi Nkosi. 
Leviticus18:6 Kakungasondeli lamuntu lakusiphi isihlobo senyama yakhe ukwembula ubunqunu baso. Ngiyi Nkosi. 
Leviticus18:7 Ungembuli ubunqunu bukayihlo lobunqunu bukanyoko; ungunyoko, ungembuli ubunqunu bakhe." 
Leviticus18:8 Ungembuli ubunqunu bomkayihlo, buyibunqunu bukayihlo." 
Leviticus18:9 Ubunqunu bukadadewenu, indodakazi kayihlo loba indodakazi kanyoko, ezelwe ekhaya loba ezelwe ngaphandle, ungembuli ubunqunu babo." 
Leviticus18:10 Ungembuli ubunqunu bendodakazi yendodana yakho, loba bendodakazi yendodakazi yakho, ngoba bayibunqunu bakho." 
Leviticus18:11 Ubunqunu bendodakazi yomkayihlo ezelwe nguyihlo, ingudadewenu, ungembuli ubunqunu bayo." 
Leviticus18:12 Ungembuli ubunqunu bukadadewabo kayihlo, ngoba eyisihlobo sikayihlo." 
Leviticus18:13 Ungembuli ubunqunu bukadadewabo kanyoko, ngoba eyisihlobo sikanyoko." 
Leviticus18:14 Ungembuli ubunqunu bomfowabo kayihlo; ungasondeli kumkakhe, ngoba enguyihlokazi." 
Leviticus18:15 Ungembuli ubunqunu bukamalokozana; ungumkandodana yakho, ungembuli ubunqunu bakhe." 
Leviticus18:16 Ungembuli ubunqunu bomkamfowenu, buyibunqunu bomfowenu." 
Leviticus18:17 Ungembuli ubunqunu bowesifazana lobendodakazi yakhe; ungathathi indodakazi yendodana yakhe loba indodakazi yendodakazi yakhe, ukwembula ubunqunu bayo; bayizihlobo; kuyinkohlakalo." 
Leviticus18:18 Ungathathi owesifazana kanye lodadewabo uku m hlupha, ukwembula ubunqunu bakhe kanye laye empilweni yakhe." 
Leviticus18:19 Ungasondeli kowesifazana ekwehlukanisweni kokungcola kwakhe ukwembula ubunqunu bakhe. 
Leviticus18:20 Ungalali lomkamakhelwane wakho ukungcola ngaye. 
Leviticus18:21 Unganiki okwenzalo yakho ukuthi ukudabulisele kuMoleki; ungangcolisi ibizo likaNkulunkulu wakho. Ngiyi Nkosi. 
Leviticus18:22 Ungalali lowesilisa njengokulala lowesifazana; kuyisinengiso. 
Leviticus18:23 Ungalali laloba yiyiphi inyamazana ukungcola ngayo; futhi owesifazana angemi phambi kwenyamazana ukulala layo; kuyingxube. 
Leviticus18:24 Lingazingcolisi langenye yalezizinto, ngoba ngazo zonke lezizinto izizwe ziyangcoliswa engizixotsha phambi kwenu." 
Leviticus18:25 Ngalokho ilizwe lingcolile; ngakho ngiphindisela ububi balo phezu kwalo, lelizwe liyabahlanza abahlali balo." 
Leviticus18:26 Ngakho lina lizagcina izimiso zami lezehlulelo zami, lingenzi okwazo zonke lezizinengiso; owokuzalwa elizweni loba owemzini ohlala njengowezizwe phakathi kwenu." 
Leviticus18:27 Ngoba zonke lezizinengiso bazenza abantu balelolizwe ababekhona ngaphambi kwenu, ngakho ilizwe langcola." 
Leviticus18:28 Ukuze ilizwe lingalihlanzi lapho lilingcolisa, njengalokhu lahlanza isizwe esasikhona ngaphambi kwenu." 
Leviticus18:29 Ngoba wonke owenza okwalezizinengiso, imiphefumulo ekwenzayo izaqunywa isuke ebantwini bayo." 
Leviticus18:30 Ngakho lizagcina umlayo wami, ukuze lingenzi okwalezozimiso eziyisinengiso ezenziwa ngaphambi kwenu, ukuthi lingazingcolisi ngazo. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus19:2 Tshono kunhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Banini ngcwele, ngoba mina i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ngingcwele." 
Leviticus19:3 Yesabani, ngulowo lalowo, unina loyise. Gcinani-ke amasabatha ami. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:4 Lingaphendukeli ezithombeni, lingazenzeli onkulunkulu ababunjwe ngokuncibilikisa. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:5 Njalo nxa linikela umhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula e Nkosi ni, liwunikele ngokuthanda kwenu." 
Leviticus19:6 Uzadliwa ngosuku lokunikela kwenu langakusasa; kodwa okuseleyo ngosuku lwesithathu kuzatshiswa ngomlilo. 
Leviticus19:7 Uba kudliwa lokudliwa ngosuku lwesithathu, kuzakuba yisinengiso; kakuyikwemukeleka." 
Leviticus19:8 Ngakho okudlayo uzathwala ububi bakhe, ngoba ungcolise okungcwele kwe Nkosi; lalowomphefumulo uzaqunywa usuke ebantwini bawo." 
Leviticus19:9 Lalapho livuna isivuno selizwe lakini, ungavuni ngokupheleleyo umngcele wensimu yakho; futhi ungabuthi okuseleyo kwesivuno sakho." 
Leviticus19:10 Ungakhothozi isivini sakho; futhi ungabuthi okuwileyo kwesivini sakho; uzakutshiyela abayanga labemzini. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu. 
Leviticus19:11 Lingebi, lingaphathi ngenkohliso, omunye lomakhelwane wakhe." 
Leviticus19:12 Lingafungi ngamanga ngebizo lami, uze ungcolise ibizo likaNkulunkulu wakho. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus19:13 Ungacindezeli umakhelwane wakho, unga m phangi. Iholo loqatshiweyo lingahlali kuwe ubusuku kuze kube sekuseni." 
Leviticus19:14 Ungaqalekisi isacuthe, ungafaki isikhubekiso phambi kwesiphofu, kodwa wesabe uNkulunkulu wakho. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus19:15 Ungenzi ukungalungi ekwahluleleni; ungemukeli ubuso bomyanga, ungahloniphi ubuso bomkhulu, yahlulela umakhelwane wakho ngokulunga." 
Leviticus19:16 Ungahambahambi njeng omnyundi phakathi kwabantu bakini; ungamelani legazi lomakhelwane wakho. Ngiyi Nkosi. 
Leviticus19:17 Ungazondi umfowenu enhliziyweni yakho; umkhuze lokumkhuza umakhelwane wakho, ungathwali isono ngenxa yakhe." 
Leviticus19:18 Ungaphindiseli, ungabi lasikhwili labantwana babantu bakini; kodwa thanda umakhelwane wakho njengalokhu uzi thanda wena. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus19:19 Gcinani izimiso zami. Ungavumeli izifuyo zakho zikhwelwe yimihlobo emibili. Ungahlanyeli insimu yakho ngenhlobo ezimbili. Lesigqoko esemihlobo emibili exubeneyo singezi phezu kwakho. 
Leviticus19:20 Lendoda, nxa ilala lomfazi, eyisigqilikazi esikhombileyo, esingahlengwanga lokuhlengwa, kumbe singanikwanga inkululeko, kuzakuba lesijeziso. Kabayikubulawa, ngoba sasingakhululwanga." 
Leviticus19:21 Njalo izaletha umnikelo wayo wecala e Nkosi ni, emnyango wethente lenhlangano, inqama ibe ngumnikelo wecala." 
Leviticus19:22 Njalo umpristi uzayenzela inhlawulo yokuthula ngenqama yomnikelo wecala phambi kwe Nkosi ngesono sayo esonileyo, izathethelelwa-ke esonweni sayo esonileyo." 
Leviticus19:23 Lalapho selifikile elizweni, lihlanyele zonke izihlahla zokudla, lizathatha ijwabu lazo, eliy isithelo sazo, njengesingasokwanga; iminyaka emithathu sizakuba singasokwanga kini, singadliwa." 
Leviticus19:24 Kodwa ngomnyaka wesine sonke isithelo sazo sizakuba ngcwele, sibe yindumiso e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus19:25 Langomnyaka wesihlanu lingadla isithelo sazo, ukuze zilengezelelele isivuno sazo. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:26 Lingadli lutho olulegazi. Lingenzi imilingo, lingachasisi ngemibono." 
Leviticus19:27 Lingageli amagumbi ekhanda lenu, ungoni amagumbi endevu zakho." 
Leviticus19:28 Lingazicabi enyameni yenu ngenxa yofileyo, lingafaki phezu kwenu uphawu lokuzisika. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus19:29 Ungangcolisi indodakazi yakho ngokuyenza ibe liwule, hlezi ilizwe liphinge, lelizwe ligcwale inkohlakalo." 
Leviticus19:30 Gcinani amasabatha ami, lihloniphe indlu yami engcwele. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus19:31 Lingaphendukeli kulabo abalamadlozi lakwabalumbayo; lingabadingi ukuze lingcoliswe yibo. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu. 
Leviticus19:32 Sukumela impunga, uhloniphe ubuso bomdala, wesabe uNkulunkulu wakho. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus19:33 Futhi nxa owezizweni ehlala njengowezizwe lawe elizweni lakini, lingamcindezeli." 
Leviticus19:34 Owezizweni ohlala njengowezizwe lani uzakuba kini njengozalwa elizweni phakathi kwenu, umthande njengalokhu uzi thanda wena; ngoba lalingabezizweni elizweni leGibhithe. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:35 Lingenzi ukungalungi ekwahluleleni, ebudeni, esisindweni, lesilinganisweni." 
Leviticus19:36 Banini lezikali zokulinganisa ezilungileyo, izilinganiso ezilungileyo, i-efa* elilungileyo, lehini* elilungileyo. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu owalikhupha elizweni leGibhithe." 
Leviticus19:37 Ngakho gcinani zonke izimiso zami lezehlulelo zami zonke, lizenze. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus20:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus20:2 Tshono futhi ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Ngulowo lalowo wabantwana bakoIsrayeli, loba owabezizweni abahlala njengabezizwe koIsrayeli, onikela okwenzalo yakhe kuMoleki, uzabulawa lokubulawa, abantu belizwe bazamkhanda ngamatshe." 
Leviticus20:3 Mina-ke ngizamisa ubuso bami bumelane lalowomuntu, ngimqume asuke phakathi kwabantu bakibo, ngoba enikele okwenzalo yakhe kuMoleki, ukuze angcolise indlu yami engcwele, lokungcolisa ibizo lami elingcwele." 
Leviticus20:4 Uba-ke abantu belizwe befihla lokufihla amehlo abo kulowomuntu nxa enikela okwenzalo yakhe kuMoleki, ukuze bangambulali," 
Leviticus20:5 mina ngizamisa ubuso bami bumelane lalowomuntu njalo bumelane losapho lwakhe, ngimqume labo bonke abaphinga emva kwakhe, ukuthi baphinge belandela uMoleki, basuke phakathi kwabantu bakibo." 
Leviticus20:6 Umphefumulo, ophendukela-ke kulabo abalamadlozi lakwabalumbayo ukuphinga ubalandela, ngizamisa ubuso bami bumelane lalowomphefumulo, ngiwuqume usuke phakathi kwabantu bakibo." 
Leviticus20:7 Ngakho zingcweliseni libe ngcwele, ngoba ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus20:8 Njalo gcinani izimiso zami, lizenze. Ngiyi Nkosi elingcwelisayo." 
Leviticus20:9 Ngoba ngulowo lalowo othuka uyise kumbe unina uzabulawa lokubulawa; uthukile uyise kumbe unina; igazi lakhe liphezu kwakhe. 
Leviticus20:10 Lendoda efeba lomfazi womuntu, efeba lomkamakhelwane wayo, izabulawa lokubulawa, isifebe lesifebekazi." 
Leviticus20:11 Lendoda elala lomkayise yembule ubunqunu bukayise; bobabili bazabulawa lokubulawa; igazi labo liphezu kwabo. 
Leviticus20:12 Lendoda elala lomalokazana wayo, bobabili bazabulawa lokubulawa; benze ingxube; igazi labo liphezu kwabo." 
Leviticus20:13 Lendoda elala lowesilisa njengokulala lowesifazana, bobabili benze isinengiso; bazabulawa lokubulawa; igazi labo liphezu kwabo." 
Leviticus20:14 Lendoda ethatha umfazi kanye lonina, kuyinkohlakalo. Bazatshiswa ngomlilo, yena labo, ukuze kungabi khona inkohlakalo phakathi kwenu." 
Leviticus20:15 Lendoda elala lenyamazana, izabulawa lokubulawa, futhi lizayibulala inyamazana." 
Leviticus20:16 Lowesifazana osondela lakuyiphi inyamazana ukulala layo, uzabulala owesifazana lenyamazana; bazabulawa lokubulawa; igazi labo liphezu kwabo." 
Leviticus20:17 Lendoda ethatha udadewabo, indodakazi kayise loba indodakazi kanina, ibone ubunqunu bakhe, laye abone ubunqunu bayo, kulihlazo; njalo bazaqunywa emehlweni abantwana babantu bakibo; yembule ubunqunu bukadadewabo; izathwala ububi bayo." 
Leviticus20:18 Lendoda elala lowesifazana ogulayo, yembule ubunqunu bakhe, inqunule umthombo wakhe, laye wembule umthombo wegazi lakhe, bobabili bazaqunywa basuke phakathi kwabantu bakibo." 
Leviticus20:19 Njalo ungembuli ubunqunu bukadadewabo kanyoko, loba obukadadewabo kayihlo; ngoba wembule isihlobo sakhe; bazathwala ububi babo." 
Leviticus20:20 Lendoda elala lomkamfowabo kayise, yembule ubunqunu bomfowabo kayise; bazathwala isono sabo; bafe bengelabantwana." 
Leviticus20:21 Lendoda ethatha umkamfowabo, kuyikungcola; yembule ubunqunu bukamfowabo; bazakuba ngabangelabantwana." 
Leviticus20:22 Ngakho gcinani zonke izimiso zami lezehlulelo zonke zami, lizenze, ukuze ilizwe engililetha kulo ukuhlala kulo lingalihlanzi." 
Leviticus20:23 Njalo lingahambi ngezimiso zesizwe engisixotshayo phambi kwenu; ngoba benze zonke lezizinto; ngakho nganengwa yibo. 
Leviticus20:24 Kodwa ngathi kini: Lizakudla ilifa lelizwe labo; mina ngizalinika ukuthi lidle ilifa lalo, ilizwe eligeleza uchago loluju. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu, olehlukanise labezizwe." 
Leviticus20:25 Ngakho yehlukanisani phakathi kwenyamazana ezihlambulukileyo lezingahlambulukanga, laphakathi kwezinyoni ezingahlambulukanga lezihlambulukileyo; lingenzi imiphefumulo yenu inengeke ngezinyamazana loba ngezinyoni loba ngakuphi okuhuquzelayo emhlabathini, engikwehlukanise lani njengokungcolileyo." 
Leviticus20:26 Njalo lizakuba ngcwele kimi, ngoba mina Nkosi ngingcwele; ngilehlukanisile labezizwe ukuze libe ngabami." 
Leviticus20:27 Njalo owesilisa loba owesifazana, abalamadlozi loba abalumbayo, bazabulawa lokubulawa, bazabakhanda ngamatshe; igazi labo liphezu kwabo." 
Leviticus21:1 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Tshono kubapristi, amadodana kaAroni, uthi kubo: Kakungabi khona ozingcolisayo ngofileyo phakathi kwabantu bakibo," 
Leviticus21:2 ngaphandle kwesihlobo sakhe, esiseduze laye, ngonina, langoyise, langendodana yakhe, langendodakazi yakhe, langomfowabo," 
Leviticus21:3 langodadewabo intombi emsulwa, eseduze laye, engazange ibe ngeyendoda; angazingcolisa ngayo." 
Leviticus21:4 Kayikuzingcolisa, eyisikhulu phakathi kwabantu bakibo, ukuzingcolisa." 
Leviticus21:5 Kabayikwenza impabanga ekhanda labo, bangageli igumbi lodevu lwabo, bangacabi inhlanga enyameni yabo." 
Leviticus21:6 Bazakuba ngcwele kuNkulunkulu wabo, bangangcolisi ibizo likaNkulunkulu wabo. Ngoba banikela iminikelo ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo, ukudla kukaNkulunkulu wabo. Ngakho bazakuba ngcwele." 
Leviticus21:7 Kabayikuthatha owesifazana oyisifebe kumbe ongcolileyo, njalo kabayikuthatha owesifazana olahlwe yindoda yakhe; ngoba ungcwele kuNkulunkulu wakhe." 
Leviticus21:8 Ngakho uzamngcwelisa, ngoba unikela ukudla kukaNkulunkulu wakho. Uzakuba ngcwele kuwe, ngoba mina Nkosi elingcwelisayo ngingcwele." 
Leviticus21:9 Lendodakazi yaloba nguwuphi umpristi, uba izingcolisa ngokuphinga, iyamngcolisa uyise; izatshiswa ngomlilo." 
Leviticus21:10 Lompristi omkhulu phakathi kwabafowabo, okuthelwe ekhanda lakhe amafutha okugcoba, lowehlukaniselwa ukuthi embathe izembatho, kayikuvumela ukuthi ikhanda lakhe lembulwe, angadabuli izembatho zakhe;" 
Leviticus21:11 angayi lakusiphi isidumbu, angazingcolisi ngoyise loba ngonina;" 
Leviticus21:12 angaphumi endlini engcwele, angangcolisi indlu engcwele kaNkulunkulu wakhe, ngoba umqhele wamafutha okugcoba kaNkulunkulu wakhe uphezu kwakhe. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus21:13 Njalo yena uzathatha umfazi ebuntombini bakhe. 
Leviticus21:14 Umfelokazi, kumbe olahliweyo, loba isifebe esingcolisiweyo, laba kangabathathi. Kodwa uzathatha intombi emsulwa ebantwini bakibo ibe ngumka khe," 
Leviticus21:15 njalo angangcolisi inzalo yakhe phakathi kwabantu bakibo. Ngoba ngiyi Nkosi emngcwelisayo. 
Leviticus21:16 INkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus21:17 Khuluma kuAroni usithi: Loba ngubani owenzalo yakho ezizukulwaneni zabo okulesici kuye kangasondeli ukunikela ukudla kukaNkulunkulu wakhe. 
Leviticus21:18 Ngoba loba nguwuphi umuntu okulesici kuye angasondeli, umuntu oyisiphofu, kumbe oyisiqhuli, kumbe olimele ebusweni, kumbe olesitho eselulekileyo," 
Leviticus21:19 kumbe umuntu okulokwephuka konyawo kuye, kumbe ukwephuka kwesandla," 
Leviticus21:20 kumbe olesifumbu, kumbe ongumuthwa, kumbe olomntwana elihlweni lakhe, kumbe olentembuzane, kumbe oloqweqwe olulumayo, loba ochotshozwe emasendeni." 
Leviticus21:21 Kakulamuntu owenzalo kaAroni umpristi okukuye isici ozasondela ukunikela iminikelo ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo; kulesici kuye, angasondeli ukunikela ukudla kukaNkulunkulu wakhe." 
Leviticus21:22 Angadla ukudla kukaNkulunkulu wakhe, ezintweni ezingcwelengcwele lezintweni ezingcwele," 
Leviticus21:23 kodwa angezi kulo iveyili, angasondeli elathini, ngoba kulesici kuye, ukuze angangcolisi izindlu zami ezingcwele. Ngoba ngiyi Nkosi ebangcwelisayo." 
Leviticus21:24 UMozisi wasekhuluma lokho kuAroni, lakumadodana akhe, lakubo bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Leviticus22:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus22:2 Tshono kuAroni lakumadodana akhe ukuthi bazehlukanise lezinto ezingcwele zabantwana bakoIsrayeli abangingcwelisela zona, ukuze bangangcolisi ibizo lami elingcwele; ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus22:3 Tshono kibo uthi: Loba nguwuphi umuntu ezizukulwaneni zenu owenzalo yenu yonke osondela ezintweni ezingcwele, abantwana bakoIsrayeli abazingcwelisela i Nkosi, nxa ukungcola kwakhe kuphezu kwakhe, lowomuntu uzaqunywa asuke phambi kwami. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus22:4 Ngulowo lalowo owenzalo kaAroni, ongumlephero, loba olokugobhoza, kangadli ezintweni ezingcwele aze ahlambuluke. Lothinta lakuphi okungcoliswe yisidumbu, kumbe indoda okuphuma kuyo ubudoda bokuhlangana," 
Leviticus22:5 kumbe loba ngubani othinta loba yiyiphi into ehuquzelayo, angcoliswa yiyo, kumbe umuntu angcoliswa nguye, ngakho konke ukungcola kwakhe," 
Leviticus22:6 umuntu othinta lokhu uzakuba ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe, angadli okwezinto ezingcwele ngaphandle kokuthi ageze umzimba wakhe ngamanzi." 
Leviticus22:7 Nxa selitshonile ilanga uzahlambuluka; lemva kwalokho angadla okwezinto ezingcwele, ngoba kuyikudla kwakhe." 
Leviticus22:8 Ingcuba lokudatshuliweyo kangakudli ukuzingcolisa ngakho. Ngiyi Nkosi. 
Leviticus22:9 Ngakho bazagcina umlayo wami, ukuze bangathwali isono ngawo, bafele kuso, sebewungcolisile. Ngiyi Nkosi ebangcwelisayo." 
Leviticus22:10 Njalo kakho owemzini ozakudla into engcwele. Ohlala lompristi loyisisebenzi esiqatshiweyo kangadli into engcwele. 
Leviticus22:11 Kodwa uba umpristi ethenga umuntu eyintengo yemali yakhe, yena angadla okwayo, lozelwe emzini wakhe, bona bangadla okokudla kwakhe." 
Leviticus22:12 Lendodakazi yompristi, uba isiba ngeyendoda yemzini, yona kayingadli okomnikelo wezinto ezingcwele." 
Leviticus22:13 Kodwa indodakazi yompristi, nxa ingumfelokazi loba ingelahliweyo ingelanzalo, isibuyele emzini kayise njengebutsheni bayo, izakudla okokudla kukayise; kanti kakho owemzini ongadla kukho." 
Leviticus22:14 Njalo nxa umuntu esidla into engcwele ngokungazi, uzakwengezelela kuyo ingxenye yesihlanu yayo, anike umpristi into engcwele." 
Leviticus22:15 Njalo kabayikungcolisa izinto ezingcwele zabantwana bakoIsrayeli abaziphakamisela i Nkosi," 
Leviticus22:16 babenze bathwale ububi becala, lapho besidla izinto zabo ezingcwele; ngoba ngiyi Nkosi ebangcwelisayo." 
Leviticus22:17 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus22:18 Tshono kuAroni, lakumadodana akhe, lakubo bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli, uthi kubo: Ngulowo lalowo owendlu kaIsrayeli, lowabezizweni koIsrayeli, ozanikela umnikelo wakhe ngezithembiso zabo zonke, langokweminikelo yabo yonke yesihle, abazayinikela e Nkosi ni kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa," 
Leviticus22:19 ngenhliziyo yenu enhle, iduna elingelasici, elezinkomo, elezimvu, loba elembuzi."
