Leviticus22:20 Linganikeli loba ngakuphi okulesici kukho, ngoba kakuyikwemukeleka kini." 
Leviticus22:21 Umuntu, nxa enikela-ke umhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula e Nkosi ni wesithembiso esikhethekileyo loba womnikelo wesihle, enkomeni loba ezimvini, kumele uphelele ukuze wemukeleke, kungabi lasici kuwo." 
Leviticus22:22 Eziyiziphofu, kumbe ezephukileyo, kumbe eziyizilima, kumbe ezilensumpa, kumbe eziloqweqwe, kumbe ezilamathumba, linganikeli lezi e Nkosi ni, futhi linganikeli kulezi umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo e Nkosi ni phezu kwelathi." 
Leviticus22:23 Kodwa inkunzi loba imvu elesitho eselulekileyo kumbe esidundubeleyo lingayinikela ibe ngumnikelo wesihle; kodwa kayiyikwemukeleka ukuba ngeyesithembiso. 
Leviticus22:24 Njalo linganikeli e Nkosi ni okuhluzukileyo kumbe okugxotshiweyo loba okudatshuliweyo loba okuqunyiweyo; lingakwenzi elizweni lakini. 
Leviticus22:25 Ngokuvela esandleni sowemzini linganikeli isinkwa sikaNkulunkulu wenu okuvela kuzo zonke lezi; ngoba ukonakala kwazo kukuzo, isici sikuzo, kaziyikwemukeleka kini." 
Leviticus22:26 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus22:27 Nxa kuzalwa inkunzi loba imvu loba imbuzi, izakuba ngaphansi kukanina insuku eziyisikhombisa. Njalo kusukela kusuku lwesificaminwembili njalo kusiya phambili izakwemukeleka ibe ngumnikelo, umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Leviticus22:28 Kodwa inkomokazi loba imvukazi lingayihlabi lomntwana wayo ngasuku lunye. 
Leviticus22:29 Njalo nxa lihlabela i Nkosi umhlatshelo wokubonga, lizawuhlaba ngokukhululeka kwenu." 
Leviticus22:30 Uzadliwa ngalolosuku, lingatshiyi okwawo kuze kube sekuseni. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus22:31 Ngakho gcinani imilayo yami, liyenze. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus22:32 Njalo lingalingcolisi ibizo lami elingcwele, kodwa ngizangcweliswa phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli. Ngiyi Nkosi elingcwelisayo," 
Leviticus22:33 eyalikhupha elizweni leGibhithe ukuze ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu. Ngiyi Nkosi. 
Leviticus23:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus23:2 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Imikhosi emisiweyo ye Nkosi elizayimemezela ibe zinhlangano ezibiziweyo ezingcwele, le yimikhosi yami emisiweyo." 
Leviticus23:3 Umsebenzi uzakwenziwa insuku eziyisithupha; kodwa usuku lwesikhombisa lulisabatha lokuphumula, inhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; lingenzi lamsebenzi; lulisabatha e Nkosi ni kuyo yonke imizi yenu." 
Leviticus23:4 Le yimikhosi emisiweyo ye Nkosi, inhlangano ezibiziweyo ezingcwele elizazimemezela ngesikhathi sazo esimisiweyo." 
Leviticus23:5 Ngenyanga yokuqala ngolwetshumi lane lwenyanga kusihlwa kuliphasika le Nkosi. 
Leviticus23:6 Langosuku lwetshumi lanhlanu lwaleyonyanga kulomkhosi wesinkwa esingelamvubelo e Nkosi ni; dlanini isinkwa esingelamvubelo insuku eziyisikhombisa. 
Leviticus23:7 Ngosuku lokuqala lizakuba lenhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi. 
Leviticus23:8 Kodwa lizanikela umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo insuku eziyisikhombisa. Ngosuku lwesikhombisa kuzakuba khona inhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi. 
Leviticus23:9 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus23:10 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Lapho selifikile elizweni engilinika lona, livune isivuno salo, lethani isithungo sezithelo zokuqala zesivuno senu kumpristi," 
Leviticus23:11 njalo azunguze isithungo phambi kwe Nkosi ukuze lemukeleke. Umpristi uzasizunguza ngosuku olulandela isabatha. 
Leviticus23:12 Ngosuku elizunguza ngalo isithungo, nikelani iwundlu elingelasici elilomnyaka owodwa, libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus23:13 Lomnikelo wawo wokudla uzakuba zingxenye ezimbili etshumini zempuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, ube ngumnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo, kube luqhatshi olumnandi; lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo uzakuba ngowewayini, ingxenye yesine yehini*." 
Leviticus23:14 Njalo kaliyikudla isinkwa, lamabele akhanzingiweyo, lezikhwebu ezintsha, kuze kufike lona lolosuku, lize lilethe umnikelo kaNkulunkulu wenu. Kuyisimiso esilaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu, kuyo yonke imizi yenu." 
Leviticus23:15 Njalo lizazibalela kusukela ngosuku olulandela isabatha, kusukela ngosuku elaletha ngalo isithungo somnikelo wokuzunguzwa; kuzakuba ngamasabatha ayisikhombisa apheleleyo," 
Leviticus23:16 kuze kufike usuku olulandela isabatha lesikhombisa libale insuku ezingamatshumi amahlanu; khona lizanikela umnikelo omutsha wokudla e Nkosi ni. 
Leviticus23:17 Lethani okuvela emizini yenu izinkwa ezimbili zokuzunguzwa; zizakuba zingxenye ezimbili etshumini zempuphu ecolekileyo; zizabhakwa lemvubelo; ziyizithelo zokuqala e Nkosi ni. 
Leviticus23:18 Njalo lizanikela kanye lesinkwa amawundlu ayisikhombisa angelasici alomnyaka owodwa, lejongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, lenqama ezimbili; zizakuba ngumnikelo wokutshiswa e Nkosi ni, kanye lomnikelo wazo wokudla leminikelo yazo yokunathwayo, umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo, kube luqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus23:19 Lizanikela njalo izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono, lamawundlu amabili alomnyaka owodwa abe ngumhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula." 
Leviticus23:20 Umpristi uzazizunguza-ke kanye lesinkwa sezithelo zokuqala zibe ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi, kanye lamawundlu amabili; zizakuba ngcwele e Nkosi ni, zibe ngezompristi." 
Leviticus23:21 Lizamemezela ngalona lolosuku; kuzakuba yinhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele kini, lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi. Kuyisimiso esaphakade kuyo yonke imizi yenu ezizukulwaneni zenu." 
Leviticus23:22 Lalapho livuna isivuno selizwe lakini, ekuvuneni kwakho ungaqedi emngceleni wensimu yakho; futhi ungabuthi okuseleyo kwesivuno sakho; ukutshiyele umyanga lowemzini. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus23:23 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus23:24 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Ngenyanga yesikhombisa ngolokuqala lwenyanga kuzakuba kini lisabatha, isikhumbuzo sokutshaywa kwezimpondo, inhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele." 
Leviticus23:25 Lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi; kodwa nikelani umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo. 
Leviticus23:26 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus23:27 Yebo, ngolwetshumi lwalinyanga yesikhombisa kuzakuba lusuku lwenhlawulo yokuthula; lizakuba lenhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; lizathobisa imiphefumulo yenu, linikele umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Leviticus23:28 Langalona lolosuku lingenzi lamsebenzi, ngoba kulusuku lwenhlawulo yokuthula, ukulenzela lina inhlawulo yokuthula phambi kwe Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus23:29 Ngoba loba yiwuphi umphefumulo ongazithobiyo ngalona lolosuku uzaqunywa usuke ebantwini bakibo. 
Leviticus23:30 Laloba yiwuphi umphefumulo owenza loba yiwuphi umsebenzi ngalona lolosuku ngizawubhubhisa lowomphefumulo usuke phakathi kwabantu bakibo. 
Leviticus23:31 Lingenzi lamsebenzi. Kuyisimiso esilaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu kuyo yonke imizi yenu. 
Leviticus23:32 Lisabatha lokuphumula kini; lizathobisa imiphefumulo yenu; ngolwesificamunwemunye lwenyanga, ntambama, kusukela kusihlwa kuze kube kusihlwa, lizagcina isabatha lenu." 
Leviticus23:33 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus23:34 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Ngosuku lwetshumi lanhlanu lwale inyanga yesikhombisa kuzakuba lomkhosi wamadumba insuku eziyisikhombisa e Nkosi ni. 
Leviticus23:35 Ngosuku lokuqala kuzakuba lenhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi. 
Leviticus23:36 Insuku eziyisikhombisa lizanikela umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo. Ngosuku lwesificaminwembili kuzakuba lenhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele kini, linikele umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo. Kungumhlangano onzulu, lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi." 
Leviticus23:37 Le yimikhosi emisiweyo ye Nkosi elizayimemezela ibe zinhlangano ezibiziweyo ezingcwele, ukunikela umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo, umnikelo wokutshiswa, lomnikelo wokudla, umhlatshelo, leminikelo yokunathwayo, kube ngulowo lalowo ngosuku lwawo," 
Leviticus23:38 ngaphandle kwamasabatha e Nkosi, langaphandle kwezipho zenu, langaphandle kwezithembiso zenu zonke, langaphandle kweminikelo yenu yonke yesihle, elayinikela e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus23:39 Kodwa ngosuku lwetshumi lanhlanu lwenyanga yesikhombisa, lapho selibuthile isivuno selizwe, gcinani umkhosi we Nkosi insuku eziyisikhombisa. Ngosuku lokuqala kuzakuba lokuphumula langosuku lwesificaminwembili kuzakuba lokuphumula." 
Leviticus23:40 Langosuku lokuqala zithatheleni izithelo zezihlahla ezinhle, izingatsha zezihlahla zelala, lezingatsha zezihlahla ezilamahlamvu aminyeneyo, leminyezane yemifula, lithabe phambi kwe Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Leviticus23:41 Lizawugcina ube ngumkhosi e Nkosi ni insuku eziyisikhombisa ngomnyaka. Kuyisimiso esilaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu; liwugubhe ngenyanga yesikhombisa. 
Leviticus23:42 Lizahlala emadumbeni insuku eziyisikhombisa; bonke abazalwa koIsrayeli bazahlala emadumbeni," 
Leviticus23:43 ukuze izizukulwana zenu zazi ukuthi ngabahlalisa abantwana bakoIsrayeli emadumbeni ekubakhupheni kwami elizweni leGibhithe. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu. 
Leviticus23:44 Ngokunjalo uMozisi wabatshela abantwana bakoIsrayeli imikhosi emisiweyo ye Nkosi. 
Leviticus24:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus24:2 Laya abantwana bakoIsrayeli ukuthi balethe kuwe amafutha emihlwathi acengekileyo agigelwe ukukhanyisa ukuze izibane zivuthe njalonjalo. 
Leviticus24:3 Ngaphandle kweveyili lobufakazi, ethenteni lenhlangano, uAroni uzazilungisa phambi kwe Nkosi njalonjalo, kusukela kusihlwa kuze kube sekuseni; kuzakuba yisimiso esilaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu." 
Leviticus24:4 Uzalungisa izibane eluthini lwesibane olucwengekileyo phambi kwe Nkosi njalonjalo. 
Leviticus24:5 Uzathatha-ke impuphu ecolekileyo, ubhake ngayo amaqebelengwana alitshumi lambili; ingxenye ezimbili etshumini kuzakuba liqebelengwana elilodwa." 
Leviticus24:6 Uwabeke emizileni emibili, ayisithupha emzileni, phezu kwetafula elicwengekileyo phambi kwe Nkosi;" 
Leviticus24:7 futhi ubeke ku lowo lalowo umzila inhlaka ecengekileyo, ibe yisinkwa sesikhumbuzo, umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Leviticus24:8 Ngalo lonke usuku lwesabatha uzakulungisa phambi kwe Nkosi njalonjalo, kuvela ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, isivumelwano esilaphakade." 
Leviticus24:9 Njalo kuzakuba ngokukaAroni lokwamadodana akhe, besebekudlela endaweni engcwele; ngoba kuyingcwelengcwele kuye, okuvela eminikelweni ye Nkosi eyenziwe ngomlilo, isimiso esilaphakade." 
Leviticus24:10 Kwasekuphuma indodana yowesifazana umIsrayelikazi, owayeyindodana yendoda engumGibhithe, phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli. Lalindodana yomIsrayelikazi lendoda engumIsrayeli balwa enkambeni." 
Leviticus24:11 Indodana yowesifazana umIsrayelikazi yasihlambaza iBizo, yathuka. Basebemletha kuMozisi. Lebizo likanina lalinguShelomithi, indodakazi kaDibiri, owesizwe sakoDani." 
Leviticus24:12 Basebemfaka esitokosini, ukuze bachasiselwe ngokomlomo we Nkosi." 
Leviticus24:13 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi yathi: 
Leviticus24:14 Khiphela ngaphandle kwenkamba umthuki; labo bonke abamuzwayo kababeke izandla zabo ekhanda lakhe, lenhlangano yonke imkhande ngamatshe." 
Leviticus24:15 Khuluma-ke ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Ngulowo lalowo othuka uNkulunkulu wakhe uzathwala isono sakhe. 
Leviticus24:16 Lohlambaza ibizo le Nkosi uzabulawa lokubulawa; inhlangano yonke izamkhanda lokumkhanda ngamatshe. Njengowokuzalwa elizweni uzakuba njalo owemzini, nxa ehlambaza iBizo uzabulawa." 
Leviticus24:17 Lomuntu nxa etshaya loba yiwuphi umphefumulo womuntu uzabulawa lokubulawa. 
Leviticus24:18 Lotshaya abulale inyamazana uzayihlawula, impilo ngempilo." 
Leviticus24:19 Umuntu nxa esipha-ke umakhelwane wakhe isici, njengokwenza kwakhe kuzakwenziwa njalo kuye," 
Leviticus24:20 ukwephuka ngokwephuka, ilihlo ngelihlo, izinyo ngezinyo; njengalokho ephe umuntu isici, kuzakwenziwa njalo kuye." 
Leviticus24:21 Lotshaya inyamazana ife uzayihlawula; lotshaya umuntu afe uzabulawa. 
Leviticus24:22 Lizakuba lokwahlulela okukodwa, njengowezizwe uzakuba njalo owokuzalwa elizweni. Ngoba ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus24:23 UMozisi wakhuluma-ke ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, ukuthi bamkhuphele ngaphandle kwenkamba umthuki, bamkhande ngamatshe. Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenza njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Leviticus25:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi entabeni yeSinayi isithi: 
Leviticus25:2 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Nxa lifika elizweni engilinika lona, ilizwe lizaphumula, isabatha e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus25:3 Iminyaka eyisithupha uzahlanyela insimu yakho, leminyaka eyisithupha uthene isivini sakho, ubuthe isithelo saso." 
Leviticus25:4 Kodwa ngomnyaka wesikhombisa kuzakuba lesabatha lokuphumula kwelizwe, isabatha e Nkosi ni. Kawuyikuhlanyela insimu yakho, ungatheni isivini sakho." 
Leviticus25:5 Kawuyikuvuna umkhukhuzela wesivuno sakho, kaliyikukha izithelo zamavini akho angathenwanga. Uzakuba ngumnyaka wokuphumula welizwe." 
Leviticus25:6 Njalo isabatha lelizwe lizakuba yikudla kwenu, ngokwakho, lokwenceku yakho, lokwencekukazi yakho, lokoqatshiweyo wakho, lokowemzini wakho ohlala lawe njengowezizwe," 
Leviticus25:7 lokwezifuyo zakho, lokwenyamazana eziselizweni lakho; konke elikuthelayo kuzakuba yikudla." 
Leviticus25:8 Uzazibalela-ke amaviki ayisikhombisa eminyaka, iminyaka eyisikhombisa ephindwe kasikhombisa, ukuze insuku zamaviki ayisikhombisa eminyaka zibe yiminyaka engamatshumi amane lesificamunwemunye kuwe." 
Leviticus25:9 Khona uzadlulisa uphondo lomsindo enyangeni yesikhombisa ngolwetshumi lwenyanga; ngosuku lwenhlawulo yokuthula lizadlulisa umsindo wophondo elizweni lonke lakini. 
Leviticus25:10 Njalo lizangcwelisa lumnyaka wamatshumi amahlanu, limemezele inkululeko elizweni kubo bonke abakhileyo balo. Kuzakuba lijubili* kini; lizabuyela, ngulowo lalowo, elifeni lakhe; futhi lizabuyela, ngulowo lalowo, kusapho lwakhe." 
Leviticus25:11 Umnyaka wamatshumi amahlanu uzakuba ngumnyaka wejubili kini; lingahlanyeli, lingavuni umkhukhuzela wawo, lingakhi ngawo izinto zamavini angathenwanga." 
Leviticus25:12 Ngoba ulijubili, uzakuba ngcwele kini; lizakudla ensimini okuthelwayo kwayo." 
Leviticus25:13 Ngomnyaka walelijubili lizabuyela, ngulowo lalowo elifeni lakhe." 
Leviticus25:14 Uba-ke uthengisa ulutho kumakhelwane wakho loba uthenga esandleni sikamakhelwane wakho, lingacindezelani." 
Leviticus25:15 Ngokwenani leminyaka emva kwejubili uzathenga kumakhelwane wakho; ngokwenani leminyaka yokuthelwayo uzakuthengisela. 
Leviticus25:16 Ngobunengi beminyaka uzakwandisa intengo yakho; njalo ngobulutshwana beminyaka uzanciphisa intengo yakho; ngoba ekuthengisela inani lezivuno. 
Leviticus25:17 Ngakho lingacindezelani, kodwa wesabe uNkulunkulu wakho. Ngoba ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus25:18 Ngakho yenzani izimiso zami, ligcine izehlulelo zami, lizenze, ukuze lihlale elizweni livikelekile." 
Leviticus25:19 Lelizwe lizathela izithelo zalo, lidle lize lisuthe, lihlale kulo livikelekile." 
Leviticus25:20 Uba-ke lisithi: Sizakudlani ngomnyaka wesikhombisa? Khangela, kasihlanyeli, kasibuthi isivuno sethu." 
Leviticus25:21 Khona ngizalaya isibusiso sami kini ngomnyaka wesithupha, ukuze uthele isivuno seminyaka emithathu." 
Leviticus25:22 Njalo lizahlanyela ngomnyaka wesificaminwembili lidle okwesivuno esidala kuze kufike umnyaka wesificamunwemunye; kuze kufike isivuno sawo lizakudla esidala. 
Leviticus25:23 Lelizwe kaliyikuthengiswa lanininini, ngoba ilizwe ngelami; ngoba lingabemzini labahlala njengabezizwe lami." 
Leviticus25:24 Lelizweni lonke lelifa lenu lizavumela uhlengo lwelizwe. 
Leviticus25:25 Uba umfowenu esiba ngumyanga, athengise okwelifa lakhe, umhlengi wakhe uzafika, isihlobo sakhe, ahlenge lokho umfowabo akuthengisileyo." 
Leviticus25:26 Njalo umuntu, uba engelaye umhlengi, kodwa isandla sakhe sifinyelele, athole okwenele uhlengo lwakhe," 
Leviticus25:27 kabale iminyaka yokuthengiswa kwalo, abuyisele okuseleyo kulowomuntu owamthengisela lona, abuyele elifeni lakhe." 
Leviticus25:28 Kodwa uba isandla sakhe singatholanga okwenele ukubuyisela kuye, okuthengisiweyo kuzakuba sesandleni sokuthengileyo kuze kufike umnyaka wejubili; kodwa ngejubili kuzaphuma, njalo uzabuyela elifeni lakhe." 
Leviticus25:29 Umuntu, uba ethengisa-ke indlu yokuhlala emzini olomthangala, ilungelo lohlengo lwayo lizakuba kuze kuphele umnyaka wokuthengiswa kwayo; ilungelo lohlengo lwayo lizakuba ngumnyaka wonke." 
Leviticus25:30 Kodwa uba ingahlengwanga uze umnyaka wayo wonke ugcwale, leyondlu esemzini olomthangala izamiselwa lowo owayithengayo njalonjalo, ezizukulwaneni zakhe; kayiyikuphuma ngejubili." 
Leviticus25:31 Kodwa izindlu zemizi engabiyelwanga ngomthangala zizabalwa njengensimu yelizwe; kulohlengo lwayo, njalo izaphuma ngejubili." 
Leviticus25:32 Mayelana lemizi yamaLevi, izindlu zemizi yelifa lawo, amaLevi azakuba lohlengo lwaphakade." 
Leviticus25:33 Mayelana lohlenga kumaLevi, kuzaphuma ukuthengiswa kwendlu lokomuzi welifa lakhe ngejubili; ngoba izindlu zemizi yamaLevi ziyilifa lawo phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Kodwa insimu yamaphethelo emizi yawo kayiyikuthengiswa, ngoba iyilifa lawo kuze kube nininini." 
Leviticus25:35 Uba-ke umfowenu esiba ngumyanga, lesandla sakhe sixega kuwe, uzamsekela: Owemzini lohlezi njengowezizwe, ukuze aphile lawe." 
Leviticus25:36 Ungathathi kuye umvuzo lenzuzo, kodwa wesabe uNkulunkulu wakho, ukuze umfowenu aphile lawe." 
Leviticus25:37 Ungamuphi imali yakho ngenzalo, futhi ungaphi ukudla kwakho ngenzuzo." 
Leviticus25:38 Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu owalikhupha elizweni leGibhithe ukulinika ilizwe leKhanani, ukuze ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus25:39 Uba-ke umfowenu olawe esiba ngumyanga, azithengise kuwe, ungamenzi asebenze umsebenzi wesigqili;" 
Leviticus25:40 uzakuba lawe njengoqatshiweyo, njengohlala njengowezizwe, asebenze kuwe kuze kufike umnyaka wejubili." 
Leviticus25:41 Khona ezaphuma kuwe, yena labantwana bakhe laye, abuyele kwabomdeni wakhe, abuyele elifeni laboyise." 
Leviticus25:42 Ngoba bayizinceku zami engabakhupha elizweni leGibhithe; kabayikuthengiswa ngokuthengiswa kwesigqili. 
Leviticus25:43 Ungambusi nzima, kodwa wesabe uNkulunkulu wakho." 
Leviticus25:44 Lesigqili sakho lesigqilikazi sakho ozakuba lazo, zizavela ezizweni ezilizingelezeleyo; kuzo lizathenga isigqili kumbe isigqilikazi." 
Leviticus25:45 Futhi-ke ebantwaneni babahlala njengabemzini abahlala njengabezizwe lani, kubo lingazithenga lakuzizukulwana zabo ezilani, abazizalela elizweni lakini, njalo bazakuba yimfuyo yenu." 
Leviticus25:46 Njalo lizazenza abafuyi bazo lisenz ela abantwana benu emva kwenu ukuze badle ilifa lemfuyo; lizabenza basebenze kuze kube nininini. Kodwa phakathi kwabafowenu, abantwana bakoIsrayeli, kaliyikubusa nzima, omunye phezu komunye." 
Leviticus25:47 Uba-ke isandla sowezizweni loba sowemzini ohlala lawe sesifinyelele enothweni, lomfowenu olaye abe ngumyanga, azithengise kowemzini, owezizweni ohlala lawe, kumbe kumdeni wesizukulwana sowemzini," 
Leviticus25:48 esezithengisile kungaba lokuhlengwa kwakhe; omunye wabafowabo angamhlenga," 
Leviticus25:49 loba umfowabo kayise, loba umtanomfowabo kayise angamhlenga, kumbe isihlobo sakhe segazi emdeni wakhe singamhlenga; uba isandla sakhe sesifinyelele enothweni, angazihlenga." 
Leviticus25:50 Uzabalisana lowamthengayo, kusukela emnyakeni owazithengisa kuye ngawo kuze kufike umnyaka wejubili; ukuze imali yentengiso yakhe izakuba njengenani leminyaka, njengensuku zoqatshiweyo kuzakuba njalo ngaye." 
Leviticus25:51 Uba kuseleminyaka eminengi, ngokungayo uzabuyisela uhlengo lwakhe, emalini yokuthengwa kwakhe." 
Leviticus25:52 Uba-ke kusele iminyaka emilutshwana kuze kufike umnyaka wejubili, uzabalisana laye; njengokweminyaka yakhe uzabuyisela uhlengo lwakhe." 
Leviticus25:53 Uzakuba laye njengoqatshiweyo iminyaka ngeminyaka; kayikumbusa nzima phambi kwamehlo akho. 
Leviticus25:54 Kodwa uba engahlengwanga ngalokhu, uzaphuma ngomnyaka wejubili, yena labantwana bakhe kanye laye." 
Leviticus25:55 Ngoba kimi abantwana bakoIsrayeli bazinceku, bazinceku zami engazikhupha elizweni leGibhithe. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus26:1 Lingazenzeli izithombe, lingazimiseli isifanekiso esibaziweyo lensika eyisithombe, lingabeki elizweni lakini ilitshe elilemifanekiso ukulikhothamela; ngoba ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Leviticus26:2 Gcinani amasabatha ami, lihloniphe indlu yami engcwele. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus26:3 Uba lihamba ngezimiso zami, ligcine imilayo yami, liyenze," 
Leviticus26:4 khona ngizanika izulu lenu ngesikhathi salo, lelizwe lizaveza isivuno salo, lezihlahla zeganga zithele isithelo sazo." 
Leviticus26:5 Lesikhathi sokubhula kwenu sizafinyelela esikhathini sokuvuna amavini, lesikhathi sokuvuna amavini sizafinyelela esikhathini sokuhlanyela; njalo lizakudla ukudla kwenu lize lisuthe, lihlale livikelekile elizweni lakini." 
Leviticus26:6 Njalo ngizanika ukuthula elizweni, lilale futhi kungelamuntu owethusayo, njalo ngisuse inyamazana ezimbi elizweni, lenkemba kayiyikudabula elizweni lakini." 
Leviticus26:7 Njalo lizaxotsha izitha zenu, zizakuwa-ke phambi kwenu ngenkemba." 
Leviticus26:8 Labahlanu benu bazaxotsha ikhulu, labalikhulu benu bazaxotsha inkulungwane ezilitshumi; lezitha zenu zizakuwa phambi kwenu ngenkemba." 
Leviticus26:9 Njalo ngizaphendukela kini, ngilenze ukuthi lizale, ngilandise, ngimise isivumelwano sami lani." 
Leviticus26:10 Lizakudla-ke okudala osekukudala, likhuphe okudala ngenxa yokutsha." 
Leviticus26:11 Njalo ngizamisa ithabhanekele lami phakathi kwenu, lomphefumulo wami kawuyikunengwa yini." 
Leviticus26:12 Ngizahambahamba-ke phakathi kwenu, ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu, lina libe ngabantu bami." 
Leviticus26:13 Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu owalikhupha elizweni leGibhithe ukuze lingabi yizigqili zabo; ngephule izikeyi zejogwe lenu, ngenze ukuthi lihambe leluleme." 
Leviticus26:14 Kodwa uba lingangilaleli, lingayenzi yonke le imilayo," 
Leviticus26:15 njalo uba lisala izimiso zami, njalo uba umphefumulo wenu unengwa yizehlulelo zami, ukuze lingenzi yonke imilayo yami, ukwephula isivumelwano sami," 
Leviticus26:16 lami ngizakwenza lokhu kini: Ngizamisa phezu kwenu ukwesaba okukhulu, isifo esicakisayo, lomkhuhlane, okuqeda amehlo, okwenza impilo iphele. Njalo inhlanyelo yenu lizayihlanyelela ize, ngoba izitha zenu zizayidla." 
Leviticus26:17 Njalo ngizamisa ubuso bami bumelane lani, njalo litshaywe phambi kwezitha zenu. Labalizondayo bazalibusa, libaleke kungelamuntu olixotshayo." 
Leviticus26:18 Kodwa uba ngalezizinto lingangilaleli, ngizakwengeza ngilijezise kasikhombisa ngenxa yezono zenu," 
Leviticus26:19 ngephule ukuziphakamisa kwamandla enu, ngenze isibhakabhaka senu sibe njengensimbi, lomhlabathi wenu njengethusi;" 
Leviticus26:20 lamandla enu azachithelwa ize, ngoba ilizwe lenu kaliyikuveza isivuno salo, lezihlahla zelizwe kaziyikuthela isithelo sazo." 
Leviticus26:21 Uba-ke lihamba ngokuphambene lami, lingafuni ukungilalela, ngizakwengezelela kini inhlupheko kasikhombisa ngokwezono zenu." 
Leviticus26:22 Ngizathumela phakathi kwenu izilo zeganga ezizalemuka abantwana benu, zichithe izifuyo zenu, zilenze libe balutshwana, lezindlela zenu zibe yinkangala." 
Leviticus26:23 Njalo uba lingavumi ukuxwayiswa yimi ngalezizinto, kodwa lihamba ngokuphambene lami," 
Leviticus26:24 lami ngizahamba ngokuphambene lani, lami ngilitshaye kasikhombisa ngenxa yezono zenu." 
Leviticus26:25 Ngizakwehlisela inkemba phezu kwenu ezaphindisela impindiselo yesivumelwano. Uba libuthana emizini yenu, ngizathumela umatshayabhuqe wesifo phakathi kwenu, njalo linikelwe esandleni sesitha." 
Leviticus26:26 Lapho ngilephulela udondolo lwesinkwa, abesifazana abalitshumi bazabhaka isinkwa senu eziko elilodwa, babuyise isinkwa senu ngesisindo; njalo lizakudla, kodwa lingasuthi." 
Leviticus26:27 Kodwa uba lingangilaleli kulokhu, lihambe ngokuphambene lami," 
Leviticus26:28 lami ngizahamba ngokuphambene lani ngilentukuthelo, lami ngilijezise kasikhombisa ngenxa yezono zenu." 
Leviticus26:29 Njalo lizakudla inyama yamadodana enu lenyama yamadodakazi enu lizayidla. 
Leviticus26:30 Njalo ngizachitha indawo zenu eziphakemeyo, ngidilize amalathi enu empepha, ngiphosele izidumbu zenu phezu kwezidumbu zezithombe zenu, lomphefumulo wami unengwe yini." 
Leviticus26:31 Ngizakwenza-ke imizi yenu ibe lunxiwa, ngidilize izindlu zenu ezingcwele; kangiyikunuka uqhatshi lwenu olumnandi." 
Leviticus26:32 Mina-ke ngizachitha ilizwe ukuze izitha zenu ezihlala kulo zikhakhamale ngalo. 
Leviticus26:33 Njalo ngizalihlakazela ezizweni, ngihwatshe inkemba emva kwenu; lelizwe lakini lizakuba yincithakalo, lemizi yenu ibe lunxiwa." 
Leviticus26:34 Khona ilizwe lizathokoza ngamasabatha alo zonke izinsuku zencithakalo, liselizweni lezitha zenu; khona ilizwe lizaphumula, lithokoze ngamasabatha alo." 
Leviticus26:35 Zonke insuku zencithakalo lizaphumula, ngoba kaliphumulanga ngamasabatha enu lisahlala kilo." 
Leviticus26:36 Mayelana lalabo abaseleyo phakathi kwenu, ngizathuma ubuthakathaka enhliziyweni zabo emazweni ezitha zabo; lomsindo wehlamvu eliphephukayo uzabaxotsha, bazabaleka njengomuntu obalekela inkemba, bawe kungelamuntu o ba xotshayo." 
Leviticus26:37 Bazakhubeka omunye phezu komunye kungathi kuphambi kwenkemba, kungelamuntu o ba xotshayo. Kaliyikuba lakho ukuma phambi kwezitha zenu." 
Leviticus26:38 Njalo lizabhubha phakathi kwezizwe, lelizwe lezitha zenu lizakulidla." 
Leviticus26:39 Labaseleyo phakathi kwenu bazacikizeka ebubini babo emazweni ezitha zabo, yebo lebubini baboyise bazacikizeka kanye labo." 
Leviticus26:40 Bazavuma ububi babo lobubi baboyise, lesiphambeko sabo abaphambeka ngaso kimi, yebo futhi ukuthi bahambe ngokuphambene lami," 
Leviticus26:41 lami ngihambe ngokuphambene labo, ngibase elizweni lezitha zabo. Uba ngalesosikhathi inhliziyo yabo engasokanga izathotshiswa, langalesosikhathi bemukele ngokuthokoza ukutshaywa ngenxa yobubi babo," 
Leviticus26:42 khona ngizakhumbula isivumelwano sami loJakobe, yebo lesivumelwano sami loIsaka, yebo lesivumelwano sami loAbrahama ngisikhumbule, lelizwe ngilikhumbule." 
Leviticus26:43 Lelizwe lizatshiywa yibo, lithokoze ngamasabatha alo lisachithekile lingelabo. Bona bazakwemukela ngokuthokoza ukutshaywa ngenxa yobubi babo, ngoba, yebo ngoba balahla izehlulelo zami, lomphefumulo wabo wanengwa yizimiso zami." 
Leviticus26:44 Kanti-ke lalokhu, lapho beselizweni lezitha zabo, kangiyikubalahla, futhi kangiyikunengwa yibo ukuze ngibaqothule, ngephule isivumelwano sami labo, ngoba ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo." 
Leviticus26:45 Kodwa ngizabakhumbulela isivumelwano sabokhokho babo engabakhupha elizweni leGibhithe phambi kwamehlo ezizwe, ukuze ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo. Ngiyi Nkosi." 
Leviticus26:46 Lezi yizimiso lezehlulelo lemilayo i Nkosi ekunikileyo phakathi kwayo labantwana bakoIsrayeli entabeni yeSinayi ngesandla sikaMozisi. 
Leviticus27:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Leviticus27:2 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Umuntu, nxa esenza isithembiso esikhethekileyo, njengesilinganiso sakho imiphefumulo izakuba ngeye Nkosi." 
Leviticus27:3 Nxa isilinganiso sakho singesowesilisa, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili kusiya koleminyaka engamatshumi ayisithupha, isilinganiso sakho sizakuba ngamashekeli* esiliva angamatshumi amahlanu, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele." 
Leviticus27:4 Kodwa uba kungowesifazana, isilinganiso sakho sizakuba ngamashekeli angamatshumi amathathu." 
Leviticus27:5 Njalo nxa kusukela koleminyaka emihlanu kusiya koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili, isilinganiso sakho sowesilisa sizakuba ngamashekeli angamatshumi amabili, lakowesifazana amashekeli alitshumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Njalo nxa kusukela kolenyanga kusiya koleminyaka emihlanu, isilinganiso sakho sowesilisa sizakuba ngamashekeli amahlanu esiliva, njalo kowesifazana isilinganiso sakho sizakuba ngamashekeli amathathu esiliva." 
Leviticus27:7 Uba-ke kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi ayisithupha langaphezulu, uba kungowesilisa, isilinganiso sakho sizakuba ngamashekeli alitshumi lanhlanu, lakowesifazana amashekeli alitshumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Kodwa uba engumyanga kulesilinganiso sakho, uzazimisa phambi kompristi ukuze umpristi amlinganise; njengalokho isandla sowathembisayo singafinyelela kukho umpristi uzamlinganisa." 
Leviticus27:9 Njalo uba kuyinyamazana abanikela okwayo umnikelo e Nkosi ni, konke okwayo anikela ngakho e Nkosi ni kuzakuba ngcwele." 
Leviticus27:10 Kayikuyintshintsha, futhi angenaniseli ngayo, enhle ngembi loba embi ngenhle. Uba-ke usenanisa lokwenanisa inyamazana ngenyamazana, lokhu lalokhukwenaniselana kuzakuba ngcwele." 
Leviticus27:11 Njalo uba kuyinyamazana loba yiyiphi engcolileyo abanganikeli okwayo ngayo umnikelo e Nkosi ni, uzayimisa inyamazana phambi kompristi," 
Leviticus27:12 umpristi ayilinganise-ke, ukuthi inhle loba imbi; njengesilinganiso sakho, mpristi, izakuba njalo." 
Leviticus27:13 Kodwa uba eyihlenga lokuyihlenga, uzakwengezelela ingxenye yesihlanu yayo phezu kwesilinganiso sakho." 
Leviticus27:14 Umuntu, nxa engcwelisa-ke indlu yakhe, ukuthi ibe ngcwele e Nkosi ni, umpristi uzayilinganisa, ukuthi inhle loba imbi; njengalokho umpristi ezayilinganisa izakuma njalo." 
Leviticus27:15 Uba-ke oyingcwelisileyo ezayihlenga indlu yakhe, uzakwengezelela ingxenye yesihlanu yemali yesilinganiso sakho phezu kwayo, njalo izakuba ngeyakhe." 
Leviticus27:16 Uba-ke umuntu ezangcwelisela i Nkosi okwensimu yelifa lakhe, isilinganiso sakho sizakuba njengokwenhlanyelo yayo. Ihomeri* lenhlanyelo yebhali* libe ngamashekeli esiliva engamatshumi amahlanu." 
Leviticus27:17 Uba engcwelisa insimu yakhe kusukela emnyakeni wejubili*, njengesilinganiso sakho izakuma." 
Leviticus27:18 Kodwa uba wangcwelisa insimu yakhe emva kwejubili, umpristi uzambalela imali ngokweminyaka eseleyo kuze kufike umnyaka wejubili, njalo kuzaphungulwa esilinganisweni sakho." 
Leviticus27:19 Uba-ke owayingcwelisayo eyihlenga lokuyihlenga insimu, uzakwengezelela ingxenye yesihlanu yemali yesilinganiso sakho phezu kwayo, njalo iqiniswe kuye." 
Leviticus27:20 Kodwa uba engayihlengi insimu, loba uba eseyithengisile insimu komunye umuntu, kayisayikuhlengwa;" 
Leviticus27:21 Kodwa insimu ekuphumeni kwayo ngejubili izakuba ngcwele e Nkosi ni, njengensimu eyehlukanisiweyo; ilifa layo libe ngelompristi." 
Leviticus27:22 Uba-ke eyingcwelisela i Nkosi insimu ayithengileyo, engayisiyo insimu yelifa lakhe," 
Leviticus27:23 umpristi uzambalela-ke inani lesilinganiso sakho, kuze kufike umnyaka wejubili, abesenika isilinganiso sakho ngalolosuku, into engcwele e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus27:24 Ngomnyaka wejubili insimu izabuyela kulowo eyathengwa kuye, kulowo ilifa lensimu ebelingelakhe." 
Leviticus27:25 Njalo sonke isilinganiso sakho sizakuba ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; amagera* angamatshumi amabili azakuba lishekeli. 
Leviticus27:26 Kodwa izibulo, elizelwe njengengqabutho e Nkosi ni elenyamazana, kakho ozalingcwelisa; loba inkabi loba imvu, ngele Nkosi." 
Leviticus27:27 Kodwa uba lingelenyamazana engcolileyo, uzalihlenga ngokwesilinganiso sakho, engezelele phezu kwalo ingxenye yesihlanu yalo; kodwa uba lingahlengwanga, lizathengiswa ngokwesilinganiso sakho." 
Leviticus27:28 Kodwa kakukho into eyehlukanisiweyo, umuntu ayehlukanisele i Nkosi, kukho konke alakho, okuvela emuntwini, loba enyamazaneni, loba okuvela ensimini yelifa lakhe, kakuyikuthengiswa, futhi kakuyikuhlengwa; konke okwehlukanisiweyo kuyingcwelengcwele e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus27:29 Yonke into eqalekisiweyo, eqalekiswe ebantwini, kayiyikuhlengwa; izabulawa lokubulawa." 
Leviticus27:30 Lengxenye yetshumi yonke yelizwe, okwenhlanyelo yelizwe, okwesithelo sezihlahla, kungokwe Nkosi; kungcwele e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus27:31 Uba umuntu ehlenga lokuhlenga kwengxenye yetshumi yakhe, uzakwengezelela kukho ingxenye yesihlanu yakho." 
Leviticus27:32 Mayelana layo yonke ingxenye yetshumi yezinkomo leyezimvu, konke okwedlula ngaphansi kwentonga, ingxenye yetshumi izakuba ngcwele e Nkosi ni." 
Leviticus27:33 Kayikuhlola phakathi kokuhle lokubi, futhi kayikuntshintsha. Njalo uba ekuntshintsha lokukuntshintsha, ngakho khona lokuntshintshana lakho kuzakuba ngcwele, kakuyikuhlengwa." 
Leviticus27:34 Leyo yimilayo i Nkosi eyayilaya uMozisi kubantwana bakoIsrayeli entabeni yeSinayi. 
Numbers1:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi enkangala yeSinayi ethenteni lenhlangano, ngolokuqala lwenyanga yesibili, ngomnyaka wesibili emva kokuphuma kwabo elizweni leGibhithe, isithi:" 
Numbers1:2 Thathani inani lonke lenhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, lenani lamabizo, wonke owesilisa, ngamakhanda abo." 
Numbers1:3 Kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni koIsrayeli, lizababala ngamabutho abo, wena loAroni." 
Numbers1:4 Kuzakuba lani indoda kuleso lalesosizwe, ileyo laleyo eyinhloko yendlu yaboyise." 
Numbers1:5 Lala ngamabizo amadoda azakuma lani. KoRubeni: UElizuri indodana kaShedewuri. 
Numbers1:6 KoSimeyoni: UShelumiyeli indodana kaZurishadayi. 
Numbers1:7 KoJuda: UNashoni indodana kaAminadaba. 
Numbers1:8 KoIsakari: UNethaneli indodana kaZuwari. 
Numbers1:9 KoZebuluni: UEliyabi indodana kaHeloni. 
Numbers1:10 Kubantwana bakoJosefa, koEfrayimi: UElishama indodana kaAmihudi; koManase: UGamaliyeli indodana kaPedazuri." 
Numbers1:11 KoBhenjamini: UAbidani indodana kaGideyoni. 
Numbers1:12 KoDani: UAhiyezeri indodana kaAmishadayi. 
Numbers1:13 KoAsheri: UPagiyeli indodana kaOkirani. 
Numbers1:14 KoGadi: UEliyasafi indodana kaDehuweli. 
Numbers1:15 KoNafithali: UAhira indodana kaEnani. 
Numbers1:16 Yibo ababizwayo benhlangano, iziphathamandla zezizwe zaboyise, inhloko zezinkulungwane zakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers1:17 OMozisi loAroni basebethatha lawomadoda aqanjwe ngamabizo. 
Numbers1:18 Bahlanganisa inhlangano yonke ngolokuqala lwenyanga yesibili; babala ngenhlanga zabo ngensendo zabo ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, ngamakhanda abo." 
Numbers1:19 Njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi wababala ngokunjalo enkangala yeSinayi. 
Numbers1:20 Njalo abantwana bakoRubeni, izibulo likaIsrayeli, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, ngamakhanda abo, wonke owesilisa kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:21 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoRubeni, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lesithupha lamakhulu amahlanu." 
Numbers1:22 Kubantwana bakoSimeyoni, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, labo ababalwayo, ngokwenani lamabizo, ngamakhanda abo, wonke owesilisa kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:23 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoSimeyoni, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu lesificamunwemunye lamakhulu amathathu." 
Numbers1:24 Kubantwana bakoGadi, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:25 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoGadi, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lanhlanu lamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi amahlanu." 
Numbers1:26 Kubantwana bakoJuda, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:27 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoJuda, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisikhombisa lane lamakhulu ayisithupha." 
Numbers1:28 Kubantwana bakoIsakari, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:29 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoIsakari, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu lane lamakhulu amane." 
Numbers1:30 Kubantwana bakoZebuluni, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:31 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoZebuluni, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu lesikhombisa lamakhulu amane." 
Numbers1:32 Kubantwana bakoJosefa, kubantwana bakoEfrayimi, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:33 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoEfrayimi, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lamakhulu amahlanu." 
Numbers1:34 Kubantwana bakoManase, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:35 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoManase, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lambili lamakhulu amabili." 
Numbers1:36 Kubantwana bakoBhenjamini, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:37 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoBhenjamini, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lanhlanu lamakhulu amane." 
Numbers1:38 Kubantwana bakoDani, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:39 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoDani, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisithupha lambili lamakhulu ayisikhombisa." 
Numbers1:40 Kubantwana bakoAsheri, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:41 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoAsheri, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lanye lamakhulu amahlanu." 
Numbers1:42 Abantwana bakoNafithali, izizukulwana zabo, ngensendo zabo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngokwenani lamabizo, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni;" 
Numbers1:43 labo ababaliweyo kubo, esizweni sakoNafithali, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu lantathu lamakhulu amane." 
Numbers1:44 Yibo laba ababalwayo, oMozisi loAroni abababalayo, leziphathamandla zakoIsrayeli, amadoda alitshumi lambili, yileso laleso singesendlu yaboyise." 
Numbers1:45 Babenjalo bonke ababalwayo babantwana bakoIsrayeli, ngezindlu zaboyise, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni koIsrayeli." 
Numbers1:46 Ngakho bonke ababalwayo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamakhulu ayisithupha lantathu lamakhulu amahlanu lamatshumi amahlanu. 
Numbers1:47 Kodwa amaLevi, ngezindlu zaboyise, kawabalwanga phakathi kwabo." 
Numbers1:48 Ngoba i Nkosi yayikhulume kuMozisi yathi: 
Numbers1:49 Kuphela isizwe sakoLevi ungasibali, ungathathi inani lonke laso phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli;" 
Numbers1:50 kodwa wena, misa amaLevi phezu kwethabhanekele lobufakazi, laphezu kwazo zonke izitsha zalo, laphezu kwakho konke okwalo. Wona azathwala ithabhanekele lazo zonke izitsha zalo; futhi wona azakhonza kulo, amise amathente awo azingelezele ithabhanekele." 
Numbers1:51 Lekusukeni kwethabhanekele amaLevi azalidiliza, lekumisweni kwethabhanekele amaLevi azalimisa. Lowemzini osondelayo uzabulawa." 
Numbers1:52 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli bazamisa-ke amathente abo, kube ngulowo lalowo enkambeni yakhe, lalowo lalowo ngophawu lwakhe, ngokwamabutho abo." 
Numbers1:53 Kodwa amaLevi azamisa amathente awo azingeleze ithabhanekele lobufakazi, ukuze kungabi lolaka phezu kwenhlangano yabantwana bakoIsrayeli; amaLevi azagcina-ke umlindo wethabhanekele lobufakazi." 
Numbers1:54 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenza njengakho konke i Nkosi eyayimlaye khona uMozisi, benza njalo." 
Numbers2:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni isithi: 
Numbers2:2 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli bazamisa amathente abo, kube ngulowo lalowo ngophawu lwakhe, ngokwezibonakaliso zezindlu zaboyise; bazamisa amathente abo bucwadlana lethente lenhlangano inhlangothi zonke." 
Numbers2:3 Labo abamisa amathente abo ngempumalanga lapho okuphuma khona ilanga, bangabophawu lwenkamba yakoJuda ngokwamabutho abo, lesiphathamandla sabantwana bakoJuda sizakuba nguNashoni indodana kaAminadaba;" 
Numbers2:4 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisikhombisa lane lamakhulu ayisithupha. 
Numbers2:5 Lalabo abamisa amathente abo eceleni kwakhe ngabesizwe sakoIsakari, lesiphathamandla sabantwana bakoIsakari sizakuba nguNethaneli indodana kaZuwari;" 
Numbers2:6 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo balo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu lane lamakhulu amane. 
Numbers2:7 Isizwe sakoZebuluni: Isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoZebuluni sizakuba-ke nguEliyabi indodana kaHeloni; 
Numbers2:8 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo balo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu lesikhombisa lamakhulu amane. 
Numbers2:9 Bonke ababalwayo benkamba yakoJuda babeyizinkulungwane ezilikhulu lamatshumi ayisificaminwembili lamakhulu amane, ngamabutho abo; bazasuka kuqala." 
Numbers2:10 Uphawu lwenkamba yakoRubeni luzakuba ngeningizimu, ngamabutho abo, lesiphathamandla sabantwana bakoRubeni sizakuba nguElizuri indodana kaShedewuri;" 
Numbers2:11 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo balo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lesithupha lamakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers2:12 Lalabo abamisa amathente abo eceleni kwakhe ngabesizwe sakoSimeyoni, lesiphathamandla sabantwana bakoSimeyoni sizakuba nguShelumiyeli indodana kaZurishadayi;" 
Numbers2:13 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu lesificamunwemunye lamakhulu amathathu. 
Numbers2:14 Lesizwe sakoGadi: Isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoGadi sizakuba-ke nguEliyasafi indodana kaRehuweli; 
Numbers2:15 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lanhlanu lamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi amahlanu. 
Numbers2:16 Bonke ababalwayo benkamba yakoRubeni babeyizinkulungwane ezilikhulu lamatshumi amahlanu lanye lamakhulu amane lamatshumi amahlanu, ngamabutho abo. Njalo bazakuba ngabesibili ekusukeni." 
Numbers2:17 Emva kwalokhu kuzasuka ithente lenhlangano, lenkamba yamaLevi phakathi kwenkamba; njengokumisa kwabo inkamba ngokunjalo bazasuka, kube ngulowo lalowo endaweni yakhe, ngokwempawu zabo." 
Numbers2:18 Uphawu lwenkamba yakoEfrayimi ngamabutho abo luzakuba sentshonalanga, lesiphathamandla sabantwana bakoEfrayimi sizakuba nguElishama indodana kaAmihudi;" 
Numbers2:19 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lamakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers2:20 Leceleni kwakhe isizwe sakoManase, lesiphathamandla sabantwana bakoManase sizakuba nguGamaliyeli indodana kaPedazuri;" 
Numbers2:21 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lambili lamakhulu amabili. 
Numbers2:22 Lesizwe sakoBhenjamini; isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoBhenjamini sizakuba-ke nguAbidani indodana kaGideyoni; 
Numbers2:23 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lanhlanu lamakhulu amane. 
Numbers2:24 Bonke ababalwayo benkamba yakoEfrayimi babeyizinkulungwane ezilikhulu lesificaminwembili lekhulu, ngamabutho abo. Njalo bazakuba ngabesithathu ekusukeni." 
Numbers2:25 Uphawu lwenkamba yakoDani luzakuba ngenyakatho, ngamabutho abo, lesiphathamandla sabantwana bakoDani sizakuba nguAhiyezeri indodana kaAmishadayi;" 
Numbers2:26 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisithupha lambili lamakhulu ayisikhombisa. 
Numbers2:27 Labamisa amathente abo eceleni kwakhe kuzakuba yisizwe sakoAsheri, lesiphathamandla sabantwana bakoAsheri sizakuba nguPagiyeli indodana kaOkirani;" 
Numbers2:28 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lanye lamakhulu amahlanu. 
Numbers2:29 Lesizwe sakoNafithali; isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoNafithali sizakuba-ke nguAhira indodana kaEnani; 
Numbers2:30 lebutho lakhe lababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu lantathu lamakhulu amane. 
Numbers2:31 Bonke ababalwayo benkamba yakoDani babeyizinkulungwane ezilikhulu lamatshumi amahlanu lesikhombisa lamakhulu ayisithupha. Bazakuba ngabokucina ekusukeni ngokwempawu zabo. 
Numbers2:32 Yibo labo ababalwayo babantwana bakoIsrayeli ngezindlu zaboyise. Bonke ababalwayo bezinkamba ngokwamabutho abo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamakhulu ayisithupha lantathu lamakhulu amahlanu lamatshumi amahlanu. 
Numbers2:33 Kodwa amaLevi kawabalwanga phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, njengalokho i Nkosi yayimlayile uMozisi." 
Numbers2:34 Njalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli benza njengalokho konke i Nkosi eyayimlaye khona uMozisi; ngokunjalo bamisa amathente abo ngokwempawu zabo futhi basuka ngokunjalo, ngulowo lalowo ngosendo lwakhe ngokwendlu kayise." 
Numbers3:1 Lezi-ke yizizukulwana zikaAroni lezikaMozisi, ngosuku i Nkosi eyakhuluma ngalo loMozisi entabeni yeSinayi." 
Numbers3:2 Lala ngamabizo amadodana kaAroni; izibulo uNadabi, loAbihu, uEleyazare, loIthamari." 
Numbers3:3 La ngamabizo amadodana kaAroni, abapristi abagcotshiweyo, owabehlukanisela ukusebenza njengabapristi." 
Numbers3:4 Kodwa uNadabi loAbihu bafa phambi kwe Nkosi, lapho benikela umlilo ongejwayelekanga phambi kwe Nkosi enkangala yeSinayi. Babengelabantwana. Ngakho uEleyazare loIthamari basebenza njengabapristi phambi kukaAroni uyise." 
Numbers3:5 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers3:6 Sondeza isizwe sakoLevi, usimise phambi kukaAroni umpristi, ukuthi bamsebenzele." 
Numbers3:7 Bazagcina imfanelo yakhe lemfanelo yenhlangano yonke phambi kwethente lenhlangano ukwenza inkonzo yethabhanekele. 
Numbers3:8 Bazalondoloza yonke impahla yethente lenhlangano, lemfanelo yabantwana bakoIsrayeli, ukuthi benze inkonzo yethabhanekele." 
Numbers3:9 Njalo uzanikela amaLevi kuAroni lemadodaneni akhe; aphiwe lokuphiwa kuye bevela kubantwana bakoIsrayeli. 
Numbers3:10 Njalo uAroni lamadodana akhe uzabamisa, bagcine-ke ubupristi babo. Lowemzini osondelayo uzabulawa." 
Numbers3:11 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers3:12 Mina-ke, khangela, ngithethe amaLevi ephuma phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli endaweni yalo lonke izibulo elivula isizalo kubantwana bakoIsrayeli. LamaLevi azakuba ngawami," 
Numbers3:13 ngoba lonke izibulo lingelami ngosuku engatshaya ngalo lonke izibulo elizweni leGibhithe. Ngizingcwelisele lonke izibulo koIsrayeli, kusukela emuntwini kusiya enyamazaneni; lizakuba ngelami; ngiyi Nkosi." 
Numbers3:14 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi enkangala yeSinayi isithi: 
Numbers3:15 Bala abantwana bakoLevi ngezindlu zaboyise langensendo zabo; wonke owesilisa kusukela kolenyanga kusiya phezulu, uzababala." 
Numbers3:16 Ngakho uMozisi wababala ngokomlomo we Nkosi njengokulaywa kwakhe. 
Numbers3:17 Lala ayengamadodana kaLevi ngamabizo awo: UGerishoni loKohathi loMerari. 
Numbers3:18 Lala ngamabizo amadodana kaGerishoni ngensendo zawo: ULibini loShimeyi. 
Numbers3:19 Lamadodana kaKohathi ngensendo zawo: UAmramu loIzihari, uHebroni loUziyeli." 
Numbers3:20 Lamadodana kaMerari ngensendo zawo: UMahli loMushi. Lezi zinsendo zamaLevi ngezindlu zaboyise. 
Numbers3:21 KuGerishoni kwakulosendo lwamaLibini losendo lwamaShimeyi; lezi zinsendo zamaGerishoni. 
Numbers3:22 Ababalwayo babo, ngenani labo bonke abesilisa, kusukela kolenyanga kusiya phezulu, ababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa lamakhulu amahlanu." 
Numbers3:23 Insendo zamaGerishoni zizamisa amathente azo ngemva kwethabhanekele ngentshonalanga. 
Numbers3:24 Lesiphathamandla sendlu kayise wamaGerishoni sizakuba nguEliyasafi indodana kaLayeli. 
Numbers3:25 Lemfanelo yamadodana kaGerishoni ethenteni lenhlangano izakuba lithabhanekele, lethente, isifulelo salo, lesilenge somnyango wethente lenhlangano," 
Numbers3:26 lamakhetheni eguma, lesilenge somnyango weguma elingasethabhanekeleni lelingaselathini inhlangothi zonke, lentambo zalo, ngokomsebenzi walo wonke." 
Numbers3:27 LakuKohathi kwakulosendo lwamaAmramu, losendo lwamaIzihari, losendo lwamaHebroni, losendo lwamaUziyeli. Lezi zinsendo zamaKohathi." 
Numbers3:28 Kunani labo bonke abesilisa, kusukela kolenyanga kusiya phezulu, babeyizinkulungwane eziyisificaminwembili lamakhulu ayisithupha, begcina imfanelo yendlu engcwele." 
Numbers3:29 Insendo zamadodana kaKohathi zizamisa amathente azo eceleni kwethabhanekele ngeningizimu. 
Numbers3:30 Lesiphathamandla sendlu kayise wensendo zamaKohathi sizakuba nguElizafani indodana kaUziyeli. 
Numbers3:31 Lemfanelo yawo izakuba ngumtshokotsho, letafula, loluthi lwesibane, lamalathi, lezitsha zendlu engcwele abakhonza ngazo, lesilenge, layo yonke inkonzo yalo." 
Numbers3:32 Njalo umphathi weziphathamandla zamaLevi uzakuba nguEleyazare, indodana kaAroni umpristi; ubuphathi bakhe babukwabagcina ukulindwa kwendlu engcwele." 
Numbers3:33 KoMerari kwakulusendo lwamaMahli losendo lwamaMushi; lezi zinsendo zamaMerari. 
Numbers3:34 Lababalwayo babo, ngenani labo bonke abesilisa, kusukela kolenyanga kusiya phezulu, babeyizinkulungwane eziyisithupha lamakhulu amabili." 
Numbers3:35 Lesiphathamandla sendlu kayise wensendo zakoMerari sizakuba nguZuriyeli indodana kaAbihayili. Bazamisa amathente abo eceleni kwethabhanekele ngenyakatho. 
Numbers3:36 Lobuphathi bokulinda bamadodana kaMerari buzakuba ngamapulanka ethabhanekele, lemithando yalo, lensika zalo, lezisekelo zalo, lezitsha zalo zonke, lawo wonke umsebenzi walo," 
Numbers3:37 lensika zeguma inhlangothi zonke, lezisekelo zazo, lezikhonkwane zazo, lentambo zazo." 
Numbers3:38 Lalabo ababemise amathente abo phambi kwethabhanekele ngempumalanga, phambi kwethente lenhlangano, kwakungoMozisi loAroni lamadodana akhe, belondoloza ukulindwa kwendlu engcwele, kusenzelwa umlindo wabantwana bakoIsrayeli. Lowemzini osondelayo uzabulawa." 
Numbers3:39 Bonke ababalwayo bamaLevi, oMozisi loAroni abababalayo, ngokomlayo we Nkosi, ngezinsapho zabo, bonke abesilisa kusukela kolenyanga kusiya phezulu, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lambili." 
Numbers3:40 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Bala wonke amazibulo esilisa abantwana bakoIsrayeli, kusukela kolenyanga kusiya phezulu, uthathe inani lamabizo abo." 
Numbers3:41 Uzangithathela amaLevi (ngiyi Nkosi) endaweni yawo wonke amazibulo phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli; lezifuyo zamaLevi endaweni yamazibulo wonke phakathi kwezifuyo zabantwana bakoIsrayeli. 
Numbers3:42 Ngakho uMozisi wabala wonke amazibulo phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuye." 
Numbers3:43 Lawo wonke amazibulo esilisa, ngenani lamabizo, kusukela kolenyanga kusiya phezulu, kwababaliweyo babo, ayezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lambili lamakhulu amabili lamatshumi ayisikhombisa lantathu." 
Numbers3:44 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers3:45 Thatha amaLevi endaweni yamazibulo wonke phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, lezifuyo zamaLevi endaweni yezifuyo zabo; lamaLevi azakuba ngawami; ngiyi Nkosi." 
Numbers3:46 Mayelana labazahlengwa, abangamakhulu amabili lamatshumi ayisikhombisa lantathu bamazibulo abantwana bakoIsrayeli, abaphezu kwenani lamaLevi;" 
Numbers3:47 uzathatha lamashekeli* nganhlanu nganhlanu ngekhanda, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele uzawathatha; ishekeli lingamagera* angamatshumi amabili." 
Numbers3:48 Unike kuAroni lakumadodana akhe imali yabahlengiweyo abasele phakathi kwabo. 
Numbers3:49 UMozisi wasethatha imali yohlengo kulabo ababesele phezu kwabahlengwa ngamaLevi. 
Numbers3:50 Wayithatha imali kumazibulo abantwana bakoIsrayeli, amashekeli ayinkulungwane lamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi ayisithupha lanhlanu, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele." 
Numbers3:51 UMozisi wasenika uAroni lamadodana akhe imali yabahlengiweyo, ngokomlomo we Nkosi, njengalokhu i Nkosi imlayile uMozisi." 
Numbers4:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni isithi: 
Numbers4:2 Thathani inani lonke lamadodana kaKohathi avela phakathi kwamadodana kaLevi, ngensendo zawo, ngezindlu zaboyise," 
Numbers4:3 kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amathathu kusiya koleminyaka engamatshumi amahlanu, wonke ongena empini ukwenza umsebenzi wethente lenhlangano." 
Numbers4:4 Lo ngumsebenzi wamadodana kaKohathi ethenteni lenhlangano: Izinto ezingcwelengcwele. 
Numbers4:5 Ekusukeni-ke kwenkamba uAroni lamadodana akhe bazakuza behlise iveyili lesembeso, basibekele umtshokotsho wobufakazi ngalo," 
Numbers4:6 bazabeka phezu kwawo izikhumba zikamantswane, bendlale phezu kwawo ilembu eliluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lonke, bafake imijabo yawo." 
Numbers4:7 Laphezu kwetafula lokubukisa bazakwendlala ilembu eliluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, babeke phezu kwalo imiganu, lenkezo zempepha, lezitsha, lenkezo zomnikelo wokunathwayo; lesinkwa esihlezi sikhona sizakuba phezu kwalo." 
Numbers4:8 Laphezu kwalezizinto bazakwendlala ilembu elibomvu, balembese ngesembeso sezikhumba zikamantswane, bafake imijabo yalo." 
Numbers4:9 Bazathatha-ke ilembu eliluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, bembese uluthi lwesibane sesikhanyiso, lezibane zalo, lendlawu zalo, lemiganu yalo yomlotha, lezitsha zonke zalo zamafutha abasebenza ngazo kulo." 
Numbers4:10 Njalo bazalufaka kanye lezinto zalo zonke esembesweni sezikhumba zikamantswane, bakugaxe egodweni." 
Numbers4:11 Laphezu kwelathi legolide bazakwendlala ilembu eliluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, balembese ngesembeso sezikhumba zikamantswane, bafake imijabo yalo." 
Numbers4:12 Njalo bazathatha yonke impahla yenkonzo, abakhonza ngayo endlini engcwele, bayifake elenjini eliluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, bayembese ngesembeso sezikhumba zikamantswane, bayigaxe egodweni." 
Numbers4:13 Njalo bazasusa umlotha elathini, bendlale phezu kwalo ilembu eliyibubende," 
Numbers4:14 babeke phezu kwalo zonke izinto zalo abakhonza ngazo kulo, izitsha zokuthwala umlilo, amafologwe enyama, lamafotsholo, lemiganu yokufafaza, zonke izinto zelathi; bendlale phezu kwalo isembeso sezikhumba zikamantswane, bafake imijabo yalo." 
Numbers4:15 Lapho uAroni lamadodana akhe sebeqedile ukwembesa indlu engcwele lempahla zonke zendlu engcwele, ekususweni kwenkamba, emva kwalokho amadodana kaKohathi azakuza ukuthwala, kodwa kawayikuthinta into engcwele hlezi afe. Lezizinto zingumthwalo wamadodana kaKohathi, ethenteni lenhlangano." 
Numbers4:16 Ubongameli bukaEleyazare indodana kaAroni umpristi buzakuba ngamafutha esibane, lempepha elephunga elimnandi, lomnikelo wokudla njalonjalo, lamafutha okugcoba; ububonisi ngethabhanekele lonke lakho konke okukilo, endlini engcwele lezintweni zayo." 
Numbers4:17 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni isithi: 
Numbers4:18 Lingaqumi insendo zesizwe samaKohathi zisuke phakathi kwamaLevi. 
Numbers4:19 Kodwa lokho kwenzeni kuwo, ukuze aphile angafi, ekusondeleni kwawo ezintweni ezingcwelengcwele; uAroni lamadodana akhe bazangena, bawamise lowo lalowo emsebenzini wakhe lemthwalweni wakhe;" 
Numbers4:20 kodwa kawayikungena ukubona lapho izinto ezingcwele zigoqelwa, hlezi afe." 
Numbers4:21 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers4:22 Thatha inani lonke lamadodana kaGerishoni lawo, ngezindlu zaboyise, ngensendo zawo," 
Numbers4:23 kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amathathu langaphezulu kusiya koleminyaka engamatshumi amahlanu uzababala; wonke ongena ukulwa impi, ukuthi enze umsebenzi ethenteni lenhlangano." 
Numbers4:24 Lo ngumsebenzi wensendo zamaGerishoni ukukhonza lemthwalweni; 
Numbers4:25 bazathwala-ke amakhetheni ethabhanekele, lethente lenhlangano, isembeso salo, lesembeso sezikhumba zikamantswane eziphezu kwalo phezulu, lesilenge somnyango wethente lenhlangano," 
Numbers4:26 lamakhetheni eguma, lesilenge somnyango wesango leguma eliseduze lethabhanekele njalo eduze lelathi inhlangothi zonke, lentambo zazo, lempahla yonke yenkonzo yabo, lakho konke okwenzelwe bona; basebenze-ke." 
Numbers4:27 Njengokulaya kukaAroni lamadodana akhe uzakuba njalo umsebenzi wonke wamadodana amaGerishoni emthwalweni wabo wonke lenkonzweni yabo yonke. Uzawamisa ukugcina wonke umthwalo wabo. 
Numbers4:28 Lo ngumsebenzi wensendo zamadodana amaGerishoni ethenteni lenhlangano; ukugcinwa kwawo kuzakuba ngaphansi kwesandla sikaIthamari indodana kaAroni umpristi. 
Numbers4:29 Amadodana kaMerari uzawabala ngensendo zawo ngezindlu zaboyise," 
Numbers4:30 kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amathathu langaphezulu kusiya koleminyaka engamatshumi amahlanu uzababala, wonke ongena empini, ukusebenza umsebenzi wethente lenhlangano." 
Numbers4:31 Lalokhu yikugcinwa komthwalo wabo, njengokomsebenzi wabo wonke ethenteni lenhlangano: Amapulanka ethabhanekele, lemithando yalo, lensika zalo, lezisekelo zalo," 
Numbers4:32 lensika zeguma inhlangothi zonke, lezisekelo zazo, lezikhonkwane zazo, lezintambo zazo, lempahla yazo yonke, lomsebenzi wazo wonke. Njalo lizaziqamba ngamabizo impahla abafanele ukuzithwala." 
Numbers4:33 Lo ngumsebenzi wensendo zamadodana kaMerari, ngokomsebenzi wonke wawo ethenteni lenhlangano, ngaphansi kwesandla sikaIthamari indodana kaAroni umpristi." 
Numbers4:34 UMozisi loAroni leziphathamandla zenhlangano basebebala amadodana amaKohathi ngensendo zawo langezindlu zaboyise," 
Numbers4:35 kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amathathu langaphezulu kusiya koleminyaka engamatshumi amahlanu, wonke ongena empini, emsebenzini wethente lenhlangano;" 
Numbers4:36 Lalabo ababalwayo kuwo ngensendo zabo babeyizinkulungwane ezimbili lamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi amahlanu. 
Numbers4:37 Laba ngababalwayo bensendo zamaKohathi, wonke owasebenza ethenteni lenhlangano, oMozisi loAroni abababalayo, ngokomlayo we Nkosi ngesandla sikaMozisi." 
Numbers4:38 Lalabo ababalwayo bamadodana kaGerishoni, ngensendo zawo, langezindlu zaboyise," 
Numbers4:39 kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amathathu langaphezulu kusiya koleminyaka engamatshumi amahlanu, wonke ongena empini, emsebenzini ethenteni lenhlangano." 
Numbers4:40 Lalabo ababalwayo kuwo ngensendo zabo ngezindlu zaboyise babeyizinkulungwane ezimbili lamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi amathathu. 
Numbers4:41 Laba ngababalwayo bensendo zamadodana kaGerishoni, wonke owasebenza ethenteni lenhlangano, oMozisi loAroni abababalayo ngokomlayo we Nkosi." 
Numbers4:42 Lalabo ababalwayo bensendo zamadodana kaMerari, ngensendo zawo, ngezindlu zaboyise," 
Numbers4:43 kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amathathu langaphezulu kusiya koleminyaka engamatshumi amahlanu, wonke ongena empini, emsebenzini wethente lenhlangano." 
Numbers4:44 Lalabo ababalwayo kuwo ngensendo zabo babeyizinkulungwane ezintathu lamakhulu amabili. 
Numbers4:45 Laba ngababalwayo bensendo zamadodana kaMerari, oMozisi loAroni abababalayo, ngokomlayo we Nkosi ngesandla sikaMozisi." 
Numbers4:46 Bonke ababalwayo, oMozisi loAroni leziphathamandla zakoIsrayeli abababalayo, bamaLevi, ngensendo zabo langezindlu zaboyise," 
Numbers4:47 kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amathathu langaphezulu kusiya koleminyaka engamatshumi amahlanu, wonke owangena ukusebenza umsebenzi wenkonzo lomsebenzi womthwalo ethenteni lenhlangano," 
Numbers4:48 lalabo ababalwayo kubo babeyizinkulungwane eziyisificaminwembili lamakhulu amahlanu lamatshumi ayisificaminwembili. 
Numbers4:49 Ngokomlayo we Nkosi bababala, ngesandla sikaMozisi, ngulowo lalowo ngokomsebenzi wakhe langokomthwalo wakhe; ngakho babalwa nguye, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Numbers5:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers5:2 Laya abantwana bakoIsrayeli ukuthi bakhuphe enkambeni wonke umlephero, laye wonke olokugobhoza, laye wonke ongcolileyo ngofileyo." 
Numbers5:3 Kusukela kowesilisa kusiya kowesifazana lizabakhupha, kuze kube ngaphandle kwenkamba lizabakhupha, ukuze bangangcolisi izinkamba zabo, engihlala phakathi kwazo." 
Numbers5:4 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenza njalo, babakhupha baze baba ngaphandle kwenkamba; njengokutsho kwe Nkosi kuMozisi, benza njalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers5:5 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers5:6 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Indoda kumbe umfazi, uba besenza loba yisiphi isono somuntu besenza ngokungathembeki, isenzo sokungathembeki e Nkosi ni, lowomuntu ulecala." 
Numbers5:7 Njalo bazavuma isono sabo abasenzileyo, abesehlawula icala lakhe ngokupheleleyo kwalo, engezelele phezu kwalo ingxenye yesihlanu yalo, anike lowo alecala kuye." 
Numbers5:8 Kodwa uba lowomuntu engelamhlengi oyisihlobo okungahlawulwa kuso icala, icala lizahlawulwa e Nkosi ni kube ngokompristi, ngaphandle kwenqama yenhlawulo yokuthula, azamenzela inhlawulo yokuthula ngayo." 
Numbers5:9 Lawo wonke umnikelo wazo zonke izinto ezingcwele zabantwana bakoIsrayeli, abaziletha kumpristi, uzakuba ngowakhe." 
Numbers5:10 Lezinto ezingcwele zawo wonke umuntu zizakuba ngezakhe; lokhu loba ngubani akunika umpristi kuzakuba ngokwakhe. 
Numbers5:11 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers5:12 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Loba yiyiphi indoda, uba umkayo eduha, ngokungathembeki kuyo enze isenzo sokungathembeki," 
Numbers5:13 lendoda ilala laye ngobudoda bokuhlangana, njalo kufihlakale emehlweni endoda yakhe, angabonwa, yena ungcolisiwe, njalo kungelamfakazi omelana laye, futhi yena engabanjwanga," 
Numbers5:14 lomoya wobukhwele ufike phezu kwayo, futhi ibe lobukhwele ngomkayo, njalo yena engcolisiwe, loba umoya wobukhwele ufike phezu kwayo, futhi ibe lobukhwele ngomkayo, lanxa yena engangcolanga," 
Numbers5:15 indoda izaletha umkayo kumpristi, imlethele umnikelo wakhe, ingxenye yetshumi ye-efa* lempuphu yebhali*; kayiyikuthela amafutha kuyo, ingabeki inhlaka phezu kwayo, ngoba kungumnikelo wokudla wobukhwele, umnikelo wokudla wesikhumbuzo, ukukhumbuza ububi." 
Numbers5:16 Umpristi uzasondeza-ke owesifazana, ammise phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Numbers5:17 Umpristi athathe amanzi angcwele embizeni yebumba, lompristi athathe okothuli oluphansi ethabhanekeleni, akufake emanzini." 
Numbers5:18 Umpristi uzamisa owesifazana phambi kwe Nkosi, athukulule inwele zekhanda lowesifazana, abeke ezandleni zakhe umnikelo wokudla wokukhumbuza, ongumnikelo wokudla wobukhwele. Lesandleni sompristi kuzakuba lamanzi ababayo aletha isiqalekiso." 
Numbers5:19 Umpristi uzamfungisa-ke, athi kowesifazana: Uba kungelandoda elele lawe, njalo uba ungaduhelanga ekungcoleni, uphansi kwendoda yakho, khululeka emanzini la ababayo aletha isiqalekiso." 
Numbers5:20 Kodwa wena, uba uduhile, uphansi kwendoda yakho, futhi uba ungcolisiwe, lendoda yahlangana lawe, ngaphandle kwendoda yakho," 
Numbers5:21 umpristi amfungise owesifazana ngesifungo sesiqalekiso, umpristi athi kuye: I Nkosi kayikwenze ube yisiqalekiso lesifungo phakathi kwabantu bakini, lapho i Nkosi isenza ithangazi lakho liwe, lesisu sakho sikhukhumale." 
Numbers5:22 Lamanzi la aletha isiqalekiso kawangene emibilini yakho, akwenze isisu sikhukhumale lokwenza ithangazi liwe. Owesifazana abesesithi: Ameni, Ameni." 
Numbers5:23 Umpristi uzabhala-ke iziqalekiso lezi egwalweni, azesule ngamanzi ababayo," 
Numbers5:24 anathise owesifazana amanzi ababayo aletha isiqalekiso, lamanzi aletha isiqalekiso azangena kuye, abe ngokubabayo." 
Numbers5:25 Umpristi uzathatha-ke esandleni sowesifazana umnikelo wokudla wobukhwele, awuzunguze umnikelo wokudla phambi kwe Nkosi, awusondeze elathini," 
Numbers5:26 umpristi acuphe isandla esigcweleyo somnikelo wokudla, sibe yisikhumbuzo sawo, asitshise elathini, lemva kwalokho amnathise owesifazana amanzi." 
Numbers5:27 Esemnathisile amanzi, kuzakuthi uba engcolile, esenze ngokungathembeki isenzo sokungathembeki endodeni yakhe, amanzi aletha isiqalekiso esengenile kuye abe ngokubabayo, isisu sakhe sizakhukhumala lethangazi lakhe liwe, lowesifazana uzakuba yisiqalekiso phakathi kwabantu bakibo." 
Numbers5:28 Kodwa uba owesifazana engangcolanga, kodwa ehlambulukile, uzakhululeka, uzakwemukela inhlanyelo." 
Numbers5:29 Lo ngumlayo wobukhwele, lapho umfazi eduha ephansi kwendoda yakhe, abesengcoliswa," 
Numbers5:30 kumbe indoda, uba umoya wobukhwele ufika phezu kwayo ibe lobukhwele ngomkayo; immise owesifazana phambi kwe Nkosi, lompristi enze kuye umlayo lo wonke." 
Numbers5:31 Indoda izakhululeka-ke ecaleni, kodwa lowo owesifazana uzathwala icala lakhe." 
Numbers6:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers6:2 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Owesilisa loba owesifazana, uba ezehlukanisela ukuthembisa isithembiso somNaziri, ukuze azehlukanisele i Nkosi," 
Numbers6:3 uzazehlukanisa lewayini lokunathwayo okulamandla, anganathi iviniga lewayini, leviniga lokunathwayo okulamandla, anganathi lamhluzi wezithelo zevini, angadli izithelo zevini ezimanzi lezomileyo." 
Numbers6:4 Zonke insuku zokuzehlukanisela kwakhe kayikudla okolutho olwenziwe ngevini lewayini, kusukela enhlamvini kusiya emakhasini." 
Numbers6:5 Zonke insuku zesithembiso sokuzehlukanisela kwakhe impuco kayiyikudlula phezu kwekhanda lakhe; kuze kugcwaliseke insuku zokuzehlukanisela kwakhe i Nkosi uzakuba ngcwele, ayekele izihluthu zenwele zekhanda lakhe zikhule." 
Numbers6:6 Zonke insuku azehlukanisele i Nkosi ngazo kayikuya esidunjini. 
Numbers6:7 Kayikuzingcolisa ngoyise, langonina, ngomfowabo, langodadewabo, uba befile, ngoba ukwehlukaniselwa uNkulunkulu wakhe kuphezu kwekhanda lakhe." 
Numbers6:8 Zonke insuku zokuzehlukanisela kwakhe ungcwele e Nkosi ni. 
Numbers6:9 Uba-ke ofayo ejunywa masinyane yikufa phansi kwakhe, usengcolise ikhanda lokuzehlukanisela kwakhe, uzaphuca ikhanda lakhe ngosuku lokuhlanjululwa kwakhe, uzaliphuca ngosuku lwesikhombisa." 
Numbers6:10 Langosuku lwesificaminwembili uzaletha amajuba amabili loba amaphuphu amabili enkwilimba kumpristi emnyango wethente lenhlangano. 
Numbers6:11 Lompristi uzanikela enye ibe ngumnikelo wesono, lenye ibe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa, amenzele inhlawulo yokuthula, ngoba wonile ngesidumbu. Njalo uzangcwelisa ikhanda lakhe ngalona lolosuku," 
Numbers6:12 azehlukanisele i Nkosi insuku zokuzehlukanisela kwakhe, alethe iwundlu elilomnyaka owodwa libe ngumnikelo wecala; kodwa insuku zakuqala zizakuwa, ngoba ukuzehlukanisela kwakhe kungcolisiwe." 
Numbers6:13 Lalo ngumlayo womNaziri ngosuku lapho insuku zokuzehlukanisela kwakhe sezigcwalisekile. Uzaletha lokhu emnyango wethente lenhlangano," 
Numbers6:14 anikele umnikelo wakhe e Nkosi ni, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa elingelasici libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa, lewundlukazi elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa elingelasici libe ngumnikelo wesono, lenqama ibenye engelasici ibe yiminikelo yokuthula," 
Numbers6:15 lesitsha sezinkwa ezingelamvubelo, amaqebelengwana empuphu ecolekileyo ehlanganiswe lamafutha, lezinkwana eziyizipatalala ezingelamvubelo ezinindwe ngamafutha, lomnikelo wazo wokudla leminikelo yazo yokunathwayo." 
Numbers6:16 Njalo umpristi uzakusondeza phambi kwe Nkosi, anikele umnikelo wakhe wesono lomnikelo wakhe wokutshiswa." 
Numbers6:17 Lenqama uzayinikela ibe ngumhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula e Nkosi ni kanye lesitsha sezinkwa ezingelamvubelo; lompristi uzanikela umnikelo wakhe wokudla lomnikelo wakhe wokunathwayo. 
Numbers6:18 UmNaziri uzaphuca-ke ikhanda lokuzehlukanisela kwakhe emnyango wethente lenhlangano, athathe inwele zekhanda lokuzehlukanisela kwakhe, azifake emlilweni ongaphansi komhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula." 
Numbers6:19 Lompristi uzathatha umkhono ophekiweyo wenqama, leqebelengwana elilodwa elingelamvubelo esitsheni, lesinkwana esisodwa esiyisipatalala esingelamvubelo, akubeke ezandleni zomNaziri esephucile ukuzehlukanisela kwakhe," 
Numbers6:20 umpristi akuzunguze-ke kube ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi; kungcwele kumpristi, kanye lesifuba esizunguziweyo kanye lomlenze wokuphakanyiswa. Emva kwalokhu umNaziri usenganatha iwayini." 
Numbers6:21 Lo ngumlayo womNaziri othembise umnikelo wakhe wokuzehlukanisela kwakhe e Nkosi ni, ngaphandle kwalokho isandla sakhe singafinyelela kukho; njengesithembiso sakhe asithembisileyo uzakwenza njalo, njengomlayo wobuNaziri bakhe." 
Numbers6:22 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers6:23 Tshono kuAroni lakumadodana akhe uthi: Lizabusisa kanje abantwana bakoIsrayeli, lisithi kubo:" 
Numbers6:24 I Nkosi kayikubusise, ikulondoloze." 
Numbers6:25 I Nkosi kayikhanyise ubuso bayo kuwe, ibe lomusa kuwe." 
Numbers6:26 I Nkosi kayiphakamise ubuso bayo kuwe, ikunike ukuthula." 
Numbers6:27 Ngokunjalo bazabeka ibizo lami phezu kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, mina-ke ngizababusisa." 
Numbers7:1 Kwasekusithi ngosuku uMozisi aqeda ngalo ukumisa ithabhanekele, waligcoba, walingcwelisa, lempahla zalo zonke, lelathi lempahla zalo zonke, wakugcoba, wakungcwelisa;" 
Numbers7:2 iziphathamandla zakoIsrayeli, izinhloko zezindlu zaboyise, ezaziyiziphathamandla zezizwe, ezazisongamela labo ababalwayo, zanikela," 
Numbers7:3 zaletha umnikelo wazo phambi kwe Nkosi, inqola eziyisithupha ezembesiweyo lenkabi ezilitshumi lambili; inqola eyodwa ngeziphathamandla ezimbili, lenkabi ngesisodwa; zazisondeza phambi kwethabhanekele." 
Numbers7:4 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers7:5 Yemukela kuzo, ukuze zibe ngezokusebenza inkonzo yethente lenhlangano, uzinike amaLevi, kulowo lalowo njengomsebenzi wakhe." 
Numbers7:6 Ngakho uMozisi wathatha izinqola lezinkabi, wazinika amaLevi." 
Numbers7:7 Inqola ezimbili lenkabi ezine wazinika amadodana kaGerishoni, njengomsebenzi wawo;" 
Numbers7:8 lenqola ezine lenkabi eziyisificaminwembili wazinika amadodana kaMerari, njengomsebenzi wawo, ngesandla sikaIthamari indodana kaAroni umpristi." 
Numbers7:9 Kodwa emadodaneni kaKohathi kanikanga lutho, ngoba umsebenzi wezinto ezingcwele wawuphezu kwawo, awuthwala emahlombe." 
Numbers7:10 Leziphathamandla zanikelela ukwehlukaniselwa kwelathi ngosuku elagcotshwa ngalo; iziphathamandla zasondeza umnikelo wazo phambi kwelathi. 
Numbers7:11 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Isiphathamandla esisodwa ngosuku, isiphathamandla esisodwa ngosuku, zizanikelela umnikelo wazo wokwehlukaniselwa kwelathi." 
Numbers7:12 Owanikela-ke umnikelo wakhe ngosuku lokuqala wayenguNashoni indodana kaAminadaba, owesizwe sakoJuda." 
Numbers7:13 Lomnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli * alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:14 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:15 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:16 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:17 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokhu kwakungumnikelo kaNashoni indodana kaAminadaba." 
Numbers7:18 Ngosuku lwesibili uNethaneli indodana kaZuwari, isiphathamandla sakoIsakari, wanikela." 
Numbers7:19 Wanikela umnikelo wakhe: Umganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:20 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:21 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:22 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:23 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokhu kwakungumnikelo kaNethaneli indodana kaZuwari." 
Numbers7:24 Ngosuku lwesithathu uEliyabi indodana kaHeloni, isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoZebuluni:" 
Numbers7:25 Umnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:26 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:27 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:28 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:29 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokho kwakungumnikelo kaEliyabi indodana kaHeloni." 
Numbers7:30 Ngosuku lwesine uElizuri indodana kaShedewuri, isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoRubeni:" 
Numbers7:31 Umnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:32 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:33 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:34 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:35 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokho kwakungumnikelo kaElizuri indodana kaShedewuri." 
Numbers7:36 Ngosuku lwesihlanu uShelumiyeli indodana kaZurishadayi, isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoSimeyoni:" 
Numbers7:37 Umnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:38 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:39 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:40 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:41 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokho kwakungumnikelo kaShelumiyeli indodana kaZurishadayi." 
Numbers7:42 Ngosuku lwesithupha uEliyasafi indodana kaDehuweli, isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoGadi:" 
Numbers7:43 Umnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:44 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:45 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:46 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:47 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokho kwakungumnikelo kaEliyasafi indodana kaDehuweli." 
Numbers7:48 Ngosuku lwesikhombisa uElishama indodana kaAmihudi, isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoEfrayimi:" 
Numbers7:49 Umnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:50 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:51 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:52 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:53 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokho kwakungumnikelo kaElishama indodana kaAmihudi." 
Numbers7:54 Ngosuku lwesificaminwembili uGamaliyeli indodana kaPedazuri, isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoManase:" 
Numbers7:55 Umnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:56 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:57 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:58 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:59 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokho kwakungumnikelo kaGamaliyeli indodana kaPedazuri." 
Numbers7:60 Ngosuku lwesificamunwemunye uAbidani indodana kaGideyoni, isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoBhenjamini:" 
Numbers7:61 Umnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:62 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:63 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:64 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:65 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokho kwakungumnikelo kaAbidani indodana kaGideyoni." 
Numbers7:66 Ngosuku lwetshumi uAhiyezeri indodana kaAmishadayi, isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoDani:" 
Numbers7:67 Umnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:68 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:69 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:70 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:71 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokho kwakungumnikelo kaAhiyezeri indodana kaAmishadayi." 
Numbers7:72 Ngosuku lwetshumi lanye uPagiyeli indodana kaOkirani, isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoAsheri:" 
Numbers7:73 Umnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:74 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:75 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:76 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:77 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokho kwakungumnikelo kaPagiyeli indodana kaOkirani." 
Numbers7:78 Ngosuku lwetshumi lambili uAhira indodana kaEnani, isiphathamandla sabantwana bakoNafithali:" 
Numbers7:79 Umnikelo wakhe wawungumganu owodwa wesiliva, osisindo sawo sasingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu, umganu wokufafaza owodwa wesiliva wamashekeli angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; yomibili yayigcwele impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, kube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:80 ukhezo olulodwa olungama shekeli alitshumi egolide, lugcwele impepha;" 
Numbers7:81 ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, iwundlu elilodwa elilomnyaka owodwa, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:82 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono; 
Numbers7:83 lokomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula, izinkabi ezimbili, inqama ezinhlanu, impongo ezinhlanu, amawundlu amahlanu alomnyaka owodwa. Lokho kwakungumnikelo kaAhira indodana kaEnani."
