Numbers7:84 Lokhu kwakuyikwehlukaniselwa kwelathi ngosuku lokugcotshwa kwalo kweziphathamandla zakoIsrayeli. Imiganu yesiliva elitshumi lambili, imiganu yokufafaza yesiliva elitshumi lambili, inkezo zegolide ezilitshumi lambili." 
Numbers7:85 Lowo lalowo umganu wesiliva wawungama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amathathu; lalowo lalowo umganu wokufafaza wamatshumi ayisikhombisa; sonke isiliva semiganu sasingama shekeli azinkulungwane ezimbili lamakhulu amane, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele." 
Numbers7:86 Inkezo zegolide ezilitshumi lambili, zigcwele impepha; yilolo lalolokhezo lwalungama shekeli alitshumi ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele; igolide lonke lenkezo lalingama shekeli alikhulu lamatshumi amabili." 
Numbers7:87 Zonke izifuyo zomnikelo wokutshiswa zazingamajongosi alitshumi lambili, inqama ezilitshumi lambili, amawundlu alomnyaka owodwa alitshumi lambili, lomnikelo wazo wokudla; lamazinyane embuzi alitshumi lambili omnikelo wesono." 
Numbers7:88 Lazo zonke izifuyo zomhlatshelo weminikelo yokuthula zazingamajongosi angamatshumi amabili lane, inqama ezingamatshumi ayisithupha, impongo ezingamatshumi ayisithupha, amawundlu angamatshumi ayisithupha alomnyaka owodwa. Lokhu kwakuyikwehlukaniselwa kwelathi, emva kokugcotshwa kwalo." 
Numbers7:89 Lapho uMozisi esengena ethenteni lenhlangano ukukhuluma laye, wezwa ilizwi likhuluma kuye, livela ngaphezu kwesihlalo somusa esiphezu komtshokotsho wobufakazi, livela phakathi kwamakherubi* amabili; wasekhuluma kuye." 
Numbers8:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers8:2 Tshono kuAroni uthi kuye: Nxa ulumathisa izibane, izibane eziyisikhombisa zizakhanyisa phambili phambi koluthi lwesibane." 
Numbers8:3 UAroni wasesenza njalo; phambili phambi koluthi lwesibane walumathisa izibane zalo, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Numbers8:4 Lalo umsebenzi woluthi lwesibane wawungowegolide elikhandiweyo, kuze kube sesidindini salo kuze kuye emalubeni alo lwalukhandiwe; njengesifanekiso i Nkosi eyamtshengisa sona uMozisi, walwenza njalo uluthi lwesibane." 
Numbers8:5 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers8:6 Khupha amaLevi phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, uwahlambulule;" 
Numbers8:7 wenze ngokunjalo kuwo ukuwahlambulula; ufafaze phezu kwawo amanzi okuhlambulula, njalo adlulise impuco emzimbeni wawo wonke, awatshe izigqoko zawo, azihlambulule." 
Numbers8:8 Athathe ijongosi ithole lenkomo, lomnikelo walo wokudla, impuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, uthathe lelinye ijongosi ithole lenkomo, libe ngumnikelo wesono." 
Numbers8:9 Njalo uzasondeza amaLevi phambi kwethente lenhlangano, ubuthanise inhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers8:10 Usondeze amaLevi phambi kwe Nkosi, njalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli bazabeka izandla zabo phezu kwamaLevi," 
Numbers8:11 loAroni azunguze amaLevi, abe ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi, evela ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, ukuze abe ngasebenza umsebenzi we Nkosi." 
Numbers8:12 AmaLevi azabeka-ke izandla zawo enhlokweni yamajongosi; unikele elinye libe ngumnikelo wesono, lelinye libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa e Nkosi ni, ukuwenzela amaLevi inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Numbers8:13 Njalo uzawamisa amaLevi phambi kukaAroni laphambi kwamadodana akhe, uwazunguze abe ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa e Nkosi ni." 
Numbers8:14 Ngakho uzakwehlukanisa amaLevi uwakhuphe phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, ukuthi amaLevi abe ngawami." 
Numbers8:15 Lemva kwalokho amaLevi azangena ukukhonza ethenteni lenhlangano. Njalo uzawahlambulula, uwazunguze abe ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa." 
Numbers8:16 Ngoba wona aphiwe lokuphiwa mina ephuma phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli. Esikhundleni salokho okuvula sonke isizalo, izibulo laye wonke wabantwana bakoIsrayeli, ngizithathele wona." 
Numbers8:17 Ngoba lonke izibulo phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli ngelami, phakathi kwabantu laphakathi kwezifuyo. Ngosuku engatshaya ngalo lonke izibulo elizweni leGibhithe ngazingcwelisela wona;" 
Numbers8:18 sengithethe amaLevi esikhundleni sawo wonke amazibulo phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli. 
Numbers8:19 Ngiwanikile amaLevi njengabaphiweyo kuAroni lakumadodana akhe, ephuma phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, ukukhonza inkonzo yabantwana bakoIsrayeli ethenteni lenhlangano, lokwenzela abantwana bakoIsrayeli inhlawulo yokuthula, ukuze kungabi lenhlupheko phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, nxa abantwana bakoIsrayeli besondela endlini engcwele." 
Numbers8:20 UMozisi loAroni lenhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenza kumaLevi njengakho konke i Nkosi eyakulaya uMozisi mayelana lamaLevi; benza njalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli kuwo. 
Numbers8:21 LamaLevi azihlambulula, awatsha izembatho zawo; uAroni wasewazunguza aba ngumnikelo wokuzunguzwa phambi kwe Nkosi; loAroni wawenzela inhlawulo yokuthula ukuwahlambulula." 
Numbers8:22 Lemva kwalokho amaLevi angena ukwenza inkonzo yawo ethenteni lenhlangano phambi kukaAroni laphambi kwamadodana akhe. Njengalokhu i Nkosi yamlaya uMozisi ngamaLevi, benza njalo kuwo." 
Numbers8:23 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers8:24 Yilokhu okuqondene lamaLevi: Kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili lanhlanu langaphezulu azangena ukulwa impi, enkonzweni yethente lenhlangano." 
Numbers8:25 Njalo kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amahlanu azaphuma empini yenkonzo, angabe esasebenza;" 
Numbers8:26 kodwa azasiza abazalwane bawo ethenteni lenhlangano ukugcina umlindo, kodwa angasebenzi umsebenzi. Uzakwenza njalo kumaLevi kumfanelo zawo." 
Numbers9:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi enkangala yeSinayi, ngomnyaka wesibili emva kokuphuma kwabo elizweni leGibhithe ngenyanga yokuqala, isithi:" 
Numbers9:2 Futhi abantwana bakoIsrayeli kabagcine iphasika ngesikhathi salo esimisiweyo. 
Numbers9:3 Ngosuku lwetshumi lane lwenyanga le, kusihlwa, lizaligcina ngesikhathi salo esimisiweyo; ngokwezimiso zalo zonke langokwemithetho yalo yonke liligcine." 
Numbers9:4 Ngakho uMozisi wakhuluma kubantwana bakoIsrayeli, ukuthi bagcine iphasika." 
Numbers9:5 Basebegcina iphasika ngosuku lwetshumi lane lwenyanga yakuqala, kusihlwa, enkangala yeSinayi; njengakho konke i Nkosi eyamlaya ngakho uMozisi, benza njalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers9:6 Kwakukhona-ke amadoda ayengcolile ngenxa yesidumbu, ukuthi ayengelakugcina iphasika ngalolosuku. Asondela phambi kukaMozisi laphambi kukaAroni ngalolosuku." 
Numbers9:7 Lalawomadoda asesithi kubo: Thina singcolile ngenxa yesidumbu; sivinjelelwani ukuze singanikeli umnikelo we Nkosi ngesikhathi sawo esimisiweyo, phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli?" 
Numbers9:8 UMozisi wasesithi kuwo: Manini, ukuze ngizwe ukuthi i Nkosi izalilayani." 
Numbers9:9 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers9:10 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi: Uba ngulowo lalowo phakathi kwenu loba owezizukulwana zenu ezangcola ngenxa yesidumbu, loba esekuhambeni khatshana, uzagcina iphasika e Nkosi ni." 
Numbers9:11 Ngenyanga yesibili, ngosuku lwetshumi lane, kusihlwa, bazaligcina; bazalidla lesinkwa esingelamvubelo lemibhida ebabayo." 
Numbers9:12 Kabayikutshiya lutho lwalo kuze kube sekuseni, bangephuli thambo lalo; bazaligcina ngokwezimiso zonke zephasika." 
Numbers9:13 Kodwa umuntu ohlambulukileyo, ongekho ekuhambeni, oyekela ukugcina iphasika, lowomphefumulo uzaqunywa usuke ebantwini bawo, ngoba kanikelanga umnikelo we Nkosi ngesikhathi sawo esimisiweyo; lowomuntu uzathwala isono sakhe." 
Numbers9:14 Uba-ke owemzini ehlala njengowezizwe kini agcine iphasika e Nkosi ni, ngokwesimiso sephasika langokomthetho walo, uzakwenza njalo. Kuzakuba lesimiso esisodwa kini lakowemzini lakowokuzalwa elizweni." 
Numbers9:15 Langosuku ithabhanekele elamiswa ngalo, iyezi lasibekela ithabhanekele, ithente lobufakazi; lakusihlwa kwakukhona phezu kwethabhanekele njengokubonakala komlilo kwaze kwaba sekuseni." 
Numbers9:16 Kwakunjalo isikhathi sonke: Iyezi lalisibekela, njalo kwaba lokubonakala komlilo ebusuku." 
Numbers9:17 Kwakusithi lapho iyezi liphakanyiswa lisuka phezu kwethente, langemva kwalokho abantwana bakoIsrayeli basuke; lendaweni lapho iyezi elima khona, abantwana bakoIsrayeli bamisa khona amathente abo." 
Numbers9:18 Ngokomlayo we Nkosi abantwana bakoIsrayeli basuka, langokomlayo we Nkosi bamisa amathente abo: Bahlala enkambeni insuku zonke iyezi elalihlala ngazo phezu kwethabhanekele." 
Numbers9:19 Lalapho iyezi lihlala isikhathi eside phezu kwethabhanekele insuku ezinengi, abantwana bakoIsrayeli bagcina imfanelo ye Nkosi, kabasukanga." 
Numbers9:20 Kwasekusithi lapho iyezi liphezu kwethabhanekele insuku ezinlutshwana; ngokomlayo we Nkosi bahlala enkambeni, futhi ngokomlayo we Nkosi basuka." 
Numbers9:21 Kwasekusithi lapho iyezi likhona kusukela kusihlwa kuze kube sekuseni, lapho iyezi liphakanyiswa ekuseni, basuka. Loba kusemini kumbe ebusuku, lapho iyezi liphakanyiswa basuka." 
Numbers9:22 Kumbe uba iyezi lalihlala isikhathi eside phezu kwethabhanekele okwensuku ezimbili, loba inyanga, loba umnyaka, lihlezi phezu kwalo, abantwana bakoIsrayeli bahlala enkambeni, kabasukanga. Kodwa lapho liphakanyiswa, basuka." 
Numbers9:23 Ngokomlayo we Nkosi bamisa inkamba, langokomlayo we Nkosi basuka. Bagcina imfanelo ye Nkosi ngokomlayo we Nkosi ngesandla sikaMozisi." 
Numbers10:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers10:2 Zenzele impondo ezimbili zesiliva, uzenze zibe ngumsebenzi okhandiweyo; njalo zizakuba ngezakho ekubizeni inhlangano lekusukeni kwezinkamba." 
Numbers10:3 Uba bezivuthela inhlangano yonke izabuthana kuwe emnyango wethente lenhlangano. 
Numbers10:4 Kodwa uba bevuthela olulodwa, iziphathamandla, inhloko zezinkulungwane zakoIsrayeli zizabuthana kuwe." 
Numbers10:5 Lapho lihlaba umkhosi, izinkamba ezimise ngempumalanga zizasuka." 
Numbers10:6 Lalapho lihlaba umkhosi ngokwesibili, izinkamba ezimise ngeningizimu zizasuka. Bazahlaba umkhosi ukuze zisuke." 
Numbers10:7 Kodwa ekubuthaniseni ibandla lizavuthela impondo, kodwa lingahlabi umkhosi." 
Numbers10:8 Njalo amadodana kaAroni, abapristi, azavuthela izimpondo. Zizakuba kini yisimiso esilaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu." 
Numbers10:9 Njalo lapho liphuma impi elizweni lakini ukuyakulwa lesitha esilicindezelayo, lihlabe umkhosi ngezimpondo, njalo likhunjulwe phambi kwe Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu, lisindiswe ezitheni zenu." 
Numbers10:10 Langosuku lwentokozo yenu, lemikhosini yenu emisiweyo, lekuthwaseni kwenyanga zenu, lizavuthela izimpondo phezu kweminikelo yenu yokutshiswa laphezu kwemihlatshelo yeminikelo yenu yokuthula, ukuze ibe kini yisikhumbuzo phambi kukaNkulunkulu wenu. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Numbers10:11 Kwasekusithi ngomnyaka wesibili, ngenyanga yesibili, ngolwamatshumi amabili lwenyanga, iyezi laphakanyiswa lisuka phezu kwethabhanekele lobufakazi." 
Numbers10:12 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesuka enkangala yeSinayi ngokwenhambo zabo; leyezi lema enkangala yeParani. 
Numbers10:13 Basebesuka okokuqala ngokomlayo we Nkosi ngesandla sikaMozisi. 
Numbers10:14 Kwasekusuka uphawu lwenkamba yabantwana bakoJuda kuqala ngamabutho abo; laphezu kwebutho lakhe kwakunguNashoni indodana kaAminadaba. 
Numbers10:15 Laphezu kwebutho lesizwe sabantwana bakoIsakari kwakunguNethaneli indodana kaZuwari. 
Numbers10:16 Laphezu kwebutho lesizwe sabantwana bakoZebuluni kwakunguEliyabi indodana kaHeloni. 
Numbers10:17 Ithabhanekele laselidilizwa; amadodana kaGerishoni lamadodana kaMerari asesuka, ethwele ithabhanekele." 
Numbers10:18 Kwasekusuka uphawu lwenkamba yakoRubeni ngamabutho abo; laphezu kwebutho lakhe kwakunguElizuri indodana kaShedewuri. 
Numbers10:19 Laphezu kwebutho lesizwe sabantwana bakoSimeyoni kwakunguShelumiyeli indodana kaZurishadayi. 
Numbers10:20 Laphezu kwebutho lesizwe sabantwana bakoGadi kwakunguEliyasafi indodana kaDehuweli. 
Numbers10:21 Kwasekusuka amaKohathi ethwele indlu engcwele, l abanye bamisa ithabhanekele, engakafiki." 
Numbers10:22 Kwasekusuka uphawu lwenkamba yabantwana bakoEfrayimi ngamabutho abo; laphezu kwebutho lakhe kwakunguElishama indodana kaAmihudi. 
Numbers10:23 Laphezu kwebutho lesizwe sabantwana bakoManase kwakunguGamaliyeli indodana kaPedazuri. 
Numbers10:24 Laphezu kwebutho lesizwe sabantwana bakoBhenjamini kwakunguAbidani indodana kaGideyoni. 
Numbers10:25 Kwasekusuka uphawu lwenkamba yabantwana bakoDani ngamabutho abo; babengabokucina ezinkambeni zonke; laphezu kwebutho lakhe kwakunguAhiyezeri indodana kaAmishadayi. 
Numbers10:26 Laphezu kwebutho lesizwe sabantwana bakoAsheri kwakunguPagiyeli indodana kaOkirani. 
Numbers10:27 Laphezu kwebutho lesizwe sabantwana bakoNafithali kwakunguAhira indodana kaEnani. 
Numbers10:28 Lokhu yikusuka kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli ngamabutho abo, ekusukeni kwabo." 
Numbers10:29 UMozisi wasesithi kuHobabi indodana kaRehuweli umMidiyani, uyisezala kaMozisi: Thina siyasuka siya endaweni i Nkosi eyathi ngayo: Ngizalipha yona. Hamba lathi; sizakwenzela okuhle, ngoba i Nkosi ikhulume okuhle ngoIsrayeli." 
Numbers10:30 Wasesithi kuye: Kangiyikuhamba, kodwa-ke ngizakuya elizweni lakithi lezihlotsheni zami." 
Numbers10:31 Wasesithi: Ake ungasitshiyi, ngoba uyazi lapho esingamisa khona inkamba enkangala, uzakuba ngamehlo ethu." 
Numbers10:32 Kuzakuthi-ke, uba uhamba lathi, yebo, kuzakwenzeka lokho okuhle okungakho i Nkosi ezasenzela okuhle, sizakwenzela okuhle." 
Numbers10:33 Basuka-ke entabeni ye Nkosi, uhambo lwensuku ezintathu; lomtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi wahamba phambi kwabo uhambo lwensuku ezintathu, ukuze ubadingele indawo yokuphumula." 
Numbers10:34 Leyezi le Nkosi laliphezu kwabo emini, ekusukeni kwabo enkambeni." 
Numbers10:35 Kwasekusithi ekusukeni komtshokotsho, uMozisi wathi: Vuka, Nkosi, kazichitheke-ke izitha zakho, lalabo abakuzondayo kababaleke phambi kwakho." 
Numbers10:36 Ekumisweni kwawo wathi: Buyela, Nkosi, kuzinkulungwane ezilitshumi zezinkulungwane zakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers11:1 Kwasekusithi abantu besola kwakukubi endlebeni ze Nkosi. Kwathi i Nkosi isikuzwile, ulaka lwayo lwavutha, lomlilo we Nkosi wavutha phakathi kwabo, waqothula emngceleni wenkamba." 
Numbers11:2 Abantu basebekhala kuMozisi; uMozisi wasekhuleka e Nkosi ni, lomlilo wadeda." 
Numbers11:3 Ngakho wabiza ibizo laleyondawo iTabera, ngoba umlilo we Nkosi wavutha phakathi kwabo." 
Numbers11:4 Ududu lwabantu olwaluphakathi kwabo lwaloyisa isiloyiso; ngakho labantwana bakoIsrayeli baphinde bakhala inyembezi, bathi: Ngubani ozasipha inyama ukuthi sidle?" 
Numbers11:5 Siyazikhumbula inhlanzi esasizidla ngesihle eGibhithe, amakhomane, lamakhabe, lamaliki, lesandindima, legalikhi." 
Numbers11:6 Kodwa khathesi umphefumulo wethu womile, kakulalutho ngitsho, ngaphandle kwale imana phambi kwamehlo ethu." 
Numbers11:7 Njalo imana yayinjengenhlanyelo yekoriyanderi*, lokukhangeleka kwayo kwakunjengokukhangeleka kwebedola*." 
Numbers11:8 Abantu bahambahamba bayibutha bayichola ematsheni okuchola, loba bayigiga engigeni, bayipheka ezimbizeni, benza amaqebelengwana ngayo; lokunambitheka kwayo kwakunjengokunambitheka komhluzi wamafutha." 
Numbers11:9 Lapho amazolo esehlela phezu kwenkamba ebusuku, imana yehla phezu kwawo." 
Numbers11:10 Njalo uMozisi wezwa abantu bekhala inyembezi ngokwensapho zabo, ngulowo lalowo emnyango wethente lakhe. Lolaka lwe Nkosi lwavutha kakhulu; futhi kwaba kubi emehlweni kaMozisi." 
Numbers11:11 UMozisi wasesithi e Nkosi ni: Wenzeleni okubi encekwini yakho? Njalo kungani ngingatholanga umusa emehlweni akho ukuthi ubeke umthwalo walababantu bonke phezu kwami? 
Numbers11:12 Mina ngakhulelwa yibo bonke lababantu yini? Kumbe mina ngabazala yini, ukuze uthi kimi: Basingathe esifubeni sakho, njengomlizane owesilisa esingatha umntwana omunyayo, kuze kube selizweni owalifungela oyise?" 
Numbers11:13 Ngingayithatha ngaphi inyama ukuthi ngibaphe bonke lababantu? Ngoba bayakhala inyembezi kimi besithi: Siphe inyama ukuze sidle. 
Numbers11:14 Mina kangilamandla okuthwala bonke lababantu ngedwa, ngoba kunzima kakhulu kimi." 
Numbers11:15 Uba-ke usenza njalo kimi, ake ungibulale lokungibulala, uba ngithole umusa emehlweni akho, njalo kangingaboni usizi lwami." 
Numbers11:16 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Buthela kimi amadoda angamatshumi ayisikhombisa abadala bakoIsrayeli, owaziyo ngawo ukuthi angabadala babantu lenduna zabo, uwalethe ethenteni lenhlangano ukuze eme khona lawe." 
Numbers11:17 Njalo ngizakwehla, ngikhulume lawe khona; ngizagodla okomoya ophezu kwakho ngikufake phezu kwabo; njalo bazathwala kanye lawe umthwalo wabantu, ukuze ungawuthwali wedwa." 
Numbers11:18 Tshono-ke ebantwini uthi: Zingcweliseleleni ikusasa, lizakudla inyama; ngoba likhalile inyembezi endlebeni ze Nkosi lisithi: Ngubani ozasipha inyama ukuze sidle? Ngoba kwakukuhle kithi eGibhithe. Ngakho i Nkosi izalipha inyama njalo lidle." 
Numbers11:19 Kaliyikudla usuku olulodwa, loba insuku ezimbili, loba insuku ezinhlanu, loba insuku ezilitshumi, kumbe insuku ezingamatshumi amabili," 
Numbers11:20 kuze kube yinyanga yonke, ize iphume emakhaleni enu, ilitshiphele, ngenxa yokuthi liyalile i Nkosi ephakathi kwenu, lakhala inyembezi phambi kwayo lisithi: Kanti saphumelani eGibhithe?" 
Numbers11:21 Kodwa uMozisi wathi: Abantu abahamba ngenyawo engiphakathi kwabo bazinkulungwane ezingamakhulu ayisithupha; wena-ke uthe: Ngizabanika inyama ukuze badle inyanga yonke. 
Numbers11:22 Bazahlatshelwa izimvu lezinkomo yini ukuze zibanele? Loba bazabuthelwa yini inhlanzi zonke zolwandle ukuze zibanele? 
Numbers11:23 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Isandla se Nkosi sifinyeziwe yini? Khathesi uzabona ukuthi ilizwi lami lizakwenzeka kuwe kumbe hatshi. 
Numbers11:24 UMozisi wasephuma, wabatshela abantu amazwi e Nkosi; wabutha amadoda angamatshumi ayisikhombisa ebadaleni babantu, wawamisa ehanqe ithente." 
Numbers11:25 I Nkosi yasisehla ngeyezi, yakhuluma kuye, yagodla okomoya ophezu kwakhe, yakubeka phezu kwamadoda angamatshumi ayisikhombisa, abadala. Kwasekusithi lapho uMoya ehlala phezu kwabo, baprofetha, kodwa kabakuphindanga." 
Numbers11:26 Njalo kwakusele amadoda amabili enkambeni, ibizo lenye lalinguElidadi lebizo lenye linguMedadi; loMoya wahlala phezu kwawo. Njalo ayephakathi kwalabo ababhaliweyo, kodwa kawaphumanga ukuya ethenteni, njalo aprofetha enkambeni." 
Numbers11:27 Kwagijima ijaha labika kuMozisi lathi: UElidadi loMedadi bayaprofetha enkambeni. 
Numbers11:28 UJoshuwa indodana kaNuni, inceku kaMozisi, omunye wabatsha bakhe, wasephendula wathi: Nkosi yami, Mozisi, benqabele." 
Numbers11:29 Kodwa uMozisi wathi kuye: Ulobukhwele ngenxa yami yini? Kungathi bonke abantu be Nkosi bangaba ngabaprofethi, ukuze i Nkosi ifake uMoya wayo phezu kwabo!" 
Numbers11:30 UMozisi wasezibuthela enkambeni, yena labadala bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers11:31 Kwasekusuka umoya ovela e Nkosi ni, waletha izagwaca zivela elwandle, wazehlisela phezu kwenkamba, phose uhambo losuku ngapha, njalo phose uhambo losuku ngapha, zizingelezele inkamba, njalo okungaba zingalo ezimbili phezu komhlabathi." 
Numbers11:32 Abantu basebesukuma lolosuku lonke, lobusuku bonke, losuku lonke olulandelayo, bebutha izagwaca. Lowo owayelezinlutshwana wayebuthe amahomeri* alitshumi; bazichayela zona inhlangothi zonke zenkamba." 
Numbers11:33 Inyama isesephakathi kwamazinyo abo ingakahlafunwa, intukuthelo ye Nkosi yabavuthela abantu, njalo i Nkosi yabatshaya abantu ngenhlupheko enkulu kakhulu." 
Numbers11:34 Ngakho ibizo laleyondawo lathiwa yiKibirothi-Hathava, ngoba lapho bangcwaba abantu abakhanukayo." 
Numbers11:35 Abantu basuka eKibirothi-Hathava baya eHazerothi; bahlala eHazerothi. 
Numbers12:1 UMiriyamu loAroni basebekhuluma bemelene loMozisi ngenxa yowesifazana umKushikazi owayemthethe, ngoba wayethethe umfazi umKushikazi." 
Numbers12:2 Basebesithi: Kambe, i Nkosi ikhulume ngoMozisi kuphela? Kayikhulumanga langathi? Le Nkosi yakuzwa." 
Numbers12:3 Njalo indoda uMozisi yayimnene kakhulu kulabo bonke abantu abaphezu kobuso bomhlaba. 
Numbers12:4 Khona i Nkosi yahle yathi kuMozisi lakuAroni lakuMiriyamu: Phumani lobathathu lize ethenteni lenhlangano. Baphuma-ke bona bobathathu. 
Numbers12:5 I Nkosi yasisehla isensikeni yeyezi, yema emnyango wethente, yabiza uAroni loMiriyamu; basebephuma bobabili." 
Numbers12:6 Yasisithi: Zwanini-ke amazwi ami; uba kukhona umprofethi phakathi kwenu, mina i Nkosi ngizaziveza kuye ngombono, ngikhulume laye ngephupho." 
Numbers12:7 Kodwa inceku yami uMozisi kanjalo, uthembekile endlini yami yonke." 
Numbers12:8 Ngikhuluma laye umlomo ngomlomo, langokubona, kungeyisikho ngemizekeliso; futhi ukhangela isimo se Nkosi. Ngakho kungani belingesabi ukukhuluma limelene lenceku yami uMozisi?" 
Numbers12:9 Njalo ulaka lwe Nkosi lwabavuthela; yasihamba. 
Numbers12:10 Kwathi lapho iyezi lisuka phezu kwethente, khangela, uMiriyamu wayelobulephero, emhlophe njengeliqhwa elikhithikayo. UAroni wasemkhangela uMiriyamu, khangela-ke, ulobulephero." 
Numbers12:11 UAroni wasesithi kuMozisi: Hawu nkosi yami, akungabeki isono phezu kwethu, okungaso senze ngobuthutha, lokungaso sonile." 
Numbers12:12 Ake angabi njengofileyo, othi nxa ephuma esiswini sikanina ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yenyama yakhe idliwe." 
Numbers12:13 UMozisi wasekhala e Nkosi ni esithi: Nkulunkulu, ake umelaphe, ngiyakuncenga." 
Numbers12:14 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Uba uyise ubemkhafulele lokumkhafulela ngamathe ebusweni bakhe, ubengayikuyangeka insuku eziyisikhombisa yini? Kavalelwe ngaphandle kwenkamba insuku eziyisikhombisa; lemva kwalokho emukelwe." 
Numbers12:15 UMiriyamu wasevalelwa ngaphandle kwenkamba insuku eziyisikhombisa; labantu kabasukanga, waze wemukelwa uMiriyamu." 
Numbers12:16 Lemva kwalokho abantu basuka eHazerothi, bamisa inkamba enkangala yeParani." 
Numbers13:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers13:2 Zithumele amadoda ukuthi ahlole ilizwe leKhanani engibapha lona abantwana bakoIsrayeli; uthume indoda eyodwa yaleso lalesosizwe saboyise, yonke eyinduna phakathi kwabo." 
Numbers13:3 UMozisi wawathuma-ke esuka enkangala yeParani, ngokomlayo we Nkosi; wonke lawomadoda ayezinhloko zabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers13:4 Lala ngamabizo awo; owesizwe sakoRubeni, uShamuwa indodana kaZakuri." 
Numbers13:5 Owesizwe sakoSimeyoni, uShafati indodana kaHori." 
Numbers13:6 Owesizwe sakoJuda, uKalebi indodana kaJefune." 
Numbers13:7 Owesizwe sakoIsakari, uIgali indodana kaJosefa." 
Numbers13:8 Owesizwe sakoEfrayimi, uHoseya indodana kaNuni." 
Numbers13:9 Owesizwe sakoBhenjamini, uPaliti indodana kaRafu." 
Numbers13:10 Owesizwe sakoZebuluni, uGadiyeli indodana kaSodi." 
Numbers13:11 Owesizwe sakoJosefa, owesizwe sakoManase, uGadi indodana kaSusi." 
Numbers13:12 Owesizwe sakoDani, uAmiyeli indodana kaGemali." 
Numbers13:13 Owesizwe sakoAsheri, uSethuri indodana kaMikayeli." 
Numbers13:14 Owesizwe sakoNafithali, uNabi indodana kaVofisi." 
Numbers13:15 Owesizwe sakoGadi, uGewuweli indodana kaMaki." 
Numbers13:16 La ngamabizo amadoda uMozisi awathumayo ukuhlola ilizwe. UMozisi wasembiza uHoseya indodana kaNuni ngokuthi nguJoshuwa. 
Numbers13:17 UMozisi wasewathuma ukuhlola ilizwe leKhanani, wathi kuwo: Yenyukani lapha liye eningizimu, lenyukele entabeni," 
Numbers13:18 libone ilizwe ukuthi linjani, labantu abakhileyo kulo ukuthi balamandla kumbe babuthakathaka, balutshwana kumbe banengi yini," 
Numbers13:19 lokuthi linjani ilizwe abahlala kulo, loba lihle loba libi, lokuthi injani imizi abahlala kiyo, loba izinkamba loba izinqaba," 
Numbers13:20 lokuthi ilizwe linjani, loba livundile loba lilugwadule, lokuthi lilezihlahla loba hayi. Manini isibindi, lithathe okwesithelo selizwe. Lalesisikhathi kwakuyisikhathi sezithelo zokuqala zevini." 
Numbers13:21 Basebesenyuka, balihlola ilizwe kusukela enkangala yeZini kuze kube seRehobi, ekungeneni eHamathi." 
Numbers13:22 Benyuka-ke ngeningizimu bafika eHebroni, lapho kwakulaboAhimani, uSheshayi, loTalimayi, abantwana bakaAnaki. IHebroni lakhiwa-ke iminyaka eyisikhombisa kungakabi leZowani eGibhithe." 
Numbers13:23 Basebefika esihotsheni seEshikoli; baquma khona ugatsha olulehlukuzo elilodwa lezithelo zevini, baluthwalisana ngesigodo ngababili, lokwamapomegranati* lokwemikhiwa." 
Numbers13:24 Leyondawo kwathiwa yisihotsha seEshikoli, ngenxa yehlukuzo abantwana bakoIsrayeli abaliqumayo lapho." 
Numbers13:25 Basebebuya bevela ekuhloleni ilizwe ekupheleni kwensuku ezingamatshumi amane. 
Numbers13:26 Basebehamba bafika kuMozisi lakuAroni lakunhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli enkangala yeParani, eKadeshi; basebebuyisela umbiko kubo lakunhlangano yonke, basebebatshengisa isithelo selizwe." 
Numbers13:27 Basebembikela bathi: Safika elizweni owasithuma kulo; njalo ngeqiniso, ligeleza uchago loluju; lalesi yisithelo salo." 
Numbers13:28 Kodwa-ke abantu abahlala elizweni balamandla, lemizi ibiyelwe ngemithangala, mikhulu kakhulu; njalo-ke sibone khona inzalo kaAnaki." 
Numbers13:29 AmaAmaleki akhile elizweni leningizimu; lamaHethi lamaJebusi lamaAmori akhile entabeni; lamaKhanani akhile elwandle leceleni kweJordani. 
Numbers13:30 UKalebi wasethulisa abantu phambi kukaMozisi, wathi: Asenyukeni lokwenyuka, sidle ilifa lalo, ngoba silamandla okulinqoba." 
Numbers13:31 Kodwa amadoda ayenyuke laye athi: Kasilamandla okwenyukela kulabobantu, ngoba balamandla kulathi." 
Numbers13:32 Basebeveza umbiko omubi ngelizwe ababelihlolile ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli besithi: Ilizwe esidabule kulo ukulihlola yilizwe elidla abantu abahlala kulo; labantu bonke esababona phakathi kwalo bangamadoda amade kakhulu. 
Numbers13:33 Lalapho sibone iziqhwaga, amadodana kaAnaki, avela eziqhwageni. Lemehlweni ethu sasinjengentethe, sasinjalo lemehlweni azo." 
Numbers14:1 Lenhlangano yonke yasiziphakamisa, yazwakalisa ilizwi layo; abantu basebekhala inyembezi ngalobobusuku." 
Numbers14:2 Bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebengunguna bemelene loMozisi loAroni; lenhlangano yonke yathi kubo: Kungathi ngabe safela elizweni leGibhithe, kumbe kungathi ngabe safela kule inkangala!" 
Numbers14:3 Njalo kungani i Nkosi isilethe kulelilizwe ukuthi siwe ngenkemba? Omkethu labantwanyana bethu bazakuba yimpango. Bekungebe ngcono kithi ukubuyela eGibhithe yini? 
Numbers14:4 Basebesithi omunye komunye: Asimiseni inhloko, sibuyele eGibhithe." 
Numbers14:5 UMozisi loAroni basebesithi mbo ngobuso babo phambi kwebandla lonke lenhlangano yabantwana bakoIsrayeli. 
Numbers14:6 UJoshuwa indodana kaNuni loKalebi indodana kaJefune ababengabalabo abahlola ilizwe, basebedabula izembatho zabo," 
Numbers14:7 bakhuluma kunhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli besithi: Ilizwe esadabula kulo ukuze silihlole yilizwe elihle kakhulukazi. 
Numbers14:8 Uba i Nkosi ithokoza ngathi, izasingenisa kulelilizwe, isinike lona, ilizwe eligeleza uchago loluju." 
Numbers14:9 Kuphela lingayivukeli i Nkosi; futhi lina lingesabi abantu belizwe, ngoba bayikudla kwethu. Umthunzi wabo usukile kubo; le Nkosi ilathi; lingabesabi." 
Numbers14:10 Kodwa inhlangano yonke yathi kabakhandwe ngamatshe. Inkazimulo ye Nkosi yasibonakala ethenteni lenhlangano kubo bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli. 
Numbers14:11 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Koze kube nini lababantu bengidelela? Koze kube nini bengangikholwa, ngazo zonke izibonakaliso engizenze phakathi kwabo?" 
Numbers14:12 Ngizabatshaya ngomatshayabhuqe wesifo, ngibathathele ilifa, ngikwenze ube yisizwe esikhulu lesilamandla kulabo." 
Numbers14:13 UMozisi wasesithi e Nkosi ni: Khona amaGibhithe azakuzwa; ngoba wenyuse lababantu phakathi kwawo ngamandla akho. 
Numbers14:14 Njalo azatshela abahlali balelilizwe. Bazwile ukuthi wena Nkosi uphakathi kwalababantu, ukuthi wena Nkosi ubonwa ubuso ngobuso, lokuthi iyezi lakho lima phezu kwabo, uhamba phambi kwabo usensikeni yeyezi emini lensikeni yomlilo ebusuku." 
Numbers14:15 Uba ubulala lababantu njengomuntu oyedwa, izizwe ezizwe ngendumela yakho zizakhuluma zisithi:" 
Numbers14:16 Ngoba i Nkosi yayingelakho ukungenisa lababantu elizweni eyabafungela lona, ngakho ibabulele enkangala." 
Numbers14:17 Khathesi-ke, ngiyancenga, kawabe makhulu amandla eNkosi yami, njengokutsho kwakho usithi:" 
Numbers14:18 I Nkosi iyaphuza ukuthukuthela, njalo inkulu emuseni, ithethelela ububi leziphambeko, kodwa engayikumyekela lokumyekela olecala, iphindisela ububi baboyise phezu kwabantwana kwesesithathu lesesine isizukulwana." 
Numbers14:19 Thethelela, ngiyancenga, ububi balababantu njengobukhulu bomusa wakho, lanjengalokho ubathethelele lababantu kusukela eGibhithe kuze kube khathesi." 
Numbers14:20 I Nkosi yasisithi: Sengibathethelele njengokwelizwi lakho. 
Numbers14:21 Kodwa isibili, njengalokhu ngiphila, umhlaba wonke uzagcwala ngenkazimulo ye Nkosi." 
Numbers14:22 ngoba wonke amadoda abone inkazimulo yami lezibonakaliso zami engazenza eGibhithe lenkangala, langilingileyo lezizikhathi ezilitshumi, kawezwanga ilizwi lami," 
Numbers14:23 isibili kabayikubona ilizwe engalifungela oyise; futhi kakho owalabo abangideleleyo ozalibona. 
Numbers14:24 Kodwa inceku yami uKalebi, ngoba omunye umoya ubulaye, wangilandela ngokupheleleyo; ngakho ngizamngenisa elizweni ayengene kilo; lenzalo yakhe izakudla ilifa lalo." 
Numbers14:25 (AmaAmaleki lamaKhanani ahlala-ke esigodini.) Kusasa phendukani, lisuke liziyele enkangala ngendlela yoLwandle oluBomvu." 
Numbers14:26 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni isithi: 
Numbers14:27 Koze kube nini ngila linhlangano embi, engingungunelayo? Ngizwile ukungunguna kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli abangunguna ngakho bemelene lami." 
Numbers14:28 Tshono kibo uthi: Sibili njengoba ngiphila, kutsho i Nkosi, njengalokhu likhulume endlebeni zami, ngizakwenza njalo kini." 
Numbers14:29 Izidumbu zenu zizawela enkangala le, labo bonke ababaliweyo benu, njengokwenani lonke lenu, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, lina abangingunguneleyo;" 
Numbers14:30 sibili lina kaliyikungena elizweni engiliphakamisele isandla sami ukulihlalisa kulo, ngaphandle kukaKalebi indodana kaJefune loJoshuwa indodana kaNuni." 
Numbers14:31 Kodwa abantwanyana benu elathi ngabo bazakuba yimpango, ngizabangenisa, bazalazi ilizwe elalilahlayo." 
Numbers14:32 Lina-ke, izidumbu zenu zizawela kulinkangala." 
Numbers14:33 Labantwana benu bazakuba zinzulane enkangala iminyaka engamatshumi amane, bathwale ukuphinga kwenu, izidumbu zenu zize ziphele enkangala." 
Numbers14:34 Njengokwenani lezinsuku elahlola ngazo ilizwe, insuku ezingamatshumi amane, usuku ngomnyaka, usuku ngomnyaka, lizathwala ububi benu, iminyaka engamatshumi amane, lazi ukumelana kwami lani." 
Numbers14:35 Mina Nkosi ngikhulumile. Isibili ngizakwenza lokhu kulinhlangano yonke embi ebuthene imelene lami; kulinkangala bazaphela, bafele khona." 
Numbers14:36 Njalo amadoda uMozisi awathumayo ukuhlola ilizwe, esephenduka, enza inhlangano yonke yamngungunela ngokuletha umbiko omubi mayelana lelizwe," 
Numbers14:37 lamadoda aletha umbiko omubi ngelizwe afa ngenhlupheko phambi kwe Nkosi. 
Numbers14:38 Kodwa uJoshuwa indodana kaNuni loKalebi indodana kaJefune, kulawomadoda ayeyehlola ilizwe, asala ephila." 
Numbers14:39 Njalo uMozisi wakhuluma lamazwi kubo bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli; abantu basebelila kakhulu. 
Numbers14:40 Basebevuka ekuseni kakhulu, benyukela engqongeni yentaba, besithi: Khangelani silapha, sizakwenyukela endaweni i Nkosi eyithembisileyo; ngoba sonile." 
Numbers14:41 Kodwa uMozisi wathi: Kungani-ke liseqa umlayo we Nkosi? Ngoba kakuyikuphumelela. 
Numbers14:42 Lingenyuki, ngoba i Nkosi kayikho phakathi kwenu, ukuze lingatshaywa phambi kwezitha zenu." 
Numbers14:43 Ngoba amaAmaleki lamaKhanani alapho phambi kwenu; njalo lizakuwa ngenkemba, ngoba njengoba liphendukile ekulandeleni i Nkosi, i Nkosi kayiyikuba lani." 
Numbers14:44 Kodwa ngokuziqhenya benyukela engqongeni yentaba, kodwa umtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi loMozisi kawuphumanga phakathi kwenkamba." 
Numbers14:45 AmaAmaleki asesehla, lamaKhanani ahlala kulezozintaba, abatshaya, abahlakaza kwaze kwaba seHorma." 
Numbers15:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers15:2 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Lapho lifika elizweni lokuhlala kwenu, engilinika lona," 
Numbers15:3 lisenza umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo, umnikelo wokutshiswa kumbe umhlatshelo, owokugcwalisa isithembiso, loba emnikelweni wesihle, loba emikhosini yenu emisiweyo, ukwenza uqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni, okuvela enkomeni kumbe ezimvini," 
Numbers15:4 lowo-ke onikelayo umnikelo wakhe e Nkosi ni uzasondeza umnikelo wokudla, ube yingxenye yetshumi lempuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lengxenye yesine yehini* yamafutha;" 
Numbers15:5 lewayini libe ngumnikelo wokunathwayo, ingxenye yesine yehini*, uzakulungisa lomnikelo wokutshiswa loba umhlatshelo, owewundlu elilodwa." 
Numbers15:6 Kumbe owenqama lizalungisa umnikelo wokudla, ube zingxenye ezimbili etshumini zempuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, ingxenye yesithathu yehini*;" 
Numbers15:7 lewayini libe ngumnikelo wokunathwayo, ingxenye yesithathu yehini*, uzalinikela libe liphunga elimnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Numbers15:8 Njalo nxa lilungisa ithole eliduna lenkomo libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa kumbe umhlatshelo, owokugcwalisa isithembiso, kumbe iminikelo yokuthula e Nkosi ni," 
Numbers15:9 uzanikelela-ke ithole lenkomo umnikelo wokudla, ube zingxenye ezintathu etshumini lempuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yehini*." 
Numbers15:10 Linikele iwayini libe ngumnikelo wokunathwayo, ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yehini, kube ngumnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo olephunga elimnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Numbers15:11 Kuzakwenziwa njalo ngaleyonkunzi, loba ngaleyonqama, loba ngewundlu, kumbe ngezinyane." 
Numbers15:12 Njengenani elizalilungisa, lizakwenza njalo kuleyo laleyo, ngokwenani lazo." 
Numbers15:13 Wonke owokuzalwa elizweni uzazenza njalo lezizinto, ekunikeleni umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo woqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Numbers15:14 Uba-ke owemzini ohlala njengowezizwe lani, kumbe loba ngubani ophakathi kwenu ezizukulwaneni zenu, njalo enikela umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo woqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni, njengoba lisenza uzakwenza njalo." 
Numbers15:15 Kuzakuba lesimiso sinye kini abebandla lakowemzini ohlala njengowezizwe, isimiso esilaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu; njengani uzakuba njalo owemzini phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Numbers15:16 Kuzakuba lomthetho munye lesimiso sinye kini lakowemzini ohlala lani njengowezizwe. 
Numbers15:17 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers15:18 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Ekungeneni kwenu elizweni engilisa kulo," 
Numbers15:19 kuzakuthi nxa lisidla okokudla kwelizwe, linikele umnikelo wokuphakanyiswa e Nkosi ni." 
Numbers15:20 Ngokokuqala kwenhlama yenu lizanikela iqebelengwana, kube ngumnikelo wokuphakanyiswa; njengomnikelo wokuphakanyiswa webala lokubhulela, ngokunjalo lizawuphakamisa." 
Numbers15:21 Ngokokuqala kwenhlama yenu lizanika e Nkosi ni umnikelo wokuphakanyiswa ezizukulwaneni zenu. 
Numbers15:22 Uba-ke liduha, lingenzanga yonke imilayo le i Nkosi eyikhulume kuMozisi," 
Numbers15:23 konke i Nkosi elilaye khona ngesandla sikaMozisi kusukela ngosuku i Nkosi eyalaya ngalo kusiya phambili ezizukulwaneni zenu," 
Numbers15:24 kuzakuthi-ke uba kwenziwe ngokungazi, kungekho emehlweni enhlangano, inhlangano yonke izanikela ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa, kube luqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni, lomnikelo walo wokudla, lomnikelo walo wokunathwayo njengomthetho, lezinyane lembuzi elilodwa, libe ngumnikelo wesono." 
Numbers15:25 Umpristi uzakwenzela-ke inhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli inhlawulo yokuthula, bakuthethelelwe, ngoba kuyikungazi, futhi bona bazaletha umnikelo wabo, umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo, lomnikelo wabo wesono phambi kwe Nkosi, ngenxa yesiphambeko sokungazi kwabo." 
Numbers15:26 Lenhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli izakuthethelelwa, lowemzini ohlala njengowezizwe phakathi kwabo, ngoba kubo bonke abantu kwakusekungazini." 
Numbers15:27 Uba-ke umuntu oyedwa esona ngokungazi, uzasondeza isibhuzikazi esilomnyaka owodwa, sibe ngumnikelo wesono." 
Numbers15:28 Lompristi uzawenzela lowomphefumulo owone ngokungazi inhlawulo yokuthula, lapho one ngokungazi phambi kwe Nkosi, ukumenzela inhlawulo yokuthula; uzakuthethelelwa-ke." 
Numbers15:29 Lizakuba lomlayo munye kwalowo owona ngokungazi, owokuzalwa elizweni phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, lowemzini ohlala njengowezizwe phakathi kwabo." 
Numbers15:30 Kodwa umuntu okwenza ngabomo, engowokuzalwa elizweni loba engowemzini, ethuka i Nkosi; njalo lowomuntu uzaqunywa asuke phakathi kwabantu bakibo." 
Numbers15:31 Ngoba edelele ilizwi le Nkosi, wephula umlayo wayo, lowomuntu uzaqunywa lokuqunywa; ububi bakhe buzakuba phezu kwakhe." 
Numbers15:32 Kwathi abantwana bakoIsrayeli besenkangala, bafica umuntu etheza inkuni ngosuku lwesabatha." 
Numbers15:33 Labo abamficayo etheza inkuni bamletha kuMozisi lakuAroni lakunhlangano yonke. 
Numbers15:34 Bamfaka esitokisini, ngoba kwakunga ka tshiwo ukuthi kuzakwenziwani kuye." 
Numbers15:35 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Lowomuntu kabulawe lokubulawa; inhlangano yonke izamkhanda ngamatshe ngaphandle kwenkamba. 
Numbers15:36 Lenhlangano yonke yamkhuphela ngaphandle kwenkamba, yamkhanda ngamatshe waze wafa, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Numbers15:37 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers15:38 Khuluma ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, ubatshele ukuthi bazenzele izintshaka emiphethweni yezembatho zabo, ezizukulwaneni zabo, lokuthi bafake entshakeni yomphetho intambo eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka." 
Numbers15:39 Njalo kuzakuba kini yintshaka ukuze likukhangele, likhumbule yonke imilayo ye Nkosi, liyenze, lingadingi lilandele inhliziyo yenu lilandele amehlo enu, eliphinga ngokukulandela." 
Numbers15:40 Ukuze likhumbule lenze yonke imilayo yami, libe ngcwele kuNkulunkulu wenu." 
Numbers15:41 Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu eyalikhupha elizweni leGibhithe ukuba nguNkulunkulu wenu; ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu. 
Numbers16:1 UKora indodana kaIzihari indodana kaKohathi indodana kaLevi, loDathani loAbiramu amadodana kaEliyabi, loOni indodana kaPelethi, amadodana kaRubeni, basebethatha amadoda." 
Numbers16:2 Basukuma phambi kukaMozisi, lamadoda abantwana bakoIsrayeli, abangamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amahlanu, abangabakhokheli benhlangano, abakhethiweyo bomhlangano, amadoda alebizo." 
Numbers16:3 Bahlangana bamelana loMozisi bamelana loAroni, bathi kubo: Seledlulise amalawulo! Ngoba inhlangano yonke, bonke bangcwele, le Nkosi iphakathi kwabo. Pho, liziphakamiselani phezu kwebandla le Nkosi?" 
Numbers16:4 Kwathi uMozisi esekuzwile, wathi mbo ngobuso bakhe phansi." 
Numbers16:5 Wasekhuluma kuKora lakuqembu lakhe lonke esithi: Kusisa, khona i Nkosi izatshengisa ukuthi ngubani ongowayo lokuthi ngubani ongcwele, izamsondeza kuyo, lalowo emkhethileyo izamsondeza kuyo." 
Numbers16:6 Yenzani lokhu: zithatheleni imiganu yokutshisela impepha, uKora, leqembu lakhe lonke," 
Numbers16:7 lifake kiyo umlilo, libeke kiyo impepha phambi kwe Nkosi kusasa. Kuzakuthi indoda i Nkosi eyikhethayo, yiyo engcwele. Seledlulise amalawulo, madodana kaLevi!" 
Numbers16:8 UMozisi wasesithi kuKora: Ake lizwe, madodana kaLevi;" 
Numbers16:9 kuyinto encinyane kini yini ukuthi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli ulehlukanisile lenhlangano yakoIsrayeli ukuze alisondeze kuye ukuthi lenze inkonzo yethabhanekele le Nkosi, lokuthi lime phambi kwenhlangano ukubakhonza?" 
Numbers16:10 Ukusondezile, labafowenu bonke, amadodana kaLevi, kanye lawe; selifuna lobupristi yini?" 
Numbers16:11 Ngalokho wena leqembu lakho lonke selihlangene ukumelana le Nkosi. Ngoba uAroni uyini ukuthi limngungunele? 
Numbers16:12 UMozisi wasethuma ukubiza uDathani loAbiramu, amadodana kaEliyabi. Kodwa bathi: Kasiyikwenyuka;" 
Numbers16:13 kuyinto encinyane yini ukuthi wasenyusa sivela elizweni eligeleza uchago loluju ukusibulala enkangala, kanti lawe usuzenza umbusi phezu kwethu?" 
Numbers16:14 Futhi kawusingenisanga elizweni eligeleza uchago loluju, loba ukusinika ilifa lamasimu lezivini. Amehlo ala amadoda ungawakopola yini? Asiyikwenyuka." 
Numbers16:15 UMozisi wasethukuthela kakhulu, wathi e Nkosi ni: Unganaki umnikelo wabo. Kangithathanga ubabhemi oyedwa wabo, futhi kangenzanga okubi komunye wabo." 
Numbers16:16 UMozisi wasesithi kuKora: Wena leqembu lakho lonke banini phambi kwe Nkosi, wena, labo, loAroni, kusasa;" 
Numbers16:17 Thathani, omunye lomunye umganu wakhe wokutshisela impepha, lifake kuyo impepha, liyisondeze phambi kwe Nkosi, kube ngulowo lalowo umganu wakhe wokutshisela impepha, imiganu yokutshisela impepha engamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amahlanu; lawe loAroni, ngulowo lalowo umganu wakhe wokutshisela impepha." 
Numbers16:18 Basebethatha, ngulowo lalowo umganu wakhe wokutshisela impepha, bafaka umlilo kuyo, babeka impepha kuyo, bema emnyango wethente lenhlangano, loMozisi loAroni." 
Numbers16:19 UKora wasebuthanisa inhlangano yonke ukumelana labo emnyango wethente lenhlangano. Inkazimulo ye Nkosi yasibonakala ebandleni lonke. 
Numbers16:20 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni isithi: 
Numbers16:21 Zehlukaniseni liphume phakathi kwalinhlangano ukuze ngibaqede ngokucwayiza kwelihlo. 
Numbers16:22 Basebesithi mbo ngobuso babo phansi bathi: Nkulunkulu, Nkulunkulu wemimoya yayo yonke inyama, kona umuntu oyedwa, ubusuthukuthelela inhlangano yonke yini?" 
Numbers16:23 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers16:24 Tshono enhlanganweni uthi: Yenyukani lisuke kunhlangothi zonke zomuzi kaKora, uDathani, loAbiramu." 
Numbers16:25 UMozisi wasesukuma, waya kuDathani loAbiramu, labadala bakoIsrayeli bamlandela." 
Numbers16:26 Wasekhuluma enhlanganweni esithi: Ake lisuke emathenteni alamadoda amabi, lingathinti lutho olungolwabo, hlezi liphetshulwe ezonweni zabo zonke." 
Numbers16:27 Basebesenyuka besuka emzini yaboKora, uDathani loAbiramu enhlangothini zonke; oDathani loAbiramu basebephuma, bema emnyango wamathente abo labomkabo lamadodana abo labantwanyana babo." 
Numbers16:28 UMozisi wasesithi: Ngalokhu lizakwazi ukuthi i Nkosi ingithumile ukwenza yonke limisebenzi, lokuthi kakusikho okwengqondo yami." 
Numbers16:29 Uba laba besifa njengokufa kwabantu bonke, kumbe behlelwe njengokwehlelwa kwabantu bonke, i Nkosi kayingithumanga." 
Numbers16:30 Kodwa uba i Nkosi idala into entsha, ukuthi umhlaba uvule umlomo wawo, ubaginye lakho konke okwabo, behlele esihogweni bephila, lizaqedisisa ukuthi lamadoda ayidelele i Nkosi." 
Numbers16:31 Kwasekusithi eseqedile ukukhuluma wonke lamazwi, umhlaba owawungaphansi kwabo waqhekezeka," 
Numbers16:32 lomhlaba wavula umlomo wawo, wabaginya lezindlu zabo, labo bonke abantu ababengabakaKora, lempahla yabo yonke." 
Numbers16:33 Basebetshona esihogweni bephila bona lakho konke okwabo; umhlaba wabagqibela, babhubha besuka phakathi kwebandla." 
Numbers16:34 UIsrayeli wonke owayebazingelezele wasebaleka ekukhaleni kwabo, ngoba bathi: Hlezi umhlaba usiginye." 
Numbers16:35 Kwasekuphuma umlilo e Nkosi ni, waqothula amadoda angamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amahlanu ayenikele impepha." 
Numbers16:36 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers16:37 Tshono kuEleyazare, indodana kaAroni umpristi, ukuthi athathe imiganu yokutshisela impepha phakathi kokutsha; uwuchithachithele umlilo laphayana, ngoba ingcwele." 
Numbers16:38 Imiganu yokutshisela impepha yalezizoni imelene lemiphefumulo yazo, kabayenze ibe yizicecedu ezibanzi zibe yisisibekelo selathi; ngoba bayinikele phambi kwe Nkosi, ngakho ingcwele; njalo izakuba yisibonakaliso ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers16:39 UEleyazare umpristi wasethatha imiganu yethusi yokutshisela impepha ababenikele ngayo abatshisiweyo, basebeyikhanda yaba yizicecedu zokusibekela ilathi," 
Numbers16:40 kube yisikhumbuzo ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli ukuze kungabi lowemzini, ongesuye owenzalo kaAroni, osondela ukutshisa impepha phambi kwe Nkosi, ukuze angabi njengoKora lanjengexuku lakhe, njengoba i Nkosi yakhuluma kuye ngesandla sikaMozisi." 
Numbers16:41 Kodwa kusisa inhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli yabasola oMozisi loAroni, isithi: Lina libabulele abantu be Nkosi." 
Numbers16:42 Kwasekusithi inhlangano isihlangene imelene loMozisi njalo imelene loAroni, bakhangela ethenteni lenhlangano, khangela-ke iyezi lalilisibekele lenkazimulo ye Nkosi yabonakala." 
Numbers16:43 UMozisi loAroni basebesiza ngaphambi kwethente lenhlangano. 
Numbers16:44 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers16:45 Yenyukani lisuke phakathi kwalinhlangano, ukuze ngibaqede njengokucwayiza kwelihlo. Basebesithi mbo ngobuso babo phansi." 
Numbers16:46 UMozisi wasesithi kuAroni: Thatha umganu wokutshisela impepha, ufake kuwo umlilo ovela elathini, ubeke kuwo impepha, uye ngokuphangisa enhlanganweni, ubenzele inhlawulo yokuthula; ngoba ulaka seluphumile lusuka phambi kwe Nkosi, inhlupheko i si qalisile." 
Numbers16:47 UAroni wasekuthatha njengokutsho kukaMozisi, wagijimela phakathi kwebandla, khangela-ke, inhlupheko yayisiqalisile phakathi kwabantu. Wafaka impepha, wabenzela abantu inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Numbers16:48 Wasesima phakathi kwabafileyo labaphilayo. Inhlupheko yasimiswa. 
Numbers16:49 Labafayo enhluphekweni babeyizinkulungwane ezilitshumi lane lamakhulu ayisikhombisa, ngaphandle kwalabo abafa ngendaba kaKora." 
Numbers16:50 UAroni wasebuyela kuMozisi emnyango wethente lenhlangano; lenhlupheko yayisimisiwe. 
Numbers17:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers17:2 Tshono kubantwana bakoIsrayeli, njalo uthathe induku kulowo lalowo wabo, ngokwendlu kayise, kuzo zonke iziphathamandla zabo, ngokwezindlu zaboyise, induku ezilitshumi lambili. Bhala ibizo laleyo laleyondoda endukwini yayo," 
Numbers17:3 ubhale ibizo likaAroni endukwini kaLevi. Ngoba induku eyodwa izakuba ngeyenhloko yendlu yaboyise. 
Numbers17:4 Njalo uzazibeka ethenteni lenhlangano phambi kobufakazi, lapho engizahlangana lawe khona." 
Numbers17:5 Kuzakuthi-ke induku yendoda engizayikhetha izahluma; njalo ngizathulisa kusuke kimi ukusola kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, abalisola ngakho." 
Numbers17:6 UMozisi wasekhuluma ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli; zonke-ke iziphathamandla zabo zamnika izinduku, yabanye kuleso lalesosiphathamandla, njengezindlu zaboyise, induku ezilitshumi lambili; lenduku kaAroni yayiphakathi kwenduku zazo." 
Numbers17:7 UMozisi wasezibeka induku phambi kwe Nkosi ethenteni lobufakazi. 
Numbers17:8 Kwasekusithi kusisa uMozisi wangena ethenteni lobufakazi, khangela-ke, induku kaAroni eyendlu kaLevi yayihlumile, yakhupha amahlumela, yakhahlela impoko, yathela ama-alimondi*." 
Numbers17:9 UMozisi wasezikhuphela phandle zonke induku zivela phambi kwe Nkosi, kubo bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli; basebekhangela, bathatha ngulowo lalowo induku yakhe." 
Numbers17:10 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Buyisela induku kaAroni phambi kobufakazi, igcinwe, ibe yisibonakaliso kwabahlamukayo, ukuze ususe ukusola kwabo kimi, ukuze bangafi." 
Numbers17:11 UMozisi wasesenza; njengalokho i Nkosi yamlaya, wenza njalo." 
Numbers17:12 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebekhuluma kuMozisi besithi: Khangela, siyafa, siyabhubha, sonke siyabhubha!" 
Numbers17:13 Wonke osondela lokusondela ethabhanekeleni le Nkosi uzakufa. Sizaphela ngokufa yini? 
Numbers18:1 I Nkosi yasisithi kuAroni: Wena lamadodana akho lendlu kayihlo kanye lawe lizathwala ububi bendlu engcwele; futhi wena lamadodana akho kanye lawe lizathwala ububi bobupristi benu. 
Numbers18:2 Labafowenu, isizwe sakoLevi, isizwe sikayihlo, basondeze-ke lawe ukuze bahlanganiswe lawe, bakusize. Kodwa wena lamadodana akho kanye lawe lizakuba phambi kwethente lobufakazi." 
Numbers18:3 Bazagcina umlayo wakho, lemfanelo zethente lonke; kodwa kabayikusondela ezitsheni zendlu engcwele lelathini, ukuze bangafi, labo lani." 
Numbers18:4 Bazahlanganiswa lawe, bagcine imfanelo zethente lenhlangano kuyo yonke inkonzo yethente; kodwa owemzini kayikusondela kini." 
Numbers18:5 Njalo lizagcina imfanelo zendlu engcwele lemfanelo zelathi, ukuze kungabi kusaba khona ulaka phezu kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers18:6 Mina-ke, khangelani, ngithethe abafowenu amaLevi bevela phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli. Bayisipho kini, baphiwe i Nkosi ukwenza inkonzo yethente lenhlangano." 
Numbers18:7 Ngakho wena lamadodana akho kanye lawe lizagcina ubupristi benu kuzo zonke izinto zelathi laphakathi kweveyili, likhonze. Nginike ubupristi benu bube ngumsebenzi wesipho; kodwa owemzini osondelayo uzabulawa." 
Numbers18:8 I Nkosi yasisithi kuAroni: Mina-ke, khangela, ngikunike ukuphathwa kweminikelo yami yokuphakanyiswa yazo zonke izinto ezingcwele zabantwana bakoIsrayeli; ngiziphe wena, ngenxa yokugcotshwa, lamadodana akho, ngesimiso esilaphakade." 
Numbers18:9 Lokhu kuzakuba ngokwakho okuvela ezintweni ezingcwelengcwele, zivela emlilweni; yonke iminikelo yabo, yonke iminikelo yabo yokudla, layo yonke iminikelo yabo yesono, layo yonke iminikelo yabo yecala, abazayibuyisela kimi; izakuba ngengcwelengcwele ibe ngeyakho leyamadodana akho." 
Numbers18:10 Lizakudlela engcweleni yezingcwele; wonke owesilisa uzakudla; kuzakuba ngcwele kuwe. 
Numbers18:11 Lalokhu ngokwakho: Umnikelo wokuphakanyiswa wesipho sabo, layo yonke iminikelo yokuzunguzwa yabantwana bakoIsrayeli; ngikuphe wena lamadodana akho lamadodakazi akho, ngesimiso esilaphakade. Wonke ohlambulukileyo endlini yakho uzakudla." 
Numbers18:12 Ikhethelo lonke lamafutha, lekhethelo lonke lewayini elitsha, lelamabele, lengqabutho yalezo abazazinikela e Nkosi ni, ngiziphe wena." 
Numbers18:13 Izithelo zokuqala zakho konke okuselizweni labo abazakuletha e Nkosi ni kuzakuba ngokwakho. Wonke ohlambulukileyo endlini yakho uzakudla. 
Numbers18:14 Konke okwehlukanisiweyo koIsrayeli kuzakuba ngokwakho. 
Numbers18:15 Konke okuvula isizalo, kwayo yonke inyama abakuletha e Nkosi ni, phakathi kwabantu laphakathi kwezifuyo, kuzakuba ngokwakho; kodwa izibulo lomuntu uzalihlenga lokulihlenga, lezibulo lenyamazana engcolileyo uzalihlenga." 
Numbers18:16 Lalezo ezizahlengwa uzazihlenga kusukela sezilenyanga, njengesilinganiso sakho, ngemali yamashekeli* amahlanu, ngokweshekeli lendlu engcwele, elingamagera* angamatshumi amabili." 
Numbers18:17 Kodwa izibulo lenkomo, kumbe izibulo lemvu, kumbe izibulo lembuzi, awuyikuwahlenga, angcwele. Uzafafaza igazi lawo phezu kwelathi, utshise amahwahwa awo, abe ngumnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo, kube luqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Numbers18:18 Lenyama yawo izakuba ngeyakho, njengesifuba esizunguziweyo lanjengomlenze wokunene, kuzakuba ngokwakho." 
Numbers18:19 Yonke iminikelo yokuphakanyiswa yezinto ezingcwele abantwana bakoIsrayeli abayinikela e Nkosi ni ngiyinike wena lamadodana akho lamadodakazi akho kanye lawe, ngesimiso esilaphakade. Kuyisivumelwano setswayi esilaphakade phambi kwe Nkosi kuwe lakunzalo yakho kanye lawe." 
Numbers18:20 I Nkosi yasisithi kuAroni: Kawuyikudla ilifa elizweni labo, kawuyikuba lesabelo phakathi kwabo; ngiyisabelo sakho lelifa lakho phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers18:21 Khangela-ke, nginike abantwana bakoLevi yonke ingxenye yetshumi koIsrayeli ibe yilifa, ngomsebenzi wabo abawenzayo, inkonzo yethente lenhlangano." 
Numbers18:22 Njalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli bangabe besasondela ethenteni lenhlangano ukuthwala isono lokufa. 
Numbers18:23 Kodwa amaLevi azakwenza inkonzo yethente lenhlangano, wona athwale ububi bawo. Kuzakuba yisimiso esilaphakade ezizukulwaneni zenu; laphakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli kawayikuzuza ilifa." 
Numbers18:24 Ngoba ingxenye yetshumi yabantwana bakoIsrayeli abayinikela e Nkosi ni ibe ngumnikelo wokuphakanyiswa, ngiyinike amaLevi ibe yilifa. Ngakho ngitshilo kiwo ukuthi phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli kawayikuzuza ilifa." 
Numbers18:25 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers18:26 Futhi uzakhuluma kumaLevi uthi kuwo: Nxa lithatha ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli ingxenye yetshumi engilinike yona, ivela kubo ibe yilifa lenu, lizanikela kokwayo umnikelo wokuphakanyiswa we Nkosi, ibe yingxenye yetshumi yaleyongxenye yetshumi." 
Numbers18:27 Lomnikelo wenu wokuphakanyiswa uzabalelwa lina, njengamabele ebala lokubhulela lanjengokugcwala kwesikhamelo sewayini." 
Numbers18:28 Ngalokhu lani lizanikela umnikelo wokuphakanyiswa we Nkosi kuyo yonke ingxenye yetshumi yenu eliyemukelayo ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli; lizanika kokwayo umnikelo wokuphakanyiswa we Nkosi, kuAroni umpristi." 
Numbers18:29 Kuzo zonke izipho zenu lizanikela wonke umnikelo wokuphakanyiswa we Nkosi; ekhethelweni lonke lazo, ingxenye yayo engcwelisiweyo evela kuyo." 
Numbers18:30 Futhi uzakuthi kuwo: Lapho linikela ikhethelo lazo elivela kuzo, kuzabalelwa amaLevi njengesivuno sebala lokubhulela lanjengesivuno sesikhamelo sewayini." 
Numbers18:31 Lizakudla lokho endaweni zonke, lina lendlu yenu, ngoba kungumvuzo wenu ngomsebenzi wenu ethenteni lenhlangano." 
Numbers18:32 Njalo kaliyikuthwala isono ngenxa yakho, lapho seliphakamisile ikhethelo lakho kukho; kaliyikungcolisa izinto ezingcwele zabantwana bakoIsrayeli, ukuze lingafi." 
Numbers19:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni isithi: 
Numbers19:2 Lesi yisimiso somlayo i Nkosi esimisileyo isithi: Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli ukuthi balethe kini ithokazi elibomvu elipheleleyo okungelasici kulo, okungazange kufakwe ijogwe kulo;" 
Numbers19:3 njalo lilinike uEleyazare umpristi, alikhuphele-ke ngaphandle kwenkamba, libe selihlatshwa phambi kwakhe." 
Numbers19:4 Njalo uEleyazare uzathatha okwegazi lalo ngomunwe wakhe, afafaze kasikhombisa okwegazi lalo maqondana laphambi kwethente lenhlangano." 
Numbers19:5 Lethokazi litshiswe phambi kwamehlo akhe; kutshiswe isikhumba salo lenyama yalo legazi lalo kanye lomswane walo. 
Numbers19:6 Umpristi uzathatha-ke isigodo somsedari, lehisope*, lokubomvu, akuphose phakathi kokutsha kwethokazi." 
Numbers19:7 Umpristi usezawatsha izembatho zakhe, ageze umzimba wakhe emanzini, emva kwalokho angene enkambeni, njalo umpristi abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:8 Lolitshisileyo uzawatsha izembatho zakhe emanzini, ageze umzimba wakhe emanzini, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:9 Lendoda ehlambulukileyo izabutha umlotha wethokazi, iwubeke ngaphandle kwenkamba endaweni ehlambulukileyo, ukuze ugcinelwe inhlangano yabantwana bakoIsrayeli, kube ngamanzi okwehlukanisa; kuyikuhlanjululwa kwesono." 
Numbers19:10 Lobutha umlotha wethokazi uzawatsha izembatho zakhe, abe ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe; njalo kuzakuba yisimiso esilaphakade ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli lowemzini ohlala njengowezizwe phakathi kwabo." 
Numbers19:11 Othinta ofileyo, loba yisiphi isidumbu somuntu uzakuba ngongcolileyo insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Numbers19:12 Uzazihlambulula ngawo ngosuku lwesithathu langosuku lwesikhombisa uzahlambuluka; kodwa uba engazihlambululi ngosuku lwesithathu, khona ngosuku lwesikhombisa kayikuhlambuluka." 
Numbers19:13 Loba ngubani othinta ofileyo, isidumbu somuntu osefile, angazihlambululi, ungcolisa ithabhanekele le Nkosi; lowomphefumulo uzaqunywa usuke koIsrayeli, ngoba amanzi okwehlukanisa engafafazwanga phezu kwakhe; uzakuba ngongcolileyo, lokungcola kwakhe kusekuye." 
Numbers19:14 Lo ngumlayo womuntu nxa efela ethenteni. Konke okungena ethenteni lakho konke okusethenteni kuzakuba ngokungcolileyo insuku eziyisikhombisa. 
Numbers19:15 Njalo yonke imbiza evulekileyo engelasisibekelo esibotshelwe phezulu kwayo ingcolile. 
Numbers19:16 Laye wonke othinta umuntu obuleweyo ngenkemba, endle, loba ofileyo, loba ithambo lomuntu, loba ingcwaba, uzakuba ngongcolileyo insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Numbers19:17 Ngongcolileyo bazathatha okomlotha walokho okwatshiswayo kokuhlanjululwa kwesono, njalo kuzafakwa phezu kwakho amanzi aphilayo esitsheni." 
Numbers19:18 Lendoda ehlambulukileyo izathatha ihisope*, iyigxamuze emanzini, ifafaze phezu kwethente, laphezu kwempahla yonke, laphezu kwabantu ababelapho, laphezu kowathinta ithambo, loba obuleweyo, loba ofileyo, loba ingcwaba." 
Numbers19:19 Lohlambulukileyo uzafafaza ongcolileyo ngosuku lwesithathu langosuku lwesikhombisa, njalo uzamhlambulula ngosuku lwesikhombisa; awatshe izembatho zakhe, ageze emanzini, ahlambuluke kusihlwa." 
Numbers19:20 Kodwa indoda engcolileyo, ingazihlambululi, lowomuntu uzaqunywa asuke phakathi kwebandla, ngoba engcolise indlu engcwele ye Nkosi; amanzi okwehlukanisa kawafafazwanga phezu kwakhe, ungcolile." 
Numbers19:21 Njalo kuzakuba yisimiso esilaphakade kubo, ukuthi lowo ofafaza amanzi okwehlukanisa uzawatsha izembatho zakhe; lalowo othinta amanzi okwehlukanisa uzakuba ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:22 Njalo konke akuthintayo ongcolileyo kuzakuba ngokungcolileyo; lomuntu okuthintayo uzakuba ngongcolileyo kuze kuhlwe. 
Numbers20:1 Khona abantwana bakoIsrayeli, inhlangano yonke, bafika enkangala yeZini ngenyanga yokuqala; labantu bahlala eKadeshi. UMiriyamu wasefela lapho, wangcwatshwa khona." 
Numbers20:2 Njalo kwakungelamanzi enhlangano; ngakho bahlangana bamelana loMozisi bamelana loAroni. 
Numbers20:3 Abantu baphikisana loMozisi bakhuluma besithi: Kungathi ngabe safa ekufeni kwabafowethu phambi kwe Nkosi! 
Numbers20:4 Liletheleni ibandla le Nkosi enkangala le ukuze sifele lapha, thina lezifuyo zethu?" 
Numbers20:5 Lasenyuselani sisuka eGibhithe ukusiletha kulindawo embi? Kakusiyo indawo yenhlanyelo lemikhiwa lamavini lamapomegranati*, futhi kakulamanzi okunatha." 
Numbers20:6 UMozisi loAroni basebesuka phambi kwebandla, baya emnyango wethente lenhlangano, bathi mbo ngobuso babo phansi. Inkazimulo ye Nkosi yasibonakala kubo." 
Numbers20:7 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers20:8 Thatha intonga, ubuthanise inhlangano, wena loAroni umnewenu, likhulume kulo idwala phambi kwamehlo abo, njalo lizanika amanzi alo; ngalokhu uzabakhuphela amanzi edwaleni, ukuze ulinathise ibandla lezifuyo zabo." 
Numbers20:9 UMozisi wasethatha intonga esuka phambi kwe Nkosi njengokumlaya kwayo. 
Numbers20:10 UMozisi loAroni basebebuthanisa ibandla phambi kwedwala; wasesithi kubo: Zwanini-ke, lina bahlamuki; sizalikhuphela yini amanzi edwaleni leli?" 
Numbers20:11 UMozisi wasephakamisa isandla sakhe, watshaya idwala kabili ngentonga yakhe; kwasekumpompoza amanzi amanengi, inhlangano yasinatha, lezifuyo zayo." 
Numbers20:12 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi lakuAroni: Ngoba lingangikholwanga, ukungingcwelisa emehlweni abantwana bakoIsrayeli, ngakho kaliyikungenisa ibandla leli elizweni engibanike lona." 
Numbers20:13 La ngamanzi eMeriba, lapho abantwana bakoIsrayeli abaphikisana khona le Nkosi, yasingcweliswa kubo." 
Numbers20:14 UMozisi wasethuma izithunywa enkosini yeEdoma zisuka eKadeshi wathi: Utsho njalo umfowenu uIsrayeli: Wena uyazazi zonke inkathazo ezisehleleyo," 
Numbers20:15 lokuthi obaba behlela eGibhithe, sasesihlala eGibhithe insuku ezinengi; lamaGibhithe asiphatha kubi labobaba." 
Numbers20:16 Sasesikhala e Nkosi ni, yasisizwa ilizwi lethu, yathuma ingilosi, yasikhupha eGibhithe; khangela-ke siseKadeshi, umuzi osekucineni komngcele wakho." 
Numbers20:17 Ake usiyekele sidabule elizweni lakho. Kasiyikudabula ensimini loba esivinini, futhi kasiyikunatha amanzi omthombo. Sizahamba ngomgwaqo wenkosi, kasiyikuphambukela ngakwesokunene langakwesokhohlo, size sedlule umngcele wakho." 
Numbers20:18 Kodwa uEdoma wathi kuye: Kawuyikudabula kimi, hlezi ngiphume ngenkemba ngimelane lawe." 
Numbers20:19 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesithi kuye: Sizahamba ngomgwaqo omkhulu. Uba-ke mina lezifuyo zami sinatha okwamanzi akho, sizawabhadalela; kuphela ngizadabula ngenyawo zami nje." 
Numbers20:20 Kodwa wathi: Kawuyikudabula. UEdoma wasephuma wamelana laye elabantu abanengi, langesandla esilamandla." 
Numbers20:21 Ngalokhu uEdoma wala ukuvumela uIsrayeli ukudabula emngceleni wakhe. Ngakho uIsrayeli waphambuka wasuka kuye. 
Numbers20:22 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli, inhlangano yonke, basebesuka eKadeshi, bafika entabeni yeHori." 
Numbers20:23 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi lakuAroni entabeni yeHori, emngceleni welizwe leEdoma, isithi:" 
Numbers20:24 UAroni uzabuthelwa ebantwini bakibo, ngoba kayikungena elizweni engilinike abantwana bakoIsrayeli, ngoba lahlamukela ilizwi lami emanzini eMeriba." 
Numbers20:25 Thatha uAroni loEleyazare indodana yakhe, ubenyusele entabeni yeHori," 
Numbers20:26 umhlubule uAroni izembatho zakhe, uzifake kuEleyazare indodana yakhe; ngoba uAroni uzabuthelwa kwabakibo, afele lapho." 
Numbers20:27 UMozisi wenza njengokulaya kwe Nkosi. Basebesenyukela entabeni yeHori phambi kwamehlo enhlangano yonke. 
Numbers20:28 UMozisi wasemhlubula uAroni izembatho zakhe, wazifaka kuEleyazare indodana yakhe. UAroni wasefela lapho engqongeni yentaba. UMozisi loEleyazare basebesehla entabeni." 
Numbers20:29 Lapho inhlangano yonke ibona ukuthi uAroni usephelile, balilela uAroni insuku ezingamatshumi amathathu, indlu yonke kaIsrayeli." 
Numbers21:1 Kwathi inkosi yeAradi, umKhanani, eyayihlala eningizimu, isizwa ukuthi uIsrayeli uyeza ngendlela yeAtharimi, yalwa imelene loIsrayeli yathumba abanye kubo." 
Numbers21:2 UIsrayeli wathembisa isithembiso e Nkosi ni wathi: Uba unikela lokunikela lababantu esandleni sami, ngizatshabalalisa imizi yabo." 
Numbers21:3 I Nkosi yasisizwa ilizwi likaIsrayeli, yanikela amaKhanani, wawatshabalalisa lemizi yawo; ngakho wabiza ibizo laleyondawo ngokuthi yiHorma." 
Numbers21:4 Basebesuka entabeni yeHori, ngendlela yoLwandle oluBomvu ukuze baceze ilizwe leEdoma; lomphefumulo wabantu wadinwa endleleni." 
Numbers21:5 Abantu basebekhuluma bemelene loNkulunkulu njalo bemelene loMozisi bathi: Lasenyuselani lisikhupha eGibhithe ukuze sifele enkangala? Ngoba kakulasinkwa njalo kakulamanzi, futhi umphefumulo wethu unengwa yilesisinkwa esilula." 
Numbers21:6 I Nkosi yasithuma inyoka ezilokutshisa phakathi kwabantu, zasezibaluma abantu, njalo kwafa abantu abanengi koIsrayeli." 
Numbers21:7 Ngakho abantu beza kuMozisi bathi: Sonile, ngoba sikhulume simelene le Nkosi njalo simelene lawe; khuleka e Nkosi ni ukuze isuse izinyoka kithi. UMozisi wasebakhulekela abantu." 
Numbers21:8 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Zenzele inyoka elomlilo, uyibeke esigodweni; njalo kuzakuthi wonke olunyiweyo, nxa eyikhangela, uzaphila." 
Numbers21:9 UMozisi wasesenza inyoka yethusi, wayibeka esigodweni; kwasekusithi lapho inyoka ilume loba nguwuphi umuntu, uba ekhangele inyoka yethusi, waphila." 
Numbers21:10 Njalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli basuka bamisa inkamba eObothi. 
Numbers21:11 Basuka eObothi, bamisa inkamba eIye-Abarimi enkangala emaqondana lakoMowabi lapho okuphuma khona ilanga." 
Numbers21:12 Basuka lapho, bamisa inkamba esigodini seZeredi." 
Numbers21:13 Basuka lapho, bamisa inkamba ngale kweArinoni esenkangala ephuma emingceleni yamaAmori; ngoba iArinoni lingumngcele wakoMowabi, phakathi kweMowabi lamaAmori." 
Numbers21:14 Ngakho kuthiwa egwalweni lwezimpi ze Nkosi: IWahebi eliseSufa, lezifula zeArinoni," 
Numbers21:15 leliwa lezifula elehlela endaweni yeAri, lisekele umngcele wakoMowabi." 
Numbers21:16 Basebesuka lapho baya eBeri; lo ngumthombo i Nkosi eyakhuluma ngawo kuMozisi yathi: Buthanisa abantu, ngizabanika-ke amanzi." 
Numbers21:17 Khona uIsrayeli wahlabela lingoma ethi: Mpompoza, mthombo! Hlabelelani kuwo," 
Numbers21:18 umthombo ezawugebhayo iziphathamandla, ezawugebhayo izikhulu zabantu, ngomnikumthetho, ngendondolo zazo. Basebesuka enkangala baya eMathana." 
Numbers21:19 Besuka eMathana baya eNahaliyeli; besuka eNahaliyeli baya eBamothi; 
Numbers21:20 besuka eBamothi esigodini esisemhlabeni wakoMowabi, engqongeni yePisiga ekhangele inkangala." 
Numbers21:21 UIsrayeli wasethuma izithunywa kuSihoni inkosi yamaAmori, esithi:" 
Numbers21:22 Ake ngidabule elizweni lakho; kasiyikuphambukela emasimini loba ezivinini; kasiyikunatha amanzi omthombo; sizahamba ngomgwaqo wenkosi, size sedlule imingcele yakho." 
Numbers21:23 Kodwa uSihoni kamvumelanga uIsrayeli ukudabula umngcele wakhe, kodwa uSihoni wabuthanisa bonke abantu bakhe, waphuma ukumelana loIsrayeli enkangala, wafika eJahazi, walwa emelene loIsrayeli." 
Numbers21:24 UIsrayeli wamtshaya ngobukhali benkemba, waba ngumnikazi welizwe lakhe kusukela eArinoni kuze kube seJaboki, kuze kube sebantwaneni bakoAmoni, ngoba umngcele wabantwana bakoAmoni wawuqinile." 
Numbers21:25 UIsrayeli wasethatha yonke le imizi; uIsrayeli wasehlala emizini yonke yamaAmori, eHeshiboni layo yonke imizana yalo." 
Numbers21:26 Ngoba iHeshiboni yayingumuzi kaSihoni inkosi yamaAmori, owayelwe emelene lenkosi yamandulo yakoMowabi, wayethethe ilizwe lonke layo esandleni sayo, kwaze kwafika eArinoni." 
Numbers21:27 Ngakho abasebenzisa izaga bathi: Wozani eHeshiboni! Umuzi kaSihoni kawakhiwe, umiswe." 
Numbers21:28 Ngoba umlilo waphuma eHeshiboni, ilangabi emzini kaSihoni, laqothula iAri loMowabi, amakhosi endawo eziphakemeyo zeArinoni." 
Numbers21:29 Maye kuwe, Mowabi! Selibhujisiwe, bantu bakaKemoshi! Unikele amadodana akhe aba ngababaleki, lamadodakazi akhe ekuthunjweni kuSihoni, inkosi yamaAmori." 
Numbers21:30 Sesibatshokile; iHeshiboni ibhubhile kuze kube seDiboni; sesibachithile kuze kube seNofa, efika eMedeba." 
Numbers21:31 UIsrayeli wasehlala elizweni lamaAmori. 
Numbers21:32 UMozisi wathuma ukuyahlola iJazeri; basebethumba imizana yalo, baxotsha amaAmori ayehlala khona." 
Numbers21:33 Basebephenduka, benyuka ngendlela yeBashani. UOgi inkosi yeBashani wasephuma ukumelana labo, yena labantu bakhe bonke, empini eEdreyi." 
Numbers21:34 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Ungamesabi; ngoba ngimnikele esandleni sakho, labantu bakhe bonke, lelizwe lakhe; njalo uzakwenza kuye njengokwenza kwakho kuSihoni inkosi yamaAmori owayehlala eHeshiboni." 
Numbers21:35 Basebemtshaya, lamadodana akhe, labantu bakhe bonke, akwaze kwasala ophilayo kuye. Badla ilifa lelizwe lakhe." 
Numbers22:1 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesuka, bamisa inkamba emagcekeni akoMowabi, nganeno kweJordani, eJeriko." 
Numbers22:2 UBalaki indodana kaZipori wasebona konke uIsrayeli ayekwenze kumaAmori. 
Numbers22:3 UMowabi wasesesaba kakhulu ubuso babantu, ngoba babebanengi. UMowabi wasetshaywa luvalo ngenxa yabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers22:4 UMowabi wasesithi ebadaleni beMidiyani: Khathesi lelibandla lizakhotha konke okusihanqileyo, njengenkabi ikhotha utshani bedlelo. Njalo uBalaki indodana kaZipori wayeyinkosi yakoMowabi ngalesosikhathi." 
Numbers22:5 Wasethuma izithunywa kuBalami indodana kaBeyori ePethori eliseduze lomfula welizwe labantwana babantu bakhe, ukumbiza, esithi: Khangela, abantu baphumile eGibhithe. Khangela, basibekele ubuso bomhlaba, futhi sebehlala maqondana lami." 
Numbers22:6 Khathesi-ke, ake uze, ngiqalekisela lababantu, ngoba balamandla kulami; mhlawumbe ngingaba lamandla okuthi sibatshaye, lokuthi ngibaxotshe elizweni, ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi lowo ombusisayo ubusisiwe, lalowo omqalekisayo uqalekisiwe." 
Numbers22:7 Abadala beMowabi labadala beMidiyani basebehamba belembadalo yokuvumisa esandleni sabo; bafika kuBalami, bakhuluma kuye amazwi kaBalaki." 
Numbers22:8 Wasesithi kubo: Lalani lapha lobubusuku, njalo ngizalilethela ilizwi, njengalokhu i Nkosi ezakutsho kimi. Iziphathamandla zakoMowabi zasezihlala loBalami." 
Numbers22:9 UNkulunkulu wasefika kuBalami, wathi: Ngobani lamadoda alawe?" 
Numbers22:10 UBalami wasesithi kuNkulunkulu: UBalaki, indodana kaZipori, inkosi yakoMowabi, ungithumele esithi:" 
Numbers22:11 Khangela, abantu baphumile eGibhithe basibekele ubuso bomhlaba; woza khathesi, ungiqalekisele bona; mhlawumbe ngingaba lamandla okulwa labo, ngibaxotshe." 
Numbers22:12 UNkulunkulu wasesithi kuBalami: Ungahambi labo; ungabaqalekisi labobantu, ngoba babusisiwe." 
Numbers22:13 UBalami wasevuka ekuseni, wathi kuziphathamandla zikaBalaki: Yanini elizweni lakini, ngoba i Nkosi iyala ukungivumela ukuhamba lani." 
Numbers22:14 Ngakho iziphathamandla zakoMowabi zasukuma, zaya kuBalaki, zathi: UBalami uyala ukuhamba lathi." 
Numbers22:15 UBalaki wasebuya wathuma njalo iziphathamandla, ezinengi ezidumileyo kulalezo." 
Numbers22:16 Zasezifika kuBalami zathi kuye: Utsho njalo uBalaki indodana kaZipori uthi: Ake ungavinjwa yilutho ukuza kimi. 
Numbers22:17 Ngoba ngizakuhlonipha lokukuhlonipha kakhulu, lakho konke ongitshela khona ngizakwenza. Ngakho ake uze, ngiqalekisela lababantu." 
Numbers22:18 Kodwa uBalami waphendula wathi encekwini zikaBalaki: Uba uBalaki ebezangipha indlu yakhe igcwele isiliva legolide, bengingayikweqa umlayo we Nkosi uNkulunkulu wami ukwenza okukhulu kumbe okuncinyane." 
Numbers22:19 Khathesi-ke, ake lihlale lapha lani lobubusuku, ukuze ngazi ukuthi i Nkosi izakuthini kimi futhi." 
Numbers22:20 UNkulunkulu wasesiza kuBalami ebusuku wathi kuye: Uba amadoda efika ukukubiza, sukuma uhambe lawo; kodwa kuphela lelolizwi engizalikhuluma kuwe, lona uzalenza." 
Numbers22:21 UBalami wasesukuma ekuseni, wabophela isihlalo kubabhemi wakhe, wahamba leziphathamandla zakoMowabi." 
Numbers22:22 Ulaka lukaNkulunkulu lwavutha ngoba wahamba; ingilosi ye Nkosi yayakuma endleleni ukuba yisitha esimelane laye. Njalo wayegade ubabhemi wakhe, lenceku zakhe ezimbili zilaye." 
Numbers22:23 Ubabhemi waseyibona ingilosi ye Nkosi imi endleleni, lenkemba ehwatshiweyo isesandleni sayo; lobabhemi waphambuka endleleni, wangena ensimini. UBalami wasemtshaya ubabhemi ukumphendulela endleleni." 
Numbers22:24 Ingilosi ye Nkosi yasisima endleleni eminyeneyo yezivini, umduli ngapha lomduli ngapha." 
Numbers22:25 Lapho ubabhemi ebona ingilosi ye Nkosi wazibandezela emdulini, wabandezela unyawo lukaBalami emdulini; wasemtshaya futhi." 
Numbers22:26 Ingilosi ye Nkosi yasiqhubeka, yema endaweni eminyeneyo, lapho okwakungelandlela yokuphendukela ngakwesokunene kumbe ngakwesokhohlo." 
Numbers22:27 Lapho ubabhemi ebona ingilosi ye Nkosi, walala ngaphansi kukaBalami. Ulaka lukaBalami lwaseluvutha, wasemtshaya ubabhemi ngenduku." 
Numbers22:28 I Nkosi yasivula umlomo kababhemi, wasesithi kuBalami: Ngenzeni kuwe ukuthi ungitshaye okwalezizikhathi ezintathu?" 
Numbers22:29 UBalami wasesithi kubabhemi: Ngoba ungenze inhlekisa. Kungathi ngabe kulenkemba esandleni sami, ngoba bengizakubulala khathesi." 
Numbers22:30 Ubabhemi wasesithi kuBalami: Angisuye yini ubabhemi wakho omgade kusukela ngi sengowakho kuze kube lamuhla? Ngake ngejwayela ukwenza kanje kuwe yini? Wasesithi: Hatshi. 
Numbers22:31 I Nkosi yasivula amehlo kaBalami, wasebona ingilosi ye Nkosi imi endleleni, lenkemba yayo ihwatshiwe isesandleni sayo; wakhothama wathi mbo ngobuso bakhe phansi." 
Numbers22:32 Ingilosi ye Nkosi yasisithi kuye: Umtshayeleni ubabhemi wakho okwalezizikhathi ezintathu? Khangela, mina ngiphumile ukumelana lawe, ngoba indlela yakho iphambukile kimi;" 
Numbers22:33 njalo ubabhemi wangibona, waphambuka phambi kwami lezizikhathi ezintathu. Ngaphandle kokuthi ephambukile phambi kwami, ngeqiniso khathesi ngabe ngikubulele lawe, ngamgcina yena ephila." 
Numbers22:34 UBalami wasesithi engilosini ye Nkosi: Ngonile, ngoba bengingazi ukuthi umi endleleni ukumelana lami. Ngakho-ke uba kukubi emehlweni akho, ngizabuyela futhi." 
Numbers22:35 Ingilosi ye Nkosi yasisithi kuBalami: Hamba lalawomadoda; kodwa kuphela ilizwi engizalikhuluma kuwe, yilo ozalikhuluma. UBalami wasehamba leziphathamandla zikaBalaki." 
Numbers22:36 UBalaki esezwile ukuthi uBalami uyeza, waphuma ukuyamhlangabeza emzini wakoMowabi, osemngceleni weArinoni, osekucineni komngcele." 
Numbers22:37 UBalaki wasesithi kuBalami: Kangithumanga yini lokuthuma kuwe ukukubiza? Kungani ungafikanga kimi? Isibili kangilamandla okukunika udumo yini? 
Numbers22:38 UBalami wasesithi kuBalaki: Khangela, ngifikile kuwe. Khathesi ngilamandla isibili okukhuluma loba yini na? Ilizwi uNkulunkulu alifaka emlonyeni wami, yilo engizalikhuluma." 
Numbers22:39 UBalami wasehamba loBalaki, basebefika eKiriyathi-Huzothi." 
Numbers22:40 UBalaki wasehlaba izinkabi lezimvu, wathumela kuBalami lakuziphathamandla ezazilaye." 
Numbers22:41 Kwasekusithi ekuseni uBalaki wamthatha uBalami, wamenyusela endaweni eziphakemeyo zikaBhali, ukuthi abone elapho ukucina kwabantu." 
Numbers23:1 UBalami wasesithi kuBalaki: Ngakhela lapha amalathi ayisikhombisa, ungilungisele lapha amajongosi ayisikhombisa lenqama eziyisikhombisa." 
Numbers23:2 UBalaki wenza njengokutsho kukaBalami; uBalaki loBalami basebenikela ku lelo lalelo ilathi ijongosi lenqama. 
Numbers23:3 UBalami wasesithi kuBalaki: Mana emnikelweni wakho wokutshiswa, ngizahamba mina; mhlawumbe i Nkosi izafika ukungihlangabeza; lento ezangitshengisa yona ngizakutshela. Wasesiya endaweni ephakemeyo." 
Numbers23:4 UNkulunkulu wasehlangana loBalami; wasesithi kuye: Sengilungise amalathi ayisikhombisa, nganikela ku lelo lalelo ilathi ijongosi lenqama." 
Numbers23:5 I Nkosi yasifaka ilizwi emlonyeni kaBalami, yathi: Buyela kuBalaki, ukhulume kanje." 
Numbers23:6 Wasebuyela kuye, khangela-ke, wayemi emnikelweni wakhe wokutshiswa, yena lazo zonke iziphathamandla zakoMowabi." 
Numbers23:7 Wasephakamisa umzekeliso wakhe, wathi: UBalaki, inkosi yakoMowabi, ungilandile eSiriya, ezintabeni zempumalanga wathi: Woza, ungiqalekisele uJakobe, woza, umthuke uIsrayeli." 
Numbers23:8 Ngingamqalekisa njani uNkulunkulu anga m qalekisiyo? Kumbe ngingamthuka njani i Nkosi enga m thukanga? 
Numbers23:9 Ngoba ngisengqongeni yamadwala ngiyambona, ngisemaqaqeni ngiyamkhangela. Khangela, abantu bazahlala bodwa, kabayikubalelwa phakathi kwezizwe." 
Numbers23:10 Ngubani ongabala uthuli lukaJakobe, lenani lengxenye yesine kaIsrayeli? Umphefumulo wami kawufe ukufa kwabalungileyo, lokuphela kwami kube njengokwakhe!" 
Numbers23:11 UBalaki wasesithi kuBalami: Wenzeni kimi? Ngikuthethe ukuze uqalekise izitha zami, kodwa khangela, u zi busisile loku zi busisa." 
Numbers23:12 Wasephendula wathi: Lokho i Nkosi ekufaka emlonyeni wami, kakumelanga ngiqaphele yini ukukukhuluma?" 
Numbers23:13 UBalaki wasesithi kuye: Ake uze lami siye kwenye indawo lapho ozababona khona; uzabona ukucina kwabo kuphela, ungaboni bonke; njalo ungiqalekisele bona ulapho." 
Numbers23:14 Njalo wamthatha wamusa ensimini yeZofimu, engqongeni yePisiga; wakha amalathi ayisikhombisa, wanikela ijongosi lenqama phezu kwa lelo lalelo ilathi." 
Numbers23:15 Wasesithi kuBalaki: Mana lapha emnikelweni wakho wokutshiswa, njalo mina ngizahlangana layo laphayana." 
Numbers23:16 I Nkosi yasihlangana loBalami, yafaka ilizwi emlonyeni wakhe, yathi: Buyela kuBalaki, ukhulume kanje." 
Numbers23:17 Esefikile kuye, khangela-ke wema emnikelweni wakhe wokutshiswa leziphathamandla zakoMowabi zilaye. UBalaki wasesithi kuye: I Nkosi itheni?" 
Numbers23:18 Wasephakamisa umfanekiso wakhe wathi: Sukuma, Balaki, uzwe, ubeke indlebe, ndodana kaZipori." 
Numbers23:19 UNkulunkulu kasumuntu ukuthi aqambe amanga, loba indodana yomuntu ukuthi azisole. Utshilo, kanti kayikukwenza? Kumbe ukhulumile, kanti kayikukumisa?" 
Numbers23:20 Khangela, ngemukele ukuthi ngibusise; yebo, ubusisile, njalo ngingeke ngikuguqule." 
Numbers23:21 Kakhangelanga ububi kuJakobe, kabonanga isiphambeko kuIsrayeli. I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakhe ilaye, lesimemezelo senkosi siphakathi kwakhe." 
Numbers23:22 UNkulunkulu wabakhupha eGibhithe, ulokunjengamandla enyathi." 
Numbers23:23 Isibili kakulamlingo ongamelana loJakobe, loba ukuvumisa okungamelana loIsrayeli. Ngalesisikhathi kuzatshiwo ngoJakobe langoIsrayeli ukuthi uNkulunkulu akwenzileyo!" 
Numbers23:24 Khangela, abantu bazasukuma njengesilwane esisikazi, bazisukumise njengesilwane; kabalali baze badle impango, njalo banathe igazi lababuleweyo." 
Numbers23:25 UBalaki wasesithi kuBalami: Futhi ungabaqalekisi lokubaqalekisa, njalo ungababusisi lokubabusisa." 
Numbers23:26 Kodwa uBalami waphendula wathi kuBalaki: Kangikutshelanga yini ngisithi: Konke i Nkosi ekutshoyo, lokhu ngizakwenza?" 
Numbers23:27 UBalaki wasesithi kuBalami: Ake uze, ngizakusa kwenye indawo; mhlawumbe kungaqonda emehlweni kaNkulunkulu ukuthi ungiqalekisele bona ulapho." 
Numbers23:28 UBalaki wamthatha wamusa uBalami engqongeni yePeyori ekhangele ngasenkangala. 
Numbers23:29 UBalami wasesithi kuBalaki: Ngakhela lapha amalathi ayisikhombisa, ungilungisele lapha amajongosi ayisikhombisa lenqama eziyisikhombisa." 
Numbers23:30 UBalaki wasesenza njengokutsho kukaBalami, wanikela ijongosi lenqama ku lelo lalelo ilathi." 
Numbers24:1 UBalami esebonile ukuthi kuhle emehlweni e Nkosi ukubusisa uIsrayeli, kahambanga njengezinye izikhathi ukuyadinga imilingo; kodwa wakhangelisa ubuso bakhe enkangala." 
Numbers24:2 Kwathi uBalami ephakamisa amehlo akhe, wabona uIsrayeli ehlezi ngokwezizwe zakhe, loMoya kaNkulunkulu wayephezu kwakhe." 
Numbers24:3 Wasephakamisa umfanekiso wakhe wathi: UBalami indodana kaBeyori uthi, lendoda elamehlo avulekileyo ithi," 
Numbers24:4 uthi ozwayo amazwi kaNkulunkulu, obonayo umbono kaSomandla, esiwa, njalo kuvuleke amehlo." 
Numbers24:5 Mahle kangakanani amathente akho, Jakobe, amakhaya akho, Israyeli!" 
Numbers24:6 Njengezigodi zisabalele, njengezivande ngasemfuleni, njengezinhlaba i Nkosi ezihlanyeleyo, njengezihlahla zomsedari ngasemanzini!" 
Numbers24:7 Amanzi azageleza evela embizeni zakhe, lenhlanyelo yakhe izakuba semanzini amanengi, lenkosi yakhe izakuba nkulu kuloAgagi, lombuso wakhe uzaphakama." 
Numbers24:8 UNkulunkulu wamkhupha eGibhithe, ulokunjengamandla enyathi, uzakudla izizwe, izitha zakhe, njalo uzakwephula amathambo azo, njalo azitshoke ngemitshoko yakhe." 
Numbers24:9 Waqutha, walala phansi njengesilwane, lanjengesilwane esisikazi; ngubani ozamvusa? Okubusisayo abusiswe, lokuqalekisayo aqalekiswe!" 
Numbers24:10 Njalo ulaka lukaBalaki lwavuthela uBalami, waqakeza izandla zakhe, uBalaki wasesithi kuBalami: Ngikubize ukuze uqalekise izitha zami, kodwa khangela, uzibusisile lokuzibusisa okwalezizikhathi ezintathu." 
Numbers24:11 Khathesi-ke zibalekele uye endaweni yakho. Bengithe ngizakuhlonipha ngodumo, kodwa khangela, i Nkosi ikuvimbile kudumo." 
Numbers24:12 UBalami wasesithi kuBalaki: Kangikhulumanga yini lakuzithunywa obuzithume kimi ngisithi: 
Numbers24:13 Uba uBalaki ebezangipha indlu yakhe igcwele isiliva legolide, bengingayikweqa umlayo we Nkosi, ukwenza okuhle kumbe okubi okwenhliziyo yami; lokho i Nkosi ekutshoyo yilokho engizakukhuluma?" 
Numbers24:14 Khathesi-ke, khangela, ngiya ebantwini bakithi; woza ngikutshele ukuthi lababantu bazakwenzani ebantwini bakini ensukwini zokucina." 
Numbers24:15 Wasephakamisa umfanekiso wakhe wathi: UBalami indodana kaBeyori uthi, lendoda elamehlo avulekileyo ithi," 
Numbers24:16 uthi ozwayo amazwi kaNkulunkulu, lowazi ulwazi loPhezukonke, obonayo umbono kaSomandla, esiwa, njalo kuvuleke amehlo." 
Numbers24:17 Ngizambona, kodwa hatshi khathesi, ngizamkhangela, kodwa kungeseduze; kuzavela inkanyezi kuJakobe, lentonga yobukhosi izavuka koIsrayeli, itshaye amagumbi akoMowabi, njalo ichithe bonke abantwana bakaShethi." 
Numbers24:18 Njalo uEdoma uzakuba yimfuyo, loSeyiri abe yimfuyo yezitha zakhe, kodwa uIsrayeli uzakwenza ngobuqhawe," 
Numbers24:19 kuzavela-ke koJakobe umbusi, njalo uzabhubhisa oseleyo emzini." 
Numbers24:20 Esebone uAmaleki, waphakamisa umfanekiso wakhe wathi: UAmaleki wayengowokuqala wezizwe, kodwa ukucina kwakhe kuyikubhubha okwesikhathi sonke." 
Numbers24:21 Esebone amaKeni, waphakamisa umfanekiso wakhe wathi: Iqinile indlu yakho, isidleke sakho usimise edwaleni." 
Numbers24:22 Kanti-ke uKhayini uzachithwa, aze akuthumbe uAshuri." 
Numbers24:23 Wasephakamisa umfanekiso wakhe wathi: Maye, ngubani ozaphila nxa uNkulunkulu esenza lokhu?" 
Numbers24:24 Imikhumbi izavela ekhunjini lweKitimi, ihluphe uAshuri, ihluphe uEberi; njalo laye uzabhubha okwesikhathi sonke." 
Numbers24:25 UBalami wasesukuma wahamba wabuyela endaweni yakhe; loBalaki laye wahamba ngendlela yakhe. 
Numbers25:1 UIsrayeli wasehlala eShithimi. Abantu basebeqala ukuphinga lamadodakazi akoMowabi. 
Numbers25:2 Asebabizela abantu emihlatshelweni yabonkulunkulu bawo, labantu badla, bakhothamela onkulunkulu bawo." 
Numbers25:3 UIsrayeli wasezihlanganisa loBhali-Peyori; lolaka lwe Nkosi lwamvuthela uIsrayeli. 
Numbers25:4 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Thatha zonke inhloko zabantu, uziphanyeke phambi kwe Nkosi maqondana lelanga, ukuze ulaka lwe Nkosi oluvuthayo lubuye lusuke koIsrayeli." 
Numbers25:5 UMozisi wasesithi kubahluleli bakoIsrayeli: Bulalani, kube ngulowo lalowo amadoda akhe ababezihlanganise loBhali-Peyori." 
Numbers25:6 Khangela-ke, umuntu wabantwana bakoIsrayeli weza waletha kubafowabo umMidiyanikazi phambi kwamehlo kaMozisi laphambi kwamehlo enhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli, besakhala inyembezi emnyango wethente lenhlangano." 
Numbers25:7 Kwathi uPhinehasi, indodana kaEleyazare, indodana kaAroni umpristi, ekubona, wasukuma ephuma phakathi kwenhlangano, wathatha umkhonto esandleni sakhe," 
Numbers25:8 waseyilandela indoda yakoIsrayeli ethenteni, wabagwaza bobabili, indoda yakoIsrayeli lowesifazana esiswini sakhe. Yasimiswa inhlupheko kubantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers25:9 Lalabo abafayo ngenhlupheko babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
Numbers25:10 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers25:11 UPhinehasi, indodana kaEleyazare indodana kaAroni umpristi, uphendule ulaka lwami lusuka ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, ngoba wayelobukhwele ngobukhwele bami phakathi kwabo; ngakho kangibaqothulanga abantwana bakoIsrayeli ngobukhwele bami."
