Numbers25:12 Ngakho utsho: Khangela, ngiyamnika isivumelwano sami sokuthula." 
Numbers25:13 Njalo uzakuba laso, lenzalo yakhe emva kwakhe, isivumelwano sobupristi obulaphakade, ngenxa yokuthi elobukhwele ngoNkulunkulu wakhe, wabenzela abantwana bakoIsrayeli inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Numbers25:14 Lebizo lendoda yakoIsrayeli eyatshaywayo, eyatshaywa kanye lomMidiyanikazi, lalinguZimri indodana kaSalu, isiphathamandla sendlu kayise phakathi kwabakoSimeyoni." 
Numbers25:15 Ibizo lowesifazana owatshaywayo, umMidiyanikazi, lalinguKozibi indodakazi kaZuri, owayeyinhloko yesizwe sendlu kayise eMidiyani." 
Numbers25:16 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers25:17 Phathani amaMidiyani njengezitha, liwatshaye;" 
Numbers25:18 ngoba aliphethe njengezitha ngobuqili bawo, alikhohlisa ngodaba lukaPeyori langodaba lukaKozibi, indodakazi yesiphathamandla seMidiyani, udadewabo, owatshaywa ngosuku lwenhlupheko ngenxa yodaba lukaPeyori." 
Numbers26:1 Kwathi emva kwenhlupheko i Nkosi yakhuluma kuMozisi lakuEleyazare indodana kaAroni umpristi, isithi:" 
Numbers26:2 Thathani inani lonke lenhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, ngezindlu zaboyise, bonke abaphuma ukuya ebuthweni koIsrayeli." 
Numbers26:3 UMozisi loEleyazare umpristi basebekhuluma labo emagcekeni akoMowabi, eJordani eJeriko, besithi:" 
Numbers26:4 Babale kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi labantwana bakoIsrayeli abaphuma elizweni leGibhithe." 
Numbers26:5 URubeni, izibulo likaIsrayeli. Amadodana kaRubeni: UHanoki, okwavela kuye usendo lwabakoHanoki; koPalu, usendo lwabakoPalu;" 
Numbers26:6 koHezironi, usendo lwabakoHezironi; koKarimi, usendo lwabakoKarimi." 
Numbers26:7 Lezi zinsendo zabakoRubeni; lalabo ababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lantathu lamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi amathathu. 
Numbers26:8 Lamadodana kaPalu; uEliyabi. 
Numbers26:9 Lamadodana kaEliyabi; oNemuweli loDathani loAbiramu. Yibo oDathani loAbiramu, ababizwa yinhlangano, abaphikisana loMozisi loAroni, eqenjini likaKora, lapho bephikisana le Nkosi." 
Numbers26:10 Lomhlaba wavula umlomo wawo, wabaginya loKora ekufeni kwaleloqembu, lapho umlilo waqothula amadoda angamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amahlanu; asesiba yisibonelo." 
Numbers26:11 Kodwa abantwana bakaKora kabafanga. 
Numbers26:12 Amadodana kaSimeyoni ngensendo zawo: KoNemuweli, usendo lwabakoNemuweli; koJamini, usendo lwabakoJamini; koJakini, usendo lwabakoJakini;" 
Numbers26:13 koZera, usendo lwabakoZera; koShawuli, usendo lwabakoShawuli." 
Numbers26:14 Lezi zinsendo zabakoSimeyoni; izinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lambili lamakhulu amabili. 
Numbers26:15 Amadodana kaGadi ngensendo zawo: KoZefoni, usendo lwabakoZefoni; koHagi, usendo lwabakoHagi; koShuni, usendo lwabakoShuni;" 
Numbers26:16 koOzini, usendo lwabakoOzini; koEri, usendo lwabakoEri;" 
Numbers26:17 koArodi, usendo lwabakoArodi; koAreli, usendo lwabakoAreli." 
Numbers26:18 Lezi zinsendo zamadodana kaGadi, njengababaliweyo babo, inkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lamakhulu amahlanu." 
Numbers26:19 Amadodana kaJuda ayengoEri loOnani; oEri loOnani basebefela elizweni leKhanani. 
Numbers26:20 Njalo amadodana kaJuda ngensendo zawo yila: KoShela, usendo lwabakoShela; koPerezi, usendo lwabakoPerezi; koZera, usendo lwabakoZera." 
Numbers26:21 Lamadodana kaPerezi yila: KoHezironi, usendo lwabakoHezironi; koHamuli, usendo lwabakoHamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Lezi zinsendo zikaJuda, njengababaliweyo babo, inkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisikhombisa lesithupha lamakhulu amahlanu." 
Numbers26:23 Amadodana kaIsakari ngensendo zawo: K oThola, usendo lwabakoThola; koPhuwa, usendo lwabakoPhuwa;" 
Numbers26:24 koJashubi, usendo lwabakoJashubi; koShimroni, usendo lwabakoShimroni." 
Numbers26:25 Lezi zinsendo zikaIsakari, njengababaliweyo babo, inkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisithupha lane lamakhulu amathathu." 
Numbers26:26 Amadodana kaZebuluni ngensendo zawo: KoSeredi, usendo lwabakoSeredi; koEloni, usendo lwabakoEloni; koJaleli, usendo lwabakoJaleli." 
Numbers26:27 Lezi zinsendo zabakoZebuloni, njengababaliweyo babo, inkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisithupha lamakhulu amahlanu." 
Numbers26:28 Amadodana kaJosefa ngensendo zawo ayengoManase loEfrayimi. 
Numbers26:29 Amadodana kaManase: KoMakiri, usendo lwabakoMakiri; uMakiri wasezala uGileyadi; koGileyadi, usendo lwabakoGileyadi." 
Numbers26:30 La ngamadodana kaGileyadi: K oIyezeri, usendo lwabakoIyezeri; koHeleki, usendo lwabakoHeleki;" 
Numbers26:31 la ko Asiriyeli, usendo lwabakoAsiriyeli; la ko Shekema, usendo lwabakoShekema;" 
Numbers26:32 la ko Shemida, usendo lwabakoShemida; la ko Heferi, usendo lwabakoHeferi." 
Numbers26:33 Njalo uZelofehadi indodana kaHeferi wayengelamadodana, kodwa amadodakazi. Lamabizo amadodakazi kaZelofehadi ayengoMahla, loNowa, uHogila, uMilka, loTiriza." 
Numbers26:34 Lezi zinsendo zikaManase, lababaliweyo babo, inkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu lambili lamakhulu ayisikhombisa." 
Numbers26:35 La ngamadodana kaEfrayimi ngensendo zawo: KoShuthela, usendo lwabakoShuthela; koBekeri, usendo lwabakoBekeri; koTahani, usendo lwabakoTahani." 
Numbers26:36 Lala ngamadodana kaShuthela: KoErani, usendo lwabakoErani." 
Numbers26:37 Lezi zinsendo zamadodana kaEfrayimi, njengababaliweyo babo, inkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lambili lamakhulu amahlanu. La ngamadodana kaJosefa ngensendo zawo." 
Numbers26:38 Amadodana kaBhenjamini ngensendo zawo: KoBhela, usendo lwabakoBhela; koAshibeli, usendo lwabakoAshibeli; koAhiramu, usendo lwabakoAhiramu;" 
Numbers26:39 koShefufamu, usendo lwabakoShefufamu; koHufamu, usendo lwabakoHufamu." 
Numbers26:40 Lamadodana kaBhela ayenguAridi loNamani: KoAridi, usendo lwabakoAridi; koNamani, usendo lwabakoNamani." 
Numbers26:41 La ngamadodana kaBhenjamini ngensendo zawo; lababaliweyo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lanhlanu lamakhulu ayisithupha. 
Numbers26:42 La ngamadodana kaDani ngensendo zawo: KoShuhamu, usendo lwabakoShuhamu. Lezi zinsendo zikaDani ngensendo zazo." 
Numbers26:43 Zonke insendo zabakoShuhamu, njengababaliweyo babo, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisithupha lane lamakhulu amane." 
Numbers26:44 Amadodana kaAsheri ngensendo zawo: KoJimna, usendo lwabakoJimna; koIshivi, usendo lwabakoIshivi; koBeriya, usendo lwabakoBeriya." 
Numbers26:45 Kumadodana kaBeriya: KoHeberi, usendo lwabakoHeberi; koMalikiyeli, usendo lwabakoMalikiyeli." 
Numbers26:46 Lebizo lendodakazi kaAsheri lalinguSera. 
Numbers26:47 Lezi zinsendo zamadodana kaAsheri, njengababaliweyo babo; inkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu lantathu lamakhulu amane." 
Numbers26:48 Amadodana kaNafithali ngensendo zawo: KoJazeli, usendo lwabakoJazeli; koGuni, usendo lwabakoGuni;" 
Numbers26:49 koJezeri, usendo lwabakoJezeri; koShilema, usendo lwabakoShilema." 
Numbers26:50 Lezi zinsendo zikaNafithali ngensendo zazo; lababaliweyo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lanhlanu lamakhulu amane. 
Numbers26:51 Laba ngababaliweyo babantwana bakoIsrayeli, inkulungwane ezingamakhulu ayisithupha lanye lamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi amathathu." 
Numbers26:52 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers26:53 Kulaba ilizwe lizakwehlukaniswa libe yilifa njengenani lamabizo. 
Numbers26:54 Kwabanengi uzakwengeza ilifa labo, lakwabalutshwana uzanciphisa ilifa labo; ngulowo lalowo uzanikwa ilifa lakhe njengababaliweyo bakhe." 
Numbers26:55 Loba kunjalo ilizwe lizakwehlukaniswa ngenkatho; ngokwamabizo ezizwe zaboyise bazalidla ilifa. 
Numbers26:56 Ngokwenkatho ilifa lalo lizakwehlukaniswa phakathi kwabanengi labalutshwana. 
Numbers26:57 Lalaba ngababalwayo bamaLevi ngensendo zawo; koGerishoni, usendo lwabakoGerishoni; koKohathi, usendo lwabakoKohathi; koMerari, usendo lwabakoMerari." 
Numbers26:58 Laba zinsendo zabakoLevi; usendo lwabakoLibini, usendo lwabakoHebroni, usendo lwabakoMahli, usendo lwabakoMushi, usendo lwabakoKora. UKohathi wasezala uAmramu." 
Numbers26:59 Lebizo lomkaAmramu lalinguJokebedi, indodakazi kaLevi, unina owamzalela uLevi eGibhithe; njalo wamzalela uAmramu oAroni loMozisi loMiriyamu udadewabo." 
Numbers26:60 UAroni wazalelwa uNadabi loAbihu, uEleyazare loIthamari." 
Numbers26:61 Kodwa uNadabi loAbihu bafa lapho banikela umlilo ongejwayelekanga phambi kwe Nkosi. 
Numbers26:62 Lababalwayo babo babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lantathu, bonke abesilisa kusukela kolenyanga kusiya phezulu; ngoba babengabalelwanga phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, ngoba babenganikwanga ilifa phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers26:63 Laba ngababalwa nguMozisi loEleyazare umpristi, ababala abantwana bakoIsrayeli emagcekeni akoMowabi eJordani eJeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Kodwa phakathi kwalabo kwakungekho muntu wababalwayo nguMozisi loAroni umpristi, lapho bebala abantwana bakoIsrayeli enkangala yeSinayi;" 
Numbers26:65 ngoba i Nkosi yayithe ngabo: Bazakufa lokufa enkangala. Njalo kakusalanga muntu kubo ngaphandle kukaKalebi indodana kaJefune, loJoshuwa indodana kaNuni." 
Numbers27:1 Kwasekusondela amadodakazi kaZelofehadi indodana kaHeferi indodana kaGileyadi indodana kaMakiri indodana kaManase owensendo zikaManase indodana kaJosefa; njalo la ngamabizo amadodakazi akhe: UMahla, uNowa, loHogila, loMilka, loTiriza." 
Numbers27:2 Asesima phambi kukaMozisi, laphambi kukaEleyazare umpristi, laphambi kweziphathamandla, lenhlangano yonke, emnyango wethente lenhlangano, esithi:" 
Numbers27:3 Ubaba wafela enkangala; kodwa yena wayengekho phakathi kweqembu lalabo ababuthana ukumelana le Nkosi, eqenjini likaKora, kodwa wafa esonweni sakhe, wayengelamadodana." 
Numbers27:4 Kungani ibizo likababa likhutshwe phakathi kosendo lwakhe ngoba engelandodana? Siphe ilifa phakathi kwabafowabo bakababa. 
Numbers27:5 UMozisi waseluletha udaba lwawo phambi kwe Nkosi. 
Numbers27:6 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers27:7 Amadodakazi kaZelofehadi akhulume iqiniso; uzawanika lokuwanika isabelo selifa phakathi kwabafowabo bakayise; uzadlulisela kuwo ilifa likayise. 
Numbers27:8 Njalo uzakhuluma ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli usithi: Uba indoda isifa, ingelandodana, lizadlulisela ilifa layo kundodakazi yayo." 
Numbers27:9 Njalo uba ingelandodakazi, lizanika abafowabo ilifa layo." 
Numbers27:10 Uba-ke ingelabafowabo, lizanika ilifa layo kubafowabo bakayise." 
Numbers27:11 Njalo uba uyise engelabafowabo, lizanika ilifa layo esihlotsheni sayo esiseduze layo sosendo lwayo, silidle. Njalo kuzakuba yisimiso sesahlulelo ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Numbers27:12 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Yenyukela kule intaba yeAbarimi, ubone ilizwe engilinike abantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers27:13 Lapho usulibonile, lawe uzabuthelwa ebantwini bakini, njengoAroni umnewenu wabuthwa;" 
Numbers27:14 njengokuba lavukela umlayo wami enkangala yeZini, ekuphikisaneni kwenhlangano, ukungingcwelisa phambi kwamehlo abo. La ngamanzi eMeriba eKadeshi enkangala yeZini." 
Numbers27:15 UMozisi wasekhuluma e Nkosi ni esithi: 
Numbers27:16 I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wemimoya yenyama yonke, kayimise indoda enhlanganweni," 
Numbers27:17 engaphuma phambi kwabo, lengangena phambi kwabo, lengabakhokhela baphume, lengabangenisa, ukuze inhlangano ye Nkosi ingabi njengezimvu ezingelamelusi." 
Numbers27:18 I Nkosi yasisithi kuMozisi: Zithathele uJoshuwa indodana kaNuni, indoda okukuyo umoya, ubeke isandla sakho phezu kwayo," 
Numbers27:19 uyimise phambi kukaEleyazare umpristi laphambi kwenhlangano yonke, uyilaye phambi kwamehlo abo," 
Numbers27:20 ubusubeka okodumo lwakho phezu kwayo, ukuze inhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli ilalele." 
Numbers27:21 Njalo izakuma phambi kukaEleyazare umpristi ozayibuzela njengokwesahlulelo sikaUrimi phambi kwe Nkosi; ngomlomo wayo bazaphuma, langomlomo wayo bazangena, yona labantwana bonke bakoIsrayeli kanye layo, ngitsho inhlangano yonke." 
Numbers27:22 UMozisi wasesenza njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuye. Wathatha uJoshuwa, wammisa phambi kukaEleyazare umpristi laphambi kwenhlangano yonke," 
Numbers27:23 wabeka izandla zakhe phezu kwakhe, wamlaya, njengokukhuluma kwe Nkosi ngesandla sikaMozisi." 
Numbers28:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers28:2 Laya abantwana bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Umnikelo wami, isinkwa sami seminikelo eyenziwe ngomlilo, uqhatshi lwami olumnandi, lizakuqaphela ukukunikela kimi ngesikhathi sakho esimisiweyo." 
Numbers28:3 Uzakuthi kibo: Lo ngumnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo elizawunikela e Nkosi ni; amawundlu amabili alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici, insuku ngensuku, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa njalonjalo." 
Numbers28:4 Elinye iwundlu uzalinikela ekuseni, lelinye iwundlu ulinikele kusihlwa," 
Numbers28:5 lengxenye yetshumi ye-efa* lempuphu ecolekileyo ibe ngumnikelo wokudla, ixubene lengxenye yesine yehini* yamafutha agigiweyo." 
Numbers28:6 Kungumnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke owamiswa entabeni yeSinayi, ube luqhatshi olumnandi, umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Numbers28:7 Lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo uzakuba yingxenye yesine yehini ngewundlu linye; uzathululela e Nkosi ni umnikelo wokunathwayo ongo wokunathwayo okulamandla endaweni engcwele. 
Numbers28:8 Lelinye iwundlu uzalinikela kusihlwa; njengomnikelo wokudla wekuseni, lanjengomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo uzalinikela, umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo, oloqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni." 
Numbers28:9 Langosuku lwesabatha amawundlu amabili, alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici, lengxenye ezimbili zetshumi lempuphu ecolekileyo, kube ngumnikelo wokudla, ixubene lamafutha, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo;" 
Numbers28:10 kungumnikelo wokutshiswa wamasabatha wonke, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo." 
Numbers28:11 Ekuqaleni kwenyanga zenu lizanikela umnikelo wokutshiswa e Nkosi ni, amajongosi amabili amathole enkomo, lenqama eyodwa, lamawundlu ayisikhombisa alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici," 
Numbers28:12 lengxenye ezintathu zetshumi lempuphu ecolekileyo kube ngumnikelo wokudla, ixubene lamafutha, ngejongosi elilodwa; lokubili kwetshumi kwempuphu ecolekileyo kube ngumnikelo wokudla, ixubene lamafutha, ngenqama eyodwa," 
Numbers28:13 njalo ileyo laleyo ingxenye yetshumi yempuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha kube ngumnikelo wokudla ngewundlu elilodwa; ngumnikelo wokutshiswa oloqhatshi olumnandi, umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Numbers28:14 Leminikelo yayo yokunathwayo izakuba yingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yehini lewayini ngejongosi, lengxenye yesithathu yehini ngenqama, lengxenye yesine yehini ngewundlu. Lokhu kungumnikelo wokutshiswa wezinyanga zonke ngezinyanga zomnyaka." 
Numbers28:15 Futhi kuzanikelwa izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono e Nkosi ni, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa ngezikhathi zonke, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo." 
Numbers28:16 Futhi ngenyanga yokuqala ngosuku lwetshumi lane lwenyanga kuliphasika le Nkosi. 
Numbers28:17 Langosuku lwetshumi lanhlanu lwenyanga le kuzakuba khona umkhosi; kuzadliwa isinkwa esingelamvubelo insuku eziyisikhombisa. 
Numbers28:18 Ngosuku lokuqala kuzakuba khona inhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi," 
Numbers28:19 kodwa lizanikela umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo, umnikelo wokutshiswa e Nkosi ni, amajongosi amabili amathole enkomo, lenqama eyodwa, lamawundlu ayisikhombisa alomnyaka owodwa; kuzakuba ngokungelasici kini." 
Numbers28:20 Lomnikelo wakho wokudla kuzakuba yimpuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha; okuthathu kwetshumi lizakunikela ngejongosi, lokubili kwetshumi ngenqama," 
Numbers28:21 ileyo laleyo ingxenye yetshumi uzayinikelela iwundlu elilodwa, kumawundlu ayisikhombisa;" 
Numbers28:22 lempongo eyodwa ibe ngumnikelo wesono, ukulenzela inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Numbers28:23 Lizanikela lokho ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wekuseni, ongowomnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke." 
Numbers28:24 Ngalindlela lizanikela insuku zonke, okwensuku eziyisikhombisa, ukudla komnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo, uqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni; kuzanikelwa ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo." 
Numbers28:25 Langosuku lwesikhombisa lizakuba lenhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi. 
Numbers28:26 Langosuku lwezithelo zokuqala, lapho liletha umnikelo wokudla omutsha e Nkosi ni, emva kwamaviki enu, lizakuba lenhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi." 
Numbers28:27 Kodwa lizanikela umnikelo wokutshiswa, kube luqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni; amajongosi amabili amathole enkomo, inqama eyodwa, amawundlu ayisikhombisa alomnyaka owodwa." 
Numbers28:28 Lomnikelo wakho wokudla wempuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, okuthathu kwetshumi ngejongosi elilodwa, lokubili kwetshumi ngenqama eyodwa," 
Numbers28:29 ileyo laleyo ingxenye yetshumi ngewundlu elilodwa, kumawundlu ayisikhombisa;" 
Numbers28:30 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa, ukulenzela inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Numbers28:31 Lizanikela lokho ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa ngezikhathi zonke, lomnikelo wakho wokudla (kube ngokungelasici kini) leminikelo yakho yokunathwayo." 
Numbers29:1 Ngenyanga yesikhombisa, ngo suku lokuqala lwenyanga, lizakuba-ke lenhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi. Kuzakuba lusuku lokutshaywa kwempondo kini." 
Numbers29:2 Njalo lizanikela umnikelo wokutshiswa, kube luqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni, ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, amawundlu ayisikhombisa alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici." 
Numbers29:3 Lomnikelo wakho wokudla wempuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, okuthathu kwetshumi ngejongosi, okubili kwetshumi ngenqama," 
Numbers29:4 lengxenye yetshumi eyodwa kumawundlu ayisikhombisa; 
Numbers29:5 lezinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono, ukulenzela inhlawulo yokuthula;" 
Numbers29:6 ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wenyanga, lomnikelo wawo wokudla, lomnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, lomnikelo wawo wokudla, leminikelo yayo yokunathwayo, ngokwesimiso sayo, kube luqhatshi olumnandi, umnikelo owenzelwe i Nkosi ngomlilo." 
Numbers29:7 Ngo suku lwetshumi lwale inyanga yesikhombisa lizakuba lenhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele, njalo lizathobisa imiphefumulo yenu; lingenzi lamsebenzi," 
Numbers29:8 kodwa linikele umnikelo wokutshiswa e Nkosi ni, kube luqhatshi olumnandi, ijongosi elilodwa ithole lenkomo, inqama eyodwa, amawundlu ayisikhombisa alomnyaka owodwa; azakuba ngangelasici kini." 
Numbers29:9 Lomnikelo wakho wokudla wempuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, okuthathu kwetshumi ngejongosi, okubili kwetshumi ngenqama eyodwa," 
Numbers29:10 ileyo laleyo ingxenye yetshumi ngewundlu elilodwa, kumawundlu ayisikhombisa;" 
Numbers29:11 izinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono, ngaphandle komnikelo wesono wenhlawulo yokuthula, lomnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, lomnikelo wawo wokudla, leminikelo yayo yokunathwayo." 
Numbers29:12 Langosuku lwetshumi lanhlanu lwenyanga yesikhombisa lizakuba lenhlangano ebiziweyo engcwele; lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi, liyigcinele i Nkosi umkhosi insuku eziyisikhombisa," 
Numbers29:13 linikele umnikelo wokutshiswa, umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo, ube luqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni, amajongosi alitshumi lantathu amathole enkomo, inqama ezimbili, amawundlu alitshumi lane alomnyaka owodwa, azakuba ngangelasici." 
Numbers29:14 Lomnikelo wakho wokudla wempuphu ecolekileyo ixubene lamafutha, okuthathu kwetshumi ngejongosi elilodwa, kumajongosi alitshumi lantathu, okubili kwetshumi ngenqama eyodwa, kunqama ezimbili," 
Numbers29:15 njalo yileyo laleyo ingxenye yetshumi ngewundlu elilodwa, kumawundlu alitshumi lane;" 
Numbers29:16 lezinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, umnikelo wawo wokudla, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo." 
Numbers29:17 Langosuku lwesibili: Amajongosi alitshumi lambili amathole enkomo, inqama ezimbili, amawundlu alitshumi lane alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici," 
Numbers29:18 lomnikelo wakho wokudla leminikelo yakho yokunathwayo ngamajongosi, ngezinqama, langamawundlu, ngokwenani lakho, ngokwesimiso," 
Numbers29:19 lezinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, lomnikelo wawo wokudla, leminikelo yayo yokunathwayo." 
Numbers29:20 Langosuku lwesithathu: Amajongosi alitshumi lanye, inqama ezimbili, amawundlu alitshumi lane alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici," 
Numbers29:21 lomnikelo wakho wokudla leminikelo yakho yokunathwayo ngamajongosi, ngezinqama, langamawundlu, ngokwenani lakho, ngokwesimiso," 
Numbers29:22 lempongo eyodwa ibe ngumnikelo wesono, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, lomnikelo wawo wokudla, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo." 
Numbers29:23 Langosuku lwesine: Amajongosi alitshumi, inqama ezimbili, amawundlu alitshumi lane alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici," 
Numbers29:24 umnikelo wakho wokudla leminikelo yakho yokunathwayo ngamajongosi, ngezinqama, langamawundlu, ngokwenani lakho, ngokwesimiso," 
Numbers29:25 lezinyane lembuzi elilodwa libe ngumnikelo wesono, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, umnikelo wawo wokudla, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo." 
Numbers29:26 Langosuku lwesihlanu: Amajongosi ayisificamunwemunye, inqama ezimbili, amawundlu alitshumi lane alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici," 
Numbers29:27 lomnikelo wakho wokudla leminikelo yakho yokunathwayo ngamajongosi, ngezinqama, langamawundlu, ngokwenani lakho, ngokwesimiso," 
Numbers29:28 lempongo eyodwa ibe ngumnikelo wesono, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, lomnikelo wawo wokudla, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo." 
Numbers29:29 Langosuku lwesithupha: Amajongosi ayisificaminwembili, inqama ezimbili, amawundlu alitshumi lane alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici," 
Numbers29:30 lomnikelo wakho wokudla leminikelo yakho yokunathwayo, ngamajongosi, ngezinqama, langamawundlu, ngokwenani lakho, ngokwesimiso," 
Numbers29:31 lempongo eyodwa ibe ngumnikelo wesono, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, umnikelo wawo wokudla, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo." 
Numbers29:32 Langosuku lwesikhombisa: Amajongosi ayisikhombisa, inqama ezimbili, amawundlu alitshumi lane alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici," 
Numbers29:33 lomnikelo wakho wokudla leminikelo yakho yokunathwayo, ngamajongosi, ngezinqama, langamawundlu, ngokwenani lakho, ngokwesimiso," 
Numbers29:34 lempongo eyodwa ibe ngumnikelo wesono, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, umnikelo wawo wokudla, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo." 
Numbers29:35 Ngosuku lwesificaminwembili lizakuba lomhlangano onzulu; lingenzi lamsebenzi wezisebenzi," 
Numbers29:36 kodwa linikele umnikelo wokutshiswa, umnikelo owenziwe ngomlilo, uqhatshi olumnandi e Nkosi ni: Ijongosi elilodwa, inqama eyodwa, amawundlu ayisikhombisa alomnyaka owodwa, angelasici," 
Numbers29:37 umnikelo wakho wokudla, leminikelo yakho yokunathwayo, ngejongosi, ngenqama, langamawundlu, ngokwenani lakho, ngokwesimiso," 
Numbers29:38 lempongo eyodwa ibe ngumnikelo wesono, ngaphandle komnikelo wokutshiswa wezikhathi zonke, lomnikelo wawo wokudla, lomnikelo wawo wokunathwayo." 
Numbers29:39 Lezizinto lizazenzela i Nkosi emikhosini yenu emisiweyo, ngaphandle kwezithembiso zenu, leminikelo yenu yesihle, leminikelo yenu yokutshiswa, leminikelo yenu yokudla, leminikelo yenu yokunathwayo, leminikelo yenu yokuthula." 
Numbers29:40 UMozisi wasekhuluma ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli njengakho konke i Nkosi emlaye ngakho uMozisi. 
Numbers30:1 UMozisi wasekhuluma kunhloko zezizwe zabantwana bakoIsrayeli esithi: Yile into i Nkosi elaye ngayo: 
Numbers30:2 Nxa indoda ithembisa isithembiso e Nkosi ni, loba ifunga isifungo, ukubopha umphefumulo wayo ngesibopho, kayingephuli ilizwi layo; izakwenza njengakho konke okuphuma emlonyeni wayo." 
Numbers30:3 Futhi nxa owesifazana ethembisa isithembiso e Nkosi ni, azibophe ngesibopho, esesemzini kayise ebutsheni bakhe," 
Numbers30:4 loyise esizwa isithembiso sakhe lesibopho sakhe abophe ngaso umphefumulo wakhe, loyise athule kuye, khona zonke izithembiso zakhe zizakuma, laso sonke isibopho abopha ngaso umphefumulo wakhe sizakuma." 
Numbers30:5 Kodwa uba uyise emenqabela, ngosuku ezwa ngalo, kakuyikuma lesisodwa sezithembiso zakhe lezibopho zakhe abophe ngazo umphefumulo wakhe; le Nkosi izamthethelela, ngoba uyise emnqabele." 
Numbers30:6 Uba-ke elendoda sibili, lezithembiso zakhe ziphezu kwakhe, kumbe ilizwi lokungananzeleli lomlomo wakhe, abophe ngalo umphefumulo wakhe," 
Numbers30:7 lendoda yakhe ikuzwa, yathula kuye ngosuku ezwa ngalo, khona izithembiso zakhe zizakuma, lezibopho abophe ngazo umphefumulo wakhe zizakuma." 
Numbers30:8 Kodwa uba indoda yakhe imenqabela ngosuku ekuzwa ngalo, iyasenza ize isithembiso esiphezu kwakhe, lelizwi lokungananzeleli lomlomo wakhe, abophe ngalo umphefumulo wakhe; le Nkosi izamthethelela." 
Numbers30:9 Kodwa isithembiso somfelokazi loba esolahliweyo, konke abophe ngakho umphefumulo wakhe, kuzakuma phezu kwakhe." 
Numbers30:10 Uba-ke ethembisile endlini yendoda yakhe, loba ebophe umphefumulo wakhe ngesibopho ngesifungo," 
Numbers30:11 lendoda yakhe izwile, yathula kuye, ingamenqabelanga, khona zonke izithembiso zakhe zizakuma, laso sonke isibopho abophe ngaso umphefumulo wakhe sizakuma." 
Numbers30:12 Kodwa uba indoda yakhe izenza ize sibili ngosuku izizwa, konke okuphuma endebeni zakhe mayelana lezithembiso zakhe lamayelana lesibopho somphefumulo wakhe kakuyikuma; indoda yakhe izenze ize; le Nkosi izamthethelela." 
Numbers30:13 Sonke isithembiso laso sonke isifungo sesibopho ukuthobisa umphefumulo, indoda yakhe ingasiqinisa loba indoda yakhe isenze ize." 
Numbers30:14 Kodwa uba indoda yakhe ithula lokumthulela insuku ngensuku, abeseqinisa zonke izithembiso zakhe kumbe zonke izibopho zakhe eziphezu kwakhe; iyaziqinisa, ngoba yathula kuye ngosuku lokuzwa kwayo." 
Numbers30:15 Kodwa uba izenza ize sibili emva kokuzwa kwayo, izathwala ububi bakhe." 
Numbers30:16 Lezi yizimiso i Nkosi eyamlaya zona uMozisi, phakathi kwendoda lomkayo, phakathi kukayise lendodakazi yakhe ebutsheni bayo emzini kayise." 
Numbers31:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers31:2 Phindisela impindiselo yabantwana bakoIsrayeli kumaMidiyani; emva kwalokho ubuthelwe ebantwini bakini. 
Numbers31:3 UMozisi wakhuluma ebantwini esithi: Abanye benu kabahlomele impi ukuze bamelane lamaMidiyani, benze impindiselo ye Nkosi kumaMidiyani." 
Numbers31:4 Thumelani empini abayinkulungwane kuleso lalesosizwe, kuzo zonke izizwe zakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers31:5 Kwasekunikelwa kuvela ezinkulungwaneni zakoIsrayeli inkulungwane ngesizwe, inkulungwane ezilitshumi lambili zihlomele impi." 
Numbers31:6 UMozisi wasezithumela empini, inkulungwane ngesizwe, zona loPhinehasi indodana kaEleyazare umpristi, ukuya empini, belempahla ezingcwele lempondo zokuhlaba umkhosi esandleni sakhe." 
Numbers31:7 Basebesilwa bemelene lamaMidiyani, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi, babulala bonke abesilisa." 
Numbers31:8 Babulala njalo amakhosi eMidiyani, ngaphandle kwababuleweyo, oEvi loRekemi loZuri loHuri loReba, amakhosi amahlanu eMidiyani; loBalami indodana kaBeyori bambulala ngenkemba." 
Numbers31:9 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebethumba abesifazana bamaMidiyani labantwanyana babo, baphanga inkomo zawo zonke, lezimvu zawo zonke, layo yonke inotho yawo." 
Numbers31:10 Batshisa ngomlilo yonke imizi ayehlala kiyo, lazo zonke izinqaba zawo." 
Numbers31:11 Bathatha yonke impango lakho konke okuthunjiweyo, kwabantu lokwezifuyo," 
Numbers31:12 baletha abathunjiweyo lempango lokuthunjiweyo kuMozisi lakuEleyazare umpristi, lakunhlangano yabantwana bakoIsrayeli, enkambeni emagcekeni akoMowabi, aseJordani eJeriko." 
Numbers31:13 UMozisi loEleyazare umpristi leziphathamandla zonke zenhlangano basebephuma ukubahlangabeza ngaphandle kwenkamba. 
Numbers31:14 UMozisi wasethukuthelela induna zebutho, induna zezinkulungwane lenduna zamakhulu ezazivela ebuthweni lempi." 
Numbers31:15 UMozisi wasesithi kuzo: Liyekele yini abesifazana bonke ukuthi baphile? 
Numbers31:16 Khangelani, yilaba abenza abantwana bakoIsrayeli, ngeseluleko sikaBalami, ukuthi benze isiphambeko e Nkosi ni endabeni yePeyori, kwaze kwaba lenhlupheko phakathi kwenhlangano ye Nkosi." 
Numbers31:17 Ngakho-ke bulalani wonke owesilisa ebantwanyaneni, libulale wonke owesifazana owazi indoda ngokulala lendoda;" 
Numbers31:18 kodwa bonke abantwanyana abesifazana abangazanga indoda ngokulala layo, libayekele baphile, babe ngabenu." 
Numbers31:19 Lina-ke, misani inkamba ngaphandle kwenkamba insuku eziyisikhombisa, loba ngubani obulele umuntu, laloba ngubani othinte obuleweyo, lizihlambulule lina labathunjiweyo benu ngosuku lwesithathu langosuku lwesikhombisa," 
Numbers31:20 lihlambulule sonke isembatho, layo yonke into eyenziweyo ngesikhumba, lakho konke okwenziweyo ngoboya bembuzi, layo yonke into eyenziweyo ngesihlahla." 
Numbers31:21 UEleyazare umpristi wasesithi kumadoda empi ayephume impi: Lesi yisimiso somlayo i Nkosi emlaye ngaso uMozisi: 
Numbers31:22 Kuphela igolide, lesiliva, ithusi, insimbi, ithini, lomnuso," 
Numbers31:23 yonke into engahlala emlilweni lizayidlulisa emlilweni, ihlambuluke; loba kunjalo izahlanjululwa ngamanzi okwehlukanisa. Lakho konke okungahlali emlilweni lizakudlulisa emanzini." 
Numbers31:24 Njalo lizawatsha izembatho zenu ngosuku lwesikhombisa, lihlambuluke, lemva kwalokho lingene enkambeni." 
Numbers31:25 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers31:26 Thatha inani lonke lempango lokuthunjiweyo, okwabantu lokwezifuyo, wena, loEleyazare umpristi, lenhloko zaboyise zenhlangano;" 
Numbers31:27 yehlukanisa impango ibe zingxenye ezimbili, phakathi kwabahlanganyela empini baphuma impi lenhlangano yonke." 
Numbers31:28 Njalo thelisela i Nkosi umthelo emadodeni empi ayephumele impi, umphefumulo owodwa phakathi kwamakhulu amahlanu, owabantu, lowenkomo, lowabobabhemi, lowezimvu," 
Numbers31:29 likuthathe kungxenye yawo eyodwa kwezimbili, njalo ukunike uEleyazare umpristi kube ngumnikelo wokuphakanyiswa we Nkosi." 
Numbers31:30 Lengxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yabantwana bakoIsrayeli thatha isabelo esisodwa kwezingamatshumi amahlanu, esabantu, esezinkomo, esabobabhemi, lesezimvu, kuso sonke isifuyo, ukunike amaLevi alondoloza imfanelo yethabhanekele le Nkosi." 
Numbers31:31 UMozisi loEleyazare umpristi basebesenza njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi. 
Numbers31:32 Lempango eyayisele lokuthunjiweyo abantu bempi abakuthumbayo yayiyizimvu ezizinkulungwane ezingamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi ayisikhombisa lanhlanu," 
Numbers31:33 lenkomo ezizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisikhombisa lambili," 
Numbers31:34 labobabhemi abazinkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisithupha lanye," 
Numbers31:35 lemiphefumulo yabantu besifazana abangazanga ukulala lendoda, bonke abantu babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lambili." 
Numbers31:36 Lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili, isabelo sababephumele impi, ngenani, yayiyizimvu ezizinkulungwane ezingamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi amathathu lesikhombisa lamakhulu amahlanu;" 
Numbers31:37 lomthelo e Nkosi ni wezimvu wawungamakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi ayisikhombisa lanhlanu. 
Numbers31:38 Lenkomo zazizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lesithupha; lomthelo wazo e Nkosi ni wawungamatshumi ayisikhombisa lambili. 
Numbers31:39 Labobabhemi babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lamakhulu amahlanu; lomthelo wabo e Nkosi ni wawungamatshumi ayisithupha lanye. 
Numbers31:40 Lemiphefumulo yabantu yayizinkulungwane ezilitshumi lesithupha; lomthelo wayo e Nkosi ni wawungabantu abangamatshumi amathathu lambili. 
Numbers31:41 UMozisi wasenika umthelo, umnikelo wokuphakanyiswa we Nkosi, kuEleyazare umpristi, njengalokho i Nkosi yamlaya uMozisi." 
Numbers31:42 Lokwengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yabantwana bakoIsrayeli, uMozisi ayehlukanise ivela emadodeni ayelwe impi." 
Numbers31:43 Lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili enge yenhlangano, eyezimvu, yayizinkulungwane ezingamakhulu amathathu lamatshumi amathathu lesikhombisa lamakhulu amahlanu," 
Numbers31:44 lenkomo ezizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lesithupha," 
Numbers31:45 labobabhemi abazinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lamakhulu amahlanu," 
Numbers31:46 lemiphefumulo yabantu abayizinkulungwane ezilitshumi lesithupha. 
Numbers31:47 Lakuyo ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yabantwana bakoIsrayeli uMozisi wathatha isabelo esisodwa kwezingatshumini amahlanu, esabantu lesezifuyo, wakunika amaLevi ayelondoloza imfanelo yethabhanekele le Nkosi, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Numbers31:48 Iziphathamandla ezaziphezu kwezinkulungwane zebutho, izinduna zezinkulungwane lezinduna zamakhulu, zasezisondela kuMozisi," 
Numbers31:49 zathi kuMozisi: Izinceku zakho sezithethe inani lonke lamadoda empi ayengaphansi kwesandla sethu; njalo kakulamuntu ongekho kithi. 
Numbers31:50 Ngakho silethile umnikelo we Nkosi, ngulowo lalowo awutholileyo, izinto zegolide, izigqizo, lamasongo, izindandatho, amacici, lezigqizo zentanyeni, ukwenzela imiphefumulo yethu inhlawulo yokuthula phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Numbers31:51 UMozisi loEleyazare umpristi basebesemukela igolide kuzo, zonke izinto ezenziwe ngobungcitshi." 
Numbers31:52 Lalo lonke igolide lomnikelo abalinikela e Nkosi ni, livela ezinduneni zezinkulungwane lenduneni zamakhulu lalingamashekeli* azinkulungwane ezilitshumi lesithupha lamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi amahlanu." 
Numbers31:53 Amadoda empi ayethethe impango, yileyo laleyo engeyayo." 
Numbers31:54 UMozisi loEleyazare umpristi basebesemukela igolide enduneni zezinkulungwane lezamakhulu, baliletha ethenteni lenhlangano, kube yisikhumbuzo kubantwana bakoIsrayeli phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Numbers32:1 Mayelana labantwana bakoRubeni labantwana bakoGadi, babelenkomo ezinengi, ezinengi kakhulu. Sebebone ilizwe leJazeri lelizwe leGileyadi, khangela-ke, indawo yayiyindawo yenkomo." 
Numbers32:2 Ngakho abantwana bakoGadi labantwana bakoRubeni beza bakhuluma kuMozisi lakuEleyazare umpristi lakuziphathamandla zenhlangano, besithi:" 
Numbers32:3 IAtarothi leDiboni leJazeri leNimra leHeshiboni leEleyale leSebamu leNebo leBeyoni," 
Numbers32:4 ilizwe i Nkosi eyalitshayayo phambi kwenhlangano yakoIsrayeli, liyilizwe lezinkomo; futhi izinceku zenu zilezinkomo." 
Numbers32:5 Basebesithi: Nxa sithole umusa emehlweni akho, ilizwe leli kaliphiwe inceku zakho libe yimfuyo; ungasichaphisi iJordani." 
Numbers32:6 UMozisi wasesithi ebantwaneni bakoGadi lebantwaneni bakoRubeni: Abafowenu bazakuya empini, lina-ke lihlale lapha yini?" 
Numbers32:7 Njalo lizadaniselani inhliziyo yabantwana bakoIsrayeli ukuze bangachaphi ukuya elizweni i Nkosi ebanike lona? 
Numbers32:8 Benza njalo oyihlo mhla ngibathuma besuka eKadeshi-Bhaneya ukubona ilizwe. 
Numbers32:9 Ekuhambeni kwabo ukuya esihotsheni seEshikoli, balibona ilizwe, badanisa inhliziyo yabantwana bakoIsrayeli ukuze bangangeni elizweni i Nkosi eyayibanike lona." 
Numbers32:10 Ulaka lwe Nkosi lwaseluvutha ngalolusuku, yasifunga isithi:" 
Numbers32:11 Isibili kakho kumadoda enyuka esuka eGibhithe, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphezulu ozalibona ilizwe engalifungela uAbrahama, uIsaka loJakobe, ngoba kabangilandelanga ngokupheleleyo;" 
Numbers32:12 ngaphandle kukaKalebi indodana kaJefune umKenizi, loJoshuwa indodana kaNuni, ngoba balandele i Nkosi ngokupheleleyo." 
Numbers32:13 Lolaka lwe Nkosi lwamvuthela uIsrayeli, yasibazulisa enkangala iminyaka engamatshumi amane, kwaze kwaphela isizukulwana sonke esasenze okubi emehlweni e Nkosi." 
Numbers32:14 Khangelani-ke, selivukile esikhundleni saboyihlo, inzalo yabantu abonayo, ukwandisa futhi intukuthelo ye Nkosi evuthela uIsrayeli." 
Numbers32:15 Uba liphenduka ekuyilandeleni, izaphinda njalo ibatshiye enkangala; njalo lizabhubhisa bonke lababantu." 
Numbers32:16 Basebesondela kuye bathi: Sizakwakha lapha izibaya zezifuyo zethu, lemizi yabantwanyana bethu;" 
Numbers32:17 kodwa thina sizahloma siphangise phambi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, size sibafikise endaweni yabo, labantwanyana bethu bazahlala emizini evikelekileyo, ngenxa yabahlali belizwe." 
Numbers32:18 Kasiyikubuyela emizini yethu, abantwana bakoIsrayeli baze badle, ngulowo lalowo ilifa lakhe." 
Numbers32:19 Ngoba kasiyikudla ilifa kanye labo ngaphetsheya kweJordani langaphambili, ngoba ilifa lethu selehlele kithi nganeno kweJordani empumalanga." 
Numbers32:20 UMozisi wasesithi kubo: Nxa lisenza linto, nxa lizahamba lihlomele impi phambi kwe Nkosi," 
Numbers32:21 beselichapha iJordani, wonke ohlomileyo kini, phambi kwe Nkosi, ize ixotshe izitha zayo phambi kwayo," 
Numbers32:22 lelizwe lehliselwe phansi phambi kwe Nkosi, khona emva kwalokho lizabuya, lingabi lacala e Nkosi ni lakuIsrayeli; lalelilizwe lizakuba yilifa lenu phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Numbers32:23 Kodwa nxa lingenzi njalo, khangelani lizabe lonile e Nkosi ni; ngakho yazini ukuthi isono senu sizalithola." 
Numbers32:24 Zakheleni imizi yabantwanyana benu lezibaya zezimvu zenu, njalo yenzani lokho okuphume emlonyeni wenu." 
Numbers32:25 Abantwana bakoGadi labantwana bakoRubeni basebekhuluma kuMozisi besithi: Izinceku zakho zizakwenza njengalokho inkosi yami ilaya. 
Numbers32:26 Abantwanyana bethu, omkethu, izimvu zethu, lazo zonke izifuyo zethu kuzakuba lapho emizini yeGileyadi;" 
Numbers32:27 kodwa inceku zakho zizachapha, ngulowo lalowo ehlomele impi, phambi kukaJehova empini, njengokutsho kwenkosi yami." 
Numbers32:28 UMozisi waselayezela ngabo kuEleyazare umpristi, loJoshuwa indodana kaNuni, lenhloko zaboyise zezizwe zabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers32:29 UMozisi wasesithi kubo: Nxa abantwana bakoGadi labantwana bakoRubeni bechapha lani iJordani, wonke ehlomele impi, phambi kwe Nkosi, lelizwe lisehliselwa phansi phambi kwenu, khona lizabanika ilizwe leGileyadi libe yimfuyo." 
Numbers32:30 Kodwa uba bengachaphi lani behlomile, bazakuba lemfuyo phakathi kwenu elizweni leKhanani." 
Numbers32:31 Abantwana bakoGadi labantwana bakoRubeni basebephendula besithi: Lokhu i Nkosi esikutshilo kunceku zakho - sizakwenza njalo. 
Numbers32:32 Thina sizachapha sihlomile phambi kwe Nkosi siye elizweni leKhanani, ukuze imfuyo yelifa lethu ibe ngeyethu nganeno kweJordani." 
Numbers32:33 Njalo uMozisi wabanika, kubantwana bakoGadi lakubantwana bakoRubeni lakungxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase, indodana kaJosefa, umbuso kaSihoni inkosi yamaAmori, lombuso kaOgi inkosi yeBashani, ilizwe lemizi yalo emingceleni, imizi yelizwe inhlangothi zonke." 
Numbers32:34 Labantwana bakoGadi bakha iDiboni leAtarothi leAroweri 
Numbers32:35 leAtirothi-Shofani leJazeri leJogibeha," 
Numbers32:36 leBeti-Nimra leBeti-Harani, imizi evikelweyo, lezibaya zezimvu." 
Numbers32:37 Labantwana bakoRubeni bakha iHeshiboni leEleyale leKiriyathayimi 
Numbers32:38 leNebo leBhali-Meyoni (sekuguqulwe amabizo) leSibima; basebebiza amabizo emizi abayakhayo nga manye amabizo. 
Numbers32:39 Labantwana bakoMakiri indodana kaManase baya eGileyadi, bayithumba, bawakhupha amaAmori emfuyweni yawo ayekuyo." 
Numbers32:40 UMozisi wasenika uMakiri indodana kaManase iGileyadi, wasehlala kiyo." 
Numbers32:41 LoJayiri indodana kaManase wayathumba imizana yayo, wayibiza ngokuthi yiHavothi-Jayiri." 
Numbers32:42 LoNoba wayathumba iKenathi, lemizana yayo, wayibiza ngokuthi yiNoba ngebizo lakhe." 
Numbers33:1 Lezi zinhambo zabantwana bakoIsrayeli abaphuma elizweni leGibhithe ngamabutho abo, ngesandla sikaMozisi loAroni." 
Numbers33:2 UMozisi wasebhala ukuphuma kwabo ngezinhambo zabo ngokomlayo we Nkosi. Lalezi zinhambo zabo njengokuphuma kwabo. 
Numbers33:3 Basebesuka eRamesesi ngenyanga yokuqala ngosuku lwetshumi lanhlanu lwenyanga yokuqala; ngakusisa kwephasika abantwana bakoIsrayeli baphuma ngesandla esiphakemeyo phambi kwamehlo awo wonke amaGibhithe," 
Numbers33:4 lapho amaGibhithe engcwaba labo i Nkosi eyabatshayayo phakathi kwawo, wonke amazibulo; laphezu kwabonkulunkulu bawo i Nkosi yenza isigwebo." 
Numbers33:5 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesuka eRamesesi, bamisa inkamba eSukothi." 
Numbers33:6 Basuka eSukothi, bamisa inkamba eEthama elisekucineni kwenkangala." 
Numbers33:7 Basuka eEthama, babuyela ePi-Hahirothi ephambi kweBhali-Zefoni, bamisa inkamba phambi kweMigidoli." 
Numbers33:8 Basuka ePi-Hahirothi, badabula phakathi kolwandle besiya enkangala; bahamba uhambo lwensuku ezintathu enkangala yeEthama, bamisa inkamba eMara." 
Numbers33:9 Basuka eMara, bayafika eElimi; njalo eElimi kwakukhona imithombo yamanzi elitshumi lambili lezihlahla zelala ezingamatshumi ayisikhombisa; basebemisa inkamba lapho." 
Numbers33:10 Basuka eElimi, bamisa inkamba eLwandle oluBomvu." 
Numbers33:11 Basuka eLwandle oluBomvu, bamisa inkamba enkangala yeSini." 
Numbers33:12 Basuka enkangala yeSini, bamisa inkamba eDofika." 
Numbers33:13 Basuka eDofika, bamisa inkamba eAlushi." 
Numbers33:14 Basuka eAlushi, bamisa inkamba eRefidimi lapho okwakungelamanzi khona okuthi abantu banathe." 
Numbers33:15 Basebesuka eRefidimi, bamisa inkamba enkangala yeSinayi." 
Numbers33:16 Basuka enkangala yeSinayi, bamisa inkamba eKibirothi-Hathava." 
Numbers33:17 Basuka eKibirothi-Hathava, bamisa inkamba eHazerothi." 
Numbers33:18 Basuka eHazerothi, bamisa inkamba eRithima." 
Numbers33:19 Basuka eRithima, bamisa inkamba eRimoni-Perezi." 
Numbers33:20 Basuka eRimoni-Perezi, bamisa inkamba eLibhina." 
Numbers33:21 Basuka eLibhina, bamisa inkamba eRisa." 
Numbers33:22 Basuka eRisa, bamisa inkamba eKehelatha." 
Numbers33:23 Basuka eKehelatha, bamisa inkamba entabeni yeSheferi." 
Numbers33:24 Basuka entabeni yeSheferi, bamisa inkamba eHarada." 
Numbers33:25 Basuka eHarada, bamisa inkamba eMakelothi." 
Numbers33:26 Basuka eMakelothi, bamisa inkamba eTahathi." 
Numbers33:27 Basuka eTahathi, bamisa inkamba eTera." 
Numbers33:28 Basuka eTera, bamisa inkamba eMithika." 
Numbers33:29 Basuka eMithika, bamisa inkamba eHashimona." 
Numbers33:30 Basuka eHashimona, bamisa inkamba eMoserothi." 
Numbers33:31 Basuka eMoserothi, bamisa inkamba eBene-Jakani." 
Numbers33:32 Basuka eBene-Jakani, bamisa inkamba eHori-Hagidigadi." 
Numbers33:33 Basuka eHori-Hagidigadi, bamisa inkamba eJotibatha." 
Numbers33:34 Basuka eJotibatha, bamisa inkamba eAbrona." 
Numbers33:35 Basuka eAbrona, bamisa inkamba eEziyoni-Geberi." 
Numbers33:36 Basuka eEziyoni-Geberi, bamisa inkamba enkangala yeZini, eyiKadeshi." 
Numbers33:37 Basuka eKadeshi, bamisa inkamba entabeni yeHori ekucineni kwelizwe leEdoma." 
Numbers33:38 UAroni umpristi wasesenyukela entabeni yeHori ngokomlayo we Nkosi, wafela khona, ngomnyaka wamatshumi amane emva kokuphuma kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli elizweni leGibhithe, ngenyanga yesihlanu, ngo suku lokuqala lwenyanga." 
Numbers33:39 Njalo uAroni wayeleminyaka elikhulu lamatshumi amabili lantathu ekufeni kwakhe entabeni yeHori. 
Numbers33:40 UmKhanani, inkosi yeAradi, owayehlala eningizimu elizweni leKhanani, wasesizwa ngokuza kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers33:41 Basebesuka entabeni yeHori, bamisa inkamba eZalimona." 
Numbers33:42 Basuka eZalimona, bamisa inkamba ePunoni." 
Numbers33:43 Basuka ePunoni, bamisa inkamba eObothi." 
Numbers33:44 Basuka eObothi, bamisa inkamba eIye-Abarimi, emngceleni wakoMowabi." 
Numbers33:45 Basuka eIyimi, bamisa inkamba eDiboni-Gadi." 
Numbers33:46 Basuka eDiboni-Gadi, bamisa inkamba eAlimoni-Dibilathayimi." 
Numbers33:47 Basuka eAlimoni-Dibilathayimi, bamisa inkamba entabeni zeAbarimi, phambi kweNebo." 
Numbers33:48 Basuka entabeni zeAbarimi, bamisa inkamba emagcekeni akoMowabi eJordani eJeriko;" 
Numbers33:49 bamisa inkamba eJordani kusukela eBeti-Jeshimothi kusiya eAbeli-Shithimi, emagcekeni akoMowabi." 
Numbers33:50 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi emagcekeni akoMowabi, eJordani eJeriko, isithi:" 
Numbers33:51 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Lapho selichaphe iJordani laya elizweni leKhanani," 
Numbers33:52 lizaxotsha bonke abakhileyo belizwe libakhuphe emfuyweni yabo phambi kwenu, lichithe yonke imifanekiso yabo, lichithe zonke izithombe zabo ezibunjwe ngokuncibilikisa, liqede zonke indawo zabo eziphakemeyo," 
Numbers33:53 lidle ilifa lelizwe, lihlale kilo, ngoba ngilinike ilizwe ukuthi lidle ilifa lalo." 
Numbers33:54 Njalo lizakudla ilifa lelizwe ngenkatho ngensendo zenu; kwabanengi lizakwengeza ilifa labo, lakwabalutshwana lizanciphisa ilifa labo. Lapho inkatho ezamphumela khona umuntu, kuzakuba ngokwakhe. Njengezizwe zaboyihlo lizakudla ilifa." 
Numbers33:55 Kodwa nxa lingabakhuphi abakhileyo elizweni emfuyweni yabo phambi kwenu, khona kuzakuthi elibatshiyayo babo bazakuba zimvava emehlweni enu babe ngameva ezinhlangothini zenu, balihluphe elizweni elihlala kilo." 
Numbers33:56 Kuzakuthi-ke, ngizakwenza kini njengalokhu ebengicabanga ukukwenza kubo." 
Numbers34:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers34:2 Laya abantwana bakoIsrayeli uthi kubo: Lapho lingena elizweni leKhanani, leli lizakuba yilizwe elizawela kini libe yilifa, ilizwe leKhanani, ngokwemingcele yalo." 
Numbers34:3 Legumbi lenu leningizimu lizakuba kusukela enkangala yeZini, enhlangothini zeEdoma. Njalo uzakuba ngumngcele wenu weningizimu kusukela ekucineni kolwandle lwetswayi empumalanga." 
Numbers34:4 Umngcele wenu uzajika uvela eningizimu usiya emqansweni weAkirabimi, wedlulele eZini; lokuphuma kwawo kuzavela eningizimu kuye eKadeshi-Bhaneya; uzaphuma uye eHazari-Adari, wedlulele eAzimoni." 
Numbers34:5 Lomngcele uzajika uvela eAzimoni uye esifuleni seGibhithe; lokuphuma kwawo kuzakuba selwandle. 
Numbers34:6 Mayelana lomngcele wentshonalanga, ulwandle olukhulu luzakuba ngumngcele wenu; lona luzakuba ngumngcele wenu ngentshonalanga." 
Numbers34:7 Lalokhu kuzakuba ngumngcele wenu wenyakatho: Kusukela elwandle olukhulu lizazidwebela intaba yeHori; 
Numbers34:8 kusukela entabeni yeHori lizadweba umngcele oya ekungeneni kweHamathi, lokuphuma komngcele kuye eZedadi." 
Numbers34:9 Lomngcele uzaphuma uye eZifroni, lokuphuma kwawo kuzakuba eHazari-Enani. Lo uzakuba ngumngcele wenu wenyakatho." 
Numbers34:10 Njalo lizazidwebela umngcele wenu wempumalanga kusukela eHazari-Enani kusiya eShefamu; 
Numbers34:11 lomngcele uzakwehla uvela eShefamu uye eRibila empumalanga kweAyini, lomngcele wehle ufike eceleni kolwandle lweKinerethi ngempumalanga." 
Numbers34:12 Umngcele uzakwehlela-ke eJordani, lokuphuma kwawo kuzakuba solwandle lwetswayi. Leli lizakuba yilizwe lenu ngemingcele yalo inhlangothi zonke." 
Numbers34:13 UMozisi waselaya abantwana bakoIsrayeli esithi: Leli yilizwe elizakudla ilifa lalo ngenkatho, i Nkosi elaye ngalo ukulinika izizwe eziyisificamunwemunye lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe." 
Numbers34:14 Ngoba isizwe sabantwana bakoRubeni ngezindlu zaboyise, lesizwe sabantwana bakoGadi ngezindlu zaboyise zemukele, lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase yemukele ilifa layo." 
Numbers34:15 Izizwe ezimbili lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe zemukele ilifa lazo nganeno kweJordani, eJeriko, empumalanga, lapho okuphuma khona ilanga." 
Numbers34:16 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers34:17 La ngamabizo amadoda azalabela ilizwe libe yilifa: UEleyazare umpristi loJoshuwa indodana kaNuni. 
Numbers34:18 Njalo lizathatha isiphathamandla kuleso lalesosizwe ukwehlukanisa ilizwe libe yilifa. 
Numbers34:19 Lala ngamabizo amadoda: Esizweni sakoJuda, uKalebi indodana kaJefune." 
Numbers34:20 Lesizweni sabantwana bakoSimeyoni, uShemuweli indodana kaAmihudi." 
Numbers34:21 Esizweni sakoBhenjamini, uElidadi indodana kaKisiloni." 
Numbers34:22 Lesizweni sabantwana bakoDani, isiphathamandla uBuki indodana kaJogili." 
Numbers34:23 Ebantwaneni bakoJosefa, esizweni sabantwana bakoManase, isiphathamandla uHaniyeli indodana kaEfodi." 
Numbers34:24 Lesizweni sabantwana bakoEfrayimi, isiphathamandla uKemuweli indodana kaShifitani." 
Numbers34:25 Lesizweni sabantwana bakoZebuluni, isiphathamandla uElizafani indodana kaParinaki." 
Numbers34:26 Lesizweni sabantwana bakoIsakari, isiphathamandla uPalitiyeli indodana kaAzani." 
Numbers34:27 Lesizweni sabantwana bakoAsheri, isiphathamandla uAhiyudi indodana kaShelomi." 
Numbers34:28 Lesizweni sabantwana bakoNafithali, isiphathamandla uPedaheli indodana kaAmihudi." 
Numbers34:29 Yibo labo i Nkosi eyabalaya ukwehlukanisela abantwana bakoIsrayeli ilifa elizweni leKhanani. 
Numbers35:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi emagcekeni akoMowabi, eJordani eJeriko, isithi:" 
Numbers35:2 Laya abantwana bakoIsrayeli ukuthi banike amaLevi okwelifa lemfuyo yabo imizi yokuhlala; futhi linike amaLevi amadlelo emizi inhlangothi zonke zawo. 
Numbers35:3 Njalo azakuba lemizi yokuhlala, lamadlelo awo abe ngawenkomo zawo lawempahla zawo lawezifuyo zawo zonke." 
Numbers35:4 Lamadlelo emizi elizawanika amaLevi azakuba kusukela emthangaleni womuzi langaphandle izingalo eziyinkulungwane inhlangothi zonke. 
Numbers35:5 Njalo lizalinganisa ngaphandle komuzi ingalo ezizinkulungwane ezimbili ehlangothini lwempumalanga, lengalo ezizinkulungwane ezimbili ehlangothini lweningizimu, lengalo ezizinkulungwane ezimbili ehlangothini lwentshonalanga, lengalo ezizinkulungwane ezimbili ehlangothini lwenyakatho, lomuzi ube phakathi. Lokho kuzakuba ngamadlelo awo emizi." 
Numbers35:6 Lemizi elizayinika amaLevi izakuba yimizi eyisithupha yokuphephela elizayinika, ukuze umbulali abalekele khona; langaphezu kwayo linike imizi engamatshumi amane lambili." 
Numbers35:7 Yonke imizi elizayinika amaLevi izakuba ngamatshumi amane lesificaminwembili, yile lamadlelo ayo." 
Numbers35:8 Lemizi elizayinika emfuyweni yabantwana bakoIsrayeli; koleminengi lithathe eminengi, lakolemilutshwana lithathe emilutshwana; ngulowo lalowo njengokwelifa lakhe azalidla, uzanika okwemizi yakhe kumaLevi." 
Numbers35:9 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuMozisi isithi: 
Numbers35:10 Tshono ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli uthi kibo: Lapho lichapha iJordani lingene elizweni leKhanani," 
Numbers35:11 zimiseleni imizi ezakuba yimizi yenu yokuphephela, ukuze umbulali abalekele khona, otshaye umuntu kungeyisikho ngabomo." 
Numbers35:12 Njalo izakuba yimizi yenu yokuphephela kumphindiseli, ukuthi umbulali angafi aze eme phambi kwenhlangano ukuthi ahlulelwe." 
Numbers35:13 Lemizi elizayinika izakuba yimizi yenu eyisithupha yokuphephela. 
Numbers35:14 Lizanika imizi emithathu nganeno kweJordani, linike imizi emithathu elizweni leKhanani, ibe yimizi yokuphephela." 
Numbers35:15 Limizi eyisithupha izakuba ngeyokuphephela kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, lakowemzini lakowezizweni phakathi kwabo, ukuze loba ngubani otshaya umuntu kungeyisikho ngabomo abalekele khona." 
Numbers35:16 Njalo nxa emtshaya ngesikhali sensimbi afe, ungumbulali; umbulali kabulawe lokubulawa." 
Numbers35:17 Njalo nxa emtshaya ngelitshe elisesandleni angafa ngalo, abesesifa, ungumbulali; umbulali kabulawe lokubulawa." 
Numbers35:18 Kumbe uba emtshaya ngesikhali sesigodo esisesandleni angafa ngaso, abesesifa, ungumbulali; umbulali kabulawe lokubulawa." 
Numbers35:19 Umphindiseli wegazi, yena uzabulala umbulali; lapho ehlangana laye, yena uzambulala." 
Numbers35:20 Njalo nxa emsunduza ngokuzonda, loba emjikijela ngokucathama, afe," 
Numbers35:21 loba ngobutha emtshaya ngesandla sakhe, afe, lowo otshayayo kabulawe lokubulawa, ungumbulali; umphindiseli wegazi uzabulala umbulali lapho ehlangana laye." 
Numbers35:22 Kodwa uba emsunduzile masinyane engelabutha, loba emjikijela loba ngasiphi isikhali engacathamanga," 
Numbers35:23 kumbe loba ngaliphi ilitshe, angafa ngalo, enga m boni, aliwisele kuye, afe, lanxa engeyisiso isitha sakhe, futhi engadingi ububi bakhe," 
Numbers35:24 inhlangano izakwahlulela phakathi komtshayi lomphindiseli wegazi ngokwezahlulelo lezi. 
Numbers35:25 Lenhlangano izamophula umbulali esandleni somphindiseli wegazi; lenhlangano imbuyisele emzini wokuphephela kwakhe, lapho abebalekele khona, ahlale kuwo, aze afe umpristi omkhulu owagcotshwa ngamafutha angcwele." 
Numbers35:26 Kodwa uba umbulali ephuma nje umngcele womuzi wokuphephela kwakhe, abebalekele khona," 
Numbers35:27 umphindiseli wegazi emfica ngaphandle komngcele womuzi wokuphephela kwakhe, umphindiseli wegazi uzabulala umbulali; kayikuba lecala legazi." 
Numbers35:28 Ngoba ngabe uhlale emzini wokuphephela kwakhe, aze afe umpristi omkhulu; kodwa emva kokufa kompristi omkhulu umbulali uzabuyela elizweni lemfuyo yakhe." 
Numbers35:29 Njalo lezizinto zizakuba ngumthetho wesahlulelo kini, ezizukulwaneni zenu, kuyo yonke imizi yenu." 
Numbers35:30 Loba ngubani otshaya umuntu, ngomlomo wabafakazi umbulali uzabulawa; kodwa umfakazi oyedwa kayikufakaza ngomuntu ukuthi afe." 
Numbers35:31 Futhi kaliyikuthatha inhlawulo ngempilo yombulali ocaleke ngokufa; ngoba uzabulawa lokubulawa. 
Numbers35:32 Njalo kaliyikuthatha inhlawulo ngobalekele emzini wokuphephela kwakhe, ukuze abuyele ukuyahlala elizweni, aze afe umpristi." 
Numbers35:33 Ngakho kaliyikungcolisa ilizwe elikilo; ngoba ligazi elingcolisa ilizwe; njalo kakuyikwenzelwa ilizwe ukubuyisana ngegazi elichithwe kulo, ngaphandle kwangegazi lolichithileyo." 
Numbers35:34 Ngakho lingangcolisi ilizwe elihlala kilo, engihlala phakathi kwalo; ngoba mina i Nkosi ngihlala phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Numbers36:1 Kwasekusondela inhloko zaboyise zensendo zabantwana bakoGileyadi indodana kaMakiri indodana kaManase, abosendo lwabantwana bakoJosefa, zakhuluma phambi kukaMozisi laphambi kweziphathamandla, inhloko zaboyise babantwana bakoIsrayeli," 
Numbers36:2 zathi: I Nkosi yalaya inkosi yami ukuthi iphe abantwana bakoIsrayeli ilizwe njengelifa ngenkatho; futhi inkosi yami yalaywa yi Nkosi ukuthi inike ilifa likaZelofehadi umfowethu kumadodakazi akhe. 
Numbers36:3 Uba esendela kwenye yamadodana ezizwe zabantwana bakoIsrayeli, ilifa lawo lizasuswa elifeni labobaba, lengezelelwe elifeni lalesosizwe azakuba ngawaso; ngalokho lizasuswa kunkatho yelifa lethu." 
Numbers36:4 Lalapho kuzakuba lijubili* labantwana bakoIsrayeli, ilifa lawo lizakwengezelelwa elifeni lalesosizwe azakuba ngawaso; ngalokho ilifa lawo lizasuswa elifeni lesizwe sabobaba." 
Numbers36:5 UMozisi waselaya abantwana bakoIsrayeli ngokomlomo we Nkosi esithi: Isizwe sabantwana bakoJosefa sikhulume kuhle. 
Numbers36:6 Le yinto i Nkosi eyilayileyo mayelana lamadodakazi kaZelofehadi isithi: Kawendele kulabo abahle emehlweni awo, kodwa kawendele osendweni lwesizwe sikayise." 
Numbers36:7 Ngalokho ilifa labantwana bakoIsrayeli kalingabhodi lisuke esizweni liye esizweni, ngoba abantwana bakoIsrayeli bazanamathela, ngulowo lalowo elifeni lesizwe saboyise." 
Numbers36:8 Layileyo laleyo indodakazi edla ilifa esizweni sabantwana bakoIsrayeli izakwendela komunye wosendo wesizwe sikayise, ukuze abantwana bakoIsrayeli badle ilifa, omunye lomunye ilifa laboyise." 
Numbers36:9 Ngalokho ilifa kaliyikubhoda lisuke esizweni liye kwesinye isizwe, ngoba izizwe zabantwana bakoIsrayeli zizanamathela, ngulowo lalowo elifeni lakhe." 
Numbers36:10 Njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi enza njalo amadodakazi kaZelofehadi; 
Numbers36:11 ngoba uMahla, uTiriza, loHogila, loMilka, loNowa, amadodakazi kaZelofehadi, endela emadodaneni abafowabo bakayise." 
Numbers36:12 Endela kunsendo zabantwana bakoManase indodana kaJosefa, lelifa lawo lahlala esizweni sosendo lukayise." 
Numbers36:13 Le yimilayo lezahlulelo i Nkosi eyazilaya abantwana bakoIsrayeli ngesandla sikaMozisi emagcekeni akoMowabi eJordani eJeriko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 La ngamazwi uMozisi awakhuluma kuIsrayeli wonke nganeno kweJordani enkangala, egcekeni eliqondene leSufi, phakathi kweParani leTofeli leLabani leHazerothi leDizahabi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Kulensuku ezilitshumi lanye kusukela eHorebe ngendlela yentaba yeSeyiri kusiya eKadeshi-Bhaneya. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Kwasekusithi ngomnyaka wamatshumi amane, ngenyanga yetshumi lanye, ngolokuqala lwenyanga, uMozisi wakhuluma kubantwana bakoIsrayeli njengakho konke i Nkosi eyamlaya ngakho kubo," 
Deuteronomy1:4 esemtshayile uSihoni inkosi yamaAmori owayehlala eHeshiboni, loOgi inkosi yeBashani owayehlala eAshitarothi eEdreyi." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Nganeno kweJordani, elizweni lakoMowabi, uMozisi waqala ukuchasisa lumlayo esithi:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu yakhuluma kithi eHorebe isithi: Selihlale isikhathi eseneleyo kulintaba. 
Deuteronomy1:7 Phendukani lisuke, liye entabeni yamaAmori, lakubomakhelwane bawo, egcekeni, entabeni, lesihotsheni, leningizimu, lekhunjini lolwandle, ilizwe lamaKhanani, leLebhanoni, kuze kube semfuleni omkhulu, umfula iYufrathi." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Bonani, ngibeke ilizwe phambi kwenu. Ngenani, lidle ilifa lelizwe i Nkosi eyalifungela oyihlo, oAbrahama, uIsaka, loJakobe, ukubanika lona lenzalo yabo emva kwabo." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Njalo ngakhuluma kini ngalesosikhathi ngisithi: Kangilakulithwala ngingedwa. 
Deuteronomy1:10 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ilandisile, khangelani-ke, lamuhla linjengenkanyezi zamazulu ngobunengi." 
Deuteronomy1:11 I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu waboyihlo, kayandise kini, njengoba linjalo, ngokuphindwe kankulungwane, ilibusise, njengokukhuluma kwayo kini." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ngingedwa ngingathwala njani ubunzima benu lomthwalo wenu lenkani yenu? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Zithatheleni amadoda ahlakaniphileyo, azwisisayo, laziwayo ezizweni zenu, ngiwabeke-ke abe zinhloko zenu." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Laselingiphendula lisithi: Ilizwi olikhulumileyo lilungile ukulenza. 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ngasengithatha inhloko zezizwe zenu, amadoda ahlakaniphileyo, aziwayo, ngawabeka aba zinhloko phezu kwenu, induna zezinkulungwane, lenduna zamakhulu, lenduna zamatshumi amahlanu, lenduna zamatshumi, leziphathamandla zezizwe zenu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Ngasengilaya abahluleli benu ngalesosikhathi ngisithi: Zwanini oku phakathi kwabafowenu, lahlulele ngokulunga phakathi komuntu lomfowabo lowezizweni oku ye." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Lingakhangeli ubuso ekwahluleleni, zwanini omncinyane njengomkhulu; lingesabi ubuso bomuntu, ngoba ukwahlulela kungokukaNkulunkulu. Lendaba elukhuni kini lizayiletha kimi, besengiyizwa." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Langalesosikhathi ngalilaya zonke izinto elifanele ukuzenza. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Sasesisuka eHorebe, sahamba kuyo yonke leyonkangala enkulu leyesabekayo elayibonayo ngendlela yentaba yamaAmori, njengokusilaya kwe Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu, saze safika eKadeshi-Bhaneya." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ngasengisithi kini: Selifikile entabeni yamaAmori i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu ezasinika yona. 
Deuteronomy1:21 Bona, i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ilinikile ilizwe phambi kwakho; yenyuka udle ilifa lalo, njengokutsho kwe Nkosi uNkulunkulu waboyihlo kuwe; ungesabi, ungadideki." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Laselisondela kimi lonke lathi: Asithume amadoda phambi kwethu ukuze asihlolele ilizwe, abuyise ilizwi kithi, indlela esizakwenyuka ngayo, lemizi esizangena kuyo." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Lendaba yayinhle emehlweni ami; ngakho ngathatha kini amadoda alitshumi lambili, indodanye ngesizwe." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Wona aphenduka, enyukela entabeni aze afika esihotsheni seEshikoli, asihlola." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Asethatha okwezithelo zelizwe esandleni sabo, azehlisela kithi; abuyisa ilizwi kithi athi: Ilizwe lihle i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu esinika lona." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Kanti kalifunanga ukwenyuka, kodwa lavukela umlomo we Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu," 
Deuteronomy1:27 langunguna emathenteni enu lathi: Ngoba i Nkosi yayisizonda, yasikhupha elizweni leGibhithe ukusinikela esandleni samaAmori ukusibhubhisa." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Sizakwenyukela ngaphi? Abafowethu benze inhliziyo yethu iphele amandla besithi: Abantu bakhulu bade kulathi; imizi mikhulu, ibiyelwe ngemithangala efika emazulwini; futhi-ke sibonile khona amadodana amaAnaki." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Ngasengisithi kini: Lingatshaywa luvalo, libesabe." 
Deuteronomy1:30 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ehamba phambi kwenu, yona izalilwela njengakho konke eyalenzela khona eGibhithe phambi kwamehlo enu," 
Deuteronomy1:31 lenkangala, lapho obone khona ukuthi i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho yakuthwala njengendoda ithwala indodana yayo, endleleni yonke elahamba ngayo laze lafika kulindawo." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kodwa ngalelilizwi kalikholwanga i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu 
Deuteronomy1:33 eyahamba phambi kwenu endleleni, ukulidingela indawo ukuze limise inkamba, ngomlilo ebusuku, ukulitshengisa indlela elizahamba ngayo, langeyezi emini." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Kwathi i Nkosi isizwile ilizwi lamazwi enu, yathukuthela yafunga yathi:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 Isibili kakho kulamadoda alesisizukulwana esibi ozabona ilizwe elihle engafunga ukulinika oyihlo," 
Deuteronomy1:36 ngaphandle kukaKalebi indodana kaJefune; yena uzalibona. Njalo ngizanika kuye ilizwe anyathela kulo, lakubantwana bakhe, ngoba ulandele i Nkosi ngokupheleleyo." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Lami i Nkosi yangithukuthelela ngenxa yenu, isithi: Lawe kawuyikungena khona." 
Deuteronomy1:38 UJoshuwa indodana kaNuni oma phambi kwakho, yena uzangena khona; mqinise, ngoba yena uzakwenza uIsrayeli adle ilifa lalo." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Labantwanyana benu elalisithi bazakuba yimpango, labantwana benu, abangaziyo lamuhla okuhle lokubi, bona bazangena khona; lakubo ngizalinika, bona-ke bazakudla ilifa lalo." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Kodwa lina ziphendukeleni, lisuke liye enkangala, indlela yoLwandle oluBomvu." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Laseliphendula lisithi kimi: Sonile e Nkosi ni; thina sizakwenyuka siyekulwa, njengakho konke i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu eyasilaya khona. Selihlomile, ngulowo lalowo isikhali sakhe sempi, lacabanga ukuthi kulula ukwenyukela entabeni." 
Deuteronomy1:42 I Nkosi yasisithi kimi: Tshono kubo: Lingenyuki, lingalwi, ngoba kangikho phakathi kwenu, hlezi litshaywe phambi kwezitha zenu." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ngasengikhuluma kini, kodwa kalilalelanga, lavukela umlomo we Nkosi, laqholoza lenyukela entabeni." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Kwathi amaAmori ayehlala entabeni leyo aphuma ukumelana lani, alixotsha njengokwenziwa zinyosi, alihlakaza eSeyiri, kwaze kwaba seHorma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Laselibuya, lakhala inyembezi phambi kwe Nkosi, kodwa i Nkosi kayilizwanga ilizwi lenu, kayibekanga indlebe kini." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Laselihlala eKadeshi insuku ezinengi, njengensuku elahlala ngazo." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Sasesiphenduka, sasuka saya enkangala, indlela yoLwandle oluBomvu, njengokutsho kwe Nkosi kimi; njalo sayibhoda intaba yeSeyiri insuku ezinengi." 
Deuteronomy2:2 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kimi isithi: 
Deuteronomy2:3 Selibhode intaba le okweneleyo; phendukelani lina enyakatho. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Balaye-ke abantu usithi: Lidabula umngcele wabafowenu, abantwana bakaEsawu abahlala eSeyiri. Njalo bazalesaba, ngakho lizinanzelele kakhulu," 
Deuteronomy2:5 lingalwi labo; ngoba kangiyikulinika okwelizwe labo, lelingangokunyathela kwangaphansi konyawo, ngoba ngimnikile uEsawu intaba yeSeyiri ibe yilifa." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Lizathenga ukudla kubo ngemali ukuze lidle, lithenge kubo lamanzi ngemali ukuze linathe." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ikubusisile emsebenzini wonke wesandla sakho; iyazi ukuhamba kwakho kulinkangala enkulu. Le iminyaka engamatshumi amane i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ibilawe, kawuswelanga lutho." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Uba sisedlula sisuka kubafowethu, abantwana bakaEsawu abahlala eSeyiri, ngendlela yegceke sisuke eElathi njalo sisuka eEziyoni-Geberi, saphenduka, sadlula ngendlela yenkangala yakoMowabi." 
Deuteronomy2:9 I Nkosi yasisithi kimi: Ungahlukuluzi uMowabi, ungalwi labo empini; ngoba kangiyikukunika okwelizwe labo kube yilifa, ngoba ngibanikile abantwana bakaLothi iAri ibe yilifa." 
Deuteronomy2:10 Kwakuhlala khona endulo amaEmi, abantu abakhulu, labanengi, labade, njengamaAnaki;" 
Deuteronomy2:11 babebalwa njenge ziqhwaga labo njengamaAnaki, kodwa amaMowabi ababiza ngokuthi ngamaEmi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 LamaHori ayehlala eSeyiri endulo, kodwa abantwana bakaEsawu bawakhupha emfuyweni yabo, bawachitha phambi kwabo, bahlala endaweni yawo, njengokwenza kukaIsrayeli elizweni lelifa lakhe, i Nkosi eyabanika lona." 
Deuteronomy2:13 Khathesi, sukumani lina lichaphe isifula iZeredi. Ngakho sachapha isifula iZeredi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Lensuku esahamba ngazo sisuka eKadeshi-Bhaneya saze sachapha isifula iZeredi zaziyiminyaka engamatshumi amathathu lesificaminwembili, kwaze kwaphela isizukulwana sonke samadoda empi sisuka phakathi kwenkamba, njengokufunga kwe Nkosi kuwo." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Ngoba isibili isandla se Nkosi sasimelene lawo, ukuwachitha esuka phakathi kwenkamba, aze aphela." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Kwasekusithi lapho wonke amadoda empi esephelile esifa esuka phakathi kwabantu," 
Deuteronomy2:17 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kimi isithi: 
Deuteronomy2:18 Lamuhla uzakwedlula iAri, umngcele wakoMowabi," 
Deuteronomy2:19 lapho ususondele maqondana labantwana bakoAmoni, ungabahlukuluzi, ungalwi labo, ngoba kangiyikukunika okwelizwe labantwana bakoAmoni kube yilifa, ngoba ngilinike abantwana bakaLothi libe yilifa." 
Deuteronomy2:20 Lalelo labalwa njengelizwe leziqhwaga. Iziqhwaga zahlala kulo endulo, kodwa amaAmoni bazibiza ngokuthi ngamaZamuzumu;" 
Deuteronomy2:21 abantu abakhulu, labanengi, labade, njengamaAnaki; kodwa i Nkosi yabachitha phambi kwabo, babakhupha emfuyweni yabo, bahlala endaweni yabo," 
Deuteronomy2:22 njengalokho eyakwenzela abantwana bakaEsawu, ababehlala eSeyiri, lapho yawachitha amaHori esuka phambi kwabo, bawakhupha emfuyweni yabo, bahlala endaweni yawo kuze kube lamuhla." 
Deuteronomy2:23 LamaAvi, ayehlala eHazerimi kuze kube seGaza; amaKafitori, aphuma eKafitori, awachitha, ahlala endaweni yawo." 
Deuteronomy2:24 Sukumani, lisuke lichaphe isifula iArinoni. Bona, nginikele esandleni sakho uSihoni, inkosi yeHeshiboni, umAmori, lelizwe lakhe; qala ukudla ilifa lalo, ulwe laye empini." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Lamuhla ngizaqalisa ukufaka uvalo ngawe lokwesabeka kwakho phezu kobuso bezizwe, ngaphansi kwamazulu wonke, ezizakuzwa umbiko ngawe, zithuthumele, ziqhaqhazele ngenxa yakho." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Ngasengithuma izithunywa zisuka enkangala yeKedemothi kuSihoni inkosi yeHeshiboni, zilamazwi okuthula, zisithi:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 Ake ngidabule elizweni lakho; ngizahamba ngomgwaqo kuphela, ngingaphambukeli ngakwesokunene loba ngakwesokhohlo." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Uzangithengisela ukudla ngemali ukuze ngidle, ungiphe amanzi ngemali ukuze nginathe; kuphela ngizadabula ngenyawo zami," 
Deuteronomy2:29 njengalokhu abantwana bakaEsawu abahlala eSeyiri lamaMowabi ahlala eAri benza kimi, ngize ngichaphe iJordani, ngingene elizweni i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu esinika lona." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Kodwa uSihoni inkosi yeHeshiboni kasivumelanga ukuthi sidlule kuye; ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho yenza umoya wakhe waba lukhuni, yenza lenhliziyo yakhe yaba lenkani, ukuze imnikele esandleni sakho, njengalamuhla." 
Deuteronomy2:31 I Nkosi yathi kimi: Bona, sengiqalisile ukunikela phambi kwakho uSihoni lelizwe lakhe; qalisa ukudla ilifa, ukuze udle ilifa lelizwe lakhe." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Kwasekuphuma uSihoni ukumelana lathi, yena labantu bakhe bonke, ukulwa eJahazi." 
Deuteronomy2:33 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu yasimnikela phambi kwethu; sasesimtshaya lamadodana akhe labantu bakhe bonke. 
Deuteronomy2:34 Ngalesosikhathi sasesithumba yonke imizi yakhe, satshabalalisa wonke umuzi, abesilisa labesifazana labantwanyana; kasitshiyanga insali;" 
Deuteronomy2:35 sazithumbela izifuyo kuphela, lempango yemizi esayithumbayo." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Kusukela eAroweri esekhunjini lwesifula iArinoni, lomuzi osesifuleni, kuze kube seGileyadi kwakungekho muzi owawuphakeme kakhulu kithi. I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu yayinikela yonke phambi kwethu." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Kuphela kawusondelanga elizweni labantwana bakoAmoni, endaweni yonke yesifula iJaboki, lemizini esezintabeni, lakukuphi i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu esenqabela khona." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Sasesiphenduka sisenyuka ngendlela yeBashani. UOgi inkosi yeBashani wasephuma ukumelana lathi, yena labantu bakhe bonke, ukulwa eEdreyi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Kodwa i Nkosi yathi kimi: Ungamesabi, ngoba ngizamnikela labantu bakhe bonke lelizwe lakhe esandleni sakho; njalo uzakwenza kuye njengokwenza kwakho kuSihoni inkosi yamaAmori owayehlala eHeshiboni." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Ngakho i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu yanikela esandleni sethu loOgi inkosi yeBashani labo bonke abantu bakhe; sasesimtshaya, kakwaze kwasala lansali kuye." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Sasesithumba yonke imizi yakhe ngalesosikhathi; kwakungelamuzi esingawuthathanga kibo; imizi engamatshumi ayisithupha, isabelo sonke seArigobi, umbuso kaOgi eBashani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Yonke limizi yayivikelwe ngemithangala ephakemeyo, amasango lemigoqo, ngaphandle kwemizana eminengi kakhulu engelamithangala." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Sasesiyitshabalalisa, njengokwenza kwethu kuSihoni inkosi yeHeshiboni, satshabalalisa yonke imizi, abesilisa labesifazana labantwanyana." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Kodwa zonke izifuyo lempango yemizi, saziphangela." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Ngalesosikhathi sasesithatha esandleni samakhosi amabili amaAmori ilizwe, elalinganeno kweJordani, kusukela esifuleni iArinoni kuze kube sentabeni yeHermoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (AmaSidoni ayibiza iHermoni ngokuthi yiSiriyoni, lamaAmori ayibiza ngokuthi yiSeniri.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 Yonke imizi yemagcekeni, leGileyadi yonke, leBashani yonke, kuze kube seSaleka leEdreyi, imizi yombuso kaOgi eBashani." 
Deuteronomy3:11 Ngoba nguOgi kuphela, inkosi yeBashani, owasalayo kunsali yeziqhwaga; khangela, umbheda wakhe wawungumbheda wensimbi; kawukho yini eRaba yabantwana bakoAmoni? Ubude bawo babuzingalo eziyisificamunwemunye, lobubanzi bawo babuzingalo ezine, ngokwengalo yomuntu." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Lalelilizwe sadla ilifa lalo ngalesosikhathi; kusukela eAroweri, elisesifuleni seArinoni, lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yentaba yeGileyadi lemizi yayo ngayipha abakoRubeni labakoGadi." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Lokuseleyo kweGileyadi leBashani yonke, umbuso kaOgi, ngakunika kungxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase; isabelo sonke seArigobi, layo yonke iBashani, eyayithiwa yilizwe leziqhwaga." 
Deuteronomy3:14 UJayiri indodana kaManase wathatha isabelo sonke seArigobi, kuze kube semngceleni wamaGeshuri lowamaMahakathi; wayibiza imizi ngebizo lakhe wathi yiBashani-Havothi-Jayiri, kuze kube yilolusuku." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Ngasengimnika uMakiri iGileyadi. 
Deuteronomy3:16 LakwabakoRubeni lakwabakoGadi nganika kusukela eGileyadi ngitsho kuze kufike esifuleni seArinoni, phakathi laphakathi kwesifula, lomngcele, njalo kuze kube sesifuleni iJaboki, umngcele wabantwana bakoAmoni." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Lamagceke, leJordani, lomngcele, kusukela eKinerethi njalo kuze kufike elwandle lwemagcekeni, ulwandle lwetswayi, ngaphansi kweAshidodi-Pisiga ngasempumalanga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Ngasengililaya ngalesosikhathi ngisithi: I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ilinikile lelilizwe libe yilifa lenu. Lizachapha lihlomile phambi kwabafowenu, abantwana bakoIsrayeli, wonke amadoda angamaqhawe." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Kuphela omkenu labantwanyana benu lezifuyo zenu - ngiyazi ukuthi lilezifuyo ezinengi - kuzahlala emizini yenu engilinike yona," 
Deuteronomy3:20 i Nkosi ize ibanike ukuphumula abafowenu njengani, baze bathi labo badle ilifa lelizwe i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ebaphe lona, ngaphetsheya kweJordani; beselibuyela, ngulowo lalowo elifeni lakhe, engilinike lona." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Njalo ngamlaya uJoshuwa ngalesosikhathi ngisithi: Amehlo akho abonile konke i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ekwenze kulawomakhosi amabili; izakwenza njalo i Nkosi kuyo yonke imibuso ozakwedlulela kuyo. 
Deuteronomy3:22 Lingabesabi, ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu, yona izalilwela." 
Deuteronomy3:23 Ngasengiyincenga i Nkosi ngalesosikhathi ngisithi: 
Deuteronomy3:24 Nkosi Jehova, wena usuqalile ukutshengisa inceku yakho ubukhulu bakho lesandla sakho esilamandla; ngoba nguwuphi unkulunkulu emazulwini lemhlabeni ongenza njengemisebenzi yakho lanjengamandla akho?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Ngicela ngichaphe, ngibone ilizwe elihle elingaphetsheya kweJordani, leyontaba enhle, leLebhanoni." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Kodwa i Nkosi yangithukuthelela ngenxa yenu, kayingizwanga; i Nkosi yasisithi kimi: Kwenele kuwe; ungabe usaphinda ukukhuluma kimi ngaloludaba." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Yenyukela engqongeni yePisiga, uphakamisele amehlo akho ngentshonalanga langenyakatho langeningizimu langempumalanga, ukhangele ngamehlo akho; ngoba kawuyikuchapha le iJordani." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Kodwa laya uJoshuwa, umkhuthaze, umqinise; ngoba yena uzachapha phambi kwalababantu, laye abenze badle ilifa lelizwe ozalibona." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Sasesihlala esigodini maqondana leBeti-Peyori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Khathesi-ke, Israyeli, zwana izimiso lezahlulelo engilifundisa zona, ukuzenza, ukuze liphile, lingene lidle ilifa lelizwe i Nkosi uNkulunkulu waboyihlo elinika lona." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Kaliyikwengezelela elizwini engililaya lona, lingaphunguli lutho kulo, ukuze ligcine imilayo ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu engililaya yona." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Amehlo enu abonile i Nkosi eyakwenzayo ngenxa kaBhali-Peyori; ngoba wonke umuntu owalandela uBhali-Peyori, i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu yambhubhisa phakathi kwenu;" 
Deuteronomy4:4 kodwa lina elanamathela e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wenu liyaphila lonke lamuhla. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Bonani, ngilifundisile izimiso lezahlulelo, njengokungilaya kwe Nkosi uNkulunkulu wami, ukuthi lenze njalo phakathi kwelizwe eliya kulo ukudla ilifa lalo." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Ngakho zigcineni, lizenze; ngoba lokhu kuyinhlakanipho yenu lokuqedisisa kwenu emehlweni ezizwe ezizakuzwa zonke lezizimiso zithi: Isibili lesisizwe esikhulu singabantu abahlakaniphileyo labaqedisisayo." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Ngoba yisiphi isizwe esikhulu esilabonkulunkulu abaseduze laso njenge Nkosi uNkulunkulu ekumbizeni kwethu konke? 
Deuteronomy4:8 Futhi yisiphi isizwe esikhulu esilezimiso lezahlulelo ezilungileyo njengalumlayo wonke engiwubeka phambi kwenu lamuhla? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Kuphela ziqaphele, ugcine kakhulu umphefumulo wakho, hlezi ukhohlwe izinto amehlo akho azibonileyo, njalo hlezi zisuke enhliziyweni yakho, zonke izinsuku zempilo yakho. Njalo uzazise abantwana bakho labantwana babantwana bakho," 
Deuteronomy4:10 ukuthi ngosuku owema ngalo phambi kwe Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho eHorebe, lapho i Nkosi yathi kimi: Ngibuthanisela abantu ngibe sengibazwisa amazwi ami, ukuze bafunde ukungesaba zonke izinsuku abazaziphila emhlabeni, bafundise njalo abantwana babo." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Laselisondela, lema ngaphansi kwentaba, lentaba yayivutha umlilo kwaze kwaba phakathi kwamazulu, lo mnyama, amayezi, lomnyama onzima." 
Deuteronomy4:12 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kini iphakathi komlilo; lezwa ilizwi lamazwi, kodwa kalibonanga simo; ilizwi kuphela." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Yamemezela kini isivumelwano sayo, eyalilaya ukuthi lisenze, imilayo elitshumi; njalo yayibhala ezibhebheni zamatshe ezimbili." 
Deuteronomy4:14 I Nkosi yasingilaya ngalesosikhathi ukuthi ngilifundise izimiso lezahlulelo, ukuze lizenze elizweni elidlulela kulo ukudla ilifa lalo." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Ngakho-ke qaphelani kakhulu ngenxa yemiphefumulo yenu. Ngoba kalibonanga lasimo ngosuku i Nkosi ikhuluma kini eHorebe iphakathi komlilo," 
Deuteronomy4:16 hlezi lizone, lizenzele isithombe esibaziweyo, isimo saloba yiwuphi umfanekiso, isifanekiso sowesilisa loba sowesifazana," 
Deuteronomy4:17 isifanekiso saloba yiyiphi inyamazana esemhlabeni, isifanekiso saloba yiyiphi inyoni elempiko ephapha emazulwini," 
Deuteronomy4:18 isifanekiso saloba yikuphi okuhuquzelayo emhlabeni, isifanekiso saloba yiyiphi inhlanzi esemanzini ngaphansi komhlaba." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Futhi hlezi uphakamisele amehlo akho emazulwini, lapho ubona ilanga lenyanga lezinkanyezi, ibutho lonke lamazulu, uyengwe, ukukhothamele, ukukhonze, i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ekwabele izizwe zonke ngaphansi kwamazulu wonke." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Kodwa lina i Nkosi yalithatha, yalikhupha esithandweni sensimbi, eGibhithe, ukuze libe kuyo ngabantu belifa, njengalamuhla." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Futhi i Nkosi yangithukuthelela ngenxa yenu, yafunga ukuthi kangiyikuchapha iJordani, lokuthi kangiyikungena kulelolizwe elihle i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ekunika lona libe yilifa." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ngoba ngizafela kulelilizwe, ngingachaphi iJordani; kodwa lina lizachapha, lidle ilifa lalelolizwe elihle." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Ziqapheleni hlezi likhohlwe isivumelwano se Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu eyasenza lani, lizenzele isithombe esibaziweyo, umfanekiso waloba yikuphi i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ekwenqabele khona." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ingumlilo oqothulayo, uNkulunkulu olobukhwele." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Lapho uzala abantwana labantwana babantwana, njalo selihlale elizweni isikhathi eside, uba lisonakala, lenze isithombe esibaziweyo, umfanekiso waloba yikuphi, lenze okubi emehlweni e Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ukuze liyithukuthelise," 
Deuteronomy4:26 ngibiza amazulu lomhlaba lamuhla ukuze kufakaze kumelene lani ukuthi lizabhubha lokubhubha masinyane lisuka elizweni elichapha iJordani ukuya kilo ukuze libe yilifa lenu; kaliyikwelula insuku zenu phezu kwalo, ngoba lizabhujiswa lokubhujiswa." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Njalo i Nkosi izalichithachitha phakathi kwezizwe, lisale libalutshwana ngenani phakathi kwezizwe, lapho i Nkosi ezalixotshela khona." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Lapho lizakhonza onkulunkulu, umsebenzi wezandla zabantu, izigodo lamatshe, abangaboniyo, abangezwayo, abangadliyo, labanganukiyo." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Kodwa lilapho liyidinge i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho, uzayithola uba uyidinga ngenhliziyo yakho yonke langomphefumulo wakho wonke." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Lapho usekuhluphekeni, lezizinto zonke zikwehlela, ekupheleni kwezinsuku, uzaphendukela e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wakho, ulalele ilizwi layo;" 
Deuteronomy4:31 ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho inguNkulunkulu olomusa, kayiyikukutshiya, kayiyikukubhubhisa, kayiyikukhohlwa isivumelwano saboyihlo, eyasifunga kubo." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Ngoba buza-ke ngensuku zamandulo ezazingaphambi kwakho, kusukela esukwini uNkulunkulu adala ngalo umuntu emhlabeni, kusukela komunye umkhawulo wamazulu kuze kube komunye umkhawulo wamazulu, ukuthi kwake kwaba khona yini into enje njengale into enkulu, kumbe kwezwakala enjengayo yini?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Abantu bake balizwa yini ilizwi likaNkulunkulu likhuluma livela phakathi komlilo, njengalokhu ulizwile wena, waphila?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Futhi uNkulunkulu wake wazama yini ukuyazithathela isizwe phakathi kwesizwe, ngezilingo, ngezibonakaliso, langezimangaliso, langempi, langesandla esilamandla, langengalo eyeluliweyo, langezesabiso ezinkulu, njengakho konke i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu eyalenzela khona eGibhithe phambi kwamehlo akho?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Wena wakutshengiswa, ukuze wazi ukuthi uJehova unguNkulunkulu; kakho omunye ngaphandle kwakhe." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Esemazulwini wakuzwisa ilizwi lakhe ukukufundisa; lemhlabeni wakutshengisa umlilo wakhe omkhulu, lamazwi akhe wawezwa evela phakathi komlilo." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Njalo ngoba wabathanda oyihlo, wakhetha inzalo yabo emva kwabo, wakukhupha eGibhithe ebusweni bakhe ngamandla akhe amakhulu," 
Deuteronomy4:38 ukuxotsha elifeni izizwe ezinkulu lezilamandla kulawe phambi kwakho, ukukungenisa, ukukupha ilizwe lazo, libe yilifa, njengalamuhla." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Ngakho yazi lamuhla, ukukhumbule enhliziyweni yakho ukuthi i Nkosi inguNkulunkulu emazulwini phezulu, lemhlabeni phansi; kakho omunye." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Ngakho uzagcina izimiso zakhe lemilayo yakhe engikulaya yona lamuhla, ukuze kukulungele labantwana bakho emva kwakho, lokuze welule izinsuku phezu kwelizwe i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ekunika lona, zonke izinsuku." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Khona uMozisi wehlukanisa imizi emithathu nganeno kweJordani ngasempumalanga," 
Deuteronomy4:42 ukuthi abalekele kuyo umbulali obulele umakhelwane wakhe kungeyisikho ngabomo, obengamzondi mandulo, ukuze abalekele komunye waleyomizi aphile;" 
Deuteronomy4:43 iBezeri enkangala elizweni lamagceke, elabakoRubeni; leRamothi eGileyadi, elabakoGadi; leGolani eBashani, elabakoManase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Njalo yilo umlayo uMozisi awubeka phambi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Lobu yibufakazi lezimiso lezahlulelo uMozisi akukhuluma ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli ekuphumeni kwabo eGibhithe," 
Deuteronomy4:46 nganeno kweJordani, esigodini maqondana leBeti-Peyori, elizweni likaSihoni inkosi yamaAmori, owayehlala eHeshiboni, uMozisi labantwana bakoIsrayeli abamtshayayo ekuphumeni kwabo eGibhithe." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Basebesidla ilifa lelizwe lakhe lelizwe likaOgi inkosi yeBashani, amakhosi amabili amaAmori, ayenganeno kweJordani ngasempumalanga," 
Deuteronomy4:48 kusukela eAroweri esekhunjini lwesifula seArinoni, kuze kufike entabeni yeSiyoni, eyiHermoni," 
Deuteronomy4:49 lamagceke wonke nganeno kweJordani ngasempumalanga, kuze kube selwandle lwamagceke, ngaphansi kweAshidodi-Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 UMozisi wasebiza uIsrayeli wonke, wathi kubo: Zwana, Israyeli, izimiso lezahlulelo engizikhuluma endlebeni zenu lamuhla, ukuze lizifunde, ligcine ukuzenza." 
Deuteronomy5:2 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu yenza isivumelwano lathi eHorebe. 
Deuteronomy5:3 I Nkosi kayisenzanga lesisivumelwano labobaba, kodwa lathi, thina sonke esilapha siphila lamuhla." 
Deuteronomy5:4 I Nkosi yakhuluma lani ubuso lobuso entabeni, iphakathi komlilo,"
