Joshua10:7 Ngakho uJoshuwa wenyuka esuka eGiligali, yena labo bonke abantu bempi kanye laye, lawo wonke amaqhawe alamandla." 
Joshua10:8 I Nkosi yasisithi kuJoshuwa: Ungabesabi, ngoba ngibanikele esandleni sakho; kakulamuntu wabo ozakuma phambi kwakho." 
Joshua10:9 UJoshuwa wasebajuma, enyuke ubusuku bonke esuka eGiligali." 
Joshua10:10 I Nkosi yabasanganisa phambi kukaIsrayeli, yabatshaya ngokutshaya okukhulu eGibeyoni, yaxotshana labo endleleni enyukela eBethi-Horoni, yabatshaya kwaze kwaba seAseka kwaze kwaba seMakeda." 
Joshua10:11 Kwasekusithi besabaleka phambi kukaIsrayeli ekwehleni kweBethi-Horoni, i Nkosi yaphosela phezu kwabo amatshe amakhulu evela emazulwini, kwaze kwaba seAzeka, njalo bafa. Babebanengi abafa ngesiqhotho okwedlula labo abantwana bakoIsrayeli abababulala ngenkemba." 
Joshua10:12 Ngalesosikhathi uJoshuwa wakhuluma e Nkosi ni mhla i Nkosi inikela amaAmori phambi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, wathi phambi kwamehlo kaIsrayeli: Langa, mana eGibeyoni, lawe nyanga, esihotsheni seAjaloni." 
Joshua10:13 Lelanga lathi mpo lenyanga yema, abantu baze baphindisela ezitheni zabo. Lokhu kakubhaliwe yini egwalweni lukaJashari? Ngakho ilanga lema phakathi komkhathi, kalaze laphangisa ukutshona phose okosuku olupheleleyo." 
Joshua10:14 Kaluzanga lube khona usuku olunjalo ngaphambi kwalo loba emva kwalo lapho i Nkosi eyalizwa khona ilizwi lomuntu, ngoba i Nkosi yamlwela uIsrayeli." 
Joshua10:15 UJoshuwa wasebuyela enkambeni eGiligali loIsrayeli wonke kanye laye. 
Joshua10:16 Kodwa lawomakhosi amahlanu abaleka, acatsha ebhalwini eMakeda." 
Joshua10:17 Kwasekubikwa kuJoshuwa ukuthi: Amakhosi amahlanu atholwe ecatshile ebhalwini eMakeda. 
Joshua10:18 UJoshuwa wasesithi: Giqelani amatshe amakhulu emlonyeni wobhalu, limise amadoda kulo ukuwalinda." 
Joshua10:19 Kodwa lina lingami; xotshanani lezitha zenu, lizitshaye ngemuva kwazo, lingaziyekeli zingene emizini yazo, ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu izinikele esandleni senu." 
Joshua10:20 Kwasekusithi lapho uJoshuwa labantwana bakoIsrayeli sebeqedile ukuzitshaya ngokutshaya okukhulukazi zaze zaqedwa, insali eyasalayo yazo yangena emizini evikelweyo." 
Joshua10:21 Labantu bonke babuyela enkambeni kuJoshuwa eMakeda ngokuthula; kakho owanyikinya ulimi lwakhe emelana labantwana bakoIsrayeli. 
Joshua10:22 UJoshuwa wasesithi: Vulani umlomo wobhalu, likhuphele kimi lawomakhosi amahlanu evela ebhalwini." 
Joshua10:23 Basebesenza njalo, bawakhuphela kuye lawomakhosi amahlanu evela ebhalwini: Inkosi yeJerusalema, inkosi yeHebroni, inkosi yeJarimuthi, inkosi yeLakishi, inkosi yeEgiloni." 
Joshua10:24 Kwasekusithi sebewakhuphele kuJoshuwa lawomakhosi, uJoshuwa wabiza wonke amadoda akoIsrayeli, wathi ezinduneni zamadoda empi ezazihambe laye: Sondelani, libeke inyawo zenu entanyeni zalamakhosi. Zasezisondela, zabeka inyawo zazo entanyeni zawo." 
Joshua10:25 UJoshuwa wasesithi kuzo: Lingesabi lingatshaywa luvalo; qinani lime isibindi, ngoba i Nkosi izakwenza njalo kuzo zonke izitha zenu elilwa limelene lazo." 
Joshua10:26 Emva kwalokho uJoshuwa wasewatshaya wawabulala, wawalengisa ezihlahleni ezinhlanu; njalo ayelenga ezihlahleni kwaze kwahlwa." 
Joshua10:27 Kwasekusithi ngesikhathi sokutshona kwelanga uJoshuwa walaya ukuthi bawethule ezihlahleni, bawaphosele ebhalwini ayecatshe khona; basebefaka amatshe amakhulu emlonyeni wobhalu, akhona kuze kube yilona lolusuku." 
Joshua10:28 UJoshuwa wathumba layo iMakeda ngalolosuku, wayitshaya ngobukhali benkemba, watshabalalisa lenkosi yayo, bona, layo yonke imiphefumulo eyayikiyo, katshiyanga insali. Wasesenza enkosini yeMakeda njengalokho akwenza enkosini yeJeriko." 
Joshua10:29 UJoshuwa, loIsrayeli wonke laye, wasedlula esuka eMakeda waya eLibhina, walwa emelene leLibhina." 
Joshua10:30 I Nkosi yasiyinikela layo lenkosi yayo esandleni sikaIsrayeli; waseyitshaya ngobukhali benkemba lemiphefumulo yonke eyayikiyo; katshiyanga insali kiyo; wenza enkosini yayo njengalokho akwenza enkosini yeJeriko. 
Joshua10:31 UJoshuwa wasesedlula esuka eLibhina, loIsrayeli wonke kanye laye, waya eLakishi, wamisa inkamba maqondana layo, walwa emelene layo." 
Joshua10:32 I Nkosi yasiyinikela iLakishi esandleni sikaIsrayeli; waseyithumba ngosuku lwesibili, wayitshaya ngobukhali benkemba layo yonke imiphefumulo eyayikiyo, njengakho konke akwenza eLibhina." 
Joshua10:33 Ngalesosikhathi uHoramu inkosi yeGezeri wenyuka ukusiza iLakishi; kodwa uJoshuwa wamtshaya labantu bakhe, kwaze kwathi kamtshiyelanga insali." 
Joshua10:34 UJoshuwa wasesedlula esuka eLakishi, loIsrayeli wonke kanye laye, baya eEgiloni, bamisa inkamba maqondana layo, balwa bemelene layo." 
Joshua10:35 Bayithumba ngalolosuku, bayitshaya ngobukhali benkemba, lemiphefumulo yonke eyayikiyo bayitshabalalisa ngalolosuku, njengakho konke akwenza eLakishi." 
Joshua10:36 UJoshuwa wasesenyuka esuka eEgiloni loIsrayeli wonke kanye laye, baya eHebroni, balwa bemelene layo," 
Joshua10:37 bayithumba, bayitshaya ngobukhali benkemba, lenkosi yayo lemizi yayo yonke lawo wonke umphefumulo owawukiyo; katshiyanga insali, njengakho konke akwenza eEgiloni, wawutshabalalisa lawo wonke umphefumulo owawukiyo." 
Joshua10:38 UJoshuwa wasebuyela eDebiri loIsrayeli wonke kanye laye, balwa bemelene layo," 
Joshua10:39 bayithumba lenkosi yayo layo yonke imizi yayo, bayitshaya ngobukhali benkemba, batshabalalisa wonke umphefumulo owawukiyo; katshiyanga insali. Njengokwenza kwakhe eHebroni wenza njalo eDebiri lenkosini yayo, lanjengokwenza kwakhe eLibhina lenkosini yayo." 
Joshua10:40 Ngakho uJoshuwa walitshaya ilizwe lonke lezintaba leleningizimu lelesihotsha lelamawatha lawo wonke amakhosi abo; katshiyanga insali, kodwa watshabalalisa konke okuphefumulayo, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
Joshua10:41 UJoshuwa wasebatshaya kusukela eKadeshi-Bhaneya kwaze kwaba seGaza, lelizwe lonke leGosheni, kwaze kwaba seGibeyoni." 
Joshua10:42 UJoshuwa wasethumba wonke lamakhosi lelizwe lawo ngasikhathi sinye, ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli yamlwela uIsrayeli." 
Joshua10:43 UJoshuwa wasebuyela, loIsrayeli wonke kanye laye, enkambeni eGiligali." 
Joshua11:1 Kwasekusithi lapho uJabini inkosi yeHazori e ku zwa, wathumela kuJobabi inkosi yeMadoni, lenkosini yeShimironi, lenkosini yeAkishafi," 
Joshua11:1 Kwasekusithi lapho uJabini inkosi yeHazori e ku zwa, wathumela kuJobabi inkosi yeMadoni, lenkosini yeShimironi, lenkosini yeAkishafi," 
Joshua11:2 lemakhosini ayengenyakatho ezintabeni, lemagcekeni, eningizimu kweKinerothi, lesihotsheni, lemaqaqeni eDori entshonalanga," 
Joshua11:3 amaKhanani empumalanga lentshonalanga, lamaAmori lamaHethi lamaPerizi lamaJebusi entabeni, lamaHivi ngaphansi kweHermoni elizweni leMizipa." 
Joshua11:4 Asephuma, wona lawo wonke amabutho awo kanye lawo, abantu abanengi, njengetshebetshebe elisekhunjini lolwandle ngobunengi, lamabhiza lenqola okunengi kakhulu." 
Joshua11:5 Wonke lamakhosi asehlangana, eza amisa inkamba ndawonye emanzini eMeroma, ukulwa emelene loIsrayeli." 
Joshua11:6 I Nkosi yasisithi kuJoshuwa: Ungesabi ngenxa yabo, ngoba kusasa phose ngalesisikhathi ngizawanikela wonke esebulewe phambi kukaIsrayeli; uzaquma imisipha yamabhiza awo, utshise inqola zawo ngomlilo." 
Joshua11:7 UJoshuwa wasesiza, labo bonke abantu bempi kanye laye, bemelene lawo emanzini eMeroma bawajuma, bawadumela." 
Joshua11:8 I Nkosi yasiwanikela esandleni sikaIsrayeli, owawatshaya waxotshana lawo kwaze kwaba seSidoni enkulu, kwaze kwaba seMisirefothi-Mayimi, kwaze kwaba sesihotsheni seMizipa empumalanga. Bawatshaya, kabaze batshiya insali kubo." 
Joshua11:9 UJoshuwa wasesenza kiwo njengokutsho kwe Nkosi kuye; waquma imisipha yamabhiza awo, watshisa inqola zawo ngomlilo." 
Joshua11:10 UJoshuwa wasebuya ngalesosikhathi, wathumba iHazori, watshaya inkosi yayo ngenkemba. Ngoba kuqala iHazori yayiyinhloko yayo yonke leyomibuso." 
Joshua11:11 Batshaya yonke imiphefumulo eyayikiyo ngobukhali benkemba, bayitshabalalisa; kakusalanga lokukodwa okuphefumulayo; wasetshisa iHazori ngomlilo." 
Joshua11:12 Yonke-ke imizi yalawomakhosi lamakhosi ayo wonke uJoshuwa wakuthumba, wakutshaya ngobukhali benkemba, wakutshabalalisa, njengokulaya kukaMozisi inceku ye Nkosi." 
Joshua11:13 Kuphela imizi yonke eyayimi emadundulwini ayo uIsrayeli kayitshisanga, ngaphandle kweHazori kuphela uJoshuwa ayitshisayo." 
Joshua11:14 Layo yonke impango yalimizi lezifuyo abantwana bakoIsrayeli baziphangela. Kuphela bonke abantu babatshaya ngobukhali benkemba baze babachitha; kabatshiyanga loyedwa ophefumulayo. 
Joshua11:15 Njengalokhu i Nkosi yayimlayile uMozisi inceku yayo, ngokunjalo uMozisi wamlaya uJoshuwa, langokunjalo uJoshuwa wakwenza; kasusanga lizwi kukho konke i Nkosi eyakulaya uMozisi." 
Joshua11:16 Ngakho uJoshuwa walithatha lelolizwe lonke, izintaba, leningizimu yonke, lelizwe lonke leGosheni, lesihotsha, lamagceke, lentaba zakoIsrayeli, lesigodi sakhe," 
Joshua11:17 kusukela entabeni elugwadule eyenyukela eSeyiri, kuze kube seBhali-Gadi esihotsheni seLebhanoni ngaphansi kwentaba yeHermoni. Wawathumba wonke amakhosi abo, wawatshaya wawabulala." 
Joshua11:18 UJoshuwa wayilwa-ke impi insuku ezinengi lawo wonke lawomakhosi. 
Joshua11:19 Kakubanga lamuzi owenza ukuthula labantwana bakoIsrayeli ngaphandle kwamaHivi abakhileyo beGibeyoni; bayithatha yonke ngempi. 
Joshua11:20 Ngoba kwakuvela e Nkosi ni ukwenza lukhuni inhliziyo zabo ukuze bahlangabezane loIsrayeli empini, ukuze abatshabalalise, ukuze bangazuzi umusa, kodwa ukuze ababhubhise, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi." 
Joshua11:21 UJoshuwa wasesiza ngalesosikhathi, waquma amaAnaki asuke ezintabeni, eHebroni, eDebiri, eAnabi, lentabeni zonke zakoJuda, lakuzo zonke intaba zakoIsrayeli; uJoshuwa wawatshabalalisa lemizi yawo." 
Joshua11:22 Kakusalanga amaAnaki elizweni labantwana bakoIsrayeli; kuphela eGaza, eGathi, leAshidodi, asala." 
Joshua11:23 UJoshuwa wasethatha ilizwe lonke njengakho konke i Nkosi eyakukhuluma kuMozisi. UJoshuwa waselinika laba yilifa kuIsrayeli, njengokwehlukaniswa kwabo ngezizwe zabo. Ilizwe laseliphumula empini." 
Joshua12:1 Lala ngamakhosi elizwe abantwana bakoIsrayeli abawatshayayo, badla ilifa lelizwe lawo ngaphetsheya kweJordani ngempumalanga, kusukela esifuleni seArinoni kusiya entabeni yeHermoni, lamagceke wonke ngempumalanga:" 
Joshua12:2 USihoni inkosi yamaAmori owayehlala eHeshiboni, ebusa kusukela eAroweri esekhunjini lwesifula seArinoni laphakathi kwesifula, lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yeGileyadi kuze kufike esifuleni iJaboki, umngcele wabantwana bakoAmoni," 
Joshua12:3 lamagceke kuze kufike elwandle lweKinerothi, kuze kube selwandle lwamagceke, uLwandle lweTswayi, empumalanga, indlela yeBeti-Jeshimothi, njalo kusukela eningizimu ngaphansi kweAshidodi-Pisiga;" 
Joshua12:4 lomngcele kaOgi inkosi yeBashani owensali zeziqhwaga owayehlala eAshitarothi leEdreyi," 
Joshua12:5 wabusa entabeni yeHermoni leSaleka leBashani lonke, kuze kube semngceleni wamaGeshuri lamaMahakathi, lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yeGileyadi, umngcele kaSihoni inkosi yeHeshiboni." 
Joshua12:6 UMozisi inceku ye Nkosi labantwana bakoIsrayeli babatshaya. UMozisi inceku ye Nkosi waselinika abakoRubeni labakoGadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase ukuba yilifa. 
Joshua12:7 Lala ngamakhosi elizwe uJoshuwa labantwana bakoIsrayeli abawatshayayo nganeno kweJordani entshonalanga, kusukela eBhali-Gadi esihotsheni seLebhanoni kusiya entabeni elugwadule eyenyukela eSeyiri. UJoshuwa walinika-ke izizwe zakoIsrayeli laba yilifa njengokwehlukaniswa kwazo:" 
Joshua12:8 Ezintabeni, lezihotsheni, lemagcekeni, lemawatheni, lenkangala, leningizimu: AmaHethi, amaAmori, lamaKhanani, amaPerizi, amaHivi, lamaJebusi." 
Joshua12:9 Inkosi yeJeriko, eyodwa; inkosi yeAyi, eseceleni kweBhetheli, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:10 inkosi yeJerusalema, eyodwa; inkosi yeHebroni, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:11 inkosi yeJarimuthi, eyodwa; inkosi yeLakishi, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:12 inkosi yeEgiloni, eyodwa; inkosi yeGezeri, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:13 inkosi yeDebiri, eyodwa; inkosi yeGederi, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:14 inkosi yeHorma, eyodwa; inkosi yeAradi, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:15 inkosi yeLibhina, eyodwa; inkosi yeAdulamu, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:16 inkosi yeMakeda, eyodwa; inkosi yeBhetheli, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:17 inkosi yeTapuwa, eyodwa; inkosi yeHeferi, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:18 inkosi yeAfeki, eyodwa; inkosi yeLasharoni, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:19 inkosi yeMadoni, eyodwa; inkosi yeHazori, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:20 inkosi yeShimironi-Meroni, eyodwa; inkosi yeAkishafi, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:21 inkosi yeThahanakhi, eyodwa; inkosi yeMegido, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:22 inkosi yeKedeshi, eyodwa; inkosi yeJokineyamu eKharmeli, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:23 inkosi yeDori emngceleni weDori, eyodwa; inkosi yezizwe zeGiligali, eyodwa;" 
Joshua12:24 inkosi yeTiriza, eyodwa; wonke amakhosi angamatshumi amathathu lanye." 
Joshua13:1 UJoshuwa wayesemdala eleminyaka eminengi. I Nkosi yasisithi kuye: Usumdala, uleminyaka eminengi, kusasele ilizwe elikhulu kakhulu ukudla ilifa lalo." 
Joshua13:2 Yileli ilizwe eliseleyo: Yonke imingcele yamaFilisti, leGeshuri yonke," 
Joshua13:3 kusukela eShihori eliphambi kweGibhithe, kusiya emngceleni weEkhironi enyakatho, elibalelwa kumaKhanani; ababusi abahlanu bamaFilisti, abeGaza, labeAshidodi, abeAshikeloni, abeGathi, labeEkhironi, labeAvi," 
Joshua13:4 kusukela eningizimu, ilizwe lonke lamaKhanani, leMeyara elingelamaSidoni, kuze kufike eAfeki, kuze kube semngceleni wamaAmori," 
Joshua13:5 lelizwe lamaGebali, leLebhanoni lonke, kusiya empumalanga, kusukela eBhali-Gadi ngaphansi kwentaba yeHermoni, kusiya ekungeneni kweHamathi." 
Joshua13:6 Bonke abakhileyo ezintabeni, kusukela eLebhanoni kusiya eMisirefothi-Mayimi, wonke amaSidoni, mina ngizabaxotsha elifeni phambi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli. Kuphela ulabele uIsrayeli ngenkatho libe yilifa, njengoba ngikulayile." 
Joshua13:7 Ngakho-ke yehlukanisa ilizwe leli libe yilifa ezizweni eziyisificamunwemunye lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase. 
Joshua13:8 Kanye labo abakoRubeni labakoGadi bemukela ilifa labo, uMozisi owabanika lona, ngaphetsheya kweJordani ngempumalanga, njengalokho uMozisi inceku ye Nkosi wabanika:" 
Joshua13:9 Kusukela eAroweri esekhunjini lwesifula seArinoni, lomuzi ophakathi kwesifula, lamagceke wonke eMedeba kuze kube seDiboni," 
Joshua13:10 lemizi yonke kaSihoni inkosi yamaAmori owabusa eHeshiboni, kuze kube semngceleni wabantwana bakoAmoni," 
Joshua13:11 leGileyadi lomngcele wamaGeshuri lamaMahakathi lentaba yonke yeHermoni leBashani lonke kuze kube seSaleka," 
Joshua13:12 umbuso wonke kaOgi eBashani owabusa eAshitarothi leEdreyi. Nguye owasala kunsali yeziqhwaga. UMozisi wayebatshaye-ke wabaxotsha elifeni labo. 
Joshua13:13 Kodwa abantwana bakoIsrayeli kabawaxotshanga elifeni amaGeshuri lamaMahakathi; kodwa amaGeshuri lamaMahakathi ahlala phakathi kukaIsrayeli kuze kube lamuhla. 
Joshua13:14 Kuphela esizweni sakoLevi kanikanga ilifa; iminikelo ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli eyenziwe ngomlilo iyilifa laso, njengokutsho kwayo kuso." 
Joshua13:15 UMozisi wasenika isizwe sabantwana bakoRubeni ngokwensendo zabo. 
Joshua13:16 Lomngcele waso wasukela eAroweri esekhunjini lwesifula seArinoni, lomuzi ophakathi kwesifula, lamagceke wonke eMedeba," 
Joshua13:17 iHeshiboni, lemizi yayo yonke esemagcekeni, iDiboni leBamothi-Bhali leBeti-Bhali-Meyoni," 
Joshua13:18 leJahazi leKedemothi leMefahathi," 
Joshua13:19 leKiriyathayimi leSibima leZerethi-Shahari entabeni yesigodi," 
Joshua13:20 leBeti-Peyori leAshidodi-Pisiga leBeti-Jeshimothi," 
Joshua13:21 lemizi yonke yamagceke, lombuso wonke kaSihoni inkosi yamaAmori, owayebusa eHeshiboni, uMozisi amtshaya leziphathamandla zeMidiyani, oEvi loRekemi loZuri loHuri loReba, amakhosana kaSihoni, abakhileyo belizwe." 
Joshua13:22 LoBalami indodana kaPeyori, ovumisayo, abantwana bakoIsrayeli bambulala ngenkemba phakathi kwababuleweyo babo." 
Joshua13:23 Lomngcele wabantwana bakoRubeni wawuyiJordani lomngcele wayo. Lokhu kwakuyilifa labantwana bakoRubeni ngokwensendo zabo, imizi lemizana yayo." 
Joshua13:24 UMozisi wasenika isizwe sakoGadi, kubantwana bakoGadi ngokwensendo zabo." 
Joshua13:25 Lomngcele wabo wawuyiJazeri layo yonke imizi yeGileyadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yelizwe labantwana bakoAmoni, kusiya eAroweri, ephambi kweRaba," 
Joshua13:26 njalo kusukela eHeshiboni kusiya eRamathi-Mizipa leBetonimi, njalo kusukela eMahanayimi kuze kube semngceleni weDebhiri;" 
Joshua13:27 lesigodini, iBeti-Harama leBeti-Nimira leSukothi leZafoni, insali yombuso kaSihoni inkosi yeHeshiboni, iJordani lomngcele, kuze kube sekupheleni kolwandle lweKinerethi ngaphetsheya kweJordani empumalanga." 
Joshua13:28 Leli yilifa labantwana bakoGadi ngokwensendo zabo, imizi lemizana yabo." 
Joshua13:29 UMozisi wasenika ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase ilifa; njalo yayingeyengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sabantwana bakoManase ngokwensendo zabo. 
Joshua13:30 Lomngcele wabo wasukela eMahanayimi, iBashani lonke, umbuso wonke kaOgi inkosi yeBashani, layo yonke imizana yeJayiri eseBashani, imizi engamatshumi ayisithupha." 
Joshua13:31 Lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yeGileyadi, leAshitarothi, leEdreyi, imizi yombuso kaOgi eBashani, yayingeyabantwana bakoMakiri indodana kaManase, ngitsho eyengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yabantwana bakoMakiri ngokwensendo zabo." 
Joshua13:32 La yiwo uMozisi awanika aba yilifa emagcekeni akoMowabi ngaphetsheya kweJordani eJeriko empumalanga. 
Joshua13:33 Kodwa esizweni sakoLevi uMozisi kanikanga ilifa; i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, iyilifa labo, njengokutsho kwayo kubo." 
Joshua14:1 Lala ngamazwe abantwana bakoIsrayeli abawadla abe yilifa elizweni leKhanani, uEleyazare umpristi loJoshuwa indodana kaNuni lenhloko zaboyise bezizwe zabantwana bakoIsrayeli ababanika wona aba yilifa," 
Joshua14:2 ngenkatho yelifa labo, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi ngesandla sikaMozisi, ngezizwe eziyisificamunwemunye lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe." 
Joshua14:3 Ngoba uMozisi wayesenike ilifa izizwe ezimbili lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe ngaphetsheya kweJordani; kodwa kumaLevi kanikanga ilifa phakathi kwazo. 
Joshua14:4 Ngoba abantwana bakoJosefa babeyizizwe ezimbili, uManase loEfrayimi. Njalo kabawanikanga amaLevi isabelo elizweni, ngaphandle kwemizi yokuhlala, lamadlelo ayo ezifuyo zabo lempahla zabo." 
Joshua14:5 Njengokulaya kwe Nkosi kuMozisi, abantwana bakoIsrayeli benza njalo, balaba ilizwe." 
Joshua14:6 Khona abantwana bakoJuda basondela kuJoshuwa eGiligali; uKalebi indodana kaJefune umKenizi wasesithi kuye: Wena uyalazi ilizwi i Nkosi eyalikhuluma kuMozisi umuntu kaNkulunkulu mayelana lawe lamayelana lami eKadeshi-Bhaneya. 
Joshua14:7 Ngangileminyaka engamatshumi amane lapho uMozisi inceku ye Nkosi ingithuma ngisuka eKadeshi-Bhaneya ukuhlola ilizwe. Ngasengibuyisela kuye umbiko njengokusenhliziyweni yami. 
Joshua14:8 Kodwa abazalwane bami ababenyuke lami benza inhliziyo zabantu zancibilika; kodwa mina ngayilandela ngokupheleleyo i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wami. 
Joshua14:9 UMozisi wasefunga mhlalokho esithi: Isibili umhlaba olunyathele kuwo unyawo lwakho uzakuba ngowakho ube yilifa, lebantwaneni bakho kuze kube nininini, ngoba uyilandele ngokupheleleyo i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wami." 
Joshua14:10 Khathesi-ke khangela, i Nkosi ingilondoloze ngiphila njengokutsho kwayo okwale iminyaka engamatshumi amane lanhlanu, kusukela esikhathini i Nkosi eyakhuluma ngaso lelilizwi kuMozisi, uIsrayeli esahamba enkangala. Khathesi-ke khangela, lamuhla ngileminyaka engamatshumi ayisificaminwembili lanhlanu." 
Joshua14:11 Ngisaqinile lalamuhla njengasosukwini uMozisi angithuma ngalo. Njengamandla ami ngalesosikhathi, asenjalo amandla ami khathesi, awempi lawokuphuma lawokungena." 
Joshua14:12 Ngakho-ke nginika lintaba i Nkosi eyakhuluma ngayo ngalolosuku, ngoba wena wezwa mhlalokho ukuthi amaAnaki ayekhona lapho lemizi emikhulu ebiyelwe ngemithangala. Aluba i Nkosi ilami, ngizawaxotsha elifeni, njengokutsho kwe Nkosi." 
Joshua14:13 UJoshuwa wasembusisa wanika uKalebi indodana kaJefune iHebroni ibe yilifa. 
Joshua14:14 Ngalokho-ke iHebroni yaba ngekaKalebi indodana kaJefune umKenizi yaba yilifa kuze kube lamuhla, ngoba wayilandela ngokupheleleyo i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
Joshua14:15 Lebizo leHebroni kuqala laliyiKiriyathi-Arba, owayengumuntu omkhulu phakathi kwamaAnaki. Ilizwe laseliphumula empini." 
Joshua15:1 Lenkatho yesizwe sabantwana bakoJuda ngokwensendo zabo yayisemngceleni weEdoma, inkangala yeZini ngeningizimu ephethelweni eningizimu." 
Joshua15:2 Lomngcele wabo weningizimu wawusuka ephethelweni loLwandle lweTswayi, kusukela ethekwini elikhangela eningizimu." 
Joshua15:3 Waphuma waya eningizimu emqansweni weAkirabimi, wedlulela eZini, wenyuka usuka eningizimu kusiya eKadeshi-Bhaneya, wedlulele eHezironi, wenyukele eAdari, uphendukele eKarika," 
Joshua15:4 wedlulele eAzimoni, uphumele esifuleni seGibhithe; lokuphuma komngcele kwakuselwandle. Lo uzakuba ngumngcele wenu eningizimu." 
Joshua15:5 Njalo umngcele wempumalanga wawuluLwandle lweTswayi, kusiya ephethelweni leJordani. Lomngcele ehlangothini lwenyakatho wasukela ethekwini lolwandle, kusukela ephethelweni leJordani." 
Joshua15:6 Lomngcele wenyukela eBeti-Hogila, wedlula kusuka enyakatho kusiya eBeti-Araba; lomngcele wenyukela elitsheni likaBohani indodana kaRubeni." 
Joshua15:7 Lomngcele wenyukela eDebiri kusuka esihotsheni seAkori, usiya enyakatho ukhangele eGiligali, omaqondana lomqanso weAdumimi, ongeningizimu kwesifula. Lomngcele wedlula usiya emanzini eEni-Shemeshi, lokuphuma kwawo kwakuseEni-Rogeli." 
Joshua15:8 Lomngcele wenyuka ngesihotsha sendodana kaHinomu usiya ehlangothini lwamaJebusi eningizimu, okuyiJerusalema. Lomngcele wenyukela engqongeni yentaba ephambi kwesihotsha seHinomu entshonalanga, elisephethelweni lesihotsha seziqhwaga enyakatho." 
Joshua15:9 Lomngcele wadwetshwa usuka engqongeni yentaba kuze kube semthonjeni wamanzi eNefitowa, waphumela emizini yentaba yeEfroni. Lomngcele wadwetshwa usiya eBhahala, okuyiKiriyathi-Jeyarimi." 
Joshua15:10 Lomngcele wabhoda usuka eBhahala ngentshonalanga waya entabeni yeSeyiri, wedlulele eceleni kwentaba yeJeyarimi, eyiKesaloni, wehlele eBeti-Shemeshi, wedlule eThiminathi." 
Joshua15:11 Lomngcele waphuma uye eceleni kweEkhironi enyakatho; lomngcele wadwetshwa uye eShikeroni, wedlula intaba yeBhahala, waphumela eJabineli; lokuphuma komngcele kwakuselwandle." 
Joshua15:12 Lomngcele wentshonalanga wawululwandle olukhulu lokhumbi. Lo ngumngcele wabantwana bakoJuda inhlangothi zonke ngokwensendo zabo. 
Joshua15:13 Wasemupha uKalebi indodana kaJefune isabelo phakathi kwabantwana bakoJuda, ngokomlayo we Nkosi kuJoshuwa, iKiriyathi-Arba, uyise kaAnaki, eyiHebroni." 
Joshua15:14 UKalebi wasexotsha elifeni amadodana amathathu kaAnaki asuke lapho, uSheshayi loAhimani loTalimayi, abantwana bakaAnaki." 
Joshua15:15 Wasesenyuka esuka lapho waya kwabakhileyo beDebiri. Lebizo leDebiri kuqala laliyiKiriyathi-Seferi. 
Joshua15:16 UKalebi wasesithi: Lowo otshaya iKiriyathi-Seferi, ayithumbe, ngizamupha uAkisa indodakazi yami abe ngumka khe." 
Joshua15:17 UOthiniyeli indodana kaKenazi, umnawakhe kaKalebi, waseyithumba; wasemnika uAkisa indodakazi yakhe ukuba ngumka khe." 
Joshua15:18 Kwasekusithi ekufikeni kwakhe wamkhuthaza ukuthi acele kuyise insimu; wasesehla kubabhemi, uKalebi wasesithi kuye: Ukhala ngani?" 
Joshua15:19 Wasesithi: Ngipha isibusiso. Njengoba ungiphe ilizwe elomileyo, ngipha njalo imithombo yamanzi. Wasemnika imithombo engaphezulu lemithombo engaphansi." 
Joshua15:20 Leli yilifa lesizwe sabantwana bakoJuda ngokwensendo zabo. 
Joshua15:21 Lemizi esukela ekucineni kwesizwe sabantwana bakoJuda kusiya emngceleni weEdoma yile: IKabhiseyeli leEderi leJaguri 
Joshua15:22 leKina leDimona leAdada 
Joshua15:23 leKedeshi leHazori leIthinani," 
Joshua15:24 iZifi leTelema leBeyalothi 
Joshua15:25 leHazori-Hadatha leKeriyothi, iHezironi okuyiHazori," 
Joshua15:26 iAmama leShema leMolada 
Joshua15:27 leHazari-Gada leHeshimoni leBeti-Peleti 
Joshua15:28 leHazari-Shuwali leBherishebha leBiziyothiya," 
Joshua15:29 iBhahala leIyimi leEzema 
Joshua15:30 leElitoladi leKesili leHorma 
Joshua15:31 leZikilagi leMadimana leSansana 
Joshua15:32 leLebayothi leShilihimi leEni leRimoni. Yonke imizi ingamatshumi amabili lesificamunwemunye lemizana yayo. 
Joshua15:33 Esihotsheni: IEshitawoli leZora leAshina 
Joshua15:34 leZanowa leEni-Ganimi, iTapuwa leEnama," 
Joshua15:35 iJarimuthi leAdulamu, iSoko leAzeka" 
Joshua15:36 leShaharayimi leAdithayimi leGedera leGederothayimi; imizi elitshumi lane lemizana yayo. 
Joshua15:37 IZenani leHadasha leMigidali-Gadi 
Joshua15:38 leDileyani leMizipa leJokhitheyeli," 
Joshua15:39 iLakishi leBhozikhathi leEgiloni 
Joshua15:40 leKhabhoni leLahimasa leKitilishi 
Joshua15:41 leGederothi, iBeti-Dagoni, leNahama, leMakeda; imizi elitshumi lesithupha lemizana yayo." 
Joshua15:42 ILibhina leEtheri leAshani 
Joshua15:43 leJifitha leAshina leNezibhi 
Joshua15:44 leKeyila leAkizibi leMaresha; imizi eyisificamunwemunye lemizana yayo. 
Joshua15:45 IEkhironi lemizi yayo lemizana yayo. 
Joshua15:46 Kusukela eEkhironi kusiya elwandle, yonke eseceleni kweAshidodi lemizana yayo:" 
Joshua15:47 IAshidodi, imizi yayo lemizana yayo; iGaza, imizi yayo lemizana yayo; kusiya esifuleni seGibhithe, lolwandle olukhulu, lomngcele." 
Joshua15:48 Lezintabeni: IShamiri leJatiri leSoko 
Joshua15:49 leDana leKiriyathi-Sana okuyiDebiri," 
Joshua15:50 leAnabi leEshithemo leAnimi 
Joshua15:51 leGosheni leHoloni leGilo; imizi elitshumi lanye lemizana yayo. 
Joshua15:52 IArabi leDuma leEshani 
Joshua15:53 leJanumi leBeti-Tapuwa leAfeka 
Joshua15:54 leHumta leKiriyathi-Arba, okuyiHebroni, leZiyori; imizi eyisificamunwemunye lemizana yayo." 
Joshua15:55 IMayoni, iKharmeli leZifi leJuta" 
Joshua15:56 leJizereyeli leJokideyama leZanoya," 
Joshua15:57 iKayini, iGibeya leTimina; imizi elitshumi lemizana yayo." 
Joshua15:58 IHalihuli, iBeti-Zuri leGedori" 
Joshua15:59 leMarathi leBeti-Anothi leElitekoni; imizi eyisithupha lemizana yayo. 
Joshua15:60 iKiriyathi-Bhali, okuyiKiriyathi-Jeyarimi, leRaba; imizi emibili lemizana yayo." 
Joshua15:61 Enkangala: IBeti-Araba, iMidini leSekaka" 
Joshua15:62 leNibishani, lomuzi wetswayi, leEngedi; imizi eyisithupha lemizana yayo." 
Joshua15:63 Kodwa amaJebusi, abahlali beJerusalema, abantwana bakoJuda babengelakho ukuwaxotsha elifeni; ngakho amaJebusi ahlala labantwana bakoJuda eJerusalema kuze kube lamuhla." 
Joshua16:1 Kwasekuphuma inkatho yabantwana bakoJosefa kusukela eJordani eJeriko, kusiya emanzini eJeriko ngempumalanga, inkangala isenyuka isuka eJeriko entabeni yeBhetheli;" 
Joshua16:2 yasiphuma eBhetheli isiya eLuzi, yadlulela emngceleni wamaAriki eAtarothi," 
Joshua16:3 yehlela entshonalanga emngceleni wamaJafilethi, isiya emngceleni weBethi-Horoni ngaphansi, kwaze kwaba seGezeri; lokuphuma kwayo kwakuselwandle." 
Joshua16:4 Ngakho abantwana bakoJosefa, uManase loEfrayimi, balidla ilifa." 
Joshua16:5 Lomngcele wabantwana bakoEfrayimi ngokwensendo zabo wawu nje: Ngitsho umngcele welifa labo empumalanga wawuyiAtarothi-Adari kuze kufike eBethi-Horoni ngaphezulu. 
Joshua16:6 Umngcele wasuphumela elwandle, eMikimethathi enyakatho; lomngcele waphendukela empumalanga eTanathi-Shilo, wedlula empumalanga usiya eJanowa;" 
Joshua16:7 wasusehla usuka eJanowa usiya eAtarothi leNahara, wagudla iJeriko, waphumela eJordani." 
Joshua16:8 Kusukela eTapuwa umngcele waya entshonalanga esifuleni iKana, lokuphuma kwawo waba selwandle. Leli yilifa lesizwe sabantwana bakoEfrayimi ngokwensendo zabo." 
Joshua16:9 Lemizi eyayehlukaniselwe abantwana bakoEfrayimi yayiphakathi kwelifa labantwana bakoManase, yonke imizi lemizana yayo." 
Joshua16:10 Kodwa kabawaxotshanga elifeni amaKhanani ayehlala eGezeri. Ngakho amaKhanani ahlala phakathi kwabakoEfrayimi kuze kube lamuhla, ayesebenza njengezibhalwa." 
Joshua17:1 Kwasekusiba lenkatho yesizwe sakoManase, ngoba wayelizibulo likaJosefa, enge kaMakiri izibulo likaManase uyise kaGileyadi; ngoba yena wayengumuntu wempi; ngakho waba leGileyadi leBashani." 
Joshua17:2 Yayikhona njalo eyabaseleyo babantwana bakoManase ngokwensendo zabo, eyabantwana bakoAbiyezeri, leyabantwana bakoHeleki, leyabantwana bakoAsiriyeli, leyabantwana bakoShekema, leyabantwana bakoHeferi, leyabantwana bakoShemida. Laba ngabantwana besilisa bakaManase indodana kaJosefa ngokwensendo zabo." 
Joshua17:3 Kodwa uZelofehadi indodana kaHeferi indodana kaGileyadi indodana kaMakiri indodana kaManase wayengelamadodana, kodwa amadodakazi. Lala ngamabizo amadodakazi akhe: OMahla loNowa, uHogila, uMilka loTiriza." 
Joshua17:4 Asesondela phambi kukaEleyazare umpristi laphambi kukaJoshuwa indodana kaNuni laphambi kweziphathamandla, esithi: I Nkosi yalaya uMozisi ukusinika ilifa phakathi kwabafowethu. Ngakho wawanika ngokomlayo we Nkosi ilifa phakathi kwabafowabo bakayise." 
Joshua17:5 Ngakho kwawela inkatho ezilitshumi kuManase, ngaphandle kwelizwe leGileyadi leBashani, elingaphetsheya kweJordani." 
Joshua17:6 Ngoba amadodakazi kaManase adla ilifa phakathi kwamadodana akhe. Lelizwe leGileyadi laba ngelabaseleyo bamadodana akoManase. 
Joshua17:7 Umngcele wakoManase wasusukela eAsheri usiya eMikimethathi ephambi kweShekema; lomngcele waya ngakwesokunene kubahlali beEni-Tapuwa. 
Joshua17:8 UManase waba lelizwe leTapuwa, kodwa iTapuwa emngceleni kaManase yayingeyabantwana bakoEfrayimi." 
Joshua17:9 Lomngcele wehlela esifuleni iKana eningizimu kwesifula. Imizi le ngeyakoEfrayimi phakathi kwemizi yakoManase. Lomngcele wakoManase usenyakatho kwesifula, lokuphuma kwawo kuselwandle." 
Joshua17:10 Eningizimu lalingelakoEfrayimi, lenyakatho lalingelakoManase, lolwandle lungumngcele wakhe. LeAsheri bahlangana enyakatho, leIsakari empumalanga." 
Joshua17:11 Ngoba koIsakari loAsheri uManase wayeleBeti-Sheyani lemizana yayo, leIbileyamu lemizana yayo, labahlali beDori lemizana yayo, labahlali beEni-Dori lemizana yayo, labahlali beThahanakhi lemizana yayo, labahlali beMegido lemizana yayo: Amadundulu amathathu." 
Joshua17:12 Kodwa abantwana bakoManase babengelakho ukuxotsha elifeni leyomizi, kodwa amaKhanani ayefuna ukuhlala kulelolizwe." 
Joshua17:13 Kodwa kwathi lapho abantwana bakoIsrayeli sebelamandla bawasebenzisa amaKhanani njengezibhalwa, kodwa kabawaxotshanga lokuwaxotsha elifeni." 
Joshua17:14 Abantwana bakoJosefa basebekhuluma kuJoshuwa besithi: Unginikeleni inkatho eyodwa lesabelo esisodwa ukuba yilifa, kube kanti ngiyisizwe esikhulu, njengoba i Nkosi ingibusisile kuze kube lapha?" 
Joshua17:15 UJoshuwa wasesithi kubo: Uba uyisizwe esikhulu, wena yenyukela eguswini, uzicentele khona elizweni lamaPerizi leleziqhwaga, nxa intaba yakoEfrayimi iminyene kuwe." 
Joshua17:16 Abantwana bakoJosefa basebesithi: Intaba kayisanelanga, njalo kulenqola zensimbi lamaKhanani wonke ahlala elizweni lesihotsha, lawaseBeti-Sheyani lemizana yayo, lawasesigodini seJizereyeli." 
Joshua17:17 UJoshuwa wasekhuluma kundlu kaJosefa, kuEfrayimi lakuManase esithi: Uyisizwe esikhulu, futhi ulamandla amakhulu; kawuyikuba lenkatho eyodwa," 
Joshua17:18 kodwa intaba izakuba ngeyakho; ngoba iligusu, uzalicenta, lokuphuma kwalo kube ngokwakho, ngoba uzawaxotsha elifeni amaKhanani, lanxa elenqola zensimbi, lanxa elamandla." 
Joshua18:1 Inhlangano yonke-ke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli yabuthana eShilo, yamisa khona ithente lenhlangano. Lelizwe lalehliselwe phansi phambi kwabo." 
Joshua18:2 Kwasekusele phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli izizwe eziyisikhombisa ezazingabelwanga ilifa lazo. 
Joshua18:3 UJoshuwa wasesithi kubantwana bakoIsrayeli: Koze kube nini lidonda ukuyakudla ilifa lelizwe i Nkosi uNkulunkulu waboyihlo elinike lona? 
Joshua18:4 Zinikeni amadoda amathathu ngesizwe, ngiwathume, asukume ahambe adabule ilizwe, alibhale ngokwelifa lazo, abuye kimi." 
Joshua18:5 Azalehlukanisa libe yizabelo eziyisikhombisa; uJuda uzahlala emngceleni wakhe eningizimu, labendlu kaJosefa bahlale emngceleni wabo enyakatho." 
Joshua18:6 Lani lizabhala ilizwe ngezigaba eziyisikhombisa, beseliletha kimi lapha, ukuthi ngiliphosele inkatho lapha phambi kwe Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu." 
Joshua18:7 Ngoba amaLevi kawalasabelo phakathi kwenu, ngoba ubupristi be Nkosi buyilifa labo. LoGadi loRubeni lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase sebethethe ilifa labo ngaphetsheya kweJordani empumalanga, uMozisi inceku ye Nkosi eyabanika lona." 
Joshua18:8 Asesuka amadoda ahamba. UJoshuwa wawalaya ahambayo ukubhala ilizwe esithi: Hambani lidabule ilizwe lilibhale, libuyele kimi, ukuze ngiliphosele inkatho lapha phambi kwe Nkosi eShilo." 
Joshua18:9 Ngakho amadoda ahamba adabula phakathi kwelizwe, alibhala ngemizi ngezigaba eziyisikhombisa egwalweni; asebuya kuJoshuwa enkambeni eShilo." 
Joshua18:10 UJoshuwa wasebaphosela inkatho eShilo phambi kwe Nkosi; uJoshuwa wasebabela lapho ilizwe abantwana bakoIsrayeli ngokwezigaba zabo. 
Joshua18:11 Inkatho yesizwe sabantwana bakoBhenjamini yavela ngokwensendo zabo. Lomngcele wenkatho yabo waphuma phakathi kwabantwana bakoJuda labantwana bakoJosefa. 
Joshua18:12 Lomngcele wabo ngenyakatho wasukela eJordani, lomngcele wenyuka ewatheni leJeriko enyakatho, wasusenyuka udabula entabeni usiya entshonalanga, lokuphuma kwawo waba senkangala yeBeti-Aveni." 
Joshua18:13 Lomngcele wedlula usuka lapho waya eLuzi, ewatheni leLuzi, eyiBhetheli, ngeningizimu; lomngcele wehlela eAtarothi-Adari, eduze lentaba engeningizimu kweBethi-Horoni engaphansi." 
Joshua18:14 Umngcele wadwetshwa-ke, waphenduka waya eceleni lentshonalanga ngeningizimu, kusukela entabeni emaqondana leBethi-Horoni eningizimu; lokuphuma kwawo kwaba eKiriyathi-Bhali, eyiKiriyathi-Jeyarimi, umuzi wabantwana bakoJuda. Lolu luhlangothi lwentshonalanga." 
Joshua18:15 Lohlangothi lweningizimu lusephethelweni leKiriyathi-Jeyarimi; lomngcele waphuma waya entshonalanga, waphuma waya emthonjeni wamanzi weNefitowa." 
Joshua18:16 Umngcele wasusehla usiya ephethelweni lentaba emaqondana lesihotsha sendodana kaHinomu esisesihotsheni seziqhwaga enyakatho, wasusehlela esihotsheni seHinomu ewatheni lamaJebusi eningizimu, wehlela eEni-Rogeli;" 
Joshua18:17 wadwetshwa usukela enyakatho waphuma eEni-Shemeshi, waphumela eGelilothi emaqondana lomqanso weAdumimi, wehlela elitsheni likaBohani indodana kaRubeni;" 
Joshua18:18 wadlulela ewatheni maqondana leAraba enyakatho, wehlela eAraba." 
Joshua18:19 Umngcele wasusedlulela ewatheni leBeti-Hogila enyakatho, lokuphuma komngcele kwakusethekwini loLwandle lweTswayi enyakatho, ephethelweni leJordani ngeningizimu. Lo ngumngcele weningizimu." 
Joshua18:20 LeJordani ingumngcele walo ehlangothini lwempumalanga. Leli yilifa labantwana bakoBhenjamini ngemingcele yalo inhlangothi zonke, ngokwensendo zabo." 
Joshua18:21 Lemizi yesizwe sabantwana bakoBhenjamini ngokwensendo zabo yile: IJeriko leBeti-Hogila leEmeki-Kezizi 
Joshua18:22 leBeti-Araba leZemarayimi leBhetheli 
Joshua18:23 leAvimi lePara leOfira 
Joshua18:24 leKefari-Amoni leOfini leGeba; imizi elitshumi lambili lemizana yayo. 
Joshua18:25 IGibeyoni leRama leBeyerothi 
Joshua18:26 leMizipa leKefira leMoza 
Joshua18:27 leRekemi leIripheyeli leTarala 
Joshua18:28 leZela, iElefi, leJebusi, okuyiJerusalema, iGibeyathi, iKiriyathi; imizi elitshumi lane lemizana yayo. Leli yilifa labantwana bakoBhenjamini ngokwensendo zabo." 
Joshua19:1 Inkatho yesibili yasivela yaya kuSimeyoni, eyesizwe sabantwana bakoSimeyoni, ngokwensendo zabo. Lelifa labo laliphakathi kwelifa labantwana bakoJuda." 
Joshua19:2 Elifeni labo-ke babeleBherishebha leShebha leMolada 
Joshua19:3 leHazari-Shuwali leBala leEzema 
Joshua19:4 leElitoladi leBethuli leHorma 
Joshua19:5 leZikilagi leBeti-Marikabothi leHazari-Susa 
Joshua19:6 leBeti-Lebawothi leSharuheni; imizi elitshumi lantathu lemizana yayo. 
Joshua19:7 IEni, iRimoni leEtheri leAshani; imizi emine lemizana yayo." 
Joshua19:8 Layo yonke imizana ezingelezele imizi le, kuze kufike eBahalathi-Beri, iRama yeningizimu. Leli yilifa lesizwe sabantwana bakoSimeyoni ngokwensendo zabo." 
Joshua19:9 Ilifa labantwana bakoSimeyoni lavela enkathweni yabantwana bakoJuda; ngoba isigaba sabantwana bakoJuda sasisikhulu kakhulu kibo; ngakho abantwana bakoSimeyoni badla ilifa phakathi kwelifa labo. 
Joshua19:10 Inkatho yesithathu yasivela yaya kubantwana bakoZebuluni ngokwensendo zabo. Lomngcele welifa labo wafika eSaridi. 
Joshua19:11 Umngcele wabo-ke wenyukela entshonalanga leMarala, wafinyelela eDabeshethi wafinyelela esifuleni esiphambi kweJokineyamu;" 
Joshua19:12 waphenduka uvela eSaridi usiya empumalanga lapho okuphuma khona ilanga emngceleni weKisilothi-Thabhori, waphuma waya eDaberathi, wenyukela eJafiya;" 
Joshua19:13 ususuka lapho wedlulela empumalanga, endaweni yokuphuma kwelanga, usiya eGitha -Heferi leItha-Kazini, waphumela eRimoni, uphendukela eNeya." 
Joshua19:14 Lomngcele wayizingelezela enyakatho eHanathoni; lokuphuma kwawo kwaba sesihotsheni seJifitaheli. 
Joshua19:15 LeKatathi leNahalali leShimironi leJidala leBhethelehema, imizi elitshumi lambili lemizana yayo." 
Joshua19:16 Leli yilifa labantwana bakoZebuluni ngokwensendo zabo: Imizi le lemizana yayo. 
Joshua19:17 Inkatho yesine yavela yaya kubantwana bakoIsakari ngokwensendo zabo. 
Joshua19:18 Umngcele wabo-ke wawuyiJizereyeli leKesulothi leShunemi 
Joshua19:19 leHafarayimi leShiyoni leAnaharathi 
Joshua19:20 leRabithi leKishiyoni leAbezi 
Joshua19:21 leRemethi leEni-Ganimi leEni-Hada leBeti-Pazezi. 
Joshua19:22 Lomngcele wafinyelela eThabhori leShahazima leBeti-Shemeshi; lokuphuma komngcele wabo kwakuseJordani; imizi elitshumi lesithupha lemizana yayo. 
Joshua19:23 Leli yilifa lesizwe sabantwana bakoIsakari ngokwensendo zabo, imizi lemizana yayo." 
Joshua19:24 Inkatho yesihlanu yasivela yaya esizweni sabantwana bakoAsheri ngokwensendo zabo. 
Joshua19:25 Umngcele wabo-ke wawuyiHelkathi leHali leBeteni leAkishafi 
Joshua19:26 leAlameleki leAmadi leMishali; wasufinyelela eKharmeli entshonalanga leShihori-Libhinathi," 
Joshua19:27 waphendukela lapho okuphuma khona ilanga usiya eBeti-Dagoni, wafinyelela eZebuluni lesihotsha seJifitaheli enyakatho waya eBeti-Emeki leNeyiyeli, waphumela eKabuli kwesokhohlo," 
Joshua19:28 leEbroni leRehobi leHamoni leKana, kwaze kwaba seSidoni enkulu." 
Joshua19:29 Umngcele wasuphendukela eRama, waya emzini obiyelweyo weTire; lomngcele waphendukela eHosa; lokuphuma kwawo kwakuselwandle, uvela esigabeni usiya eAkizibi" 
Joshua19:30 leUma leAfeki leRehobi; imizi engamatshumi amabili lambili lemizana yayo. 
Joshua19:31 Leli yilifa lesizwe sabantwana bakoAsheri ngokwensendo zabo, imizi le lemizana yayo." 
Joshua19:32 Inkatho yesithupha yavela yaya kubantwana bakoNafithali, eyabantwana bakoNafithali ngokwensendo zabo." 
Joshua19:33 Umngcele wabo wasusuka eHelefi, esihlahleni se-okhi * eZahananimi leAdami-Nekebi leJabineli, kwaze kwaba seLakumi; lokuphuma kwawo wawuseJordani." 
Joshua19:34 Umngcele wasuphendukela entshonalanga usiya eAzinothi-Thabhori, waphuma lapho waya eHukoki, wafinyelela eZebuluni ngeningizimu, leAsheri wafinyelela entshonalanga, leJuda eJordani lapho okuphuma khona ilanga." 
Joshua19:35 Njalo imizi ebiyelweyo yile: IZidimi, iZeri, leHamathi, iRakathi, leKinerethi," 
Joshua19:36 leAdama, leRama, leHazori," 
Joshua19:37 leKedeshi, leEdreyi, leEni-Hazori," 
Joshua19:38 leYironi, leMigidali-Eli, iHorema, leBeti-Anathi, leBeti-Shemeshi; imizi elitshumi lesificamunwemunye lemizana yayo." 
Joshua19:39 Leli yilifa lesizwe sabantwana bakoNafithali ngokwensendo zabo, imizi lemizana yayo." 
Joshua19:40 Inkatho yesikhombisa yavela yaya esizweni sabantwana bakoDani ngokwensendo zabo. 
Joshua19:41 Lomngcele welifa labo wawuyiZora leEshitawoli leIri-Shemeshi 
Joshua19:42 leShahalabini leAjaloni leJithila 
Joshua19:43 leEloni leTiminatha leEkhironi 
Joshua19:44 leEliteke leGibethoni leBahalathi 
Joshua19:45 leJehudi leBene-Beraki leGathi-Rimoni 
Joshua19:46 leMe-Jarkoni leRakoni kanye lomngcele oqondene leJafo. 
Joshua19:47 Lomngcele wabantwana bakoDani wavela umncinyane kakhulu kubo. Ngakho abantwana bakoDani benyuka ukuyakulwa bemelene leLeshema; sebeyithumbile bayitshaya ngobukhali benkemba, badla ilifa layo, bahlala kiyo, bayibiza iLeshema ngokuthi yiDani, ngebizo likaDani uyise." 
Joshua19:48 Leli yilifa lesizwe sabantwana bakoDani ngokwensendo zabo, imizi le lemizana yayo." 
Joshua19:49 Kwathi sebeqedile ukwaba ilizwe libe yilifa ngokwemingcele yalo, abantwana bakoIsrayeli bamnika uJoshuwa indodana kaNuni ilifa phakathi kwabo." 
Joshua19:50 Ngokomlayo we Nkosi bamnika umuzi awucelayo, iThiminathi-Sera entabeni yakoEfrayimi, wasesakha umuzi, wahlala kiwo." 
Joshua19:51 La ngamafa uEleyazare umpristi loJoshuwa indodana kaNuni lenhloko zaboyise zezizwe zabantwana bakoIsrayeli abawaba aba yilifa ngenkatho eShilo phambi kwe Nkosi, emnyango wethente lenhlangano. Baqeda-ke ukulaba ilizwe." 
Joshua20:1 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuJoshuwa isithi: 
Joshua20:2 Khuluma kubantwana bakoIsrayeli uthi: Zikhetheleni imizi yokuphephela engakhuluma ngayo kini ngesandla sikaMozisi," 
Joshua20:3 ukuze umbulali obulala umuntu kungeyisikho ngabomo engazi abalekele khona. Njalo izakuba yisiphephelo kini kumphindiseli wegazi. 
Joshua20:4 Nxa ebalekela komunye walimizi uzakuma emnyango wesango lomuzi, akhulume udaba lwakhe ezindlebeni zabadala balowomuzi; babesebememukela kubo emzini, bamnike indawo ukuthi ahlale labo." 
Joshua20:5 Uba-ke umphindiseli wegazi exotshana laye, kabayikunikela umbulali esandleni sakhe, ngoba utshaye umakhelwane wakhe engazi, ebengamzondi mandulo." 
Joshua20:6 Uzahlala kulowomuzi aze eme phambi kwenhlangano kusenzelwa ukwahlulelwa, kuze kube lokufa kompristi omkhulu oyabe ekhona ngalezonsuku. Umbulali usengabuyela eze emzini wakibo lendlini yakhe, aye emzini abaleke khona." 
Joshua20:7 Basebesehlukanisa iKedeshi eGalili entabeni yakoNafithali, leShekema entabeni yakoEfrayimi, leKiriyathi-Arba okuyiHebroni entabeni yakoJuda." 
Joshua20:8 Langaphetsheya kweJordani eJeriko empumalanga banika iBezeri enkangala emagcekeni esizweni sakoRubeni, leRamothi eGileyadi esizweni sakoGadi, leGolani eBashani esizweni sakoManase." 
Joshua20:9 Le yimizi eyayimiselwe bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli lowezizwe ohlala njengowezizwe phakathi kwabo, ukuze loba ngubani obulala umuntu kungeyisikho ngabomo abalekele khona, ukuze angafi ngesandla somphindiseli wegazi, aze eme phambi kwenhlangano." 
Joshua21:1 Kwasekusondela inhloko zaboyise bamaLevi kuEleyazare umpristi lakuJoshuwa indodana kaNuni lakuzo inhloko zaboyise bezizwe zabantwana bakoIsrayeli," 
Joshua21:2 bakhuluma kubo eShilo elizweni leKhanani, besithi: I Nkosi yalaya ngesandla sikaMozisi ukusinika imizi yokuhlala, lamadlelo ayo ezifuyo zethu." 
Joshua21:3 Ngakho abantwana bakoIsrayeli banika amaLevi okwelifa labo ngokomlayo we Nkosi, limizi lamadlelo ayo." 
Joshua21:4 Kwasekuvela inkatho yensendo zamaKohathi. Abantwana bakoAroni umpristi, abavela kumaLevi, ngenkatho esizweni sakoJuda lesizweni sakoSimeyoni lesizweni sakoBhenjamini, basebesiba lemizi elitshumi lantathu." 
Joshua21:5 Labaseleyo kubantwana bakaKohathi, ngenkatho ensendweni zesizwe sakoEfrayimi lesizweni sakoDani lengxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase, baba lemizi elitshumi." 
Joshua21:6 Labantwana bakoGerishoni, ngenkatho ensendweni zesizwe sakoIsakari lesizweni sakoAsheri lesizweni sakoNafithali lengxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase eBashani, baba lemizi elitshumi lantathu." 
Joshua21:7 Abantwana bakoMerari ngokwensendo zabo, esizweni sakoRubeni lesizweni sakoGadi lesizweni sakoZebuluni, baba lemizi elitshumi lambili." 
Joshua21:8 Labantwana bakoIsrayeli banika amaLevi le imizi lamadlelo ayo ngenkatho, njengokulaya kwe Nkosi ngesandla sikaMozisi." 
Joshua21:9 Basebenika esizweni sabantwana bakoJuda lesizweni sabantwana bakoSimeyoni le imizi, eqanjwa ngebizo," 
Joshua21:10 eyayingeyabantwana bakoAroni, bevela kunsendo zamaKohathi ebantwaneni bakoLevi, ngoba baba lenkatho yokuqala." 
Joshua21:11 Basebebanika iKiriyathi-Arba, uyise kaAnoki, okuyiHebroni, ezintabeni zakoJuda lamadlelo inhlangothi zayo zonke." 
Joshua21:12 Kodwa insimu yomuzi lemizana yawo bakunika uKalebi indodana kaJefune ukuba ngeyakhe. 
Joshua21:13 Ngakho banika abantwana bakoAroni umpristi umuzi wokuphephela wombulali, iHebroni, lamadlelo ayo, leLibhina lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:14 leJatiri lamadlelo ayo, leEshithemowa lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:15 leHoloni lamadlelo ayo, leDebiri lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:16 leAyini lamadlelo ayo, leJuta lamadlelo ayo, leBeti-Shemeshi lamadlelo ayo; imizi eyisificamunwemunye kulezizizwe ezimbili." 
Joshua21:17 Lesizweni sakoBhenjamini: IGibeyoni lamadlelo ayo, iGeba lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:18 iAnathothi lamadlelo ayo, leAlimoni lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emine." 
Joshua21:19 Yonke imizi yabantwana bakoAroni, abapristi, yayilemizi elitshumi lantathu lamadlelo ayo." 
Joshua21:20 Lensendo zabantwana bakoKohathi, amaLevi, asalayo ebantwaneni bakoKohathi, baba lemizi yenkatho yabo esizweni sakoEfrayimi." 
Joshua21:21 Basebebanika umuzi wokuphephela umbulali, iShekema lamadlelo ayo entabeni yakoEfrayimi, leGezeri lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:22 leKibizayimi lamadlelo ayo, leBethi-Horoni lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emine." 
Joshua21:23 Lesizweni sakoDani iEliteke lamadlelo ayo, iGibethoni lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:24 iAjaloni lamadlelo ayo, iGathi-Rimoni lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emine." 
Joshua21:25 Lengxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase, iThahanakhi lamadlelo ayo, leGathi-Rimoni lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emibili." 
Joshua21:26 Yonke imizi yensendo zabantwana bakoKohathi abaseleyo yayilitshumi lamadlelo ayo. 
Joshua21:27 Lakubantwana bakoGerishoni, bensendo zamaLevi, kungxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase, iGolani eBashani, umuzi wokuphephela umbulali, lamadlelo ayo, leBheyeshithera lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emibili." 
Joshua21:28 Lesizweni sakoIsakari, iKishiyoni lamadlelo ayo, iDaberathi lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:29 iJarimuthi lamadlelo ayo, iEni-Ganimi lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emine." 
Joshua21:30 Lesizweni sakoAsheri, iMishali lamadlelo ayo, iAbidoni lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:31 iHelkathi lamadlelo ayo, leRehobi lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emine." 
Joshua21:32 Lesizweni sakoNafithali, iKedeshi eGalili, umuzi wokuphephela umbulali, lamadlelo ayo, leHamothi-Dori lamadlelo ayo, leKaritani lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emithathu." 
Joshua21:33 Yonke imizi yamaGerishoni ngokwensendo zawo yayiyimizi elitshumi lantathu lamadlelo ayo. 
Joshua21:34 Lensendo zabantwana bakoMerari, amaLevi aseleyo, zaba leJokineyamu esizweni sakoZebuluni lamadlelo ayo, leKarita lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:35 iDimina lamadlelo ayo, iNahalali lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emine." 
Joshua21:36 Lesizweni sakoRubeni, iBezeri lamadlelo ayo, leJahazi lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:37 iKedemothi lamadlelo ayo, leMefahathi lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emine." 
Joshua21:38 Lesizweni sakoGadi, iRamothi eGileyadi, umuzi wokuphephela umbulali, lamadlelo ayo, leMahanayimi lamadlelo ayo," 
Joshua21:39 iHeshiboni lamadlelo ayo, iJazeri lamadlelo ayo: Imizi emine isiyonke." 
Joshua21:40 Yonke imizi yayingeyabantwana bakoMerari, ngokwensendo zabo, abaseleyo ensendweni zamaLevi. Lenkatho yabo yayiyimizi elitshumi lambili." 
Joshua21:41 Yonke imizi yamaLevi phakathi kwelifa labantwana bakoIsrayeli yayiyimizi engamatshumi amane lesificaminwembili lamadlelo ayo. 
Joshua21:42 Le imizi, lowo lalowo wawulamadlelo awo inhlangothi zawo zonke. Kwakunjalo kuleyo yonke imizi." 
Joshua21:43 I Nkosi yasinika uIsrayeli ilizwe lonke eyafunga ukubanika lona oyise; basebesidla ilifa lalo bahlala kulo. 
Joshua21:44 I Nkosi yasibanika ukuphumula inhlangothi zonke njengokufunga kwayo konke kuboyise. Kakumanga muntu phambi kwabo kuzo zonke izitha zabo. I Nkosi yazinikela izitha zonke zabo esandleni sabo. 
Joshua21:45 Kakuwanga lalutho lwayo yonke into enhle i Nkosi eyayikhuluma kundlu kaIsrayeli; konke kweza. 
Joshua22:1 Ngalesosikhathi uJoshuwa wabiza abakoRubeni labakoGadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sabakoManase," 
Joshua22:2 wathi kubo: Lina ligcinile konke uMozisi inceku ye Nkosi eyalilaya khona, lalilalela ilizwi lami kukho konke engalilaya khona." 
Joshua22:3 Kalibatshiyanga abafowenu kulezinsuku ezinengi, kuze kube lamuhla; kodwa ligcinile imfanelo yomlayo we Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Joshua22:4 Khathesi-ke, i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ibanikile abafowenu ukuphumula, njengalokho akukhuluma kubo. Ngakho-ke buyelani lina liye emathenteni enu elizweni lelifa lenu, alinika lona uMozisi inceku ye Nkosi ngaphetsheya kweJordani." 
Joshua22:5 Kuphela liqaphelisise ukwenza umlayo lomthetho uMozisi inceku ye Nkosi alilaya wona, ukuthanda i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu, lokuhamba endleleni zayo zonke, lokugcina imilayo yayo, lokunamathela kuyo, lokuyikhonza ngenhliziyo yenu yonke langomphefumulo wenu wonke." 
Joshua22:6 Wasebabusisa uJoshuwa ebayekela behamba, baya emathenteni abo." 
Joshua22:7 Njalo kungxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase uMozisi wayeyinike indawo eBashani; kodwa kungxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yayo uJoshuwa wayinika indawo labafowabo nganeno kweJordani entshonalanga. Njalo-ke nxa uJoshuwa ebayekela behamba besiya emathenteni abo, wababusisa." 
Joshua22:8 Wakhuluma labo esithi: Buyelani emathenteni enu lilenotho enengi lezifuyo ezinengi kakhulu lilesiliva legolide lethusi lensimbi lezigqoko ezinengi kakhulu; lehlukaniselane impango yezitha zenu labafowenu. 
Joshua22:9 Abantwana bakoRubeni labantwana bakoGadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase basebebuyela, besuka ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli bephuma eShilo eselizweni leKhanani, ukuya elizweni leGileyadi, elizweni lelifa labo ababelizuzile, ngokomlayo we Nkosi ngesandla sikaMozisi." 
Joshua22:10 Kwathi sebefikile emingceleni yeJordani eselizweni leKhanani, abantwana bakoRubeni labantwana bakoGadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase bakha khona ilathi ngaseJordani, ilathi elikhulu ngokubonakala." 
Joshua22:11 Kwathi abantwana bakoIsrayeli besizwa kuthiwa: Khangelani, abantwana bakoRubeni labantwana bakoGadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase bakhile ilathi maqondana lelizwe leKhanani emingceleni eJordani ehlangothini lwabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Joshua22:12 Kwathi abantwana bakoIsrayeli be ku zwa, inhlangano yonke yabantwana bakoIsrayeli yabuthana eShilo ukwenyukela kubo empini." 
Joshua22:13 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebethuma kubantwana bakoRubeni lakubantwana bakoGadi lengxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase elizweni leGileyadi uPhinehasi indodana kaEleyazare umpristi," 
Joshua22:14 lezinduna ezilitshumi laye, induna eyodwa ngendlu ngayinye yaboyise ivela kuzo zonke izizwe zakoIsrayeli; ngayinye yayiyinhloko yendlu yaboyise, kunkulungwane zakoIsrayeli." 
Joshua22:15 Basebefika kubantwana bakoRubeni lakubantwana bakoGadi lengxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase elizweni leGileyadi, bakhuluma labo besithi:" 
Joshua22:16 Itsho njalo inhlangano yonke ye Nkosi: Kuyisiphambeko bani eseliphambeke ngaso limelane loNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, liphambuka lamuhla ekuyilandeleni i Nkosi, ekuzakheleni ilathi, ukuze lihlamukele i Nkosi lamuhla?" 
Joshua22:17 Ngabe isiphambeko sePeyori sincinyane kakhulu kithi yini, esingahlanjululwanga kuso kuze kube lamuhla, lanxa inhlupheko yayiphakathi kwenhlangano ye Nkosi," 
Joshua22:18 ukuze lina liphenduke lamuhla ekuyilandeleni i Nkosi? Kuzakuthi uba lina liyihlamuka i Nkosi lamuhla, kusasa izayithukuthelela inhlangano yonke yakoIsrayeli." 
Joshua22:19 Kodwa ngeqiniso, uba ilizwe lemfuyo yenu lingcolile, chaphelani lina elizweni lemfuyo ye Nkosi lapho ithabhanekele le Nkosi elihlala khona, lizizuzele imfuyo phakathi kwethu; kodwa lingayihlamukeli i Nkosi njalo lingasihlamukeli ekuzakheleni kwenu ilathi ngaphandle kwelathi le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu." 
Joshua22:20 UAkani indodana kaZera kaphambekanga yini ngesiphambeko entweni eqalekisiweyo, kwasekusiba lolaka phezu kwenhlangano yonke yakoIsrayeli? Leyondoda kayibhubhanga-ke yodwa esiphambekweni sayo." 
Joshua22:21 Abantwana bakoRubeni labantwana bakoGadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase basebephendula bathi kunhloko zezinkulungwane zakoIsrayeli: 
Joshua22:22 UNkulunkulu wabonkulunkulu, i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wabonkulunkulu, i Nkosi, uyazi, loIsrayeli uzakwazi. Uba bekungokuhlamuka kumbe uba ngokuphambuka e Nkosi ni, lingasisindisi lamuhla," 
Joshua22:23 ukuthi sizakhele ilathi ukuphambuka ekuyilandeleni i Nkosi, loba sinikelele phezu kwalo umnikelo wokutshiswa loba umnikelo wokudla, loba ukwenza phezu kwalo iminikelo yokuthula, i Nkosi uqobo kayikudinge." 
Joshua22:24 Kodwa ngeqiniso sikwenze ngokunqineka nga lolu daba sisithi: Kusasa abantwana benu bazakhuluma kubantwana bethu bathi: Lilani le Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli? 
Joshua22:25 Ngoba i Nkosi iyenzile iJordani yaba ngumngcele phakathi kwethu lani, lina bantwana bakoRubeni labantwana bakoGadi, kalilasabelo e Nkosi ni. Ngalokho abantwana benu benze abantwana bethu ukuthi bayekele ukuyesaba i Nkosi." 
Joshua22:26 Ngakho sathi: Kasizilungiseleni khathesi ukwakha ilathi, lingabi ngelomnikelo wokutshiswa, njalo lingabi ngelomhlatshelo," 
Joshua22:27 kodwa libe yibufakazi phakathi kwethu lani lezizukulwana zethu emva kwethu, ukuthi sikhonze inkonzo ye Nkosi phambi kwayo ngeminikelo yethu yokutshiswa langemihlatshelo yethu langeminikelo yethu yokuthula, ukuze abantwana benu bangathi ebantwaneni bethu kusasa: Kalilasabelo e Nkosi ni." 
Joshua22:28 Sasesisithi: Kuzakuthi-ke, nxa bekhuluma lokhu kithi lesizukulwaneni sethu kusasa, sizakuthi: Bonani umfanekiso welathi le Nkosi obaba abalakhayo, kungeyisilo lomnikelo wokutshiswa lingeyisilo lomhlatshelo, kodwa liyibufakazi phakathi kwethu lani." 
Joshua22:29 Kakube khatshana lathi ukuthi siyihlamuke i Nkosi, lokuthi siphenduke lamuhla ekuyilandeleni i Nkosi, ukwakha ilathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa lelomnikelo wokudla lelomhlatshelo, ngaphandle kwelathi le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu eliphambi kwethabhanekele layo." 
Joshua22:30 Kwathi uPhinehasi umpristi lenduna zenhlangano lenhloko zezinkulungwane zakoIsrayeli ezazilaye bewezwa amazwi abantwana bakoRubeni labantwana bakoGadi labantwana bakoManase abawakhulumayo, kwakukuhle emehlweni abo." 
Joshua22:31 UPhinehasi indodana kaEleyazare umpristi wasesithi kubantwana bakoRubeni lakubantwana bakoGadi lakubantwana bakoManase: Lamuhla siyazi ukuthi i Nkosi iphakathi kwethu, ngoba kaliphambekanga lesisiphambeko e Nkosi ni; khathesi likhulule abantwana bakoIsrayeli esandleni se Nkosi." 
Joshua22:32 UPhinehasi indodana kaEleyazare umpristi lezinduna basebebuyela bevela ebantwaneni bakoRubeni lebantwaneni bakoGadi elizweni leGileyadi, besiya elizweni leKhanani ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, babuyisela ilizwi kubo." 
Joshua22:33 Lodaba lwaluluhle emehlweni abantwana bakoIsrayeli; abantwana bakoIsrayeli bambusisa uNkulunkulu, kabasakhulumanga ngo kwenyukela kubo empini ukuchitha ilizwe abantwana bakoRubeni labantwana bakoGadi ababehlala kulo." 
Joshua22:34 Abantwana bakoRubeni labantwana bakoGadi balibiza ilathi ngokuthi: Liyibufakazi phakathi kwethu bokuthi i Nkosi inguNkulunkulu. 
Joshua23:1 Kwasekusithi emva kwensuku ezinengi emva kokuthi i Nkosi isimphumuzile uIsrayeli ezitheni zonke zabo inhlangothi zonke, loJoshuwa wayesemdala elensuku ezinengi," 
Joshua23:2 uJoshuwa wabiza uIsrayeli wonke, abadala babo, lenhloko zabo, labahluleli babo, lenduna zabo, wathi kubo: Mina sengimdala ngilensuku ezinengi." 
Joshua23:3 Lina selibonile konke i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ekwenzileyo kulezizizwe zonke ngenxa yenu, ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu yiyo elilweleyo." 
Joshua23:4 Bonani, ngilabele ngenkatho lezizizwe eziseleyo zibe yilifa lezizwe zenu, kusukela eJordani, lazo zonke izizwe engiziqumileyo, ngitsho kuze kube selwandle olukhulu lapho okutshona khona ilanga." 
Joshua23:5 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu izazixotsha-ke phambi kwenu, izixotshe elifeni phambi kwenu, njalo lizakudla ilifa lelizwe, njengalokho i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ikhulumile kini." 
Joshua23:6 Ngakho qinani kakhulu ukugcina lokwenza konke okubhaliweyo egwalweni lomlayo kaMozisi, ukuze lingaphambuki kuwo liye ngakwesokunene loba ngakwesokhohlo," 
Joshua23:7 ukuze lingangeni kulezi izizwe, lezi ezisele lani, lingaphathi ibizo labonkulunkulu bazo, lingafungisi ngabo, lingabakhonzi, lingakhothami kubo," 
Joshua23:8 kodwa linamathele e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wenu njengoba lenzile kuze kube lamuhla. 
Joshua23:9 Ngoba i Nkosi ixotshile elifeni phambi kwenu izizwe ezinkulu lezilamandla; lina-ke kakulamuntu ome phambi kwenu kuze kube lamuhla. 
Joshua23:10 Umuntu oyedwa kini uzaxotsha inkulungwane, ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu yiyo elilwelayo, njengalokho ikhulumile kini." 
Joshua23:11 Ngakho ziqaphelisiseni ukuthanda i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu. 
Joshua23:12 Ngoba uba libuyela lokubuyela, linamathele kunsali yalezizizwe, lezi ezisele lani, lithathane lazo, lingene kuzo, lazo kini," 
Joshua23:13 yazini lokwazi ukuthi i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu kayiyikuqhubeka ngokuzixotsha elifeni lezizizwe phambi kwenu; kodwa zizakuba yisifu lomjibila kini, zibe luswazi enhlangothini zenu, lameva emehlweni enu, lize libhubhe liphele kulelilizwe elihle, i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu elinike lona." 
Joshua23:14 Khangelani-ke, ngihamba lamuhla ngendlela yomhlaba wonke. Njalo liyazi enhliziyweni yenu yonke lemphefumulweni wenu wonke ukuthi akukho lelizwi elilodwa eliwileyo kuwo wonke amazwi amahle i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu ewakhulumileyo phezu kwenu; wonke ezile kini, akukho lelizwi elilodwa eliwileyo kuwo." 
Joshua23:15 Kuzakuthi-ke, njengalokhu zonke izinto ezinhle i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu eyazikhuluma kini sezilehlele, ngokunjalo i Nkosi izalehlisela zonke izinto ezimbi, ize ilibhubhise liphele kulelilizwe elihle i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu elinike lona." 
Joshua23:16 Uba liseqa isivumelwano se Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu eyalilaya sona, lisuke liyekhonza abanye onkulunkulu, likhothame kibo, khona ulaka lwe Nkosi luzalivuthela, libhubhe masinyane liphele kulelilizwe elihle elinike lona." 
Joshua24:1 UJoshuwa wasebuthanisa zonke izizwe zakoIsrayeli eShekema, wabiza abadala bakoIsrayeli lenhloko zabo labahluleli babo lenduna zabo, bazimisa phambi kukaNkulunkulu." 
Joshua24:2 UJoshuwa wasesithi kubo bonke abantu: Itsho njalo i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli: Endulo oyihlo babehlala ngaphetsheya komfula, uTera uyise kaAbrahama loyise kaNahori, babekhonza abanye onkulunkulu." 
Joshua24:3 Ngasengimthatha uyihlo uAbrahama ngimsusa ngaphetsheya komfula, ngamhambisa wadabula elizweni lonke leKhanani, ngayandisa inzalo yakhe, ngamnika uIsaka." 
Joshua24:4 LakuIsaka nganika uJakobe loEsawu. LakuEsawu nganika intaba yeSeyiri ukudla ilifa layo, kodwa uJakobe labantwana bakhe behlela eGibhithe." 
Joshua24:5 Ngasengithuma uMozisi loAroni, ngatshaya iGibhithe, njengalokho engakwenzayo phakathi kwayo; lemva kwalokho ngalikhupha." 
Joshua24:6 Ngasengibakhupha oyihlo eGibhithe, lafika elwandle, amaGibhithe asexotshana lani ngenqola langamabhiza aze afika eLwandle oluBomvu." 
Joshua24:7 Kwathi bekhala e Nkosi ni, yabeka umnyama phakathi kwenu lamaGibhithe, yaletha ulwandle phezu kwabo, yabasibekela. Lamehlo enu abona engakwenza eGibhithe. Lahlala enkangala insuku ezinengi." 
Joshua24:8 Ngasengililetha elizweni lamaAmori ayehlala ngaphetsheya kweJordani, asesilwa lani, ngawanikela esandleni senu, lalidla ilifa lelizwe lawo, ngawachitha phambi kwenu." 
Joshua24:9 UBalaki indodana kaZipori inkosi yakoMowabi wasesukuma walwa loIsrayeli, wathuma wabiza uBalami indodana kaBeyori ukuthi aliqalekise." 
Joshua24:10 Kodwa kangithandanga ukulalela uBalami; ngakho walibusisa lokulibusisa, ngasengilikhulula esandleni sakhe." 
Joshua24:11 Lachapha iJordani, lafika eJeriko, izakhamizi zeJeriko zalwa zimelene lani, amaAmori, lamaPerizi, lamaKhanani, lamaHethi, lamaGirigashi, amaHivi, lamaJebusi; ngawanikela esandleni senu." 
Joshua24:12 Ngathuma olonyovu phambi kwenu abawaxotsha phambi kwenu, amakhosi amabili amaAmori; hatshi ngenkemba yakho njalo hatshi ngedandili lakho." 
Joshua24:13 Ngasengilinika ilizwe elingalisebenzelanga, lemizi elingayakhanga, lihlala kiyo. Lidla okwezivini lezivande zemihlwathi elingakuhlanyelanga." 
Joshua24:14 Khathesi-ke yesabeni i Nkosi, liyikhonze ngobuqotho langeqiniso, lisuse onkulunkulu oyihlo ababakhonza ngaphetsheya komfula leGibhithe, njalo likhonze i Nkosi." 
Joshua24:15 Uba-ke kukubi emehlweni enu ukuyikhonza i Nkosi, zikhetheleni lamuhla lowo elizamkhonza; kumbe onkulunkulu ababakhonzayo oyihlo ababengaphetsheya komfula, loba onkulunkulu bamaAmori elihlala elizweni lawo. Kodwa mina lendlu yami sizayikhonza i Nkosi." 
Joshua24:16 Basebephendula abantu besithi: Kakube khatshana lathi ukuthi sitshiye i Nkosi, sikhonze abanye onkulunkulu." 
Joshua24:17 Ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu iyiyo eyasenyusayo labobaba sivela elizweni leGibhithe, endlini yobugqili, eyenza phambi kwamehlo ethu lezizibonakaliso ezinkulu, yasilondoloza endleleni yonke esahamba kiyo, laphakathi kwabo bonke abantu esedlule phakathi kwabo." 
Joshua24:18 I Nkosi yasixotsha phambi kwethu zonke izizwe, lamaAmori ayehlala elizweni. Thina lathi sizayikhonza i Nkosi, ngoba inguNkulunkulu wethu." 
Joshua24:19 UJoshuwa wasesithi ebantwini: Kalilakuyikhonza i Nkosi, ngoba inguNkulunkulu ongcwele, inguNkulunkulu olobukhwele. Kayiyikuthethelela iziphambeko zenu lezono zenu." 
Joshua24:20 Uba liyitshiya i Nkosi likhonze onkulunkulu abezizwe, izaphenduka yenze okubi kini, iliqede, emva kokuthi ilenzele okuhle." 
Joshua24:21 Abantu basebesithi kuJoshuwa: Hatshi, kodwa sizayikhonza i Nkosi." 
Joshua24:22 UJoshuwa wasesithi ebantwini: Lingabafakazi ngani ukuthi lina lizikhethele i Nkosi ukuyikhonza. Basebesithi: Si ngabafakazi. 
Joshua24:23 Khathesi-ke, susani onkulunkulu abezizwe abaphakathi kwenu, lithobele inhliziyo yenu e Nkosi ni, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
Joshua24:24 Abantu basebesithi kuJoshuwa: I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu sizayikhonza, lelizwi layo sililalele." 
Joshua24:25 Ngakho uJoshuwa wasebenzela abantu isivumelwano ngalolosuku, wababekela isimiso lesimiselo eShekema." 
Joshua24:26 UJoshuwa wasebhala lawomazwi egwalweni lomlayo kaNkulunkulu; wathatha ilitshe elikhulu, walimisa lapho ngaphansi kwesihlahla se-okhi elingasendlini engcwele ye Nkosi." 
Joshua24:27 UJoshuwa wasesithi ebantwini bonke: Khangelani, lelilitshe lizakuba yibufakazi ngathi, ngoba liwezwile wonke amazwi e Nkosi eyawakhuluma kithi; ngakho lizakuba yibufakazi ngani, hlezi lenze inkohliso kuNkulunkulu wenu." 
Joshua24:28 UJoshuwa wasebayekela abantu ukuthi bahambe, ngulowo lalowo waya elifeni lakhe." 
Joshua24:29 Kwasekusithi emva kwalezizinto uJoshuwa indodana kaNuni, inceku ye Nkosi, wafa eleminyaka elikhulu letshumi." 
Joshua24:30 Basebemngcwabela emngceleni welifa lakhe eThiminathi-Sera esentabeni yakoEfrayimi enyakatho kwentaba iGahashi. 
Joshua24:31 Njalo uIsrayeli wayikhonza i Nkosi zonke izinsuku zikaJoshuwa lazo zonke izinsuku zabadala abelula insuku emva kukaJoshuwa, njalo ababewazi wonke umsebenzi we Nkosi eyawenzela uIsrayeli." 
Joshua24:32 Lamathambo kaJosefa abantwana bakoIsrayeli ababenyuke lawo bevela eGibhithe bawangcwaba eShekema, esiqintini sensimu uJakobe asithenga kubantwana bakaHamori uyise kaShekema ngenhlamvu zesiliva ezilikhulu; saba-ke yilifa labantwana bakoJosefa." 
Joshua24:33 UEleyazare indodana kaAroni wasesifa, bamngcwaba eqaqeni lukaPhinehasi indodana yakhe, ayeluphiwe entabeni yakoEfrayimi." 
Judges1:1 Kwasekusithi emva kokufa kukaJoshuwa abantwana bakoIsrayeli babuza i Nkosi besithi: Ngubani ozasenyukelela ukuyamelana lamaKhanani kuqala ukulwa emelene labo? 
Judges1:2 I Nkosi yasisithi: UJuda uzakwenyuka; khangelani, ngilinikele ilizwe esandleni sakhe." 
Judges1:3 UJuda wasesithi kuSimeyoni umfowabo: Yenyuka lami enkathweni yami ukuze silwe simelene lamaKhanani; lami-ke ngizahamba lawe enkathweni yakho. USimeyoni wasehamba laye. 
Judges1:4 UJuda wasesenyuka, njalo i Nkosi yanikela amaKhanani lamaPerizi esandleni sabo; bawatshaya eBezeki, amadoda azinkulungwane ezilitshumi." 
Judges1:5 Basebefica uAdoni-Bezeki eBezeki, balwa bemelene laye, bawatshaya amaKhanani lamaPerizi." 
Judges1:6 Kodwa uAdoni-Bezeki wabaleka, baxotshana laye, bambamba, baquma izithupha zezandla zakhe lezenyawo zakhe." 
Judges1:7 UAdoni-Bezeki wasesithi: Amakhosi angamatshumi ayisikhombisa aqunywe izithupha zezandla zawo lezenyawo zawo ayedobha ngaphansi kwetafula lami. Njengokwenza kwami, ngokunjalo uNkulunkulu ungiphindisele. Basebemusa eJerusalema, wafela khona." 
Judges1:8 Abantwana bakoJuda balwa-ke bemelene leJerusalema, bayithumba, bayitshaya ngobukhali benkemba, lomuzi bawuthungela ngomlilo." 
Judges1:9 Emva kwalokho-ke abantwana bakoJuda behla ukuyakulwa bemelene lamaKhanani ayehlala entabeni leningizimu lesihotsheni. 
Judges1:10 UJuda wasehamba wamelana lamaKhanani ayehlala eHebroni; lebizo leHebroni kuqala kwakuyiKiriyathi-Arba; batshaya uSheshayi loAhimani loTalimayi. 
Judges1:11 Basuka lapho baya bamelana labahlali beDebiri. Lebizo leDebiri kuqala kwakuyiKiriyathi-Seferi. 
Judges1:12 UKalebi wasesithi: Ozatshaya iKiriyathi-Seferi, ayithumbe, ngizamnika uAkisa indodakazi yami ibe ngumka khe." 
Judges1:13 UOthiniyeli indodana kaKenazi umfowabo kaKalebi, owayemncane kulaye, waseyithumba; wasemnika uAkisa indodakazi yakhe ukuba ngumka khe." 
Judges1:14 Kwasekusithi ekufikeni kwakhe wamkhuthaza ukuthi acele kuyise insimu; wasesehla kubabhemi, uKalebi wasesithi kuye: Ulani?" 
Judges1:15 Wasesithi kuye: Ngipha isibusiso. Njengoba ungiphe ilizwe elomileyo, ngipha njalo imithombo yamanzi. UKalebi wasemnika imithombo engaphezulu lemithombo engaphansi." 
Judges1:16 Abantwana bomKeni, uyisezala kaMozisi, basebesenyuka besuka emzini wamalala, belabantwana bakoJuda, baya enkangala yakoJuda, eseningizimu kweAradi; baya bahlala phakathi kwabantu." 
Judges1:17 UJuda wasehamba loSimeyoni umfowabo, bawatshaya amaKhanani ayehlala eZefathi, bayitshabalalisa. Ngakho ibizo lomuzi lathiwa yiHorma." 
Judges1:18 UJuda wasethumba iGaza lomngcele wayo, leAshikeloni lomngcele wayo, leEkhironi lomngcele wayo." 
Judges1:19 I Nkosi yasisiba loJuda, wadla ilifa lezintaba, kodwa weyengelakubaxotsha elifeni abahlali besigodi, ngoba babelezinqola zensimbi." 
Judges1:20 Basebenika uKalebi iHebroni, njengokutsho kukaMozisi; wasexotsha elifeni esuka lapho amadodana amathathu kaAnaki." 
Judges1:21 Kodwa abantwana bakoBhenjamini kabawaxotshanga elifeni amaJebusi ayehlala eJerusalema; ngakho amaJebusi ahlala labantwana bakoBhenjamini eJerusalema kuze kube lamuhla. 
Judges1:22 Lendlu kaJosefa, labo benyukela eBhetheli; njalo i Nkosi yayilabo." 
Judges1:23 Indlu kaJosefa yasithuma inhloli eBhetheli; lebizo lomuzi kuqala laliyiLuzi. 
Judges1:24 Abalindi basebebona umuntu ephuma emzini, bathi kuye: Akusitshengise indlela yokungena emzini, besesikwenzela umusa." 
Judges1:25 Esebatshengise indlela yokungena emzini, bawutshaya umuzi ngobukhali benkemba, kodwa lowomuntu losapho lwakhe lonke babayekela bahamba." 
Judges1:26 Lowomuntu wasesiya elizweni lamaHethi, wakha umuzi, wabiza ibizo lawo ngokuthi yiLuzi; yilelo ibizo lawo kuze kube lamuhla." 
Judges1:27 UManase kaxotshanga-ke iBeti-Sheyani lemizana yayo, leThahanakhi lemizana yayo, labahlali beDori lemizana yayo, labahlali beIbileyamu lemizana yayo, labahlali beMegido lemizana yayo; kodwa amaKhanani afuna ukuhlala kulelolizwe." 
Judges1:28 Kwasekusithi uIsrayeli eselamandla wawamisa amaKhanani kusibhalo, kodwa kawaxotshanga lokuwaxotsha elifeni." 
Judges1:29 UEfrayimi kawaxotshanga-ke elifeni amaKhanani ayehlala eGezeri, kodwa amaKhanani ahlala eGezeri phakathi kwabo." 
Judges1:30 UZebuluni kabaxotshanga elifeni abahlali beKitroni labahlali beNahaloli, kodwa amaKhanani ahlala phakathi kwabo, aba yizibhalwa." 
Judges1:31 UAsheri kabaxotshanga elifeni abahlali beAko labahlali beSidoni leAhilabi leAkizibi leHeliba leAfiki leRehobi; 
Judges1:32 kodwa abakoAsheri bahlala phakathi kwamaKhanani abahlali belizwe, ngoba kabawaxotshanga elifeni." 
Judges1:33 UNafithali kabaxotshanga elifeni abahlali beBeti-Shemeshi labahlali beBeti-Anathi, kodwa wahlala phakathi kwamaKhanani, abahlali belizwe; kodwa abahlali beBeti-Shemeshi labeBeti-Anathi baba yizibhalwa kubo." 
Judges1:34 AmaAmori asebafuqela abantwana bakoDani entabeni, ngoba kawabavumelanga ukwehlela esigodini." 
Judges1:35 Kodwa amaAmori ayefuna ukuhlala entabeni yeHeresi eAjaloni leShahalibimi, kodwa isandla sendlu kaJosefa saba nzima, aba yizibhalwa." 
Judges1:36 Umngcele wamaAmori wawusukela emqansweni weAkirabimi, uvela edwaleni usiya phezulu." 
Judges2:1 Ingilosi ye Nkosi yasisenyuka isuka eGiligali isiya eBokimi, yathi: Ngalenyusa lisuka eGibhithe, ngaliletha elizweni engalifungela oyihlo, njalo ngathi: Kangiyikwephula isivumelwano sami lani kuze kube sephakadeni." 
Judges2:2 Lani-ke kaliyikwenza isivumelwano labahlali balelilizwe, lizadiliza amalathi abo. Kodwa kalililalelanga ilizwi lami. Kuyini lokhu elikwenzileyo?" 
Judges2:3 Ngakho lami ngathi: Kangiyikuzixotsha elifeni phambi kwenu, kodwa zizakuba senhlangothini zenu, labonkulunkulu bazo babe ngumjibila kini." 
Judges2:4 Kwasekusithi lapho ingilosi ye Nkosi isikhulume lamazwi kubo bonke abantwana bakoIsrayeli, abantu baphakamisa ilizwi labo bakhala inyembezi." 
Judges2:5 Basebebiza ibizo laleyondawo ngokuthi yiBokimi, bayihlabela i Nkosi lapho." 
Judges2:6 Kwathi uJoshuwa esebayekele abantu bahamba, abantwana bakoIsrayeli bahamba, ngulowo lalowo waya elifeni lakhe ukudla ilifa lelizwe." 
Judges2:7 Abantu basebeyikhonza i Nkosi kuzo zonke izinsuku zikaJoshuwa, lazo zonke izinsuku zabadala abasala bephila emva kukaJoshuwa, ababewubonile wonke umsebenzi omkhulu we Nkosi eyayiwenzele uIsrayeli." 
Judges2:8 UJoshuwa indodana kaNuni, inceku ye Nkosi, wafa-ke, eleminyaka elikhulu letshumi." 
Judges2:9 Basebemngcwabela emngceleni welifa lakhe eThiminathi-Heresi entabeni yakoEfrayimi, enyakatho kwentaba iGahashi." 
Judges2:10 Njalo lalesosizukulwana sabuthelwa kuboyise. Kwasekusukuma esinye isizukulwana emva kwabo esasingayazi i Nkosi njalo lomsebenzi eyayiwenzele uIsrayeli. 
Judges2:11 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi, bakhonza oBhali." 
Judges2:12 Batshiya i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu waboyise, eyabakhupha elizweni leGibhithe, balandela abanye onkulunkulu, kubonkulunkulu bezizwe ezazibazingelezele, bakhothama kibo, bayithukuthelisa i Nkosi." 
Judges2:13 Bayidela i Nkosi, bakhonza uBhali laboAshitarothi *." 
Judges2:14 Ngakho ulaka lwe Nkosi lwavutha kuIsrayeli, yabanikela esandleni sabaphangi ababaphangayo; yabathengisa esandleni sezitha zabo inhlangothi zonke, ukuze bangabe besaba lakho ukuma phambi kwazo." 
Judges2:15 Loba bephuma besiya ngaphi, isandla se Nkosi samelana labo ngokubi, njengokutsho kwe Nkosi lanjengokufunga kwe Nkosi kibo, njalo bacindezeleka kakhulu." 
Judges2:16 I Nkosi yasimisa abahluleli ababophula esandleni salabo ababaphangayo. 
Judges2:17 Kanti kababalalelanga labahluleli babo, kodwa baphinga ngokulandela abanye onkulunkulu, bakhothama kibo; baphambuka masinyane endleleni oyise ababehamba kuyo, belalela imilayo ye Nkosi. Bona kabenzanga njalo." 
Judges2:18 Lalapho i Nkosi ibamisela abahluleli, i Nkosi yayilomahluleli, yabophula esandleni sezitha zabo zonke izinsuku zikamahluleli; ngoba i Nkosi yazisola ngenxa yokububula kwabo ngenxa yalabo ababacindezelayo lababahlukuluzayo." 
Judges2:19 Kwasekusithi ekufeni kukamahluleli, babuyela emuva baxhwala okwedlula oyise, ngokulandela abanye onkulunkulu, ngokubakhonza langokubakhothamela; kabalahlanga okwemisebenzi yabo lokwendlela yabo yenkani." 
Judges2:20 Ngakho ulaka lwe Nkosi lwavutha kuIsrayeli, yathi: Ngoba lesisizwe seqe isivumelwano sami engasilaya oyise, kasilalelanga ilizwi lami," 
Judges2:21 lami kangisayikuxotsha loba ngubani elifeni phambi kwabo ezizweni uJoshuwa azitshiya ekufeni kwakhe," 
Judges2:22 ukuze ngihlole ngazo uIsrayeli ukuthi bazagcina yini indlela ye Nkosi ukuhamba kuyo njengaboyise ba yi gcina, kumbe hatshi." 
Judges2:23 Ngakho i Nkosi yaziyekela lezozizwe, ukuze ingazixotshi elifeni masinyane, njalo kayizinikelanga esandleni sikaJoshuwa." 
Judges3:1 Lalezi yizizwe i Nkosi eyazitshiyayo ukuze ihlole uIsrayeli ngazo, bonke abangazazanga zonke izimpi zeKhanani;" 
Judges3:2 kuphela ukuze izizukulwana zabantwana bakoIsrayeli zazi, ukuzifundisa impi, kuphela abangazazanga phambili:" 
Judges3:3 Amakhosi amahlanu amaFilisti, lawo wonke amaKhanani, lamaSidoni, lamaHivi ayehlala entabeni yeLebhanoni, kusukela entabeni yeBhali-Hermoni kuze kube sekungeneni kweHamathi." 
Judges3:4 Zazingezokuhlola uIsrayeli ngazo ukwazi ukuthi bazayilalela yini imilayo ye Nkosi eyabalaya yona oyise ngesandla sikaMozisi. 
Judges3:5 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli bahlala-ke phakathi kwamaKhanani, amaHethi, lamaAmori, lamaPerizi, lamaHivi, lamaJebusi." 
Judges3:6 Basebethatha amadodakazi awo ukuba ngomkabo, lamadodakazi abo bawanika amadodana awo, bakhonza onkulunkulu bawo." 
Judges3:7 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi, bayikhohlwa i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo, bakhonza oBhali lezixuku." 
Judges3:8 Ngakho ulaka lwe Nkosi lwavutha kuIsrayeli, yabathengisa esandleni sikaKushani-Rishathayimi inkosi yeMesopotamiya. Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebeyisebenzela inkosi uKushani-Rishathayimi iminyaka eyisificaminwembili." 
Judges3:9 Kwathi abantwana bakoIsrayeli bekhala e Nkosi ni, i Nkosi yabavusela abantwana bakoIsrayeli umkhululi owabakhululayo, uOthiniyeli indodana kaKenazi umfowabo kaKalebi ongumnawakhe." 
Judges3:10 Njalo uMoya we Nkosi wayephezu kwakhe, wahlulela uIsrayeli, waphuma impi, i Nkosi yanikela esandleni sakhe uKushani-Rishathayimi inkosi yeSiriya, lesandla sakhe saba lamandla phezu kukaKushani-Rishathayimi." 
Judges3:11 Lelizwe laba lokuthula iminyaka engamatshumi amane. UOthiniyeli indodana kaKenazi wasesifa. 
Judges3:12 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebebuya besenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi. I Nkosi yasimqinisa uEgiloni inkosi yakoMowabi ukumelana loIsrayeli, ngenxa yokuthi babenzile okubi emehlweni e Nkosi." 
Judges3:13 Wasezibuthela abantwana bakoAmoni loAmaleki, waya wamtshaya uIsrayeli, badla ilifa lomuzi wamalala." 
Judges3:14 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesebenzela uEgiloni inkosi yakoMowabi iminyaka elitshumi leyisificaminwembili. 
Judges3:15 Kwathi abantwana bakoIsrayeli bekhala e Nkosi ni, i Nkosi yabavusela umkhululi, uEhudi indodana kaGera, umBhenjamini owayelinxele. Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebethumela ngesandla sakhe isipho kuEgiloni inkosi yakoMowabi." 
Judges3:16 UEhudi wasezenzela inkemba ebukhali inhlangothi ezimbili, ubude bayo buyingalo, wayibophela ngaphansi kwezigqoko zakhe ethangazini lakhe lokunene." 
Judges3:17 Wasondeza isipho kuEgiloni inkosi yakoMowabi. Njalo uEgiloni wayengumuntu okhulupheleyo kakhulu. 
Judges3:18 Kwasekusithi eseqedile ukusondeza isipho, wasephelekezela abantu ababethwele isipho." 
Judges3:19 Kodwa yena wabuyela emuva ezithombeni ezibaziweyo ezaziseGiligali, wathi: Nkosi, ngilendaba eyimfihlo kuwe. Yasisithi: Thula. Bonke ababemi laye basebephuma." 
Judges3:20 UEhudi wasesiza kuye ehlezi endlini ephezulu epholileyo eyayingeyakhe yedwa. UEhudi wathi: Ngilendaba kaNkulunkulu kuwe. Wasesukuma esihlalweni. 
Judges3:21 UEhudi waseselula isandla sakhe sokhohlo, wathatha inkemba ethangazini lakhe lokunene, wayithela esiswini sakhe," 
Judges3:22 kwaze kwangena lesilanda emva kobukhali, amahwahwa agubuzela ubukhali, ngoba kayingcothulanga inkemba esiswini sakhe, kwasekuphuma umswane." 
Judges3:23 UEhudi wasephuma ekhulusini, wavala iminyango yendlu ephezulu emva kwakhe, wayikhiya." 
Judges3:24 Yena esephumile, kwafika izinceku zakhe; kwathi zibona, khangela-ke, iminyango yendlu ephezulu yayikhiyiwe, zathi: Sibili wembese inyawo zakhe endlini epholileyo." 
Judges3:25 Njalo zalinda zaze zaba lenhloni; khangela-ke kavulanga iminyango yendlu ephezulu; ngakho zathatha isihluthulelo zavula, khangela-ke, inkosi yazo yayiwele phansi ifile." 
Judges3:26 UEhudi wasephunyuka zisalibele, yena wedlula ezithombeni ezibaziweyo, waphunyuka waya eSeyira." 
Judges3:27 Kwasekusithi ekufikeni kwakhe wavuthela uphondo entabeni yakoEfrayimi. Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesehla laye ezintabeni, yena ephambi kwabo." 
Judges3:28 Wasesithi kibo: Landelani emva kwami, ngoba i Nkosi inikele izitha zenu amaMowabi esandleni senu. Ngakho behla bamlandela, bathumba amazibuko eJordani aye koMowabi, kabavumelanga muntu ukuchapha." 
Judges3:29 Basebebulala amaMowabi ngalesosikhathi angaba zinkulungwane ezilitshumi, amadoda wonke aqatha lawo wonke amadoda alamandla, njalo kakuphunyukanga muntu." 
Judges3:30 Ngalokho uMowabi wehliselwa phansi mhlalokho ngaphansi kwesandla sikaIsrayeli. Lelizwe laba lokuthula iminyaka engamatshumi ayisificaminwembili. 
Judges3:31 Lemva kwakhe kwaba loShamigari indodana kaAnathi, owatshaya amaFilisti amadoda angamakhulu ayisithupha ngocijo lwenkabi; laye wasemkhulula uIsrayeli." 
Judges4:1 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebebuya besenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi esefile uEhudi. 
Judges4:2 I Nkosi yasibathengisa esandleni sikaJabini inkosi yeKhanani owayebusa eHazori. Lenduna yebutho lakhe yayinguSisera, owayehlala eHaroshethi labezizwe." 
Judges4:3 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebekhala e Nkosi ni, ngoba wayelezinqola zensimbi ezingamakhulu ayisificamunwemunye, wabacindezela ngamandla abantwana bakoIsrayeli iminyaka engamatshumi amabili." 
Judges4:4 UDebora umfazi owayengumprofethikazi umkaLapidothi yena wahlulela uIsrayeli ngalesosikhathi. 
Judges4:5 Wayehlala ngaphansi kwesihlahla selala sikaDebora phakathi kweRama leBhetheli entabeni yakoEfrayimi. Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebesenyukela kuye ukwahlulelwa. 
Judges4:6 Wasethuma wabiza uBaraki indodana kaAbinowama eKedeshi koNafithali, wathi kuye: I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakoIsrayeli kayilayanga yini isithi: Hamba usondele entabeni yeThabhori, uzithathele amadoda azinkulungwane ezilitshumi ebantwaneni bakoNafithali lebantwaneni bakoZebuluni?" 
Judges4:7 Njalo ngizadonsela kuwe esifuleni iKishoni uSisera induna yebutho likaJabini lenqola zakhe lexuku lakhe, ngimnikele esandleni sakho." 
Judges4:8 UBaraki wasesithi kuye: Uba uhamba lami, ngizahamba; kodwa uba ungahambi lami, kangiyikuhamba." 
Judges4:9 Wasesithi: Ngizahamba lokuhamba lawe, kodwa udumo kaluyikuba ngolwakho ngendlela ohamba ngayo, ngoba i Nkosi izathengisa uSisera esandleni sowesifazana. Wasesukuma uDebora, wahamba loBaraki waya eKedeshi." 
Judges4:10 UBaraki wasebizela oZebuluni loNafithali eKedeshi. Kwasekusenyuka amadoda azinkulungwane ezilitshumi amlandela, loDebora wenyuka laye." 
Judges4:11 UHeberi umKeni wazehlukanisa-ke lamaKeni, abantwana bakaHobabi uyisezala kaMozisi, wamisa ithente lakhe kwaze kwaba sesihlahleni se-okhi* eZahananimi eseduze leKedeshi." 
Judges4:12 Basebebikela uSisera ukuthi uBaraki indodana kaAbinowama usenyukele entabeni yeThabhori. 
Judges4:13 USisera wasebiza zonke izinqola zakhe, inqola ezingamakhulu ayisificamunwemunye zensimbi, labo bonke abantu ababelaye, kusukela eHaroshethi labezizwe kuze kufike esifuleni iKishoni." 
Judges4:14 UDebora wasesithi kuBaraki: Vuka! Ngoba yilo lolusuku i Nkosi enikele ngalo uSisera esandleni sakho. Kayihambanga yini i Nkosi phambi kwakho? Ngakho uBaraki wehla entabeni iThabhori lamadoda azinkulungwane ezilitshumi ngemva kwakhe. 
Judges4:15 I Nkosi yasimsanganisa uSisera lazo zonke izinqola lebutho lonke ngobukhali benkemba phambi kukaBaraki, kwaze kwathi uSisera wehla enqoleni wabaleka ngenyawo zakhe." 
Judges4:16 UBaraki wasexotshana lezinqola lebutho, waze wafika eHaroshethi labezizwe; ibutho lonke likaSisera laselisiwa ngobukhali benkemba; kakusalanga loyedwa." 
Judges4:17 Kodwa uSisera wabaleka ngenyawo zakhe waya ethenteni likaJayeli umkaHeberi umKeni, ngoba kwakulokuthula phakathi kukaJabini inkosi yeHazori lendlu kaHeberi umKeni." 
Judges4:18 UJayeli wasephuma ukuhlangabeza uSisera, wathi kuye: Phambuka, nkosi yami, phambukela kimi, ungesabi. Wasephambukela kuye ethenteni, wamembesa ngengubo." 
Judges4:19 Wasesithi kuye: Akunginathise amanzi amalutshwana ngoba ngomile. Wasesibukula igula lochago, wamnathisa, wamembesa." 
Judges4:20 Wasesithi kuye: Mana emnyango wethente; kuzakuthi-ke, uba kufika umuntu kuwe ekubuza esithi: Kulomuntu lapha yini? Uzakuthi: Akulamuntu." 
Judges4:21 Kodwa uJayeli umkaHeberi wathatha isikhonkwane sethente, wafaka isando esandleni sakhe, wamnyenyela, wabethela isikhonkwane enhlafunweni yakhe sangena emhlabathini, ngoba yena wayelele ubuthongo obukhulu, ediniwe, wasesifa." 
Judges4:22 Khangela-ke, uBaraki waxotsha uSisera; uJayeli wasephuma ukumhlangabeza wathi kuye: Woza, ngizakutshengisa umuntu omdingayo. Wasengena e thente ni lakhe, khangela-ke, uSisera wayelele efile, lesikhonkwane sasisenhlafunweni yakhe."
