2Kings19:4 Mhlawumbe i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho izakuzwa wonke amazwi kaRabi-Shake, inkosi yeAsiriya inkosi yakhe eyamthumayo, ukuthi aklolodele uNkulunkulu ophilayo; njalo izasola amazwi i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ewezwileyo: Ngakho phakamiselani insali etholakeleyo umkhuleko." 
2Kings19:5 Izinceku zenkosi uHezekhiya zasezifika kuIsaya. 
2Kings19:6 UIsaya wasesithi kuzo: Lizakutsho njalo enkosini yenu: Utsho njalo uJehova: Ungesabi amazwi owezwileyo inceku zenkosi yeAsiriya ezingithuke ngawo. 
2Kings19:7 Khangela, ngizafaka umoya kuyo, njalo izakuzwa ihungahunga, ibuyele elizweni layo; ngizayenza ukuthi iwe ngenkemba elizweni layo." 
2Kings19:8 URabi-Shake wasebuyela, wafica inkosi yeAsiriya isilwa imelene leLibhina; ngoba wayezwile ukuthi isisukile eLakishi." 
2Kings19:9 Kwathi isizwa ngoTirihaka inkosi yeEtiyopiya kuthiwa: Khangela, uphumile uku ya kulwa emelene lawe, yabuya yathuma izithunywa kuHezekhiya, isithi:" 
2Kings19:10 Lizakhuluma kanje kuHezekhiya inkosi yakoJuda, lithi: UNkulunkulu wakho omthembileyo kangakukhohlisi esithi: IJerusalema kayiyikunikelwa esandleni senkosi yeAsiriya." 
2Kings19:11 Khangela, wena usuzwile ukuthi amakhosi eAsiriya enzeni kuwo wonke amazwe, ngokuwatshabalalisa. Wena-ke uzakhululwa yini?" 
2Kings19:12 Onkulunkulu bezizwe bazikhululile yini, obaba abazichithayo, iGozani leHarani leRezefi labantwana bakaEdeni ababeseTelasari?" 
2Kings19:13 Ingaphi inkosi yeHamathi, lenkosi yeArpadi, lenkosi yomuzi weSefavayimi, iHena, leIva?" 
2Kings19:14 UHezekhiya waseyemukela izincwadi esandleni sezithunywa, wazibala, wasesenyukela endlini ye Nkosi, uHezekhiya wayichaya phambi kwe Nkosi." 
2Kings19:15 UHezekhiya wasekhuleka phambi kwe Nkosi, wathi: Nkosi, Nkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ohlala phakathi kwamakherubi*, wena unguNkulunkulu, wena wedwa, wayo yonke imibuso yomhlaba; wena wenze amazulu lomhlaba." 
2Kings19:16 Nkosi, beka indlebe yakho, uzwe-ke, Nkosi, vula amehlo akho, ubone; uzwe amazwi kaSenakheribi amthume ngawo ukuklolodela uNkulunkulu ophilayo." 
2Kings19:17 Qiniso, Nkosi, amakhosi eAsiriya azichithile izizwe lelizwe lazo," 
2Kings19:18 aphosela onkulunkulu bazo emlilweni; ngoba babengeyisibo onkulunkulu, kodwa bengumsebenzi wezandla zabantu, izigodo lamatshe; ngakho bababhubhisa." 
2Kings19:19 Ngakho-ke, Nkosi Nkulunkulu wethu, ake usisindise esandleni sakhe, ukuze yonke imibuso yomhlaba yazi ukuthi wena uyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu, wena wedwa." 
2Kings19:20 UIsaya indodana kaAmozi wasethumela kuHezekhiya esithi: Itsho njalo i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakoIsrayeli, ithi: Lokho okukhuleke kimi mayelana loSenakheribi inkosi yeAsiriya ngikuzwile." 
2Kings19:21 Yileli ilizwi i Nkosi elikhulume mayelana laye: Intombi emsulwa, indodakazi yeZiyoni, iyakudelela, iyakuklolodela; indodakazi yeJerusalema inikina ikhanda ngemva kwakho." 
2Kings19:22 Ngubani omeyisileyo wamhlambaza? Njalo uphakamisele bani ilizwi, waphakamisela amehlo akho phezulu? Umelene loNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
2Kings19:23 Ngesandla sezithunywa zakho uyeyisile iNkosi, wathi: Ngobunengi bezinqola zami ngenyuke indawo ephezulu yezintaba, inhlangothi zeLebhanoni. Ngizagamula imisedari yayo emide, l amafiri ayo akhethekileyo. Ngizangena endaweni yokuhlala yamaphethelo ayo, igusu leKharmeli yayo." 
2Kings19:24 Mina ngagebha nganatha amanzi angaziwayo, langengaphansi yenyawo zami ngomisa yonke imifula yezindawo ezivinjelweyo." 
2Kings19:25 Kawuzwanga yini ukuthi ngakwenza endulo, ngakubumba ensukwini zendulo. Khathesi ngikufikisile, ukuthi ube ngodiliza imizi ebiyelwe ngemithangala ibe zinqumbi zamanxiwa." 
2Kings19:26 Ngakho abahlali bayo balezandla ezinfitshane, badanile balenhloni, ba njengo tshani egangeni lemibhida eluhlaza, utshani bempahla, lamabele ahanguliweyo engakami." 
2Kings19:27 Kodwa ngiyakwazi ukuhlala kwakho lokuphuma kwakho lokungena kwakho lokungithukuthelela kwakho. 
2Kings19:28 Ngenxa yokungithukuthelela kwakho, lokuthi umsindo wakho wenyukele endlebeni zami, ngizafaka umkhala wami emakhaleni akho, letomu lami endebeni zakho, ngikwenze ubuyele ngendlela oweza ngayo." 
2Kings19:29 Lokhu-ke yisibonakaliso kuwe; lonyaka li zakudla okuzikhulelayo, langomnyaka wesibili umkhukhuzela wakho, kuthi ngomnyaka wesithathu lihlanyele livune, lihlanyele izivini lidle izithelo zazo." 
2Kings19:30 Labaphephileyo bendlu yakoJuda abaseleyo bazaphinda bagxumeke impande phansi, bathele izithelo ngaphezulu;" 
2Kings19:31 ngoba kuzaphuma eJerusalema insali, labaphephileyo entabeni yeZiyoni; ukutshiseka kwe Nkosi yamabandla kuzakwenza lokhu." 
2Kings19:32 Ngakho utsho njalo uJehova mayelana lenkosi yeAsiriya: Kayiyikungena kulumuzi, kayiyikutshoka umtshoko khona, kayiyikuza phambi kwawo ilesihlangu, kayiyikubuthelela idundulu maqondana lawo." 
2Kings19:33 Ngendlela eyeza ngayo izabuyela ngayo, kayiyikungena kulumuzi, itsho i Nkosi." 
2Kings19:34 Ngoba ngizawuvikela lumuzi ukuwusindisa, ngenxa yami, langenxa kaDavida inceku yami." 
2Kings19:35 Kwasekusithi ngalobobusuku ingilosi ye Nkosi yaphuma yatshaya enkambeni yamaAsiriya izinkulungwane ezilikhulu lamatshumi ayisificaminwembili lanhlanu. Lapho bevuka ekuseni kakhulu, khangela, bonke babeyizidumbu ezifileyo." 
2Kings19:36 Ngakho uSenakheribi inkosi yeAsiriya wasesuka wahamba wabuyela, wahlala eNineve." 
2Kings19:37 Kwasekusithi ekhonza endlini kaNisiroki unkulunkulu wakhe, oAdrameleki loSharezeri amadodana akhe bamtshaya ngenkemba, bona babalekela elizweni leArarathi. UEsarihadoni indodana yakhe wasebusa esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings20:1 Ngalezonsuku uHezekhiya wagula okokufa. UIsaya indodana kaAmozi umprofethi wasefika kuye wathi kuye: Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Laya indlu yakho, ngoba uzakufa, kawuyikuphila." 
2Kings20:2 Wasephendulela ubuso bakhe emdulini, wakhuleka e Nkosi ni esithi:" 
2Kings20:3 Ngiyakuncenga Nkosi, ake ukhumbule ukuthi ngihambe phambi kwakho ngobuqotho langenhliziyo epheleleyo, ngenza okulungileyo emehlweni akho. UHezekhiya wasekhala inyembezi ngokukhala okukhulu." 
2Kings20:4 Kwasekusithi uIsaya engakaphumi egumeni elingaphakathi, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuye lisithi:" 
2Kings20:5 Buyela uthi kuHezekhiya umbusi wabantu bami: Itsho njalo i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaDavida uyihlo: Ngiwuzwile umkhuleko wakho, ngabona inyembezi zakho; khangela, ngizakusilisa; ngosuku lwesithathu uzakwenyukela endlini ye Nkosi." 
2Kings20:6 Njalo ngizakwengezelela iminyaka elitshumi lanhlanu ensukwini zakho; ngikukhulule wena lalumuzi esandleni senkosi yeAsiriya; ngiwuvikele lumuzi ngenxa yami langenxa yenceku yami uDavida. 
2Kings20:7 UIsaya wasesithi: Thathani isigaqa somkhiwa. Basebesithatha, basifaka phezu kwethumba, yasisila." 
2Kings20:8 UHezekhiya wasesithi kuIsaya: Yisiphi isibonakaliso sokuthi i Nkosi izangisilisa, lokuthi ngizakwenyukela endlini ye Nkosi ngosuku lwesithathu?" 
2Kings20:9 UIsaya wasesithi: Lesi yisibonakaliso kuwe esivela e Nkosi ni esokuthi i Nkosi izayenza into eyikhulumileyo: Isithunzi sizakuya phambili izinyathelo ezilitshumi, loba siye emuva izinyathelo ezilitshumi yini?" 
2Kings20:10 UHezekhiya wasesithi: Kulula esithunzini ukuthi selule izinyathelo ezilitshumi; hatshi, kodwa isithunzi kasibuyele emuva izinyathelo ezilitshumi." 
2Kings20:11 UIsaya umprofethi wasekhala e Nkosi ni, yasibuyisela emuva isithunzi, ngezinyathelo esasehle ngazo esikhwelweni sikaAhazi, izinyathelo ezilitshumi emuva." 
2Kings20:12 Ngalesosikhathi uMerodaki-Baladani indodana kaBaladani, inkosi yeBhabhiloni, wathumela izincwadi lesipho kuHezekhiya, ngoba wayezwile ukuthi uHezekhiya ubekade egula." 
2Kings20:13 UHezekhiya wabalalela, wabatshengisa yonke indlu yakhe yezinto eziligugu, isiliva legolide lamakha lamafutha amahle lendlu yezikhali zakhe, lakho konke okwakutholakala endlini yakhe yokuligugu; kakulalutho endlini yakhe lembusweni wonke wakhe uHezekhiya angabatshengisanga lona." 
2Kings20:14 UIsaya umprofethi wasesiza enkosini uHezekhiya wathi kiyo: Batheni lababantu? Futhi bebevela ngaphi besiza kuwe? UHezekhiya wasesithi: Bebevela elizweni elikhatshana, eBhabhiloni." 
2Kings20:15 Wasesithi: Baboneni endlini yakho? UHezekhiya wasesithi: Babone konke okusendlini yami; kakulalutho phakathi kokuligugu kwami engingabatshengisanga khona. 
2Kings20:16 UIsaya wasesithi kuHezekhiya: Zwana ilizwi le Nkosi. 
2Kings20:17 Khangela, insuku ziyeza lapho konke okusendlini yakho lalokho oyihlo abakubekelelayo kuze kube lamuhla kuzathwalelwa eBhabhiloni; kakuyikusala lutho, itsho i Nkosi." 
2Kings20:18 Njalo bazathatha emadodaneni akho azaphuma kuwe, ozawazala, abe ngabathenwa esigodlweni senkosi yeBhabhiloni." 
2Kings20:19 UHezekhiya wasesithi kuIsaya: Lihle ilizwi le Nkosi olikhulumileyo. Wasesithi: Kaku njalo yini, uba kuzakuba khona ukuthula lokuvikeleka ensukwini zami?" 
2Kings20:20 Ezinye-ke zezindaba zikaHezekhiya, lawo wonke amandla akhe, lokuthi wenza ichibi, lomgelo, wangenisa amanzi phakathi komuzi, kakubhalwanga yini egwalweni lwemilando yamakhosi akoJuda?" 
2Kings20:21 UHezekhiya waselala laboyise. UManase indodana yakhe wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe. 
2Kings21:1 UManase wayeleminyaka elitshumi lambili lapho esiba yinkosi; wabusa iminyaka engamatshumi amahlanu lanhlanu eJerusalema. Lebizo likanina lalinguHefiziba. 
2Kings21:2 Wasesenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi njengokwamanyala ezizwe i Nkosi eyazixotsha elifeni phambi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli. 
2Kings21:3 Ngoba wabuya wakha indawo eziphakemeyo uyise uHezekhiya ayezichithile, wamisela uBhali amalathi, wenza isixuku, njengokwenza kukaAhabi inkosi yakoIsrayeli, wakhothamela ibutho lonke lamazulu, walikhonza." 
2Kings21:4 Wasesakha amalathi endlini ye Nkosi, i Nkosi eyathi ngayo: EJerusalema ngizabeka ibizo lami." 
2Kings21:5 Wasesakhela ibutho lonke lamazulu amalathi emagumeni womabili endlini ye Nkosi. 
2Kings21:6 Wasedabulisa indodana yakhe emlilweni, wachasisa ngemibono, wenza imilingo, wasebenza labalamadlozi labalumbayo. Wenza okubi kakhulu emehlweni e Nkosi uku yi thukuthelisa." 
2Kings21:7 Wasemisa isithombe esibaziweyo sesixuku ayesenzile endlini, i Nkosi eyakhuluma ngayo kuDavida lakuSolomoni indodana yakhe yathi: Kulindlu, leJerusalema engiyikhethe kuzo zonke izizwe zakoIsrayeli, ngizabeka ibizo lami kuze kube nininini." 
2Kings21:8 Kangisayikuzulisa unyawo lukaIsrayeli luphume futhi elizweni engalinika oyise, kuphela uba bezananzelela ukwenza njengakho konke engabalaya khona langokomlayo wonke inceku yami uMozisi eyabalaya wona." 
2Kings21:9 Kodwa kabalalelanga; uManase wasebaphambukisa ukuthi benze okubi okwedlula izizwe i Nkosi eyazichitha phambi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli. 
2Kings21:10 I Nkosi yasikhuluma ngesandla sezinceku zayo abaprofethi isithi: 
2Kings21:11 Ngenxa yokuthi uManase inkosi yakoJuda wenzile lamanyala, wenze okubi okwedlula konke amaAmori akwenzayo, ayephambi kwakhe, wonisa loJuda ngezithombe zakhe." 
2Kings21:12 Ngakho itsho njalo i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli: Khangela, ngiletha okubi phezu kweJerusalema loJuda kuthi laye wonke ozwayo indlebe zakhe zombili zizakhenceza ngakho." 
2Kings21:13 Ngizakwelula phezu kweJerusalema intambo yeSamariya, lentambo yokulinganisa yendlu kaAhabi, ngiyesule iJerusalema njengowesula umganu, awesule awumbokothe." 
2Kings21:14 Njalo ngizatshiya insali yelifa lami, ngibanikele esandleni sezitha zabo, babe ngokubanjiweyo lempango kwezitha zabo zonke," 
2Kings21:15 ngenxa yokuthi benzile okubi emehlweni ami, bayangithukuthelisa, kusukela osukwini oyise abaphuma ngalo eGibhithe ngitsho kuze kube lamuhla." 
2Kings21:16 Futhi-ke uManase uchithile igazi elinengi kakhulu elingelacala waze wayigcwalisa iJerusalema kusukela ekuqaleni kuze kube sekucineni, ngaphandle kwesono sakhe enza ngaso uJuda ukuthi one, ukwenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi." 
2Kings21:17 Ezinye-ke zezindaba zikaManase, lakho konke akwenzayo, lesono sakhe asonayo, kakubhalwanga yini egwalweni lwemilando yamakhosi akoJuda?" 
2Kings21:18 UManase waselala laboyise, wangcwatshelwa esivandeni sendlu yakhe, esivandeni sikaUza. UAmoni indodana yakhe wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Kings21:19 UAmoni wayeleminyaka engamatshumi amabili lambili lapho esiba yinkosi; wabusa iminyaka emibili eJerusalema. Lebizo likanina lalinguMeshulemethi indodakazi kaHaruzi weJotiba. 
2Kings21:20 Wasesenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi njengokwenza kukaManase uyise. 
2Kings21:21 Wahamba ngendlela yonke uyise ahamba ngayo, wakhonza izithombe uyise azikhonzayo, wakhothama kuzo." 
2Kings21:22 Wayidela i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu waboyise, kahambanga ngendlela ye Nkosi." 
2Kings21:23 Izinceku zikaAmoni zasezimenzela ugobe, zabulala inkosi endlini yayo." 
2Kings21:24 Kodwa abantu belizwe babatshaya bonke labo ababenzele inkosi uAmoni ugobe; abantu belizwe basebebeka uJosiya indodana yakhe ukuba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe. 
2Kings21:25 Ezinye-ke zezindaba zikaAmoni azenzayo kazibhalwanga yini egwalweni lwemilando yamakhosi akoJuda? 
2Kings21:26 Wasengcwatshelwa engcwabeni lakhe esivandeni sikaUza. UJosiya indodana yakhe wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe. 
2Kings22:1 UJosiya wayeleminyaka eyisificaminwembili lapho esiba yinkosi; wabusa iminyaka engamatshumi amathathu lanye eJerusalema. Lebizo likanina lalinguJedida indodakazi kaAdaya weBhozikhathi. 
2Kings22:2 Wasesenza okulungileyo emehlweni e Nkosi, wahamba ngayo yonke indlela kaDavida uyise, kaze aphambukela ngakwesokunene langakwesokhohlo." 
2Kings22:3 Kwasekusithi ngomnyaka wetshumi lesificaminwembili wenkosi uJosiya, inkosi yathuma uShafani indodana kaAzaliya indodana kaMeshulamu, umabhalane, endlini ye Nkosi, esithi:" 
2Kings22:4 Yenyukela kuHilikhiya umpristi omkhulu ukuthi ahlanganise imali elethwe endlini ye Nkosi, abalindi bombundu womnyango ababeyiqoqe ebantwini." 
2Kings22:5 Kabayinikele esandleni sabenzi bomsebenzi abamiswe phezu kwendlu ye Nkosi, kabayinike abenzi bomsebenzi osendlini ye Nkosi, ukulungisa izikhala zendlu," 
2Kings22:6 kubabazi, lakubakhi, lakubabazi bamatshe, lokuthenga amapulanka lamatshe abaziweyo ukulungisa indlu." 
2Kings22:7 Kodwa akubalelwananga labo imali eyayinikelwe esandleni sabo ngoba benza ngokuthembeka. 
2Kings22:8 UHilikhiya umpristi omkhulu wasesithi kuShafani umabhalane: Sengifice ugwalo lomlayo endlini ye Nkosi. UHilikhiya wasenika uShafani ugwalo, waselufunda." 
2Kings22:9 UShafani umabhalane wasefika enkosini, wabuyisela ilizwi enkosini wathi: Izinceku zakho seziyithulule imali eficwe endlini, zayinikela esandleni sabenzi bomsebenzi abamiswe phezu kwendlu ye Nkosi." 
2Kings22:10 UShafani umabhalane wasebika enkosini esithi: UHilikhiya umpristi unginike ugwalo. UShafani waselufunda phambi kwenkosi. 
2Kings22:11 Kwasekusithi inkosi isizwile amazwi ogwalo lomlayo, yadabula izigqoko zayo." 
2Kings22:12 Inkosi yasilaya uHilikhiya umpristi loAhikhamu indodana kaShafani loAkhibhori indodana kaMikhaya loShafani umabhalane loAsaya inceku yenkosi, isithi:" 
2Kings22:13 Hambani liyengibuzela e Nkosi ni mina labantu loJuda wonke mayelana lamazwi alolugwalo oluficiweyo; ngoba yinkulu intukuthelo ye Nkosi esesiyibaselwe, ngoba obaba kabawalalelanga amazwi alolugwalo, ukwenza konke okubhaliweyo mayelana lathi." 
2Kings22:14 Ngakho uHilikhiya umpristi loAhikhamu loAkhibhori loShafani loAsaya baya kuHulida umprofethikazi umkaShaluma indodana kaTikiva indodana kaHarihasi, umgcini wezigqoko. Wayehlala-ke eJerusalema esigabeni sesibili. Basebekhuluma laye." 
2Kings22:15 Wasesithi kibo: Itsho njalo i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli: Mtsheleni lowomuntu olithume kimi:" 
2Kings22:16 Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Khangela, ngizakwehlisela okubi kulindawo laphezu kwabakhileyo bayo, wonke amazwi ogwalo inkosi yakoJuda elufundileyo." 
2Kings22:17 Ngenxa yokuthi bangidelile, batshisela abanye onkulunkulu impepha, ukuze bangithukuthelise ngawo wonke umsebenzi wezandla zabo. Ngakho intukuthelo yami izabaselwa lindawo, ingacitshwa." 
2Kings22:18 Kodwa enkosini yakoJuda elithumileyo ukubuza e Nkosi ni, lizakutsho njalo kuyo: Itsho njalo i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli: Mayelana l amazwi eliwezwileyo:" 
2Kings22:19 Ngoba inhliziyo yakho ibithambile, wazithoba phambi kwe Nkosi, lapho usizwa engikukhulume ngimelene lalindawo labakhileyo bayo, ukuthi bazakuba yincithakalo lesiqalekiso, wadabula izigqoko zakho, wakhala inyembezi phambi kwami, lami-ke ngizwile, kutsho i Nkosi." 
2Kings22:20 Ngakho, khangela, ngizakubuthela kuboyihlo, njalo uzabuthelwa engcwabeni lakho ngokuthula, lamehlo akho kawayikubona bonke ububi engizabehlisela phezu kwalindawo. Basebebuyisela ilizwi enkosini." 
2Kings23:1 Inkosi yasithumela, basebebuthanisa kuye bonke abadala bakoJuda labeJerusalema." 
2Kings23:2 Inkosi yasisenyukela endlini kaJehova, lawo wonke amadoda akoJuda labo bonke abakhileyo beJerusalema kanye laye, labapristi labaprofethi, labo bonke abantu kusukela komncinyane kusiya komkhulu, yasifunda endlebeni zabo wonke amazwi ogwalo lwesivumelwano olwaficwa endlini ye Nkosi." 
2Kings23:3 Inkosi yema-ke ngasensikeni, yenza isivumelwano phambi kwe Nkosi, sokuhamba emva kwe Nkosi, lokugcina imilayo yayo lemithetho yayo lezimiso zayo ngenhliziyo yonke langomphefumulo wonke, ukuqinisa amazwi alesisivumelwano abhaliweyo kulolugwalo. Bonke abantu basebesima esivumelwaneni." 
2Kings23:4 Inkosi yasilaya uHilikhiya umpristi omkhulu labapristi besigaba sesibili labalindi bombundu womnyango ukuthi bakhuphe ethempelini le Nkosi zonke izitsha ezazenzelwe uBhali lesixuku lebutho lonke lamazulu, wazitshisela ngaphandle kweJerusalema eziqintini zeKidroni, wathwalela umlotha wazo eBhetheli." 
2Kings23:5 Wasesusa abapristi bezithombe amakhosi akoJuda ayebabekile ukuthi batshise impepha endaweni eziphakemeyo, emizini yakoJuda, lendawo ezizingelezele iJerusalema, lalabo ababetshisa impepha kuBhali, elangeni, lenyangeni, lezinkanyezini, lebuthweni lonke lamazulu." 
2Kings23:6 Wakhupha isixuku endlini ye Nkosi, ngaphandle kweJerusalema, wasisa esifuleni iKidroni, wasitshisa esifuleni iKidroni, wasichola saba luthuli, waphosela uthuli lwaso emangcwabeni abantwana babantu." 
2Kings23:7 Wadiliza izindlu zezinkotshana ezazingasendlini ye Nkosi lapho abesifazana ababeselukela khona amaveyili esixuku. 
2Kings23:8 Wakhupha bonke abapristi emizini yakoJuda, wangcolisa indawo eziphakemeyo lapho abapristi ababetshisela khona impepha, kusukela eGeba kusiya eBherishebha. Wadiliza indawo eziphakemeyo zamasango ezisekungeneni kwesango likaJoshuwa umbusi womuzi, ezazingakwesokhohlo somuntu esangweni lomuzi." 
2Kings23:9 Loba kunjalo abapristi bendawo eziphakemeyo kabenyukelanga elathini le Nkosi eJerusalema, kodwa badla izinkwa ezingelamvubelo phakathi kwabafowabo." 
2Kings23:10 Wasengcolisa iTofethi elisesihotsheni sabantwana bakaHinomu ukuze kungabi khona umuntu odabulisa indodana yakhe kumbe indodakazi yakhe emlilweni kuMoleki. 
2Kings23:11 Wasesusa amabhiza amakhosi akoJuda ayewanikele elangeni ekungeneni kwendlu ye Nkosi, ngasekamelweni likaNathani-Meleki umthenwa elalisekhulusini, wazitshisa inqola zelanga ngomlilo." 
2Kings23:12 Lamalathi ayesephahleni lwendlu kaAhazi engaphezulu awenzayo amakhosi akoJuda, lamalathi uManase ayewenzile emagumeni womabili endlu ye Nkosi, inkosi yawadiliza yawachoboza iwasusa lapho, yaluphosela uthuli lwawo esifuleni iKidroni." 
2Kings23:13 Lendawo eziphakemeyo, ezaziphambi kweJerusalema, ezazingakwesokunene sentaba yokubola, uSolomoni inkosi yakoIsrayeli eyayizakhele uAshitarothi isinengiso samaSidoni, loKemoshi isinengiso samaMowabi, loMilkomu isinengiso sabantwana bakoAmoni, inkosi yazingcolisa." 
2Kings23:14 Wasephahlaza insika eziyizithombe, wagamula izixuku, wagcwalisa izindawo zazo ngamathambo abantu." 
2Kings23:15 Lelathi lalo elaliseBhetheli, lendawo ephakemeyo, ayenzayo uJerobowamu indodana kaNebati owenza uIsrayeli ukuthi one, kokubili lelolathi lendawo ephakemeyo wakudiliza, watshisa indawo ephakemeyo, wayichoboza yaba luthuli, watshisa isixuku." 
2Kings23:16 Lapho uJosiya ephenduka wabona amangcwaba ayelapho entabeni, wathuma wasekhupha amathambo emangcwabeni, wawatshisela phezu kwelathi, walingcolisa, njengelizwi le Nkosi umuntu kaNkulunkulu ayelimemezele, owamemezela lamazwi." 
2Kings23:17 Wasesithi: Yisikhumbuzo sani lesiyana engisibonayo? Abantu bomuzi basebesithi kuye: Lingcwaba lomuntu kaNkulunkulu owavela koJuda wamemezela lezizinto ozenzileyo umelene lelathi leBhetheli. 
2Kings23:18 Wasesithi: Myekeleni, kakungabi lamuntu othinta amathambo akhe. Basebewayekela amathambo akhe kanye lamathambo omprofethi owavela eSamariya." 
2Kings23:19 Njalo lazo zonke izindlu zezindawo eziphakemeyo ezisemizini yeSamariya, amakhosi akoIsrayeli ayezenzile ukuthukuthelisa, uJosiya wazisusa, wenza kizo njengayo yonke imisebenzi ayeyenze eBhetheli." 
2Kings23:20 Wasehlabela bonke abapristi bezindawo eziphakemeyo, ababekhonapho, phezu kwamalathi, watshisa amathambo abantu phezu kwawo. Wasebuyela eJerusalema." 
2Kings23:21 Inkosi yasilaya bonke abantu isithi: Gcinani iphasika e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wenu, njengalokhu kubhaliwe kulolugwalo lwesivumelwano." 
2Kings23:22 Ngoba kwakungagcinwanga elinjengaleli iphasika kusukela ensukwini zabehluleli abehlulela uIsrayeli, kumbe kuzo zonke izinsuku zamakhosi akoIsrayeli, kumbe zamakhosi akoJuda." 
2Kings23:23 Kodwa ngomnyaka wetshumi lesificaminwembili wenkosi uJosiya lagcinwa leliphasika e Nkosi ni eJerusalema. 
2Kings23:24 Ngaphezu kwalokho-ke abalamadlozi, labalumbayo, lamatherafi*, lezithombe, lawo wonke amanyala abonakala elizweni lakoJuda leJerusalema, uJosiya wakususa, ukuze aqinise amazwi omlayo ayebhalwe ogwalweni uHilikhiya umpristi alufica endlini ye Nkosi." 
2Kings23:25 Langaphambi kwakhe kakubanga khona inkosi eyafanana laye eyaphendukela e Nkosi ni ngenhliziyo yayo yonke langomphefumulo wayo wonke langamandla ayo wonke, njengokomlayo wonke kaMozisi. Futhi emva kwakhe kakuvelanga eya fanana laye." 
2Kings23:26 Kanti i Nkosi kayiphendukanga ekuvutheni kolaka lwayo olukhulu, olaka lwayo eyavuthela ngalo uJuda, ngenxa yazo zonke intukutheliso uManase ayithukuthelisa ngazo." 
2Kings23:27 I Nkosi yasisithi: Ngizamsusa loJuda phambi kwami, njengoba ngasusa uIsrayeli, ngiwulahle lumuzi weJerusalema engawukhethayo, lendlu engathi ngayo: Ibizo lami lizakuba lapho." 
2Kings23:28 Ezinye-ke zezindaba zikaJosiya, lakho konke akwenzayo, kakubhalwanga yini egwalweni lwemilando yamakhosi akoJuda?" 
2Kings23:29 Ensukwini zakhe uFaro Neko inkosi yeGibhithe wenyuka wamelana lenkosi yeAsiriya emfuleni iYufrathi. Inkosi uJosiya yasisiyahlangabezana laye; wayibulalela eMegido eseyibonile. 
2Kings23:30 Inceku zakhe zasezimthwala efile ngenqola, zisuka eMegido, zamusa eJerusalema, zamngcwaba engcwabeni lakhe. Abantu belizwe basebethatha uJehowahazi indodana kaJosiya, bamgcoba, bambeka waba yinkosi esikhundleni sikayise." 
2Kings23:31 UJehowahazi wayeleminyaka engamatshumi amabili lantathu lapho esiba yinkosi; wabusa inyanga ezintathu eJerusalema. Lebizo likanina lalinguHamuthali indodakazi kaJeremiya weLibhina. 
2Kings23:32 Wasesenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi njengakho konke oyise abakwenzayo. 
2Kings23:33 UFaro Neko wasembopha eRibila elizweni leHamathi ukuthi angabusi eJerusalema, wahlawulisa ilizwe amathalenta* esiliva alikhulu lethalenta legolide." 
2Kings23:34 UFaro Neko wasebeka uEliyakhimi indodana kaJosiya ukuthi abe yinkosi esikhundleni sikaJosiya uyise, waphendula ibizo lakhe wathi nguJehoyakhimi. Wasethatha uJehowahazi; wasesiza eGibhithe, wafela khona." 
2Kings23:35 UJehoyakhimi wasemnika uFaro isiliva legolide, kodwa wathelisa ilizwe ukuze anike leyomali njengokomlayo kaFaro. Wakhuphisa abantu belizwe isiliva legolide, ngulowo lalowo ngokomthelo wakhe, yokunika uFaro Neko." 
2Kings23:36 UJehoyakhimi wayeleminyaka engamatshumi amabili lanhlanu lapho esiba yinkosi; wabusa iminyaka elitshumi lanye eJerusalema. Lebizo likanina lalinguZebida indodakazi kaPedaya weRuma. 
2Kings23:37 Wasesenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi njengakho konke oyise abakwenzayo. 
2Kings24:1 Ngensuku zakhe uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni wenyuka, njalo uJehoyakhimi waba yisikhonzi sakhe iminyaka emithathu; wasephenduka wamvukela." 
2Kings24:2 I Nkosi yasithuma ukumelana laye amaviyo amaKhaladiya lamaviyo amaSiriya lamaviyo amaMowabi lamaviyo abantwana bakoAmoni, yasiwathuma ukumelana loJuda ukumchitha, njengokwelizwi le Nkosi eyalikhuluma ngesandla sezinceku zayo abaprofethi." 
2Kings24:3 Sibili ngokomlayo we Nkosi lokho kwehlela koJuda ukubasusa ebusweni bayo ngenxa yezono zikaManase, njengakho konke akwenzayo," 
2Kings24:4 njalo la nge gazi elingelacala alichithayo; ngoba wagcwalisa iJerusalema ngegazi elingelacala, i Nkosi engavumanga ukulithethelela." 
2Kings24:5 Ezinye-ke zezindaba zikaJehoyakhimi, lakho konke akwenzayo, kakubhalwanga yini egwalweni lwemilando yamakhosi akoJuda?" 
2Kings24:6 UJehoyakhimi waselala laboyise. UJehoyakhini indodana yakhe wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe. 
2Kings24:7 Inkosi yeGibhithe kayisaphindanga futhi ukuphuma elizweni layo, ngoba inkosi yeBhabhiloni yayithethe kusukela emfuleni weGibhithe kusiya emfuleni iYufrathi, konke okwakungokwenkosi yeGibhithe." 
2Kings24:8 UJehoyakhini wayeleminyaka elitshumi lesificaminwembili lapho esiba yinkosi; wabusa inyanga ezintathu eJerusalema. Lebizo likanina lalinguNehushita indodakazi kaElinathani weJerusalema. 
2Kings24:9 Wasesenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi njengokwenza konke kukayise. 
2Kings24:10 Ngalesosikhathi izinceku zikaNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni zenyukela eJerusalema, umuzi wasungena ekuvinjezelweni." 
2Kings24:11 UNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni wasefika wamelana lomuzi, izinceku zakhe zisawuvimbezela." 
2Kings24:12 UJehoyakhini inkosi yakoJuda wasephuma waya enkosini yeBhabhiloni, yena lonina lenceku zakhe lenduna zakhe labathenwa bakhe. Inkosi yeBhabhiloni yasimthatha ngomnyaka wesificaminwembili wokubusa kwakhe." 
2Kings24:13 Yasikhupha lapho wonke amagugu endlu kaJehova lamagugu endlu yenkosi, yabulala zonke izitsha zegolide, uSolomoni inkosi yakoIsrayeli ayezenzile ethempelini likaJehova, njengokutsho kwe Nkosi." 
2Kings24:14 Yasithumba iJerusalema yonke, leziphathamandla zonke, lawo wonke amaqhawe alamandla, abathunjwa abazinkulungwane ezilitshumi, lazo zonke ingcitshi zemisebenzi labakhandi; kakusalanga loyedwa ngaphandle kwabangabayanga babantu belizwe." 
2Kings24:15 Yasimthumbela uJehoyakhini eBhabhiloni; lonina wenkosi, lamakhosikazi enkosi, labathenwa bakhe, lamaqhawe elizwe, yabathumbela eBhabhiloni besuka eJerusalema." 
2Kings24:16 Lawo wonke amadoda angamaqhawe, azinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa, lezingcitshi zemisebenzi labakhandi, abayinkulungwane, bonke abaqinileyo abangaphuma impi, inkosi yeBhabhiloni yasibaletha bengabathunjwa eBhabhiloni." 
2Kings24:17 Inkosi yeBhabhiloni yasibeka uMathaniya uyise omncinyane ukuba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe, yaguqula ibizo lakhe yathi nguZedekhiya." 
2Kings24:18 UZedekhiya wayeleminyaka engamatshumi amabili lanye lapho esiba yinkosi; wabusa iminyaka elitshumi lanye eJerusalema. Lebizo likanina lalinguHamutali indodakazi kaJeremiya weLibhina. 
2Kings24:19 Wasesenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi njengokwenza konke kukaJehoyakhimi. 
2Kings24:20 Ngoba ngenxa yentukuthelo ye Nkosi lokhu kwenzeka eJerusalema lakoJuda yaze yabaxotsha phambi kwayo. UZedekhiya waseyivukela inkosi yeBhabhiloni. 
2Kings25:1 Kwasekusithi ngomnyaka wesificamunwemunye wokubusa kwakhe, ngenyanga yetshumi, ngolwetshumi lwenyanga, uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni wafika, yena lebutho lakhe lonke emelene leJerusalema, wamisa inkamba maqondana layo; bayakhela imiduli yokuvimbezela emelene layo inhlangothi zonke." 
2Kings25:2 Umuzi wangena ekuvinjezelweni kwaze kwaba ngumnyaka wetshumi lanye wenkosi uZedekhiya. 
2Kings25:3 Ngolwesificamunwemunye lwenyanga yesine indlala yasisiba lamandla phakathi komuzi, njalo kwakungelakudla kwabantu belizwe." 
2Kings25:4 Umuzi wasufohlelwa. Wonke amadoda empi ase baleka ebusuku ngendlela yesango phakathi kwemiduli emibili eyayiseduze lesivande senkosi, (amaKhaladiya ayemelene-ke lomuzi inhlangothi zonke); inkosi yasihamba ngendlela yamagceke." 
2Kings25:5 Ibutho lamaKhaladiya laselixotshana lenkosi, layifica emagcekeni eJeriko; ibutho layo lonke laselihlakazeka lisuka kuyo." 
2Kings25:6 Aseyibamba inkosi, ayenyusela enkosini yeBhabhiloni eRibila, akhuluma ukwahlulela kwayo." 
2Kings25:7 Abulala amadodana kaZedekhiya phambi kwamehlo akhe, akhupha amehlo kaZedekhiya, ambopha ngamaketane ethusi amabili, amusa eBhabhiloni." 
2Kings25:8 Langenyanga yesihlanu ngolwesikhombisa lwenyanga (okungumnyaka wetshumi lesificamunwemunye wenkosi uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni) kwafika uNebuzaradani induna yabalindi, inceku yenkosi yeBhabhiloni, eJerusalema." 
2Kings25:9 Wasetshisa indlu kaJehova lendlu yenkosi lazo zonke izindlu zeJerusalema; layo yonke indlu yesikhulu wayitshisa ngomlilo. 
2Kings25:10 Lebutho lonke lamaKhaladiya elalilenduna yabalindi ladilizela phansi imiduli yeJerusalema inhlangothi zonke. 
2Kings25:11 Njalo insali yabantu ababesele emzini, labahlamuki ababehlamukele enkosini yeBhabhiloni, lensali yexuku, uNebuzaradani induna yabalindi yabathumba." 
2Kings25:12 Kodwa induna yabalindi yatshiya ebayangeni belizwe ukuba ngabaphathi bezivini labalimi. 
2Kings25:13 Lensika zethusi ezazisendlini ye Nkosi, lezisekelo, lolwandle lwethusi olwalusendlini ye Nkosi, amaKhaladiya akuphahlaza, athwalela ithusi lakho eBhabhiloni." 
2Kings25:14 Lezimbiza, lamafotsholo, lezindlawu, lenkezo, lezitsha zonke zethusi, abasebenza ngazo, akuthatha." 
2Kings25:15 Lezitsha zokuthwala umlilo lemiganu yokufafaza, okwakuligolide golide lokwakuyisiliva siliva, induna yabalindi yakuthatha." 
2Kings25:16 Insika zombili, ulwandle olulodwa, lezisekelo, uSolomoni ayekwenzele indlu ye Nkosi, ithusi lazo zonke lezizitsha lalingela kulinganiswa nge sisindo." 
2Kings25:17 Ubude bensika eyodwa babuzingalo ezilitshumi lesificaminwembili, lesiduku phezu kwayo sasilithusi, lokuphakama kwesiduku kuzingalo ezintathu, lomsebenzi ophothiweyo, lamapomegranati* phezu kwesiduku inhlangothi zonke, konke kungokwethusi. Lensika yesibili yayilokunje, ilomsebenzi ophothiweyo." 
2Kings25:18 Induna yabalindi yasithatha uSeraya umpristi oyinhloko loZefaniya umpristi wesibili, labalindi bombundu womnyango abathathu." 
2Kings25:19 Lemzini yasithatha induna eyayimiswe phezu kwamadoda empi, lamadoda amahlanu ayesebusweni benkosi ayeficwe emzini, lomabhalane omkhulu webutho eyayibuthela abantu belizwe emabuthweni, lamadoda angamatshumi ayisithupha abantu belizwe ayeficwe phakathi komuzi." 
2Kings25:20 UNebuzaradani induna yabalindi wasebathatha laba wabasa enkosini yeBhabhiloni eRibila. 
2Kings25:21 Inkosi yeBhabhiloni yasibatshaya yababulalela eRibila elizweni leHamathi. Ngokunjalo uJuda wathunjwa esuswa elizweni lakhe. 
2Kings25:22 Abantu abasala-ke elizweni lakoJuda, uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni owayebatshiyile, wabeka phezu kwabo uGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu indodana kaShafani." 
2Kings25:23 Kwathi zonke induna zamabutho, zona labantu bazo, sezizwile ukuthi inkosi yeBhabhiloni ibeke uGedaliya abe ngumbusi, zeza kuGedaliya eMizipa: Ngitsho oIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya loJohanani indodana kaKareya loSeraya indodana kaTanihumethi umNetofa loJahazaniya indodana yomMahakathi, zona labantu bazo." 
2Kings25:24 UGedaliya wasefunga kuzo lakubantu bazo wathi kuzo: Lingesabi ukuba zinceku zamaKhaladiya; hlalani elizweni, likhonze inkosi yeBhabhiloni, njalo kuzakuba kuhle kini." 
2Kings25:25 Kodwa kwathi ngenyanga yesikhombisa, kwafika uIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya indodana kaElishama, owenzalo yobukhosi, lamadoda alitshumi elaye, basebemtshaya uGedaliya waze wafa, lamaJuda lamaKhaladiya ayelaye eMizipa." 
2Kings25:26 Abantu bonke-ke, kusukela komncinyane kuze kuye komkhulu, lenduna zamabutho, basebesuka baya eGibhithe, ngoba besaba amaKhaladiya." 
2Kings25:27 Kwasekusithi ngomnyaka wamatshumi amathathu lesikhombisa wokuthunjwa kukaJehoyakhini inkosi yakoJuda, ngenyanga yetshumi lambili, ngolwamatshumi amabili lesikhombisa lwenyanga, uEvili Merodaki inkosi yeBhabhiloni, ngomnyaka aba yinkosi ngawo, waphakamisa ikhanda likaJehoyakhini inkosi yakoJuda emkhupha entolongweni." 
2Kings25:28 Wasekhuluma kuhle laye, wamisa isihlalo sakhe sobukhosi phezu kwesihlalo sobukhosi samakhosi ayelaye eBhabhiloni." 
2Kings25:29 Wasentshintsha izigqoko zokubotshwa kwakhe; wasesidla isinkwa njalonjalo phambi kwakhe insuku zonke zempilo yakhe. 
2Kings25:30 Lesabelo esimiyo, isabelo esimiyo esiqhubekayo sanikwa yena yinkosi, into yosuku ngosuku lwayo, zonke izinsuku zempilo yakhe." 
1Chronicles1:1 UAdamu, uSeti, uEnosi," 
1Chronicles1:2 uKenani, uMahalaleli, uJaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 uEnoki, uMethusela, uLameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 uNowa, uShemu, uHamu, loJafethi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Amadodana kaJafethi: OGomeri loMagogi loMadayi loJavani loTubali loMesheki loTirasi. 
1Chronicles1:6 Lamadodana kaGomeri: OAshikenazi loRifathi loTogarma. 
1Chronicles1:7 Lamadodana kaJavani: OElisha loTarshishi, amaKiti lamaDodani." 
1Chronicles1:8 Amadodana kaHamu: OKushi loMizirayimi, uPuti loKhanani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Lamadodana kaKushi: OSeba loHavila loSabitha loRahama loSabitheka. Lamadodana kaRahama: OShebha loDedani. 
1Chronicles1:10 UKushi wasezala uNimrodi; yena waqala ukuba liqhawe emhlabeni. 
1Chronicles1:11 UMizirayimi wasezala amaLudi lamaAnami lamaLehabi lamaNafethuhi 
1Chronicles1:12 lamaPatrusi lamaKaseluhi (okwaphuma kiwo amaFilisti), lamaKafitori." 
1Chronicles1:13 UKhanani wasezala uSidoni izibulo lakhe, loHethi," 
1Chronicles1:14 lomJebusi lomAmori lomGirigashi 
1Chronicles1:15 lomHivi lomArki lomSini 
1Chronicles1:16 lomArvadi lomZemari lomHamathi. 
1Chronicles1:17 Amadodana kaShemu: OElamu loAshuri loArpakishadi loLudi loAramu loUzi loHuli loGetheri loMesheki. 
1Chronicles1:18 UArpakishadi wasezala uShela; uShela wasezala uEberi. 
1Chronicles1:19 UEberi wasezalelwa amadodana amabili. Ibizo lenye lalinguPelegi, ngoba ensukwini zayo umhlaba wadatshulwa; lebizo lomfowabo lalinguJokithani." 
1Chronicles1:20 UJokithani wasezala oAlimodadi loShelefi loHazamavethi loJera 
1Chronicles1:21 loHadoramu loUzali loDikila 
1Chronicles1:22 loEbhali loAbhimayeli loShebha 
1Chronicles1:23 loOfiri loHavila loJobabi. Bonke labo babengamadodana kaJokithani. 
1Chronicles1:23 loOfiri loHavila loJobabi. Bonke labo babengamadodana kaJokithani. 
1Chronicles1:24 UShemu, uArpakishadi, uShela," 
1Chronicles1:25 uEberi, uPelegi, uRewu," 
1Chronicles1:26 uSerugi, uNahori, uTera," 
1Chronicles1:27 uAbrama; onguAbrahama. 
1Chronicles1:28 Amadodana kaAbrahama: OIsaka loIshmayeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Laba yizizukulwana zabo: Izibulo likaIshmayeli, uNebayothi, loKedari, loAdibeli, loMibisama," 
1Chronicles1:30 uMishima, loDuma, uMasa, uHadadi, loTema," 
1Chronicles1:31 uJeturi, uNafishi, loKedema; la ngamadodana kaIshmayeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Njalo amadodana kaKetura, umfazi omncinyane kaAbrahama: Wazala oZimrani loJokishani loMedani loMidiyani loIshibaki loShuwa. Amadodana-ke kaJokishani: OShebha loDedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Lamadodana kaMidiyani: OEfa loEferi loHanoki loAbida loElidaha. Bonke laba ngamadodana kaKetura. 
1Chronicles1:34 UAbrahama wasezala uIsaka. Amadodana kaIsaka: OEsawu loIsrayeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Amadodana kaEsawu: OElifazi, uRehuweli, loJewushi, loJalamu, loKora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Amadodana kaElifazi: OThemani, loOmari, uZefi, loGatama, uKenazi, loTimina, loAmaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Amadodana kaRehuweli: ONahathi, uZera, uShama, loMiza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Lamadodana kaSeyiri: OLotani loShobhali loZibeyoni loAna loDishoni loEzeri loDishani. 
1Chronicles1:39 Lamadodana kaLotani: OHori loHomama; lodadewabo kaLotani wayenguTimina. 
1Chronicles1:40 Amadodana kaShobhali: OAliyani, loManahathi, loEbhali, uShefi, loOnama. Lamadodana kaZibeyoni: OAya loAna." 
1Chronicles1:41 Amadodana kaAna: UDishoni. Lamadodana kaDishoni: OHamrani loEshibhani loJitirani loKerani. 
1Chronicles1:42 Amadodana kaEzeri: OBilihani loZahavana, uJahakhani. Amadodana kaDishani: OUzi loArani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Njalo la ngamakhosi abusa elizweni leEdoma, kungakabusi inkosi phezu kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli: UBhela indodana kaBeyori; lebizo lomuzi wakhe laliyiDinihaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 UBhela wasesifa, uJobabi indodana kaZera weBozira wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:44 UBhela wasesifa, uJobabi indodana kaZera weBozira wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:45 UJobabi wasesifa, uHushama owelizweni lamaThemani wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:45 UJobabi wasesifa, uHushama owelizweni lamaThemani wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:46 UHushama wasesifa, uHadadi indodana kaBedadi, owatshaya amaMidiyani emagcekeni akoMowabi, wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe; lebizo lomuzi wakhe laliyiAvithi." 
1Chronicles1:47 UHadadi wasesifa, uSamila weMasireka wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:48 USamila wasesifa, uShawuli weRehobothi emfuleni wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:49 UShawuli wasesifa, uBhali-Hanani indodana kaAkhibhori wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles1:50 UBhali-Hanani wasesifa, uHadadi wasesiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe; lebizo lomuzi wakhe laliyiPhayi; lebizo lomkakhe lalinguMehethabheli indodakazi kaMatiredi indodakazi kaMezahabhi." 
1Chronicles1:51 UHadadi wasesifa. Lezinduna zeEdoma zaziyi lezi: Induna uTimina, induna uAliya, induna uJethethi," 
1Chronicles1:52 induna uAholibama, induna uEla, induna uPinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 induna uKenazi, induna uThemani, induna uMibhizari," 
1Chronicles1:54 induna uMagidiyeli, induna uIrama; lezi yizinduna zeEdoma." 
1Chronicles2:1 La ngamadodana kaIsrayeli: ORubeni, uSimeyoni, uLevi, loJuda, uIsakari, loZebuluni," 
1Chronicles2:2 uDani, uJosefa, loBhenjamini, uNafithali, uGadi, loAsheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Amadodana kaJuda: OEri loOnani loShela; amathathu wawazalelwa yindodakazi kaShuwa umKhananikazi. Kodwa uEri izibulo likaJuda wayemubi emehlweni e Nkosi; yasimbulala. 
1Chronicles2:4 UTamari, umalokozana wakhe, wasemzalela uPerezi loZera. Wonke amadodana kaJuda ayemahlanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Amadodana kaPerezi: OHezironi loHamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Njalo amadodana kaZera: OZimri loEthani loHemani loKalikoli loDara; wonke ayemahlanu. 
1Chronicles2:7 Njalo amadodana kaKarimi: UAkari, umhluphi kaIsrayeli, owenza isiphambeko ngokuqalekisiweyo." 
1Chronicles2:8 Njalo amadodana kaEthani: UAzariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Njalo amadodana kaHezironi awazalelwayo: OJerameli loRamu loKalebi. 
1Chronicles2:10 URamu wasezala uAminadaba; uAminadaba wasezala uNahishoni induna yabantwana bakoJuda. 
1Chronicles2:11 UNahishoni wasezala uSalima; uSalima wasezala uBhowazi; 
1Chronicles2:12 uBhowazi wasezala uObedi; uObedi wasezala uJese. 
1Chronicles2:13 UJese wasezala izibulo lakhe uEliyabi, loAbinadaba owesibili, loShimeya owesithathu," 
1Chronicles2:14 uNethaneli owesine, uRadayi owesihlanu," 
1Chronicles2:15 uOzema owesithupha, uDavida owesikhombisa." 
1Chronicles2:16 Odadewabo babengoZeruya loAbigayili. Lamadodana kaZeruya: OAbishayi loJowabi loAsaheli; abathathu. 
1Chronicles2:17 UAbigayili wasezala uAmasa; loyise kaAmasa wayenguJetheri umIshmayeli. 
1Chronicles2:18 UKalebi indodana kaHezironi wasezala kuAzuba umka khe lakuJeriyothi; lala ngamadodana akhe: OJesheri loShobabi loAridoni. 
1Chronicles2:19 UAzuba esefile uKalebi wazithathela uEfrathi owamzalela uHuri. 
1Chronicles2:20 UHuri wasezala uUri; uUri wasezala uBhezaleli. 
1Chronicles2:21 Emva kwalokho uHezironi wasengena kundodakazi kaMakiri uyise kaGileyadi; wayithatha eseleminyaka engamatshumi ayisithupha. Yasimzalela uSegubi. 
1Chronicles2:22 USegubi wasezala uJayiri owayelemizi engamatshumi amabili lantathu elizweni leGileyadi. 
1Chronicles2:23 Wasethatha kibo iGeshuri leAramu kanye lemizana yeJayiri, kanye leKenathi lemizana yayo; imizi engamatshumi ayisithupha. Bonke labo babengamadodana kaMakiri uyise kaGileyadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Lemva kokufa kukaHezironi eKalebi-Efratha, uAbhiya umkaHezironi wamzalela uAshuri uyise kaThekhowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Njalo amadodana kaJerameli izibulo likaHezironi ayengoRamu izibulo, loBuna, loOreni, loOzema, uAhiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 UJerameli laye wayelomunye umfazi obizo lakhe lalinguAthara; wayengunina kaOnama. 
1Chronicles2:27 Njalo amadodana kaRamu izibulo likaJerameli ayengoMahazi loJamini loEkeri. 
1Chronicles2:28 Lamadodana kaOnama ayengoShamayi loJada. Lamadodana kaShamayi: ONadabi loAbhishuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Lebizo lomkaAbhishuri lalinguAbihayili, owamzalela oAhibani loMolidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Njalo amadodana kaNadabi: OSeledi loAphayimi; kodwa uSeledi wafa engelabantwana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Njalo amadodana kaAphayimi: UIshi. Lamadodana kaIshi: USheshani. Lamadodana kaSheshani: UAhilayi. 
1Chronicles2:32 Njalo amadodana kaJada umfowabo kaShamayi: OJetheri loJonathani; kodwa uJetheri wafa engelabantwana. 
1Chronicles2:33 Njalo amadodana kaJonathani: OPelethi loZaza. Laba babengabantwana bakaJerameli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Njalo uSheshani wayengelamadodana, kodwa amadodakazi; njalo uSheshani wayelenceku, umGibhithe, obizo layo lalinguJariha." 
1Chronicles2:35 USheshani wasenika uJariha inceku yakhe indodakazi yakhe yaba ngumka khe; yasimzalela uAthayi. 
1Chronicles2:36 UAthayi wasezala uNathani, uNathani wasezala uZabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 uZabadi wasezala uEfilali, uEfilali wasezala uObedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 uObedi wasezala uJehu, uJehu wasezala uAzariya," 
1Chronicles2:39 uAzariya wasezala uHelezi, uHelezi wasezala uEleyasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 uEleyasa wasezala uSisimayi, uSisimayi wasezala uShaluma," 
1Chronicles2:41 uShaluma wasezala uJekamiya, uJekamiya wasezala uElishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Njalo amadodana kaKalebi umfowabo kaJerameli: OMesha, izibulo lakhe, onguyise kaZifi, lamadodana kaMaresha uyise kaHebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Njalo amadodana kaHebroni: OKora loTapuwa loRekemi loShema. 
1Chronicles2:44 UShema wasezala uRahama uyise kaJorikeyamu; uRekemi wasezala uShamayi. 
1Chronicles2:45 Lendodana kaShamayi: UMawoni; loMawoni wayenguyise kaBeti-Zuri. 
1Chronicles2:46 UEfa umfazi omncinyane kaKalebi wasezala oHarani loMoza loGazezi; uHarani wasezala uGazezi. 
1Chronicles2:47 Njalo amadodana kaJahidayi: ORegema loJothamu loGeshani loPeleti loEfa loShahafi. 
1Chronicles2:48 UMahaka umfazi omncinyane kaKalebi wazala oSheberi loTirihana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Wasezala uShahafi uyise kaMadimana, uSheva uyise kaMakibena, loyise kaGibeya. Lendodakazi kaKalebi yayinguAkisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Laba babengabantwana bakaKalebi, indodana kaHuri, izibulo likaEfratha: OShobhali, uyise kaKiriyathi-Jeyarimi," 
1Chronicles2:51 uSalima uyise kaBhethelehema, uHarefi uyise kaBeti-Gaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 UShobhali uyise kaKiriyathi-Jeyarimi wayelamadodana: UHarowe, ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yamaMenuhothi." 
1Chronicles2:53 Njalo insendo zikaKiriyathi-Jeyarimi: AmaIthiri lamaPuti lamaShumathi lamaMishrayi; kwaphuma kuwo amaZorathi lamaEshitawoli. 
1Chronicles2:54 Amadodana kaSalima: OBhethelehema, lamaNetofa, uAtarothi, uBeti-Jowabi, lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yamaManahethi, amaZori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Lensendo zababhali ababehlala eJabezi, amaTirathi, amaShimeyathi, amaSukathi. Labo babengamaKeni avela kuHamathi uyise wendlu kaRekabi." 
1Chronicles3:1 Njalo la ayengamadodana kaDavida awazalelwa eHebroni: Izibulo nguAmnoni kuAhinowama umJizereyelikazi; eyesibili nguDaniyeli kuAbigayili umKharmelikazi; 
1Chronicles3:2 eyesithathu nguAbisalomu indodana kaMahaka indodakazi kaTalimayi inkosi yeGeshuri; eyesine nguAdonija indodana kaHagithi; 
1Chronicles3:3 eyesihlanu nguShefathiya kuAbithali; eyesithupha nguIthereyamu kuEgila umkakhe. 
1Chronicles3:4 Abayisithupha bazalelwa yena eHebroni, lapho abusa khona iminyaka eyisikhombisa lezinyanga eziyisithupha; leJerusalema wabusa iminyaka engamatshumi amathathu lantathu." 
1Chronicles3:5 Lalaba bazalelwa yena eJerusalema: OShimeya loShobabi loNathani loSolomoni, bo bane, kuBathishuwa indodakazi kaAmiyeli;" 
1Chronicles3:6 loIbihari loElishama loElifelethi 
1Chronicles3:7 loNoga loNefegi loJafiya 
1Chronicles3:8 loElishama loEliyada loElifelethi, abayisificamunwemunye." 
1Chronicles3:9 Bonke babengamadodana kaDavida, ngaphandle kwamadodana abafazi abancane, loTamari udadewabo." 
1Chronicles3:10 Lendodana kaSolomoni yayinguRehobowamu, uAbhiya indodana yakhe, uAsa indodana yakhe, uJehoshafathi indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles3:11 uJoramu indodana yakhe, uAhaziya indodana yakhe, uJowashi indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles3:12 uAmaziya indodana yakhe, uAzariya indodana yakhe, uJothamu indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles3:13 uAhazi indodana yakhe, uHezekhiya indodana yakhe, uManase indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles3:14 uAmoni indodana yakhe, uJosiya indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles3:15 Njalo amadodana kaJosiya: Izibulo uJohanani, eyesibili uJehoyakhimi, eyesithathu uZedekhiya, eyesine uShaluma." 
1Chronicles3:16 Lamadodana kaJehoyakhimi: UJekoniya indodana yakhe, uZedekhiya indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles3:17 Njalo amadodana kaJekoniya: UAsiri, uSheyalitiyeli indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles3:18 loMalikiramu, loPedaya, loShenazari, uJekamiya, uHoshama, loNedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Njalo amadodana kaPedaya: OZerubhabheli loShimeyi. Lamadodana kaZerubhabheli: OMeshulamu, loHananiya, loShelomithi udadewabo;" 
1Chronicles3:20 loHashuba, loOheli, loBerekiya, loHasadiya, uJushabi-Hesedi, amahlanu." 
1Chronicles3:21 Lamadodana kaHananiya: OPelatiya loJeshaya; amadodana kaRefaya, amadodana kaArinani, amadodana kaObadiya, amadodana kaShekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Lamadodana kaShekaniya: UShemaya. Lamadodana kaShemaya: OHathushi loIgali loBariya loNeyariya loShafati, ayisithupha." 
1Chronicles3:23 Njalo amadodana kaNeyariya: OEliyohenayi loHizikiya loAzirikamu, amathathu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Njalo amadodana kaEliyohenayi: OHodaviya loEliyashibi loPelaya loAkubi loJohanani loDelaya loAnani, ayisikhombisa." 
1Chronicles4:1 Amadodana kaJuda: OPerezi, uHezironi, loKarmi, loHuri, loShobhali." 
1Chronicles4:2 UReyaya indodana kaShobhali wasezala uJahathi; uJahathi wasezala uAhumayi loLahadi. Laba babezinsendo zamaZorathi. 
1Chronicles4:3 Laba babengabakayise kaEtamu: OJizereyeli loIshma loIdibhashi; lebizo likadadewabo lalinguHazeleliponi. 
1Chronicles4:4 LoPenuweli uyise kaGedori, loEzeri uyise kaHusha. Laba babengamadodana kaHuri, izibulo likaEfratha, uyise kaBhethelehema." 
1Chronicles4:5 Njalo uAshuri uyise kaThekhowa wayelabafazi ababili, oHela loNahara." 
1Chronicles4:6 UNahara wasemzalela uAhuzama loHeferi loTemeni loHahashitari. Laba babengamadodana kaNahara. 
1Chronicles4:7 Lamadodana kaHela: OZerethi loIzohari loEthinani. 
1Chronicles4:8 UKhozi wasezala uAnubi loZobeba, lensendo zikaAhariheli indodana kaHarumi." 
1Chronicles4:9 Njalo uJabezi wayelodumo kulabafowabo; unina wasemutha ibizo wathi nguJabezi, esithi: Ngoba ngamzala ngisosizini." 
1Chronicles4:10 UJabezi wasebiza uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli esithi: Kungathi ungangibusisa lokungibusisa, uqhelise umngcele wami, lesandla sakho sibe lami, ungivikele ebubini ukuze bungangidabuki! UNkulunkulu wenza kwenzakala lokho akucelayo." 
1Chronicles4:11 UKelubi umfowabo kuShuha wasezala uMehiri, onguyise kaEshitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 UEshitoni wasezala uBeti-Rafa loPhaseya loTehina uyise kaIri-Nahashi. Laba babengabantu bakaReka. 
1Chronicles4:13 Lamadodana kaKenazi: O-Othiniyeli loSeraya. Lamadodana kaOthiniyeli: UHathathi. 
1Chronicles4:14 UMeyonothayi wasezala uOfira. USeraya wasezala uJowabi uyise wesigodi seHarashi, ngoba babezingcitshi." 
1Chronicles4:15 Lamadodana kaKalebi indodana kaJefune: OIru, uEla, loNahamu; lamadodana kaEla, ngitsho uKenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Lamadodana kaJehaleleli: OZifi, loZifa, uTiriya, loAsareli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Lamadodana kaEzra: OJetheri loMeredi loEferi loJaloni. Wasezala oMiriyamu loShamayi loIshiba uyise kaEshithemowa. 
1Chronicles4:17 Lamadodana kaEzra: OJetheri loMeredi loEferi loJaloni. Wasezala oMiriyamu loShamayi loIshiba uyise kaEshithemowa. 
1Chronicles4:18 Umkakhe umJudakazi wasezala uJeredi uyise kaGedori, loHeberi uyise kaSoko, loJekuthiyeli uyise kaZanowa. Lalabo babengamadodana kaBithiya indodakazi kaFaro, uMeredi amthathayo." 
1Chronicles4:19 Lamadodana omkaHodiya, udadewabo kaNahama, uyise kaKeyila umGarmi, loEshithemowa umMahakathi." 
1Chronicles4:20 Njalo amadodana kaShimoni: OAmnoni, loRina, uBheni-Hanani, loThiloni. Lamadodana kaIshi: OZohethi loBheni-Zohethi." 
1Chronicles4:21 Amadodana kaShela indodana kaJuda: OEri uyise kaLeka, loLahada uyise kaMaresha, lensendo zendlu yabenzi belembu elicolekileyo bendlu kaAshibeya," 
1Chronicles4:22 loJokimi, lamadoda akoKhozeba, loJowashi, loSarafi ababebusa amaMowabi, loJashubi-Lehema. Lalezizindaba zindala." 
1Chronicles4:23 Labo babengababumbi, labakhileyo eNetayimi leGedera; bahlala lapho lenkosi emsebenzini wayo." 
1Chronicles4:24 Amadodana kaSimeyoni: ONemuweli, loJamini, loJaribi, uZera, uShawuli," 
1Chronicles4:25 uShaluma indodana yakhe, uMibhisamu indodana yakhe, uMishima indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles4:26 Lamadodana kaMishima: UHamuweli indodana yakhe, uZakuri indodana yakhe, uShimeyi indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles4:27 Njalo uShimeyi wayelamadodana alitshumi lesithupha lamadodakazi ayisithupha; kodwa abafowabo babengelabantwana abanengi, losendo lonke lwabo kalwandanga njengabantwana bakoJuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Basebehlala eBherishebha leMolada leHazari-Shuwali 
1Chronicles4:29 leBiliha leEzema leToladi 
1Chronicles4:30 leBethuweli leHorma leZikilagi 
1Chronicles4:31 leBeti-Marikabothi leHazari-Susimi leBeti-Biri leShaharayimi. Le yayiyimizi yabo kwaze kwaba sekubuseni kukaDavida. 
1Chronicles4:32 Lemizana yabo: IEtamu, leAyini, iRimoni, leTokeni, leAshani, imizi emihlanu," 
1Chronicles4:33 layo yonke imizana yayo, eyayiyizingelezele leyomizi, kuze kube seBahali. Lezi zindawo zabo zokuhlala, njalo baba lombhalo wosendo lwabo." 
1Chronicles4:34 LoMeshobabi loJamileki loJosha indodana kaAmaziya," 
1Chronicles4:35 loJoweli loJehu indodana kaJoshibhiya indodana kaSeraya indodana kaAsiyeli," 
1Chronicles4:36 loEliyohenayi loJahakoba loJeshohaya loAsaya loAdiyeli loJesimiyeli loBhenaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 loZiza indodana kaShifi indodana kaAloni indodana kaJedaya indodana kaShimiri indodana kaShemaya. 
1Chronicles4:38 Laba abangena ngamabizo babeyizikhulu ensendweni zabo, lezindlu zaboyise zanda kakhulu ngobunengi." 
1Chronicles4:39 Basebesiya ekungeneni kweGedori, baya ngempumalanga kwesihotsha, ukudingela imihlambi yabo idlelo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Bafica idlelo elivundileyo lelihle, lommango obanzi emaceleni, lolokuzola, lolokuthula; ngoba aba koHamu babehlala khona endulo." 
1Chronicles4:41 Lalabo ababebhalwe ngamabizo bafika ensukwini zikaHezekhiya inkosi yakoJuda, batshaya amathente lendawo zokuhlala ezazitholakala khona, babatshabalalisa kuze kube lamuhla; bahlala endaweni zabo, ngoba kwakukhona lapho idlelo lezimvu zabo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Kwasekuphuma kubo, ebantwaneni bakoSimeyoni, amadoda angamakhulu amahlanu, aya entabeni yeSeyiri. LoPelatiya loNeyariya loRefaya loUziyeli amadodana kaIshi babezinhloko zabo." 
1Chronicles4:43 Basebetshaya insali yabaphephayo bamaAmaleki, bahlala khona kuze kube lamuhla." 
1Chronicles5:1 Njalo amadodana kaRubeni, izibulo likaIsrayeli (ngoba wayelezibulo, kodwa njengoba wayengcolise umbheda kayise, ubuzibulo bakhe banikwa amadodana kaJosefa indodana kaIsrayeli; futhi wayengabhalwanga njengezibulo;" 
1Chronicles5:2 ngoba uJuda wayelamandla kulabafowabo, lowayengumbusi wavela kuye, kodwa ubuzibulo babungobukaJosefa)." 
1Chronicles5:3 Amadodana kaRubeni, izibulo likaIsrayeli: OHanoki, loPalu, uHezironi, loKarmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Amadodana kaJoweli: UShemaya indodana yakhe, uGogi indodana yakhe, uShimeyi indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles5:5 uMika indodana yakhe, uReyaya indodana yakhe, uBhali indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles5:6 uBehera indodana yakhe, uTiligathi-Pilineseri inkosi yeAsiriya eyamthumbayo; wayeyisiphathamandla sabakoRubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Njalo abafowabo ngensendo zabo, lapho bebhalwa ngokwezizukulwana zabo, bayizinhloko: OJeyiyeli, loZekariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 loBhela indodana kaAzazi indodana kaShema indodana kaJoweli, owayehlala eAroweri, njalo kwaze kwaba seNebo leBhali-Meyoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Langempumalanga wahlala kwaze kwaba sekungeneni kwenkangala kusukela emfuleni iYufrathi, ngoba izifuyo zabo zasezandile elizweni leGileyadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Ensukwini zikaSawuli balawula-ke impi lamaHagari, awa ngesandla sabo; bahlala emathenteni awo elizweni lonke lempumalanga yeGileyadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Labantwana bakoGadi bahlala maqondana labo elizweni leBashani kwaze kwaba seSaleka. 
1Chronicles5:12 UJoweli inhloko, loShafamu owesibili, loJanayi loShafati eBashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Labafowabo ngendlu yaboyise: OMikayeli loMeshulamu loShebha loJorayi loJakani loZiya loEberi, beyisikhombisa." 
1Chronicles5:14 Laba babengamadodana kaAbihayili indodana kaHuri indodana kaJarowa indodana kaGileyadi indodana kaMikayeli indodana kaJeshishayi indodana kaJahido indodana kaBuzi. 
1Chronicles5:15 UAhi indodana kaAbidiyeli indodana kaGuni wayeyinhloko yendlu yaboyise. 
1Chronicles5:16 Basebehlala eGileyadi, eBashani, lemizaneni yayo, lakuwo wonke amadlelo eSharoni, kwaze kwaba sekuphumeni kwawo." 
1Chronicles5:17 Bonke laba babhalwa ngezizukulwana zabo ezinsukwini zikaJothamu inkosi yakoJuda lensukwini zikaJerobowamu inkosi yakoIsrayeli. 
1Chronicles5:18 Amadodana kaRubeni labakoGadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase, emadodeni angamaqhawe, athwala isihlangu lenkemba, anyathela idandili, lezingcitshi empini, ayeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lane lamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi ayisithupha, ephumela ebuthweni." 
1Chronicles5:19 Basebelawula impi lamaHagari loJeturi loNafishi loNodabi. 
1Chronicles5:20 Bancediswa bemelene labo, amaHagari asenikelwa esandleni sabo, labo bonke ababelawo; ngoba bakhala kuNkulunkulu besempini, wasencengeka ngabo, ngoba bamthemba." 
1Chronicles5:21 Bathumba izifuyo zabo, amakamela azinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu, lezimvu ezizinkulungwane ezingamakhulu amabili lamatshumi amahlanu, labobabhemi abazinkulungwane ezimbili, lemiphefumulo yabantu ezinkulungwane ezilikhulu." 
1Chronicles5:22 Ngoba kwawa abanengi ababuleweyo, ngoba impi yayingekaNkulunkulu. Basebehlala ezindaweni zabo kwaze kwafika ukuthunjwa." 
1Chronicles5:23 Abantwana bengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase basebehlala elizweni; kusukela eBashani kusiya eBhali-Hermoni leSeniri lentabeni yeHermoni bona banda. 
1Chronicles5:24 Lalezi zinhloko zendlu yaboyise, ngitsho oEferi loIshi loEliyeli loAziriyeli loJeremiya loHodaviya loJahidiyeli, amadoda angamaqhawe alamandla, amadoda alamabizo, inhloko zendlu yaboyise." 
1Chronicles5:25 Kodwa bona kuNkulunkulu waboyise, baphinga ngo kulandela onkulunkulu babantu balelolizwe, uNkulunkulu abachithayo phambi kwabo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ngakho uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli wavusa umoya kaPhuli inkosi yeAsiriya, lomoya kaTiligathi-Pilineseri inkosi yeAsiriya, wabathumba, ngitsho abakoRubeni labakoGadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase, wabasa eHala leHabori leHara lemfuleni iGozani, kuze kube lamuhla." 
1Chronicles6:1 Amadodana kaLevi: OGerishoni, uKohathi, loMerari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Lamadodana kaKohathi: OAmramu, uIzihari, loHebroni, loUziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Labantwana bakaAmramu: OAroni loMozisi loMiriyamu. Lamadodana kaAroni: ONadabi, loAbihu, uEleyazare, loIthamari." 
1Chronicles6:4 UEleyazare wazala uPhinehasi; uPhinehasi wazala uAbishuwa; 
1Chronicles6:5 uAbishuwa wasezala uBuki; uBuki wasezala uUzi; 
1Chronicles6:6 uUzi wasezala uZerahiya; uZerahiya wasezala uMerayothi; 
1Chronicles6:7 uMerayothi wazala uAmariya; uAmariya wasezala uAhitubi; 
1Chronicles6:8 uAhitubi wasezala uZadoki; uZadoki wasezala uAhimahazi; 
1Chronicles6:9 uAhimahazi wasezala uAzariya; uAzariya wasezala uJohanani; 
1Chronicles6:10 uJohanani wasezala uAzariya (nguye owasebenza njengompristi endlini uSolomoni ayakha eJerusalema); 
1Chronicles6:11 uAzariya wasezala uAmariya; uAmariya wasezala uAhitubi; 
1Chronicles6:12 uAhitubi wasezala uZadoki; uZadoki wasezala uShaluma; 
1Chronicles6:13 uShaluma wasezala uHilikhiya; uHilikhiya wasezala uAzariya; 
1Chronicles6:14 uAzariya wasezala uSeraya; uSeraya wasezala uJehozadaki. 
1Chronicles6:15 UJehozadaki laye wahamba lapho i Nkosi yathumba uJuda leJerusalema ngesandla sikaNebukadinezari. 
1Chronicles6:16 Amadodana kaLevi: OGerishoni, uKohathi, loMerari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Lala ngamabizo amadodana kaGerishoni: OLibini loShimeyi. 
1Chronicles6:18 Njalo amadodana kaKohathi: OAmramu loIzihari loHebroni loUziyeli. 
1Chronicles6:19 Amadodana kaMerari: OMahli loMushi. Lalezi zinsendo zamaLevi njengokwaboyise. 
1Chronicles6:20 KoGerishoni: ULibini indodana yakhe, uJahathi indodana yakhe, uZima indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles6:21 uJowa indodana yakhe, uIdo indodana yakhe, uZera indodana yakhe, uJeyatherayi indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles6:22 Amadodana kaKohathi: UAminadaba indodana yakhe, uKora indodana yakhe, uAsiri indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles6:23 uElkana indodana yakhe, loEbiyasafi indodana yakhe, loAsiri indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles6:24 uTahathi indodana yakhe, uUriyeli indodana yakhe, uUziya indodana yakhe, loShawuli indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles6:25 Njalo amadodana kaElkana: OAmasayi loAhimothi. 
1Chronicles6:26 UElkana; amadodana kaElkana: UZofayi indodana yakhe, loNahathi indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles6:27 uEliyabi indodana yakhe, uJerohamu indodana yakhe, uElkana indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles6:28 Amadodana kaSamuweli: Izibulo uVashini, loAbhiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Amadodana kaMerari: UMahli, uLibini indodana yakhe, uShimeyi indodana yakhe, uUza indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles6:30 uShimeya indodana yakhe, uHagiya indodana yakhe, uAsaya indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles6:31 Lalaba yibo uDavida abamisayo phezu kwenkonzo yengoma endlini ye Nkosi umtshokotsho usuphumule. 
1Chronicles6:32 Njalo babekhonza phambi kwethabhanekele lethente lenhlangano ngengoma, uSolomoni waze wakha indlu ye Nkosi eJerusalema. Bema ngokwesimiso sabo enkonzweni yabo." 
1Chronicles6:33 Lalaba yibo abema lamadodana abo: Kumadodana amaKohathi: UHemani umhlabeleli indodana kaJoweli indodana kaSamuweli 
1Chronicles6:34 indodana kaElkana indodana kaJerohamu indodana kaEliyeli indodana kaTowa 
1Chronicles6:35 indodana kaZufi indodana kaElkana indodana kaMahathi indodana kaAmasayi 
1Chronicles6:36 indodana kaElkana indodana kaJoweli indodana kaAzariya indodana kaZefaniya 
1Chronicles6:37 indodana kaTahathi indodana kaAsiri indodana kaEbhiyasafi indodana kaKora 
1Chronicles6:38 indodana kaIzihari indodana kaKohathi indodana kaLevi indodana kaIsrayeli. 
1Chronicles6:39 Lomfowabo uAsafi owema ngakwesokunene sakhe: UAsafi indodana kaBerekiya indodana kaShimeya 
1Chronicles6:40 indodana kaMikayeli indodana kaBahaseya indodana kaMalikiya 
1Chronicles6:41 indodana kaEthini indodana kaZera indodana kaAdaya 
1Chronicles6:42 indodana kaEthani indodana kaZima indodana kaShimeyi 
1Chronicles6:43 indodana kaJahathi indodana kaGerishoni indodana kaLevi. 
1Chronicles6:44 Lamadodana kaMerari, abafowabo, ema ngakwesokhohlo: UEthani indodana kaKishi indodana kaAbidi indodana kaMaluki" 
1Chronicles6:45 indodana kaHashabiya indodana kaAmaziya indodana kaHilikhiya 
1Chronicles6:46 indodana kaAmizi indodana kaBani indodana kaShemeri 
1Chronicles6:47 indodana kaMahli indodana kaMushi indodana kaMerari indodana kaLevi. 
1Chronicles6:48 Labafowabo, amaLevi, bamiswa kuyo yonke inkonzo yethabhanekele lendlu kaNkulunkulu." 
1Chronicles6:49 Kodwa uAroni lamadodana akhe banikela phezu kwelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa laphezu kwelathi lempepha, kusenzelwa wonke umsebenzi wengcwele yezingcwele, lokwenzela uIsrayeli inhlawulo yokuthula, njengakho konke uMozisi inceku kaNkulunkulu eyakulayayo." 
1Chronicles6:50 Lala ngamadodana kaAroni: OEleyazare indodana yakhe, uPhinehasi indodana yakhe, uAbishuwa indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles6:51 uBuki indodana yakhe, uUzi indodana yakhe, uZerahiya indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles6:52 uMerayothi indodana yakhe, uAmariya indodana yakhe, uAhitubi indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles6:53 uZadoki indodana yakhe, uAhimahazi indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles6:54 Lezi-ke zindawo zawo zokuhlala ezinqabeni zawo emingceleni yawo, zamadodana kaAroni, zezinsendo zamaKohathi; ngoba inkatho yayingeyawo." 
1Chronicles6:55 Basebewanika iHebroni elizweni lakoJuda, lamadlelo ayo ayizingelezeleyo." 
1Chronicles6:56 Kodwa insimu yomuzi lemizana yawo bakunika uKalebi indodana kaJefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Basebenika amadodana kaAroni imizi yokuphephela iHebroni, leLibhina lamadlelo ayo, leJathiri, leEshithemowa lamadlelo ayo," 
1Chronicles6:58 leHileni lamadlelo ayo, iDebiri lamadlelo ayo," 
1Chronicles6:59 leAshani lamadlelo ayo, leBeti-Shemeshi lamadlelo ayo." 
1Chronicles6:60 Lesizweni sakoBhenjamini: IGeba lamadlelo ayo, leAlemethi lamadlelo ayo, leAnathothi lamadlelo ayo. Yonke imizi yawo, ngensendo zawo, yayiyimizi elitshumi lantathu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Lamadodana kaKohathi, aseleyo kusendo lwesizwe, avela kungxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe, ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yakoManase, aba lemizi elitshumi, ngenkatho." 
1Chronicles6:62 Njalo amadodana kaGerishoni, ngensendo zawo, esizweni sakoIsakari lesizweni sakoAsheri lesizweni sakoNafithali lesizweni sakoManase eBashani, aba lemizi elitshumi lantathu." 
1Chronicles6:63 Amadodana kaMerari, ngensendo zawo, esizweni sakoRubeni lesizweni sakoGadi lesizweni sakoZebuluni, aba lemizi elitshumi lambili, ngenkatho." 
1Chronicles6:64 Abantwana bakoIsrayeli basebenika amaLevi limizi kanye lamadlelo ayo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Basebenika le imizi ngenkatho esizweni sabantwana bakoJuda lesizweni sabantwana bakoSimeyoni lesizweni sabantwana bakoBhenjamini, abayibiza ngamabizo." 
1Chronicles6:66 Le zinye zensendo zamadodana kaKohathi zaba lemizi yemingcele yazo esizweni sakoEfrayimi. 
1Chronicles6:67 Basebewanika imizi yokuphephela, iShekema lamadlelo ayo entabeni yakoEfrayimi, leGezeri lamadlelo ayo," 
1Chronicles6:68 leJokimeyamu lamadlelo ayo, leBethi-Horoni lamadlelo ayo," 
1Chronicles6:69 leAjaloni lamadlelo ayo, leGathi-Rimoni lamadlelo ayo." 
1Chronicles6:70 Lengxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase: IAneri lamadlelo ayo, leBileyamu lamadlelo ayo, yosendo lwamadodana kaKohathi aseleyo." 
1Chronicles6:71 Amadodana kaGerishoni ensendweni zengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase aba leGolani eBashani lamadlelo ayo, leAshitarothi lamadlelo ayo." 
1Chronicles6:72 Lesizweni sakoIsakari: IKedeshi lamadlelo ayo, leDaberathi lamadlelo ayo," 
1Chronicles6:73 leRamothi lamadlelo ayo, leAnema lamadlelo ayo." 
1Chronicles6:74 Lesizweni sakoAsheri: IMashali lamadlelo ayo, leAbidoni lamadlelo ayo," 
1Chronicles6:75 leHukoki lamadlelo ayo, leRehobi lamadlelo ayo." 
1Chronicles6:76 Lesizweni sakoNafithali: IKedeshi eGalili lamadlelo ayo, leHamoni lamadlelo ayo, leKiriyathayimi lamadlelo ayo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Njalo amadodana kaMerari aseleyo, esizweni sakoZebuluni, aba leRimono lamadlelo ayo, leThabhori lamadlelo ayo;" 
1Chronicles6:78 langaphetsheya kweJordani, eJeriko, ngempumalanga kweJordani, esizweni sakoRubeni: IBezeri enkangala lamadlelo ayo, leJahiza lamadlelo ayo," 
1Chronicles6:79 leKedemothi lamadlelo ayo, leMefahathi lamadlelo ayo;" 
1Chronicles6:80 lesizweni sakoGadi: IRamothi eGileyadi lamadlelo ayo, leMahanayimi lamadlelo ayo," 
1Chronicles6:81 leHeshiboni lamadlelo ayo, leJazeri lamadlelo ayo." 
1Chronicles7:1 Lemadodaneni kaIsakari: OThola, loPhuwa, uJashubi, loShimroni; bebane." 
1Chronicles7:2 Njalo amadodana kaThola: OUzi, loRefaya, loJeriyeli, loJahimayi, loIbisamu, loShemuweli, izinhloko zendlu yaboyise, abakoThola, amaqhawe alamandla ezizukulwaneni zabo; inani labo ensukwini zikaDavida laliyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lambili lamakhulu ayisithupha." 
1Chronicles7:3 Lamadodana kaUzi: UIzrahiya. Lamadodana kaIzrahiya: OMikayeli, loObadiya, loJoweli, uIshiya, bebahlanu; beyizinhloko bonke." 
1Chronicles7:4 Kanye labo-ke, ngensendo zabo, ngendlu yaboyise, kwakukhona amaviyo ebutho lempi, izinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lesithupha, ngoba babelabafazi labantwana abanengi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Labafowabo, phakathi kwensendo zonke zakoIsakari, amaqhawe alamandla, izinkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisificaminwembili lesikhombisa, bebhalwe bonke ngezizukulwana." 
1Chronicles7:6 Amadodana kaBhenjamini: OBhela, loBekeri loJediyayeli, bebathathu." 
1Chronicles7:7 Lamadodana kaBhela: OEziboni, loUzi, loUziyeli, loJerimothi, loIri, bebahlanu; izinhloko zendlu zaboyise, amaqhawe alamandla; bebhalwe ngezizukulwana, babeyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lambili lamatshumi amathathu lane." 
1Chronicles7:8 Njalo amadodana kaBekeri: OZemira, loJowashi, loEliyezeri, loEliyohenayi, loOmri, loJeremothi, loAbhiya, loAnathothi, loAlemethi; bonke laba babengamadodana kaBekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Bebhalwe ngensendo ngezizukulwana zabo, izinhloko zezindlu zaboyise, amaqhawe alamandla, babezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lamakhulu amabili." 
1Chronicles7:10 Njalo amadodana kaJediyayeli: UBilihani. Lamadodana kaBilihani: OJewushi, loBhenjamini, loEhudi, loKenahana, loZethani, loTarshishi, loAhishahari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Bonke laba babengamadodana kaJediyayeli, ngezinhloko zaboyise, amaqhawe alamandla; babeyizinkulungwane ezilitshumi lesikhombisa lamakhulu amabili, angaphuma ebuthweni ukuya empini." 
1Chronicles7:12 LoShupimi loHupimi babengamadodana kaIri, lo Hushimi amadodana kaAheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Amadodana kaNafithali: OJahaziyeli, loGuni, loJezeri, loShaluma, amadodana kuBiliha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Amadodana kaManase: UAsiriyeli umkakhe amzalayo. (Umfazi wakhe omncinyane umAramukazi wazala uMakiri uyise kaGileyadi. 
1Chronicles7:15 UMakiri wathatha udadewabo kaHupimi loShupimi, waba ngumka khe, obizo lakhe nguMahaka.) Lebizo leyesibili lalinguZelofehadi; njalo uZelofehadi wayelamadodakazi." 
1Chronicles7:16 UMahaka umkaMakiri wasezala indodana, wayitha ibizo wathi nguPereshi; lebizo lomfowabo lalinguShereshi, lamadodana akhe ayengoUlamu loRakema." 
1Chronicles7:17 Njalo amadodana kaUlamu: UBedani. La ayengamadodana kaGileyadi indodana kaMakiri indodana kaManase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Udadewabo uHamolekethi wasezala oIshodi loAbiyezeri loMahla. 
1Chronicles7:19 Lamadodana kaShemida ayengoAhiyani loShekema loLikhi loAniyamu. 
1Chronicles7:20 Njalo amadodana kaEfrayimi: OShuthela, loBeredi indodana yakhe, loTahathi indodana yakhe, loEleyada indodana yakhe, loTahathi indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles7:21 loZabadi indodana yakhe, loShuthela indodana yakhe, loEzeri loEleyadi, amadoda eGathi azalelwa kulelolizwe ababulalayo, ngoba behlela ukuthatha izifuyo zabo." 
1Chronicles7:22 UEfrayimi uyise walila insuku ezinengi; abafowabo basebesiza uku za mduduza. 
1Chronicles7:23 Wasengena kumkakhe; wathatha isisu, wazala indodana; waseyitha ibizo wathi nguBeriya, ngoba wayesebubini endlini yakhe." 
1Chronicles7:24 Lendodakazi yakhe yayinguShera, owakha iBethi-Horoni elingaphansi lelingaphezulu, leUzeni-Shera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Njalo uRefa wayeyindodana yakhe, loReshefi, loTela indodana yakhe, loTahani indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles7:26 uLadani indodana yakhe, uAmihudi indodana yakhe, uElishama indodana yakhe," 
1Chronicles7:27 uNoni indodana yakhe, uJoshuwa indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles7:28 Lemfuyo yawo lendawo zawo zokuhlala kwakuyiBhetheli lemizana yayo, langempumalanga iNaharani, langentshonalanga iGezeri lemizana yayo, leShekema lemizana yayo, kwaze kwaba seAya lemizana yayo." 
1Chronicles7:29 Lasemingceleni yabantwana bakoManase, iBeti-Sheyani lemizana yayo, iThahanakhi lemizana yayo, iMegido lemizana yayo, iDori lemizana yayo. Kule kwahlala abantwana bakoJosefa indodana kaIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles7:30 Abantwana bakaAsheri: OImina, loIshiva, loIshivi, loBeriya, loSera udadewabo." 
1Chronicles7:31 Njalo amadodana kaBeriya: OHeberi, loMalikiyeli onguyise kaBirizayithi." 
1Chronicles7:32 UHeberi wasezala oJafilethi loShomeri loHothamu loShuwa udadewabo. 
1Chronicles7:33 Lamadodana kaJafilethi: OPasaki loBimihali loAshivathi; la ngamadodana kaJafilethi. 
1Chronicles7:34 Lamadodana kaShemeri: OAhi, loRohiga, uJehuba, loAramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Njalo amadodana kaHelemu umfowabo: OZofa loImina loSheleshi loAmali. 
1Chronicles7:36 Njalo amadodana kaZofa: OSuwa, loHarineferi, loShuwali, loBeri, loImra," 
1Chronicles7:37 uBezeri, loHodi, loShama, loShilisha, loIthirani, loBehera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Njalo amadodana kaJetheri: OJefune loPisipa loAra. 
1Chronicles7:39 Njalo amadodana kaUla: OAra loHaniyeli loRiziya. 
1Chronicles7:40 Bonke laba babengabantwana bakaAsheri, izinhloko zendlu yaboyise, abakhethiweyo, amaqhawe alamandla, izinhloko zeziphathamandla. Basebebhalwa ngezizukulwana ebuthweni empini; inani labo lalingamadoda azinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lesithupha." 
1Chronicles8:1 UBhenjamini wasezala uBhela izibulo lakhe, uAshibeli owesibili, loAhara owesithathu," 
1Chronicles8:2 uNoha owesine, loRafa owesihlanu." 
1Chronicles8:3 Njalo uBhela wayelamadodana: OAdari loGera loAbhihudi 
1Chronicles8:4 loAbishuwa loNamani loAhowa 
1Chronicles8:5 loGera loShefufani loHuramu. 
1Chronicles8:6 Lala ngamadodana kaEhudi; lezi zinhloko zaboyise zabahlali beGeba; wasebathumbela eManahathi; 
1Chronicles8:7 loNamani, loAhiya, loGera; yena wabathumba; wasezala oUza loAhihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 UShaharayimi wasezala abantwana elizweni lakoMowabi, esebaxotshile; oHushimi loBahara babengomkakhe." 
1Chronicles8:9 Wasezala kuHodeshi umkakhe oJobabi loZibiya loMesha loMalikamu 
1Chronicles8:9 Wasezala kuHodeshi umkakhe oJobabi loZibiya loMesha loMalikamu 
1Chronicles8:10 loJewuzi loSakiya loMirima. Laba babengamadodana akhe, izinhloko zaboyise." 
1Chronicles8:11 KuHushimi wasezala oAbitubi loEliphahali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Amadodana kaEliphahali: OEberi, loMishamu, loShemedi owakha iOno leLodi lemizana yayo," 
1Chronicles8:13 loBeriya, loShema, ababezinhloko zaboyise zabahlali beAjaloni, ababexotshe abahlali beGathi," 
1Chronicles8:14 loAhiyo, uShashaki, loJeremothi," 
1Chronicles8:15 loZebhadiya, loAradi, loEderi," 
1Chronicles8:16 loMikayeli, loIshipa, loJoha, amadodana kaBeriya." 
1Chronicles8:17 LoZebhadiya, loMeshulamu, loHiziki, loHeberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 loIshmerayi, loIziliya, loJobabi, amadodana kaEliphahali." 
1Chronicles8:18 loIshmerayi, loIziliya, loJobabi, amadodana kaEliphahali." 
1Chronicles8:19 LoJakimi, loZikiri, loZabidi," 
1Chronicles8:20 loEliyenayi, loZilethayi, loEliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:21 loAdaya, loBeraya, loShimirathi, amadodana kaShimeyi." 
1Chronicles8:22 LoIshipani, loEberi, loEliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:23 loAbidoni, loZikiri, loHanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 loHananiya, loElamu, loAnithothiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 loIfideya, loPenuweli, amadodana kaShashaki." 
1Chronicles8:26 LoShamisherayi, loShekariya, loAthaliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 loJahareshiya, loEliya, loZikiri, amadodana kaJerohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Laba babezinhloko zaboyise, izinhloko ngezizukulwana zabo; laba bahlala eJerusalema." 
1Chronicles8:29 EGibeyoni kwasekuhlala uyise kaGibeyoni; lebizo lomkakhe lalinguMahaka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Lendodana yakhe, izibulo lakhe, nguAbhidoni, loZuri, loKishi, loBhali, loNadabi," 
1Chronicles8:31 loGedori, loAhiyo, loZekeri." 
1Chronicles8:32 UMikilothi wasezala uShimeya. Lalaba babehlala maqondana labafowabo eJerusalema, kanye labafowabo." 
1Chronicles8:33 UNeri wasezala uKishi; uKishi wasezala uSawuli; uSawuli wasezala oJonathani loMaliki-Shuwa loAbinadaba loEshibhali. 
1Chronicles8:34 Njalo indodana kaJonathani yayinguMeribi-Bhali; uMeribi-Bhali wasezala uMika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Njalo amadodana kaMika: OPithoni loMeleki loTareya loAhazi. 
1Chronicles8:36 UAhazi wasezala uJehoyada; uJehoyada wasezala oAlemethi loAzimavethi loZimri; uZimri wasezala uMoza; 
1Chronicles8:37 uMoza wasezala uBineya; uRafa wayey indodana yakhe, uEleyasa indodana yakhe, uAzeli indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles8:38 Njalo uAzeli wayelamadodana ayisithupha; lala ngamabizo awo: OAzirikamu, uBhokeru, loIshmayeli, loSheyariya, loObadiya, loHanani. Wonke la ngamadodana kaAzeli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Njalo amadodana kaEsheki umfowabo: OUlamu izibulo lakhe, uJewushi eyesibili, loElifeleti eyesithathu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Njalo amadodana kaUlamu ayengamadoda, amaqhawe alamandla, anyathela idandili, elamadodana amanengi lamadodana amadodana, ikhulu lamatshumi amahlanu. Bonke laba babengabantwana bakoBhenjamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 UIsrayeli wonke wasebalwa ngezizukulwana; khangela-ke, zibhaliwe egwalweni lwamakhosi akoIsrayeli; kodwa abakoJuda bathunjelwa eBhabhiloni ngenxa yeziphambeko zabo." 
1Chronicles9:2 Njalo abahlali bokuqala ababeselizweni labo emizini yabo kwakunguIsrayeli, abapristi, amaLevi, lamaNethini." 
1Chronicles9:3 Njalo eJerusalema kwahlala ababantwana bakoJuda lababantwana bakoBhenjamini lababantwana bakoEfrayimi loManase: 
1Chronicles9:4 U-Uthayi indodana kaAmihudi indodana kaOmri indodana kaImri indodana kaBani, wabantwana bakaPerezi indodana kaJuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 LakumaShiloni: UAsaya izibulo, lamadodana akhe." 
1Chronicles9:6 Lakumadodana kaZera: UJeyuweli labafowabo, amakhulu ayisithupha lamatshumi ayisificamunwemunye." 
1Chronicles9:7 Lakumadodana akoBhenjamini: USalu indodana kaMeshulamu indodana kaHodaviya indodana kaHasenuwa; 
1Chronicles9:8 loIbineya indodana kaJerohamu, loEla indodana kaUzi indodana kaMikiri, loMeshulamu indodana kaShefathiya indodana kaRehuweli indodana kaIbiniya;" 
1Chronicles9:9 labafowabo ngezizukulwana zabo, amakhulu ayisificamunwemunye lamatshumi amahlanu lesithupha. Wonke lamadoda ayeyizinhloko zaboyise endlini yaboyise." 
1Chronicles9:10 Lakubapristi: OJedaya, loJehoyaribi, loJakini," 
1Chronicles9:11 loAzariya indodana kaHilikhiya indodana kaMeshulamu indodana kaZadoki indodana kaMerayothi indodana kaAhitubi, umphathi wendlu kaNkulunkulu," 
1Chronicles9:12 loAdaya indodana kaJerohamu indodana kaPashuri indodana kaMalikiya, loMahasayi indodana kaAdiyeli indodana kaJahizera indodana kaMeshulamu indodana kaMeshilemithi indodana kaImeri," 
1Chronicles9:13 labafowabo, izinhloko zendlu yaboyise, inkulungwane lamakhulu ayisikhombisa lamatshumi ayisithupha, amaqhawe alamandla omsebenzi wenkonzo yendlu kaNkulunkulu." 
1Chronicles9:14 LakumaLevi: UShemaya indodana kaHashubi indodana kaAzirikamu indodana kaHashabiya, owamadodana kaMerari," 
1Chronicles9:15 loBakibakari, uHereshi, loGalali, loMathaniya indodana kaMika indodana kaZikiri indodana kaAsafi," 
1Chronicles9:16 loObadiya indodana kaShemaya indodana kaGalali indodana kaJeduthuni, loBerekiya indodana kaAsa indodana kaElkana owahlala emizini yamaNetofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Labagcini bamasango: OShaluma loAkubi loTalimoni loAhimani labafowabo; uShaluma wayeyinhloko; 
1Chronicles9:18 njalo kuze kube lesisikhathi, esangweni lenkosi ngempumalanga, laba babengabagcini bamasango enkambeni yabantwana bakoLevi." 
1Chronicles9:19 UShaluma indodana kaKore indodana kaEbiyasafi indodana kaKora, labafowabo, abendlu kayise, amaKora, basebephatha umsebenzi wenkonzo, abalindi beminyango yethente; laboyise baphatha ibandla le Nkosi, abalindi bentuba." 
1Chronicles9:20 UPhinehasi indodana kaEleyazare wayengumbusi phezu kwabo ngaphambili; i Nkosi yayilaye. 
1Chronicles9:21 UZekariya indodana kaMeshelemiya wayengumgcinisango emnyango wethente lenhlangano. 
1Chronicles9:22 Bonke labo abakhethwayo babangabagcinimasango emibundwini, babengamakhulu amabili letshumi lambili; babhalwa ngezizukulwana zabo emizini yabo; oDavida loSamuweli umboni ababamisa esikhundleni sabo." 
1Chronicles9:23 Ngakho bona lamadodana abo baphatha amasango endlini ye Nkosi, indlu yethente, ngemilindo." 
1Chronicles9:24 Abalindi bamasango babekhona emimoyeni yomine, empumalanga, entshonalanga, enyakatho, leningizimu." 
1Chronicles9:25 Labafowabo ababesemizini yabo babefanele beze okwensuku eziyisikhombisa izikhathi ngezikhathi kanye labo. 
1Chronicles9:26 Ngoba amaLevi la, abagcini bamasango abakhulu bobane, babesesikhundleni, babephethe amakamelo bephezu kwezindlu zenotho zendlu kaNkulunkulu." 
1Chronicles9:27 Njalo babehlala ebusuku bezingelezele indlu kaNkulunkulu, ngoba umlindo wawuphezu kwabo, njalo babephethe isihluthulelo sokuvula, ngitsho ikuseni ngekuseni." 
1Chronicles9:28 Njalo abanye babo babephethe izitsha zenkonzo, ngoba ngenani bazingenisa, langenani bazikhupha." 
1Chronicles9:29 L abanye babo babemiswe phezu kwezitsha, laphezu kwazo zonke izitsha ezingcwele, laphezu kwempuphu ecolekileyo lewayini lamafutha lempepha lamakha." 
1Chronicles9:30 Abanye emadodaneni abapristi babehlanganisa-ke amafutha amakha. 
1Chronicles9:31 LoMathithiya kumaLevi, owayelizibulo likaShaluma umKora, wayesesikhundleni somsebenzi wamaqebelengwana abhakwe emapanini." 
1Chronicles9:32 L abanye babantwana bamaKohathi kubafowabo babephethe isinkwa sokubukiswa uku si lungisa isabatha ngesabatha. 
1Chronicles9:33 Lalaba ngabahlabeleli, izinhloko zaboyise bamaLevi, emakamelweni, bekhululekile, ngoba emini lebusuku kwakuphezu kwabo ukuba semsebenzini." 
1Chronicles9:34 Laba bazinhloko zaboyise bamaLevi, izinhloko ngezizukulwana zabo; laba bahlala eJerusalema." 
1Chronicles9:35 EGibeyoni kwakuhlala-ke uyise kaGibeyoni, uJehiyeli; lebizo lomkakhe lalinguMahaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Lendodana yakhe elizibulo uAbidoni, loZuri loKishi loBhali loNeri loNadabi" 
1Chronicles9:37 loGedori loAhiyo loZekariya loMikilothi. 
1Chronicles9:38 UMikilothi wasezala uShimeyamu; laba labo bahlala eJerusalema maqondana labafowabo kanye labafowabo. 
1Chronicles9:39 UNeri wasezala uKishi; uKishi wasezala uSawuli; uSawuli wasezala oJonathani loMaliki-Shuwa loAbinadaba loEshibhali. 
1Chronicles9:40 Njalo indodana kaJonathani yayinguMeribi-Bhali; uMeribi-Bhali wasezala uMika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Njalo amadodana kaMika: OPithoni loMeleki loTareya. 
1Chronicles9:42 UAhazi wasezala uJara; uJara wasezala oAlemethi loAzimavethi loZimri. UZimri wasezala uMoza. 
1Chronicles9:43 UMoza wasezala uBineya, loRefaya indodana yakhe, uEleyasa indodana yakhe, uAzeli indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles9:44 Njalo uAzeli wayelamadodana ayisithupha; lala ngamabizo awo: OAzirikamu, uBhokeru, loIshmayeli, loSheyariya, loObadiya, loHanani. La ayengamadodana kaAzeli." 
1Chronicles10:1 AmaFilisti asesilwa emelene loIsrayeli; lamadoda akoIsrayeli abaleka phambi kwamaFilisti, awa abulawa entabeni yeGilibowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 AmaFilisti asenamathela ngemva kukaSawuli langemva kwamadodana akhe; amaFilisti atshaya uJonathani loAbinadaba loMaliki-Shuwa, amadodana kaSawuli." 
1Chronicles10:3 Impi yasisiba nzima imelene loSawuli; abatshoka ngamadandili basebemfica; wasekhathazeka ngabatshoki. 
1Chronicles10:4 USawuli wasesithi kumthwali wezikhali zakhe: Hwatsha inkemba yakho, ungigwaze ngayo, hlezi laba abangasokanga bafike, badlale kubi ngami. Kodwa umthwali wezikhali zakhe kavumanga, ngoba wesaba kakhulu. USawuli wasethatha inkemba, wa zi wisela phezu kwayo." 
1Chronicles10:5 Lapho umthwali wezikhali zakhe ebona ukuthi uSawuli u se file, laye wa zi wisela phezu kwenkemba, wafa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Wafa-ke uSawuli, lamadodana akhe amathathu, lendlu yakhe yonke; bafa ndawonye." 
1Chronicles10:7 Kwathi wonke amadoda akoIsrayeli ayesesigodini ebona ukuthi abalekile, lokuthi uSawuli lamadodana akhe bafile, atshiya imizi yawo, abaleka; amaFilisti asefika, ahlala kiyo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Kwasekusithi kusisa lapho amaFilisti efika ukuhlubula ababuleweyo, afica uSawuli lamadodana akhe bewile entabeni yeGilibowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Amhlubula, athatha ikhanda lakhe lezikhali zakhe, athumela elizweni lamaFilisti inhlangothi zonke, ukumemezela imibiko ezithombeni zawo lebantwini." 
1Chronicles10:10 Asebeka izikhali zakhe endlini yabonkulunkulu bawo, abethela ukhakhayi lwakhe endlini kaDagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Kwathi iJabeshi-Gileyadi yonke isizwile konke amaFilisti akwenze kuSawuli," 
1Chronicles10:12 wonke amaqhawe asuka, athatha isidumbu sikaSawuli lezidumbu zamadodana akhe, aziletha eJabeshi, angcwaba amathambo abo ngaphansi kwesihlahla se-okhi* eJabeshi, azila ukudla insuku eziyisikhombisa." 
1Chronicles10:13 Ngakho uSawuli wafa ngenxa yesiphambeko sakhe aphambuka ngaso emelene le Nkosi, emelene lelizwi le Nkosi ayengaligcinanga, njalo langokubuza koledlozi ukudinga kuye," 
1Chronicles10:14 njalo kakudinganga e Nkosi ni. Ngakho yambulala, yaguqulela umbuso kuDavida indodana kaJese." 
1Chronicles11:1 UIsrayeli wonke wasebuthana kuDavida eHebroni esithi: Khangela, thina silithambo lakho lenyama yakho."
