1Chronicles11:2 Ngitsho mandulo, ngitsho uSawuli eyinkosi, nguwe owakhupha lowangenisa uIsrayeli; i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho yasisithi kuwe: Wena uzakwelusa abantu bami uIsrayeli, njalo wena uzakuba ngumbusi phezu kwabantu bami uIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles11:3 Kwasekufika bonke abadala bakoIsrayeli enkosini eHebroni. UDavida wasesenza isivumelwano labo eHebroni phambi kwe Nkosi. Basebemgcoba uDavida ukuba yinkosi phezu kukaIsrayeli, njengelizwi le Nkosi ngesandla sikaSamuweli." 
1Chronicles11:4 UDavida loIsrayeli wonke basebesiya eJerusalema, eyiJebusi, ngoba lapho kwakulamaJebusi, abahlali balelolizwe." 
1Chronicles11:5 Abahlali beJebusi basebesithi kuDavida: Kawuyikungena lapha. Kodwa uDavida wayithumba inqaba yeZiyoni, engumuzi kaDavida." 
1Chronicles11:6 UDavida wasesithi: Loba ngubani ozatshaya amaJebusi kuqala uzakuba yinhloko lenduna. Ngakho uJowabi indodana kaZeruya wenyuka kuqala, waba yinhloko." 
1Chronicles11:7 UDavida wasehlala enqabeni; ngalokho-ke bayibiza ngokuthi ngumuzi kaDavida. 
1Chronicles11:8 Wasewakha umuzi inhlangothi zonke, kusukela eMilo waze wawuhlanganisa. UJowabi wasevuselela okuseleyo komuzi." 
1Chronicles11:9 UDavida wasesiya eqhubeka esiba mkhulu, ngoba i Nkosi yamabandla yayilaye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Lalezi zinhloko zamaqhawe uDavida ayelazo, ezaziqinisa kanye laye embusweni wakhe, loIsrayeli wonke, ukumenza inkosi, njengelizwi le Nkosi mayelana loIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles11:11 Laleli linani lamaqhawe uDavida ayelawo: UJashobeyamu indodana yomHakimoni inhloko yamatshumi amathathu; yena waphakamisa umkhonto wakhe emelene labangamakhulu amathathu, wa ba bulala ngasikhathi sinye." 
1Chronicles11:12 Lemva kwakhe kwakuloEleyazare indodana kaDodo umAhohi; wayephakathi kwamaqhawe amathathu. 
1Chronicles11:13 Yena wayeloDavida ePasi-Damimi lapho amaFilisti ayebuthanele impi khona. Lesiqinti sensimu sasigcwele ibhali*; abantu basebebaleka phambi kwamaFilisti. 
1Chronicles11:14 Bona bazimisa phakathi kwesiqinti, basikhulula, batshaya amaFilisti, i Nkosi yasisindisa ngokukhulula okukhulu." 
1Chronicles11:15 Abathathu ezinduneni ezingamatshumi amathathu basebesehlela edwaleni kuDavida, ebhalwini lweAdulamu; lebutho lamaFilisti lalimise inkamba esihotsheni seRefayimi." 
1Chronicles11:16 UDavida ngalesosikhathi wayesenqabeni, lebutho lenqaba lamaFilisti ngalesosikhathi laliseBhethelehema." 
1Chronicles11:17 UDavida waselangatha wathi: Hawu, kungathi omunye ubenganginathisa amanzi omthombo weBhethelehema osesangweni!" 
1Chronicles11:18 Labo abathathu bafohlela enkambeni yamaFilisti, bakha amanzi emthonjeni weBhethelehema owawusesangweni, bawathwala bawaletha kuDavida; kodwa uDavida kafunanga ukuwanatha, kodwa wawathululela i Nkosi." 
1Chronicles11:19 Wasesithi: Kakube khatshana lami, ngoNkulunkulu wami, ukwenza lokho. Nginganatha yini igazi lalamadoda abeke impilo yawo engozini? Ngoba ngokubeka impilo yawo engozini, awalethile. Ngakho kafunanga ukuwanatha. Lezizinto azenza lawomaqhawe amathathu." 
1Chronicles11:20 UAbishayi umfowabo kaJowabi, yena-ke wayeyinhloko yabathathu. Yena ephakamisa umkhonto wakhe emelene labangamakhulu amathathu wababulala; wasesiba lebizo phakathi kwabathathu." 
1Chronicles11:21 Kwabathathu wayehlonitshwa kulababili, wasesiba yinduna yabo; kodwa kafinyelelanga kwabathathu abokuqala." 
1Chronicles11:22 UBhenaya indodana kaJehoyada, indodana yeqhawe leKabhiseyeli, wayemkhulu ngezenzo: Nguye owatshaya abakoMowabi ababili ababenjengezilwane; futhi yena wehla wabulala isilwane phakathi komgodi mhla weliqhwa elikhithikayo." 
1Chronicles11:23 Yena wasetshaya indoda engumGibhithe, umuntu omude, ozingalo ezinhlanu. Lesandleni somGibhithe kwakulomkhonto onjengogodo lomeluki; kodwa wehlela kuye ngenduku, wahluthuna umkhonto esandleni somGibhithe, wambulala ngowakhe umkhonto." 
1Chronicles11:24 Lezizinto wazenza uBhenaya indodana kaJehoyada, waba lebizo phakathi kwamaqhawe amathathu." 
1Chronicles11:25 Khangela, wahlonitshwa phakathi kwabangamatshumi amathathu, kodwa kafinyelelanga kwabathathu. UDavida wasembeka phezu kwabalindi bakhe." 
1Chronicles11:26 Lamaqhawe amabutho: OAsaheli umfowabo kaJowabi, uElihanani indodana kaDodo weBhethelehema," 
1Chronicles11:27 uShamothi umHarodi, uHelezi umPheloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 uIra indodana kaIkheshi umThekhowa, uAbiyezeri umAnathothi," 
1Chronicles11:29 uSibekayi umHushathi, uIlayi umAhohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 uMaharayi umNetofa, uHelebi indodana kaBahana umNetofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 uIthayi indodana kaRibayi weGibeya yabantwana bakoBhenjamini, uBhenaya umPirathoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 uHurayi wezifula zeGahashi, uAbiyeli umArba," 
1Chronicles11:33 uAzimavethi umBaharumi, uEliyabha umShahaliboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 amadodana kaHashema umGizoni, uJonathani indodana kaShage umHarari," 
1Chronicles11:35 uAhiyamu indodana kaSakari umHarari, uElifali indodana kaUri," 
1Chronicles11:36 uHeferi umMekera, uAhiya umPheloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 uHeziro umKharmeli, uNaharayi indodana kaEzibayi," 
1Chronicles11:38 uJoweli umfowabo kaNathani, uMibhari indodana kaHagiri," 
1Chronicles11:39 uZeleki umAmoni, uNaharayi umBherothi, umthwali wezikhali zikaJowabi indodana kaZeruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 uIra umIthiri, uGarebi umIthiri," 
1Chronicles11:41 uUriya umHethi, uZabadi indodana kaAhilayi," 
1Chronicles11:42 uAdina indodana kaShiza umRubeni, inhloko kwabakoRubeni, labangamatshumi amathathu belaye," 
1Chronicles11:43 uHanani indodana kaMahaka, loJoshafati umMithini," 
1Chronicles11:44 uUziya umAshiterathi, uShama loJehiyeli amadodana kaHothamu umAroweri," 
1Chronicles11:45 uJediyayeli indodana kaShimri, loJoha umfowabo umTizi," 
1Chronicles11:46 uEliyeli umMahavi, loJeribayi loJoshaviya amadodana kaElinahamu, loIthima umMowabi," 
1Chronicles11:47 loEliyeli, loObedi, loJahasiyeli umMezobaya." 
1Chronicles12:1 Laba-ke yilabo abeza kuDavida eZikilagi, lapho esavalelwe ngenxa kaSawuli indodana kaKishi; njalo babephakathi kwamaqhawe, abasizi bempi." 
1Chronicles12:2 Behlomile ngamadandili, besebenzisa isandla sokunene lesokhohlo ngamatshe, langemitshoko, ngedandili; babengababafowabo bakaSawuli koBhenjamini." 
1Chronicles12:3 Inhloko yayinguAhiyezeri, loJowashi, amadodana kaShemaha umGibeya; loJeziyeli loPeleti amadodana kaAzimavethi, loBeraka, loJehu umAnathothi," 
1Chronicles12:4 loIshmaya umGibeyoni, iqhawe phakathi kwabangamatshumi amathathu njalo ephezu kwabangamatshumi amathathu; loJeremiya, loJahaziyeli, loJohanani, loJozabadi umGedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 uEluzayi, loJerimothi, loBeyaliya, loShemariya, loShefathiya umHarufi," 
1Chronicles12:6 uElkana, loIshiya, loAzareli, loJowezeri, loJashobeyamu, amaKora," 
1Chronicles12:7 loJowela, loZebhadiya, amadodana kaJehoramu weGedori." 
1Chronicles12:8 LakwabakoGadi bazehlukanisela kuDavida enqabeni enkangala, amaqhawe alamandla, amadoda ebutho empi, ephatha isihlangu esikhulu lomkhonto, obuso bawo babuyibuso bezilwane, enjengemiziki ezintabeni ngesiqubu." 
1Chronicles12:9 UEzeri wayeyinhloko, uObadiya owesibili, uEliyabi owesithathu," 
1Chronicles12:10 uMishimana owesine, uJeremiya owesihlanu," 
1Chronicles12:11 uAthayi owesithupha, uEliyeli owesikhombisa," 
1Chronicles12:12 uJohanani owesificaminwembili, uElizabadi owesificamunwemunye," 
1Chronicles12:13 uJeremiya owetshumi, uMakibanayi owetshumi lanye." 
1Chronicles12:14 Laba babengabamadodana akoGadi, izinhloko zebutho; omunye wabancinyane wayephethe ikhulu, lomkhulu wayephethe inkulungwane." 
1Chronicles12:15 Laba yibo abachapha iJordani ngenyanga yokuqala lapho yayigcwele iphuphuma inkumbi zonke zayo, baxotsha bonke ababese zigodini ngempumalanga langentshonalanga." 
1Chronicles12:16 Basebefika bevela ebantwaneni bakoBhenjamini labakoJuda enqabeni kuDavida. 
1Chronicles12:17 UDavida wasephuma ukubahlangabeza, waphendula wathi kibo: Uba lisiza kimi ngokuthula ukungisiza, ngilenhliziyo ehlangene lani; kodwa uba kuyikunginikela ngenkohliso ezitheni zami, kungelabubi ezandleni zami, uNkulunkulu wabobaba kakubone, ajezise." 
1Chronicles12:18 UMoya wasesehlela kuAmasayi inhloko yezinduna, wasesithi: Si ngabakho, Davida, si lawe, ndodana kaJese! Ukuthula, ukuthula kube kuwe, lokuthula kube kubasizi bakho, ngoba uNkulunkulu wakho uyakusiza! UDavida wasebemukela, wabenza induna zeviyo." 
1Chronicles12:19 Abavela koManase bahlamukela kuDavida ekufikeni kwakhe lamaFilisti emelene loSawuli empini. Kodwa kababasizanga, ngoba ababusi bamaFilisti bamxotsha ngecebo besithi: Ngamakhanda ethu uzahlamukela enkosini yakhe uSawuli." 
1Chronicles12:20 Ekuyeni kwakhe eZikilagi kwabalekela kuye abavela koManase: OAdina loJozabadi loJediyayeli loMikhayeli loJozabadi loElihu loZilethayi, inhloko zezinkulungwane ababengabakoManase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Bona basebesiza kanye loDavida bemelene leviyo elihlaselayo, ngoba bonke babengamaqhawe alamandla, bezinduna ebuthweni." 
1Chronicles12:22 Ngoba ngesikhathi insuku ngensuku beza kuDavida ukumnceda baze babe libutho elikhulu njengebutho likaNkulunkulu. 
1Chronicles12:23 Lala ngamanani ezinhloko ezazihlomele impi; zeza kuDavida eHebroni ukuphendulela umbuso kaSawuli kuye, ngokomlomo we Nkosi." 
1Chronicles12:24 Abantwana bakoJuda bethwele isihlangu esikhulu lomkhonto babeyizinkulungwane eziyisithupha lamakhulu ayisificaminwembili, behlomele impi." 
1Chronicles12:25 Ebantwaneni bakoSimeyoni, amaqhawe alamandla empi, izinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa lekhulu." 
1Chronicles12:26 Ebantwaneni bakoLevi, izinkulungwane ezine lamakhulu ayisithupha." 
1Chronicles12:27 LoJehoyada wayeyisiphathamandla sabakoAroni; kanye laye kwakulezinkulungwane ezintathu lamakhulu ayisikhombisa. 
1Chronicles12:28 LoZadoki ijaha, iqhawe elilamandla; lendlini kayise izinduna ezingamatshumi amabili." 
1Chronicles12:29 Lebantwaneni bakoBhenjamini, abafowabo bakaSawuli, izinkulungwane ezintathu; ngoba kuze kube khathesi ubunengi babo bagcina umlindo wendlu kaSawuli." 
1Chronicles12:30 Lebantwaneni bakoEfrayimi, izinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lamakhulu ayisificaminwembili, amaqhawe alamandla, amadoda alamabizo endlini yaboyise." 
1Chronicles12:31 Lengxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase, izinkulungwane ezilitshumi leyisificaminwembili, ababeqanjwe ngamabizo ukuthi beze babeke uDavida abe yinkosi." 
1Chronicles12:32 Lebantwaneni bakoIsakari, ababelokwazi beqedisisa izikhathi ukwazi ukuthi uIsrayeli ufanele enzeni, izinhloko zabo zazingamakhulu amabili, labafowabo bonke babesemlayweni wazo." 
1Chronicles12:33 KoZebuluni, abaphuma impi, behlela impi ngazo zonke izikhali zempi, izinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amahlanu, ukuncedisa kungengenhliziyombili." 
1Chronicles12:34 LakoNafithali, izinduna eziyinkulungwane, labayizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lesikhombisa kanye lazo, belesihlangu esikhulu lomkhonto." 
1Chronicles12:35 LakwabakoDani, abahlela impi, izinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lesificaminwembili lamakhulu ayisithupha." 
1Chronicles12:36 LakoAsheri, abaphuma ebuthweni, ukuhlela impi, izinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane." 
1Chronicles12:37 Lababevela ngaphetsheya kweJordani, kwabakoRubeni labakoGadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase, belezikhali zonke zempi ukuyakulwa, izinkulungwane ezilikhulu lamatshumi amabili." 
1Chronicles12:38 Wonke lamadoda empi, angancedisa kuviyo, afika eHebroni ngenhliziyo epheleleyo ukubeka uDavida abe yinkosi phezu kukaIsrayeli wonke; njalo loIsrayeli wonke oseleyo wayenhliziyonye ukubeka uDavida abe yinkosi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Njalo baba lapho loDavida insuku ezintathu besidla benatha, ngoba abafowabo babebalungisele." 
1Chronicles12:40 Futhi lababeseduze labo kuze kube koIsakari lakoZebuluni lakoNafithali baletha isinkwa ngabobabhemi langamakamela langezimbongolo langezinkabi, ukudla, impuphu, izinkwa zomkhiwa, lamahlukuzo ezithelo zevini ezonyisiweyo, lewayini, lamafutha, lezinkabi, lezimvu, ngobunengi, ngoba kwakulentokozo koIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 UDavida wasecebisana lezinduna zezinkulungwane lezamakhulu laye wonke umphathi. 
1Chronicles13:2 UDavida wasesithi ebandleni lonke lakoIsrayeli: Uba kulungile kini, njalo kuvela e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wethu, kasisabalale sithumele kubafowethu abaseleyo emazweni wonke akoIsrayeli lakubapristi lamaLevi alabo emizini, emadlelweni, ukuze babuthane kithi." 
1Chronicles13:3 Besesibuyisa kithi umtshokotsho wesivumelwano sikaNkulunkulu wethu, ngoba kasiwudinganga ensukwini zikaSawuli." 
1Chronicles13:4 Ibandla lonke laselisithi kwenziwe njalo, ngoba udaba lwalulungile emehlweni abo bonke abantu." 
1Chronicles13:5 UDavida wasebuthanisa uIsrayeli wonke kusukela eShihori yeGibhithe kuze kube sekungeneni kweHamathi ukuletha umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu usuka eKiriyathi-Jeyarimi. 
1Chronicles13:6 UDavida loIsrayeli wonke basebesenyukela eBhahala, eKiriyathi-Jeyarimi eyakoJuda, ukuze benyuse lapho umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu i Nkosi, ehlala phakathi kwamakherubi*, lapho ibizo elibizwa khona." 
1Chronicles13:7 Basebewuthwala umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu ngenqola entsha bewususa endlini kaAbinadaba; njalo oUza loAhiyo babetshayela leyonqola. 
1Chronicles13:8 UDavida loIsrayeli wonke babedlala-ke phambi kukaNkulunkulu ngamandla wonke, langengoma, langamachacho, langezigubhu zezintambo, langezingungu, langezinsimbi ezincencethayo, langezimpondo." 
1Chronicles13:9 Lapho befika ebaleni lokubhulela likaKidoni, uUza welula isandla sakhe ukubamba umtshokotsho, ngoba inkabi zakhubeka." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ulaka lwe Nkosi lwaselumvuthela uUza, yamtshaya, ngenxa yokuthi welulela isandla sakhe emtshokotshweni; wasefela khonapho phambi kukaNkulunkulu." 
1Chronicles13:11 UDavida wasethukuthela ngoba i Nkosi imfohlele ngokufohla uUza; waseyibiza leyondawo ngokuthi yiPerezi-Uza, kuze kube lamuhla." 
1Chronicles13:12 UDavida wasemesaba uNkulunkulu ngalolosuku, esithi: Ngizawuletha njani kimi umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu?" 
1Chronicles13:13 Ngakho uDavida kawulethanga umtshokotsho kuye emzini kaDavida, kodwa wawuphambulela endlini kaObedi-Edoma umGithi." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ngakho umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu wahlala kwabendlu kaObedi-Edoma endlini yakhe inyanga ezintathu. I Nkosi yasibusisa indlu kaObedi-Edoma lakho konke ayelakho. 
1Chronicles14:1 UHiramu inkosi yeTire wasethuma izithunywa kuDavida, lezigodo zemisedari lababazi bamatshe lababazi bezigodo ukumakhela indlu." 
1Chronicles14:2 UDavida wasesazi ukuthi i Nkosi yayimmisile ukuthi abe yinkosi phezu kukaIsrayeli, ngoba umbuso wakhe wawuphakanyiselwe phezulu ngenxa yabantu bayo uIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 UDavida wasethatha abanye abafazi eJerusalema; uDavida wasezala amanye amadodana lamadodakazi. 
1Chronicles14:4 Lala ngamabizo abantwana aba labo eJerusalema: OShamuwa, loShobabi, uNathani, loSolomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 loIbihari, loElishuwa, loEliphaleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 loNoga, loNefegi, loJafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 loElishama, loBeyeliyada, loElifaleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 AmaFilisti esezwile ukuthi uDavida ugcotshiwe ukuthi abe yinkosi phezu kukaIsrayeli wonke, wonke amaFilisti enyuka ukudinga uDavida; uDavida ekuzwa waphuma uku ya melana lawo." 
1Chronicles14:9 AmaFilisti asefika azisabalalisa esihotsheni seRefayimi. 
1Chronicles14:10 UDavida wasebuza kuNkulunkulu esithi: Ngenyukele yini kumaFilisti? Uzawanikela esandleni sami yini? I Nkosi yasisithi kuye: Yenyuka, ngoba ngizawanikela esandleni sakho." 
1Chronicles14:11 Basebesenyukela eBhali-Perazimi, uDavida wawatshaya lapho; uDavida wasesithi: UNkulunkulu ufohlele ezitheni zami ngesandla sami njengokufohla kwamanzi. Ngenxa yalokhu babiza leyondawo ngokuthi yiBhali-Perazimi." 
1Chronicles14:12 Asetshiya onkulunkulu bawo lapho, uDavida wasesithi kabatshiswe ngomlilo." 
1Chronicles14:13 AmaFilisti asebuya ezisabalalisa esihotsheni futhi. 
1Chronicles14:14 Lapho uDavida ebuza futhi kuNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu wathi kuye: Ungenyukeli ngemva kwawo, agombolozele usuka kiwo, uze kuwo maqondana lezihlahla zebhalisamu." 
1Chronicles14:15 Kuzakuthi-ke lapho usizwa umsindo wokuhamba ezihlokweni zezihlahla zebhalisamu, ubusuphumela empini, ngoba uNkulunkulu uzabe esephume phambi kwakho ukutshaya ibutho lamaFilisti." 
1Chronicles14:16 Ngakho uDavida wenza njengoba uNkulunkulu emlayile; basebetshaya ibutho lamaFilisti kusukela eGibeyoni kwaze kwaba seGezeri. 
1Chronicles14:17 Njalo ibizo likaDavida laphumela kuwo wonke amazwe; i Nkosi yasibeka ukwesabeka kwakhe phezu kwazo zonke izizwe. 
1Chronicles15:1 Wasemenzela izindlu emzini kaDavida, walungisela umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu indawo, wawumisela ithente." 
1Chronicles15:2 Ngalesosikhathi uDavida wathi: Kakho ongathwala umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu ngaphandle kwamaLevi, ngoba yiwo i Nkosi eyawakhethela ukuthwala umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu, lokuyikhonza kuze kube nininini." 
1Chronicles15:3 UDavida wasebuthanisa uIsrayeli wonke eJerusalema ukuze benyuse umtshokotsho we Nkosi endaweni yawo ayeyilungisele wona. 
1Chronicles15:4 UDavida wasebuthanisa amadodana kaAroni lamaLevi. 
1Chronicles15:5 Kumadodana kaKohathi, uUriyeli induna, labafowabo, ikhulu lamatshumi amabili." 
1Chronicles15:6 Kumadodana kaMerari, uAsaya induna, labafowabo, amakhulu amabili lamatshumi amabili." 
1Chronicles15:7 Kumadodana kaGerishoni, uJoweli induna, labafowabo, ikhulu lamatshumi amathathu." 
1Chronicles15:8 Kumadodana kaElizafani, uShemaya induna, labafowabo, amakhulu amabili." 
1Chronicles15:9 Kumadodana kaHebroni, uEliyeli induna, labafowabo, amatshumi ayisificaminwembili." 
1Chronicles15:10 Kumadodana kaUziyeli, uAminadaba induna, labafowabo, ikhulu letshumi lambili." 
1Chronicles15:11 UDavida wasebiza oZadoki loAbhiyatha abapristi, lamaLevi, oUriyeli, uAsaya, loJoweli, uShemaya, loEliyeli, loAminadaba." 
1Chronicles15:12 Wasesithi kubo: Lizinhloko zaboyise bamaLevi; zingcweliseni lina labafowenu ukuze lenyuse umtshokotsho we Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli endaweni engiyilungisele wona. 
1Chronicles15:13 Ngoba lina lalingekho kuqala, i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu yafohlela kithi, ngoba singayidinganga ngokwesimiso." 
1Chronicles15:14 Ngakho abapristi lamaLevi bazingcwelisa ukwenyusa umtshokotsho we Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli. 
1Chronicles15:15 Abantwana bamaLevi basebethwala umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu, njengokulaya kukaMozisi ngokwelizwi le Nkosi, emahlombe abo ngemijabo phezu kwabo." 
1Chronicles15:16 UDavida wasesithi ezinduneni zamaLevi zimise abafowabo, abahlabeleli, lezinto zokuhlabelela lezigubhu zezintambo lamachacho lezinsimbi ezincencethayo, bazizwakalise, ngokuphakamisa ilizwi ngentokozo." 
1Chronicles15:17 AmaLevi asemisa uHemani indodana kaJoweli, lakubafowabo uAsafi indodana kaBerekiya, lemadodaneni kaMerari abafowabo uEthani indodana kaKushaya." 
1Chronicles15:18 Njalo kanye labo abafowabo besigaba sesibili: OZekariya, uBeni, loJahaziyeli, loShemiramothi, loJehiyeli, loUni, uEliyabi, loBhenaya, loMahaseya, loMathithiya, loElifelehu, loMikineya, loObedi-Edoma, loJeyiyeli, abalindi bamasango." 
1Chronicles15:19 Abahlabeleli oHemani, uAsafi, loEthani bazizwakalisa-ke ngensimbi ezincencethayo zethusi." 
1Chronicles15:20 LoZekariya loAziyeli loShemiramothi loJehiyeli loUni loEliyabi loMahaseya loBhenaya belezigubhu zezintambo ngeAlamothi. 
1Chronicles15:21 LoMathithiya loElifelehu loMikineya loObedi-Edoma loJeyiyeli loAzaziya belamachacho ngeSheminithi ukukhokhela. 
1Chronicles15:22 LoKenaniya induna yamaLevi emthwalweni, wafundisa ngomthwalo ngoba wayeqedisisa." 
1Chronicles15:23 LoBerekiya loElkana babengabagcini bamasango omtshokotsho. 
1Chronicles15:24 LoShebaniya loJoshafati loNethaneli loAmasayi loZekariya loBhenaya loEliyezeri abapristi bakhalisa izimpondo phambi komtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu. LoObedi-Edoma loJehiya babengabagcini bamasango omtshokotsho. 
1Chronicles15:25 Kwasekusithi uDavida labadala bakoIsrayeli lenduna zezinkulungwane bahamba ukwenyusa umtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi uvela endlini kaObedi-Edoma ngentokozo. 
1Chronicles15:26 Kwasekusithi uNkulunkulu ewasiza amaLevi ayewuthwele umtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi, banikela umhlatshelo wamajongosi ayisikhombisa lenqama eziyisikhombisa." 
1Chronicles15:27 UDavida wayegqoke-ke isembatho selembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, lawo wonke amaLevi ayewuthwele umtshokotsho labahlabeleli loKenaniya induna yomthwalo wabahlabeleli; uDavida wayegqoke-ke i-efodi* yelembu elicolekileyo." 
1Chronicles15:28 Ngakho uIsrayeli wonke wawenyusa umtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi ngokumemeza langokukhala kophondo lwenqama, langezimpondo, langezinsimbi ezincencethayo, besenza umsindo ngezigubhu zezintambo lamachacho." 
1Chronicles15:29 Kwasekusithi lapho umtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi ufika emzini kaDavida, uMikhali indodakazi kaSawuli walunguza ngewindi wabona inkosi uDavida esina edlala, wamdelela enhliziyweni yakhe." 
1Chronicles16:1 Basebewuletha umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu, bawumisa phakathi kwethente uDavida ayelimisele wona; basebenikela iminikelo yokutshiswa leminikelo yokuthula phambi kukaNkulunkulu." 
1Chronicles16:2 UDavida eseqedile ukunikela umnikelo wokutshiswa leminikelo yokuthula wababusisa abantu ebizweni le Nkosi. 
1Chronicles16:3 Wasesabela wonke umuntu wakoIsrayeli kusukela kowesilisa kuze kube kowesifazana, kwaba ngulowo lalowo isinkwa esisodwa, leqatha lenyama, lesinkwa sezithelo zevini ezonyisiweyo." 
1Chronicles16:4 Wasemisa abathile kumaLevi phambi komtshokotsho we Nkosi, izikhonzi, ngitsho ukukhumbula lokubonga lokudumisa i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 UAsafi inhloko, lowesibili kuye uZekariya, uJeyiyeli, loShemiramothi, loJehiyeli, loMathithiya, loEliyabi, loBhenaya, loObedi-Edoma, loJeyiyeli belezinto zezigubhu zezintambo njalo lamachacho; uAsafi wasezizwakalisa ngezinsimbi ezincencethayo;" 
1Chronicles16:6 loBhenaya loJahaziyeli abapristi ngezimpondo njalonjalo phambi komtshokotsho wesivumelwano sikaNkulunkulu. 
1Chronicles16:7 Ngalesosikhathi ngalolosuku uDavida wanika kuqala lesisihlabelelo ukudumisa i Nkosi ngesandla sikaAsafi labafowabo: 
1Chronicles16:8 Bongani i Nkosi, libize ibizo layo, lazise phakathi kwabantu izenzo zayo." 
1Chronicles16:9 Hlabelani kuyo, liyihubele amahubo, lilandise ngezenzo zayo ezimangalisayo." 
1Chronicles16:10 Zincomeni ebizweni layo elingcwele, kayithokoze inhliziyo yabo abadinga i Nkosi." 
1Chronicles16:11 Dingani i Nkosi lamandla ayo, lidinge ubuso bayo njalonjalo." 
1Chronicles16:12 Khumbulani izimangaliso zayo eyazenzayo, izibonakaliso zayo, lezahlulelo zomlomo wayo," 
1Chronicles16:13 nzalo kaIsrayeli inceku yayo, bantwana bakaJakobe, abakhethiweyo bayo." 
1Chronicles16:14 Iyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu; izahlulelo zayo zisemhlabeni wonke. 
1Chronicles16:15 Khumbulani isivumelwano sayo kuze kube nininini, ilizwi e yalilaya kuzinkulungwane zezizukulwana," 
1Chronicles16:16 eyasenza loAbrahama, lesifungo sakhe kuIsaka," 
1Chronicles16:17 eyasiqinisa lakuJakobe saba yisimiso, kuIsrayeli saba yisivumelwano esilaphakade," 
1Chronicles16:18 isithi: Ngizakunika ilizwe leKhanani, inkatho yelifa lakho." 
1Chronicles16:19 Lapho lalibalutshwana ngenani, yebo libalutshwana lezihambi kulo." 
1Chronicles16:20 Basebezula besuka esizweni besiya esizweni, besuka embusweni besiya kwabanye abantu." 
1Chronicles16:21 Kayivumelanga muntu ukubacindezela; yebo yakhuza amakhosi ngenxa yabo: 
1Chronicles16:22 Lingathinti abagcotshiweyo bami, lingoni abaprofethi bami." 
1Chronicles16:23 Hlabelelani e Nkosi ni, mhlaba wonke, litshumayele insuku ngensuku usindiso lwayo." 
1Chronicles16:24 Landisani udumo lwayo phakathi kwezizwe, izimangaliso zayo phakathi kwabantu bonke." 
1Chronicles16:25 Ngoba yinkulu i Nkosi, ifanele ukudunyiswa kakhulu, iyesabeka phezu kwabonkulunkulu bonke." 
1Chronicles16:26 Ngoba bonke onkulunkulu bezizwe bayizithombe; kodwa i Nkosi yenza amazulu. 
1Chronicles16:27 Udumo lenkazimulo kuphambi kwayo, amandla lentokozo kusendaweni yayo." 
1Chronicles16:28 Inikeni i Nkosi, zizukulwana zezizwe, inikeni i Nkosi udumo lamandla." 
1Chronicles16:29 Inikeni i Nkosi udumo lwebizo layo, lethani umnikelo lize phambi kwayo. Ikhonzeni i Nkosi ebuhleni bobungcwele." 
1Chronicles16:30 Lithuthumele phambi kwayo, mhlaba wonke; njalo umhlaba uzaqiniswa, kawuyikunyikinyeka." 
1Chronicles16:31 Kawathokoze amazulu, lomhlaba ujabule, kabatsho phakathi kwezizwe ukuthi: I Nkosi iyabusa." 
1Chronicles16:32 Kaluhlokome ulwandle lokugcwala kwalo, iganga kalithabe lakho konke okukulo." 
1Chronicles16:33 Khona zizahlabelela ngentokozo izihlahla zehlathi phambi kwe Nkosi, ngoba iyeza ukwahlulela umhlaba." 
1Chronicles16:34 Bongani i Nkosi ngoba ilungile, ngoba umusa wayo umi kuze kube phakade." 
1Chronicles16:35 Lithi futhi: Sisindise, Nkulunkulu wosindiso lwethu, usibuthe usikhulule ezizweni, ukuze sibonge ibizo lakho elingcwele, sizincome kudumo lwakho." 
1Chronicles16:36 Kayibusiswe i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, kusukela phakade kuze kube phakade. Bonke abantu basebesithi: Ameni. Basebeyidumisa i Nkosi." 
1Chronicles16:37 Wasetshiya lapho phambi komtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi oAsafi labafowabo ukukhonza phambi komtshokotsho njalonjalo njengodaba losuku ngosuku lwalo. 
1Chronicles16:38 LoObedi-Edoma kanye labafowabo, abangamatshumi ayisithupha lesificaminwembili; uObedi-Edoma indodana kaJeduthuni loHosa babengabagcini bamasango." 
1Chronicles16:39 LoZadoki umpristi labafowabo abapristi phambi kwethabhanekele le Nkosi endaweni ephakemeyo eyayiseGibeyoni," 
1Chronicles16:40 ukuze banikele iminikelo yokutshiswa e Nkosi ni phezu kwelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa njalonjalo ekuseni lakusihlwa, lanjengakho konke okubhaliweyo emlayweni we Nkosi, eyawulaya uIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Njalo kanye labo oHemani loJeduthuni labanye ababekhethiwe abamiswa ngamabizo ukubonga i Nkosi, ngoba umusa wayo umi kuze kube phakade." 
1Chronicles16:42 Njalo kanye labo oHemani loJeduthuni babe le zimpondo lezinsimbi ezincencethayo zalabo abazizwakalisayo, lezinto zokuhlabelela zikaNkulunkulu. Lamadodana kaJeduthuni ayesesangweni." 
1Chronicles16:43 Basebehamba bonke abantu, ngulowo lalowo waya endlini yakhe. UDavida wasebuyela ukubusisa indlu yakhe." 
1Chronicles17:1 Kwasekusithi uDavida esehlezi endlini yakhe, uDavida wathi kuNathani umprofethi: Khangela, mina ngihlala endlini yemisedari, kodwa umtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi ungaphansi kwamakhetheni." 
1Chronicles17:2 UNathani wasesithi kuDavida: Yenza konke okusenhliziyweni yakho, ngoba uNkulunkulu ulawe." 
1Chronicles17:3 Kodwa kwathi ngabona lobobusuku ilizwi likaNkulunkulu lafika kuNathani, lisithi:" 
1Chronicles17:4 Hamba utshele uDavida inceku yami: Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Wena kawuyikungakhela indlu yokuhlala. 
1Chronicles17:5 Ngoba kangihlalanga endlini kusukela esukwini engenyusa ngalo uIsrayeli kuze kube lamuhla, kodwa ngasuka ethenteni ngaya ethenteni njalo ngasuka ethabhanekeleni ngaya kwelinye." 
1Chronicles17:6 Loba ngaphi engihambe khona loIsrayeli wonke ngake ngakhuluma ilizwi yini komunye wabahluleli bakoIsrayeli, engabalaya ukwelusa abantu bami ngisithi: Yini lingangakhelanga indlu yemisedari?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Ngakho-ke uzakutsho njalo encekwini yami uDavida uthi: Itsho njalo i Nkosi yamabandla: Mina ngakuthatha esibayeni sezimvu ekulandeleni izimvu ukuze ube ngumbusi phezu kwabantu bami uIsrayeli. 
1Chronicles17:8 Njalo ngaba lawe loba ngaphi oya khona, ngaquma zonke izitha zakho zasuka phambi kwakho, ngakwenzela ibizo njengebizo labakhulu abasemhlabeni." 
1Chronicles17:9 Njalo ngizabamisela indawo abantu bami uIsrayeli, ngibagxumeke ukuze bahlale endaweni yabo, bangabe besanyikinywa; labantwana bobubi kabasayikubamotsha njengakuqala," 
1Chronicles17:10 njalo kusukela kulezonsuku engalaya abahluleli ukuthi babe phezu kwabantu bami uIsrayeli; ngazehlisela phansi zonke izitha zakho; njalo ngiyakutshela ukuthi iNKOSI izakwakhela indlu. 
1Chronicles17:11 Kuzakuthi-ke lapho insuku zakho sezigcwalisekile ukuthi uhambe laboyihlo, ngizavusa inzalo yakho emva kwakho, ezavela emadodaneni akho, ngiqinise umbuso wayo." 
1Chronicles17:12 Yena uzangakhela indlu, ngizaqinisa isihlalo sakhe sobukhosi kuze kube nininini." 
1Chronicles17:13 Mina ngizakuba nguyise, yena abe yindodana yami; njalo kangiyikususa uthandolomusa lwami kuye njengoba ngalususa kulowo owayengaphambi kwakho." 
1Chronicles17:14 Kodwa ngizamqinisa endlini yami lembusweni wami kuze kube nininini, lesihlalo sakhe sobukhosi sizaqiniswa kuze kube nininini." 
1Chronicles17:15 Njengawo wonke lamazwi lanjengawo wonke lumbono, ngokunjalo uNathani wakhuluma kuDavida." 
1Chronicles17:16 Inkosi uDavida yasingena yahlala phambi kwe Nkosi, yathi: Mina ngingubani, Nkosi Nkulunkulu, lendlu yami iyini, ukuthi ungilethe kuze kube lapha?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Lokhu bekukuncinyane emehlweni akho, Nkulunkulu; usukhulumile ngendlu yenceku yakho kusekhatshana, wangibona njengesimo somuntu ophakemeyo, Nkosi Nkulunkulu." 
1Chronicles17:18 UDavida angengezani okunye kuwe ngodumo lwenceku yakho? Ngoba wena uyayazi inceku yakho. 
1Chronicles17:19 Nkosi, ngenxa yenceku yakho langokwenhliziyo yakho wenzile zonke lezizinto ezinkulu ukwazisa zonke lezizinto ezinkulu." 
1Chronicles17:20 Nkosi, kakho onjengawe, njalo kakho uNkulunkulu ngaphandle kwakho, njengakho konke esikuzwileyo ngendlebe zethu." 
1Chronicles17:21 Njalo ngubani onjengabantu bakho uIsrayeli, isizwe esisodwa emhlabeni, uNkulunkulu owayazihlengela sibe ngabantu, ukuzenzela ibizo lezinto ezinkulu lezesabekayo, ngokuxotsha elifeni izizwe ukuzisusa phambi kwabantu bakho owabahlenga eGibhithe?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Ngoba wenza abantu bakho uIsrayeli ukuthi babe ngabantu bakho kuze kube nininini; lawe Nkosi waba nguNkulunkulu wabo. 
1Chronicles17:23 Khathesi-ke, Nkosi, ilizwi owalikhuluma ngenceku yakho langendlu yayo kaliqiniswe kuze kube nininini, wenze njengokukhuluma kwakho." 
1Chronicles17:24 Yebo kaliqiniswe, lebizo lakho kalibe likhulu kuze kube nininini, kuthiwa: I Nkosi yamabandla inguNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, nguNkulunkulu koIsrayeli; lendlu kaDavida inceku yakho kayimiswe phambi kwakho." 
1Chronicles17:25 Ngoba wena, Nkulunkulu wami, wembule endlebeni yenceku yakho ukuthi uzayakhela indlu; ngenxa yalokho inceku yakho ithole ok okukhuleka phambi kwakho." 
1Chronicles17:26 Khathesi-ke, Nkosi, wena unguye uNkulunkulu, ukhulume lokhu okuhle ngenceku yakho." 
1Chronicles17:27 Khathesi-ke, kukuthokozisile ukubusisa indlu yenceku yakho ukuze ibe phambi kwakho kuze kube nininini; ngoba, wena Nkosi, uyabusisa, njalo izabusiswa kuze kube nini lanini." 
1Chronicles18:1 Kwasekusithi emva kwalokho uDavida watshaya amaFilisti, wawehlisela phansi, wathatha iGathi lemizana yayo ekususa esandleni samaFilisti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Watshaya loMowabi; amaMowabi asesiba zinceku zikaDavida, aletha umthelo." 
1Chronicles18:3 UDavida watshaya loHadadezeri inkosi yeZoba kuze kube seHamathi lapho esiyamisa amandla akhe emfuleni iYufrathi. 
1Chronicles18:4 UDavida wasethumba kuye inqola eziyinkulungwane, labamabhiza abazinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa, lamadoda ahamba ngenyawo azinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili; uDavida wasequma imisipha yawo wonke amabhiza enqola, kodwa watshiya kuwo amabhiza enqola alikhulu." 
1Chronicles18:5 Lapho amaSiriya eDamaseko eza ukusiza uHadadezeri inkosi yeZoba, uDavida watshaya kumaSiriya amadoda azinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lambili." 
1Chronicles18:6 UDavida wasebeka amabutho enqaba eSiriya yeDamaseko; amaSiriya asesiba zinceku zikaDavida, aletha umthelo. Ngokunjalo i Nkosi yamsindisa uDavida loba ngaphi aya khona." 
1Chronicles18:7 UDavida wasethatha izihlangu zegolide ezaziphezu kwenceku zikaHadadezeri, waziletha eJerusalema." 
1Chronicles18:8 Njalo eTibhathi leKuni, imizi kaHadadezeri, uDavida wathatha ithusi elinengi kakhulu, uSolomoni owenza ngalo ulwandle lwethusi, lezinsika, lezitsha zethusi." 
1Chronicles18:9 UTowu inkosi yeHamathi esizwa ukuthi uDavida utshayile ibutho lonke likaHadadezeri inkosi yeZoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 wathuma uHadoramu indodana yakhe enkosini uDavida ukuyibuza impilakahle lokuyibusisa, ngenxa yokuthi ilwe loHadadezeri yamtshaya, (ngoba uHadadezeri wayengumuntu wezimpi esilwa loTowu), e lezitsha zonke zegolide lezesiliva lezethusi." 
1Chronicles18:11 Lalezo inkosi uDavida yazehlukanisela uJehova kanye lesiliva legolide eyakuletha kuvela ezizweni zonke, eEdoma, lakoMowabi, lebantwaneni bakoAmoni, lakumaFilisti, lakumaAmaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 UAbishayi indodana kaZeruya wasetshaya amaEdoma esihotsheni setswayi, izinkulungwane ezilitshumi lesificaminwembili." 
1Chronicles18:13 Wasebeka amabutho enqaba eEdoma; wonke amaEdoma asesiba zinceku zikaDavida. Ngokunjalo i Nkosi yamsindisa uDavida loba ngaphi aya khona. 
1Chronicles18:14 UDavida wabusa-ke phezu kukaIsrayeli wonke, wayesenza isahlulelo lokulunga kubo bonke abantu bakhe." 
1Chronicles18:15 Njalo uJowabi indodana kaZeruya wayephezu kwebutho; loJehoshafathi indodana kaAhiludi wayengumabhalane; 
1Chronicles18:16 loZadoki indodana kaAhitubi loAbhimeleki indodana kaAbhiyatha babengabapristi; loShavisha wayengumbhali; 
1Chronicles18:17 loBhenaya indodana kaJehoyada wayephezu kwamaKerethi lamaPelethi; lamadodana kaDavida ayengawokuqala esandleni senkosi. 
1Chronicles19:1 Kwasekusithi emva kwalokho uNahashi inkosi yamaAmoni wafa, indodana yakhe yasisiba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles19:2 UDavida wasesithi: Ngizamenzela umusa uHanuni indodana kaNahashi, ngoba uyise wangenzela umusa. UDavida wasethuma izithunywa uku ya mduduza ngoyise. Izinceku zikaDavida zasezifika elizweni labantwana bakoAmoni kuHanuni ukumduduza." 
1Chronicles19:3 Kodwa iziphathamandla zabantwana bakoAmoni zathi kuHanuni: Kambe uDavida uyamhlonipha uyihlo emehlweni akho, ngoba ethume abaduduzi kuwe? Izinceku zakhe kazizanga kuwe yini ukuphenya lokuchitha lokuhlola ilizwe?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Ngakho uHanuni wathatha izinceku zikaDavida wazigela waquma izembatho zazo kungxenye eyodwa kwezimbili kuze kube sezibunu zazo, waziyekela zahamba." 
1Chronicles19:5 Basebehamba bamtshela uDavida ngalawomadoda; wasethuma ukuwahlangabeza, ngoba amadoda ayelenhloni kakhulu; inkosi yasisithi: Hlalani eJeriko zize zihlume izindevu zenu, beselibuya." 
1Chronicles19:6 Abantwana bakoAmoni sebebonile ukuthi sebelevumba kuDavida, uHanuni labantwana bakoAmoni bathumela amathalenta* esiliva ayinkulungwane ukuziqatshela izinqola labagadi bamabhiza eMesopotamiya leSiriya-Mahaka leZoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Basebeziqatshela inqola ezizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lambili lenkosi yeMahaka labantu bayo; basebesiza bamisa inkamba phambi kweMedeba; abantwana bakoAmoni basebebuthana bevela emizini yabo, beza empini." 
1Chronicles19:8 UDavida esezwile wathuma uJowabi lebutho lonke lamaqhawe. 
1Chronicles19:9 Abantwana bakoAmoni basebephuma bahlela impi esangweni lomuzi, lamakhosi ayezile ayewodwa egangeni." 
1Chronicles19:10 UJowabi esebonile ukuthi impondo zebutho zimelene laye ngaphambili langemuva, wakhetha kuwo wonke umkhethwa koIsrayeli, wabahlela ukumelana lamaSiriya." 
1Chronicles19:11 Labaseleyo babantu wabanikela esandleni sikaAbishayi umfowabo; basebe zi hlela ukumelana labantwana bakoAmoni. 
1Chronicles19:12 Wasesithi: Uba amaSiriya engikhulela, uzakuba lusizo lwami; kodwa uba abantwana bakoAmoni bekukhulela, ngizakusiza." 
1Chronicles19:13 Bana lesibindi, siziqinise ngenxa yabantu bakithi langenxa yemizi kaNkulunkulu wethu; le Nkosi kayenze okuhle emehlweni ayo." 
1Chronicles19:14 UJowabi labantu ababelaye basebesondela phambi kwamaSiriya ukuya empini; asebaleka phambi kwakhe. 
1Chronicles19:15 Abantwana bakoAmoni sebebona ukuthi amaSiriya ayabaleka, babaleka labo phambi kukaAbishayi umfowabo, bangena emzini. UJowabi wasengena eJerusalema." 
1Chronicles19:16 AmaSiriya esebonile ukuthi atshayiwe phambi kukaIsrayeli athuma izithunywa akhupha amaSiriya ayengaphetsheya komfula. LoShofaki induna yebutho likaHadadezeri wayephambi kwawo. 
1Chronicles19:17 Esetsheliwe uDavida, wabuthanisa uIsrayeli wonke, wachapha iJordani, wafika kibo, wahlela ibutho limelene lawo. UDavida esehlele impi ukumelana lamaSiriya, alwa laye." 
1Chronicles19:18 Kodwa amaSiriya abaleka phambi kukaIsrayeli; uDavida wasebulala kumaSiriya abezinqola abazinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa, lamadoda ahamba ngenyawo azinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane, wabulala loShofaki induna yebutho." 
1Chronicles19:19 Izinceku zikaHadadezeri sezibonile ukuthi zitshayiwe phambi kukaIsrayeli, zenza ukuthula loDavida, zamsebenzela. Ngakho amaSiriya kawafunanga ukusiza abantwana bakoAmoni futhi." 
1Chronicles20:1 Kwasekusithi ngesikhathi sokuthwasa komnyaka ngesikhathi amakhosi aphuma ngaso, uJowabi wakhokhela amaqhawe ebutho, wachitha ilizwe labantwana bakoAmoni, weza wavimbezela iRaba. Kodwa uDavida wasala eJerusalema. UJowabi waseyitshaya iRaba, wayichitha." 
1Chronicles20:2 UDavida wathatha umqhele wenkosi yabo wawususa ekhanda layo, wawuthola ulesisindo sethalenta legolide, laphakathi kwawo kulelitshe eliligugu, wasu bekwa ekhanda likaDavida. Wasekhupha impango enengi kakhulu emzini." 
1Chronicles20:3 Wakhupha abantu ababephakathi kwawo, wa ba saha ngesaha langamapiki ensimbi langamahloka. Wenza njalo-ke uDavida kuyo yonke imizi yabantwana bakoAmoni; uDavida wasebuyela eJerusalema labo bonke abantu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Kwasekusithi emva kwalokho kwavuka impi lamaFilisti eGezeri; ngalesosikhathi uSibekayi umHushathi watshaya uSiphayi owabantwana besiqhwaga; asesehliselwa phansi. 
1Chronicles20:5 Kwasekusiba khona impi futhi lamaFilisti; uElihanani indodana kaJayiri wasetshaya uLahimi umfowabo kaGoliyathi umGithi, oluthi lomkhonto wakhe lwalungangogodo lwabeluki." 
1Chronicles20:6 Kwabuye kwaba khona futhi impi eGathi lapho okwakukhona umuntu omude owayeleminwe eyisithupha lesithupha, amatshumi amabili lane; laye futhi wazalwa yisiqhwaga." 
1Chronicles20:7 Eseyisa uIsrayeli, uJonathani indodana kaShimeya, umfowabo kaDavida, wamtshaya." 
1Chronicles20:8 Laba bazalelwa isiqhwaga eGathi; basebesiwa ngesandla sikaDavida langesandla sezinceku zakhe. 
1Chronicles21:1 USathane wasesukuma emelana loIsrayeli, wavusa uDavida ukuthi abale uIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles21:2 Ngakho uDavida wathi kuJowabi lakubabusi babantu: Hambani libale uIsrayeli kusukela eBherishebha kuze kufike koDani, lilethe kimi ukuze ngazi inani labo." 
1Chronicles21:3 UJowabi wasesithi: I Nkosi kayandise ebantwini bayo njengoba benjalo ngokulikhulu. Nkosi yami, nkosi, abasizo izinceku zenkosi yami bonke yini? Inkosi yami ikufunelani lokhu? Izakuba licala ngani kuIsrayeli?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kodwa ilizwi lenkosi laba lamandla phezu kukaJowabi. Ngakho uJowabi waphuma, wahambahamba phakathi kukaIsrayeli wonke; wafika eJerusalema." 
1Chronicles21:5 UJowabi wasenika uDavida inani lokubalwa kwabantu. Njalo wonke uIsrayeli wayengamadoda azinkulungwane ezizinkulungwane lezinkulungwane ezilikhulu ahwatsha inkemba; loJuda wayengamadoda azinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amane lamatshumi ayisikhombisa ahwatsha inkemba. 
1Chronicles21:6 Kodwa uLevi loBhenjamini kababalanga phakathi kwabo, ngoba ilizwi lenkosi lalinengeka kuJowabi." 
1Chronicles21:7 Njalo kwaba kubi emehlweni kaNkulunkulu mayelana lalindaba; ngakho wamtshaya uIsrayeli. 
1Chronicles21:8 UDavida wasesithi kuNkulunkulu: Ngonile kakhulu ngoba ngenze linto. Kodwa khathesi, ake wedlulise ububi benceku yakho, ngoba ngenze ngobuthutha obukhulu." 
1Chronicles21:9 I Nkosi yasikhuluma kuGadi umboni kaDavida isithi: 
1Chronicles21:10 Hamba ukhulume kuDavida uthi: Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Mina ngikubekela okuthathu; zikhethele okunye kukho engizakwenza kuwe. 
1Chronicles21:11 UGadi wasefika kuDavida wathi kuye: Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Zikhethele: 
1Chronicles21:12 Kumbe iminyaka emithathu yendlala; loba inyanga ezintathu uqedwa ebusweni bezitha zakho lenkemba yezitha zakho i ku fice; kumbe insuku ezintathu inkemba ye Nkosi, ngitsho umatshayabhuqe wesifo, elizweni, lengilosi ye Nkosi ichitha kuwo wonke umngcele wakoIsrayeli. Ngakho-ke bona ukuthi yimpendulo bani engizayibuyisela kongithumileyo." 
1Chronicles21:13 UDavida wasesithi kuGadi: Ngicindezelwe kakhulu; ake ngiwele esandleni se Nkosi, ngoba izisa zayo zinengi kakhulu; kodwa kangingaweli esandleni somuntu." 
1Chronicles21:14 Ngakho i Nkosi yathuma umatshayabhuqe wesifo koIsrayeli; kwasekusiwa abantu abazinkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisikhombisa. 
1Chronicles21:15 UNkulunkulu wasethuma ingilosi eJerusalema ukuyibhubhisa; njalo isayibhubhisa, i Nkosi yabona yazisola ngalobobubi, yasisithi kuyo ingilosi ebhubhisayo: Kwanele, khathesi thoba isandla sakho. Ingilosi ye Nkosi yayimi-ke ebaleni lokubhulela likaOrnani umJebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 UDavida wasephakamisa amehlo akhe, wabona ingilosi ye Nkosi imi phakathi komhlaba lamazulu lenkemba yayo ehwatshiweyo esandleni sayo iyelulele phezu kweJerusalema. UDavida labadala begqoke-ke amalembu amasaka bathi mbo ngobuso babo." 
1Chronicles21:17 UDavida wasesithi kuNkulunkulu: Kakusimi yini othe kababale abantu? Yebo yimi owonileyo owenze lokwenza okubi. Kodwa lezizimvu zenzeni? Nkosi Nkulunkulu wami, isandla sakho ake sibe phezu kwami laphezu kwendlu kababa, kodwa hatshi phezu kwabantu bakho ukuthi bahlutshwe." 
1Chronicles21:18 Ingilosi ye Nkosi yasisithi kuGadi katshele uDavida ukuthi uDavida kenyuke a ye kwakhela i Nkosi ilathi ebaleni lokubhulela likaOrnani umJebusi. 
1Chronicles21:19 UDavida wasesenyuka ngelizwi likaGadi alikhuluma ngebizo le Nkosi. 
1Chronicles21:20 UOrnani enyemukula wabona ingilosi; lamadodana akhe amane ayelaye acatsha. UOrnani wayebhula-ke ingqoloyi. 
1Chronicles21:21 UDavida esefika kuOrnani, uOrnani wakhangela wambona uDavida, waphuma ebaleni lokubhulela, wamkhothamela uDavida ngobuso emhlabathini." 
1Chronicles21:22 UDavida wasesithi kuOrnani: Nginika indawo yebala lokubhulela ukuze ngakhele i Nkosi ilathi kuyo; nginike yona ngemali egcweleyo, ukuze inhlupheko imiswe ebantwini." 
1Chronicles21:23 UOrnani wasesithi kuDavida: Zithathele, inkosi yami inkosi kayenze okuhle emehlweni ayo; khangela, ngiyanika inkabi zibe yiminikelo yokutshiswa, lezimbulo zibe zinkuni, lengqoloyi ibe ngumnikelo wokudla. Ngiyanika konke." 
1Chronicles21:24 Kodwa inkosi uDavida yathi kuOrnani: Hatshi, kodwa ngizathenga lokuthenga ngemali egcweleyo; ngoba kangiyikuthathela i Nkosi okwakho, loba nginikele iminikelo yokutshiswa ngaphandle kwentengo." 
1Chronicles21:25 UDavida wasemnika uOrnani ngaleyondawo amashekeli* angamakhulu ayisithupha egolide ngesisindo. 
1Chronicles21:26 UDavida waseyakhela khona i Nkosi ilathi, wanikela iminikelo yokutshiswa leminikelo yokuthula, wayibiza i Nkosi; yasimphendula ngomlilo ovela emazulwini phezu kwelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa." 
1Chronicles21:27 I Nkosi yasisithi engilosini kayibuyisele inkemba yayo esikhwameni sayo. 
1Chronicles21:28 Ngalesosikhathi uDavida esebonile ukuthi i Nkosi imphendule ebaleni lokubhulela likaOrnani umJebusi, wanikela khona imihlatshelo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Ngoba ithabhanekele le Nkosi uMozisi ayelenze enkangala lelathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa ngalesosikhathi kwakusendaweni ephakemeyo eGibeyoni. 
1Chronicles21:30 Kodwa uDavida wayengelakho ukuhamba phambi kwalo ukudinga uNkulunkulu, ngoba wethuswa yinkemba yengilosi ye Nkosi." 
1Chronicles22:1 UDavida wasesithi: Le yindlu ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu, laleli lilathi lomnikelo wokutshiswa kaIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles22:2 UDavida waselaya ukubuthanisa abezizweni ababeselizweni lakoIsrayeli; wamisa ababazi bamatshe ukuthi babaze amatshe alungisiweyo okwakha indlu kaNkulunkulu. 
1Chronicles22:3 UDavida waselungisa insimbi enengi kakhulu yezipikili zezivalo zamasango leyokuhlanganisa; lethusi elinengi kakhulu elalingela kulinganiswa nge sisindo; 
1Chronicles22:4 lezigodo zemisedari ezingelakubalwa; ngoba amaSidoni lamaTire amlethela uDavida izigodo zemisedari ezinengi kakhulu. 
1Chronicles22:5 UDavida wasesithi: USolomoni indodana yami u se ngumfana, uthambile, lendlu ezakwakhelwa i Nkosi kumele yenziwe ibe nkulu kakhulu, ibe lebizo ibe lodumo emazweni wonke. Ngakho ngizayilungiselela. UDavida waselungiselela kakhulu phambi kokufa kwakhe." 
1Chronicles22:6 Wasebiza uSolomoni indodana yakhe, wamlaya ukuthi akhele i Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli indlu." 
1Chronicles22:7 UDavida wasesithi kuSolomoni: Ndodana yami, mina-ke, kwakusenhliziyweni yami ukwakhela ibizo le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wami indlu." 
1Chronicles22:8 Kodwa ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lisithi: Uchithe igazi elinengi, walawula izimpi ezinkulu; kawuyikwakhela ibizo lami indlu, ngoba uchithe igazi elinengi emhlabeni phambi kwami." 
1Chronicles22:9 Khangela, uzazalelwa indodana ezakuba ngumuntu wokuphumula; njalo ngizayiphumuza ezitheni zayo zonke inhlangothi zonke: Ngoba ibizo layo lizakuba nguSolomoni, njalo ngizanika ukuthula lokuphumula phezu kukaIsrayeli ensukwini zakhe." 
1Chronicles22:10 Yena uzakwakhela ibizo lami indlu. Yena-ke uzakuba yindodana yami, lami ngibe nguyise; ngiqinise isihlalo sakhe sobukhosi phezu kukaIsrayeli kuze kube nininini." 
1Chronicles22:11 Khathesi, ndodana yami, i Nkosi ibe lawe, njalo uphumelele wakhe indlu ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho, njengokutsho kwayo ngawe." 
1Chronicles22:12 Kuphela i Nkosi ikunike inhlakanipho lokuqedisisa, ikulaye ngoIsrayeli, ukuze ulondoloze umlayo we Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho." 
1Chronicles22:13 Khona uzaphumelela, uba unanzelela ukwenza izimiso lezahlulelo i Nkosi eyakulaya uMozisi ngoIsrayeli; qina, ube lesibindi, ungesabi ungatshaywa luvalo." 
1Chronicles22:14 Khangela-ke, ekuhluphekeni kwami ngilungisele indlu ye Nkosi amathalenta* egolide ayizinkulungwane ezilikhulu, lamathalenta esiliva ayizinkulungwane eziyinkulungwane, lethusi lensimbi okungela kulinganiswa nge sisindo, ngoba kunengi kakhulu; ngilungise lezigodo lamatshe. Uzakwengezelela-ke kukho." 
1Chronicles22:15 Njalo ulezisebenzi ezinengi, ababazi bamatshe, lezingcitshi zamatshe lezezigodo, layo yonke indoda ehlakaniphileyo kuwo wonke umsebenzi." 
1Chronicles22:16 Kakulanani legolide, lelesiliva, lelethusi, lelensimbi. Sukuma usebenze; le Nkosi ibe lawe!" 
1Chronicles22:17 UDavida waselaya zonke induna zakoIsrayeli ukusiza uSolomoni indodana yakhe, esithi:" 
1Chronicles22:18 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu kayilani yini? Kambe ka yilinik anga yini ukuphumula inhlangothi zonke? Ngoba inikele abahlali belizwe esandleni sami, lelizwe lehliselwe phansi phambi kwe Nkosi laphambi kwabantu bayo." 
1Chronicles22:19 Khathesi misani inhliziyo yenu lomphefumulo wenu ukudinga i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu. Sukumani-ke lakhe indawo engcwele ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu, ukungenisa umtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi lezitsha ezingcwele zikaNkulunkulu endlini eyakhelwe ibizo le Nkosi." 
1Chronicles23:1 UDavida esemdala esanele ngensuku wamisa uSolomoni indodana yakhe ukuthi abe yinkosi phezu kukaIsrayeli. 
1Chronicles23:2 Wasebuthanisa zonke induna zakoIsrayeli labapristi lamaLevi. 
1Chronicles23:3 AmaLevi asebalwa kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amathathu kusiya phezulu; lenani lawo, ngamakhanda awo, ngamadoda, laba zinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amathathu lesificaminwembili." 
1Chronicles23:4 Kula kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane okuqondisa umsebenzi wendlu ye Nkosi; lezinduna labahluleli abayizinkulungwane eziyisithupha; 
1Chronicles23:5 labagcini bamasango abayizinkulungwane ezine; labadumisi be Nkosi abayizinkulungwane ezine ngezinto engizenzele ukudumisa, watsho uDavida." 
1Chronicles23:6 UDavida wasewehlukanisa ngezigaba, ngokwamadodana kaLevi, oGerishoni, uKohathi, loMerari." 
1Chronicles23:7 KumaGerishoni kwakungoLadani loShimeyi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Amadodana kaLadani: OJehiyeli inhloko, loZethamu, loJoweli, emathathu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Amadodana kaShimeyi: OShelomithi loHaziyeli loHarani, emathathu. La ayezinhloko zaboyise koLadani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Lamadodana kaShimeyi: OJahathi, uZiza, loJewushi, loBeriya. La ayengamadodana kaShimeyi, emane." 
1Chronicles23:11 LoJahathi wayeyinhloko, loZiza engowesibili; kodwa uJewushi loBeriya babengelabantwana abanengi, ngakho babesendlini yaboyise ngokubalwa kanye." 
1Chronicles23:12 Amadodana kaKohathi: OAmramu, uIzihari, uHebroni, loUziyeli, emane." 
1Chronicles23:13 Amadodana kaAmramu: OAroni loMozisi. UAroni wehlukaniselwa-ke ukungcwelisa izinto ezingcwelengcwele, yena lamadodana akhe kuze kube nininini, ukutshisa impepha phambi kwe Nkosi, ukuyikhonza, lokubusisa ngebizo layo kuze kube nininini." 
1Chronicles23:14 NgoMozisi umuntu kaNkulunkulu, amadodana akhe abizwa ngaphansi kwesizwe sakoLevi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Amadodana kaMozisi: OGereshoma loEliyezeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Amadodana kaGereshoma: UShebuweli inhloko. 
1Chronicles23:17 Lamadodana kaEliyezeri ayenguRehabhiya inhloko; uEliyezeri wayengelawo-ke amanye amadodana, kodwa amadodana kaRehabhiya ayemanengi okwedlulisayo." 
1Chronicles23:18 Amadodana kaIzihari: UShelomithi inhloko. 
1Chronicles23:19 Amadodana kaHebroni: OJeriya inhloko, uAmariya owesibili, uJahaziyeli owesithathu, uJekameyamu owesine." 
1Chronicles23:20 Amadodana kaUziyeli: OMika inhloko, loIshiya owesibili." 
1Chronicles23:21 Amadodana kaMerari: OMahli loMushi. Amadodana kaMahli: OEleyazare loKishi. 
1Chronicles23:22 UEleyazare wasesifa, wayengelamadodana kodwa amadodakazi; amadodana kaKishi, abafowabo, asewathatha." 
1Chronicles23:23 Amadodana kaMushi: OMahli loEderi loJeremothi, emathathu." 
1Chronicles23:24 La ngamadodana kaLevi ngendlu yaboyise, inhloko zaboyise, ngokubalwa kwawo, ngenani lamabizo, ngamakhanda awo, esenza umsebenzi wenkonzo yendlu ye Nkosi, kusukela koleminyaka engamatshumi amabili kusiya phezulu." 
1Chronicles23:25 Ngoba uDavida wathi: I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ibanikile abantu bayo ukuphumula, izahlala eJerusalema kuze kube sephakadeni." 
1Chronicles23:26 Ngokunjalo-ke kumaLevi; kakulamuntu ozathwala ithabhanekele laloba yiziphi izitsha zalo zenkonzo yalo. 
1Chronicles23:27 Ngoba ngamazwi kaDavida okucina amadodana kaLevi abhalwa kusukela kwaleminyaka engamatshumi amabili kusiya phezulu. 
1Chronicles23:28 Ngoba indawo yawo yayingasesandleni samadodana kaAroni enkonzweni yendlu ye Nkosi, phezu kwamaguma, laphezu kwamakamelo, laphezu kokuhlambulula zonke izinto ezingcwele, lomsebenzi wenkonzo yendlu kaNkulunkulu," 
1Chronicles23:29 lowezinkwa zokubukiswa, lowempuphu ecolekileyo yomnikelo wokudla, lowezinkwana eziyizipatalala ezingelamvubelo, low okubhakwe ngepani, lowokukhanzingiweyo, lowesilinganiso sonke lobukhulu;" 
1Chronicles23:30 lokuma ukusa ngokusa ukubonga lokudumisa i Nkosi, kanjalo lantambama," 
1Chronicles23:31 lokunikela konke kweminikelo yokutshiswa e Nkosi ni ngamasabatha, ngokuthwasa kwenyanga, langemikhosi emisiweyo, ngenani, ngokwesimiso kukho, njalonjalo phambi kwe Nkosi." 
1Chronicles23:32 Njalo azagcina umlindo wethente lenhlangano, lomlindo wendlu engcwele, lomlindo wamadodana kaAroni, abafowabo, enkonzweni yendlu ye Nkosi." 
1Chronicles24:1 Njalo izigaba zamadodana kaAroni. Amadodana kaAroni: ONadabi, loAbihu, uEleyazare, loIthamari." 
1Chronicles24:2 Kodwa oNadabi loAbihu bafa mandulo kuloyise, njalo bengelabantwana; ngakho oEleyazare loIthamari basebenza njengabapristi." 
1Chronicles24:3 UDavida wasebehlukanisa, loZadoki emadodaneni kaEleyazare, loAhimeleki emadodaneni kaIthamari, ngokwesikhundla sabo enkonzweni yabo." 
1Chronicles24:4 Kwatholakala emadodaneni kaEleyazare inhloko zamaqhawe amanengi okwedlula emadodaneni kaIthamari mhla bewehlukanisa; emadodaneni kaEleyazare kwakulenhloko ezilitshumi lesithupha zendlu yaboyise, lemadodaneni kaIthamari ngokwendlu yaboyise, eziyisificaminwembili." 
1Chronicles24:5 Basebezehlukanisa ngezinkatho, lezi laleziyana, ngoba izinduna zendlu engcwele lezinduna zikaNkulunkulu zazivela emadodaneni kaEleyazare lemadodaneni kaIthamari." 
1Chronicles24:6 UShemaya indodana kaNethaneli umbhali, ovela kumaLevi, wasezibhala phambi kwenkosi leziphathamandla loZadoki umpristi loAhimeleki indodana kaAbhiyatha, lenhloko zaboyise zabapristi lezamaLevi; indlu kayise eyodwa yathathelwa uEleyazare, leyodwa yathathelwa uIthamari." 
1Chronicles24:7 Inkatho yokuqala yasiphumela uJehoyaribi, eyesibili uJedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 eyesithathu uHarimi, eyesine uSeworimi," 
1Chronicles24:9 eyesihlanu uMalikiya, eyesithupha uMijamini," 
1Chronicles24:10 eyesikhombisa uHakhozi, eyesificaminwembili uAbhiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 eyesificamunwemunye uJeshuwa, eyetshumi uShekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 eyetshumi lanye uEliyashibi, eyetshumi lambili uJakimi," 
1Chronicles24:13 eyetshumi lantathu uHupha, eyetshumi lane uJeshebeyabi," 
1Chronicles24:14 eyetshumi lanhlanu uBiliga, eyetshumi lesithupha uImeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 eyetshumi lesikhombisa uHeziri, eyetshumi lesificaminwembili uHaphizezi," 
1Chronicles24:16 eyetshumi lesificamunwemunye uPhethahiya, eyamatshumi amabili uJehezekeli" 
1Chronicles24:17 eyamatshumi amabili lanye uJakini, eyamatshumi amabili lambili uGamuli," 
1Chronicles24:18 eyamatshumi amabili lantathu uDelaya, eyamatshumi amabili lane uMahaziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Isikhundla salaba enkonzweni yabo sasiyikungena endlini ye Nkosi ngokwesimiso sabo ngesandla sikaAroni uyise, njengalokho i Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli yayimlayile." 
1Chronicles24:20 Labaseleyo emadodaneni kaLevi: Emadodaneni kaAmramu: NguShubayeli; emadodaneni kaShubayeli: NguJehideya. 
1Chronicles24:21 NgoRehabhiya: Emadodaneni kaRehabhiya, inhloko kwakunguIshiya;" 
1Chronicles24:22 kwabakoIzihari, uShelomothi; emadodaneni kaShelomothi, uJahathi." 
1Chronicles24:23 Lamadodana kaHebroni, uJeriya owokuqala, uAmariya owesibili, uJahaziyeli owesithathu, uJekameyamu owesine." 
1Chronicles24:24 Amadodana kaUziyeli, uMika; emadodaneni kaMika, uShamiri." 
1Chronicles24:25 Umfowabo kaMika nguIshiya; emadodaneni kaIshiya, uZekariya." 
1Chronicles24:26 Amadodana kaMerari: OMahli loMushi; amadodana kaJahaziya: UBheno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Amadodana kaMerari: KuJahaziya: OBheno loShohama loZakuri loIbiri. 
1Chronicles24:28 KuMahli: UEleyazare, owayengelamadodana." 
1Chronicles24:29 NgoKishi: Amadodana kaKishi: UJerameli. 
1Chronicles24:30 Lamadodana kaMushi: OMahli loEderi loJerimothi. La ngamadodana amaLevi ngokwendlu yaboyise. 
1Chronicles24:31 Lalaba labo benza inkatho yokuphosa njengabafowabo, amadodana kaAroni, phambi kukaDavida inkosi loZadoki loAhimeleki lenhloko zaboyise babapristi labamaLevi, inhloko yaboyise njengomfowabo omnciyane." 
1Chronicles25:1 UDavida lenduna zebutho behlukanisela-ke inkonzo emadodaneni kaAsafi lakaHemani lakaJeduthuni, abaprofetha ngamachacho, ngezigubhu zezintambo, langensimbi ezincencethayo. Lenani lamadoda omsebenzi lalinjengokwenkonzo yawo:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Emadodaneni kaAsafi: OZakuri loJosefa loNethaniya loAsarela, amadodana kaAsafi, esandleni sikaAsafi, owaprofetha ngokwesandla senkosi." 
1Chronicles25:3 NgoJeduthuni: Amadodana kaJeduthuni: OGedaliya, loZeri, loJeshaya, uHashabiya, loMathithiya, beyisithupha, ezandleni zikayise uJeduthuni, owayeprofetha ngechacho, ukubonga lokudumisa i Nkosi." 
1Chronicles25:4 NgoHemani: Amadodana kaHemani: OBukhiya, uMathaniya, uUziyeli, uShebuweli, loJerimothi, uHananiya, uHanani, uEliyatha, uGidaliti, loRomamiti-Ezeri, uJoshibekasha, uMaloti, uHothiri, uMahaziyothi." 
1Chronicles25:5 Bonke laba babengamadodana kaHemani umboni wenkosi emazwini kaNkulunkulu ukuphakamisa uphondo. Njalo uNkulunkulu wamnika uHemani amadodana alitshumi lane lamadodakazi amathathu. 
1Chronicles25:6 Bonke laba babesezandleni zikayise ekuhlabeleleni endlini ye Nkosi ngensimbi ezincencethayo, izigubhu zezintambo, lamachacho enkonzweni yendlu kaNkulunkulu, esandleni senkosi, oAsafi loJeduthuni loHemani." 
1Chronicles25:7 Lenani labo kanye labafowabo ababefundiswe ngezingoma ze Nkosi, bonke ababelolwazi, lalingamakhulu amabili lamatshumi ayisificaminwembili lesificaminwembili." 
1Chronicles25:8 Basebesenza inkatho yokuphosa ngomlindo, omncinyane njengomkhulu, ofundisayo lofundayo." 
1Chronicles25:9 Inkatho yokuqala yasiphumela uAsafi kuJosefa; eyesibili kuGedaliya, yena labafowabo lamadodana akhe, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:10 eyesithathu uZakuri, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:11 eyesine kuIziri, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:12 eyesihlanu uNethaniya, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:13 eyesithupha uBukhiya, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:14 eyesikhombisa uAsarela, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:15 eyesificaminwembili uJeshaya, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:16 eyesificamunwemunye uMathaniya, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:17 eyetshumi uShimeyi, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:18 eyetshumi lanye uAzareli, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:19 eyetshumi lambili kuHashabiya, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:20 eyetshumi lantathu uShebuweli, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:21 eyetshumi lane uMathithiya, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:22 eyetshumi lanhlanu kuJeremothi, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:23 eyetshumi lesithupha kuHananiya, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:24 eyetshumi lesikhombisa kuJoshibekasha, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:25 eyetshumi lesificaminwembili kuHanani, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:26 eyetshumi lesificamunwemunye kuMalothi, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:27 eyamatshumi amabili kuEliyatha, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:28 eyamatshumi amabili lanye kuHothiri, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:29 eyamatshumi amabili lambili kuGidaliti, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:30 eyamatshumi amabili lantathu kuMahaziyothi, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili;" 
1Chronicles25:31 eyamatshumi amabili lane kuRomamiti-Ezeri, amadodana akhe labafowabo, belitshumi lambili." 
1Chronicles26:1 Ngezigaba zabalindi bamasango. KwabakoKora kwakunguMeshelemiya indodana kaKore wamadodana kaAsafi. 
1Chronicles26:2 LoMeshelemiya wayelamadodana, uZekariya izibulo, uJediyayeli owesibili, uZebhadiya owesithathu, uJathiniyeli owesine," 
1Chronicles26:3 uElamu owesihlanu, uJehohanani owesithupha, uEliyohenayi owesikhombisa." 
1Chronicles26:4 UObedi-Edoma laye wayelamadodana, uShemaya izibulo, uJehozabadi owesibili, uJowa owesithathu, uSakari owesine, loNethaneli owesihlanu," 
1Chronicles26:5 uAmiyeli owesithupha, uIsakari owesikhombisa, uPhewulethayi owesificaminwembili; ngoba uNkulunkulu wayembusisile." 
1Chronicles26:6 LakuShemaya indodana yakhe kwazalwa amadodana abusa jikelele endlini kayise, ngoba ayengamaqhawe alamandla." 
1Chronicles26:7 Amadodana kaShemaya: O-Othini, loRefayeli, loObedi, uElizabadi, abafowabo, amadodana alamandla, oElihu loSemakhiya." 
1Chronicles26:8 Bonke laba babengabamadodana kaObedi-Edoma, bona lamadodana abo labafowabo, amadoda alamandla emandleni omsebenzi, bengamatshumi ayisithupha lambili bakoObedi-Edoma." 
1Chronicles26:9 Njalo uMeshelemiya wayelamadodana labafowabo, amadodana alamandla, elitshumi lesificaminwembili." 
1Chronicles26:10 UHosha laye emadodaneni kaMerari wayelamadodana, uShimiri inhloko (lanxa wayengesilo izibulo, kodwa uyise wamenza waba yinhloko);" 
1Chronicles26:11 uHilikhiya owesibili, uTebaliya owesithathu, uZekariya owesine; wonke amadodana labafowabo bakaHosa babelitshumi lantathu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Phakathi kwalabo kwakulezigaba zabalindi bamasango; izinhloko zamadoda zilemilandu njengabafowabo, ukukhonza endlini ye Nkosi." 
1Chronicles26:13 Basebesenza inkatho yokuphosa, omncinyane laye njengomkhulu, ngokwendlu yaboyise, besenzela isango lesango." 
1Chronicles26:14 Inkatho yempumalanga yawela-ke phezu kukaShelemiya; basebesenza inkatho yokuphosa ngoZekariya indodana yakhe, umeluleki ohlakaniphileyo; inkatho yakhe yasiphuma ngenyakatho." 
1Chronicles26:15 KuObedi-Edoma ngeningizimu; lakumadodana akhe, isiphala." 
1Chronicles26:16 KuShupimi lakuHosa ngentshonalanga, lesango iShalekethi elisemgwaqweni omkhulu oya phezulu, umlindi ngomlindi." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ngempumalanga kwakulamaLevi ayisithupha, ngenyakatho abane ngosuku, ngeningizimu abane ngosuku, leziphaleni ababili ng ababili;" 
1Chronicles26:18 eParibari ngentshonalanga, abane emgwaqweni omkhulu, ababili eParibari." 
1Chronicles26:19 Lezi yizigaba zabalindi bamasango bamadodana amaKora labamadodana kaMerari. 
1Chronicles26:20 LakumaLevi, uAhiya wayephethe izinto eziligugu zendlu kaNkulunkulu, njalo wayephethe izinto eziligugu zezinto ezingcwele." 
1Chronicles26:21 Amadodana kaLadani, abantwana bomGerishoni uLadani, kaLadani umGerishoni, inhloko zaboyise zazingoJehiyeli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Amadodana kaJehiyeli: UZethamu, loJoweli umfowabo, babephethe izinto eziligugu zendlu ye Nkosi" 
1Chronicles26:23 kumaAmramu, kumaIzihari, kumaHebroni, kumaUziyeli." 
1Chronicles26:24 LoShebuweli indodana kaGereshoma indodana kaMozisi wayeyisiphathamandla phezu kwezinto eziligugu. 
1Chronicles26:25 Labafowabo abakaEliyezeri: ORehabhiya indodana yakhe, loJeshaya indodana yakhe, loJoramu indodana yakhe, loZikiri indodana yakhe, loShelomithi indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles26:26 UShelomithi lo labafowabo babephethe zonke izinto eziligugu zezinto ezingcwele uDavida inkosi ayezingcwelisile, lenhloko zaboyise, lenduna zezinkulungwane lezamakhulu, labalawulimabutho." 
1Chronicles26:27 Kokwempi lokwempangweni bakungcwelisela ukulungisa indlu ye Nkosi. 
1Chronicles26:28 Lakho konke uSamuweli umboni ayekungcwelisile, loSawuli indodana kaKishi loAbineri indodana kaNeri loJowabi indodana kaZeruya; konke okwakungcwelisiwe kwakungaphansi kwesandla sikaShelomithi labafowabo." 
1Chronicles26:29 KumaIzihari uKenaniya lamadodana akhe babengabomsebenzi wangaphandle phezu kukaIsrayeli, beyizinduna bengabahluleli." 
1Chronicles26:30 KumaHebroni uHashabiya labafowabo, amadoda alamandla, ayinkulungwane lamakhulu ayisikhombisa, babephethe iziphathamandla zakoIsrayeli nganeno kweJordani ngentshonalanga, emsebenzini wonke kaJehova lenkonzweni yenkosi." 
1Chronicles26:31 KumaHebroni uJeriya wayeyinhloko, kumaHebroni, ngokwezizukulwana zaboyise. Ngomnyaka wamatshumi amane wokubusa kukaDavida adingwa, kwasekutholwa phakathi kwawo amaqhawe alamandla eJazere yeGileyadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Labafowabo amadoda alamandla ayezinkulungwane ezimbili lamakhulu ayisikhombisa, inhloko zezindlu. UDavida inkosi wasebenza abaphathi phezu kwabakoRubeni labakoGadi lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase ezintweni zonke zikaNkulunkulu lezinto zenkosi." 
1Chronicles27:1 Njalo abantwana bakoIsrayeli ngenani labo, inhloko zaboyise, lezinduna zezinkulungwane lezamakhulu, leziphathamandla zabo ezazisebenzela inkosi ezindabeni zonke zezigaba, ezazingena ziphuma inyanga ngenyanga enyangeni zonke zomnyaka; leso lalesosigaba sasilezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane." 
1Chronicles27:2 Phezu kwesigaba sokuqala ngenyanga yokuqala kwakunguJashobeyamu indodana kaZabidiyeli; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:3 Wayengowamadodana kaPerezi, inhloko yabo bonke abaphathi bebutho ngenyanga yokuqala." 
1Chronicles27:4 Laphezu kwesigaba senyanga yesibili kwakunguDodayi umAhohi; l e sigab eni sakhe uMikilothi laye wayeyinduna; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:5 Induna yesithathu yebutho ngenyanga yesithathu yayinguBhenaya indodana kaJehoyada umpristi omkhulu; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:6 UBhenaya lo wayeliqhawe labangamatshumi amathathu, laphezu kwabangamatshumi amathathu. La ku sigaba sakhe kwakuloAmizabadi indodana yakhe." 
1Chronicles27:7 Eyesine ngenyanga yesine yayinguAsaheli umfowabo kaJowabi, loZebhadiya indodana yakhe emva kwakhe; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane." 
1Chronicles27:8 Eyesihlanu ngenyanga yesihlanu yayingumphathi uShamihuthi umIzira; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:9 Eyesithupha ngenyanga yesithupha yayinguIra indodana kaIkheshi umThekhowa; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:10 Eyesikhombisa ngenyanga yesikhombisa yayinguHelezi umPheloni wamadodana akoEfrayimi; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:11 Eyesificaminwembili ngenyanga yesificaminwembili yayinguSibekayi umHushathi wabakoZera; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:12 Eyesificamunwemunye ngenyanga yesificamunwemunye yayinguAbiyezeri umAnathothi wabakoBhenjamini; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:13 Eyetshumi ngenyanga yetshumi yayinguMaharayi umNetofa wabakoZera; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:14 Eyetshumi lanye ngenyanga yetshumi lanye yayinguBhenaya umPirathoni wabantwana bakoEfrayimi; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:15 Eyetshumi lambili ngenyanga yetshumi lambili yayinguHelidayi umNetofa wakoOthiniyeli; lesigabeni sakhe kwakulezinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lane. 
1Chronicles27:16 Laphezu kwezizwe zakoIsrayeli: Umbusi wabakoRubeni kwakunguEliyezeri indodana kaZikiri. KwabakoSimeyoni, uShefethiya indodana kaMahaka." 
1Chronicles27:17 KwabakoLevi, uHashabiya indodana kaKemuweli; kwabakoAroni, uZadoki." 
1Chronicles27:18 KoJuda, uElihu wabafowabo bakaDavida. KoIsakari, uOmri indodana kaMikayeli." 
1Chronicles27:19 KoZebuluni, uIshmaya indodana kaObadiya. KoNafithali, uJerimothi indodana kaAziriyeli." 
1Chronicles27:20 Ebantwaneni bakoEfrayimi, uHosheya indodana kaAzaziya. Engxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yesizwe sakoManase, uJoweli indodana kaPedaya." 
1Chronicles27:21 Engxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yakoManase eGileyadi, uIdo indodana kaZekariya. KoBhenjamini, uJahasiyeli indodana kaAbineri." 
1Chronicles27:22 KoDani, uAzareli indodana kaJerohamu. Laba babeyiziphathamandla zezizwe zakoIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles27:23 Kodwa uDavida kathathanga inani lalabo abaleminyaka engamatshumi amabili langaphansi, ngoba i Nkosi yayithe izakwengeza uIsrayeli njengenkanyezi zamazulu." 
1Chronicles27:24 UJowabi indodana kaZeruya waqalisa ukubala, kodwa kaqedanga; ngoba kwaba khona ulaka phezu kukaIsrayeli ngenxa yalokho; ngakho inani kalifakwanga ekulandiseni kwemilando yenkosi uDavida." 
1Chronicles27:25 Laphezu kwezinto eziligugu zenkosi kwakuloAzimavethi indodana kaAdiyeli; laphezu kwezinto eziligugu ensimini, emizini, lemizaneni, lezinqabeni kwakuloJonathani indodana kaUziya." 
1Chronicles27:26 Laphezu kwabenza umsebenzi wensimu, wokulinywa komhlabathi, kwakuloEziri indodana kaKelubi." 
1Chronicles27:27 Laphezu kwezivini kwakuloShimeyi umRama. Laphezu kokwezivini eziphaleni zewayini kwakuloZabidi umShefama. 
1Chronicles27:28 Laphezu kwezihlahla zemihlwathi lemikhiwa yesikhamore ezisesihotsheni kwakuloBhali-Hanani umGederi. Laphezu kweziphala zamafutha kwakuloJowashi. 
1Chronicles27:29 Laphezu kwezinkomo ezazisidla eSharoni kwakuloShitirayi umSharoni. Laphezu kwezinkomo ezazisezigodini kwakuloShafati indodana kaAdilayi. 
1Chronicles27:30 Laphezu kwamakamela kwakuloObili umIshmayeli. Laphezu kwabobabhemikazi kwakuloJehideya umMeronothi. 
1Chronicles27:31 Laphezu kwemihlambi kwakuloJaziri umHagiri. Bonke labo babengabaphathi bempahla inkosi uDavida ayelayo. 
1Chronicles27:32 UJonathani, uyise omdala kaDavida, wayengumeluleki, indoda ehlakaniphileyo, njalo wayengumbhali; loJehiyeli indodana kaHakimoni wayelabantwana benkosi." 
1Chronicles27:33 Njalo uAhithofeli wayengumeluleki wenkosi, loHushayi umArki wayengumngane wenkosi." 
1Chronicles27:34 Lemva kukaAhithofeli kwakuloJehoyada indodana kaBhenaya loAbhiyatha. Lomphathi webutho lenkosi kwakunguJowabi. 
1Chronicles28:1 UDavida wasebuthanisa zonke iziphathamandla zakoIsrayeli, iziphathamandla zezizwe, lezinduna zezigaba ezazisebenzela inkosi, labaphathi bezinkulungwane, labaphathi bamakhulu, labaphathi bempahla yonke labezifuyo zenkosi labezamadodana ayo, labathenwa, lamaqhawe, lawo wonke amaqhawe alamandla, eJerusalema." 
1Chronicles28:2 UDavida inkosi wasesima ngenyawo zakhe wathi: Ngilalelani, bafowethu labantu bami. Mina, kwakusenhliziyweni yami ukwakhela umtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi indlu yokuphumula, leyisigcabha senyawo zikaNkulunkulu wethu, ngenza amalungiselelo okwakha." 
1Chronicles28:3 Kodwa uNkulunkulu wathi kimi: Kawuyikulakhela ibizo lami indlu, ngoba wena ungumuntu wempi, uchithe igazi elinengi." 
1Chronicles28:4 Kanti i Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli yangikhetha kuyo yonke indlu kababa ukuthi ngibe yinkosi phezu kukaIsrayeli kuze kube nininini; ngoba yakhetha uJuda ukuba ngumbusi, lendlini yakoJuda indlu kababa; laphakathi kwamadodana kababa yangithanda uku ng enza ngi be yinkosi phezu kukaIsrayeli wonke." 
1Chronicles28:5 Lakuwo wonke amadodana ami (ngoba i Nkosi yanginika amadodana amanengi) yakhetha uSolomoni indodana yami ukuthi ahlale esihlalweni sobukhosi sombuso we Nkosi phezu kukaIsrayeli. 
1Chronicles28:6 Yasisithi kimi: USolomoni indodana yakho nguye ozakwakha indlu yami lamaguma ami, ngoba ngimkhethile ukuba yindodana yami, lami ngizakuba nguyise." 
1Chronicles28:7 Njalo ngizawuqinisa umbuso wakhe kuze kube nininini uba eqina ukwenza imilayo yami lezahlulelo zami njengalamuhla. 
1Chronicles28:8 Ngakho-ke phambi kwamehlo kaIsrayeli wonke, ibandla le Nkosi, lendlebeni zikaNkulunkulu wethu, gcinani lidinge yonke imilayo ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu, ukuze lidle ilifa lalelilizwe elihle, lenze abantwana benu badle ilifa lalo emva kwenu kuze kube nininini." 
1Chronicles28:9 Wena-ke, Solomoni ndodana yami, mazi uNkulunkulu kayihlo, umkhonze ngenhliziyo epheleleyo langengqondo evumayo; ngoba i Nkosi iyazihlola zonke inhliziyo, iqedisise konke ukuzindla kwemicabango. Uba uyidinga, izatholwa nguwe; kodwa uba uyitshiya, izakulahla kokuphela." 
1Chronicles28:10 Bona-ke, ngoba i Nkosi ikukhethile ukuthi wakhe indlu ibe yindlu engcwele; qina, ukwenze." 
1Chronicles28:11 UDavida wasenika uSolomoni indodana yakhe umdwebo wekhulusi, lowezindlu zalo, loweziphala zezinto eziligugu, lowamakamelo aphezulu, lowamakamelo aphakathi, lowendlu yesihlalo somusa." 
1Chronicles28:12 Lomdwebo wakho konke ayelakho ngoMoya, lowamaguma endlu ye Nkosi, lowamakamelo wonke azingelezeleyo, loweziphala zezinto eziligugu zendlu kaNkulunkulu, loweziphala zokuligugu zezinto ezingcwele," 
1Chronicles28:13 lowezigaba zabapristi lezamaLevi, lowomsebenzi wonke wenkonzo yendlu ye Nkosi, lowezitsha zonke zenkonzo yendlu ye Nkosi." 
1Chronicles28:14 Wapha igolide ngesisindo nge zinto ze golide, ngempahla yonke yenkonzo ngenkonzo, ngempahla yonke yesiliva ngesisindo, ngempahla yonke yenkonzo ngenkonzo," 
1Chronicles28:15 lesisindo sezinti zesibane zegolide, lezibane zazo zegolide, ngesisindo soluthi lwesibane ngalunye lezibane zalo, langezinti zesibane zesiliva, ngesisindo soluthi lwesibane lezibane zalo, njengomsebenzi woluthi lwesibane ngalunye." 
1Chronicles28:16 Wa se nika igolide ngesisindo lamatafula ezinkwa zokubukiswa, ngalelo lalelotafula, lesiliva samatafula esiliva." 
1Chronicles28:17 Lamafologwe lemiganu yokufafaza lezinkezo zegolide elicwengekileyo, langezitsha zegolide ngesisindo saleso lalesositsha, langezitsha zesiliva ngesisindo saleso lalesositsha." 
1Chronicles28:18 Langelathi lempepha igolide elicwengekileyo ngesisindo, langomdwebo wenqola yamakherubi* egolide elule impiko agubuzela umtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi." 
1Chronicles28:19 UDavida wathi: Konke lokhu i Nkosi yenza ngi kuqedisise ngombhalo ngesandla sayo phezu kwami, yonke imisebenzi yomdwebo." 
1Chronicles28:20 UDavida wasesithi kuSolomoni indodana yakhe: Qina, ube lesibindi, usebenze; ungesabi, ungatshaywa luvalo; ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu wami, ilawe. Kayisoze yakulahla, kayisoze yakutshiya, uze uqede umsebenzi wonke wenkonzo yendlu ye Nkosi." 
1Chronicles28:21 Khangela-ke, izigaba zabapristi lezamaLevi zenkonzo yonke yendlu kaNkulunkulu; njalo kukhona lawe kuwo wonke umsebenzi wonke oyingcitshi ovumayo kuyo yonke inkonzo, labaphathi labo bonke abantu bazakuba njengokulaya kwakho konke." 
1Chronicles29:1 UDavida inkosi wasesithi ebandleni lonke: USolomoni indodana yami, oyedwa uNkulunkulu amkhethileyo, u se ngumfana uthambile, lomsebenzi mkhulu; ngoba isigodlo kayisiso somuntu, kodwa ngese Nkosi uNkulunkulu." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ngakho ngiyilungisele indlu kaNkulunkulu wami ngamandla ami wonke, igolide lo kwe golide, lesiliva lo kwe siliva, lethusi lo kwe thusi, insimbi lo kwe nsimbi, lezigodo lo kwe zigodo, amatshe e-onikse* lawokubekwa, amatshe okucecisa lalemibala, lenhlobo zonke zamatshe aligugu, lamatshe e-alibasta* ngobunengi." 
1Chronicles29:3 Laphezu kwakho, ngenxa yokuthanda kwami indlu kaNkulunkulu wami, nganikela indlu kaNkulunkulu wami inotho yegolide leyesiliva engilayo, phezu kwakho konke engikulungisele indlu yendawo engcwele," 
1Chronicles29:4 amathalenta* egolide azinkulungwane ezintathu egolideni leOfiri, lamathalenta* esiliva elicwengekileyo azinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa, ukuhuqa imiduli yezindlu." 
1Chronicles29:5 Igolide kusenzelwa okwe golide, lesiliva kusenzelwa okwe siliva, langawo wonke umsebenzi ngesandla sezingcitshi. Ngubani-ke ovumayo ukuzehlukanisela i Nkosi lamuhla?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Inhloko zaboyise zasezinikela ngesihle, lezinduna zezizwe zakoIsrayeli, labaphathi bezinkulungwane labamakhulu, labaphathi bomsebenzi wenkosi." 
1Chronicles29:7 Basebenikela emsebenzini wendlu kaNkulunkulu amathalenta* azinkulungwane ezinhlanu egolide, lenhlamvu ezizinkulungwane ezilitshumi, lamathalenta* esiliva azinkulungwane ezilitshumi, lamathalenta* ethusi azinkulungwane ezilitshumi lesificaminwembili, lamathalenta* ensimbi azinkulungwane ezilikhulu." 
1Chronicles29:8 Lalabo okwatholwa kibo amatshe aligugu bawanika indlu yokuligugu yendlu ye Nkosi ngaphansi kwesandla sikaJehiyeli umGerishoni. 
1Chronicles29:9 Basebethokoza abantu ngokunikela kwabo ngesihle, ngoba ngenhliziyo epheleleyo babenikele ngothando kuNkulunkulu; loDavida inkosi laye wathokoza ngentokozo enkulu." 
1Chronicles29:10 UDavida waseyibusisa i Nkosi phambi kwamehlo ebandla lonke; uDavida wathi: Kawubusiswe wena Nkosi Nkulunkulu kaIsrayeli ubaba, kusukela ephakadeni kuze kube sephakadeni." 
1Chronicles29:11 Kungokwakho, Nkosi, ubukhulu lamandla lodumo lokunqoba lobukhosi; ngoba konke okusemazulwini lokusemhlabeni kungokwakho; umbuso ungowakho, Nkosi; wena uziphakamisile waba yinhloko phezu kwakho konke." 
1Chronicles29:12 Lenotho lodumo kuvela phambi kwakho, wena-ke ubusa phezu kwakho konke; lesandleni sakho kukhona ukuqina lamandla, lesandleni sakho kukhona ukukhulisa lokupha amandla kubo bonke." 
1Chronicles29:13 Ngakho-ke Nkulunkulu wethu, siyakubonga, silidumise ibizo lakho elilodumo." 
1Chronicles29:14 Ngoba mina-ke ngingubani, labantu bami bangobani, ukuthi sithole amandla okunika ngothando ngokunje? Ngoba konke kuvela kuwe, sinikele kuwe okuvela esandleni sakho." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ngoba singabemzini phambi kwakho labahlala njengabezizwe njengabo bonke obaba; insuku zethu emhlabeni zinjengesithunzi, kalikho ithemba." 
1Chronicles29:16 Nkosi Nkulunkulu wethu, konke lokhu okunengi, esikulungisele ukwakhela wena indlu, kusenzelwa ibizo lakho elingcwele, kuvela esandleni sakho, njalo konke kungokwakho." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ngiyazi-ke, Nkulunkulu wami, ukuthi wena uhlola inhliziyo, uyabuthanda ubuqotho. Mina, ebuqothweni benhliziyo yami nginikele ngesihle zonke lezizinto; khathesi sengibonile ngentokozo abantu bakho abatholakala lapha ukuthi banikela kuwe ngesihle." 
1Chronicles29:18 Nkosi, Nkulunkulu kaAbrahama, uIsaka, loIsrayeli, obaba, gcina lokho laphakade ekuzindleni kweminakano yenhliziyo yabantu bakho, ulungise inhliziyo yabo kuwe." 
1Chronicles29:19 Njalo unike uSolomoni indodana yami inhliziyo epheleleyo ukugcina imilayo yakho, ubufakazi bakho, lezimiso zakho, lokwenza konke, lokwakha isigodlo engisilungise le leyo." 
1Chronicles29:20 UDavida wasesithi kulo lonke ibandla: Khathesi busisani i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu. Ibandla lonke laselibusisa i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu waboyise; bakhothama bamkhonza uJehova, lenkosi." 
1Chronicles29:21 Basebehlabela imihlatshelo e Nkosi ni, banikela iminikelo yokutshiswa e Nkosi ni, ngokusa kwalolosuku, amajongosi azinkulungwane, izinqama eziyinkulungwane, amawundlu ayinkulungwane, kanye leminikelo yabo yokunathwayo, lemihlatshelo ngobunengi ngoIsrayeli wonke." 
1Chronicles29:22 Basebesidla banatha phambi kwe Nkosi ngalolosuku ngentokozo enkulu. Basebembeka okwesibili uSolomoni indodana kaDavida ukuthi abe yinkosi, ba m gcobela i Nkosi waba ngumkhokheli, loZadoki waba ngumpristi." 
1Chronicles29:23 USolomoni wasehlala esihlalweni sobukhosi sikaJehova njengenkosi esikhundleni sikaDavida uyise, waphumelela; loIsrayeli wonke wamlalela." 
1Chronicles29:24 Lazo zonke izinduna lamaqhawe kanye lawo wonke amadodana enkosi uDavida bazehlisela ngaphansi kukaSolomoni inkosi. 
1Chronicles29:25 I Nkosi yasimphakamisa uSolomoni kakhulu phambi kwamehlo kaIsrayeli wonke, yamnika ubukhosi bombuso obungazanga bube khona lakuyiphi inkosi ngaphambi kwakhe koIsrayeli." 
1Chronicles29:26 Ngokunjalo uDavida indodana kaJese wayebuse phezu kukaIsrayeli wonke. 
1Chronicles29:27 Lensuku abusa ngazo phezu kukaIsrayeli zaziyiminyaka engamatshumi amane; eHebroni wabusa iminyaka eyisikhombisa, leJerusalema wabusa iminyaka engamatshumi amathathu lantathu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Wasesifa eseluphele kuhle, enele ngezinsuku, inotho lodumo; uSolomoni indodana yakhe wasebusa esikhundleni sakhe." 
1Chronicles29:29 Lezindaba zikaDavida inkosi, ezokuqala lezokucina, khangela, zibhaliwe egwalweni lwezindaba zikaSamuweli umboni legwalweni lwezindaba zikaNathani umprofethi legwalweni lwezindaba zikaGadi umboni," 
1Chronicles29:30 kanye lakho konke ukubusa kwakhe lamandla akhe, lezikhathi ezedlula phezu kwakhe laphezu kukaIsrayeli laphezu kwayo yonke imibuso yamazwe." 
2Chronicles1:1 USolomoni indodana kaDavida waseqina embusweni wakhe, le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakhe yayilaye, yamenza waba mkhulu kakhulu." 
2Chronicles1:2 USolomoni wasekhuluma kuIsrayeli wonke, kubaphathi bezinkulungwane labamakhulu, lakubahluleli, lakuzo zonke induna kuIsrayeli wonke, inhloko zaboyise." 
2Chronicles1:3 USolomoni lebandla lonke laye basebesiya endaweni ephakemeyo eyayiseGibeyoni; ngoba kwakukhona lapho ithente lenhlangano kaNkulunkulu uMozisi inceku ye Nkosi alenzayo enkangala. 
2Chronicles1:4 Kodwa uDavida wayewenyusile umtshokotsho kaNkulunkulu uvela eKiriyathi-Jeyarimi, wawusa lapho uDavida ayewulungisele khona, ngoba wayewumisele ithente eJerusalema." 
2Chronicles1:5 Lelathi lethusi, uBhezaleli indodana kaUri indodana kaHuri ayelenzile, walibeka phambi kwethabhanekele le Nkosi; uSolomoni lebandla badinga-ke kulo." 
2Chronicles1:6 USolomoni wasesenyukela lapho elathini lethusi phambi kwe Nkosi elalisethenteni lenhlangano, wanikela phezu kwalo iminikelo yokutshiswa eyinkulungwane." 
2Chronicles1:7 Ngalobobusuku uNkulunkulu wabonakala kuSolomoni, wathi kuye: Cela engingakupha khona." 
2Chronicles1:8 USolomoni wasesithi kuNkulunkulu: Wena wenzele uDavida ubaba umusa omkhulu, wangenza ngaba yinkosi esikhundleni sakhe." 
2Chronicles1:9 Khathesi, Nkosi Nkulunkulu, kaliqiniswe ilizwi lakho kuDavida ubaba, ngoba wena ungenze ngaba yinkosi phezu kwabantu abanengi ngangothuli lomhlabathi." 
2Chronicles1:10 Khathesi ngipha inhlakanipho lolwazi ukuze ngiphume ngingene phambi kwalababantu; ngoba ngubani ongehlulela lababantu bakho abakhulu kangaka? 
2Chronicles1:11 UNkulunkulu wasesithi kuSolomoni: Ngenxa yokuthi lokhu bekusenhliziyweni yakho, njalo ungacelanga inotho, ingcebo, lodumo, lempilo yezitha zakho, futhi ungacelanga insuku ezinengi, kodwa uzicelele inhlakanipho lolwazi ukuze wahlulele abantu bami engikwenze waba yinkosi phezu kwabo:" 
2Chronicles1:12 Inhlakanipho lolwazi ukuphiwe; ngizakunika futhi inotho lengcebo lodumo, angazange abe lakho okunjalo amakhosi ayengaphambi kwakho, langemva kwakho kakuyikuba khona okunjalo." 
2Chronicles1:13 Wasebuya uSolomoni evela endaweni ephakemeyo eseGibeyoni waya eJerusalema, evela phambi kwethente lenhlangano; wasebusa phezu kukaIsrayeli." 
2Chronicles1:14 USolomoni wasebuthanisa izinqola labagadi bamabhiza; wayelezinqola ezingamakhulu alitshumi lane, labagadi bamabhiza abazinkulungwane ezilitshumi lambili; wasekubeka emizini yezinqola, njalo lenkosini eJerusalema."
