Nehemiah13:2 ngoba bengahlangabezanga abantwana bakoIsrayeli ngesinkwa langamanzi, kodwa baqatsha bemelene labo uBalami, ukubaqalekisa; kodwa uNkulunkulu wethu waphendula isiqalekiso saba yisibusiso." 
Nehemiah13:3 Kwasekusithi sebewuzwile umlayo behlukanisa koIsrayeli yonke ingxubevange yezizwe. 
Nehemiah13:4 Ngaphambi kwalokho-ke uEliyashibi umpristi owayemiswe phezu kwekamelo likaNkulunkulu wethu, wayeyisihlobo sikaTobiya." 
Nehemiah13:5 Wayemlungisele ikamelo elikhulu lapho ababekade befaka khona umnikelo wokudla, impepha, lezitsha, lokwetshumi kwamabele, iwayini elitsha, lamafutha, okwakulayelwe amaLevi labahlabeleli labalindimasango, lomnikelo wabapristi." 
Nehemiah13:6 Kodwa kukho konke lokhu ngangingekho eJerusalema, ngoba ngomnyaka wamatshumi amathathu lambili kaAthakisekisi inkosi yeBhabhiloni ngeza enkosini; lekupheleni kwezinsuku ngacela imvumo enkosini," 
Nehemiah13:7 ngeza eJerusalema, ngaqedisisa ngokubi uEliyashibi ayekwenzele uTobiya ngokumlungisela ikamelo emagumeni endlu kaNkulunkulu." 
Nehemiah13:8 Kwasekusiba kubi kakhulu kimi; ngakho ngaphosela phandle zonke impahla zendlu kaTobiya phandle kwekamelo. 
Nehemiah13:9 Ngasengilaya, bahlambulula amakamelo; ngabuyisela khona izitsha zendlu kaNkulunkulu lomnikelo wokudla lempepha." 
Nehemiah13:10 Ngasengisazi ukuthi izabelo zamaLevi zazinganikwanga, lokuthi amaLevi labahlabeleli ababesenza umsebenzi babalekela ngulowo ensimini yakhe." 
Nehemiah13:11 Ngasengiphikisana lababusi ngathi: Kungani indlu kaNkulunkulu itshiyiwe? Ngababuthanisa, ngabamisa endaweni yabo." 
Nehemiah13:12 Khona wonke uJuda waletha okwetshumi kwamabele lewayini elitsha lamafutha eziphaleni. 
Nehemiah13:13 Ngasengibeka abagciniziphala phezu kweziphala, oShelemiya umpristi, loZadoki umbhali, loPedaya kumaLevi, leceleni kwabo uHanani indodana kaZakuri indodana kaMathaniya, ngoba kwathiwa bathembekile; njalo kwakuphezu kwabo ukwabela abafowabo." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ngikhumbule, Nkulunkulu wami, mayelana lalokho, ungayicitshi imisebenzi yami yomusa engiyenzele indlu kaNkulunkulu wami lezinkonzo zayo." 
Nehemiah13:15 Ngalezonsuku ngabona koJuda abanyathela izikhamelo zewayini ngesabatha, labangenisa izithungo, abathwalisa obabhemi, lewayini futhi, izithelo zesivini, lemikhiwa, lawo wonke umthwalo, abakungenisa eJerusalema ngosuku lwesabatha. Ngafakaza mhla bethengisa ukudla." 
Nehemiah13:16 LabeTire bahlala kuyo, beletha inhlanzi lempahla yonke ethengiswayo, bakuthengisa ngesabatha kubantwana bakoJuda laseJerusalema." 
Nehemiah13:17 Khona ngaphikisana lezikhulu zakoJuda, ngathi kuzo: Iyini le into embi eliyenzayo lingcolisa usuku lwesabatha?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Kabenzanga njalo yini oyihlo, loNkulunkulu wethu wehlisela phezu kwethu bonke lobububi laphezu kwalumuzi? Kanti lina landisa ulaka phezu kukaIsrayeli ngokungcolisa isabatha." 
Nehemiah13:19 Kwasekusithi lapho amasango eJerusalema eseqala ukuba mnyama mandulo kwesabatha, ngalaya ukuthi iminyango kayivalwe, njalo ngalaya ukuthi bangayivuli kuze kube ngemva kwesabatha. Ngabeka ezinye zenceku zami emasangweni ukuze kungangeni mthwalo ngosuku lwesabatha." 
Nehemiah13:20 Ngakho abathengi labathengisi bempahla yonke balala ngaphandle kweJerusalema kanye loba kabili. 
Nehemiah13:21 Khona ngafakaza ngimelene labo ngathi kibo: Lilalelani maqondana lomduli? Uba likwenza futhi, ngizalidumela ngesandla. Kusukela kulesosikhathi kababuyanga ngesabatha." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ngasengitshela amaLevi ukuthi azihlambulule, eze alinde amasango, ukungcwelisa usuku lwesabatha. La nga lokho ungikhumbule, Nkulunkulu wami, ungihawukele ngokobunengi bomusa wakho." 
Nehemiah13:23 Futhi, ngalezonsuku ngabona amaJuda ayehlalise ne l abafazi, abang amaAshidodikazi, amaAmoni, amaMowabi." 
Nehemiah13:24 Labantwana babo, ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili babekhuluma isiAshidodi njalo bengelakukhuluma isiJuda, kodwa ngokolimi lwezizwe ngezizwe." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ngasengiphikisana lawo, ngawaqalekisa, ngatshaya amanye awo, ngawangcothula inwele; ngawafungisa ngoNkulunkulu: Kaliyikunika amadodakazi enu kumadodana abo, njalo kaliyikuthathela amadodana enu emadodakazini abo, kumbe lina ngokwenu." 
Nehemiah13:26 USolomoni inkosi yakoIsrayeli konanga yini ngalezozinto? Kube kanti phakathi kwezizwe ezinengi kwakungelankosi enjengaye, owayethandeka kuNkulunkulu wakhe, loNkulunkulu wamenza inkosi phezu kukaIsrayeli wonke; laye abafazi bezizweni bamenza ukuthi one." 
Nehemiah13:27 Pho, sizalilalela yini ukwenza bonke lobobubi obukhulu, ngokona kuNkulunkulu wethu ngokuhlalisa na l abafazi bezizweni?" 
Nehemiah13:28 L enye yamadodana kaJehoyada indodana kaEliyashibi umpristi omkhulu, yayingumkhwenyana kaSanibhalathi umHoroni; ngakho ngayixotsha yasuka kimi." 
Nehemiah13:29 Bakhumbule, Nkulunkulu wami, ngoba bangcolisile ubupristi lesivumelwano sobupristi lesamaLevi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Ngokunjalo ngabahlambulula kubo bonke abezizweni, ngamisa imfanelo kubapristi lakumaLevi, ngulowo lalowo emsebenzini wakhe," 
Nehemiah13:31 leyomnikelo wenkuni ngezikhathi ezimisiweyo, leyezithelo zokuqala. Ngikhumbule, Nkulunkulu wami, ngokuhle." 
Esther1:1 Kwasekusithi ngensuku zikaAhasuwerusi, uAhasuwerusi lo owabusa kusukela eIndiya kuze kube seEtiyopiya, izigaba ezilikhulu lamatshumi amabili lesikhombisa," 
Esther1:2 ngalezonsuku lapho inkosi uAhasuwerusi wahlala esihlalweni sobukhosi sombuso wakhe esasiseShushani isigodlo," 
Esther1:3 ngomnyaka wesithathu wokubusa kwakhe wenzela iziphathamandla zakhe lenceku zakhe zonke idili. Amandla ePerisiya leMede, izinduna lababusi bezigaba babephambi kwakhe," 
Esther1:4 lapho etshengisa inotho yenkazimulo yombuso wakhe lobugugu bobuhle bobukhulu bakhe insuku ezinengi, insuku ezilikhulu lamatshumi ayisificaminwembili." 
Esther1:5 Kwathi lezonsuku sezigcwalisekile, inkosi yenzela bonke abantu abatholakala eShushani isigodlo idili, kusukela komkhulu kusiya komncinyane, insuku eziyisikhombisa, egumeni lesivande sesigodlo senkosi." 
Esther1:6 Kwakulamalembu amhlophe, amalembu acolekileyo, laluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, ebotshelwe ngentambo zelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu leziyibubende emasongweni esiliva lezinsikeni zelitshe le-alibasta*. Imibheda yayingeyegolide lesiliva phezu kwendawo egandelwe ngamatshe abomvu, le-alibasta, lamapharele*, lamnyama." 
Esther1:7 Basebenathisa ngezitsha zegolide, lezitsha zaziyizitsha ezehlukeneyo, lewayini lesikhosini laba linengi njengokwesandla senkosi." 
Esther1:8 Lokunatha kwakungokomthetho, kungekho obamba ngamandla; ngoba ngokunjalo inkosi yayilayile kwabakhulu bonke bendlu yayo ukuthi benze njengokufisa komuntu lomuntu." 
Esther1:9 UVashiti indlovukazi laye wenzela abesifazana idili endlini yesikhosini inkosi uAhasuwerusi ayelayo. 
Esther1:10 Ngosuku lwesikhombisa, inhliziyo yenkosi isithokozile ngewayini, yathi kuboMehumani, uBhizitha, uHaribona, uBhigitha, loAbhagitha, uZethari, loKarikasi, abathenwa abayisikhombisa ababesebenza phambi kwenkosi uAhasuwerusi," 
Esther1:11 ukuthi balethe uVashiti indlovukazi phambi kwenkosi elomqhele wesikhosini, ukutshengisa abantu leziphathamandla ubuhle bakhe, ngoba wayekhangeleka kuhle." 
Esther1:12 Kodwa indlovukazi uVashiti yala ukubuya ngelizwi lenkosi elalingesandla sabathenwa. Ngakho inkosi yathukuthela kakhulu, lolaka lwayo lwavutha phakathi kwayo." 
Esther1:13 Inkosi yasisithi kwabahlakaniphileyo ababesazi izikhathi (ngoba lalinjalo ilizwi lenkosi phambi kwabo bonke abaziyo umthetho lesahlulelo," 
Esther1:14 lalabo ababeseduze layo babengoKarishena, uShethari, uAdimatha, uTarshishi, uMeresi, uMarisena, uMemukani, iziphathamandla eziyisikhombisa zePerisiya leMede, ezazibona ubuso benkosi, ezazihlala phambili embusweni):" 
Esther1:15 Ngokomthetho kungenziwani ngendlovukazi uVashiti ngenxa yokuthi kayenzanga ilizwi lenkosi uAhasuwerusi ngesandla sabathenwa? 
Esther1:16 UMemukani wasesithi phambi kwenkosi leziphathamandla: UVashiti indlovukazi wonile kungeyisikho enkosini kuphela, kodwa la kuziphathamandla zonke lebantwini bonke abasezigabeni zonke zenkosi uAhasuwerusi." 
Esther1:17 Ngoba isenzo sendlovukazi sizaphumela kubo bonke abesifazana, kuze kuthi badelele omkabo emehlweni abo, nxa besithi: Inkosi uAhasuwerusi watshela ukuthi kulethwe uVashiti indlovukazi phambi kwayo, kodwa kayizanga." 
Esther1:18 Yebo mhlalokho amakhosikazi ePerisiya leMede ezwe isenzo sendlovukazi azakuthi kuzo zonke iziphathamandla zenkosi, kube khona ukudelela lokuthukuthela okwedlulisayo." 
Esther1:19 Uba kulungile enkosini kakuphume umthetho wesikhosini kuyo, kakubhalwe emithethweni yamaPerisiya lamaMede, ongeguqulwe, ukuthi uVashiti kayikungena phambi kwenkosi uAhasuwerusi; inkosi inike-ke ubukhosikazi bakhe kumakhelwanekazi wakhe ongcono kulaye." 
Esther1:20 Usuzwakele umthetho wenkosi ezawenza embusweni wayo wonke (ngoba mkhulu) bonke abesifazana bazanika inhlonipho kubomkabo, kusukela komkhulu kusiya komncinyane." 
Esther1:21 Njalo indaba yayilungile emehlweni enkosi leziphathamandla; inkosi yasisenza njengokwelizwi likaMemukani. 
Esther1:22 Yasithumela izincwadi kuzo zonke izigaba zenkosi, kusigaba lesigaba njengombhalo waso, lakubo abantu labantu njengokolimi lwabo, ukuthi ileyo laleyondoda ibe ngumbusi endlini yayo, ikhulume njengokolimi lwabantu bakibo." 
Esther2:1 Emva kwalezizinto, ulaka lwenkosi uAhasuwerusi seludedile, wamkhumbula uVashiti, lalokho ayekwenzile, lalokho okwaqunywa ngaye." 
Esther2:2 Izinceku zenkosi ezaziyisebenzela zasezisithi: Kakudingelwe inkosi amantombazana, izintombi ezikhangeleka kuhle." 
Esther2:3 Inkosi imise-ke ababonisi kuzo zonke izigaba zombuso, ukuze babuthanise wonke amantombazana, izintombi ezikhangeleka kuhle, eShushani isigodlo, endlini yabesifazana, esandleni sikaHegayi, umthenwa wenkosi, umlondolozi wabesifazana, lokunika okokuqhola kwawo." 
Esther2:4 Kuthi intombazana enhle emehlweni enkosi ibe yindlovukazi esikhundleni sikaVashiti. Indaba yayilungile-ke emehlweni enkosi, yenza njalo." 
Esther2:5 Kwakukhona indoda engumJuda eShushani isigodlo, obizo layo lalinguMordekhayi indodana kaJayiri indodana kaShimeyi indodana kaKishi, umBhenjamini," 
Esther2:6 owayethunjwe eJerusalema kanye labathunjwa ababethunjwe loJekoniya inkosi yakoJuda, uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni owayebathumbile." 
Esther2:7 Njalo wayesondla uHadasa, onguEsta, umntakamalumakhe, ngoba wayengelayise kumbe unina; njalo intombi yayiyinhle ngesimo njalo ikhangeleka kuhle; ekufeni-ke kukayise lonina uMordekhayi wayithatha yaba yindodakazi yakhe." 
Esther2:8 Kwasekusithi sekuzwakele ilizwi lenkosi lomthetho wayo, lapho sekubuthaniswe izintombi ezinengi eShushani isigodlo esandleni sikaHegayi, uEsta laye wathathwa wasiwa endlini yenkosi esandleni sikaHegayi, umlondolozi wabesifazana." 
Esther2:9 Lentombi yayiyinhle emehlweni akhe, yazuza umusa phambi kwakhe; wasehle eyinika amakha ayo lezabelo zayo, lamantombazana akhethiweyo ayisikhombisa ukuyinika avela endlini yenkosi; wayisusa wayifaka yona lamantombazana ayo endaweni enhle yendlu yabesifazana." 
Esther2:10 UEsta wayengakhulumanga abantu bakwabo lomhlobo wakhe, ngoba uMordekhayi wayemlayile ukuthi angakukhulumi." 
Esther2:11 Langalo lonke usuku ngosuku uMordekhayi wayehambahamba phambi kweguma lendlu yabesifazana ukwazi impilakahle kaEsta lokuthi kuyini okuzakwenzeka kuye. 
Esther2:12 Lekufikeni kwezopha lentombi ngentombi ukungena enkosini uAhasuwerusi ekucineni sekwenziwe kuye njengomthetho wabesifazana, inyanga ezilitshumi lambili, ngoba ngokunjalo kwagcwaliseka insuku zamakha awo, inyanga eziyisithupha ngamafutha emure*, lenyanga eziyisithupha ngamakha okuqhola, lang amanye amakha abesifazana." 
Esther2:13 Ngalokho-ke intombi yangena enkosini; loba kuyini ekutshoyo izakunikwa ukuthi ihambe lakho isuka endlini yabesifazana isiya endlini yenkosi. 
Esther2:14 Ntambama yangena, lekuseni ibuyele endlini yesibili yabesifazana, esandleni sikaShashigazi umthenwa wenkosi umlondolozi wabafazi abancinyane; kayingenanga futhi enkosini ngaphandle kokuthi inkosi ithokoze ngayo, ibizwe ngebizo." 
Esther2:15 Kwathi selifikile izopho likaEsta, indodakazi kaAbihayili umalumakhe kaMordekhayi owayemthethe waba yindodakazi yakhe, lokuthi angene enkosini, kacelanga lutho ngaphandle kwalokho uHegayi umthenwa wenkosi umlondolozi wabesifazana akutshoyo. UEsta wayesemukela-ke umusa emehlweni abo bonke abambonayo." 
Esther2:16 Ngokunjalo uEsta wasiwa enkosini uAhasuwerusi endlini yayo yesikhosini ngenyanga yetshumi, eyinyanga kaTebethi, ngomnyaka wesikhombisa wokubusa kwayo." 
Esther2:17 Inkosi yasimthanda uEsta okwedlula bonke abesifazana, wemukela umusa lesihe phambi kwayo okwedlula zonke intombi, yasibeka umqhele wobukhosi ekhanda lakhe, yamenza indlovukazi esikhundleni sikaVashiti." 
Esther2:18 Inkosi yasisenzela zonke iziphathamandla zayo lenceku zayo idili elikhulu, idili likaEsta. Yenzela izigaba ukuphumula, yapha izipho njengokwamandla enkosi." 
Esther2:19 Kwathi intombi sezibuthanisiwe okwesibili, uMordekhayi wayehlezi esangweni lenkosi." 
Esther2:20 UEsta wayengakhulumanga umhlobo wakhe labantu bakibo, njengoba uMordekhayi wamlaya, ngoba uEsta wenza umlayo kaMordekhayi njengalapho esondliwa elaye." 
Esther2:21 Ngalezozinsuku uMordekhayi ehlezi esangweni lenkosi, oBigithani loTereshi abathenwa ababili benkosi, abalindi bombundu, bathukuthela, badinga ukuyithela isandla inkosi uAhasuwerusi." 
Esther2:22 Njalo udaba lwaziwa kuMordekhayi, waselutshela uEsta indlovukazi; njalo uEsta wayitshela inkosi ebizweni likaMordekhayi." 
Esther2:23 Lolodaba seluhlolwa, lwatholakala lunjalo; ngakho bobabili baphanyekwa esihlahleni. Kwasekubhalwa egwalweni lwemilando phambi kwenkosi." 
Esther3:1 Emva kwalezizindaba inkosi uAhasuwerusi yamkhulisa uHamani indodana kaHamedatha umAgagi, yamphakamisa, yabeka isihlalo sakhe phezu kwazo zonke iziphathamandla ezazilaye." 
Esther3:2 Ngakho zonke inceku zenkosi ezazisesangweni lenkosi zakhothama zamkhonza uHamani, ngoba inkosi yayilaye ngokunjalo ngaye. Kodwa uMordekhayi kakhothamanga kakhonzanga." 
Esther3:3 Izinceku zenkosi ezazisesangweni lenkosi zasezisithi kuMordekhayi: Kungani useqa umlayo wenkosi? 
Esther3:4 Kwasekusithi zikhuluma laye insuku ngensuku, kodwa engazizwanga, zamtshela uHamani ukuze zibone ukuthi amazwi kaMordekhayi azakuma yini; ngoba wayezitshelile ukuthi ungumJuda." 
Esther3:5 UHamani esebonile ukuthi uMordekhayi kakhothamanga njalo kakhonzanga kuye, uHamani wagcwala intukuthelo." 
Esther3:6 Wesedelela emehlweni akhe ukumthela isandla uMordekhayi yedwa, ngoba babemtshelile abantu bakibo kaMordekhayi, ngakho uHamani wadinga ukuchitha wonke amaJuda, ayesembusweni wonke kaAhasuwerusi, abantu bakibo kaMordekhayi." 
Esther3:7 Ngenyanga yokuqala, eyinyanga uNisani, ngomnyaka wetshumi lambili wenkosi uAhasuwerusi, baphosa iPuri, eliyinkatho, phambi kukaHamani, kusukela esukwini kusiya esukwini, njalo kusukela enyangeni kusiya enyangeni yetshumi lambili, eyinyanga uAdari." 
Esther3:8 UHamani wasesithi enkosini uAhasuwerusi: Kukhona abantu abathile abahlakazeke basabalala phakathi kwabantu ezigabeni zonke zombuso wakho; lemilayo yabo yehlukile kweyabo bonke abantu, lemilayo yenkosi kabayenzi; ngakho kakufanelanga enkosini ukuthi ibayekele bahlale." 
Esther3:9 Uba kulungile enkosini, kakubhalwe ukuthi bachithwe, njalo ngizalinganisa amathalenta* esiliva azinkulungwane ezilitshumi ezandleni zabenzi bomsebenzi, ukuze afakwe kokuligugu kwenkosi." 
Esther3:10 Inkosi yasikhupha indandatho yophawu lwayo esandleni sayo, yayinika uHamani indodana kaHamedatha umAgagi, isitha samaJuda." 
Esther3:11 Inkosi yasisithi kuHamani: Isiliva usinikiwe, labantu, ukwenza ngabo njengokuhle emehlweni akho." 
Esther3:12 Kwasekubizwa ababhali benkosi ngenyanga yokuqala ngosuku lwetshumi lantathu lwayo; kwasekubhalwa njengakho konke uHamani ayekulayile, ezikhulwini zenkosi lakubabusi ababephezu kwesigaba lesigaba, lakuziphathamandla zesizwe lesizwe sesigaba lesigaba, njengokombhalo waso, labantu ngabantu ngokolimi lwabo; kwabhalwa ebizweni lenkosi uAhasuwerusi, kwananyathiselwa ngendandatho yophawu lwenkosi." 
Esther3:13 Incwadi zathunyelwa ngesandla sezigijimi kuzo zonke izigaba zenkosi ukuchitha, ukubulala, lokubhubhisa wonke amaJuda, kusukela komutsha kusiya komdala, abantwanyana labesifazana, ngasuku lunye, ngolwetshumi lantathu lwenyanga yetshumi lambili, eyinyanga uAdari, lokuthi kuphangwe impahla yawo." 
Esther3:14 Ikhophi yombhalo yokuthi umlayo unikwe kuso sonke isigaba ngesigaba yayisobala kubo bonke abantu ukuze balungele lolosuku. 
Esther3:15 Izigijimi zaphuma ziphangisiswa yilizwi lenkosi, lomthetho wanikwa eShushani isigodlo. Inkosi loHamani basebehlalela ukunatha, kodwa umuzi iShushani wawusanganisekile." 
Esther4:1 UMordekhayi esekwazile konke okwenziweyo, uMordekhayi wadabula izigqoko zakhe, wagqoka ilembu lesaka lomlotha, waphuma wangena phakathi komuzi, wakhala ukukhala okukhulu lokubabayo," 
Esther4:2 weza waze waba phambi kwesango lenkosi, ngoba kwakungekho ongangena esangweni lenkosi egqoke ilembu lesaka." 
Esther4:3 Lakuso sonke isigaba lesigaba, indawo lapho ilizwi lenkosi lomthetho okwakufika khona, kwaba lokulila okukhulu kumaJuda, lokuzila ukudla, lokukhala inyembezi, lokulila; amanengi alala emalenjini amasaka lemlotheni." 
Esther4:4 Kwasekufika amantombazana kaEsta labathenwa bakhe bamtshela; indlovukazi yasidabuka kakhulu, yathumela izembatho zokugqokisa uMordekhayi, lokususa kuye ilembu lakhe lesaka, kodwa kazemukelanga." 
Esther4:5 UEsta wasebiza uHathaki omunye wabathenwa benkosi eyayimmisele yena, wamlaya ngoMordekhayi ukuthi azi ukuthi kuyini lokuthi kungani." 
Esther4:6 UHathaki wasephuma waya kuMordekhayi egcekeni lomuzi elaliphambi kwesango lenkosi. 
Esther4:7 UMordekhayi wamtshela konke okwenzeke kuye, lengcazelo yemali uHamani athi uzayilinganisela kokuligugu kwenkosi ngamaJuda ukuwachitha." 
Esther4:8 Wasemnika ikhophi yombhalo womthetho eyanikwa eShushani ukuwachitha ukuthi ayitshengise uEsta, lokuthi amtshele, lokuthi amlaye ukuthi angene enkosini, ukumncengela, lokucelela abantu bakibo phambi kwakhe." 
Esther4:9 UHathaki wasesiza wamtshela uEsta amazwi kaMordekhayi. 
Esther4:10 UEsta wasekhuluma loHathaki, wamnika umlayo usiya kuMordekhayi wokuthi:" 
Esther4:11 Zonke inceku zenkosi labantu bezigaba zenkosi bayakwazi ukuthi, loba ngubani, owesilisa loba owesifazana, ongena esiya enkosini egumeni elingaphakathi, engabizwanga, kulomthetho owodwa ngaye woku m bulala, ngaphandle kokuthi inkosi imelulele intonga yobukhosi yegolide, ukuze aphile; kodwa mina kangibizwanga ukungena enkosini lezinsuku ezingamatshumi amathathu." 
Esther4:12 Basebemtshela uMordekhayi amazwi kaEsta. 
Esther4:13 UMordekhayi wasesithi ephendula uEsta: Ungacabangi engqondweni yakho ukuthi uzaphepha endlini yenkosi okwedlula wonke amaJuda. 
Esther4:14 Ngoba uba uthula lokuthula ngalesisikhathi, usizo lenkululeko kuzamela amaJuda kuvela kwenye indawo, kodwa wena lendlu kayihlo lizabhubha. Ngubani kambe owaziyo ukuthi ufikile embusweni ngenxa yesikhathi esinje?" 
Esther4:15 UEsta wasesithi ephendula uMordekhayi: 
Esther4:16 Hamba ubuthanise wonke amaJuda atholakala eShushani, lingizilele ukudla, lingadli linganathi insuku ezintathu ubusuku lemini; lami lamantombazana ami sizazila ukudla ngokufananayo; ngokunjalo-ke ngizangena enkosini, okunganjengokomthetho; njalo uba ngibhubha, ngizabhubha." 
Esther4:17 UMordekhayi waseqhubeka wenza njengakho konke uEsta amlaye khona. 
Esther5:1 Kwasekusithi ngosuku lwesithathu uEsta wagqoka ezobundlovukazi, wema egumeni elingaphakathi lendlu yenkosi, maqondana lendlu yenkosi. Inkosi yayihlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi sombuso wayo endlini yesikhosini iqondene lomnyango wendlu." 
Esther5:2 Kwasekusithi inkosi ibona uEsta indlovukazi emi egumeni, wazuza umusa emehlweni ayo; inkosi yasimelulela uEsta intonga yobukhosi yegolide eyayisesandleni sayo. Wasesondela uEsta wathinta isihloko sentonga yobukhosi." 
Esther5:3 Inkosi yasisithi kuye: Ulani, ndlovukazi Esta? Lesicelo sakho siyini? Uzasinikwa ngitsho kuze kube yingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yombuso." 
Esther5:4 UEsta wasesithi: Uba kukuhle enkosini, kayize inkosi loHamani edilini engiyenzele lona." 
Esther5:5 Inkosi yasisithi: Phangisisani uHamani ukuthi enze ilizwi likaEsta. Ngakho yeza inkosi loHamani edilini uEsta ayelenzile. 
Esther5:6 Inkosi yasisithi kuEsta edilini lewayini: Siyini isicelo sakho? Njalo uzasinikwa. Siyini-ke isifiso sakho? Kuzakwenziwa ngitsho kuze kube yingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yombuso. 
Esther5:7 UEsta wasephendula wathi: Isicelo sami lesifiso sami yilokhu: 
Esther5:8 Uba ngithole umusa emehlweni enkosi, futhi uba kukuhle enkosini ukupha isicelo sami lokwenza isifiso sami, inkosi loHamani kabeze edilini engizalenzela bona. Kusasa-ke ngizakwenza njengokwelizwi lenkosi." 
Esther5:9 UHamani wasephuma mhlalokho ethokoza elenhliziyo enhle. Kodwa uHamani ebona uMordekhayi esangweni lenkosi ukuthi kasukumanga lokuthi kamthuthumelelanga, uHamani wagcwala ulaka ngoMordekhayi." 
Esther5:10 Kodwa uHamani wazithinta, wafika endlini yakhe; wasethuma walanda abangane bakhe loZereshi umkakhe." 
Esther5:11 UHamani wasebalandisela udumo lwenotho yakhe, lobunengi bamadodana akhe, lakho konke inkosi eyayimkhulise ngakho, leyamphakamisa ngakho phezu kweziphathamandla lenceku zenkosi." 
Esther5:12 UHamani wasesithi: Yebo, uEsta indlovukazi kangenisanga muntu kanye lenkosi edilini alenzileyo ngaphandle kwami; njalo lakusasa nginxuselwe kuye lenkosi." 
Esther5:13 Kanti konke lokhu kakungenelisi ngalutho ngaso sonke isikhathi ngibona uMordekhayi umJuda ehlezi esangweni lenkosi. 
Esther5:14 UZereshi umkakhe labo bonke abangane bakhe basebesithi kuye: Kakwenziwe ugodo ubude obuzingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu; kusasa-ke uthi enkosini kabalengise uMordekhayi kulo, ubusungena lenkosi edilini uthokozile. Njalo loludaba lwalulungile phambi kukaHamani, waselwenza ugodo." 
Esther6:1 Ngalobobusuku ubuthongo benkosi babaleka; yasisithi kakulethwe ugwalo lwezikhumbuzo lwemilando; yasibalwa phambi kwenkosi. 
Esther6:2 Kwasekutholakala kubhaliwe ukuthi uMordekhayi wabika ngoBigithana loTereshi, abathenwa ababili benkosi, abalindi bombundu, ababedinge ukwelulela isandla enkosini uAhasuwerusi." 
Esther6:3 Inkosi yasisithi: Dumo lobukhulu bani obenziwa kuMordekhayi ngalokhu? Izinceku zenkosi ezaziyikhonza zasezisithi: Kakwenziwanga lutho kuye. 
Esther6:4 Inkosi yasisithi: Ngubani osegumeni? UHamani wayesengene egumeni elingaphandle lendlu yenkosi ukukhuluma enkosini ukuthi ilengise uMordekhayi egodweni ayemlungisele lona. 
Esther6:5 Izinceku zenkosi zasezisithi kuyo: Khangela, uHamani umi egumeni. Inkosi yasisithi: Kangene." 
Esther6:6 UHamani wasengena; inkosi yasisithi kuye: Kwenziweni kumuntu inkosi ethokoza kudumo lwakhe? UHamani wasesithi enhliziyweni yakhe: Ngubani inkosi engathokoza uku m nika udumo okwedlula mina? 
Esther6:7 UHamani wasesithi enkosini: Umuntu inkosi ethokoza kudumo lwakhe," 
Esther6:8 kakulethwe isembatho sobukhosi inkosi uqobo esigqokayo, lebhiza inkosi eligadayo, lokuthi umqhele wobukhosi ubekwe enhlokweni yalo;" 
Esther6:9 lesembatho lebhiza kunikwe esandleni somunye weziphathamandla zenkosi ezihloniphekayo, lokuthi bagqokise lowomuntu inkosi ethokoza kudumo lwakhe, bamgadise ibhiza adabule igceke lomuzi, bamemeze phambi kwakhe bathi: Kwenziwa nje emuntwini inkosi ethokoza ngodumo lwakhe." 
Esther6:10 Inkosi yasisithi kuHamani: Phangisa thatha isembatho lebhiza njengokutsho kwakho, wenze njalo kuMordekhayi umJuda ohlala esangweni lenkosi; kungawi lalizwi kukho konke okukhulumileyo." 
Esther6:11 UHamani wasethatha isembatho lebhiza, wagqokisa uMordekhayi, wamgadisa wadabula igceke lomuzi, wamemeza phambi kwakhe wathi: Kwenziwa nje emuntwini inkosi ethokoza kudumo lwakhe." 
Esther6:12 Wasebuyela uMordekhayi esangweni lenkosi, kodwa uHamani wahaluzela waya endlini yakhe elila embomboze ikhanda." 
Esther6:13 UHamani wasetshela uZereshi umkakhe labo bonke abangane bakhe konke okumehleleyo. Abahlakaniphileyo bakhe loZereshi umkakhe basebesithi kuye: Uba uMordekhayi engowenzalo yamaJuda, osuqalise ukuwa phambi kwakhe, kawuyikumelana laye, kodwa uzakuwa lokuwa phambi kwakhe." 
Esther6:14 Besakhuluma loHamani, abathenwa benkosi basondela, bahaluzela ukuletha uHamani edilini uEsta ayelenzile." 
Esther7:1 Bafika-ke inkosi loHamani uku ya natha loEsta indlovukazi. 
Esther7:2 Inkosi yasisithi kuEsta langosuku lwesibili edilini lewayini: Siyini isicelo sakho, Esta ndlovukazi? njalo uzasinikwa. Siyini-ke isifiso sakho? kuzakwenziwa ngitsho kuze kube yingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yombuso." 
Esther7:3 UEsta indlovukazi wasephendula wathi: Uba ngithole umusa emehlweni akho, nkosi, njalo uba kukuhle enkosini, impilo yami kangiyinikwe ngesicelo sami labantu bakithi ngesifiso sami." 
Esther7:4 Ngoba sithengisiwe, mina labantu bakithi, ukuthi sibhujiswe sibulawe njalo sichithwe; kodwa uba besithengiswe ukuba yizigqili lezigqilikazi ngabe ngithule; lanxa isitha besingelinganise ukoniwa kwenkosi." 
Esther7:5 Inkosi uAhasuwerusi yasikhuluma yathi kuEsta indlovukazi: Ngubani lo, futhi ungaphi lo ogcwalise inhliziyo yakhe ukwenza njalo?" 
Esther7:6 UEsta wasesithi: Umuntu, umbandezeli lesitha, nguHamani lo okhohlakeleyo. UHamani waseqhaqhazela phambi kwenkosi lendlovukazi." 
Esther7:7 Inkosi yasisukuma edilini lewayini olakeni lwayo, yaya esivandeni sesigodlo; uHamani wasesukuma ukuncengela impilo yakhe kuEsta indlovukazi, ngoba wabona ukuthi okubi se kunqunywe yinkosi ngaye." 
Esther7:8 Inkosi isiphendukile ivela esivandeni sesigodlo isiya endlini yedili lewayini, uHamani wayewele phezu kombheda uEsta ayekuwo. Inkosi yasisithi: Usuzadlova indlovukazi ilami endlini yini? Ilizwi laphuma emlonyeni wenkosi; basebembomboza ubuso bukaHamani." 
Esther7:9 UHaribona omunye wabathenwa wasesithi phambi kwenkosi: Khangela-ke, ugodo uHamani alwenzele uMordekhayi, owayeyikhulumele okuhle inkosi, lumi endlini kaHamani, ubude buzingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu. Inkosi yasisithi: Umlengiseni kulo." 
Esther7:10 Basebemlengisa uHamani kulologodo ayelulungisele uMordekhayi. Lwaseludeda ulaka lwenkosi. 
Esther8:1 Ngalolosuku inkosi uAhasuwerusi yanika uEsta indlovukazi indlu kaHamani isitha samaJuda. UMordekhayi wasesiza phambi kwenkosi ngoba uEsta waye se landisile ukuthi wayeyini kuye. 
Esther8:2 Inkosi yasikhupha indandatho yophawu lwayo eyayiyithathele uHamani, yayinika uMordekhayi. UEsta wasebeka uMordekhayi phezu kwendlu kaHamani." 
Esther8:3 UEsta wasebuya ekhuluma phambi kwenkosi, wawa phambi kwenyawo zayo wakhala inyembezi wayincenga ukuthi isuse ububi bukaHamani umAgagi, logobe lwakhe ayelucebe ngamaJuda." 
Esther8:4 Inkosi yasiselulela intonga yobukhosi yegolide kuEsta. UEsta wasesukuma wema phambi kwenkosi," 
Esther8:5 wasesithi: Uba kukuhle enkosini, uba-ke ngithole umusa phambi kwayo, lodaba lulungile phambi kwenkosi, lami ngilungile emehlweni ayo, kakubhalwe ukubuyisela emuva izincwadi, ugobe lukaHamani indodana kaHamedatha umAgagi, ayelubhalele ukubhubhisa amaJuda asezigabeni zonke zenkosi." 
Esther8:6 Ngoba ngingaba lakho njani ukubona ububi obuzathola isizwe sakithi? Kumbe ngingaba lakho njani ukubona ukubhujiswa kwezihlobo zami? 
Esther8:7 Inkosi uAhasuwerusi yasisithi kuEsta indlovukazi lakuMordekhayi umJuda: Khangelani, indlu kaHamani ngiyinike uEsta, yena-ke bamlengise egodweni, ngenxa yokuthi welulela isandla sakhe kumaJuda." 
Esther8:8 Ngakho lina bhalelani amaJuda ebizweni lenkosi, njengokuhle emehlweni enu, likunameke ngophawu lwendandatho yenkosi, ngoba umbhalo obhalwe ngebizo lenkosi wananyekwa ngophawu lwendandatho yenkosi, kakho ongawubuyisela emuva." 
Esther8:9 Kwasekubizwa ababhali benkosi ngalesosikhathi ngenyanga yesithathu, eyinyanga uSivani, ngolwamatshumi amabili lantathu lwayo; kwasekubhalwa njengakho konke uMordekhayi akulaya kumaJuda, lezikhulwini lakubabusi lakuziphathamandla zezigaba ezisukela eIndiya kuze kufike eEtiyopiya, izigaba ezilikhulu lamatshumi amabili lesikhombisa, isigaba lesigaba njengokombhalo waso, lesizwe ngesizwe njengokolimi lwaso, lakumaJuda njengokombhalo wawo lanjengokolimi lwawo." 
Esther8:10 Wasebhala ebizweni lenkosi uAhasuwerusi, wanameka ngophawu lwendandatho yenkosi, wathumela izincwadi ngesandla sezigijimi ezigade amabhiza, ezigade amabhiza alejubane awesikhosini, amabhizakazi amatsha." 
Esther8:11 Ukuthi inkosi yavumela amaJuda ayesemzini ngomuzi wonke ukuthi ahlangane amele impilo yawo ukubhubhisa abulale aqede wonke amandla abantu lesigaba abawahlaseleyo, abantwanyana labesifazana, lokuphanga impango yabo," 
Esther8:12 ngasuku lunye kuzo zonke izigaba zenkosi uAhasuwerusi, ngolwetshumi lantathu lwenyanga yetshumi lambili, eyinyanga uAdari." 
Esther8:13 Ikhophi yombhalo yomthetho ozamiswa kuso sonke isigaba ngesigaba yayisobala kubo bonke abantu, ukuthi amaJuda azilungisele lolusuku ukuziphindiselela ezitheni zawo." 
Esther8:14 Izigijimi zigade amabhiza esikhosini alejubane zaphuma, ziphangisiswa zicindezelwa yilizwi lenkosi, lomthetho wanikwa eShushani isigodlo." 
Esther8:15 UMordekhayi wasephuma phambi kwenkosi ekusembatho sobukhosi sobuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka lesimhlophe, lomqhele omkhulu wegolide, lesembatho selembu elicolekileyo kakhulu leliyibubende. Umuzi weShushani wasuthokoza wathaba." 
Esther8:16 AmaJuda ayelokukhanya lentokozo lenjabulo lodumo. 
Esther8:17 Lakuso sonke isigaba ngesigaba lakuwo wonke umuzi ngomuzi endaweni lapho ilizwi lenkosi lomthetho wayo okwafika khona amaJuda aba lentokozo, lenjabulo, idili, losuku oluhle. Labanengi babantu belizwe baba ngamaJuda, ngoba ukwesaba amaJuda kwabehlela." 
Esther9:1 Kwathi ngenyanga yetshumi lambili, eyinyanga uAdari, ngosuku lwetshumi lantathu lwayo, sekusondele ilizwi lenkosi lomlayo wayo ukuthi kwenziwe, ngosuku izitha zamaJuda ezazithemba ukuwabusa ngalo, kwaguquka, ngoba amaJuda ngokwawo abusa kwababewazonda." 
Esther9:2 AmaJuda abuthana emizini yawo kuzo zonke izigaba zenkosi uAhasuwerusi ukwelulela isandla kulabo ababedinge ukulinyazwa kwawo; njalo kakho owayengema phambi kwawo, ngoba ukwesabeka kwawo kwakwehlele bonke abantu." 
Esther9:3 Zonke-ke iziphathamandla zezigaba, lezikhulu, lababusi, labenzi bomsebenzi inkosi eyayilabo, basiza amaJuda, ngoba ukwesabeka kukaMordekhayi kwakubehlele." 
Esther9:4 Ngoba uMordekhayi wayemkhulu endlini yenkosi, lodumo lwakhe lwahamba kuzo zonke izigaba, ngoba lindoda uMordekhayi yaqhubeka ikhula." 
Esther9:5 Ngakho amaJuda atshaya phakathi kwezitha zawo zonke ngokutshaya kwenkemba lokubulala lokubhubhisa, enza ngabazondi bawo ngokwentando yawo." 
Esther9:6 EShushani isigodlo amaJuda asebulala abhubhisa abantu abangamakhulu amahlanu," 
Esther9:7 loParishanidatha, loDalifoni, loAsiphatha," 
Esther9:8 loPoratha, loAdaliya, loAridatha," 
Esther9:9 loParimashita, loArisayi, loAridayi, loVayizatha." 
Esther9:10 Amadodana alitshumi kaHamani indodana kaHamedatha, isitha samaJuda, awabulala; kodwa kawelulelanga isandla sawo empangweni." 
Esther9:11 Ngalolosuku inani lababulawayo eShushani isigodlo lafika phambi kwenkosi. 
Esther9:12 Inkosi yasisithi kuEsta indlovukazi: EShushani isigodlo amaJuda abulele abhubhisa abantu abangamakhulu amahlanu lamadodana alitshumi kaHamani. Enzeni kwezinye izigaba zenkosi? Siyini-ke isicelo sakho? Njalo uzasinikwa. Siyini-ke isifiso sakho futhi? Njalo sizakwenziwa. 
Esther9:13 UEsta wasesithi: Uba kulungile enkosini kawavunyelwe amaJuda aseShushani ukwenza lakusasa njengokomthetho walamuhla; lamadodana alitshumi kaHamani kabawalengise egodweni. 
Esther9:14 Inkosi yasisithi kwenziwe njalo; kwasekunikwa umthetho eShushani, lamadodana alitshumi kaHamani bawalengisa." 
Esther9:15 AmaJuda eyeseShushani asebuthana futhi ngosuku lwetshumi lane lwenyanga uAdari, abulala abantu abangamakhulu amathathu eShushani; kodwa kawelulelanga isandla sawo empangweni." 
Esther9:16 Amanye kumaJuda ayesezigabeni zenkosi abuthana-ke amela impilo yabo, aphumula ezitheni zawo, abulala kwabawazondayo izinkulungwane ezingamatshumi ayisikhombisa lanhlanu; kodwa kawelulelanga isandla sawo empangweni." 
Esther9:17 Kwaku ngosuku lwetshumi lantathu lwenyanga uAdari. Asephumula ngolwetshumi lane lwayo, alwenza lwaba lusuku lwedili lentokozo." 
Esther9:18 Kodwa amaJuda aseShushani abuthana ngolwetshumi lantathu lwayo langolwetshumi lane lwayo; asephumula ngolwetshumi lanhlanu lwayo, alwenza lwaba lusuku lwedili lentokozo." 
Esther9:19 Ngenxa yalokhu amaJuda emaphandleni ahlala emizini emaphandleni enza usuku lwetshumi lane lwenyanga uAdari lwaba ngolwentokozo ledili, losuku oluhle, lolokuthumelana izabelo." 
Esther9:20 UMordekhayi wasezibhala lezizinto, wathumela izincwadi kuwo wonke amaJuda ayekuzo zonke izigaba zenkosi uAhasuwerusi, aseduze lakhatshana," 
Esther9:21 ukumisa phakathi kwabo ukwenza usuku lwetshumi lane lwenyanga uAdari losuku lwetshumi lanhlanu lwayo kuwo wonke umnyaka ngomnyaka," 
Esther9:22 njengokwensuku amaJuda aphumula ngazo ezitheni zawo, lenyanga eyaphendulwa kuwo kusuka osizini kusiya kuntokozo, lekulileni kube lusuku oluhle, azenze zibe zinsuku zedili lentokozo, lezokuthumelana izabelo, lezipho kubayanga." 
Esther9:23 AmaJuda emukela lokho ayesekuqalile ukukwenza, lalokho uMordekhayi ayewabhalele khona." 
Esther9:24 Ngoba uHamani indodana kaHamedatha umAgagi, isitha sawo wonke amaJuda, wayecebe mayelana lamaJuda ukuwachitha, waphosa iPuri, eyinkatho, ukuwachoboza lokuwabhubhisa." 
Esther9:25 Kodwa lapho uEsta efika phambi kwenkosi, yalaya ngencwadi ukuthi icebo lakhe elibi ayelicebe ngamaJuda libuyele ekhanda lakhe; basebebalengisa yena lamadodana akhe egodweni." 
Esther9:26 Ngenxa yalokhu babiza lezozinsuku ngokuthi iPurimi ngebizo lePuri. Ngenxa yalokhu, ngenxa yawo wonke amazwi aleyoncwadi, lababekubonile mayelana lalokho, lokwakubehlele," 
Esther9:27 amaJuda amisa azemukelela wona lenzalo yawo labo bonke abazihlanganisa lawo, ukuze bangeqi, ukugcina lezinsuku ezimbili, njengokombhalo wazo, lanjengokwesikhathi sazo esimisiweyo, kuwo wonke umnyaka lomnyaka," 
Esther9:28 ukuthi lezinsuku zikhunjulwe zigcinwe kuso sonke isizukulwana lesizukulwana, usapho losapho, isigaba ngesigaba, lomuzi ngomuzi, ukuthi lezinsuku zePurimi zingeqiwa phakathi kwamaJuda, lesikhumbuzo sazo singapheli enzalweni yawo." 
Esther9:29 UEsta indlovukazi, indodakazi kaAbihayili, loMordekhayi umJuda, basebebhala ngamandla wonke ukuqinisa lincwadi yesibili yePurimi." 
Esther9:30 Wasethumela izincwadi kuwo wonke amaJuda ezigabeni ezilikhulu lamatshumi amabili lesikhombisa zombuso kaAhasuwerusi, amazwi okuthula leqiniso," 
Esther9:31 ukuqinisa lezinsuku zePurimi ngezikhathi zazo ezimisiweyo njengokumisa phezu kwawo kukaMordekhayi umJuda loEsta indlovukazi, lanjengokuzimisela kwawo wona lenzalo yawo, indaba zokuzila ukudla lokukhala kwawo." 
Esther9:32 Ilizwi likaEsta laseliqinisa lezizindaba zePurimi; kwasekubhalwa egwalweni. 
Esther10:1 Inkosi uAhasuwerusi yasibeka umthelo elizweni lezihlenge ni zolwandle. 
Esther10:2 Zonke-ke izenzo zamandla ayo lawengalo zayo, lomlando wobukhulu bukaMordekhayi, inkosi eyamkhulisayo, kakubhalwanga yini egwalweni lwemilando yamakhosi eMede lePerisiya?" 
Esther10:3 Ngoba uMordekhayi umJuda wayengowesibili enkosini uAhasuwerusi, emkhulu phakathi kwamaJuda, ethandeka kunengi lwabafowabo, edingela isizwe sakibo okuhle, ekhuluma ukuthula kuyo yonke inzalo yakhe." 
Job1:1 Kwakukhona indoda elizweni leUzi, ibizo layo lalinguJobe. Leyondoda yayiphelele-ke, iqondile, imesaba uNkulunkulu, ixwaya okubi." 
Job1:2 Yasizalelwa amadodana ayisikhombisa lamadodakazi amathathu. 
Job1:3 Lemfuyo yayo yayiyizimvu eziyizinkulungwane eziyisikhombisa, lamakamela ayizinkulungwane ezintathu, lezipane zenkabi ezingamakhulu amahlanu, labobabhemi abasikazi abangamakhulu amahlanu, lenceku ezinengi kakhulu. Ngakho lowomuntu wayemkhulu okwedlula bonke abantu bempumalanga." 
Job1:4 Njalo amadodana akhe ahamba enza idili endlini yaleyo laleyo ngosuku lwayo; athuma abiza odadewabo abathathu ukuze badle banathe lawo. 
Job1:5 Kwakusithi lapho esephelile amazopha ensuku zedili, uJobe athume, awangcwelise, avuke ekuseni kakhulu, anikele iminikelo yokutshiswa ngokw enani lawo wonke, ngoba uJobe wathi: Mhlawumbe amadodana ami onile, amthuka uNkulunkulu enhliziyweni yawo. Wenza njalo uJobe zonke izinsuku." 
Job1:6 Kwasekusiba losuku lapho amadodana kaNkulunkulu eza ukuzimisa phambi kwe Nkosi, loSathane laye wafika phakathi kwawo." 
Job1:7 I Nkosi yasisithi kuSathane: Uvela ngaphi? USathane wasephendula i Nkosi wathi: Ekuzulazuleni emhlabeni lekuhambahambeni kuwo. 
Job1:8 I Nkosi yasisithi kuSathane: Ubekile yini inhliziyo yakho encekwini yami uJobe, ngoba kakho onjengayo emhlabeni, umuntu opheleleyo loqondileyo, owesaba uNkulunkulu loxwaya ububi?" 
Job1:9 USathane wasephendula i Nkosi wathi: UJobe umesabela ize uNkulunkulu yini? 
Job1:10 Kawumbiyelanga yini yena lendlu yakhe lakho konke alakho inhlangothi zonke? Ubusisile umsebenzi wezandla zakhe, lezifuyo zakhe zanda kakhulu elizweni." 
Job1:11 Kodwa isibili yelula isandla sakho khathesi, uthinte konke alakho; sibili uzakuthuka ebusweni bakho." 
Job1:12 I Nkosi yasisithi kuSathane: Khangela konke alakho kusesandleni sakho; kuphela kuye ungeluleli isandla sakho. Wasephuma uSathane phambi kwe Nkosi. 
Job1:13 Kwasekusiba losuku lapho amadodana lamadodakazi akhe ayesidla enatha iwayini endlini yomfowabo, izibulo." 
Job1:14 Kwasekufika isithunywa kuJobe sathi: Inkabi bezilima labobabhemi besidla emaceleni azo; 
Job1:15 kwasekutheleka amaShebha, akuthatha, atshaya izinceku ngobukhali benkemba, njalo yimi ngedwa kuphela engiphephileyo ukuze ngikubikele." 
Job1:16 Lesi sisakhuluma, kwafika lesinye, sathi: Umlilo kaNkulunkulu uwile uvela emazulwini, watshisa phakathi kwezimvu laphakathi kwezinceku, waziqeda; njalo yimi ngedwa kuphela engiphephileyo ukuze ngikubikele." 
Job1:17 Lesi sisakhuluma, kwafika lesinye, sathi: AmaKhaladiya amise amaxuku amathathu atheleka phezu kwamakamela, awathatha, atshaya izinceku ngobukhali benkemba, njalo yimi ngedwa kuphela engiphephileyo ukuze ngikubikele." 
Job1:18 Lesi sisakhuluma, kwafika lesinye, sathi: Amadodana akho lamadodakazi akho bebesidla benatha iwayini endlini yomfowabo, izibulo." 
Job1:19 Khangela-ke, umoya omkhulu wafika uvela ngaphetsheya kwenkangala, watshaya amagumbi womane endlu, yawela phezu kwamajaha, afa; njalo yimi ngedwa kuphela engiphephileyo ukuze ngikubikele." 
Job1:20 UJobe wasesukuma, wadabula ibhatshi lakhe, waphuca ikhanda lakhe, wawa emhlabathini, wakhonza;" 
Job1:21 wasesithi: Ngaphuma ngize esiswini sikamama, njalo ngizabuyela khona ngize; i Nkosi yapha, i Nkosi ithethe; kalibusiswe ibizo le Nkosi." 
Job1:22 Kukho konke lokhu uJobe konanga, kambalelanga ubuwula uNkulunkulu." 
Job2:1 Kwakulosuku futhi lapho amadodana kaNkulunkulu afika ukuzimisa phambi kwe Nkosi, uSathane laye wafika phakathi kwawo ukuzimisa phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Job2:2 I Nkosi yasisithi kuSathane: Uvela ngaphi? USathane wasephendula i Nkosi wathi: Ekuzulazuleni emhlabeni lekuhambahambeni kuwo. 
Job2:3 I Nkosi yasisithi kuSathane: Ubekile yini inhliziyo yakho encekwini yami uJobe? Ngoba kakho onjengaye emhlabeni, umuntu opheleleyo loqondileyo, owesaba uNkulunkulu, loxwaya ububi? Usabambelele kubo ubuqotho bakhe, lanxa ungivuse ukuze ngimmimilize kungelasizatho." 
Job2:4 USathane wasephendula i Nkosi wathi: Isikhumba ngesikhumba, yebo, konke umuntu alakho uzakunikelela impilo yakhe." 
Job2:5 Kodwa khathesi yelula isandla sakho, uthinte ithambo lakhe lenyama yakhe; isibili uzakuthuka ebusweni bakho." 
Job2:6 I Nkosi yasisithi kuSathane: Khangela, usesandleni sakho; kodwa gcina impilo yakhe." 
Job2:7 USathane wasephuma phambi kwe Nkosi, wamtshaya uJobe ngamathumba amabi, kusukela ngaphansi konyawo lwakhe kuze kube enkanda yakhe." 
Job2:8 Wasezithathela udengezi ukuziphala ngalo, wahlala phakathi kwesilotha." 
Job2:9 Umkakhe wasesithi kuye: Usabambelele yini kubuqotho bakho? Thuka uNkulunkulu, ufe." 
Job2:10 Kodwa wathi kuye: Ukhuluma njengokukhuluma komunye wabesifazana abayizithutha. Kambe, sizakwemukela okuhle kuNkulunkulu, singemukeli lokubi yini? Kukho konke lokhu uJobe konanga ngendebe zakhe." 
Job2:11 Abangane abathathu bakaJobe sebezwile ngakho konke lokhu okubi okumehleleyo, beza, lowo lalowo evela endaweni yakhe, uElifazi umThemani, loBilidadi umShuhi, loZofari umNahama; bavumelana ndawonye ukuthi beze bamkhalele bamduduze." 
Job2:12 Lapho bephakamisa amehlo abo bekhatshana, kabamazanga, baphakamisa ilizwi labo, bakhala inyembezi, badabula ngulowo ibhatshi lakhe, bavuvuzela uthuli emakhanda abo ngasemazulwini." 
Job2:13 Basebehlala laye emhlabathini insuku eziyisikhombisa lobusuku obuyisikhombisa, njalo kakho owakhuluma ilizwi kuye, ngoba babona ukuthi ubuhlungu bukhulu kakhulu." 
Job3:1 Emva kwalokho uJobe wavula umlomo wakhe, waqalekisa usuku lwakhe." 
Job3:2 UJobe wasephendula wathi: 
Job3:3 Kalubhubhe usuku engazalwa ngalo, lobusuku okwathiwa ngalo: Kukhulelwe umntwana wesilisa." 
Job3:4 Lolosuku kalube ngumnyama, uNkulunkulu angalunanzi ephezulu, lokukhanya kungalukhanyisi." 
Job3:5 Umnyama lethunzi lokufa kakulubange, iyezi lihlale phezu kwalo, umnyama welanga ulesabise." 
Job3:6 Lobobusuku, umnyama ububambe, lungathokozi ensukwini zomnyaka, lungezi kunani lezinyanga." 
Job3:7 Khangela, lobobusuku kabube yinyumba, umsindo wentokozo ungangeni kubo." 
Job3:8 Kababuqalekise abaqalekisi bosuku, abalungele ukuvusa uLeviyathani*." 
Job3:9 Zibe mnyama inkanyezi zokusa kwabo, bulindele ukukhanya, kodwa kungabi khona, bungaboni inkophe zokusa." 
Job3:10 Ngoba bungavalanga iminyango yesisu sika mama wami, bungafihlanga usizi emehlweni ami." 
Job3:11 Kungani ngingafanga kusukela esizalweni, ngiphele ekuphumeni kwami esiswini?" 
Job3:12 Kungani amadolo angandulela? Kungani lamabele ukuthi ngimunye? 
Job3:13 Ngoba khathesi ngabe ngacambalala ngathula, ngalala, khona ngaba lokuphumula," 
Job3:14 kanye lamakhosi labeluleki bomhlaba abazakhela amanxiwa," 
Job3:15 kumbe kanye leziphathamandla ezazilegolide ezagcwalisa izindlu zazo ngesiliva. 
Job3:16 Kumbe njengomphunzo ofihliweyo ngingabi khona, njengensane e zingabonanga ukukhanya." 
Job3:17 Lapho ababi bayekela ukuhlupha, lapho abakhathele ngamandla bephumula." 
Job3:18 Izibotshwa ziyaphumula ndawonye, kazizwa ilizwi lomcindezeli." 
Job3:19 Omncinyane lomkhulu balapho, lesigqili sikhululekile enkosini yaso." 
Job3:20 Kungani enika ukukhanya kohluphekayo, lempilo kwabalokubaba komphefumulo;" 
Job3:21 abalindele ukufa, kodwa kungekho, bekugebha kulenotho efihliweyo," 
Job3:22 abathabayo kakhulu ngentokozo, bajabule lapho bethola ingcwaba?" 
Job3:23 Emuntwini yini, ondlela yakhe ifihliwe, uNkulunkulu ambiyeleyo?" 
Job3:24 Ngoba ukububula kwami kuza phambi kokudla kwami, lokubhonga kwami kuthululeka njengamanzi." 
Job3:25 Ngoba engikwesabayo ngokwesaba sekungehlele, lengilovalo ngakho kufikile kimi." 
Job3:26 Ngangingahlalisekanga, ngingaphumuli, ngingelakuthula, lohlupho lweza." 
Job4:1 UElifazi umThemani wasephendula wathi: 
Job4:2 Uba sizama ilizwi kuwe, uzadabuka yini? Kodwa ngubani ongazibamba emazwini?" 
Job4:3 Khangela, uqondisile abanengi, waqinisa izandla ezibuthakathaka." 
Job4:4 Amazwi akho amvusile okhubekayo, waqinisa amadolo axegayo." 
Job4:5 Kodwa khathesi kufikile kuwe, uyadinwa; kuyakuthinta wena, utshaywa luvalo." 
Job4:6 Ukwesaba kwakho uNkulunkulu kakusiso isibindi sakho yini, lobuqotho bendlela zakho ithemba lakho?" 
Job4:7 Akukhumbule, ngubani owake wachithwa engelacala? Kumbe abalungileyo bake baqunywa ngaphi?" 
Job4:8 Njengengikubonileyo, abalima ububi behlanyela udubo, bavuna khona." 
Job4:9 Ngokuphephetha kukaNkulunkulu bayabhubha, langokuphefumula kwamakhala akhe bayaphela." 
Job4:10 Ukubhonga kwesilwane, lelizwi lesilwane esesabekayo, lamazinyo amabhongo esilwane, kwephukile." 
Job4:11 Isilwane esidala siyabhubha ngokuswela impango, lemidlwane yesilwanekazi isabalale." 
Job4:12 Ngasenginyenyezelwa ilizwi, lendlebe yami yemukela okuncinyane kwalo." 
Job4:13 Phakathi kwemicabango yemibono yebusuku, lapho ubuthongo obukhulu busehlela abantu," 
Job4:14 ukwesaba kwangifikela lokuthuthumela okwenza ubunengi bamathambo ami baqhaqhazela. 
Job4:15 Kwasekusedlula umoya ebusweni bami, loboya benyama yami bavuka." 
Job4:16 Wema, kodwa angikuqondanga ukubonakala kwawo; isimo sasiphambi kwamehlo ami; kwathula, ngasengisizwa ilizwi lisithi:" 
Job4:17 Kambe umuntu angalunga okwedlula uNkulunkulu? Umuntu angahlambuluka okwedlula uMenzi wakhe yini? 
Job4:18 Khangela, kazithembi inceku zakhe, lengilosi zakhe uzibeka icala." 
Job4:19 Kangakanani abahlala endlini zebumba, abasisekelo sabo sisethulini, a bachotshozwa phambi kwenundu." 
Job4:20 Bakhandwa kusukela ekuseni kuze kube kusihlwa, kungelakunanzwa bayabhubha kuze kube nininini." 
Job4:21 Ubuhle babo kabususwa labo yini? Bayafa kodwa bengalanhlakanipho. 
Job5:1 Ake umemeze, ukhona ongakuphendula yini? Uzaphendukela kuwuphi wabangcwele?" 
Job5:2 Ngoba ulaka luyasibulala isiwula, lomhawu ubulale isiphukuphuku." 
Job5:3 Mina ngibone isiwula sigxila, kodwa ngahle ngaqalekisa indawo yaso yokuhlala." 
Job5:4 Abantwana baso bakhatshana losindiso, bachothozwa esangweni, njalo kungekho umkhululi." 
Job5:5 Osivuno saso olambileyo uyasidla, esithatha lemeveni, lomphangi uginya inotho yaso." 
Job5:6 Ngoba usizi kaluveli ethulini, lenhlupheko kayihlumi emhlabathini." 
Job5:7 Kube kanti umuntu uzalelwe inhlupheko njengoba inhlansi ziqhatshela phezulu. 
Job5:8 Kodwa mina bengizadinga uNkulunkulu, lakuNkulunkulu bengizabeka udaba lwami." 
Job5:9 Owenza izinto ezinkulu lezingelakuhlolwa, imimangaliso engelakubalwa." 
Job5:10 Onika izulu ebusweni bomhlaba, athumele amanzi ebusweni bamaphandle," 
Job5:11 ukuze abamise phezulu abaphansi, ukuze abalilayo baphakanyiselwe e kuvikelek eni." 
Job5:12 Uchitha amacebo abalobuqili, ukuze izandla zabo zingenzi cebo." 
Job5:13 Ubamba abahlakaniphileyo ebuqilini babo, ukuze icebo labangaqondanga liwiselwe phansi." 
Job5:14 Bahlangana lomnyama emini, baphumputhe phakathi kwemini njengebusuku." 
Job5:15 Kodwa ukhulula umyanga enkembeni, emlonyeni wabo, lesandleni solamandla." 
Job5:16 Ngakho umyanga ulethemba, lobubi buzavala umlomo wabo." 
Job5:17 Khangela, ubusisiwe lowomuntu uNkulunkulu amlayayo; ngakho ungadeleli ukukhuza kukaSomandla." 
Job5:18 Ngoba yena uzwisa ubuhlungu, abuye abophe; uyalimaza, lezandla zakhe ziyapholisa." 
Job5:19 Uzakukhulula enhluphekweni eziyisithupha, lakweziyisikhombisa ububi kabuyikukuthinta." 
Job5:20 Endlaleni uzakuhlenga ekufeni, lempini emandleni enkemba." 
Job5:21 Uzafihlelwa isiswepu solimi, njalo kawuyikwesaba incithakalo lapho ifika." 
Job5:22 Uzahleka incithakalo lendlala, njalo kawuyikwesaba izilo zomhlaba." 
Job5:23 Ngoba uzakuba lesivumelwano lamatshe eganga, lezilo zeganga zizakuba lokuthula lawe." 
Job5:24 Njalo uzakwazi ukuthi ithente lakho lilokuthula, uzakwethekela indawo yakho yokuhlala ungasweli lutho." 
Job5:25 Uzakwazi futhi ukuthi inzalo yakho izakuba nengi, lomdeni wakho njengotshani bomhlaba." 
Job5:26 Uzafika engcwabeni lakho usuluphele, njengenqumbi zamabele zisenyuka ngesikhathi sawo." 
Job5:27 Khangela lokhu, sesikuhlolile; kunjalo. Kuzwe, uzazele wena." 
Job6:1 UJobe wasephendula wathi: 
Job6:2 Kungathi ukudabuka kwami bekungalinganiswa lokulinganiswa, lenhlupheko yami ibekwe ndawonye esikalini!" 
Job6:3 Ngoba khathesi kungaba nzima kuletshebetshebe lolwandle. Ngenxa yalokho amazwi ami aginyiwe. 
Job6:4 Ngoba imitshoko kaSomandla iphakathi kwami, obuhlungu bayo umoya wami uyabunatha; izesabiso zikaNkulunkulu ziyazihlela zimelene lami." 
Job6:5 Ubabhemi weganga uyakhala yini esohlazeni, kumbe inkabi iyakhonya yini ekudleni kwayo?" 
Job6:6 Kambe okuduma kungadliwa kungelatswayi? Kulokuhlabusa kokumhlophe kweqanda yini? 
Job6:7 Umphefumulo wami uyala ukukuthinta, kunjengokudla kwami okunengekayo." 
Job6:8 Kungathi isicelo sami singafika, njalo uNkulunkulu a ngi nike ithemba lami," 
Job6:9 ukuthi kumthokozise uNkulunkulu ukungichoboza, ayekele isandla sakhe, angiqume." 
Job6:10 Khona kungahlala kube yinduduzo yami, bengingajabula ebuhlungwini bami; kangayekeli; ngoba kangiwafihlanga amazwi oNgcwele." 
Job6:11 Ayini amandla ami ukuze ngithembe? Lokuphela kwami kuyini ukuze ngelule impilo yami? 
Job6:12 Amandla ami angamandla amatshe yini? Inyama yami ilithusi yini? 
Job6:13 Usizo lwami kalukimi yini? Lenhlakanipho iyaxotshwa kimi yini? 
Job6:14 Ohluphekayo nga ehawukelwa ngumngane wakhe, kodwa udela ukwesabeka kukaSomandla." 
Job6:15 Abafowethu kabenzanga ngokuthembeka njengesifula, njengempophoma yezifula bayedlula," 
Job6:16 ezimnyama ngenxa yongqwaqwane, okucatsha kizo iliqhwa elikhithikayo." 
Job6:17 Ngesikhathi sokufudumala kwazo ziyanyamalala, sekutshisa zicitshe endaweni yazo." 
Job6:18 Imikhondo yendlela yazo iyajika, yenyukele enkangala ibhubhe." 
Job6:19 Izihambi zeTema zakhangela, indwendwe zezihambi zeShebha zalindela kuyo." 
Job6:20 Zaba lenhloni ngoba zazithembile, zafika kuyo zayangeka." 
Job6:21 Ngoba khathesi kalisilutho; liyabona isesabiso, liyesaba." 
Job6:22 Ngitshilo yini ukuthi: Lethani kimi? Kumbe: Phanini isipho ngenxa yami empahleni yenu? 
Job6:23 Kumbe: Ngikhululani esandleni sesitha? Kumbe: Lingihlenge esandleni sabalesihluku? 
Job6:24 Ngifundisani, khona mina ngizathula; lingenze ngiqedisise engiduhe khona." 
Job6:25 Alamandla angakanani amazwi aqotho; kodwa ukusola okuvela kini kusolani? 
Job6:26 Likhumbula amazwi okusola yini, lezinkulumo zophelelwe lithemba zingumoya?" 
Job6:27 Yebo, li zi wisela phezu kwentandane, ligebhele umngane wenu umgodi." 
Job6:28 Ngakho-ke, vumani lingikhangele, ngoba kuphambi kobuso benu nxa ngiqamba amanga." 
Job6:29 Ake liphenduke, kungabi lobubi, yebo, libuye liphenduke, ukulunga kwami kukukho." 
Job6:30 Kambe kukhona ububi olimini lwami? Ukunambitha kwami bekungehlukanise yini izinto ezimbi? 
Job7:1 Kakukho yini imfazo kumuntu emhlabeni, lensuku zakhe ka zinjengensuku zoqatshiweyo yini?" 
Job7:2 Njengesigqili sikhefuzelela umthunzi, lanjengesiqatshwa silindele iholo laso," 
Job7:3 ngokunjalo mina ngidliswe ilifa lenyanga zeze, lobusuku bezinhlupheko bubalelwe mina." 
Job7:4 Lapho ngilala phansi ngithi: Ngizavuka nini? Ngoba ubusuku bude, njalo ngigcwele ukutshukuma kuze kuse." 
Job7:5 Inyama yami yembethe impethu lamagade othuli; isikhumba sami siyadabuka siyenyanyeka. 
Job7:6 Insuku zami ziyaphangisa kuleselukiso someluki, ziphele kungelathemba." 
Job7:7 Khumbula ukuthi impilo yami ingumoya; ilihlo lami kaliyikuphinda libone okuhle. 
Job7:8 Ilihlo longibonayo kaliyikungibona futhi; amehlo akho aphezu kwami, kodwa ngizakuba nginga se kho." 
Job7:9 Iyezi liyaphela linyamalale; ngokunjalo owehlela engcwabeni kayikwenyuka. 
Job7:10 Kaphindi abuyele emzini wakhe, lendawo yakhe kayisayikumazi." 
Job7:11 Ngakho mina kangiyikubamba umlomo wami; ngizakhuluma ekucindezelweni komoya wami, ngisole ekubabeni komphefumulo wami." 
Job7:12 Ngilulwandle yini, kumbe isilo solwandle, ukuze lingibekele abalindi?" 
Job7:13 Lapho ngisithi: Umbheda wami uzangiduduza, icansi lami liphungule ukusola kwami;" 
Job7:14 ubusungiqhaqhazelisa ngamaphupho, angethuse ngemibono;" 
Job7:15 ukuze umphefumulo wami ukhethe ukuklinywa, ukufa kulamathambo ami." 
Job7:16 Ngiyanengwa yikho, kangiyikuphila njalonjalo; ngiyekele, ngoba insuku zami ziyize." 
Job7:17 Uyini umuntu ukuthi umkhulise, lokuthi ubeke inhliziyo yakho kuye," 
Job7:18 lokuthi umhambele ikuseni yonke, umlinge sonke isikhathi?" 
Job7:19 Koze kube nini ungayekeli ukungiqaphela, ungangiyekeli ngize ngiginye amathe ami yini?" 
Job7:20 Ngonile, ngizakwenzani kuwe, wena mlindi wabantu? Ungimiseleni ngibe yinto yakho yokunenjwa, ngize ngibe ngumthwalo kimi?" 
Job7:21 Njalo kawuthetheleli ngani isiphambeko sami, ususe isono sami? Ngoba sengizalala phansi othulini; uzangidinga ngovivi, kodwa kangiyikuba khona." 
Job8:1 Wasephendula uBilidadi umShuhi wathi: 
Job8:2 Koze kube nini ukhuluma lezizinto, lamazwi omlomo wakho abe ngumoya olamandla?" 
Job8:3 UNkulunkulu uyahlanekela isahlulelo yini? Kumbe uSomandla uyahlanekela ukulunga yini? 
Job8:4 Uba abantwana bakho bonile kuye, yena usebalahlile emandleni esiphambeko sabo;" 
Job8:5 uba wena umdinga uNkulunkulu ngovivi, uncenge kuSomandla;" 
Job8:6 uba uhlambulukile, uqotho; isibili khathesi ubezavuka ngenxa yakho, aphumelelise indawo yokuhlala yokulunga kwakho." 
Job8:7 Lanxa ukuqala kwakho bekukuncinyane, kube kanti isiphetho sakho sizakwanda kakhulu." 
Job8:8 Ngoba ake ubuze esizukulwaneni sakuqala, uzilungisele isidingo saboyise." 
Job8:9 Ngoba singabezolo, njalo kasazi, ngoba insuku zethu emhlabeni ziyisithunzi." 
Job8:10 Kabayikukufundisa yini, bakutshele, bakhuphe amazwi enhliziyweni yabo?" 
Job8:11 Imihlanga ingakhula lapho okungelaxhaphozi khona yini? Ibhuma likhule lapho okungelamanzi khona? 
Job8:12 Nxa lisebuluhlazeni balo linga ka khiwa, kube kanti libuna kuqala kwazo zonke izihlahlakazana." 
Job8:13 Zinjalo indlela zabo bonke abamkhohlwayo uNkulunkulu, lethemba lomzenzisi lizabhubha." 
Job8:14 Othemba lakhe lizaqunywa, lokuthemba kwakhe kuyibulembu besayobe." 
Job8:15 Uyeyama endlini yakhe, kodwa kayimi; ubambelela kiyo, kodwa kayihlali." 
Job8:16 Uluhlaza phambi kwelanga, lamahlumela akhe aphuma esivandeni sakhe." 
Job8:17 Impande zakhe zithandele enqumbini; ubona indawo yamatshe. 
Job8:18 Uba emchitha endaweni yakhe, izamphika ithi: Kangizange ngikubone." 
Job8:19 Khangela, le yintokozo yendlela yakhe; njalo kuzakhula abanye emhlabathini." 
Job8:20 Khangela, uNkulunkulu kayikumlahla opheleleyo, kabambi isandla sabenzi bobubi." 
Job8:21 Aze agcwalise umlomo wakho ngohleko, lezindebe zakho ngokumemeza kwentokozo." 
Job8:22 Abakuzondayo bazakwembeswa ngenhloni, lethente lababi lingabi khona." 
Job9:1 UJobe wasephendula wathi: 
Job9:2 Ngeqiniso ngiyazi ukuthi kunjalo. Kodwa umuntu angalunga njani kuNkulunkulu? 
Job9:3 Uba efisa ukuphikisana laye, kayikumphendula okukodwa phakathi kwenkulungwane." 
Job9:4 Uhlakaniphile enhliziyweni, uqinile emandleni: Ngubani oziqinisileyo wamelana laye waphumelela?" 
Job9:5 Osusa izintaba njalo zingazi, ozigenqula entukuthelweni yakhe." 
Job9:6 Onyikinya umhlaba awususe endaweni yawo, lensika zawo zizamazame." 
Job9:7 Olaya ilanga ukuthi lingaphumi, avalele inkanyezi ngophawu." 
Job9:8 Owendlala amazulu eyedwa, anyathele phezu kwezingqonga zolwandle." 
Job9:9 Owenza iBhere, iziNja, lesiLimela, lamakamelo eningizimu." 
Job9:10 Owenza izinto ezinkulu ezingelakuhlolwa, lezimangalisayo ezingelakubalwa." 
Job9:11 Khangela, uyedlula phansi kwami nginga m boni, edlulele phambili ngingamuzwa." 
Job9:12 Khangela, uyahluthuna, ngubani ongamnqanda? Ngubani ongathi kuye: Wenzani?" 
Job9:13 UNkulunkulu kayinqandi intukuthelo yakhe. Abasizi bokuziqhenya bayakhothama phansi kwakhe. 
Job9:14 Pho-ke, mina ngingamphendula ngithini, ngikhethe amazwi ami okuqondana laye?" 
Job9:15 Ebengingeke ngamphendula loba bengilungile; ngizacela isihawu kumahluleli wami. 
Job9:16 Uba bengibizile, wangiphendula, bengingayikukholwa ukuthi ubekile indlebe elizwini lami." 
Job9:17 Ngoba uyangihlifiza ngesiphepho, andise amanxeba ami kungelasizatho." 
Job9:18 Kangivumeli ukukhokha umoya, kodwa engigcwalisa ngezinto ezibabayo." 
Job9:19 Uba ku ngamandla, khangela, ul amandla. Njalo uba ku ngesahlulelo, ngubani ozangimisela isikhathi?" 
Job9:20 Aluba ngilungile, umlomo wami uzangilahla; uba ngiphelele, uzakuthi ngonakele." 
Job9:21 Ngiphelele, angikhathaleli umphefumulo wami, ngidelela impilo yami." 
Job9:22 Kunye lokho, ngenxa yalokho ngithi: Uyabhubhisa olungileyo lomubi." 
Job9:23 Lapho isiswepu sibulala ngokujumayo, uzahleka ukudangala kwabangelacala." 
Job9:24 Umhlaba unikelwe esandleni somubi; wembesa ubuso babehluleli bawo. Uba kungenjalo, pho, ngubani?" 
Job9:25 Njalo insuku zami zilejubane kulesigijimi; ziyabaleka, kaziboni okuhle." 
Job9:26 Ziyedlula njengezikepe zomhlanga, njengokhozi olutheleka empangweni." 
Job9:27 Uba ngisithi: Ngizakhohlwa ukusola kwami, ngitshiye ukunyukumala kwami, ngithokoze," 
Job9:28 ngiyesaba zonke insizi zami, ngiyazi ukuthi kawuyikungiphatha njengongelacala." 
Job9:29 Ngilecala mina, pho, ngizatshikatshikelelani ize?" 
Job9:30 Uba ngizigezisa ngamanzi eliqhwa elikhithikayo, ngihlambulule izandla zami ngesepa," 
Job9:31 khona uzangiphosela emgodini, besengisenyanywa yizigqoko zami." 
Job9:32 Ngoba kasuye umuntu njengami ukuze ngimphendule, ukuze siye ndawonye kusahlulelo." 
Job9:33 Kakukho umqamuli phakathi kwethu o ngabeka isandla sakhe phezu kwethu sobabili. 
Job9:34 Kasuse uswazi lwakhe kimi, njalo uvalo ngaye lungangethusi." 
Job9:35 Bengingakhuluma ngingamesabi, kodwa anginjalo ngokwami." 
Job10:1 Umphefumulo wami ukhathele yimpilo yami; ngizatshiya insolo yami phezu kwami; ngizakhuluma ekubabeni komphefumulo wami. 
Job10:2 Ngizakuthi kuNkulunkulu: Ungangilahli; ngazisa ukuthi kungani uphikisana lami. 
Job10:3 Kuhle yini kuwe ukuthi ucindezele, ukuthi udelele umsebenzi wezandla zakho, ukhanye phezu kwecebo lababi?" 
Job10:4 Ulamehlo enyama yini? Ubona njengokubona komuntu? 
Job10:5 Insuku zakho zinjengensuku zomuntu na? Iminyaka yakho injengensuku zomuntu yini," 
Job10:6 ukuthi udinge ngobubi bami, uhlolisise ngesono sami?" 
Job10:7 Ngoba usazi ukuthi kangikhohlakalanga, lokuthi kakho ongakhulula esandleni sakho." 
Job10:8 Izandla zakho zangibumba zangenza kanyekanye inhlangothi zonke, kanti uyangiginya." 
Job10:9 Ake ukhumbule ukuthi wangenza njengebumba. Pho, uzangibuyisela ethulini?" 
Job10:10 Kawungithululanga njengochago, wangijiyisa njengamasi yini?" 
Job10:11 Ungigqokise isigogo lenyama, wangihlanganisa ndawonye ngamathambo langemisipha." 
Job10:12 Ungenzele impilo lomusa, lokunakekela kwakho kulondolozile umoya wami." 
Job10:13 Kanti lezizinto uzifihlile enhliziyweni yakho; ngiyazi ukuthi lokhu kukuwe. 
Job10:14 Uba ngisona, ungiqaphele, kawuyikungiyekela ngingelacala esonweni sami." 
Job10:15 Uba ngimubi, maye kimi! Uba ngilungile, bengingayikuphakamisa ikhanda lami. Ngigcwele ihlazo, ngakho bona inhlupheko yami." 
Job10:16 Ngoba kuyaziphakamisa; uyangizingela njengesilwane; ubuye uzenze okumangalisayo kimi. 
Job10:17 Uyavuselela abafakazi bakho abamelene lami, wandise ulaka lwakho kimi; izinguquko lempi kulami." 
Job10:18 Pho kungani wangikhupha esizalweni? Kungathi ngabe ngaphela, lelihlo lingangibonanga!" 
Job10:19 Ngangizakuba njengokungathi kangikho; ngangizathwalwa ngisuswe esizalweni ngisiwe engcwabeni. 
Job10:20 Insuku zami kazinlutshwana yini? Khawula phela, ungiyekele ukuze ngithokoze kancinyane," 
Job10:21 ngingakayi - ngingabuyi - elizweni lomnyama lethunzi lokufa," 
Job10:22 ilizwe lomnyama, njengobumnyama, ithunzi lokufa, elingelahlelo, lokukhanya kunjengobumnyama." 
Job11:1 Wasephendula uZofari umNahama wathi: 
Job11:2 Kambe kabuphendulwa yini ubunengi bamazwi? Njalo isilawuli singalungisiswa yini? 
Job11:3 Ukulawula kwakho kuzathulisa abantu yini? Lapho ukloloda, kakho onga ku yangisa yini?" 
Job11:4 Ngoba uthe: Imfundiso yami ihlanzekile, ngihlambulukile emehlweni akho." 
Job11:5 Kodwa-ke kungathi uNkulunkulu angakhuluma, avule indebe zakhe kuwe," 
Job11:6 ukuze akwazise imfihlakalo zenhlakanipho, ukuthi ziphindwe kabili kulokho okuyikho. Yazi-ke ukuthi uNkulunkulu ubiza kuwe okulutshwana kulecala lakho." 
Job11:7 Ngo kuhlola ungamfumana uNkulunkulu na? Ungamfumana yini uSomandla kuze kube sekupheleleni? 
Job11:8 Kuphakeme nje ngamazulu, ungenzani? Kutshonile kulesihogo, ungazini?" 
Job11:9 Isilinganiso sakho side kulomhlaba, sibanzi kulolwandle." 
Job11:10 Uba esedlula avalele kumbe abuthanise, ngubani-ke ongamnqanda?" 
Job11:11 Ngoba yena uyabazi abantu abayize, uyabona ububi; ngakho kayiku ku qaphelisa yini?" 
Job11:12 Ngoba umuntu oyisiphukuphuku angaba lokuqedisisa, lanxa umuntu engazalwa njeng ethole likababhemi weganga." 
Job11:13 Uba wena ulungisa inhliziyo yakho, welulele izandla zakho kuye," 
Job11:14 uba ububi busesandleni sakho, bubeke khatshana, lobubi kabungahlali emathenteni akho." 
Job11:15 Ngoba ng’khona uzaphakamisa ubuso bakho ungelasici, njalo uqine, ungesabi." 
Job11:16 Ngoba wena uzakhohlwa usizi lwakho, u lu khumbule njengamanzi asedlulile." 
Job11:17 Lobude bempilo yakho buzakhanya kulemini enkulu; loba kulomnyama kuzakuba njengekuseni. 
Job11:18 Njalo uzakuba lethemba ngoba kulethemba; uzagebha, uzalala ngokuvikeleka." 
Job11:19 Uzalala, njalo kakho oza kw ethusa, labanengi bazancenga phambi kwakho." 
Job11:20 Kodwa amehlo ababi azafiphala, lesiphephelo sizachitheka kubo, lethemba labo lizakuba yikuphela komphefumulo." 
Job12:1 Wasephendula uJobe wathi: 
Job12:2 Ngoba isibili lingabantu, lenhlakanipho izakufa lani." 
Job12:3 Lami ngilengqondo njengani, kangiphansi kulani. Njalo ngubani ongelazo izinto ezinje?" 
Job12:4 Ngiyinhlekisa kumngane wami, obiza kuNkulunkulu amphendule; olungileyo oqondileyo uyinhlekisa." 
Job12:5 Uyisibane esidelelekayo emnakanweni wowonwabileyo; ulungele ukutshelela ngonyawo. 
Job12:6 Amathente abaphangi alokuthula, labamthukuthelisayo uNkulunkulu bavikelekile, kulowo oletha uNkulunkulu esandleni sakhe." 
Job12:7 Kodwa-ke buza khathesi inyamazana, zizakufundisa, lenyoni zamazulu, zizakutshela." 
Job12:8 Kumbe khuluma lomhlaba, uzakufundisa, lenhlanzi zolwandle zizakulandisela." 
Job12:9 Ngubani ongaziyo phakathi kwakho konke lokhu ukuthi isandla sikaJehova sikwenzile lokhu? 
Job12:10 Okusesandleni sakhe umphefumulo wakho konke okuphilayo, lomoya wayo yonke inyama yomuntu." 
Job12:11 Indlebe kayihloli yini amazwi, njengolwanga luzinambithela ukudla?" 
Job12:12 Kwabadala kakhulu kulenhlakanipho, l e bud eni bezinsuku kulokuqedisisa." 
Job12:13 Kuye kukhona inhlakanipho lamandla, uleseluleko lokuqedisisa." 
Job12:14 Khangela, udiliza, kungabe kusakhiwa; uvalela umuntu, kungabe kusavulwa." 
Job12:15 Khangela, uvimbela amanzi, atshe; abesewathuma, agenqule umhlaba." 
Job12:16 Kuye kukhona amandla lenhlakanipho; okhohlisiweyo lomkhohlisi bangabakhe. 
Job12:17 Ukhupha abeluleki bahambe behlutshulwe, enze abehluleli babe yizithutha." 
Job12:18 Uthukulula isibopho samakhosi, abophe umbhinco enkalweni zawo." 
Job12:19 Ukhupha abapristi bahambe behlutshulwe, awise abalamandla." 
Job12:20 Uphambula inkulumo yabathembekileyo, asuse ukuqedisisa kwabasebekhulile." 
Job12:21 Uthela ukudelela phezu kweziphathamandla, axegise umbhinco wabalamandla." 
Job12:22 Wembula izinto ezijulileyo ezisemnyameni, akhuphele ekukhanyeni ithunzi lokufa." 
Job12:23 Enze izizwe zibe zinkulu, abesezichitha; andise izizwe, abesezisusa." 
Job12:24 Ususa inhliziyo yenhloko zabantu bomhlaba, aziduhise enkangala e ngelandlela." 
Job12:25 Ziphumputhe emnyameni kungelakukhanya, uzenza zidiyazele njengodakiweyo." 
Job13:1 Khangela, konke ilihlo lami likubonile, indlebe yami izwile yakuqedisisa." 
Job13:2 Njengokolwazi lwenu lami ngiyakwazi; kangiphansi kulani. 
Job13:3 Kodwa mina ngizakhuluma loSomandla, ngifisa ukuqondisana loNkulunkulu." 
Job13:4 Kodwa lina-ke ligcona ngamanga, lonke lingabelaphi abangelamsebenzi." 
Job13:5 Kungathi ngabe liyathula lithi zwi; lokhu kube yinhlakanipho kini! 
Job13:6 Ake lizwe ukuzivikela kwami, lilalele impikiso zendebe zami." 
Job13:7 Lizamkhulumela uNkulunkulu ngokubi, limkhulumele ngenkohliso yini?" 
Job13:8 Lizakwemukela ubuso bakhe, lizammela yini uNkulunkulu?" 
Job13:9 Kuzakuba kuhle yini lapho elihlola? Lizamkhohlisa yini njengokhohlisa umuntu? 
Job13:10 Isibili uzalisola, uba lisemukela ubuso ensitha." 
Job13:11 Ubukhulu bakhe kabulethusi yini, lokwesabeka kwakhe kulehlele?" 
Job13:12 Izikhumbuzo zenu ziyizaga zomlotha, impendulo zenu zizimpendulo zebumba." 
Job13:13 Thulani lingiyekele, ukuze ngikhulume mina; kungehlele loba kuyini." 
Job13:14 Ngizayithathelani inyama yami ngamazinyo ami, ngibeke impilo yami esandleni sami?" 
Job13:15 Lanxa ezangibulala, ngizathemba kuye. Kanti ngizazimela indlela zami phambi kwakhe." 
Job13:16 Njalo uzakuba lusindiso lwami; ngoba umzenzisi kayikuza phambi kwakhe. 
Job13:17 Zwisisani ilizwi lami, lengcazelo yami ngendlebe zenu." 
Job13:18 Khangelani-ke, se ngilubeke kuhle udaba lwami, ngiyazi ukuthi mina ngizalungisiswa." 
Job13:19 Ngubani lowo ozaphikisana lami? Nxa khathesi ngithula ngizaphela. 
Job13:20 Kuphela ungenzi izinto ezimbili kimi; khona ngingayikucatshela ubuso bakho. 
Job13:21 Susela khatshana lami isandla sakho, lokwesabeka kwakho kungangethusi." 
Job13:22 Ubusungibiza, mina ngizaphendula; kumbe ngikhulume, ungiphendule." 
Job13:23 Zingaki iziphambeko lezono engilazo? Ngazisa isiphambeko sami lesono sami. 
Job13:24 Ufihlelani ubuso bakho, ungiphathe njengesitha sakho?" 
Job13:25 Uzakwethusa yini ihlamvu eliphephethekayo? Njalo uzaxotshana lomule owomileyo yini? 
Job13:26 Ngoba ubale izinto ezibabayo umelene lami, wangenza ngadla ilifa leziphambeko zobutsha bami." 
Job13:27 Ufake lenyawo zami esigodweni, waqaphela zonke indlela zami, wazidweba uluphawu empandeni zezinyawo zami." 
Job13:28 Yena-ke njengokubolileyo uyaguga, njengesembatho inundu esidlayo." 
Job14:1 Umuntu, ozelwe ngowesifazana ulensuku ezimfitshane, ezigcwele inhlupheko." 
Job14:2 Uyavela njengeluba, abune, abaleke njengesithunzi, akemi." 
Job14:3 Kambe onjalo umvulela amehlo akho, ungingenise ekwahlulelweni kanye lawe." 
Job14:4 Ngubani ongaveza okuhlambulukileyo kokungcolileyo? Kakho loyedwa. 
Job14:5 Lokhu insuku zakhe zimisiwe, inani lenyanga zakhe likuwe, ummisele imingcele yakhe angeyedlule;" 
Job14:6 ungamkhangeli, ukuze aphumule, aze athokoze ngosuku lwakhe njengesiqatshwa." 
Job14:7 Ngoba kukhona ithemba esihlahleni uba siganyulwa ukuthi sizabuya sihlume, lokuthi ihlumela laso kaliyikuphela." 
Job14:8 Lanxa impande yaso isiba ndala emhlabeni, lesiphunzi saso sifele emhlabathini," 
Job14:9 ngephunga lamanzi sizahluma, senze ingatsha njengosaba." 
Job14:10 Kodwa umuntu uyafa ebuthakathaka, yebo, umuntu uyaphela, ungaphi-ke?" 
Job14:11 Amanzi ayemuka elwandle, lomfula uyoma utshe," 
Job14:12 ngokunjalo umuntu uyalala phansi angavuki; kuze kuthi amazulu angabikho, bangavuki, kumbe bangaphatshanyiswa ebuthongweni babo." 
Job14:13 Kungathi ungangifihla engcwabeni, ungithukuze, ize iphenduke intukuthelo yakho, ungimisele isikhathi esimisiweyo, ungikhumbule!" 
Job14:14 Uba umuntu esifa, uzabuya aphile yini? Zonke insuku zemfazo yami ngizalinda, kuze kufike ukukhululwa kwami." 
Job14:15 Uzabiza, mina-ke ngizasabela, uzalangatha umsebenzi wezandla zakho." 
Job14:16 Kanti khathesi uyazibala izinyathelo zami; kawuyikuqaphelisa ngesono sami. 
Job14:17 Isiphambeko sami sinanyekwe esikhwameni, wasusibekela isono sami." 
Job14:18 Isibili-ke intaba ewayo iyabhidlika, ledwala liyasuswa endaweni yalo." 
Job14:19 Amanzi ayaguguda amatshe, impophoma zawo ziyakhukhula ubhuqu lomhlaba. Uyachitha-ke ithemba lomuntu." 
Job14:20 Uyamehlula phakade, adlule; uyaguqula ubuso bakhe, umxotshe." 
Job14:21 Amadodana akhe ayadunyiswa, kodwa engakwazi; kumbe ayehliselwa phansi, kodwa angakunanzeleli." 
Job14:22 Kodwa inyama yakhe kuye isebuhlungwini, lomphefumulo wakhe kuye uyalila." 
Job15:1 Wasephendula uElifazi umThemani wathi: 
Job15:2 Ohlakaniphileyo angaphendula yini ulwazi olungumoya, agcwalise isisu sakhe ngomoya wempumalanga?" 
Job15:3 Aphikise ngamazwi angasizi lutho, langenkulumo ezingelanzuzo yini?" 
Job15:4 Yebo, wena uyachitha ukwesaba, uvimbela umkhuleko phambi kukaNkulunkulu." 
Job15:5 Ngoba umlomo wakho ufundisa ububi bakho, ukhethe ulimi lwamaqili." 
Job15:6 Umlomo wakho uyakulahla, kayisimi; yebo, indebe zakho ziyafakaza ngawe." 
Job15:7 Ungumuntu wokuqala owazalwayo yini? Kumbe wazalwa mandulo kwamaqaqa yini? 
Job15:8 Uzwile yini icebo langasese likaNkulunkulu? Kumbe uzigodlele inhlakanipho yini? 
Job15:9 Kuyini okwaziyo esingakwaziyo? Kuyini okuqedisisayo okungekho kithi? 
Job15:10 Kukhona phakathi kwethu lempunga lekhehla, omdala ngensuku kuloyihlo." 
Job15:11 Zincinyane yini kuwe induduzo zikaNkulunkulu, lelizwi elikhulunywa kuhle lawe?" 
Job15:12 Kungani inhliziyo yakho ikumukisa? Njalo kungani amehlo akho ephayiza," 
Job15:13 ukuthi uphendule umoya wakho umelane loNkulunkulu, ukhuphe amazwi anje emlonyeni wakho?" 
Job15:14 Umuntu uyini ukuthi abe ngohlambulukileyo, lozelwe ngowesifazana ukuthi abe ngolungileyo?" 
Job15:15 Khangela, kathembeli kwabangcwele bakhe, lamazulu kawahlambulukanga emehlweni akhe." 
Job15:16 Kukangakanani umuntu onengekayo lowonakeleyo, onatha ububi njengamanzi!" 
Job15:17 Ngizakutshengisa, ungilalele, lengikubonileyo ngizakulandisa," 
Job15:18 lokho izihlakaniphi ezikukhulumileyo, njalo kazikufihlanga kuboyise," 
Job15:19 okwanikwa kuzo zodwa ilizwe, lokungadlulanga izihambi phakathi kwazo." 
Job15:20 Insuku zonke zokhohlakeleyo uzizwisa ubuhlungu, lenani leminyaka ebekelelwe umcindezeli." 
Job15:21 Umsindo wezethuso usendlebeni zakhe; ekuthuleni umchithi uzamfikela. 
Job15:22 Kakholwa ukuthi uzaphenduka emnyameni, kodwa ukuthi ulindelwe yinkemba." 
Job15:23 Uzulela ukudla. Kungaphi? Uyazi ukuthi usuku lobumnyama lulungisiwe esandleni sakhe. 
Job15:24 Uhlupho losizi kuyamethusa, kumehlule njengenkosi elungele impi." 
Job15:25 Ngoba welule isandla sakhe emelene loNkulunkulu, wenza ngamandla ukumelana loSomandla." 
Job15:26 Wagijima emelene laye ngentamo, ngohlonzi lwamaqhubu ezihlangu zakhe." 
Job15:27 Ngoba wamboza ubuso bakhe ngamafutha akhe, wenza ukhalo lwakhukhumala ngamafutha." 
Job15:28 Uhlala emizini echithekileyo, izindlu abangahlali kuzo, ezilungele ukuba zinqumbi." 
Job15:29 Kayikunotha, lenotho yakhe kayiyikuma, lenzuzo yakhe kayiyikusabalala emhlabeni." 
Job15:30 Kayikusuka emnyameni; ilangabi lizakomisa ihlumela lakhe, njalo uzasuka ngokuphefumula komoya wakhe." 
Job15:31 Oduhisiweyo kangathembeli ezenini, ngoba ize lizakuba ngumvuzo wakhe." 
Job15:32 Kuzafezwa kungakabi lusuku lwakhe, logatsha lwakhe aluyikuba luhlaza." 
Job15:33 Uzawohloza izithelo zakhe ezingavuthwanga njengevini, athintithe impoko zakhe njengesihlahla somhlwathi." 
Job15:34 Ngoba inhlangano yabazenzisi izakuba ngengelazithelo, lomlilo uzaqothula amathente ezivalamlomo." 
Job15:35 Bamitha uhlupho, bazale isono, lesizalo sabo silungisa inkohliso." 
Job16:1 Wasephendula uJobe wathi: 
Job16:2 Ngizwile izinto ezinengi ezinje; lingabaduduzi abakhathazayo lina lonke. 
Job16:3 Kuzakuba lesiphetho yini emazwini angumoya? Kumbe kuyini okulicunulayo ukuthi liphendule? 
Job16:4 Lami bengingakhuluma njengani uba umphefumulo wenu ubusendaweni yomphefumulo wami; bengingabuthelela amazwi phezu kwenu, ngilinikinele ikhanda lami." 
Job16:5 Bengingaliqinisa ngomlomo wami, lokunyikinyeka kwendebe zami bekungazithiba." 
Job16:6 Uba ngikhuluma, ubuhlungu bami kabudedi; uba ngiyekela, kuyini okusuka kimi?" 
Job16:7 Kodwa khathesi ungidinisile yena, wena uchithile yonke inhlangano yami." 
Job16:8 Ungicindezele, kube yibufakazi, lokucaka kwami kungivukele, kuyafakaza ebusweni bami." 
Job16:9 Ulaka lwakhe luya ngi dwengula, njalo uyangizonda; ungigedlela amazinyo akhe; isitha sami singicijisela amehlo aso." 
Job16:10 Bangikhamisela umlomo wabo, bangiwakala esihlathini ngokuyangisa, bengihlanganyela ndawonye." 
Job16:11 UNkulunkulu unginikele kokhohlakeleyo, wangiphosela ezandleni zababi." 
Job16:12 Ngangonwabile, kodwa wangichoboza, wangidumela ngentamo, wangiphahlaza, wangimisa ngaba yinto yakhe yokunenjwa." 
Job16:13 Abatshoki bakhe bangigombolozela; uqhekeze izinso zami, engayekeli, wachithela emhlabathini inyongo yami." 
Job16:14 Wangivodloza ngokuvodlovodloza, wagijimela kimi njengeqhawe." 
Job16:15 Ngathunga ilembu lesaka phezu kwesikhumba sami, ngathukuza uphondo lwami othulini." 
Job16:16 Ubuso bami bubomvu ngokukhala, lenkotsheni zami kulethunzi lokufa," 
Job16:17 lanxa kungekho isihluku ezandleni zami, lomkhuleko wami uhlanzekile." 
Job16:18 Mhlaba, ungaligqibeli igazi lami, lokukhala kwami kakungabi landawo." 
Job16:19 Lakhathesi, khangelani, ubufakazi bami busemazulwini, lomfakazi wami usezindaweni eziphakemeyo." 
Job16:20 Abangane bami bayangiklolodela; ilihlo lami liyathonta kuNkulunkulu. 
Job16:21 Kungathi kungaba khona ongamlamulela umuntu kuNkulunkulu, njengendodana yomuntu kumngane wayo." 
Job16:22 Ngoba iminyaka emilutshwana izafika, ng’khona ngizahamba nge ndlela engingayikubuya ngayo." 
Job17:1 Umoya wami wonakele, insuku zami zicitshiwe, amangcwaba ngawami." 
Job17:2 Kabakho lami yini abaklolodayo, lelihlo lami lichitha ubusuku ekuvukeleni kwabo?" 
Job17:3 Akubeke isibambiso sami kuwe; ngubani yena o zatshaya esandleni sami? 
Job17:4 Ngoba inhliziyo yabo uyifihlele ukuqedisisa; ngenxa yalokhu kawuyikubaphakamisa. 
Job17:5 Okhuluma ngokuyenga kubangane, lamehlo abantwana bakhe azafiphala." 
Job17:6 Njalo ungimise ngaba yisaga sezizwe, ngaze ngaba ngokhafulelwayo phambi kwazo." 
Job17:7 Njalo ilihlo lami lifiphele ngosizi, lamalunga ami anjengesithunzi wonke." 
Job17:8 Abaqotho bazakwethuswa yikho, longelacala uvukela ongamesabiyo uNkulunkulu." 
Job17:9 Lolungileyo uzabambelela endleleni yakhe, lolezandla ezihlambulukileyo uzakwengeza amandla." 
Job17:10 Kodwa-ke lina lonke, phendukani ake libuye, ngoba kangitholi ohlakaniphileyo phakathi kwenu." 
Job17:11 Insuku zami zedlule, lamacebo ami adabuke phakathi, izifiso zenhliziyo yami." 
Job17:12 Benza ubusuku bube yimini; ukukhanya kuseduze ngenxa yobumnyama. 
Job17:13 Uba ngilinda, ingcwaba lizakuba yindlu yami; ngendlala umbheda wami emnyameni." 
Job17:14 Ngibiza ingcwaba ngisithi: Wena ungubaba; impethu ngisithi: Umama lodadewethu. 
Job17:15 Pho-ke ithemba lami lingaphi? Yebo, ithemba lami ngubani ozalibona?" 
Job17:16 Kuzakwehlela ku mijabo yengcwaba, lapho sizaphumula khona ndawonye enhlabathini." 
Job18:1 Wasephendula uBilidadi umShuhi wathi: 
Job18:2 Koze kube nini libekela amazwi umgibe? Nanzelelani, lemva kwalokho sikhulume." 
Job18:3 Kungani sithiwa sizinyamazana, singcolile emehlweni enu?" 
Job18:4 Udwengula umphefumulo wakhe ngokuthukuthela kwakhe. Umhlaba uzatshiywa ngenxa yakho yini, loba idwala lisuswe endaweni yalo?" 
Job18:5 Yebo, ukukhanya kwabakhohlakeleyo kuzacitshwa, lenhlansi yomlilo wakhe kayiyikukhanya." 
Job18:6 Ukukhanya kuzafiphala ethenteni lakhe, lesibane sakhe ngaphezu kwakhe sizacitshwa." 
Job18:7 Izinyathelo zamandla akhe zizafinyezwa, lecebo lakhe lizamwisela phansi." 
Job18:8 Ngoba uzaphoselwa embuleni zinyawo zakhe, ahambe phezu kwembule." 
Job18:9 Umjibila uza m bamba isithende, isihitshela sizamkhulela." 
Job18:10 Igoda lakhe lifihlwe emhlabathini, lomjibila wakhe endleleni." 
Job18:11 Izesabiso zizamethusa inhlangothi zonke, zixotshane laye enyaweni zakhe." 
Job18:12 Amandla akhe alambile, lengozi ilindile eceleni kwakhe." 
Job18:13 Kuzakudla ingxenye zesikhumba sakhe; izibulo lokufa lidle ingxenye zakhe. 
Job18:14 Ithemba lakhe izahluthunwa ethenteni lakhe, njalo kumenze aye enkosini yezesabiso." 
Job18:15 Kuzahlala ethenteni lakhe elingeyisilo lakhe; isolufa izavuvuzelwa phezu kwendawo yakhe yokuhlala. 
Job18:16 Impande zakhe zizakoma ngaphansi, logatsha lwakhe lubune ngaphezulu." 
Job18:17 Ukukhunjulwa kwakhe kuzabhubha emhlabeni, angabi labizo ezitaladeni." 
Job18:18 Bazamfuqa bamsuse ekukhanyeni bamuse emnyameni, bamxotshe emhlabeni." 
Job18:19 Kayikuba lenzalo lazizukulu ebantwini bakibo; kakuyikuba lansali endaweni zakhe zokuhlala. 
Job18:20 Abalandelayo bazakwethuswa lusuku lwakhe, labokuqala bazabanjwa yisesabiso." 
Job18:21 Isibili zinjalo indawo zokuhlala zomubi, njalo yiyo le indawo yo ngamaziyo uNkulunkulu." 
Job19:1 Wasephendula uJobe wathi: 
Job19:2 Koze kube nini lihlupha umphefumulo wami, lingiphahlaza ngamazwi?" 
Job19:3 Lezizikhathi ezilitshumi lingithela ngehlazo; kalilanhloni, lingiphatha kubi." 
Job19:4 Uba-ke kuliqiniso ukuthi ngiduhile, ukuduha kwami kuzahlala lami." 
Job19:5 Uba isibili lizikhukhumeza phezu kwami, liphikisane lami nge hlazo lami," 
Job19:6 yazini-ke ukuthi nguNkulunkulu ongihlanekeleyo, wangigombolozela ng embule lakhe." 
Job19:7 Khangela, ngiyamemeza ngithi: Okubi! Kodwa kangiphendulwa. Ngicela usizo, kodwa akulasahlulelo." 
Job19:8 Uyivalile indlela yami ngomduli ukuze ngingedluli, wamisa umnyama emikhondweni yami." 
Job19:9 Ungihlubule udumo lwami, wasusa umqhele wekhanda lami." 
Job19:10 Ungibhidlizile inhlangothi zonke, sengihambile, ulisiphule ithemba lami njengesihlahla." 
Job19:11 Ulumathisile ulaka lwakhe kimi, ungibale njengezitha kuye." 
Job19:12 Amabutho akhe afika kanyekanye, abuthelela indlela yawo emelene lami, amisa inkamba agombolozela ithente lami." 
Job19:13 Ubeke abafowethu khatshana lami, labangaziyo isibili sebengabemzini kimi." 
Job19:14 Izihlobo zami zinyamalele, labazana lami bangikhohliwe." 
Job19:15 Abahlala endlini yami lencekukazi zami bangibala njengowezizwe; ngingumfokazi emehlweni abo. 
Job19:16 Ngabiza inceku yami, kodwa kayiphendulanga; ngayincenga ngomlomo wami." 
Job19:17 Umoya wami uyenyanyeka kumkami, sengiyisinengiso kumadodana esizalo sami." 
Job19:18 Labantwana abancinyane bayangidelela; ngasukuma, basebekhuluma bemelene lami." 
Job19:19 Bonke abantu besifuba sami banengwa yimi, labo ebengibathanda sebengiphendukele." 
Job19:20 Ithambo lami linamathelana lesikhumba sami lenyama yami, njalo ngiphephe ngesikhumba samazinyo ami." 
Job19:21 Ngihawukelani, ngihawukelani, lina bangane bami; ngoba isandla sikaNkulunkulu singithintile." 
Job19:22 Lingizingelelani njengoNkulunkulu, lingeneliswa yinyama yami?" 
Job19:23 Kungathi ngabe khathesi amazwi ami abhaliwe! Kungathi ngabe abhaliwe ngokugujwa egwalweni! 
Job19:24 Ngabe abazwe ngepheni yensimbi langomnuso edwaleni kuze kube nininini! 
Job19:25 Ngoba mina ngiyazi: Umhlengi wami uyaphila, lekupheleni uzakuma emhlabathini." 
Job19:26 Lapho sekutshabalalise lokhu emva kwesikhumba sami, kanti enyameni yami ngizambona uNkulunkulu," 
Job19:27 mina engizazibonela yena, lamehlo ami azabona, hatshi omunye. Izinso zami seziphelile enkalweni zami." 
Job19:28 Kodwa lithi: Kungani simzingela? Ngoba impande yendaba itholakala kimi. 
Job19:29 Lina yesabeni inkemba, ngoba ulaka luletha izijeziso zenkemba, ukuze lazi ukuthi sikhona isahlulelo." 
Job20:1 Wasephendula uZofari umNahama wathi: 
Job20:2 Ngakho imicabango yami ingenza ngiphendule, langenxa yokuphangisa kwami phakathi kwami." 
Job20:3 Ngizwile isijeziso sehlazo lami, lomoya wokuqedisisa kwami ungenza ngiphendule." 
Job20:4 Uyakwazi lokhu yini, kusukela endulo, selokhu kwabekwa umuntu emhlabeni," 
Job20:5 ukuthi injabulo yababi imfitshane, lentokozo yomzenzisi ngeyesikhatshana nje?" 
Job20:6 Loba ubukhosi bakhe busenyukela emazulwini, lekhanda lakhe lifinyelela emayezini," 
Job20:7 uzabhubha phakade njengobulongwe bakhe; labo abambonileyo bathi: Ungaphi? 
Job20:8 Uzaphapha njengephupho, bangabe besamthola; yebo, uzaxotshwa njengombono webusuku." 
Job20:9 Ilihlo elike lambona aliyikuphinda, lendawo yakhe kayisayikumbona." 
Job20:10 Abantwana bakhe bazadinga ukuthokozisa abayanga, lezandla zakhe zibuyisele inotho yakhe." 
Job20:11 Amathambo akhe ayegcwele ubutsha bakhe, kodwa azalala kanye laye enhlabathini." 
Job20:12 Uba ububi bumnandi emlonyeni wakhe, ebufihla ngaphansi kolimi lwakhe," 
Job20:13 ebugodla, engabuyekeli, kodwa ebugcina phakathi komlomo wakhe," 
Job20:14 ukudla kwakhe kuzaphenduka esiswini sakhe, kuzakuba yibuhlungu bezinyoka phakathi kwakhe." 
Job20:15 Uginye inotho, kodwa uzayihlanza; uNkulunkulu uzayikhupha esiswini sakhe." 
Job20:16 Uzamunya ubuhlungu bezinyoka, lolimi lwebululu luzambulala." 
Job20:17 Kayikubona izifula, imifula, izifudlana zoluju lolaza." 
Job20:18 Uzabuyisela lokho akusebenzelayo, angakuginyi; njengokwenotho izakuba njalo inhlawulo, njalo kayikuthokoza." 
Job20:19 Ngoba ubacindezele wabadela abayanga, waphanga indlu abengayakhanga." 
Job20:20 Ngoba kakwazi ukuthula esiswini sakhe, kayikusindisa lutho kusifiso sakhe." 
Job20:21 Kakuyikusala lutho ekudleni kwakhe; ngenxa yalokhu okuhle kwakhe kakuyikuma. 
Job20:22 Ekugcwaleni kokwanela kwakhe uzakuba lencindezelo; sonke isandla sohluphekayo sizamfikela. 
Job20:23 Kuzakuthi lapho egcwalisa isisu sakhe, uNkulunkulu athumele kuye ukuvutha kwentukuthelo yakhe, akunise phezu kwakhe ekudleni kwakhe." 
Job20:24 Uzabalekela isikhali sensimbi, idandili lethusi lizamhlaba." 
Job20:25 Uyalihwatsha, liphume emhlana, lokubenyezelayo kuzaphuma enyongweni yakhe; izesabiso ziphezu kwakhe." 
Job20:26 Ubumnyama bonke bufihlelwe izinto zakhe ezibekelelweyo; umlilo ongavuthelwayo uzamqeda; kuzakuba kubi kunsali ethenteni lakhe. 
Job20:27 Amazulu azakwembula ububi bakhe, lomhlaba umvukele." 
Job20:28 Ukwanda kwendlu yakhe kuzanyamalala, kukhukhulwe esukwini lwentukuthelo yakhe." 
Job20:29 Lesi yisabelo somuntu omubi esivela kuNkulunkulu, lelifa alimiselwa nguNkulunkulu." 
Job21:1 Wasephendula uJobe wathi: 
Job21:2 Zwanini lilalele ilizwi lami, lalokho kube zinduduzo zenu."
