Job21:3 Ngibekezelelani, ukuthi mina ngikhulume; lemva kokukhuluma kwami lingakloloda." 
Job21:4 Mina-ke ukusola kwami kusemuntwini yini? Kodwa uba kunjalo, kungani umoya wami ungekhathazeke?" 
Job21:5 Ngikhangelani, likhakhamale, libeke isandla phezu komlomo." 
Job21:6 Yebo, lapho ngikhumbula, ngitshaywa luvalo, lokuthuthumela kubamba inyama yami." 
Job21:7 Ababi baphilelani, babe badala, yebo, bakhule emandleni?" 
Job21:8 Inzalo yabo izinze phambi kwabo kanye labo, lezizukulu emehlweni abo." 
Job21:9 Izindlu zabo zilokuthula kungelakwesaba, loswazi lukaNkulunkulu kaluphezu kwabo." 
Job21:10 Inkunzi yakhe iyakhwela ingaphuthi; inkomokazi yakhe iyazala, ingaphunzi." 
Job21:11 Bakhupha abantwanyana babo njengomhlambi, labantwana babo bayagida." 
Job21:12 Baphakamisa ilizwi ngesigujana lechacho, bathokoze ngelizwi lomhlanga." 
Job21:13 Bachitha insuku zabo ngokuhle, behlele engcwabeni ngokucwayiza kwelihlo." 
Job21:14 Babesebesithi kuNkulunkulu: Suka kithi; ngoba kasifisi ulwazi lwendlela zakho. 
Job21:15 Uyini uSomandla ukuthi simkhonze? Sizazuzani uba sikhuleka kuye? 
Job21:16 Khangela, okuhle kwabo kakukho esandleni sabo; icebo lababi likhatshana lami." 
Job21:17 Kukangaki isibane sababi sicitshwa, kusiza ukuchitheka kwabo phezu kwabo! UNkulunkulu ubabela ubuhlungu elakeni lwakhe." 
Job21:18 Banjengamahlanga phambi komoya, lanjengomule isiphepho esiwebayo." 
Job21:19 UNkulunkulu ubekela abantwana bakhe usizi lwakhe. Uyamvuza, njalo uzakwazi." 
Job21:20 Amehlo akhe azabona ukuchitheka kwakhe, anathe okolaka lukaSomandla." 
Job21:21 Ngoba iyini intokozo yakhe endlini yakhe emva kwakhe, lapho inani lenyanga zakhe liqunywa?" 
Job21:22 Kukhona ongafundisa uNkulunkulu ulwazi yini? Ngoba yena wehlulela abaphezulu. 
Job21:23 Lo uyafa esemandleni akhe apheleleyo, yena wonke onwabile, elokuthula." 
Job21:24 Iziphathelo zakhe zigcwele uchago, lomnkantsho wamathambo akhe umanzi." 
Job21:25 Lomunye ufa elomphefumulo obabayo, engadlanga kokuhle." 
Job21:26 Balala ndawonye ethulini, lempethu zibasibekele." 
Job21:27 Khangelani, ngiyayazi imicabango yenu, lamacebo e liwaceba limelene lami." 
Job21:28 Ngoba lithi: Ingaphi indlu yesiphathamandla? Njalo lingaphi ithente lendawo zababi zokuhlala? 
Job21:29 Kalibabuzanga yini abadlula ngendlela, njalo kalinanzeleli iziboniso zabo?" 
Job21:30 Ukuthi omubi uyekelelwa usuku lokubhujiswa; bazalethwa osukwini lwezintukuthelo. 
Job21:31 Ngubani ozamtshela indlela yakhe ebusweni? Ngubani ozamphindisela ngakwenzileyo? 
Job21:32 Kanti yena uzasiwa engcwabeni, alinde elibeni." 
Job21:33 Amagade esihotsha amnandi kuye, njalo udonsa wonke umuntu emva kwakhe, njengoba bengelakubalwa abaphambi kwakhe." 
Job21:34 Pho lizangiduduza njani ngeze, ngoba empendulweni zenu kusele inkohliso?" 
Job22:1 Wasephendula uElifazi umThemani wathi: 
Job22:2 Umuntu angaba losizo kuNkulunkulu yini, ngoba ohlakaniphileyo elusizo kuye ngokwakhe?" 
Job22:3 Kuyintokozo yini kuSomandla ukuthi ulungile? Kumbe inzuzo kuye ukuthi uphelelise indlela zakho? 
Job22:4 Uzakusola yini ngenxa yokwesaba kwakho? Uzangena lawe kusahlulelo. 
Job22:5 Ububi bakho kabubukhulu yini, lezono zakho kazilakuphela?" 
Job22:6 Ngoba uthethe isibambiso kubafowenu kungelasizatho, wahlubula abanqunu izigqoko." 
Job22:7 Kawumnathisanga amanzi odiniweyo, lolambileyo umgodlele ukudla." 
Job22:8 Kodwa umuntu olengalo, umhlaba ungowakhe, lowemukeleka ebusweni wahlala kuwo." 
Job22:9 Uxotshile abafelokazi bengelalutho, lengalo zezintandane zichotshoziwe." 
Job22:10 Ngakho-ke imijibila ikuhanqile, lovalo luhle lwakwesabisa," 
Job22:11 kumbe ubumnyama ukuze ungaboni, lesikhukhula samanzi sikusibekele." 
Job22:12 UNkulunkulu kakho yini engqongeni yamazulu? Bona-ke ingqonga yezinkanyezi, ukuthi ziphakeme." 
Job22:13 Kanti uthi: UNkulunkulu wazini? Angahlulela yini engemuva komnyama onzima? 
Job22:14 Amayezi amnyama ayisisibekelo sakhe ukuze angaboni, uhamba esigombolozini samazulu." 
Job22:15 Usunanzelele indlela endala yini abantu ababi abanyathela kuyo? 
Job22:16 Abahluthunwa kunga ka bi yisikhathi; uzamcolo wathululwa phezu kwesisekelo sabo. 
Job22:17 Abathi kuNkulunkulu: Suka kithi. LoSomandla wayenzeni kubo? 
Job22:18 Kanti yena wayegcwalise izindlu zabo ngokuhle; kodwa icebo labakhohlakeleyo likhatshana lami. 
Job22:19 Abalungileyo bayakubona bathokoze, lomsulwa ubahleka usulu." 
Job22:20 Isibili isitha sethu sichithiwe, lomlilo uqede insali yabo." 
Job22:21 Ake wejwayelane laye, ube lokuthula, ngalokho okuhle kuzakuza kuwe." 
Job22:22 Ake wemukele umlayo ovela emlonyeni wakhe, ubeke amazwi akhe enhliziyweni yakho." 
Job22:23 Uba ubuyela kuSomandla, uzakwakhiwa, ususe okubi khatshana lamathente akho." 
Job22:24 Ubusubeka igolide lakho othulini, le golide leOfiri elitsheni lezifula." 
Job22:25 Ngakho uSomandla uzakuba ligolide lakho, lesiliva sakho esikhethiweyo." 
Job22:26 Ngoba ngalesosikhathi uzazithokozisa ngoSomandla, uphakamisele ubuso bakho kuNkulunkulu." 
Job22:27 Uzakhuleka kuye, akuzwe, ukhokhe izifungo zakho." 
Job22:28 Uzaquma-ke udaba, luqiniseke kuwe, lokukhanya kukhanye endleleni zakho." 
Job22:29 Nxa behliselwe phansi, ubususithi: Phezulu! Abesesindisa othobekileyo ngamehlo." 
Job22:30 Uzamkhulula ongemsulwa; njalo ukhululwa ngokuhlanzeka kwezandla zakho. 
Job23:1 Wasephendula uJobe wathi: 
Job23:2 Lalamuhla isikhalazo sami silenkani; isandla sami sinzima phezu kokububula kwami. 
Job23:3 Kungathi ngabe ngiyazi lapho engingamthola khona! Bengingeza enkundleni yakhe! 
Job23:4 Ngibeke kuhle udaba lwami phambi kwakhe, ngigcwalise umlomo wami ngokuphikisa." 
Job23:5 Bengingawazi amazwi azangiphendula ngawo, ngiqedisise azakutsho kimi." 
Job23:6 Uzaphikisana lami ngobukhulu bamandla yini? Hatshi, kodwa uza ku beka kimi." 
Job23:7 Lapho oqotho angaphikisana laye; ngakho bengizaphepha phakade kumahluleli wami. 
Job23:8 Khangelani ngiya phambili, kodwa kakho, lemuva, kodwa kangimboni." 
Job23:9 Ngakwesokhohlo ekusebenzeni kwakhe, kodwa kangi m boni; uyacatsha ngakwesokunene, kodwa kangi m boni." 
Job23:10 Kanti uyayazi indlela elami; kangihlole, ngizaphuma njengegolide." 
Job23:11 Unyawo lwami lubambelele enyathelweni lakhe, ngiyigcinile indlela yakhe, kangiphambukanga." 
Job23:12 Kangisukanga lemlayweni wezindebe zakhe, ngawalondoloza amazwi omlomo wakhe okwedlula isabelo sami." 
Job23:13 Kodwa yena ukokukodwa, ngubani-ke ongambuyisela emuva? Lokho umphefumulo wakhe okufisayo uyakwenza." 
Job23:14 Ngoba uzaphelelisa engikumiselweyo; lezinto ezinengi ezinjalo zikuye. 
Job23:15 Ngenxa yalokho ngitshaywa luvalo phambi kwakhe; ngicabanga, ngiyamesaba." 
Job23:16 Ngoba uNkulunkulu wenze inhliziyo yami yaphela amandla, loSomandla ungethusile." 
Job23:17 Ngoba kangiqunywanga phambi komnyama, wagubuzela ubumnyama ebusweni bami." 
Job24:1 Kungani izikhathi zingafihlelwanga uSomandla, labamaziyo bengaboni insuku zakhe?" 
Job24:2 Bathuthukisa imingcele, baphange imihlambi bayeluse." 
Job24:3 Baxotsha ubabhemi wezintandane, bathathe inkabi yomfelokazi ibe yisibambiso." 
Job24:4 Baphambula abaswelayo emigwaqweni; abayanga bomhlaba bacatsha ndawonye. 
Job24:5 Khangelani, bangobabhemi beganga enkangala, baphumela emsebenzini wabo, badinge impango ngovivi; inkangala ibe yikudla kwakhe lo kwabantwana." 
Job24:6 Emasimini bavuna ukudla kwakhe, bakhothoze e sivini ni somubi." 
Job24:7 Balala beze ebusuku bengelasembatho, bengelasigubuzelo emqandweni." 
Job24:8 Bamanzi ngezihlambo zezintaba, babambelela edwaleni ngoba bengelasiphephelo." 
Job24:9 Bahluthuna intandane ebeleni, bathathe lesibambiso kumyanga." 
Job24:10 Bahamba beze bengelasigqoko, labalambileyo bathwala isithungo." 
Job24:11 Phakathi kwemiduli yabo bahluza amafutha, banyathela izikhamelo zewayini, kodwa bomile." 
Job24:12 Abantu bayabubula besemzini, lomphefumulo wabalimeleyo uyakhala; kodwa uNkulunkulu ka ba baleli ukungalungi." 
Job24:13 Bona baphakathi kwabavukela ukukhanya; kabazazi indlela zakhe, kabahlali emikhondweni yakhe." 
Job24:14 Umbulali uyavuka ngovivi, abulale umyanga loswelayo; lebusuku unjengesela." 
Job24:15 Lelihlo lesiphingi lilindela ukuhlwa, sisithi: Kakulalihlo elizangibona; sifake isimbombozo ebusweni baso." 
Job24:16 Emnyameni ugebha aphutshele ezindlini a ba zi phawulele emini; kabakwazi ukukhanya. 
Job24:17 Ngoba ikuseni kanyekanye ilithunzi lokufa kubo; uba besaziwa bakuzesabiso zethunzi lokufa. 
Job24:18 Ulula phezu kobuso bamanzi; isabelo sabo siqalekisiwe emhlabeni; kaphendukeli endleleni yezivini. 
Job24:19 Imbalela lokutshisa kuqeda amanzi eliqhwa elikhithikayo, ngokunjalo ingcwaba abonileyo." 
Job24:20 Isizalo sizamkhohlwa, impethu izammunya, engabe esakhunjulwa, lenkohlakalo izakwephulwa njengesihlahla." 
Job24:21 Uzondla ngenyumba engazaliyo, kamenzeli okuhle umfelokazi." 
Job24:22 Njalo udonsa abalamandla ngamandla akhe, uyavuka, njalo kungabi lolethemba lempilo." 
Job24:23 Uyamnika ukuze alondolozeke, eseyama kukho, kodwa amehlo akhe aphezu kwendlela zabo." 
Job24:24 Bayaphakanyiswa okwesikhatshana, babesebengasekho, behliselwa phansi, bavalelwe njengaye wonke, bayaqunywa njengesihloko sesikhwebu." 
Job24:25 Uba-ke kungenjalo, ngubani ongangenza umqambimanga, enze inkulumo yami ibe yize?" 
Job25:1 Wasephendula uBilidadi umShuhi wathi: 
Job25:2 Ukubusa lokwesabeka kulaye; uyenza ukuthula endaweni zakhe eziphezulu. 
Job25:3 Kukhona inani yini lamabutho akhe? Ngubani okungamphumeliyo ukukhanya kwakhe? 
Job25:4 Pho umuntu angalunga njani kuNkulunkulu? Kumbe ozelwe ngowesifazana angahlambuluka njani? 
Job25:5 Khangela kuze kube senyangeni, njalo kayikhazimuli, lezinkanyezi kazihlambulukanga emehlweni akhe." 
Job25:6 Pho kangakanani umuntu oy impethu, lendodana yomuntu ey inhlava!" 
Job26:1 Wasephendula uJobe wathi: 
Job26:2 Umsize njani ongelamandla, wasindisa ingalo e ngelamandla?" 
Job26:3 Umeluleke njani ongelakuhlakanipha, watshumayela inhlakanipho ngobunengi?" 
Job26:4 Utshele bani amazwi? Njalo ngumoya kabani ophume kuwe? 
Job26:5 Abafileyo bazelwe ngaphansi kwamanzi, labahlali bawo." 
Job26:6 Isihogo sinqunu phambi kwakhe, lencithakalo kayilasisibekelo." 
Job26:7 Welulela inyakatho phezu kwendawo engelalutho, aphanyeke umhlaba phezu kweze." 
Job26:8 Uyabophela amanzi emayezini akhe, kodwa amayezi kawadabuki ngaphansi kwawo." 
Job26:9 Uyasibekela ubuso besihlalo sakhe sobukhosi, endlale iyezi phezu kwaso." 
Job26:10 Udwebe umngcele oyisigombolozi phezu kobuso bamanzi, kuze kube sekucineni kokukhanya lomnyama." 
Job26:11 Insika zamazulu ziyathuthumela, zethuswa yikukhuza kwakhe." 
Job26:12 Ngamandla akhe uthulisa ulwandle, langenhlakanipho yakhe uphahlaza ukuziqhenya." 
Job26:13 Ngomoya wakhe ucecise amazulu; isandla sakhe sabumba inyoka ebalekayo. 
Job26:14 Khangela, lokhu kungamaphethelo ezindlela zakhe; kodwa kuzwakala into encinyane kangakanani ngaye! Kanti umdumo wamandla akhe ngubani ongawuqedisisa?" 
Job27:1 UJobe wasebuya ephakamisa isaga sakhe wathi: 
Job27:2 Kuphila kukaNkulunkulu osuse ilungelo lami, loSomandla owenze umphefumulo wami wababa." 
Job27:3 Isibili ngaso sonke isikhathi umphefumulo u se kimi, lomoya kaNkulunkulu usemakhaleni ami," 
Job27:4 oqotho indebe zami kaziyikukhuluma okubi, lolimi lwami sibili lungakhulumi inkohliso." 
Job27:5 Kakube khatshana lami ukuthi ngithi lilungile; ngize ngiphele kangiyikususa ubuqotho bami kimi. 
Job27:6 Ngizabambelela ekulungeni kwami ngingakuyekeli; inhliziyo yami kayiyikusola ensukwini zami. 
Job27:7 Isitha sami kasibe njengomubi, longivukelayo njengongalunganga." 
Job27:8 Ngoba liyini ithemba longamesabiyo uNkulunkulu, esequnyiwe, uNkulunkulu esekhuphile umphefumulo wakhe?" 
Job27:9 UNkulunkulu uzakuzwa yini ukukhala kwakhe, ukuhlupheka sekwehlele phezu kwakhe?" 
Job27:10 Uzazithokozisa yini ngoSomandla? Uzabiza uNkulunkulu yini sonke isikhathi? 
Job27:11 Ngizalifundisa ngesandla sikaNkulunkulu; okukuSomandla kangiyikukufihla. 
Job27:12 Khangela, lina lonke likubonile. Pho, kungani selibe yize lokuba yize ngokunjalo?" 
Job27:13 Lesi yisabelo somuntu omubi kuNkulunkulu, lelifa labalesihluku a ba l emukela kuSomandla." 
Job27:14 Uba abantwana bakhe besanda, kungokwenkemba, lenzalo yakhe kayiyikusutha isinkwa." 
Job27:15 Insali zakhe zizangcwatshwa ekufeni, labafelokazi bakhe kabayikukhala inyembezi." 
Job27:16 Lanxa ebuthelela isiliva njengothuli, elungisa isigqoko njengodaka;" 
Job27:17 angalungisa, kodwa olungileyo uzasigqoka, longelacala uzakwaba isiliva." 
Job27:18 Wakha indlu yakhe njengenundu, lanjengedumba umlindi alenzayo." 
Job27:19 Ulala enothile, kodwa kabuthwa; uvula amehlo akhe, kasekho." 
Job27:20 Izesabiso zizambamba njengamanzi; ebusuku isiphepho sizameba. 
Job27:21 Umoya wempumalanga uzamthatha, ahambe, umphephule asuke endaweni yakhe." 
Job27:22 Abesephosela phezu kwakhe angayekeli; uzabaleka lokubalekela isandla sakhe. 
Job27:23 Uzamqakezela izandla zakhe, amhwabhele endaweni yakhe." 
Job28:1 Isibili kukhona umthapho wesiliva, lendawo yegolide abalicengayo." 
Job28:2 Insimbi ithathwa enhlabathini, lethusi lincibilikiswa e litsh eni." 
Job28:3 Umisela umnyama umngcele, udingisisa kuze kube sekupheleleni konke, ilitshe lobumnyama lethunzi lokufa." 
Job28:4 Isifula siyaqhekezeka sivela kubahlali; amanzi onyawo akhohlakele, acitshile asuka ebantwini." 
Job28:5 Umhlaba, kuphuma ukudla kuwo, langaphansi kwawo kuphenduka kwangathi ngumlilo." 
Job28:6 Amatshe awo ayindawo yesafire*, njalo ulothuli lwegolide." 
Job28:7 Inyoni edla inyama kayiyazi indlela, lelihlo lelinqe kaliyibonanga." 
Job28:8 Imidlwane yokuziqhenyayo kayiyinyathelanga, isilwane kasihambanga kuyo." 
Job28:9 Uyelula isandla sakhe elitsheni elilukhuni, uyagenqula izintaba ezimpandeni." 
Job28:10 Aqhekeze imisele emadwaleni, lelihlo lakhe libona konke okuligugu." 
Job28:11 Uyabopha izifula zingathonti, lokufihlakeleyo ukukhuphela ekukhanyeni." 
Job28:12 Kodwa inhlakanipho ingatholakala ivela ngaphi? Lendawo yokuqedisisa ingaphi? 
Job28:13 Umuntu kalazi ixabiso lakho, njalo kakutholakali elizweni labaphilayo." 
Job28:14 Ukujula kuthi: Kakukho kimi. Lolwandle luthi: Kakulami. 
Job28:15 Igolide elihle lingenikwe endaweni yakho, lesiliva singelinganis el we intengo yakho." 
Job28:16 Kungelingane legolide leOfiri, le-onikse* eligugu, lesafire*." 
Job28:17 Igolide lekristali* kungelingane lakho, futhi ku nge naniswe ngesitsha segolide elicwengekileyo." 
Job28:18 Ikorali* lekristali kakuyikukhunjulwa, ngoba intengo yenhlakanipho ingaphezu kwamatshe aligugu." 
Job28:19 Itopazi* leEtiyopiya lingelinganiswe lakho, kungelingane legolide elicwengekileyo." 
Job28:20 Pho, inhlakanipho ivela ngaphi? Lendawo yokuqedisisa ingaphi?" 
Job28:21 Ngoba kusithekile emehlweni abo bonke abaphilayo, kwafihlwa ezinyonini zamazulu." 
Job28:22 Ukubhujiswa lokufa kuthi: Sizwile ngendlebe zethu amahungahunga akho. 
Job28:23 UNkulunkulu uyayiqedisisa indlela yakho, njalo yena uyayazi indawo yakho." 
Job28:24 Ngoba yena uyakhangela kuze kube semikhawulweni yomhlaba, abone ngaphansi kwawo wonke amazulu." 
Job28:25 Esenzela umoya isisindo, walinganisa amanzi ngesilinganiso." 
Job28:26 Lapho esenzela izulu isimiso, lombane wokuduma indlela." 
Job28:27 Ngalesosikhathi wakubona, walandisa ngakho; wakulungisa, yebo, wakuhlolisisa." 
Job28:28 Wasesithi emuntwini: Khangela, ukwesaba iNkosi, lokhu kuyinhlakanipho, lokusuka ebubini kuyikuqedisisa." 
Job29:1 UJobe wasebuya ephakamisa isaga sakhe wathi: 
Job29:2 Kungathi ngabe nginjengenyang eni zamandulo, njengensuk wini uNkulunkulu angigcine ngazo," 
Job29:3 lapho isibane sakhe sakhanya phezu kwekhanda lami; ngahamba e mnyam eni ngokukhanya kwakhe! 
Job29:4 Njengoba nganginjalo ensukwini zokuvuthwa kwami, lapho iseluleko sikaNkulunkulu sasiphezu kwethente lami," 
Job29:5 lapho uSomandla wayeseselami, l abantwana bami bengiphahlile," 
Job29:6 lapho ngagezisa izinyathelo zami ngolaza, ledwala langithululela imifula yamafutha!" 
Job29:7 Lapho ngaphuma ngaya esangweni ngidabula umuzi, ngalungisa isihlalo sami emdangeni;" 
Job29:8 amajaha angibona, acatsha; lamaxhegu asukuma ema;" 
Job29:9 iziphathamandla zayekela ukukhuluma, zabeka isandla phezu komlomo wazo;" 
Job29:10 ilizwi labakhulu lacatsha, lolimi lwabo lwanamathela elwangeni lwabo." 
Job29:11 Lapho indlebe isizwa yangibusisa, lelihlo libona langifakazela," 
Job29:12 ngoba ngakhulula umyanga okhalayo, lentandane, longelamsizi." 
Job29:13 Isibusiso sobhubhayo sehlele phezu kwami, njalo ngenza inhliziyo yomfelokazi ihlabele ngentokozo." 
Job29:14 Ngembatha ukulunga, kwangembesa; isahlulelo sami saba njengesembatho lomqhele." 
Job29:15 Ngangingamehlo koyisiphofu, ngangizinyawo kusiqhuli." 
Job29:16 Nganginguyise wabayanga, lendaba e ngingayaziyo ngayihlolisisa." 
Job29:17 Ngasengisephula umhlathi womubi, nga menza a lahle impango emazinyweni akhe." 
Job29:18 Ngasengisithi: Ngizaphela lesidleke sami, ngandise insuku njengetshebetshebe." 
Job29:19 Impande zami zinabele emanzini, lamazolo alale ubusuku ogatsheni lwami." 
Job29:20 Udumo lwami lutsha kimi, ledandili lami laguquka esandleni sami." 
Job29:21 Bangilalela, belindele, bathulela iseluleko sami." 
Job29:22 Emva kwelizwi lami kabaphendulanga, lelizwi lami lathontela phezu kwabo." 
Job29:23 Bangilindela njengezulu, lomlomo wabo bawukhamisela izulu lokucina." 
Job29:24 Lapho ngibahlekela, kabakholwanga, lokukhanya kobuso bami kabakuwiselanga phansi." 
Job29:25 Ngakhetha indlela yabo ngahlala ngiy inhloko, ngahlala njengenkosi phakathi kweviyo, njengoduduza abalilayo." 
Job30:1 Kodwa khathesi abatsha kulami ngensuku bayangihleka, oyise babo engangingabadelela ukubafaka lezinja zomhlambi wami." 
Job30:2 Yebo, amandla ezandla zabo ayengaba yini kimi, ukuvuthwa kwabo sekuphelile?" 
Job30:3 Ngenswelo langendlala bajujukile, babalekele elizweni elomileyo, elali kade li y inkangala legwadule." 
Job30:4 Abakha imibhida yetswayi enkotheni, lempande yesihlahla serotemu* iyikudla kwabo." 
Job30:5 Baxotshwa phakathi kwabantu; bamemeza ngabo kungathi lisela; 
Job30:6 ukuthi bahlale eliweni lezihotsha, imigodi yenhlabathi, lamadwala." 
Job30:7 Bayakhonya phakathi kwenkotha, babuthane phansi kokhula." 
Job30:8 Bangabantwana beziphukuphuku, yebo abantwana abangelabizo; baxotshwa emhlabeni." 
Job30:9 Khathesi sengiyingoma yabo, sengiyisiga sabo." 
Job30:10 Banengwa yimi, bakhatshana lami; kabayekeli ukungikhafulela ebusweni ngamathe." 
Job30:11 Ngoba ukhulule intambo yami, wangicindezela, ngakho balahle itomu phambi kwami." 
Job30:12 Ngakwesokunene abatsha bayasukuma, bafuqa inyawo zami, bangivusela indlela zabo zokubhubhisa." 
Job30:13 Badiliza indlela yami, baphumelele ekungichitheni, kabalamncedisi." 
Job30:14 Beza kungathi bafohlela esikhaleni esibanzi; phakathi kwencithakalo batheleka. 
Job30:15 Izesabiso ziphendukele phezu kwami; baxotshana lodumo lwami njengomoya, losindiso lwami luyedlula njengeyezi." 
Job30:16 Khathesi-ke umphefumulo wami uyazithulula phezu kwami; insuku zosizi zingibambile. 
Job30:17 Ubusuku bugwaza amathambo ami phakathi kwami, lokungigedlayo kakuphumuli." 
Job30:18 Ngobunengi bamandla isembatho sami siyaguqulwa; uyangibhinca njengesiphika sebhatshi lami. 
Job30:19 Ungiphosele odakeni, senginjengothuli lomlotha." 
Job30:20 Ngiyakhala kuwe, kodwa kawungiphenduli; ngiyasukuma, unginanzelele nje." 
Job30:21 Usuphenduke waba lesihluku kimi; ngamandla esandla sakho umelana lami. 
Job30:22 Ungiphakamisela emoyeni, ungigadise kuwo, ungincibilikisele isiphepho." 
Job30:23 Ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi uzangibuyisela e kufeni, lendlini emiselwe bonke abaphilayo." 
Job30:24 Kodwa kayikwelulela isandla enqumbini, lanxa encithakalweni yakhe bekhalela usizo." 
Job30:25 Kangimkhalelanga inyembezi yini owayelensuku ezilukhuni, umphefumulo wami wadabuka ngongumyanga?" 
Job30:26 Lapho ngilindele okuhle, kweza okubi; lapho ngilindele ukukhanya, kweza umnyama." 
Job30:27 Imibilini yami yabila, kayithulanga, lensuku zosizi zingandulele." 
Job30:28 Ngahamba ngimnyama, kungengelanga; ngasukuma ebandleni ngakhalela usizo." 
Job30:29 Ngingumfowabo wamakhanka, lomngane wamadodakazi ezintshe." 
Job30:30 Isikhumba sami simnyama phezu kwami, lamathambo ami atshile ngokutshisa." 
Job30:31 Ichacho lami selibe yisililo, lomhlanga wami uyilizwi labakhala inyembezi." 
Job31:1 Ngenza isivumelwano lamehlo ami; pho ngingananzelela njani intombi? 
Job31:2 Ngoba siyini isabelo sikaNkulunkulu esivela phezulu, lelifa likaSomandla elivela endaweni eziphezulu?" 
Job31:3 Incithakalo kayisiyomubi yini, lengozi yabenzi bobubi?" 
Job31:4 Yena kaziboni yini indlela zami, abale zonke izinyathelo zami?" 
Job31:5 Uba ngihambe ngokuyize, kumbe unyawo lwami luphuthumele enkohlisweni," 
Job31:6 kangilinganise ngesilinganiso esilungileyo, ukuze uNkulunkulu azi ubuqotho bami." 
Job31:7 Uba inyathelo lami liphambukile endleleni, lenhliziyo yami yalandela amehlo ami, kumbe kunamathele isici ezandleni zami;" 
Job31:8 kangihlanyele, kodwa kudle omunye, lezilimo zami zisitshulwe." 
Job31:9 Uba inhliziyo yami iyengwe ngowesifazana, kumbe ngacathama emnyango kamakhelwane wami," 
Job31:10 umkami kacholele omunye, labanye kabaguqe phezu kwakhe." 
Job31:11 Ngoba lokho kuyinkohlakalo, njalo kuyisono nga bahluleli." 
Job31:12 Ngoba ngumlilo odla kuze kube yincithakalo, usiphule sonke isivuno sami." 
Job31:13 Uba ngalile udaba lwenceku yami loba olwencekukazi yami, lapho ziphikisana lami," 
Job31:14 pho ngizakwenzani lapho uNkulunkulu esukuma? Lalapho esethekela, ngizaphendulani kuye?" 
Job31:15 Lowo owangenza esiswini kamenzanga yena yini, lowasibumba esiswini munye?" 
Job31:16 Uba ngigodlele umyanga isifiso, kumbe ngifiphaze amehlo omfelokazi," 
Job31:17 kumbe ngadla ucezu lwami ngedwa, ukuze intandane ingadli kulo" 
Job31:18 (ngoba kwasebutsheni bami yakhula lami ngi njengoyise, ngamqondisa kusukela esizalweni sikamama)," 
Job31:19 uba ngabona obhubha ngenxa yokuswela isigqoko, loba umyanga engelasembatho," 
Job31:20 uba inkalo zakhe zingangibusisanga, ngoba ekhudunyezwe yiboya bezimvu zami," 
Job31:21 uba ngaphakamisela isandla sami phezu kwentandane, lapho ngabona usizo lwami esangweni," 
Job31:22 kaliwe ihlombe lami esiphangeni sami, lengalo yami iqamuke ethanjeni layo." 
Job31:23 Ngoba incithakalo kaNkulunkulu yayiyisesabiso kimi, ngingenelisi ngenxa yobukhulu bakhe." 
Job31:24 Uba ngenzile igolide laba lithemba lami, ngathi kugolide elihle: Themba lami." 
Job31:25 Uba ngithokozile ngoba inotho yami inengi, langoba isandla sami sithole okunengi;" 
Job31:26 uba ngikhangele ukukhanya lapho kubenyezela, loba inyanga ehamba enkazimulweni," 
Job31:27 lenhliziyo yami yayengwa ensitha, kumbe isandla sami sange umlomo wami," 
Job31:28 lalokho yisiphambeko phambi kwabehluleli, ngoba ngabe ngimphikile uNkulunkulu waphezulu." 
Job31:29 Uba ngithokozile ngokuchitheka kongizondayo, kumbe ngajabula lapho ububi bumthola;" 
Job31:30 njalo ngingavumelanga umlomo wami ukuthi wone, ngokucela umphefumulo wakhe ngesiqalekiso;" 
Job31:31 uba abantu bethente lami bebengatshongo ukuthi: Hawu, aluba besilokwenyama yakhe, ngabe kasisuthanga." 
Job31:32 Owemzini kazanga alale esitaladeni; iminyango yami ngayivulela isihambi. 
Job31:33 Uba ngasibekela iziphambeko zami njengoAdamu, ngokufihla isono sami esifubeni sami." 
Job31:34 Ngoba ngethuswa lixuku elikhulu, lokudelelwa ngabensendo kwangesabisa, ngakho ngathula, kangaze ngaphuma emnyango." 
Job31:35 Kungathi ngabe ngilongangizwa! Khangelani, isifiso sami yikuthi ngabe uSomandla uyangiphendula, lokuthi ophikisana lami ngabe ubhale ugwalo!" 
Job31:36 Isibili, bengingaluthwala ehlombe lami, ngilubophe lube ngumqhele kimi." 
Job31:37 Ngimtshele inani lezinyathelo zami, ngisondele kuye njengesiphathamandla." 
Job31:38 Uba umhlaba wami ukhalile ngami, lemifolo yawo ililile ndawonye," 
Job31:39 uba ngidlile amandla awo kungelamali, kumbe ngenza umphefumulo wabaniniwo uphele," 
Job31:40 kakuhlume ukhula oluhlabayo endaweni yengqoloyi, lokhula olunukayo endaweni yebhali. Amazwi kaJobe a se phelile." 
Job32:1 Lawomadoda amathathu aseyekela ukumphendula uJobe, ngoba wayelungile emehlweni akhe." 
Job32:2 Lwaseluvutha ulaka lukaElihu indodana kaBarakeli umBuzi, owosendo lukaRamu. Ulaka lwakhe lwavuthela uJobe ngoba wazilungisisa yena kuloNkulunkulu." 
Job32:3 Ulaka lwakhe lwabavuthela labo abangane bakhe abathathu, ngoba bengatholanga impendulo, kube kanti bamlahla uJobe." 
Job32:4 Kodwa UElihu wayelindele uJobe ekhuluma, ngoba babebadala ngensuku kulaye." 
Job32:5 UElihu esebonile ukuthi kwakungelampendulo emlonyeni walamadoda amathathu, ulaka lwakhe lwaseluvutha." 
Job32:6 Ngakho uElihu indodana kaBarakeli umBuzi waphendula wathi: Mina ngingomncinyane ngezinsuku, lina-ke libadala. Ngenxa yalokhu bengithikaza, ngesaba ukulitshela umcabango wami." 
Job32:7 Ngathi: Kakukhulume izinsuku, lobunengi beminyaka bazise inhlakanipho." 
Job32:8 Isibili umoya ukhona emuntwini, lokuphefumulela kukaSomandla kuyabanika ukuqedisisa." 
Job32:9 Abakhulu kabahlakaniphanga, labalupheleyo ka baqedisis i isahlulelo." 
Job32:10 Ngakho ngithi: Lalelani kimi; lami ngizatshengisa umcabango wami. 
Job32:11 Khangelani, bengiwalindele amazwi enu, ngabeka indlebe ekukhulumeni kwenu okuhlakaniphileyo, lisadinga amazwi." 
Job32:12 Yebo, ngalilalela, khangelani-ke, kakho phakathi kwenu omvumisileyo uJobe, owaphenduleyo amazwi akhe." 
Job32:13 Hlezi lithi: Sitholile inhlakanipho; nguNkulunkulu ozamxotsha, hatshi umuntu." 
Job32:14 Kodwa kangihlelelanga amazwi, langamazwi enu kangiyikumphendula." 
Job32:15 Badideka, kabasaphendulanga, basusa amazwi kubo." 
Job32:16 Ngasengilinda, kodwa kabakhulumanga, ngoba bema, kabasaphendulanga." 
Job32:17 Lami ngizaphendula ingxenye yami, lami ngitshengise umcabango wami." 
Job32:18 Ngoba ngigcwele amazwi, umoya wesisu sami uyangiqhubezela." 
Job32:19 Khangelani, isisu sami sinjengewayini engavulwanga, njengemigodla emitsha sizadabuka." 
Job32:20 Ngizakhuluma ukuze ngiphefumule; ngivule indebe zami, ngiphendule." 
Job32:21 Ake ngingaphakamisi ubuso bomuntu, ngingabizi umuntu ngebizo lokubamba amehlo." 
Job32:22 Ngoba kangikwazi ukunika amabizo okubamba amehlo; masinyane umenzi wami angangisusa. 
Job33:1 Kube kanti-ke, Jobe, ake uzwe inkulumo zami, ubeke indlebe kuwo wonke amazwi ami." 
Job33:2 Khangelani, sengivule umlomo wami, ulimi lwami lukhuluma emlonyeni wami." 
Job33:3 Amazwi ami angawokuqonda kwenhliziyo yami, azakhuluma ulwazi lwendebe zami ngokuhlanzeka." 
Job33:4 UMoya kaNkulunkulu wangenza, lokuphefumula kukaSomandla kwanginika impilo." 
Job33:5 Uba ulakho ngiphendula; zihlele phambi kwami, uzimise." 
Job33:6 Khangela, nginjengawe kuNkulunkulu, lami ngathatshwa ebumbeni." 
Job33:7 Khangela, ukwethusa kwami kungakwethusi, lesandla sami singabi nzima phezu kwakho." 
Job33:8 Isibili ukhulume endlebeni zami, ngezwa ilizwi lamazwi, uthi:" 
Job33:9 Ngimsulwa, ka ngi lasiphambeko, ngihlanzekile, njalo kakulabubi kimi." 
Job33:10 Khangela, uthola amathuba okumelana lami, ungibala njengesitha sakhe." 
Job33:11 Ufaka inyawo zami esigodweni, aqaphele zonke indlela zami." 
Job33:12 Khangela, ku lokhu kawulunganga; ngizakuphendula, ngoba uNkulunkulu mkhulu kulomuntu." 
Job33:13 Umphikiselani? Ngoba engaphenduli leyodwa yezindaba zakhe. 
Job33:14 Ngoba uNkulunkulu ukhuluma kanye, yebo, kabili, engekho onanzayo." 
Job33:15 Ephutsheni, k umbono webusuku, lapho ubuthongo obunzima busehlela abantu, ekuwozeleni embhedeni;" 
Job33:16 abesesembula indlebe yabantu, aphawule ukuqondiswa kwabo;" 
Job33:17 ukuze aphambule umuntu e kwenz eni kwakhe, afihle ukuzigqaja emuntwini," 
Job33:18 anqande umphefumulo wakhe egodini, lempilo yakhe ekwedluleni ngenkemba." 
Job33:19 Njalo ujeziswa ngobuhlungu embhedeni wakhe, langokuqaqamba kwamathambo akhe okungapheliyo," 
Job33:20 ize impilo yakhe inengwe yisinkwa, lomphefumulo wakhe yikudla okuloyisekayo." 
Job33:21 Inyama yakhe iyaphela, ingabonakali, lamathambo akhe abe kade engabonakali avele." 
Job33:22 Lomphefumulo wakhe useduze legodi, lempilo yakhe kubabulali." 
Job33:23 Uba kulesithunywa kanye laye, umhumutshi, oyedwa phakathi kwenkulungwane, ukutshela umuntu ukuqonda kwakhe," 
Job33:24 uzakuba lomusa kuye athi: Mkhulule ekwehleleni egodini, se ngithole inhlawulo." 
Job33:25 Inyama yakhe izakuba ntsha okwedlula ubutsha; abuyele ensukwini zobutsha bakhe. 
Job33:26 Akhuleke kuNkulunkulu, ozakuba lesisa kuye, abone ubuso bakhe ngentokozo; ngoba uzabuyisela emuntwini ukulunga kwakhe." 
Job33:27 Ukhangela ebantwini athi: Ngonile, ngahlanekela okulungileyo, kodwa kakungisizanga." 
Job33:28 Uhlengile umphefumulo wami ekwedluleni egodini, lempilo yami izabona ukukhanya." 
Job33:29 Khangelani, lezizinto uNkulunkulu uyazenza ngomuntu kabili kumbe kathathu," 
Job33:30 ukuze abuyise umphefumulo wakhe egodini, ukuze akhanyiswe ngokukhanya kwabaphilayo." 
Job33:31 Zwana, Jobe, ungilalele, uthule, njalo mina ngikhulume." 
Job33:32 Uba kulamazwi, ungiphendule; khuluma, ngoba ngifisa ukutshengisa ukuthi ulungile." 
Job33:33 Uba kunge njalo, wena ngilalela; thula, njalo ngizakufundisa inhlakanipho." 
Job34:1 Wasephendula uElihu wathi: 
Job34:2 Zwanini amazwi ami, zihlakaniphi, lani zazi, libeke indlebe kimi." 
Job34:3 Ngoba indlebe ihlola amazwi, njengolwanga lunambitha ukudla." 
Job34:4 Asizikhetheleni isahlulelo; sazi phakathi kwethu okuhle. 
Job34:5 Ngoba uJobe uthe: Ngilungile, kodwa uNkulunkulu ususe isahlulelo sami;" 
Job34:6 ngiqamba amanga ngimelene lelungelo lami; umtshoko wami kawelapheki, ngaphandle kwesiphambeko." 
Job34:7 Nguwuphi umuntu onjengoJobe? Unatha ukuklolodelwa njengamanzi," 
Job34:8 ahambahambe exukwini labenzi bobubi, ahambe labantu benkohlakalo." 
Job34:9 Ngoba uthe: Kakumsizi umuntu nxa ethokoza ngoNkulunkulu. 
Job34:10 Ngakho, bantu bengqondo, ngilalelani: Kakube khatshana loNkulunkulu ukwenza inkohlakalo, loSomandla ukwenza isiphambeko." 
Job34:11 Ngoba umsebenzi womuntu uzawubuyisela kuye, amenze athole njengendlela yalowo lalowo." 
Job34:12 Yebo, isibili uNkulunkulu kenzi okubi, njalo uSomandla kagobisi isehlulelo." 
Job34:13 Ngubani owambeka phezu komhlaba? Kumbe ngubani owamisa umhlaba wonke? 
Job34:14 Uba ebeka inhliziyo yakhe phezu kwakhe, uzabuthela umoya wakhe lomphefumulo wakhe kuye." 
Job34:15 Inyama yonke ibizaphela kanyekanye, lomuntu abuyele ethulini." 
Job34:16 Uba kulokuqedisisa-ke, zwana lokhu, ubeke indlebe elizwini lamazwi ami." 
Job34:17 Kambe, ozonda isehlulelo ubengabusa yini? Kambe uzamlahla yini olungileyo kakhulu?" 
Job34:18 Angatsho yini enkosini: Mkhohlisi; kuziphathamandla: Ba ngelaNkulunkulu? 
Job34:19 Kuye ongemukeli ubuso beziphathamandla, engananzi isinothi phambi komyanga? Ngoba bonke bangumsebenzi wezandla zakhe." 
Job34:20 Bayafa ngesikhatshana; laphakathi kobusuku abantu bayaqhuqhiswa, bedlule; kuzasuswa olamandla kungelasandla." 
Job34:21 Ngoba amehlo akhe aphezu kwendlela zomuntu, uyabona zonke izinyathelo zakhe." 
Job34:22 Kakulamnyama njalo kakulathunzi lokufa lapho abenzi bobubi abangacatsha khona. 
Job34:23 Ngoba kabeki futhi phezu komuntu, ukuthi aye kuNkulunkulu esahlulelweni." 
Job34:24 Uyaphahlaza abalamandla kungahlolwanga, amise abanye endaweni zabo." 
Job34:25 Ngakho uyayazi imisebenzi yabo, uya ba genqula ebusuku, bachotshozwe." 
Job34:26 Uyabatshaya njengababi endaweni yababukelayo. 
Job34:27 Ngenxa yokuthi bephambukile ekumlandeleni, bengananzanga leyodwa yezindlela zakhe," 
Job34:28 baze benza ukukhala komyanga kufike kuye, njalo wakuzwa ukukhala kwabahluphekayo." 
Job34:29 Lapho yena ethulisa, ngubani-ke ongaziphatha ngenkohliso? Lapho efihla ubuso, ngubani-ke ongambona? Loba esizweni loba emuntwini eyedwa." 
Job34:30 Ukuze umuntu ongumzenzisi angabusi, ukuze kungabi lemijibila ebantwini." 
Job34:31 Isibili uthe kuNkulunkulu: Ngithwele isijeziso, kangiyikona." 
Job34:32 Ngaphandle kw e ngikubonayo ungifundise wena; uba ngenze okubi kangisayikukwenza futhi. 
Job34:33 Uzaphindisela yini ngokukuwe, loba uyala, loba wena ukhetha, njalo kungesimi? Wazini-ke? Khuluma." 
Job34:34 Abantu abalokuqedisisa bazakhuluma kimi, lomuntu ohlakaniphileyo uzangizwa." 
Job34:35 UJobe ukhulume engelalwazi, lamazwi akhe kawalanhlakanipho." 
Job34:36 Kungathi ngabe uJobe uyahlolwa kuze kube sekupheleni, ngenxa yempendulo zakhe phakathi kwabantu ababi." 
Job34:37 Ngoba esonweni sakhe wengezelela ububi, eqakeza izandla phakathi kwethu, esandisa amazwi akhe emelene loNkulunkulu." 
Job35:1 UElihu wasephendula wathi: 
Job35:2 Ukhumbula ukuthi lokhu kuqondile yini? Uthe: Ukulunga kwami kwedlula okukaNkulunkulu. 
Job35:3 Ngoba uthe: Kusizani kuwe? Ngizazuzani uba ngingoni? 
Job35:4 Mina ngizakuphendula, labangane bakho kanye lawe." 
Job35:5 Khangela amazulu ubone; ukhangele amayezi, aphakeme kulawe." 
Job35:6 Uba usona, wenzani kuye? Uba iziphambeko zakho zizinengi, wenzani kuye?" 
Job35:7 Uba ulungile, umnikani, kumbe wemukelani esandleni sakho?" 
Job35:8 Ububi bakho buqondana lomuntu onjengawe, lokulunga kwakho lendodana yomuntu." 
Job35:9 Ngenxa yobunengi bezincindezelo babenza bakhale; bayakhala ngenxa yengalo yabalamandla. 
Job35:10 Kodwa kakho othi: Ungaphi uNkulunkulu umenzi wami, onika amahubo ebusuku," 
Job35:11 osifundisa okwedlula inyamazana zomhlaba, asenze sihlakaniphe okwedlula inyoni zamazulu?" 
Job35:12 Lapho bayakhala, kodwa kaphenduli, ngenxa yokuzigqaja kwababi." 
Job35:13 Isibili uNkulunkulu kayikuzwa ize, loSomandla kayikukunanza." 
Job35:14 Yebo, lanxa usithi: Kawumboni, kanti isahlulelo siphambi kwakhe; ngakho umlindele." 
Job35:15 Kodwa khathesi, ngoba kunge njalo, intukuthelo yakhe iyethekela, ngoba engakwazi ekuphetheni okukhulu," 
Job35:16 ngakho uJobe uvule umlomo wakhe ngeze, wandisa amazwi engelalwazi." 
Job36:1 UElihu waseqhubeka wathi: 
Job36:2 Ngibekezelela kancinyane, ngizakubonisa ukuthi kuseselamazwi ngoNkulunkulu." 
Job36:3 Ngizathatha ulwazi lwami luvela khatshana, nginike ukulunga kuMenzi wami." 
Job36:4 Ngoba isibili amazwi ami kawayisiwo amanga; opheleleyo elwazini ulawe. 
Job36:5 Khangela, uNkulunkulu ulamandla, njalo keyisi; mkhulu emandleni enhliziyo." 
Job36:6 Kayekeli omubi aphile, kodwa unika abayanga okulungileyo." 
Job36:7 Kasusi amehlo akhe kolungileyo, kodwa ba lamakhosi esihlalweni sobukhosi; yebo, uyawahlalisa phakade, abesephakama." 
Job36:8 Njalo uba bebotshiwe ngezibopho, bethunjwe ngezintambo zenhlupheko," 
Job36:9 ng’khona ezabatshela isenzo sabo, leziphambeko zabo, ukuthi zazilamandla." 
Job36:10 Uyavula indlebe yabo ekulayweni, alaye baphenduke ebubini." 
Job36:11 Uba belalela, ba m khonze, bazachitha insuku zabo kobuhle, leminyaka yabo ezintokozweni." 
Job36:12 Kodwa uba bengalaleli, bazadlula ngomkhonto, baphele bengelalwazi." 
Job36:13 Labangamesabiyo uNkulunkulu ngenhliziyo babuthelela intukuthelo; kabakhali esebabophile. 
Job36:14 Umphefumulo wabo uzafela ebutsheni, lempilo yabo phakathi kwezinkotshana." 
Job36:15 Uzakhulula ohluphekayo ekuhluphekeni kwakhe, avule indlebe yabo ecindezelweni." 
Job36:16 Yebo, lawe wakususa emlonyeni wocindezelo waya e ndawe ni ebanzi, kungelacindezelo ngaphansi kwayo, lokuphezu kwetafula lakho kuzagcwala amanono." 
Job36:17 Kodwa ugcwalise isigwebo somubi; isigwebo lokulunga ku ku bambile. 
Job36:18 Ngoba kulolaka, qaphela, hlezi akuhugele ekuklolodeni, lobukhulu benhlawulo bungakuphambuli." 
Job36:19 Ubengalinganisa inotho yakho, ukuthi ubunge be ecindezelweni, lemizamo yonke elamandla?" 
Job36:20 Ungakhefuzeleli lobobusuku bokususwa kwabantu endaweni yabo. 
Job36:21 Qaphela, ungaphendukeli ebubini, ngoba ukhethe lokho kulokuhlupheka." 
Job36:22 Khangela, uNkulunkulu uziphakamisa ngamandla akhe; ngubani ongumfundisi njengaye?" 
Job36:23 Ngubani ommisele indlela yakhe? Kumbe ngubani othe: Wenze ububi? 
Job36:24 Khumbula ukuthi ukhulise umsebenzi wakhe, abahlabela ngawo abantu." 
Job36:25 Bonke abantu bayawubona; umuntu uyawukhangela ekhatshana. 
Job36:26 Khangela, uNkulunkulu uphakeme, njalo kasi m azi, lenani leminyaka yakhe kayilakuhlolwa." 
Job36:27 Ngoba wenyusa amathonsi amanzi, ahlambulule izulu njengenkungu yawo;" 
Job36:28 amayezi alithululela phansi, lithonte kakhulu phezu komuntu." 
Job36:29 Yebo, kukhona yini ongaqedisisa ukwendlaleka kwamayezi, umsindo wedumba lakhe?" 
Job36:30 Khangela, wendlala ukukhanya kwakhe phezu kwawo, agubuzele impande zolwandle." 
Job36:31 Ngoba ngawo uyehlulela abantu, anike ukudla ngobunengi." 
Job36:32 Ngezandla usibekela ukukhanya, abesekulaya ngalelo elingena phakathi." 
Job36:33 Umdumo wakhe ubika ngakho, lenkomo ngenkungu eyenyukayo." 
Job37:1 Langenxa yalokho inhliziyo yami iyathuthumela, yeqe endaweni yayo." 
Job37:2 Zwana lokuzwa umdumo welizwi lakhe, lomsindo o phuma emlonyeni wakhe." 
Job37:3 Uyakukhulula ngaphansi kwamazulu wonke, lokukhanya kwakhe kuze kube semikhawulweni yomhlaba." 
Job37:4 Emva kwalokho kubhonga ilizwi, uyaduma ngelizwi lokuphakama kwakhe, angakunqandi lapho kuzwakala ilizwi lakhe." 
Job37:5 UNkulunkulu uyaduma ngelizwi lakhe ngokumangalisayo kakhulu, wenza izinto ezinkulu, esingeziqedisise." 
Job37:6 Ngoba kuliqhwa elikhithikayo uthi: Woba semhlabeni; la ku zihlambo zezulu, la ku zihlambo zezulu elikhulu lamandla akhe." 
Job37:7 Uyanamathelisa isandla somuntu wonke, ukuze bazi bonke abantu bomsebenzi wakhe." 
Job37:8 Inyamazana ziyangena emihomeni yazo, zihlale ezikhundleni zazo." 
Job37:9 Isivunguzane siphuma ekamelweni, lomqando emoyeni wenyakatho." 
Job37:10 Ngomoya kaNkulunkulu kunikwa ungqwaqwane, lamanzi abanzi abe yilitshe." 
Job37:11 Njalo uthwalisa amayezi ngobumanzi, ahlakaze iyezi lokukhanya kwakhe." 
Job37:12 Njalo lona liyajikajika liphenduka ngokuqondisa kwakhe, ukuze enze konke awalaye khona, ebusweni bomhlaba emhlabathini." 
Job37:13 Loba ngoswazi, loba ngomhlaba wakhe, loba ngomusa, uyakufikisa." 
Job37:14 Beka indlebe kukho, Jobe; mana, unanzelele imisebenzi emangalisayo kaNkulunkulu." 
Job37:15 Uyazi yini ukuthi uNkulunkulu uwalungisa nini, enze ukukhanya kwamayezi akhe kukhanye?" 
Job37:16 Uyazi yini ukulengiswa kwamayezi, izimangaliso zopheleleyo elwazini lonke?" 
Job37:17 Ukuthi izigqoko zakho zikhudumala njani, ekuthuliseni umhlaba ngo moya weningizimu?" 
Job37:18 Uwendlalile yini amayezi kanye laye, aqine njengesibuko esibunjiweyo ngokuncibilikisa?" 
Job37:19 Sifundise ukuthi sizakuthini kuye; singeke silungise lutho ngenxa yomnyama. 
Job37:20 Kungalandiswa kuye yini ukuthi ngiyakhuluma? Uba umuntu engakhuluma, isibili uzaginywa." 
Job37:21 Khathesi-ke kabakuboni ukukhanya okubenyezelayo okusemayezini, lapho umoya udlula uwahlambulula." 
Job37:22 Igolide livela enyakatho. KuNkulunkulu kulobukhosi obesabekayo. 
Job37:23 USomandla singemfumane; uphakeme ngamandla, langokwahlulela, njalo mkhulu ngokulunga; kacindezeli." 
Job37:24 Ngakho abantu bayamesaba; kanaki wonke owabahlakaniphileyo ngenhliziyo. 
Job38:1 I Nkosi yasimphendula uJobe isesivunguzaneni yathi: 
Job38:2 Ngubani lo ofiphaza iseluleko ngamazwi angelalwazi? 
Job38:3 Bopha-ke ukhalo lwakho njengendoda, njalo ngizakubuza, njalo ungenze ngazi." 
Job38:4 Wawungaphi lapho ngimisa izisekelo zomhlaba? Tshono uba usazi ukuqedisisa. 
Job38:5 Ngubani owabeka izilinganiso zawo, uba ukwazi? Kumbe ngubani owelulela intambo yokulinganisa phezu kwawo?" 
Job38:6 Izisekelo zawo zamiswa phezu kwani? Kumbe ngubani owabeka ilitshe lawo lengonsi," 
Job38:7 lapho inkanyezi zokusa zahlabela kanyekanye, lamadodana wonke kaNkulunkulu amemeza ngenjabulo?" 
Job38:8 Kumbe ngubani owavalela ulwandle ngezivalo, lapho lufohla luphuma esiswini," 
Job38:9 lapho ngimisa iyezi laba yisembatho salo, lomnyama onzima waba yimbeleko yalo?" 
Job38:10 Njalo ngaluqumela isimiso, ngamisa imigoqo lezivalo," 
Job38:11 ngathi: Uzafika kuze kube lapha, kodwa ungedluli, lalapha kuzamelana lokuzigqaja kwamagagasi akho." 
Job38:12 Kusukela ensukwini zakho walawula ukusa yini, wenza ukudabuka kokusa ukuthi kwazi indawo yakho," 
Job38:13 ukuthi kubambe imiphetho yomhlaba, ukuze kuthintithe ababi kuwo?" 
Job38:14 Kuyaguquka njengebumba lophawu lokunamathisela, kuzimisa njengesembatho." 
Job38:15 Lakwababi ukukhanya kwabo kuyagodlwa, lengalo ephakemeyo iyephulwa." 
Job38:16 Usungenile emithonjeni yolwandle yini, wahamba usiya le lale ekudingeni inziki?" 
Job38:17 Amasango okufa wawembulelwa yini, wawabona amasango ethunzi lokufa?" 
Job38:18 Uqedisisile yini kuze kube sebubanzini bomhlaba? Tshono uba ukwazi konke. 
Job38:19 Ingaphi indlela lapho okuhlala khona ukukhanya? Lomnyama, ingaphi indawo yawo," 
Job38:20 ukuze ukuse emngceleni wakho, lokuthi uqedisise izindlela zomuzi wakho?" 
Job38:21 Uyazi, ngoba wawusuzelwe, lenani lensuku zakho likhulu." 
Job38:22 Usungenile eziphaleni zeliqhwa elikhithikayo yini, wabona iziphala zesiqhotho," 
Job38:23 engizigodle kuze kube yisikhathi sokuhlupheka, kuze kube lusuku lokulwa lolwempi?" 
Job38:24 Ingaphi indlela lapho ukukhanya okwabiwa khona, umoya wempumalanga ohlakazeka khona emhlabeni?" 
Job38:25 Ngubani owehlukanisela impophoma indlela yamanzi, lendlela yombane wemidumo," 
Job38:26 ukuthi line emhlabeni lapho okungelamuntu khona, enkangala okungelamuntu kuyo," 
Job38:27 ukusuthisa inkangala legwadule, lokuhlumisa ukuphuma kotshani?" 
Job38:28 Izulu liloyise yini, kumbe ngubani owazala amathonsi amazolo?" 
Job38:29 Ungqwaqwane waphuma esiswini sikabani? Njalo ngubani owazala iliqhwa lamazulu? 
Job38:30 Amanzi afihlakele njengelitshe, lobuso bokujula bujiyile." 
Job38:31 Ungazibopha yini izibopho zesiLimela, kumbe uthukulule intambo zeziNja?" 
Job38:32 Ungakhupha yini izinkanyezi ngesikhathi sazo? Ungakhokhela yini iBhere kanye labantwana balo? 
Job38:33 Uyazazi yini izimiso zamazulu, kumbe ungamisa umbuso wazo emhlabeni?" 
Job38:34 Ungaphakamisela yini ilizwi lakho emayezini, ukuthi ubunengi bamanzi bukusibekele?" 
Job38:35 Ungathuma yini imibane ukuthi ihambe, ithi kuwe: Khangela, si lapha?" 
Job38:36 Ngubani owabeka inhlakanipho emibilini? Kumbe ngubani onike ukuqedisisa engqondweni? 
Job38:37 Ngubani ongabala amayezi ngenhlakanipho? Njalo ngubani ongalalisa imbodlela zamazulu," 
Job38:38 lapho uthuli luqina lube yizigaqa, lamagade anamathelane?" 
Job38:39 Ungasizingelela yini isilwane ukudla, kumbe usuthise ukulamba kwamabhongo esilwane," 
Job38:40 lapho zicathame emihomeni, zihlala esikhundleni ukuthi zicathame?" 
Job38:41 Ngubani olungisela iwabayi ukudla kwalo, lapho amatsiyane alo ekhala kuNkulunkulu, ezulazula ngoba kungelakudla?" 
Job39:1 Uyasazi yini isikhathi sokuzala kwamagogo edwala? Uyananzelela yini ukuhelelwa kwezimpala? 
Job39:2 Ungazibala yini inyanga e zi zi gcwalisayo? Njalo uyasazi yini isikhathi sokuzala kwazo? 
Job39:3 Zigoba, zizale abantwana bazo, zikhuphe imihelo yazo." 
Job39:4 Amazinyane azo aqine akhule egangeni; asuke ahambe, angabuyi kuzo." 
Job39:5 Ngubani owakhupha ubabhemi weganga ekhululekile? Njalo ngubani othukulule izibopho zikababhemi weganga," 
Job39:6 engimmisele inkangala ibe ngumuzi wakhe, lesimunyu sibe zindawo zakhe zokuhlala?" 
Job39:7 Uhleka umsindo womuzi, angezwa imisindo yomtshayeli." 
Job39:8 Udinga izintaba ezi lidlelo lakhe, edinga elandela konke okuluhlaza." 
Job39:9 Inyathi iyavuma yini ukukusebenzela? Izalala yini esibayeni sakho ebusuku? 
Job39:10 Ungayibophela inyathi yini ngentambo yayo emfolweni? Ingabhuqa yini izihotsha emva kwakho? 
Job39:11 Ungathembela kuyo yini ngoba amandla ayo makhulu? Ungayiyekelela yini umtshikatshika wakho? 
Job39:12 Ungayikholwa yini ukuthi izabuyisa inhlanyelo yakho, njalo i yi buthele e bale ni lokubhulela lakho?" 
Job39:13 Impiko zezintshe ziyaphaphazela ngentokozo; kodwa ziz impiko lezinsiba zengabuzane yini? 
Job39:14 Ngoba itshiya amaqanda ayo emhlabathini, iwakhudumeze othulini," 
Job39:15 iyakhohlwa ukuthi unyawo lungawachoboza, lokuthi isilo seganga singawanyathela." 
Job39:16 Iwaphatha kalukhuni amatsiyane ayo, kungathi kawayisiwo awayo; umtshikatshika wayo uyize, ingelakwesaba." 
Job39:17 Ngoba uNkulunkulu wayithathela inhlakanipho, kayabelanga ukuqedisisa." 
Job39:18 Lapho sekuyisikhathi iyaziphakamisela phezulu, ihleke ibhiza lomgadi walo." 
Job39:19 Uzanika yini ibhiza amandla? Uyayigqokisa yini intamo yalo ngomhlonga? 
Job39:20 Uyalenza leqe yini njengentethe? Ubukhosi bokukhala kwalo buyesabeka. 
Job39:21 Liyaphanda esihotsheni, lithokoze ngamandla alo, liphume ukuhlangabeza izikhali." 
Job39:22 Liyakuhleka ukwesaba, kalesabi, kaliphenduki phambi kwenkemba." 
Job39:23 Phezu kwalo isamba semitshoko siyakhehlezela, umkhonto ophazimayo lomdikadika." 
Job39:24 Ngokuqhuqha lokufutheka liginye umhlaba; kalikholwa ukuthi ngumsindo wophondo. 
Job39:25 Ekukhaleni kophondo lithi: Aha! Linuke impi ikhatshana, umdumo wezinduna, lokumemeza." 
Job39:26 Ukhozi luyaphapha yini ngokuqedisisa kwakho, luselulela impiko zalo eningizimu?" 
Job39:27 Ilinqe liyaqonga yini ngokulaya kwakho? Lakhe isidleke salo engqongeni yini? 
Job39:28 Lihlala lilale ebusuku edwaleni, engqongeni yedwala leyenqaba." 
Job39:29 Lisuka lapho lidinga ukudla; amehlo alo abonela khatshana. 
Job39:30 Lamatsiyane alo azitika ngegazi; lalapho okukhona ababuleweyo likhona. 
Job40:1 I Nkosi yasiphendula uJobe yathi: 
Job40:2 Ophikisana loSomandla uza m qondisa yini? Osola uNkulunkulu kakuphendule. 
Job40:3 UJobe waseyiphendula i Nkosi wathi: 
Job40:4 Khangela, ngiphansi; ngingakuphendula ngithi ni? Ngibeka isandla sami emlonyeni wami." 
Job40:5 Ngikhulumile kanye, kodwa kangiyikuphendula; kumbe kabili, kodwa kangiyikuqhubeka." 
Job40:6 I Nkosi yasimphendula uJobe isesivunguzaneni yathi: 
Job40:7 Bopha khathesi ukhalo lwakho njengendoda; ngizakubuza, ubusungazisa." 
Job40:8 Isibili, uzachitha isahlulelo sami yini? Ungilahle, ukuze ube ngolungileyo yini?" 
Job40:9 Njalo ulengalo yini njengoNkulunkulu? Kumbe ungaduma yini ngelizwi njengaye? 
Job40:10 Khathesi zicecise ngobukhosi lokuphakama, uzembese ngodumo lenkazimulo." 
Job40:11 Usabalalise intukuthelo zolaka lwakho, ukhangele wonke ozigqajayo, umthobise." 
Job40:12 Khangela wonke ozigqajayo, umehlisele phansi, unyathelele phansi ababi endaweni yabo." 
Job40:13 Ubafihle bonke ethulini, ubophe ubuso babo ngasese." 
Job40:14 Khona lami ngizakudumisa, ngoba isandla sakho sokunene sizakusindisa." 
Job40:15 Ake ukhangele imvubu engayenza kanye lawe; idla utshani njengenkabi. 
Job40:16 Ake ukhangele, amandla ayo asekhalweni lwayo, lokuqina kwayo kusemisipheni yesisu sayo." 
Job40:17 Iyagobisa umsila wayo njengomsedari; imisipha yemilenze yayo yelukene. 
Job40:18 Amathambo ayo a njeng emigelo yethusi, amathambo ayo anjengemigoqo yensimbi." 
Job40:19 Ingeyokuqala yezindlela zikaNkulunkulu; owayenzayo wasondeza inkemba yayo. 
Job40:20 Ngoba intaba ziyayivezela ukudla, lapho okudlala khona inyamazana zonke zeganga." 
Job40:21 Ilala phansi kwesihlahla esiluhlaza, ekusithekeni kwemihlanga lamaxhaphozi." 
Job40:22 Izihlahla eziluhlaza ziyayisibekela ngo mthunzi wazo; imidubu yesifula iyayiphahla. 
Job40:23 Khangela, umfula uya yi cindezela, kayiphangisi; ilesibindi lanxa iJordani ingaphuphumela emlonyeni wayo." 
Job40:24 Ongayibamba yini ngamehlo ayo? Ongahlaba yini amakhala ayo ngemijibila? 
Job41:1 Ungamhudula yini uLeviyathani ngengwegwe, kumbe ulimi lwakhe ngentambo o yenza itshone?" 
Job41:2 Ungafaka yini umhlanga ekhaleni lakhe, kumbe ubhoboze umhlathi wakhe ngameva?" 
Job41:3 Uzakuncenga kanengi yini? Uzakhuluma lawe ngathambileyo yini? 
Job41:4 Uzakwenza isivumelwano lawe yini? Uzamthatha abe yinceku kokuphela yini? 
Job41:5 Uzadlala laye yini njengenyoni? Kumbe uzambophela amantombazana akho yini? 
Job41:6 Abathengi bazathengiselana ngaye yini? Bazakwehlukaniselana ngaye yini phakathi kwabathengisayo? 
Job41:7 Uzagcwalisa yini isikhumba sakhe ngezinhlendla, lekhanda lakhe ngemikhonto yenhlanzi?" 
Job41:8 Beka isandla sakho phezu kwakhe, khumbula impi, ungakwenzi futhi." 
Job41:9 Khangela, ithemba lakhe lizakuba ngamanga. Laye uzaphoselwa phansi yini ngokumbona?" 
Job41:10 Kakho olesihluku sokuthi amvuse. Ngubani-ke yena ongazimisa phambi kwami? 
Job41:11 Ngubani onganduleleyo ukuthi ngi m bhadale? Okungaphansi kwamazulu wonke ngokwami. 
Job41:12 Kangiyikuthula mayelana lezitho zakhe, lendaba yamandla akhe, lobuhle besimo sakhe." 
Job41:13 Ngubani ongabonakalisa ubuso besembatho sakhe? Ngubani ongeza lamatomu akhe aphindwe kabili? 
Job41:14 Ngubani ongavula iminyango yobuso bakhe? Amazinyo akhe ayesabeka inhlangothi zonke. 
Job41:15 Imizila yamahawu akhe ilokuziqhenya, ivalelwe ngophawu oluqinisiweyo." 
Job41:16 Elinye lisondele kwelinye, ukuze kungangeni umoya phakathi kwawo." 
Job41:17 Ahlangene, abambana, ukuze angehlukaniswa." 
Job41:18 Ukuthimula kwakhe kuphazima ukukhanya, lamehlo akhe anjengenkophe zemadabukakusa." 
Job41:19 Emlonyeni wakhe kuphuma izihlanti, ziqhatshe ziphume inhlansi zomlilo." 
Job41:20 Emakhaleni akhe kuphuma intuthu, njengembiza ebilayo lomhlanga." 
Job41:21 Umoya wakhe uvuthela amalahle, lelangabi liphume emlonyeni wakhe." 
Job41:22 Entanyeni yakhe kuhlala amandla, laphambi kwakhe kugida usizi." 
Job41:23 Amavinqo enyama yakhe anamathelene, aqinile kuye, kawanyikinyeki." 
Job41:24 Inhliziyo yakhe iqinile njengelitshe, yebo, ilukhuni njengelitshe lokuchola elingaphansi." 
Job41:25 Ekuvukeni kwakhe amaqhawe ayesaba, ekubhuleni batshedela emuva." 
Job41:26 Ofinyelela kuye ngenkemba angeme, umkhonto, umtshoko, lomdikadika." 
Job41:27 Uthatha insimbi njengotshani, ithusi njengogodo olubolileyo." 
Job41:28 Umtshoko kawumenzi abaleke; amatshe esavutha aphendulwa nguye abe yizibi. 
Job41:29 Isagila sitshaywa njengezibi; uhleka ukugenqeza komdikadika. 
Job41:30 Ngaphansi kwakhe kulendengezi ezibukhali; wendlala izinto ezibukhali odakeni. 
Job41:31 Wenza inziki zibile njengembiza, enze ulwandle lube njengembiza yamafutha." 
Job41:32 Ngemva kwakhe wenza indlela ikhanye; inziki zingathiwa ziyimpunga. 
Job41:33 Kakukho emhlabeni okufanana laye, owenziwa angabi lokwesaba." 
Job41:34 Ukhangela konke okuphakemeyo; uyinkosi phezu kwabo bonke abantwana bokuzigqaja. 
Job42:1 UJobe waseyiphendula i Nkosi wathi: 
Job42:2 Ngiyazi ukuthi ungakwenza konke, lokuthi kakulacebo elingavinjelwa kuwe." 
Job42:3 Ngubani lo ofiphaza iseluleko engelalwazi? Ngakho ngikhulumile lokho ebengingakuqedisisi, izinto ezimangalisayo kakhulu kimi, ebengingazazi." 
Job42:4 Ake uzwe, ngizakhuluma mina. Ngizakubuza, njalo wenze ngazi." 
Job42:5 Ngokuzwa kwendlebe ngikuzwile, kodwa khathesi ilihlo lami liyakubona." 
Job42:6 Ngakho-ke ngiya zi nenga, ngiyaphenduka ethulini lemlotheni." 
Job42:7 Kwasekusithi i Nkosi isikhulume lamazwi kuJobe, i Nkosi yathi kuElifazi umThemani: Ulaka lwami luyavutha kuwe lakubangane bakho ababili, ngoba kalikhulumanga ngami okuqondileyo njengenceku yami uJobe." 
Job42:8 Ngakho-ke zithatheleni amajongosi ayisikhombisa lenqama eziyisikhombisa, liye encekwini yami uJobe, lizinikelele umnikelo wokutshiswa, njalo uJobe inceku yami uzalikhulekela; ngoba isibili ngizakwemukela ubuso bakhe, ukuze ngingenzi kini njengo buthutha benu; ngoba kalikhulumanga ngami okuqondileyo njengenceku yami uJobe." 
Job42:9 Ngakho bahamba oElifazi umThemani loBilidadi umShuhi lo Zofari umNahama, benza njengokutsho kwe Nkosi kubo; njalo i Nkosi yemukela ubuso bukaJobe." 
Job42:10 I Nkosi yasiphendula ukuthunjwa kukaJobe esekhulekele abangane bakhe; njalo i Nkosi yengezelela konke uJobe ayelakho kuze kuphindwe kabili. 
Job42:11 Kwasekufika kuye bonke abafowabo labo bonke odadewabo, labo bonke ababemazi mandulo, badla isinkwa laye endlini yakhe, bamkhalela, bamduduza ngakho konke okubi i Nkosi eyayimehlisele khona; bamnika ngulowo lalowo uhlamvu lwemali, lalowo lalowo isongo legolide." 
Job42:12 I Nkosi yasibusisa isiphetho sikaJobe okwedlula ukuqala kwakhe; ngoba waba lezimvu ezizinkulungwane ezilitshumi lane, lamakamela azinkulungwane eziyisithupha, lezipane zenkabi eziyinkulungwane, labobabhemi abasikazi abayinkulungwane." 
Job42:13 Wasesiba lamadodana ayisikhombisa lamadodakazi amathathu. 
Job42:14 Wasebiza ibizo leyokuqala wathi nguJemima, lebizo leyesibili wathi nguKeziya, lebizo leyesithathu wathi nguKereni-Hapuki." 
Job42:15 Njalo kakutholakalanga abesifazana abahle njengamadodakazi kaJobe elizweni lonke; loyise wawanika ilifa phakathi kwabanewabo. 
Job42:16 Lemva kwalokho uJobe waphila iminyaka elikhulu lamatshumi amane; wabona abantwana bakhe, labantwana babantwana bakhe, kwaze kwaba yizizukulwana ezine." 
Job42:17 UJobe wasesifa, emdala, enele ngezinsuku." 
Psalms1:1 Ubusisiwe umuntu ongahambi ngeseluleko sababi, njalo ongemi endleleni yezoni, njalo ongahlali esihlalweni sabagconayo;" 
Psalms1:2 kodwa intokozo yakhe isemlayweni we Nkosi, uzindla ngomlayo wayo emini lebusuku." 
Psalms1:3 Njalo uzakuba njengesihlahla esihlanyelwe emifuleni yamanzi, esithela isithelo saso ngesikhathi saso, ohlamvu lwaso kaliyikubuna; lakho konke akwenzayo kuzaphumelela." 
Psalms1:4 Ababi kabanjalo, kodwa ba njengamakhoba umoya owaphephulayo." 
Psalms1:5 Ngakho ababi kabayikuma ekwahlulelweni, lezoni enhlanganweni yabalungileyo." 
Psalms1:6 Ngoba i Nkosi iyayazi indlela yabalungileyo, kodwa indlela yababi izabhubha." 
Psalms2:1 Kungani izizwe zixokozela, labantu benakana okuyize?" 
Psalms2:2 Amakhosi omhlaba azimisela, lababusi benza ugobe ndawonye bemelene le Nkosi njalo bemelene logcotshiweyo wayo, besithi:" 
Psalms2:3 Asiqamule izibopho zabo, silahle intambo zabo zisuke kithi." 
Psalms2:4 Ohlezi emazulwini uzahleka, iNkosi izabahleka usulu." 
Psalms2:5 Khona izakhuluma kubo entukuthelweni yayo, ibethuse ngokuvutha kolaka lwayo." 
Psalms2:6 Kube kanti mina ngibekile iNkosi yami phezu kweZiyoni, intaba yami engcwele." 
Psalms2:7 Ngizalandisa ngesimiso: I Nkosi ithe kimi: Wena uyiNdodana yami, lamuhla ngikuzele." 
Psalms2:8 Cela kimi, ngizanika izizwe zibe yilifa lakho, lemikhawulo yomhlaba ibe yimfuyo yakho." 
Psalms2:9 Uzazephula ngentonga yensimbi, uziphahlaze njengembiza yebumba." 
Psalms2:10 Ngakho-ke hlakaniphani makhosi, lilayeke bahluleli bomhlaba." 
Psalms2:11 Ikhonzeni i Nkosi ngokwesaba, lithokoze ngokuthuthumela," 
Psalms2:12 liyange iNdodana, hlezi ithukuthele, libhubhe e ndlele ni, nxa ulaka lwayo seluvutha kancinyane. Babusisiwe bonke abaphephela kuyo." 
Psalms3:1 Nkosi, zande kangakanani izitha zami! Banengi abangivukelayo." 
Psalms3:2 Banengi abathi ngomphefumulo wami: Kakulasindiso lwakhe kuNkulunkulu. Selah. 
Psalms3:3 Kodwa wena Nkosi, uyisihlangu sami, udumo lwami, lomphakamisi wekhanda lami." 
Psalms3:4 Ngakhala ngelizwi lami e Nkosi ni, yasingiphendula isentabeni yayo engcwele. Selah." 
Psalms3:5 Mina ngalala phansi, ngajunywa yibuthongo; ngavuka, ngoba i Nkosi yangisekela." 
Psalms3:6 Kangiyikwesaba izinkulungwane ezilitshumi zabantu abangihanqileyo bemelana lami. 
Psalms3:7 Vuka, Nkosi! Ngisindisa, Nkulunkulu wami. Ngoba zonke izitha zami uzitshayile emhlathini, wephule amazinyo ababi." 
Psalms3:8 Usindiso ngolwe Nkosi. Isibusiso sakho siphezu kwabantu bakho. Selah. 
Psalms4:1 Ngiphendula ekukhaleni kwami, Nkulunkulu wokulunga kwami. Ekucindezelweni wangenzela indawo ebanzi. Woba lomusa kimi, uzwe umkhuleko wami." 
Psalms4:2 Madodana abantu, koze kube nini liphendula udumo lwami lube lihlazo, lithanda okuyize, lidinga amanga? Selah." 
Psalms4:3 Kodwa yazini ukuthi i Nkosi izehlukanisele owesaba uNkulunkulu; i Nkosi iyangizwa lapho ngikhala kuyo. 
Psalms4:4 Thuthumelani, lingoni; khulumani lenhliziyo yenu embhedeni wenu, lithule. Selah." 
Psalms4:5 Nikelani imihlatshelo yokulunga, lithembe e Nkosi ni." 
Psalms4:6 Banengi abathi: Ngubani ozasitshengisa okuhle? Nkosi, phakamisela ukukhanya kobuso bakho phezu kwethu." 
Psalms4:7 Ubeke intokozo enhliziyweni yami okwedlula isikhathi lapho amabele abo lewayini labo elitsha kwandile. 
Psalms4:8 Ngizacambalala ngokuthula, khonokho ngilale ubuthongo, ngoba wena Nkosi wedwa uyangihlalisa ngokulondolozeka." 
Psalms5:1 Beka indlebe emazwini ami, Nkosi; unanzelele ukububula kwami." 
Psalms5:2 Lalela ilizwi lokukhala kwami, Nkosi yami loNkulunkulu wami; ngoba ngikhuleka kuwe." 
Psalms5:3 Nkosi, ekuseni uzalizwa ilizwi lami; ekuseni ngiza zi hlelela wena, ngilinde." 
Psalms5:4 Ngoba kawusuye uNkulunkulu othokoza ebubini; omubi kayikuhlala lawe. 
Psalms5:5 Iziwula kaziyikuma phambi kwamehlo akho; uzonda bonke abenzi bobubi. 
Psalms5:6 Uzababhubhisa abaqamba amanga. I Nkosi iyamenyanya umuntu wegazi lenkohliso. 
Psalms5:7 Kodwa mina, ngizangena endlini yakho ngobukhulu besihawu sakho, ngikhothame ngikhangele ethempelini lakho elingcwele, ngokukwesaba." 
Psalms5:8 Nkosi, ngikhokhelele ekulungeni kwakho ngenxa yezitha zami, wenze indlela yakho iqonde phambi kwami." 
Psalms5:9 Ngoba kalikho iqiniso emlonyeni wazo, ingaphakathi yazo izinkohlakalo; umphimbo wazo ulingcwaba elivulekileyo, zibamba amehlo ngolimi lwazo." 
Psalms5:10 Tshono uthi zilecala, Nkulunkulu, kaziwe ngamacebo azo; uzilahle ngenxa yobunengi beziphambeko zazo, ngoba zikuvukele." 
Psalms5:11 Kodwa kabathabe bonke abathembela kuwe, bamemeze kokuphela ngentokozo, ngoba ubavikele; lalabo abathanda ibizo lakho kabajabule kuwe." 
Psalms5:12 Ngoba wena Nkosi, uzabusisa olungileyo, uzamhanqa ngomusa njengesihlangu esikhulu." 
Psalms6:1 Nkosi, ungangikhuzi entukuthelweni yakho, ungangijezisi ekuvutheni kolaka lwakho." 
Psalms6:2 Woba lomusa kimi, Nkosi, ngoba ngibuthakathaka. Nkosi, ngisilisa mina, ngoba amathambo ami ayaqaqamba." 
Psalms6:3 Lomphefumulo wami ukhathazekile kakhulu: Kodwa wena, Nkosi, koze kube nini?" 
Psalms6:4 Phenduka, Nkosi, khulula umphefumulo wami; ungisindise ngenxa yomusa wakho." 
Psalms6:5 Ngoba ekufeni kakukho ukukukhumbula; engcwabeni ngubani ozakubonga? 
Psalms6:6 Ngikhathele yikububula kwami; ubusuku bonke ngintshezisa icansi lami, ngezinyembezi zami ngimanzisise umbheda wami." 
Psalms6:7 Ilihlo lami lidliwe ngenxa yosizi, liyaguga ngenxa yezitha zami zonke." 
Psalms6:8 Sukani kimi, lonke benzi bokubi, ngoba i Nkosi izwile ilizwi lokulila kwami." 
Psalms6:9 I Nkosi izwile ukuncenga kwami; i Nkosi izakwemukela umkhuleko wami. 
Psalms6:10 Zonke izitha zami zizayangeka zitshaywe luvalo kakhulu; zizaphenduka, zihle ziyangeke." 
Psalms7:1 Nkosi, Nkulunkulu wami, ngiyathembela kuwe; ngisindisa kubo bonke abangizingelayo, ungikhulule." 
Psalms7:2 Hlezi adabule umphefumulo wami njengesilwane, edabudabula, kungekho okhululayo." 
Psalms7:3 Nkosi, Nkulunkulu wami, uba ngikwenzile lokhu, uba kukhona okubi ezandleni zami," 
Psalms7:4 uba ngiphindisele okubi kosekuthuleni lami (yebo ngakhulula oyisitha sami ngaphandle kwesizatho)," 
Psalms7:5 isitha kasizingele umphefumulo wami, siwufice, siyinyathelele impilo yami emhlabathini, senze udumo lwami luhlale ethulini. Selah." 
Psalms7:6 Vuka, Nkosi, ngolaka lwakho, ziphakamise ngenxa yentukuthelo yezitha zami; ungivusele isahlulelo o silayileyo." 
Psalms7:7 Ngakho inhlangano yezizwe izakuhanqa; langenxa yayo buya ngaphezulu. 
Psalms7:8 I Nkosi izakwahlulela izizwe. Ngahlulela, Nkosi, njengokulunga kwami lanjengobuqotho bami obu kimi." 
Psalms7:9 Ake buphele ububi bababi, kodwa umqinise olungileyo, ngoba ohlola inhliziyo lezinso nguNkulunkulu olungileyo." 
Psalms7:10 Isihlangu sami sikuNkulunkulu osindisa abaqotho enhliziyweni. 
Psalms7:11 UNkulunkulu ngumahluleli olungileyo, njalo nguNkulunkulu othukuthela insuku zonke." 
Psalms7:12 Uba engaphenduki, uzalola inkemba yakhe; useligobile idandili lakhe walilungisa." 
Psalms7:13 Usemlungisele izikhali zokufa, wenzela abazingeli imitshoko yakhe etshisayo." 
Psalms7:14 Khangela, uhelelwa ngokubi, akhulelwe yikona, azale amanga." 
Psalms7:15 Agebhe umgodi awugubhe, abesewela egodini alenzileyo." 
Psalms7:16 Ububi bakhe buzabuyela phezu kwekhanda lakhe, lodlame lwakhe lwehlele enkanda yakhe." 
Psalms7:17 Ngizayidumisa i Nkosi njengokulunga kwayo, ngihlabelele ibizo le Nkosi ephezu konke." 
Psalms8:1 Nkosi, Nkosi yethu, lilenkazimulo kangakanani ibizo lakho emhlabeni wonke! Omise ubukhosi bakho ngaphezu kwamazulu." 
Psalms8:2 Emlonyeni wezingane lowabamunyayo umisile amandla ngenxa yezitha zakho, ukuze uthulise isitha lomphindiseli." 
Psalms8:3 Lapho ngikhangela amazulu akho, umsebenzi weminwe yakho, inyanga lenkanyezi owazimisayo," 
Psalms8:4 uyini umuntu ukuthi umkhumbule, lendodana yomuntu ukuthi uyihambele?" 
Psalms8:5 Kanti wamenza waba ngaphansi kancinyane kulengilosi, wamethwesa umqhele wobukhosi lodumo." 
Psalms8:6 Wamenza wabusa phezu kwemisebenzi yezandla zakho, konke wakubeka ngaphansi kwenyawo zakhe," 
Psalms8:7 izimvu lenkabi zonke, kanye lezinyamazana zeganga," 
Psalms8:8 inyoni zamazulu, lezinhlanzi zolwandle, okudlula ezindleleni zenlwandle." 
Psalms8:9 Nkosi, Nkosi yethu, lilenkazimulo kangakani ibizo lakho emhlabeni wonke!" 
Psalms9:1 Ngiza ku dumisa, Nkosi, ngenhliziyo yami yonke, ngilandise zonke izimangaliso zakho." 
Psalms9:2 Ngizathaba ngithokoze kuwe, ngihlabele indumiso ebizweni lakho, wena oPhezukonke." 
Psalms9:3 Lapho izitha zami zibuyela emuva, zizakuwa, zibhubhe phambi kwakho." 
Psalms9:4 Ngoba ulimele ilungelo lami lodaba lwami, wahlala esihlalweni sobukhosi, wahlulela ngokulungileyo." 
Psalms9:5 Uzikhuzile izizwe, wabhubhisa omubi; walesula ibizo labo kuze kube nini lanini." 
Psalms9:6 Sitha, iphelile yonke incithakalo; uyidilizile imizi; ukukhunjulwa kwayo kubhubhe kanye la yo." 
Psalms9:7 Kodwa i Nkosi izahlala kuze kube phakade, isihlalo sayo sobukhosi isilungisele isahlulelo." 
Psalms9:8 Yona-ke izawahlulela umhlaba ngokulunga, ibagwebe abantu ngokuqonda." 
Psalms9:9 Njalo i Nkosi izakuba yisiphephelo socindezelweyo, isiphephelo ngezikhathi zokuhlupheka." 
Psalms9:10 Labalaziyo ibizo lakho bazathemba kuwe, ngoba wena Nkosi, kawubatshiyanga abakudingayo." 
Psalms9:11 Hlabelani indumiso e Nkosi ni ehlezi eZiyoni, limemezele phakathi kwabantu izenzo zayo." 
Psalms9:12 Ngoba idinga igazi, iyabakhumbula, kayikhohlwa ukukhala kwabahlutshwayo." 
Psalms9:13 Woba lomusa kimi, Nkosi, ubone uhlupho lwami oluvela kwabangizondayo, wena ongiphakamisayo emasangweni okufa," 
Psalms9:14 ukuze ngilandise yonke indumiso yakho emasangweni endodakazi yeZiyoni, ngithokoze kusindiso lwakho." 
Psalms9:15 Izizwe zitshone emgodini e zawenzayo, embuleni ezalithiyayo unyawo lwazo lubanjiwe." 
Psalms9:16 I Nkosi iyaziwa, yenza isahlulelo; omubi uthiywe emsebenzini wezandla zakhe. Higayoni. Selah." 
Psalms9:17 Abakhohlakeleyo bazabuyela esihogweni, zonke izizwe ezimkhohlwayo uNkulunkulu." 
Psalms9:18 Ngoba oswelayo kayikukhohlakala kokuphela; ithemba labayanga ka li yiku nyamalala phakade. 
Psalms9:19 Vuka, Nkosi, umuntu kanganqobi; izizwe kazigwetshwe phambi kwakho." 
Psalms9:20 Zitshayise ngovalo, Nkosi, izizwe kazikwazi ukuthi zingabantu nje. Selah." 
Psalms10:1 Nkosi, umeleni khatshana? Ucatshela ni ezikhathini zokuhlupheka?" 
Psalms10:2 Omubi ekuzigqajeni uyamzingelisisa umyanga; kababanjwe ngamagobe abawacebileyo. 
Psalms10:3 Ngoba omubi uyazikhukhumeza ngesifiso somphefumulo wakhe, uyasibusisa isihwaba, ayeyise i Nkosi." 
Psalms10:4 Omubi, ngokuzigqaja kobuso bakhe, kadingi uNkulunkulu; emicabangweni yakhe yonke kakho uNkulunkulu." 
Psalms10:5 Indlela zakhe ziqinile isikhathi sonke; izahlulelo zakho ziphakeme zikhatshana laye; izitha zakhe zonke uyazivuthela. 
Psalms10:6 Uthi enhliziyweni yakhe: Kangiyikunyikinywa; ngoba esizukulwaneni lesizukulwana ka ngi yikuba sebunzimeni. 
Psalms10:7 Umlomo wakhe ugcwele ukuthuka lezinkohliso lobuqili; ngaphansi kolimi lwakhe kukhona ukona lobubi. 
Psalms10:8 Uhlezi endaweni yokucathama yemizi, ezindaweni ezisithekileyo ubulala ongelacala; amehlo akhe akhangele othithibeleyo ngasese." 
Psalms10:9 Uyacatsha ekusithekeni njengesilwane ebhalwini lwaso; ucatshela ukumbamba ongumyanga, uyabamba ongumyanga ngokumhudulela embuleni lakhe." 
Psalms10:10 Uyaqutha, uyakhothama, ukuthi umyanga awe ngokulamandla kwakhe." 
Psalms10:11 Uthi enhliziyweni yakhe: UNkulunkulu ukhohliwe, ufihle ubuso bakhe, kasoze abone lanini." 
Psalms10:12 Sukuma, Nkosi! Nkulunkulu, phakamisa isandla sakho, ungabakhohlwa abahluphekayo." 
Psalms10:13 Kungani omubi edelela uNkulunkulu? Uthi enhliziyweni yakhe: Kawuyikukubiza. 
Psalms10:14 Uyabona, ngoba wena uyakhangela ububi lenhlupheko, ukukubeka esandleni sakho. Umyanga uyazinikela kuwe; wena ungumsizi wezintandane." 
Psalms10:15 Yephula ingalo yokhohlakeleyo lomubi; dinga inkohlakalo yakhe ukuze ungabe u sa yithola. 
Psalms10:16 UJehova yiNkosi kuze kube nini lanini; izizwe zibhubhile elizweni layo. 
Psalms10:17 Nkosi, uzwile isifiso sabathobekileyo, uzaqinisa inhliziyo yabo, wenze indlebe yakho izwe," 
Psalms10:18 ukwahlulela intandane locindezelweyo, ukuze umuntu wasemhlabeni angabe esesabeka." 
Psalms11:1 Ngithembela e Nkosi ni. Lingatsho njani emphefumulweni wami: Balekela entabeni yenu njeng enyoni. 
Psalms11:2 Ngoba, khangela, ababi bayagobisa idandili, balungisa umtshoko wabo entanjeni, ukuze batshoke emnyameni abaqotho ngenhliziyo." 
Psalms11:3 Nxa izisekelo zidilizwa, angenzani olungileyo?" 
Psalms11:4 I Nkosi isethempelini layo elingcwele; i Nkosi, isihlalo sayo sobukhosi sisemazulwini; amehlo ayo ayakhangela, inkophe zayo ziyahlola, abantwana babantu." 
Psalms11:5 I Nkosi iyamhlola olungileyo, kodwa omubi lothanda ubudlwangudlwangu, umphefumulo wayo uyamzonda." 
Psalms11:6 Uzanisa phezu kwababi imijibila, umlilo, lesolufa*, lomoya otshisayo, kuzakuba yisabelo senkezo yabo." 
Psalms11:7 Ngoba ilungile i Nkosi, iyathanda ukulunga; ubuso bayo buyabona oqotho." 
Psalms12:1 Siza, Nkosi, ngoba owesaba uNkulunkulu ka se kho, ngoba abathembekileyo banyamalele basuka ebantwaneni babantu." 
Psalms12:2 Bakhuluma okuyize, ngulowo lalowo lomakhelwane wakhe; indebe ezilalisayo, bakhuluma nganhliziyombili." 
Psalms12:3 I Nkosi izaquma zonke indebe ezilalisayo, ulimi olukhuluma izinto zokuzidla;" 
Psalms12:4 abathi: Sizanqoba ngolimi lwethu, indebe zethu ngezethu; ngubani oyinkosi phezu kwethu?" 
Psalms12:5 Ngenxa yokubandezelwa kwabayanga, ngenxa yokububula kwabaswelayo, sengizavuka, kutsho i Nkosi. Ngizabeka ekulondolozekeni amvuthelayo." 
Psalms12:6 Amazwi e Nkosi angamazwi ahlambulukileyo, isiliva esizanywe esithandweni somlilo senhlabathi, sihlanjululwe kasikhombisa." 
Psalms12:7 Wena, Nkosi, uzabagcina, ubavikele kulesisizukulwana kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms12:8 Ababi bayahambahamba inhlangothi zonke, lapho amanyala ephakanyiswa phakathi kwabantwana babantu." 
Psalms13:1 Koze kube nini, Nkosi, ungikhohlwa kokuphela? Koze kube nini ungifihlela ubuso bakho?" 
Psalms13:2 Koze kube nini ngizicebisa emphefumulweni wami, ngilo sizi enhliziyweni yami emini? Koze kube nini isitha sami siphakanyiswa phezu kwami?" 
Psalms13:3 Khangela, ungiphendule, Nkosi, Nkulunkulu wami; khanyisa amehlo ami hlezi ngilale ubuthongo bokufa," 
Psalms13:4 hlezi isitha sami sithi: Se ngimehlule; l abangihluphayo bathokoze lapho nginyikinywa. 
Psalms13:5 Kodwa mina ngithembele emuseni wakho, inhliziyo yami izathaba ngosindiso lwakho." 
Psalms13:6 Ngizayihlabelela i Nkosi, ngoba ingenzele okuhle kakhulu." 
Psalms14:1 Isithutha sithi enhliziyweni yaso: KakulaNkulunkulu. Bonakele, benza imisebenzi eyenyanyekayo; kakho owenza okuhle." 
Psalms14:2 I Nkosi yakhangela phansi isemazulwini phezu kwabantwana babantu, ukubona ukuthi ukhona yini oqedisisayo, odinga uNkulunkulu." 
Psalms14:3 Baphambukile bonke, bebonke bonakele; kakho owenza okuhle, kakho loyedwa." 
Psalms14:4 Kabazi yini bonke abenza okubi, abadla abantu bami njengoba besidla isinkwa? Kabayibizi i Nkosi." 
Psalms14:5 Lapho besaba lokwesaba, ngoba uNkulunkulu usesizukulwaneni solungileyo." 
Psalms14:6 Liliyangisile icebo lomyanga, ngoba i Nkosi iyisiphephelo sakhe." 
Psalms14:7 Kungathi usindiso lukaIsrayeli lungavela eZiyoni! Lapho i Nkosi ibuyisa ukuthunjwa kwabantu bayo, uJakobe uzathaba, uIsrayeli athokoze." 
Psalms15:1 Nkosi, ngubani ozahlala ethenteni lakho? Ngubani ozakwakha entabeni yakho engcwele?" 
Psalms15:2 Ngulowo ohamba ngobuqotho, lowenza okulungileyo, lokhuluma iqiniso enhliziyweni yakhe," 
Psalms15:3 ongahlebiyo ngolimi lwakhe, ongenzi okubi kumngane wakhe, longaphakamiseli umakhelwane wakhe ihlazo;" 
Psalms15:4 olahliweyo uyenyanyeka emehlweni akhe, kodwa uyabahlonipha abayesabayo i Nkosi; ofunga ngoku zi limaza, kodwa kaphenduki," 
Psalms15:5 onganiki imali yakhe ukuthi azuze inzuzo, longemukeli umvuzo wokuthengwa ngongelacala. Owenza lezizinto kayikunyikinywa kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms16:1 Ngilondoloza, Nkulunkulu, ngoba ngithembela kuwe." 
Psalms16:2 Wena uthe e Nkosi ni: UyiNkosi yami, ukulunga kwami kaku fiki kuwe." 
Psalms16:3 Kubangcwele abasemhlabeni, labahlekazi, ontokozo yami yonke ikubo." 
Psalms16:4 Zizakwanda insizi zabagijimela omunye unkulunkulu; kangiyikunikela iminikelo yabo yokunathwayo yegazi; lamabizo abo kangiyikuwaphatha endebeni zami. 
Psalms16:5 I Nkosi iyisabelo selifa lami lesenkezo yami; wena uphethe isabelo sami. 
Psalms16:6 Imizila iwele kimi ezindaweni ezithokozisayo; yebo, ngilelifa elibukekayo." 
Psalms16:7 Ngizayibusisa i Nkosi engelulekayo; lebusuku izinso zami ziyangiqondisa. 
Psalms16:8 Ngibekile i Nkosi phambi kwami njalonjalo; ngoba i ngakwesokunene sami, kangiyikunyikinywa." 
Psalms16:9 Ngakho inhliziyo yami iyathokoza, lodumo lwami luyajabula, lenyama yami izahlala ivikelekile." 
Psalms16:10 Ngoba kawutshiyanga umphefumulo wami esihogweni, njalo kawuyikunikela ongcwele wakho ukuthi abone ukubola." 
Psalms16:11 Uzangazisa indlela yempilo; ukugcwala kwentokozo kusebukhoneni bakho, ngakwesokunene sakho kukhona izinjabulo phakade." 
Psalms17:1 Zwana ukulunga, Nkosi, ulalele ukukhala kwami; ubeke indlebe emkhulekweni wami onga phum i ezindebeni ezilenkohliso." 
Psalms17:2 Ukwahlulelwa kwami kakuphume ebukhoneni bakho, amehlo akho kawabone izinto eziqondileyo." 
Psalms17:3 Uyilingile inhliziyo yami, wa ngi hambela ebusuku; ungihlolile, kawuficanga lutho; ngihlosile, umlomo wami kawuyikuphambuka." 
Psalms17:4 Mayelana lezenzo zabantu, ngelizwi lendebe zakho, mina ngizinqandile ezindleleni zomchithi," 
Psalms17:5 ukusekela izinyathelo zami emikhondweni yakho, ukuze inyawo zami zingatsheleli." 
Psalms17:6 Mina ngikubizile, ngoba uzangiphendula, Nkulunkulu; beka indlebe yakho kimi, uzwe inkulumo yami." 
Psalms17:7 Tshengisa ukumangalisa kothando lwakho, wena osindisa ngesandla sakho sokunene labo abathembela kuwe kwabavukelayo." 
Psalms17:8 Ngigcine njengenhlamvu yelihlo; ungifihle emthunzini wempiko zakho," 
Psalms17:9 kubo ubuso bababi abangicindezelayo, izitha zempilo yami ezingihanqileyo." 
Psalms17:10 Baya zi valela ngamahwahwa abo; ngomlomo wabo bakhuluma ngokuzigqaja. 
Psalms17:11 Sebesihanqile emanyathelweni ethu; amehlo abo bawamise, bezithobele emhlabathini." 
Psalms17:12 Unjengesilwane esikhuthalele ukudabula, lanjengebhongo lesilwane eliquthileyo endaweni ezisithekileyo." 
Psalms17:13 Vuka, Nkosi! Uhlangabeze ubuso bakhe, umphosele phansi. Khulula umphefumulo wami komubi, oyi nkemba yakho," 
Psalms17:14 kubo abantu, abayi sandla sakho, Nkosi, ebantwini bomhlaba, osabelo sabo sikulokhukuphila, osisu sabo usigcwalisa ngokuligugu kwakho; bagcwele abantwana, njalo batshiyele izingane zabo okuseleyo kwabo." 
Psalms17:15 Mina, ngizakhangela ubuso bakho ekulungeni, ngeneliswe yisimo sakho ekuphaphameni kwami." 
Psalms18:1 Ngizakuthanda, Nkosi, mandla ami." 
Psalms18:2 I Nkosi ilidwala lami, lenqaba yami, lomkhululi wami; uNkulunkulu wami, idwala lami, engizaphephela kulo, isihlangu sami, lophondo losindiso lwami, inqaba yami ephakemeyo." 
Psalms18:3 Ngizabiza i Nkosi edumisekayo, ngakho ngizasindiswa ezitheni zami." 
Psalms18:4 Izibopho zokufa zangizingelezela, lezikhukhula zobubi zangethusa." 
Psalms18:5 Izibopho zesihogo zangigombolozela, imijibila yokufa yayiphambi kwami." 
Psalms18:6 Ekuhluphekeni kwami ngayibiza i Nkosi, ngakhala kuNkulunkulu wami; walizwa ilizwi lami esethempelini lakhe, lokukhala kwami kweza phambi kwakhe, endlebeni zakhe." 
Psalms18:7 Khona umhlaba wazamazama, wanyikinyeka, lezisekelo zezintaba zaqhaqhazela, zazamazama, ngoba wayethukuthele." 
Psalms18:8 Kwenyuka intuthu emakhaleni akhe, lomlilo ophuma emlonyeni wakhe waqothula; amalahle avuthiswa yiwo." 
Psalms18:9 Wasekhothamisa amazulu, wehlela phansi, lomnyama onzima wawungaphansi kwenyawo zakhe." 
Psalms18:10 Wasegada ikherubhi*, waphapha, wandiza phezu kwempiko zomoya." 
Psalms18:11 Wamisa umnyama waba yindawo yakhe yensitha, idumba lakhe inhlangothi zonke zakhe, amanzi amnyama, amayezi amnyama omkhathi." 
Psalms18:12 Ekukhazimuleni okuphambi kwakhe amayezi akhe amnyama edlula, isiqhotho lamalahle omlilo." 
Psalms18:13 I Nkosi yasiduma emazulwini, oPhezukonke wazwakalisa ilizwi lakhe, isiqhotho lamalahle omlilo." 
Psalms18:14 Yasithuma imitshoko yayo, yabachitha; lemibane eminengi, yabaphaphathekisa." 
Psalms18:15 Khona kwabonakala amaphansi amanzi, kwembulwa izisekelo zomhlaba ekusoleni kwakho, Nkosi, ekuvutheleni komoya wamakhala akho." 
Psalms18:16 Yathuma iphezulu, yangibamba, yangenyula emanzini amanengi." 
Psalms18:17 Yangophula esitheni sami esilamandla, lakibo abangizondayo, ngoba babelamandla kulami." 
Psalms18:18 Babephambi kwami esukwini lwenhlupheko yami, kodwa i Nkosi yaba yisisekelo sami." 
Psalms18:19 Yangikhuphela endaweni ebanzi, yangikhulula ngoba yayithokoza ngami." 
Psalms18:20 I Nkosi yangivuza njengokulunga kwami; yangibuyisela njengokuhlanzeka kwezandla zami. 
Psalms18:21 Ngoba ngizilondolozile indlela ze Nkosi, kangisukanga kuNkulunkulu wami ngenkohlakalo." 
Psalms18:22 Ngoba zonke izahlulelo zayo zaziphambi kwami, lezimiso zayo kangiziphambulanga kimi." 
Psalms18:23 Njalo ngangiqondile kuyo, ngizinqandile ebubini bami." 
Psalms18:24 Ngakho i Nkosi ingibuyisele njengokulunga kwami, njengokuhlanzeka kwezandla zami phambi kwamehlo ayo." 
Psalms18:25 Kolesihawu uzaziveza ulesihawu; koqotho uzaziveza uqotho; 
Psalms18:26 kohlanzekileyo uzaziveza uhlanzekile; lakophambukileyo uzaziveza uphambukile. 
Psalms18:27 Ngoba wena uzabasindisa abantu abahlutshwayo; kodwa amehlo aphakemeyo uzawehlisela phansi. 
Psalms18:28 Ngoba wena uzalumathisa isibane sami; i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wami, izakhanyisa ubumnyama bami." 
Psalms18:29 Ngoba ngawe ngigijimile ngadabula phakathi kwebutho, langoNkulunkulu wami ngeqe umthangala." 
Psalms18:30 UNkulunkulu, indlela yakhe iphelele; ilizwi le Nkosi lihloliwe; uyisihlangu kubo bonke abaphephela kuye." 
Psalms18:31 Ngoba ngubani onguNkulunkulu ngaphandle kwe Nkosi? Njalo ngubani olidwala ngaphandle kukaNkulunkulu wethu? 
Psalms18:32 NguNkulunkulu ongibhincisa amandla, owenza indlela yami iphelele." 
Psalms18:33 Owenza inyawo zami zibe njenge ze zimpala, wangimisa ezingqongeni zami." 
Psalms18:34 Ofundisela izandla zami impi, ukuze idandili lethusi ligotshiswe zingalo zami." 
Psalms18:35 Unginikile lesihlangu sosindiso lwakho, lesandla sakho sokunene singisekele, lobumnene bakho bungikhulisile." 
Psalms18:36 Wenze zaba banzi izinyathelo zami ngaphansi kwami, ukuze inyawo zami zingatsheleli." 
Psalms18:37 Ngixotshene lezitha zami, ngazifica, kangibuyanga ngaze ngaziqeda." 
Psalms18:38 Ngazigwaza, zaze zehluleka ukuvuka, zawa ngaphansi kwenyawo zami." 
Psalms18:39 Ngoba ungibhincise amandla kusenzelwa impi, wabakhothamisela phansi kwami abangivukelayo." 
Psalms18:40 Unginike intamo yezitha zami, labo abangizondayo ngababhubhisa." 
Psalms18:41 Bakhala, kodwa engekho umsindisi; e Nkosi ni, kodwa kayibaphendulanga." 
Psalms18:42 Ngasengibacholisisa njengothuli phambi komoya, ngabachitha njengodaka lwezitalada." 
Psalms18:43 Wangikhulula ekuphikiseni kwabantu, wangimisa ngaba yinhloko yezizwe; abantu engangingabazi bangisebenzela." 
Psalms18:44 Bangenela ukuzwa ngendlebe bazangilalela, abezizweni bazazithoba kimi ngokuzenzisa." 
Psalms18:45 Abezizweni bazabuna, baphume ezinqabeni zabo bethuthumela." 
Psalms18:46 I Nkosi iyaphila; njalo kalibusiswe idwala lami, kaphakanyiswe uNkulunkulu wosindiso lwami." 
Psalms18:47 UNkulunkulu onginika impindiselo, lowehlisela izizwe ngaphansi kwami;" 
Psalms18:48 ongikhulula ezitheni zami; yebo, phezu kwabangivukelayo wangiphakamisa, emuntwini wodlakela wangikhulula." 
Psalms18:49 Ngenxa yalokhu ngizakudumisa, Nkosi, phakathi kwezizwe, ngihubele ibizo lakho indumiso." 
Psalms18:50 Iyanika inkosi yayo usindiso olukhulu, isenzela ogcotshiweyo wayo umusa, kuDavida, lenzalweni yakhe kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms19:1 Amazulu ayazisa udumo lukaNkulunkulu, lomkhathi utshumayela umsebenzi wezandla zakhe." 
Psalms19:2 Usuku kusuku luphumisela inkulumo, lobusuku kubusuku butshengisa ulwazi." 
Psalms19:3 Kakukho nkulumo, kawakho lamazwi, lapho ilizwi lawo elingezwakali khona." 
Psalms19:4 Intambo yawo iphumele emhlabeni wonke, lamazwi awo emkhawulweni womhlaba. Ulimisele ilanga ithente kuwo." 
Psalms19:5 Elinjengomyeni ephuma ekamelweni lakhe, lithokoza njengeqhawe ligijima e ndlel eni." 
Psalms19:6 Ukuphuma kwalo kusukela emkhawulweni wamazulu, lokuzingeleza kwalo kuze kube semikhawulweni yawo; njalo kakukho okufihliweyo ekutshiseni kwalo." 
Psalms19:7 Umlayo we Nkosi uphelele, uphendula umphefumulo; ubufakazi be Nkosi buqinisile, buhlakaniphisa ongelalwazi;" 
Psalms19:8 izimiso ze Nkosi zilungile, zithokozisa inhliziyo; umthetho we Nkosi uhlambulukile, ukhanyisa amehlo." 
Psalms19:9 Ukuyesaba i Nkosi kuhlanzekile, kumi kuze kube nininini; izahlulelo ze Nkosi ziliqiniso, zilungile zonke." 
Psalms19:10 Ziyaloyiseka kakhulu kulegolide, yebo kulegolide elicwengekileyo elinengi; njalo zimnandi kuloluju lolujuluka ohlangeni loluju." 
Psalms19:11 Futhi inceku yakho iyelulekwa ngazo; ekuzigcineni kulomvuzo omkhulu. 
Psalms19:12 Ngubani oqedisisa iziphosiso zakhe? Ngihlanze kwezisithekileyo. 
Psalms19:13 Igcine inceku yakho l ezonweni zokuzincoma; kazingabusi phezu kwami. Khona ngizakuba ngoqondileyo, ngibe msulwa esiphambekweni esikhulu." 
Psalms19:14 Amazwi omlomo wami lezizindlo zenhliziyo yami kakwemukeleke phambi kwakho, Nkosi, dwala lami lomhlengi wami." 
Psalms20:1 I Nkosi ikuphendule esukwini lokuhlupheka; ibizo likaNkulunkulu kaJakobe likuvikele. 
Psalms20:2 Kayithumele usizo lwakho oluvela endaweni engcwele, ikusekele iseZiyoni." 
Psalms20:3 Kayikhumbule yonke iminikelo yakho, njalo yemukele umnikelo wakho wokutshiswa. Selah." 
Psalms20:4 Ikunike njengokwenhliziyo yakho, njalo igcwalise icebo lakho lonke." 
Psalms20:5 Simemeze ngentokozo esindisweni lwakho, lebizweni likaNkulunkulu wethu siphakamise iziboniso! I Nkosi igcwalise konke ukucela kwakho." 
Psalms20:6 Sengisazi ukuthi i Nkosi isindisa ogcotshiweyo wayo; izamphendula isemazulwini ayo angcwele ngamandla asindisayo esandla sayo sokunene. 
Psalms20:7 Abanye bathembela enqoleni, labanye emabhizeni, kodwa thina sizakhumbula ibizo le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu." 
Psalms20:8 Bona bakhothanyisiwe bawa, kodwa thina sisukumile simi." 
Psalms20:9 Jehova, sindisa; inkosi isiphendule esukwini lokukhala kwethu." 
Psalms21:1 Jehova, inkosi izajabula emandleni akho, lesindisweni lwakho izathaba kangakanani!" 
Psalms21:2 Uyinikile isifiso senhliziyo yayo, kawu yi ncitshanga isicelo sendebe zayo. Selah." 
Psalms21:3 Ngoba uyihlangabeze ngezibusiso zokuhle, wa y ethwesa umqhele wegolide elihle ekhanda layo." 
Psalms21:4 Yacela impilo kuwe, wayinika yona, ubude bezinsuku kuze kube nini lanini." 
Psalms21:5 Lukhulu udumo lwayo ekusindiseni kwakho, inkazimulo lobukhosi wakubeka phezu kwayo." 
Psalms21:6 Ngoba uyenze yaba yizibusiso kuze kube nininini, uyayithokozisa ngenjabulo ngobuso bakho." 
Psalms21:7 Ngoba inkosi ithembela kuJehova, langomusa woPhezukonke kayiyikunyikinywa." 
Psalms21:8 Isandla sakho sizazithola zonke izitha zakho, lesandla sakho sokunene sizabathola labo abakuzondayo." 
Psalms21:9 Uzabenza babe njengesithando somlilo esikhathini sobuso bakho. I Nkosi izabaginya ekuthukutheleni kwayo, lomlilo uzabaqothula." 
Psalms21:10 Uzachitha isithelo sabo emhlabeni, lenzalo yabo phakathi kwabantwana babantu." 
Psalms21:11 Ngoba bezimisela okubi bemelene lawe, beceba ugobe, bazakwehluleka." 
Psalms21:12 Ngoba uzabafulathelisa, ngezintambo zedandili uzalungisa imitshoko imelane lobuso babo." 
Psalms21:13 Phakama, Nkosi, ngamandla akho! Sizahlabela sidumise amandla akho." 
Psalms22:1 Nkulunkulu wami, Nkulunkulu wami, ungitshiyeleni? Ukhatshana lokungisiza, l amazwi okubhonga kwami?" 
Psalms22:2 Nkulunkulu wami, ngiyakhala emini, kodwa kawungiphenduli, lebusuku, kodwa kangilakho ukuthula." 
Psalms22:3 Kodwa wena ungcwele, ohlezi e zibongw eni zikaIsrayeli." 
Psalms22:4 Obaba bethu bathemba kuwe, bathemba, wasubakhulula." 
Psalms22:5 Bakhala kuwe, bakhululwa; bathembela kuwe, kabayangekanga." 
Psalms22:6 Kodwa ngiyimpethu, kangisuye muntu, ihlazo labantu, ngeyiswa ngabantu." 
Psalms22:7 Bonke abangibonayo bayangihleka usulu, bakhamisa indebe, banikine ikhanda," 
Psalms22:8 besithi: Wathembela e Nkosi ni; kayimkhulule, imophule, ngoba yathokoza kuye." 
Psalms22:9 Kodwa nguwe owangikhupha esiswini, wangenza ngathemba ngis emabeleni kamama."
