Psalms22:10 Ngalahlelwa phezu kwakho kusukela esizalweni; kusukela esiswini sikamama unguNkulunkulu wami. 
Psalms22:11 Ungabi khatshana lami, ngoba uhlupho luseduze, ngoba kakho osizayo." 
Psalms22:12 Amajongosi amanengi angihanqile, alamandla eBashani angizingelezele." 
Psalms22:13 Zangikhamisela umlomo wazo, isilwane esiphangayo lesibhongayo." 
Psalms22:14 Ngithululiwe njengamanzi, lamathambo ami wonke ehlukene; inhliziyo yami injengengcino, incibilikile phakathi kwemibilini yami." 
Psalms22:15 Amandla ami omile njengodengezi, lolimi lwami lunamathele emihlathini yami; ungibeke ethulini lokufa." 
Psalms22:16 Ngoba izinja zingigombolozele; inhlangano yababi ingihanqile; izandla zami lenyawo zami bazibhobozile. 
Psalms22:17 Ngingabala wonke amathambo ami; bona bayakhangela bayangijolozela. 
Psalms22:18 Babelana izigqoko zami, benza inkatho yokuphosa ngezembatho zami." 
Psalms22:19 Kodwa, wena Nkosi, ungabi khatshana; mandla ami, phangisa ukungisiza." 
Psalms22:20 Khulula umphefumulo wami kuyo inkemba, wona wodwa owami emandleni enja." 
Psalms22:21 Ngisindisa emlonyeni wesilwane; ngoba empondweni zezinyathi ungiphendule. 
Psalms22:22 Ngizalandisa ibizo lakho kubafowethu, phakathi kwebandla ngizakudumisa." 
Psalms22:23 Lina elesaba i Nkosi, idumiseni; lonke nzalo kaJakobe, ihlonipheni; liyesabe, lonke nzalo kaIsrayeli." 
Psalms22:24 Ngoba kayidelelanga kayinengwanga yinhlupheko yohluphekayo; njalo kayimfihlelanga ubuso bayo; kodwa lapho ekhala kuyo, yezwa." 
Psalms22:25 Indumiso yami izakuba ngawe ebandleni elikhulu; ngizakhokha izifungo zami phambi kwabayesabayo. 
Psalms22:26 Abamnene bazakudla basuthe; bazayidumisa i Nkosi labo abayidingayo. Inhliziyo yenu izaphila kuze kube phakade. 
Psalms22:27 Imikhawulo yonke yomhlaba izakhumbula, iphendukele e Nkosi ni; lezizukulwana zonke zezizwe zizakhonza phambi kwakho." 
Psalms22:28 Ngoba umbuso ungowe Nkosi, njalo iyabusa phakathi kwezizwe." 
Psalms22:29 Bonke abakhulupheleyo bomhlaba bazakudla bakhonze; bonke abehlela othulini bazakhothama phambi kwayo, longagcini umphefumulo wakhe uphila." 
Psalms22:30 Inzalo izayikhonza; izabalelwa eNkosini kuso isizukulwana. 
Psalms22:31 Bazakuza bamemezele ukulunga kwayo ebantwini abazazalwa, ukuthi i kw enzile." 
Psalms23:1 I Nkosi ingumelusi wami, kangiyikuswela." 
Psalms23:2 Iyangilalisa emadlelweni aluhlaza; iyangiholela emanzini okuphumula. 
Psalms23:3 Ibuyisa umphefumulo wami, ingiholele endleleni zokulunga ngenxa yebizo layo." 
Psalms23:4 Yebo, loba ngihamba esihotsheni sethunzi lokufa, kangiyikwesaba okubi, ngoba wena ulami; intonga yakho lodondolo lwakho, khona kuyangiduduza." 
Psalms23:5 Uyalungisa itafula phambi kwami ngaphambi kwezitha zami; ugcoba ikhanda lami ngamafutha, inkezo yami iyaphuphuma." 
Psalms23:6 Isibili okuhle lesihawu kuzangilandela insuku zonke zempilo yami; njalo ngizahlala endlini ye Nkosi kuze kube sebudeni bezinsuku. 
Psalms24:1 Umhlaba ungowe Nkosi, lokugcwala kwawo, ilizwe, labahlala kulo." 
Psalms24:2 Ngoba yona yawusekela phezu kwezinlwandle, yawumisa phezu kwemifula." 
Psalms24:3 Ngubani ozakwenyukela entabeni ye Nkosi? Kumbe ngubani ozakuma endaweni yayo engcwele? 
Psalms24:4 Ngulowo olezandla ezihlanzekileyo lenhliziyo emhlophe, ongaphakamiseli umphefumulo wakhe kokuyize longafungi ngenkohliso." 
Psalms24:5 Uzakwemukela isibusiso e Nkosi ni, lokulunga kuNkulunkulu wosindiso lwakhe." 
Psalms24:6 Lesi yisizukulwana salabo abayidingayo, abadinga ubuso bakho, Jakobe. Selah." 
Psalms24:7 Phakamisani inhloko zenu, lina masango, phakanyiswani, lina minyango yaphakade, ukuze kungene iNkosi yenkazimulo." 
Psalms24:8 Ingubani liNkosi yenkazimulo? I Nkosi elamandla leliqhawe, i Nkosi elamandla empini." 
Psalms24:9 Phakamisani inhloko zenu, lina masango, yebo, phakamani, lina minyango yaphakade, ukuze kungene iNkosi yenkazimulo." 
Psalms24:10 Ingubani liNkosi yenkazimulo? I Nkosi yamabandla, yiyo eyiNkosi yenkazimulo. Selah." 
Psalms25:1 Kuwe, Nkosi, ngiphakamisela umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms25:2 Nkulunkulu wami, ngithembela kuwe; kangingayangeki; izitha zami kazingathokozi phezu kwami." 
Psalms25:3 Yebo, kungayangeki loyedwa kulabo abakulindelayo; kabayangeke labo abaphambukayo kungelasizatho." 
Psalms25:4 Ngazisa izindlela zakho, Nkosi, ungifundise imikhondo yakho." 
Psalms25:5 Ngikhokhelela eqinisweni lakho, ungifundise, ngoba unguNkulunkulu wosindiso lwami; ngilindele wena usuku lonke." 
Psalms25:6 Khumbula izihawu zakho, Nkosi, lobubele bakho, ngoba kwaku khona kusukela phakade." 
Psalms25:7 Ungazikhumbuli izono zobutsha bami leziphambeko zami; ngokomusa wakho wena ungikhumbule, ngenxa yokulunga kwakho, Nkosi." 
Psalms25:8 I Nkosi ilungile iqondile; ngakho-ke izazifundisa izoni ngendlela. 
Psalms25:9 Izabakhokhela abathobekileyo ekwahlulelweni, ibafundise abathobekileyo indlela yayo." 
Psalms25:10 Zonke indlela ze Nkosi zingumusa leqiniso kulabo abalondoloza isivumelwano sayo lezifakazelo zayo. 
Psalms25:11 Ngenxa yebizo lakho, Nkosi, thethelela isiphambeko sami, ngoba sikhulu." 
Psalms25:12 Nguwuphi umuntu owesaba i Nkosi? Izamfundisa ngendlela eza yi khetha. 
Psalms25:13 Umphefumulo wakhe uzahlala ebuhleni, lenzalo yakhe izalidla ilifa lelizwe." 
Psalms25:14 Imfihlo ye Nkosi ingeyabayesabayo, izabazisa isivumelwano sayo." 
Psalms25:15 Amehlo ami ahlala ese Nkosi ni, ngoba yiyo ezakhupha inyawo zami embuleni." 
Psalms25:16 Phendukela kimi, ube lomusa kimi, ngoba ngilesizungu, ngihluphekile." 
Psalms25:17 Inkathazo zenhliziyo yami zibe banzi, ungikhuphe ezinhluphekweni zami." 
Psalms25:18 Khangela inhlupheko yami losizi lwami, uthethelele zonke izono zami." 
Psalms25:19 Khangela izitha zami ngoba zinengi, ziyangizonda ngenzondo elesihluku." 
Psalms25:20 Londoloza umphefumulo wami, ungikhulule; kangingayangeki, ngoba ngiphephela kuwe." 
Psalms25:21 Ubuqotho lokuqonda kakungilondoloze, ngoba ngilindele wena." 
Psalms25:22 Nkulunkulu, hlenga uIsrayeli kuzo zonke inkathazo zakhe." 
Psalms26:1 Ngahlulela, Nkosi, ngoba mina ngihambe ngobuqotho bami, njalo ngithembele e Nkosi ni, angiyikutshelela." 
Psalms26:2 Ngihlola, Nkosi, ungilinge, uhlole izinso zami lenhliziyo yami." 
Psalms26:3 Ngoba ububele bakho buphambi kwamehlo ami, njalo ngihambe eqinisweni lakho." 
Psalms26:4 Kangihlalanga labantu benkohliso, kangihambelani labazenzisayo." 
Psalms26:5 Ngiyizondile inhlangano yabenzi bobubi, kangihlali lababi." 
Psalms26:6 Ngizageza izandla zami ngokungelacala, ngizingelezele ilathi lakho, Nkosi." 
Psalms26:7 Ukuze ngizwakalise ngelizwi lokubonga, lokuze ngilandise zonke izenzo zakho ezimangalisayo." 
Psalms26:8 Nkosi, ngiyayithanda inhlalo yendlu yakho, lendawo yokuhlala yenkazimulo yakho." 
Psalms26:9 Ungabuthi umphefumulo wami kanye lezoni, kumbe impilo yami kanye labantu abomele igazi." 
Psalms26:10 Ozandla zabo zilobubi, lesandla sabo sokunene sigcwele izivalamlomo." 
Psalms26:11 Kodwa mina ngizahamba ngobuqotho bami; ngihlenga, ube lomusa kimi." 
Psalms26:12 Unyawo lwami lumi endaweni elingeneyo; ngizayibusisa i Nkosi emabandleni. 
Psalms27:1 I Nkosi iyikukhanya kwami losindiso lwami; ngizakwesaba bani? I Nkosi ingamandla empilo yami; ngizakwethuka bani? 
Psalms27:2 Lapho ababi, izitha zami labamelana lami, besondela kimi ukudla inyama yami, bona bakhubeka bawa." 
Psalms27:3 Loba ibutho lingamisa inkamba limelene lami, inhliziyo yami kayiyikwesaba; loba impi ingangivukela, kulokhu ngizathemba." 
Psalms27:4 Into yinye engiyicela e Nkosi ni, yiyo engizayidinga, yikuthi ngihlale endlini ye Nkosi insuku zonke zempilo yami, ukuze ngibone ubuhle be Nkosi, ngibuzisise ethempelini layo." 
Psalms27:5 Ngoba izangifihla edumbeni layo ngosuku lobubi, ingifihle ekusithekeni kwethente layo, ingiphakamisele edwaleni." 
Psalms27:6 Khathesi-ke ikhanda lami lizaphakanyiswa phezu kwezitha zami ezingihanqileyo; ngakho ngizanikela iminikelo yokuthaba ethenteni layo; ngizahlabela, yebo ngihlabele indumiso e Nkosi ni." 
Psalms27:7 Zwana, Nkosi, ilizwi lami lapho ngikhala, njalo ungihawukele, ungiphendule." 
Psalms27:8 Uthe: Dingani ubuso bami. Inhliziyo yami yathi kuwe: Ubuso bakho, Nkosi, ngizabudinga." 
Psalms27:9 Ungangifihleli ubuso bakho; ungayixotshi inceku yakho ngokuthukuthela; ubulusizo lwami; ungangitshiyi, ungangideli, Nkulunkulu wosindiso lwami." 
Psalms27:10 Lapho umama lobaba bengitshiya, khona i Nkosi izangemukela." 
Psalms27:11 Ngifundisa indlela yakho, Nkosi, ungikhokhele endleleni eqondileyo, ngenxa yezitha zami." 
Psalms27:12 Unganginikeli entandweni yezitha zami, ngoba abafakazi bamanga bangivukele, lovutha isihluku." 
Psalms27:13 Ngangizaphela ngaphandle kokuthi ngakholwa ukuthi ngizabona okuhle kwe Nkosi elizweni labaphilayo. 
Psalms27:14 Lindela i Nkosi, ube lamandla, izaqinisa inhliziyo yakho, yebo, lindela i Nkosi." 
Psalms28:1 Ngiyakhala kuwe, Nkosi; dwala lami, ungangithuleli, hlezi nxa ungithulela, ngifanane labehlela emgodini." 
Psalms28:2 Zwana ilizwi lokuncenga kwami lapho ngikhala kuwe, lapho ngiphakamisela izandla zami endaweni yakho yelizwi engcwele." 
Psalms28:3 Ungangihuduli kanye lababi njalo kanye labenzi bobubi, abakhuluma ukuthula labomakhelwane babo, kodwa ububi busenhliziyweni yabo." 
Psalms28:4 Ubanike njengokwenza kwabo, lanjengobubi bezenzo zabo; ubanike njengokomsebenzi wezandla zabo, ubabuyisele isenzo sabo." 
Psalms28:5 Ngoba kabayinanzi imisebenzi ye Nkosi lokwenza kwezandla zayo, izababhidliza ingabakhi." 
Psalms28:6 Kayibusiswe i Nkosi, ngoba ilizwile ilizwi lokuncenga kwami." 
Psalms28:7 I Nkosi ingamandla ami lesihlangu sami; inhliziyo yami ithembela kuyo, ngiyasizwa; ngakho inhliziyo yami iyathokoza, ngiyidumise ngengoma yami." 
Psalms28:8 I Nkosi ingamandla abo, njalo iyinqaba yensindiso yogcotshiweyo wayo." 
Psalms28:9 Sindisa abantu bakho, ubusise ilifa lakho, beluse, ubaphakamise kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms29:1 Inikeni i Nkosi, lina madodana abalamandla, inikeni i Nkosi udumo lamandla." 
Psalms29:2 Inikeni i Nkosi udumo lwebizo layo, likhothame e Nkosi ni ebuhleni bobungcwele." 
Psalms29:3 Ilizwi le Nkosi liphezu kwamanzi; uNkulunkulu wenkazimulo uyaduma; i Nkosi iphezu kwamanzi amanengi. 
Psalms29:4 Ilizwi le Nkosi lilamandla, ilizwi le Nkosi lilobukhosi." 
Psalms29:5 Ilizwi le Nkosi lephula imisedari, yebo, i Nkosi yephula imisedari yeLebhanoni." 
Psalms29:6 Yenza yona-ke iqolotshe njengethole, iLebhanoni leSiriyoni njengethole lenyathi." 
Psalms29:7 Ilizwi le Nkosi lidabula amalangabi omlilo. 
Psalms29:8 Ilizwi le Nkosi lizamazamisa inkangala, i Nkosi izamazamisa inkangala yeKadeshi." 
Psalms29:9 Ilizwi le Nkosi lizalisa izimpala, lihlubule amahlathi; lethempelini layo konke kuthi: Udumo." 
Psalms29:10 UJehova uhlezi phezu kukazamcolo, yebo, uJehova uhlezi eyiNkosi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms29:11 I Nkosi izanika abantu bayo amandla; i Nkosi ibusise abantu bayo ngokuthula. 
Psalms30:1 Ngizakuphakamisa, Nkosi, ngoba ungenyusile, njalo kawuthokozisanga izitha zami ngami." 
Psalms30:2 Nkosi Nkulunkulu wami, ngakhalela kuwe, wangisilisa." 
Psalms30:3 Nkosi, uwukhuphulile umphefumulo wami engcwabeni, ungigcinile ngiphila, ukuze ngingehleli emgodini." 
Psalms30:4 Hlabelelani e Nkosi ni, lina bangcwele bayo, libonge ekukhunjulweni kobungcwele bayo." 
Psalms30:5 Ngoba ukuthukuthela kwayo kungokwesikhatshana, impilo isemuseni wayo. Ukulila kungahlala kusihlwa, kanti ekuseni kulentokozo." 
Psalms30:6 Mina-ke ngathi ekuphumeleleni kwami: Kangiyikunyikinywa laphakade. 
Psalms30:7 Nkosi, ngomusa wakho wenzile intaba yami iqine; wabufihla ubuso bakho, ngahlupheka." 
Psalms30:8 Ngakhala kuwe, Nkosi; ngancenga eNkosini." 
Psalms30:9 Kulenzuzo bani egazini lami ekutshoneni kwami emgodini? Uthuli luzakudumisa na? Luzatshumayela iqiniso lakho yini? 
Psalms30:10 Zwana, Nkosi, ube lomusa kimi; Nkosi, woba ngumsizi wami." 
Psalms30:11 Uphendule ukukhala kwami kwaba yikusina; ukhuphile ilembu lami lesaka, wangibhincisa intokozo," 
Psalms30:12 ukuze udumo lwami luhlabele indumiso kuwe, lungathuli; Nkosi, Nkulunkulu wami, ngizakubonga kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms31:1 Kuwe, Nkosi, ngiyathemba, kangingayangeki lanini, ngikhulule ngokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms31:2 Beka kimi indlebe yakho, ngikhulule masinyane, ube lidwala elilamandla kimi, indlu yezinqaba yokungisindisa." 
Psalms31:3 Ngoba wena ulidwala lami lenqaba yami; ngakho ngenxa yebizo lakho ngikhokhela ungiqondise. 
Psalms31:4 Ngikhupha embuleni abangithiye ngalo ensitha, ngoba uyinqaba yami." 
Psalms31:5 Esandleni sakho ngibeka umoya wami; ungihlengile, Nkosi, Nkulunkulu weqiniso." 
Psalms31:6 Ngibazondile labo abananzelela okuyize kwamanga; kodwa mina ngithembela e Nkosi ni. 
Psalms31:7 Ngizathaba ngithokoze emuseni wakho, ngoba ubonile uhlupho lwami, wazile umphefumulo wami ezinkathazweni." 
Psalms31:8 Njalo kawungivalelanga esandleni sesitha, umise inyawo zami endaweni ebanzi." 
Psalms31:9 Woba lomusa kimi, Nkosi, ngoba ngilohlupho; ilihlo lami liqedwa lusizi, umphefumulo wami lesisu sami." 
Psalms31:10 Ngoba impilo yami iphela ngosizi, leminyaka yami ngokububula; amandla ami ayadeda ngenxa yeziphambeko zami, lamathambo ami ayaqedwa." 
Psalms31:11 Sengilihlazo phakathi kwazo zonke izitha zami, kodwa ikakhulu kwabakhelene lami, se ngi yikwesabeka kwabangejwayeleyo; abangibonayo ngaphandle bayangibalekela." 
Psalms31:12 Ba khohlwe ngami njengofileyo enhliziyweni; nginjengesitsha esifileyo. 
Psalms31:13 Ngoba ngizwile ukunyunda kwabanengi, ukwesaba inhlangothi zonke, becebisana bemelene lami, beceba ukuthatha impilo yami." 
Psalms31:14 Kodwa mina ngithemba kuwe, Nkosi, ngithi: UnguNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms31:15 Izikhathi zami zisesandleni sakho; ngikhulula esandleni sezitha zami lakwabangizingelayo. 
Psalms31:16 Khanyisa ubuso bakho phezu kwenceku yakho; ungisindise ngothando lwakho. 
Psalms31:17 Nkosi, kangingayangeki, ngoba ngikubizile; kabayangeke ababi, bathule engcwabeni." 
Psalms31:18 Kazithuliswe indebe zamanga, ezikhuluma kalukhuni zimelene lolungileyo ngokuzigqaja langokweyisa." 
Psalms31:19 Kukhulu kangakanani ukulunga kwakho, okubekele labo abakwesabayo, o kwenzela labo abathembela kuwe, phambi kwabantwana babantu!" 
Psalms31:20 Uzabafihla ekusithekeni kobukhona bakho basuke ekuzigqajeni komuntu, ubafihle ethenteni lakho ekuphikisaneni kwenlimi." 
Psalms31:21 Kayibusiswe i Nkosi, ngoba ingenzele uthando olumangalisayo emzini oqinileyo." 
Psalms31:22 Ngoba mina ngathi ekuphangiseni kwami: Ngiqunyiwe ngasuswa phambi kwamehlo akho. Loba kunjalo uzwile ilizwi lokuncenga kwami ekukhaleni kwami kuwe. 
Psalms31:23 Ithandeni i Nkosi lonke bangcwele bayo. I Nkosi ilondoloza abathembekileyo, iyamphindisela kakhulukazi owenze ngokuzigqaja." 
Psalms31:24 Qinani, izaqinisa inhliziyo yenu, lina lonke elithembela e Nkosi ni." 
Psalms32:1 Ubusisiwe lowo osiphambeko sakhe sithethelelwe, osono sakhe sisitshekelwe." 
Psalms32:2 Ubusisiwe umuntu i Nkosi engambaleli ububi, lokungekho inkohliso emoyeni wakhe." 
Psalms32:3 Lapho ngathula, amathambo ami aguga ngenxa yokubhonga kwami usuku lonke." 
Psalms32:4 Ngoba emini lebusuku isandla sakho sasinzima phezu kwami; ubumanzi bami baguqulelwa ekomeni kwehlobo. Selah. 
Psalms32:5 Ngakwazisa isono sami, kangifihlanga isiphambeko sami, ngathi: Ngizavuma iziphambeko zami e Nkosi ni. Wena wasuthethelela icala lesono sami. Selah." 
Psalms32:6 Ngenxa yalokhu ngulowo lalowo owesaba uNkulunkulu uzakhuleka kuwe ngesikhathi sokuthola. Isibili, esikhukhuleni samanzi amakhulu kawayikufinyelela kuye." 
Psalms32:7 Wena uyindawo yami yokucatsha, uyangilondoloza ekuhluphekeni, ungiphahle ngamahubo okukhululwa. Selah." 
Psalms32:8 Ngizakulaya ngikufundise endleleni ozahamba ngayo, ngizakweluleka, ilihlo lami libe phezu kwakho." 
Psalms32:9 Ungabi njengebhiza, njengembongolo engelakuqedisisa, omlomo wayo onqandwa ngomkhala langetomu, hlezi kusondele kuwe." 
Psalms32:10 Zinengi izinhlupheko zomubi, kodwa othembela e Nkosi ni, umusa uzamphahla." 
Psalms32:11 Jabulani e Nkosi ni, lithabe, balungileyo; memezani ngokuthaba, lonke baqotho enhliziyweni." 
Psalms33:1 Thokozani e Nkosi ni, balungileyo. Ukudumisa kubafanele abaqotho." 
Psalms33:2 Dumisani i Nkosi ngechacho, lihlabelele kuyo ngogubhu olulentambo ezilitshumi." 
Psalms33:3 Ihlabeleleni ingoma entsha, litshaye kuhle ngenhlokomo." 
Psalms33:4 Ngoba ilizwi le Nkosi liqotho, lomsebenzi wayo wonke ngowobuqotho." 
Psalms33:5 Ithanda ukulunga lesahlulelo; umhlaba ugcwele umusa we Nkosi. 
Psalms33:6 Ngelizwi le Nkosi amazulu enziwa, lalo lonke ibutho lawo ngomoya womlomo wayo." 
Psalms33:7 Ibuthelela amanzi olwandle njengenqumbi, ifake inziki eziphaleni." 
Psalms33:8 Umhlaba wonke kawuyesabe i Nkosi, bonke abakhileyo bomhlaba kabathuthumele ngayo." 
Psalms33:9 Ngoba yona yakhuluma, kwaba khona; yona yalaya, kwema." 
Psalms33:10 I Nkosi ichitha icebo lezizwe, iphuthisa imicabango yabantu." 
Psalms33:11 Icebo le Nkosi limi kuze kube nininini, imicabango yenhliziyo yayo ezizukulwaneni ngezizukulwana." 
Psalms33:12 Sibusisiwe isizwe esiNkulunkulu waso yi Nkosi, abantu ebakhethileyo baba yilifa layo." 
Psalms33:13 I Nkosi iyakhangela phansi isemazulwini, ibone bonke abantwana babantu." 
Psalms33:14 Isendaweni emisiweyo yokuhlala kwayo ikhangela bonke abakhileyo bomhlaba. 
Psalms33:15 Ibumba inhliziyo yabo bonke, inanzelele zonke izenzo zabo." 
Psalms33:16 Kayikho inkosi esindiswa yibunengi bebutho, iqhawe kalikhululwa ngamandla amakhulu." 
Psalms33:17 Ibhiza liyize ekunqobeni, njalo kalikhululi ngobukhulu bamandla alo." 
Psalms33:18 Khangela, ilihlo le Nkosi liphezu kwabayesabayo, kwalabo abathembela emuseni wayo," 
Psalms33:19 ukukhulula umphefumulo wabo ekufeni, lokubaphilisa endlaleni." 
Psalms33:20 Umphefumulo wethu ulindela i Nkosi; ilusizo lwethu lesihlangu sethu. 
Psalms33:21 Ngoba inhliziyo yethu izathokoza kuyo, ngoba sithembele ebizweni layo elingcwele." 
Psalms33:22 Umusa wakho, Nkosi, kawube phezu kwethu, njengokulindela kwethu kuwe." 
Psalms34:1 Ngizayibusisa i Nkosi ngesikhathi sonke; ukudunyiswa kwayo kuzahlala kusemlonyeni wami. 
Psalms34:2 Umphefumulo wami uzazincoma e Nkosi ni; abathobekileyo bazakuzwa bathokoze. 
Psalms34:3 Ikhuliseni i Nkosi kanye lami, asiliphakamise ibizo layo kanyekanye." 
Psalms34:4 Ngayidinga i Nkosi, yangiphendula, yasingikhulula kukho konke ukwesaba kwami." 
Psalms34:5 Bakhangela kuyo, bakhazimula, lobuso babo kabubanga lenhloni." 
Psalms34:6 Lo umyanga wakhala, le Nkosi yezwa, yasimsindisa kuzo zonke inkathazo zakhe." 
Psalms34:7 Ingilosi ye Nkosi imisa inkamba izingelezele labo abayesabayo, ibakhulule." 
Psalms34:8 Nambithanini libone ukuthi i Nkosi ilungile. Ubusisiwe lowomuntu othembela kuyo. 
Psalms34:9 Yesabeni i Nkosi, bangcwele bayo, ngoba kakulakuswela kwabayesabayo." 
Psalms34:10 Amabhongo ezilwane ayaswela alambe, kodwa labo abayidingayo i Nkosi kabasweli lutho oluhle." 
Psalms34:11 Wozani, bantwana, lingilalele, ngizalifundisa ukwesaba i Nkosi." 
Psalms34:12 Ngubani umuntu ofisa impilo, othanda izinsuku ukuthi abone okuhle?" 
Psalms34:13 Londa ulimi lwakho kokubi, lendebe zakho ekukhulumeni inkohliso." 
Psalms34:14 Suka kokubi, wenze okuhle, dinga ukuthula, kunxwanele." 
Psalms34:15 Amehlo e Nkosi akwabalungileyo, lezindlebe zayo kukukhala kwabo." 
Psalms34:16 Ubuso be Nkosi bumelene labenza okubi, ukuquma ukukhunjulwa kwabo kusuke emhlabeni." 
Psalms34:17 Bakhala, i Nkosi yezwa; iyabakhulula kuzo zonke izinhlupheko zabo." 
Psalms34:18 I Nkosi iseduze labo abalenhliziyo ezephukileyo, iyabasindisa abalomoya odabukileyo." 
Psalms34:19 Zinengi inhlupheko zolungileyo, kodwa i Nkosi iyamkhulula kuzo zonke." 
Psalms34:20 Iyawagcina wonke amathambo akhe, kakwaphulwa lelilodwa kuwo." 
Psalms34:21 Okubi kuzambulala okhohlakeleyo; labazonda olungileyo bazalahlwa. 
Psalms34:22 I Nkosi iyahlenga umphefumulo wenceku zayo; njalo bonke abathemba kuyo kabayikulahlwa. 
Psalms35:1 Phikisana, Nkosi, labaphikisana lami, ulwe labalwa lami." 
Psalms35:2 Xhakalaza ihawu lesihlangu esikhulu, usukumele usizo lwami." 
Psalms35:3 Hwatsha lomkhonto, uvimbe indlela umelane labangizingelayo; tshono emphefumulweni wami ukuthi: Ngilusindiso lwakho." 
Psalms35:4 Kabayangeke babe lehlazo labo abadinga umphefumulo wami. Kabahlehliselwe emuva babe lenhloni labo abaceba ububi ngami. 
Psalms35:5 Kababe njengamakhoba phambi komoya, lengilosi ye Nkosi kayi ba dudule." 
Psalms35:6 Indlela yabo kayibe mnyama itshelele, lengilosi ye Nkosi ibaxotshe." 
Psalms35:7 Ngoba kungelasizatho bangifihlele umgodi wembule labo, kungelasizatho bawugebhele umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms35:8 Ukubhujiswa kakumjume, lembule lakhe alifihlileyo kalimbambe yena, awele kulo, ekubhujisweni." 
Psalms35:9 Kodwa umphefumulo wami uzathokoza e Nkosi ni, ujabule esindisweni lwayo." 
Psalms35:10 Wonke amathambo ami azakuthi: Nkosi, ngubani onjengawe, okhulula umyanga kulowo olamandla kulaye, yebo, umyanga loswelayo komphangayo?" 
Psalms35:11 Abafakazi bamanga bayasukuma, bangibuza engingakwaziyo." 
Psalms35:12 Bangibuyisela okubi endaweni yokuhle; ukulahlekelwa komphefumulo wami. 
Psalms35:13 Kanti mina, ekuguleni kwabo isembatho sami sasililembu lesaka, ngathobisa umphefumulo wami ngokuzila ukudla, lomkhuleko wami wabuyela esifubeni sami." 
Psalms35:14 Ngahamba ngokungathi ungumngane ngokungathi ungumfowethu; ngikhotheme kwezimnyama njengolilela unina. 
Psalms35:15 Kodwa ekukhubekeni kwami bathokoza babuthana ndawonye, babuthana ndawonye bemelene lami abatshayi, njalo nganginga kw azi; badabula kabemanga." 
Psalms35:16 Kanye lababi abaklolodayo edilini, bangigedlela amazinyo abo." 
Psalms35:17 Nkosi, uzabukela kuze kube nini? Buyisa umphefumulo wami ekubhubhiseni kwabo, wona wodwa owami emabhongweni ezilwane." 
Psalms35:18 Ngizakubonga ebandleni elikhulu, ngikudumise phakathi kwabantu abanengi." 
Psalms35:19 Bangajabuli ngami abayizitha zami ngamanga, kaba nga ngificel i ilihlo labo abangizonda ngeze." 
Psalms35:20 Ngoba kabakhulumi ukuthula, kodwa baceba amazwi enkohliso bemelene labachumileyo emhlabeni." 
Psalms35:21 Kanti bangikhamisela kakhulu umlomo wabo bathi: Hiya belo, hiya belo, ilihlo lethu likubonile!" 
Psalms35:22 Nkosi, usu ku bonile; ungathuli. Nkosi, ungabi khatshana lami." 
Psalms35:23 Zivuse, uvukele ilungelo lami, udaba lwami, Nkulunkulu wami leNkosi yami." 
Psalms35:24 Ngahlulela, Nkosi Nkulunkulu wami, ngokulunga kwakho; kabangathokozi ngami." 
Psalms35:25 Kabangatsho enhliziyweni yabo ukuthi: Hiya, yisifiso sethu! Bangatsho ukuthi: Simginyile." 
Psalms35:26 Kabayangeke babe lenhloni ndawonye abajabula ngosizi lwami; bembathiswe ngenhloni lehlazo labo abazikhukhumeza ngami. 
Psalms35:27 Kabamemeze ngenjabulo bathabe abaloyisa ukulunga kwami, yebo kabatsho njalonjalo ukuthi: Kayikhuliswe i Nkosi ethokoza ngokuhlala kuhle kwenceku yayo." 
Psalms35:28 Lolimi lwami luzakhuluma ukulunga kwakho, usuku lonke indumiso yakho." 
Psalms36:1 Ububi bokhohlakeleyo buthi phakathi kwenhliziyo yami: Kakukho ukwesaba uNkulunkulu phambi kwamehlo akhe. 
Psalms36:2 Ngoba uyazikhohlisa emehlweni akhe, ububi bakhe buze butholakale buzondeka." 
Psalms36:3 Amazwi omlomo wakhe ayibubi lenkohliso; uyekele inhlakanipho ukwenza okuhle. 
Psalms36:4 Uceba okubi embhedeni wakhe, azimise endleleni engalunganga, kakwali okubi." 
Psalms36:5 Nkosi, umusa wakho usemazulwini, uthembeko lwakho luze lufike emayezini." 
Psalms36:6 Ukulunga kwakho kunjengezintaba zikaNkulunkulu, izahlulelo zakho ziyinziki enkulu; uyalondoloza umuntu lenyamazana, Nkosi." 
Psalms36:7 Luligugu elingakanani uthandolomusa lwakho, Nkulunkulu! Ngakho abantwana babantu baphephela emthunzini wempiko zakho." 
Psalms36:8 Bazasutha kakhulu ngamanono endlu yakho, ubanathise okomfula wentokozo yakho." 
Psalms36:9 Ngoba ukuwe umthombo wempilo; ekukhanyeni kwakho sizabona ukukhanya. 
Psalms36:10 Luqhubele phambili uthando lwakho kulabo abakwaziyo, lokulunga kwakho kubo abaqotho enhliziyweni." 
Psalms36:11 Unyawo lwabazigqajayo lungezi kimi, lesandla sababi singangixotshi." 
Psalms36:12 Nampo abenzi bobubi sebewile, bawiselwe phansi, kabalakuvuka." 
Psalms37:1 Ungazikhathazi ngababi, ungabi lamhawu ngabenzi bobubi." 
Psalms37:2 Ngoba bazaqunywa masinyane njengotshani, babune njengezimila eziluhlaza." 
Psalms37:3 Themba e Nkosi ni, wenze okuhle, uhlale elizweni, wondliwe ngothembeko." 
Psalms37:4 Zithokozise e Nkosi ni, njalo izakunika iziloyiso zenhliziyo yakho." 
Psalms37:5 Nikela indlela yakho e Nkosi ni, uthembe kuyo; yona izakwenza." 
Psalms37:6 Izaveza ukulunga kwakho njengokukhanya, lelungelo lakho njengemini enkulu." 
Psalms37:7 Chuma e Nkosi ni, uyilindele; ungazikhathazi ngophumelelayo ngendlela yakhe, ngomuntu owenza amacebo amabi." 
Psalms37:8 Yekela intukuthelo, utshiye ulaka; ungazikhathazi langokwenza okubi." 
Psalms37:9 Ngoba ababi bazaqunywa, kodwa labo abalindele i Nkosi bona bazakudla ilifa lelizwe." 
Psalms37:10 Kuseyisikhatshana nje, omubi angabe esaba khona; loba uhlola indawo yakhe uyabe engasekho." 
Psalms37:11 Kodwa abamnene bazakudla ilifa lelizwe, bazithokozise ngobunengi bokuthula." 
Psalms37:12 Omubi uzakwenzela olungileyo ugobe, amgedlele amazinyo akhe." 
Psalms37:13 INkosi izamhleka, ngoba iyabona ukuthi usuku lwakhe luyeza." 
Psalms37:14 Ababi sebehwatshe inkemba, bagobise idandili labo, ukumlahla phansi umyanga loswelayo, ukubulala abaqotho ngendlela." 
Psalms37:15 Inkemba yabo izangena kweyabo inhliziyo, kwephulwe amadandili abo." 
Psalms37:16 Okuncinyane alakho olungileyo kungcono kulenotho yababi abanengi. 
Psalms37:17 Ngoba ingalo zababi zizakwephulwa, kodwa i Nkosi iyabasekela abalungileyo." 
Psalms37:18 I Nkosi iyazazi izinsuku zabaqotho, lelifa labo lizakuba sephakadeni." 
Psalms37:19 Kabayikuyangeka ngesikhathi esibi, langensuku zendlala bazasutha." 
Psalms37:20 Kodwa ababi bazabhubha; lezitha ze Nkosi zizanyamalala njengamahwahwa amawundlu, zinyamalale entuthwini." 
Psalms37:21 Omubi uyeboleka, angabuyiseli, kodwa olungileyo ulomusa, uyaphana." 
Psalms37:22 Ngoba ababusiswe yiyo bazakudla ilifa lelizwe, kodwa abaqalekiswe yiyo bazaqunywa." 
Psalms37:23 Izinyathelo zomuntu ziqondiswa yi Nkosi, iyathokoza endleleni yakhe." 
Psalms37:24 Loba esiwa, kayikulahlwa phansi, ngoba i Nkosi isekela isandla sakhe." 
Psalms37:25 Ngangimutsha, sengimdala, kanti kangibonanga olungileyo etshiyiwe, lenzalo yakhe idinga ukudla." 
Psalms37:26 Usuku lonke ulomusa, uyeboleka, lenzalo yakhe iyisibusiso." 
Psalms37:27 Suka ebubini, wenze okuhle; uhlale kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms37:28 Ngoba i Nkosi ithanda isahlulelo, kayiyikubatshiya abangcwele bayo. Bazalondolozwa kuze kube nininini; kodwa inzalo yababi izaqunywa." 
Psalms37:29 Abalungileyo bazakudla ilifa lelizwe, bahlale kulo kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms37:30 Umlomo wolungileyo uyatsho inhlakanipho, lolimi lwakhe lukhuluma isahlulelo." 
Psalms37:31 Umlayo kaNkulunkulu wakhe usenhliziyweni yakhe; izinyathelo zakhe kazitsheleli. 
Psalms37:32 Omubi uyamqaphela olungileyo, udinga ukumbulala." 
Psalms37:33 I Nkosi kayiyikumyekela esandleni sakhe, kayiyikumlahla lapho esahlulelwa." 
Psalms37:34 Lindela e Nkosi ni, ugcine indlela yayo, izakuphakamisa ukuthi udle ilifa lelizwe; uzabona lapho ababi bequnywa." 
Psalms37:35 Ngambona omubi olamandla, eziqhelisa njengesihlahla semvelo esiluhlaza." 
Psalms37:36 Kube kanti wedlula, khangela-ke, wayenga se kho; yebo ngamdinga, kodwa katholakalanga." 
Psalms37:37 Nanzelela opheleleyo, umbone oqotho, ngoba ukuphela kwa lowo muntu kuyikuthula." 
Psalms37:38 Kodwa abaphambukayo bazabhujiswa ndawonye; ukuphela kwababi kuzaqunywa. 
Psalms37:39 Kodwa usindiso lwabalungileyo luvela e Nkosi ni, inqaba yabo esikhathini sokuhlupheka." 
Psalms37:40 Njalo i Nkosi izabasiza ibakhulule; izabakhulula kwababi, ibasindise, ngoba baphephela kuyo." 
Psalms38:1 Nkosi, ungangikhuzi entukuthelweni yakho, ungangijezisi ekuvutheni kolaka lwakho." 
Psalms38:2 Ngoba imitshoko yakho ihlabe yatshona kimi, lesandla sakho sehle nzima phezu kwami." 
Psalms38:3 Kakukho ukuphila enyameni yami ngenxa yentukuthelo yakho; kakukho ukuthula emathanjeni ami ngenxa yesono sami. 
Psalms38:4 Ngoba iziphambeko zami zedlule phezu kwekhanda lami, njengomthwalo onzima zinzima kakhulu kimi." 
Psalms38:5 Izilonda zami zilevumba zilobomvu ngenxa yobuthutha bami. 
Psalms38:6 Ngigungubele, ngagotshiselwa phansi kakhulu, usuku lonke ngihamba ngikwezimnyama." 
Psalms38:7 Ngoba ukhalo lwami lugcwele isifo esinengekayo, njalo kakukho ukuphila enyameni yami." 
Psalms38:8 Ngibuthakathaka ngichobozekile kakhulukazi, ngiyabhonga ngenxa yokububula kwenhliziyo yami." 
Psalms38:9 Nkosi, sonke isiloyiso sami siphambi kwakho, lokububula kwami kakufihlakalanga kuwe." 
Psalms38:10 Inhliziyo yami iyatshaya, amandla ami angitshiyile; lokukhanya kwamehlo ami lakho kakukho kimi." 
Psalms38:11 Abangithandayo labangane bami bema ummango lenhlupheko yami, labakwethu bema khatshana lami." 
Psalms38:12 Labo abadinga impilo yami baya ngi thiya, labo abadinga ukoniwa kwami bakhuluma izincithakalo, bezindla inkohliso usuku lonke." 
Psalms38:13 Kodwa mina nginjengesacuthe, kangizwa, lanjengesimungulu, esingavuli umlomo waso." 
Psalms38:14 Yebo, nginjengomuntu ongezwayo, okungekho ukuphikisa emlonyeni wakhe." 
Psalms38:15 Ngoba kuwe, Nkosi, ngiyathemba; wena uzaphendula, Nkosi Nkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms38:16 Ngoba ngathi: Hlezi bathokoze ngami, lapho unyawo lwami lutshelela, bazikhukhumeze bemelene lami." 
Psalms38:17 Ngoba se ngiseduze lokuwa, lobuhlungu bami buphambi kwami njalonjalo." 
Psalms38:18 Ngoba ngizakwazisa ububi bami, ngizakhathazeka ngesono sami." 
Psalms38:19 Kodwa izitha zami ziphilile zilamandla, labangizonda ngeze sebandile." 
Psalms38:20 Abaphindisela okubi esikhundleni sokuhle bayizitha zami, ngoba nginxwanela okulungileyo." 
Psalms38:21 Ungangitshiyi, Nkosi; Nkulunkulu wami, ungabi khatshana lami." 
Psalms38:22 Phangisa ungisize, Nkosi, nsindiso yami." 
Psalms39:1 Ngathi: Ngizaqaphelisa izindlela zami, ukuze ngingoni ngolimi lwami; ngizagcina umlomo wami ngetomu, omubi esesekhona phambi kwami." 
Psalms39:2 Ngaba yisimungulu ngokuthula; ngathula kokuhle; lokuhlupheka kwami kwavuswa. 
Psalms39:3 Inhliziyo yami yatshisa phakathi kwami, ngisacabanga umlilo wavutha; ngakhuluma ngolimi lwami," 
Psalms39:4 ngathi: Nkosi, ngazisa isiphetho sami lesilinganiso sensuku zami ukuthi siyini, ukuze ngazi ukuthi ngiyedlula kangakanani." 
Psalms39:5 Khangela, wenze insuku zami zaba yibubanzi besandla, lobudala bami bunjengento engesilutho phambi kwakho; isibili ngulowo lalowomuntu ekumeni kwakhe uyize nje. Selah." 
Psalms39:6 Isibili, umuntu uhambahamba esesithunzini; isibili, bayakhathazeka ngeze; uyabuthelela, kodwa kazi ukuthi ngubani ozakubutha." 
Psalms39:7 Pho-ke, ngilindeleni, Nkosi? Ithemba lami likuwe." 
Psalms39:8 Ngikhulula kuzo zonke iziphambeko zami. Ungangenzi ihlazo lesithutha. 
Psalms39:9 Ngaba yisimungulu, kangivulanga umlomo wami, ngoba wakwenza wena." 
Psalms39:10 Susa uswazi lwakho kimi, ngoba ngiyaqedwa yisidutshulo sesandla sakho." 
Psalms39:11 Lapho ulaya umuntu ngokukhuza ngenxa yesiphambeko, wenza ubuhle bakhe buncibilike njengenundu; isibili ngulowo lalowomuntu uyize. Selah." 
Psalms39:12 Zwana umkhuleko wami, Nkosi, ubeke indlebe ekukhaleni kwami; ungathuleli izinyembezi zami, ngoba ngingowemzini kuwe, ohlala njengowezizwe, njengabo bonke obaba." 
Psalms39:13 Ungangihwaqeli ukuze ngihlumelele, ngingakasuki, ngingabe ngi sa ba khona." 
Psalms40:1 Ngalindela lokuyilindela i Nkosi; yangithobela, yezwa ukukhala kwami." 
Psalms40:2 Yangenyula emgodini ohlokomayo, exhaphozini lodaka, yabeka inyawo zami phezu kwedwala, yaqinisa izinyathelo zami." 
Psalms40:3 Yafaka ingoma entsha emlonyeni wami, indumiso kuNkulunkulu wethu. Abanengi bazabona besabe, bathembe e Nkosi ni." 
Psalms40:4 Ubusisiwe umuntu oyenzayo i Nkosi ibe lithemba lakhe, ongaphendukeli kwabazigqajayo, lalabo abaphendukela emangeni." 
Psalms40:5 Minengi wena oyenzileyo, Nkosi, Nkulunkulu wami, imisebenzi yakho emangalisayo lemicabango yakho kithi; ingelandiswe ngokulandelana kuwe. Nginga yi landisa ngi yi tsho, minengi kulokuthi ibalwe." 
Psalms40:6 Umhlatshelo lomnikelo kawukufisi; izindlebe zami uzivulile; umnikelo wokutshiswa lomnikelo wesono kawuwubizi. 
Psalms40:7 Ngasengisithi: Khangela, ngiyeza; emqulwini wogwalo kubhaliwe ngami." 
Psalms40:8 Ngiyathokoza ukwenza intando yakho, Nkulunkulu wami, lomlayo wakho uphakathi kwenhliziyo yami." 
Psalms40:9 Ngitshumayele ukulunga ebandleni elikhulu; khangela, kangibambanga indebe zami, Nkosi, wena uyakwazi." 
Psalms40:10 Ukulunga kwakho kangikufihlanga phakathi kwenhliziyo yami; ngikhulumile ngobuqotho bakho langosindiso lwakho; kangifihlanga uthandolomusa lwakho leqiniso lakho ebandleni elikhulu. 
Psalms40:11 Wena Nkosi, ungangigodleli isihawu sakho; uthandolomusa lwakho leqiniso lakho kakungilondoloze njalonjalo." 
Psalms40:12 Ngoba ububi obungebalwe bungihanqile, iziphambeko zami zingibambile, ukuze ngingabi lakho ukubona; zinengi okwedlula inwele zekhanda lami; ngakho inhliziyo yami ingitshiyile." 
Psalms40:13 Thokoza, Nkosi, ukungikhulula. Nkosi, phangisa ukungisiza." 
Psalms40:14 Kabayangeke babe lenhloni ndawonye abadinga umphefumulo wami ukuwuchitha; kababuyiselwe emuva bayangiswe abangifisela okubi. 
Psalms40:15 Kabachitheke kube ngumvuzo wehlazo labo abathi kimi: Hiya belo, hiya belo!" 
Psalms40:16 Kabathabe bajabule kuwe bonke abakudingayo; abathanda usindiso lwakho kabatsho njalonjalo bathi: Kayikhuliswe i Nkosi! 
Psalms40:17 Kodwa ngingumyanga ngiyaswela; iNkosi iyangikhumbula; ungumsizi wami lomkhululi wami; Nkulunkulu wami, ungalibali." 
Psalms41:1 Ubusisiwe onanzelela obuthakathaka. I Nkosi izamkhulula ngosuku lobubi. 
Psalms41:2 I Nkosi izamlondoloza, imgcine ephila; uzabusiswa emhlabeni; kawuyikumnikela entandweni yezitha zakhe." 
Psalms41:3 I Nkosi izamsekela embhedeni wokugula kwakhe; wena uzalungisa lonke icansi lakhe emkhuhlaneni wakhe. 
Psalms41:4 Mina ngathi: Nkosi, woba lomusa kimi, silisa umphefumulo wami, ngoba ngonile kuwe." 
Psalms41:5 Izitha zami zikhuluma okubi ngami zisithi: Uzakufa nini, lebizo lakhe lichitheke?" 
Psalms41:6 Lalapho efika uku ngi bona, ukhuluma inkohliso; inhliziyo yakhe izibuthela okubi, esephumile phandle akhulume." 
Psalms41:7 Bonke abangizondayo banyenyezelana bemelene lami, bangisongele ukungona." 
Psalms41:8 Into embi inamathele kuye; njalo njengoba elele phansi kasayikuvuka. 
Psalms41:9 Yebo, indoda ebilokuthula lami engiyithembayo, ebikade isidla isinkwa sami, ingiphakamisele isithende imelene lami." 
Psalms41:10 Kodwa, wena Nkosi, woba lomusa kimi, ungilulamise ukuze ngibaphindisele." 
Psalms41:11 Ngalokhu ngiyazi ukuthi uyangithanda, ngoba isitha sami kasithabanga phezu kwami." 
Psalms41:12 Kodwa mina, ungisekele ebuqothweni bami, wangimisa phambi kwakho kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms41:13 Kayibusiswe i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, kusukela phakade kuze kube phakade. Ameni, loAmeni." 
Psalms42:1 Njengalokhu indluzele inxwanele izifula zamanzi, ngokunjalo umphefumulo wami unxwanela wena, Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms42:2 Umphefumulo wami womela uNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu ophilayo. Ngizafika nini ngibonakale phambi kobuso bukaNkulunkulu?" 
Psalms42:3 Inyembezi zami beziyikudla kwami emini lebusuku, lapho besithi kimi usuku lonke: Ungaphi uNkulunkulu wakho?" 
Psalms42:4 Ngikhumbula lezizinto ngathulula umphefumulo wami phakathi kwami, ngoba ngadlula lexuku, ngaya labo endlini kaNkulunkulu ngelizwi lentokozo lendumiso, ixuku eligubha umkhosi." 
Psalms42:5 Udanelani mphefumulo wami? Ukhathazekelani phakathi kwami? Themba kuNkulunkulu, ngoba ngisezamdumisa, ng ensindiso zobuso bakhe." 
Psalms42:6 Nkulunkulu wami, umphefumulo wami udanile phakathi kwami; ngakho ngizakukhumbula ngiselizweni leJordani lelamaHermoni, ngisentabeni iMizari." 
Psalms42:7 Inziki ibiza inziki ekuhlokomeni kwezimpophoma zakho; wonke amagagasi akho lamaza akho adlule phezu kwami. 
Psalms42:8 Emini i Nkosi izalaya uthandolomusa lwayo, lebusuku ingoma yayo i zakuba lami; umkhuleko wami kuNkulunkulu wempilo yami." 
Psalms42:9 Ngizakuthi kuNkulunkulu, idwala lami: Ungikhohlweleni? Ngihambelani ngikwezimnyama ngenxa yocindezelo lwesitha?" 
Psalms42:10 Njeng enkemba emathanjeni ami, izitha zami ziyangiklolodela, lapho zisithi kimi usuku lonke: Ungaphi uNkulunkulu wakho?" 
Psalms42:11 Udaneleni mphefumulo wami? Njalo ukhathazekelani phakathi kwami? Themba kuNkulunkulu, ngoba ngisezamdumisa, ukusiliswa kobuso bami, loNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms43:1 Ngahlulela, Nkulunkulu, umele udaba lwami esizweni esingesabi uNkulunkulu; ungikhulule emuntwini wenkohliso longalunganga." 
Psalms43:2 Ngoba wena unguNkulunkulu wesiphephelo sami; ungilahleleni? Ngihambelani ngikwezimnyama ngenxa yocindezelo lwesitha? 
Psalms43:3 Thumela ukukhanya kwakho leqiniso lakho, kungikhokhele, kungise entabeni yakho engcwele lemathabhanekeleni akho." 
Psalms43:4 Khona ngizakuya elathini likaNkulunkulu, kuNkulunkulu injabulo yentokozo yami; yebo ngizakudumisa ngechacho, Nkulunkulu, Nkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms43:5 Udanelani mphefumulo wami? Njalo ukhathazekelani phakathi kwami? Themba kuNkulunkulu, ngoba ngisezamdumisa, ukusiliswa kobuso bami, loNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms44:1 Nkulunkulu, sizwile ngendlebe zethu, obaba basitshelile, umsebenzi owawenza ensukwini zabo, ensukwini zendulo." 
Psalms44:2 Wena ngesandla sakho wazixotsha izizwe elifeni, wabahlanyela bona; wazihlupha izizwe, kodwa wabandisa bona." 
Psalms44:3 Ngoba kabadlanga ilifa lelizwe ngenkemba yabo, lengalo yabo kayibasindisanga, kodwa isandla sakho sokunene, lengalo yakho, lokukhanya kobuso bakho, ngoba wawubathanda." 
Psalms44:4 Wena uyiNkosi yami, Nkulunkulu; laya ukukhululwa kukaJakobe." 
Psalms44:5 Ngawe sizadudula izitha zethu; ngebizo lakho sizabanyathelela phansi abasivukelayo. 
Psalms44:6 Ngoba kangithembeli kulo idandili lami, lenkemba yami kayiyikungisindisa." 
Psalms44:7 Kodwa usisindisile ezitheni zethu, wayangisa abasizondayo." 
Psalms44:8 KuNkulunkulu siyazincoma usuku lonke; lebizo lakho sizalidumisa kuze kube nininini. Selah. 
Psalms44:9 Kodwa ulahlile wasiyangisa, njalo kawuphumi lamabutho ethu." 
Psalms44:10 Usenze ukuthi sibuyele emuva sisuka esitheni; labasizondayo baziphangela. 
Psalms44:11 Usinikele njengezimvu zokudliwa, wasichithachitha phakathi kwezizwe." 
Psalms44:12 Uthengisile abantu bakho ngokungelanotho, awuzuzanga lutho ngentengo yabo." 
Psalms44:13 Usenze saba lihlazo kwabakhelene lathi, inhlekisa lendumazo kwabasiphahlileyo." 
Psalms44:14 Usenze saba yisiga phakathi kwezizwe, ukunikinwa kwekhanda phakathi kwabantu." 
Psalms44:15 Usuku lonke ukudunyazwa kwami kuphambi kwami, lehlazo lobuso bami lingigubuzele," 
Psalms44:16 ngenxa yelizwi lomgconi lomhlambazi, ngenxa yesitha lomphindiseli." 
Psalms44:17 Konke lokhu kusehlele, kube kanti kasikukhohlwanga, kasenzanga ngenkohliso esivumelwaneni sakho." 
Psalms44:18 Inhliziyo yethu kayibuyelanga emuva, lezinyathelo zethu kaziphambukanga emkhondweni wakho," 
Psalms44:19 lanxa usichobozile endaweni yamaganyana, usembese ngethunzi lokufa." 
Psalms44:20 Uba besilikhohliwe ibizo likaNkulunkulu wethu, loba selulela izandla zethu kunkulunkulu wezizweni," 
Psalms44:21 uNkulunkulu ubengayikukuhlola lokhu yini? Ngoba uyayazi imfihlo yenhliziyo. 
Psalms44:22 Yebo, ngenxa yakho siyabulawa usuku lonke, kuthiwa sinjengezimvu zokuhlatshwa." 
Psalms44:23 Phaphama, ulaleleni, Nkosi? Vuka, ungalahli kokuphela." 
Psalms44:24 Ufihlelani ubuso bakho, ukhohlwe ukuhlupheka kwethu locindezelo lwethu?" 
Psalms44:25 Ngoba umphefumulo wethu ukhothamele othulini, isisu sethu sinamathela emhlabathini." 
Psalms44:26 Sukumela usizo lwethu, usihlenge ngenxa yomusa wakho." 
Psalms45:1 Inhliziyo yami iphuphuma ngendaba enhle; ngikhuluma ngezinto engizenzele inkosi; ulimi lwami lulusiba lombhali ophangisayo. 
Psalms45:2 Umuhle kulabantwana babantu; umusa uthululwe endebeni zakho; ngenxa yalokho uNkulunkulu ukubusisile kuze kube phakade. 
Psalms45:3 Bhinca inkemba yakho emlenzeni, qhawe, udumo lwakho lobukhosi bakho." 
Psalms45:4 Lebukhosini bakho gada uphumulele, ngenxa yeqiniso lobumnene bokulunga; lesandla sakho sokunene sikufundise izinto ezesabekayo." 
Psalms45:5 Imitshoko yakho ibukhali enhliziyweni yezitha zenkosi; izizwe zizakuwa ngaphansi kwakho. 
Psalms45:6 Isihlalo sakho sobukhosi, Nkulunkulu, ngesaphakade laphakade; intonga yakho yobukhosi iyintonga yobuqotho." 
Psalms45:7 Uthanda ukulunga, njalo uzonda ububi; ngenxa yalokho uNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu wakho, ukugcobile ngamafutha entokozo ngaphezu kwabanakwenu." 
Psalms45:8 Izembatho zakho zonke ziqholiwe ngemure* lenhlaba l ekhasiya*; ezigodlweni zempondo zendlovu lapho ezikwenze wathokoza. 
Psalms45:9 Amadodakazi amakhosi aphakathi kwabesifazana bakho abadumileyo; indlovukazi imi esandleni sokunene sakho yembethe igolide leOfiri. 
Psalms45:10 Zwana, ndodakazi, unakane, ubeke indlebe yakho; ukhohlwe abantu bakini lendlu kayihlo;" 
Psalms45:11 khona inkosi izalangatha ubuhle bakho; ngoba iyinkosi yakho, njalo khothama kuyo." 
Psalms45:12 Lendodakazi yeTire ilesipho, labanothileyo ebantwini, bazancenga ubuso bakho." 
Psalms45:13 Indodakazi yenkosi iyakhazimula yonke ngaphakathi, isembatho sayo singesegolide elelukiweyo." 
Psalms45:14 Izalethwa enkosini yembethe isembatho esifekethisiweyo; izintombi eziyilandelayo, abangane bayo, zizalethwa kuwe." 
Psalms45:15 Zizalethwa ngokuthaba lenjabulo, zizangena esigodlweni senkosi." 
Psalms45:16 Esikhundleni saboyihlo kuzakuba ngamadodana akho, uzawabeka abe yiziphathamandla emhlabeni wonke." 
Psalms45:17 Ibizo lakho ngizalenza likhunjulwe ezizukulwaneni zonke; ngenxa yalokho izizwe zizakudumisa kuze kube nini lanini. 
Psalms46:1 UNkulunkulu uyisiphephelo sethu lamandla ethu, uyatholwa elusizo kakhulu ekuhluphekeni." 
Psalms46:2 Ngenxa yalokhu kasiyikwesaba ekuguqukeni komhlaba, lanxa izintaba zithwalelwa phakathi kwenlwandle," 
Psalms46:3 amanzi alo ehlokoma, ekhaphazela, izintaba zizamazama ngokukhukhumala kwalo. Selah." 
Psalms46:4 Kulo mfula, izifula zawo zithokozisa umuzi kaNkulunkulu, indawo engcwele yamathabhanekele oPhezukonke." 
Psalms46:5 UNkulunkulu uphakathi kwawo, kawuyikunyikinywa; uNkulunkulu uzawusiza ngovivi lokusa." 
Psalms46:6 Izizwe ziyaxokozela, imibuso izamazame; wakhupha ilizwi lakhe, umhlaba wancibilika." 
Psalms46:7 I Nkosi yamabandla ilathi, uNkulunkulu kaJakobe uyinqaba yethu. Selah." 
Psalms46:8 Wozani libone imisebenzi ye Nkosi, incithakalo eyenzileyo emhlabeni." 
Psalms46:9 Yenza izimpi ziphele kuze kube semkhawulweni womhlaba; yephula idandili, iqumaqume umkhonto, itshise izinqola emlilweni." 
Psalms46:10 Thulani, lazi ukuthi mina nginguNkulunkulu, ngizaphakanyiswa phakathi kwezizwe, ngiphakanyiswe emhlabeni." 
Psalms46:11 I Nkosi yamabandla ilathi, uNkulunkulu kaJakobe uyinqaba yethu. Selah." 
Psalms47:1 Qakezani, zizwe zonke, hlokomani kuNkulunkulu ngelizwi lentokozo." 
Psalms47:2 Ngoba i Nkosi, oPhezukonke, iyesabeka, yiNkosi enkulu phezu komhlaba wonke." 
Psalms47:3 Izakwehlisela abantu ngaphansi kwethu, lezizwe ngaphansi kwenyawo zethu." 
Psalms47:4 Izasikhethela ilifa lethu, udumo lukaJakobe emthandayo. Selah." 
Psalms47:5 UNkulunkulu wenyukile ngokuhlokoma, i Nkosi ngokukhala kophondo." 
Psalms47:6 Hlabelani indumiso kuNkulunkulu, hlabelelani indumiso. Hlabelani indumiso eNkosini yethu, hlabelelani indumiso." 
Psalms47:7 Ngoba uNkulunkulu uyiNkosi yomhlaba wonke; hlabelelani indumiso ngokuqedisisa. 
Psalms47:8 UNkulunkulu uyabusa phezu kwezizwe; uNkulunkulu uhlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi sobungcwele bakhe. 
Psalms47:9 Iziphathamandla zabantu zibuthene ndawonye, abantu bakaNkulunkulu kaAbrahama. Ngoba izihlangu zomhlaba zingezikaNkulunkulu; uphakeme kakhulu." 
Psalms48:1 Yinkulu i Nkosi, ingeyokudunyiswa kakhulu emzini kaNkulunkulu wethu, intaba yobungcwele bayo." 
Psalms48:2 Yinhle ngokuphakama, yintokozo emhlabeni wonke intaba yeZiyoni, e nhlangothi ni zenyakatho, umuzi weNkosi enkulu." 
Psalms48:3 Ezigodlweni zawo uNkulunkulu uyaziwa ukuthi uyinqaba. 
Psalms48:4 Ngoba, khangela, amakhosi abuthana, adlula kanyekanye." 
Psalms48:5 Wona awubona, ngokunjalo amangala, atshaywa luvalo, aphaphatheka." 
Psalms48:6 Ukuthuthumela kwawabamba lapho, umhelo njengowesifazana obelethayo." 
Psalms48:7 Ngomoya wempumalanga uphahlaza imikhumbi yeTarshishi. 
Psalms48:8 Njengesikuzwileyo ngokunjalo sikubonile emzini we Nkosi yamabandla, emzini kaNkulunkulu wethu; uNkulunkulu uzawumisa kuze kube nininini. Selah." 
Psalms48:9 Sizindle ngothandolomusa lwakho, Nkulunkulu, phakathi kwethempeli lakho." 
Psalms48:10 Njengalo ibizo lakho, Nkulunkulu, injalo indumiso yakho kuze kube semikhawulweni yomhlaba; isandla sakho sokunene sigcwele ukulunga." 
Psalms48:11 Kayithokoze intaba yeZiyoni, amadodakazi akoJuda athabe, ngenxa yezahlulelo zakho." 
Psalms48:12 Ibhodeni iZiyoni, liyizingeleze, libale imiphotshongo yayo," 
Psalms48:13 liqaphelise umthangala wayo, lidabule ezigodlweni zayo, ukuze lilandisele isizukulwana esilandelayo." 
Psalms48:14 Ngoba lo uNkulunkulu unguNkulunkulu wethu kuze kube nini lanini; yena uzasikhokhela kuze kube sekufeni. 
Psalms49:1 Zwanini lokhu lonke bantu. Bekani indlebe lonke bakhileyo bomhlaba," 
Psalms49:2 bonke abantukazana labaphakemeyo, abanothileyo labayanga, ndawonye." 
Psalms49:3 Umlomo wami uzakhuluma izinhlakanipho, lokuzindla kwenhliziyo yami kuzakuba yikuqedisisa." 
Psalms49:4 Ngizabeka indlebe yami kuso isaga, ngizavula ilibho lami ngechacho." 
Psalms49:5 Ngizakwesabelani ensukwini zobubi? Ububi obusezithendeni zami buzangihanqa. 
Psalms49:6 Abathemba ingcebo yabo, abazincoma ngobunengi benotho yabo," 
Psalms49:7 umuntu kasoze ahlenge lokuhlenga umfowabo, kasoze amnike uNkulunkulu inhlawulo yakhe," 
Psalms49:8 (ngoba uhlengo lomphefumulo wabo luligugu, futhi luyaphela laphakade)" 
Psalms49:9 ukuze ahlale ephila phakade, angaboni ukubola." 
Psalms49:10 Ngoba ubona ukuthi abahlakaniphileyo bayafa, lokuthi isithutha kanye lesiphukuphuku bayabhubha, batshiyele inotho yabo abanye." 
Psalms49:11 Ingaphakathi yabo iyikuthi izindlu zabo zizakuba ngezaphakade, izindawo zabo zokuhlala zibe ngezezizukulwana, babize amazwe ngamabizo abo." 
Psalms49:12 Kodwa umuntu elodumo kayikuma, uyafanana lenyamazana e zibhubhayo." 
Psalms49:13 Le indlela yabo iyibuthutha babo; kube kanti ababalandelayo bathokoza ngomlomo wabo. Selah. 
Psalms49:14 Njengezimvu bamiselwe ingcwaba, ukufa kuzabadla; labaqotho bazababusa ekuseni, isimo sabo ngesokuqedwa engcwabeni endaweni yabo yokuhlala." 
Psalms49:15 Kodwa uNkulunkulu uzahlenga umphefumulo wami emandleni engcwaba, ngoba uzangemukela. Selah." 
Psalms49:16 Ungesabi nxa umuntu enotha, nxa udumo lwendlu yakhe lusanda;" 
Psalms49:17 ngoba ekufeni kwakhe kayikuthatha lutho, udumo lwakhe kaluyikwehla lumlandele." 
Psalms49:18 Lanxa empilweni yakhe wabusisa umphefumulo wakhe, njalo bakudumisa nxa uzenzela okuhle," 
Psalms49:19 uzakuya esizukulwaneni saboyise, kabayikubona ukukhanya kuze kube phakade." 
Psalms49:20 Umuntu o lodumo, engaqedisisi, unjengezinyamazana e zibhubhayo." 
Psalms50:1 UNkulunkulu wabonkulunkulu, i Nkosi, ukhulumile, ubiza umhlaba kusukela ekuphumeni kwelanga kuze kube sekutshoneni kwalo." 
Psalms50:2 EseZiyoni, ukuphelela kobuhle, uNkulunkulu ukhanyile." 
Psalms50:3 UNkulunkulu wethu uzakuza, kayikuthula; umlilo phambi kwakhe uzaqothula, enhlangothini zonke zakhe kuzakuba lesiphepho esikhulu." 
Psalms50:4 Uzabiza amazulu ephezulu, lomhlaba, ukwahlulela abantu bakhe." 
Psalms50:5 Buthelani kimi abangcwele bami, abenza isivumelwano lami ngomhlatshelo." 
Psalms50:6 Lamazulu azatshumayela ukulunga kwakhe, ngoba uNkulunkulu ngokwakhe ungumahluleli. Selah." 
Psalms50:7 Zwanini bantu bami, ngizakhuluma; Israyeli, ngizafakaza ngimelene lawe. NginguNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu wakho." 
Psalms50:8 Kangikusoli ngenxa yemihlatshelo yakho; leminikelo yakho yokutshiswa ihlala iphambi kwami. 
Psalms50:9 Kangiyikuthatha ijongosi elivela emzini wakho, l ezimpongo ezivela ezibayeni zakho." 
Psalms50:10 Ngoba ngeyami yonke inyamazana yehlathi, izinkomo ezisentabeni eziyizinkulungwane." 
Psalms50:11 Ngiyazazi izinyoni zonke zezintaba, lezilo zommango zikimi." 
Psalms50:12 Uba bengilambile, bengingayikukutshela, ngoba umhlaba ngowami lokugcwala kwawo." 
Psalms50:13 Ngizayidla yini inyama yezinkunzi, kumbe nginathe igazi lezimpongo?" 
Psalms50:14 Nikela kuNkulunkulu umhlatshelo wokubonga, ukhokhe izithembiso zakho koPhezukonke." 
Psalms50:15 Ungibize esukwini lokuhlupheka, ngizakukhulula, ubusungidumisa." 
Psalms50:16 Kodwa komubi uNkulunkulu uthi: Ulani lokuthi utshumayele izimiso zami, kumbe uthathe isivumelwano sami emlonyeni wakho?" 
Psalms50:17 Ngoba wena uzonda ukuqondiswa, ulahla amazwi ami emva kwakho." 
Psalms50:18 Uba ubona isela, uthokozelana lalo, lesabelo sakho sisezifebeni." 
Psalms50:19 Umlomo wakho uyawunikela ebubini, lolimi lwakho luqambe inkohliso." 
Psalms50:20 Uhlala ukhulume umelene lomfowenu, uhlebe indodana kanyoko." 
Psalms50:21 Lezizinto uzenzile, ngathula; wacabanga ukuthi nginjengawe kanye. Ngizakukhuza, ngikuhlele phambi kwamehlo akho." 
Psalms50:22 Kuqapheleni-ke lokhu, lina elikhohlwa uNkulunkulu, hlezi ngi li dabule, kungabi khona okukhululayo." 
Psalms50:23 Onikela umnikelo wokubonga uyangidumisa; lolungisa indlela yakhe ngizambonisa usindiso lukaNkulunkulu. 
Psalms51:1 Ngihawukela, Nkulunkulu, ngokobubele bakho; ngobunengi besihawu sakho yesula iziphambeko zami." 
Psalms51:2 Ungigezisise ebubini bami, ungihlambulule esonweni sami." 
Psalms51:3 Ngoba mina ngiyazivuma iziphambeko zami, lesono sami sihlezi siphambi kwami." 
Psalms51:4 Ngonile kuwe, wena wedwa, ngenze okubi emehlweni akho, ukuze kuthiwe ulungile ekukhulumeni kwakho, uhlanzeke ekwahluleleni kwakho." 
Psalms51:5 Khangela, ngazalelwa ebubini, lomama wangomulela esonweni." 
Psalms51:6 Khangela, uthanda iqiniso endaweni ezingaphakathi; lekusithekeni ungenza ngazi inhlakanipho." 
Psalms51:7 Ngihlanze ngehisope*, ngizahlambuluka; ngigezisa, ngizakuba mhlophe kuleliqhwa elikhithikayo." 
Psalms51:8 Ngizwise intokozo lenjabulo, ukuze athabe amathambo o wachobozileyo." 
Psalms51:9 Fihla ubuso bakho ezonweni zami, wesule zonke iziphambeko zami." 
Psalms51:10 Nkulunkulu, dala kimi inhliziyo ehlambulukileyo, njalo uvuselele umoya oqinileyo phakathi kwami." 
Psalms51:11 Ungangilahli ebusweni bakho, njalo ungasusi umoya wakho ongcwele kimi." 
Psalms51:12 Buyisela kimi intokozo yosindiso lwakho, ungisekele ngo moya okhululekileyo." 
Psalms51:13 Khona ngizafundisa abaphambukayo indlela zakho, lezoni zizaphendukela kuwe." 
Psalms51:14 Ngikhulula ecaleni legazi, Nkulunkulu, Nkulunkulu wosindiso lwami, ulimi lwami luzahlabelela kakhulu ngokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms51:15 Nkosi, vula indebe zami, lomlomo wami uzamemezela indumiso yakho." 
Psalms51:16 Ngoba kawuthandi umhlatshelo, ngoba bengizawunika; kawuthokozi ngomnikelo wokutshiswa." 
Psalms51:17 Imihlatshelo kaNkulunkulu ingumoya odabukileyo; inhliziyo edabukileyo leyephukileyo, Nkulunkulu, kawuyikuyidelela." 
Psalms51:18 Yenzele iZiyoni okuhle ngokuthanda kwakho; uyakhe imiduli yeJerusalema. 
Psalms51:19 Khona uzajabulela iminikelo yokulunga, umnikelo wokutshiswa, lomnikelo wonke; khona bezanikela amajongosi phezu kwelathi lakho." 
Psalms52:1 Uzincomelani ngokubi, qhawe? Umusa kaNkulunkulu ukulo lonke usuku." 
Psalms52:2 Ulimi lwakho luceba konke ukuganga, njengensingo ebukhali, lwenza inkohliso." 
Psalms52:3 Uthanda okubi kulokuhle; amanga kulokukhuluma iqiniso. Selah. 
Psalms52:4 Uthanda wonke amazwi okuginya, limi lwenkohliso." 
Psalms52:5 UNkulunkulu laye uzakubhidliza phakade, akususe, akuhluthune ethenteni, akusiphune elizweni labaphilayo. Selah." 
Psalms52:6 Abalungileyo bazakubona besabe, bazamhleka, besithi:" 
Psalms52:7 Khangelani, umuntu o ngamenzanga uNkulunkulu abe yinqaba yakhe, kodwa wathembela ebunengini benotho yakhe, eqinile ekugangeni kwakhe." 
Psalms52:8 Kodwa nginjengesihlahla somhlwathi esiluhlaza endlini kaNkulunkulu. Ngiyathemba emuseni kaNkulunkulu phakade laphakade. 
Psalms52:9 Ngizakudumisa kuze kube phakade ngoba ukwenzile. Ngizalindela ibizo lakho, ngoba lihle phambi kwabangcwele bakho." 
Psalms53:1 Isithutha sithi enhliziyweni yaso: KakulaNkulunkulu. Bonakele, benza ububi obunengekayo; kakho owenza okuhle." 
Psalms53:2 UNkulunkulu wakhangela phansi esemazulwini phezu kwabantwana babantu, ukubona ukuthi ukhona yini oqedisisayo, odinga uNkulunkulu." 
Psalms53:3 Bonke ngamunye wabo babuyele emuva, bonke bonakele; kakho owenza okuhle, kakho loyedwa." 
Psalms53:4 Kabazi yini bonke abenzi bobubi, abadla abantu bami njengoba besidla isinkwa? Kababizi uNkulunkulu." 
Psalms53:5 Lapho besaba lokwesaba, kungekho okwesabekayo. Ngoba uNkulunkulu uchithachithe amathambo akhe omisa inkamba emelane lawe; ubayangisile, ngoba uNkulunkulu ubadelile." 
Psalms53:6 Kungathi insindiso zikaIsrayeli zingavela eZiyoni! Lapho uNkulunkulu ebuyisa ukuthunjwa kwabantu bakhe, uJakobe uzathaba, uIsrayeli athokoze." 
Psalms54:1 Nkulunkulu, ngisindisa ngebizo lakho, ungahlulele ngamandla akho." 
Psalms54:2 Nkulunkulu, zwana umkhuleko wami, ubeke indlebe emazwini omlomo wami." 
Psalms54:3 Ngoba abemzini bangivukele, abalolunya badinga umphefumulo wami, kababekanga uNkulunkulu phambi kwabo. Selah." 
Psalms54:4 Khangela, uNkulunkulu ungumsizi wami; iNkosi ilalabo abasekela umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms54:5 Izaphindisela ububi ezitheni zami. Baqume ngeqiniso lakho. 
Psalms54:6 Ngizanikela umhlatshelo kuwe ngokukhululeka, ngizadumisa ibizo lakho, Nkosi, ngoba lihle." 
Psalms54:7 Ngoba ungikhulule ekuhluphekeni konke, lelihlo lami libonile ezitheni zami." 
Psalms55:1 Beka indlebe, Nkulunkulu, emkhulekweni wami, ungazifihli ekunxuseni kwami." 
Psalms55:2 Lalela kimi, ungiphendule; ngiyalila ekukhalazeni kwami, ngenza umsindo," 
Psalms55:3 ngenxa yelizwi lesitha, ngenxa yembandezelo yomubi; ngoba bangethwesa ububi, lengentukuthelo bayangizonda." 
Psalms55:4 Inhliziyo yami iyafutha phakathi kwami, lezethuso zokufa ziwele phezu kwami." 
Psalms55:5 Uvalo lokuthuthumela kungifikele, lokwesaba okukhulu kungigubuzele." 
Psalms55:6 Ngasengisithi: Kungathi ngabe ngilempiko njengejuba! Bengizaphaphela engingahlala khona. 
Psalms55:7 Khangela, bengingabalekela khatshana ngihlale enkangala. Selah." 
Psalms55:8 Bengizaphangisisa ukuphunyuka kwami, ngisuke emoyeni ovunguzayo, esiphephweni." 
Psalms55:9 Sanganisa, Nkosi, yehlukanisa ulimi lwabo. Ngoba ngibone udlakela lokuxabana emzini." 
Psalms55:10 Emini lebusuku bayawubhoda phezu kwemithangala yawo; njalo ububi lenkathazo kuphakathi kwawo. 
Psalms55:11 Inkohlakalo iphakathi kwawo; imbandezelo lenkohliso kakusuki emgwaqweni wawo. 
Psalms55:12 Ngoba kakusisitha esi ngiyangisayo, uba kunjalo bengizakuthwala; kakusuye ongizondayo o ziphakamisa phezu kwami; uba kunjalo bengizamcatshela." 
Psalms55:13 Kodwa nguwe, umuntu olingana lami, umngane wami lowejwayelene lami." 
Psalms55:14 Esasicebisana ngokumnandi sonke, saya endlini kaNkulunkulu silixuku." 
Psalms55:15 Ukufa kakubazume, kabehlele esihogweni bephila, ngoba ububi busemizini yabo, phakathi kwabo." 
Psalms55:16 Mina ngizabiza uNkulunkulu, i Nkosi ingisindise-ke." 
Psalms55:17 Kusihlwa lekuseni lemini ngizakhalaza ngikhale kakhulu, ibisilizwa ilizwi lami." 
Psalms55:18 Ikhululile umphefumulo wami ngokuthula empini emelene lami, ngoba babebanengi kimi." 
Psalms55:19 UNkulunkulu uzakuzwa, abahluphe, ngitsho yena obehlezi endulo. Selah. Ngoba bengelazinguquko, ngakho kabamesabi uNkulunkulu." 
Psalms55:20 Welule isandla sakhe kwabaxolelene laye, wasingcolisa isivumelwano sakhe." 
Psalms55:21 Umlomo wakhe wawubutshelezi kulolaza, kanti inhliziyo yakhe yimpi; amazwi akhe abuthakathaka kulamafutha, kanti azinkemba ezihwatshiweyo." 
Psalms55:22 Phosela umthwalo wakho phezu kwe Nkosi, yona izakusekela; kayiyikuvuma lanini ukuthi olungileyo anyikinywe." 
Psalms55:23 Kodwa wena, Nkulunkulu, uzabehlisela emgodini wokubhujiswa; abantu begazi lenkohliso kabayikufinyelela lengxenyeni eyodwa kwezimbili yensuku zabo. Kodwa mina ngizathemba kuwe." 
Psalms56:1 Woba lomusa kimi, Nkulunkulu, ngoba umuntu ufuna ukungiginya; usuku lonke esilwa uyangicindezela." 
Psalms56:2 Izitha zami zifuna uku ngi ginya usuku lonke, ngoba zinengi ezilwa zimelene lami, wena oPhezukonke." 
Psalms56:3 Mhla ngisesaba, mina ngizathemba kuwe." 
Psalms56:4 KuNkulunkulu ngizadumisa ilizwi lakhe, kuNkulunkulu ngiyathemba, angiyikwesaba. Inyama ingenzani kimi?" 
Psalms56:5 Usuku lonke baphambanisa amazwi ami; yonke imicabango yabo imelene lami ngokubi. 
Psalms56:6 Bayabuthana, bagugube, bona baqaphelise izinyathelo zami, njengabalindele umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms56:7 Bazaphunyuka yini ngobubi? Ekuthukutheleni wisela phansi abantu, Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms56:8 Ukuzulazula kwami ukubalile; wena faka izinyembezi zami embodleleni yakho; kazikho ogwalweni lwakho yini? 
Psalms56:9 Khona izitha zami zizabuyela emuva mhla ngibizayo. Ngiyakwazi lokhu ukuthi uNkulunkulu ukimi. 
Psalms56:10 KuNkulunkulu ngizadumisa ilizwi, e Nkosi ni ngizadumisa ilizwi." 
Psalms56:11 KuNkulunkulu ngiyathemba, angiyikwesaba. Umuntu angenzani kimi?" 
Psalms56:12 Nkulunkulu, izifungo zakho ziphezu kwami; ngizabuyisela kuwe izindumiso." 
Psalms56:13 Ngoba uwukhulule umphefumulo wami ekufeni; ubunge khulule yini inyawo zami ekuweni, ukuze ngihambe phambi kukaNkulunkulu ekukhanyeni kwabaphilayo?" 
Psalms57:1 Ngihawukela, Nkulunkulu, ngihawukela, ngoba umphefumulo wami uthembela kuwe; yebo, emthunzini wempiko zakho ngizaphephela, zize zedlule incithakalo." 
Psalms57:2 Ngizakhala kuNkulunkulu oPhezukonke, kuNkulunkulu ongiphelelisela khona." 
Psalms57:3 Uzathumela esemazulwini, angisindise, ayangise ofuna ukungiginya. Selah. UNkulunkulu uzathumela umusa wakhe leqiniso lakhe." 
Psalms57:4 Umphefumulo uphakathi kwezilwane, ngilala phakathi kwabavuthayo, amadodana abantu, omazinyo abo ayimikhonto lemitshoko, lolimi lwabo luyinkemba ebukhali." 
Psalms57:5 Phakama ngaphezu kwamazulu, Nkulunkulu; ubukhosi bakho bube phezu komhlaba wonke." 
Psalms57:6 Balungisele izinyathelo zami imbule; umphefumulo wami ukhotheme; bagebhe igodi phambi kwami; bawele phakathi kwalo. Selah. 
Psalms57:7 Inhliziyo yami iqinisiwe, Nkulunkulu, inhliziyo yami iqinisiwe. Ngizahlabelela ngihube indumiso."

Psalms57:11 Phakama ngaphezu kwamazulu, Nkulunkulu; ubukhosi bakho bube phezu komhlaba wonke." 
Psalms58:1 Isibili likhuluma okulungileyo yini, babusi? Lehlulela ngokuqonda yini, madodana abantu?" 
Psalms58:2 Yebo, enhliziyweni lenza okubi, lilinganisa udlakela lwezandla zenu emhlabeni." 
Psalms58:3 Ababi baphambuka kusukela esiswini, bayaduha kusukela esizalweni, beqamba amanga." 
Psalms58:4 Ubuhlungu babo bunjengobuhlungu benyoka, banjengebululu elingezwayo, elivimba indlebe yalo," 
Psalms58:5 ukuze lingezwa ilizwi labalumbi abalumba amalumbo ngokuhlakanipha. 
Psalms58:6 Nkulunkulu, yephula amazinyo abo emlonyeni wabo, uphohloze amazinyo emihlathi yamabhongo ezilwane, Nkosi."

Psalms58:9 Imbiza zenu zingakaluzwa ukhuni lwameva, uzabaphephula esiphephweni njengabaphilayo njengentukuthelweni." 
Psalms58:10 Olungileyo uzathokoza lapho ebona impindiselo, uzageza inyawo zakhe egazini lomubi."

Psalms59:2 Ngikhulula kubenzi bobubi, ungisindise ebantwini abomele igazi." 
Psalms59:3 Ngoba, khangela, bacathamela umphefumulo wami; abalamandla bayangihlanganyela, kungekho siphambeko sami njalo kungekho sono sami, Nkosi." 
Psalms59:4 Ngaphandle kwecala bayagijima bezilungisa. Vuka, ungihlangabeze, ubone." 
Psalms59:5 Wena-ke, Nkosi Nkulunkulu wamabandla, Nkulunkulu kaIsrayeli; vuka ukuze uhambele zonke izizwe, ungahawukeli lamunye wabakhohlisayo ebubini. Selah." 
Psalms59:6 Bayabuyela kusihlwa, behlaba umkhulungwane njengenja, bezingelezela umuzi." 
Psalms59:7 Khangela, bempompoloza ngomlomo wabo, inkemba zisendebeni zabo, ngoba bathi: Ngubani ozwayo?" 
Psalms59:8 Kodwa wena, Nkosi, uzabahleka, uzaziklolodela zonke izizwe." 
Psalms59:9 Ngenxa yamandla akhe ngizalindela kuwe, ngoba uNkulunkulu uyinqaba yami." 
Psalms59:10 UNkulunkulu womusa wami uzangandulela; uNkulunkulu uzangenza ngibukele izitha zami. 
Psalms59:11 Ungazibulali, hlezi abantu bakithi bakhohlwe; uzizulazulise ngamandla akho, uzehlisele phansi, wena sihlangu sethu, Nkosi." 
Psalms59:12 Nge sono somlomo wazo, ng elizwi lendebe zazo, kazibanjwe ekuzigqajeni kwazo, langenxa yokuhlambaza lokuqamba amanga ezikukhulumayo." 
Psalms59:13 U zi qede ngokuthukuthela, u zi qede zingabi khona, ukuze bazi ukuthi uNkulunkulu uyabusa koJakobe, kuze kube sekupheleni komhlaba. Selah." 
Psalms59:14 Kababuyele-ke kusihlwa behlaba umkhulungwane njengenja, bezingelezela umuzi." 
Psalms59:15 Bona kabazulazulele ukudla, nxa bengasuthanga kabalale." 
Psalms59:16 Kodwa mina ngizahlabelela ngamandla akho; yebo, ngizahlabelela kakhulu ekuseni ngomusa wakho; ngoba ube yinqaba yami lesiphephelo sami ngosuku lokuhlupheka kwami." 
Psalms59:17 Mandla ami, ngizahlabelela kuwe, ngoba uNkulunkulu uyinqaba yami, uNkulunkulu womusa wami."

Psalms61:1 Zwana, Nkulunkulu, ukukhala kwami, ulalele umkhuleko wami." 
Psalms61:2 Ngisemkhawulweni womhlaba ngizakhala kuwe, inhliziyo yami isiphela amandla; ngikhokhelela edwaleni eliphakemeyo kulami." 
Psalms61:3 Ngoba ubuyisiphephelo sami, inqaba eqinileyo kuso isitha." 
Psalms61:4 Ngizahlala ethenteni lakho kuze kube nininini, ngiphephele kungubudo yempiko zakho. Selah." 
Psalms61:5 Ngoba wena, Nkulunkulu, uzwile izifungo zami, wa ngi nika ilifa labesaba ibizo lakho." 
Psalms61:6 Uzakwengeza izinsuku ezinsukwini zenkosi; iminyaka yayo izakuba njengesizukulwana lesizukulwana. 
Psalms61:7 Kayihlale phambi kukaNkulunkulu kuze kube nininini; umise umusa leqiniso, ukuze kuyilondoloze."

Psalms62:1 Ngoqotho, umphefumulo wami uyamlindela uNkulunkulu ngokuthula; luvela kuye usindiso lwami." 
Psalms62:2 Nguye kuphela olidwala lami losindiso lwami, inqaba yami; kangiyikunyikinywa kakhulu." 
Psalms62:3 Koze kube nini liceba obubi limelene lomuntu? Lonke lizabulawa, njengomduli otshekileyo, uthango oludilikayo." 
Psalms62:4 Baceba kuphela uku m wisa ekuphakameni kwakhe, bathokoza ngamanga; ngomlomo wabo bayabusisa, kodwa ngaphakathi kwabo bayathuka. Selah." 
Psalms62:5 Mphefumulo wami, lindela ngokuthula kuNkulunkulu kuphela; ngoba ithemba lami livela kuye." 
Psalms62:6 Nguye kuphela olidwala lami losindiso lwami, inqaba yami; kangiyikunyikinywa." 
Psalms62:7 LukuNkulunkulu usindiso lwami lodumo lwami, idwala lamandla ami, isiphephelo sami, kukuNkulunkulu." 
Psalms62:8 Thembani kuye isikhathi sonke, lina bantu; lithulule inhliziyo yenu phambi kwakhe; uNkulunkulu uyisiphephelo sethu. Selah." 
Psalms62:9 Ngoqotho, abantukazana bayize, izikhulu ziyinkohliso; esilinganisweni balula kuleze bebonke." 
Psalms62:10 Lingathembeli embandezelweni, lingamisi ithemba eliyize ekuphangeni; uba inotho isanda, lingabeki inhliziyo kuyo."

Psalms63:1 Nkulunkulu, unguNkulunkulu wami, ngizakudinga ngovivi; umphefumulo wami womela wena; inyama yami iyakulangatha, elizweni elomileyo leligagadekileyo, elingelamanzi." 
Psalms63:2 Njengoba ngikubonile endaweni engcwele, ngibone amandla akho lobukhosi bakho." 
Psalms63:3 Ngoba uthandolomusa lwakho lungcono kulempilo; indebe zami zizakudumisa. 
Psalms63:4 Ngokunjalo ngizakubusisa ngisaphila, ngiphakamise izandla zami ebizweni lakho." 
Psalms63:5 Umphefumulo wami uzasutha kungathi ngomnkantsho lamahwahwa, lomlomo wami uzadumisa ngezindebe ezithabisayo." 
Psalms63:6 Lapho ngikukhumbula embhedeni wami, emilindweni yebusuku ngizindla ngawe." 
Psalms63:7 Ngoba ubulusizo lwami, ngakho emthunzini wempiko zakho ngizahlabela ngithokoze." 
Psalms63:8 Umphefumulo wami unamathele ekukulandeleni, isandla sakho sokunene siyangisekela." 
Psalms63:9 Kodwa a badinga umphefumulo wami ukuwuchitha bazakuya ezindaweni zomhlaba eziphansi. 
Psalms63:10 Bazakuwa ngobukhali benkemba, babe yisabelo samakhanka." 
Psalms63:11 Kodwa inkosi izathokoza kuNkulunkulu; wonke ofunga ngaye uzazincoma; kodwa umlomo wabaqamba amanga uzavalwa. 
Psalms64:1 Zwana, Nkulunkulu, ilizwi lami esikhalazweni sami, ulondoloze impilo yami ekwesabeni isitha." 
Psalms64:2 Ungifihle ecebeni elifihliweyo lababi, ekuxokozeleni kwabenzi bobubi," 
Psalms64:3 abalola ulimi lwabo njengenkemba, bagobise umtshoko wabo, ngitsho ilizwi elibabayo," 
Psalms64:4 ukutshoka opheleleyo besekusithekeni; bahle bamtshoke, bengesabi." 
Psalms64:5 Baziqinisa e dabe ni olubi, bekhuluma ngokuthiya, bathi: Ngubani ongayibona?" 
Psalms64:6 Badingisisa iziphambeko; baphelelisa ukuhlola ngenkuthalo; ngitsho ingaphakathi yomuntu lenhliziyo ejulileyo. 
Psalms64:7 Kodwa uNkulunkulu uzabatshoka ngomtshoko masinyane; bazalinyazwa. 
Psalms64:8 Njalo bazakwenza olwabo ulimi luwele phezu kwabo; bonke abababonayo bazabaleka.

Psalms65:1 Ukudunyiswa kukulindele ngokuthula, Nkulunkulu, eZiyoni, lesifungo sizagcwaliswa kuwe." 
Psalms65:2 Wena ozwa umkhuleko, yonke inyama izakuza kuwe." 
Psalms65:3 Izinto zobubi zingehlule. Iziphambeko zethu, wena uzenzele inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Psalms65:4 Ubusisiwe o m khethayo, omsondezayo ukuthi ahlale emagumeni akho. Sizasutha ngokuhle kwendlu yakho, ithempeli lakho elingcwele." 
Psalms65:5 Nge zinto ezesabekayo uzasiphendula, Nkulunkulu wosindiso lwethu, themba lemikhawulo yonke yomhlaba, lelabakhatshana e lwandle." 
Psalms65:6 Omisa izintaba ngamandla akhe, ebhince amandla." 
Psalms65:7 Othulisa ukuduma kwezinlwandle, lenhlokomo yamagagasi azo, lokuxokozela kwabantu." 
Psalms65:8 Labakhileyo emikhawulweni bayesaba iziboniso zakho; wenza kuhlabele kuthokoze ukuphuma kokusa lokokuhlwa. 
Psalms65:9 Uyahambela umhlaba uwuthelele, uwuvundise kakhulu; umfula kaNkulunkulu ugcwele amanzi; uyabalungisela amabele, lapho uwulungisa ngokunjalo." 
Psalms65:10 Uyathelela kakhulu imisele yawo, ulalise imigelo yawo, uyithambise ngezihlambo, ubusise ukumila kwawo." 
Psalms65:11 Uyethesa umnyaka ngomqhele wobuhle bakho; lemikhondo yakho ithonta amafutha. 
Psalms65:12 Ithontela amadlelo eganga, lamaqaqa embethe intokozo." 
Psalms65:13 Amadlelo embethe imihlambi, lezigodi zisitshekelwe ngamabele; kuyajabula kakhulu, njalo kuhlabele." 
Psalms66:1 Mhubeleni ngentokozo uNkulunkulu, mhlaba wonke." 
Psalms66:2 Hlabelani ubukhosi bebizo lakhe, lenze udumo lwakhe lube lenkazimulo." 
Psalms66:3 Tshonini kuNkulunkulu lithi: Yeka ukwesabeka kwezenzo zakho! Ngenxa yobukhulu bamandla akho izitha zakho zizakuthobela ngenkohliso. 
Psalms66:4 Umhlaba wonke uzakukhonza, uhlabelele kuwe, bahlabelele ibizo lakho. Selah." 
Psalms66:5 Wozani libone izenzo zikaNkulunkulu; uyesabeka ekwenzeni ebantwaneni babantu. 
Psalms66:6 Ulwandle waluphendula lwaba ngumhlaba owomileyo; bachapha umfula ngenyawo. Lapho sathokoza kuye. 
Psalms66:7 Ubusa ngamandla akhe kuze kube nininini; amehlo akhe ayazilinda izizwe; abalenkani kabangaziphakamisi. Selah. 
Psalms66:8 Busisani uNkulunkulu, zizwe, lizwakalise ilizwi lendumiso yakhe." 
Psalms66:9 Obeka umphefumulo wethu empilweni, ongavumanga ukuthi unyawo lwethu lutshelele." 
Psalms66:10 Ngoba usihlolile, Nkulunkulu, wasicenga njengokucengwa kwesiliva." 
Psalms66:11 Wasingenisa embuleni, wabeka inhlupheko enkalweni zethu." 
Psalms66:12 Wenze abantu bagade phezu kwekhanda lethu; sadabula emlilweni lasemanzini, kodwa wasikhuphela endaweni elokunengi." 
Psalms66:13 Ngizangena endlini yakho ngileminikelo yokutshiswa; ngizakhokha kuwe izifungo zami," 
Psalms66:14 indebe zami eziziphumisileyo, lomlomo wami ozikhulumileyo ngisekuhluphekeni." 
Psalms66:15 Ngizanikela kuwe iminikelo yokutshiswa yezinonileyo, kanye lempepha yezinqama; ngizanikela inkomo kanye lezimpongo. Selah." 
Psalms66:16 Wozani lizwe lina lonke elimesabayo uNkulunkulu, ngizalandisa akwenzele umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms66:17 Ngakhala kuye ngomlomo wami, waphakanyiswa ngaphansi kolimi lwami." 
Psalms66:18 Uba benginanze ububi enhliziyweni yami, ibingayikuzwa iNkosi." 
Psalms66:19 Qotho uNkulunkulu uzwile, walalela ilizwi lomkhuleko wami." 
Psalms66:20 Kabusiswe uNkulunkulu, ongabuyiselanga emuva umkhuleko wami, kumbe umusa wakhe kimi." 
Psalms67:1 Nkulunkulu, woba lomusa kithi usibusise, ukhanyise ubuso bakho phezu kwethu. Selah." 
Psalms67:2 Ukuze indlela yakho yaziwe emhlabeni, usindiso lwakho ezizweni zonke." 
Psalms67:3 Kazikudumise izizwe, Nkulunkulu, kabakudumise abantu bonke." 
Psalms67:4 Izizwe kazijabule zihlabele ngentokozo, ngoba uzabahlulela abantu ngokuqonda, uhole izizwe emhlabeni. Selah." 
Psalms67:5 Kazikudumise izizwe, Nkulunkulu, kabakudumise abantu bonke." 
Psalms67:6 Umhlaba uzathela izithelo zawo; uNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu wethu uzasibusisa." 
Psalms67:7 UNkulunkulu uzasibusisa, layo yonke imikhawulo yomhlaba izamesaba." 
Psalms68:1 UNkulunkulu kavuke, zihlakazeke izitha zakhe, labamzondayo babaleke phambi kwakhe." 
Psalms68:2 Njengokuphetshethwa kwentuthu ba phephethe; njengokuncibilikiswa kwengcino phambi komlilo, ababi kabachithwe phambi kukaNkulunkulu." 
Psalms68:3 Kodwa abalungileyo kabajabule, bathabe phambi kukaNkulunkulu, njalo bathokoze ngentokozo." 
Psalms68:4 Hlabelelani kuNkulunkulu, hlabelelani indumiso ebizweni lakhe, limphakamise lowo ogade enkangala ngebizo lakhe uJa, njalo thokozani phambi kwakhe." 
Psalms68:5 Ung uyise wezintandane lomahluleli wabafelokazi, uNkulunkulu endaweni yakhe yokuhlala engcwele." 
Psalms68:6 UNkulunkulu uhlalisa ababodwa emulini, ukhupha ababotshwe ngamaketane, kodwa abalenkani bahlala elizweni elomileyo." 
Psalms68:7 Nkulunkulu, ekuphumeni kwakho phambi kwabantu bakho, ekuhambeni kwakho enkangala; Selah:" 
Psalms68:8 Umhlaba wazamazama, lawo amazulu athontisa phambi kukaNkulunkulu, le iSinayi, phambi kukaNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
Psalms68:9 Walinisa izulu elikhulu, Nkulunkulu; waliqinisa wena ilifa lakho selikhathele." 
Psalms68:10 Ibandla lakho lahlala kulo; wamlungisela ngobuhle bakho oswelayo, Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms68:11 INkosi yanika ilizwi; ababiki bezindaba babelixuku elikhulu. 
Psalms68:12 Amakhosi amabutho ayabaleka, ayabaleka. Owesifazana ohlezi ekhaya wayaba impango." 
Psalms68:13 Lanxa lilala phakathi kwezimbiza, lizakuba njeng empiko zejuba ezisitshekelwe ngesiliva, lezinsiba zalo ngegolide eliliganu." 
Psalms68:14 Lapho uSomandla echitha amakhosi kulo, kwakunjeng eliqhwa elikhithikayo eZalimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Intaba yeBashani yintaba kaNkulunkulu, intaba elezingqonga, intaba yeBashani." 
Psalms68:16 Leqelani, lina zintaba ezilezingqonga? Lintaba uNkulunkulu uyiloyisele ukuhlala kwakhe. Yebo, i Nkosi izahlala kuyo kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms68:17 Izinqola zikaNkulunkulu ziyizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili, izinkulungwane zezinkulungwane zezingilosi, iNkosi iphakathi kwazo, iSinayi endaweni engcwele." 
Psalms68:18 Wena wenyukele phezulu, wathumba abathunjiweyo; wemukela izipho ebantwini, yebo, lakwabalenkani; ukuze uJa uNkulunkulu ahlale khona." 
Psalms68:19 Kayibusiswe iNkosi; isethwesa insuku ngensuku; uNkulunkulu ulusindiso lwethu. Selah. 
Psalms68:20 UNkulunkulu wethu unguNkulunkulu wezinsindiso; lakuJehova iNkosi kulokuphuma ekufeni. 
Psalms68:21 Kodwa uNkulunkulu uzaphohloza ikhanda lezitha zakhe, ukhakhayi olulenwele lwalowo ohamba ezonweni zakhe." 
Psalms68:22 INkosi yathi: Ngiza ba buyisa be vela eBashani, ngi ba buyise be vela enzikini yolwandle," 
Psalms68:23 ukuze inyawo zakho uzigxamuze egazini lezitha, inlimi zezinja zakho kulo." 
Psalms68:24 Zibonile izindwendwe zakho, Nkulunkulu; izindwendwe zikaNkulunkulu wami, iNkosi yami, endaweni engcwele." 
Psalms68:25 Ngaphambili kuhamba abahlabelayo, ngemuva abatshayi bamachacho, phakathi izintombi zitshaya izigubhu." 
Psalms68:26 Busisani uNkulunkulu emabandleni, i Nkosi, kuvela emthonjeni kaIsrayeli." 
Psalms68:27 Nango uBhenjamini omncinyane umbusi wabo, iziphathamandla zikaJuda, inkundla yazo, iziphathamandla zikaZebuluni, iziphathamandla zikaNafithali." 
Psalms68:28 UNkulunkulu wakho ulaye amandla akho; qinisa, Nkulunkulu, lokho osenzele khona." 
Psalms68:29 Ngenxa yethempeli lakho eJerusalema amakhosi azakulethela isipho. 
Psalms68:30 Sikhuze isilo somhlanga, umhlambi wezinkunzi kanye lamankonyana abantu, kuze kuthobeke kulenhlamvu zesiliva; ubahlakaze abantu a bathokoza ezimpini." 
Psalms68:31 Iziphathamandla zizakuza zivela eGibhithe; iEtiyopiya izakwelulela izandla zayo kuNkulunkulu ngokuphangisa. 
Psalms68:32 Mibuso yomhlaba hlabelelani kuNkulunkulu, lihlabelele indumiso eNkosini. Selah." 
Psalms68:33 Kuyo egade phezu kwamazulu amazulu awendulo; khangelani, iphumisa ilizwi layo, ilizwi elilamandla." 
Psalms68:34 Phanini amandla kuNkulunkulu; ubukhosi bakhe buphezu kukaIsrayeli, lamandla akhe asemayezini." 
Psalms68:35 Uyesabeka, Nkulunkulu, ezindaweni zakho ezingcwele; uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli nguye onika abantu bakhe amandla lengalo. Kabusiswe uNkulunkulu." 
Psalms69:1 Ngisindisa, Nkulunkulu, ngoba amanzi asengene kuwo umphefumulo." 
Psalms69:2 Ngiyatshona odakeni olujulileyo, lapho okungelakuma khona; ngingene emanzini atshonayo, lapho impophoma iyangicwilisa." 
Psalms69:3 Ngidiniwe yikukhala kwami, umphimbo wami womile qha; amehlo ami ayafiphala ekulindeleni uNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms69:4 Abangizondayo ngeze banengi okwedlula inwele zekhanda lami; abangangibhubhisa, izitha zami ngaphandle kwecala, balamandla. Lokho engingakwebanga ngasengikubuyisela." 
Psalms69:5 Nkulunkulu, wena uyabazi ubuthutha bami, lezono zami kazifihlakalanga kuwe." 
Psalms69:6 Kabangayangeki ngenxa yami labo abakulindeleyo, Nkosi Jehova wamabandla; bangadunyazwa ngenxa yami labo abakudingayo, Nkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
Psalms69:7 Ngoba ngenxa yakho ngithwele ihlazo; inhloni zisibekele ubuso bami. 
Psalms69:8 Sengaba ngowemzini kubafowethu, lowezizweni kubantwana bakamama." 
Psalms69:9 Ngoba ukutshisekela indlu yakho kungidlile, lenhlamba yabakuhlambazayo iwele phezu kwami." 
Psalms69:10 Ngasengilila ekuzileni ukudla komphefumulo wami, njalo kwaba yikudunyazwa kimi." 
Psalms69:11 Ngasengisenza isembatho sami ilembu lesaka, ngaba yisiga kibo." 
Psalms69:12 Abahlezi esangweni bakhuluma ngami, njalo ngaba yingoma yabanatha okunathwayo okulamandla." 
Psalms69:13 Kodwa mina umkhuleko wami ukuwe, Nkosi, ngesikhathi somusa, Nkulunkulu, ngobunengi besihawu sakho, ngiphendule, ngeqiniso losindiso lwakho." 
Psalms69:14 Ungophule odakeni, ngingatshoni; ngikhululwe kwabangizondayo lenzikini yamanzi." 
Psalms69:15 Impophoma yamanzi kayingangicwilisi, lenziki ingangiginyi, lomgodi ungavali umlomo wawo phezu kwami." 
Psalms69:16 Ngiphendula, Nkosi, ngoba uthandolomusa lwakho lulungile; ngobunengi besihawu sakho uphendukele kimi." 
Psalms69:17 Njalo ungayifihleli ubuso bakho inceku yakho; ngoba ngiyahlupheka, phangisa ungiphendule." 
Psalms69:18 Sondela emphefumulweni wami, uwuhlenge, ungikhulule ngenxa yezitha zami." 
Psalms69:19 Wena uyakwazi ukuthukwa kwami lehlazo lami lokudunyazwa kwami; izitha zami zonke ziphambi kwakho. 
Psalms69:20 Ukuthukwa kuyidabule inhliziyo yami, njalo ngibuthakathaka. Bengilindele ongangi hawukela, kodwa wayengekho, labaduduzayo, kodwa kangi ba tholanga." 
Psalms69:21 Basebengipha inyongo ibe yikudla kwami, lekomeni kwami banginathisa iviniga." 
Psalms69:22 Itafula labo eliphambi kwabo kalibe ngumjibila, lenhlalakahle yabo ibe yisifu." 
Psalms69:23 Amehlo abo kawafiphale ukuze bangaboni, njalo wenze inkalo zabo zihlale zithuthumele." 
Psalms69:24 Thela intukuthelo yakho phezu kwabo, lolaka lwakho oluvuthayo lubafice." 
Psalms69:25 Indawo yabo yokuhlala kayibe lunxiwa, kungabi khona ohlala emathenteni abo." 
Psalms69:26 Ngoba omtshayileyo wena bayamzingela, njalo baxoxa kube buhlungu kwabalinyazwe nguwe." 
Psalms69:27 Yengezelela ukona ekoneni kwabo, ukuze bangangeni ekulungeni kwakho." 
Psalms69:28 Kabesulwe ogwalweni lwabaphilayo, bangabalwa kanye labalungileyo." 
Psalms69:29 Kodwa mina ngilusizi, ngiyafuthelwa; usindiso lwakho, Nkulunkulu, kalungimise phezulu ngivikelekile." 
Psalms69:30 Ngizadumisa ibizo likaNkulunkulu ngehubo, ngimkhulise ngokubonga." 
Psalms69:31 Kuzakuba kuhle-ke e Nkosi ni okwedlula inkabi kumbe ijongosi elilempondo lenklagu. 
Psalms69:32 Abathobekileyo bazabona, bathokoze; lina elidinga uNkulunkulu inhliziyo yenu izaphila." 
Psalms69:33 Ngoba i Nkosi iyabezwa abaswelayo, njalo kayideleli izibotshwa zayo." 
Psalms69:34 Kakuthi amazulu lomhlaba kuyidumise, izinlwandle lakho konke okunyakaza phakathi kwazo." 
Psalms69:35 Ngoba uNkulunkulu uzasindisa iZiyoni, ayakhe imizi yakoJuda; njalo bahlale khona badle ilifa layo." 
Psalms69:36 Lenzalo yenceku zakhe izakudla ilifa layo, labathanda ibizo lakhe bazahlala kuyo." 
Psalms70:1 Nkulunkulu, ngophula, Nkosi, phangisa ungisize." 
Psalms70:2 Kabayangeke babe lenhloni bonke abadinga umphefumulo wami; kababuyiselwe emuva bayangiswe abaloyisa ukulimala kwami. 
Psalms70:3 Kababuyele emuva kube ngumvuzo wehlazo labo abathi: Hiya belo! 
Psalms70:4 Kabathabe bajabule kuwe bonke abakudingayo; labathanda usindiso lwakho kabatsho njalo bathi: Kabe mkhulu uNkulunkulu! 
Psalms70:5 Kodwa ngingumyanga njalo ngiyaswela; Nkulunkulu, phangisa uze kimi. Wena ungumsizi wami lomkhululi wami; Nkosi, ungaphuzi." 
Psalms71:1 Kuwe, Nkosi, ngiyaphephela; kangingayangeki lanininini." 
Psalms71:2 Ngikhulula ngokulunga kwakho, ungophule; beka indlebe yakho kimi, ungisindise." 
Psalms71:3 Woba lidwala lokuhlala kimi, ngiye kulo njalonjalo; ulayile ukungisindisa, ngoba ulidwala lami lenqaba yami." 
Psalms71:4 Nkulunkulu wami, ngophula esandleni somubi lesandleni songalunganga lolesihluku." 
Psalms71:5 Ngoba wena, ulithemba lami Nkosi, Jehova, ithemba lami kwasebutsheni bami." 
Psalms71:6 Ngeyame kuwe kwasesizalweni; nguwe owangikhupha esiswini sikamama; indumiso yami ingawe njalonjalo. 
Psalms71:7 Benginjengesimangaliso kwabanengi; kodwa wena uyisiphephelo sami esiqinileyo. 
Psalms71:8 Umlomo wami kawugcwaliswe ngendumiso yakho, usuku lonke ngodumo lwakho." 
Psalms71:9 Ungangilahli esikhathini sokuluphala, ungangitshiyi ekupheleni kwamandla ami." 
Psalms71:10 Ngoba izitha zami zikhuluma zimelene lami, labacathamela umphefumulo wami bayacebisana," 
Psalms71:11 besithi: UNkulunkulu umtshiyile; zingelani, limbambe, ngoba kakho okhululayo." 
Psalms71:12 Nkulunkulu, ungabi khatshana lami; Nkulunkulu wami, phangisela usizo lwami." 
Psalms71:13 Kabayangeke baphele abayizitha zomphefumulo wami, kabasitshekelwe yikuyangeka lehlazo labo abadinga ukoniwa kwami." 
Psalms71:14 Kodwa mina ngizathemba njalonjalo, ngengeze ekudunyisweni kwakho konke." 
Psalms71:15 Umlomo wami uzalandisa ukulunga kwakho, usuku lonke usindiso lwakho, ngoba kangiwazi amanani akho." 
Psalms71:16 Ngizahamba emandleni eNkosi uJehova, ngiqambe ukulunga kwakho, okwakho kuphela." 
Psalms71:17 Nkulunkulu, ungifundisile kusukela ebutsheni bami, njalo kuze kube khathesi ngitshumayele izimangaliso zakho." 
Psalms71:18 Lalapho sengiluphele sengiyimpunga, Nkulunkulu, ungangitshiyi, ngize ngitshumayele ingalo yakho kuso isizukulwana, amandla akho kuye wonke ozakuza." 
Psalms71:19 Lokulunga kwakho, Nkulunkulu, kufika ezingqongeni, owenze izinto ezinkulu; Nkulunkulu, ngubani onjengawe?" 
Psalms71:20 Ongenze ngabona inhlupheko ezinengi lezibuhlungu, uzangivuselela futhi, ungikhuphule futhi ezinzikini zomhlaba." 
Psalms71:21 Uzakwandisa ubukhulu bami, ungiduduze inhlangothi zonke." 
Psalms71:22 Lami ngizakudumisa ngogubhu lwezintambo, iqiniso lakho, Nkulunkulu wami; ngizahlabelela izibongo kuwe ngechacho, wena ongcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Psalms71:23 Indebe zami zizamemeza ngentokozo lapho ngihlabelela kuwe, lomphefumulo wami owuhlengileyo." 
Psalms71:24 Futhi ulimi lwami luzakhuluma ngokulunga kwakho usuku lonke, ngoba bayangekile, ngoba badumazeka, abadinga ukoniwa kwami." 
Psalms72:1 Nkulunkulu, nika inkosi izahlulelo zakho lokulunga kwakho endodaneni yenkosi." 
Psalms72:2 Izakwehlulela abantu bakho ngokulunga, labayanga bakho ngokuqonda." 
Psalms72:3 Izintaba zizalethela abantu ukuthula, lamaqaqa, ngokulunga." 
Psalms72:4 Izakwahlulela abahluphekayo babantu, isindise abantwana babaswelayo, ifohloze umcindezeli." 
Psalms72:5 Bazakwesaba wena lisekhona ilanga, isekhona lenyanga, ku zizukulwana nge zizukulwana." 
Psalms72:6 Izakwehla njengezulu etshanini obugundiweyo, njengezihlambo ezithambisa umhlaba." 
Psalms72:7 Ensukwini zayo olungileyo uzahluma; lokwanda kokuthula, ize ingabi khona inyanga." 
Psalms72:8 Izabusa-ke kusukela elwandle kusiya elwandle, lakusukela emfuleni kusiya emikhawulweni yomhlaba." 
Psalms72:9 Abahlala enkangala bazakhothama phambi kwayo; izitha zayo zizakhotha uthuli. 
Psalms72:10 Amakhosi eTarshishi lawezihlengeni azaletha izipho, amakhosi eShebha leSeba asondeze izipho." 
Psalms72:11 Amakhosi wonke azayikhothamela, izizwe zonke ziyikhonze." 
Psalms72:12 Ngoba izamkhulula oswelayo ekhala, longumyanga, longelamsizi."
