Psalms72:13 Izahawukela ongumyanga loswelayo, isindise imiphefumulo yabaswelayo." 
Psalms72:14 Izahlenga umphefumulo wabo enkohlisweni ledlakeleni; legazi labo lizakuba ligugu emehlweni ayo. 
Psalms72:15 Izaphila, inikwe okwegolide leShebha, ikhulekelwe njalonjalo, usuku lonke ibusiswe." 
Psalms72:16 Kuzakuba khona ihetshezana lamabele elizweni ezingqongeni zezintaba; izithelo zawo zihatshazele njengeLebhanoni; labomuzi bazahluma njengotshani bomhlaba. 
Psalms72:17 Ibizo layo lizakuba khona kuze kube phakade, lebizo layo lizaqhutshelwa phambili lisekhona ilanga. Njalo bazabusiswa kuyo; izizwe zonke zizakuthi ibusisiwe." 
Psalms72:18 Kayibusiswe i Nkosi uNkulunkulu, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, onguye yedwa owenza imimangaliso." 
Psalms72:19 Kalibusiswe ibizo lakhe elilodumo kuze kube nininini; umhlaba wonke ugcwaliswe ngodumo lwakhe. Ameni, loAmeni!" 
Psalms72:20 Imikhuleko kaDavida indodana kaJese isiphelile. 
Psalms73:1 Qotho uNkulunkulu ulungile kuIsrayeli, kulabo abahlambulukileyo enhliziyweni." 
Psalms73:2 Kodwa mina inyawo zami zaphose zasuka, izinyathelo zami zaphose zatshelela." 
Psalms73:3 Ngoba ngaba lomhawu ngabayizithutha, ngibona ukuphumelela kwababi." 
Psalms73:4 Ngoba kakulazibopho ekufeni kwabo, kodwa amandla abo aqinile." 
Psalms73:5 Kabakho enhluphekweni njengabanye abantu, njalo kabahlutshwa nje ngabanye abantu." 
Psalms73:6 Ngakho-ke ukuzigqaja kuyabazungeza njengeketane, udlame luyabasibekela njeng esembatho." 
Psalms73:7 Amehlo abo aqumbile ngamafutha; bedlula ukunakana kwenhliziyo. 
Psalms73:8 Bayakloloda, bakhulume ngobubi ngocindezelo; bakhuluma besekuphakameni." 
Psalms73:9 Bamisa umlomo wabo umelene lamazulu, lolimi lwabo luhamba emhlabeni." 
Psalms73:10 Ngakho abantu bakhe bayaphendukela lapha, lamanzi enkezo egcweleyo akhanyelwa bona." 
Psalms73:11 Njalo bathi: UNkulunkulu wazi njani? Kukhona ulwazi yini koPhezukonke? 
Psalms73:12 Khangela, laba ngabangelaNkulunkulu, kanti bayaphumelela elizweni, bandisa inotho." 
Psalms73:13 Isibili ngihlambulule inhliziyo yami ngeze, ngageza izandla zami ngokungelacala." 
Psalms73:14 Ngoba ngihlutshiwe usuku lonke, lesijeziso sami sisekuseni yonke." 
Psalms73:15 Uba bengingathi: Ngizakhuluma ngokunje, khangela, ngabe ngisikhohlisile isizukulwana sabantwana bakho." 
Psalms73:16 Lapho nganakana ukwazi lokhu, kwakubuhlungu emehlweni ami," 
Psalms73:17 ngaze ngangena ezindlini ezingcwele zikaNkulunkulu; nga sengi kuqedisisa ukuphela kwabo. 
Psalms73:18 Isibili ubamisa endaweni ezitshelelayo, ubawisela ekubhujisweni." 
Psalms73:19 Yeka ukuchitheka kwabo njengokucwayiza kwelihlo! Baphela baqedwe ngokwesabisayo. 
Psalms73:20 Njengephupho ekuphaphameni, Nkosi, nxa uvuka uzadelela umfanekiso wabo." 
Psalms73:21 Ngakho inhliziyo yami yaba buhlungu, ngahlatshwa ezinsweni zami." 
Psalms73:22 Njalo ngaba yisiphukuphuku esingaziyo, ngaba njenge nyamazana kuwe." 
Psalms73:23 Kodwa mina ngihlezi ngilawe; ubambe isandla sami sokunene. 
Psalms73:24 Uzangikhokhela ngeseluleko sakho, lemva kwalokho ungemukele e nkazimulw eni." 
Psalms73:25 Ngilobani emazulwini ngaphandle kwakho? Njalo kakukho engikufisayo emhlabeni ngaphandle kwakho. 
Psalms73:26 Inyama yami lenhliziyo yami kuyaphela; uNkulunkulu ulidwala lenhliziyo yami lesabelo sami kuze kube nininini. 
Psalms73:27 Ngoba khangela, abakhatshana lawe bazabhubha; ubachithile bonke abaphingayo ngo kusuka kuwe." 
Psalms73:28 Kodwa mina kungilungele ukusondela kuNkulunkulu; ngibeke isiphephelo sami eNkosini uJehova, ukutshumayela zonke izenzo zakho." 
Psalms74:1 Nkulunkulu, u si lahleleni kokuphela? Ulaka lwakho luvuth elani ngakuzo izimvu zedlelo lakho?" 
Psalms74:2 Khumbula ibandla lakho o wa li thenga endulo, intonga yelifa lakho o wa yi hlengayo, le intaba yeZiyoni ohlala kuyo." 
Psalms74:3 Phakamisa inyawo zakho ezincithakalweni zaphakade, konke okubi izitha ezikwenzileyo endaweni engcwele." 
Psalms74:4 Izitha zakho zibhongile phakathi kwezindawo zakho zokubuthanela, zamisa impawu zazo zibe zimpawu." 
Psalms74:5 Umuntu waziwa njengophakamisa amahloka eguswini lezihlahla. 
Psalms74:6 Kodwa khathesi zitshaye okubaziweyo kwayo ndawonye ngamahloka lezando. 
Psalms74:7 Zinikele indlu yakho engcwele emlilweni, zangcolisa indawo yokuhlala yebizo lakho ngokuyiwisela emhlabathini." 
Psalms74:8 Zathi enhliziyweni yazo: Kasibachithe ndawonye. Zatshisa zonke indawo zokubuthanela zikaNkulunkulu elizweni. 
Psalms74:9 Impawu zethu kasiziboni; kakusekho mprofethi; kakho kithi owaziyo ukuthi koze kube nini. 
Psalms74:10 Koze kube nini, Nkulunkulu, umcindezeli edelela? Isitha sizahlambaza ibizo lakho kokuphela yini?" 
Psalms74:11 Usifinyezeleni isandla sakho, yebo isandla sakho sokunene? Si khuphe phakathi kwesifuba sakho." 
Psalms74:12 Kanti uNkulunkulu uyiNkosi yami kusukela endulo, eyenza insindiso phakathi komhlaba." 
Psalms74:13 Nguwe owehlukanisa ulwandle ngamandla akho; wafohloza amakhanda emigobho emanzini. 
Psalms74:14 Nguwe owachoboza amakhanda kaLeviyathani*, wamnikela waba yikudla kwabantu enkangala." 
Psalms74:15 Nguwe owaqhekeza umthombo lesifula, nguwe owomisa imifula egeleza njalo." 
Psalms74:16 Usuku ngolwakho, lobusuku ngobakho; nguwe owamisa ukukhanya lelanga." 
Psalms74:17 Nguwe owamisa yonke imikhawulo yomhlaba; nguwe owenza ihlobo lobusika. 
Psalms74:18 Khumbula lokhu, isitha siyangisile, Nkosi, labantu abayizithutha bahlambazile ibizo lakho." 
Psalms74:19 Ungawunikeli umphefumulo wejuba lakho ezinyamazaneni zendle; ungakhohlwa ixuku lezihlupheki zakho phakade. 
Psalms74:20 Nanzelela isivumelwano; ngoba indawo ezimnyama zomhlaba zigcwele indawo zokuhlala zesihluku. 
Psalms74:21 Kangabuyeli eyangekile ocindezelweyo; ohluphekayo loswelayo kabalidumise ibizo lakho. 
Psalms74:22 Vuka, Nkulunkulu! Ulumele udaba lwakho, ukhumbule ihlazo lakho ngoyisiwula usuku lonke." 
Psalms74:23 Ungakhohlwa ilizwi lezitha zakho, ukuxokozela kwabakuvukelayo kwenyuka njalonjalo." 
Psalms75:1 Siyakubonga, Nkulunkulu, siyabonga, ukuthi ibizo lakho liseduze, iyalandisa imisebenzi yakho emangalisayo." 
Psalms75:2 Lapho ngisemukela isikhathi esimisiweyo ngizakwahlulela ngokuqonda. 
Psalms75:3 Umhlaba labo bonke abakhileyo kuwo kuncibilikile; mina ngiqinisa insika zawo. Selah. 
Psalms75:4 Ngathi kwabayiziwula: Lingabi yiziwula. Lakwababi: Lingaphakamisi uphondo. 
Psalms75:5 Lingaphakamiseli phezulu uphondo lwenu, li nga khulum i ngentamo elukhuni." 
Psalms75:6 Ngoba ukuphakanyiswa kakuveli empumalanga kumbe entshonalanga njalo hatshi enkangala. 
Psalms75:7 Kodwa uNkulunkulu ungumahluleli, uyehlisa omunye, aphakamise omunye." 
Psalms75:8 Ngoba esandleni se Nkosi kulenkezo; lewayini liphuphuma, ligcwele amahlukuzo; iyathulula okwalo; kodwa izibhidi zalo, ababi bonke bomhlaba bazazihluza bazinathe." 
Psalms75:9 Kodwa mina ngizatshumayela njalonjalo, ngihlabele indumiso kuNkulunkulu kaJakobe." 
Psalms75:10 Njalo zonke impondo zababi ngizaziquma; impondo zabalungileyo zizaphakanyiswa. 
Psalms76:1 UNkulunkulu uyaziwa koJuda; ibizo lakhe likhulu koIsrayeli. 
Psalms76:2 Njalo idumba lakhe liseSalema, lendawo yakhe yokuhlala eZiyoni." 
Psalms76:3 Lapho wephula imitshoko evuthayo yedandili, isihlangu, lenkemba, lempi. Selah." 
Psalms76:4 Uyakhazimula, ulobukhosi okwedlula izintaba zempango." 
Psalms76:5 Baphangiwe abaqinileyo ngenhliziyo, balele ubuthongo babo; njalo kakho emaqhaweni othole izandla zawo." 
Psalms76:6 Ekukhalimeni kwakho, Nkulunkulu kaJakobe, kokubili inqola lebhiza kulele ubuthongo obukhulu." 
Psalms76:7 Wena, wena uyesabeka. Ngubani-ke ongema phambi kwakho kusukela esikhathini solaka lwakho?" 
Psalms76:8 Wenza isahlulelo sizwakale usemazulwini; umhlaba wesaba wathula," 
Psalms76:9 mhla uNkulunkulu evukela isahlulelo, ukusindisa bonke abathobekileyo bomhlaba. Selah." 
Psalms76:10 Qotho, ulaka lomuntu luzakudumisa; insalela yolaka uzayikhina." 
Psalms76:11 Fungani, likhokhe e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wenu, lonke eliyihanqileyo lilethe izipho kuye ofanele esatshwe." 
Psalms76:12 Izaquma umoya weziphathamandla; iyesabeka emakhosini omhlaba. 
Psalms77:1 Ilizwi lami likuNkulunkulu, njalo ngiyakhala, ilizwi lami likuNkulunkulu, wasebeka indlebe kimi." 
Psalms77:2 Osukwini lokuhlupheka kwami ngayidinga iNkosi; isandla sami selulwa ebusuku, kasiphezanga, umphefumulo wami wala ukududuzwa." 
Psalms77:3 Ngamkhumbula uNkulunkulu, ngabubula; ngakhalaza, lomoya wami waphela amandla. Selah." 
Psalms77:4 Ubambe amehlo ami ukuthi angalali; ngakhathazeka, kangisakhulumanga." 
Psalms77:5 Ngakhumbula insuku zasendulo, iminyaka yekadeni." 
Psalms77:6 Ngakhumbula ingoma yami, ebusuku, ngakhuluma lenhliziyo yami, lomoya wami wahlolisisa." 
Psalms77:7 INkosi izalahla kokuphela yini? Njalo kayiselakuphinda ibe lomusa yini? 
Psalms77:8 Uthandolomusa lwayo seluphelile kokuphela yini? Isithembiso sesiphelile kusukela kusizukulwana kusiya kusizukulwana na? 
Psalms77:9 UNkulunkulu usekhohliwe ukuba lomusa yini? Usevalele isihawu sakhe ngolaka yini? Selah. 
Psalms77:10 Ngasengisithi: Lobu yibuthakathaka bami: Isandla sokunene soPhezukonke siphendukile. 
Psalms77:11 Ngizakhumbula izenzo ze Nkosi. Isibili, ngizakhumbula izimangaliso zakho ezindala." 
Psalms77:12 Ngizazindla ngomsebenzi wakho wonke, ngikhulume ngezenzo zakho." 
Psalms77:13 Nkulunkulu, indlela yakho isendaweni engcwele. Ngubani unkulunkulu omkhulu njengoNkulunkulu?" 
Psalms77:14 Wena unguNkulunkulu owenza isimangaliso; wazisa amandla akho phakathi kwezizwe. 
Psalms77:15 Ngengalo yakho uhlengile abantu bakho, amadodana kaJakobe loJosefa. Selah." 
Psalms77:16 Amanzi akubona, Nkulunkulu, amanzi akubona, ethuka; izinziki lazo zathuthumela." 
Psalms77:17 Amayezi athulula amanzi, lezibhakabhaka zaduma; imitshoko yakho layo yaya le lale." 
Psalms77:18 Ilizwi lokuduma kwakho lalisesibhakabhakeni; imibane yakhanyisa umhlaba; lomhlaba wagedezela wazamazama. 
Psalms77:19 Indlela yakho iselwandle, lomkhondo wakho emanzini amanengi, lezinyathelo zakho zazingaziwa." 
Psalms77:20 Wakhokhela abantu bakho njengomhlambi ngesandla sikaMozisi loAroni. 
Psalms78:1 Lalelani, bantu bami, umthetho wami, libeke indlebe yenu emazwini omlomo wami." 
Psalms78:2 Ngizavula umlomo wami ngomfanekiso, ngikhuphe izimfihlakalo zendulo," 
Psalms78:3 esizizwileyo lesizaziyo, obaba abasitshela zona." 
Psalms78:4 Kasiyiku zi fihlela abantwana babo, kusizukulwana esilandelayo, silandisa izindumiso ze Nkosi, lamandla ayo, lezimangaliso ezenzileyo." 
Psalms78:5 Ngoba wamisa ubufakazi koJakobe, wabeka umlayo koIsrayeli, awulaya obaba, ukuze bawazise abantwana babo," 
Psalms78:6 ukuze isizukulwana esilandelayo sazi, abantwana a bazazalwa, basukume batshele abantwana babo," 
Psalms78:7 ukuze babeke ithemba labo kuNkulunkulu, bangayikhohlwa imisebenzi kaNkulunkulu, kodwa bagcine imithetho yakhe;" 
Psalms78:8 njalo bangabi njengaboyise, isizukulwana esilenkani lesivukelayo, isizukulwana esingaqondisanga inhliziyo yaso, lesimoya waso ungathembekanga kuNkulunkulu." 
Psalms78:9 Abantwana bakoEfrayimi, behlomile betshoka ngamadandili, babuyela emuva mhla wempi." 
Psalms78:10 Kabasilondolozanga isivumelwano sikaNkulunkulu, bala ukuhamba emlayweni wakhe." 
Psalms78:11 Bakhohlwa izenzo zakhe lezimangaliso zakhe ayebatshengisa zona. 
Psalms78:12 Phambi kwaboyise wenza isimangaliso elizweni leGibhithe, e gange ni leZowani." 
Psalms78:13 Waqhekeza ulwandle, wabachaphisa, wenza amanzi ema njengenqumbi." 
Psalms78:14 Wabakhokhela ngeyezi emini, lebusuku bonke ngokukhanya komlilo." 
Psalms78:15 Waqhekeza amadwala enkangala, wa ba nathisa kungathi kuvela e zinziki ni ezinkulu." 
Psalms78:16 Waseveza izifula edwaleni, wenza amanzi ehla njengemifula." 
Psalms78:17 Kodwa baphinda futhi ukona kuye, ngokumvukela oPhezukonke enkangala." 
Psalms78:18 Bamlinga uNkulunkulu enhliziyweni yabo ngokucela ukudla kwenkanuko yabo. 
Psalms78:19 Basebekhuluma bemelene loNkulunkulu bathi: UNkulunkulu angalungisa itafula enkangala yini? 
Psalms78:20 Khangela, watshaya idwala, kwampompoza amanzi, lezifula zagabha; anganika lesinkwa yini? angalungisela abantu bakhe inyama na?" 
Psalms78:21 Ngakho i Nkosi yezwa yathukuthela; umlilo wasubaselwa uJakobe, njalo lolaka lwavukela uIsrayeli," 
Psalms78:22 ngoba kabakholwanga kuNkulunkulu, kabathembanga esindisweni lwakhe." 
Psalms78:23 Lanxa walaya amayezi ngaphezulu, wavula iminyango yamazulu," 
Psalms78:24 wabanisela imana ukuthi badle, wabapha amabele amazulu." 
Psalms78:25 Umuntu wadla isinkwa sabalamandla; wabathumela ukudla ukuze basuthe. 
Psalms78:26 Wenza umoya wempumalanga wavunguza emazulwini; langamandla akhe waqhuba umoya weningizimu. 
Psalms78:27 Wasenisela phezu kwabo inyama njengothuli, lenyoni ezilempiko njengetshebetshebe lolwandle;" 
Psalms78:28 wazenza zawela phakathi kwenkamba yabo, zagombolozela indawo zabo zokuhlala." 
Psalms78:29 Ngakho badla basutha kakhulu, ngoba wabalethela isiloyiso sabo." 
Psalms78:30 Kabehlukananga lenkanuko yabo; ukudla kusesemlonyeni wabo," 
Psalms78:31 ulaka lukaNkulunkulu lwaselubavukela, wabulala kwabakhulupheleyo babo, watshaya abakhethiweyo bakoIsrayeli." 
Psalms78:32 Kulokhu konke bajinga besona, njalo kabakholwanga ngenxa yezimangaliso zakhe." 
Psalms78:33 Ngakho waziqeda izinsuku zabo ngeze, leminyaka yabo ovalweni." 
Psalms78:34 Lapho ebabulala, bamdinga, baphenduka, bamdingisisa uNkulunkulu." 
Psalms78:35 Bakhumbula ukuthi uNkulunkulu ulidwala labo, loNkulunkulu oPhezukonke ungumhlengi wabo." 
Psalms78:36 Kodwa bamyenga ngomlomo wabo, baqamba amanga kuye ngolimi lwabo." 
Psalms78:37 Ngoba inhliziyo yabo yayingaqondanga kuye, njalo bengathembekanga esivumelwaneni sakhe." 
Psalms78:38 Kodwa yena elesihawu wathethelela ububi babo, ka ba bhubhisanga; yebo, kanengi walunqanda ulaka lwakhe, kakuvusanga konke ukuthukuthela kwakhe." 
Psalms78:39 Ngoba wakhumbula ukuthi bayinyama, umoya odlulayo, ongabuyiyo." 
Psalms78:40 Kanengi kangakanani bemvukela ehlane, bemdabukisa enkangala." 
Psalms78:41 Yebo baphenduka bamlinga uNkulunkulu, bamqumela oNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Psalms78:42 Kabasikhumbulanga isandla sakhe, usuku abahlenga ngalo esitheni." 
Psalms78:43 Ukuthi wamisa njani izibonakaliso zakhe eGibhithe, lezimangaliso zakhe emmangweni weZowani," 
Psalms78:44 lokuthi waphendula imifula yabo yaba ligazi, lezifula zabo, ukuze banganathi." 
Psalms78:45 Wathumela phakathi kwabo umtshitshi wezibawu, ezabadlayo, lamaxoxo ababhubhisayo." 
Psalms78:46 Wasenika imihogoyi isivuno sabo, lomsebenzi wabo isikhonyane." 
Psalms78:47 Wabulala ivini labo ngesiqhotho, lemikhiwa yabo yesikhamore ngongqwaqwane." 
Psalms78:48 Wasenikela izifuyo zabo esiqhothweni, lemihlambi yabo kuyo imibane." 
Psalms78:49 Waphosela phezu kwabo ukuvutha kolaka lwakhe, ukuthukuthela, lokucunuka, lokuhlupheka, ngo kuthuma izithunywa zobubi." 
Psalms78:50 Walungisela ulaka lwakhe indlela, kanqandanga umphefumulo wabo ekufeni, kodwa wanikela impilo yabo kumatshayabhuqe wesifo." 
Psalms78:51 Wasetshaya wonke amazibulo eGibhithe, okokuqala kwamandla emathenteni kaHamu." 
Psalms78:52 Wasebakhupha abantu bakhe njengezimvu, wabakhokhela enkangala njengomhlambi." 
Psalms78:53 Wasebakhokhela bephephile ukuze bangesabi; kodwa ulwandle lwasibekela izitha zabo. 
Psalms78:54 Wasebafikisa emkhawulweni wendawo yakhe engcwele, le intaba, isandla sakhe sokunene e sayizuzayo." 
Psalms78:55 Wasebaxotsha abezizwe phambi kwabo; wababela ilifa ngomzila, wahlalisa izizwe zakoIsrayeli emathenteni azo." 
Psalms78:56 Kanti bamlinga, bamvukela uNkulunkulu oPhezukonke, kabazigcinanga izifakazelo zakhe." 
Psalms78:57 Kodwa babuyela emuva, benza ngokungathembeki njengaboyise, baphanjulwa njengedandili elikhohlisayo." 
Psalms78:58 Ngoba bamthukuthelisa ngezindawo zabo eziphakemeyo, bavusa umona wakhe ngezithombe zabo ezibaziweyo." 
Psalms78:59 UNkulunkulu esizwa wathukuthela, wamenyanya kakhulu uIsrayeli." 
Psalms78:60 Ngakho walitshiya ithabhanekele leShilo, ithente alimisa phakathi kwabantu." 
Psalms78:61 Wasenikela amandla akhe ekuthunjweni, lenkazimulo yakhe esandleni sesitha." 
Psalms78:62 Wasenikela abantu bakhe enkembeni, waselithukuthelela ilifa lakhe." 
Psalms78:63 Umlilo waqeda amajaha abo, lezintombi zabo kazihlatshelelwanga." 
Psalms78:64 Abapristi babo bawa ngenkemba, labafelokazi babo kabalilanga." 
Psalms78:65 Khona iNkosi yavuka njengobelele, njengeqhawe eliklabalala ngenxa yewayini." 
Psalms78:66 Yazitshaya izitha zayo emuva, yazithela ihlazo phakade." 
Psalms78:67 Yasilahla ithente likaJosefa, kayikhethanga isizwe sakoEfrayimi." 
Psalms78:68 Kodwa yakhetha isizwe sakoJuda, intaba yeZiyoni eyithandayo." 
Psalms78:69 Yayakha indlu yayo engcwele njengezingqonga, njengomhlaba ewusekeleyo kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms78:70 Yasikhetha uDavida inceku yayo, yamthatha ezibayeni zezimvu;" 
Psalms78:71 ekulandeleni izimvukazi ezenyisayo, yamletha ukwelusa uJakobe abantu bayo, loIsrayeli ilifa layo." 
Psalms78:72 Njalo wabelusa njengobuqotho benhliziyo yakhe, wabakhokhela ngobugabazi bezandla zakhe." 
Psalms79:1 Nkulunkulu, abezizwe sebengenile elifeni lakho; balingcolisile ithempeli lakho elingcwele; iJerusalema bayenze yaba zinqumbi." 
Psalms79:2 Banikile izidumbu zezinceku zakho zaba yikudla kwenyoni zamazulu, inyama yabangcwele bakho kuzo izilo zomhlaba." 
Psalms79:3 Balichithile igazi labo njengamanzi inhlangothi zonke zeJerusalema; njalo kakubanga khona ongcwabayo. 
Psalms79:4 Sesibe yinhlamba kubomakhelwane bethu, inhlekisa loklolodelo kwabasiphahlileyo." 
Psalms79:5 Koze kube nini, Nkosi? Uzathukuthela phakade yini? Ubukhwele bakho buzavutha njengomlilo yini?" 
Psalms79:6 Thulula ulaka lwakho phezu kwabezizwe abangakwaziyo, laphezu kwemibuso engabizi ibizo lakho." 
Psalms79:7 Ngoba bamdlile uJakobe, lomuzi wakhe sebewenze unxiwa." 
Psalms79:8 Ungakhumbuli umelene lathi izono zethu zendulo; isihawu sakho kasize masinyane phambi kwethu, ngoba sehliselwe phansi kakhulu." 
Psalms79:9 Sisize, Nkulunkulu wosindiso lwethu, ngenxa yodumo lwebizo lakho; sikhulule, uhlawulele izono zethu, ngenxa yebizo lakho." 
Psalms79:10 Kungani abezizwe bezakuthi: Ungaphi uNkulunkulu wabo? Kawaziwe phakathi kwezizwe phambi kwamehlo ethu, impindiselo yegazi lenceku zakho elachithwayo." 
Psalms79:11 Ukububula kwezibotshwa kakuze phambi kwakho; njengobukhulu bengalo yakho ulondoloze abantwana bokufa. 
Psalms79:12 Uphindisele omakhelwane bethu kasikhombisa esifubeni sabo ukuthuka kwabo, abakuthuka ngakho, Nkosi." 
Psalms79:13 Khona thina abantu bakho, izimvu zedlelo lakho, sizakubonga kuze kube nininini, silandise udumo lwakho esizukulwaneni ngesizukulwana." 
Psalms80:1 Melusi kaIsrayeli, beka indlebe, okhokhela uJosefa njengomhlambi, ohlezi phakathi kwamakherubi*, khanyisa." 
Psalms80:2 Phambi kukaEfrayimi loBhenjamini loManase vusa amandla akho, uze ube lusindiso lwethu." 
Psalms80:3 Siphendule, Nkulunkulu, wenze ubuso bakho bukhanye, ngakho sizasindiswa." 
Psalms80:4 Nkosi Nkulunkulu wamabandla, koze kube nini uthukuthelela umkhuleko wabantu bakho?" 
Psalms80:5 Ubenze badla isinkwa sezinyembezi, wabanathisa izinyembezi ngesilinganiso esikhulu." 
Psalms80:6 Usenza sibe yingxabano kubomakhelwane bethu, lezitha zethu ziyahlekisana ngathi." 
Psalms80:7 Siphendule, Nkulunkulu wamabandla, wenze ubuso bakho bukhanye, ngakho sizasindiswa." 
Psalms80:8 Waliletha ivini livela eGibhithe, wazixotsha izizwe, walihlanyela lona." 
Psalms80:9 Walungisa indawo phambi kwalo, wagxilisa impande zalo, laze lagcwala umhlaba." 
Psalms80:10 Izintaba zembeswa ngomthunzi walo, lezingatsha zalo zi njenge misedari kaNkulunkulu." 
Psalms80:11 Lanabisela ingatsha zalo elwandle, lamahlumela alo emfuleni." 
Psalms80:12 Uyibhobozeleni imiduli yalo, ukuze balikhe bonke abadlula ngendlela?" 
Psalms80:13 Ingulube yasehlathini iyalihlikiza, lenyamazana yeganga iyalidla." 
Psalms80:14 Nkulunkulu wamabandla, akubuyele, ukhangele phansi usemazulwini, ubone, wethekelele lelivini," 
Psalms80:15 ngitsho ivini isandla sakho sokunene esalihlanyelayo, logatsha o waziqinisela lona." 
Psalms80:16 Lutshisiwe ngomlilo, lwaqunyelwa phansi; bayabhubha ngokukhuza kobuso bakho." 
Psalms80:17 Isandla sakho kasibe phezu komuntu wesandla sakho sokunene, phezu kwendodana yomuntu, o ziqinisele yona." 
Psalms80:18 Ngakho kasiyikubuyela emuva sisuke kuwe; sivuselele, khona sizabiza ibizo lakho." 
Psalms80:19 Nkosi, Nkulunkulu wamabandla, siphendule, wenze ubuso bakho bukhanye, ngakho sizasindiswa." 
Psalms81:1 Hlabelani kakhulu kuNkulunkulu amandla ethu, lihlokome ngentokozo kuNkulunkulu kaJakobe." 
Psalms81:2 Thathani ingoma, lilethe isigujana, ichacho elimnandi kanye logubhu lwezintambo." 
Psalms81:3 Vuthelani uphondo ekuthwaseni kwenyanga, esikhathini esimisiweyo, ngosuku lomkhosi wethu." 
Psalms81:4 Ngoba lokho kuyisimiso kuIsrayeli, umthetho kaNkulunkulu kaJakobe." 
Psalms81:5 Wakumisa kwaba yibufakazi kuJosefa, ekuphumeni kwakhe emelene lelizwe leGibhithe; ngezwa ulimi engingalwaziyo." 
Psalms81:6 Ngasusa ihlombe lakhe emthwalweni; izandla zakhe zakhululwa ezimbizeni. 
Psalms81:7 Wakhala usenhluphekweni, ngakukhulula; ngakuphendula ekusithekeni komdumo; ngakuhlola emanzini eMeriba. Selah." 
Psalms81:8 Zwana, sizwe sami, ngizafakaza kuwe, Israyeli, aluba ungangilalela." 
Psalms81:9 Kakungabi khona phakathi kwakho unkulunkulu wezizweni, njalo ungakhonzi unkulunkulu wezizweni." 
Psalms81:10 Mina ngiyi Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, owakwenyusa usuka elizweni leGibhithe. Khamisa umlomo wakho ube banzi, njalo ngizawugcwalisa." 
Psalms81:11 Kodwa abantu bami kabalilalelanga ilizwi lami; loIsrayeli kavumelananga lami. 
Psalms81:12 Ngakho ngabanikela enkanini yenhliziyo yabo, ukuze bahambe kumacebo abo." 
Psalms81:13 Kungathi abantu bami bengangilalela, uIsrayeli ahambe endleleni zami!" 
Psalms81:14 Masinyane bengingazehlisela phansi izitha zabo, ngiphendulele isandla sami kwabamelene labo." 
Psalms81:15 Abayizondayo i Nkosi bangatshotshobala phambi kwayo ngokuzenzisa, kodwa isikhathi sabo besizakuba phakade." 
Psalms81:16 Wayezabondla ngamanono engqoloyi; njalo bengizakusuthisa ngoluju oluvela edwaleni. 
Psalms82:1 UNkulunkulu uyema enhlanganweni yabomahluleli, uyahlulela phakathi kwabonkulunkulu." 
Psalms82:2 Koze kube nini lisahlulela ngokungalunganga, lisemukela ubuso bababi? Selah." 
Psalms82:3 Yahlulelani umyanga lentandane, lilungisele ohluphekayo loswelayo." 
Psalms82:4 Khululani umyanga loswelayo, li b ophule esandleni sababi." 
Psalms82:5 Kabazi kabaqedisisi, baya le lale emnyameni; izisekelo zonke zomhlaba ziyazamazama." 
Psalms82:6 Mina ngathi: Lingonkulunkulu, lonke lingamadodana oPhezukonke." 
Psalms82:7 Kodwa lizakufa njengabantu, liwe njengesinye seziphathamandla." 
Psalms82:8 Vuka, Nkulunkulu! wahlulele umhlaba; ngoba wena izizwe zonke ziyilifa lakho." 
Psalms83:1 Nkulunkulu, ungazithuleli; ungathuli, ungathi zwi, Nkulunkulu." 
Psalms83:2 Ngoba, khangela, izitha zakho ziyaxokozela, labakuzondayo baphakamise ikhanda." 
Psalms83:3 Benzela abantu bakho iseluleko sobuqili, bacebisana bemelene labafihliweyo bakho." 
Psalms83:4 Bathi: Wozani, sibaqume, bangabi yisizwe, lebizo likaIsrayeli lingabe lisakhunjulwa." 
Psalms83:5 Ngoba bacebisana nganhliziyonye, benza isivumelwano esimelana lawe;" 
Psalms83:6 amathente eEdoma, lamaIshmayeli; iMowabi, lamaHagari;" 
Psalms83:7 iGebali, leAmoni, leAmaleki; amaFilisti kanye labakhileyo beTire;" 
Psalms83:8 iAshuri layo isizihlanganise labo; bebeyingalo ebantwaneni bakaLothi. Selah. 
Psalms83:9 Yenza kubo njengeMidiyani, njengoSisera, njengoJabini, esifuleni iKishoni." 
Psalms83:10 Babhubhela eEndori, baba ngumquba womhlabathi." 
Psalms83:11 Yenza zona izikhulu zabo zibe njengoOrebi lanjengoZebi, lawo wonke amakhosana abo abe njengoZeba lanjengoZalimuna," 
Psalms83:12 abathi: Kasizithathele amadlelo kaNkulunkulu abe ngawethu. 
Psalms83:13 Nkulunkulu wami, benze babe njengokuhwithwayo, njengamakhoba phambi komoya," 
Psalms83:14 njengomlilo utshisa ihlathi, lanjengelangabi lithungela izintaba." 
Psalms83:15 Ngokunjalo baxotshe ngesivunguzane sakho, ubethuse ngesiphepho sakho." 
Psalms83:16 Gcwalisa ubuso babo ngehlazo, ukuze balidinge ibizo lakho, Nkosi." 
Psalms83:17 Kababe lenhloni bethuke kuze kube nininini, yebo, badunyazwe babhubhe." 
Psalms83:18 Ukuze bazi ukuthi nguwe wedwa, obizo lakho nguJehova, oPhezukonke emhlabeni wonke." 
Psalms84:1 Athandeka kangakanani amathente akho, Nkosi yamabandla!" 
Psalms84:2 Umphefumulo wami uyalangatha, yebo ngitsho, uyaphela yikunxwanela amaguma e Nkosi. Inhliziyo yami lenyama yami kuyakhala kuNkulunkulu ophilayo." 
Psalms84:3 Intaka layo iyathola indlu, lenkonjane isidleke sayo, lapho engabeka khona abantwana bayo, amalathi akho, Nkosi yamabandla, Nkosi yami, loNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms84:4 Babusisiwe abahlala endlini yakho, bazahlala bedumisa wena. Selah." 
Psalms84:5 Ubusisiwe umuntu omandla akhe akuwe, okukhona imigwaqo emikhulu enhliziyweni yabo." 
Psalms84:6 Abadabula isihotsha seBaka basenza sibe ngumthombo; lezulu liyagcwalisa amachibi. 
Psalms84:7 Bahamba besuka emandleni besiya emandleni, ngulowo lalowo abonakale phambi kukaNkulunkulu eZiyoni." 
Psalms84:8 Nkosi Nkulunkulu wamabandla, zwana umkhuleko wami, ubeke indlebe, Nkulunkulu kaJakobe. Selah." 
Psalms84:9 Nkulunkulu, sihlangu sethu, khangela ubone ubuso bogcotshiweyo wakho." 
Psalms84:10 Ngoba usuku emagumeni akho lungcono kulenkulungwane. Ngikhetha ukuba sembundwini womnyango endlini kaNkulunkulu wami kulokuhlala emathenteni enkohlakalo. 
Psalms84:11 Ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu ililanga lesihlangu; i Nkosi izakupha umusa lodumo; kayibagodleli okuhle abahamba ngobuqotho. 
Psalms84:12 Nkosi yamabandla, ubusisiwe umuntu othemba kuwe." 
Psalms85:1 Nkosi, ubulomusa elizweni lakho. Ubuyisile ukuthunjwa kukaJakobe." 
Psalms85:2 Wathethelela ububi babantu bakho, wasibekela zonke izono zabo. Selah." 
Psalms85:3 Ukususile konke ukuthukuthela kwakho, waphenduka ekuvutheni kolaka lwakho." 
Psalms85:4 Siphendule, Nkulunkulu wosindiso lwethu, wenze ulaka lwakho kithi luphele." 
Psalms85:5 Uzasithukuthelela kokuphela yini? Uzakwelulela ulaka lwakho esizukulwaneni lesizukulwana yini? 
Psalms85:6 Kawuyikubuya usivuselele yini, ukuze abantu bakho bathokoze kuwe?" 
Psalms85:7 Sitshengise umusa wakho, Nkosi, usinike usindiso lwakho." 
Psalms85:8 Ngizakuzwa lokho uNkulunkulu i Nkosi azakukhuluma, ngoba uzakhuluma ukuthula ebantwini bakhe, lakwabangcwele bakhe, kodwa kabangabuyeli ebuwuleni." 
Psalms85:9 Isibili usindiso lwakhe luseduze kulabo abamesabayo ukuze kuhlale udumo elizweni lakithi. 
Psalms85:10 Umusa leqiniso kuyahlangabezana, ukulunga lokuthula kwang en e." 
Psalms85:11 Iqiniso lizaphuma emhlabeni, lokulunga kuzakhangela phansi kusemazulwini." 
Psalms85:12 Yebo, i Nkosi izanika okuhle, lelizwe lethu lizathela isivuno salo." 
Psalms85:13 Ukulunga kuzahamba phambi kwayo, iza si misa endleleni yezinyathelo zayo." 
Psalms86:1 Beka indlebe yakho, Nkosi, ungiphendule, ngoba ngingumyanga, ngiyaswela." 
Psalms86:2 Londoloza umphefumulo wami, ngoba ngiyamesaba uNkulunkulu; wena Nkulunkulu wami, sindisa inceku yakho ekuthembayo." 
Psalms86:3 Woba lesihawu kimi, Nkosi, ngoba ngikhala kuwe usuku lonke." 
Psalms86:4 Thokozisa umphefumulo wenceku yakho, ngoba kuwe, Nkosi, ngiyawuphakamisela umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms86:5 Ngoba wena, Nkosi, ulungile, ungothethelelayo; umkhulu emuseni kubo bonke abakubizayo." 
Psalms86:6 Beka indlebe, Nkosi, emkhulekweni wami; ulalele ilizwi lokuncenga kwami." 
Psalms86:7 Ngosuku lokuhlupheka kwami ngizakhala kuwe, ngoba uzangiphendula." 
Psalms86:8 Kakho ofanana lawe phakathi kwabonkulunkulu, Nkosi, njalo enjengemisebenzi yakho kayikho." 
Psalms86:9 Izizwe zonke ozenzileyo zizakuza zikhothame phambi kwakho, Nkosi, zidumise ibizo lakho." 
Psalms86:10 Ngoba wena umkhulu, wenza izinto ezimangalisayo, unguNkulunkulu wena wedwa." 
Psalms86:11 Ngifundisa indlela yakho, Nkosi, ngizahamba eqinisweni lakho; hlanganisa inhliziyo yami ukuze yesabe ibizo lakho." 
Psalms86:12 Ngizakudumisa, Nkosi Nkulunkulu wami, ngenhliziyo yami yonke; ngilidumise ibizo lakho kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms86:13 Ngoba umusa wakho phezu kwami mkhulu; njalo wakhulula umphefumulo wami esihogweni esingaphansi kakhulu. 
Psalms86:14 Nkulunkulu, abazigqajayo bangivukele, lemibuthano yabalobudlwangudlwangu idinga umphefumulo wami; njalo kabakubekanga phambi kwabo." 
Psalms86:15 Kodwa wena, Nkosi, unguNkulunkulu olozwelo, lolesisa, ophuza ukuthukuthela, lomkhulu emuseni leqinisweni." 
Psalms86:16 Phendukela kimi, ungihawukele; uyiphe inceku yakho amandla akho, usindise indodana yencekukazi yakho." 
Psalms86:17 Ngenzela isiboniso sokuhle, ukuze labo abangizondayo babone bayangeke, ngoba wena, Nkosi, ungisizile wangiduduza." 
Psalms87:1 Isisekelo sayo siphezu kwentaba ezingcwele. 
Psalms87:2 I Nkosi iyawathanda amasango eZiyoni kulazo zonke indawo zokuhlala zikaJakobe. 
Psalms87:3 Izinto ezidumileyo zikhulunywa ngawe, muzi kaNkulunkulu! Selah." 
Psalms87:4 Ngizaqamba iRahabi leBhabhiloni kwabangaziyo; khangela, iFilisti leTire kanye leEtiyopiya; lo wazalelwa khona." 
Psalms87:5 LangeZiyoni kuzakuthiwa: Lo lalowayana bazalelwa kuyo. LoPhezukonke uqobo uzayiqinisa. 
Psalms87:6 I Nkosi izabala ekubhaleni kwayo abantu, ukuthi lo wazalelwa khona. Selah." 
Psalms87:7 Labahlabelayo kanye labatshayi bamachacho, yonke imithombo yami ikuwe." 
Psalms88:1 Nkosi Nkulunkulu wosindiso lwami, emini, ebusuku ngakhala phambi kwakho." 
Psalms88:2 Umkhuleko wami kawuze phambi kwakho; beka indlebe yakho ekukhaleni kwami. 
Psalms88:3 Ngoba umphefumulo wami ugcwele ukuhlupheka, lempilo yami ifinyelela engcwabeni." 
Psalms88:4 Ngibalwa lalabo abehlela emgodini; nginjengomuntu ongelamandla. 
Psalms88:5 Ngikhululwe phakathi kwabafileyo, nginjengababuleweyo abalele engcwabeni, ongasabakhumbuliyo; ngoba bequnyiwe basuswa esandleni sakho." 
Psalms88:6 Ungifakile emgodini ongaphansi kakhulu, emnyameni, ekujuleni." 
Psalms88:7 Intukuthelo yakho iyangeleka, la ngawo wonke amagagasi akho ungihluphile. Selah." 
Psalms88:8 Ususele khatshana lami abejwayelene lami; wangenza ngibe yisinengiso kubo; ngi valelwe, ngingephume." 
Psalms88:9 Ilihlo lami liyaphela ngenxa yosizi. Ngikubizile lonke usuku, Nkosi, ngelulele izandla zami kuwe." 
Psalms88:10 Abafileyo uyabenzela isimangaliso yini? Abafileyo bazavuka yini bakudumise? Selah. 
Psalms88:11 Uthando lwakho luzalandiswa yini engcwabeni? Ukuthembeka kwakho encithakalweni yini? 
Psalms88:12 Isimangaliso sakho sizakwaziwa yini emnyameni? Lokulunga kwakho elizweni lokukhohlwa yini? 
Psalms88:13 Kodwa mina, Nkosi, ngikhalile kuwe, lekuseni umkhuleko wami uzakuza phambi kwakho." 
Psalms88:14 Nkosi, ulahlelani umphefumulo wami? Ubufihlela ni ubuso bakho kimi?" 
Psalms88:15 Ngihluphekile ngingofayo kusukela ebutsheni, ngithwele ukwesabeka kwakho, ngikhathazekile." 
Psalms88:16 Ulaka lwakho olutshisayo ludlulile phezu kwami, okwesabekayo kwakho kungiqedile." 
Psalms88:17 Kungizingelezile njengamanzi usuku lonke, kungihanqile kanyekanye." 
Psalms88:18 Ususele khatshana lami othandayo lomngane, abejwayelene lami bas e mnyam eni." 
Psalms89:1 Ngizahlabela ngezisa zakho, Nkosi, kuze kube nininini; ngomlomo wami ngizakwazisa ukuthembeka kwakho kusizukulwana lesizukulwana." 
Psalms89:2 Ngoba ngithe: Umusa uzakwakhiwa kuze kube phakade; emazulwini ngokwawo uzaqinisa uthembeko lwakho. 
Psalms89:3 Ngenze isivumelwano lomkhethwa wami, ngifungile kuDavida inceku yami." 
Psalms89:4 Ngizaqinisa inzalo yakho kuze kube nininini, ngakhe isihlalo sakho sobukhosi esizukulwaneni lesizukulwana. Selah." 
Psalms89:5 Lamazulu azadumisa izimangaliso zakho, Nkosi, lalo uthembeko lwakho ebandleni labangcwele." 
Psalms89:6 Ngoba ngubani ezulwini ongafananiswa le Nkosi? Ngubani ofanana le Nkosi phakathi kwamadodana abalamandla? 
Psalms89:7 UNkulunkulu uyesabeka kakhulu emhlanganweni wabangcwele, njalo umele ukuhlonitshwa phezu kwabo bonke abamhanqileyo." 
Psalms89:8 Nkosi Nkulunkulu wamabandla, ngubani olamandla njengawe, Nkosi? Lothembeko lwakho lukuhanqile." 
Psalms89:9 Wena uyabusa ukukhukhumala kolwandle; lapho amagagasi alo ephakama wena uyawathulisa. 
Psalms89:10 Wena wamchoboza uRahabi njengobuleweyo, wazihlakaza izitha zakho ngengalo yamandla akho." 
Psalms89:11 Amazulu ngawakho, lomhlaba ngowakho; ilizwe lokugcwala kwalo, wena wakusekela." 
Psalms89:12 Inyakatho leningizimu wakudala wena; iThabhori leHermoni kuzajabula ngebizo lakho. 
Psalms89:13 Ulengalo elamandla, isandla sakho siqinile, isandla sakho sokunene siphakeme." 
Psalms89:14 Ukulunga lesahlulelo kuyisisekelo sesihlalo sakho sobukhosi: umusa leqiniso kuhamba phambi kobuso bakho. 
Psalms89:15 Babusisiwe abantu abawaziyo umsindo wentokozo; bazahamba ekukhanyeni kobuso bakho, Nkosi." 
Psalms89:16 Ebizweni lakho bazathokoza usuku lonke, langokulunga kwakho bazaphakanyiswa." 
Psalms89:17 Ngoba wena uludumo lwamandla abo; langomusa wakho uphondo lwethu luzaphakanyiswa. 
Psalms89:18 Ngoba isihlangu sethu singese Nkosi, lenkosi yethu ingeyoNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Psalms89:19 Khona wakhuluma ngombono kongcwele wakho, wathi: Ngibekile usizo phezu kweqhawe, ngimphakamisile okhethiweyo phakathi kwabantu." 
Psalms89:20 Ngithole uDavida inceku yami, ngamafutha ami angcwele ngimgcobile," 
Psalms89:21 osandla sami sizakuba laye siqinile, ingalo yami layo izamqinisa." 
Psalms89:22 Isitha kasiyikumcindezela, lendodana yenkohlakalo kayiyikumhlupha." 
Psalms89:23 Ngizazichoboza izitha zakhe phambi kobuso bakhe, ngihluphe abamzondayo." 
Psalms89:24 Kodwa uthembeko lwami lomusa wami kuzakuba laye, lebizweni lami luzaphakanyiswa uphondo lwakhe." 
Psalms89:25 Njalo ngizabeka isandla sakhe olwandle, lesandla sakhe sokunene emifuleni." 
Psalms89:26 Yena uzangibiza ngokuthi: Wena ungubaba wami, uNkulunkulu wami, ledwala losindiso lwami." 
Psalms89:27 Njalo mina ngizammisa abe lizibulo, aphakame kakhulu kulamakhosi omhlaba." 
Psalms89:28 Ngizaligcinela umusa wami kuze kube nininini, lesivumelwano sami sizaqina kuye." 
Psalms89:29 Njalo ngizamisa inzalo yakhe kuze kube nininini, lesihlalo sakhe sobukhosi njengensuku zamazulu." 
Psalms89:30 Uba abantwana bakhe betshiya umlayo wami, bangahambi ngezahlulelo zami," 
Psalms89:31 uba besephula izimiso zami, bengagcini imithetho yami," 
Psalms89:32 ngizaphindisela iziphambeko zabo ngenduku, lesono sabo ngenswazi." 
Psalms89:33 Kodwa kangiyikulususa du uthandolomusa lwami kuye, ngingakhohlisi ngothembeko lwami." 
Psalms89:34 Kangiyikwephula isivumelwano sami, lalokho okuphuma endebeni zami kangiyikukuguqula." 
Psalms89:35 Ngafunga kwaba kanye ngobungcwele bami: Kangiyikuqamba amanga kuDavida. 
Psalms89:36 Inzalo yakhe izakuba khona kuze kube nininini, lesihlalo sakhe sobukhosi njengelanga phambi kwami." 
Psalms89:37 Sizaqiniswa njengenyanga kuze kube nininini, lobufakazi emayezini bumi buqinile. Selah." 
Psalms89:38 Kodwa wena usulahlile wala, wamthukuthelela ogcotshiweyo wakho." 
Psalms89:39 Usenze ize isivumelwano senceku yakho; wangcolisa umqhele wakhe emhlabathini. 
Psalms89:40 Uyibhobozile yonke imithangala yakhe, wazenza inqaba zakhe amanxiwa." 
Psalms89:41 Bonke abadlula ngendlela bayamphanga; ulihlazo kubomakhelwane bakhe. 
Psalms89:42 Usiphakamisile isandla sokunene sabamelene laye; wazithokozisa zonke izitha zakhe. 
Psalms89:43 Futhi ubuyisele emuva ubukhali benkemba yakhe; kawumenzanga ame empini. 
Psalms89:44 Uyiqedile inkazimulo yakhe, lesihlalo sakhe sobukhosi wasiphosela emhlabathini." 
Psalms89:45 Ufinyezile insuku zobutsha bakhe, wamembesa ihlazo. Selah." 
Psalms89:46 Koze kube nini, Nkosi, ucatsha? Koze kube phakade ulaka lwakho luvutha njengomlilo yini?" 
Psalms89:47 Khumbula ukuthi isikhathi sempilo yami singakanani; kungani wadalela ize bonke abantwana babantu? 
Psalms89:48 Ngubani umuntu ophilayo ongaboni ukufa? Akhulule umphefumulo wakhe esandleni sengcwaba na? Selah. 
Psalms89:49 Zingaphi izisa zakho zakuqala, Nkosi, o walufunga kuDavida ngothembeko lwakho?" 
Psalms89:50 Khumbula, Nkosi, ihlazo lezinceku zakho, engi li thwele esifubeni sami, elazo zonke izizwe ezinengi," 
Psalms89:51 izitha zakho ezithuke ngalo, Nkosi, ezithuke ngalo izinyathelo zogcotshiweyo wakho." 
Psalms89:52 Kayibusiswe i Nkosi kuze kube nininini. Ameni, loAmeni." 
Psalms90:1 Nkosi, wena ubuyindawo yethu yokuhlala kusizukulwana lesizukulwana." 
Psalms90:2 Zingakazalwa intaba, kumbe uveze umhlaba lelizwe, ngitsho kusukela ephakadeni kuze kube sephakadeni wena unguNkulunkulu." 
Psalms90:3 Uyambuyisela umuntu encithakalweni, uthi: Buyelani, bantwana babantu." 
Psalms90:4 Ngoba iminyaka eyinkulungwane emehlweni akho injengelanga lezolo selidlulile, la nje ngomlindo ebusuku." 
Psalms90:5 Uyabakhukhula, ba nje ngobuthongo, ekuseni banjengotshani obukhulayo." 
Psalms90:6 Ekuseni buyakhahlela, bukhule, ntambama buyasikwa, bubune." 
Psalms90:7 Ngoba siyaqedwa yikuthukuthela kwakho, langolaka lwakho sibhujiswe." 
Psalms90:8 Ubekile iziphambeko zethu phambi kwakho, izono zethu ezifihlakeleyo ekukhanyeni kobuso bakho." 
Psalms90:9 Ngoba insuku zethu zonke ziyedlula elakeni lwakho; sichitha iminyaka yethu njengenganekwane. 
Psalms90:10 Insuku zeminyaka yethu, kuleminyaka engamatshumi ayisikhombisa kuzo; njalo uba ngenxa yamandla zingamatshumi ayisificaminwembili, kanti amandla ayo angumzamo losizi, ngoba aphangisa aqunywe, sibe sesiphapha sinyamalale." 
Psalms90:11 Ngubani owaziyo amandla okuthukuthela kwakho? Lanjengokwesabeka kwakho lunjalo ulaka lwakho. 
Psalms90:12 Ngokunjalo si fundise ukubala insuku zethu, ukuze sizuze inhliziyo yenhlakanipho." 
Psalms90:13 Phenduka, Nkosi! Koze kube nini? Uzisole mayelana lenceku zakho." 
Psalms90:14 Sisuthise ekuseni ngomusa wakho, ukuze sithabe sijabule insuku zethu zonke." 
Psalms90:15 Sithokozise njengokwensuku owasihlupha ngazo, iminyaka esabona okubi kuyo." 
Psalms90:16 Umsebenzi wakho kawubonakale ezincekwini zakho, lenkazimulo yakho ebantwaneni bazo." 
Psalms90:17 Ubuhle beNkosi, uNkulunkulu wethu, kabube phezu kwethu; uqinise umsebenzi wezandla zethu kithi, yebo, umsebenzi wezandla zethu uwuqinise." 
Psalms91:1 Ohlezi ekusithekeni koPhezukonke uzahlala emthunzini kaSomandla. 
Psalms91:2 Ngizakuthi e Nkosi ni: Uy isiphephelo sami lenqaba yami, uNkulunkulu wami, engithemba kuye." 
Psalms91:3 Sibili yena uzakukhulula emjibileni womthiyi, kuye umatshayabhuqe wesifo obhubhisayo." 
Psalms91:4 Uzakusibekela ngensiba zakhe, uzathembela langaphansi kwempiko zakhe; iqiniso lakhe liyisihlangu lehawu." 
Psalms91:5 Kawuyikwesaba isesabiso sebusuku, umtshoko ophaphayo emini," 
Psalms91:6 umatshayabhuqe wesifo ohambayo emnyameni, incithakalo ebhubhisayo emini enkulu." 
Psalms91:7 Bazakuwa abayinkulungwane eceleni kwakho, labayizinkulungwane ezilitshumi ngakwesokunene sakho; kuwe kakuyikusondela." 
Psalms91:8 Uzakhangela nje ngamehlo akho, ubone impindiselo kwababi." 
Psalms91:9 Ngoba wena, Nkosi, uyisiphephelo sami; umenzile oPhezukonke waba yindawo yakho yokuhlala." 
Psalms91:10 Kakulabubi obuzakwehlela, lenhlupheko kayiyikusondela ethenteni lakho." 
Psalms91:11 Ngoba uzalaya ingilosi zakhe ngawe, ukuthi zikulondoloze endleleni zakho zonke." 
Psalms91:12 Zizakuphatha ezandleni, hlezi utshayeke ngonyawo lwakho elitsheni." 
Psalms91:13 Uzanyathela isilwane lebululu, uzagxoba ibhongo lesilwane, lomgobho." 
Psalms91:14 Ngoba uyangithanda kakhulu, ngakho ngizamkhulula; ngizambeka phezulu, ngoba uyalazi ibizo lami." 
Psalms91:15 Uzangibiza, njalo ngimphendule; ngibe laye ekuhluphekeni, ngimkhulule, ngimnike udumo." 
Psalms91:16 Ngizamsuthisa ngobude bezinsuku, ngimtshengise usindiso lwami." 
Psalms92:1 Kuhle ukubonga i Nkosi, lokuhlabela indumiso ebizweni lakho, wena oPhezukonke;" 
Psalms92:2 ukutshumayela uthandolomusa lwakho ekuseni, lothembeko lwakho ebusuku bonke," 
Psalms92:3 ngechacho elilentambo ezilitshumi, langogubhu lwezintambo, ngechacho elikhala kamnandi." 
Psalms92:4 Ngoba ungithokozisile, Nkosi, ngomsebenzi wakho; ngizamemeza ngenjabulo ngemisebenzi yezandla zakho." 
Psalms92:5 Mikhulu kangakanani imisebenzi yakho, Nkosi! Izikile kakhulu imicabango yakho." 
Psalms92:6 Isiphukuphuku kasazi, lesithutha kasikuqedisisi lokhu." 
Psalms92:7 Lapho ababi behluma njengotshani, labo bonke abenzi bobubi bekhahlela, kuyi kuze babhujiswe kuze kube phakade." 
Psalms92:8 Kodwa wena, Nkosi, uphakeme kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms92:9 Ngoba khangela, izitha zakho, Nkosi, ngoba khangela, izitha zakho zizabhubha; bonke abenzi bobubi bazachitheka." 
Psalms92:10 Kodwa uzaphakamisa uphondo lwami njengolwenyathi; ngizagcotshwa ngamafutha amatsha. 
Psalms92:11 Lelihlo lami lizabukela izitha zami, indlebe zami zizakuzwa mayelana lababi abangivukelayo." 
Psalms92:12 Olungileyo uzahluma njengesihlahla selala, akhule njengomsedari eLebhanoni." 
Psalms92:13 Abahlanyelwe endlini ye Nkosi, bazahluma emagumeni kaNkulunkulu wethu." 
Psalms92:14 Bazabe belokhu bethela izithelo ebudaleni babo, bakhuluphale babeluhlaza," 
Psalms92:15 ukutshumayela ukuthi i Nkosi i qondile; ilidwala lami, njalo ka ku kho ukungalungi kiyo." 
Psalms93:1 I Nkosi iyabusa; yembethe ubukhosi; i Nkosi yembethe amandla; izibhincisile. Umhlaba lawo uqinisiwe, kawuyikunyikinywa." 
Psalms93:2 Isihlalo sakho sobukhosi samiswa kwasendulo; usukela ephakadeni. 
Psalms93:3 Imifula iphakamisile, Nkosi, imifula iphakamise ukuholoba kwayo, imifula iphakamisile amagagasi ayo agubhazelayo." 
Psalms93:4 I Nkosi ephakemeyo ilamandla kulokuduma kwamanzi amanengi, kul amagagasi olwandle agubhazayo alamandla." 
Psalms93:5 Izifakazelo zakho ziqinisekile kakhulu; ubungcwele buyifanele indlu yakho, Nkosi, kuze kube ebudeni bezinsuku." 
Psalms94:1 Nkosi, Nkulukulu wempindiselo, Nkulunkulu wempindiselo, khanyisa!" 
Psalms94:2 Phakama, Mahluleli womhlaba, uphindisele umvuzo kwabazigqajayo." 
Psalms94:3 Nkosi, koze kube nini ababi, koze kube nini ababi begiya?" 
Psalms94:4 Bepopota, bekhuluma okunzima, bonke abenzi bobubi bezikhukhumeza?" 
Psalms94:5 Nkosi, bayabaphohloza abantu bakho, bayalihlupha ilifa lakho." 
Psalms94:6 Babulala umfelokazi lowezizweni, lentandane bazibulale." 
Psalms94:7 Kanti bathi: I Nkosi kayiboni, loNkulunkulu kaJakobe kananzi." 
Psalms94:8 Qedisisani, lina bobunyamazana phakathi kwabantu; lani ziphukuphuku, lizahlakanipha nini?" 
Psalms94:9 Yena owagxumeka indlebe kezwa yini? Owabumba ilihlo kaboni yini? 
Psalms94:10 Yena olaya izizwe kajezisi yini; yena ofundisa umuntu ulwazi? 
Psalms94:11 I Nkosi iyayazi imicabango yomuntu ukuthi iyize. 
Psalms94:12 Nkosi, ubusisiwe lowomuntu omlayayo, omfundisayo okomlayo wakho," 
Psalms94:13 ukumphumuza ezinsukwini zobubi, kuze kugejelwe omubi umgodi." 
Psalms94:14 Ngoba i Nkosi kayiyikubalahla abantu bayo, kayiyikulitshiya ilifa layo." 
Psalms94:15 Kodwa isahlulelo sizabuyela ekulungeni, labo bonke abaqotho enhliziyweni bazakulandela." 
Psalms94:16 Ngubani ozangisukumela amelane lababi? Ngubani ozangimela kubenzi bobubi? 
Psalms94:17 Uba i Nkosi ibingesilo usizo lwami, umphefumulo wami ubuzaphosa uhlale ekuthuleni zwi." 
Psalms94:18 Lapho ngathi: Unyawo lwami luyatshelela, umusa wakho, Nkosi, wangisekela." 
Psalms94:19 Ebunengini bemicabango yami engaphakathi kwami induduzo zakho zithokozisa umphefumulo wami. 
Psalms94:20 Isihlalo sobukhosi sobubi singahlanganyela lawe, sibumba inkohlakalo ngomthetho yini?" 
Psalms94:21 Bayahlangana ukumelana lomphefumulo wolungileyo, balahla igazi elingelacala." 
Psalms94:22 Kodwa i Nkosi iyinqaba yami, loNkulunkulu wami ulidwala lokuphephela kwami." 
Psalms94:23 Izaphindisela phezu kwabo ububi babo, ibaqede enkohlakalweni yabo; i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu izabaquma." 
Psalms95:1 Wozani, siyihlabelele i Nkosi, senze umsindo wentokozo kulo idwala losindiso lwethu." 
Psalms95:2 Kasize phambi kobuso bayo ngokubonga, senze umsindo wentokozo kuyo ngezihlabelelo." 
Psalms95:3 Ngoba i Nkosi inguNkulunkulu omkhulu, leNkosi enkulu phezu kwabonkulunkulu bonke." 
Psalms95:4 Okusesandleni sayo indawo zomhlaba ezizikileyo, lezingqonga zezintaba zingezayo." 
Psalms95:5 Olungolwayo ulwandle, yona-ke yalwenza, lezandla zayo zabumba umhlabathi owomileyo." 
Psalms95:6 Wozani, sikhonze sikhothame, siguqe phambi kwe Nkosi, umenzi wethu." 
Psalms95:7 Ngoba yona inguNkulunkulu wethu, thina-ke singabantu bedlelo layo, lezimvu zesandla sayo. Lamuhla uba lilizwa ilizwi layo," 
Psalms95:8 lingayenzi ibe lukhuni inhliziyo yenu njengekuphikisan eni, njeng e sukwi ni lokulinga enkangala," 
Psalms95:9 lapho oyihlo bangilinga bengihlola, yebo babona umsebenzi wami." 
Psalms95:10 Iminyaka engamatshumi amane nganengwa yi lesi sizukulwana ngaze ngathi: Bangabantu abaduhayo enhliziyweni, bona kabazazi indlela zami." 
Psalms95:11 Engafunga kubo ekuthukutheleni kwami, ngathi: Kabayikungena ekuphumuleni kwami." 
Psalms96:1 Hlabelani e Nkosi ni ingoma entsha; hlabelelani e Nkosi ni, mhlaba wonke." 
Psalms96:2 Hlabelani e Nkosi ni, libusise ibizo layo, litshumayele usindiso lwayo insuku ngensuku." 
Psalms96:3 Landisani udumo lwayo phakathi kwezizwe, izimangaliso zayo phakathi kwabantu bonke." 
Psalms96:4 Ngoba yinkulu i Nkosi, ifanele ukudunyiswa kakhulu, yona iyesabeka phezu kwabonkulunkulu bonke." 
Psalms96:5 Ngoba bonke onkulunkulu bezizwe bayizithombe; kodwa i Nkosi yenza amazulu. 
Psalms96:6 Ubukhosi lenkazimulo kuphambi kwayo, amandla lobuhle kusendlini yayo engcwele." 
Psalms96:7 Inikeni i Nkosi, zizukulwana zezizwe, inikeni i Nkosi udumo lamandla." 
Psalms96:8 Inikeni i Nkosi udumo lwebizo layo; lethani umnikelo, lingene emagumeni ayo." 
Psalms96:9 Ikhonzeni i Nkosi ebuhleni bobungcwele; lithuthumele phambi kwayo, mhlaba wonke." 
Psalms96:10 Tshonini phakathi kwezizwe: I Nkosi iyabusa. Lomhlaba umisiwe, kawuyikunyikinyeka; izabahlulela abantu ngokuqonda." 
Psalms96:11 Kawathokoze amazulu, lomhlaba ujabule; kaluhlokome ulwandle lokugcwala kwalo." 
Psalms96:12 Iganga kalithabe lakho konke okukulo. Khona izihlahla zonke zegusu zizahlabela ngentokozo 
Psalms96:13 phambi kwe Nkosi, ngoba iyeza, ngoba iyeza ukwahlulela umhlaba; izakwahlulela umhlaba ngokulunga, labantu ngeqiniso layo." 
Psalms97:1 I Nkosi iyabusa; kawuthokoze umhlaba, kazijabule izihlenge ezinengi." 
Psalms97:2 Amayezi lomnyama kuyiphahlile; ukulunga lesahlulelo kuyisisekelo sesihlalo sayo sobukhosi. 
Psalms97:3 Umlilo uhamba phambi kwayo, utshisa izitha zayo inhlangothi zonke." 
Psalms97:4 Imibane yayo ikhanyisa umhlaba; umhlaba wabona, wathuthumela." 
Psalms97:5 Izintaba zancibilika njengengcino phambi kwe Nkosi, phambi kweNkosi yomhlaba wonke." 
Psalms97:6 Amazulu atshumayela ukulunga kwayo, labantu bonke babona inkazimulo yayo." 
Psalms97:7 Bayayangeka bonke abakhonza izithombe, abazikhukhumeza ngezithixo; ikhonzeni, lonke bonkulunkulu." 
Psalms97:8 IZiyoni yezwa, yathokoza, lamadodakazi akoJuda athaba ngenxa yezahlulelo zakho, Nkosi." 
Psalms97:9 Ngoba wena, Nkosi, uphakeme phezu komhlaba wonke, uphakanyiswe kakhulu phezu kwabonkulunkulu bonke." 
Psalms97:10 Lina elithanda i Nkosi, zondani okubi; iyagcina imiphefumulo yabangcwele bayo, ibakhulule esandleni sababi." 
Psalms97:11 Ukukhanya kuhlanyelelwe olungileyo, lentokozo abaqotho ngenhliziyo." 
Psalms97:12 Thokozani e Nkosi ni, lina balungileyo, libonge ekukhumbuleni ubungcwele bayo." 
Psalms98:1 Hlabelelani i Nkosi ingoma entsha, ngoba yenzile izimangaliso; isandla sayo sokunene lengalo yayo engcwele kuyizuzele ukunqoba." 
Psalms98:2 I Nkosi yazisile usindiso lwayo, yembule ukulunga kwayo emehlweni ezizwe." 
Psalms98:3 Ikhumbule umusa wayo leqiniso layo kuyo indlu kaIsrayeli. Imikhawulo yonke yomhlaba ibonile usindiso lukaNkulunkulu wethu. 
Psalms98:4 Hlokomani ngentokozo e Nkosi ni, mhlaba wonke, lenze umsindo omkhulu, lithokoze, lihlabele indumiso." 
Psalms98:5 Hlabelelani e Nkosi ni ngechacho, ngechacho lelizwi lokuhlabelela." 
Psalms98:6 Ngezimpondo langomsindo wophondo lwenqama hlokomani ngentokozo phambi kweNkosi, uJehova." 
Psalms98:7 Kaluholobe ulwandle lokugcwala kwalo, umhlaba labahlala kuwo." 
Psalms98:8 Imifula kayiqakeze izandla, izintaba zihlabelele ndawonye ngentokozo" 
Psalms98:9 phambi kwe Nkosi, ngoba iyeza ukwahlulela umhlaba; izawahlulela umhlaba ngokulunga, lezizwe ngokuqonda." 
Psalms99:1 I Nkosi iyabusa; abantu kabathuthumele; ihlezi phakathi kwamakherubi*; umhlaba kawuzamazame. 
Psalms99:2 I Nkosi yinkulu eZiyoni; njalo iphakeme phezu kwezizwe zonke. 
Psalms99:3 Kazidumise ibizo lakho elikhulu lelesabekayo; lingcwele lona. 
Psalms99:4 Lamandla eNkosi athanda isahlulelo; wena umisa ukuqonda; wena wenza isahlulelo lokulunga kuJakobe. 
Psalms99:5 Phakamisani i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu, likhonze esenabelweni sezinyawo zayo. Ingcwele yona." 
Psalms99:6 UMozisi loAroni phakathi kwabapristi bayo, loSamuweli phakathi kwababiza ibizo layo, babiza i Nkosi, yona yasibaphendula." 
Psalms99:7 Yakhuluma labo iphakathi kwensika yeyezi; bagcina izifakazelo zayo lesimiso eyabanika sona. 
Psalms99:8 Nkosi Nkulunkulu wethu, wena wabaphendula; waba nguNkulunkulu obathethelelayo, lanxa uphindisela ezenzweni zabo." 
Psalms99:9 Phakamisani i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu, likhonze entabeni yayo engcwele; ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu ingcwele." 
Psalms100:1 Hlabelelani i Nkosi ngokuthaba, mhlaba wonke." 
Psalms100:2 Ikhonzeni i Nkosi ngenjabulo, wozani phambi kwayo ngokuhlabela ngentokozo." 
Psalms100:3 Yazini ukuthi i Nkosi inguNkulunkulu. Yiyo eyasenzayo, njalo ayisithi: si ngabantu bayo lezimvu zedlelo layo." 
Psalms100:4 Ngenani emasangweni ayo ngokubonga, emagumeni ayo ngokudumisa. Ibongeni, libusise ibizo layo." 
Psalms100:5 Ngoba i Nkosi ilungile; umusa wayo uhlezi kuze kube nininini, leqiniso layo esizukulwaneni lesizukulwana." 
Psalms101:1 Ngizahlabela ngomusa lesahlulelo; ngizahlabela kuwe, Nkosi." 
Psalms101:2 Ngizaziphatha ngenhlakanipho ngendlela eqotho. Uzakuza nini kimi? Ngizahamba ngobuqotho benhliziyo phakathi kwendlu yami. 
Psalms101:3 Kangiyikubeka phambi kwamehlo ami into embi. Ngiyakuzonda ukwenza kwabaphambukayo; kakuyikunamathela kimi. 
Psalms101:4 Inhliziyo ephambeneyo izasuka kimi; kangiyikumazi omubi. 
Psalms101:5 Ohleba umakhelwane wakhe ensitha, yena ngizamquma. Ophakeme ngamehlo, lolenhliziyo ezikhukhumezayo, yena kangiyikumvumela." 
Psalms101:6 Amehlo ami azakuba kwabathembekileyo belizwe, ukuze bahlale lami. Ohamba endleleni eqotho, yena uzangikhonza." 
Psalms101:7 Owenza inkohliso kayikuhlala phakathi kwendlu yami; okhuluma amanga kayikuma phambi kwamehlo ami. 
Psalms101:8 Insuku zonke ekuseni ngizabaquma bonke ababi belizwe, ukuze ngibaqume basuke emzini we Nkosi bonke abenzi bobubi." 
Psalms102:1 Nkosi, zwana umkhuleko wami, lokukhala kwami kakuze kuwe." 
Psalms102:2 Ungangifihleli ubuso bakho esukwini lohlupho lwami; beka indlebe yakho kimi; mhla ngibiza ungiphendule masinyane. 
Psalms102:3 Ngoba insuku zami ziyanyamalala njengentuthu, lamathambo ami ayatsha njengeziko." 
Psalms102:4 Inhliziyo yami itshayiwe, yabuna njengotshani, ngaze ngakhohlwa ukudla isinkwa sami." 
Psalms102:5 Ngenxa yelizwi lokububula kwami amathambo ami anamathela esikhumbeni sami. 
Psalms102:6 Ngifanana lewunkwe yenkangala, senginjengesikhova sezindawo ezidilikileyo." 
Psalms102:7 Ngiyalinda, senginjengenyoni ehlezi yodwa ephahleni." 
Psalms102:8 Izitha zami ziyangithuka usuku lonke; abangihlanyelayo bafunga ngami. 
Psalms102:9 Ngoba ngidle umlotha njengesinkwa, ngixubanise okunathwayo kwami lezinyembezi," 
Psalms102:10 ngenxa yentukuthelo yakho lolaka lwakho; ngoba ungiphakamisile, wasungilahla phansi." 
Psalms102:11 Insuku zami zinjengesithunzi eselulekayo, njalo mina ngiyabuna njengotshani." 
Psalms102:12 Kodwa wena, Nkosi, uzahlala kuze kube nininini, lesikhumbuzo sakho kusizukulwana lesizukulwana." 
Psalms102:13 Wena uzavuka uhawukele iZiyoni; ngoba isikhathi sokuyitshengisa umusa, yebo, isikhathi esimisiweyo sesifikile." 
Psalms102:14 Ngoba inceku zakho ziyawathanda amatshe ayo, zilesihawu ethulini lwayo." 
Psalms102:15 Khona izizwe zizalesaba ibizo le Nkosi, lamakhosi wonke omhlaba udumo lwayo." 
Psalms102:16 Lapho i Nkosi izayakha iZiyoni, izabonakala enkazimulweni yayo." 
Psalms102:17 Izaphendukela emkhulekweni wongelalutho, kayiyikudelela umthandazo wabo." 
Psalms102:18 Lokhu kuzabhalelwa isizukulwana esilandelayo, labantu abazadalwa bazadumisa i Nkosi." 
Psalms102:19 Ngoba yakhangela phansi isekuphakameni kwendawo yayo engcwele; i Nkosi isemazulwini yakhangela emhlabeni," 
Psalms102:20 ukuzwa ukububula kwesibotshwa, ukukhulula abantwana bokufa;" 
Psalms102:21 ukulandisa ibizo le Nkosi eZiyoni, lendumiso yayo eJerusalema," 
Psalms102:22 lapho izizwe zibuthana ndawonye, lemibuso, ukuyikhonza i Nkosi." 
Psalms102:23 Yathoba amandla ami endleleni, yafinyeza insuku zami." 
Psalms102:24 Ngathi: Nkulunkulu wami, ungangisusi phakathi kwensuku zami, iminyaka yakho isesizukulwaneni l ezizukulwana." 
Psalms102:25 Endulo wawusekela umhlaba, lamazulu angumsebenzi wezandla zakho." 
Psalms102:26 Lokho kuzabhubha, kodwa wena uzakuma. Kuzaguga-ke konke njengesembatho, njengesigqoko uzakuguqula, njalo kuzaguqulwa." 
Psalms102:27 Kodwa wena unguwe njalo, leminyaka yakho kayipheli." 
Psalms102:28 Abantwana benceku zakho bazahlala, lenzalo yazo izaqiniswa phambi kwakho." 
Psalms103:1 Busisa i Nkosi, mphefumulo wami, lakho konke okuphakathi kwami ibizo layo elingcwele." 
Psalms103:2 Busisa i Nkosi, mphefumulo wami, ungakhohlwa zonke izinzuzo zayo," 
Psalms103:3 ethethelela zonke izono zakho, eyelapha zonke izifo zakho," 
Psalms103:4 ehlenga impilo yakho ekubhujisweni, ekwethwesa umqhele womusa lezihawu," 
Psalms103:5 esuthisa umlomo wakho ngokuhle, ukuze ubutsha bakho buvuswe njengobokhozi." 
Psalms103:6 I Nkosi iyabenzela ukulunga lezahlulelo bonke abacindezelweyo. 
Psalms103:7 Yamazisa uMozisi indlela zayo, abantwana bakoIsrayeli izenzo zayo." 
Psalms103:8 I Nkosi ilesihawu lomusa, iyaphuza ukuthukuthela, njalo ivame ububele." 
Psalms103:9 Kayiyikuphikisana njalonjalo, kayiyikugcina intukuthelo kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms103:10 Kayisenzelanga njengokwezono zethu, kayisiphindiselanga njengokweziphambeko zethu." 
Psalms103:11 Ngoba njengokuphakama kwamazulu ngaphezu komhlaba, umkhulu umusa wayo kubo abayesabayo." 
Psalms103:12 Njengobukhatshana bempumalanga kuyo intshonalanga, ngokunjalo izisusele khatshana lathi iziphambeko zethu." 
Psalms103:13 Njengoyise ehawukela abantwana, i Nkosi iyabahawukela labo abayesabayo." 
Psalms103:14 Ngoba iyakwazi ukubunjwa kwethu, ikhumbula ukuthi siluthuli." 
Psalms103:15 Umuntu, insuku zakhe zinjengotshani; njengeluba leganga, ngokunjalo uyakhahlela." 
Psalms103:16 Ngoba umoya wedlula phezu kwalo, njalo lingabikho, lendawo yalo ingabe isalazi." 
Psalms103:17 Kodwa umusa we Nkosi usukela ephakadeni usiya ephakadeni phezu kwabayesabayo, lokulunga kwayo kuze kube sebantwaneni babantwana," 
Psalms103:18 kubo abagcina isivumelwano sayo, lakubo abakhumbula imithetho yayo ukuyenza." 
Psalms103:19 I Nkosi imisile isihlalo sayo sobukhosi emazulwini, lombuso wayo ubusa phezu kwakho konke." 
Psalms103:20 Busisani i Nkosi, lina zingilosi zayo, maqhawe alamandla, ezenza ilizwi layo, lilalela ilizwi lelizwi layo." 
Psalms103:21 Busisani i Nkosi, lonke mabandla ayo, zikhonzi zayo, ezenza intando yayo." 
Psalms103:22 Busisani i Nkosi, lonke misebenzi yayo, endaweni zonke zombuso wayo. Busisa i Nkosi, mphefumulo wami." 
Psalms104:1 Busisa i Nkosi, mphefumulo wami. Nkosi Nkulunkulu wami, umkhulu kakhulu; wembethe ubukhosi lodumo." 
Psalms104:2 Ozembesa ngokukhanya njengesembatho, owendlala amazulu njengekhetheni." 
Psalms104:3 Owabeka imijabo yamakamelo akhe aphezulu emanzini, owenza amayezi abe yinqola yakhe, ohamba phezu kwempiko zomoya." 
Psalms104:4 Owenza izingilosi zakhe zibe yimimoya, izinceku zakhe zibe ngumlilo olamalangabi." 
Psalms104:5 Wamisa umhlaba phezu kwezisekelo zawo, kawuyikuzanyazanyiswa phakade laphakade." 
Psalms104:6 Wawugubuzela ngokujula njengesembatho; amanzi ema phezu kwezintaba. 
Psalms104:7 Ekukhuzeni kwakho abaleka; elizwini lokuduma kwakho aphangisa asuka. 
Psalms104:8 Enyuka izintaba, ehla izihotsha endaweni owawuyimisele wona." 
Psalms104:9 Wamisa umngcele angewudlule, kawayikubuya agubuzele umhlaba." 
Psalms104:10 Othumela imithombo ezihotsheni, yahamba phakathi kwezintaba." 
Psalms104:11 Yanathisa yonke inyamazana yeganga, obabhemi beganga bacitsha ukoma kwabo." 
Psalms104:12 Inyoni zamazulu zakhela emaceleni ayo, zizwakalisa ilizwi ziphakathi kwezingatsha." 
Psalms104:13 Uthelela izintaba esemakamelweni akhe aphezulu; umhlaba usuthiswa ngesithelo semisebenzi yakho. 
Psalms104:14 Umilisela izifuyo utshani, lemibhida yokusiza umuntu, ukuveza ukudla emhlabathini," 
Psalms104:15 lewayini elithokozisa inhliziyo yomuntu, ukwenza ubuso bukhanye ngamafutha, lesinkwa esiqinisa inhliziyo yomuntu." 
Psalms104:16 Ziyasutha izihlahla ze Nkosi, imisedari yeLebhanoni eyayihlanyelayo." 
Psalms104:17 Lapho inyoni ezakhela khona izidleke; ingabuzane, izihlahla zefiri ziyindlu yalo." 
Psalms104:18 Intaba eziphakemeyo zingezamagogo, amadwala ayisiphephelo sezimbila." 
Psalms104:19 Inyanga wayenzela izikhathi ezimisiweyo; ilanga liyazi ukutshona kwalo. 
Psalms104:20 Wenza umnyama, kube sebusuku, phakathi kwabo kuphume yonke inyamazana yehlathi." 
Psalms104:21 Amabhongo ezilwane abhongela impango, lokudinga ukudla kwawo kuNkulunkulu." 
Psalms104:22 Ilanga liphuma, abuthane, alale ezikhundleni zawo." 
Psalms104:23 Umuntu uphuma aye emsebenzini wakhe lemtshikatshikeni wakhe kuze kuhlwe. 
Psalms104:24 Minengi kangakanani imisebenzi yakho, Nkosi! Yonke uyenze ngenhlakanipho; umhlaba ugcwele inotho yakho." 
Psalms104:25 Lolulwandle olukhulu lolubanzi ngezinhlangothi, lapho okulezihuquzelayo khona ezingelakubalwa, izinto eziphilayo ezincinyane kanye lezinkulu." 
Psalms104:26 Kuhamba khona imikhumbi, uLeviyathani* owambumbela ukuthi adlale kulo." 
Psalms104:27 Zonke lezi zilindele kuwe, ukuthi u zi nike ukudla kwazo ngesikhathi sazo." 
Psalms104:28 Uyazinika, zibuthe; uvula isandla sakho, zisuthe okuhle." 
Psalms104:29 Ufihla ubuso bakho, zikhathazeke; ususa umoya wazo, zife, zibuyele ethulini lwazo." 
Psalms104:30 Uthumela umoya wakho, zidalwe; wenze bube butsha ubuso bomhlaba." 
Psalms104:31 Udumo lwe Nkosi ka lum e kuze kube nininini; i Nkosi izathokoza ngemisebenzi yayo. 
Psalms104:32 Ikhangela umhlaba, uthuthumele; ithinta izintaba, zithunqe." 
Psalms104:33 Ngizahlabelela i Nkosi ngisaphila; ngizahlabelela indumiso kuNkulunkulu wami nxa ngisekhona. 
Psalms104:34 Ukuzindla kwami ngaye kuzakuba mnandi; mina ngizathokoza e Nkosi ni. 
Psalms104:35 Izoni kaziqedwe emhlabeni, kungabe kusaba khona ababi. Busisa i Nkosi, mphefumulo wami. Dumisani i Nkosi!" 
Psalms105:1 Bongani i Nkosi, libize ibizo layo, lazise phakathi kwezizwe izenzo zayo." 
Psalms105:2 Hlabelelani kuyo, lihlabelele amahubo kuyo, likhulume ngezenzo zayo zonke ezimangalisayo." 
Psalms105:3 Zincomeni ebizweni layo elingcwele; kayithokoze inhliziyo yabadinga i Nkosi. 
Psalms105:4 Dingani i Nkosi lamandla ayo, lidinge ubuso bayo njalonjalo." 
Psalms105:5 Khumbulani izenzo zayo ezimangalisayo eyazenzayo, izimangaliso zayo lezahlulelo zomlomo wayo," 
Psalms105:6 nzalo kaAbrahama inceku yayo, bantwana bakaJakobe abakhethiweyo bayo." 
Psalms105:7 Yona iyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu; izahlulelo zayo zisemhlabeni wonke. 
Psalms105:8 Iyakhumbula isivumelwano sayo kuze kube nininini, ilizwi eyalilaya kuzizukulwana eziyinkulungwane," 
Psalms105:9 eyasenza loAbrahama, lesifungo sayo kuIsaka;" 
Psalms105:10 eyasiqinisa kuJakobe saba yisimiso, kuIsrayeli saba yisivumelwano esilaphakade," 
Psalms105:11 isithi: Ngizakunika wena ilizwe leKhanani, isabelo selifa lakho." 
Psalms105:12 Besebalutshwana ngenani, yebo, bebalutshwana, labemzini kulo;" 
Psalms105:13 basebezula besuka esizweni besiya esizweni, besuka ko munye umbuso besiya kwabanye abantu;" 
Psalms105:14 kayivumelanga muntu ukubahlupha; yasikhuza amakhosi ngenxa yabo," 
Psalms105:15 isithi: Lingathinti abagcotshiweyo bami, lingoni abaprofethi bami." 
Psalms105:16 Yasibiza indlala phezu kwelizwe, yephula udondolo lonke lwesinkwa." 
Psalms105:17 Yathuma indoda phambi kwabo: UJosefa wathengiswa waba yisigqili. 
Psalms105:18 Bazwisa ubuhlungu inyawo zakhe ngamaketane, yena ngokwakhe wafika ensimbini." 
Psalms105:19 Kwaze kwaba yisikhathi sokufika kwelizwi lakhe, ilizwi likaJehova lamlinga." 
Psalms105:20 Inkosi yathuma yamthukulula, umbusi wabantu wasemkhulula." 
Psalms105:21 Yambeka waba yinkosi yendlu yayo, lombusi wemfuyo yayo yonke," 
Psalms105:22 ukubopha iziphathamandla zayo ngokuthanda kwakhe, afundise abadala bakhe ukuhlakanipha." 
Psalms105:23 UIsrayeli wasefika eGibhithe; uJakobe wahlala njengowezizwe elizweni lakoHamu. 
Psalms105:24 Wenza abantu bayo bazale kakhulu, yabenza baba lamandla kulezitha zabo." 
Psalms105:25 Yaphendula inhliziyo yabo ukuzonda abantu bayo, ukuthi baphathe inceku zayo ngobuqili." 
Psalms105:26 Yasithuma uMozisi inceku yayo, uAroni eyayimkhethile." 
Psalms105:27 Babeka phakathi kwabo izinto zezibonakaliso zayo, lezimangaliso elizweni lakoHamu." 
Psalms105:28 Yathumela umnyama, yenza kwaba mnyama; njalo kabavukelanga ilizwi layo." 
Psalms105:29 Yaphendula amanzi abo aba ligazi, yabulala inhlanzi zawo." 
Psalms105:30 Ilizwe labo lanyakazela amaxoxo, emakamelweni amakhosi abo." 
Psalms105:31 Yakhuluma, kwavela umtshitshi wezibawu, intwala emngceleni wabo wonke." 
Psalms105:32 Yabanika isiqhotho saba lizulu, umlilo olamalangabi elizweni labo." 
Psalms105:33 Yasitshaya isivini sabo lomkhiwa wabo, yephula izihlahla zomngcele wabo." 
Psalms105:34 Yakhuluma, kwasekuvela isikhonyane lemihogoyi, okungelakubalwa," 
Psalms105:35 okwaqeda yonke imibhida elizweni labo, kwaqeda isithelo somhlabathi wabo." 
Psalms105:36 Yasitshaya amazibulo wonke elizweni labo, okokuqala kwamandla abo wonke." 
Psalms105:37 Yasibakhupha belesiliva legolide, njalo kwakungekho owakhubekayo phakathi kwezizwe zabo." 
Psalms105:38 IGibhithe yathokoza ekuphumeni kwabo, ngoba uvalo ngabo lwabehlela." 
Psalms105:39 Yendlala iyezi laba yisisibekelo, lomlilo wokukhanyisa e busuku." 
Psalms105:40 Bacela, yasiletha izagwaca, yabasuthisa ngesinkwa samazulu." 
Psalms105:41 Yavula idwala, kwampompoza amanzi; ahamba endaweni ezomileyo njeng omfula." 
Psalms105:42 Ngoba yakhumbula ilizwi layo elingcwele, uAbrahama inceku yayo." 
Psalms105:43 Yasikhupha abantu bayo ngentokozo, abakhethiweyo bayo ngenjabulo." 
Psalms105:44 Yasibanika amazwe abezizwe, njalo badla ilifa lomtshikatshika wabantu," 
Psalms105:45 ukuze bagcine izimiso zayo, balondoloze imilayo yayo. Dumisani i Nkosi!" 
Psalms106:1 Dumisani i Nkosi! Ibongeni i Nkosi ngoba ilungile, ngoba umusa wayo umi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms106:2 Ngubani ongalandisa izenzo ezilamandla ze Nkosi, azwakalise yonke indumiso yayo?" 
Psalms106:3 Babusisiwe abagcina izahlulelo, owenza ukulunga ngaso sonke isikhathi." 
Psalms106:4 Ngikhumbule, Nkosi, ngothando olalo ku bantu bakho; ngethekelele ngosindiso lwakho;" 
Psalms106:5 ukuze ngibone okuhle kwabakhethiweyo bakho, ukuze ngithokoze entokozweni yesizwe sakho, ukuze ngizincome kanye lelifa lakho." 
Psalms106:6 Sonile kanye labobaba, senze okubi, senza ngenkohlakalo." 
Psalms106:7 Obaba kabaqedisisanga izimangaliso zakho eGibhithe; kabakhumbulanga ubunengi bezisa zakho; kodwa benza umvukela elwandle, eLwandle oluBomvu." 
Psalms106:8 Kanti wabakhulula ngenxa yebizo lakhe, ukuze azise amandla akhe." 
Psalms106:9 Wasekhuza uLwandle oluBomvu, lwatsha; wasebahambisa phakathi kwezinziki njengenkangala." 
Psalms106:10 Wasebasindisa esandleni somzondi, wabahlenga esandleni sesitha." 
Psalms106:11 Amanzi asibekela izitha zabo; kakusalanga l oyedwa kuzo. 
Psalms106:12 Basebekholwa amazwi akhe, bahlabelela indumiso yakhe." 
Psalms106:13 Baphanga bakhohlwa imisebenzi yakhe, kabalindelanga iseluleko sakhe." 
Psalms106:14 Kodwa bakhanuka lokukhanuka ehlane, bamlinga uNkulunkulu enkangala." 
Psalms106:15 Wasebanika isicelo sabo, kodwa wathumela ukucaka emphefumulweni wabo." 
Psalms106:16 Basebesiba lomhawu ngoMozisi enkambeni, ngoAroni ongcwele we Nkosi." 
Psalms106:17 Umhlaba wavuleka waginya uDathani, wasibekela iqembu likaAbiramu." 
Psalms106:18 Lomlilo wavutha eqenjini labo, ilangabi latshisa abakhohlakeleyo." 
Psalms106:19 Benza ithole eHorebe, bakhonza isithombe esibunjwe ngokuncibilikisa." 
Psalms106:20 Basebeguqula inkazimulo yabo yaba yisifaniso senkabi edla utshani. 
Psalms106:21 Bamkhohlwa uNkulunkulu umsindisi wabo, owayenze izinto ezinkulu eGibhithe," 
Psalms106:22 izimangaliso elizweni likaHamu; izinto ezesabekayo eLwandle oluBomvu. 
Psalms106:23 Ngakho wathi uzababhubhisa, ngaphandle kokuthi uMozisi okhethiweyo wakhe wayemile ekufohleni phambi kwakhe ukuphendula ulaka lwakhe ukuze anga ba bhubhisi." 
Psalms106:24 Yebo, baleyisa ilizwe elihle, kabalikholwanga ilizwi lakhe." 
Psalms106:25 Kodwa bakhonona emathenteni abo, kabalilalelanga ilizwi le Nkosi." 
Psalms106:26 Ngakho waphakamisa isandla sakhe emelene labo, ukubawisa enkangala," 
Psalms106:27 lokuwisa inzalo yabo phakathi kwezizwe, lokubahlakaza emazweni." 
Psalms106:28 Basebezihlanganisa loBhali-Peyori, badla imihlatshelo yabafileyo." 
Psalms106:29 Basebe m thukuthelisa ngezenzo zabo, lenhlupheko yafohlela kibo." 
Psalms106:30 Kwasekusukuma uPhinehasi, wenza isigwebo, inhlupheko yasimiswa." 
Psalms106:31 Lokhu kwasekubalelwa kuye njengokulunga, esizukulwaneni ngesizukulwana kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms106:32 Basebemthukuthelisa emanzini eMeriba, kwaze kwaba kubi kuMozisi ngenxa yabo." 
Psalms106:33 Ngoba bacunula umoya wakhe, waze wakhuluma ngamawala ngendebe zakhe." 
Psalms106:34 Kabazibhubhisanga izizwe, i Nkosi eyayibatshele ngazo." 
Psalms106:35 Kodwa bazihlanganisa lezizwe, bafunda imisebenzi yazo." 
Psalms106:36 Basebekhonza izithombe zazo ezaba ngumjibila kubo. 
Psalms106:37 Lamadodana abo lamadodakazi abo bawahlabela amadimoni. 
Psalms106:38 Bachitha igazi elingelacala, igazi lamadodana abo lamadodakazi abo, abawahlabela izithombe zeKhanani; lelizwe langcoliswa ngegazi." 
Psalms106:39 Basebengcola ngemisebenzi yabo, baphinga ngezenzo zabo." 
Psalms106:40 Ngakho ulaka lwe Nkosi lwabavuthela abantu bayo, yanengwa yilifa layo." 
Psalms106:41 Yabanikela esandleni sezizwe, lababazondayo bababusa." 
Psalms106:42 Lezitha zabo zabacindezela, basebethotshiswa ngaphansi kwesandla sazo." 
Psalms106:43 Yabakhulula kanengi; kodwa bona ba yi vukela ngecebo labo, behliswa ngobubi babo." 
Psalms106:44 Loba kunjalo yabona ukuhlupheka kwabo, lapho isizwa ukukhala kwabo." 
Psalms106:45 Yabakhumbulela isivumelwano sayo, yazisola njengobunengi bezisa zayo." 
Psalms106:46 Yabanika izisa phambi kwabo bonke ababebathumbile. 
Psalms106:47 Sisindise, Nkosi Nkulunkulu wethu, usibuthe sivela ezizweni, ukubonga ibizo lakho elingcwele, ukuzincoma endumisweni yakho." 
Psalms106:48 Kayibusiswe i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, kusukela phakade kuze kube sephakadeni! Abantu bonke kabathi: Ameni. Dumisani i Nkosi!" 
Psalms107:1 Ibongeni i Nkosi, ngoba ilungile, ngoba umusa wayo umi kuze kube phakade." 
Psalms107:2 Kabatsho njalo abahlengiweyo be Nkosi ebahlengileyo esandleni sesitha. 
Psalms107:3 Yababutha bevela emazweni, empumalanga lentshonalanga, enyakatho lelwandle." 
Psalms107:4 Bazulazula enkangala endleleni yehlane, kabatholanga umuzi wokuhlala." 
Psalms107:5 Belambile njalo bomile, umphefumulo wabo waphela amandla phakathi kwabo." 
Psalms107:6 Khona bakhala e Nkosi ni ekuhluphekeni kwabo, yabakhulula ezinsizini zabo." 
Psalms107:7 Yabakhokhela ngendlela eqondileyo, ukuze baye emzini wokuhlala." 
Psalms107:8 Kabayidumise i Nkosi ngo musa wayo la nge misebenzi yayo emangalisayo ebantwaneni babantu! 
Psalms107:9 Ngoba iyasuthisa umphefumulo olangathayo, lomphefumulo olambileyo iwugcwalisa ngokuhle." 
Psalms107:10 Abahlala emnyameni lethunzini lokufa, bebotshiwe ensizini lensimbini," 
Psalms107:11 ngoba bavukela amazwi kaNkulunkulu, badelela iseluleko soPhezukonke." 
Psalms107:12 Ngakho wathoba inhliziyo yabo ngokuhlupheka; bakhubeka, njalo kwakungekho umsizi." 
Psalms107:13 Khona bakhala e Nkosi ni ekuhluphekeni kwabo, yabasindisa ezinsizini zabo." 
Psalms107:14 Yabakhupha emnyameni lethunzini lokufa, yaqamula izibopho zabo." 
Psalms107:15 Kabayidumise i Nkosi ngo musa wayo, la nge misebenzi yayo emangalisayo ebantwaneni babantu!" 
Psalms107:16 Ngoba yephule izivalo zethusi, yaquma imigoqo yensimbi." 
Psalms107:17 Abayizithutha, ngenxa yendlela yeziphambeko zabo langenxa yezono zabo, bahlutshiwe." 
Psalms107:18 Umphefumulo wabo wenyanya ukudla konke, basondela emasangweni okufa." 
Psalms107:19 Khona bakhala e Nkosi ni ekuhluphekeni kwabo, yabasindisa ezinsizini zabo." 
Psalms107:20 Yathumela ilizwi layo, yabasilisa, ya ba khulula ekubhujisweni kwabo." 
Psalms107:21 Kabayidumise i Nkosi ngo musa wayo, la nge misebenzi yayo emangalisayo ebantwaneni babantu!" 
Psalms107:22 Kabahlabe-ke imihlatshelo yokubonga, balandise izenzo zayo ngokuthaba." 
Psalms107:23 Abehlela olwandle ngemikhumbi, abenza imisebenzi emanzini amakhulu;" 
Psalms107:24 laba babona izenzo ze Nkosi, lemisebenzi yayo emangalisayo ekujuleni." 
Psalms107:25 Ngoba iyakhuluma, ivuse isiphepho somoya, esiqubula amagagasi alo." 
Psalms107:26 Benyukela emazulwini, behlele enzikini; umphefumulo wabo uncibilika ngosizi." 
Psalms107:27 Bayadengezela bebhadazela njengesidakwa, lenhlakanipho yabo yonke iginyiwe." 
Psalms107:28 Khona bakhala e Nkosi ni ekuhluphekeni kwabo, yabakhupha ezinsizini zabo." 
Psalms107:29 Yenza isiphepho sachuma, lamagagasi aso athula." 
Psalms107:30 Basebethokoza ngoba aye se thule, yasibaholela ethekwini lesifiso sabo." 
Psalms107:31 Kabayibonge i Nkosi ngo musa wayo, la nge misebenzi yayo emangalisayo ebantwaneni babantu!" 
Psalms107:32 Njalo kabayiphakamise ebandleni labantu, bayidumise esihlalweni sabadala!" 
Psalms107:33 Yenza imifula ibe yinkangala, lemithombo yamanzi ibe ngumhlabathi owomileyo," 
Psalms107:34 umhlabathi ovundileyo ube ligwadule, ngenxa yobubi babahlezi kuwo." 
Psalms107:35 Iphendula inkangala ibe yisiziba samanzi, lelizwe elomileyo libe yimithombo yamanzi." 
Psalms107:36 Ihlalise khona abalambileyo, njalo bamise umuzi wokuhlala;" 
Psalms107:37 bahlanyele amasimu, bagxumeke izivini, ezithela izithelo zesivuno." 
Psalms107:38 Njalo iyababusisa ukuze bande kakhulu, lezifuyo zabo kayizinciphisi." 
Psalms107:39 Babuye banciphe, bathotshiswe ngocindezelo, ububi, losizi." 
Psalms107:40 Ithela ukudelelwa phezu kweziphathamandla, ibazulisa enkangala, e ngelandlela." 
Psalms107:41 Kube kanti ihlalisa phezulu umyanga ekuhluphekeni, enze insapho zibe njengomhlambi." 
Psalms107:42 Abalungileyo bazabona bathokoze, lobubi bonke buzavala umlomo wabo." 
Psalms107:43 Loba ngubani ohlakaniphileyo uzaqaphelisa lezizinto; labo bazaqedisisa izisa ze Nkosi. 
Psalms108:1 Inhliziyo yami iqinile, Nkulunkulu. Ngizahlabelela ngitshotshe, ngitsho udumo lwami!" 
Psalms108:2 Vukani gubhu lwezintambo lechacho! Ngizavusa ukusa. 
Psalms108:3 Ngizakudumisa, Nkosi, phakathi kwabantu, ngihlabele indumiso kuwe phakathi kwezizwe." 
Psalms108:4 Ngoba umusa wakho mkhulu phezu kwamazulu, leqiniso lakho lifika emayezini." 
Psalms108:5 Phakama, Nkulunkulu, ngaphezu kwamazulu, lobukhosi bakho phezu komhlaba wonke." 
Psalms108:6 Ukuze abathandekayo bakho bakhululwe; sindisa nge sandla sakho sokunene, ungiphendule." 
Psalms108:7 UNkulunkulu ukhulumile ebungcweleni bakhe. Ngizathaba, ngiyabe iShekema, ngilinganise isihotsha seSukothi." 
Psalms108:8 Ngeyami iGileyadi, ngowami uManase, loEfrayimi ungamandla ekhanda lami, uJuda ungumnikimthetho wami." 
Psalms108:9 UMowabi ungumganu wami wokugezela; phezu kukaEdoma ngizaphosela inyathela lami; ngizamemeza ngokuthaba phezu kweFilisti. 
Psalms108:10 Ngubani ozangisa emzini oqinileyo? Ngubani ozangiholela eEdoma? 
Psalms108:11 Kawusilahlanga yini, Nkulunkulu? Kawuphumanga, Nkulunkulu, lamabutho ethu!" 
Psalms108:12 Siphe usizo ekuhlupheni, ngoba luyize uncedo lomuntu." 
Psalms108:13 KuNkulunkulu sizakwenza ngobuqhawe, ngoba yena uzanyathelela phansi izitha zethu." 
Psalms109:1 Nkulunkulu wendumiso yami, ungathuli." 
Psalms109:2 Ngoba umlomo wokhohlakeleyo lomlomo wenkohliso uvulekile umelene lami; bakhulume lami ngolimi lwamanga. 
Psalms109:3 Bangihanqa ngamazwi enzondo, balwa bemelene lami kungelasizatho." 
Psalms109:4 Esikhundleni sothando lwami bayizitha zami, kodwa mina ngi se mkhulekw eni." 
Psalms109:5 Basebengibuyisela okubi esikhundleni sokuhle, lenzondo esikhundleni sothando lwami." 
Psalms109:6 Umise omubi phezu kwakhe, loSathane kame ngakwesokunene sakhe." 
Psalms109:7 Ekwahlulelweni kwakhe kaphume elecala; lomkhuleko wakhe ube yisono. 
Psalms109:8 Insuku zakhe kazibe nlutshwana; omunye athathe isikhundla sakhe. 
Psalms109:9 Abantwana bakhe kabangabi loyise, lomkakhe abe ngumfelokazi." 
Psalms109:10 Abantwana bakhe kabazulazule bephanza, bacele bevela emanxiweni abo." 
Psalms109:11 Umbolekisi kabambe konke alakho, labezizweni baphange izithelo zomsebenzi wakhe." 
Psalms109:12 Kungabi khona omelulela umusa, futhi kungabi khona ozwela intandane zakhe." 
Psalms109:13 Inzalo yakhe kayiqunywe, lebizo labo lesulwe esizukulwaneni esilandelayo." 
Psalms109:14 Ububi baboyise bukhunjulwe e Nkosi ni, lesono sikanina singesulwa." 
Psalms109:15 Kabube phambi kwe Nkosi njalonjalo, ukuze aqume ukukhunjulwa kwabo kusuke emhlabeni." 
Psalms109:16 Ngenxa yokuthi wayengakhumbuli ukwenza umusa, kodwa wazingela umuntu ohluphekayo longumyanga, lodabukileyo enhliziyweni uku m bulala." 
Psalms109:17 Njengoba wathanda ukuqalekisa, ngakho kakwehlele kuye; njengoba wayengathandi ukubusisa, ngakho kakube khatshana laye." 
Psalms109:18 Njengoba wagqoka isiqalekiso njengesigqoko sakhe, ngakho kakungene emibilini yakhe njengamanzi, lanjengamafutha emathanjeni akhe." 
Psalms109:19 Kakube kuye njengesembatho azembesa ngaso, kube libhanti azibopha ngalo njalonjalo." 
Psalms109:20 Lokhu kube ngumvuzo wezitha zami ovela e Nkosi ni, lowalabo abakhuluma okubi ngomphefumulo wami." 
Psalms109:21 Kodwa wena, Jehova, Nkosi, ngenzela ngenxa yebizo lakho; ngoba umusa wakho ulungile, ngikhulule." 
Psalms109:22 Ngoba mina ngiyisihlupheki lomyanga, lenhliziyo yami ilimele phakathi kwami." 
Psalms109:23 Ngedlula njengesithunzi sisiba side; ngizanyazanyiswe njengesikhonyane. 
Psalms109:24 Amadolo ami ayaxega ngokuzila ukudla, lenyama yami isicakile iswela ukukhuluphala." 
Psalms109:25 Mina sengibe lihlazo kubo, bengibona banikina ikhanda labo." 
Psalms109:26 Ngisize, Nkosi, Nkulunkulu wami, ungisindise ngokomusa wakho." 
Psalms109:27 Ukuze bazi ukuthi lesi yisandla sakho; wena, Nkosi, ukwenzile." 
Psalms109:28 Kabathuke bona, kodwa wena ubusise; nxa bevuka kabayangeke, kodwa inceku yakho kayithabe." 
Psalms109:29 Izitha zami kazigqokiswe ngehlazo, kazizigoqele ngenhloni zazo njengesembatho." 
Psalms109:30 Ngizayibonga kakhulu i Nkosi ngomlomo wami; njalo ngizayidumisa phakathi kwabanengi. 
Psalms109:31 Ngoba izakuma ngakwesokunene komyanga, uku m sindisa kulabo abalahla umphefumulo wakhe." 
Psalms110:1 I Nkosi yathi eNkosini yami: Hlala ngakwesokunene sami, ngize ngenze izitha zakho zibe yisenabelo senyawo zakho." 
Psalms110:2 I Nkosi izathuma intonga yamandla akho ivela eZiyoni. Busa phakathi kwezitha zakho. 
Psalms110:3 Abantu bakho ba za vuma ngosuku lwamandla akho, ebuhleni bobungcwele, esizalweni emadabukakusa, amazolo obutsha bakho ngawakho." 
Psalms110:4 I Nkosi ifungile, kayiyikuphenduka: Wena ungumpristi kuze kube nininini ngokwendlela kaMelkizedeki." 
Psalms110:5 INkosi ngakwesokunene sakho izachoboza amakhosi esukwini lokuthukuthela kwayo. 
Psalms110:6 Izakwehlulela phakathi kwezizwe, kugcwale izidumbu; izachoboza inhloko phezu kwelizwe elikhulu." 
Psalms110:7 Izanatha esifuleni endleleni; ngakho-ke izaphakamisa ikhanda. 
Psalms111:1 Dumisani i Nkosi! Ngizayibonga i Nkosi ngenhliziyo yonke, emhlanganweni wabaqotho lebandl eni." 
Psalms111:2 Mikhulu imisebenzi ye Nkosi, idingwa yilabo abathokoza ngayo." 
Psalms111:3 Ulodumo lenkazimulo umsebenzi wayo, lokulunga kwayo kumi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms111:4 Yenzile izimangaliso zayo zikhunjulwe; i Nkosi ilomusa lesihawu. 
Psalms111:5 Iyabapha ukudla labo abayesabayo; iyakhumbula kuze kube phakade isivumelwano sayo. 
Psalms111:6 Yazisile abantu bayo amandla emisebenzi yayo, ngokubanika ilifa lezizwe." 
Psalms111:7 Imisebenzi yezandla zayo iliqiniso lokwehlulela; imithetho yayo yonke iqinisekile. 
Psalms111:8 Isekelwe kuze kube phakade laphakade, yenziwa ngeqiniso langobuqotho." 
Psalms111:9 Yathumela uhlengo ebantwini bayo; ilaye isivumelwano sayo kuze kube nininini; lingcwele liyesabeka ibizo layo. 
Psalms111:10 Ukuyesaba i Nkosi kuyikuqala kokuhlakanipha; balokuqedisisa okuhle bonke abayenzayo imilayo. Indumiso yayo imi kuze kube nininini. 
Psalms112:1 Dumisani i Nkosi! Ubusisiwe umuntu oyesabayo i Nkosi, othokoza kakhulu ngemithetho yayo." 
Psalms112:2 Inzalo yakhe izakuba lamandla emhlabeni; isizukulwana sabaqotho sizabusiswa. 
Psalms112:3 Imfuyo lenotho kuzakuba sendlini yakhe, lokulunga kwakhe kuzakuma kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms112:4 Kuyabaphumela abaqotho ukukhanya emnyameni; ilomusa lesihawu lokulunga. 
Psalms112:5 Umuntu olungileyo ngolesisa lowebolekisayo, wenza izindaba zakhe ngokulunga." 
Psalms112:6 Ngoba kayikunyikinywa phakade; olungileyo uzakuba sekukhunjulweni kuze kube nininini. 
Psalms112:7 Kayikwesaba umbiko omubi, inhliziyo yakhe iqinile, ithemba e Nkosi ni." 
Psalms112:8 Isekelwe inhliziyo yakhe, Kayikwesaba, aze akhangele phezu kwezitha zakhe." 
Psalms112:9 Uhlakazile, uyabanika abayanga; ukulunga kwakhe kumi kuze kube nininini; uphondo lwakhe luzaphakanyiswa ngodumo." 
Psalms112:10 Omubi uya ku bona, athukuthele; agedle amazinyo akhe, ancibilike; isifiso sababi sizabhubha." 
Psalms113:1 Dumisani i Nkosi! Dumisani, zinceku ze Nkosi, dumisani ibizo le Nkosi." 
Psalms113:2 Kalibusiswe ibizo le Nkosi kusukela khathesi njalo kuze kube nininini. 
Psalms113:3 Kusukela ekuphumeni kwelanga kuze kube sekutshoneni kwalo ibizo le Nkosi kalidunyiswe. 
Psalms113:4 I Nkosi iphakeme phezu kwezizwe zonke, ubukhosi bayo buphezu kwamazulu." 
Psalms113:5 Ngubani onjenge Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu, ehlezi phezulu," 
Psalms113:6 ekhothama ukukhangela emazulwini lemhlabeni? 
Psalms113:7 Iyamvusa umyanga ethulini, imphakamise osweleyo enqumbini yomquba," 
Psalms113:8 ukuze i m hlalise leziphathamandla, kanye leziphathamandla zabantu bayo." 
Psalms113:9 Ihlalisa inyumba emzini, unina wabantwana othokozayo. Dumisani i Nkosi!" 
Psalms114:1 Ekuphumeni kukaIsrayeli eGibhithe, indlu kaJakobe ebantwini bolimi lwezizwe," 
Psalms114:2 uJuda waba yindlu yakhe engcwele, uIsrayeli waba ng umbuso wakhe." 
Psalms114:3 Ulwandle lwa ku bona lwabaleka, iJordani yabuyela emuva." 
Psalms114:4 Intaba zaqolotsha njengezinqama, amaqaqa njengamawundlu." 
Psalms114:5 Ulani wena lwandle, ukuthi ubaleke? Wena Jordani, ukuthi ubuyele emuva?" 
Psalms114:6 Lina zintaba, ukuthi liqolotshe njengezinqama? Lina maqaqa, njengamawundlu?" 
Psalms114:7 Thuthumela, mhlaba, phambi kweNkosi, phambi kukaNkulunkulu kaJakobe," 
Psalms114:8 owaphendula idwala libe lichibi lamanzi, ilitshe elilukhuni libe ngumthombo wamanzi." 
Psalms115:1 Kakungabi kithi, Nkosi, kakungabi kithi, kodwa ebizweni lakho nika udumo, ngenxa yomusa wakho, ngenxa yeqiniso lakho." 
Psalms115:2 Kungani izizwe zizakuthi: Ungaphi pho uNkulunkulu wabo? 
Psalms115:3 Kodwa uNkulunkulu wethu usemazulwini, wenza konke akuthandayo." 
Psalms115:4 Izithombe zabo yisiliva legolide, umsebenzi wezandla zomuntu." 
Psalms115:5 Zilomlomo, kodwa kazikhulumi; zilamehlo, kodwa kaziboni;" 
Psalms115:6 zilendlebe, kodwa kazizwa; zilempumulo, kodwa kazinuki;" 
Psalms115:7 zi le zandla, kodwa kaziphathi; inyawo zi la zo, kodwa kazihambi; kazikhulumi ngomphimbo wazo." 
Psalms115:8 Abazenzayo kabafanane lazo, wonke othembela kuzo." 
Psalms115:9 Israyeli, themba e Nkosi ni. Ilusizo lwabo lesihlangu sabo." 
Psalms115:10 Ndlu kaAroni, themba e Nkosi ni. Ilusizo lwabo lesihlangu sabo." 
Psalms115:11 Lina elesaba i Nkosi, thembani e Nkosi ni. Ilusizo lwabo lesihlangu sabo." 
Psalms115:12 I Nkosi isikhumbule, izabusisa, ibusise indlu kaIsrayeli, ibusise indlu kaAroni;" 
Psalms115:13 izabusisa labo abayesabayo i Nkosi, abancinyane kanye labakhulu." 
Psalms115:14 I Nkosi izakulandisa, lina labantwana benu." 
Psalms115:15 Libusisiwe e Nkosi ni, eyenza amazulu lomhlaba." 
Psalms115:16 Amazulu, amazulu ngawe Nkosi, kodwa umhlaba iwunike abantwana babantu." 
Psalms115:17 Abafileyo kabayidumisi i Nkosi, kumbe hatshi loba ngubani owehlela ekuthuleni." 
Psalms115:18 Kodwa thina sizayibusisa i Nkosi kusukela khathesi kuze kube nininini. Dumisani i Nkosi! 
Psalms116:1 Ngiyathanda, ngoba i Nkosi izwile ilizwi lami, ukunxusa kwami." 
Psalms116:2 Ngoba ibeke indlebe yayo kimi, ngakho ngiza yi biza ensukwini zami."
