Psalms116:3 Izibopho zokufa zangihanqa, lenhlungu zesihogo zangibamba; ngathola inhlupheko losizi." 
Psalms116:4 Ngasengibiza ibizo le Nkosi, ngathi: O Nkosi, khulula umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms116:5 Ilomusa i Nkosi, ilungile; ye, uNkulunkulu wethu ulesihawu." 
Psalms116:6 I Nkosi iyabalondoloza abathobekileyo; ngehliselwa phansi, yasingisindisa." 
Psalms116:7 Buyela, mphefumulo wami, ekuphumuleni kwakho, ngoba i Nkosi ikuphethe ngomusa." 
Psalms116:8 Ngoba ikhulule umphefumulo wami ekufeni, amehlo ami ezinyembezini, inyawo yami ekuweni." 
Psalms116:9 Ngizahamba phambi kwe Nkosi emazweni abaphilayo. 
Psalms116:10 Ngakholwa, ngakho ngikhulumile. Mina ngahlupheka kakhulu." 
Psalms116:11 Mina ngathi ekuphangiseni kwami: Wonke umuntu ungumqambimanga. 
Psalms116:12 Ngizabuyiselani e Nkosi ni ngazo zonke inzuzo zayo kimi? 
Psalms116:13 Ngizathatha inkezo yosindiso, ngibize ibizo le Nkosi." 
Psalms116:14 Ngizakhokha izifungo zami e Nkosi ni, khathesi phambi kwabantu bayo bonke." 
Psalms116:15 Kuligugu emehlweni e Nkosi ukufa kwabangcwele bayo. 
Psalms116:16 Hawu Nkosi, isibili ngiyinceku yakho, ngiyinceku yakho, indodana yencekukazi yakho; uthukulule izibopho zami." 
Psalms116:17 Ngizakuhlabela umhlatshelo wokubonga, ngibize ibizo le Nkosi." 
Psalms116:18 Ngizakhokha izifungo zami e Nkosi ni, khathesi phambi kwabantu bayo bonke," 
Psalms116:19 emagumeni endlu ye Nkosi, phakathi kwakho, Jerusalema. Dumisani i Nkosi!" 
Psalms117:1 Dumisani i Nkosi, lina zizwe zonke, liyibabaze, lina bantu lonke." 
Psalms117:2 Ngoba uthandolomusa lwayo lukhulu kithi, leqiniso le Nkosi limi kuze kube nininini. Dumisani i Nkosi!" 
Psalms118:1 Bongani i Nkosi, ngoba ilungile, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms118:2 Katsho uIsrayeli khathesi ukuthi isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini. 
Psalms118:3 Kayitsho indlu kaAroni khathesi ukuthi isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini. 
Psalms118:4 Kabatsho khathesi abayesabayo i Nkosi ukuthi isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini. 
Psalms118:5 Ngisesizini ngabiza i Nkosi; i Nkosi yangiphendula yangibeka endaweni ebanzi. 
Psalms118:6 I Nkosi ingakimi, kangiyikwesaba; umuntu angenzani kimi?" 
Psalms118:7 I Nkosi ingakimi labangisizayo; ngakho mina ngizakhangela phezu kwabangizondayo. 
Psalms118:8 Kungcono ukuphephela e Nkosi ni kulokuthembela emuntwini. 
Psalms118:9 Kungcono ukuphephela e Nkosi ni kulokuthembela kuziphathamandla. 
Psalms118:10 Zonke izizwe zangihanqa; kodwa ebizweni le Nkosi ngizaziquma. 
Psalms118:11 Zangihanqa, yebo zangihanqa; kodwa ebizweni le Nkosi ngizaziquma." 
Psalms118:12 Zangihanqa njengenyosi, zacitshwa njengomlilo wameva; kodwa ebizweni le Nkosi ngizaziquma." 
Psalms118:13 Wangigudlumeza lokugudlumeza ngize ngiwe; kodwa i Nkosi yangisiza. 
Psalms118:14 I Nkosi ingamandla lengoma yami, isibe lusindiso lwami." 
Psalms118:15 Ilizwi lentokozo losindiso lisemathenteni abalungileyo; esokunene se Nkosi senza ngamandla. 
Psalms118:16 Esokunene se Nkosi siphakanyisiwe, esokunene se Nkosi senza ngamandla." 
Psalms118:17 Kangiyikufa, kodwa ngizaphila, ngilandise imisebenzi ye Nkosi." 
Psalms118:18 I Nkosi ingijezisile kabuhlungu, kodwa kayinginikelanga ekufeni." 
Psalms118:19 Ngivulelani amasango okulunga; ngingene ngawo, ngidumise i Nkosi." 
Psalms118:20 Yileli isango le Nkosi; abalungileyo bazangena ngalo. 
Psalms118:21 Ngizakudumisa, ngoba ungiphendule, usube lusindiso lwami." 
Psalms118:22 Ilitshe abakhi a balalayo seliyinhloko yengonsi. 
Psalms118:23 Lokhu kwenziwa yi Nkosi, kuyamangalisa emehlweni ethu." 
Psalms118:24 Lolu lusuku i Nkosi e yalwenzayo, sizathaba sithokoze kulo." 
Psalms118:25 Sindisa khathesi, Nkosi; ngiyakuncenga, Nkosi, khathesi unike impumelelo." 
Psalms118:26 Ubusisiwe oza ngebizo le Nkosi. Silibusisile sisendlini ye Nkosi. 
Psalms118:27 UNkulunkulu uyi Nkosi, osinike ukukhanya. Bopha umnikelo womkhosi ngezibopho kuze kube sempondweni zelathi." 
Psalms118:28 Wena unguNkulunkulu wami, ngizakudumisa; Nkulunkulu wami, ngizakuphakamisa." 
Psalms118:29 Bongani i Nkosi, ngoba ilungile; ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms119:1 Babusisiwe abaqotho endleleni, abahamba emlayweni we Nkosi." 
Psalms119:2 Babusisiwe abagcina izifakazelo zayo, a bayidinga ngenhliziyo yonke." 
Psalms119:3 Njalo kabenzi okubi, bahamba endleleni zayo." 
Psalms119:4 Wena usulayile ukugcina ngokukhuthala imithetho yakho. 
Psalms119:5 Kungathi izindlela zami zingaqondiswa ukugcina izimiso zakho! 
Psalms119:6 Khona ngingayikuyangeka, lapho nginanzelela yonke imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:7 Ngizakudumisa ngobuqotho benhliziyo, sengifunde izahlulelo zokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms119:8 Ngizagcina izimiso zakho. Ungangitshiyi ngokupheleleyo. 
Psalms119:9 Ijaha lingayihlanza ngani indlela yalo? Ngokuqaphela njengokwelizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:10 Ngikudingile ngenhliziyo yami yonke; ungangiphambuli emithethweni yakho. 
Psalms119:11 Ilizwi lakho ngilifihlile enhliziyweni yami, ukuze ngingoni kuwe." 
Psalms119:12 Ubusisiwe wena, Nkosi; ungifundise izimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:13 Ngezindebe zami ngilandisile zonke izahlulelo zomlomo wakho. 
Psalms119:14 Ngithokozile ngendlela yezifakazelo zakho njengaphezu kwenotho yonke. 
Psalms119:15 Ngizazindla ngemithetho yakho, ngikhangele ezindleleni zakho." 
Psalms119:16 Ngizazithokozisa ngezimiso zakho; kangiyikukhohlwa ilizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:17 Iphathe kuhle inceku yakho, ukuze ngiphile ngigcine ilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:18 Vula amehlo ami ukuze ngibone izimangaliso ezivela emlayweni wakho. 
Psalms119:19 Ngiyisihambi emhlabeni; ungangifihleli imithetho yakho. 
Psalms119:20 Umphefumulo wami uyadabuka ngenxa yokulangathela izahlulelo zakho ngaso sonke isikhathi. 
Psalms119:21 Ukhuzile abaziqakisayo abaqalekisiweyo, abaduha emithethweni yakho." 
Psalms119:22 Susa kimi ihlazo lokudelela, ngoba ngigcinile izifakazelo zakho." 
Psalms119:23 Iziphathamandla lazo zahlala zakhuluma zimelene lami; inceku yakho yazindla ngezimiso zakho. 
Psalms119:24 Izifakazelo zakho lazo ziyintokozo yami, zingabeluleki bami." 
Psalms119:25 Umphefumulo wami unamathele ethulini; ngivuselela ngokwelizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:26 Ngilandisile indlela zami, wangiphendula. Ngifundisa izimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:27 Ngenze ngiqedisise indlela yemithetho yakho, ukuze ngikhulume ngezenzo zakho ezimangalisayo." 
Psalms119:28 Umphefumulo wami uyathonta ngenxa yosizi; ngiqinisa ngokwelizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:29 Susa kimi indlela yamanga, unginike ngomusa umlayo wakho." 
Psalms119:30 Ngikhethile indlela yeqiniso, ngibekile phambi kwami izahlulelo zakho." 
Psalms119:31 Nginamathele ezifakazelweni zakho; Nkosi, ungangiyangisi." 
Psalms119:32 Ngizagijima e ndlel eni yemithetho yakho, ngoba uzakhulisa inhliziyo yami." 
Psalms119:33 Ngifundisa, Nkosi, indlela yezimiso zakho, njalo ngizayigcina kuze kube sekupheleni." 
Psalms119:34 Ngiphe ukuqedisisa ngibe sengigcina umlayo wakho, yebo ngiwulondoloze ngenhliziyo yonke." 
Psalms119:35 Ngihambisa endleleni yemithetho yakho, ngoba ngiyathokoza ngayo." 
Psalms119:36 Thobisela inhliziyo yami ezifakazelweni zakho, kungabi semhawini." 
Psalms119:37 Susa amehlo ami ukuze angaboni okuyize; ungivuselele endleleni yakho. 
Psalms119:38 Qinisa ilizwi lakho encekwini yakho e zinik ele ukukwesaba. 
Psalms119:39 Susa isigcono engisesabayo, ngoba izahlulelo zakho zilungile." 
Psalms119:40 Khangela, ngiyalangatha imithetho yakho; ngivuselela ekulungeni kwakho." 
Psalms119:41 Lezisa zakho kazize kimi, Nkosi, usindiso lwakho ngokwelizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:42 Khona ngizakuba lakho ukuphendula ongithukayo, ngoba ngiyathembela elizwini lakho." 
Psalms119:43 Njalo ungasusi ngokupheleleyo emlonyeni wami ilizwi leqiniso, ngoba ngithembele ezahlulelweni zakho." 
Psalms119:44 Ngokunjalo ngizawugcina umlayo wakho njalonjalo, kuze kube phakade laphakade." 
Psalms119:45 Ngizahamba ebubanzini, ngoba ngidinga imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:46 Njalo ngizakhuluma ngezifakazelo zakho phambi kwamakhosi, ngingayangeki." 
Psalms119:47 Ngizithokozise ngemithetho yakho engiyithandileyo. 
Psalms119:48 Ngizaphakamisela lezandla zami emithethweni yakho engiyithandileyo, ngizindle ngezimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:49 Khumbula ilizwi encekwini yakho, ongenze ngathembela kulo." 
Psalms119:50 Le yinduduzo yami ekuhluphekeni kwami, ngoba ilizwi lakho lingivuselele." 
Psalms119:51 Abazigqajayo bangiklolodela kakhulukazi; kangiphambukanga emlayweni wakho. 
Psalms119:52 Ngikhumbule izahlulelo zakho zasendulo, Nkosi, futhi ngiziduduzile." 
Psalms119:53 Intukuthelo enkulu ingibambile ngenxa yababi abatshiya umlayo wakho. 
Psalms119:54 Izimiso zakho zaba zingoma zami endlini yobuhambuma bami. 
Psalms119:55 Ebusuku ngikhumbule ibizo lakho, Nkosi, ngigcine umlayo wakho." 
Psalms119:56 Lokhu kwaba ngokwami ngoba ngigcinile imithetho yakho. 
Psalms119:57 UJehova uyisabelo sami; ngithe ngizagcina amazwi akho. 
Psalms119:58 Ngancenga ubuso bakho ngenhliziyo yonke; woba lomusa kimi ngokwelizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:59 Ngazindla ngezindlela zami, ngaphendulela inyawo zami ezifakazelweni zakho." 
Psalms119:60 Ngaphangisa, kangiphuzanga ukugcina imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:61 Amaxuku ababi angihanqile; kangikhohlwa umlayo wakho. 
Psalms119:62 Phakathi kobusuku ngizavuka ukuze ngikubonge ngenxa yezahlulelo zokulunga kwakho. 
Psalms119:63 Ngingumngane wabo bonke abakwesabayo, labagcina imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:64 Nkosi, umhlaba ugcwele umusa wakho; ngifundisa izimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:65 Wenzele inceku yakho okuhle, Nkosi, ngokwelizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:66 Ngifundisa ingqondo enhle lolwazi, ngoba ngikholwa imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:67 Ngingakahlupheki ngaduha, kodwa khathesi ngigcine ilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:68 Wena ulungile, wenza okulungileyo; ngifundisa izimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:69 Abazigqajayo bangibhaceke ngamanga; ngenhliziyo yonke mina ngizagcina imithetho yakho. 
Psalms119:70 Inhliziyo yabo inone njengamahwahwa; mina ngithokoza ngomlayo wakho. 
Psalms119:71 Kungilungele ukuthi ngihlutshwe, ukuze ngifunde izimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:72 Umlayo womlomo wakho ungcono kimi kulezinkulungwane zegolide lezesiliva. 
Psalms119:73 Izandla zakho zingenzile, zangibumba; ngiphe ukuqedisisa ukuze ngifunde imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:74 Abakwesabayo bazangibona bathokoze, ngoba ngithembele elizwini lakho." 
Psalms119:75 Ngiyazi, Nkosi, ukuthi izahlulelo zakho zilungile, lokuthi ungihluphile ngokuthembeka." 
Psalms119:76 Umusa wakho ake ube yinduduzo yami njengokutsho kwakho encekwini yakho. 
Psalms119:77 Izihawu zakho kazize kimi ukuze ngiphile, ngoba umlayo wakho uyintokozo yami." 
Psalms119:78 Abazigqajayo kabayangeke, ngoba bangiphambukisa ngamanga; mina ngizazindla ngemithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:79 Kabaphendukele kimi abakwesabayo, labazi izifakazelo zakho." 
Psalms119:80 Inhliziyo yami kayiphelele ezimisweni zakho, ukuze ngingayangeki." 
Psalms119:81 Umphefumulo wami uyaphela ngokulangatha usindiso lwakho; ngithembela elizwini lakho. 
Psalms119:82 Amehlo ami ayafiphala ngokulangatha ilizwi lakho, ngisithi: Uzangiduduza nini?" 
Psalms119:83 Ngoba senginjengomgodla osentuthwini; kangikhohlwa izimiso zakho. 
Psalms119:84 Zingaki insuku zenceku yakho? Uzakwenza nini isigwebo kwabangizingelayo? 
Psalms119:85 Abazigqajayo bangigebhela imigodi, okungenjengokomlayo wakho." 
Psalms119:86 Yonke imithetho yakho ithembekile; bangizingela ngamanga; ngisiza! 
Psalms119:87 Baphosa bangiqeda emhlabeni, kodwa mina kangitshiyanga imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:88 Ngivuselela ngokomusa wakho; ngibe sengigcina isifakazelo somlomo wakho. 
Psalms119:89 Laphakade, Nkosi, ilizwi lakho limi emazulwini." 
Psalms119:90 Uthembeko lwakho lusesizukulwaneni lesizukulwana; wamisa umhlaba, usemi." 
Psalms119:91 Ngokwezimiso zakho ku s emi lamuhla, ngoba konke kuzinceku zakho." 
Psalms119:92 Uba umlayo wakho ubungesizo intokozo zami, ngabe sengibhubhele ekuhluphekeni kwami." 
Psalms119:93 Laphakade kangiyikukhohlwa imithetho yakho, ngoba ungivuselele ngayo." 
Psalms119:94 Ngingowakho, ungisindise; ngoba ngiyidingile imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:95 Ababi bangilindele ukungibhubhisa; ngiyananzelela izifakazelo zakho. 
Psalms119:96 Ngibonile ukucina kwakho konke ukuphelela, kodwa umlayo wakho ubanzi kakhulu." 
Psalms119:97 Ngiwuthanda kangakanani umlayo wakho! Usuku lonke uyikuzindla kwami. 
Psalms119:98 Ngemithetho yakho uyangihlakaniphisa kulezitha zami, ngoba ilami kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms119:99 Ngilokuqedisisa kulabo bonke abafundisi bami, ngoba izifakazelo zakho ziyikuzindla kwami." 
Psalms119:100 Ngiyaqedisisa kulabadala, ngoba ngigcina imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:101 Ngizinqandile inyawo zami kuyo yonke indlela embi, ukuze ngigcine ilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:102 Kangiphambukanga kuzahlulelo zakho, ngoba wena ungifundisile." 
Psalms119:103 Amnandi kangakanani amazwi akho ekunambitheni kwami, okwedlula uluju emlonyeni wami!" 
Psalms119:104 Emithethweni yakho ngizuza ukuqedisisa; ngenxa yalokho ngizonda yonke indlela yamanga. 
Psalms119:105 Ilizwi lakho liyisibane enyaweni lwami, lokukhanya endleleni yami." 
Psalms119:106 Ngifungile, ngiza ku qinisa, ukugcina izahlulelo zokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms119:107 Ngiyahlupheka kakhulukazi; Nkosi, ngivuselela ngokwelizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:108 Nkosi, yemukela iminikelo yesihle yomlomo wami, ungifundise izahlulelo zakho." 
Psalms119:109 Umphefumulo wami usesandleni sami njalonjalo, kodwa kangikhohlwa umlayo wakho." 
Psalms119:110 Ababi bangibekele umjibila, kodwa kangiduhanga emithethweni yakho." 
Psalms119:111 Ngidle ilifa lezifakazelo zakho kuze kube nininini, ngoba ziyintokozo yenhliziyo yami." 
Psalms119:112 Ngithobe inhliziyo yami ukwenza izimiso zakho njalonjalo, kuze kube sekupheleni." 
Psalms119:113 Ngiyabazonda abanhliziyombili, kodwa umlayo wakho ngiyawuthanda." 
Psalms119:114 Wena uyisiphephelo sami lesihlangu sami; ngithemba elizwini lakho. 
Psalms119:115 Sukani kimi benzi bobubi, ngoba ngigcine imithetho kaNkulunkulu wami." 
Psalms119:116 Ngisekela ngokwelizwi lakho ukuze ngiphile, ungangiyangisi ngethemba lami." 
Psalms119:117 Ngisekela ngibe sengisindiswa, ngizananzelela izimiso zakho njalonjalo." 
Psalms119:118 Uyabalahla bonke abaduha ezimisweni zakho, ngoba ubuqili babo bungamanga." 
Psalms119:119 Uyasusa bonke ababi bomhlaba njeng amanyele; ngakho ngiyazithanda izifakazelo zakho. 
Psalms119:120 Inyama yami iyathuthumela ngovalo ngawe, ngesaba izigwebo zakho." 
Psalms119:121 Ngenzile ukwahlulela lokulunga; ungangiyekeli kubacindezeli bami. 
Psalms119:122 Mela inceku yakho kube kuhle, abazigqajayo kabangangicindezeli." 
Psalms119:123 Amehlo ami aphelela usindiso lwakho, lelizwi lokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms119:124 Yenza encekwini yakho ngokomusa wakho, ungifundise izimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:125 Ngiyinceku yakho; ngiphe ukuqedisisa, ukuze ngazi izifakazelo zakho." 
Psalms119:126 Se kuyisikhathi se Nkosi sokuthi isebenze, ngoba bawephule umlayo wakho." 
Psalms119:127 Ngakho-ke ngiyayithanda imithetho yakho kakhulu kulegolide, yebo, kulegolide elicwengekileyo." 
Psalms119:128 Ngalokho imithetho yakho yonke mayelana lazo zonke izinto ngiyibona iqondile; yonke indlela yamanga ngiyayizonda. 
Psalms119:129 Izifakazelo zakho ziyamangalisa; ngakho-ke umphefumulo wami uyazigcina. 
Psalms119:130 Ukuvulwa kwamazwi akho kuyakhanyisa, kunika ukuqedisisa kwabangelalwazi." 
Psalms119:131 Ngavula umlomo wami, ngaphefuzela, ngoba ngalangazelela imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:132 Phendukela kimi, ube lomusa kimi, njengomkhuba kulabo abathanda ibizo lakho." 
Psalms119:133 Qinisa izinyathelo zami elizwini lakho, njalo kabungabusi phezu kwami labubi." 
Psalms119:134 Ngikhulula kucindezelo lwabantu, ukuze ngigcine imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:135 Khanyisa ubuso bakho phezu kwenceku yakho, ungifundise izimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:136 Imifula yamanzi iyehla emehlweni ami, ngoba kabagcini umlayo wakho." 
Psalms119:137 Wena, Nkosi, ulungile, ziqondile izahlulelo zakho." 
Psalms119:138 Ulayile izifakazelo zakho e zilungileyo lezithembekileyo kakhulu. 
Psalms119:139 Ukutshiseka kwami kungiqedile, ngoba izitha zami zikhohlwe amazwi akho." 
Psalms119:140 Ilizwi lakho licwengekile kakhulu; ngakho inceku yakho iyalithanda. 
Psalms119:141 Ngimncinyane, ngidelelekile; imithetho yakho kangiyikhohlwa." 
Psalms119:142 Ukulunga kwakho kuyikulunga kuze kube phakade, lomlayo wakho uliqiniso." 
Psalms119:143 Ucindezelo lohlupho kungifumene; imithetho yakho izintokozo zami. 
Psalms119:144 Ukulunga kwezifakazelo zakho kungokwaphakade; ngiphe ukuqedisisa ukuze ngiphile. 
Psalms119:145 Ngakhala ngenhliziyo yami yonke; ngiphendula, Nkosi. Ngizagcina izimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:146 Ngikhalela kuwe; ngisindisa, njalo ngizagcina izifakazelo zakho." 
Psalms119:147 Ngandulela uvivi, ngakhala; ngathembela elizwini lakho." 
Psalms119:148 Amehlo ami aqalela imilindo yobusuku, ukuze ngizindle elizwini lakho." 
Psalms119:149 Zwana ilizwi lami ngokomusa wakho; Nkosi, ngivuselela ngokwesehlulelo sakho." 
Psalms119:150 Bayasondela abazingeli bobubi, bakhatshana lomlayo wakho." 
Psalms119:151 Wena useduze, Nkosi, lemithetho yakho yonke iliqiniso." 
Psalms119:152 Sekukade ngisazi ngemilayo yakho ukuthi uyisekele kuze kube nininini. 
Psalms119:153 Khangela ukuhlupheka kwami, ungikhulule, ngoba kangiwukhohlwa umlayo wakho." 
Psalms119:154 Mela udaba lwami, ungihlenge; ngivuselela ngokwelizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:155 Usindiso lukhatshana lababi, ngoba kabadingi izimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:156 Izihawu zakho, Nkosi, zinkulu; ngivuselela ngokwezahlulelo zakho." 
Psalms119:157 Banengi abangizingelayo labayizitha zami; kangiphambuki ezifakazelweni zakho. 
Psalms119:158 Ngabona abaphambuki, ngacunuka, ngoba kabagcinanga ilizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:159 Bona ukuthi ngiyayithanda imithetho yakho. Ngivuselela, Nkosi, ngokothandolomusa lwakho." 
Psalms119:160 Ilizwi lakho liliqiniso kwase kuqal eni, laso sonke isahlulelo sakho esilungileyo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms119:161 Iziphathamandla zingizingela kungelasizatho; kodwa inhliziyo yami ilovalo ngamazwi akho. 
Psalms119:162 Ngiyathokoza ngelizwi lakho njengothole impango enkulu. 
Psalms119:163 Amanga ngiyawazonda ngiyawenyanya; umlayo wakho ngiyawuthanda. 
Psalms119:164 Kasikhombisa ngosuku ngiyakudumisa ngenxa yezahlulelo zakho ezilungileyo. 
Psalms119:165 Balokuthula okukhulu abathanda umlayo wakho; njalo kakulasikhubekiso kubo. 
Psalms119:166 Ngilindele usindiso lwakho, Nkosi, ngiyayenza imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:167 Umphefumulo wami uyazigcina izifakazelo zakho, ngiyazithanda kakhulu." 
Psalms119:168 Ngiyagcina imithetho yakho lezifakazelo zakho, ngoba zonke indlela zami ziphambi kwakho." 
Psalms119:169 Ukukhala kwami kakusondele kuwe, Nkosi; ngiphe ukuqedisisa ngokwelizwi lakho." 
Psalms119:170 Ukuncenga kwami kakufike phambi kwakho; ngikhulula ngokwelizwi lakho. 
Psalms119:171 Indebe zami zizathulula indumiso, ngoba ungifundisile izimiso zakho." 
Psalms119:172 Ulimi lwami luzakhuluma ilizwi lakho, ngoba yonke imithetho yakho iyikulunga." 
Psalms119:173 Isandla sakho kasibe lusizo lwami, ngoba ngikhethile imithetho yakho." 
Psalms119:174 Ngiyalangazelela usindiso lwakho, Nkosi, lomlayo wakho uyintokozo yami." 
Psalms119:175 Kawuphile umphefumulo wami, njalo uzakudumisa, lezahlulelo zakho zingisize." 
Psalms119:176 Ngiduhile njengemvu elahlekileyo; dinga inceku yakho, ngoba kangikhohlwa imithetho yakho." 
Psalms120:1 Ekuhluphekeni kwami ngakhala e Nkosi ni, yangiphendula." 
Psalms120:2 Nkosi, khulula umphefumulo wami kundebe zamanga, kulimi lwenkohliso." 
Psalms120:3 Uzanikwani, njalo kuzakwengezelelwani kuwe, limi lwenkohliso?" 
Psalms120:4 Imitshoko ebukhali yeqhawe, lamalahle avuthayo esihlahla serotemu*!" 
Psalms120:5 Maye kimi, ngoba ngihlala njengowezizwe koMesheki, ngihlala emathenteni eKedari!" 
Psalms120:6 Umphefumulo wami sekukade wahlala laye ozonda ukuthula. 
Psalms120:7 Ngingo wo kuthula, kodwa lapho ngikhuluma, bangabempi." 
Psalms121:1 Ngizaphakamisela amehlo ami ezintabeni, lapho usizo lwami oluzavela khona." 
Psalms121:2 Usizo lwami luvela e Nkosi ni, eyenza amazulu lomhlaba." 
Psalms121:3 Kayiyikuvuma ukuthi unyawo lwakho lutshelele; umlondolozi wakho kayikuwozela. 
Psalms121:4 Khangela, umlondolozi kaIsrayeli kayikuwozela njalo kayikulala." 
Psalms121:5 I Nkosi ingumlondolozi wakho; i Nkosi ingumthunzi wakho esandleni sakho sokunene. 
Psalms121:6 Ilanga kaliyikukutshaya emini, lenyanga ebusuku." 
Psalms121:7 I Nkosi izakulondoloza kukho konke okubi; izalondoloza umphefumulo wakho. 
Psalms121:8 I Nkosi izalondoloza ukuphuma kwakho lokungena kwakho, kusukela khathesi kuze kube phakade." 
Psalms122:1 Ngathokoza lapho besithi kimi: Kasiye endlini ye Nkosi. 
Psalms122:2 Inyawo zethu zizakuma emasangweni akho, Jerusalema." 
Psalms122:3 IJerusalema yakhiwe njengomuzi ohlangeneyo ngokwawo," 
Psalms122:4 lapho izizwe ezenyukela khona, izizwe ze Nkosi, ku bufakazi bukaIsrayeli, ukuze zibonge ibizo le Nkosi." 
Psalms122:5 Ngoba kumiswe khona izihlalo zobukhosi zesahlulelo, izihlalo zobukhosi zendlu kaDavida." 
Psalms122:6 Khulekelani ukuthula kweJerusalema; bazaphumelela abakuthandayo. 
Psalms122:7 Kakube khona ukuthula phakathi kwemiduli yakho, inhlalakahle ezigodlweni zakho." 
Psalms122:8 Ngenxa yabafowethu labangane bami sengizakuthi: Ukuthula kakube phakathi kwakho. 
Psalms122:9 Ngenxa yendlu ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu ngizakudingela okuhle. 
Psalms123:1 Ngiyaphakamisela kuwe amehlo ami, wena ohlezi emazulwini." 
Psalms123:2 Khangela, njengalokhu amehlo ezinceku engasesandleni senkosi yazo, njengamehlo encekukazi engasesandleni senkosikazi yayo, ngokunjalo amehlo ethu angase Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wethu, ize ibe lesihawu kithi." 
Psalms123:3 Woba lesihawu kithi, Nkosi, woba lesihawu kithi, ngoba sigcwele kakhulu yikudelelwa." 
Psalms123:4 Umphefumulo wethu ugcwele kakhulu yikukloloda kwabonwabileyo, yikudelela kwabazigqajayo." 
Psalms124:1 Uba kwakungesi Nkosi eyayilathi - katsho-ke uIsrayeli - 
Psalms124:2 uba kwakungesi Nkosi eyayilathi, lapho abantu besivukela," 
Psalms124:3 ngabe basiginya siphila, ekuvutheni kolaka lwabo kithi;" 
Psalms124:4 ngabe amanzi agijima phezu kwethu, lempophoma yedlula phezu komphefumulo wethu;" 
Psalms124:5 ngabe amanzi aqubukayo edlula phezu komphefumulo wethu. 
Psalms124:6 Ka yibusiswe i Nkosi, engasinikelanga ukuthi sibe yimpango emazinyweni abo." 
Psalms124:7 Umphefumulo wethu uphunyukile njengenyoni emjibileni wabathiyi; umjibila uqamukile, thina sasesiphunyuka." 
Psalms124:8 Usizo lwethu lusebizweni le Nkosi eyenza amazulu lomhlaba. 
Psalms125:1 Labo abathembela e Nkosi ni banjengentaba iZiyoni e nganyikinyekiyo, emi kuze kube phakade." 
Psalms125:2 Njenge zintaba ziyiphahlile iJerusalema, ngokunjalo i Nkosi iyabaphahla abantu bayo kusukela kulesisikhathi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms125:3 Ngoba intonga yobukhosi yobubi kayiyikuhlala phezu kwesabelo sabalungileyo, ukuze abalungileyo bangeluleli izandla zabo kokubi." 
Psalms125:4 Nkosi, yenza okuhle kubo abalungileyo lakubo abaqotho enhliziyweni zabo." 
Psalms125:5 Kodwa labo abaphambukela e zindlel eni zabo ezitshekileyo i Nkosi izabenza bahambe labenzi bobubi. Ukuthula phezu kukaIsrayeli! 
Psalms126:1 Lapho i Nkosi ibuyisa abathunjiweyo beZiyoni, saba njengabaphuphayo." 
Psalms126:2 Umlomo wethu wasugcwala uhleko, lolimi lwethu ukuhlabelela. Basebesithi phakathi kwezizwe: I Nkosi ibenzele izinto ezinkulu." 
Psalms126:3 I Nkosi isenzele izinto ezinkulu; siyathokoza. 
Psalms126:4 Buyisa, Nkosi, ukuthunjwa kwethu, njengezifula zeningizimu." 
Psalms126:5 Abahlanyela ngezinyembezi bazavuna ngentokozo. 
Psalms126:6 Yena ohamba ahambe ekhala inyembezi, ephethe inhlanyelo yokuhlanyela, isibili uzabuya ethokoza, ethwele inyanda zakhe." 
Psalms127:1 Uba i Nkosi ingayakhi indlu, basebenzela ize kiyo abayakhayo. Uba i Nkosi ingawulondolozi umuzi, umlindi ulindela ize." 
Psalms127:2 Kuyize kini ukuthi livuke ngovivi, lihlale kuze kube sebusuku, lidle ukudla kosizi; ngokunjalo iyamnika ubuthongo othandiweyo wayo." 
Psalms127:3 Khangela, abantwana bayilifa le Nkosi, isithelo sesizalo singumvuzo." 
Psalms127:4 Njengemitshoko esandleni seqhawe, banjalo abantwana bobutsha." 
Psalms127:5 Ibusisiwe indoda egcwalise umxhaka wayo ngabo; kabayikuyangeka ngoba bazakhuluma lezitha esangweni. 
Psalms128:1 Ubusisiwe wonke oyesabayo i Nkosi, ohamba endleleni zayo." 
Psalms128:2 Ngoba uzakudla umsebenzi wezandla zakho; uzathokoza, njalo kuzakuba kuhle kuwe." 
Psalms128:3 Umkakho uzakuba njengevini elithelayo emaceleni endlu yakho, abantwana bakho bazakuba njengamahlumela omhlwathi bezingelezele itafula lakho." 
Psalms128:4 Ngoba khangela, ngokunjalo uzabusiswa umuntu oyesabayo i Nkosi." 
Psalms128:5 I Nkosi izakubusisa iseZiyoni, njalo ubone okuhle kweJerusalema insuku zonke zempilo yakho," 
Psalms128:6 yebo, uzabona abantwana babantwana bakho. Ukuthula kakube phezu kukaIsrayeli!" 
Psalms129:1 Kanengi bangihluphile kusukela ebutsheni bami, katsho-ke uIsrayeli," 
Psalms129:2 kanengi bangihluphile kusukela ebutsheni bami, kanti kabangehlulanga." 
Psalms129:3 Abalimi balima emhlana wami, bayenza yaba mide imifolo yabo." 
Psalms129:4 I Nkosi ilungile, iqumile intambo zababi." 
Psalms129:5 Kabayangeke babuyiselwe emuva bonke abazonda iZiyoni. 
Psalms129:6 Kababe njengotshani ephahleni, obubuna bungakakhuli," 
Psalms129:7 ovunayo angagcwalisi ngabo isandla sakhe, lalowo obopha izithungo isifuba sakhe." 
Psalms129:8 Labadlulayo bangatsho ukuthi: Isibusiso se Nkosi kasibe phezu kwenu; siyalibusisa ebizweni le Nkosi. 
Psalms130:1 Ngisenzikini ngakhalela kuwe, Nkosi." 
Psalms130:2 Nkosi, zwana ilizwi lami, indlebe zakho zilalele ilizwi lokuncenga kwami." 
Psalms130:3 Uba wena, Nkosi, uqaphela iziphambeko, Nkosi, ngubani ongema?" 
Psalms130:4 Kodwa kuwe kulothethelelo, ukuze wesatshwe." 
Psalms130:5 Ngiyilindele i Nkosi, umphefumulo wami ulindile, lelizwini layo ngiyathemba." 
Psalms130:6 Umphefumulo wami ulindela iNkosi okwedlula abalindele ukusa, belindele ukusa." 
Psalms130:7 UIsrayeli kathembele e Nkosi ni; ngoba e Nkosi ni kulothandolomusa, njalo kuyo kulohlengo olunengi." 
Psalms130:8 Yona-ke izahlenga uIsrayeli kuzo zonke iziphambeko zakhe. 
Psalms131:1 Nkosi, inhliziyo yami kayikhukhumali, lamehlo ami kawaphakami, njalo kangihambi ezintweni ezinkulu lezintweni ezimangalisayo kakhulu kimi." 
Psalms131:2 Sibili ngichumisile ngathulisa umphefumulo wami, njengolunyuliweyo kunina; umphefumulo wami unjengolunyuliweyo phakathi kwami." 
Psalms131:3 UIsrayeli kathembele e Nkosi ni kusukela khathesi kuze kube laphakade. 
Psalms132:1 Khumbula, Nkosi, uDavida, izinhlupheko zakhe zonke," 
Psalms132:2 ukuthi wafunga e Nkosi ni, wathembisa kuSomandla kaJakobe:" 
Psalms132:3 Qotho, kangiyikungena ethenteni lendlu yami, qotho, kangiyikwenyukela ecansini lombheda wami;" 
Psalms132:4 qotho, kangiyikunika amehlo ami ubuthongo, ukuwozela ezinkopheni zami," 
Psalms132:5 ngize ngiyitholele i Nkosi indawo, indawo zokuhlala uSomandla kaJakobe." 
Psalms132:6 Khangela, sakuzwa eEfratha, sakuthola emasimini egusu." 
Psalms132:7 Sizangena ezindlini zayo zokuhlala, sikhonze esenabelweni senyawo zayo." 
Psalms132:8 Sukuma, Nkosi, uye ekuphumuleni kwakho, wena lomtshokotsho wamandla akho!" 
Psalms132:9 Abapristi bakho kabembeswe ukulunga, labangcwele bakho bathabe kakhulu." 
Psalms132:10 Ngenxa yenceku yakho uDavida ungafulathelisi ubuso bogcotshiweyo wakho. 
Psalms132:11 I Nkosi yafunga nge qiniso kuDavida, kayiyikubuyela emuva kilo: O wesithelo sesizalo sakho ngiza m beka esihlalweni sakho sobukhosi." 
Psalms132:12 Uba abantwana bakho begcina isivumelwano sami lezifakazelo zami engizabafundisa zona, labantwana babo bazahlala esihlalweni sakho sobukhosi kuze kube nini lanini." 
Psalms132:13 Ngoba i Nkosi iyikhethile iZiyoni, iyifisile ibe yindawo yayo yokuhlala." 
Psalms132:14 Le yindawo yami yokuphumula kuze kube nini lanini; lapha ngizahlala, ngoba ngiyifisile." 
Psalms132:15 Ngizabusisa kakhulu ukudla kwayo, ngisuthise abayanga bayo ngesinkwa." 
Psalms132:16 Labapristi bayo ngizabembathisa usindiso, labangcwele bayo bazahlabelela kakhulu ngenjabulo." 
Psalms132:17 Lapho ngizahlumisa uphondo lukaDavida; ngimisele ogcotshiweyo wami isibane. 
Psalms132:18 Izitha zakhe ngizazembathisa ihlazo, kodwa phezu kwakhe uzakhazimula umqhele wakhe wobukhosi." 
Psalms133:1 Khangela, kuhle kangakanani njalo kumnandi kangakanani ukuhlala kwabazalwane ndawonye babe munye." 
Psalms133:2 Kufanana lamafutha amahle phezu kwekhanda, ehlela endevini, indevu zikaAroni, ehlele emphethweni wezembatho zakhe." 
Psalms133:3 Njengamazolo eHermoni, ehlela entabeni zeZiyoni; ngoba lapho i Nkosi yalaya isibusiso, impilo kuze kube phakade." 
Psalms134:1 Khangelani, libusise i Nkosi lina lonke zinceku ze Nkosi, elimi endlini ye Nkosi ebusuku." 
Psalms134:2 Phakamiselani izandla zenu e ndaw eni engcwele, libusise i Nkosi." 
Psalms134:3 I Nkosi eyenza amazulu lomhlaba kayilibusise iseZiyoni. 
Psalms135:1 Dumisani i Nkosi! Dumisani ibizo le Nkosi, dumisani lina zinceku ze Nkosi," 
Psalms135:2 elimi endlini ye Nkosi, emagumeni endlu kaNkulunkulu wethu." 
Psalms135:3 Dumisani i Nkosi, ngoba i Nkosi ilungile; hlabelelani indumiso ebizweni layo, ngoba kumnandi." 
Psalms135:4 Ngoba i Nkosi izikhethele uJakobe, uIsrayeli abe ngokuligugu kwakhe okukhethekileyo." 
Psalms135:5 Ngoba mina ngiyazi ukuthi i Nkosi yinkulu, ukuthi iNkosi yethu iphezu kwabo bonke onkulunkulu." 
Psalms135:6 Konke i Nkosi ekuthandayo iyakwenza, emazulwini lemhlabeni, ezinlwandle lenzikini zonke." 
Psalms135:7 Yenza izinkungu zenyuke emikhawulweni yomhlaba, yenzela izulu imibane, ikhupha umoya eziphaleni zayo." 
Psalms135:8 Eyatshaya izibulo leGibhithe, kusukela emuntwini kuze kube senyamazaneni." 
Psalms135:9 Yathumela izibonakaliso lezimangaliso phakathi kwakho, Gibhithe, phezu kukaFaro laphezu kwenceku zakhe zonke." 
Psalms135:10 Eyatshaya izizwe ezinengi, yabulala amakhosi alamandla," 
Psalms135:11 uSihoni inkosi yamaAmori, loOgi inkosi yeBashani, layo yonke imibuso yeKhanani," 
Psalms135:12 yanikela ilizwe labo laba yilifa, ilifa likaIsrayeli, isizwe sayo." 
Psalms135:13 Nkosi, ibizo lakho limi kuze kube phakade, ukukhunjulwa kwakho, Nkosi, kusizukulwana ngesizukulwana." 
Psalms135:14 Ngoba i Nkosi izakwehlulela abantu bayo, izazisola mayelana lezinceku zayo." 
Psalms135:15 Izithombe zezizwe ziyisiliva legolide, umsebenzi wezandla zomuntu." 
Psalms135:16 Zilemilomo, kodwa kazikhulumi; zilamehlo, kodwa kaziboni;" 
Psalms135:17 zilendlebe, kodwa kazizwa; lomoya kawukho emlonyeni wazo." 
Psalms135:18 Abazenzayo bafanana lazo, lawo wonke othembela kuzo." 
Psalms135:19 Wena ndlu kaIsrayeli, busisani i Nkosi; wena ndlu kaAroni, busisani i Nkosi;" 
Psalms135:20 wena ndlu kaLevi, busisani i Nkosi. Lina eliyesabayo i Nkosi, busisani i Nkosi." 
Psalms135:21 Kayibusiswe i Nkosi iseZiyoni, ehlala eJerusalema. Dumisani i Nkosi!" 
Psalms136:1 Bongani i Nkosi ngoba ilungile, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms136:2 Bongani uNkulunkulu wabonkulunkulu, ngoba isihawu sakhe simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms136:3 Bongani iNkosi yamakhosi, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms136:4 Yona yodwa eyenza izimangaliso ezinkulu, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:5 eyenza amazulu ngokuhlakanipha, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:6 eyendlala umhlaba phezu kwamanzi, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:7 eyenza izikhanyiso ezinkulu, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:8 ilanga ukubusa emini, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:9 inyanga lezinkanyezi ukubusa ebusuku, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms136:10 Yona eyatshaya amaGibhithe kumazibulo awo, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:11 yakhupha uIsrayeli phakathi kwabo, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:12 ngesandla esilamandla langengalo eyeluliweyo, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms136:13 Yona eyehlukanisa uLwandle oluBomvu lwaba yiziqamu, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:14 yenza uIsrayeli adabule phakathi kwalo, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:15 kodwa yathintithela uFaro lebutho lakhe oLwandle oluBomvu, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms136:16 Yona eyakhokhela abantu bayo enkangala, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms136:17 Yona eyatshaya amakhosi amakhulu, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:18 yabulala amakhosi adumileyo, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:19 uSihoni inkosi yamaAmori, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:20 loOgi inkosi yeBashani, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:21 yanika ilizwe labo laba yilifa, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:22 ilifa kuIsrayeli inceku yayo, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms136:23 Eyasikhumbula ebuphansini bethu, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini;" 
Psalms136:24 yasophula ezitheni zethu, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms136:25 Enika yonke inyama ukudla, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms136:26 Bongani uNkulunkulu wamazulu, ngoba isihawu sakhe simi kuze kube nininini." 
Psalms137:1 Emifuleni yeBhabhiloni sahlala phansi khona, yebo sakhala inyembezi, lapho sikhumbula iZiyoni." 
Psalms137:2 Amachacho ethu sawaphanyeka eminyezaneni phakathi kwayo. 
Psalms137:3 Ngoba khonapho abasithumbayo basicela amazwi engoma, labasimotshayo bacela injabulo besithi: Sihlabeleleni enye yezingoma zeZiyoni." 
Psalms137:4 Singahlabela njani ingoma ye Nkosi elizweni lemzini? 
Psalms137:5 Uba ngikukhohlwa, Jerusalema, isandla sami sokunene kasikhohlwe ubungcitshi." 
Psalms137:6 Ulimi lwami kalunamathele elwangeni lwami, uba ngingakukhumbuli, uba ngingaphakamisi iJerusalema phezu kwentokozo yami enkulu." 
Psalms137:7 Khumbula, Nkosi, ngabantwana bakoEdoma, ngo suku lweJerusalema, abathi: Dilizani, dilizani, kuze kube sesisekelweni sayo." 
Psalms137:8 Ndodakazi yeBhabhiloni, ozabhujiswa, ubusisiwe ozaphindisela kuwe izenzo ozenze kithi." 
Psalms137:9 Ubusisiwe ozabamba asakaze abantwana bakho edwaleni. 
Psalms138:1 Ngizakubonga ngenhliziyo yami yonke; phambi kwabonkulunkulu ngizakuhlabelela indumiso. 
Psalms138:2 Ngizakhonza ngikhangele ngasethempelini lakho elingcwele, ngidumise ibizo lakho ngenxa yothando lwakho langenxa yobuqotho bakho; ngoba ukhulisile ilizwi lakho phezu kwalo lonke ibizo lakho." 
Psalms138:3 Ngosuku engakhala ngalo wangiphendula, wangiqinisa ng amandla emphefumulweni wami." 
Psalms138:4 Wonke amakhosi omhlaba azakudumisa, Nkosi, ngoba azwile amazwi omlomo wakho." 
Psalms138:5 Yebo, azahlabelela ngezindlela ze Nkosi, ngoba lukhulu udumo lwe Nkosi." 
Psalms138:6 Loba i Nkosi iphakeme, kube kanti iyabona othobekileyo; kodwa ozigqajayo iyamazi ekhatshana." 
Psalms138:7 Loba ngihamba phakathi kwenhlupheko, uzangiphilisa; uzakwelula isandla sakho umelana lolaka lezitha zami, lesandla sakho sokunene sizangisindisa." 
Psalms138:8 I Nkosi izangiphelelisela khona; uthando lwakho, Nkosi, lumi kuze kube nininini. Ungatshiyi imisebenzi yezandla zakho." 
Psalms139:1 Nkosi, ungihlolile, uya ng azi." 
Psalms139:2 Wena uyakwazi ukuhlala kwami lokusukuma kwami; uyaqedisisa imicabango yami ukhatshana. 
Psalms139:3 Uyahanqa ukuhamba kwami lokulala kwami, uzejwayele indlela zami zonke." 
Psalms139:4 Ngoba kalikho ilizwi elimini lwami, khangela Nkosi, usulazi lonke." 
Psalms139:5 Ungizingelezile emuva langaphambili, ubeke isandla sakho phezu kwami." 
Psalms139:6 Ulwazi lumangalisa kakhulu kimi; luphakeme, kangilakho ukufinyelela kulo." 
Psalms139:7 Ngizakuya ngaphi ngisuke kuMoya wakho? Kumbe ngizabalekela ngaphi ngisuke ebusweni bakho? 
Psalms139:8 Uba ngisenyukela emazulwini, lapho ukhona; uba ngisendlala icansi lami esihogweni, khangela, ukhona." 
Psalms139:9 Uba ngithatha amaphiko okusa, ngihlale emikhawulweni yolwandle," 
Psalms139:10 lalapho isandla sakho sizangikhokhela, lesokunene sakho singibambe." 
Psalms139:11 Uba ngisithi: Isibili umnyama uzangifihla, ng’khona ubusuku buzakuba yikukhanya kimi inhlangothi zonke." 
Psalms139:12 Ngitsho umnyama kawufihli kuwe, kodwa ubusuku bukhanya njengemini; njengomnyama kunjalo ukukhanya kuwe." 
Psalms139:13 Ngoba wena ungumnini wezinso zami, wangigubuzela esiswini sikamama." 
Psalms139:14 Ngizakudumisa, ngenxa yokuthi ngenziwe ngokwesabekayo, ngokumangalisayo. Imisebenzi yakho iyamangalisa; lomphefumulo wami uyakwazi kuhle kakhulu." 
Psalms139:15 Amathambo ami ayengafihlekanga kuwe, lapho ngangisenziwa ekusithekeni, ngenziwa ngobuciko ezindaweni ezizikileyo zomhlaba." 
Psalms139:16 Amehlo akho abona ibumba lami; legwalweni lwakho konke lokhu kwabhalwa, izinsuku o kwabunjwa ngazo, kunga ka bikho lakunye kwakho." 
Psalms139:17 Iligugu kangakanani-ke kimi imicabango yakho, O Nkulunkulu; bukhulu kangakanani ubunengi bayo!" 
Psalms139:18 Uba ngingayibala, minengi kuletshebetshebe. Lapho ngivuka, ngilokhu ngilawe." 
Psalms139:19 Isibili uzambulala omubi, Nkulunkulu! Ngakho lina bantu abomele igazi sukani kimi;" 
Psalms139:20 abakhuluma ngenkohliso ngawe, izitha zakho, ziphatha ngeze ibizo lakho." 
Psalms139:21 Kangibazondi yini, Nkosi, abakuzondayo, nginengwe ngabakuvukelayo?" 
Psalms139:22 Ngiyabazonda ngenzondo epheleleyo; sebeyizitha kimi. 
Psalms139:23 Ngihlola, Nkulunkulu, uyazi inhliziyo yami; ngilinga, uyazi imicabango yami," 
Psalms139:24 ubone ukuthi ikhona indlela embi kimi yini, ungikhokhele endleleni ephakade." 
Psalms140:1 Ngikhulula, Nkosi, emuntwini omubi, ungilondoloze emuntwini olesihluku," 
Psalms140:2 abaceba izinto ezimbi enhliziyweni, usuku lonke babuthanela izimpi." 
Psalms140:3 Balola ulimi lwabo njengenyoka, ubuhlungu bebululu bungaphansi kwendebe zabo. Selah." 
Psalms140:4 Ngilondoloze, Nkosi, ezandleni zomubi, ungivikele emuntwini olesihluku; abaceba ukuwisa inyawo zami." 
Psalms140:5 Abazigqajayo bangifihlele umjibila, lezintambo, bendlala imbule eceleni kwendlela; bangibekela izithiyo. Selah." 
Psalms140:6 Ngithe e Nkosi ni: Wena unguNkulunkulu wami. Beka indlebe elizwini lokuncenga kwami, Nkosi." 
Psalms140:7 Jehova, Nkosi, mandla osindiso lwami, wembese ikhanda lami esukwini lwezikhali." 
Psalms140:8 Ungavumeli, Nkosi, izifiso zomubi, ungaphumelelisi icebo lakhe elibi, hlezi baziphakamise. Selah." 
Psalms140:9 Nge khanda labangihanqileyo, ububi bendebe zabo kabubembese." 
Psalms140:10 Kakuthi amalahle atshisayo akhithikele phezu kwabo, ubawisela emlilweni, emigodini etshonayo, ukuze bangavuki." 
Psalms140:11 Umuntu wolimi kangamiswa elizweni; umuntu olesihluku, ububi buzamzingela kube yikuwiswa kwakhe." 
Psalms140:12 Ngiyazi ukuthi i Nkosi izasebenza udaba lohluphekayo, ilungelo labayanga." 
Psalms140:13 Isibili abalungileyo bazalidumisa ibizo lakho; abaqotho bazahlala ebusweni bakho. 
Psalms141:1 Nkosi, ngiyakhala kuwe; phangisa uze kimi; beka indlebe elizwini lami lapho ngikhala kuwe." 
Psalms141:2 Umkhuleko wami kawumiswe njeng empepha phambi kwakho, ukuphakanyiswa kwezandla zami njeng omnikelo wakusihlwa." 
Psalms141:3 Nkosi, bekela umlomo wami umlindi, gcina umnyango wendebe zami." 
Psalms141:4 Ungaphenduleli inhliziyo yami entweni embi, ukuthi ngenze izenzo ezimbi kanye labantu abenza ububi, ngingadli ezibilibocweni zabo." 
Psalms141:5 Olungileyo kangitshaye, kuzakuba ngumusa; kangisole, kuzakuba ngamafutha ekhanda; kakuyikuqhekeza ikhanda lami, ngoba lomkhuleko wami usezakuba sezinhluphekweni zabo." 
Psalms141:6 Abahluleli babo baphoselwa emaceleni edwala, bazakuzwa amazwi ami ngoba amnandi." 
Psalms141:7 Amathambo ethu ahlakazekile emlonyeni wengcwaba njengobandayo adabule emhlabathini. 
Psalms141:8 Kodwa amehlo ami akuwe, Jehova, Nkosi; ngithembele kuwe; ungawuchayi umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms141:9 Ngigcina emandleni omjibila a bangibekele wona, lezithiyo zabenzi bobubi." 
Psalms141:10 Ababi kabawele emambuleni abo kanye, ngize ngidlule mina." 
Psalms142:1 Ngakhalela e Nkosi ni ngelizwi lami, ngelizwi lami e Nkosi ni ngancenga." 
Psalms142:2 Ngathulula isikhalazo sami phambi kwayo, ngatshengisa ukuhlupheka kwami phambi kwayo." 
Psalms142:3 Lapho umoya wami uphela amandla phakathi kwami, wena wayazi indlela yami. Endleleni engihamba ngayo bangifihlele umjibila." 
Psalms142:4 Ngakhangela ngakwesokunene, khangela-ke, wayengekho ongaziyo; isiphephelo sangehlula, kakho owakhathalela umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms142:5 Ngakhalela kuwe, Nkosi, ngathi: Wena uyisiphephelo sami, isabelo sami elizweni labaphilayo." 
Psalms142:6 Lalela ukukhala kwami, ngoba ngehliselwe phansi kakhulu. Ngikhulula kwabangizingelayo, ngoba balamandla kulami." 
Psalms142:7 Khupha umphefumulo wami entolongweni, ukuze ngidumise ibizo lakho. Abalungileyo bazangibuthanela, ngoba uzangiphatha kuhle kakhulu." 
Psalms143:1 Nkosi, zwana umkhuleko wami, ubeke indlebe ekuncengeni kwami. Ungiphendule ngothembeko lwakho, ngokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms143:2 Njalo ungangeni kusahlulelo lenceku yakho, ngoba phambi kobuso bakho kakho ophilayo ozalungisiswa." 
Psalms143:3 Ngoba isitha sizingele umphefumulo wami, sacindezelela impilo yami emhlabathini, sangenza ngahlala emnyameni omkhulu, njengabakade bafa." 
Psalms143:4 Ngakho umoya wami uphela amandla phakathi kwami, lenhliziyo yami ithithibele phakathi kwami." 
Psalms143:5 Ngikhumbula insuku zekadeni, ngizindla ngazo zonke izenzo zakho, nginakane ngomsebenzi wezandla zakho." 
Psalms143:6 Ngelulela izandla zami kuwe; umphefumulo wami wom ele wena njengomhlaba owomileyo. Selah. 
Psalms143:7 Phangisa ungiphendule, Nkosi; umoya wami uyaphela. Ungangifihleli ubuso bakho, hlezi ngibe njengalabo abehlela emgodini." 
Psalms143:8 Ngizwisa uthandolomusa lwakho ekuseni, ngoba ngiyathemba kuwe. Ungazise indlela engingahamba ngayo, ngoba ngiyaphakamisela kuwe umphefumulo wami." 
Psalms143:9 Ngikhulula ezitheni zami, Nkosi; ngifihla kuwe." 
Psalms143:10 Ngifundisa ukwenza intando yakho, ngoba wena unguNkulunkulu wami. UMoya wakho muhle, ngikhokhelele elizweni lokuqonda." 
Psalms143:11 Ngenxa yebizo lakho, Nkosi, ngiphilisa. Ngokulunga kwakho khupha umphefumulo wami ekuhluphekeni." 
Psalms143:12 Langomusa wakho chitha izitha zami, ubhubhise bonke abahlupha umphefumulo wami, ngoba ngiyinceku yakho." 
Psalms144:1 Kayibusiswe i Nkosi, idwala lami, efundisela izandla zami impi, iminwe yami ukulwa;" 
Psalms144:2 umusa wami, lenqaba yami, umphotshongo wami ophakemeyo, lomkhululi wami, isihlangu sami, lengiphephela kuyo, ethobisa abantu bami ngaphansi kwami." 
Psalms144:3 Nkosi, umuntu uyini ukuthi umazi? Indodana yomuntu ukuthi uyinanze?" 
Psalms144:4 Umuntu unjengeze, insuku zakhe zinjengesithunzi esidlulayo." 
Psalms144:5 Nkosi, khothamisa amazulu akho, wehle; thinta izintaba ukuze zithunqe." 
Psalms144:6 Phazimisa umbane, ubachithe, uthumele imitshoko yakho, ubahlakaze." 
Psalms144:7 Yelula isandla sakho uphezulu, ungikhulule, ungophule emanzini amanengi, esandleni sabantwana besizwe," 
Psalms144:8 abamlomo wabo ukhuluma amanga, lesandla sabo sokunene singesokunene senkohliso." 
Psalms144:9 Ngizahlabelela kuwe ingoma entsha, Nkulunkulu; ngizahlabelela indumiso kuwe ngogubhu olulentambo ezilitshumi." 
Psalms144:10 Wena onika amakhosi usindiso, okhulula uDavida inceku yakho enkembeni embi." 
Psalms144:11 Ngophula, ungikhulule esandleni sabantwana besizwe, abamlomo wabo ukhuluma amanga, lesandla sabo sokunene singesokunene senkohliso." 
Psalms144:12 Ukuthi amadodana ethu abe njengezilimo ezikhula ebutsheni bazo, amadodakazi ethu njengamatshe engonsi abazwe njeng omfanekiso wesigodlo!" 
Psalms144:13 Ukuthi iziphala zethu zigcwale ziveze uhlobo ngohlobo; izimvu zethu zizale izinkulungwane, yebo, izinkulungwane ezilitshumi emadlelweni ethu!" 
Psalms144:14 Ukuthi inkabi zethu zingathwaliswa, kungabi lokufohlela phakathi, njalo kungabi lokuphuma, kumbe kungabi lesililo ezitaladeni zethu!" 
Psalms144:15 Bayathaba abantu okunjalo kubo; bayathaba abantu abaNkulunkulu wabo yi Nkosi. 
Psalms145:1 Ngizakuphakamisa, Nkulunkulu wami, Nkosi, ngibusise ibizo lakho kuze kube nini lanini." 
Psalms145:2 Ngensuku zonke ngizakubusisa, ngidumise ibizo lakho kuze kube nini lanini." 
Psalms145:3 Yinkulu i Nkosi, ifanele ukudunyiswa kakhulu, lobukhulu bayo kabuhloleki." 
Psalms145:4 Isizukulwana ngesizukulwana sizababaza imisebenzi yakho, sitshumayele izenzo zakho ezilamandla." 
Psalms145:5 Ngizakhuluma ngodumo lwakho olukhazimulayo lobukhosi bakho, langendaba zezimangaliso zakho." 
Psalms145:6 Njalo bazakhuluma ngamandla ezenzo zakho ezesabekayo, lobukhulu bakho ngibulandise." 
Psalms145:7 Bazathulula ngamazwi isikhumbuzo sokulunga kwakho okukhulu, bahlabele ngentokozo ngokulunga kwakho." 
Psalms145:8 Ilomusa lesihawu i Nkosi, iyaphuza ukuthukuthela, inkulu ngothando." 
Psalms145:9 I Nkosi ilungile kubo bonke, lezihawu zayo ziphezu kwayo yonke imisebenzi yayo." 
Psalms145:10 Imisebenzi yakho yonke izakudumisa, Nkosi, labangcwele bakho bazakubusisa." 
Psalms145:11 Bazakhuluma ngenkazimulo yombuso wakho, balandise ngamandla akho." 
Psalms145:12 Ukuze bazise abantwana babantu izenzo zayo ezilamandla, lenkazimulo yobukhosi bombuso wayo." 
Psalms145:13 Umbuso wakho ungumbuso wamaphakade wonke, lokubusa kwakho kumi kuso sonke isizukulwana ngesizukulwana." 
Psalms145:14 I Nkosi isekela bonke abawayo, iphakamise bonke abakhothemeyo." 
Psalms145:15 Amehlo abo bonke alindele kuwe, wena-ke uyabanika ukudla kwabo ngesikhathi sakho." 
Psalms145:16 Uyavula isandla sakho, usuthise isifiso sakho konke okuphilayo." 
Psalms145:17 I Nkosi ilungile endleleni zayo zonke, njalo ilomusa emisebenzini yayo yonke." 
Psalms145:18 I Nkosi iseduze labo bonke abayibizayo, labo bonke abayibiza ngeqiniso." 
Psalms145:19 Yenza isifiso sabayesabayo, iyezwa ukukhala kwabo, ibasindise." 
Psalms145:20 I Nkosi iyabalondoloza bonke abayithandayo; kodwa bonke ababi izababhubhisa. 
Psalms145:21 Umlomo wami uzakhuluma indumiso ye Nkosi, layo yonke inyama ibusise ibizo layo elingcwele kuze kube nini lanini." 
Psalms146:1 Dumisani i Nkosi! Dumisa i Nkosi, mphefumulo wami." 
Psalms146:2 Ngizayidumisa i Nkosi ngisaphila; ngizahlabelela indumiso kuNkulunkulu wami ngisesekhona. 
Psalms146:3 Lingabeki ithemba lenu eziphathamandleni, endodaneni yomuntu okungekho kuyo usindiso." 
Psalms146:4 Umoya wakhe uyaphuma, uyabuyela emhlabathini wakhe; ngalolosuku amacebo akhe ayaphela." 
Psalms146:5 Ubusisiwe yena oloNkulunkulu kaJakobe ukuthi abe lusizo lwakhe, othemba lakhe lise Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wakhe," 
Psalms146:6 owenza amazulu, lomhlaba, ulwandle, lakho konke okukukho, ogcina iqiniso kuze kube nininini," 
Psalms146:7 owenzela abacindezelweyo isahlulelo, obaphayo ukudla abalambileyo. I Nkosi iyakhulula izibotshwa," 
Psalms146:8 I Nkosi iyavula amehlo eziphofu; i Nkosi iyabalulamisa abakhothemeyo; i Nkosi iyabathanda abalungileyo. 
Psalms146:9 I Nkosi ilondoloza abemzini, isekele intandane lomfelokazi; kodwa indlela yababi iyayigenqula." 
Psalms146:10 I Nkosi izabusa kuze kube nininini, uNkulunkulu wakho, Ziyoni, kuze kube sesizukulwaneni ngesizukulwana. Dumisani i Nkosi!" 
Psalms147:1 Dumisani i Nkosi, ngoba kuhle ukuhlabelela indumiso kuNkulunkulu wethu, ngoba kumnandi, indumiso ifanele." 
Psalms147:2 I Nkosi iyayakha iJerusalema, iqoqe abahlakaziweyo bakoIsrayeli." 
Psalms147:3 Yelapha abadabukileyo enhliziyweni, ibophe izinsizi zabo." 
Psalms147:4 Ibala inani lezinkanyezi, izibize zonke ngamabizo." 
Psalms147:5 Yinkulu iNkosi yethu, njalo ngeyamandla amakhulu; ukuqedisisa kwayo kakulakunaniswa." 
Psalms147:6 I Nkosi iyaphakamisa abamnene, iyabawisela emhlabathini ababi." 
Psalms147:7 Hlabelelani e Nkosi ni ngokubonga; lihlabele indumiso kuNkulunkulu wethu ngechacho. 
Psalms147:8 Eyembesa amazulu ngamayezi, elungisela umhlaba izulu, ekhulisa utshani e zintab eni," 
Psalms147:9 enika inyamazana ukudla kwazo, amatsiyane ewabayi akhalayo." 
Psalms147:10 Kayithokozi ngamandla ebhiza, kayijabuleli imilenze yomuntu." 
Psalms147:11 I Nkosi ijabulela abayesabayo, labo abathembela emuseni wayo." 
Psalms147:12 Babaza i Nkosi, Jerusalema. Dumisa uNkulunkulu wakho, Ziyoni." 
Psalms147:13 Ngoba iqinise imigoqo yamasango akho; ibusise abantwana bakho phakathi kwakho. 
Psalms147:14 Iyenza ukuthula e mingcele ni yakho; ikusuthise ngamanono engqoloyi. 
Psalms147:15 Iyathumela umthetho wayo e mhlabe ni; ilizwi layo ligijima ngesiqubu esikhulu. 
Psalms147:16 Enika iliqhwa elikhithikayo njengoboya; ihaze ungqwaqwane njengomlotha. 
Psalms147:17 Iyaphosa isiqhotho sayo njengezigaqa; ngubani ongema phambi komqando wayo? 
Psalms147:18 Iyathumela ilizwi layo, ikuncibilikise; ivunguzise umoya wayo, amanzi ageleze." 
Psalms147:19 Iyamemezela ilizwi layo kuJakobe, izimiso zayo lezahlulelo zayo kuIsrayeli." 
Psalms147:20 Kayenzanga njalo lakusiphi isizwe; lezahlulelo zayo kazizazi. Dumisani i Nkosi! 
Psalms148:1 Dumisani i Nkosi! Dumisani i Nkosi lisemazulwini, idumiseni endaweni eziphezulu." 
Psalms148:2 Idumiseni lonke zingilosi zayo. Idumiseni lonke mabandla ayo. 
Psalms148:3 Idumiseni langa lenyanga. Idumiseni lonke zinkanyezi ezikhanyayo. 
Psalms148:4 Idumiseni mazulu amazulu, lani manzi aphezu kwamazulu." 
Psalms148:5 Kakudumise ibizo le Nkosi; ngoba yona yalaya, kwasekudalwa." 
Psalms148:6 Yakumisa kuze kube nini lanini; yakhupha isimiso esingayikwedlula. 
Psalms148:7 Dumisani i Nkosi lisemhlabeni, migobho yolwandle, lani zinziki zonke," 
Psalms148:8 mlilo lesiqhotho, liqhwa elikhithikayo lenkungu, siphepho esenza ilizwi layo;" 
Psalms148:9 zintaba lamaqaqa wonke, zihlahla zezithelo lemisedari yonke," 
Psalms148:10 zinyamazana zeganga lezifuyo zonke, zinto ezihuquzelayo lenyoni eziphaphayo." 
Psalms148:11 Makhosi omhlaba, lani zizwe zonke, ziphathamandla, lani babusi bomhlaba," 
Psalms148:12 majaha, lani-ke zintombi, maxhegu labatsha." 
Psalms148:13 Kabadumise ibizo le Nkosi, ngoba ibizo layo lodwa liphakeme; ubukhosi bayo bu phezu komhlaba lamazulu." 
Psalms148:14 Njalo iphakamisile uphondo lwabantu bayo, indumiso yabo bonke abangcwele bayo, eyabantwana bakoIsrayeli, abantu abaseduze layo. Dumisani i Nkosi!" 
Psalms149:1 Dumisani i Nkosi! HIabelelani i Nkosi ingoma entsha, indumiso yayo ebandleni labangcwele." 
Psalms149:2 UIsrayeli kathokoze ngoMenzi wakhe, abantwana beZiyoni kabathabe eNkosini yabo." 
Psalms149:3 Kabadumise ibizo layo ngokusina, kabayihlabelele indumiso ngesigujana lechacho." 
Psalms149:4 Ngoba i Nkosi iyathokoza ngabantu bayo; izacecisa abamnene ngosindiso. 
Psalms149:5 Abangcwele kabathokoze ngendumiso, kabahlabelele ngenjabulo emibhedeni yabo." 
Psalms149:6 Indumiso zikaNkulunkulu zisemphinjeni wabo, lenkemba esika nhlangothi mbili esandleni sabo," 
Psalms149:7 ukuze benze impindiselo phezu kwabahedeni, izijeziso phezu kwezizwe," 
Psalms149:8 ukuze babophe amakhosi azo ngamaketane, lezikhulu zazo ngezibopho zensimbi," 
Psalms149:9 ukuze benze isahlulelo esibhaliweyo phezu kwazo. Loludumo abangcwele bayo bonke balalo. Dumisani i Nkosi! 
Psalms150:1 Dumisani i Nkosi! Dumisani uNkulunkulu endlini yakhe engcwele; mdumiseni emkhathini wamandla akhe. 
Psalms150:2 Mdumiseni ngenxa yezenzo zakhe ezilamandla, limdumise ngenxa yobunengi bobukhulu bakhe." 
Psalms150:3 Mdumiseni ngokuvuthelwa kophondo, limdumise ngogubhu lwezintambo lechacho," 
Psalms150:4 limdumise ngesigujana langokusina, limdumise ngezinto zokuhlabelela ezilentambo langomhlanga," 
Psalms150:5 limdumise ngensimbi ezincencethayo ezihlokomayo, limdumise ngensimbi ezincencethayo ezikhala kakhulu." 
Psalms150:6 Konke okuphefumulayo kakudumise i Nkosi. Dumisani i Nkosi! 
Proverbs1:1 Izaga zikaSolomoni, indodana kaDavida, inkosi yakoIsrayeli;" 
Proverbs1:2 ukwazi inhlakanipho lokulaywa, ukuqedisisa amazwi okuqedisisa," 
Proverbs1:3 ukwemukela ukulaya kwenhlakanipho, ukulunga, lesahlulelo, lokuqonda;" 
Proverbs1:4 ukunika abangelalwazi inhlakanipho, ijaha ulwazi lengqondo." 
Proverbs1:5 Ohlakaniphileyo uzakuzwa, andise ukufunda, loqedisisayo uzazuza izeluleko," 
Proverbs1:6 ukuqedisisa isaga lomzekeliso, amazwi abahlakaniphileyo, lamalibho abo." 
Proverbs1:7 Ukwesaba i Nkosi kuyikuqala kolwazi; izithutha ziyadelela inhlakanipho lokulaywa. 
Proverbs1:8 Ndodana yami, zwana ukulaya kukayihlo, ungawudeli umlayo kanyoko;" 
Proverbs1:9 ngoba ku za kuba ngumqhele womusa ekhanda lakho, lemigaxo entanyeni yakho." 
Proverbs1:10 Ndodana yami, uba izoni zikuhuga, ungavumi." 
Proverbs1:11 Uba zisithi: Hamba lathi, si ye cathamela igazi, sicatshele ongelacala kungelasizatho;" 
Proverbs1:12 sibaginye bephila njengengcwaba, yebo, ngokupheleleyo, njengabehlela egodini." 
Proverbs1:13 Sizathola yonke impahla eligugu, sigcwalise izindlu zethu ngempango." 
Proverbs1:14 Phosela inkatho yakho phakathi kwethu; sonke sibe lesikhwama semali sinye. 
Proverbs1:15 Ndodana yami, ungahambi lazo endleleni; unqande unyawo lwakho emkhondweni wazo." 
Proverbs1:16 Ngoba inyawo zazo zigijimela ebubini, ziphangisa ukuchitha igazi." 
Proverbs1:17 Isibili, imbule lendlalelwa ize phambi kwamehlo aloba yiyiphi inyoni." 
Proverbs1:18 Lalaba bacathamela igazi labo, bacatshele imiphefumulo yabo." 
Proverbs1:19 Zinjalo indlela zakhe wonke ozuza inzuzo ngokuphanga; ithatha impilo yabaniniyo. 
Proverbs1:20 Inhlakanipho enkulu iyamemeza ngaphandle, ikhupha ilizwi layo emidangeni." 
Proverbs1:21 Iyamemeza endaweni eqakathekileyo yokuxokozela, ekungeneni kwamasango; emzini itsho amazwi ayo" 
Proverbs1:22 isithi: Koze kube nini, lina elingelalwazi, lithanda ukungabi lalwazi, labaklolodayo bezifisela ukukloloda, leziphukuphuku zizonda ulwazi?" 
Proverbs1:23 Phendukelani ekukhuzeni kwami; khangelani, ngizathululela umoya wami kini, ngilazise amazwi ami." 
Proverbs1:24 Ngoba ngibizile, kodwa lala; ngelulile isandla sami, kodwa kakho onanzayo;" 
Proverbs1:25 ladelela sonke iseluleko sami, kalivumanga ukukhuza kwami;" 
Proverbs1:26 mina-ke ngizahleka ukuchitheka kwenu, ngiklolode ekufikeni kokwesaba kwenu," 
Proverbs1:27 ekufikeni kokwesaba kwenu njengesiphepho, lokuchitheka kwenu kufika njengesivunguzane, lapho ubuhlungu losizi kulehlela." 
Proverbs1:28 Khona bazangibiza, kodwa kangiyikusabela; bazangidingisisa, kodwa kabayikungithola." 
Proverbs1:29 Ngenxa yokuthi babezonda ulwazi, bengakhethanga ukwesaba i Nkosi." 
Proverbs1:30 Kabavumanga iseluleko sami, bedelela konke ukukhuza kwami." 
Proverbs1:31 Ngakho bazakudla okwesithelo sendlela yabo, basuthiswe ngamacebo abo." 
Proverbs1:32 Ngoba ukuhlehla kwabangelalwazi kuzababulala, lokwenwaba kweziphukuphuku kuzababhubhisa." 
Proverbs1:33 Kodwa ongilalelayo uzahlala evikelekile, onwabe ekwesabeni okubi." 
Proverbs2:1 Ndodana yami, uba usemukela amazwi ami, ugcine kuwe imilayo yami," 
Proverbs2:2 ukuthi wenze indlebe yakho ilalele inhlakanipho, uthobise inhliziyo yakho ekuqedisiseni," 
Proverbs2:3 yebo, uba ukhalela ukuqedisisa, ukhuphele ilizwi lakho ekuzwisiseni," 
Proverbs2:4 uba ukudinga njengesiliva, ukuphenye njengezimpahla eziligugu ezifihliweyo," 
Proverbs2:5 khona uzaqedisisa ukuyesaba i Nkosi, uthole ulwazi lukaNkulunkulu." 
Proverbs2:6 Ngoba i Nkosi inika inhlakanipho; ulwazi lokuqedisisa kuvela emlonyeni wayo. 
Proverbs2:7 Iyababekela abaqotho inhlakanipho eqotho; iyisihlangu kubo abahamba ngokuqonda," 
Proverbs2:8 ukugcina indlela zesahlulelo; izalondoloza indlela zabangcwele bayo. 
Proverbs2:9 Khona uzaqedisisa ukulunga, lesahlulelo, lokuqonda; yonke indlela elungileyo." 
Proverbs2:10 Lapho inhlakanipho izangena enhliziyweni yakho, lolwazi lube mnandi emphefumulweni wakho;" 
Proverbs2:11 ingqondo izakugcina, ukuqedisisa kukulondoloze;" 
Proverbs2:12 ukukophula endleleni embi, emuntwini okhuluma izinto eziphambeneyo;" 
Proverbs2:13 abatshiya indlela zobuqotho, ukuze bahambe ngendlela zobumnyama;" 
Proverbs2:14 abathokoza ngokwenza okubi, bejabula ekuphambukeni komubi;" 
Proverbs2:15 abandlela zabo ziphambene, begobile emikhondweni yabo;" 
Proverbs2:16 ukukophula kowesifazana wemzini, kowezizwe okhohlisa ngamazwi akhe;" 
Proverbs2:17 otshiya umngane wobutsha bakhe, ekhohlwa isivumelwano sikaNkulunkulu wakhe;" 
Proverbs2:18 ngoba indlu yakhe itshonela ekufeni, lemikhondo yakhe emimoyeni efileyo." 
Proverbs2:19 Bonke abangena kuye kabayikubuya, njalo kabayikufinyelela endleleni zempilo." 
Proverbs2:20 Ukuze uhambe endleleni yabalungileyo, ugcine imikhondo yamalungisa." 
Proverbs2:21 Ngoba abaqotho bazahlala elizweni, labapheleleyo basale kulo;" 
Proverbs2:22 kodwa abakhohlakeleyo bazaqunywa basuswe elizweni, labaphambekayo badatshulwe basuswe kulo." 
Proverbs3:1 Ndodana yami, ungakhohlwa umlayo wami, kodwa inhliziyo yakho kayigcine imilayo yami." 
Proverbs3:2 Ngoba yengezelela kuwe ubude bezinsuku leminyaka yempilo lokuthula. 
Proverbs3:3 Umusa lothembeko kakungakutshiyi, kubophele entanyeni yakho, ukubhale esibhebheni senhliziyo yakho." 
Proverbs3:4 Ngalokho uzathola umusa lokuqedisisa okuhle emehlweni kaNkulunkulu labantu. 
Proverbs3:5 Themba e Nkosi ni ngenhliziyo yakho yonke, ungeyami ekuqedisiseni kwakho." 
Proverbs3:6 Ivume endleleni zakho zonke, yona-ke izaqondisa imikhondo yakho." 
Proverbs3:7 Ungabi ngohlakaniphileyo emehlweni akho; yesabe i Nkosi, usuke ebubini." 
Proverbs3:8 Kuzakuba yikwelatshwa kwenkaba yakho, lokunathwayo kwamathambo akho." 
Proverbs3:9 Hlonipha i Nkosi ngemfuyo yakho, langezithelo zakho zokuqala zesivuno sakho sonke." 
Proverbs3:10 Khona iziphala zakho zizagcwaliswa ngenala, lezikhamelo zakho zewayini ziphuphume iwayini elitsha." 
Proverbs3:11 Ndodana yami, ungadeleli ukulaya kwe Nkosi, unganengwa yikukhuza kwayo." 
Proverbs3:12 Ngoba i Nkosi iyamlaya emthandayo, yebo, njengoyise indodana athokoza ngayo." 
Proverbs3:13 Ubusisiwe umuntu o thola inhlakanipho, lomuntu o zuza ukuqedisisa." 
Proverbs3:14 Ngoba inzuzo yakho ingcono kulenzuzo yesiliva, lesivuno sakho kulegolide." 
Proverbs3:15 Kuligugu elidlula amatshe aligugu, lakho konke ongakufisa kakulinganiswa lakho." 
Proverbs3:16 Ubude bezinsuku busesandleni sakho sokunene, kwesokhohlo sakho inotho lodumo." 
Proverbs3:17 Izindlela zakho zizindlela zentokozo, lemikhondo yakho yonke iyikuthula." 
Proverbs3:18 Kuyisihlahla sempilo kwabakubambayo, lobambelela kukho ubusisiwe." 
Proverbs3:19 Ngenhlakanipho i Nkosi yasekela umhlaba; yamisa amazulu ngokuqedisisa. 
Proverbs3:20 Ngolwazi lwayo izinziki zaqhekezwa, lamayezi athonta amazolo." 
Proverbs3:21 Ndodana yami, kakungasuki emehlweni akho; gcina inhlakanipho eqotho lengqondo." 
Proverbs3:22 Njalo kuzakuba yimpilo yomphefumulo wakho, lesisa entanyeni yakho." 
Proverbs3:23 Khona uzahamba indlela yakho uvikelekile, lonyawo lwakho kaluyikukhubeka." 
Proverbs3:24 Nxa ulala phansi, kawuyikwesaba, yebo, uzalala, lobuthongo bakho buzakuba mnandi." 
Proverbs3:25 Ungesabi uvalo olujumayo, kumbe ukuchitheka kwababi nxa kufika." 
Proverbs3:26 Ngoba i Nkosi izakuba sethembeni lakho, igcine unyawo lwakho ukuze lungabanjwa." 
Proverbs3:27 Ungagodleli umninikho okuhle nxa kusemandleni esandla sakho ukukwenza. 
Proverbs3:28 Ungathi kumakhelwane wakho: Hamba, ubuye, kusasa ngizakunika; nxa ulakho." 
Proverbs3:29 Ungacebi okubi ngomakhelwane wakho, ngoba yena uhlala lawe evikelekile." 
Proverbs3:30 Ungaphikisani lomuntu kungelasizatho, nxa engakonanga." 
Proverbs3:31 Ungahawukeli umuntu oyisidlwangudlwangu; ungakhethi leyodwa yezindlela zakhe. 
Proverbs3:32 Ngoba ophambeneyo uyisinengiso e Nkosi ni, kodwa imfihlo yayo ikwabaqotho." 
Proverbs3:33 Isiqalekiso se Nkosi sisendlini yomubi, kodwa iyawubusisa umuzi wabalungileyo." 
Proverbs3:34 Isibili, yona iyabeyisa abeyisayo, kodwa inika umusa kwabathobekileyo." 
Proverbs3:35 Abahlakaniphileyo bazakudla ilifa lodumo, kodwa iphakamisa abayizithutha ehlazweni." 
Proverbs4:1 Zwanini, bantwana bami, umlayo kayihlo, linanzelele ukuze lazi ukuqedisisa." 
Proverbs4:2 Ngoba ngilinika imfundiso enhle, lingawutshiyi umlayo wami." 
Proverbs4:3 Ngoba bengiyindodana kababa, ngithambile, ngingedwa phambi kukamama." 
Proverbs4:4 Wasengifundisa wathi kimi: Inhliziyo yakho kayibambelele emazwini ami; gcina imilayo yami, uphile." 
Proverbs4:5 Zuza inhlakanipho, uzuze ukuqedisisa, ungakhohlwa; ungaphambuki emazwini omlomo wami." 
Proverbs4:6 Ungakutshiyi, njalo kuzakulondoloza; ukuthande, njalo kuzakulinda." 
Proverbs4:7 Okokuqala yinhlakanipho; zuza inhlakanipho; langenzuzo yakho yonke uzuze ukuqedisisa. 
Proverbs4:8 Kukhulise, njalo kuzakuphakamisa; kuzakunika udumo nxa ukugona." 
Proverbs4:9 Kuzanika ikhanda lakho umqhele womusa; kuzakulethela umqhele wodumo. 
Proverbs4:10 Zwana, ndodana yami, wemukele amazwi ami, leminyaka yempilo izakuba minengi kuwe." 
Proverbs4:11 Ngikufundisile endleleni yenhlakanipho; ngikwenze wanyathela emikhondweni yobuqotho. 
Proverbs4:12 Ekuhambeni kwakho inyathelo lakho kaliyikufinyezwa, njalo nxa ugijima kawuyikukhubeka." 
Proverbs4:13 Bambelela ekulayweni, unga ku yekeli; kugcine, ngoba kuyimpilo yakho." 
Proverbs4:14 Ungangeni emkhondweni wabakhohlakeleyo, ungahambi endleleni yababi." 
Proverbs4:15 Iyekele, ungedluli ngayo, phambuka kuyo, wedlule." 
Proverbs4:16 Ngoba kabalali uba bengenzanga okubi; lobuthongo babo buyasuswa uba bengakhubekisanga muntu. 
Proverbs4:17 Ngoba badla isinkwa senkohlakalo, banathe iwayini lobudlwangudlwangu." 
Proverbs4:18 Kodwa indlela yabalungileyo injengokukhanya okukhanyayo, kuqhubeka kukhanya kuze kube semini enkulu." 
Proverbs4:19 Indlela yababi injengomnyama; kabazi ukuthi bazakhutshwa yini. 
Proverbs4:20 Ndodana yami, lalela amazwi ami, ubeke indlebe yakho ekukhulumeni kwami." 
Proverbs4:21 Kakungaphunyuki emehlweni akho; ukugcine phakathi kwenhliziyo yakho. 
Proverbs4:22 Ngoba kuyimpilo kwabakutholayo, lempilo enhle yenyama yabo yonke." 
Proverbs4:23 Gcina inhliziyo yakho phezu kwakho konke okungagcinwa, ngoba kuvela kikho ukuphuma kwempilo." 
Proverbs4:24 Susa kuwe ukuphambana komlomo, lokuphambeka kwendebe kususele khatshana lawe." 
Proverbs4:25 Amehlo akho kawakhangele phambili, lenkophe zakho ziqonde phambi kwakho." 
Proverbs4:26 Linganisa umkhondo wonyawo lwakho, ukuze zonke indlela zakho ziqine." 
Proverbs4:27 Ungaphambukeli ngakwesokunene kumbe ngakwesokhohlo; uphambule unyawo lwakho ebubini. 
Proverbs5:1 Ndodana yami, lalela inhlakanipho yami, beka indlebe yakho ekuqedisiseni kwami," 
Proverbs5:2 ukuze uqaphele ingqondo, lendebe zakho zigcine ulwazi." 
Proverbs5:3 Ngoba indebe zowesifazana wemzini zithonta uluju, lomlomo wakhe ubutshelezi kulamafutha." 
Proverbs5:4 Kodwa ukucina kwakhe kuyababa njengomhlonyane, kubukhali njengenkemba esika nhlangothi mbili." 
Proverbs5:5 Inyawo zakhe zehlela ekufeni; izinyathelo zakhe zibambelela esihogweni. 
Proverbs5:6 Hlezi ulinganise indlela yempilo, imikhondo yakhe iyazulazula, kananzeleli." 
Proverbs5:7 Ngakho-ke, bantwana, ngilalelani, lingaphambuki emazwini omlomo wami." 
Proverbs5:8 Dedisela indlela yakho khatshana laye, ungasondeli emnyango wendlu yakhe;" 
Proverbs5:9 hlezi unikele udumo lwakho kwabanye, leminyaka yakho kolesihluku;" 
Proverbs5:10 hlezi abezizwe bazisuthise ngamandla akho, lemitshikatshika yakho ibe sendlini yowezizweni;" 
Proverbs5:11 njalo ububule ekupheleni kwakho, lapho inyama yakho lomzimba wakho sekudliwe;" 
Proverbs5:12 njalo uthi: Ngikuzonde njani ukulaywa, lenhliziyo yami yadelela ukukhuzwa!" 
Proverbs5:13 Kangizwanga-ke ilizwi labafundisi bami; kangibekanga indlebe zami kwabangifundisayo! 
Proverbs5:14 Ngaphosa ngaba ebubini bonke phakathi kwebandla lenhlangano. 
Proverbs5:15 Natha amanzi emgodini wakho, lemifula ephuma phakathi komthombo wakho." 
Proverbs5:16 Imithombo yakho ichitheke phandle, izifula zamanzi emidangeni." 
Proverbs5:17 Kakube ngokwakho wedwa, kungabi ngokwabezizweni kanye lawe." 
Proverbs5:18 Umthombo wakho kawubusiswe; uthokoze ngomfazi wobutsha bakho; 
Proverbs5:19 impala ethandekayo kakhulu, legogo elibukekayo; amabele akhe kawakusuthise sonke isikhathi, uzule othandweni lwakhe kokuphela." 
Proverbs5:20 Kungani-ke, ndodana yami, uzule kowesifazana wemzini, ugone isifuba sowemzini?" 
Proverbs5:21 Ngoba indlela zomuntu ziphambi kwamehlo e Nkosi; njalo iyalinganisa yonke imikhondo yakhe. 
Proverbs5:22 Ezakhe iziphambeko zizabamba omubi, abanjwe zintambo zesono sakhe." 
Proverbs5:23 Yena uzakufa ngokungalaywa, lebukhulwini bobuthutha bakhe uzaduha." 
Proverbs6:1 Ndodana yami, uba uyisibambiso somakhelwane wakho, waqakezela owezizwe isandla sakho," 
Proverbs6:2 uthiywe ngamazwi omlomo wakho, ubanjwe ngamazwi omlomo wakho." 
Proverbs6:3 Yenza lokhu khathesi, ndodana yami, uzophule, lokhu usesandleni sikamakhelwane wakho; hamba, uzithobe, umncengisise umakhelwane wakho." 
Proverbs6:4 Unganiki amehlo akho ubuthongo, lokuwozela enkopheni zakho." 
Proverbs6:5 Uzophule njengomziki esandleni somzingeli, lanjengenyoni esandleni somthiyi wenyoni." 
Proverbs6:6 Yana ebunyonyweni, vila, ubone indlela zabo, uhlakaniphe." 
Proverbs6:7 Obuthi, bungelamkhokheli, induna, lombusi," 
Proverbs6:8 bulungisa isinkwa sabo ehlobo, bubuthe ukudla kwabo esivunweni." 
Proverbs6:9 Koze kube nini, vila, ulele? Uzavuka nini ebuthongweni bakho?" 
Proverbs6:10 Ubuthongo obuncinyane, ukuwozela okuncinyane, ukusonga izandla okuncinyane ukuthi ulale," 
Proverbs6:11 besebusiza ubuyanga bakho njengesihambi, lenswelo yakho njengomuntu olesihlangu." 
Proverbs6:12 Umuntu kaBheliyali, umuntu okhohlakeleyo, ohamba lomlomo ophambeneyo," 
Proverbs6:13 afice amehlo akhe, akhulume ngenyawo zakhe, afundise ngeminwe yakhe," 
Proverbs6:14 ukuphambuka kusenhliziyweni yakhe, uceba okubi ngesikhathi sonke, ephosela ingxabano." 
Proverbs6:15 Ngenxa yalokhu ingozi yakhe izafika masinyane, ahle ephuke, kuze kungabi leselapho." 
Proverbs6:16 Lezizinto eziyisithupha i Nkosi iyazizonda; yebo, eziyisikhombisa ziyizinengiso emphefumulweni wakhe:" 
Proverbs6:17 Amehlo aphakemeyo, ulimi oluqamba amanga, lezandla ezichitha igazi elingelacala," 
Proverbs6:18 inhliziyo eceba amacebo amabi, inyawo eziphangisa ukugijimela obubi," 
Proverbs6:19 umfakazi wamanga ophafuza izinkohliso, lophosela ingxabano phakathi kwabazalwane." 
Proverbs6:20 Ndodana yami, gcina umlayo kayihlo, ungakudeli ukufundisa kukanyoko." 
Proverbs6:21 Kubophele enhliziyweni yakho njalo, kubophele entanyeni yakho." 
Proverbs6:22 Ekuhambeni kwakho kuzakukhokhela, ekulaleni kwakho kukulondoloze, lekuvukeni kwakho khona kukhulume lawe." 
Proverbs6:23 Ngoba umlayo uyisibane, lokufundisa kuyikukhanya, lokukhuza kokulaya kuyindlela yempilo," 
Proverbs6:24 ukuze kukugcine emfazini omubi, emazwini ayengayo olimi lowesifazana wemzini." 
Proverbs6:25 Ungaloyisi ubuhle bakhe enhliziyweni yakho; angakuthathi ngenkophe zakhe. 
Proverbs6:26 Ngoba ngenxa yomfazi o yisiphingi ungafika ecezwini lwesinkwa, lomfazi womuntu uzingela umphefumulo oligugu." 
Proverbs6:27 Kambe, umuntu angaphatha umlilo esifubeni sakhe, lezigqoko zakhe zingatshi?" 
Proverbs6:28 Umuntu angahamba phezu kwamalahle avuthayo, lenyawo zakhe zingatshi yini?" 
Proverbs6:29 Unjalo ongena kumkamakhelwane wakhe; wonke omthintayo kayikuba msulwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Kabalideleli isela, nxa liseba ukuthi ligcwalise umphefumulo walo, ngoba lilambile." 
Proverbs6:31 Uba litholwa, lihlawula kuphindwe kasikhombisa, linika yonke impahla yendlu yalo." 
Proverbs6:32 Ofeba lowesifazana uswela ingqondo; owenza lokhu nguye ochitha umphefumulo wakhe. 
Proverbs6:33 Uzathola ukutshaywa lesigcono, lehlazo lakhe kaliyikwesulwa." 
Proverbs6:34 Ngoba ubukhwele bululaka lomuntu; ngakho kayikuba lasihawu ngosuku lwempindiselo. 
Proverbs6:35 Kayikunanza loba yiyiphi inhlawulo, kayikuvuma lanxa usandisa isipho." 
Proverbs7:1 Ndodana yami, gcina amazwi ami, uzibekele imilayo yami." 
Proverbs7:2 Gcina imilayo yami, uphile, lomthetho wami njengenhlamvu yamehlo akho." 
Proverbs7:3 Ukubophele eminweni yakho, kubhale esibhebheni senhliziyo yakho." 
Proverbs7:4 Uthi kunhlakanipho: Ungudadewethu; ubize ukuqedisisa ngokuthi yisihlobo sakho; 
Proverbs7:5 ukuze kukugcine kumfazi wemzini, kowesifazana wemzini oyengayo ngamazwi akhe." 
Proverbs7:6 Ngoba ewindini lendlu yami, ngeminxibo yewindi ngalunguza phandle," 
Proverbs7:7 ngasengibona phakathi kwabangelalwazi, ngananzelela phakathi kwabatsha ijaha eliswele ingqondo," 
Proverbs7:8 lisedlula esitaladeni eceleni kwengonsi yakhe, linyathela endleleni yendlu yakhe," 
Proverbs7:9 kusihlwa, ngentambama yosuku, ebusuku obumnyama, lomnyama." 
Proverbs7:10 Khangela-ke, owesifazana walihlangabeza, le sembatho sewule, elemfihlo ngenhliziyo." 
Proverbs7:11 Lo wayelomsindo, eyisiqholo; inyawo zakhe kazihlali endlini yakhe." 
Proverbs7:12 Khathesi uphandle, abesesiba ezitaladeni, ecathama kuyo yonke ingonsi." 
Proverbs7:13 Ngokunjalo walibamba, walanga, waqinisa ubuso bakhe, wathi kulo:" 
Proverbs7:14 Imihlatshelo yeminikelo yokuthula ikimi; lamuhla se ngibhadele izifungo zami. 
Proverbs7:15 Ngakho-ke ngiphumile ukukuhlangabeza, ngidingisise ubuso bakho; ngikutholile." 
Proverbs7:16 Ngendlele umbheda wami ngezendlalo, ngamalembu acolekileyo kakhulu alemibalabala avela eGibhithe." 
Proverbs7:17 Ngifafazile umbheda wami ngemure*, izinhlaba, lekinamoni*." 
Proverbs7:18 Woza, sizidakise ngothando kuze kuse, sizithokozise ngothando olukhulu." 
Proverbs7:19 Ngoba indoda kayikho endlini yayo, ihambile uhambo khatshana." 
Proverbs7:20 Ithethe isaka lemali esandleni sayo; ngosuku lwenyanga egcweleyo izakuza endlini yayo. 
Proverbs7:21 Walihuga ngobunengi bemfundiso yakhe, walibamba ngamandla ngokuyenga kwendebe zakhe." 
Proverbs7:22 Lahle lamlandela njengenkabi isiya ekuhlatshweni, lanjengesiphukuphuku sisiya ekujezisweni esongweni lenqagala;" 
Proverbs7:23 uze umtshoko uhlabe isibindi salo, njengenyoni iphangisela esifwini, ingazi ukuthi simelene lempilo yayo." 
Proverbs7:24 Khathesi-ke, bantwana, ngizweni, lilalele amazwi omlomo wami." 
Proverbs7:25 Inhliziyo yakho kayingaphambukeli endleleni zakhe; ungaduhi emikhondweni yakhe. 
Proverbs7:26 Ngoba ubawisele phansi abanengi abalimeleyo, labo bonke ababuleweyo bakhe banengi." 
Proverbs7:27 Indlu yakhe izindlela zesihogo, ezehlela emakamelweni okufa." 
Proverbs8:1 Inhlakanipho kayimemezi yini, lokuqedisisa kukhuphe ilizwi lakho?" 
Proverbs8:2 Engqongeni yezindawo eziphakemeyo, ngasendleleni, phakathi kwezindlela kumi." 
Proverbs8:3 Eceleni kwamasango, entubeni yomuzi, e kungen eni kweminyango kuyamemeza kakhulu kuthi:" 
Proverbs8:4 Kini, madoda, ngiyamemeza, lelizwi lami lisebantwaneni babantu." 
Proverbs8:5 Lina elingelalwazi, qedisisani inhlakanipho; lani zithutha, qedisisani nge nhliziyo." 
Proverbs8:6 Zwanini, ngoba ngizakhuluma izinto zobukhosi, lokuvula kwendebe zami kuzakuba yikuqonda." 
Proverbs8:7 Ngoba umlomo wami ukhuluma iqiniso, lenkohlakalo iyisinengiso endebeni zami." 
Proverbs8:8 Wonke amazwi omlomo wami asekulungeni; kakukho okutshilekileyo lokugobileyo kuwo. 
Proverbs8:9 Wonke aqondile kulowo oqedisisayo, alungile kulabo abathola ulwazi." 
Proverbs8:10 Yemukelani ukufundisa kwami, hatshi isiliva, lolwazi kulegolide elikhethekileyo." 
Proverbs8:11 Ngoba inhlakanipho ingcono kulamatshe amahle, lakho konke okufisekayo kakulakulinganiswa layo." 
Proverbs8:12 Mina nhlakanipho ngihlala lokuqedisisa, ngithola ulwazi lamacebo." 
Proverbs8:13 Ukwesaba i Nkosi kuyikuzonda ububi; ukuzigqaja, lokuziqhenya, lendlela embi, lomlomo wokuphambeka ngiyakuzonda." 
Proverbs8:14 Iseluleko ngesami, lenhlakanipho eqotho; ngiyikuqedisisa; amandla ngawami." 
Proverbs8:15 Ngami amakhosi ayabusa, lababusi bamisa ukulunga." 
Proverbs8:16 Ngami iziphathamandla ziyabusa, lezikhulu, bonke abehluleli bomhlaba." 
Proverbs8:17 Mina ngiyathanda abangithandayo, lalabo abangidingisisayo bazangithola." 
Proverbs8:18 Inotho lodumo kukimi, inotho eqhubekayo lokulunga." 
Proverbs8:19 Isithelo sami singcono kulegolide, legolide elicwengekileyo, lesivuno sami kulesiliva esikhethekileyo." 
Proverbs8:20 Ngihamba endleleni yokulunga, phakathi kwemikhondo yesahlulelo;" 
Proverbs8:21 ukuthi ngenze abangithandayo badle ilifa lemfuyo; ngigcwalise iziphala zabo. 
Proverbs8:22 I Nkosi yangidala ngaba yikuqala kwendlela yayo, ngaphambi kwemisebenzi yayo yendulo." 
Proverbs8:23 Ngamiswa kwasephakadeni, kusukela ekuqaleni, kusukela emandulo omhlaba." 
Proverbs8:24 Kungakabi khona izinziki nga se ngizelwe, ingakabi khona imithombo enzima ngamanzi." 
Proverbs8:25 Intaba zingakamiswa, kungakabi khona amaqaqa, nga se ngizelwe." 
Proverbs8:26 Ingakawenzi umhlaba lemimango, lokuqala kwentuli zomhlaba." 
Proverbs8:27 Lapho ilungisa amazulu ngangikhonapho; lapho imisa umkhathi ngaphezu kwenziki; 
Proverbs8:28 lapho imisa amayezi ngaphezulu; lapho iqinisa imithombo yenziki; 
Proverbs8:29 lapho imisela ulwandle umngcele walo ukuze amanzi angeqi umlayo wayo; lapho imisa izisekelo zomhlaba; 
Proverbs8:30 khona ngangiseduze layo ngiyingcitshi, ngizintokozo z ayo usuku ngosuku, ngidlala phambi kwayo ngaso sonke isikhathi," 
Proverbs8:31 ngidlala elizweni lomhlaba wayo, lentokozo zami zisebantwaneni babantu." 
Proverbs8:32 Ngakho-ke, bantwana bami, ngizweni; ngoba babusisiwe a bagcina indlela zami." 
Proverbs8:33 Zwanini ukulaya, lihlakaniphe, linga ku deli." 
Proverbs8:34 Ubusisiwe umuntu ongizwayo, alinde insuku ngensuku emasangweni ami, alinde emigubazini yeminyango yami." 
Proverbs8:35 Ngoba ongitholayo uthola impilo, azuze umusa e Nkosi ni." 
Proverbs8:36 Kodwa owona kimi wona umphefumulo wakhe; bonke abangizondayo bathanda ukufa. 
Proverbs9:1 Inhlakanipho enkulu yakhe indlu yayo, ibaze insika zayo eziyisikhombisa." 
Proverbs9:2 Ihlabe okuhlatshwayo kwayo, ixubanise iwayini layo, futhi yalungisa itafula layo." 
Proverbs9:3 Ithume incekukazi zayo, iyamemeza engqongeni zendawo eziphakemeyo zomuzi zisithi:" 
Proverbs9:4 Loba ngubani ongelalwazi? Kaphendukele lapha; oswele ingqondo, ithi kuye:" 
Proverbs9:5 Wozani, lidle okwesinkwa sami, linathe okwewayini e ngi li xubanisileyo." 
Proverbs9:6 Yekelani abangelalwazi liphile, lihambe ngokuqonda ngendlela yokuqedisisa." 
Proverbs9:7 Osola isiklolodi uzizuzela ihlazo, lokhuza okhohlakeleyo u zi zuz ela isici." 
Proverbs9:8 Ungasoli isiklolodi, hlezi sikuzonde; sola ohlakaniphileyo, njalo uzakuthanda." 
Proverbs9:9 Nika ohlakaniphileyo, njalo uzakuba lokhu ehlakanipha; fundisa olungileyo, njalo uzakwandisa ukufunda." 
Proverbs9:10 Ukuyesaba i Nkosi kuyikuqala kwenhlakanipho, lolwazi lwabangcwele luyikuqedisisa." 
Proverbs9:11 Ngoba ngami insuku zakho zizakwandiswa, leminyaka yempilo yengezelelwe kuwe." 
Proverbs9:12 Uba uhlakaniphile, uzakuba uzihlakaniphele; uba ukloloda, uzakuthwala wedwa." 
Proverbs9:13 Owesifazana oyisithutha ulomsindo, kalangqondo, kazi lutho." 
Proverbs9:14 Ngoba uhlala emnyango wendlu yakhe, esihlalweni, e ndaw eni eziphakemeyo zomuzi," 
Proverbs9:15 ukubiza abadlulayo ngendlela, abahamba beqondile emikhondweni yabo, esithi:" 
Proverbs9:16 Loba ngubani ongelalwazi? Kaphendukele lapha; loswele ingqondo, uthi kuye:" 
Proverbs9:17 Amanzi ebiweyo amnandi, lesinkwa sensitha siyahlabusa." 
Proverbs9:18 Kodwa kazi ukuthi abafileyo balapho; abanxusiweyo bakhe basenzikini yesihogo. 
Proverbs10:1 Izaga zikaSolomoni. Indodana ehlakaniphileyo ithokozisa uyise, kodwa indodana eyisithutha ilusizi kunina." 
Proverbs10:2 Inotho yenkohlakalo kayisizi lutho, kodwa ukulunga kophula ekufeni." 
Proverbs10:3 I Nkosi kayiyekeli umphefumulo wolungileyo ulambe, kodwa isunduza isifiso sababi." 
Proverbs10:4 Osebenza nge sandla esixegayo uba ngumyanga, kodwa isandla sabakhutheleyo siyanothisa." 
Proverbs10:5 Ovuna ehlobo uyindodana ehlakaniphileyo; olala ubuthongo obukhulu ngesikhathi sokuvuna uyindodana ethelela ihlazo. 
Proverbs10:6 Izibusiso zisekhanda lolungileyo, kodwa ubudlwangudlwangu busibekela umlomo wabakhohlakeleyo." 
Proverbs10:7 Ukukhunjulwa kolungileyo kungokwesibusiso, kodwa ibizo labakhohlakeleyo lizabola." 
Proverbs10:8 Ohlakaniphileyo ngenhliziyo uyemukela imilayo, kodwa isithutha ngendebe sizawiselwa phansi." 
Proverbs10:9 Ohamba ngobuqotho uhamba evikelekile, kodwa ophambula indlela zakhe uzakwaziwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Ociyoza ilihlo ubanga inkathazo, njalo isithutha ngendebe sizawiselwa phansi." 
Proverbs10:11 Umlomo wolungileyo ungumthombo wempilo, kodwa ubudlwangudlwangu busibekela umlomo wabakhohlakeleyo." 
Proverbs10:12 Inzondo ibanga ingxabano, kodwa uthando lusibekela iziphambeko zonke." 
Proverbs10:13 Endebeni zoqedisisayo kutholakala inhlakanipho, kodwa intonga emhlane woswela ingqondo." 
Proverbs10:14 Abahlakaniphileyo babekelela ulwazi, kodwa umlomo wesithutha useduze lencithakalo." 
Proverbs10:15 Inotho yonothileyo ingumuzi wamandla akhe; ubuyanga babayanga buyincithakalo yabo. 
Proverbs10:16 Umsebenzi wolungileyo ngowempilo; inzuzo yokhohlakeleyo ngeyesono. 
Proverbs10:17 Ogcina ukulaywa u se ndlel eni yempilo, kodwa odelela ukukhuzwa ubanga ukuduha." 
Proverbs10:18 Osibekela inzondo ungowendebe zamanga, lohlebayo uyisithutha." 
Proverbs10:19 Ebunengini bamazwi ukuphambeka kakusileli, kodwa othiba indebe zakhe uhlakaniphile." 
Proverbs10:20 Ulimi lolungileyo luyisiliva esikhethekileyo; inhliziyo yokhohlakeleyo injengento encinyane. 
Proverbs10:21 Indebe zolungileyo zondla abanengi, kodwa izithutha ziyafa ngokuswela ingqondo." 
Proverbs10:22 Isibusiso se Nkosi sona siyanothisa; njalo kayengezi usizi kuso. 
Proverbs10:23 Kunjengenhlekisa koyisithutha ukwenza okubi; kunjalo inhlakanipho kumuntu wokuqedisisa. 
Proverbs10:24 Lokho okhohlakeleyo akwesabayo kuzamfikela, kodwa isiloyiso solungileyo sizanikwa." 
Proverbs10:25 Njengokwedlula kwesivunguzane, unjalo okhohlakeleyo ka se kho; kodwa olungileyo uyisisekelo saphakade." 
Proverbs10:26 Njengeviniga emazinyweni, lanjengentuthu emehlweni, unjalo olivila kwabamthumileyo." 
Proverbs10:27 Ukuyesaba i Nkosi kwandisa insuku, kodwa iminyaka yabakhohlakeleyo izafinyezwa." 
Proverbs10:28 Ithemba labalungileyo liyintokozo, kodwa okulindelwayo kwabakhohlakeleyo kuzabhubha." 
Proverbs10:29 Indlela ye Nkosi iyinqaba koqotho, kodwa iyincithakalo kubenzi bobubi." 
Proverbs10:30 Olungileyo kayikunyikinywa laphakade, kodwa abakhohlakeleyo kabayikuhlala elizweni." 
Proverbs10:31 Umlomo wolungileyo ukhupha inhlakanipho, kodwa ulimi oluphambeneyo luzaqunywa." 
Proverbs10:32 Indebe zolungileyo ziyazi okuthokozisayo, kodwa umlomo wabakhohlakeleyo iziphambeko." 
Proverbs11:1 Isikali esikhohlisayo siyisinengiso e Nkosi ni, kodwa ilitshe lokulinganisa elipheleleyo liyintokozo yayo." 
Proverbs11:2 Nxa kufika ukuzigqaja, kufika lehlazo; kodwa kwabathobekileyo kukhona inhlakanipho." 
Proverbs11:3 Ubuqotho babaqotho buzabaqondisa, kodwa ukuphambeka kwabaphambekayo kuzababhubhisa." 
Proverbs11:4 Inotho kayisizi ngosuku lolaka, kodwa ukulunga kophula ekufeni." 
Proverbs11:5 Ukulunga kwabaqotho kuzaqondisa indlela yakhe, kodwa okhohlakeleyo uzakuwa ngenkohlakalo yakhe." 
Proverbs11:6 Ukulunga kwabaqotho kuzabophula, kodwa abaphambukayo bazathunjwa zinkanuko zabo." 
Proverbs11:7 Nxa umuntu okhohlakeleyo esifa, ithemba lakhe lizabhubha, lethemba lamandla akhe liyabhubha." 
Proverbs11:8 Olungileyo ukhululwa ekuhluphekeni, kodwa omubi ungena endaweni yakhe." 
Proverbs11:9 Ngomlomo umzenzisi uchitha umakhelwane wakhe, kodwa ngolwazi abalungileyo bayakhululwa." 
Proverbs11:10 Ngempumelelo yabalungileyo umuzi uyathokoza; lekubhubheni kwabakhohlakeleyo kulenjabulo. 
Proverbs11:11 Ngesibusiso sabaqotho umuzi uyaphakanyiswa, kodwa ngomlomo wabakhohlakeleyo uyachitheka." 
Proverbs11:12 Oswela ingqondo udelela umakhelwane, kodwa umuntu oqedisisayo uyazithulela." 
Proverbs11:13 Ohamba enyeya wembula imfihlakalo, kodwa othembekileyo ngomoya ufihla udaba." 
Proverbs11:14 Lapho kungekho izeluleko abantu bayawa; kodwa ukukhululwa kusebunengini babeluleki. 
Proverbs11:15 Oba yisibambiso sowezizwe uzahlupheka ngokubi; kodwa ozonda ukuqakeza izandla uvikelekile. 
Proverbs11:16 Owesifazana olomusa ubamba udumo, labalamandla babamba inotho." 
Proverbs11:17 Umuntu olomusa wenzela umphefumulo wakhe okuhle, kodwa olesihluku ukhathaza inyama yakhe." 
Proverbs11:18 Okhohlakeleyo wenza umsebenzi wenkohliso, kodwa ohlanyela ukulunga ulo mvuzo weqiniso." 
Proverbs11:19 Njengoba ukulunga kungokwempilo, kunjalo ozingela okubi kungokokufa kwakhe." 
Proverbs11:20 Abaphambeneyo ngenhliziyo bayisinengiso e Nkosi ni, kodwa abaqotho ngendlela bayintokozo yayo." 
Proverbs11:21 Isandla esandleni omubi kayikuba msulwa, kodwa inzalo yabalungileyo izaphepha." 
Proverbs11:22 Ulisongo legolide empumulweni yengulube owesifazana obukekayo ophambuka engqondweni. 
Proverbs11:23 Isifiso sabalungileyo singokuhle kuphela; ithemba labakhohlakeleyo lulaka. 
Proverbs11:24 Kukhona ohlakazayo, kube kanti okunengi kuyengezwa; logodla okwedlula okufaneleyo, kodwa kungokokuswela."
