Proverbs11:25 Umphefumulo obusisayo uzakhuluphaliswa, lothelelayo uzathelelwa laye." 
Proverbs11:26 Ogodla amabele, abantu bazamqalekisa; kodwa isibusiso sizakuba phezu kwekhanda lothengisayo." 
Proverbs11:27 Odingisisa okuhle, udinga umusa; kodwa odinga okubi, kuzakuza kuye." 
Proverbs11:28 Othemba inotho yakhe yena uzakuwa, kodwa abalungileyo bazahluma njengamahlamvu." 
Proverbs11:29 Oletha inkathazo emzini wakhe uzakudla ilifa lomoya, lesithutha sizakuba yinceku yohlakaniphileyo ngenhliziyo." 
Proverbs11:30 Isithelo solungileyo siyisihlahla sempilo, lozuza imiphefumulo uhlakaniphile." 
Proverbs11:31 Khangela, olungileyo uzavuzwa emhlabeni; kakhulu kangakanani omubi lesoni!" 
Proverbs12:1 Othanda ukulaywa uthanda ulwazi; kodwa ozonda ukukhuzwa uyisithutha. 
Proverbs12:2 Olungileyo uzuza umusa e Nkosi ni, kodwa umuntu wamacebo amabi iyamlahla." 
Proverbs12:3 Umuntu kayikumiswa yibubi, kodwa impande yabalungileyo kayiyikunyikinywa." 
Proverbs12:4 Umfazi okhutheleyo ungumqhele wendoda yakhe, kodwa oyangisayo unjengokubola emathanjeni ayo." 
Proverbs12:5 Imicabango yabalungileyo ilungile; izeluleko zababi ziyinkohliso. 
Proverbs12:6 Amazwi abakhohlakeleyo ngawokucathamela igazi, kodwa umlomo wabaqotho uzabophula." 
Proverbs12:7 Abakhohlakeleyo bayachithwa, bangabe besaba khona; kodwa indlu yabalungileyo izakuma." 
Proverbs12:8 Umuntu uzadunyiswa ngokwenhlakanipho yakhe, kodwa ophambeke ngenhliziyo uzakuba ngowokudelelwa." 
Proverbs12:9 Odelelekayo elesisebenzi ungcono kulozihloniphayo aswele ukudla. 
Proverbs12:10 Olungileyo unanzelela impilo yesifuyo sakhe, kodwa izihawu zabakhohlakeleyo ziyilunya." 
Proverbs12:11 Olima insimu yakhe uzasutha ngokudla, kodwa ozingela izinto eziyize uswela ingqondo." 
Proverbs12:12 Okhohlakeleyo ufisa imbule yababi, kodwa impande yabalungileyo iyanika." 
Proverbs12:13 Ekuphambekeni kwendebe kulomjibila womubi, kodwa olungileyo uzaphuma enkathazweni." 
Proverbs12:14 Umuntu uzasutha ngokulungileyo ngesithelo somlomo, lomvuzo wezandla zomuntu uzabuyiselwa kuye." 
Proverbs12:15 Indlela yesithutha ilungile emehlweni aso, kodwa olalela iseluleko uhlakaniphile." 
Proverbs12:16 Isithutha, intukuthelo yaso yaziwa ngosuku; kodwa ohlakaniphileyo ufihla ihlazo." 
Proverbs12:17 Ophefumula iqiniso wazisa ukulunga, kodwa umfakazi wamanga inkohliso." 
Proverbs12:18 Kukhona ophahluka njengokuhlaba kwenkemba, kodwa ulimi lwezihlakaniphi luyikusilisa." 
Proverbs12:19 Indebe yeqiniso izamiswa phakade, kodwa ulimi lwamanga lungolomzuzu nje." 
Proverbs12:20 Inkohliso isenhliziyweni yabaceba okubi, kodwa abeluleki bokuthula balentokozo." 
Proverbs12:21 Lokukodwa okubi kakuyikubehlela abalungileyo, kodwa abakhohlakeleyo bagcwele ububi." 
Proverbs12:22 Indebe zamanga ziyisinengiso e Nkosi ni, kodwa abenza iqiniso bayintokozo yayo." 
Proverbs12:23 Umuntu ohlakaniphileyo ufihla ulwazi, kodwa inhliziyo yezithutha imemezela ubuthutha." 
Proverbs12:24 Isandla sabakhutheleyo sizabusa, kodwa amavila azakuba yizibhalwa." 
Proverbs12:25 Ukukhathazeka enhliziyweni yomuntu kuyayithobisa, kodwa ilizwi elihle liyayithokozisa." 
Proverbs12:26 Olungileyo uhlolisisa okwedlula umakhelwane wakhe, kodwa indlela yabakhohlakeleyo iyabaduhisa." 
Proverbs12:27 Olivila kayikosa inyamazana yakhe ayizingeleyo, kodwa impahla yomuntu okhutheleyo iligugu." 
Proverbs12:28 Endleleni yokulunga kulempilo, lendleleni yomkhondo kakulakufa." 
Proverbs13:1 Indodana ehlakaniphileyo ilalela ukulaya kukayise, kodwa isideleli kasilaleli ukukhuzwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Umuntu uzakudla okuhle okuvela esithelweni somlomo, kodwa umphefumulo weziphambuki ubudlwangudlwangu." 
Proverbs13:3 Olondoloza umlomo wakhe ugcina umphefumulo wakhe, kodwa ovula indebe zakhe zibe banzi uzakuba lencithakalo." 
Proverbs13:4 Umphefumulo wevila uyafisa, kodwa kakulalutho; kodwa umphefumulo wokhutheleyo uyakhuluphaliswa." 
Proverbs13:5 Olungileyo uyalizonda ilizwi lamanga; kodwa omubi uzenza abe levumba, uthelela ihlazo." 
Proverbs13:6 Ukulunga kulinda oqotho endleleni, kodwa inkohlakalo ichitha isoni." 
Proverbs13:7 Kukhona ozitshaya onothileyo, kanti kalalutho; ozitshaya ongumyanga, kanti u nothile kakhulu." 
Proverbs13:8 Inhlawulo yempilo yomuntu yinotho yakhe, kodwa umyanga kezwa ukukhuzwa." 
Proverbs13:9 Ukukhanya kwabalungileyo kuyathokoza, kodwa isibane sabakhohlakeleyo sizacitshwa." 
Proverbs13:10 Ukuzigqaja kuveza ingxabano kuphela, kodwa inhlakanipho ikwabalulekiweyo." 
Proverbs13:11 Inotho etholakala ngokuyize izaphunguka, kodwa obuthelela ngesandla uya y andisa." 
Proverbs13:12 Ithemba eliphuzayo ligulisa inhliziyo, kodwa isifiso esizayo siyisihlahla sempilo." 
Proverbs13:13 Odelela ilizwi yena uzachithwa, kodwa owesaba umlayo yena uzavuzwa." 
Proverbs13:14 Imfundiso yohlakaniphileyo ingumthombo wempilo, ukuthi asuke emijibileni yokufa." 
Proverbs13:15 Ukuqedisisa okuhle kunika umusa, kodwa indlela yabaphambukayo ilukhuni." 
Proverbs13:16 Wonke ohlakaniphileyo wenza ngolwazi, kodwa isithutha sichaya ubuthutha." 
Proverbs13:17 Isithunywa esikhohlakeleyo siwela ebubini, kodwa isithunywa esithembekileyo siyikusilisa." 
Proverbs13:18 Ubuyanga lehlazo ngokwalowo oyekela ukufundiswa, kodwa onanzelela ukukhuzwa uzadunyiswa." 
Proverbs13:19 Isifiso esenziweyo simnandi emphefumulweni, kodwa kuyisinengiso ezithutheni ukuphenduka ebubini." 
Proverbs13:20 Ohamba labahlakaniphileyo uzahlakanipha, kodwa umngane wezithutha uzaqamuka." 
Proverbs13:21 Ububi buzazingela izoni, kodwa abalungileyo bazavuzwa ngokuhle." 
Proverbs13:22 Olungileyo uzabenza abantwana babantwana badle ilifa, kodwa inotho yesoni ibekelwa olungileyo." 
Proverbs13:23 Ukudla okunengi kusengqathweni yabayanga, kodwa kukhona okukhukhulwa ngokungabi lokwahlulela." 
Proverbs13:24 Ogodla uswazi lwakhe uzonda indodana yakhe, kodwa oyithandayo uyayidinga ngovivi ngesijeziso." 
Proverbs13:25 Olungileyo uyadla kuze kusuthe umphefumulo wakhe, kodwa isisu sabakhohlakeleyo sizaswela." 
Proverbs14:1 Wonke owesifazana ohlakaniphileyo uyayakha indlu yakhe, kodwa oyisithutha uyayidiliza ngezandla zakhe." 
Proverbs14:2 Ohamba ngobuqotho bakhe wesaba i Nkosi, kodwa ophambene ngendlela zakhe uyayidelela." 
Proverbs14:3 Emlonyeni wesithutha kulentonga yokuzigqaja, kodwa indebe zabahlakaniphileyo ziyabagcina." 
Proverbs14:4 Lapho okungekho izinkabi khona umkolo uhlanzekile, kodwa kulesivuno esinengi ngamandla enkabi." 
Proverbs14:5 Umfakazi othembekileyo kaqambi amanga, kodwa umfakazi wamanga uphafuza amanga." 
Proverbs14:6 Odelelayo udinga inhlakanipho, kodwa kayikho; kodwa ulwazi lulula koqedisisayo." 
Proverbs14:7 Suka phambi komuntu oyisithutha, nxa ungayikunanzelela kuye indebe zolwazi." 
Proverbs14:8 Inhlakanipho yokhaliphileyo yikuqedisisa indlela yakhe, kodwa ubuthutha bezithutha buyinkohliso." 
Proverbs14:9 Izithutha ziyakloloda ngesono, kodwa phakathi kwabaqotho kulomusa." 
Proverbs14:10 Inhliziyo iyazi ukubaba kwayo ngokwayo, lowemzini kahlanganyeli lentokozo yayo." 
Proverbs14:11 Indlu yabakhohlakeleyo izachithwa, kodwa ithente labaqotho lizahluma." 
Proverbs14:12 Kukhona indlela ebonakala ilungile emuntwini, kodwa ukuphela kwayo zindlela zokufa." 
Proverbs14:13 Lekuhlekeni inhliziyo isebuhlungwini, lokuphela kwaleyontokozo lusizi." 
Proverbs14:14 Ohlehlela nyovane ngenhliziyo uzasutha ngezindlela zakhe, kodwa umuntu olungileyo uzasutha ngaye ngokwakhe." 
Proverbs14:15 Ongelalwazi ukholwa lonke ilizwi, kodwa olengqondo unanzelela ukuhamba kwakhe." 
Proverbs14:16 Ohlakaniphileyo uyesaba, asuke ebubini, kodwa isithutha siyathukuthela, silitshapha." 
Proverbs14:17 Ophangisa ukuthukuthela wenza ubuthutha, lomuntu wamacebo amabi uzazondwa." 
Proverbs14:18 Abangelalwazi badla ilifa lobuthutha, kodwa abakhaliphileyo bazathwala umqhele wolwazi." 
Proverbs14:19 Ababi bakhothama phambi kwabalungileyo, labakhohlakeleyo emasangweni abalungileyo." 
Proverbs14:20 Umyanga uzondwa langumakhelwane wakhe, kodwa abathanda onothileyo banengi." 
Proverbs14:21 Odelela umakhelwane wakhe uyona, kodwa olomusa kubayanga ubusisiwe." 
Proverbs14:22 Kabaduhi yini abaceba okubi? Kodwa umusa leqiniso ngokwalabo abaceba okuhle. 
Proverbs14:23 Kumtshikatshika wonke kulenzuzo, kodwa inkulumo yendebe ibanga inswelo kuphela." 
Proverbs14:24 Umqhele wabahlakaniphileyo uyinotho yabo; ubuthutha bezithutha buyibuthutha. 
Proverbs14:25 Umfakazi oqinisileyo uyophula imiphefumulo, kodwa ophafuza amanga ungumkhohlisi." 
Proverbs14:26 Ekuyesabeni i Nkosi kulethemba eliqinileyo, labantwana bakhe bazakuba lesiphephelo." 
Proverbs14:27 Ukuyesaba i Nkosi kungumthombo wempilo, ukusuka emijibileni yokufa." 
Proverbs14:28 Lusebunengini babantu udumo lwenkosi, kodwa kusekuswelekeni kwabantu ukuchitheka kombusi." 
Proverbs14:29 Ophuza ukuthukuthela ulokuqedisisa okukhulu, kodwa ophangisa ukuzonda ukhulisa ubuthutha." 
Proverbs14:30 Inhliziyo ephilileyo iyimpilo yenyama, kodwa umhawu uyikubola kwamathambo." 
Proverbs14:31 Ocindezela umyanga uthuka uMenzi wakhe, kodwa olomusa koswelayo uyamdumisa." 
Proverbs14:32 Okhohlakeleyo uwiswa ebubini bakhe, kodwa olungileyo ulethemba ekufeni kwakhe." 
Proverbs14:33 Inhlakanipho ihlala enhliziyweni yoqedisisayo, kodwa okuphakathi kwezithutha kuyaziwa." 
Proverbs14:34 Ukulunga kuphakamisa isizwe, kodwa isono silihlazo ebantwini." 
Proverbs14:35 Umusa wenkosi usencekwini ehlakaniphileyo, kodwa intukuthelo yayo izakuba kw ethela ihlazo." 
Proverbs15:1 Impendulo ethambileyo ibuyisela emuva ulaka, kodwa ilizwi elilukhuni livusa intukuthelo." 
Proverbs15:2 Ulimi lwabahlakaniphileyo lwenza ulwazi lube luhle, kodwa umlomo wezithutha uthulula ubuthutha." 
Proverbs15:3 Amehlo e Nkosi akuyo yonke indawo, eqaphela ababi labalungileyo." 
Proverbs15:4 Ukusilisa kolimi kuyisihlahla sempilo, kodwa ukuphambeka kulo kuyikwephuka emoyeni." 
Proverbs15:5 Isithutha sidelela ukulaya kukayise, kodwa onanza ukukhuzwa uhlakaniphile." 
Proverbs15:6 E ndl ini yolungileyo kulenotho enengi, kodwa enzuzweni yomubi kulenkathazo." 
Proverbs15:7 Indebe zabahlakaniphileyo ziyahlakaza ulwazi, kodwa inhliziyo yezithutha kayinjalo." 
Proverbs15:8 Umhlatshelo wabakhohlakeleyo uyisinengiso e Nkosi ni, kodwa umkhuleko wabaqotho uyintokozo yayo." 
Proverbs15:9 Indlela yokhohlakeleyo iyisinengiso e Nkosi ni, kodwa ithanda ozingela ukulunga." 
Proverbs15:10 Ukujezisa kubi kotshiya indlela; ozonda ukukhuzwa uzakufa. 
Proverbs15:11 Isihogo lentshabalalo kuphambi kwe Nkosi; kakhulu kangakanani inhliziyo zabantwana babantu! 
Proverbs15:12 Isideleli kasithandi osikhuzayo, kasiyi kwabahlakaniphileyo." 
Proverbs15:13 Inhliziyo ethokozayo yenza ubuso bujabule, kodwa ngosizi lwenhliziyo umoya uyadabuka." 
Proverbs15:14 Inhliziyo yoqedisisayo idinga ulwazi, kodwa umlomo wezithutha udla ubuthutha." 
Proverbs15:15 Zonke insuku zohluphekayo zimbi, kodwa inhliziyo ethokozayo ilidili njalonjalo." 
Proverbs15:16 Kungcono okuncinyane kanye lokwesaba i Nkosi kulenotho enengi lenkathazo kanye layo. 
Proverbs15:17 Kungcono isidlo semibhida lapho okulothando khona kulenkabi enonileyo lenzondo kanye layo. 
Proverbs15:18 Umuntu ololaka udungula ingxabano, kodwa ophuza ukuthukuthela uzathulisa ingxabano." 
Proverbs15:19 Indlela yevila injengothango lwameva, kodwa indlela yabaqotho ibuthelelwe." 
Proverbs15:20 Indodana ehlakaniphileyo ithokozisa uyise, kodwa umuntu oyisithutha weyisa unina." 
Proverbs15:21 Ubuthutha buyintokozo koswela ingqondo, kodwa umuntu oqedisisayo uyaqondisa ukuhamba kwakhe." 
Proverbs15:22 Amaqhinga angelaseluleko ayachitheka, kodwa ngabeluleki abanengi ayakuma." 
Proverbs15:23 Umuntu ulentokozo ngempendulo yomlomo wakhe; lelizwi ngesikhathi salo, lihle kangakanani." 
Proverbs15:24 Indlela yempilo kohlakaniphileyo iya phezulu, ukuze asuke esihogweni phansi." 
Proverbs15:25 I Nkosi izadiliza indlu yozigqajayo, kodwa izamisa umngcele womfelokazi." 
Proverbs15:26 Imicabango yomubi iyisinengiso e Nkosi ni, kodwa amazwi amnandi ahlambulukile." 
Proverbs15:27 Ophanga inzuzo ukhathaza indlu yakhe, kodwa ozonda izipho uzaphila." 
Proverbs15:28 Inhliziyo yolungileyo inakana ukuphendula, kodwa umlomo wababi uthulula izinto ezimbi." 
Proverbs15:29 I Nkosi ikhatshana labakhohlakeleyo, kodwa iyezwa umkhuleko wabalungileyo." 
Proverbs15:30 Ukukhanya kwamehlo kuthokozisa inhliziyo, lodaba oluhle lwenza amathambo akhuluphale." 
Proverbs15:31 Indlebe elalela ukukhuzwa kwempilo izahlala phakathi kwabahlakaniphileyo. 
Proverbs15:32 Owala ukulaywa weyisa umphefumulo wakhe, kodwa olalela ukukhuzwa uzuza ukuqedisisa." 
Proverbs15:33 Ukuyesaba i Nkosi kuyikufundiswa kwenhlakanipho, lokuthobeka kwandulela udumo." 
Proverbs16:1 Umuntu ulamacebo enhliziyo, kodwa impendulo yolimi ivela e Nkosi ni." 
Proverbs16:2 Zonke indlela zomuntu zihlanzekile emehlweni akhe, kodwa i Nkosi ilinganisa imimoya." 
Proverbs16:3 Giqela e Nkosi ni imisebenzi yakho, lamacebo akho azaqiniswa." 
Proverbs16:4 I Nkosi izenzele konke, lomubi laye usuku lobubi." 
Proverbs16:5 Wonke ozigqajayo ngenhliziyo uyisinengiso e Nkosi ni; isandla esandleni, kayikuba msulwa." 
Proverbs16:6 Ngomusa leqiniso isono siyahlawulelwa, langokuyesaba i Nkosi umuntu uyasuka ebubini." 
Proverbs16:7 Nxa indlela zomuntu zithokozisa i Nkosi, iyenza lezitha zakhe zibe lokuthula laye." 
Proverbs16:8 Okulutshwana kanye lokulunga kungcono kulobunengi benzuzo engelakulunga. 
Proverbs16:9 Inhliziyo yomuntu iceba indlela yakhe, kodwa i Nkosi iqondisa inyathelo lakhe." 
Proverbs16:10 Ilizwi likaNkulunkulu lisendebeni zenkosi; umlomo wayo kawuyikuphambeka kusahlulelo. 
Proverbs16:11 Isikali lesilinganiso esilungileyo kungokwe Nkosi; wonke amatshe okulinganisa omgodla angumsebenzi wayo. 
Proverbs16:12 Kuyisinengiso emakhosini ukwenza okubi, ngoba isihlalo sobukhosi simiswa ngokulunga." 
Proverbs16:13 Indebe zokulunga ziyintokozo yamakhosi; iyathanda okhuluma izinto eziqondileyo. 
Proverbs16:14 Ulaka lombusi luyizithunywa zokufa, kodwa umuntu ohlakaniphileyo uzaluthulisa." 
Proverbs16:15 Ekukhanyeni kobuso benkosi kulempilo, lomusa wayo unjengeyezi lezulu lamuva." 
Proverbs16:16 Kungcono kangakanani ukuzuza inhlakanipho kulegolide; lokuzuza ukuqedisisa kukhethwa kulesiliva. 
Proverbs16:17 Umgwaqo omkhulu wabaqotho yikusuka ebubini; olondoloza umphefumulo wakhe unanzelela indlela yakhe. 
Proverbs16:18 Ukuzigqaja kuqalela ukubhujiswa, lokuziphakamisa komoya kuqalela ukuwa." 
Proverbs16:19 Kungcono ukuthobeka ngomoya kanye labamnene, kulokwabelana impango labazigqajayo." 
Proverbs16:20 Ophatha udaba ngenhlakanipho uzathola okuhle; lothemba e Nkosi ni uyathaba. 
Proverbs16:21 Ohlakaniphileyo ngenhliziyo kuthiwa ngoqedisisayo; lobumnandi bendebe bandisa imfundiso. 
Proverbs16:22 Ukuqedisisa kwabalakho kungumthombo wempilo, kodwa ukulaya kwezithutha kuyibuthutha." 
Proverbs16:23 Ingqondo yohlakaniphileyo yenza umlomo wakhe uhlakaniphe, izakwandisa imfundiso endebeni zakhe." 
Proverbs16:24 Amazwi amnandi aluhlanga loluju, amnandi emphefumulweni, ayimpiliso emathanjeni." 
Proverbs16:25 Kukhona indlela ebonakala iqondile emuntwini, kodwa ukuphela kwayo zindlela zokufa." 
Proverbs16:26 Umphefumulo womtshikatshiki uyazitshikatshikela, ngoba umlomo wakhe uyamkhuthaza." 
Proverbs16:27 Umuntu omubi ugebha ububi; lendebeni zakhe kulokunjengomlilo otshisayo. 
Proverbs16:28 Umuntu ophambeneyo ungenisa ingxabano, lonyeyayo wehlukanisa umngane oseduze." 
Proverbs16:29 Umuntu wobudlwangudlwangu uhuga umakhelwane wakhe, amhambise ngendlela engalunganga." 
Proverbs16:30 Uvala amehlo akhe ukuceba izinto eziphambeneyo, eluma indebe zakhe aqede ububi." 
Proverbs16:31 Izimvu zekhanda zingumqhele wodumo; zitholakala endleleni yokulunga. 
Proverbs16:32 Ophuza ukuthukuthela ungcono kuleqhawe, lobusa umoya wakhe kulothumba umuzi." 
Proverbs16:33 Inkatho iphoselwa ethanganzini, kodwa isinqumo sayo sonke sivela e Nkosi ni." 
Proverbs17:1 Ucezu olomileyo lokuthula kanye lalo lungcono kulendlu egcwele imihlatshelo lengxabano. 
Proverbs17:2 Inceku ehlakaniphileyo izabusa phezu kwendodana eyangisayo, yehlukanise ilifa phakathi kwezelamani." 
Proverbs17:3 Imbiza yokuncibilikisa ngeyesiliva, lesithando somlilo ngesegolide, kodwa i Nkosi ihlola izinhliziyo." 
Proverbs17:4 Umenzi wobubi ulalela indebe ekhohlakeleyo; umqambimanga ubeka indlebe olimini oluchithayo. 
Proverbs17:5 Oklolodela umyanga uthuka uMenzi wakhe; othokoza encithakalweni kayikuba msulwa. 
Proverbs17:6 Abantwana babantwana bangumqhele wabadala, lodumo lwabantwana ngoyise." 
Proverbs17:7 Indebe elobungcwethi kayisifanelanga isithutha; kakhulu kangakanani indebe yamanga isiphathamandla. 
Proverbs17:8 Isipho siyilitshe eliligugu emehlweni abaniniso; loba ngaphi esiphendukela khona sizaphumelela. 
Proverbs17:9 Osibekela isiphambeko udinga uthando, kodwa ophindaphinda udaba wehlukanisa umngane oseduze." 
Proverbs17:10 Ukukhuza kuyajula koqedisisayo kulokutshaya isithutha ngokulikhulu. 
Proverbs17:11 Omubi udinga ububi kuphela, kodwa isithunywa esilesihluku sizathunyelwa kuye." 
Proverbs17:12 Kakuthi ibhere elifelwe yimidlwane lihlangane lomuntu, kodwa hatshi isithutha ebuthutheni baso." 
Proverbs17:13 Ophindisela okubi esikhundleni sokuhle, ububi kabuyikusuka endlini yakhe." 
Proverbs17:14 Ukuqala kwenkani ku njengo kuvulela amanzi; ngakho yekela ingxabano ingakazivezi. 
Proverbs17:15 Olungisisa omubi lolahla olungileyo bayisinengiso e Nkosi ni, ngitsho bobabili." 
Proverbs17:16 Kungani kulemali yokuthenga inhlakanipho esandleni sesithutha, lokhu si ngelangqondo?" 
Proverbs17:17 Umngane uyathanda ngaso sonke isikhathi, lomzalwane uzalelwa inhlupheko." 
Proverbs17:18 Umuntu oswela ingqondo uyabambana ngezandla ukuba yisibambiso phambi kukamakhelwane wakhe. 
Proverbs17:19 Othanda isiphambeko uthanda inkani; ophakamisa umnyango wakhe udinga ukubhujiswa. 
Proverbs17:20 Olenhliziyo ephambeneyo katholi okuhle, lophambene ngolimi uwela ebubini." 
Proverbs17:21 Ozala isithutha, sizakuba lusizi kuye; loyise wesithutha kathokozi." 
Proverbs17:22 Inhliziyo ethokozayo yenza kuhle njengo muthi, kodwa umoya owephukileyo womisa amathambo." 
Proverbs17:23 Omubi uthatha isipho esifubeni ukuphambula izindlela zesahlulelo. 
Proverbs17:24 Inhlakanipho iphambi koqedisisayo, kodwa amehlo esithutha asekucineni komhlaba." 
Proverbs17:25 Indodana eyisiwula ilusizi kuyise, iyikubaba kowayizalayo." 
Proverbs17:26 Ukuhlawulisa olungileyo lakho kakulunganga, lo kutshaya iziphathamandla ngenxa yobuqotho." 
Proverbs17:27 Owazi ulwazi ugodla amazwi akhe; umuntu oqedisisayo ulomoya opholileyo. 
Proverbs17:28 Isithutha esithuleyo laso sithiwa sihlakaniphile; ovala indebe zakhe uthiwa uyaqedisisa. 
Proverbs18:1 Ozehlukanisayo udinga okuloyisekayo; ufohlela inhlakanipho yonke. 
Proverbs18:2 Isithutha kasithokozi ekuqedisiseni, kodwa ukuze inhliziyo yaso iziveze." 
Proverbs18:3 Lapho okhohlakeleyo esiza, kuza lokudelela, njalo kanye lenhloni, ihlazo." 
Proverbs18:4 Amazwi omlomo womuntu angamanzi azikileyo; umthombo wenhlakanipho uyisifula esigobhozayo. 
Proverbs18:5 Kakulunganga ukwemukela ubuso bokhohlakeleyo, ukuphambula olungileyo kusahlulelo." 
Proverbs18:6 Indebe zesithutha zingena enkanini, lomlomo waso ubiza imivimvinya." 
Proverbs18:7 Umlomo wesithutha uyintshabalalo yaso, lendebe zaso zingumjibila womphefumulo waso." 
Proverbs18:8 Amazwi onyeyayo anjengezibondlo ezehlela kokungaphakathi kwesisu. 
Proverbs18:9 Lolivila emsebenzini wakhe ungumfowabo womchithi. 
Proverbs18:10 Ibizo le Nkosi lingumphotshongo oqinileyo; olungileyo uzagijimela kuwo amiswe phezulu evikelekile. 
Proverbs18:11 Inotho yesinothi ingumuzi waso oqinileyo, lanjengomthangala ophakemeyo ekucabangeni kwaso." 
Proverbs18:12 Mandulo kokubhujiswa inhliziyo yomuntu iyaziphakamisa, njalo mandulo kodumo kulokuthobeka." 
Proverbs18:13 Ophendula indaba engakezwa, kuyibuwula kuye, lehlazo." 
Proverbs18:14 Umoya womuntu uzasekela ukugula kwakhe, kodwa umoya owephukileyo, ngubani ongawuthwala?" 
Proverbs18:15 Inhliziyo yoqedisisayo izuza ulwazi, lendlebe yabahlakaniphileyo idinga ulwazi." 
Proverbs18:16 Isipho somuntu siyamvulela ngokubanzi, simkhokhelela phambi kwabakhulu." 
Proverbs18:17 Ongowokuqala ecaleni lakhe ubonakala elungile, kodwa umakhelwane wakhe ufika amhlole." 
Proverbs18:18 Inkatho iqeda izingxabano, yehlukanise phakathi kwabalamandla." 
Proverbs18:19 Umzalwane owoniweyo wedlula umuzi oqinileyo, lengxabano zinjengomgoqo wenqaba." 
Proverbs18:20 Isisu somuntu siyasuthiswa yizithelo zomlomo wakhe, uzasuthiswa yinzuzo yendebe zakhe." 
Proverbs18:21 Ukufa lempilo kusesandleni solimi; labaluthandayo bazakudla isithelo salo. 
Proverbs18:22 Othole umfazi uthole okuhle, uzuze umusa e Nkosi ni." 
Proverbs18:23 Umyanga uyakhuluma ngo kuncenga, kodwa isinothi siphendula izinto ezilukhuni." 
Proverbs18:24 Umuntu wabangane kumele azitshengise ngobungane, njalo kulomngane onamathela kuleselamani." 
Proverbs19:1 Umyanga ohamba ngobuqotho bakhe ungcono kulophambeneyo endebeni zakhe, njalo oyisithutha." 
Proverbs19:2 Futhi umphefumulo ongelalwazi kawulunganga, lophangisayo ngezinyawo uyona." 
Proverbs19:3 Ubuthutha bomuntu buphambula indlela yakhe, lenhliziyo yakhe iyayithukuthelela i Nkosi." 
Proverbs19:4 Inotho yengeza abangane abanengi, kodwa umyanga wehlukaniswa lomngane wakhe." 
Proverbs19:5 Umfakazi wamanga kayikuba msulwa, lophafuza amanga kayikuphunyuka." 
Proverbs19:6 Banengi abancenga ubuso beziphathamandla; njalo wonke ungumngane womuntu wezipho. 
Proverbs19:7 Bonke abazalwane bomyanga bayamzonda; kakhulu kangakanani abangane bakhe besiya khatshana laye; uxotshana labo ng amazwi angesilutho. 
Proverbs19:8 Ozuza ingqondo uthanda umphefumulo wakhe; unanzelela ukuqedisisa ukuthola okuhle. 
Proverbs19:9 Umfakazi wamanga kayikuba msulwa, lophafuza amanga uzabhubha." 
Proverbs19:10 Ukutamasa kakusifanele isiwula; kakhulu kangakanani ukuthi inceku ibuse phezu kweziphathamandla. 
Proverbs19:11 Ukuqedisisa komuntu kuphuzisa ukuthukuthela kwakhe; lodumo lwakhe yikwedlula isiphambeko. 
Proverbs19:12 Ulaka lwenkosi lunjengokubhonga kwebhongo lesilwane, kodwa umusa wayo unjengamazolo etshanini." 
Proverbs19:13 Indodana eyisithutha iyincithakalo kayise; lengxabano zomfazi ziyikuthonta njalonjalo. 
Proverbs19:14 Umuzi lenotho kuyilifa labobaba, kodwa umfazi ohlakaniphileyo uvela e Nkosi ni." 
Proverbs19:15 Ubuvila buphosela ebuthongweni obukhulu, lomphefumulo olivila uzalamba." 
Proverbs19:16 Ogcina umlayo ugcina umphefumulo wakhe; odelela indlela zakhe uzakufa. 
Proverbs19:17 Ozwela umyanga weboleka i Nkosi; izambhadala ngesenzo sakhe. 
Proverbs19:18 Laya indodana yakho kuselethemba, kodwa ungaphakamisi umphefumulo wakho ukuyibulala." 
Proverbs19:19 Ololaka olukhulu uzathwala inhlawulo; ngoba nxa u m ophula uzabe lokhu uqhubeka ukwenza. 
Proverbs19:20 Lalela izeluleko, wemukele imfundiso, ukuze uhlakaniphe ekucineni kwakho." 
Proverbs19:21 Kulamacebo amanengi enhliziyweni yomuntu, kodwa iseluleko se Nkosi sona sizakuma." 
Proverbs19:22 Isiloyiso somuntu ngumusa wakhe, njalo umyanga ungcono kulomuntu wamanga." 
Proverbs19:23 Ukuyesaba i Nkosi kungokwempilo; ngoba olakho uzalala ebusuku esuthi; kayikwethekelelwa yibubi. 
Proverbs19:24 Ivila lifihla isandla salo emganwini, njalo kaliyikusibuyisela emlonyeni walo." 
Proverbs19:25 Tshaya isideleli ongelalwazi abesekhalipha; njalo khuza oqedisisayo, uzaqedisisa ulwazi." 
Proverbs19:26 Ochitha uyise, axotshe unina, uyindodana ethelela inhloni ilethe ihlazo." 
Proverbs19:27 Yekela, ndodana yami, ngokulalela imfundiso, ukuphambuka emazwini olwazi." 
Proverbs19:28 Umfakazi omubi udelela isahlulelo, lomlomo wabakhohlakeleyo uginya ububi." 
Proverbs19:29 Izahlulelo zilungiselwe izideleli, lemivimvinya umhlana wezithutha." 
Proverbs20:1 Iwayini liyisideleli; okunathwayo okulamandla kulomsindo; njalo wonke oduha kukho kahlakaniphanga. 
Proverbs20:2 Ukwesabeka kwenkosi kunjengokubhonga kwebhongo lesilwane; oyithukuthelisayo wona umphefumulo wakhe. 
Proverbs20:3 Kuludumo emuntwini ukuyekela inkani; kodwa sonke isiwula siyaziveza. 
Proverbs20:4 Ngenxa yobusika ivila kaliyikulima; ngakho lizaphanza esivunweni, kodwa kungabi lalutho." 
Proverbs20:5 Iseluleko enhliziyweni yomuntu si njeng amanzi azikileyo, kodwa umuntu oqedisisayo uzasikha." 
Proverbs20:6 Inengi labantu limemezela, lowo lalowo ukulunga kwakhe, kodwa ngubani ongathola umuntu othembekileyo?" 
Proverbs20:7 Olungileyo uhamba ngobuqotho bakhe; babusisiwe abantwana bakhe emva kwakhe. 
Proverbs20:8 Inkosi ehlezi esihlalweni sesahlulelo ihlakaza bonke ububi ngamehlo ayo. 
Proverbs20:9 Ngubani ongathi: Ngihlanzile inhliziyo yami, ngihlambulukile esonweni sami?" 
Proverbs20:10 Amatshe ezilinganiso ezehlukeneyo, ama-efa* ehlukeneyo, kuyisinengiso e Nkosi ni, yebo kokubili." 
Proverbs20:11 Lomntwana uyazazisa ngezenzo zakhe, loba umsebenzi wakhe uhlanzekile kumbe loba uqotho." 
Proverbs20:12 Indlebe ezwayo lelihlo elibonayo, i Nkosi yakwenza, yebo kokubili." 
Proverbs20:13 Ungathandi ubuthongo, hlezi ube ngumyanga; vula amehlo akho, usuthe isinkwa." 
Proverbs20:14 Kubi, kubi, kutsho umthengi; kodwa esehambile abesezincoma." 
Proverbs20:15 Kulegolide, lobunengi bamatshe aligugu, kodwa indebe zolwazi zingumceciso oligugu." 
Proverbs20:16 Thatha isembatho sakhe oyisibambiso sowemzini, umbambe abe yisibambiso sabezizwe." 
Proverbs20:17 Isinkwa samanga simnandi emuntwini, kodwa emva kwalokho umlomo wakhe uzagcwaliswa ngokhethe." 
Proverbs20:18 Imicabango uyimisa ngeseluleko; ngakho yenza impi ngamaqhinga amahle. 
Proverbs20:19 Ohambahamba enyeya wembula imfihlakalo; ngakho ungahlangani lokhohlisa ngendebe zakhe. 
Proverbs20:20 Othuka uyise loba unina, isibane sakhe sizacitshwa ebumnyameni obumnyama." 
Proverbs20:21 Ilifa li nga phangisiswa ekuqaleni, kodwa ukucina kwalo kakuyikubusiswa." 
Proverbs20:22 Ungathi: Ngizaphindisela okubi; lindela i Nkosi, njalo izakusindisa." 
Proverbs20:23 Amatshe ezilinganiso ezehlukeneyo ayisinengiso e Nkosi ni, lesikali esikhohlisayo kasilunganga." 
Proverbs20:24 Izinyathelo zomuntu zivela e Nkosi ni; pho, umuntu angaqedisisa njani indlela yakhe?" 
Proverbs20:25 Kungumjibila emuntwini ukuginya okungcwele, lokuhlolisisa emva kwezifungo." 
Proverbs20:26 Inkosi ehlakaniphileyo ihlakaza ababi, ibuyisela ivili phezu kwabo." 
Proverbs20:27 Umphefumulo womuntu uyisibane se Nkosi, sihlolisisa wonke amakamelo esisu." 
Proverbs20:28 Umusa leqiniso kuyayigcina inkosi, isekela isihlalo sayo sobukhosi ngokulunga." 
Proverbs20:29 Udumo lwejaha lungamandla alo, lobukhosi babadala yizimvu zekhanda." 
Proverbs20:30 Imivimvinya yenxeba ihlanza ububi, ngokunjalo izidutshuzo zamakamelo esisu." 
Proverbs21:1 Inhliziyo yenkosi isesandleni sikaJehova i njenge zifula zamanzi; uyiphendulela loba ngaphi athanda khona. 
Proverbs21:2 Yonke indlela yomuntu ilungile emehlweni akhe, kodwa i Nkosi ihlola izinhliziyo." 
Proverbs21:3 Ukwenza ukulunga lesahlulelo kukhethekile e Nkosi ni kulomhlatshelo. 
Proverbs21:4 Ukuphakama kwamehlo, lokuzigqaja kwenhliziyo, lo kulima kwabakhohlakeleyo, kuyisono." 
Proverbs21:5 Imicabango yokhutheleyo isenzuzweni kuphela, kodwa eyakhe wonke ophangisayo isekusweleni kuphela." 
Proverbs21:6 Ukwenza inotho ngolimi lwamanga kuyize eliphephukayo elalabo abadinga ukufa. 
Proverbs21:7 Isihluku sababi sizabahudula, ngoba besala ukwenza okulungileyo." 
Proverbs21:8 Indlela yomuntu igobile njalo ilecala, kodwa ohlanzekileyo, umsebenzi wakhe uqondile." 
Proverbs21:9 Kungcono ukuhlala engonsini yophahla kulalowesifazana wezinkani lendlini yokuhlanganyela. 
Proverbs21:10 Umphefumulo wokhohlakeleyo uloyisa ububi; umakhelwane wakhe kemukeli umusa emehlweni akhe. 
Proverbs21:11 Nxa isideleli sijeziswa, umuntu ongelalwazi uyahlakanipha; lalapho ohlakaniphileyo elaywa wemukela ulwazi." 
Proverbs21:12 Olungileyo uyananzelela indlu yokhohlakeleyo; uNkulunkulu uwisela abakhohlakeleyo ebubini. 
Proverbs21:13 Ogcika indlebe yakhe ekukhaleni komyanga, laye uzakhala angaphendulwa." 
Proverbs21:14 Isipho sensitha siyadedisa intukuthelo, lesivalamlomo esifubeni ulaka olulamandla." 
Proverbs21:15 Kuyintokozo kolungileyo ukwenza ukulunga, kodwa kuluvalo kubenzi bobubi." 
Proverbs21:16 Umuntu oduha endleleni yokuqedisisa uzahlala ebandleni lemimoya efileyo. 
Proverbs21:17 Othanda injabulo uzakuba ngumyanga; othanda iwayini lamafutha kayikunotha. 
Proverbs21:18 Okhohlakeleyo uyinhlawulelo yolungileyo, lesiphambeki esikhundleni sabaqotho." 
Proverbs21:19 Kungcono ukuhlala elizweni eliyinkangala kulalowesifazana wezingxabano lolaka. 
Proverbs21:20 Kukhona imfuyo eloyisekayo lamafutha emzini wohlakaniphileyo, kodwa umuntu oyisithutha uyakuginya." 
Proverbs21:21 Oxotshana lokulunga lomusa uzathola impilo, ukulunga, lodumo." 
Proverbs21:22 Ohlakaniphileyo ukhwela emzini wamaqhawe, adilizele phansi amandla ethemba lawo." 
Proverbs21:23 Ogcina umlomo wakhe lolimi lwakhe, ugcina umphefumulo wakhe ezinkathazweni." 
Proverbs21:24 Isideleli esizikhukhumezayo esizigqajayo libizo lakhe osebenza ngolaka lokuzikhukhumeza. 
Proverbs21:25 Isiloyiso sevila sizalibulala, ngoba izandla zalo ziyala ukusebenza." 
Proverbs21:26 Usuku lonke liloyisa isiloyiso, kodwa olungileyo uzakupha, angagodli." 
Proverbs21:27 Umhlatshelo wabakhohlakeleyo uyisinengiso; kakhulu kangakanani nxa bewuletha ngecebo elibi. 
Proverbs21:28 Umfakazi wamanga uzabhubha, kodwa umuntu olalelayo uzakhuluma njalonjalo." 
Proverbs21:29 Umuntu okhohlakeleyo wenza lukhuni ubuso bakhe, kodwa oqotho yena uyananzelela indlela yakhe." 
Proverbs21:30 Kakulanhlakanipho, njalo kakulakuqedisisa, njalo kakulaseluleko, okumelana le Nkosi." 
Proverbs21:31 Ibhiza lilungiselwa usuku lwempi, kodwa ukukhululwa ngokwe Nkosi." 
Proverbs22:1 Ibizo elihle likhethekile kulenotho enengi; isisa esihle kulesiliva njalo kulegolide. 
Proverbs22:2 Onothileyo lomyanga bayahlangana; i Nkosi yabenza bonke. 
Proverbs22:3 Ohlakaniphileyo ubona ububi acatshe, kodwa abangelalwazi bayaqhubeka babesebejeziswa." 
Proverbs22:4 Umvuzo wokuthobeka lo kwesaba i Nkosi, yinotho, lodumo, lempilo." 
Proverbs22:5 Ameva le mijibila kusendleleni yabaphambeneyo; ogcina umphefumulo wakhe uzakuba khatshana labo. 
Proverbs22:6 Fundisa umntwana ngokwendlela yakhe; ngitsho esemdala kayikuphambuka kuyo. 
Proverbs22:7 Onothileyo ubusa abayanga, lomboleki uyisigqili sombolekisi." 
Proverbs22:8 Ohlanyela ukonakala uzavuna ukuhlupheka, lentonga yolaka lwakhe izaphela." 
Proverbs22:9 Olelihlo elilokuhle yena uzabusiswa, ngoba unikile okwesinkwa sakhe kumyanga." 
Proverbs22:10 Xotsha isideleli, kuzaphuma lenkani, yebo, ingxabano lehlazo kuzaphela." 
Proverbs22:11 Othanda ukuhlanzeka kwenhliziyo, ngenxa yesisa sendebe zakhe, inkosi ingumgane wakhe." 
Proverbs22:12 Amehlo e Nkosi alondoloza ulwazi, kodwa izachitha amazwi abangathembekanga." 
Proverbs22:13 Ivila lithi: Kulesilwane ngaphandle; ngizabulawa phakathi kwezitalada. 
Proverbs22:14 Umlomo wabesifazana bemzini ungumgodi otshonayo; lowo i Nkosi emthukutheleleyo uzawela khona. 
Proverbs22:15 Ubuthutha bubotshelwe enhliziyweni yomntwana; uswazi lokuqondisa luzabususela khatshana laye. 
Proverbs22:16 Ocindezela umyanga ukwandisa alakho, opha onothileyo, isibili uzakuba ngoswelayo." 
Proverbs22:17 Beka indlebe yakho, uzwe amazwi abahlakaniphileyo, umise inhliziyo yakho elwazini lami." 
Proverbs22:18 Ngoba kumnandi uba uwalondoloza emibilini yakho; azahlala elungile kanyekanye endebeni zakho. 
Proverbs22:19 Ukuze ithemba lakho libe se Nkosi ni, ngikwazisile wona lamuhla, ngitsho wena." 
Proverbs22:20 Kangikubhalelanga yini izinto ezinhle kakhulu kuzeluleko lelwazini? 
Proverbs22:21 Ukukwazisa ukuqiniseka kwamazwi eqiniso, ukuze ubuyisele amazwi eqiniso kulabo abakuthumileyo." 
Proverbs22:22 Ungamphangi umyanga ngoba engumyanga, njalo ungamchobozi oswelayo esangweni." 
Proverbs22:23 Ngoba i Nkosi izamela udaba lwabo, iphange umphefumulo wababaphangayo." 
Proverbs22:24 Ungahlanganyeli lomuntu ololaka, ungahambisani lomuntu othukuthelayo," 
Proverbs22:25 hlezi ufunde indlela zakhe, wemukele umjibila emphefumulweni wakho." 
Proverbs22:26 Ungabi phakathi kwababambana izandla, phakathi kwabayizibambiso ngezikwelede." 
Proverbs22:27 Uba ungelakho okokuhlawula, kungani ezathatha umbheda wakho ngaphansi kwakho?" 
Proverbs22:28 Ungatshedisi isikhonkwane esidala somngcele, oyihlo abasenzayo." 
Proverbs22:29 Uyambona yini umuntu oyingcitshi emsebenzini wakhe? Uzazimisa phambi kwamakhosi; kayikuzimisa phambi kwabantukazana. 
Proverbs23:1 Nxa uhlalela ukudla lesiphathamandla, qaphelisa lokuqaphelisa okuphambi kwakho."

Proverbs23:3 Ungafisi izibondlo zaso, ngoba ziyikudla kwamanga." 
Proverbs23:4 Ungatshikatshikeli ukunotha; pheza ekuqedisiseni kwakho. 
Proverbs23:5 Uzandizisa yini amehlo akho kokungekho? Ngoba kuzazenzela lokuzenzela izimpiko njengokhozi oluphaphela emazulwini. 
Proverbs23:6 Ungadli ukudla kolelihlo elibi, ungafisi izibondlo zakhe." 
Proverbs23:7 Ngoba njengoba ecabangile emphefumulweni wakhe, unjalo. Uzakuthi: Dlana unathe; kodwa inhliziyo yakhe kayilawe." 
Proverbs23:8 Ucezu oludlileyo uzaluhlanza, wone amazwi akho amnandi."

Proverbs23:11 ngoba uMhlengi wazo ulamandla; yena uzamela udaba lwazo kuwe. 
Proverbs23:12 Beka inhliziyo yakho ekufundisweni, lezindlebe zakho emazwini olwazi." 
Proverbs23:13 Ungagodleli umntwana isijeziso; nxa umtshaya ngoswazi kayikufa. 
Proverbs23:14 Wena uzamtshaya ngoswazi, ukhulule umphefumulo wakhe esihogweni." 
Proverbs23:15 Ndodana yami, uba inhliziyo yakho ihlakanipha, inhliziyo yami izathokoza, yebo eyami;" 
Proverbs23:16 lezinso zami zizajabula ekukhulumeni kwendebe zakho izinto eziqondileyo. 
Proverbs23:17 Inhliziyo yakho kayingahawukeli izoni; kodwa bana ekwesabeni i Nkosi lonke usuku. 
Proverbs23:18 Ngoba isibili kukhona umvuzo, lomlindelo wakho kawuyikuqunywa." 
Proverbs23:19 Lalela wena, ndodana yami, uhlakaniphe, uqondise inhliziyo yakho endleleni." 
Proverbs23:20 Ungabi phakathi kwabanathi bewayini, phakathi kwezihwaba zenyama." 
Proverbs23:21 Ngoba isidakwa lesihwaba sizakuba ngumyanga, lokuwozela kugqokisa amadabudabu." 
Proverbs23:22 Lalela uyihlo owakuzalayo, ungamdeleli unyoko esemdala." 
Proverbs23:23 Thenga iqiniso, unga li thengisi; inhlakanipho, lemfundiso, lokuqedisisa." 
Proverbs23:24 Uyise wolungileyo uzathaba lokuthaba; lozala ohlakaniphileyo uzathokoza ngaye. 
Proverbs23:25 Uyihlo lonyoko kabathokoze, lokuzeleyo kathabe." 
Proverbs23:26 Ndodana yami, ngiphe inhliziyo yakho, lamehlo akho kawananzelele indlela zami." 
Proverbs23:27 Ngoba iwule lingumgodi otshonayo, lowesifazana owemzini ungumthombo ongumcingo." 
Proverbs23:28 Laye ucathama njengomphangi, andise abangathembekanga phakathi kwabantu." 
Proverbs23:29 Ngubani olo: Maye? Ngubani olo: Wo? Ngubani olenkani? Ngubani olesililo? Ngubani olamanxeba ngeze? Ngubani olamehlo abomvu?

Proverbs23:31 Ungakhangeli iwayini, lapho lizibonakalisa libomvu, nxa linika umbala walo enkomitshini, lihamba liqondile." 
Proverbs23:32 E kucin eni kwalo liluma njengenyoka, lilume njengebululu."

Proverbs23:34 Yebo, uzakuba njengolala enhliziyweni yolwandle, lanjengolala esihlokweni sensika yomkhumbi." 
Proverbs23:35 Bangitshayile, kangizwanga buhlungu; bangidutshuzile, kangikunanzanga. Ngizavuka nini? Ngiphinde ngilidinge futhi." 
Proverbs24:1 Ungabi lamhawu ngabantu ababi, ungaloyisi ukuba labo." 
Proverbs24:2 Ngoba inhliziyo yabo iceba udlakela, lezindebe zabo zikhuluma uhlupho." 
Proverbs24:3 Ngenhlakanipho indlu iyakhiwa, langokuqedisisa iqiniswe." 
Proverbs24:4 Langolwazi amakamelo agcwaliswa ngempahla zonke eziligugu lezimnandi. 
Proverbs24:5 Umuntu ohlakaniphileyo ulamandla, lomuntu ololwazi uqinisa amandla." 
Proverbs24:6 Ngoba ngezeluleko ezihlakaniphileyo ungalawula impi yakho, lokukhululwa kusebunengini babeluleki." 
Proverbs24:7 Inhlakanipho enkulu iphakeme esiwuleni; esangweni kasivuli umlomo waso. 
Proverbs24:8 Oceba ukwenza okubi, bazambiza ngokuthi ngumnikazi wamacebo amabi." 
Proverbs24:9 Umcabango wobuwula yisono, lesideleli siyisinengiso emuntwini." 
Proverbs24:10 Uba uzitshengisa uxega ngosuku lokuhlupheka, amandla akho mancinyane." 
Proverbs24:11 Bophule abasiwa ekufeni, ngoba batatalikela ekubulaweni nxa ugodla." 
Proverbs24:12 Uba usithi: Khangela besingakwazi; ohlola izinhliziyo yena kayiku ku nanzelela yini? Olondoloza umphefumulo wakho yena uza kw azi; njalo uzabuyisela emuntwini njengokomsebenzi wakhe. 
Proverbs24:13 Dlana uluju, ndodana yami, ngoba lulungile, lohlanga loluju lumnandi elwangeni lwakho." 
Proverbs24:14 Lunjalo ulwazi lwenhlakanipho emphefumulweni wakho; uba uluthola, kuzakuba lomvuzo, lethemba lakho kaliyikuqunywa." 
Proverbs24:15 Wena okhohlakeleyo, ungacathameli umuzi wolungileyo; ungachithi indawo yakhe yokuphumula." 
Proverbs24:16 Ngoba olungileyo uzakuwa kasikhombisa, avuke; kodwa abakhohlakeleyo bazakhubeka ebubini." 
Proverbs24:17 Ungathokozi ngokuwa kwesitha sakho, lekukhubekeni kwaso inhliziyo yakho kayingajabuli;" 
Proverbs24:18 hlezi i Nkosi ikubone, kube kubi emehlweni ayo, iphendule ulaka lwayo ilususe kuso." 
Proverbs24:19 Ungazikhathazi ngenxa yabenzi bobubi, ungabi lamhawu ngabakhohlakeleyo;" 
Proverbs24:20 ngoba omubi kayikuba lomvuzo; isibane sabakhohlakeleyo sizacitshwa. 
Proverbs24:21 Ndodana yami, yesaba uJehova lenkosi; ungahlanganyeli labaguqukayo;" 
Proverbs24:22 ngoba incithakalo yabo izavuka masinyane; njalo ngubani owazi ukuchitheka kwabo bobabili? 
Proverbs24:23 Lala ngawabahlakaniphileyo. Ukunaka ubuso kusahlulelo kakulunganga. 
Proverbs24:24 Othi kokhohlakeleyo: Wena ulungile; abantu bazamqalekisa, izizwe zizamthukuthelela." 
Proverbs24:25 Kodwa kulabo aba m khuzayo kuzakuba lentokozo, lesibusiso esihle sizabehlela." 
Proverbs24:26 Uzakwanga indebe zalowo ophendula ngamazwi aqondileyo. 
Proverbs24:27 Lungisa umsebenzi wakho ngaphandle, uzilungiselele wona ensimini, emva kwalokho wakhe indlu yakho." 
Proverbs24:28 Ungabi ngumfakazi umelene lomakhelwane wakho kungelasizatho, kumbe ukhohlise ngendebe zakho." 
Proverbs24:29 Ungathi: Njengokwenza kwakhe kimi ngizakwenza njalo kuye; ngizaphindisela emuntwini njengokomsebenzi wakhe. 
Proverbs24:30 Ngedlula ensimini yevila, lesivinini somuntu oswele ingqondo;" 
Proverbs24:31 khangela-ke, konke kwakumile ameva, imbabazane yayisibekele ubuso bakho, lomthangala wakho wamatshe udilikile." 
Proverbs24:32 Mina-ke nga ku khangela, nga ku beka enhliziyweni yami; nga ku bona, ngemukela imfundiso." 
Proverbs24:33 Ubuthongo obuncinyane, ukuwozela okuncinyane, ukusonga izandla okuncinyane ukuthi kulalwe," 
Proverbs24:34 besebusiza ubuyanga bakho njeng esihambi, lenswelo zakho njengomuntu olesihlangu."

Proverbs25:2 Kuludumo lukaNkulunkulu ukufihla udaba, kodwa kuludumo lwamakhosi ukuhlolisisa udaba." 
Proverbs25:3 Amazulu ngokuphakama, lomhlaba ngokujula, lenhliziyo yamakhosi kakulakuhlolisiswa." 
Proverbs25:4 Susa amanyele esiliveni, besekuphuma isitsha somncibilikisi." 
Proverbs25:5 Susa okhohlakeleyo phambi kwenkosi, besekuqiniswa isihlalo sayo sobukhosi ngokulunga." 
Proverbs25:6 Ungaziqhenyi phambi kwenkosi, njalo ungemi endaweni yezikhulu;" 
Proverbs25:7 ngoba kungcono kuthiwe kuwe: Yenyukela ngapha, kulokuthi wehliswe phambi kwesiphathamandla, amehlo akho asibonileyo." 
Proverbs25:8 Ungaphangisi ukuphuma uku ya phikisana, hlezi wenze ulutho ekucineni kwakho, lapho umakhelwane wakho esekuyangisile." 
Proverbs25:9 Mela udaba lwakho lomakhelwane wakho, kodwa ungavezi imfihlo yomunye;" 
Proverbs25:10 hlezi okuzwayo akuyangise, lesigcono sakho singaphambuki." 
Proverbs25:11 Ilizwi elikhulunywe ngokufaneleyo li njeng ama-apula egolide ezitsheni zesiliva ezibaziweyo. 
Proverbs25:12 Umkhuzi ohlakaniphileyo endlebeni ezwayo ulisongo legolide lesiceciso segolide elihle. 
Proverbs25:13 Isithunywa esithembekileyo kwabasithumileyo sinjengomqando weliqhwa elikhithikayo ngosuku lokuvuna, ngoba sivuselela umphefumulo wamakhosi aso." 
Proverbs25:14 Umuntu oziqhenya ngesipho samanga u njeng amayezi lomoya okungelazulu. 
Proverbs25:15 Ngokubekezela umbusi angavunyiswa, lolimi oluthambileyo lwephula ithambo." 
Proverbs25:16 Utholile yini uluju? Dlana okwenele wena, hlezi uludle kakhulu, uluhlanze." 
Proverbs25:17 Unyawo lwakho kalungavami endlini kamakhelwane wakho, hlezi akusuthe akuzonde." 
Proverbs25:18 Umuntu ofakaza ubufakazi bamanga ngomakhelwane wakhe uyisagila lenkemba lomtshoko obukhali. 
Proverbs25:19 Ukuthemba ongathembekanga ngosuku lokuhlupheka ku njeng ezinyo elephukileyo, lonyawo olwenyeleyo." 
Proverbs25:20 Ohlabelela izingoma enhliziyweni edabukileyo u njeng okhupha isembatho ngosuku lwamakhaza, njenge viniga phakathi kwesoda." 
Proverbs25:21 Uba okuzondayo elambile, umnike isinkwa adle, njalo uba omile, umnike amanzi anathe;" 
Proverbs25:22 ngoba uzabekelela amalahle omlilo ekhanda lakhe, le Nkosi izakuvuza." 
Proverbs25:23 Umoya wenyakatho uletha izulu, lolimi lwemfihlo ubuso obulolaka." 
Proverbs25:24 Kungcono ukuhlala engonsini yophahla kulalowesifazana wezinkani lendlini yokuhlanganyela. 
Proverbs25:25 Umbiko omuhle ovela elizweni elikhatshana unjengamanzi aqandayo emphefumulweni odiniweyo. 
Proverbs25:26 Olungileyo ozanyazanyiswayo phambi kokhohlakeleyo ungumthombo odungekileyo lesiphethu esonakeleyo. 
Proverbs25:27 Ukudla uluju olunengi kakulunganga; ngokunjalo ukudinga udumo lwabo kakusi dumo. 
Proverbs25:28 Umuntu ongathinti umoya wakhe u nje ngomuzi ofohlelweyo ongelamthangala. 
Proverbs26:1 Njengeliqhwa elikhithikayo ehlobo lanjengezulu ngesikhathi sokuvuna, ngokunjalo udumo kalusifanelanga isithutha." 
Proverbs26:2 Njengenyoni ekuzulazuleni, njengenkonjane ekuphapheni, ngokunjalo isiqalekiso kungelasizatho kasiyikufika." 
Proverbs26:3 Isiswepu ngesebhiza, itomu ngelikababhemi, loswazi ngolomhlane wezithutha." 
Proverbs26:4 Ungaphenduli isithutha ngokobuthutha baso, hlezi lawe ufanane laso." 
Proverbs26:5 Phendula isithutha ngokobuthutha baso, hlezi sibe ngesihlakaniphileyo emehlweni aso." 
Proverbs26:6 Othumela amazwi ngesandla sesithutha, uquma inyawo, unatha isihluku." 
Proverbs26:7 Imilenze yesiqhuli iyalengalenga; sinjalo isaga emlonyeni wezithutha. 
Proverbs26:8 Njengokubophela ilitshe esavutheni, unjalo onika udumo esithutheni." 
Proverbs26:9 Njeng ameva enyuka esandleni sesidakwa sinjalo isaga emlonyeni wezithutha. 
Proverbs26:10 Oqatsha isithutha loqatsha abadlulayo unjengomtshoki ociba wonke. 
Proverbs26:11 Njengenja ebuyela emahlanzweni ayo ngokunjalo isithutha siphinda ubuthutha baso. 
Proverbs26:12 Uyabona yini umuntu ohlakaniphileyo emehlweni akhe? Kulethemba elikhulu esithutheni kulaye. 
Proverbs26:13 Olivila uthi: Kulesilwane endleleni; isilwane sisezitaladeni. 
Proverbs26:14 Isivalo siphenduka ngamabhanti aso, ngokunjalo ivila embhedeni walo." 
Proverbs26:15 Ivila lifihla isandla salo emganwini, liyavilapha ukusibuyisela emlonyeni walo." 
Proverbs26:16 Ivila lihlakaniphile emehlweni alo okwedlula abayisikhombisa abangaphendula nge nhlakanipho. 
Proverbs26:17 Odlulayo ethukuthela ngengxabano engeyisiyo eyakhe ungobamba indlebe zenja. 
Proverbs26:18 Njengohlanya oluphosa izikhuni ezivuthayo, imitshoko, lokufa," 
Proverbs26:19 unjalo umuntu okhohlisa umakhelwane wakhe, abesesithi: Kangisomi yini?" 
Proverbs26:20 Uba kungelankuni umlilo uyacitsha; njalo uba kungelakunyeya, ukuxabana kuyathula." 
Proverbs26:21 Njeng amalahle emalahleni avuthayo, lenkuni emlilweni, unjalo umuntu wenkani ngowokubasa ingxabano." 
Proverbs26:22 Amazwi onyeyayo anjengezibondlo ezehlela kokungaphakathi kwesisu. 
Proverbs26:23 Indebe ezivuthayo lenhliziyo embi kungamanyele esiliva ahuqa ukhamba. 
Proverbs26:24 Ozondayo uyazenzisa ngezindebe zakhe, kodwa ufaka inkohliso ngaphakathi kwakhe." 
Proverbs26:25 Lapho esenza ilizwi lakhe libe ngelomusa, ungamkholwa, ngoba izinengiso eziyisikhombisa zisenhliziyweni yakhe." 
Proverbs26:26 Inzondo isibekelwa ngenkohliso; ububi bakhe buzakwembulwa ebandleni. 
Proverbs26:27 Ogebhayo umgodi uzawela kuwo, logiqa ilitshe, lizabuyela kuye." 
Proverbs26:28 Ulimi lwamanga luzonda olubachobozayo, lomlomo obutshelezi usebenza incithakalo." 
Proverbs27:1 Ungazincomi ngosuku lwakusasa, ngoba kawazi ukuthi usuku luzazalani." 
Proverbs27:2 Owemzini kakudumise, njalo hatshi umlomo wakho; owezizwe, njalo hatshi indebe zakho." 
Proverbs27:3 Ilitshe linzima, letshebetshebe liyasinda, kodwa ulaka lwesithutha lunzima kulakho kokubili." 
Proverbs27:4 Ulaka lulolunya, lentukuthelo iyisikhukhula; kodwa ngubani ongema phambi komona?" 
Proverbs27:5 Kungcono ukukhuzwa ngokusobala kulothando lwensitha. 
Proverbs27:6 Amanxeba omngane athembekile, kodwa ukwanga kwesitha kunengi." 
Proverbs27:7 Umphefumulo osuthiyo unyathelela phansi uhlanga loluju, kodwa k umphefumulo olambileyo konke okubabayo kumnandi." 
Proverbs27:8 Njengenyoni eduha isuka esidlekeni sayo unjalo umuntu oduha esuka endaweni yakhe. 
Proverbs27:9 Amafutha lempepha kuthokozisa inhliziyo; kunjalo ubumnandi bomngane womuntu ngenxa yeseluleko somphefumulo. 
Proverbs27:10 Ungadeli umngane wakho lomngane kayihlo; njalo ungangeni endlini yomfowenu ngosuku lwencithakalo yakho; kungcono umakhelwane oseduze kulomfowenu okhatshana. 
Proverbs27:11 Hlakanipha, ndodana yami, uthokozise inhliziyo yami, ukuze ngibe lempendulo kongisolayo." 
Proverbs27:12 Okhaliphileyo uyabona ububi acatshe, kodwa abangelalwazi bayaqhubeka bajeziswe." 
Proverbs27:13 Thatha isigqoko soyisibambiso ngenxa yowemzini, umthathele isibambiso ngenxa yowesifazana wezizwe." 
Proverbs27:14 Obusisa umngane wakhe ngelizwi elikhulu evuka ekuseni kakhulu, kuzathiwa yisiqalekiso kuye." 
Proverbs27:15 Ukuchophelela ngosuku lwezulu eliqhubekayo lowesifazana oxabanayo kuyafanana. 
Proverbs27:16 Omfihlayo ufihla umoya, lamagcobo esandla sakhe sokunene ayabiza." 
Proverbs27:17 Insimbi ilolwa ngensimbi; ngokunjalo umuntu ulola ubuso bomngane wakhe. 
Proverbs27:18 Olondoloza isihlahla somkhiwa uzakudla isithelo saso; lolinda inkosi yakhe uzadunyiswa. 
Proverbs27:19 Njeng e manz ini ubuso busebusweni, ngokunjalo inhliziyo yomuntu isemuntwini." 
Proverbs27:20 Isihogo lencithakalo kakusuthi, ngokunjalo amehlo omuntu kawasuthi." 
Proverbs27:21 Imbiza yokucenga ngeyesiliva, lesithando somlilo ngesegolide; kunjalo umuntu ngokokudunyiswa kwakhe." 
Proverbs27:22 Lanxa ugiga isithutha ngomgigo engigeni phakathi kwengqoloyi, ubuthutha baso kabuyikusuka kuso." 
Proverbs27:23 Yazi lokwazi ubuso bezimvu zakho, beka inhliziyo yakho kumihlambi yakho," 
Proverbs27:24 ngoba inotho kayisiyaphakade; kumbe umqhele ube sesizukulwaneni lesizukulwana yini? 
Proverbs27:25 Utshani buyasuswa, lohlaza lubonakale, kubuthwe lemibhida yezintaba." 
Proverbs27:26 Amawundlu angawezigqoko zakho, lezimpongo ziyintengo yesiqinti." 
Proverbs27:27 Kuzakuba lochago lwezimbuzi olwanele ukudla kwakho lokudla kwendlu yakho lempilo yencekukazi zakho. 
Proverbs28:1 Ababi babaleka kungekho umzingeli, kodwa abalungileyo balesibindi njengebhongo lesilwane." 
Proverbs28:2 Ngesiphambeko sesizwe ababusi baso banengi; kodwa ngomuntu olokuqedisisa o lolwazi ngokunjalo sizakwelulwa. 
Proverbs28:3 Umuntu ongumyanga ocindezela abayanga ulizulu elikhukhulayo ukuze kungabi lokudla. 
Proverbs28:4 Abadela umlayo badumisa ababi, kodwa labo abagcina umlayo balwa labo." 
Proverbs28:5 Abantu ababi kabaqedisisi ukulunga, kodwa abadinga i Nkosi baqedisisa konke." 
Proverbs28:6 Kungcono umyanga ohamba ngobuqotho bakhe kulophambene ngezindlela lanxa enothile. 
Proverbs28:7 Ogcina umlayo uyindodana eqedisisayo, kodwa ozihlanganisa lezigangi uyangisa uyise." 
Proverbs28:8 Owandisa inotho yakhe ngenzalo langenzuzo uyibuthela olomusa kubayanga. 
Proverbs28:9 Ophambula indlebe yakhe ekulaleleni umlayo, lomkhuleko wakhe uzakuba yisinengiso." 
Proverbs28:10 Oduhisela abaqotho endleleni embi yena uzawela emgodini wakhe, kodwa abaqotho bazakudla ilifa lokuhle." 
Proverbs28:11 Indoda enothileyo ihlakaniphile emehlweni ayo, kodwa umyanga oqedisisayo uzayihlola." 
Proverbs28:12 Lapho abalungileyo bethokoza, kulenkazimulo enkulu; kodwa nxa ababi bephakama, umuntu uyadingwa." 
Proverbs28:13 Osibekela iziphambeko zakhe kayikuphumelela, kodwa o zi vumayo a zi tshiye, uzahawukelwa." 
Proverbs28:14 Ubusisiwe umuntu owesaba njalonjalo, kodwa owenza inhliziyo yakhe ibe lukhuni uzawela ebubini." 
Proverbs28:15 Umbusi okhohlakeleyo phezu kwabantu abangabayanga uyisilwane esibhongayo lebhere elizingelayo. 
Proverbs28:16 Umbusi oswele ukuqedisisa konke wandisa lencindezelo; ozonda inzuzo embi uzakwelula insuku. 
Proverbs28:17 Umuntu ocindezelwe ligazi lomphefumulo uzabalekela emgodini; kabangamsekeli. 
Proverbs28:18 Ohamba ngobuqotho uzasindiswa, kodwa ophambene ngendlela ezimbili uzawela kweyodwa." 
Proverbs28:19 Olima umhlaba wakhe uzasutha ukudla, kodwa olandela abayize uzasutha ubuyanga." 
Proverbs28:20 Umuntu wothembeko lonke uzavama ngezibusiso, kodwa ophangisa ukunotha kayikuba msulwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Ukuhlonipha ubuso kakulunganga, ngoba umuntu uzakona ngenxa yocezu lwesinkwa." 
Proverbs28:22 Ophangisa ukunotha ungumuntu olelihlo elibi, njalo engazi ukuthi ubuyanga buzamehlela." 
Proverbs28:23 Okhuza umuntu uzathola umusa emuva okwedlula okhohlisayo ngolimi. 
Proverbs28:24 Ophanga uyise kumbe unina, athi: Akusiso isiphambeko; ungumngane womchithi." 
Proverbs28:25 Olomphefumulo obanzi udunga ingxabano, kodwa othemba e Nkosi ni uzakhuluphaliswa." 
Proverbs28:26 Othemba enhliziyweni yakhe uyisithutha, kodwa ohamba ngenhlakanipho uzaphepha." 
Proverbs28:27 Opha umyanga kayikuswela, kodwa ofihla amehlo akhe uzakuba leziqalekiso ezinengi." 
Proverbs28:28 Nxa abakhohlakeleyo bephakanyiswa, umuntu uyacatsha, kodwa nxa bebhubha, abalungileyo bayanda." 
Proverbs29:1 Umuntu othi ekhuzwa kanengi aqinise intamo, uzahle ephulwe, njalo kungabi lakusiliswa." 
Proverbs29:2 Lapho abalungileyo bekhula, abantu bayathokoza, kodwa lapho okhohlakeleyo ebusa, abantu bayabubula." 
Proverbs29:3 Umuntu othanda inhlakanipho uthokozisa uyise, kodwa ohlanganyela lamawule uchitha inotho." 
Proverbs29:4 Inkosi iqinisa ilizwe ngesahlulelo, kodwa umuntu wezipho uyalichitha." 
Proverbs29:5 Umuntu olalisa ngolimi umakhelwane wakhe wendlalela izinyawo zakhe imbule. 
Proverbs29:6 Esiphambekweni somuntu omubi kulomjibila, kodwa olungileyo uyamemeza ngenjabulo ethokoza." 
Proverbs29:7 Olungileyo uyalwazi udaba lwabayanga; okhohlakeleyo kananzeleli ulwazi. 
Proverbs29:8 Abantu abadelelayo bayawuthungela umuzi, kodwa abahlakaniphileyo badedisa ulaka." 
Proverbs29:9 Umuntu ohlakaniphileyo emangalelana lomuntu oyisithutha, loba elolaka, loba ehleka, kakulakuthula." 
Proverbs29:10 Abantu abomele igazi bazonda opheleleyo, kodwa abaqotho badinga umphefumulo wakhe." 
Proverbs29:11 Isithutha sikhupha umoya waso wonke, kodwa ohlakaniphileyo uyawuthibela emuva." 
Proverbs29:12 Umbusi olalela amazwi amanga, zonke izinceku zakhe zikhohlakele." 
Proverbs29:13 Umyanga lomuntu wencindezelo bayahlangana; i Nkosi ikhanyisa amehlo abo bobabili. 
Proverbs29:14 Inkosi eyahlulela abayanga ngothembeko, isihlalo sayo sobukhosi sizamiswa phakade." 
Proverbs29:15 Uswazi lokukhuza kunika inhlakanipho, kodwa umntwana oyekelelwayo uthelela unina inhloni." 
Proverbs29:16 Lapho abakhohlakeleyo besanda, isiphambeko siyanda, kodwa abalungileyo bazabona ukuwa kwabo." 
Proverbs29:17 Laya indodana yakho, izakuphumuza; yebo, izanika izinjabulo emphefumulweni wakho." 
Proverbs29:18 Lapho okungelambono khona, abantu bayadlubulunda; kodwa ubusisiwe ogcina umlayo." 
Proverbs29:19 Inceku kayilaywa ngamazwi; lanxa iqedisisa, kayiyikuphendula." 
Proverbs29:20 Uyambona yini umuntu ophangisa ngamazwi akhe? Kulethemba elingcono esithutheni kulaye. 
Proverbs29:21 Ototoza inceku yakhe kusukela ebuntwaneni, ekucineni izakuba luhlupho kuye." 
Proverbs29:22 Umuntu ololaka ubanga ukuxabana, lomuntu ovutha intukuthelo wandisa isiphambeko." 
Proverbs29:23 Ukuzigqaja komuntu kuzamehlisa, kodwa olomoya othobekileyo uzabamba udumo." 
Proverbs29:24 Owabelana lesela uzonda umphefumulo wakhe; uzwa isiqalekiso, angakhulumi." 
Proverbs29:25 Ukwesaba abantu kuletha umjibila, kodwa othemba e Nkosi ni uzabekwa phezulu evikelekile." 
Proverbs29:26 Abanengi badinga ubuso bombusi, kodwa isahlulelo salowo lalowo sivela e Nkosi ni." 
Proverbs29:27 Umuntu ongalunganga uyisinengiso kwabalungileyo, kodwa oqotho endleleni uyisinengiso kokhohlakeleyo." 
Proverbs30:1 Amazwi kaAguri indodana kaJake umMasa. Umuntu wathi kuIthiyeli, kuIthiyeli loUkhali:" 
Proverbs30:2 Isibili, ngiyisithutha kulomuntu, kangilakuqedisisa komuntu." 
Proverbs30:3 Kangifundanga inhlakanipho, kangilwazi ulwazi lwabangcwele." 
Proverbs30:4 Ngubani owenyukela emazulwini njalo wehla? Ngubani oqoqe wafumbatha umoya ezandleni zakhe? Ngubani ogoqele amanzi esembathweni? Ngubani omise yonke imikhawulo yomhlaba? Lingubani ibizo lakhe, lebizo lendodana yakhe lingubani, uba usazi?" 
Proverbs30:5 Lonke ilizwi likaNkulunkulu licwengekile; uyisihlangu kwabaphephela kuye. 
Proverbs30:6 Ungengezeleli emazwini akhe, hlezi akukhuze, utholwe ungumqambimanga." 
Proverbs30:7 Zimbili izinto engizicele kuwe; ungangigodleli zona ngingakafi. 
Proverbs30:8 Susa khatshana lami ize lamazwi amanga; ungangiphi ubuyanga loba inotho; ungiphe ukudla kwesabelo sami. 
Proverbs30:9 Hlezi ngisuthe, ngi ku phike ngithi: Ngubani i Nkosi? Kumbe hlezi ngibe ngumyanga, ngintshontshe, ngithathe ngeze ibizo likaNkulunkulu wami." 
Proverbs30:10 Ungahlebi inceku enkosini yayo, hlezi ikuthuke, ube lecala." 
Proverbs30:11 Kulesizukulwana esi thuka uyise, esingabusisi unina;" 
Proverbs30:12 isizukulwana esihlambulukileyo emehlweni aso, kodwa esingahlanjululwanga engcekezeni yaso;" 
Proverbs30:13 isizukulwana omehlo aso aphakeme kangaka, lenkophe zaso ziphakanyisiwe;" 
Proverbs30:14 isizukulwana omazinyo aso zinkemba, lesimazinyo aso omhlathi zingqamu, zokudla abayanga emhlabeni, labaswelayo ebantwini." 
Proverbs30:15 Umkhaza ulamadodakazi amabili athi: Phana, phana; lezizontathu kazisuthi; ezine kazitsho ukuthi: Kwanele." 
Proverbs30:16 Ingcwaba, lesizalo esivaliweyo, umhlaba o ngasuthi amanzi, lomlilo o ngathi: Kwanele." 
Proverbs30:17 Ilihlo e liklolodela uyise, lelidelela ukulalela unina, amawabayi esihotsha azalukopola, labantwana bamanqe bazalidla." 
Proverbs30:18 Lezizinto ezintathu ziyisimangaliso esikhulu kimi, yebo, ezine engingazaziyo:" 
Proverbs30:19 Indlela yokhozi emazulwini, indlela yenyoka edwaleni, indlela yomkhumbi enhliziyweni yolwandle, lendlela yejaha entombini." 
Proverbs30:20 Injalo indlela yowesifazana oliwule; udla, esule umlomo wakhe, athi: Kangenzanga isiphambeko." 
Proverbs30:21 Ngenxa yezinto ezintathu umhlaba uyazamazama, yebo, ngenxa yezine o ngezithwale:" 
Proverbs30:22 Ngenxa yesigqili nxa sibusa, lesithutha nxa sisuthi ukudla," 
Proverbs30:23 ngenxa yesaliwakazi nxa sendile, lencekukazi nxa iyindlalifa yenkosikazi yayo." 
Proverbs30:24 Lezi ezine zingezincinyane zomhlaba, kanti zihlakaniphile zenziwe zihlakaniphe:" 
Proverbs30:25 Ubunyonyo buyisizwe esingelamandla, kanti bulungisa ukudla kwabo ehlobo." 
Proverbs30:26 Imbila ziyisizwe esingelamandla, kanti zimisa indlu yazo edwaleni." 
Proverbs30:27 Intethe kazilankosi, kanti zonke ziphuma zehlukene ngamaviyo." 
Proverbs30:28 Umbankwa ubambelela ngezandla ezimbili, njalo usezigodlweni zenkosi." 
Proverbs30:29 Lezi ezintathu zinyathela kuhle, yebo, ezine zihamba kuhle:" 
Proverbs30:30 Isilwane esilamandla phakathi kwenyamazana, esingeyikubuyela emuva ngenxa yobuso loba ngobukabani;" 
Proverbs30:31 obhince okhalweni, kumbe impongo; lenkosi ileviyo lamabutho." 
Proverbs30:32 Uba ube yisithutha ngokuziphakamisa, njalo uba ucebe okubi, beka isandla emlonyeni." 
Proverbs30:33 Ngoba ukuphehlwa kochago kuveza iphehla, lokucindezelwa kwempumulo kuveza igazi, lokucindezelwa kwentukuthelo kuveza ingxabano." 
Proverbs31:1 Amazwi kaLemuweli inkosi yeMasa, unina amfundisa wona." 
Proverbs31:2 Ini, ndodana yami! Ini-ke, ndodana yesizalo sami! Ini-ke, ndodana yezithembiso zami!" 
Proverbs31:3 Unganiki amandla akho kwabesifazana, kumbe izindlela zakho ekubhubhiseni amakhosi." 
Proverbs31:4 Kakusikwamakhosi, Lemuweli, kakusikwamakhosi ukunatha iwayini, kumbe okweziphathamandla ukuloyisa okunathwayo okulamandla." 
Proverbs31:5 Hlezi anathe, akhohlwe isimiso, aguqule isahlulelo sawo wonke amadodana enhlupheko." 
Proverbs31:6 Phana okunathwayo okulamandla kobhubhayo, lewayini kwabababayo emphefumulweni." 
Proverbs31:7 Kanathe, akhohlwe ubuyanga bakhe, angabe esakhumbula usizi lwakhe." 
Proverbs31:8 Vulela isimungulu umlomo wakho, udaba lwawo wonke amadodana okwedlula." 
Proverbs31:9 Vula umlomo wakho, wahlulele ngokulunga, umele ilungelo lomyanga loswelayo." 
Proverbs31:10 Ngubani ongathola umfazi okhutheleyo? Ngoba intengo yakhe iyedlula kakhulu amatshe amahle. 
Proverbs31:11 Inhliziyo yomkakhe ithemba kuye, ukuze angasweli impango." 
Proverbs31:12 Umenzela okuhle, hatshi okubi, insuku zonke zempilo yakhe." 
Proverbs31:13 Udinga uboya bezimvu lefilakisi, asebenze ngenjabulo yezandla zakhe." 
Proverbs31:14 Ufanana lemikhumbi yomthengisi; uletha ukudla kwakhe kuvela khatshana. 
Proverbs31:15 Uvuka kusesebusuku, anike indlu yakhe ukudla, lesabelo kuzincekukazi zakhe." 
Proverbs31:16 Anakane ngensimu ayizuze; ngesithelo sezandla zakhe ahlanyele ivini. 
Proverbs31:17 Uyabhinca ukhalo lwakhe ngamandla, aqinise ingalo zakhe." 
Proverbs31:18 Uyananzelela ukuthi ukuthengisa kwakhe kuhle; isibane sakhe kasicitshi ebusuku. 
Proverbs31:19 Welulela izandla zakhe kuluthi lokuphotha, lezandla zakhe zibambe isigodo esilezintambo." 
Proverbs31:20 Welulela umyanga isandla sakhe, elulele izandla zakhe koswelayo." 
Proverbs31:21 Kesabi iliqhwa elikhithikayo ngenxa yabendlu yakhe, ngoba bonke abendlu yakhe bagqokiswe kabili." 
Proverbs31:22 Uzenzela izembeso; isigqoko sakhe sililembu elicolekileyo leliyibubende. 
Proverbs31:23 Umkakhe uyaziwa emasangweni, lapho ehlezi labadala belizwe." 
Proverbs31:24 Wenza ilembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, alithengise; anike umthengi ibhanti." 
Proverbs31:25 Amandla lodumo kuyisigqoko sakhe; uyahleka mayelana losuku olulandelayo. 
Proverbs31:26 Uvula umlomo wakhe ngenhlakanipho; lemfundiso yomusa iselimini lwakhe. 
Proverbs31:27 Uqaphela inhambo zomuzi wakhe; kadli isinkwa sobuvila. 
Proverbs31:28 Abantwana bakhe bayavuka bathi ubusisiwe, l omkakhe laye uyamdumisa:" 
Proverbs31:29 Manengi amadodakazi enze ngenkuthalo, kodwa wena wenyukile phezu kwawo wonke." 
Proverbs31:30 Ubuhle buyinkohliso, lokubukeka kuyize; owesifazana owesaba i Nkosi yena uzadunyiswa." 
Proverbs31:31 Mnikeni okuvela esithelweni sezandla zakhe, lemisebenzi yakhe kayimdumise emasangweni." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Amazwi omTshumayeli, indodana kaDavida, inkosi eJerusalema." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Ize leze, kutsho umTshumayeli, ize leze, konke kuyize." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Kuyinzuzoni emuntwini emtshikatshikeni wakhe wonke awutshikatshika ngaphansi kwelanga? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Isizukulwana siyedlula, lesizukulwana size, kodwa umhlaba umi kuze kube nininini." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Lelanga liyaphuma, lelanga litshone, litshetshela endaweni lapho eliphuma khona." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Umoya uya eningizimu, ujikele enyakatho, ujikajike uhambe, lomoya ubuyele ekubhodeni kwawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Yonke imifula iya olwandle, kodwa ulwandle kalugcwali; endaweni lapho imifula evela khona, ibuyele iye khona." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zonke izinto ziyadinisa; kakulamuntu olakho ukukukhuluma. Ilihlo kalisuthi ngokubona, lendlebe kayigcwaliswa yikuzwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Okwake kwaba khona yilokho okuzakuba khona, lokwake kwenziwa yilokho okuzakwenziwa; njalo kakulalutho olutsha ngaphansi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kungaba khona ulutho yini okungathiwa ngalo: Khangela, lokhu kutsha! Kwakuvele kukhona endulo engaphambi kwethu." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Kakukho ukukhunjulwa kwezinto zakuqala; njalo lezinto ezizayo ezizakuba khona kakuyikuba khona ukukhunjulwa kwazo lalabo abazakuba khona emva kwalokho. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Mina mTshumayeli ngangiyinkosi phezu kukaIsrayeli eJerusalema. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ngasenginikela inhliziyo yami ukudinga lokuhlolisisa ngokuhlakanipha ngakho konke okwenziwayo ngaphansi kwamazulu; lumtshikatshika onzima uNkulunkulu uwunike abantwana babantu ukuthi baphatheke ngawo. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ngiyibonile yonke imisebenzi eyenziwayo ngaphansi kwelanga; khangela-ke, konke kuyize lokukhathazeka komoya." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Okugobileyo kakulakuqondiswa; lokuswelekayo kakulakubalwa. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ngakhuluma mina lenhliziyo yami ngisithi: Khangela, mina ngikhulile ngandisa inhlakanipho phezu kwabo bonke ababephambi kwami eJerusalema; njalo inhliziyo yami ibonile kakhulu inhlakanipho lolwazi." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Nganginikela inhliziyo yami ukwazi inhlakanipho, lokwazi ukuhlanya lobuthutha, ngabona ukuthi lalokhu yikukhathazeka komoya." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ngoba kunhlakanipho enengi kulokukhathazeka okunengi, lowandisa ulwazi wandisa usizi." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ngathi mina enhliziyweni yami: Woza-ke, ngizakuzama ngentokozo, ngakho khangela okuhle. Khangela-ke, lalokhu kwakuyize." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ngokuhleka ngathi: Kuyibuhlanya! Langentokozo: Kwenzani? 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ngadinga enhliziyweni yami ukuthokozisa inyama yami ngewayini (kodwa ngakhokhela inhliziyo yami ngenhlakanipho), lokubambelela ebuthutheni, ngize ngibone ukuthi kuyini lokho okulungele abantwana babantu, abangakwenza ngaphansi kwamazulu, ngenani lensuku zempilo zabo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ngazenzela imisebenzi emikhulu; ngazakhela izindlu; ngazihlanyelela izivini; 
Ecclesiastes2:5 ngazenzela izivande lezivande zezihlahla; ngahlanyela kuzo izihlahla zezithelo zohlobo lonke; 
Ecclesiastes2:6 ngazenzela amachibi amanzi okuthelela ngawo ihlathi lokukhulisa izihlahla; 
Ecclesiastes2:7 ngathenga izigqili lezigqilikazi, ngaba labazalelwe endlini; njalo ngaba lemfuyo enengi yenkomo lezimvu okwedlula bonke ababekhona ngaphambi kwami eJerusalema;" 
Ecclesiastes2:8 ngazibuthela futhi isiliva legolide lemfuyo ekhethekileyo yamakhosi leyamazwe; ngazizuzela abahlabeleli labahlabelelikazi, lentokozo zabantwana babantu, izinto zokuhlabelela zemihlobo yonke." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ngakho ngaba mkhulu nganda okwedlula wonke owayekhona ngaphambi kwami eJerusalema, lenhlakanipho yami yema lami." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Lakho konke amehlo ami akufisayo kangiwancitshanga khona, kangigodlanga inhliziyo yami lakuyiphi intokozo; ngoba inhliziyo yami yathokoza ekutshikatshikeni kwami konke; lalokhu kwaba yisabelo sami somtshikatshika wami wonke." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Mina ngasengikhangela yonke imisebenzi izandla zami eziyenzileyo, lomtshikatshika engangitshikatshike ukuwenza; khangela-ke, konke kwakuyize lokukhathazeka komoya, njalo kwakungekho nzuzo ngaphansi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Mina ngasengibuyela ukubona inhlakanipho lobuhlanya lobuthutha. Ngoba a ngenza ni umuntu olandela inkosi? Lokho okuvele sekwenziwe. 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Mina ngasengibona ukuthi inhlakanipho ingcono kulobuthutha njengokukhanya kungcono kulomnyama. 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Ohlakaniphileyo, amehlo akhe asekhanda lakhe, kodwa isithutha sihamba emnyameni; ngasengisazi lami ukuthi isehlakalo sinye sehlela bonke." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Mina ngasengisithi enhliziyweni yami: Njengoba kusehlela isithutha kuzangehlela lami; pho, kungani-ke mina ngangihlakaniphe okwedlulisileyo? Ngasengikhuluma enhliziyweni yami ukuthi lokhu lakho kuyize." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Ngoba kakukho ukukhunjulwa kohlakaniphileyo okwedlula koyisithutha phakade; ngoba lokhu okukhona khathesi ensukwini ezizayo konke kuzakhohlakala. Ohlakaniphileyo ufa njani? Njengesithutha. 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ngasengizonda impilo, ngoba umsebenzi owenziwa ngaphansi kwelanga wawubuhlungu kimi; ngoba konke kuyize lokukhathazeka komoya." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Yebo, mina ngawuzonda wonke umtshikatshika wami engawutshikatshika ngaphansi kwelanga, ngoba ngizawutshiyela umuntu ozakuba khona ngemva kwami." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ngubani-ke owaziyo ukuthi uzakuba ngohlakaniphileyo kumbe oyisithutha? Kanti uzabusa phezu kwawo wonke umtshikatshika wami engawutshikatshikayo lengiwenze ngenhlakanipho ngaphansi kwelanga. Lokhu lakho kuyize. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Mina ngasengiphenduka ngadangalisa inhliziyo yami ngomtshikatshika wonke engangiwutshikatshika ngaphansi kwelanga. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Ngoba kulomuntu omtshikatshika wakhe ukunhlakanipho lakulwazi lakubuqotho, kanti uzawunika umuntu ongatshikatshikanga kuwo ube yisabelo sakhe. Lokhu lakho kuyize, lobubi obukhulu." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ngoba ulani umuntu ngomtshikatshika wakhe wonke langokukhathazeka kwenhliziyo yakhe akutshikatshike ngaphansi kwelanga? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Ngoba insuku zakhe zonke zizinsizi, lomsebenzi wakhe uyikudabuka; lebusuku inhliziyo yakhe kayiphumuli. Lokhu lakho kuyize." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Kakukho okungcono emuntwini kul okuthi adle anathe abonise umphefumulo wakhe okuhle emtshikatshikeni wakhe. Lokhu lakho mina ngabona ukuthi kuvela esandleni sikaNkulunkulu. 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Ngoba ngubani ongadla kumbe ngubani ongaphangisa kukho kulami? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Ngoba yena uyamnika umuntu olungileyo phambi kobuso bakhe inhlakanipho lolwazi lentokozo; kodwa isoni uyasinika umsebenzi wokubutha lokubuthelela ukunika olungileyo phambi kukaNkulunkulu. Lokhu lakho kuyize lokukhathazeka komoya. 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Konke kulesikhathi esimisiweyo, njalo kulesikhathi sayo yonke indaba ngaphansi kwamazulu:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Isikhathi sokuzalwa, lesikhathi sokufa; isikhathi sokuhlanyela, lesikhathi sokusiphuna okuhlanyelweyo;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 isikhathi sokubulala, lesikhathi sokuphilisa; isikhathi sokudiliza, lesikhathi sokwakha;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 isikhathi sokukhala inyembezi, lesikhathi sokuhleka; isikhathi sokulila, lesikhathi sokugida;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 isikhathi sokulahla amatshe, lesikhathi sokubuthelela amatshe; isikhathi sokugona, lesikhathi sokuba khatshana lokugona;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 isikhathi sokudinga, lesikhathi sokuyekela kulahleke; isikhathi sokulondoloza, lesikhathi sokulahla;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 isikhathi sokudabula, lesikhathi sokuthunga; isikhathi sokuthula, lesikhathi sokukhuluma;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 isikhathi sokuthanda, lesikhathi sokuzonda; isikhathi sempi, lesikhathi sokuthula." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Ulenzuzo bani osebenzayo kwatshikatshika kikho? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ngiwubonile umsebenzi uNkulunkulu awunike abantwana babantu ukuthi baphatheke ngawo. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Konke ukwenze kwaba kuhle ngesikhathi sakho; wasebeka iphakade enhliziyweni yabo, ukuze kungabi lomuntu ongafumana umsebenzi uNkulunkulu awenzayo kusukela ekuqaleni kuze kube sekucineni." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ngiyazi ukuthi kakukho okuhle kubo ngaphandle kokuthokoza lokwenza okuhle empilweni yakhe. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Futhi lokuthi wonke umuntu adle anathe akholise okuhle ngomtshikatshika wakhe wonke, kuyisipho sikaNkulunkulu." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ngiyazi ukuthi konke uNkulunkulu akwenzayo kuzakuba khona phakade; kakukho okuzakwengezelelwa kukho, njalo kakukho okuzaphungulwa kukho; uNkulunkulu wakwenza ukuze besabe phambi kwakhe." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Lokho okwakukhona kukhona khathesi, lalokho okuzakuba khona sekuvele kukhona; njalo uNkulunkulu ufuna okuxotshiweyo." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Futhi ngasengibona ngaphansi kwelanga indawo yokwahlulela, kwakukhona ububi lapho; lendawo yokulunga, kwakukhona ububi lapho." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ngathi mina enhliziyweni yami: UNkulunkulu uzakwahlulela olungileyo lomubi, ngoba kukhona lapho isikhathi sayo yonke indaba lesawo wonke umsebenzi." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ngathi mina enhliziyweni yami ngesimo sabantwana babantu ukuthi uNkulunkulu abatshengise obala ukuthi babone ukuthi bona uqobo bazinyamazana. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Ngoba okwehlela abantwana babantu kwehlela lezinyamazana; njalo yinye into ebehlelayo; njengoba omunye esifa, ngokunjalo enye iyafa; yebo konke kulomoya munye, lomuntu kalakho angadlula ngakho inyamazana; ngoba konke kuyize." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Konke kuya endaweninye; konke kuvela ethulini, njalo konke kubuyela ethulini." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ngubani owazi umoya wabantwana babantu owenyukela phezulu, lomoya wenyamazana owehlela phansi emhlabathini?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ngakho ngabona ukuthi kakukho okungcono okwedlula ukuthi umuntu azithokozise ngemisebenzi yakhe, ngoba lokhu kuyisabelo sakhe. Ngoba ngubani ongamletha ukuthi abone lokho okuzakuba khona emva kwakhe?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Mina ngasengiphenduka ngabona incindezelo zonke ezenziwa ngaphansi kwelanga; khangela-ke inyembezi zabacindezelweyo, njalo babengelamduduzi; lehlangothini lwababacindezelayo kwakulamandla, kodwa babengelamduduzi." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ngakho ngancoma abafileyo, abavele sebefile, okwedlula abaphilayo, abalokhu besaphila." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Yebo ungcono kulabo bobabili, ongakabi khona, ongabonanga umsebenzi omubi owenziwa ngaphansi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Ngasengibona mina wonke umtshikatshika lempumelelo yonke yomsebenzi, ngoba lokhu kungumhawu womuntu ovela kumakhelwane wakhe. Lokhu lakho kuyize lokukhathazeka komoya." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Isiphukuphuku sigoqa izandla zaso sidle inyama yaso. 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Singcono isandla esigcwele ukuthula kulezandla ezimbili ezigcwele ukutshikatshika lokukhathazeka komoya. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Mina ngasengiphenduka ngabona ize ngaphansi kwelanga. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kukhona oyedwa, njalo kakho owesibili, yebo kalamntwana kumbe umfowabo, njalo kakulakuphela komtshikatshika wakhe wonke, lelihlo lakhe kalisuthiswa yinotho, njalo katsho ukuthi: Ngitshikatshikela bani, ngenze umphefumulo wami uswele okuhle? Lokhu lakho kuyize, yebo, kungumsebenzi omubi." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Ababili bangcono kuloyedwa, ngoba balomvuzo omuhle ngokutshikatshika kwabo." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Ngoba uba besiwa omunye uzamvusa umngane wakhe; kodwa maye kuye oyedwa nxa esiwa, ngoba kungekho owesibili ongamvusa." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Futhi uba ababili belala ndawonye, ngakho balokukhudumala; kodwa ngoyedwa angakhudumala njani?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Njalo uba omunye engehlula oyedwa, ababili bazamelana laye; lentambo elemicu emithathu kayiqanyulwa masinyane." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Umfana ongumyanga ohlakaniphileyo ungcono kulenkosi endala eyisithutha engasakwazi ukwelulekwa. 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Ngoba uyaphuma entolongweni ukuthi abe yinkosi, lanxa futhi owayezelwe embusweni wakhe esiba ngumyanga." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ngabona bonke abaphilayo abahamba ngaphansi kwelanga, lomfana wesibili ozakuma esikhundleni sakhe." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Kakulasiphetho sabantu bonke, sabo bonke ababephambi kwabo, lalabo abeza emva kabayikuthokoza ngaye. Isibili lokhu lakho kuyize lokukhathazeka komoya." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Gcina unyawo lwakho nxa usiya endlini kaNkulunkulu; sondelela ukulalela kulokunikela umhlatshelo wezithutha, ngoba kazazi ukuthi zenza okubi." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Ungabi lamawala ngomlomo wakho, lenhliziyo yakho ingaphangisi ukukhupha ilizwi phambi kukaNkulunkulu; ngoba uNkulunkulu usemazulwini, wena-ke usemhlabeni, ngakho amazwi akho kawabe malutshwana." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ngoba iphupho liza ngobunengi bomsebenzi, lelizwi lesithutha ngobunengi bamazwi." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Lapho ufunga isifungo kuNkulunkulu, ungaphuzi ukusikhokha, ngoba kakulantokozo kuziwula; khokha lokho okufungileyo." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kungcono ukuthi ungafungi kulokuthi ufunge ungakhokhi. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Ungavumeli umlomo wakho ukuthi wenze inyama yakho yone, futhi ungatsho phambi kwengilosi ukuthi bekuyisiphosiso; uNkulunkulu uzathukuthelelani ilizwi lakho, achithe umsebenzi wezandla zakho?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Ngoba ebunengini bamaphupho lamazwi kukhona lokuyize okunengi, kodwa mesabe uNkulunkulu." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Uba ubona ucindezelo lomyanga lokuphanjulwa kokulunga lesahlulelo ngodlakela esabelweni, ungamangali ngalinto, ngoba ophezulu kophezulu uyananzelela, njalo kulabaphezulu phezu kwabo." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Lenzuzo yomhlabathi ngeyabo bonke; inkosi isetshenzelwa yinsimu. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Othanda imali kayikweneliswa yimali, njalo othanda okunengi kayi kweneliswa yikwanda; lokhu lakho kuyize." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ekwandeni kokuhle, bayanda abakudlayo; njalo kulenzuzo bani kubanini bakho, ngaphandle koku ku buka ngamehlo abo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Bumnandi ubuthongo besisebenzi loba sisidla okulutshwana loba okunengi; kodwa ukusutha kwesinothi kakusivumeli ukulala. 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Kukhona ububi obubuhlungu e sengibubonile ngaphansi kwelanga: Inotho egcinelwe abaniniyo kube yibubi kibo. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Kodwa leyonotho ichitheka ngomsebenzi omubi: Esezala umntwana, kungaselalutho esandleni sakhe." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Njengokuphuma kwakhe esiswini sikanina, uzabuyela eze ehamba njengokuza kwakhe; njalo kayikuthatha lutho lomtshikatshika wakhe angahamba lalo esandleni sakhe." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Lokhu lakho kuyibubi obubuhlungu, kukho konke njengokufika kwakhe ngokunjalo uzahamba. Njalo ulenzuzo bani owatshikatshikela umoya?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Njalo insuku zakhe zonke udlela emnyameni, e losizi olukhulu, lomkhuhlane wakhe, lokuthukuthela?" 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Khangela, engikubonileyo mina, kulungile okuhle ukudla lokunatha lokubona okuhle emtshikatshikeni wakhe wonke awutshikatshikayo ngaphansi kwelanga, e nani ni lensuku zempilo yakhe uNkulunkulu amnike zona, ngoba kuyisabelo sakhe." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Laye wonke umuntu, uNkulunkulu amnike inotho lengcebo, wamnika amandla okudla kukho, lokuthatha isabelo sakhe, lokuthokoza emtshikatshikeni wakhe - lokhu kuyisipho sikaNkulunkulu." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Ngoba kayikukhumbula kakhulu insuku zempilo yakhe, ngoba uNkulunkulu u m phendula ngentokozo yenhliziyo yakhe." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Kukhona ububi esengibubonile ngaphansi kwelanga, njalo buvamile ebantwini:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Umuntu uNkulunkulu amnike inotho lengcebo lodumo ukuze angasweleli umphefumulo wakhe ulutho kukho konke akufisayo, kodwa uNkulunkulu angamniki amandla ukuthi adle kukho, kodwa owemzini uyakudla; lokhu kuyize, njalo kuyisifo esibi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Uba umuntu ezala abantwana abalikhulu, aphile iminyaka eminengi, ukuze insuku zeminyaka yakhe zibe zinengi, kodwa umphefumulo wakhe ungasuthiswa ngokuhle, futhi angabi lakungcwatshwa, ngithi umphunzo ungcono kulaye." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ngoba uza ngeze, uye emnyameni, lebizo lawo lisitshekelwe emnyameni;" 
Ecclesiastes6:5 futhi kawulibonanga ilanga, kawulalwazi; lo ulokuphumula kulaye." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Yebo, lanxa ephila iminyaka eyinkulungwane, ephindwe kabili, kanti engabonanga okuhle; bonke kabayi yini endaweni eyodwa?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Wonke umtshikatshika womuntu ngowomlomo wakhe, kube kanti inkanuko kayisuthi." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Ngoba ohlakaniphileyo ulani okwedlula isithutha? Ulani umyanga owazi ukuhamba phambi kwabaphilayo? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kungcono ukubona kwamehlo kulokuzulazula kwenkanuko. Lokhu lakho kuyize lokukhathazeka komoya. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Osekukhona sekuke kwathiwa ibizo lakho, njalo kuyaziwa ukuthi kungumuntu, lokuthi kalakho ukuphikisana lolamandla kulaye." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ngoba zinengi izinto ezandisa ize; kuyinzuzo bani emuntwini? 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ngoba ngubani okwaziyo okulungele umuntu empilweni, e nani ni lensuku zempilo yakhe eyize ayichitha njengesithunzi? Ngoba ngubani ongatshela umuntu lokho okuzakuba khona emva kwakhe ngaphansi kwelanga?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Ibizo elihle lingcono kulamafutha amahle; losuku lokufa kulosuku lokuzalwa kwakhe. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kungcono ukuya endlini yokulila kulokuya endlini yedili; ngoba lokhu kuyisiphetho sakhe wonke umuntu; lophilayo uzakubeka enhliziyweni yakhe. 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Usizi lungcono kulohleko, ngoba ngokudana kobuso inhliziyo yenziwa ngcono." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Inhliziyo yabahlakaniphileyo isendlini yokulila, kodwa inhliziyo yezithutha isendlini yentokozo." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kungcono ukuzwa ukukhuza kohlakaniphileyo kulokuthi umuntu ezwe ingoma yezithutha. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ngoba njengokuchachamba kwameva ngaphansi kwembiza lunjalo uhleko lwesithutha. Lokhu lakho kuyize. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Isibili ucindezelo lwenza ohlakaniphileyo abe luhlanya, lesipho siyayichitha inhliziyo." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Singcono isiphetho sento kulokuqala kwayo; kungcono ukubekezela komoya kulokuziphakamisa komoya. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ungaphangisi emoyeni wakho ukuthukuthela, ngoba ukuthukuthela kuhlala esifubeni sezithutha." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ungatsho ukuthi: Kwenziwa yini ukuthi insuku zakuqala zibe ngcono kulalezi? Ngoba kawubuzi ngenhlakanipho ngalokhu. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Inhlakanipho yinhle ilelifa, njalo kulenzuzo kwabalibonayo ilanga." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ngoba inhlakanipho iyisivikelo, imali iyisivikelo; kodwa ubungcono bolwazi yikuthi lunika impilo kubaninilo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Nakana umsebenzi kaNkulunkulu; ngoba ngubani olakho ukwelula akugobisileyo? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Thokoza ngosuku lokuphumelela, kodwa ngosuku lobubi nakana: UNkulunkulu ulwenzile lalolu lwaba njengalolo, ukuze umuntu angatholi lutho oluzakuba khona emva kwakhe." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Konke ngikubonile ensukwini zokuyize kwami: Kukhona olungileyo obhubhela ekulungeni kwakhe, njalo kukhona omubi owelula impilo yakhe ebubini bakhe." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ungabi ngolungileyo ngokudlulisayo, futhi ungahlakaniphi okwedlulisileyo; uzichithelani?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ungabi ngomubi ngokudlulisayo, futhi ungabi yisiwula; uzafelani kungakabi yisikhathi sakho?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kuhle ukuthi ubambelele kulokhu, yebo, ungabuyisi isandla sakho lakulokho; ngoba omesabayo uNkulunkulu uzaphepha kukho konke." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Inhlakanipho iyamqinisa ohlakaniphileyo okwedlula ababusi abalitshumi abasemzini. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ngoba kakulamuntu olungileyo emhlabeni owenza okuhle angoni. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Futhi ungabeki inhliziyo yakho emazwini wonke akhulunywayo, ukuze ungezwa ukuthi inceku yakho iyakuthuka." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Ngoba ngezikhathi ezinengi lenhliziyo yakho iyakwazi ukuthi lawe uqobo ubathukile abanye. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Konke lokhu ngikuhlolile ngenhlakanipho, ngathi: Ngizahlakanipha; kodwa kwakukhatshana lami." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Okukhatshana, lokujule kakhulu, ngubani ozakufumana?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ngaphenduka mina lenhliziyo yami ukwazi lokuhlola lokudinga inhlakanipho, lesizatho sezinto, lokwazi inkohlakalo yobuwula, lobuthutha bobuhlanya." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ngasengithola okubaba kulokufa: Owesifazana onhliziyo yakhe iyimijibila lamambule, le zandla zakhe ziyizibopho. Olungileyo phambi kukaNkulunkulu uzaphepha kuye, kodwa isoni sizabanjwa nguye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Khangela, yilokhu engikutholileyo, utsho umTshumayeli, ngibeka okunye kokunye, ukuthola isizatho sezinto," 
Ecclesiastes7:28 umphefumulo wami osasidinga kodwa kangisitholanga. Indoda eyodwa phakathi kwenkulungwane ngayithola, kodwa owesifazana phakathi kwabo bonke labo kangimtholanga." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Khangela, yilokhu kuphela engikutholileyo, ukuthi uNkulunkulu wamenza umuntu waqonda; kodwa bona sebedinge amacebo amanengi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ngubani onjengohlakaniphileyo? Ngubani-ke owazi ukuchasiswa kolutho? Inhlakanipho yomuntu iyakhanyisa ubuso bakhe, lobulukhuni bobuso bakhe buyaguqulwa." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ngi thi: Gcina umlayo wenkosi, lanjengokwesifungo sikaNkulunkulu." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ungaphangisi ukusuka phambi kwayo, ungemi edabeni olubi, ngoba yenza konke ekuthandayo." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Lapho okulelizwi lenkosi khona kulamandla; njalo ngubani ongathi kuyo: Wenzani? 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Lowo ogcina umlayo kayikwazi into embi, lenhliziyo yohlakaniphileyo iyasazi isikhathi lokwahlulela." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Ngoba kulo lonke udaba kulesikhathi lokwahlulela, ngoba ububi bomuntu bukhulu phezu kwakhe." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Ngoba kakwazi ukuthi kuzakuba yini, ngoba ngubani ongamtshela ukuthi kuzakuba nini?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Kakulamuntu olamandla phezu komoya ukubamba umoya, njalo kalamandla osukwini lokufa; njalo kakukho ukukhululwa kuleyompi, lobubi kabuyikukhulula abaninibo." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Konke lokhu ngikubonile, nganikela inhliziyo yami emsebenzini wonke owenziwa ngaphansi kwelanga; kulesikhathi lapho umuntu abusa khona umuntu kube yikulimala kwakhe." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ngokunjalo-ke ngabona ababi bengcwatshwa, ababevela njalo baye endaweni engcwele, abasebekhohlakele emzini lapho ababenze khona okunjalo. Lokhu lakho kuyize." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ngoba isigwebo nge senzo esibi singenziwa masinyane, ngenxa yalokho inhliziyo yabantwana babantu igcwele ngaphakathi kwabo ukwenza okubi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Lanxa isoni sisenza okubi izikhathi ezilikhulu, le nsuku z aso zelulwe, kube kanti sibili ngiyazi ukuthi kuzabalungela labo abamesabayo uNkulunkulu, abesabayo phambi kwakhe." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Kodwa omubi kakuyikumlungela; futhi kayikwelula insuku zakhe; unjengesithunzi ngoba kesabi phambi kukaNkulunkulu. 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Kukhona okuyize okwenziwayo emhlabeni, ukuthi bakhona abalungileyo abehlelwa njengokomsebenzi wababi, bakhona lababi abehlelwa njengokomsebenzi wabalungileyo. Ngathi: Lokhu lakho kuyize."
