Ecclesiastes8:15 Ngakho mina ngababaza intokozo; ngoba umuntu kalalutho oluhle ngaphansi kwelanga, ngaphandle kokudla lokunatha lokuthokoza, ngoba lokhu kuzahlala laye ekutshikatshikeni kwakhe e nsuk wini zempilo yakhe uNkulunkulu amnike zona ngaphansi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Lapho nganikela inhliziyo ukwazi inhlakanipho lokubona umsebenzi owenziwa emhlabeni, (ngoba futhi ukhona ongaboni ubuthongo ngamehlo akhe emini lebusuku)" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ngasengibona wonke umsebenzi kaNkulunkulu ukuthi umuntu kalakho ukufumana umsebenzi owenziwayo ngaphansi kwelanga; ngoba lanxa umuntu etshikatshika ukukudinga, kube kanti kayikukufumana; yebo futhi, lanxa ohlakaniphileyo angathi uyazi, kayikuba lakho ukukuthola." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ngoba konke lokhu ngakubeka enhliziyweni yami ukuhlolisisa konke lokhu, ukuthi abalungileyo labahlakaniphileyo lezenzo zabo kusesandleni sikaNkulunkulu; loba uthando kumbe inzondo, kakho umuntu okwaziyo, konke okuphambi kwabo." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Konke kwehla ngokufananayo kubo bonke; sinye isehlakalo kolungileyo lakomubi, komuhle, lakohlambulukileyo lakongahlambulukanga, lakonikela umhlatshelo lakonganikeli umhlatshelo; njeng ak olungileyo kunjalo ku soni, ofungayo njengowesaba isifungo." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Yilobu ububi phakathi kwakho konke okwenziwa ngaphansi kwelanga, ukuthi sinye isehlakalo kukho konke, futhi lenhliziyo yabantwana babantu igcwele ububi, lobuhlanya busenhliziyweni yabo besaphila, lemva kwalokhu baya kwabafileyo." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ngoba kulowo ohlanganiswe labo bonke abaphilayo kulethemba, ngoba inja ephilayo ingcono kulesilwane esifileyo." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Ngoba abaphilayo bayazi ukuthi bazakufa, kodwa abafileyo kabazi lutho, njalo kabaselawo umvuzo, ngoba ukukhunjulwa kwabo sekukhohlakele." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Futhi uthando lwabo lenzondo yabo lomona wabo sekubhubhile, njalo kabasayikuba lesabelo laphakade kukho konke okwenziwayo ngaphansi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Hamba, udle ukudla kwakho ngentokozo, unathe iwayini lakho ngenhliziyo elenjabulo, ngoba uNkulunkulu usethokozile ngemisebenzi yakho." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Izigqoko zakho kazibe ngezimhlophe ngesikhathi sonke, lamafutha angasweleki ekhanda lakho." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Kholisa impilo lomkakho omthandayo zonke izinsuku zempilo yakho eyize akunike yona ngaphansi kwelanga, zonke izinsuku zakho eziyize, ngoba lesi yisabelo sakho empilweni, lemtshikatshikeni owutshikatshika ngaphansi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Loba kuyini isandla sakho esikutholayo ukukwenza kwenze ngamandla akho, ngoba kawukho umsebenzi lecebo lolwazi lenhlakanipho engcwabeni lapho oya khona." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ngaphenduka ngabona ngaphansi kwelanga ukuthi umjaho kawusiwabalejubane, lempi kayisiyamaqhawe, futhi lesinkwa kasisisabahlakaniphileyo, futhi lenotho kayisiyabalolwazi, futhi lomusa kawusiwezingcitshi, kodwa isikhathi lesehlakalo kwehlela bonke." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ngoba futhi umuntu kasazi isikhathi sakhe; njengenhlanzi ezibanjwa embuleni elibi, lanjengezinyoni ezibanjwa emjibileni, njengazo abantwana babantu bayabanjwa esikhathini esibi, lapho sibajuma." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Lale inhlakanipho ngayibona ngaphansi kwelanga, njalo yaba nkulu kimi." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kwakukhona umuzi omncinyane, okwakulabantu abalutshwana phakathi kwawo; kwasekusiza inkosi enkulu kuwo, yawuvimbezela, yawakhela amadundulu amakhulu okuvimbezela." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Kwasekutholakala phakathi kwawo umuntu ohlakaniphileyo ongumyanga, yena-ke ngenhlakanipho yakhe wawukhulula lowomuzi. Kanti kakho owake wamkhumbula lowomuntu ongumyanga." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Mina ngasengisithi: Inhlakanipho ingcono kulamandla, lanxa ukuhlakanipha komyanga kuseyiswa lamazwi akhe engalalelwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Amazwi abahlakaniphileyo azwiwa ekupholeni ngcono kulokumemeza kobusayo phakathi kwezithutha. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Inhlakanipho ingcono kulezikhali zempi, kodwa isoni esisodwa sichitha ubuhle obunengi." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Impukane ezifileyo zinukisa zibilise amagcobo omthaki; ubuthutha obuncinyane benza njalo k ohloniphekayo ngenxa yenhlakanipho lo dumo. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Inhliziyo yohlakaniphileyo ingakwesokunene sakhe, kodwa inhliziyo yesithutha ingakwesokhohlo saso." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Yebo-ke lapho oyisithutha ehamba endleleni, ingqondo yakhe iyasilela, uthi kuye wonke uyisithutha." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Uba umoya wombusi ukuvukela, ungatshiyi indawo yakho, ngoba ukuthobeka kuyathulisa iziphambeko ezinkulu." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kulobubi e ngibubone ngaphansi kwelanga, njengesiphosiso esiphuma ebusweni bombusi:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Ubuwula bubekwa ezindaweni eziphakemeyo kakhulu, labanothileyo bahlala endaweni ephansi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ngibonile izigqili zigade amabhiza, leziphathamandla zihamba njengezigqili emhlabeni." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ogebha umgodi uzawela kuwo; lodiliza umthangala, inyoka izamluma." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Osusa amatshe uzalinyazwa yiwo; obanda izigodo uzakuba sengozini ngazo. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Uba insimbi ibuthundu njalo engaloli ubukhali, ngakho ufanele engezelele amandla; kodwa inhlakanipho yinhle ukulungisa." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Uba inyoka iluma kungelakulunjwa, kakulanzuzo kungcitshi yolimi." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Amazwi omlomo ohlakaniphileyo alomusa, kodwa indebe zesithutha ziyasiginya." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Ukuqala kwamazwi omlomo waso kuyibuthutha, lokucina komlomo waso kuyibuhlanya obubi," 
Ecclesiastes10:14 njalo isithutha sandisa amazwi. Umuntu kazi okuzakuba khona; lalokho okuzakuba khona emva kwakhe, ngubani ongamtshela khona?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Umtshikatshika wesithuthandini uyasidinisa, ngoba kasazi ukuya emzini." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Maye kuwe, lizwe, onkosi yakho ingumntwana, leziphathamandla zakho zidla ekuseni!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ubusisiwe, lizwe, onkosi yakho iyindodana yabakhulu, leziphathamandla zakho zidla ngesikhathi esifaneleyo, zidl ela ukuqina, hatshi ukudakwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ngobuvila obukhulu intungo ziyabhensa, langokuyekethisa izandla indlu iyanethela." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Idili lenzelwa uhleko, lewayini lithokozisa impilo; kodwa imali iyimpendulo yakho konke." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Lemcabangweni wakho ungayithuki inkosi, lekamelweni lakho lokulala ungamthuki onothileyo; ngoba inyoni yamazulu izathwala ilizwi, lokulamaphiko kubike udaba." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Phosela isinkwa sakho phezu kobuso bamanzi, ngoba uzasithola emva kwensuku ezinengi." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Nika isabelo kwabayisikhombisa, yebo, lakwabayisificaminwembili, ngoba kawazi ukuthi bubi bani obuzakuba emhlabeni." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Uba amayezi egcwele izulu, aya li thululela emhlabeni; uba-ke isihlahla siwela ngeningizimu kumbe ngenyakatho, endaweni lapho isihlahla esiwela khona sizakuba khonapho." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Onanzelela umoya kayikuhlanyela, lalowo okhangela amayezi kayikuvuna." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Njengoba ungazi ukuthi iyini indlela yomoya, a khula njani amathambo esiswini sokhulelweyo, ngokunjalo kawazi umsebenzi kaNkulunkulu owenza konke." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Hlanyela inhlanyelo yakho ekuseni, lantambama ungaphumuzi isandla sakho; ngoba kawazi ukuthi yiyiphi ezaphumelela, le kumbe leyana, loba zombili zizakuba zinhle ngokufananayo." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Sibili, ukukhanya kumnandi; njalo kuhle emehlweni ukubona ilanga." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Kodwa uba umuntu ephila iminyaka eminengi, ethokoza ngayo yonke, kakhumbule lensuku zomnyama, ngoba zizakuba zinengi. Konke okuzayo kuyize." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Thokoza, jaha, ebutsheni bakho, lenhliziyo yakho kayikuthokozise ensukwini zobutsha bakho, uhambe endleleni zenhliziyo yakho lekuboneni kwamehlo akho. Kodwa yazi ukuthi ngenxa yazo zonke izinto uNkulunkulu uzakuletha kusahlulelo." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Ngakho susa ukudabuka enhliziyweni yakho, ukhuphe ububi enyameni yakho, ngoba ubutsha lobujaha buyize." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Khumbula-ke uMdali wakho ensukwini zobutsha bakho zingakafiki insuku ezimbi, kumbe kusondele iminyaka, lapho ozakuthi: Kangilantokozo ngayo." 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Kungakafiphali ilanga lokukhanya lenyanga lezinkanyezi, kumbe amayezi abuyele emva kwezulu." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Ngosuku lapho abagcini bendlu bezathuthumela, lamadoda alamandla akhokhobe, labacholayo beme ngoba bebalutshwana, lalabo abalunguza ngamawindi bafiphazeke," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 lezivalo zivalwe esitaladini, lapho umsindo wokuchola u su ncipha, lapho ezavuka ekukhaleni kwenyoni, lamadodakazi wonke engoma ezathotshiswa," 
Ecclesiastes12:5 la lapho bezakwesaba okuphakemeyo lezesabiso endleleni, lapho isihlahla se-alimondi* sesilempoko, lentothoviyane izakuba ngumthwalo, lesiloyiso sizaphela. Ngoba umuntu uya ekhaya lakhe elilaphakade, labalilayo bazazulazula esitaladeni." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Kungakathukululwa intambo yesiliva, lomganu wegolide ufe, lembiza iphahlazeke emthonjeni, lendirayo yephuke emgodini wamanzi," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 lothuli lubuyele emhlabathini njengoba lwalunjalo, lomoya ubuyela kuNkulunkulu owawunikayo." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Ize leze, kutsho umTshumayeli, konke kuyize." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Phezu kwalokho-ke, ngoba umTshumayeli wayehlakaniphile, wayelokhu efundisa abantu ulwazi, yebo wazindla, wadingisisa, wamisa kuhle izaga ezinengi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 UmTshumayeli wadinga ukuthola amazwi akholisisayo, lokwabhalwayo kwakuqondile, amazwi eqiniso." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Amazwi abahlakaniphileyo anjengezincijo, lanjengezipikili ezibethelwe zatshona, amakhosi emihlangano, enikwa ngumelusi munye." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Phezu kwalokho-ke, ndodana yami, xwayiseka: Ekwenzeni ingwalo ezinengi kakulasiphelo, lokufunda okunengi kuyikudinisa inyama." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Kasizwe isiphetho sodaba lonke: Mesabe uNkulunkulu, ugcine imilayo yakhe; ngoba lokho yimfanelo yonke yomuntu." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Ngoba uNkulunkulu uzaletha wonke umsebenzi kusahlulelo, layo yonke into efihliweyo, loba kuhle laloba kubi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Ingoma yezingoma engekaSolomoni. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Kangange ngokwanga komlomo wakhe; ngoba uthando lwakho lungcono kulewayini. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Ngenxa yephunga lamagcobo akho amnandi, ibizo lakho li nje ngamagcobo athululiweyo; ngakho-ke izintombi ziyakuthanda." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ngidonsa, sizagijima emva kwakho; inkosi ingingenise emakamelweni ayo; sizajabula sithokoze kuwe, sikhumbule uthando lwakho okwedlula iwayini; abaqondileyo bayakuthanda." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ngimnyama, kodwa ngimuhle, madodakazi eJerusalema, njengamathente eKedari, njengamakhetheni kaSolomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Lingangibukeli ngoba ngimnyama, ngoba ilanga lingitshisile. Abantwana bakamama bangizondela, bangenza umlindikazi wezivini; isivini sami esingesami kangisilindanga." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ngitshela, wena umphefumulo wami okuthandayo, ukuthi welusela ngaphi, uphumuza ngaphi umhlambi emini; ngoba kungani ngizakuba njengozulayo ngasemihlanjini yabangane bakho?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Uba ungazi, wena omuhle kakhulu phakathi kwabesifazana, phuma wena ngezinyathelo zomhlambi, welusele amazinyane akho phansi kwamadumba abelusi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ngikufananise lebhizakazi ezinqoleni zikaFaro, mngane wami." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Izihlathi zakho zinhle phakathi kwemiceciso, intamo yakho ngezigqizo." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Sizakwenzela imiceciso yegolide lamaqhubu esiliva. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Inkosi isesetafuleni layo ledili inadi* yami yakhupha iphunga layo. 
SongOfSongs1:13 Isithandwa sami kimi siyisamba semure*; sizalala phakathi kwamabele ami ebusuku. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Isithandwa sami kimi silihlukuzo lesihlahla sehena* ezivinini zeEngedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Khangela, umuhle, mngane wami, khangela, umuhle, amehlo akho angawamajuba." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Khangela, umuhle, sithandwa sami, isibili uyathokozisa. Lombheda wethu uluhlaza." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Imijabo yezindlu zethu yimisedari, intungo zethu ngezefire*." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ngilirozi leSharoni, umduze wezigodi." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Njengomduze phakathi kwameva, unjalo umngane wami phakathi kwamadodakazi." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Njengesihlahla sama-aphula phakathi kwezihlahla zeganga, sinjalo isithandwa sami phakathi kwamadodana. Ngahlala emthunzini waso ngathokoza kakhulu, lesithelo saso simnandi ekunambitheni kwami." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Sangisa endlini yewayini, lesiboniso saso phezu kwami siluthando." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Ngisekelani ngeziphiso zewayini, lingiqinise ngama-aphula, ngoba ngigul isw a lu thando." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Isandla saso sokhohlo singaphansi kwekhanda lami, lesokunene saso siyangigona." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ngiyalifungisa, madodakazi eJerusalema, ngemiziki kumbe ngezimpala zeganga, ukuze lingaphazamisi lingavusi uthando luze luthande." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ilizwi lesithandwa sami! Khangela sona siyeza, siseqa phezu kwezintaba, siqolotsha phezu kwamaqaqa." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Isithandwa sami sinjengomziki kumbe njengethole lendluzele. Khangela simi ngemva komduli wethu, silunguza emawindini, sizibonakalisa eminxibeni yewindi." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Isithandwa sami saphendula sathi kimi: Vuka wena, mngane wami, omuhle wami, a si hambe wena." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Ngoba khangela, ubusika sebudlulile, izulu seliphelile, lihambile." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Amaluba ayabonakala emhlabeni, isikhathi sokuhlabelela se sifikile, lelizwi lejuba liyezwakala elizweni lakithi." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Isihlahla somkhiwa sivuthisa imikhiwa yaso eluhlaza, lamavini ale mpoko aletha iphunga elimnandi. Vuka wena, mngane wami, omuhle wami wena, si hambe." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Juba lami, elis engoxweni yedwala, ekusithekeni kweliwa, ngitshengisa ubuso bakho, ngizwise ilizwi lakho, ngoba ilizwi lakho limnandi, lobuso bakho buyabukeka." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Sibambeleni amakhanka, amakhanka amancinyane, ona izivini, ngoba izivini zethu zile zimpoko." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Isithandwa sami ngesami, lami ngingowaso, eselusa phakathi kwemiduze." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Kuze kube semadabukakusa, lamathunzi abaleke, phenduka, sithandwa sami, ube njengomziki kumbe njengethole lendluzele phezu kwezintaba zeBhetheri." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Embhedeni wami ebusuku ngamdinga lowo umphefumulo wami omthandayo; ngamdinga, kodwa kangimtholanga." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Sengizasuka ngibhodabhode emzini, ezitaladeni lemagcekeni, ngimdinge yena umphefumulo wami omthandayo; ngamdinga, kodwa kangimtholanga." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Abalindi ababebhodabhoda emzini bangifica. Limbonile yini yena umphefumulo wami omthandayo? 
SongOfSongs3:4 Sengidlule kancinyane kubo ngasengimthola yena umphefumulo wami omthandayo. Ngambamba, kangimyekelanga ahambe ngaze ngamletha endlini kamama, lekamelweni lakhe owangimithayo." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ngiyalifungisa, madodakazi eJerusalema, ngemiziki kumbe ngezimpala zeganga, ukuze lingaphazamisi lingavusi uthando luze luthande." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ngubani lo owenyuka evela enkangala njengezinsika zentuthu, eqholwe ngemure* lempepha, ngakho konke okucholisisiweyo kwabathengisi?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Khangela umbheda wakhe ongokaSolomoni, amaqhawe angamatshumi ayisithupha awugombolozela, emaqhaweni akoIsrayeli." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Wonke abambe inkemba efundiselwe impi, yilelo lalelo inkemba yalo emlenzeni walo ngenxa yokwesaba ebusuku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Inkosi uSolomoni yazenzela isihlalo sokuthwalwa ngezigodo zeLebhanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Yenza insika zaso nge siliva, iphansi laso nge golide, isihlalo saso ngo kuyibubende, ubuphakathi baso bubekelelwe ngo thando ngamadodakazi eJerusalema." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Phumani, madodakazi eZiyoni, libone inkosi uSolomoni, ilomqhele unina amethwesa umqhele ngawo ngosuku lomtshado wayo, langosuku lwentokozo yenhliziyo yayo." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Khangela, umuhle, mngane wami, khangela, umuhle. Amehlo akho angawamajuba ngaphakathi kweveyili lakho; inwele zakho zinjengomhlambi wembuzi zisehla entabeni iGileyadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amazinyo akho anjengomhlambi wezimvukazi ezigundiweyo, ezikhuphuka ekugezisweni, okuthi zonke zazo zizele amaphahla, njalo kungekho eyinyumba phakathi kwazo." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Indebe zakho zinjengentambo ebomvu, lenkulumo yakho yinhle. Inhlafuno zakho phakathi kweveyili lakho zinjengocezu lwepomegranati*." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Intamo yakho injengomphotshongo kaDavida owakhiwe waba yindlu yezikhali, okulenga kuwo amahawu ayinkulungwane, wonke ayizihlangu zamaqhawe." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabele akho womabili anjengabantwana bomziki, abangamaphahla empala, abadla phakathi kwemiduze." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Kuze kube semadabukakusa, lamathunzi abaleke, mina ngizakuya entabeni yemure*, leqaqeni lwempepha." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Wena wonke umuhle, mngane wami, kakukho sici kuwe." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Woza lami si suke eLebhanoni, makoti wami, lami si suke eLebhanoni. Khangela usengqongeni yeAmana, engqongeni yeSeniri leyeHermoni, ezimbalwini zezilwane, entabeni zezingwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Uyithumbile inhliziyo yami, dadewethu, makoti, uyithumbile inhliziyo yami ngelinye lamehlo akho, ngesigqizo esisodwa sentamo yakho." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Luhle kangakanani uthando lwakho, dadewethu, makoti! Lungcono kangakanani uthando lwakho kulewayini, lephunga lamagcobo akho kulamakha wonke." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Indebe zakho, makoti, zithonta njeng ohlanga loluju; uluju lochago kungaphansi kolimi lwakho, lephunga lezembatho zakho linjengephunga leLebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Uyisivande esikhiyiweyo, dadewethu, makoti, umthombo okhiyiweyo, isiphethu esinanyekwe ngophawu." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Amahlumela akho ayisivande samapomegranati*, lezithelo ezimnandi, ihena* lenadi*," 
SongOfSongs4:14 inadi* lesafroni*, ikhalamu* lekinamoni*, lezihlahla zonke zempepha, imure lenhlaba, lamakha wonke aqakathekileyo;" 
SongOfSongs4:15 umthombo wezivande, umgodi wamanzi aphilayo, lezifula ezivela eLebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Vuka, moya wenyakatho, uze lawe, moya weningizimu, uphephethe esivandeni sami ukuze amakha aso ageleze aphume. Kasize isithandwa sami esivandeni saso, sidle izithelo zaso ezimnandi." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Sengingenile esivandeni sami, dadewethu, mlobokazi, sengikhe imure yami lamakha ami, ngidle uhlanga loluju lwami kanye loluju lwami, nginathe iwayini lami lochago lwami. Dlanini, bangane, linathe, linathe kakhulu, bathandekayo." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ngilele, kodwa inhliziyo yami iphapheme. Ilizwi lesithandwa sami liqoqoda, lisithi: Ngivulela, dadewethu, mngane wami, juba lami, opheleleyo wami, ngoba ikhanda lami ligcwele amazolo, inwele zami eziphotheneyo amathonsi ebusuku." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ngikhuphile isigqoko sami, ngingasigqoka njani? Ngigezile inyawo zami, ngingazingcolisa njani?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Isithandwa sami safaka isandla saso esikhaleni sesivalo, lemibilini yami yasiqubukela." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ngasukuma mina ukuvulela isithandwa sami; lezandla zami zathonta imure*, leminwe yami imure egelezayo, ezibanjeni zekhiye." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Mina ngasivulela isithandwa sami, kodwa isithandwa sami sasitshibilike sedlula. Umphefumulo wami wehluleka ekukhulumeni kwaso. Ngasidinga, kodwa kangisitholanga, ngasibiza, kodwa kasingiphendulanga." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Abalindi ababebhodabhoda emzini bangifica, bangitshaya, bangilimaza; abalindi bemiduli bangithathela iveyili yami." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ngiyalifungisa, madodakazi eJerusalema, uba lithola othandekayo wami, lizamtshelani? Ukuthi ngigul isw a lu thando." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Isithandwa sakho simedlula ngani omunye othandekayo, wena omuhle phakathi kwabesifazana? Isithandwa sakho simedlula ngani omunye othandekayo ukuthi usifungise njalo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Isithandwa sami simhlophe sibomvana, inhlokonkulu phakathi kwenkulungwane ezilitshumi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Ikhanda laso li nje ngegolide elicengeke kakhulu, inwele zaso eziphotheneyo ziyibulembu, zimnyama njengewabayi." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amehlo aso anjengamajuba ezifuleni zamanzi, agezwe ngochago, afakwe kakuhle." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Izihlathi zaso zinjengombheda wamakha, njeng amaluba akhupha iphunga elihle. Indebe zaso zi njeng emiduze, zithonta imure* egelezayo." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Izandla zaso zi njeng endandatho zegolide ezigcwele ibherule*. Isisu saso si njengo phondo lwendlovu olukhanyayo, luhuqwe ngesafire.*" 
SongOfSongs5:15 Imilenze yaso zinsika zelitshe elimhlophe zimiswe ezisekelweni zegolide elicwengekileyo. Ukukhangeleka kwaso kunjengeLebhanoni, elikhethelo njengemisedari." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Umlomo waso uyibumnandi kakhulu, yebo sonke siyathandeka kakhulu. Lesi yisithandwa sami, njalo lesi ngumngane wami, madodakazi eJerusalema." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Siye ngaphi isithandwa sakho, wena omuhle phakathi kwabesifazana? Siphendukele ngaphi isithandwa sakho, ukuze sisidinge kanye lawe?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Isithandwa sami sehlele esivandeni saso, emibhedeni yamakha, ukudla ezivandeni, lokukha imiduze." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ngingowesithandwa sami, lesithandwa sami singesami, esidla phakathi kwemiduze." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Umuhle, mngane wami, njengeTiriza, uyabukeka njengeJerusalema, uyesabeka njenge butho eliphethe iziboniso." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Susa amehlo akho kimi ngoba ayanginqoba. Inwele zakho zinjengomhlambi wembuzi zisehla eGileyadi. 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amazinyo akho anjengomhlambi wezimvukazi ezikhuphuka ekugezisweni, okuthi zonke zazo zizele amaphahla, njalo kungekho eyinyumba phakathi kwazo." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Inhlafuno zakho phakathi kweveyili lakho zinjengocezu lwepomegranati*. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Kukhona izindlovukazi ezingamatshumi ayisithupha, labafazi abancane abangamatshumi ayisificaminwembili, lezintombi ezingelanani." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Linye ijuba lami, opheleleyo wami, nguye yedwa kunina, ongokhethiweyo wakhe owamzalayo. Amadodakazi ambona, ambusisa, izindlovukazi labafazi abancinyane, bambabaza." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ngubani lo obonakala njengokusa, omuhle njengenyanga, ocwebileyo njengelanga, owesabeka njenge butho eliphethe iziboniso?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ngehlela esivandeni senkelo ukubona okuhlumayo esigodini, ukubona ukuthi ivini liyahluma, amapomegranati* ayakhahlela yini." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ngingakazi umphefumulo wami wangenza ngaba njenge zinqola zikaAminadibi. 
SongOfSongs6:13 Phenduka, phenduka, mShulami, phenduka, phenduka, ukuze sikubuke. Limbukelani umShulami? Kunjengexuku lamabutho amabili." 
SongOfSongs7:1 Zinhle kangakanani izinyawo zakho emanyathelweni, ndodakazi yenkosana! Amalunga amathangazi akho anjengemiceciso, umsebenzi wezandla zengcitshi." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Inkaba yakho i njengo mganu oyingubhe ongasweli iwayini elixutshanisiweyo. Isisu sakho si njenge nqumbi yengqoloyi ezingelezelwe yimiduze. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Amabele akho womabili anjengabantwana bomziki, abangamaphahla empala." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Intamo yakho injengomphotshongo wempondo zendlovu. Amehlo akho ayiziziba zeHeshiboni ngasesangweni leBeti-Rabimi. Impumulo yakho injengomphotshongo weLebhanoni okhangelene leDamaseko. 
SongOfSongs7:5 Ikhanda lakho phezu kwakho linjengeKharmeli, lenwele zekhanda lakho zinjengokuyibubende; inkosi ibotshwe emikhandlweni." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Umuhle kangakanani, njalo uthandeka kangakanani, thando, ezinjabulweni." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Lobu ubude bakho bunjengesihlahla selala, lamabele akho njengamaxha." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ngathi: Ngizakhwela esihlahleni selala ngibambe ingatsha zaso. Khathesi-ke amabele akho azakuba njengamahlukuzo evini, lephunga lamakhala akho linjengama-aphula," 
SongOfSongs7:9 lolwanga lwakho lunjengewayini elihle eliya kusithandwa sami kakuhle, kusenza indebe zabaleleyo zikhulume." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ngingowesithandwa sami, lesifiso saso singakimi." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Woza, sithandwa sami, kasiphumele egangeni, silale ebusuku emizaneni;" 
SongOfSongs7:12 kasivuke ngovivi siye ezivinini, sibone ukuthi amavini asehluma, ekhupha impoko, lokuthi amapomegranati* akhahlele yini. Lapho ngizakunika uthando lwami." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Amamandrake* akhupha iphunga elimnandi, langasemasangweni ethu kukhona zonke inhlobo zezithelo ezimnandi kakhulu, ezintsha lezindala, e ngizibekele wena, sithandwa sami." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Kungathi ngabe unjengomfowethu owamunya amabele kamama! Uba bengingakufica phandle, bengingakwanga, yebo, bebengayikungidelela." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Bengingakukhokhela ngikungenise endlini kamama, ubengangifundisa; bengingakunathisa okwewayini elilesinongo, okomhluzi wepomegranati lami." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Isandla sakhe sokhohlo singaphansi kwekhanda lami, lesokunene saso siyangigona." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ngiyalifungisa, lina madodakazi eJerusalema, ukuze lingaphazamisi lingavusi uthando luze luthande." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ngubani lo owenyuka evela enkangala eyeme kothandekayo wakhe? Ngakuvusa ngaphansi kwesihlahla sama-aphula, kulapho unyoko akuhelela khona, kulapho ahelelwa khona owakuzalayo." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Ngibeka njengophawu enhliziyweni yakho, njengophawu engalweni yakho; ngoba uthando lulamandla njengokufa, ubukhwele bulesihluku njengengcwaba; amalahle alo angamalahle omlilo, ilangabi elilamandla kakhulu." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Amanzi amanengi kawalakulucitsha uthando, lezimpophoma kazilugalulisi. Uba umuntu ubenganika impahla yonke yendlu yakhe ngothando, bebengayidelela lokuyidelela." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Silodadewethu omncinyane, njalo kalamabele. Sizamenzelani udadewethu ngosuku mhla kukhulunywa ngaye?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Uba engumduli, sizakwakha phezu kwakhe inqaba yesiliva, njalo uba engumnyango, sizamvalela ngamapulanka omsedari." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ngingumduli, lamabele ami anjengemiphotshongo; khona emehlweni akhe ngaba njengokufumene umusa." 
SongOfSongs8:11 USolomoni wayelesivini eBhali-Hamoni, wanikela isivini kubalindi; ngulowo lalowo wayezaletha ngezithelo zaso inhlamvu zesiliva eziyinkulungwane." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Isivini sami esingesami siphambi kwami; inhlamvu eziyinkulungwane ngezakho, Solomoni, lamakhulu amabili ngawabalindi bezithelo zaso." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Wena ohlala ezivandeni, abangane balalela ilizwi lakho; ngizwise lona." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Phangisa, sithandwa sami, ube njengomziki kumbe njengethole lendluzele phezu kwezintaba zamakha." 
Isaiah1:1 Umbono kaIsaya indodana kaAmozi, awubona ngoJuda leJerusalema, ensukwini zaboUziya, uJothamu, uAhazi, uHezekhiya, amakhosi akoJuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Zwanini, mazulu, ubeke indlebe, mhlaba, ngoba i Nkosi isikhulumile, yathi: Ngondlile ngakhulisa abantwana, kodwa bona bangivukele." 
Isaiah1:3 Inkabi iyamazi umniniyo, lobabhemi umkolo womnikazi wakhe; kodwa uIsrayeli kazi, abantu bami kabaqedisisi." 
Isaiah1:4 Hawu, isizwe esonayo, abantu abasindwa yibubi, inzalo yabenzi bobubi, abantwana abonakalisayo! Bayitshiyile i Nkosi, bamdelele oNgcwele kaIsrayeli, bahlehlele nyovane." 
Isaiah1:5 Lizatshayelwani futhi? Beliyaqhubeka livukela; ikhanda lonke liyagula, lenhliziyo yonke ibuthakathaka." 
Isaiah1:6 Kusukela kungaphansi yonyawo kuze kufike ekhanda kakulandawo ephilileyo kukho, kodwa izilonda lemivimvinya lamanxeba ophayo; kakukhanywanga, kakubotshwanga, kakuthanjiswanga ngamafutha." 
Isaiah1:7 Ilizwe lakini liyincithakalo, imizi yenu itshiswe ngomlilo, umhlaba wenu abezizwe bawudla phambi kwenu, njalo kulencithakalo njengokugenqulwa ngabemzini." 
Isaiah1:8 Indodakazi yeZiyoni isele-ke njengedumba esivinini, njengengalane ensimini yamakhomane, njengomuzi ovinjezelweyo." 
Isaiah1:9 Uba i Nkosi yamabandla ibingasitshiyelanga insali eyingcosana, besizakuba njengeSodoma, sifanane leGomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi, babusi beSodoma, libeke indlebe kumlayo kaNkulunkulu wethu, lina bantu beGomora." 
Isaiah1:11 Buyini kimi ubunengi bemihlatshelo yenu? itsho i Nkosi. Ngenelisiwe yiminikelo yokutshiswa yezinqama langamahwahwa okunonisiweyo; legazi lamajongosi lelamawundlu lelezimpongo kangithokozi ngalo. 
Isaiah1:12 Lapho lisizabonakala phambi kwami, ngubani ofune lokhu esandleni senu, ukugxoba amaguma ami?" 
Isaiah1:13 Lingabe lisaletha umnikelo oyize; impepha iyisinengiso kimi; ukuthwasa kwenyanga, lesabatha, lokubizwa kwenhlangano, ngingekumele; kuyisiphambeko, ngitsho umhlangano onzulu." 
Isaiah1:14 Umphefumulo wami uyakuzonda ukuthwasa kwenyanga zenu lemikhosi yenu emisiweyo; kungumthwalo kimi, sengikhathele yikukuthwala." 
Isaiah1:15 Lalapho liselula izandla zenu, ngizalifihlela amehlo ami; njalo nxa lisandisa umkhuleko, kangiyikuzwa; izandla zenu zigcwele igazi." 
Isaiah1:16 Gezani, lizihlambulule; susani ububi bezenzo zenu phambi kwamehlo ami; yekelani ukwenza okubi;" 
Isaiah1:17 fundani ukwenza okuhle; dingani isahlulelo; sizani ocindezelweyo; ahlulelani intandane; melani umfelokazi. 
Isaiah1:18 Wozani-ke, siqondisane, itsho i Nkosi; loba izono zenu zinjengokubomvu gebhu, zizakuba mhlophe njengeliqhwa elikhithikayo; loba zibomvu njengokubomvu kakhulu, zizakuba njengoboya bezimvu." 
Isaiah1:19 Uba livuma lilalela, lizakudla okuhle kwelizwe;" 
Isaiah1:20 kodwa uba lisala lihlamuka, lizadliwa yinkemba; ngoba umlomo we Nkosi ukhulumile." 
Isaiah1:21 Yeka, umuzi othembekileyo usube liwule! Wawugcwele isahlulelo, ukulunga kwakuhlezi kuwo, kodwa khathesi ababulali." 
Isaiah1:22 Isiliva sakho sesibe ngamanyele; iwayini lakho laxubana lamanzi. 
Isaiah1:23 Iziphathamandla zakho zingabahlamuki labangane bamasela; ngulowo lalowo uthanda isipho, azingele izivalamlomo; kazehluleli intandane, lendaba yomfelokazi kayifiki kuzo." 
Isaiah1:24 Ngakho itsho iNkosi, i Nkosi yamabandla, oLamandla wakoIsrayeli: E, ngizaziduduza ngezitha zami, ngiziphindisele kwabamelana lami." 
Isaiah1:25 Ngizabuyisela isandla sami phezu kwakho, ngigcwengisise amanyele akho, ngisuse yonke ingcekeza yokugcwengwa kwakho." 
Isaiah1:26 Ngizabuyisela abahluleli bakho njengekuqaleni, labeluleki bakho njengakuqala; emva kwalokho ubizwe ngokuthi ngumuzi wokulunga, umuzi othembekileyo." 
Isaiah1:27 IZiyoni izahlengwa ngesahlulelo, labaphendukayo bayo ngokulunga." 
Isaiah1:28 Lokwephulwa kwabaphambuki lokwezoni kuzakuba kanyekanye, labadela i Nkosi baqedwe." 
Isaiah1:29 Ngoba bazakuba lenhloni ngezihlahla zama-okhi* elaliziloyisa, liyangeke ngezivande elizikhethileyo." 
Isaiah1:30 Ngoba lizakuba njengesihlahla se-okhi omahlamvu aso ayabuna, lanjengesivande esingelamanzi." 
Isaiah1:31 Njalo olamandla uzakuba lifilakisi eliyizibi, lomenzi walo abe yinhlansi; njalo kuzakutsha kokubili kanyekanye, kungabi khona ocitshayo." 
Isaiah2:1 Ilizwi uIsaya indodana kaAmozi alibona ngoJuda leJerusalema. 
Isaiah2:2 Kuzakuthi-ke ekupheleni kwezinsuku intaba yendlu ye Nkosi imiswe engqongeni yezintaba, iphakanyiswe phezu kwamaqaqa; lazo zonke izizwe zizajulukela kuyo." 
Isaiah2:3 Lezizwe ezinengi zizahamba zithi: Wozani senyukele entabeni ye Nkosi, endlini kaNkulunkulu kaJakobe, njalo uzasifundisa ngendlela zakhe, sihambe emikhondweni yakhe; ngoba kuzaphuma umlayo eZiyoni, lelizwi le Nkosi eJerusalema." 
Isaiah2:4 Njalo izakwahlulela phakathi kwezizwe, ikhuze abantu abanengi; bazakhanda inkemba zabo zibe yimilomo yamakhuba, lemikhonto yabo ibe zingqamu zokuthena izihlahla; isizwe kasiyikuphakamisela isizwe inkemba, kasisayikufunda impi futhi." 
Isaiah2:5 Ndlu kaJakobe, wozani sihambe ekukhanyeni kwe Nkosi." 
Isaiah2:6 Ngakho ubalahlile abantu bakho, indlu kaJakobe, ngoba bagcwele okwempumalanga, bayizanuse njengamaFilisti, babambana izandla labantwana bezizwe." 
Isaiah2:7 Lelizwe labo ligcwaliswe isiliva legolide, njalo kakulakuphela kwenotho yabo; lelizwe labo ligcwaliswe amabhiza, njalo kakulakuphela kwenqola zabo." 
Isaiah2:8 Lelizwe labo ligcwaliswe izithombe; bakhothamela imisebenzi yezandla zabo, lalokho iminwe yabo ekwenzileyo." 
Isaiah2:9 Lomuntukazana uyakhothama, lomuntu omkhulu azithobe; ngakho kawubaxoleli." 
Isaiah2:10 Ngena edwaleni, ucatshe othulini, ngenxa yokwesabeka kwe Nkosi, langenxa yodumo lokuphakama kwayo." 
Isaiah2:11 Amehlo aziqhenyayo omuntu azakwehliselwa phansi, lokuzikhukhumeza kwabantu kuzakhothanyiswa, le Nkosi kuphela izaphakanyiswa ngalolosuku." 
Isaiah2:12 Ngoba usuku lwe Nkosi yamabandla luzakuba phezu kwakhe wonke ozigqajayo lozikhukhumezayo, lumelane laye wonke oziphakamisayo, njalo athotshiswe;" 
Isaiah2:13 lumelane layo yonke imisedari yeLebhanoni emide lephakemeyo, lumelane lazo zonke izihlahla zama-okhi* zeBashani," 
Isaiah2:14 lumelane lazo zonke intaba ezinde, lumelane lawo wonke amaqaqa aphakemeyo," 
Isaiah2:15 lumelane lawo wonke umphotshongo ophakemeyo, lumelane lawo wonke umthangala obiyelweyo," 
Isaiah2:16 lumelane layo yonke imikhumbi yeTarshishi, lumelane layo yonke imifanekiso eloyisekayo." 
Isaiah2:17 Lokuziqhenya kwabantu kuzakhothanyiswa, lokuzikhukhumeza kwabantu kuzathotshiswa, le Nkosi kuphela izaphakanyiswa ngalolusuku." 
Isaiah2:18 Lezithombe zizaphela du. 
Isaiah2:19 Bazangena-ke ezimbalwini zamadwala lemihomeni yomhlaba, ngenxa yokwesabeka kwe Nkosi langenxa yodumo lokuphakama kwayo, lapho izavuka ukuqhaqhazelisa umhlaba." 
Isaiah2:20 Ngalolosuku umuntu uzalahlela emagundwaneni lakubolulwane izithombe zakhe zesiliva lezithombe zakhe zegolide abazenzela yena ukuzikhonza," 
Isaiah2:21 ukungena emifantwini yamadwala lezingoxweni zamawa, ngenxa yokwesabeka kwe Nkosi langenxa yodumo lokuphakama kwayo, lapho izavuka ukuqhaqhazelisa umhlaba." 
Isaiah2:22 Lina phezani kumuntu, omphefumulo wakhe usemakhaleni akhe; ngoba unakanwa kukuphi?" 
Isaiah3:1 Ngoba khangela, iNkosi, uJehova wamabandla, izasusa eJerusalema lakoJuda insika lodondolo, insika yonke yesinkwa, lensika yonke yamanzi," 
Isaiah3:2 iqhawe, lendoda yempi, umahluleli, lomprofethi, umvumisi, lomdala," 
Isaiah3:3 induna yamatshumi amahlanu, lowemukelekayo ngobuso, lomeluleki, lesanuse esihlakaniphileyo, lowazi amalumbo." 
Isaiah3:4 Ngizabanika abafana babe yizikhulu zabo, lezihluku zizabusa phezu kwabo." 
Isaiah3:5 Labantu bazacindezelwa, omunye komunye, lowo lalowo kumakhelwane wakhe; ijaha lizadelela omdala, lodelelekayo ohloniphekayo." 
Isaiah3:6 Lapho umuntu ezabamba umfowabo wendlu kayise athi: Wena ulesembatho, woba ngumbusi wethu, lokhukuchithakala kube ngaphansi kwesandla sakho;" 
Isaiah3:7 uzaphakamisa ngalolosuku athi: Kangiyikuba ngumelaphi, njalo endlini yami kakulakudla kakulasembatho; lingangimisi ngibe ngumbusi wabantu." 
Isaiah3:8 Ngoba iJerusalema ikhubekile, loJuda uwile, ngoba ulimi lwabo lezenzo zabo kumelene le Nkosi, ukuvukela amehlo obukhosi bayo." 
Isaiah3:9 Ukukhangeleka kobuso babo kuyafakaza ngabo; bememezela izono zabo njengeSodoma, kabazifihli. Maye kumphefumulo wabo! Ngoba bazenzela okubi." 
Isaiah3:10 Tshelani olungileyo ukuthi kuzakuba kuhle kuye; ngoba bazakudla isithelo sezenzo zabo. 
Isaiah3:11 Maye kokhohlakeleyo! Kuzakuba kubi kuye; ngoba umvuzo wezandla zakhe uzakwenziwa kuye. 
Isaiah3:12 Abantu bami, abacindezeli babo ngabantwana, labesifazana bayababusa. Bantu bami, abakhokheli benu ngabaduhisi, basanganisa indlela yemikhondo yenu." 
Isaiah3:13 I Nkosi izimisele ukulabhela, imi ukuthi yahlulele abantu." 
Isaiah3:14 I Nkosi ingena kusahlulelo labadala babantu bayo leziphathamandla zayo; ngoba lina lidle isivini; impango yomyanga isezindlini zenu. 
Isaiah3:15 Lilani, lichoboza abantu bami, lichola ubuso babayanga? itsho iNkosi uJehova wamabandla." 
Isaiah3:16 I Nkosi yasisithi: Ngenxa yokuthi amadodakazi eZiyoni eziphakamisile, ehamba elule intamo, ehuga ngamehlo, ehamba ngokuxoxomela ehamba, ekhencezisa izigqizo enyaweni zawo," 
Isaiah3:17 ngakho iNkosi izakwenza inkanda yamadodakazi eZiyoni ibe loqweqwe, le Nkosi izanqunula izitho zawo zangasese." 
Isaiah3:18 Ngalolosuku iNkosi izasusa ubuhle bezigqizo zawo, lezicwatsho, lamasongo anjengenyanga," 
Isaiah3:19 amacici, lamasongo, lezimbombozo," 
Isaiah3:20 amaqhiye, lezigetsho, lamabhanti, lemifuma, lezintebe," 
Isaiah3:21 izindandatho, lamacici amakhala," 
Isaiah3:22 izigqoko zemikhosi, lamajazi, lezembatho, lezamba," 
Isaiah3:23 lezibuko, lezigqoko zelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, lamaqhele, lamaveyili." 
Isaiah3:24 Kuzakuthi-ke endaweni yamakha kube levumba, lendaweni yebhanti kube khona igoda, lendaweni yenwele ezenziwe kuhle kube khona impabanga, lendaweni yesigqoko esihle kube khona amalembu amasaka, ukutsha endaweni yobuhle." 
Isaiah3:25 Amadoda akho azakuwa ngenkemba, lamaqhawe akho empini." 
Isaiah3:26 Lamasango ayo azakhala alile; yenziweze izahlala emhlabathini. 
Isaiah4:1 Labesifazana abayisikhombisa bazabamba indoda ibenye ngalolosuku, bathi: Sizakudla okwethu ukudla, sigqoke ezethu izigqoko; kuphela ibizo lakho kalibizwe phezu kwethu; susa ihlazo lethu." 
Isaiah4:2 Ngalolosuku ihlumela le Nkosi lizakuba ngelobuhle, njalo elodumo, lesithelo selizwe ngesokuhle kakhulu lokokubukeka kwabaphunyukileyo bakoIsrayeli." 
Isaiah4:3 Kuzakuthi-ke oseleyo eZiyoni lotshiywe eJerusalema athiwe ungcwele, wonke obhalelwe impilo eJerusalema;" 
Isaiah4:4 iNkosi isigezisile ingcekeza yamadodakazi eZiyoni, yahlambulula ingazi zeJerusalema phakathi kwayo, ngomoya wesahlulelo langomoya wokutshisa." 
Isaiah4:5 Le Nkosi izadala phezu kwendawo yonke yokuhlala yentaba yeZiyoni laphezu kwenhlangano zayo ebiziweyo iyezi emini lentuthu, lokukhanya komlilo olamalangabi ebusuku; ngoba phezu kwayo yonke inkazimulo kuzakuba lesivikelo esiluphahla." 
Isaiah4:6 Njalo kuzakuba ledumba libe ngumthunzi emini ekutshiseni, njalo libe yisiphephelo, njalo libe yisivikelo esivunguvungwini lezulwini." 
Isaiah5:1 Ake ngihlabelelele othandiweyo wami ingoma yomthandwa wami ngesivini sakhe. Othandiweyo wami ulesivini oqaqeni oluvundileyo. 
Isaiah5:2 Wasibiyela, wakhupha amatshe kiso, wasihlanyela ngevini elikhethiweyo, wakha umphotshongo phakathi kwaso, wagebha lesikhamelo sewayini kiso; walindela ukuthi sizathela izithelo zevini, kodwa sathela izithelo zevini ezimunyu." 
Isaiah5:3 Ngakho-ke, bahlali beJerusalema, lani bantu akoJuda, ake lahlulele phakathi kwami lesivini sami." 
Isaiah5:4 Ngabe kwenziwani okunye esivinini sami engingakwenzanga kuso? Ngalindelelani ukuthi sizathela izithelo zesivini, kodwa sathela izithelo zevini ezimunyu?" 
Isaiah5:5 Ngakho-ke, ake ngilitshele engizakwenza esivinini sami: Ngizasusa uthango lwaso ukuze sibe lidlelo, ngidilize umduli waso ukuze sibe ngesokugxotshwa." 
Isaiah5:6 Ngizasenza sibe liganga, singathenwa, singahlakulwa, kodwa kumile ameva lokhula oluhlabayo. Njalo ngizalaya amayezi ukuthi anganisi izulu phezu kwaso." 
Isaiah5:7 Ngoba isivini se Nkosi yamabandla yindlu kaIsrayeli, labantu bakoJuda bayisithombo sentokozo zayo. Njalo yayilindele isahlulelo, kodwa khangela, ukuchithwa kwegazi; ukulunga, kodwa khangela, ukukhala." 
Isaiah5:8 Maye kulabo abahlanganisa indlu lendlu, abasondeza insimu lensimu, kuze kusweleke indawo, lina lihlale lodwa phakathi kwelizwe!" 
Isaiah5:9 Endlebeni zami i Nkosi yamabandla yathi: Isibili izindlu ezinengi zizakuba ngamanxiwa, ezinkulu lezinhle zingabi lamhlali." 
Isaiah5:10 Ngoba indima ezilitshumi zevini zizathela ibhathi* elilodwa, lehomeri* lenhlanyelo lithele i-efa*." 
Isaiah5:11 Maye kwabavuka ekuseni kakhulu, bexotshana lotshwala, balibale kuze kuhlwe, lize libalumathise iwayini!" 
Isaiah5:12 Ichacho lomhubhe, isigubhu lomhlanga, lewayini kusemadilini abo, kodwa kabananzi isenzo se Nkosi, bengaboni umsebenzi wezandla zayo." 
Isaiah5:13 Ngakho abantu bami bazakuya ekuthunjweni ngenxa yokungabi lolwazi, lamadoda abo odumo alendlala, lenengi labo lizakoma ngumhawu." 
Isaiah5:14 Ngakho ingcwaba lizanabulula umphimbo walo, livule umlomo walo ube banzi ngokungelasilinganiso, kuze kwehle udumo lwabo lobunengi babo lenxokozelo yabo lothokozayo phakathi kwabo." 
Isaiah5:15 Lomuntukazana uzakwehliselwa phansi, lomuntu ophakemeyo athotshiswe, lamehlo abazikhukhumezayo athotshiswe." 
Isaiah5:16 Kodwa i Nkosi yamabandla izaphakanyiswa ngesahlulelo, loNkulunkulu ongcwele uzangcweliswa ngokulunga." 
Isaiah5:17 Lamawundlu azakudla ngokwendlela yawo, labemzini badle amanxiwa abakhulupheleyo." 
Isaiah5:18 Maye kwabadonsa isiphambeko ngentambo zeze, lesono njengamagoda enqola!" 
Isaiah5:19 Labo abathi: Kaphangise, aphangisise umsebenzi wakhe, ukuze si wu bone; lecebo loNgcwele kaIsrayeli kalisondele lize, ukuze si l azi." 
Isaiah5:20 Maye kwabathi kokubi kuhle, lakokuhle kubi, ababeka umnyama ube yikukhanya, lokukhanya kube ngumnyama, ababeka okubabayo kube mnandi, lokumnandi kube ngokubabayo!" 
Isaiah5:21 Maye kwabahlakaniphileyo emehlweni abo, labaqedisisayo phambi kobuso babo!" 
Isaiah5:22 Maye kwabangamaqhawe okunatha iwayini, lamadoda alamandla okuhlanganisa okunathwayo okulamandla;" 
Isaiah5:23 abalungisisa okhohlakeleyo ngenxa yomvuzo, basuse ukulunga kwabalungileyo kubo!" 
Isaiah5:24 Ngakho njengolimi lomlilo lusidla isidindi sotshani, lamakhoba edilika ngelangabi, ngokunjalo impande yabo izakuba njengokubola, lempoko yabo iphephuke njengothuli; ngoba bewalile umlayo we Nkosi yamabandla, balidelela ilizwi loNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Ngenxa yalokho ulaka lwe Nkosi lubavuthele abantu bayo, yelula isandla sayo imelene labo, yabatshaya, izintaba zaze zazamazama, lezidumbu zabo zaba njengengcekeza phakathi kwezitalada. Ngenxa yakho konke lokhu ulaka lwayo kaluphenduki, kodwa isandla sayo silokhu seluliwe." 
Isaiah5:26 Njalo izasiphakamisela isizwe isiboniso ikhatshana, isitshayele ikhwelo isekucineni komhlaba; khangela-ke, sizakuza masinyane ngejubane." 
Isaiah5:27 Kakho ozadinwa, njalo kakho ozakhubeka phakathi kwaso, kakho ozawozela, njalo kakho ozalala, njalo kakho ozakhululelwa ibhanti lokhalo lwakhe, njalo kakho ozaqanyukelwa ngumchilo wamanyathela akhe." 
Isaiah5:28 Omitshoko yakhe ibukhali, lomadandili akhe wonke agotshiwe; amasondo amabhiza akhe azabalwa njengelitshe elilukhuni, lamavili akhe njengesivunguzane." 
Isaiah5:29 Ukubhonga kwakhe uzakuba njengokwesilwane, njalo uzabhonga njengamabhongo esilwane, abhavume abambe impango, ayilethe ekuvikelekeni, njalo kungekho umemuki." 
Isaiah5:30 Bazasibhavumela ngalolosuku njengokubhavuma kolwandle. Uba umuntu ekhangela emhlabeni, khangela-ke, umnyama, usizi, lokukhanya kwenziwe kwaba mnyama ngamayezi aso." 
Isaiah6:1 Ngomnyaka wokufa kwenkosi uUziya ngabona iNkosi ihlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi esiphezulu lesiphakemeyo, lemiphetho yesembatho sayo yagcwalisa ithempeli." 
Isaiah6:2 Amaserafi* ayemi ngaphezu kwayo; impiko eziyisithupha, impiko eziyisithupha zalelo lalelo; ngezimbili lagubuzela ubuso balo, langezimbili lagubuzela inyawo zalo, langezimbili laphapha." 
Isaiah6:3 Lelinye lamemeza kwelinye lathi: Ingcwele, ingcwele, ingcwele i Nkosi yamabandla; umhlaba wonke ugcwele inkazimulo yayo." 
Isaiah6:4 Insika zomnyango zasezinyikinyeka ngenxa yelizwi lomemezayo, lendlu yagcwala intuthu." 
Isaiah6:5 Ngasengisithi: Maye kimi, ngoba ngiyabhubha! Ngoba ngingumuntu wendebe ezingcolileyo, futhi ngihlala phakathi kwabantu bendebe ezingcolileyo; ngoba amehlo ami abonile iNkosi, uJehova wamabandla." 
Isaiah6:6 Kwasekuphaphela kimi elinye lamaserafi lilelahle elivuthayo esandleni salo elalilithethe ngodlawu elathini. 
Isaiah6:7 Lathinta umlomo wami, lathi: Khangela, lokhu kuzithintile indebe zakho; ngakho ububi bakho bususiwe, lesono sakho senzelwe inhlawulo lokuthula." 
Isaiah6:8 Ngasengisizwa ilizwi leNkosi lisithi: Ngizathuma bani? Njalo ngubani ozasiyela? Ngasengisithi: Khangela, ngi lapha, thuma mina!" 
Isaiah6:9 Yasisithi: Hamba, uthi kulababantu: Zwanini lizwe, kodwa kaliyikuqedisisa; njalo bonani libone, kodwa kaliyikubonisisa." 
Isaiah6:10 Yenza inhliziyo yalababantu ikhuluphale, wenze indlebe zabo zibe nzima, uvale amehlo abo, hlezi babone ngamehlo abo, bezwe ngendlebe zabo, baqedisise ngenhliziyo zabo, baphenduke, abesebasilisa." 
Isaiah6:11 Ngasengisithi: Koze kube nini, Nkosi? Yasisithi: Kuze kuchitheke imizi ingabi lamhlali, lezindlu zingabi lamuntu, lelizwe lichitheke lithi nya," 
Isaiah6:12 le Nkosi ibasusele khatshana abantu, njalo kube lokutshiywa okukhulu phakathi kwelizwe." 
Isaiah6:13 Kodwa ingxenye eyodwa etshumini isezakuba kulo, izaphenduka, ibe ngeyokutshiswa, njengomtherebhinti* lanjengesihlahla se-okhi*, okuthi emva kokuganyulwa kube lesidindi kuso; ngokunjalo inzalo engcwele izakuba yisidindi salo." 
Isaiah7:1 Kwasekusithi ensukwini zikaAhazi indodana kaJothamu, indodana kaUziya inkosi yakoJuda, uRezini inkosi yeSiriya kanye loPheka indodana kaRemaliya inkosi yakoIsrayeli wenyukela eJerusalema ukuya empini emelene layo, kodwa kabangalakho ukulwa layo." 
Isaiah7:2 Kwasekubikwa endlini kaDavida ukuthi iSiriya ihlangene loEfrayimi; inhliziyo yakhe lenhliziyo yabantu bakhe zasezinyikinyeka njengezihlahla zegusu zinyikinywa ngumoya. 
Isaiah7:3 I Nkosi yasisithi kuIsaya: Ake uphume u ye hlangabeza uAhazi, wena loSheyari-Yashubi indodana yakho, ekucineni komfolo wechibi elingaphezulu, emgwaqweni omkhulu wensimu yomwatshi," 
Isaiah7:4 uthi kuye: Nanzelela, uthule, ungesabi, lenhliziyo yakho ingabi buthakathaka ngenxa yemisila emibili yalezizikhuni ezithunqayo, ngenxa yokuvutha kolaka lukaRezini leSiriya, lendodana kaRemaliya." 
Isaiah7:5 Ngenxa yokuthi iSiriya, uEfrayimi, lendodana kaRemaliya, bacebise okubi ngawe, besithi:" 
Isaiah7:6 Asenyukele koJuda, simesabise, sizifohlelele kuye, sibeke inkosi kuye, indodana kaTabeyeli." 
Isaiah7:7 Itsho njalo iNkosi uJehova: Kakuyikuma, njalo kakuyikwenzeka." 
Isaiah7:8 Ngoba inhloko yeSiriya yiDamaseko, lenhloko yeDamaseko nguRezini; laphakathi kuseleminyaka engamatshumi ayisithupha lanhlanu uEfrayimi uzakwephulwa, angabi yisizwe." 
Isaiah7:9 Njalo inhloko kaEfrayimi yiSamariya, lenhloko yeSamariya yindodana kaRemaliya. Uba lingakholwa, isibili kaliyikuqiniswa." 
Isaiah7:10 I Nkosi yasiqhubeka ikhuluma kuAhazi isithi: 
Isaiah7:11 Zicelele isibonakaliso e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wakho; cela ekujuleni loba ekuphakameni phezulu. 
Isaiah7:12 Kodwa uAhazi wathi: Kangiyikucela, kangiyikulinga i Nkosi." 
Isaiah7:13 Wasesithi: Zwana-ke, ndlu kaDavida; kuyinto encinyane kakhulu kuwe yini ukuthi udinise abantu, ukuthi udinise loNkulunkulu wami?" 
Isaiah7:14 Ngakho iNkosi uqobo izalinika isibonakaliso: Khangela, intombi emsulwa izathatha isisu, ibelethe indodana, ibize ibizo layo ngokuthi nguEmanuweli." 
Isaiah7:15 Uzakudla amasi loluju, ukuze azi ukwala okubi lokukhetha okuhle." 
Isaiah7:16 Ngoba umntwana engakakwazi ukwala okubi lokukhetha okuhle, ilizwe onengwa yilo lizatshiywa ngamakhosi alo amabili." 
Isaiah7:17 I Nkosi izaletha phezu kwakho laphezu kwabantu bakho laphezu kwendlu kayihlo insuku ezazingezanga kusukela esukwini uEfrayimi asuka ngalo koJuda; yinkosi yeAsiriya. 
Isaiah7:18 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku i Nkosi ithi ssss empukaneni isephethelweni lwemifula yeGibhithe, lenyosini eselizweni leAsiriya." 
Isaiah7:19 Zizakuza-ke, ziphumule zonke ezigodini zamawa, lemifantwini yamadwala, lezihlahleni zonke zameva, lemadlelweni wonke." 
Isaiah7:20 Ngalolosuku iNkosi izaphuca ngensingo eyebolekwe, phetsheya komfula, yinkosi yeAsiriya, ikhanda loboya bezinyawo, futhi ihluthune lendevu." 
Isaiah7:21 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku umuntu uzagcina kuphila ithokazi lezimvu ezimbili; 
Isaiah7:22 kuzakuthi-ke ngenxa yobunengi kochago ezilwehlisayo adle amasi; yebo, wonke oseleyo phakathi kwelizwe uzakudla amasi loluju." 
Isaiah7:23 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku, yonke indawo lapho okwakukhona amavini ayinkulungwane ngenhlamvu zesiliva eziyinkulungwane, kube ngokwameva lokhula oluhlabayo." 
Isaiah7:24 Bazakuya khona ngemitshoko langedandili, ngoba ilizwe lonke lizakuba ngameva lokhula oluhlabayo." 
Isaiah7:25 Lazo zonke izintaba ezazilinywa ngekhuba kabayikuya kuzo ngo kwesaba ameva lokhula oluhlabayo; kodwa kuzakuba ngokokungenisa inkabi lokokunyathelwa yizimvu. 
Isaiah8:1 I Nkosi yasisithi kimi: Zithathele isibhebhe esikhulu, ubhale kiso ngepheni yomuntu ukuthi: Maherishalali-Hashibazi." 
Isaiah8:2 Ngasengizifakazisela abafakazi abathembekileyo, oUriya umpristi loZekariya indodana kaJeberekiya." 
Isaiah8:3 Ngasengisondela umprofethikazi, wasethatha isisu, wazala indodana. I Nkosi yasisithi kimi: Umuthe ibizo lokuthi uMaherishalali-Hashibazi." 
Isaiah8:4 Ngoba umntwana engakakwazi ukumemeza athi baba, lokuthi, mama, inotho yeDamaseko lempango yeSamariya kuzathwalelwa phambi kwenkosi yeAsiriya." 
Isaiah8:5 I Nkosi yasibuya yakhuluma lami futhi isithi: 
Isaiah8:6 Ngenxa yokuthi lesisizwe siwalile amanzi eShilowa ahamba kancinyane, njalo kulentokozo kuRezini lendodana kaRemaliya," 
Isaiah8:7 ngakho-ke, khangela, iNkosi izakwenyusela phezu kwabo amanzi omfula amanengi lalamandla - inkosi yeAsiriya labo bonke ubukhosi bayo; azakwenyukela phezu kwaso yonke imigelo yaso, ahambe phezu kwazo zonke inkumbi zaso," 
Isaiah8:8 aze adlulele koJuda; akhukhule, adlule, afinyelele entanyeni; lokweluleka kwempiko zawo kuzagcwalisa ilizwe lakho, Emanuweli." 
Isaiah8:9 Zihlanganiseni, zizwe, kodwa liphahlazwe; bekani indlebe, lina lonke abezizwe ezikhatshana; zibhinceni, kodwa liphahlazwe." 
Isaiah8:10 Cebani icebo, kodwa lizafojiswa; khulumani ilizwi, kodwa kaliyikuma; ngoba uNkulunkulu ulathi." 
Isaiah8:11 Ngoba yatsho njalo I Nkosi kimi ngesandla esilamandla, yangifundisa ukuthi ngingahambi endleleni yalababantu, isithi:" 
Isaiah8:12 Lingatsho ukuthi: Ugobe, kubo bonke lababantu abathi ngabo: Ugobe; lingesabi ukwesaba kwabo, lingatshaywa luvalo." 
Isaiah8:13 I Nkosi yamabandla, yona lizayingcwelisa, njalo yona ibe ukwesaba kwenu, njalo yona ibe luvalo lwenu." 
Isaiah8:14 Njalo izakuba yindawo engcwele, kodwa ibe yilitshe lokukhubekisa, ibe lidwala lokuwisa kuzo zombili izindlu zakoIsrayeli, ibe ngumjibila ibe yisifu kwabakhileyo eJerusalema." 
Isaiah8:15 Labanengi bazakhubeka phakathi kwabo, bawe, bephuke, bathiywe, bathunjwe." 
Isaiah8:16 Bopha ubufakazi, unameke umlayo phakathi kwabafundi bami." 
Isaiah8:17 Ngakho ngizalindela iNkosi efihlela indlu kaJakobe ubuso bayo, ngiyidinge." 
Isaiah8:18 Khangela mina labantwana i Nkosi enginike bona siyizibonakaliso lezimangaliso koIsrayeli, ezivela e Nkosi ni yamabandla ehlala entabeni yeZiyoni." 
Isaiah8:19 Lalapho bezakuthi kini: Buzani kwabalamadlozi, lakubathakathi abatshaya imilozwi labanyenyezayo: Abantu kabayikubuza yini kuNkulunkulu wabo? Ngenxa yabaphilayo kwabafileyo?" 
Isaiah8:20 Kuwo umthetho lakubo ubufakazi! Uba bengakhulumi njengalelilizwi, kungokuba kakukho ukukhanya kubo." 
Isaiah8:21 Uzadabula kukho, ecindezelwe kakhulu elambile; kuzakuthi-ke elambile ezondile, athuke inkosi yakhe loNkulunkulu wakhe, akhangela phezulu." 
Isaiah8:22 Lapho ezakhangela emhlabeni, khangela-ke, kuzakuba lokuhlupheka lomnyama, ubumnyama benkathazo, njalo axotshelwe emnyameni." 
Isaiah9:1 Kodwa umnyama kawuyikuba njengoba wawunjalo enkathazweni yalo; njengesikhathini samandulo wakwenza kwaba lula elizweni lakoZebuluni lelizweni lakoNafithali; kodwa emva kwalokhu wakwenza kwaba nzima nge ndlela yolwandle, phetsheya kweJordani, e Galili lezizwe." 
Isaiah9:2 Abantu ababehamba emnyameni babonile ukukhanya okukhulu; ababehlala elizweni lethunzi lokufa, ukukhanya kubakhanyisele." 
Isaiah9:3 Wandisile isizwe, wakhulisa intokozo yaso; bayathokoza phambi kwakho njengentokozo ekuvuneni, njengoba bethokoza ekwehlukaniselaneni kwabo impango." 
Isaiah9:4 Ngoba wephulile ijogwe lomthwalo laso, loswazi lehlombe laso, intonga yomcindezeli waso, njengasosukwini lukaMidiyani." 
Isaiah9:5 Lapho lonke inyathela elinyathelwa ngokuzamazama, lesigqoko esigiqwe engazi kwakungokokutshiswa, okubasisa umlilo." 
Isaiah9:6 Ngoba sizalelwe umntwana, sinikwe indodana; lombuso uzakuba sehlombe layo, lebizo lakhe lizathiwa: OMangalisayo, uMeluleki, uNkulunkulu olamandla, uBaba wephakade, iNkosana yokuthula." 
Isaiah9:7 Ukwanda kombuso lokuthula kakuyikuphela, phezu kwesihlalo sobukhosi sikaDavida laphezu kombuso wakhe, ukuwumisa, lokuwuqinisa ngesahlulelo langokulunga, kusukela khathesi kuze kube nininini. Ukutshiseka kwe Nkosi yamabandla kuzakwenza lokhu." 
Isaiah9:8 INkosi ithumele ilizwi koJakobe, lawela koIsrayeli." 
Isaiah9:9 Labo bonke abantu bazakwazi, uEfrayimi labahlali beSamariya, ngokuzigqaja langokuzikhukhumeza kwenhliziyo, besithi:" 
Isaiah9:10 Izitina ziwile, kodwa sizakwakha ng amatshe abaziweyo; imikhiwa yesikhamore iganyuliwe, kodwa sizayiguqula abe yimisedari." 
Isaiah9:11 Ngakho i Nkosi izaphakamisa abacindezeli bakaRezini phezu kwakhe, ihlanganise izitha zakhe ndawonye;" 
Isaiah9:12 amaSiriya ngaphambili lamaFilisti ngemuva, azakudla uIsrayeli ngomlomo wonke. Kukho konke lokhu intukuthelo yayo kayiphenduki, kodwa isandla sayo siseluliwe." 
Isaiah9:13 Ngoba abantu kabaphendukeli kulowo owabatshayayo, futhi kabayidingi i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Isaiah9:14 Ngakho i Nkosi izaquma kusuke koIsrayeli inhloko lomsila, ugatsha lomhlanga, ngasuku lunye." 
Isaiah9:15 Omdala lowemukelwa ngobuso, uyinhloko, kodwa umprofethi ofundisa amanga, ungumsila." 
Isaiah9:16 Ngoba abakhokheli balababantu bayaduhisa, labakhokhelwa yibo bayaginywa." 
Isaiah9:17 Ngenxa yalokho iNkosi kayiyikuthokoza ngamajaha abo, kayiyikuba lasihawu ngezintandane zabo labafelokazi babo; ngoba bonke bangabazenzisi labenzi bobubi, lomlomo wonke ukhuluma ubuthutha. Kukho konke lokhu intukuthelo yayo kayiphenduki, kodwa isandla sayo siseluliwe." 
Isaiah9:18 Ngoba inkohlakalo itshisa njengomlilo, izakudla ameva lokhula oluhlabayo, ithungele izixuku zehlathi, ziziphakamise njengokuphakama kwentuthu." 
Isaiah9:19 Ngolaka lwe Nkosi yamabandla ilizwe litshisiwe, labantu bazakuba njengokudla komlilo; umuntu kayikuyekela umfowabo." 
Isaiah9:20 Njalo uzahluthuna ngakwesokunene, kodwa alambe; adle ngakwesokhohlo, kodwa angasuthi; ngulowo lalowo adle inyama yengalo yakhe." 
Isaiah9:21 UManase uEfrayimi, loEfrayimi uManase; bazamelana loJuda kanyekanye. Kukho konke lokhu intukuthelo yayo kayiphenduki, kodwa isandla sayo siseluliwe." 
Isaiah10:1 Maye kwabamisa izimiso ezikhohlakeleyo, lakubabhali ababhala uhlupho;" 
Isaiah10:2 ukuphambula abayanga ekwahlulelweni, lokuphanga ilungelo labahluphekayo babantu bami, ukuze abafelokazi babe yimpango yabo lokuthi baphange izintandane!" 
Isaiah10:3 Kodwa lizakwenzani ngosuku lwempindiselo, lencithakalweni e zavela khatshana? Lizabalekela kubani ukuthi libe losizo? Lizatshiya ngaphi udumo lwenu?" 
Isaiah10:4 Ukuze bangakhothami ngaphansi kwezibotshwa, liwele ngaphansi kwababuleweyo? Kukho konke lokhu intukuthelo yayo kayiphenduki, kodwa isandla sayo siseluliwe." 
Isaiah10:5 Maye kumAsiriya, intonga yentukuthelo yami, lolaka lwami luyinduku esandleni sabo!" 
Isaiah10:6 Ngizamthumela isizwe esizenzisayo, ngizamlaya ukumelana labantu bolaka lwami, ukuphanga impango, lokuthumba okuthunjiweyo, ukukubeka kube ngokunyathelwayo njengodaka lwezitalada." 
Isaiah10:7 Lanxa yena engakunakani njalo, lenhliziyo yakhe kayicabangi njalo; kodwa kusenhliziyweni yakhe ukuchitha, lokuquma izizwe ezingenlutshwana." 
Isaiah10:8 Ngoba uthi: Iziphathamandla zami zonke kazisimakhosi yini? 
Isaiah10:9 IKalino kayinjengeKarikemishi yini? IHamathi kayinjengeArpadi yini? ISamariya kayinjengeDamaseko yini? 
Isaiah10:10 Njengoba isandla sami sithole imibuso yezithombe, ozithombe zayo ezibaziweyo zingcono kule ze Jerusalema lakule ze Samariya;" 
Isaiah10:11 njengalokhu ngenzile kuyo iSamariya lezithombe zayo, kangiyikwenza njalo yini kuyo iJerusalema lezithombe zayo?" 
Isaiah10:12 Kuzakuthi-ke lapho iNkosi isiqedile umsebenzi wayo wonke entabeni yeZiyoni leJerusalema, ngiphindisele isithelo sokuzikhukhumeza kwenhliziyo yenkosi yeAsiriya lobuhle bokuziqhenya kwamehlo ayo." 
Isaiah10:13 Ngoba ithe: Ngamandla esandla sami ngikwenzile, langenhlakanipho yami, ngoba ngiyaqedisisa; ngisusile imikhawulo yezizwe, ngaphanga inotho yazo; lanjengeqhawe ngawisela phansi abahlali bazo." 
Isaiah10:14 Isandla sami sesithole inotho yezizwe njengesidleke; lanjengomuntu ebuthelela amaqanda atshiyiweyo, mina ngibuthelele umhlaba wonke; njalo kwakungekho ophaphazelisa impiko, kumbe ovula umlomo, kumbe otshiyozayo." 
Isaiah10:15 Ihloka lizazikhukhumeza kuye ogamulayo ngalo yini? Isaha izazikhulisa kuye osaha ngayo yini? Njengokungathi induku inyikinya lowo oyiphakamisayo. Ekuphakanyisweni kodondolo akusisigodo yini? 
Isaiah10:16 Ngalokhu iNkosi uJehova wamabandla izathumela ukucaka phakathi kwabazimukileyo bayo; langaphansi kodumo lwayo izaphemba ukutshisa njengokutshisa komlilo. 
Isaiah10:17 Lokukhanya kukaIsrayeli kuzakuba ngumlilo, loNgcwele wakhe abe lilangabi, elizatshisa liqede ameva ayo lokhula oluhlabayo lwayo ngasuku lunye." 
Isaiah10:18 Liqede lodumo lwehlathi lwayo, lensimu yayo ethelayo, kusukela emphefumulweni kusiya enyameni, njengokucikizeka kwesiguli." 
Isaiah10:19 Lokuseleyo kwezihlahla zehlathi zayo kuzakuba nlutshwana ngenani, ukuze umntwana akubale." 
Isaiah10:20 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku insali yakoIsrayeli labaphunyukileyo bendlu kaJakobe kabasayikuqhubeka ukweyama kobatshayileyo; kodwa bazakweyama e Nkosi ni, oNgcwele kaIsrayeli, ngeqiniso." 
Isaiah10:21 Insali izabuyela, insali kaJakobe, kuNkulunkulu olamandla." 
Isaiah10:22 Ngoba lanxa abantu bakho, Israyeli, bengangetshebetshebe lolwandle, kube kanti insali yabo izabuya; ukuchitheka kumisiwe, kuphuphuma ngo kulunga." 
Isaiah10:23 Ngoba ukubhujiswa okupheleleyo okumisiweyo iNkosi uJehova wamabandla izakwenza phakathi komhlaba wonke. 
Isaiah10:24 Ngakho itsho njalo iNkosi uJehova wamabandla: Bantu bami, elakhe eZiyoni, lingesabi iAsiriya lapho ilitshaya ngenduku, iliphakamisela intonga yayo njengendlela yamaGibhithe." 
Isaiah10:25 Ngoba kuseyisikhatshana nje ukuthukuthela kuzaphela, lolaka lwami ekuchithweni kwabo." 
Isaiah10:26 Njalo i Nkosi yamabandla izabavusela isiswepu, njengokuhlatshwa kweMidiyani edwaleni leOrebi; la njenge ntonga yayo phezu kolwandle ezayiphakamisa njengendlela yamaGibhithe." 
Isaiah10:27 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku umthwalo wayo usuke ehlombe lakho, lejogwe layo entanyeni yakho, lejogwe lizakwephulwa ngenxa yokugcotshwa." 
Isaiah10:28 Uyeza eAyathi, udabula phakathi kweMigironi, eMikimashi wethula impahla yakhe." 
Isaiah10:29 Badlula esikhaleni, ebusuku bayalala eGeba; iRama iyathuthumela, iGibeya kaSawuli iyabaleka." 
Isaiah10:30 Hlaba umkhosi ngelizwi lakho, ndodakazi kaGalimi! Lizwakalise eLayishi, wena Anathothi elusizana!" 
Isaiah10:31 IMadimena iyabaleka, labahlali beGebimi badinga isiphephelo." 
Isaiah10:32 Lamhlanje uzakuma eNobi, anyikinye isandla sakhe emelene l entaba yendodakazi yeZiyoni, uqaqa lweJerusalema." 
Isaiah10:33 Khangela, iNkosi uJehova wamabandla izaquma ingatsha ngamandla esabekayo, lalabo abaphakeme ngobude bazaganyulelwa phansi, labazikhukhumezayo bazathotshiswa." 
Isaiah10:34 Njalo izagamula izixuku zehlathi ngensimbi, leLebhanoni izakuwa ngolobukhosi." 
Isaiah11:1 Kuzavela uGatsha esidindini sikaJese, leHlumela lithele empandeni zakhe." 
Isaiah11:2 LoMoya we Nkosi uzahlala phezu kwakhe, uMoya wenhlakanipho lokuqedisisa, uMoya weseluleko lowamandla, uMoya wolwazi lowokwesaba i Nkosi." 
Isaiah11:3 Lokunuka kwakhe kuzakuba sekuyesabeni i Nkosi; kayikwahlulela ngokubona kwamehlo akhe, njalo kayikukhuza ngokuzwa kwezindlebe zakhe;" 
Isaiah11:4 kodwa uzakwahlulela abayanga ngokulunga, akhuze abathobekileyo bomhlaba ngobuqotho; njalo uzatshaya umhlaba ngentonga yomlomo wakhe, langomoya wendebe zakhe uzabulala okhohlakeleyo." 
Isaiah11:5 Njalo ukulunga kuzakuba libhanti lokhalo lwakhe, lobuqotho bube libhanti lokhalo lwakhe." 
Isaiah11:6 Lempisi izahlala lewundlu, lengwe ilale lezinyane; lethole, lebhongo lesilwane, lokunonisiweyo ndawonye; lomfana omncinyane uzakuqhuba." 
Isaiah11:7 Inkomokazi lebhere kuzakudla; lamathole akho alale ndawonye; lesilwane sizakudla amahlanga njengenkabi. 
Isaiah11:8 Lomunyayo uzadlalela phezu komlindi wenhlangwana, lolunyuliweyo afake isandla sakhe emlindini wephimpi." 
Isaiah11:9 Kabayikwenza okubi, njalo kabayikona entabeni yami yonke engcwele; ngoba umhlaba uzagcwala ulwazi lwe Nkosi njengamanzi esibekela ulwandle." 
Isaiah11:10 Langalolosuku kuzakuba lempande kaJese ezakuma ibe luphawu ezizweni; izizwe zizadinga kuyo, lendawo yayo yokuphumula ibe lodumo." 
Isaiah11:11 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku iNkosi isebenzise isandla sayo futhi ngokwesibili ukubuyisa insali yabantu bayo, ezasala ivela eAsiriya leGibhithe lePatrosi leEtiyopiya leElamu leShinari leHamathi lezihlengeni zolwandle." 
Isaiah11:12 Izaziphakamisela izizwe uphawu, ibuthe abaxotshiweyo bakoIsrayeli, iqoqe abahlakazekileyo bakoJuda, bevela ezingonsini zozine zomhlaba." 
Isaiah11:13 Lomhawu kaEfrayimi uzasuka, lezitha zakoJuda zizaqunywa; uEfrayimi kayikuba lomona ngoJuda, loJuda kayikucindezela uEfrayimi." 
Isaiah11:14 Kodwa bazaphaphela ehlombe lamaFilisti ngentshonalanga; kanyekanye baphange abantwana bempumalanga; bazakwelulela isandla sabo phezu kukaEdoma loMowabi; labantwana bakoAmoni babalalele. 
Isaiah11:15 Le Nkosi izatshabalalisa ulimi lolwandle lweGibhithe, inyikinye isandla sayo phezu komfula ngamandla omoya wayo, iwutshaye ube yizifudlana eziyisikhombisa, ibenze bahambe ngamanyathela." 
Isaiah11:16 Kuzakuba khona umgwaqo omkhulu wensali yabantu bakhe abaseleyo bevela eAsiriya, njengalokhu kwakunjalo kuIsrayeli ekwenyukeni kwakhe elizweni leGibhithe." 
Isaiah12:1 Langalolosuku uzakuthi: Ngiyakubonga, Nkosi, lanxa wawungithukuthelele, ulaka lwakho seluphendukile, njalo ungiduduzile." 
Isaiah12:2 Khangela, uNkulunkulu ulusindiso lwami, ngizathemba ngingesabi; ngoba uJa uJehova ungamandla ami lengoma yami, usebe lusindiso lwami." 
Isaiah12:3 Ngakho ngentokozo lizakukha amanzi emithonjeni yosindiso. 
Isaiah12:4 Lithi ngalolosuku: Bongani i Nkosi, libize ibizo layo, lazise izenzo zayo phakathi kwezizwe, limemezele ukuthi ibizo layo liphakeme." 
Isaiah12:5 Hlabelelani e Nkosi ni ngoba yenzile izinto ezinhle kakhulu; lokhu kakwaziwe emhlabeni wonke. 
Isaiah12:6 Memeza, uhlabele ngentokozo, mhlali weZiyoni, ngoba mkhulu phakathi kwakho oNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah13:1 Umthwalo weBhabhiloni awubonayo uIsaya indodana kaAmozi. 
Isaiah13:2 Phakamisani uphawu entabeni eligceke, libaphakamisele ilizwi, liqhwebe ngesandla, ukuze bangene eminyango yeziphathamandla." 
Isaiah13:3 Mina ngibalayile abangcwelisiweyo bami, ngibizile lamaqhawe ami kuntukuthelo yami, abathokozayo ngobukhosi bami." 
Isaiah13:4 Ukuxokozela kwexuku ezintabeni, kungathi ngokwabantu abanengi, umsindo wokuxokozela kwemibuso, kwezizwe ezibutheneyo; i Nkosi yamabandla ibutha ibutho lempi." 
Isaiah13:5 Bavela elizweni elikhatshana, emkhawulweni wamazulu, i Nkosi kanye lezikhali zentukuthelo yayo, ukuchitha ilizwe lonke." 
Isaiah13:6 Qhinqani isililo, ngoba usuku lwe Nkosi lusondele; njengokuchitheka okuvela kuSomandla luzafika." 
Isaiah13:7 Ngenxa yalokhu izandla zonke zizaxega, lenhliziyo yonke yomuntu incibilike;" 
Isaiah13:8 babesebetshaywa luvalo; imihelo lobuhlungu kubabambe; bafuthelwe njengowesifazana obelethayo; bamangale ngulowo ngomakhelwane wakhe; ubuso babo buyibuso bamalangabi. 
Isaiah13:9 Khangelani, usuku lwe Nkosi luyeza, lulesihluku lokufutheka lolaka oluvuthayo, ukubeka umhlaba ube yincithakalo; ibhubhise izoni zawo zisuke kuwo." 
Isaiah13:10 Ngoba inkanyezi zamazulu lemithala yazo kaziyikukhanyisa ukukhanya kwazo; ilanga lizakuba mnyama ekuphumeni kwalo, lenyanga kayiyikukhanyisa ukukhanya kwayo." 
Isaiah13:11 Ngoba ngizaphindisela ububi phezu komhlaba, laphezu kwabakhohlakeleyo izono zabo; ngiqede ukuzigqaja kwabazikhukhumezayo; ngithobise ukuzikhukhumeza kwabalesihluku." 
Isaiah13:12 Ngizakwenza ukuthi indoda ibe ligugu elikhulu kulegolide elicwengekileyo, lomuntu kulegolide leOfiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Ngenxa yalokhu ngizazamazamisa amazulu, lomhlaba uzanyikinyeka usuke endaweni yawo, entukuthelweni lwe Nkosi yamabandla, esukwini lokuvutha kolaka lwayo." 
Isaiah13:14 Kuzakuba njengomziki oxotshwayo, lanjengezimvu okungelamuntu oziqoqayo; bazaphenduka ngulowo lalowo ebantwini bakibo, babalekele ngulowo lalowo elizweni lakhe." 
Isaiah13:15 Wonke ozatholakala uzagwazwa, lawo wonke ozabanjwa uzakuwa ngenkemba." 
Isaiah13:16 Labantwana babo bazachotshozwa phambi kwamehlo abo, izindlu zabo ziphangwe, labomkabo badlwengulwe." 
Isaiah13:17 Khangela, ngizabavusela amaMede, angakhathaleli isiliva; legolide, angathokozi ngalo." 
Isaiah13:18 Lamadandili awo azachoboza amajaha; njalo kawayikuba lesihawu ngesithelo sesizalo; ilihlo lawo kaliyikuhawukela abantwana. 
Isaiah13:19 LeBhabhiloni, udumo lwemibuso, ubuhle bokuziqhenya kwamaKhaladiya, izakuba njengokugenqulwa nguNkulunkulu kweSodoma leGomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Kakuyikuba lendawo yokuhlala kuze kube nininini, njalo kayiyikuhlalwa kusizukulwana lesizukulwana; lomArabhiya kayikumisa ithente khona, labelusi kabayikulalisa umhlambi khona." 
Isaiah13:21 Kodwa izilo zeganga zizalala khona, lezindlu zayo zizagcwala izilo ezikhonyayo; labantwana bezintshe bazahlala khona, lamagogo aqolotshe khona." 
Isaiah13:22 Lezimpisi zizaphendulana emanxiweni ayo, lamakhanka ezigodlweni. Lesikhathi sayo siseduze ukufika, lezinsuku zayo kaziyikuphuziswa." 
Isaiah14:1 Ngoba i Nkosi izamhawukela uJakobe, imkhethe futhi uIsrayeli, ibabeke elizweni lakibo; lowezizwe uzahlangana labo, njalo bazanamathela endlini kaJakobe." 
Isaiah14:2 Labantu bazabathatha, babese endaweni yabo; lendlu kaIsrayeli izabafuya elizweni le Nkosi, babe yizigqili lezigqilikazi; njalo bazathumba abathumbi babo, babuse abacindezeli babo." 
Isaiah14:3 Kuzakuthi-ke ngosuku i Nkosi ezaliphumuza ngalo ebuhlungwini benu lekuhluphekeni kwenu lemtshikatshikeni onzima ebelisetshenziswa kiwo," 
Isaiah14:4 lizaphakamisa lesisaga ngenkosi yeBhabhiloni lithi: Uphele njani umcindezeli! Ubutha sebuphelile! 
Isaiah14:5 I Nkosi ilwephule udondolo lwabakhohlakeleyo, intonga yababusi," 
Isaiah14:6 owatshaya abantu entukuthelweni ngokutshaya okungapheliyo, owabusa izizwe ngolaka wazingelwa, kungekho onqandayo." 
Isaiah14:7 Umhlaba wonke uphumule, ulokuthula; baqhamuka ngo kuhlabelela." 
Isaiah14:8 Lezihlahla zefiri ziyathokoza ngawe, imisedari yeLebhanoni, isithi: Selokhu walala phansi, kakulamgamuli owenyukela kithi." 
Isaiah14:9 Isihogo ngaphansi siyanyakaziswa ngenxa yakho uku ku hlangabeza lapho usiza, sikuvusela imimoya efileyo, impongo zonke zomhlaba, sisukumise wonke amakhosi ezizwe ezihlalweni zawo zobukhosi." 
Isaiah14:10 Bonke bazaphendula bathi kuwe: Lawe usubuthakathaka njengathi; usufanana lathi. 
Isaiah14:11 Ubukhosi bakho sebehliselwe esihogweni, ukukhala kwamachacho akho; izimpethu zizakwendlalwa ngaphansi kwakho, lemihlavane ikugubuzele." 
Isaiah14:12 Uwe njani uvela emazulwini, wena okhanyayo, ndodana yokusa! Uqunyelwe emhlabathini, wena owawisela phansi izizwe!" 
Isaiah14:13 Wena wasusithi enhliziyweni yakho: Ngizakwenyukela emazulwini; ngaphezu kwenkanyezi zikaNkulunkulu ngiphakamise isihlalo sami sobukhosi; ngihlale entabeni yenhlangano ezinhlangothini zenyakatho; 
Isaiah14:14 ngizakwenyukela ngaphezu kwendawo eziphakemeyo emayezini; ngizenze ngifanane loPhezukonke. 
Isaiah14:15 Kodwa uzakwehliselwa esihogweni, ezinhlangothini zomgodi." 
Isaiah14:16 Abakubonayo bazakujolozela, bakuqaphele, besithi: Nguye lo umuntu yini owenza ukuthi umhlaba uthuthumele, owanyakazisa imibuso," 
Isaiah14:17 owamisa ilizwe laba njengenkangala, wachitha imizi yalo, ongavulelanga izibotshwa zakhe ziye ekhaya?" 
Isaiah14:18 Wonke amakhosi ezizwe, wonke alala phansi ngodumo, ileyo laleyo endlini yayo;" 
Isaiah14:19 kodwa wena uphoselwe ngaphandle kwengcwaba lakho, njengehlumela elinengekayo, njenge lembu lababuleweyo, begwazwe ngenkemba, abehlela phansi ematsheni omgodi, njengesidumbu esinyathelelwe phansi." 
Isaiah14:20 Kawuyikuhlanganiswa kanye labo ekungcwatshweni, ngoba ulichithile ilizwe lakini, wabulala abantu bakini. Inzalo yabenzi bobubi kayiyikubizwa kuze kube nininini." 
Isaiah14:21 Lungiselani ukubulawa kwabantwana babo ngenxa yobubi baboyise, ukuze bangavuki badla ilifa lelizwe, bagcwalise ubuso bomhlaba ngemizi." 
Isaiah14:22 Ngoba ngizabavukela, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla, ngiqume kusuke eBhabhiloni ibizo, lensali, lendodana, lomzukulu, itsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah14:23 Ngizayimisa ibe yindawo yezinhloni lamatete amanzi, ngiyithanyele ngomthanyelo wencithakalo, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Isaiah14:24 I Nkosi yamabandla ifungile isithi: Isibili, njengokucabanga kwami kuzakuba njalo, lanjengokweluleka kwami khona kuzakuma!" 
Isaiah14:25 Ukuthi ngimephule umAsiriya elizweni lami, ngimnyathele phezu kwezintaba zami; beselisuka ijogwe lakhe phezu kwabo, lomthwalo wakhe usuke ehlombe labo." 
Isaiah14:26 Lesi yiseluleko eselulekwe ngomhlaba wonke, njalo lesi yisandla eselulelwe izizwe zonke." 
Isaiah14:27 Ngoba i Nkosi yamabandla ikucebile, ngubani-ke ongakuphuthisa? Lesandla sayo seluliwe, njalo ngubani ongasibuyisela emuva?" 
Isaiah14:28 Ngomnyaka wokufa kwenkosi uAhazi kwaba lalo umthwalo: 
Isaiah14:29 Ungathokozi, wena wonke Filisti, ngokuthi intonga ekutshayileyo yephukile; ngoba empandeni yenyoka kuzavela ibululu, lesithelo sabo sibe yinyoka ephaphayo etshisayo." 
Isaiah14:30 Lamazibulo abayanga azakwelusela, labaswelayo balale bevikelekile; kodwa ngizabulala impande yakho ngendlala, njalo abulale insali yakho." 
Isaiah14:31 Qhinqa isililo, sango, ukhale, muzi. Uncibilike, Filisti, wonke. Ngoba enyakatho kuvela intuthu, njalo kakho oyedwa ngezikhathi zakhe ezimisiweyo." 
Isaiah14:32 Lezithunywa zesizwe zizaphendulwa ngokuthi ni? Ngokuthi: I Nkosi iyisekele iZiyoni, labahluphekayo babantu bayo bazaphephela kuyo." 
Isaiah15:1 Umthwalo kaMowabi. Ngoba ngobusuku iAri kaMowabi ichithekile, iqunyiwe; ngoba ngobusuku iKiri kaMowabi ichithekile, iqunyiwe." 
Isaiah15:2 Wenyukela eBayiti leDiboni, indawo eziphakemeyo uku ya lila; uMowabi uzaqhinqa isililo ngeNebo langeMedeba; kulempabanga kuwo wonke amakhanda abo, zonke indevu zigeliwe;" 
Isaiah15:3 ezitaladeni zabo bazibhinca ngamalembu amasaka; empahleni zezindlu zabo lezitaladeni zabo wonke uqhinqa isililo, besehla bekhala inyembezi." 
Isaiah15:4 LeHeshiboni leEleyale kuzakhala; ilizwi labo lizwakale kuze kube seJahazi; ngenxa yalokhu abahlomileyo bakoMowabi bayamemeza; umphefumulo wakhe uyathuthumela kuye. 
Isaiah15:5 Inhliziyo yami iyamkhalela uMowabi; ababalekayo bakhe bafinyelele eZowari, ithokazi elileminyaka emithathu; ngoba umqanso weLuhithi, bawenyuka bekhala inyembezi; ngoba endleleni yeHoronayimi baphakamisa ukukhala kwencithakalo." 
Isaiah15:6 Ngoba amanzi eNimrimi azakuba zincithakalo; ngoba utshani buyoma, uhlaza luyaphela, kakukho okuluhlaza." 
Isaiah15:7 Ngenxa yalokhu ukwanda abakwenzileyo lempahla yabo bazakuthwalela esifuleni seminyezane. 
Isaiah15:8 Ngoba ukukhala kuzabhoda umngcele kaMowabi, ukuqhinqa kwakhe isililo kufinyelela eEgilayimi, yebo, ukuqhinqa kwakhe isililo kufinyelela eBeri-Elimi." 
Isaiah15:9 Ngoba amanzi eDiboni agcwele igazi; ngoba ngizamisela iDiboni okunye futhi, isilwane kulabo abaphunyukileyo bakoMowabi lakunsali yelizwe." 
Isaiah16:1 Thumelani iwundlu kumbusi welizwe lilisusa eSela lisiya enkangala, entabeni yendodakazi yeZiyoni." 
Isaiah16:2 Ngoba kuzakuthi amadodakazi akoMowabi emazibukweni eArinoni abe njengenyoni ezulazulayo exotshwe e sidlek eni. 
Isaiah16:3 Lethani iseluleko, lenze isinqumo; wenze isithunzi sakho sibe njengobusuku phakathi kwemini, ufihle abaxotshiweyo, ungavezi obalekayo;" 
Isaiah16:4 Abaxotshiweyo bami kabahlale njengabezizwe phakathi kwakho, Mowabi; ube yisiphephelo kibo ebusweni bomchithi; ngoba umcindezeli usekucineni, lokuchitheka sekunyamalele, lonyathezela phansi usephelile elizweni." 
Isaiah16:5 Njalo kuzamiswa isihlalo sobukhosi ngomusa, njalo ahlale kiso ngobuqotho ethenteni likaDavida umahluleli odinga isahlulelo, lophangisisa ukulunga." 
Isaiah16:6 Sizwile ngokuziphakamisa kukaMowabi, uyazigqaja kakhulu; ukuzikhukhumeza kwakhe, lokuziqhenya kwakhe, lolaka lwakhe, ukuwumana kwakhe kakunjalo." 
Isaiah16:7 Ngakho uMowabi uzaqhinqela uMowabi isililo, bonke baqhinqe isililo; libubulele izinkwa zezithelo zevini zeKiri-Haresethi; isibili batshayiwe." 
Isaiah16:8 Ngoba amasimu eHeshiboni ayabuna, ivini leSibima; amakhosi ezizwe atshayele phansi amahlukuzo evini awo; afinyelele eJazeri, azulazule e nkangala, ingatsha zawo zeluliwe, zachapha ulwandle." 
Isaiah16:9 Ngenxa yalokho ngizakhala inyembezi ngokukhala kweJazeri ngevini leSibima; ngikuthambise ngezinyembezi zami, Heshiboni lawe Eleyale; ngoba ukujabulela izithelo zakho zehlobo lesivuno sakho sekuwile." 
Isaiah16:10 Intokozo lenjabulo sekususiwe ensimini ethelayo, lezivinini kakuhlatshelwa ngoma; kakulakumemeza; kakulamnyatheli onyathela iwayini ezikhamelweni zewayini; ngimisile ukumemeza kwenjabulo." 
Isaiah16:11 Ngenxa yalokho imibilini yami iyakhala njengechacho ngoMowabi, lengaphakathi yami ngeKiri-Haresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Kuzakuthi sekubonakele ukuthi uMowabi uzidinisile endaweni ephakemeyo, khona ezangena endlini yakhe engcwele ukukhuleka, kodwa kayikuphumelela." 
Isaiah16:13 Leli yilizwi i Nkosi elikhulume ngoMowabi kusukela kulesosikhathi. 
Isaiah16:14 Kodwa khathesi i Nkosi ikhuluma isithi: Phakathi kweminyaka emithathu, njengeminyaka yoqatshiweyo, udumo lukaMowabi luzadelelwa, elexuku elikhulu; lensali izakuba nlutshwana, incane, ingelamandla." 
Isaiah17:1 Umthwalo weDamaseko. Khangela, iDamaseko izasuswa, ingabi ngumuzi, kodwa ibe lunxiwa oludilikileyo." 
Isaiah17:2 Imizi yeAroweri izatshiywa, ibe ngeyemihlambi elala phansi, njalo kungabi lomethusi." 
Isaiah17:3 Lenqaba izaphela koEfrayimi, lombuso weDamaseko, lensali yeSiriya; bazakuba njengodumo lwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Isaiah17:4 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku udumo lukaJakobe lwehliselwe phansi, lokuzimuka kwenyama yakhe kucakiswe." 
Isaiah17:5 Njalo kube njengomvuni evuna amabele amiyo, lengalo yakhe iqume izikhwebu; yebo, kube njengomuntu edobha izikhwebu esigodini seRefayimi." 
Isaiah17:6 Kodwa umkhothozo uzasala kukho, njengokunyikinyeka kwesihlahla somhlwathi, imihlwathi emibili loba emithathu engqongeni yengqonga, emine loba emihlanu engatsheni zaso ezithelayo, itsho i Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah17:7 Ngalolosuku umuntu uzajolozela kuMenzi wakhe, lamehlo akhe akhangele koNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Njalo kayikujolozela emalathini, umsebenzi wezandla zakhe; njalo kayikukhangela kulokho iminwe yakhe ekwenzileyo, loba izixuku loba amalathi empepha." 
Isaiah17:9 Ngalolosuku imizi yabo eqinileyo izakuba njengegusu elideliweyo lengqonga yogatsha abaludelileyo ngenxa yabantwana bakoIsrayeli; njalo kuzakuba yincithakalo. 
Isaiah17:10 Ngoba umkhohliwe uNkulunkulu wosindiso lwakho, kawukhumbulanga idwala lamandla akho; ngenxa yalokho uzahlanyela izithombo ezinhle, uyihlanyele ngamahlumela angejwayelekanga." 
Isaiah17:11 Ngosuku lokuhlanyela kwakho uzakwenza kuhlume, lekuseni wenze inhlanyelo yakho ikhuphe impoko; kodwa isivuno sizakuba yinqumbi ngosuku lomkhuhlane lobuhlungu obungelaphekiyo." 
Isaiah17:12 Yeka ukuhlokoma kwabantu abanengi abahlokoma njengokuhlokoma kwezinlwandle, lokuduma kwezizwe eziduma njengomdumo wamanzi amanengi!" 
Isaiah17:13 Izizwe ziduma njengomdumo wamanzi amanengi, kodwa uzazikhuza ukuze zibalekele khatshana, zixotshwe njengamakhoba ezintaba phambi komoya, lanjengokugiqikayo phambi kwesiphepho." 
Isaiah17:14 Ngesikhathi sokuhlwa, khangela-ke, ukuthuthumela, kungakasi ka se kho. Yiso isabelo sabasiphangayo lenkatho yabasihlaselayo." 
Isaiah18:1 Maye e lizwe ni okuhatshaza kulo impiko, elingaphetsheya kwemifula yeEtiyopiya," 
Isaiah18:2 elithuma izithunywa ngolwandle langemikhumbi yemihlanga ebusweni bamanzi! Hambani, zithunywa ezilejubane, liye esizweni eside lesibutshelezi, isizwe esesabekayo kusukela lapho kusiya phambili, isizwe esingumzila mzila esinyathelela phansi, esilizwe laso imifula iyalehlukanisa." 
Isaiah18:3 Lina lonke bahlali bomhlaba, lani elihlezi elizweni, bonani lapho kuphakanyiswa uphawu e zintab eni, lizwe lapho kuvuthelwa uphondo." 
Isaiah18:4 Ngoba yatsho njalo i Nkosi kimi: Ngizathula ngikhangele ngisendaweni yami emisiweyo, njengokukhanya okutshisayo phezu kwesibane, njengeyezi lamazolo ekutshiseni kwesivuno." 
Isaiah18:5 Ngoba mandulo kwesivuno, ihlumela seliphelele, lesithelo sesivini esingavuthwanga sivuthwe emva kwamaluba, izaquma amahlumela ngezingqamu zokuthena, isuse izingatsha, iziqume." 
Isaiah18:6 Zizatshiywa ndawonye zibe ngezinyoni zezintaba ezidla inyama lezenyamazana zomhlaba. Lenyoni ezidla inyama zizachitha ihlobo phezu kwazo, lenyamazana zonke zomhlaba zichithe ubusika phezu kwazo." 
Isaiah18:7 Ngalesosikhathi kuzalethwa isipho e Nkosi ni yamabandla, sivela e sizw eni eside lesibutshelezi, lesizweni esesabekayo kusukela lapho kusiya phambili, isizwe esingumzila mzila esinyathelela phansi, esilizwe laso imifula iyalehlukanisa, siye endaweni yebizo le Nkosi yamabandla, intaba yeZiyoni." 
Isaiah19:1 Umthwalo weGibhithe. Khangela, i Nkosi igade eyezini elilejubane, izakuza eGibhithe; lezithombe zeGibhithe zizathuthumela phambi kwayo, lenhliziyo yamaGibhithe incibilike phakathi kwawo." 
Isaiah19:2 Njalo ngizacija amaGibhithe amelane lamaGibhithe, ukuthi alwe, lowo lalowo emelene lomfowabo, lalowo lalowo emelene lomakhelwane wakhe, umuzi umelene lomuzi, umbuso umelene lombuso." 
Isaiah19:3 Lomoya wamaGibhithe uzathululwa phakathi kwawo, njalo ngizaginya icebo lawo; babesebebuza izithombe zawo, labathakathi, labalamadlozi, labalumbayo." 
Isaiah19:4 Sengizavalela amaGibhithe esandleni samakhosi alukhuni; lenkosi elolaka izabusa phezu kwawo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova wamabandla." 
Isaiah19:5 Lamanzi elwandle azacitsha, lomfula wome utshe." 
Isaiah19:6 Lemifula izanuka yetshe, lezifudlana zeGibhithe zizacitsha; imihlanga lebhuma kubune." 
Isaiah19:7 Imihlanga ezifuleni, emilonyeni yezifula, lakho konke okuhlanyelweyo kwezifula kuzakoma, kuphetshethwe, kungabe kusaba khona." 
Isaiah19:8 Njalo abagoli benhlanzi bazakhala balile, labo bonke abaphosa ingwegwe zokuthiya inhlanzi esifuleni; labendlala imbule ebusweni bamanzi bazaphela amandla." 
Isaiah19:9 Labasebenzi ngefikalisi elicolekileyo labeluka okumhlophe bazakuba lenhloni. 
Isaiah19:10 Njalo bazachithwa e zisekel weni zayo, labo bonke abasebenza ngokuqatshwa bazadana emphefumulweni." 
Isaiah19:11 Isibili, iziphathamandla zeZowani ziyizithutha, iseluleko sabeluleki abahlakaniphileyo bakaFaro siyibuthutha. Litsho njani kuFaro lithi: Ngiyindodana yabahlakaniphileyo, indodana yamakhosi endulo?" 
Isaiah19:12 Pho, bangaphi abahlakaniphileyo bakho? Yebo, ake bakutshele, kabakwazi lokho i Nkosi yamabandla ekucebileyo ngeGibhithe." 
Isaiah19:13 Iziphathamandla zeZowani sezibe yizithutha, iziphathamandla zeNofi zikhohlisiwe; bazaduhisa iGibhithe abazinsika zezizwe zayo." 
Isaiah19:14 I Nkosi ithulule umoya ophambeneyo phakathi kwayo; baduhise iGibhithe kukho konke ukwenza kwayo, njengodakiweyo ediyazela ekuhlanzeni kwakhe." 
Isaiah19:15 Njalo kakuyikuba khona umsebenzi weGibhithe okungawenza inhloko kumbe umsila, ugatsha loba umhlanga." 
Isaiah19:16 Ngalolosuku iGibhithe izakuba njengabesifazana; izathuthumela yesabe ngenxa yokuzunguza kwesandla se Nkosi yamabandla esizunguza phezu kwayo. 
Isaiah19:17 Lelizwe lakoJuda lizakuba yisesabiso eGibhithe; wonke ozakhuluma ngalo uzakwethuka yena ngokwakhe ngenxa yecebo le Nkosi yamabandla elicebileyo imelene layo. 
Isaiah19:18 Ngalolosuku kuzakuba lemizi emihlanu elizweni leGibhithe ekhuluma ulimi lweKhanani, lefungayo e Nkosi ni yamabandla. Omunye uzakuthiwa ngumuzi wokubhujiswa." 
Isaiah19:19 Ngalolosuku i Nkosi izakuba lelathi phakathi kwelizwe leGibhithe, lensika ye Nkosi emngceleni wayo." 
Isaiah19:20 Njalo izakuba yisibonakaliso lobufakazi be Nkosi yamabandla elizweni leGibhithe, ngoba bazakhala e Nkosi ni ngenxa yabacindezeli, njalo izathuma kubo umsindisi lomkhulu ozabakhulula." 
Isaiah19:21 Le Nkosi izakwaziwa kumaGibhithe; njalo amaGibhithe azayazi i Nkosi ngalolosuku, azakwenza umhlatshelo lomnikelo, afunge isifungo e Nkosi ni, a si khokhe." 
Isaiah19:22 Le Nkosi izatshaya iGibhithe, itshaye ibuye isilise; bazaphendukela e Nkosi ni, ezancengeka ngabo, ibasilise." 
Isaiah19:23 Ngalolosuku kuzakuba lomgwaqo omkhulu osuka eGibhithe usiya eAsiriya, ukuze amaAsiriya eze eGibhithe, lamaGibhithe eAsiriya; lamaGibhithe akhonze lamaAsiriya." 
Isaiah19:24 Ngalolosuku uIsrayeli uzakuba ngowesithathu leGibhithe leAsiriya, isibusiso phakathi komhlaba," 
Isaiah19:25 ezababusisa i Nkosi yamabandla isithi: Ibusisiwe iGibhithe abantu bami, leAsiriya umsebenzi wezandla zami, loIsrayeli ilifa lami." 
Isaiah20:1 Ngomnyaka wokufika kukaTharithani eAshidodi, lapho uSarigoni inkosi yeAsiriya wamthuma, lapho walwa leAshidodi wayithumba;" 
Isaiah20:2 ngalesosikhathi i Nkosi yakhuluma ngesandla sikaIsaya indodana kaAmozi isithi: Hamba, ukhulule ilembu lesaka ekhalweni lwakho, ukhuphe inyathela lakho enyaweni zakho. Wasesenza njalo, ehambaze engafakanga manyathela." 
Isaiah20:3 I Nkosi yasisithi: Njengalokhu inceku yami uIsaya isihambeze, ingafakanga manyathela okweminyaka emithathu, kube yisibonakaliso lesimanga phezu kweGibhithe laphezu kweEtiyopiya;" 
Isaiah20:4 ngokunjalo inkosi yeAsiriya izaqhuba abathunjiweyo beGibhithe labaxotshiweyo beEtiyopiya, abatsha labadala, beze bengafakanga manyathela, lezibunu zisegcekeni, kube lihlazo eGibhithe." 
Isaiah20:5 Basebesethuka baba lenhloni ngeEtiyopiya ithemba labo, langeGibhithe udumo lwabo." 
Isaiah20:6 Abahlali balesisihlenge bazakuthi ngalolosuku: Khangela, linjalo ithemba lethu, lapho esabalekelela usizo khona ukuze sikhululwe ebusweni benkosi yeAsiriya. Pho, thina sizaphunyuka njani?"
