Isaiah21:1 Umthwalo wenkangala yolwandle. Njengokudlula kwezivunguzane eningizimu, kuzavela enkangala, elizweni elesabekayo." 
Isaiah21:2 Ngaziswe umbono olukhuni; umkhohlisi wenza ngenkohliso, lomchithi uyachitha. Yenyuka Elamu, uvimbezele Mede; ngiqede konke ukububula kwayo." 
Isaiah21:3 Ngenxa yalokhu ukhalo lwami lugcwele ubuhlungu, imihelo ingibambile njengemihelo yobelethayo; ngagotshiswa ngenxa yokuzwa, ngadideka ngenxa yokubona." 
Isaiah21:4 Inhliziyo yami yaduha, uvalo lwangesabisa; ukuhwalala engikuloyisayo wakwenza kwaba yikuthuthumela kimi." 
Isaiah21:5 Lungisa itafula, yendlala ingubo, dlana, unathe; sukumani, ziphathamandla, ligcobe isihlangu." 
Isaiah21:6 Ngoba yatsho njalo iNkosi kimi: Hamba umise umlindi; akhulume akubonayo. 
Isaiah21:7 Wasebona inqola, abagadi bamabhiza ababili, inqola kababhemi, inqola yekamela; walalela ngesineke, ngesineke esikhulu." 
Isaiah21:8 Wasememeza esithi: Isilwane, Nkosi, ngimi njalonjalo emphotshongweni wokulinda emini, njalo ngimi emlindweni ubusuku bonke." 
Isaiah21:9 Khangela-ke, nansi inqola yomuntu isiza, labagadi bamabhiza ababili. Wasephendula wathi: Iwile, iwile iBhabhiloni; lazo zonke izithombe ezibaziweyo zabonkulunkulu bayo uzidilizele phansi." 
Isaiah21:10 Lina okubhuliweyo kwami, lendodana yebala lami lokubhulela, engikuzwileyo e Nkosi ni yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ngilitshelile khona." 
Isaiah21:11 Umthwalo weDuma. Uyangimemeza eseSeyiri esithi: Mlindi, uthini ngobusuku? Mlindi, uthini ngobusuku?" 
Isaiah21:12 Umlindi wathi: Kuyeza ukusa, lobusuku futhi. Uba libuza, buzani, libuye, lize." 
Isaiah21:13 Umthwalo phezu kweArabhiya. Ehlathini leArabhiya lizalala ubusuku, lina zindwendwe zeDedani." 
Isaiah21:14 Mletheleni omileyo amanzi. Abahlali belizwe leTema bahlangabeza obalekayo ngokudla. 
Isaiah21:15 Ngoba babalekela izinkemba, inkemba ehwatshiweyo, ledandili eligotshiweyo, lobunzima bempi." 
Isaiah21:16 Ngoba itsho njalo iNkosi kimi: Kusesephakathi komnyaka, njengeminyaka yoqatshiweyo, lonke udumo lweKedari luzaphela." 
Isaiah21:17 Lensali yenani labatshoki, amaqhawe amaKedari, bazakuba balutshwana. Ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli isikhulumile." 
Isaiah22:1 Umthwalo wesigodi sombono. Kutheni kuwe khathesi, ukuthi lowo lalowo wakho akhwele empahleni zezindlu?" 
Isaiah22:2 Wena ogcwele umsindo, muzi oxokozelayo, dolobho elilentokozo, ababuleweyo bakho kababulawanga ngenkemba, kabafelanga empini." 
Isaiah22:3 Bonke ababusi bakho babaleke kanyekanye, babotshwe ngabatshoki, bonke abatholakala kuwe, babotshiwe kanyekanye, babaleke besuka khatshana." 
Isaiah22:4 Ngenxa yalokhu ngathi: Susani amehlo kimi; kangikhale ngokubabayo; ungaphangisi ukungiduduza ngenxa yokuchitheka kwendodakazi yabantu bakithi. 
Isaiah22:5 Ngoba kulusuku lokusanganiseka, lolokunyathelela phansi, lolokuphithizela kweNkosi uJehova wamabandla esigodini sombono, lolokudilizela phansi umduli, lokuhlaba umkhosi kuze kube sentabeni." 
Isaiah22:6 IElamu yathatha-ke isikhwama semitshoko, kanye lenqola, abantu, abagadi bamabhiza; leKiri yavumbulula isihlangu." 
Isaiah22:7 Kuzakuthi-ke izigodi zakho ezikhethekileyo zigcwala izinqola, labagadi bamabhiza bazihlele lokuzihlela ngasesangweni." 
Isaiah22:8 Njalo yena uzakwembula isimbombozo sakoJuda; langalolosuku wena uzakhangela izikhali zendlu yehlathi. 
Isaiah22:9 Njalo lizabona imikenke yomuzi kaDavida, ukuthi minengi, liqoqe amanzi echibini elingaphansi." 
Isaiah22:10 Lizabala izindlu zeJerusalema, lidilize izindlu ukuze liqinise umduli." 
Isaiah22:11 Lizakwenza ichibi phakathi kwemiduli yomibili lisenz ela amanzi omgodi omdala. Kodwa kaliyikukhangelanga kowakwenzayo, kalimnanzanga owakubumbayo kudala." 
Isaiah22:12 Langalolosuku iNkosi uJehova wamabandla izamemezela ukulila, lokukhala, lokuphucwa kwamakhanda, lokugqokwa kwamalembu amasaka." 
Isaiah22:13 Kodwa khangela, injabulo lokuthaba, ukubulawa kwenkomo, lokuhlatshwa kwezimvu, ukudliwa kwenyama, lokunathwa kwewayini; lathi: Asidleni sinathe, ngoba kusasa sizakufa." 
Isaiah22:14 Kodwa i Nkosi yamabandla yembula endlebeni zami isithi: Isibili lesisono kaliyikusenzelwa inhlawulo yokuthula lize life, kutsho iNkosi uJehova wamabandla." 
Isaiah22:15 Itsho njalo iNkosi uJehova wamabandla: Hamba uye kulo umphathi, kuShebina, ophezu kwendlu, uthi:" 
Isaiah22:16 Ulani lapha, njalo ulobani lapha, ukuthi uzigebhele ingcwaba lapha, njeng ozigebhela ingcwaba lakhe phezulu, ozigubhela indawo yokuhlala edwaleni?" 
Isaiah22:17 Khangela, i Nkosi izakujikijela khatshana, ngokujikijela kwendoda; izakugoqela ngoku ku goqela," 
Isaiah22:18 i ku thandele lokukuthandela njengebhola eligiqelwa elizweni elibanzi enhlangothini zombili; uzafela khona, lalapho kuzakuba khona izinqola zakho ezilodumo, wena hlazo lendlu yenkosi yakho!" 
Isaiah22:19 Njalo ngizakusunduza usuke esikhundleni sakho, ikuwise ekumeni kwakho." 
Isaiah22:20 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku ngibize inceku yami uEliyakhimi indodana kaHilikhiya; 
Isaiah22:21 ngizamgqokisa isigqoko sakho, ngimqinise ngebhanti lakho, nginikeze umbuso wakho esandleni sakhe; njalo yena uzakuba nguyise kubahlali beJerusalema lendlini yakoJuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Ngizabeka-ke isihluthulelo sendlu kaDavida ehlombe lakhe; yena uzavula kungavali muntu, avale kungavuli muntu." 
Isaiah22:23 Ngizambethela njenge sikhonkwane endaweni eqinileyo; njalo uzakuba yisihlalo sobukhosi esilodumo endlini kayise. 
Isaiah22:24 Bazaphanyeka phezu kwakhe udumo lonke lwendlu kayise, inzalo labantwana, zonke izitsha ezincinyane, kusukela ezitsheni zenkezo kusiya kuzo zonke izitsha zeziphiso." 
Isaiah22:25 Ngalolosuku, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla, isikhonkwane esabethelwa endaweni eqinileyo sizasuswa, siganyulwe siwe; lomthwalo obuphezu kwaso uzaqunywa; ngoba i Nkosi ikhulumile." 
Isaiah23:1 Umthwalo weTire. Qhinqani isililo, mikhumbi yeTarshishi, ngoba ichithiwe, kungabi lendlu, kungabi lokungena. Kuvela elizweni leKitimi kwembuliwe kubo." 
Isaiah23:2 Thulani, bahlali besihlenge, wena, abathengiselani beSidoni, abachapha ulwandle, abakugcwalisileyo." 
Isaiah23:3 Langamanzi amakhulu, inzalo yeShihori, isivuno somfula yinzuzo yayo; njalo iyindawo yezizwe yokuthengiselana." 
Isaiah23:4 Woba lenhloni, Sidoni, ngoba ulwandle lukhulumile, amandla olwandle, lusithi: Kangihelelwa, kangibelethanga, njalo kangikhulisanga amajaha, kangondlanga izintombi ezimsulwa." 
Isaiah23:5 Njengasembikweni ngeGibhithe, bazahelelwa ngombiko weTire." 
Isaiah23:6 Chaphelani eTarshishi, qhinqani isililo, bahlali besihlenge." 
Isaiah23:7 Yiwo lo yini umuzi wenu ojabulayo, obudala bawo busukela ensukwini zendulo? Inyawo zawo zizawuthwalela khatshana uku ya hlala njengowezizwe." 
Isaiah23:8 Ngubani oweluleke lokhu ngeTire, omethesi womqhele, obathengisi bayo bayiziphathamandla, obathengiselani bayo ngabadumileyo emhlabeni?" 
Isaiah23:9 I Nkosi yamabandla ikucebisile lokhu, ukonakalisa ukuzigqaja kodumo lonke, ukwenza badeleleke bonke abadumileyo bomhlaba." 
Isaiah23:10 Dabula ilizwe lakho njengomfula, ndodakazi yeTarshishi; akuselabhanti." 
Isaiah23:11 Yelulele isandla sayo phezu kolwandle, inyikinye imibuso; i Nkosi ilayezile imelene leKhanani, ukuchitha inqaba zayo." 
Isaiah23:12 Yasisithi: Kawusayikuphinda ujabule, ntombi emsulwa ecindezelweyo, ndodakazi yeSidoni; sukuma, uchaphele eKhithimu, lakhona kakuyikuba lokuphumula kuwe." 
Isaiah23:13 Khangela ilizwe lamaKhaladiya; lesisizwe sasingekho; amaSiriya asisekelela bona abahlala enkangala; amisa imiphotshongo yawo yokuvimbezela, abhidliza izigodlo zalo; alenza laba lunxiwa." 
Isaiah23:14 Qhinqani isililo, mikhumbi yeTarshishi, ngoba inqaba yenu ichithekile." 
Isaiah23:15 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku iTire ikhohlakale okweminyaka engamatshumi ayisikhombisa, njengokwensuku zenkosi eyodwa. Ekupheleni kweminyaka engamatshumi ayisikhombisa kuzakuba khona eTire okunjengoma yewule." 
Isaiah23:16 Thatha ichacho, ubhode umuzi, wule elikhohlakeleyo, utshaye kamnandi, uhlabele ingoma ezinengi, ukuze ukhunjulwe." 
Isaiah23:17 Kuzakuthi-ke ekupheleni kweminyaka engamatshumi ayisikhombisa i Nkosi iyihambele iTire; njalo izabuyela ekuqatshweni kobuwule bayo; izawula layo yonke imibuso phezu kobuso bomhlaba. 
Isaiah23:18 Lenzuzo yayo yokuthengiselana lokuqatshwa kwayo kuzaba yibungcwele e Nkosi ni; kakuyikulondolozwa, kubuthelelwe, ngoba inzuzo yayo yokuthengiselana izakuba ngeyabahlala phambi kwe Nkosi, ukuze badle basuthe, babe lezigqoko ezinhle." 
Isaiah24:1 Khangela, i Nkosi yenza umhlaba ube yize, iwenze ube yincithakalo, yone ubuso bawo, ihlakaze abahlali bawo." 
Isaiah24:2 Kuzakuthi njengabantu kube njalo umpristi; njengesisebenzi kube njalo inkosi yaso; njengencekukazi kube njalo inkosikazi yayo; njengomthengi kube njalo umthengisi; njengombolekisi kube njalo obolekayo; njengomniki wesikwelede, kube njalo okweledayo." 
Isaiah24:3 Umhlaba uzachitheka lokuchitheka, uphangwe lokuphangwa; ngoba i Nkosi ilikhulumile lelilizwi." 
Isaiah24:4 Umhlaba uyalila, ubune, ilizwe liyadangala, libune; abantu bomhlaba abaphakemeyo bayadangala." 
Isaiah24:5 Umhlaba lawo ungcolisiwe ngaphansi kwabahlali bawo; ngoba beqile imilayo, baguqula isimiso, bephula isivumelwano esilaphakade." 
Isaiah24:6 Ngenxa yalokho isiqalekiso siwuqedile umhlaba, labahlala kuwo bayachitheka; ngakho-ke abahlali bomhlaba batshisiwe, njalo kusale abantu abalutshwana." 
Isaiah24:7 Iwayini elitsha liyalila, ivini lidangale, bonke abanhliziyo ethokozayo bayabubula." 
Isaiah24:8 Injabulo yezigubhu iphelile, umsindo wabajabulayo uphelile, intokozo yechacho iphelile." 
Isaiah24:9 Kabayikunatha iwayini ngengoma; okunathwayo okulamandla kuzababa kwabakunathayo. 
Isaiah24:10 Umuzi wencithakalo ubhidlikile, yonke indlu ivaliwe ukuze kungangenwa." 
Isaiah24:11 Kukhalelwa iwayini ezitaladeni; intokozo yonke ifiphele, injabulo yomhlaba inyamalele." 
Isaiah24:12 Emzini kusele incithakalo, lesango litshayiwe lachithwa." 
Isaiah24:13 Ngoba phakathi kwelizwe, phakathi kwabantu, kuzakuba njalo njengokunyikinywa kwesihlahla somhlwathi, njengokukhothoza sesiphelile isivuno sezithelo zevini." 
Isaiah24:14 Bona bazaphakamisa ilizwi labo, bazahlabelela ubukhosi beNkosi, bamemeze beselwandle." 
Isaiah24:15 Ngenxa yalokhu dumisani i Nkosi ekukhanyeni, ibizo leNkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli ezihlengeni zolwandle." 
Isaiah24:16 Sizwile amahubo avela emkhawulweni womhlaba, udumo kolungileyo. Kodwa ngathi: Ukucaka kwami, ukucaka kwami! Maye kimi! Abenzi benkohliso benze ngokukhohlisa; yebo abenzi benkohliso benze ngokukhohlisa okukhulu." 
Isaiah24:17 Ukwesaba lomgodi lomjibila kuphezu kwakho, wena mhlali womhlaba." 
Isaiah24:18 Kuzakuthi-ke obalekela umsindo wokwesaba awele emgodini; lowenyuka phakathi komgodi abanjwe ngumjibila; ngoba amawindi aphezulu avulekile, lezisekelo zomhlaba ziyaqhaqhazela." 
Isaiah24:19 Umhlaba wephukile lokwephuka, umhlaba udatshudatshuliwe, umhlaba uyanyikinyeka kakhulu." 
Isaiah24:20 Umhlaba uzadiyazela lokudiyazela njengesidakwa, uzunguzeke njengedumba; lesiphambeko sawo sizakuba nzima phezu kwawo; uzakuwa, ungabe u sa vuka futhi." 
Isaiah24:21 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku i Nkosi ijezise ibutho labaphakemeyo aba phezulu, lamakhosi omhlaba phezu komhlaba." 
Isaiah24:22 Bazabuthelwa ndawonye njenge zibotshwa zibuthelwa emgodini, bavalelwe entolongweni, langemva kwensuku ezinengi bethekelelwe." 
Isaiah24:23 Khona inyanga izayangeka, lelanga libe lenhloni, lapho i Nkosi yamabandla izabusa entabeni iZiyoni laseJerusalema, laphambi kwabadala bayo ngenkazimulo." 
Isaiah25:1 Nkosi unguNkulunkulu wami; ngizakuphakamisa, ngidumise ibizo lakho; ngoba wenzile okumangalisayo; amacebo akho endulo aluthembeko le qiniso." 
Isaiah25:2 Ngoba wenzile umuzi waba yinqwaba; umuzi obiyelweyo ube lunxiwa; isigodlo sabezizwe singabi ngumuzi; kasiyikwakhiwa kuze kube nininini. 
Isaiah25:3 Ngenxa yalokho abantu abalamandla bazakudumisa, umuzi wezizwe ezilesihluku ukwesabe." 
Isaiah25:4 Ngoba ubungamandla kubayanga, amandla kosweleyo ekuhluphekeni kwakhe, isiphephelo kuzulu lesiphepho, umthunzi ekutshiseni, lapho ukuvuthela kwabalolunya kunjengezulu lesiphepho e mdul ini." 
Isaiah25:5 Uzakwehlisa umsindo wabezizwe njengokutshisa endaweni eyomileyo; ukutshisa emthunzini weyezi; ingoma yabalolunya izathotshiswa. 
Isaiah25:6 Lakulintaba i Nkosi yamabandla izakwenzela abantu bonke idili lezinto ezinonileyo, idili lamawayini alenzece, lezinto ezinonileyo zigcwele umnkantsho, lamawayini alenzece acengekileyo." 
Isaiah25:7 Izaginya kulintaba ubuso besembeso esembese bonke abantu, lesigubuzelo eselukiweyo phezu kwezizwe zonke." 
Isaiah25:8 Izaginya ukufa ekunqobeni, leNkosi uJehova izakwesula inyembezi izisuse ebusweni bonke, isuse lehlazo labantu bayo emhlabeni wonke; ngoba i Nkosi ikhulumile." 
Isaiah25:9 Kuzakuthiwa-ke ngalolosuku: Khangela, lo nguNkulunkulu wethu; silindele kuye, njalo uzasisindisa; le yi Nkosi; siyilindele, sizathaba, sithokoze kusindiso lwayo." 
Isaiah25:10 Ngoba isandla se Nkosi sizaphumula kulintaba, loMowabi uzanyathelelwa phansi kwayo, njengamahlanga abuthelelweyo enyathelelwa enqumbini yomquba." 
Isaiah25:11 Njalo izakwelula izandla zayo phakathi kwakhe njengontshezayo e ze lula ukuze antsheze; njalo izathobisa ukuzigqaja kwakhe kanye lempango yezandla zakhe. 
Isaiah25:12 Lenqaba ephakemeyo yemiduli yakho izayidilizela phansi, iyehlisele phansi, iyifikise emhlabathini, ethulini." 
Isaiah26:1 Ngalolosuku lingoma izahlatshelwa elizweni lakoJuda ethi: Silomuzi oqinileyo; uNkulunkulu uzamisa usindiso lube yimiduli lezinqaba. 
Isaiah26:2 Vulani amasango ukuze singene isizwe esilungileyo esigcina amaqiniso. 
Isaiah26:3 Uzamgcina ekuthuleni okupheleleyo o ngqondo yakhe yeyama phezu kwakho, ngoba ethemba kuwe." 
Isaiah26:4 Thembani e Nkosi ni kokuphela, ngoba e Nkosi ni uJehova kulidwala elilaphakade." 
Isaiah26:5 Ngoba ibehlisela phansi abahlala engqongeni; umuzi ophakemeyo, iwehlisela phansi; iwehlisela phansi emhlabathini, iwufikise othulini." 
Isaiah26:6 Unyawo luzawunyathelela phansi, ngitsho inyawo zabayanga, amanyathela abaswelayo." 
Isaiah26:7 Indlela yabalungileyo iyikuqonda okukhulu; wena oqondileyo, uyalinganisa umkhondo wabalungileyo." 
Isaiah26:8 Yebo, endleleni yezahlulelo zakho, Nkosi, sikulindele; isiloyiso somphefumulo wethu sisebizweni lakho lekukukhumbuleni." 
Isaiah26:9 Ngo mphefumulo wami ngikuloyisile ebusuku; yebo, ngo moya wami o phakathi kwami ngizakudinga ngovivi; ngoba lapho izahlulelo zakho zisemhlabeni, abahlali bomhlaba bazafunda ukulunga." 
Isaiah26:10 Uba umusa utshengiswa okhohlakeleyo, kube kanti kayikufunda ukulunga; elizweni lobuqotho uzakwenza okubi, njalo kayikubona ubukhosi be Nkosi." 
Isaiah26:11 Nkosi, isandla sakho siphakeme, kabayikubona; kodwa bazabona babe lenhloni ngenxa yomhawu ebantwini; yebo umlilo uzaziqeda izitha zakho." 
Isaiah26:12 Nkosi, uzasimisela ukuthula, ngoba lawe usenzele yonke imisebenzi yethu." 
Isaiah26:13 Nkosi Nkulunkulu wethu, amanye amakhosi ngaphandle kwakho ake abusa phezu kwethu; kodwa ngawe kuphela sizakhumbula ibizo lakho." 
Isaiah26:14 Afile, kawayikuphila; kawasekho, kawayikuvuka; ngakho uwaphindisele wawachitha, waqeda konke ukukhunjulwa kwawo." 
Isaiah26:15 Usandisile isizwe, Nkosi, wasandisa isizwe; uyadunyiswa; u si susele khatshana kuyo yonke imikhawulo yomhlaba." 
Isaiah26:16 Nkosi, besekuhluphekeni bakwethekelele, bathulula umkhuleko lapho ukujezisa kwakho kuphezu kwabo." 
Isaiah26:17 Njengowesifazana okhulelweyo sekusondele ukubeletha, esebuhlungwini, ekhala emihelweni yakhe, saba njalo ebusweni bakho, Nkosi." 
Isaiah26:18 Sasikhulelwe, sasisebuhlungwini, kwakungathi sibelethe umoya. Kasenzanga ukukhululwa emhlabeni, njalo abahlali bomhlaba kabawanga." 
Isaiah26:19 Abafileyo bakho bazaphila, le sidumbu sami, bazavuka. Vukani, limemeze ngentokozo, lina elihlala ethulini; ngoba amazolo akho anjeng amazolo okukhanya, lomhlaba uzabakhupha abafileyo." 
Isaiah26:20 Hambani bantu bami, lingene emakamelweni enu, livale iminyango yenu ngemva kwenu, licatshe okwesikhatshana, luze ludlule ulaka." 
Isaiah26:21 Ngoba, khangelani, i Nkosi iyaphuma endaweni yayo ukuthi ijezise abahlali bomhlaba ngenxa yobubi babo; lomhlaba uzaveza igazi lawo, ungabe usabafihla ababuleweyo bawo." 
Isaiah27:1 Ngalolosuku i Nkosi ngenkemba yayo elukhuni lenkulu lelamandla izajezisa uLeviyathani*, inyoka ebalekayo, ngitsho uLeviyathani inyoka egoqanayo, ibulale umgobho oselwandle." 
Isaiah27:2 Ngalolosuku hlabelelani ngaso isivini sewayini elibomvu. 
Isaiah27:3 Mina Nkosi, ngiyasilondoloza, ngiyasithelela isikhathi sonke; hlezi kube khona osonayo ngisilondoloze ebusuku lemini." 
Isaiah27:4 Ukuthukuthela kakukho kimi. Ngubani ongabeka ukhula oluhlabayo lameva kumelane lami empini? Bengizamatsha ngidabule phakathi kwakho, ngikutshise kanyekanye." 
Isaiah27:5 Kumbe kabambelele emandleni ami, enze ukuthula lami; uzakwenza ukuthula lami." 
Isaiah27:6 Izakwenza abavela koJakobe bagxile, uIsrayeli uzahluma, akhahlele, agcwalise ubuso bomhlaba ngezithelo." 
Isaiah27:7 Imtshayile yini njengokutshaya kwayo oyitshayayo? Ubulewe yini njengokubulawa kwababulewe nguye? 
Isaiah27:8 Ngokulinganisa, ekukuxotsheni izaphikisana lakho; izakususa ngomoya wayo olukhuni ngosuku lomoya wempumalanga." 
Isaiah27:9 Ngakho ngalokhu isiphambeko sikaJakobe sizahlawulelwa; lalokhu kuyisithelo sonke sokususa isono sakhe, lapho esenza ukuthi wonke amatshe elathi abe njengamatshe ekalaga avuthuziweyo, izixuku lezithombe kakuyikuma." 
Isaiah27:10 Ngoba umuzi obiyelweyo uzakuba wodwa, indawo yokuhlala ixotshwe, itshiywe njengenkangala; lapho ithole lizakudla khona, lilale khona, liqede izingatsha zawo." 
Isaiah27:11 Lapho ingatsha zawo sezomile zizakwephulwa; abesifazana beze bazibase; ngoba bangabantu abangaqedisisiyo; ngakho-ke lowo owabenzayo kayikubahawukela, lowababumbayo kayikubatshengisa umusa." 
Isaiah27:12 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku i Nkosi ibhule kusukela esifudlaneni somfula kuze kube semfuleni weGibhithe; lina lizabuthwa ngamunye ngamunye, bantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Isaiah27:13 Kuzakuthi-ke ngalolosuku kuvuthelwe uphondo olukhulu, lalabo ababebhubhe elizweni leAsiriya labaxotshelwe elizweni leGibhithe, bazabuya bayikhonze i Nkosi entabeni engcwele eJerusalema." 
Isaiah28:1 Maye kumqhele wokuzigqaja wezidakwa zakoEfrayimi, obuhle benkazimulo yazo buliluba elibunayo, eliphezu kwekhanda lezihotsha ezivundileyo zalabo abatshaywe liwayini." 
Isaiah28:2 Khangela, iNkosi ilaye olamandla loqinileyo, ozaphosela emhlabeni ngesandla, njengezulu lesiphepho elilesiqhotho, isiphepho esichithayo, njengempophoma yamanzi alamandla akhukhulayo." 
Isaiah28:3 Umqhele wokuziqgaja wezidakwa zakoEfrayimi uzanyathelwa phansi ngezinyawo," 
Isaiah28:4 lobuhle benkazimulo yakhe, obuphezu kwekhanda lesihotsha esivunde kakhulu, buzakuba liluba elibunayo, njengesithelo esivuthwe masinyane kungakafiki ihlobo; okuthi osibonileyo asibone, sisesesandleni sakhe asiginye." 
Isaiah28:5 Ngalolosuku i Nkosi yamabandla izakuba ngumqhele wenkazimulo, lesidlodlo sobuhle kunsali yabantu bayo," 
Isaiah28:6 lomoya wesahlulelo kulowo ohlalela isahlulelo, lamandla kulabo ababuyisela impi esangweni." 
Isaiah28:7 Lalaba baduhile ngenxa yewayini, langenxa yokunathwayo okulamandla baphambukile; umpristi lomprofethi baduhile ngenxa yokunathwayo okulamandla, baginywe liwayini, baphambukile ngenxa yokunathwayo okulamandla; bayaduha emibonweni, bakhubeke kusahlulelo." 
Isaiah28:8 Ngoba wonke amatafula agcwele amahlanzo lo kungcola, kakulandawo engangcolanga." 
Isaiah28:9 Izafundisa bani ulwazi, njalo izakwenza bani aqedisise umbiko? Abalunyuliweyo echagweni, abakhunyuliweyo emabeleni." 
Isaiah28:10 Ngoba umthetho phezu komthetho, umthetho phezu komthetho; umzila phezu komzila, umzila phezu komzila; lapha okuncinyane, laphayana okuncinyane." 
Isaiah28:11 Ngoba ngendebe eziklolodayo, langolunye ulimi izakhuluma kulababantu," 
Isaiah28:12 ethi kubo: Lokhu yikuphumula, phumuzani abadiniweyo; lalokhu yikuvuselela; kodwa kabathandanga ukuzwa." 
Isaiah28:13 Kodwa ilizwi le Nkosi lizakuba kibo umthetho phezu komthetho, umthetho phezu komthetho; umzila phezu komzila, umzila phezu komzila; lapha kancinyane, laphayana kancinyane; ukuze bahambe, bawe nyovane, bephuke, bathiywe, bathunjwe." 
Isaiah28:14 Ngakho zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi, bantu abaklolodayo, elibusa lababantu abaseJerusalema." 
Isaiah28:15 Ngoba lithe: Senze isivumelwano lokufa, njalo senze isivumelwano lesihogo; lapho isiswepu esiphuphumayo sisedlula, kakuyikufika kithi; ngoba senze amanga aba yisiphephelo sethu, sacatsha ngaphansi kwenkohliso." 
Isaiah28:16 Ngakho itsho njalo iNkosi uJehova: Khangela, ngibeka eZiyoni ilitshe lesisekelo, ilitshe elihloliweyo, ilitshe lengonsi eliligugu, isisekelo esisekelweyo; okholwayo kayikuphangisa." 
Isaiah28:17 Isahlulelo laso ngizasibeka entanjeni, lokulunga entanjeni yokuqondisa; lesiqhotho sizakhukhula isiphephelo samanga; lamanzi agabhele indawo yokucatsha." 
Isaiah28:18 Lesivumelwano senu lokufa sizaphela, lesivumelwano senu lesihogo kasiyikuma; lapho isiswepu esikhukhulayo sisedlula, khona lizanyathelelwa phansi yikho." 
Isaiah28:19 Kusukela esikhathini sokwedlula kwaso, sizalithatha; ngoba ukusa ngokusa sizakwedlula, emini lebusuku; njalo kuzakuba ngokwesabisayo kuphela ukuqedisisa umbiko." 
Isaiah28:20 Ngoba umbheda mfitshane kakhulu ukuthi umuntu azelule kuwo, lengubo yincinyane kakhulu ukuthi umuntu azigoqele ngayo." 
Isaiah28:21 Ngoba i Nkosi izavuka njengentab eni yePerazimi, ithukuthele njengesigodi ni seGibeyoni, ukuze yenze umsebenzi wayo, umsebenzi wayo ongejwayelekanga, yenze isenzo sayo, isenzo sayo esingejwayelekanga." 
Isaiah28:22 Ngakho-ke lingahleki usulu, hlezi izibopho zenu ziqiniswe; ngoba ngizwile eNkosini uJehova wamabandla ngo kuqedwa okuqunywe phezu komhlaba wonke." 
Isaiah28:23 Bekani indlebe, lizwe ilizwi lami; lalelani lizwe inkulumo yami." 
Isaiah28:24 Umlimi ulimela ukuhlanyela lonke usuku yini? Uyavula abhuqe umhlabathi wakhe yini? 
Isaiah28:25 Lapho esewuhlelembile ubuso bawo, kaphosi yini amafitshizi*, ahlakaze ikumini*, afake emizileni ingqoloyi lebhali*, lespelite* endaweni ekhethelwe yona?" 
Isaiah28:26 Ngoba uNkulunkulu wakhe uyamazisa ngendlela, amfundise." 
Isaiah28:27 Ngoba amafitshizi kawabhulwa ngobhulo, levili lenqola kaliphendulwa phezu kwekumini; kodwa amafitshizi atshaywa ngoswazi, lekumini ngentonga." 
Isaiah28:28 Amabele esinkwa ayachotshozwa; ngoba kayikuhlala ewabhula kokuphela, loba ewachoboza nge vili lenqola yakhe, njalo kawachobozi ngamabhiza akhe." 
Isaiah28:29 Lalokhu kuvela e Nkosi ni yamabandla; iyamangalisa ekwelulekeni, yinkulu ekusebenzeni." 
Isaiah29:1 Maye kuAriyeli, iAriyeli umuzi uDavida amisa kuwo inkamba! Yengezelelani umnyaka emnyakeni; kayibhode imikhosi." 
Isaiah29:2 Kanti ngizayicindezela iAriyeli, njalo kube khona ukulila losizi; kuzakuba njengeAriyeli kimi." 
Isaiah29:3 Njalo ngizamisa inkamba inhlangothi zakho zonke, ngikuvimbezele ngedundulu, ngikumisele izinqaba ezimelene lawe." 
Isaiah29:4 Njalo uzakwehliselwa phansi, ukhulume usemhlabathini, lenkulumo yakho izakuba phansi ethulini, lelizwi lakho lizakuba njengeloledlozi liphuma emhlabathini, lenkulumo yakho ibe ngumlozwi ophuma othulini." 
Isaiah29:5 Njalo ixuku labezizwe bakho lizakuba njengothuli olucholekileyo, lexuku labalesihluku libe njengamakhoba adlulayo. Yebo, kuzahle kube masinyane." 
Isaiah29:6 Uzakwethekelelwa yi Nkosi yamabandla ngokuduma, langokuzamazama komhlaba, lomsindo omkhulu, isivunguzane, lesiphepho, lelangabi lomlilo oqothulayo." 
Isaiah29:7 Lexuku lezizwe zonke elilwa limelene leAriyeli, ngitsho zonke ezilwa zimelene layo lezinqaba zayo, leziyicindezelayo, zizakuba njengephupho, umbono webusuku." 
Isaiah29:8 Kuzakuba lanjengolambileyo ephupha; khangela-ke, uyadla, kodwa aphaphame, lomphefumulo wakhe ungelalutho; loba njengowomileyo ephupha, khangela-ke, uyanatha, kodwa aphaphame, khangela-ke uphelelwa ngamandla, lomphefumulo wakhe uyalangatha; lizakuba njalo ixuku lazo zonke izizwe ezilwa zimelene lentaba iZiyoni." 
Isaiah29:9 Manini, lithithibale; ziphumphuthekiseni liphumphutheke; badakiwe, kodwa hatshi ngewayini; bayadiyazela, kodwa hatshi ngenxa yokunathwayo okulamandla." 
Isaiah29:10 Ngoba i Nkosi ithululele phezu kwenu umoya wobuthongo obunzima, yavala amehlo enu; abaprofethi lezinhloko zenu, ababoni, ibagubuzele." 
Isaiah29:11 Lawo wonke umbono usube kini njengamazwi ogwalo olunanyekiweyo okuthi balunika owazi umbhalo, besithi: Bala lokhu siyakuncenga; yena athi: Ngingeke, ngoba lunanyekiwe." 
Isaiah29:12 Ugwalo beselunikwa ongazi umbhalo, besithi: Bala lokhu, siyakuncenga; yena athi: Kangiwazi umbhalo." 
Isaiah29:13 INkosi yasisithi: Ngenxa yokuthi lababantu besondela ngomlomo wabo langezindebe zabo bengihlonipha, kodwa babeka inhliziyo zabo khatshana lami, lokungesaba kwabo kufundiswa ngumlayo wabantu;" 
Isaiah29:14 ngakho, khangela, ngizaqhubeka ukuphatha lababantu ngokumangalisayo, umsebenzi omangalisayo lesimanga; ngoba inhlakanipho yabahlakaniphileyo babo izaphela, lokuqedisisa kwabaqedisisayo babo kucatshe." 
Isaiah29:15 Maye kulabo abajula besuka e Nkosi ni ukuze bafihle icebo labo, lemisebenzi yabo isemnyameni, bathi: Ngubani osibonayo? Njalo ngubani osaziyo?" 
Isaiah29:16 Ukugonqomisa kwenu kuthiwa kunjengebumba lombumbi! Ngoba umsebenzi uzakutsho yini ngaye owenzileyo ukuthi: Kangenzanga? Kumbe okubunjiweyo kungatsho yini ngombumbi wakho ukuthi: Kaqedisisi? 
Isaiah29:17 Kakuseyi sikha tshana esifitshane yini, ukuthi iLebhanoni liphendulwe libe yinsimu ethelayo, lensimu ethelayo ithiwe injengehlathi?" 
Isaiah29:18 Njalo ngalolosuku izacuthe zizakuzwa amazwi ogwalo, lamehlo eziphofu abone ekufiphaleni lemnyameni." 
Isaiah29:19 Abathobekileyo labo bazakwandisa intokozo e Nkosi ni, labangabayanga ebantwini bathokoze koNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah29:20 Ngoba olesihluku kayikuba khona, lodelelayo uqediwe, labo bonke abalindele okubi bazaqunywa;" 
Isaiah29:21 abenza umuntu one ngelizwi, bambekele umjibila okhuzayo esangweni, baphambule olungileyo ngento engelutho." 
Isaiah29:22 Ngakho itsho njalo i Nkosi eyahlenga uAbrahama, ngendlu kaJakobe: Khathesi uJakobe kayikuba lanhloni, lobuso bakhe khathesi kabuyikuhloba." 
Isaiah29:23 Ngoba lapho ebona abantwana bakhe, umsebenzi wezandla zami, phakathi kwakhe, bazangcwelisa ibizo lami; bangcwelise oNgcwele kaJakobe, besabe uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah29:24 Lalabo abaduhayo emoyeni bazakwazi ukuqedisisa, labangungunayo bazafunda imfundiso." 
Isaiah30:1 Maye ebantwaneni abahlamukayo! itsho i Nkosi, abenza icebo, kodwa elingeyisilo elami, abembesa ngesembeso, kodwa esingesiso so moya wami, ukuze bengezelele isono phezu kwesono." 
Isaiah30:2 Abahamba ukwehlela eGibhithe, njalo bengabuzanga umlomo wami, ukuze baziqinise emandleni kaFaro, bathembele emthunzini weGibhithe!" 
Isaiah30:3 Ngakho amandla kaFaro azakuba yinhloni kini, lokuthembela emthunzini weGibhithe kube yikuyangeka." 
Isaiah30:4 Ngoba iziphathamandla zakhe zaziseZowani lezithunywa zakhe zafika eHanesi. 
Isaiah30:5 Bonke izabayangisa ngabantu ababengelakubasiza, bangabi luncedo njalo bangabi yinzuzo, kodwa babe luyangiso njalo babe lihlazo." 
Isaiah30:6 Umthwalo wezilo zeningizimu. Elizweni lokucindezelwa lembandezelo, lapho okuvela khona ibhongo lesilwane, ibululu lenyoka ephaphayo elokutshisa, bathwala inotho yabo emhlane wamathole abobabhemi, lokuligugu kwabo phezu kwamalunda amakamela, bekusa ebantwini abangelasizo." 
Isaiah30:7 Ngoba amaGibhithe azasiza ngeze langokungelalutho; ngakho ngakhala ngalokhu ngathi: Amandla abo yikuhlala bathule. 
Isaiah30:8 Khathesi hamba, ukubhale phambi kwabo esibhebheni, ukulobe ngokugubha egwalweni, ukuze kube khona kuze kube lusuku lokucina, kuze kube laphakade." 
Isaiah30:9 Ngoba bangabantu abavukelayo, abantwana abaqamba amanga, abantwana abangathandi ukuzwa umlayo we Nkosi;" 
Isaiah30:10 abathi kubaboni: Lingaboni; lakubakhangeli: Lingasikhangeleli izinto eziqondileyo; khulumani kithi izinto ezibutshelezi, likhangele izinkohliso," 
Isaiah30:11 phumani endleleni, liphambuke lisuke emkhondweni, lisuse oNgcwele kaIsrayeli phambi kwethu." 
Isaiah30:12 Ngakho utsho njalo oNgcwele kaIsrayeli uthi: Ngoba lidelele lelilizwi, lathembela kucindezelo lokuphambeneyo, labambelela kukho." 
Isaiah30:13 Ngakho lobububi buzakuba kini njengomkenke osuzakuwa, ukhukhumala emdulini omude, okudilika kwawo kuhle kufike masinyazane." 
Isaiah30:14 Yebo, uzawephula njengokwephulwa kwembiza yababumbi ephahaziweyo; kayikuyekela, ukuze kungatholakali ezicucwini zayo udengezi lokokha umlilo eziko, kumbe ukukha amanzi emthonjeni." 
Isaiah30:15 Ngoba itsho njalo iNkosi uJehova, oNgcwele kaIsrayeli: Ngokuphenduka lokuphumula lizasindiswa; ngokuthula langokwethemba kuzakuba ngamandla enu; kodwa kalifunanga." 
Isaiah30:16 Kodwa lathi: Hatshi, ngoba sizabaleka ngamabhiza; ngakho-ke lizabaleka; njalo: Sizagada amabhiza alejubane; ngakho-ke abalixotshayo bazakuba lejubane." 
Isaiah30:17 Inkulungwane eyodwa izabaleka ngokukhalima koyedwa; ngokukhalima kwabahlanu lizabaleka, lize lisale njengensika phezu kwengqonga yentaba, lanjengesiboniso phezu koqaqa." 
Isaiah30:18 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi izalinda, ukuze ibe lomusa kini, ngakho-ke izaphakanyiswa ukuthi ibe lesihawu kini; ngoba i Nkosi ing uNkulunkulu wesahlulelo; babusisiwe bonke abalindela kuyo." 
Isaiah30:19 Ngoba abantu bazahlala eZiyoni eJerusalema: kaliyikukhala lokukhala inyembezi; izakuba lomusa omkhulu kuwe elizwini lokukhala kwakho; lapho isizwa lona, izakuphendula." 
Isaiah30:20 Loba iNkosi ilinika isinkwa sosizi lamanzi okuhlupheka, kanti abafundisi bakho kabasayikususelwa engonsini, kodwa amehlo akho azabona abafundisi bakho." 
Isaiah30:21 Lendlebe zakho zizakuzwa ilizwi emva kwakho lisithi: Le yiyo indlela, hambani ngayo, lapho liphambukela ngakwesokunene lalapho liphambukela ngakwesokhohlo." 
Isaiah30:22 Lizangcolisa lokunanyekiweyo kwezithombe zakho ezibaziweyo zesiliva, lokunanyekiweyo kwezithombe zakho zegolide ezibunjwe ngokuncibilikisa; lizihlakaze njengelembu losesikhathini, lithi kuzo: Phumani!" 
Isaiah30:23 Khona izanika izulu lenhlanyelo yakho ozayihlanyela emhlabathini, lesinkwa sesivuno somhlaba; uzavunda ucicime. Ngalolosuku izifuyo zenu zizakudla emadlelweni abanzi;" 
Isaiah30:24 lezinkabi labobabhemi abatsha okulima umhlabathi kuzakudla umcantsha, oweliweyo ngefotsholo langefologwe." 
Isaiah30:25 Laphezu kwayo yonke intaba ende laphezu kwalo lonke uqaqa oluphakemeyo kuzakuba lemifula le zifudlana zamanzi ngosuku lokubulawa okukhulu, lapho kusiwa imiphotshongo." 
Isaiah30:26 Futhi ukukhanya kwenyanga kuzakuba njengokukhanya kwelanga, lokukhanya kwelanga kuphindwe kasikhombisa, njengokukhanya kwensuku eziyisikhombisa, mhla i Nkosi ibopha ukwephuka kwabantu bayo, ipholisa umvimvinya wesilonda sabo." 
Isaiah30:27 Khangela, ibizo le Nkosi livela khatshana, livutha ulaka lwayo, lomthwalo walo unzima; indebe zayo zigcwele intukuthelo lolimi lwayo lunjengomlilo oqothulayo;" 
Isaiah30:28 lokuphefumula kwayo kunjengesifula esiphuphumayo size sifike phakathi kwentamo, ukuhlungula izizwe ngesihlungulo sobuze; njalo kuzaba letomu eliduhisayo emihlathini yabantu." 
Isaiah30:29 Lizakuba lengoma, njengeyobusuku bokwehlukaniswa komkhosi, lokuthokoza kwenhliziyo, njengohamba lomhubhe esiya entabeni ye Nkosi, eDwaleni lakoIsrayeli." 
Isaiah30:30 I Nkosi izazwakalisa-ke ilizwi layo elilodumo, ibonakalise ukwehla kwengalo yayo, ngentukuthelo yolaka, lelangabi lomlilo oqothulayo, isivunguvungu, lezulu lesiphepho, langesiqhotho." 
Isaiah30:31 Ngoba ngelizwi le Nkosi amaAsiriya azaphahlazwa, itshaya ngenduku." 
Isaiah30:32 Kuzakuthi yonke indawo okwedlula khona induku emisiweyo, i Nkosi eyibeka phezu kwayo, kube ngezigubhu langamachacho, langezimpi zokunyikinya ilwe labo." 
Isaiah30:33 Ngoba iThofethi yahlelwa endulo, layo yamiselwa inkosi; yayenza yatshona, yaba banzi, inqumbi yayo ingumlilo lenkuni ezinengi; ukuphefumula kwe Nkosi kuyayithungela njengesifula sesolufa*." 
Isaiah31:1 Maye kulabo abehlela usizo eGibhithe, abeyama emabhizeni, bethemba izinqola ngoba zizinengi, labagadi bamabhiza ngoba belamandla kakhulu, kodwa bengakhangeli koNgcwele kaIsrayeli, njalo bengadingi i Nkosi!" 
Isaiah31:2 Kanti layo ihlakaniphile, izaletha ububi, njalo kayiyikuwabuyisa amazwi ayo; kodwa izavukela indlu yabenzi bobubi, njalo imelene losizo lwabenzi beziphambeko." 
Isaiah31:3 Ngoba amaGibhithe angabantu, kabasuNkulunkulu, lamabhiza awo ayinyama, kawasimoya. Lapho i Nkosi izakwelula isandla sayo, osizayo uzakhubeka losizwayo uzakuwa phansi, njalo baphele kanyekanye." 
Isaiah31:4 Ngoba i Nkosi itsho njalo kimi: Njengesilwane lebhongo lesilwane kubhongela phezu kwempango yakho, lapho ixuku labelusi libizelwe ukumelana laso, kasiyikwesaba ilizwi labo, njalo kasiyikuzithoba ngenxa yomsindo wabo; ngokunjalo i Nkosi yamabandla izakwehla ukulwela intaba yeZiyoni loqaqa lwayo." 
Isaiah31:5 Njengenyoni eziphaphayo, ngokunjalo i Nkosi yamabandla izavikela iJerusalema; ivikela, iza y ophula; isedlula, iyikhulule." 
Isaiah31:6 Phendukelani ku yo abantwana bakoIsrayeli abahlubuke ngokujulileyo kuyo. 
Isaiah31:7 Ngoba ngalolosuku bazalahla, wonke umuntu izithombe zakhe zesiliva lezithombe zakhe zegolide, ozandla zenu zilenzele zona ukuba yisono." 
Isaiah31:8 ISiriya izakuwa-ke ngenkemba engeyisiyo yomuntu olamandla, lenkemba engeyisiyo yomuntukazana izayiqeda; kodwa izabalekela inkemba, kuthi amajaha ayo abe yizibhalwa." 
Isaiah31:9 Izakwedlulela edwaleni layo ngokwesaba, leziphathamandla zayo zesabe uphawu, itsho i Nkosi, omlilo wayo useZiyoni, lesithando sayo siseJerusalema." 
Isaiah32:1 Khangela, inkosi izabusa ngokulunga, leziphathamandla zibuse ngesahlulelo." 
Isaiah32:2 Lomuntu uzakuba njengendawo yokucatshela umoya lesivikelo kuzulu lesiphepho; njengemifula yamanzi endaweni eyomileyo, njengomthunzi wedwala elikhulu elizweni elomileyo." 
Isaiah32:3 Lamehlo alabo ababonayo kawayikufiphala, lezindlebe zalabo abezwayo zizalalela." 
Isaiah32:4 Inhliziyo yabalamawala layo izaqedisisa ulwazi, lolimi lwabagagasayo luzaphangisa ukukhuluma ngokucaca." 
Isaiah32:5 Isithutha kasisayikubizwa ngokuthi sihloniphekile, loncitshanayo angathiwa uyaphana." 
Isaiah32:6 Ngoba isithutha sikhuluma ubuthutha, lenhliziyo yaso isebenze okubi, ukwenza ubuzenzisi, lokukhuluma okuphambeneyo nge Nkosi, ukwenza umphefumulo wolambileyo ube ze, senze kusweleke okunathwayo kowomileyo." 
Isaiah32:7 Izikhali zoncitshanayo lazo zimbi; yena uceba amacebo akhohlakeleyo ukuze achithe abayanga ngamazwi amanga, lanxa oswelayo ekhuluma okulungileyo." 
Isaiah32:8 Kodwa ohloniphekayo uceba izinto ezihloniphekayo; langezinto ezihloniphekayo yena uzakuma. 
Isaiah32:9 Vukani, besifazana abonwabileyo, lizwe ilizwi lami; madodakazi avikelekileyo, bekani indlebe ekukhulumeni kwami." 
Isaiah32:10 Izinsuku ezedlula umnyaka lizathuthumela, besifazana abavikelekileyo, ngoba ukuvunwa kwevini kuzaphela, ukubutha kakuyikufika." 
Isaiah32:11 Thuthumelani, besifazana abonwabileyo, liqhuqhe, bavikelekileyo; khululani, lizinqunule, libhince amalembu amasaka enkalweni." 
Isaiah32:12 Bazakhalela amabele okumunya, amasimu amahle, isivini esithelayo." 
Isaiah32:13 Phezu komhlabathi wabantu bami kuzakhula ameva lo khula oluhlabayo; yebo, phezu kwezindlu zonke zenjabulo, e mzi ni wentokozo." 
Isaiah32:14 Ngoba isigodlo sizadelwa, inengi lomuzi lizatshiywa; inqaba lemiphotshongo kuzakuba yimihome kuze kube phakade, intokozo yabobabhemi beganga, amadlelo emihlambi;" 
Isaiah32:15 aze athululelwe phezu kwethu uMoya evela phezulu, lenkangala ibe yinsimu ethelayo, lensimu ethelayo ithiwe lihlathi." 
Isaiah32:16 Khona isahlulelo sizahlala enkangala, lokulunga kuhlale ensimini ethelayo." 
Isaiah32:17 Lomsebenzi wokulunga uzakuba yikuthula, lesilandelamuva sokulunga yikuthula lokuqinisekiswa kube nininini." 
Isaiah32:18 Labantu bami bazahlala endaweni yokuhlala elokuthula, lezindaweni zokuhlala ezivikelekileyo, lezindaweni zokuphumula ezonwabileyo." 
Isaiah32:19 Lapho lisina ngesiqhotho ekwehleni kwehlathi, lomuzi uzathotshiswa endaweni ephansi." 
Isaiah32:20 Libusisiwe lina elihlanyela ngasemanzini wonke, lithumezela lapho inyawo zezinkabi labobabhemi." 
Isaiah33:1 Maye kuwe ochithayo, kodwa ungachithwanga! Lowenza ngenkohliso, bengenzanga ngenkohliso kuwe! Lapho usuqedile ukuchitha, uzachithwa; lapho usucinile ukwenza ngenkohliso, bazakukhohlisa." 
Isaiah33:2 Nkosi, woba lomusa kithi, sikulindele; woba yingalo yabo ekuseni konke, losindiso lwethu ngesikhathi socindezelo." 
Isaiah33:3 Emsindweni wokuhlokoma abantu babaleka; ekuziphakamiseni kwakho izizwe zahlakazeka. 
Isaiah33:4 Lempango yenu izabuthwa njengo kubutha kwecimbi, njengokugijima kwentethe uzagijima phezu kwayo." 
Isaiah33:5 I Nkosi iphakeme, ngoba ihlala phezulu; igcwalise iZiyoni ngesahlulelo langokulunga," 
Isaiah33:6 lenhlakanipho lolwazi kuzakuba yikuqina kwezikhathi zakho, amandla ezinsindiso; ukwesaba i Nkosi kuligugu lakhe." 
Isaiah33:7 Khangela, amaqhawe abo azakhala ngaphandle; izithunywa zokuthula zizakhala inyembezi ngokubabayo." 
Isaiah33:8 Imigwaqo emikhulu ize, owedlula ngendlela kakho; wephule isivumelwano, udelele imizi, kananzi muntu." 
Isaiah33:9 Ilizwe liyalila lidangele; iLebhanoni ilenhloni iyabuna; iSharoni injengenkangala; njalo iBashani leKharmeli kuyakhithiza. 
Isaiah33:10 Khathesi ngizavuka, kutsho i Nkosi; khathesi ngizadunyiswa; khathesi ngizaphakanyiswa." 
Isaiah33:11 Lizakhulelwa ngamakhoba, beselizala izibi; umoya wenu, njengo mlilo ozaliqeda." 
Isaiah33:12 Njalo abantu bazakuba njengo kutshisiweyo kwekalaga; njeng ameva aqunyiweyo bazatshiswa emlilweni. 
Isaiah33:13 Zwanini, lina eli khatshana, engikwenzileyo; lani eliseduze, vumani amandla ami." 
Isaiah33:14 Izoni zeZiyoni ziyesaba, ukuthuthumela kubabambile abazenzisi. Ngubani phakathi kwethu ongahlala lomlilo oqothulayo? Ngubani phakathi kwethu ongahlala lokutshisa okulaphakade?" 
Isaiah33:15 Yena ohamba ngokulunga, akhulume ngobuqotho, odelela inzuzo yezincindezelo, othintitha izandla zakhe ekubambeni isivalamlomo, ovala indlebe yakhe ekuzweni ngegazi, ocimeza amehlo akhe ukuze angaboni okubi;" 
Isaiah33:16 yena uzahlala ezindaweni eziphakemeyo; izinqaba zamadwala zibe yesivikelo sakhe; isinkwa sakhe asinikwe; amanzi akhe athembeke. 
Isaiah33:17 Amehlo akho azabona iNkosi ebuhleni bayo; abone ilizwe elikhatshana kakhulu. 
Isaiah33:18 Inhliziyo yakho izazindla ngokwesabisa. Ungaphi umbhali? Ungaphi umlinganisi? Ungaphi obala imiphotshongo? 
Isaiah33:19 Kawuyikubona abantu abayiziqholo; abantu abenkulumo ejule okokuthi ungeyizwisise, abolimi olugagasayo ongeluqedisise." 
Isaiah33:20 Khangela iZiyoni, umuzi wemikhosi yethu emisiweyo; amehlo akho abone iJerusalema, indawo yokuhlala elokonwaba, ithente elingayikusuka, ozikhonkwane zalo esizasitshulwa phakade, kakuyikuqamuka leyodwa yezintambo zalo." 
Isaiah33:21 Kodwa lapho i Nkosi izakuba ngelobukhosi kithi, indawo yemifula, yezifula ezibanzi; umkolo olamaphini okugwedla ongahambi khona, lomkhumbi olamandla ongedluli khona." 
Isaiah33:22 Ngoba uJehova ungumahluleli wethu, uJehova ungumnikimthetho wethu, uJehova uyinkosi yethu, yena uzasisindisa." 
Isaiah33:23 Ingoda zakho ziyaxega; kaziyikuqinisa iqonde insika yazo yomkolo, zingeyelule iseyili; khona kuzakwabiwa impango yempango enengi, abaqhulayo baphange impango." 
Isaiah33:24 Lomhlali kayikuthi: Ngiyagula. Abantu abahlala khona bazathethelelwa iziphambeko. 
Isaiah34:1 Sondelani, zizwe, ukuze lizwe; lani bantu, lilalele; umhlaba kawuzwe, lokugcwala kwawo; ilizwe, lakho konke okuvela kilo." 
Isaiah34:2 Ngoba intukuthelo ye Nkosi iphezu kwazo zonke izizwe, lolaka lwayo phezu kwawo wonke amabutho azo; izitshabalalisile, izinikele ekubulaweni." 
Isaiah34:3 Ababuleweyo bazo labo bazaphoselwa phandle, levumba labo lizakwenyuka ezidunjini zabo, lezintaba zizancibilika ngegazi labo." 
Isaiah34:4 Lalo lonke ibutho lamazulu lizabola; lamazulu agoqwe njengomqulu; lalo lonke ibutho labo liwele phansi, njengehlamvu liwohloka evinini, lanjengo mkhiwa owohlokayo esihlahleni somkhiwa." 
Isaiah34:5 Ngoba inkemba yami izacwila emazulwini; khangela, izakwehlela phezu kukaEdoma laphezu kwabantu bokutshabalalisa kwami ngesigwebo." 
Isaiah34:6 Inkemba ye Nkosi igcwele igazi, inoniswe ngamafutha, ngegazi lamawundlu lelezimbuzi, ngamahwahwa ezinso zezinqama: ngoba i Nkosi ilomhlatshelo eBozira, lokubulala okukhulu elizweni leEdoma." 
Isaiah34:7 Lezinyathi zizakwehla kanye lazo, lamajongosi kanye lezinkunzi. Njalo ilizwe labo lizacwila egazini, lothuli lwabo lunoniswe ngamahwahwa." 
Isaiah34:8 Ngoba kulusuku lwempindiselo ye Nkosi, umnyaka wokubuyiselwa kwempikiswano yeZiyoni." 
Isaiah34:9 Lezifula zabo zizaphendulwa zibe yingcino, lothuli lwabo lube yisibabule; lelizwe labo lizakuba yingcino etshayo." 
Isaiah34:10 Kaliyikucitshwa ubusuku lemini; intuthu yalo izakwenyuka laphakade: kusukela esizukulwaneni kusiya kusizukulwana lizakuba yinkangala; kakho ozadabula phakathi kwalo kuze kube nini lanini. 
Isaiah34:11 Kodwa iwunkwe lenhloni kuzakudla ilifa lalo; isikhova laso lewabayi kuzahlala kulo. Njalo izakwelula phezu kwalo intambo yencithakalo, lamatshe onxiwa." 
Isaiah34:12 Bazabizela izikhulu zalo embusweni, kodwa kakho ozakuba khona, leziphathamandla zalo zonke zizakuba yinto engelutho." 
Isaiah34:13 Lameva azakhula ezigodlweni zalo, imbabazane lokhula oluhlabayo ezinqabeni zalo; njalo libe yindawo yokuhlala yamakhanka, lomuzi wamadodakazi ezintshe." 
Isaiah34:14 Izilo zenkangala lazo zizahlangana lezilo ezihlaba umkhulungwane, legogo lizakhalela umngane walo; lesikhova esikhalayo sizaphumula khona, sizitholele indawo yokuphumula." 
Isaiah34:15 Lapho isikhova esikhulu sizakwakha isidleke, sibekele, sichamisele, sifukamele ngaphansi komthunzi waso; amanqe lawo azabuthana lapho, yilelo lalelo lomngane walo." 
Isaiah34:16 Dingani egwalweni lwe Nkosi, lifunde; kakukho lokukodwa kwalokhu okuzasilela, kakukho okuzaswela umngane wakho; ngoba umlomo wami ngokwawo ulayile, lomoya wayo ngokwawo ukubuthanisile." 
Isaiah34:17 Ngoba yona ibenzele inkatho yokuphosa, lesandla sayo sibehlukanisele ngentambo; lizakuba yilifa labo kuze kube phakade, kusukela kusizukulwana kuze kube sesizukulwaneni bazahlala kulo." 
Isaiah35:1 Inkangala legwadule kuzajabula; lehlane ithokoze, ikhahlele njengerosi," 
Isaiah35:2 ikhahlele kakhulu, ithokoze langentokozo lokuhlabelela. Inkazimulo yeLebhanoni izayinikwa, ubuhle beKharmeli leSharoni; khona kuzabona inkazimulo ye Nkosi, ubukhosi bukaNkulunkulu wethu." 
Isaiah35:3 Qinisani izandla ezibuthakathaka, liqinise amadolo axegayo." 
Isaiah35:4 Tshonini kwabalenhliziyo ephangisayo lithi: Qinani, lingesabi. Khangelani, uNkulunkulu wenu uzakuza ngempindiselo, uNkulunkulu elomvuzo; yena uzakuza alisindise." 
Isaiah35:5 Khona amehlo eziphofu azavuleka, lezindlebe zezacuthe zivuleke." 
Isaiah35:6 Khona oqhulayo ezakweqa njengendluzele, lolimi lwesimungulu luhlabelele; ngoba amanzi azaqhekezeka endaweni elugwadule, lezifula enkangala." 
Isaiah35:7 Lomhlabathi otshileyo uzakuba lixhaphozi, lomhlabathi owomileyo ube yimithombo yamanzi. Endaweni yokuhlala amakhanka, endaweni yalo yokulala, kube lotshani lemihlanga lebhuma." 
Isaiah35:8 Kuzakuba lomgwaqo omkhulu khona, lendlela, ezathiwa yindlela yobungcwele; ongcolileyo kayikudlula kuyo, kodwa izakuba ngeyalowo; abahambayo, loba beyizithutha, kabayikulahleka." 
Isaiah35:9 Kakuyikuba khona isilwane lapho, lesilo esiphangayo kasiyikwenyuka phezu kwayo, kasiyikutholwa lapho; kodwa abahlengiweyo bazahamba ngayo." 
Isaiah35:10 Njalo abenzelwe inhlawulo yokuthula be Nkosi bazabuyela, bafike eZiyoni ngengoma, lentokozo ephakade phezu kwekhanda labo; bazazuza intokozo lenjabulo, kubaleke-ke usizi lokububula." 
Isaiah36:1 Kwasekusithi ngomnyaka wetshumi lane wenkosi uHezekhiya, uSenakheribi inkosi yeAsiriya wenyuka wamelana lemizi yonke evikelweyo yakoJuda, wayithatha." 
Isaiah36:2 Njalo inkosi yeAsiriya yathuma uRabi-Shake esuka eLakishi esiya eJerusalema enkosini uHezekhiya lebutho elinzima. Wasesima emfolweni wechibi elingaphezulu, emgwaqweni omkhulu wensimu yomwatshi." 
Isaiah36:3 Kwasekuphumela kuye uEliyakhimi, indodana kaHilikhiya, owayephezu kwendlu, loShebina umbhali, loJowa indodana kaAsafi umabhalane." 
Isaiah36:4 URabi-Shake wasesithi kubo: Tshonini khathesi kuHezekhiya ukuthi: Itsho njalo inkosi enkulu, inkosi yeAsiriya: Lithemba bani leli othembele kulo?" 
Isaiah36:5 Ngithi (kodwa yilizwi lendebe): Kuleseluleko lamandla empi. Khathesi uthembele kubani ukuthi ungivukele? 
Isaiah36:6 Khangela, uthembele kololudondolo lwalo umhlanga owephukileyo, kulo iGibhithe, okuthi uba umuntu eseyama kulo, luzangena esandleni sakhe lusihlabe. Unjalo uFaro inkosi yeGibhithe kubo bonke abathembela kuye." 
Isaiah36:7 Kodwa uba usithi kimi: Sithembela e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wethu; kakusuye yini ozindawo zakhe eziphakemeyo lamalathi akhe uHezekhiya akususileyo, wathi kuJuda leJerusalema: Lizakhonza phambi kwaleli ilathi?" 
Isaiah36:8 Ngakho-ke ake unike isibambiso enkosini yami, inkosi yeAsiriya; njalo ngizakunika amabhiza azinkulungwane ezimbili, uba wena ulakho ukubeka abagadi bamabhiza phezu kwawo." 
Isaiah36:9 Uzabuyisela njani-ke emuva ubuso bombusi oyedwa wabancinyane bezinceku zenkosi yami, wena-ke uthembela eGibhithe usenzela izinqola labagadi bamabhiza?" 
Isaiah36:10 Khathesi sengenyukile yini ngingela Nkosi ngimelene lalelilizwe ukulichitha? I Nkosi yathi kimi: Yenyuka umelene lalelilizwe, ulichithe." 
Isaiah36:11 UEIiyakimi loShebina loJowa basebesithi kuRabi-Shake: Ake ukhulume lenceku zakho ngesiSiriya, ngoba siyasiqedisisa; ungakhulumi lathi ngesiJuda, endlebeni zabantu abasemdulini." 
Isaiah36:12 Kodwa uRabi-Shake wathi: Inkosi yami ingithume enkosini yakho lakuwe yini ukukhuluma lamazwi? Kakusebantwini yini abahlezi phezu komduli ukuze badle ubulongwe babo, banathe umchamo wabo kanye lani?" 
Isaiah36:13 URabi-Shake wema-ke, wamemeza ngelizwi elikhulu ngesiJuda, wathi: Zwanini amazwi enkosi enkulu, inkosi yeAsiriya." 
Isaiah36:14 Itsho njalo inkosi: UHezekhiya kangalikhohlisi, ngoba kayikuba lakho ukulikhulula;" 
Isaiah36:15 Futhi uHezekhiya angalenzi lithembele e Nkosi ni, esithi: INkosi izasikhulula lokusikhulula; lumuzi kawuyikunikelwa esandleni senkosi yeAsiriya." 
Isaiah36:16 Lingamlaleli uHezekhiya, ngoba itsho njalo inkosi yeAsiriya: Sebenzelanani lami ngesipho, liphume lize kimi; lidle ngulowo lalowo okwevini lakhe, lalowo lalowo okomkhiwa wakhe, linathe ngulowo lalowo amanzi omthombo wakhe;" 
Isaiah36:17 ngize ngifike, ngilithathe, ngilise elizweni elifanana lelizwe lenu, ilizwe lamabele lewayini elitsha, ilizwe lesinkwa lezivini." 
Isaiah36:18 UHezekhiya kangalincengi esithi: I Nkosi izasikhulula. Onkulunkulu bezizwe bakhulule yini, ngulowo lalowo ilizwe lakhe, esandleni samakhosi eAsiriya?" 
Isaiah36:19 Bangaphi onkulunkulu beHamathi leArpadi? Bangaphi onkulunkulu beSefavayimi? Bayikhulule yini layo iSamariya esandleni sami? 
Isaiah36:20 Ngobani phakathi kwabo bonke onkulunkulu balawomazwe abakhulule ilizwe labo esandleni sami, ukuthi i Nkosi ikhulule iJerusalema esandleni sami?" 
Isaiah36:21 Kodwa bathula, kabaze bamphendula lizwi, ngoba umlayo wenkosi wawuyikuthi: Lingamphenduli." 
Isaiah36:22 Kwasekufika uEliyakhimi, indodana kaHilikhiya, owayephezu kwendlu, loShebina umbhali, loJowa indodana kaAsafi, umabhalane, kuHezekhiya, izigqoko zabo zidatshuliwe, bamtshela amazwi kaRabi-Shake." 
Isaiah37:1 Kwasekusithi inkosi uHezekhiya isi ku zwile, yadabula izigqoko zayo, yazembesa ngelembu lesaka, yangena endlini ye Nkosi." 
Isaiah37:2 Yasithuma uEliyakhimi owayephezu kwendlu, loShebina umabhalane, labadala babapristi bembethe amalembu amasaka, kuIsaya umprofethi indodana kaAmozi." 
Isaiah37:3 Basebesithi kuye: Utsho njalo UHezekhiya: Lolusuku lusuku lohlupho lolokusolwa lolokweyiswa, ngoba abantwana sebefikile ekuzalweni, kanti akulamandla okubeletha." 
Isaiah37:4 Mhlawumbe i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, izawezwa amazwi kaRabi-Shake, onkosi yeAsiriya, inkosi yakhe, emthume ukuthuka uNkulunkulu ophilayo, lokusola ngamazwi i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho ewazwileyo. Ngakho phakamisa umkhuleko ngensali etholakeleyo." 
Isaiah37:5 Ngakho inceku zenkosi uHezekhiya zafika kuIsaya. 
Isaiah37:6 UIsaya wasesithi kuzo: Lizakutsho njalo enkosini yenu: Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Ungesabi amazwi owezwileyo, inceku zenkosi yeAsiriya ezingithuke ngawo." 
Isaiah37:7 Khangela, ngizafaka umoya kuyo, njalo izakuzwa ihungahunga, ibuyele elizweni layo; njalo ngizayenza ukuthi iwe ngenkemba elizweni layo." 
Isaiah37:8 URabi-Shake wasebuyela, wafica inkosi yeAsiriya isilwa imelene leLibhina; ngoba wayezwile ukuthi isisukile eLakishi." 
Isaiah37:9 Wasesizwa ngoTirihaka inkosi yeEtiyopiya kuthiwa: Uphumile uku za kulwa lawe. Esekuzwile wathuma izithunywa kuHezekhiya esithi: 
Isaiah37:10 Lizakhuluma kanje kuHezekhiya inkosi yakoJuda: UNkulunkulu wakho othembele kuye kangakukhohlisi esithi: IJerusalema kayiyikunikelwa esandleni senkosi yeAsiriya. 
Isaiah37:11 Khangela, wena usuzwile ukuthi amakhosi eAsiriya enzeni kuwo wonke amazwe ngokuwatshabalalisa. Wena-ke uzakhululwa yini?" 
Isaiah37:12 Onkulunkulu bezizwe bazikhulula yini obaba abazichithayo, iGozani leHarani leRezefi, labantwana beEdeni ababeseTelasari?" 
Isaiah37:13 Ingaphi inkosi yeHamathi, lenkosi yeArpadi, lenkosi yomuzi weSefavayimi, iHena, leIva?" 
Isaiah37:14 UHezekhiya wasesemukela izincwadi esandleni sezithunywa, wazifunda, wasesenyukela endlini ye Nkosi, uHezekhiya wazichaya phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Isaiah37:15 UHezekhiya wasekhuleka e Nkosi ni, esithi:" 
Isaiah37:16 Nkosi yamabandla, Nkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ohlala phakathi kwamakherubi*, nguwe wedwa onguNkulunkulu wayo yonke imibuso yomhlaba; wena wenzile amazulu lomhlaba." 
Isaiah37:17 Thoba indlebe yakho, Nkosi, uzwe, vula amehlo akho, Nkosi, ubone; uzwe amazwi wonke kaSenakheribi awathumele ukuklolodela uNkulunkulu ophilayo." 
Isaiah37:18 Isibili, Nkosi, amakhosi eAsiriya achithile zonke izizwe lamazwe azo;" 
Isaiah37:19 aphosela onkulunkulu bazo emlilweni, ngoba babengesibo onkulunkulu, kodwa umsebenzi wezandla zabantu, izigodo lamatshe; ngalokho bababhubhisa." 
Isaiah37:20 Ngakho-ke, Nkosi Nkulunkulu wethu, sisindise esandleni sakhe, ukuze yonke imibuso yomhlaba yazi ukuthi wena wedwa uyi Nkosi." 
Isaiah37:21 UIsaya indodana kaAmozi wasethumela kuHezekhiya, esithi: Itsho njalo I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli: Ngenxa yokuthi ukhuleke kimi ngoSenakheribi inkosi yeAsiriya," 
Isaiah37:22 leli yilizwi i Nkosi elikhulume ngaye: Intombi emsulwa, indodakazi yeZiyoni ikudelele, yakuklolodela; indodakazi yeJerusalema inikine ikhanda layo ngemva kwakho." 
Isaiah37:23 Uklolodele bani wamthuka? Uphakamisele bani ilizwi, waphakamisela amehlo akho phezulu? Umelene loNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah37:24 Uklolodele iNkosi ngesandla sezinceku zakho, wathi: Ngobunengi bezinqola zami mina ngenyukele endaweni ephakemeyo yezintaba, ezinhlangothini zeLebhanoni. Njalo ngizagamula imisedari yayo emide, ikhethelo lezihlahla zamafiri ayo, ngingene ekuphakameni kwemingcele yayo, igusu leKharmeli layo." 
Isaiah37:25 Mina ngigebhe, nganatha amanzi, langengaphansi yenyawo zami ngomisa yonke imifula yezindawo ezivinjelweyo." 
Isaiah37:26 Kawuzwanga yini endulo, ukuthi ngakwenza, ensukwini zendulo, ukuthi ngakubumba? Khathesi sengikwenze kwenzakala, ukuthi ube ngowokudiliza imizi evikelweyo ibe zinqumbi zamanxiwa." 
Isaiah37:27 Ngakho abahlali bayo babe babelesandla esifitshane, besaba babe lenhloni, baba njeng otshani beganga, lemibhida eluhlaza, utshani obuphezu kwezindlu, lamabele atshazwe engakakhuliyo." 
Isaiah37:28 Kodwa ngiyakwazi ukuhlala kwakho, lokuphuma kwakho, lokungena kwakho, lokungithukuthelela kwakho." 
Isaiah37:29 Ngoba ukungithukuthelela kwakho, lokuziqakisa kwakho kwenyukele endlebeni zami, ngakho ngizakufaka umkhala wami emakhaleni akho, letomu lami endebeni zakho, ngikubuyisele ngendlela oweza ngayo." 
Isaiah37:30 Lokhu kuzakuba yisibonakaliso kuwe; lonyaka uzakudla okuzikhulelayo; langomnyaka wesibili umkhukhuzela; kuthi ngomnyaka wesithathu lihlanyele, livune, lihlanyele izivini lidle izithelo zazo." 
Isaiah37:31 Lokuphephileyo kwendlu yakoJuda okuseleyo kuzaphinda kugxumeke impande phansi, kuthele izithelo phezulu." 
Isaiah37:32 Ngoba kuzaphuma eJerusalema insali, lokuphephileyo entabeni yeZiyoni. Ukutshiseka kwe Nkosi yamabandla kuzakwenza lokhu." 
Isaiah37:33 Ngakho itsho njalo i Nkosi ngenkosi yeAsiriya: Kayiyikungena kulumuzi, kayiyikutshoka umtshoko khona, kayiyikuza phambi kwawo ile sihlangu, kayiyikubuthelela idundulu maqondana lawo." 
Isaiah37:34 Ngendlela eyeza ngayo, ngayo izabuyela, kayiyikungena kulo umuzi, itsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah37:35 Ngoba ngizawuvikela lumuzi ngiwusindise ngenxa yami, langenxa kaDavida inceku yami." 
Isaiah37:36 Khona kwaphuma ingilosi ye Nkosi, yatshaya enkambeni yamaAsiriya abazinkulungwane ezilikhulu lamatshumi ayisificaminwembili lanhlanu. Kwathi bevuka ekuseni kakhulu, khangela-ke, bonke babeyizidumbu ezifileyo." 
Isaiah37:37 Ngakho uSenakheribi inkosi yeAsiriya wasuka, wahamba ebuyela, wahlala eNineve." 
Isaiah37:38 Kwasekusithi ekhonza endlini kaNisiroki unkulunkulu wakhe, oAdrameleki loSharezeri amadodana akhe bamtshaya ngenkemba, bona baphephela elizweni leArarathi; uEsarihadoni indodana yakhe wasebusa esikhundleni sakhe." 
Isaiah38:1 Ngalezonsuku uHezekhiya wagula waphos’ukufa. UIsaya indodana kaAmozi umprofethi wasefika kuye, wathi kuye: Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Layezela indlu yakho, ngoba uzakufa, kawuyikuphila." 
Isaiah38:2 UHezekhiya wasephendulela ubuso bakhe ngasemdulini, wakhuleka e Nkosi ni," 
Isaiah38:3 wasesithi: Ngiyakuncenga, Nkosi, ake ukhumbule, ukuthi ngihambe phambi kwakho ngobuqotho langenhliziyo epheleleyo, ngenza okulungileyo emehlweni akho. UHezekhiya wasekhala inyembezi ngokukhala okukhulu." 
Isaiah38:4 Kwasekufika ilizwi le Nkosi kuIsaya, lisithi:" 
Isaiah38:5 Hamba, uthi kuHezekhiya: Itsho njalo i Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaDavida uyihlo: Ngiwuzwile umkhuleko wakho, ngibonile inyembezi zakho; khangela, ngizakwengezelela iminyaka elitshumi lanhlanu ensukwini zakho," 
Isaiah38:6 ngikukhulule wena lalumuzi esandleni senkosi yeAsiriya, ngiwuvikele lumuzi." 
Isaiah38:7 Lalesi yisibonakaliso kuwe esivela e Nkosi ni, esokuthi i Nkosi izayenza le into eyikhulumileyo." 
Isaiah38:8 Khangela, ngizabuyisela emuva isithunzi sezinyathelo esesehlile ezinyathelweni zikaAhazi zelanga, izinyathelo ezilitshumi emuva. Ilanga laselibuyela emuva izinyathelo ezilitshumi, ngezinyathelo elalehle ngazo." 
Isaiah38:9 Umbhalo kaHezekhiya inkosi yakoJuda lapho egula, esesile emkhuhlaneni wakhe." 
Isaiah38:10 Mina ngathi: Ekuqunyweni kwezinsuku zami ngizakuya emasangweni engcwaba; ngemukwe insali yeminyaka yami. 
Isaiah38:11 Ngathi: Kangiyikubona uJehova, uJehova elizweni labaphilayo; kangisayikubona muntu labahlali bomhlaba." 
Isaiah38:12 Isizukulwana sami sesisukile, sasuswa kimi njengethente lomelusi; ngiqume impilo yami njengomeluki; uzangiquma njengomkhuhlane ocikizayo; kusukela emini kuze kube sebusuku uzangiqeda." 
Isaiah38:13 Ngabalisa kwaze kwaba sekuseni; njengesilwane, ngokunjalo uzakwephula amathambo ami wonke; kusukela emini kuze kube sebusuku uzangiqeda." 
Isaiah38:14 Njengenkonjane kumbe ihemu, ngokunjalo ngatshiyoza ngilila njengejuba, amehlo ami afiphala ngokukhangela phezulu. Nkosi, ngicindezelwe; woba yisibambiso sami." 
Isaiah38:15 Ngingathini? Ikhulumile kimi, yona uqobo ikwenzile. Ngizahamba kabuthakathaka yonke iminyaka yami ekubabeni komphefumulo wami." 
Isaiah38:16 Nkosi, ngalezizinto bayaphila, lakuzo zonke lezizinto kulempilo yomoya wami. Njalo uzangelapha, ungiphilise." 
Isaiah38:17 Khangela, kulokuthula ngibe lokubaba okukhulu, kodwa wena uwuthandile umphefumulo wami wawukhulula egodini lencithakalo, ngoba uphosele ngemva komhlana wakho zonke izono zami." 
Isaiah38:18 Ngoba ingcwaba lingekubonge, ukufa ku nge kudumise, labo abehlela emgodini bangethembele iqiniso lakho." 
Isaiah38:19 Ophilayo, ophilayo, yena uzakudumisa, njengami lamuhla; uyise uzakwazisa abantwana iqiniso lakho." 
Isaiah38:20 I Nkosi yayilungele ukungisindisa, ngakho sizahlabelela ingoma zami ngamachacho insuku zonke zempilo yethu endlini ye Nkosi." 
Isaiah38:21 Ngoba uIsaya wayethe: Kabathathe isigaqa somkhiwa, basifake njengomnameko phezu kwethumba, uzasila." 
Isaiah38:22 UHezekhiya laye wayethe: Siyini isibonakaliso sokuthi ngizakwenyukela endlini ye Nkosi? 
Isaiah39:1 Ngalesosikhathi uMerodaki-Baladani, indodana kaBaladani inkosi yeBhabhiloni, wathumela izincwadi lesipho kuHezekhiya, ngoba wayezwile ukuthi ubekade egula, useqinile." 
Isaiah39:2 UHezekhiya wasethokoza ngazo, wabatshengisa indlu yokuligugu kwakhe, isiliva, legolide, lamakha, lamafutha amahle, lendlu yonke yezikhali zakhe, lakho konke okwatholakala kokuligugu kwakhe; kakubanga lutho endlini yakhe lembusweni wakhe wonke uHezekhiya angabatshengisanga lona." 
Isaiah39:3 Wasefika uIsaya umprofethi enkosini uHezekhiya, wathi kuyo: Atheni lamadoda? Futhi avele ngaphi esiza kuwe? UHezekhiya wasesithi: Avele elizweni elikhatshana esiza kimi, eBhabhiloni." 
Isaiah39:4 Wasesithi: Aboneni endlini yakho? UHezekhiya wasesithi: Abone konke okusendlini yami; kakulalutho phakathi kokuligugu kwami engingawatshengisanga lona. 
Isaiah39:5 UIsaya wasesithi kuHezekhiya: Zwana ilizwi le Nkosi yamabandla. 
Isaiah39:6 Khangela, insuku ziyeza lapho konke okusendlini yakho, lalokho oyihlo abakubuthelelayo kuze kube lamuhla, kuzathwalelwa eBhabhiloni; kakuyikusala lutho, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah39:7 Lemadodaneni akho azaphuma kuwe, ozawazala, bazathatha; njalo abe ngabathenwa esigodlweni senkosi yeBhabhiloni." 
Isaiah39:8 UHezekhiya wasesithi kuIsaya: Ilizwi le Nkosi olikhulumileyo lilungile. Wathi futhi: Ngoba kuzakuba lokuthula leqiniso ensukwini zami. 
Isaiah40:1 Duduzani, liduduze abantu bami, utsho uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Isaiah40:2 Khulumani kunhliziyo yeJerusalema, limemeze kuyo ukuthi imfazo yayo iphelelisiwe, ukuthi ububi bayo buthethelelwe, ngoba yemukele esandleni se Nkosi okuphindwe kabili ngazo zonke izono zayo." 
Isaiah40:3 Ilizwi lomemezayo ehlane lithi: Lungisani indlela ye Nkosi, limqondisele uNkulunkulu wethu umgwaqo omkhulu enkangala." 
Isaiah40:4 Sonke isigodi sizaphakanyiswa, layo yonke intaba loqaqa kuzakwehliswa; lokugobileyo kuzakwenziwa kuqonde, lendawo ezimaxhakaxhaka zibe ligceke." 
Isaiah40:5 Inkazimulo ye Nkosi izabonakaliswa, layo yonke inyama i yi bone kanyekanye, ngoba umlomo we Nkosi ukhulumile." 
Isaiah40:6 Ilizwi lathi: Memeza! Wasesithi: Ngizamemeza ngithini? Yonke inyama ibutshani, labo bonke ubuhle bayo bunjengeluba leganga." 
Isaiah40:7 Utshani buyabuna, iluba liyawohloka, ngoba uMoya we Nkosi uphephetha phezu kwakho; isibili abantu babutshani." 
Isaiah40:8 Utshani buyabuna, iluba liyawohloka; kodwa ilizwi likaNkulunkulu wethu limi kuze kube nini lanini." 
Isaiah40:9 Wena Ziyoni, oletha izindaba ezinhle, khwela entabeni ende; wena Jerusalema, oletha izindaba ezinhle, phakamisa ilizwi lakho ngamandla, liphakamise ungesabi; tshono emizini yakoJuda uthi: Khangelani, uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Isaiah40:10 Khangela, iNkosi uJehova izakuza ngamandla, lengalo yayo izayibusela: khangela, umvuzo wayo ilawo, lenkokhelo yayo iphambi kwayo." 
Isaiah40:11 Izakwelusa umhlambi wayo njengomelusi, izabutha amawundlu ngengalo yayo, iwathwale esifubeni sayo, ikhokhele kuhle ezimunyisayo." 
Isaiah40:12 Ngubani olinganise amanzi entendeni yesandla sakhe, walinganisa amazulu ngeminwe eyeluliweyo, wahlanganisa uthuli lomhlaba esilinganisweni, walinganisa izintaba ngesikali, lamaqaqa ngezilinganiso?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ngubani oqondise uMoya we Nkosi, kumbe wamfundisa eng umeluleki wakhe?" 
Isaiah40:14 Yelulekane lobani, owayenza yaqedisisa, wayifundisa endleleni yesahlulelo, wayifundisa ulwazi, wayazisa indlela yokuqedisisa?" 
Isaiah40:15 Khangela, izizwe zinjengethonsi lenkonxa, zibalwa njengothuli lwesikali. Khangela, uphakamisa izihlenge njengento encinyane kakhulu." 
Isaiah40:16 LeLebhanoni kayeneli ukutsha, lenyamazana zayo kazeneli umnikelo wokutshiswa." 
Isaiah40:17 Zonke izizwe zinjengezingasilutho phambi kwayo, zibalwa kuyo zingaphansi kokungelutho lokuyize." 
Isaiah40:18 Lizamfananisa lobani-ke uNkulunkulu, loba mfanekiso bani elizamlinganisa lawo?" 
Isaiah40:19 Ingcitshi incibilikisa isithombe esibaziweyo, lomkhandi wegolide uyasinameka ngegolide, abumbe ngokuncibilikisa amaketane esiliva." 
Isaiah40:20 Lowo ongumyanga ongelamnikelo ukhetha isihlahla esingaboliyo, azidingele umbazi oyingcitshi ukuze alungise isithombe esingayikunyikinywa." 
Isaiah40:21 Kalazi yini? Kalizwanga yini? Kalitshelwanga yini kwasekuqaleni? Kaliqedisisanga yini kwasekusekelweni komhlaba? 
Isaiah40:22 Kunguye ohlala phezu kwesigombolozi somhlaba, labahlali bawo banjengentethe; owendlala amazulu njengekhetheni, awelule njengethente lokuhlala;" 
Isaiah40:23 owenza iziphathamandla zingabi yilutho, enze abehluleli bomhlaba babe njengeze." 
Isaiah40:24 Yebo, kabayikugxunyekwa; yebo, kabayikuhlanyelwa; yebo isiqu sabo kasiyikugxila emhlabathini; laye uzaphephetha phezu kwabo babune; lesivunguzane sibasuse njengamabibi." 
Isaiah40:25 Pho, lizangifananisa lobani, engizafanana laye? kutsho oNgcwele." 
Isaiah40:26 Phakamiselani amehlo enu phezulu, likhangele odale lezizinto, okhipha ibutho lazo ngenani; azibize zonke ngamabizo ngobukhulu bamandla akhe, ngoba eqinile emandleni; kayikho leyodwa esilelayo." 
Isaiah40:27 Utsholoni, wena Jakobe, ukhulume, wena Israyeli ukuthi: Indlela yami isithekile e Nkosi ni lesahlulelo sami sedlule sivela kuNkulunkulu wami?" 
Isaiah40:28 Kawazi yini, kawukezwa yini? UNkulunkulu olaphakade, i Nkosi, uMdali wemikhawulo yomhlaba kapheli amandla njalo kadinwa? Kakuphenyeki ukuqedisisa kwakhe." 
Isaiah40:29 Inika amandla abadangeleyo, lakwabangaqinanga yandisa amandla." 
Isaiah40:30 Labatsha bazaphelelwa ngamandla, badinwe, lamajaha azakuwa lokuwa;" 
Isaiah40:31 kodwa abalindela i Nkosi bazavuselela amandla; bazaqonga ngempiko njengenkozi, bagijime bangadinwa, bahambe bangapheli amandla." 
Isaiah41:1 Thulani phambi kwami, zihlenge, kakuthi abantu bavuselele amandla; kabasondele; bakhulume-ke; kasisondele kanyekanye kusahlulelo." 
Isaiah41:2 Ngubani owavusa olungileyo ngasempumalanga? Wambizela enyaweni lwakhe, wanikela izizwe phambi kwakhe, wa m enza wabusa phezu kwamakhosi, wawanikela enkembeni yakhe njengothuli, edandilini lakhe njengezibi eziqhutshelwayo." 
Isaiah41:3 Waxotshana lawo, wedlula ephephile, ngendlela angayihambanga ngenyawo zakhe." 
Isaiah41:4 Ngubani okusebenzileyo, wa kw enza, ebiza izizukulwana kwasekuqaleni? Mina i Nkosi ngingowokuqala, njalo ngilabokucina; nginguye." 
Isaiah41:5 Izihlenge zakubona, zesaba; imikhawulo yomhlaba yathuthumela; yasondela, yafika." 
Isaiah41:6 Basiza, ngulowo lalowo umakhelwane wakhe, wathi kumfowabo: Qina!" 
Isaiah41:7 Umbazi waseqinisa umkhandi wegolide, ololonga ngesando lowo otshaya isikhandelo, esithi: Se kulungele ukunuselwa; wakuqinisa ngezipikili ukuze kunganyikinyeki." 
Isaiah41:8 Kodwa wena Israyeli, nceku yami, Jakobe engikukhethileyo, nzalo kaAbrahama isithandwa sami," 
Isaiah41:9 wena engakubambayo kwasemikhawulweni yomhlaba, ngakubiza ezikhulwini zawo, ngathi kuwe: Uyinceku yami, ngikukhethile, kangikulahlanga;" 
Isaiah41:10 ungesabi, ngoba ngilawe, ungathalathalazi, ngoba mina nginguNkulunkulu wakho; ngizakuqinisa, yebo ngizakusiza, yebo ngizakusekela ngesandla sami sokunene sokulunga kwami." 
Isaiah41:11 Khangela bonke abakuthukuthelelayo bazayangeka badaniswe, bazakuba njengento engesilutho; lalabo abalwa lawe bazabhubha." 
Isaiah41:12 Uzabadinga, ungabatholi; labo abaphikisana lawe bazakuba njengento engesilutho, lalabo abalwa lawe bazakuba njengeze." 
Isaiah41:13 Ngoba mina Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, ngibamba isandla sakho sokunene, ngisithi kuwe: Ungesabi, mina ngizakusiza." 
Isaiah41:14 Ungesabi, mpethu Jakobe, bantu bakoIsrayeli; mina ngizakusiza, kutsho i Nkosi, lomhlengi wakho, oNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah41:15 Khangela, ngizakwenza ube lubhulo olutsha olubukhali nhlangothi mbili; uzabhula izintaba uzichoboze, wenze amaqaqa abe njengamakhoba;" 
Isaiah41:16 uzawela, lomoya uzawasusa, lesivunguzane siwachithachithe; njalo wena uthokoze nge Nkosi, uzidumise ngoNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah41:17 Abayanga labaswelayo badinga amanzi, kodwa engekho, ulimi lwabo lome ngokoma, mina Nkosi ngizabaphendula; mina Nkulunkulu kaIsrayeli kangiyikubadela." 
Isaiah41:18 Ngizavula imifula emadundulwini, lemithombo phakathi kwezigodi; ngizakwenza inkangala ibe yisiziba samanzi, lomhlabathi owomileyo iziphethu zamanzi." 
Isaiah41:19 Ngizamisa enkangala umsedari, isihlahla sesinga, lemiteli*, lesihlahla samafutha, ngibeke egwaduleni isihlahla sefiri, lomangwe, lomsayiphuresi* ndawonye;" 
Isaiah41:20 ukuze babone, bazi, baqaphelise, baqedisise kanyekanye, ukuthi isandla se Nkosi sikwenzile lokhu, loNgcwele kaIsrayeli ukudalile." 
Isaiah41:21 Sondezani indaba yenu, itsho i Nkosi, lilethe izizatho zenu eziqinileyo, itsho iNkosi kaJakobe." 
Isaiah41:22 Kabasondeze, basitshele okuzakwenzakala; kabakhulume izinto zamandulo, ukuthi ziyini, ukuze si zi beke enhliziyweni yethu, sazi isiphetho sazo; loba yenza sizwe izinto ezizayo." 
Isaiah41:23 Tshonini izinto ezizakuza emva kwalokhu, ukuze sazi ukuthi lingonkulunkulu; yebo, yenzani okuhle kumbe lenze okubi, ukuze simangale, sikhangele kanyekanye." 
Isaiah41:24 Khangelani, livela kokungekho, lomsebenzi wenu uvela emayeni; uyisinengiso olikhethayo." 
Isaiah41:25 Ngimvusile o vela enyakatho, njalo uzafika, evela lapho eliphuma khona ilanga uzabiza ibizo lami; njalo uzakwehlela phezu kweziphathamandla njengodaka, lanjengombumbi evoxa ibumba." 
Isaiah41:26 Ngubani owakubikayo kwasekuqaleni, ukuze sazi? langaphambili ukuze sitsho ukuthi: U lungile? Yebo, kakho obikayo, yebo, kakho ozwakalisayo, yebo, kakho owezwayo amazwi enu." 
Isaiah41:27 Owokuqala uzakuthi eZiyoni: Khangela, bakhangele; njalo ngizanika iJerusalema oletha izindaba ezinhle." 
Isaiah41:28 Ngoba ngakhangela, njalo kwakungelamuntu, laphakathi kwabo kungekho umeluleki, ukuthi, lapho ngibabuza, baphendule ilizwi." 
Isaiah41:29 Khangela, bonke bayize; imisebenzi yabo kayisilutho; izithombe zabo ezibunjiweyo zingumoya lokusanganiseka." 
Isaiah42:1 Khangela inceku yami, engiyisekelayo; umkhethwa wami, othokoza ngaye umphefumulo wami; ngibekile uMoya wami phezu kwakhe; uzavezela izizwe ukwahlulela." 
Isaiah42:2 Kayikumemeza, kayikuphakamisa ilizwi, kayikwenza ilizwi lakhe lizwakale ezitaladeni." 
Isaiah42:3 Umhlanga ofecekileyo kayikuwephula, lentambo yesibane ethunqayo kayikuyicitsha; uzaveza isahlulelo ngeqiniso." 
Isaiah42:4 Kayikudinwa, kayikwephulwa, aze amise isahlulelo emhlabeni; lezihlenge zizalindela umlayo wakhe." 
Isaiah42:5 Utsho njalo uNkulunkulu i Nkosi, owadala amazulu, wawelula, owendlala umhlaba lalokho okuphuma kuwo, onika abantu abakuwo ukuphefumula, lomoya kulabo abahamba kuwo." 
Isaiah42:6 Mina Nkosi ngikubizile ngokulunga, ngizabamba isandla sakho, ngikulondoloze, ngikunike ube yisivumelwano sabantu, ube yikukhanya kwabezizwe." 
Isaiah42:7 Ukuze uvule amehlo eziphofu, ukhuphe izibotshwa entolongweni, l abahlezi emnyameni endlini yezibotshwa." 
Isaiah42:8 Ngiyi Nkosi, lelo libizo lami; lodumo lwami kangiyikulunika omunye, kumbe indumiso yami ezithombeni ezibaziweyo." 
Isaiah42:9 Khangela, izinto zamandulo sezifikile; sengimemezela izinto ezintsha; zingakahlumi ngilitshela ngazo." 
Isaiah42:10 Hlabelelani i Nkosi ingoma entsha, indumiso zayo kusukela emkhawulweni womhlaba; lina elehlela elwandle, lokugcwala kwalo, zihlenge, labahlali bazo." 
Isaiah42:11 Kakuthi inkangala lemizi yayo kuphakamise ilizwi, lemizi uKedari ahlala kuyo; kakuthi abahlali bedwala bahlabelele, bamemeze besengqongeni yezintaba." 
Isaiah42:12 Kabayinike udumo i Nkosi, bamemezele indumiso yayo ezihlengeni." 
Isaiah42:13 I Nkosi izaphuma njengeqhawe, ivuselele ukutshiseka njengendoda yempi; izamemeza, yebo iklabalale, izinqobe izitha zayo." 
Isaiah42:14 Kwasendulo ngithule; ngathi zwi, ngazibamba; ngizakhala njengowesifazana obelethayo; ngiphefuzele, ngikhefuzele kanyekanye." 
Isaiah42:15 Ngizabhidliza izintaba lamaqaqa, ngomise konke okuluhlaza kwazo, ngenze imifula ibe yizihlenge, ngomise amachibi." 
Isaiah42:16 Njalo ngizakwenza iziphofu zihambe ngendlela ezingayaziyo, ngizikhokhelele emikhondweni e zinga ya ziyo; ngizakwenza umnyama ube yikukhanya phambi kwazo, lezinto ezigobileyo ziqonde; lezizinto ngizazenza kuzo, ngingaziyekeli." 
Isaiah42:17 Bazabuyiselwa emuva, bayangeke ngenhloni abathembela ezithombeni ezibaziweyo, abathi ezithombeni ezibunjwe ngokuncibilikisa: Lingonkulunkulu bethu." 
Isaiah42:18 Zwanini lina zacuthe, lani ziphofu likhangele, ukuze libone." 
Isaiah42:19 Ngubani oyisiphofu ngaphandle kwenceku yami, kumbe oyisacuthe njengesithunywa sami e ngi si thumayo? Ngubani oyisiphofu njengopheleleyo, loyisiphofu njengenceku ye Nkosi?" 
Isaiah42:20 Wena ubona izinto ezinengi, kodwa ungaziqaphelisi; yena uvula izindlebe, kodwa kezwa." 
Isaiah42:21 I Nkosi iyathokoza ngenxa yokulunga kwayo; ikhulise umlayo, iwenze ube lodumo." 
Isaiah42:22 Kodwa laba ngabantu abantshontshelwayo baphangwa, bonke bathiyiwe emigodini, bafihlwa ezintolongweni; bangabokuphangwa, njalo kungekho okhululayo; bayimpango, njalo kungabikho othi: Buyisela." 
Isaiah42:23 Ngubani phakathi kwenu ozabeka indlebe kulokhu, ozalalela azwele isikhathi esizayo?" 
Isaiah42:24 Ngubani owanikela uJakobe ekuphangweni, loIsrayeli kubaphangi? Kwakungeyisiyo yini i Nkosi esone kuyo? Ngoba bengavumanga ukuhamba endleleni zayo, njalo bengalalelanga umlayo wayo." 
Isaiah42:25 Ngakho yathululela phezu kwakhe ukuvutha kolaka lwayo, lamandla empi; njalo kwamthungela ngomlilo inhlangothi zonke, kodwa kakwazanga; kwamtshisa, kodwa kakubekanga enhliziyweni." 
Isaiah43:1 Kodwa khathesi itsho njalo i Nkosi eyakudalayo, Jakobe, leyakubumbayo, Israyeli: Ungesabi; ngoba ngikuhlengile, ngakubiza ngebizo lakho; ungowami." 
Isaiah43:2 Lapho udabula emanzini ngizakuba lawe, lemifuleni, kayiyikukukhukhula; lapho uhamba udabula emlilweni, kawuyikutsha, lelangabi kaliyikukulumathisa." 
Isaiah43:3 Ngoba ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho, oNgcwele kaIsrayeli, uMsindisi wakho. Nginikele iGibhithe libe lihlawulo lokuthula lakho, iEtiyopiya leSeba esikhundleni sakho." 
Isaiah43:4 Njengoba wawuligugu emehlweni ami, wawudumile, njalo mina ngikuthandile. Ngakho ngizanika abantu esikhundleni sakho, lezizwe endaweni yempilo yakho." 
Isaiah43:5 Ungesabi, ngoba ngilawe; ngizaletha inzalo yakho ivela empumalanga, ngikubuthe uvela entshonalanga;" 
Isaiah43:6 ngizakutsho kuyo inyakatho: Phana; lakuningizimu: Ungagodli; lethani amadodana ami akhatshana, lamadodakazi ami asemkhawulweni womhlaba," 
Isaiah43:7 wonke obizwa ngebizo lami; ngoba ngimdalele udumo lwami, ngimbumbile, yebo ngimenzile." 
Isaiah43:8 Khuphani abantu abayiziphofu abalamehlo, lezacuthe ezilendlebe." 
Isaiah43:9 Izizwe zonke kazibuthane ndawonye, labantu bahlangane. Ngubani phakathi kwabo ongamemezela lokhu, asenze sizwe izinto zamandulo? Kabalethe abafakazi babo, ukuze balungisiswe, kumbe bezwe bathi: Kuliqiniso." 
Isaiah43:10 Lingabafakazi bami, kutsho i Nkosi, lenceku yami engiyikhethileyo: ukuze lazi, lingikholwe, liqedisise ukuthi nginguye; ngaphambi kwami kakubunjwanga unkulunkulu, langemva kwami kayikuba khona." 
Isaiah43:11 Mina, mina ngiyi Nkosi; langaphandle kwami kakulamsindisi." 
Isaiah43:12 Ngimemezele, ngasindisa, ngazwakalisa, kungakabikho unkulunkulu wezizwe phakathi kwenu; ngakho lingabafakazi bami, kutsho i Nkosi, ukuthi nginguNkulunkulu." 
Isaiah43:13 Yebo, kungakabi khona usuku, mina nginguye; njalo kakho ongakhulula esandleni sami; ngizasebenza, njalo ngubani ongakubuyisela emuva?" 
Isaiah43:14 Itsho njalo i Nkosi, uMhlengi wenu, oNgcwele kaIsrayeli: Ngenxa yenu ngithumele eBhabhiloni, ngehlisele phansi bonke ababalekayo babo, lamaKhaladiya osimemezelo sawo sisemikhunjini." 
Isaiah43:15 Ngiyi Nkosi, oNgcwele wenu, uMdali kaIsrayeli, inkosi yenu." 
Isaiah43:16 Itsho njalo i Nkosi, eyenza indlela olwandle, lomkhondo emanzini alamandla," 
Isaiah43:17 ekhupha inqola lebhiza, ibutho lamandla; kuzalala ndawonye, kakuyikuvuka; kuzaphela du, kucitshe njengentambo yesibane." 
Isaiah43:18 Lingakhumbuli izinto zakuqala, linganakani ngezinto zendulo." 
Isaiah43:19 Khangelani, ngizakwenza into entsha; khathesi kuzahluma, kaliyikukwazi yini? Yebo, ngizakwenza indlela enkangala, imifula ogwaduleni." 
Isaiah43:20 Inyamazana zeganga zizangidumisa, amakhanka lamadodakazi ezintshe; ngoba nginika amanzi enkangala, imifula ehlane, ukunathisa abantu bami, abakhethiweyo bami." 
Isaiah43:21 Lababantu ngizibumbele bona; bazalandisa udumo lwami. 
Isaiah43:22 Kanti kawungibizanga, Jakobe; kodwa udiniwe ngami, Israyeli." 
Isaiah43:23 Kawulethanga kimi izimvu zomnikelo wakho wokutshiswa, kawungihloniphanga ngemihlatshelo yakho. Kangikwenzanga wakhonza ngomnikelo, kangikudinisanga ngempepha." 
Isaiah43:24 Kawungithengelanga umhlanga wamakha ngemali, njalo kawungisuthisanga ngamahwahwa emihlatshelo yakho; kodwa ungenze ngasebenza ngezono zakho, wangidinisa ngeziphambeko zakho." 
Isaiah43:25 Mina, mina nginguye owesula iziphambeko zakho ngenxa yami, kangiyikuzikhumbula izono zakho." 
Isaiah43:26 Ngikhumbuza: kasehlulelane; landisa wena, ukuze ulungisiswe." 
Isaiah43:27 Uyihlo wokuqala wona, labachasisi bakho baphambukile bemelene lami." 
Isaiah43:28 Ngakho ngingcolise iziphathamandla zendlu engcwele, nganikela uJakobe ekutshabalalisweni, loIsrayeli ekuthukweni." 
Isaiah44:1 Kodwa khathesi zwana, Jakobe nceku yami, lawe Israyeli engikukhethileyo." 
Isaiah44:2 Itsho njalo I Nkosi eyakwenzayo, yakubumba kusukela esiswini, ezakusiza: Ungesabi, Jakobe, nceku yami, lawe Jeshuruni engikukhethileyo." 
Isaiah44:3 Ngoba ngizathela amanzi phezu kwakhe owomileyo, lezikhukhula emhlabathini owomileyo; ngizathela uMoya wami phezu kwenzalo yakho, lesibusiso sami phezu kwabantwana bakho." 
Isaiah44:4 Bazahluma phakathi kotshani, njengeminyezane ngasezifuleni zamanzi." 
Isaiah44:5 Omunye uzakuthi: Mina ngingowe Nkosi; lomunye azibize ngebizo likaJakobe, lomunye abhale e sandl eni sakhe ukuthi: Nging owe Nkosi; a zi bonge ngebizo likaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah44:6 Utsho njalo uJehova, inkosi yakoIsrayeli, loMhlengi wakhe, i Nkosi yamabandla: Ngingowokuqala njalo ngingowokucina; njalo ngaphandle kwami kakho uNkulunkulu." 
Isaiah44:7 Njalo ngubani ongabiza njengami, akumemezele, angihlelele khona, kusukela ngimisa abantu bendulo? Lezinto ezizayo, lezizakuza, kabazimemezele kubo." 
Isaiah44:8 Lingatshaywa luvalo, lingesabi; kangilitshelanga yini kusukela ngalesosikhathi, ngakumemezela? Njalo lina lingabafakazi bami. Kukhona yini uNkulunkulu ngaphandle kwami? Yebo, kalikho iDwala elinjengami, kangilazi." 
Isaiah44:9 Bonke ababumbi bezithombe ezibaziweyo bayize, lezinto zabo ezithandekayo kazisizi lutho; labo bangabafakazi babo, kababoni, kabazi; ukuze bayangeke." 
Isaiah44:10 Ngubani obumbe unkulunkulu, loba wabumba ngokuncibilikisa isithombe esibaziweyo esingasizi lutho?" 
Isaiah44:11 Khangela, bonke abangane bakhe bazayangeka; lababazi bangababantu; kababuthane bonke, basukume, bazakwesaba, bayangeke kanyekanye." 
Isaiah44:12 Umkhandi wensimbi ukhanda ihloka, asebenze emalahleni, alibumbe ngezando, alisebenze ngamandla engalo yakhe; yebo, alambe, aze aphele amandla; kanathi manzi, aze adinwe." 
Isaiah44:13 Umbazi welula intambo yokulinganisa, adwebe ngosungulo, asenze ngezancele, asidwebe ngensimbi ecijileyo, asenze ngomfanekiso womuntu, ngokobuhle bomuntu, ukuze sihlale endlini." 
Isaiah44:14 Uzigamulela imisedari, athathe umsayiphuresi* lesihlahla se-okhi*, aziqinisela sona phakathi kwezihlahla zegusu, ahlanyele umfire*, lezulu li wu khulise." 
Isaiah44:15 Kuzakuba-ke ngokomuntu ukuthi akubase, njalo uzathatha kukho, othe, yebo akubase, abhake isinkwa; yebo enze unkulunkulu, amkhonze, enze isithombe esibaziweyo, akhothame kuso." 
Isaiah44:16 Atshise ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yakho emlilweni; ngengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yakho adle inyama, ose amawoso asuthe; yebo, uyotha athi: Alala! ngiyakhudumala, ngiwubonile umlilo." 
Isaiah44:17 Njalo insali yakho ayenze unkulunkulu, isithombe sakhe esibaziweyo; akhothame kuso, asikhonze, akhuleke kuso athi: Ngophula, ngoba ungunkulunkulu wami." 
Isaiah44:18 Kabazanga, kabaqedisisanga; ngoba ebhade amehlo abo ukuze bangaboni; inhliziyo zabo ukuze bangaqedisisi." 
Isaiah44:19 Kakho obuyela enhliziyweni yakhe, njalo kakulalwazi njalo kakulakuqedisisa kokuthi: Ngibasile ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yakho emlilweni, yebo ngibhake isinkwa phezu kwamalahle akho, ngosa inyama, ngayidla; kambe ngizakwenza insali yakho isinengiso yini? Ngizakhothamela kokuvela esihlahleni yini?" 
Isaiah44:20 Udla umlotha; inhliziyo ekhohlisiweyo imphambule, okokuthi angekhulule umphefumulo wakhe njalo kathi: Kakulamanga yini esandleni sami sokunene?" 
Isaiah44:21 Khumbula lezizinto, Jakobe, lawe Israyeli, ngoba uyinceku yami; ngikubumbile, uyinceku yami. Wena Israyeli, kawuyikukhohlakala yimi." 
Isaiah44:22 Ngesule iziphambeko zakho njengeyezi elinzima, lanjengeyezi izono zakho; buyela kimi, ngoba ngikuhlengile." 
Isaiah44:23 Hlabelelani, mazulu, ngoba i Nkosi ikwenzile; memezani, zindawo eziphansi zomhlaba; qhamukani lihlabele, zintaba, gusu, laso sonke isihlahla esiphakathi kwakho; ngoba i Nkosi imhlengile uJakobe, yazidumisa koIsrayeli." 
Isaiah44:24 Itsho njalo i Nkosi, uMhlengi wakho, leyakubumba kwasesiswini: Ngiyi Nkosi eyenza zonke izinto; eyendlala amazulu iyodwa; eyeneka umhlaba iyodwa;" 
Isaiah44:25 efubisa izibonakaliso zabaqambimanga; enze izanuse zihlanye; ebuyisela emuva abahlakaniphileyo; enze ulwazi lwabo lube yibuthutha; 
Isaiah44:26 eqinisa ilizwi lenceku yayo; ifeze amacebo ezithunywa zayo; ethi kuyo iJerusalema: Uzahlalwa; lemizini yakoJuda: Lizakwakhiwa; futhi ngizavusa amanxiwa ayo; 
Isaiah44:27 etshoyo enzikini: Tshana; njalo ngizakomisa imifula yakho; 
Isaiah44:28 etshoyo ngoKurosi: Ungumelusi wami, uzaphelelisa intokozo yami yonke; ithi lakuJerusalema: Kayakhiwe; l e thempeli ni: Isisekelo sakho kasibekwe." 
Isaiah45:1 Itsho njalo i Nkosi kogcotshiweyo wayo, kuKurosi, osandla sakhe sokunene ngisibambile ukuze ngehlisele phansi izizwe phambi kwakhe; njalo ngithukulule izinkalo zamakhosi, ukuvula phambi kwakhe amasango alezivalo ezimbili, lamasango angavalwa." 
Isaiah45:2 Mina ngizahamba phambi kwakho, ngenze indawo ezigobileyo ziqonde, ngiphahlaze izivalo zethusi, ngiqume imigoqo yensimbi." 
Isaiah45:3 Ngizakunika okuligugu kobumnyama, lenotho ethukuziweyo yezindawo ezisithekileyo, ukuze wazi ukuthi mina Nkosi, engikubiza ngebizo lakho, nginguNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah45:4 Ngenxa yenceku yami uJakobe, loIsrayeli umkhethwa wami, ngikubizile ngitsho ngebizo lakho, ngakunika isibongo, lanxa ungangazanga." 
Isaiah45:5 Ngiyi Nkosi, njalo kakho omunye, ngaphandle kwami kakulaNkulunkulu, ngikubhincisile lanxa ungangazanga." 
Isaiah45:6 Ukuze bazi kusukela lapho eliphuma khona ilanga, njalo kusukela entshonalanga, ukuthi kakho omunye ngaphandle kwami; ngiyi Nkosi, njalo kakho omunye." 
Isaiah45:7 Ngibumba ukukhanya, ngidale umnyama; ngenza ukuthula, ngidale ububi; mina Nkosi ngenza zonke lezizinto." 
Isaiah45:8 Yehlisani, mazulu, kuvela phezulu, lamayezi athulule ukulunga; umhlaba kawuvuleke, njalo kuthele usindiso, njalo kakuthi ukulunga kumile kanyekanye; mina Nkosi ngikudalile." 
Isaiah45:9 Maye kuye ophikisana loMdali wakhe, udengezi lezindengezi zomhlaba! Ibumba lizakutsho yini kolibumbayo ukuthi: Wenzani? kumbe umsebenzi wakho: Kalazandla yini?" 
Isaiah45:10 Maye kuye othi kuyise: Uzalani? kumbe kowesifazana: Ubeletheni? 
Isaiah45:11 Itsho njalo i Nkosi, oNgcwele kaIsrayeli, loMdali wakhe: Buzani kimi ngezinto ezizayo, ngamadodana ami, langomsebenzi wezandla zami liyangilaya." 
Isaiah45:12 Mina ngiwenzile umhlaba, ngadala umuntu phezu kwawo; mina, izandla zami zendlale amazulu, ngalawula amabutho awo wonke." 
Isaiah45:13 Mina ngimvusile ngokulunga, njalo ngizaqondisa zonke izindlela zakhe; yena uzakwakha umuzi wami, akhulule abathunjiweyo bami, kungengenxa yentengo njalo kungengenxa yesivalamlomo, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Isaiah45:14 Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Umsebenzi weGibhithe, lokuthengiswayo kweEtiyopiya lokwamaShebha, amadoda amade, kuzadlulela kuwe, kuzakuba ngokwakho; bazakulandela, bedlule besemaketaneni, bakhothame kuwe, balabhele kuwe besithi: Isibili uNkulunkulu ukuwe, kakho omunye, kakho omunye uNkulunkulu." 
Isaiah45:15 Isibili unguNkulunkulu ozifihlayo, uNkulunkulu wakoIsrayeli, uMsindisi." 
Isaiah45:16 Bazayangeka, ngitsho babe lenhloni, bonke; bazahamba belehlazo kanyekanye ababazi bezithombe."
