Isaiah45:17 UIsrayeli uzasindiswa e Nkosi ni ngo sindiso olulaphakade; kaliyikuyangeka, kaliyikuba lenhloni, kuze kube nini lanini." 
Isaiah45:18 Ngoba itsho njalo i Nkosi eyadala amazulu, yona enguNkulunkulu, eyabumba umhlaba yawenza; yona yawumisa, ingawudalelanga ize, yawubumbela ukuze kuhlalwe kuwo, ithi: Ngiyi Nkosi, njalo kakho omunye." 
Isaiah45:19 Kangikhulumelanga ekusithekeni, endaweni emnyama yomhlaba, kangitshongo kuyo inzalo kaJakobe ukuthi: Ngidingani ngeze. Mina Nkosi ngikhuluma iqiniso, ngitsho izinto eziqotho." 
Isaiah45:20 Buthanani libuye; sondelani kanyekanye, lina elaphunyuka ezizweni; abamisa izigodo zezithombe zabo ezibaziweyo kabazi, abakhuleka kunkulunkulu ongelakusindisa." 
Isaiah45:21 Tshelani, li ba sondeze; yebo kabacebisane kanyekanye: Ngubani owazwakalisa lokhu kwasendulo? owakukhulumayo kusukela kulesosikhathi na? Kakusimi i Nkosi yini? Njalo kakho omunye uNkulunkulu ngaphandle kwami, uNkulunkulu olungileyo loMsindisi; kakho ngaphandle kwami." 
Isaiah45:22 Phendukelani kimi, lisindiswe, lina lonke mikhawulo yomhlaba; ngoba nginguNkulunkulu, njalo kakho omunye." 
Isaiah45:23 Ngizifungile mina, ilizwi liphumile emlonyeni wami ng okulunga, njalo kaliyikuphenduka, elithi: Lonke idolo lizangiguqela, lonke ulimi luzafunga." 
Isaiah45:24 Ngeqiniso, omunye uzakuthi: E Nkosi ni ngilokulunga lamandla; bazakuza kuyo; kodwa bonke abayithukuthelelayo bazayangeka." 
Isaiah45:25 Yonke inzalo yakoIsrayeli izalungisiswa e Nkosi ni, izincome." 
Isaiah46:1 UBeli uyakhothama, uNebo uyazithoba; izithombe zabo zazingezezifuyo, njalo zazingezezinkomo; imithwalo yenu ethwelweyo ingumthwalo kwediniweyo." 
Isaiah46:2 Bayaguqa, bakhothame kanyekanye, kabalakophula umthwalo, kodwa bona ngokwabo baya ekuthunjweni." 
Isaiah46:3 Ngilalela, ndlu kaJakobe, lensali yonke yendlu kaIsrayeli, e ngi bathwele kwasesibelethweni, abasinathwe kwasesizalweni." 
Isaiah46:4 Kuze kube segugeni nginguye; yebo, kuze kube sebumpungeni mina ngiza li thwala; mina ngenzile, ngitsho mina ngizathwala, ngikhulule." 
Isaiah46:5 Lizangifananisa, li ngi linganise, lingiqathanise lobani ukuze sifanane?" 
Isaiah46:6 Bathulula igolide esikhwameni, balinganise isiliva esilinganisweni, baqatshe umkhandi ukuthi akwenze unkulunkulu; bathi mbo phansi, yebo, bakhonze." 
Isaiah46:7 Bametshata ehlombe, bamthwale, bambeke endaweni yakhe, ame, angasuki endaweni yakhe. Yebo, umuntu ememeza kuye, kaphenduli, kamsindisi enkathazweni yakhe." 
Isaiah46:8 Khumbulani lokhu, lizibonakalise liqinile, kubuyiseleni enhliziyweni, lina bahlamuki." 
Isaiah46:9 Khumbulani izinto zakuqala zendulo; ngoba nginguNkulunkulu, njalo kakho omunye; nging uNkulunkulu, njalo kakho ofanana lami;" 
Isaiah46:10 engimemezela isiphetho kwasekuqaleni, njalo kusukela endulo izinto ezinga k enziwa, ngisithi: Icebo lami lizakuma, njalo ngizakwenza yonke intokozo yami;" 
Isaiah46:11 engibiza inyoni edla inyama ivela empumalanga, umuntu wecebo lami evela elizweni elikhatshana; yebo, ngikhulumile, ngizakufeza; ngikumisile, yebo, ngizakwenza." 
Isaiah46:12 Ngilalelani, lina abalenhliziyo eziqinileyo, lina elikhatshana lokulunga." 
Isaiah46:13 Ngiyasondeza ukulunga kwami, kakuyikuba khatshana; losindiso lwami kaluyikuphuza; kodwa ngizanika usindiso eZiyoni, udumo lwami koIsrayeli." 
Isaiah47:1 Yehla, uhlale othulini, ntombi emsulwa, ndodakazi yeBhabhiloni; hlala emhlabathini; akulasihlalo sobukhosi, ndodakazi yamaKhaladiya; ngoba kawusayikubizwa ngokuthi uthambile njalo ubuthakathaka." 
Isaiah47:2 Thatha amatshe okuchola, uchole impuphu, wembule isimbombozo sakho, ukhulule ilokwe, uveze umlenze, uchaphe imifula." 
Isaiah47:3 Ubunqunu bakho buzakwembulwa, yebo, ihlazo lakho libonakale. Ngizaphindisela, ngingahlangani la we njengo muntu." 
Isaiah47:4 UMhlengi wethu, i Nkosi yamabandla libizo lakhe, oyiNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah47:5 Hlala ngokuthula, ungene emnyameni, ndodakazi yamaKhaladiya; ngoba kawusayikubizwa ngokuthi: Inkosikazi yemibuso." 
Isaiah47:6 Ngabathukuthelela abantu bami, ngangcolisa ilifa lami, ngabanikela esandleni sakho, kawubenzelanga izihawu; walenza laba nzima kakhulu ijogwe lakho phezu komdala." 
Isaiah47:7 Wena wathi: Ngizakuba yinkosikazi njalonjalo; kawukazibeki enhliziyweni yakho, kawukhumbulanga isiphetho kwakho." 
Isaiah47:8 Khathesi-ke zwana lokhu, wena ozithokozisayo, ohlezi uvikelekile, othi enhliziyweni yakho: Yimi, njalo kakho omunye ngaphandle kwami; kangiyikuhlala oko mfelokazi, kangiyikwazi ukufelwa ngabantwana." 
Isaiah47:9 Kodwa lokhu kokubili kuzakwehlela ngokucwayiza kwelihlo ngasuku lunye: Ukufelwa ngabantwana lobufelokazi; kuzakwehlela phezu kwakho ngokuphelela kwakho, ngenxa yobunengi bobuthakathi bakho, ngenxa yobunengi obukhulu bamalumbo akho." 
Isaiah47:10 Ngoba wathembela ebubini bakho, wathi: Kakho ongibonayo. Inhlakanipho yakho lolwazi lwakho khona kwakuphambula, wathi enhliziyweni yakho: Yimi, njalo kakho omunye ngaphandle kwami." 
Isaiah47:11 Ngakho ububi buzakwehlela, kawusoze wazi lapho obenyuka khona; lengozi izakwehlela, ongelakho ukwenza inhlawulo yokuthula ngayo; lencithakalo ihle yehlele phezu kwakho, ungazi." 
Isaiah47:12 Mana khathesi ngamalumbo akho langobunengi bobuthakathi bakho otshikatshike kukho kusukela ebutsheni bakho; mhlawumbe uzakuba lakho ukuba lenzuzo, mhlawumbe wethusele." 
Isaiah47:13 Udiniwe ebunengini bamacebo akho; kakuthi basukume khathesi abahloli bamazulu, abakhangela izinkanyezi, abazisa ngezinyanga, bakusindise kwezizakwehlela." 
Isaiah47:14 Khangela, bazakuba njengamabibi; umlilo uzabatshisa; kabayikuzophula emandleni elangabi; lingabikho ilahle lokotha, umlilo wokuhlala phambi kwawo." 
Isaiah47:15 Bazakuba njalo kuwe labo owatshikatshika labo, owathengiselana labo kusukela ebutsheni bakho; bazazulazula, ngulowo lalowo ngendlela yakhe; kawuzukuba lomsindisi wakho." 
Isaiah48:1 Zwanini lokhu, lina ndlu kaJakobe, elabizwa ngebizo likaIsrayeli, elaphuma emanzini akoJuda, elifunga ngebizo le Nkosi, elikhuluma ngoNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, kungeyisikho ngeqiniso, njalo kungeyisikho ngokulunga." 
Isaiah48:2 Ngoba bazibiza ngokuthi ba ngabomuzi oyingcwele, beseyama kuNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli; i Nkosi yamabandla libizo lakhe." 
Isaiah48:3 Ngamemezela izinto zamandulo kwasekuqaleni, zaphuma emlonyeni wami, ngazizwakalisa, ngenza masinyane, zafika." 
Isaiah48:4 Ngoba ngangisazi ukuthi ulukhuni, lentamo yakho ngumsipha wensimbi, lebunzi lakho lithusi," 
Isaiah48:5 Ngitsho kwasekuqaleni ngamemezela kuwe, kungakenzakali ngakwenza wa ku zwa, hlezi uthi: Isithombe sami sizenzile, lesithombe sami esibaziweyo, lesithombe sami esibunjwe ngokuncibilikisa sikulayile." 
Isaiah48:6 Usuzwile, khangela konke lokhu; njalo kaliyikukumemezela yini? Ngikwenze uzwe izinto ezintsha kusukela khathesi, lezinto ezifihlakeleyo obungazazi." 
Isaiah48:7 Zidalwe khathesi, kungeyisikho ekuqaleni; ngitsho lungakafiki lolusuku ungakezwa langazo, hlezi uthi: Khangela, bengizazi." 
Isaiah48:8 Yebo, kawuzwanga; yebo, kawazanga; yebo, kusukela ngalesosikhathi indlebe yakho yayingavulekanga; ngoba bengisazi ukuthi uzakwenza lokwenza ngenkohliso, wabizwa ngokuthi uyisiphambuki kusukela esizalweni." 
Isaiah48:9 Ngenxa yebizo lami ngizaphuzisa ulaka lwami, la ngenxa yodumo lwami ngizibambe ngawe, ukuze ngingakuqumi." 
Isaiah48:10 Khangela, ngikuhlolile, kodwa hatshi ngesiliva, ngikukhethile esithandweni somlilo senhlupheko." 
Isaiah48:11 Ngenxa yami, ngenxa yami ngiyakwenza; ngoba ibizo lami lingangcoliswa njani? Njalo kangiyikunika udumo lwami komunye." 
Isaiah48:12 Ngilalela, Jakobe, lawe Israyeli obiziweyo wami: Nginguye, ngingowokuqala, njalo ngingowokucina." 
Isaiah48:13 Isandla sami laso sabeka isisekelo somhlaba, lesandla sami sokunene sendlale amazulu; lapho ngikubiza, kuyasukuma kanyekanye." 
Isaiah48:14 Buthanani lina lonke, lizwe; ngubani phakathi kwabo omemezele lezizinto? I Nkosi imthandile, izakwenza intando yayo eBhabhiloni, lengalo yayo izakuba phezu kw amaKhaladiya." 
Isaiah48:15 Mina uqobo ngikhulumile; yebo ngambiza, ngimlethile, njalo uzaphumelelisa indlela yakhe." 
Isaiah48:16 Sondelani kimi, lizwe lokhu; kangikhulumanga ensitha kusukela ekuqaleni; kusukela kulesosikhathi kusenzeka, ngikhona. Khathesi-ke iNkosi uJehova kanye loMoya wayo ingithumile." 
Isaiah48:17 Itsho njalo i Nkosi, uMhlengi wakho, oNgcwele kaIsrayeli: Ngiyi Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, ekufundisa okukusizayo, ekukhokhela ngendlela ofanele ukuthi uhambe ngayo." 
Isaiah48:18 Kungathi ngabe walalela imilayo yami! Khona ukuthula kwakho kwakuzakuba njengomfula, lokulunga kwakho njengamagagasi olwandle." 
Isaiah48:19 Inzalo yakho layo yayizakuba njengetshebetshebe, lomdeni wemibilini yakho njengokhethe lwalo; ibizo lwawo belingayikuqunywa kumbe lichithwe lisuke phambi kwami." 
Isaiah48:20 Phumani eBhabhiloni, libalekele amaKhaladiya, limemeze ngelizwi lokuhlabelela, likuzwakalise, likuphumisele kuze kube semkhawulweni womhlaba, lithi: I Nkosi ihlengile inceku yayo uJakobe." 
Isaiah48:21 Njalo kabomanga ibakhokhela bedabula izinkangala; yenza amanzi abagelezela evela edwaleni, futhi yaqhekeza idwala, lamanzi ampompoza." 
Isaiah48:22 Kakulakuthula, itsho I Nkosi, kwabakhohlakeleyo." 
Isaiah49:1 Ngilalelani, zihlenge; lizwe, lina bantu abakhatshana. I Nkosi ingibizile ngisesiswini; ngisemibilini kamama yaqamba ibizo lami." 
Isaiah49:2 Yasisenza umlomo wami waba njengenkemba ebukhali, yangifihla ngaphansi komthunzi wesandla sayo; yangenza umtshoko ololiweyo, yangifihla esambeni sayo semitshoko." 
Isaiah49:3 Yathi kimi: Uyinceku yami, Israyeli, engizazidumisa ngayo." 
Isaiah49:4 Ngasengisithi mina: Ngitshikatshikele ize, amandla ami ngiwachithele okungelutho lokuyize; qiniso, isahlulelo sami sise Nkosi ni, lomvuzo wami ukuNkulunkulu wami." 
Isaiah49:5 Khathesi-ke itsho i Nkosi, eyangibumba kwasesiswini ukuba yinceku yayo, yokubuyisela uJakobe kuyo; lanxa uIsrayeli engabuthwanga, kube kanti ngizadunyiswa emehlweni e Nkosi; njalo uNkulunkulu wami uzakuba ngamandla ami." 
Isaiah49:6 Yasisithi: Kuyinto encane ukuthi ube yinceku yami yokuvusa izizwe zikaJakobe, lokubuyisela abalondoloziweyo bakoIsrayeli; ngizakupha futhi ube yikukhanya kwabezizwe, ukuze ube lusindiso lwami kuze kube semkhawulweni womhlaba." 
Isaiah49:7 Itsho njalo i Nkosi, uMhlengi kaIsrayeli, oNgcwele wakhe, kumphefumulo odelelwayo, kuye onengwa yisizwe, kunceku yababusi: Amakhosi azabona, asukume, iziphathamandla lazo zizakhonza, ngenxa ye Nkosi ethembekileyo, oNgcwele kaIsrayeli, ekukhethileyo." 
Isaiah49:8 Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Ngesikhathi esemukelekayo ngikuzwile, langosuku losindiso ngikusizile; njalo ngizakulondoloza, ngikunike ube yisivumelwano sabantu, ukumisa umhlaba, ukubenza badle amafa achithekileyo," 
Isaiah49:9 ukuze uthi kuzibotshwa: Phumani; kwabasemnyameni: Zivezeni. Bazakudla ezindleleni, ledlelo labo libe semadundulwini wonke." 
Isaiah49:10 Kabayikulamba, kumbe bome, njalo ukutshisa kumbe ilanga kakuyikubatshaya, ngoba yena olesihawu kibo uzabakhokhela, lemithonjeni yamanzi uzabaqondisa." 
Isaiah49:11 Njalo ngizakwenza zonke intaba zami zibe yindlela, lemigwaqo yami iphakame." 
Isaiah49:12 Khangela laba bazavela khatshana, njalo khangela laba bevela enyakatho njalo bevela entshonalanga, lalaba bevela elizweni leSinimi." 
Isaiah49:13 Hlabelelani, mazulu, uthokoze, lawe mhlaba, lihlokome ngokuhlabela, lani zintaba. Ngoba i Nkosi ibaduduzile abantu bayo, izakuba lesihawu kwabahluphekileyo bayo." 
Isaiah49:14 Kodwa iZiyoni yathi: UJehova ungidelile, njalo iNkosi yami ingikhohliwe." 
Isaiah49:15 Owesifazana angamkhohlwa yini umntanakhe omunyayo, ukuba angabi lasihawu kuyo indodana yesisu sakhe? Yebo, bangakhohlwa, kodwa mina kangiyikukukhohlwa." 
Isaiah49:16 Khangela, ngikubhale ngokugubha ezintendeni zezandla; imiduli yakho ihlezi iphambi kwami." 
Isaiah49:17 Abantwana bakho bazaphangisa; abachithi bakho labakumotshayo bazaphuma kuwe. 
Isaiah49:18 Phakamisa amehlo akho inhlangothi zonke, ukhangele; bonke laba bayabuthana, beze kuwe. Kuphila kwami, itsho i Nkosi: Isibili, uzazigqokisa ngabo bonke njengesiceciso, uzibhince ngabo njengomakoti." 
Isaiah49:19 Ngoba indawo zakho ezichithekileyo lamanxiwa akho, lelizwe lencithakalo yakho, lakhathesi lizaminyana kakhulu ngenxa yabahlali; lalabo abakuginyayo bazakuba khatshana." 
Isaiah49:20 Abantwana bokufelwa kwakho bazakuthi futhi endlebeni zakho: Lindawo iminyene kakhulu kimi; ngivulela indawo ukuze ngihlale! 
Isaiah49:21 Khona uzakuthi enhliziyweni yakho: Ngubani ongizalele laba, njengoba ngafelwa ngabantwana bami, ngaba yinyumba? Ngingumthunjwa, ngisiwa le lale, njalo ngubani okhulise laba? Khangela mina ngangisele ngedwa; laba babengaphi?" 
Isaiah49:22 Itsho njalo iNkosi uJehova: Khangela, ngizaphakamisela izizwe isandla sami, ngimise uphawu lwami ebantwini; njalo bazaletha amadodana akho esifubeni, lamadodakazi akho bewetshete." 
Isaiah49:23 Lamakhosi azakuba ngabondli bakho, lezindlovukazi zawo zibe ngabalizane bakho. Bazakukhothamela ngobuso emhlabathini, bakhothe uthuli lwezinyawo zakho. Njalo uzakwazi ukuthi mina ngiyi Nkosi, ukuthi abangithembayo kabayikuyangeka." 
Isaiah49:24 Impango izathathwa yini kolamandla, kumbe abathunjwa bolungileyo bakhululwe?" 
Isaiah49:25 Kodwa itsho njalo i Nkosi: Yebo, abathunjiweyo bamaqhawe bazathathwa, lempango yabesabekayo izakophulwa; ngoba mina ngizalwisana laye olwisana lawe, mina-ke ngisindise abantwana bakho." 
Isaiah49:26 Njalo ngizadlisa abacindezeli bakho eyabo inyama, badakwe ngelabo igazi kungathi ngewayini elimnandi. Njalo yonke inyama izakwazi ukuthi mina Nkosi, uMsindisi wakho, loMhlengi wakho, oLamandla kaJakobe." 
Isaiah50:1 Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Ingaphi incwadi yesehlukaniso kanyoko engimlahlileyo? Loba ngubani engilesikwelede kuye engilithengise kuye? Khangelani, lazithengisa ngenxa yeziphambeko zenu, langenxa yeziphambeko zenu unyoko walahlwa." 
Isaiah50:2 Kungani ekufikeni kwami kwakungela muntu? ekubizeni kwami engekho ophendulayo? isandla sami sifinyeziwe yini ukuthi singehlenge? kumbe kangilamandla yini okukhulula? khangela ngokukhuza kwami ngomisa ulwandle, ngenza imifula ibe yinkangala, izinhlanzi zayo zibe levumba ngoba kungelamanzi, zife ngenxa yokoma." 
Isaiah50:3 Ngigqokisa amazulu ngobumnyama, ngeze ilembu lesaka libe yisembeso sawo." 
Isaiah50:4 INkosi uJehova inginike ulimi lwabafundileyo, ukuze ngazi ukukhuluma ilizwi ngesikhathi esifaneleyo kokhatheleyo. Iyavuka ukusa ngokusa; ivusa indlebe yami, ukuze ngizwe njengofundileyo." 
Isaiah50:5 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu ivule indlebe yami, njalo kangihlamukanga, kangibuyelanga emuva." 
Isaiah50:6 Nganika umhlana wami kubatshayi, lezihlathi zami kulabo abacutha indevu zami; kangifihlanga ubuso bami ehlazweni lekukhafulelweni." 
Isaiah50:7 Ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu izangisiza; ngakho kangiyangekanga; ngakho ngimise ubuso bami njengensengetsha, njalo ngiyazi ukuthi kangiyikuyangeka," 
Isaiah50:8 useduze yena ongilungisisayo. Ngubani ongalwisana lami? Kasime ndawonye. Ngubani oyisitha sami? Kasondele kimi. 
Isaiah50:9 Khangela, i Nkosi uNkulunkulu izangisiza; ngubani ozangilahla? Khangela bonke bazaguga njengesembatho, inundu izabadla." 
Isaiah50:10 Ngubani phakathi kwenu oyesabayo i Nkosi, olalela ilizwi lenceku yayo, ohamba emnyameni, njalo engelakukhanya? Kathembele ebizweni le Nkosi, eyame kuNkulunkulu wakhe." 
Isaiah50:11 Khangelani, lina lonke eliphemba umlilo, elizigombolozela ngenhlansi, hambani ekukhanyeni komlilo wenu, laphakathi kwezikhuni elizibasileyo. Lizakwemukela lokhu esandleni sami, lizalala phansi ngobuhlungu." 
Isaiah51:1 Lalelani kimi, lina elilandela ukulunga, lina elidinga i Nkosi; khangelani edwaleni elacezulwa kulo, legodini elagejwa kulo." 
Isaiah51:2 Khangelani kuAbrahama uyihlo, lakuSara owalizalayo; ngoba ngambiza eyedwa, ngambusisa, ngamandisa." 
Isaiah51:3 Ngoba i Nkosi izayiduduza iZiyoni, iduduze wonke amanxiwa ayo, njalo izakwenza inkangala yayo ifanane leEdeni, logwadule lwayo lufanane lensimu ye Nkosi; injabulo lentokozo kuzatholakala khona, ukubonga lelizwi lokuhlabelela." 
Isaiah51:4 Lalelani kimi, bantu bami, libeke indlebe kimi, lina sizwe sami; ngoba umlayo uzaphuma kimi, njalo ngizakwenza ukwahlulela kwami kuphumule kube yikukhanya kwabantu." 
Isaiah51:5 Ukulunga kwami kuseduze, usindiso lwami luphumile, lengalo zami zizakwehlulela abantu; izihlenge zingilindele, zithembele engalweni yami." 
Isaiah51:6 Phakamiselani amehlo enu emazulwini, likhangele lemhlabeni phansi; ngoba amazulu azanyamalala njengentuthu, lomhlaba uguge njengesembatho, labahlezi kuwo bafe njengempukane; kodwa usindiso lwami luzakuba phakade, lokulunga kwami kakuyikuphela." 
Isaiah51:7 Lalelani kimi, lina elazi ukulunga, abantu abamlayo wami usenhliziyweni zabo; lingesabi ukusola kwabantu, kumbe lethuswe yikuthuka kwabo." 
Isaiah51:8 Ngoba inundu izabadla njengesembatho, lempethu ibadle njengoboya bezimvu, kodwa ukulunga kwami kuzakuba laphakade, losindiso lwami ezizukulwaneni lezizukulwana." 
Isaiah51:9 Vuka, vuka, uzembathise amandla, wena ngalo ye Nkosi; vuka njengensukwini zendulo, ezizukulwaneni zendulo. Kawusuwe yini lowo owaquma iRahabi, walimaza umgobho?" 
Isaiah51:10 Kawusuwe yini lowo owomisa ulwandle, amanzi enziki enkulu, owenza ukujula kolwandle kwaba yindlela yokuchapha abahlengiweyo?" 
Isaiah51:11 Ngakho abahlengiweyo be Nkosi bazabuya, beze eZiyoni behlabelela; lentokozo elaphakade phezu kwekhanda labo, bazazuza intokozo lenjabulo, usizi lokulila kuzabaleka." 
Isaiah51:12 Mina, mina uqobo nginguye oliduduzayo; ungubani wena ozakwesaba umuntu ozakufa, lendodana yomuntu ezakwenziwa ibe njeng otshani?" 
Isaiah51:13 Ubusukhohlwa i Nkosi, umenzi wakho, eyeneka amazulu, yabeka izisekelo zomhlaba, uqhubeka usesaba insuku zonke ngenxa yokuvutha kwentukuthelo yomcindezeli, kungathi uzimisele ukuchitha? Ingaphi-ke intukuthelo yomcindezeli?" 
Isaiah51:14 Isibotshwa esithunjiweyo siyaphangisa ukuze sikhululwe, lokuthi singafeli emgodini, njalo ukuthi ukudla kwaso kungasweleki." 
Isaiah51:15 Ngoba ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho eyadabula ulwandle, amagagasi alo ahlokoma; i Nkosi yamabandla libizo layo." 
Isaiah51:16 Ngifakile amazwi ami emlonyeni wakho, ngakusibekela emthunzini wesandla sami, ukuze ngihlanyele amazulu, ngibeke izisekelo zomhlaba, ngithi kuyo iZiyoni: Lina lingabantu bami." 
Isaiah51:17 Vuka, vuka, usukume, wena Jerusalema, wena onathe esandleni se Nkosi inkezo yolaka lwayo, wanatha inzece zenkezo zokuthuthumela, wazikhoca." 
Isaiah51:18 Kakho ongayikhokhela phakathi kwawo wonke amadodana azelwe yiyo; njalo kakho ongayibamba ngesandla kuwo wonke amadodana ewakhulisileyo. 
Isaiah51:19 Lokhu kokubili kukwehlele, ngubani ozakuzwela usizi? Incithakalo, lokubhujiswa, lendlala, lenkemba; ngizakududuza ngobani?" 
Isaiah51:20 Amadodana akho aphelelwe ngamandla, alele ezihlokweni zezitalada, njengenkunzi yendle ebanjwe embuleni; agcwele ulaka lwe Nkosi, ukukhuza kukaNkulunkulu wakho." 
Isaiah51:21 Ngakho khathesi zwana lokhu, wena ohluphekayo lodakiweyo, kodwa hatshi ngewayini." 
Isaiah51:22 Itsho njalo iNkosi yakho, uJehova loNkulunkulu wakho olabhelela udaba lwabantu bakhe: Khangela, ngisusile esandleni sakho inkezo yokuthuthumela; inzece zenkezo yolaka lwami, kawusayikuyinatha futhi;" 
Isaiah51:23 Kodwa ngizayibeka esandleni salabo abakuhluphayo, abathe emphefumulweni wakho: Khothama, ukuze sedlule phezulu; usubeke umzimba wakho njengomhlabathi, lanjengesitalada kwabadlula phezulu." 
Isaiah52:1 Vuka, vuka, wembathe amandla akho, wena Ziyoni! Yembatha izembatho zakho ezinhle, wena Jerusalema, muzi ongcwele! Ngoba kusukela khathesi kakusayikungena kuwe ongasokanga longcolileyo." 
Isaiah52:2 Zithintithe uthuli; sukuma, uhlale phansi, wena Jerusalema: zikhulule kuzibopho ezisentanyeni yakho, wena ndodakazi ethunjiweyo yeZiyoni!" 
Isaiah52:3 Ngoba itsho njalo i Nkosi: Lizithengisile ngeze; njalo lizahlengwa ngaphandle kwemali. 
Isaiah52:4 Ngoba itsho njalo iNkosi uJehova: Abantu bami behlela eGibhithe esikhathini sendulo ukuhlala njengabezizwe khona, njalo amaAsiriya abacindezela ngaphandle kwesizatho." 
Isaiah52:5 Khathesi-ke, ngiseselani lapha, itsho i Nkosi, ukuthi abantu bami bathethwe ngeze? Labo abababusayo babenza baqhinqe isililo, itsho i Nkosi; lebizo lami liqhubeka nsukuzonke lihlanjazwa." 
Isaiah52:6 Ngakho abantu bami bazalazi ibizo lami, ngalolosuku bazakwazi-ke ukuthi yimi engikhulumayo: khangela, yimi." 
Isaiah52:7 Zinhle kangakanani phezu kwezintaba inyawo zalowo oletha izindaba ezinhle, ezimemezela ukuthula, eziletha indaba ezinhle zokulunga; ezimemezela usindiso; ezithi kuyo iZiyoni: UNkulunkulu wakho uyabusa." 
Isaiah52:8 Abalindi bakho bazaphakamisa ilizwi, bahlabele kanyekanye ngelizwi, ngoba bazabona ilihlo ngelihlo, lapho i Nkosi izabuyisa futhi iZiyoni." 
Isaiah52:9 Qhamukani ngentokozo, lihlabelele kanyekanye, lina manxiwa eJerusalema, ngoba i Nkosi isibaduduzile abantu bayo, iyihlengile iJerusalema." 
Isaiah52:10 I Nkosi iwavezile ingalo yayo engcwele emehlweni phambi kwazo zonke izizwe, umhlaba wonke uzabona ukukhulula kukaNkulunkulu wethu." 
Isaiah52:11 Phumani, phumani kulo iBhabhiloni, lingathinti okungcolileyo; phumani phakathi kwalo, lizigcine lihlambulukile, lina eliphatha izitsha ze Nkosi." 
Isaiah52:12 Kaliyikuphuma ngokuphangisa, kaliyikuphuma libaleka, ngoba i Nkosi izalikhokhela, loNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli alivikele ngemuva." 
Isaiah52:13 Khangela, inceku yami izaphumelela, izakuba nkulu ibe lodumo kakhulu." 
Isaiah52:14 Abanengi batshaqeka lapho beyibona; yayilimele kakhulu ubuso bungasakhangeleki njengobomuntu, lesimo singasabukeki njengesabantu." 
Isaiah52:15 Ngokunjalo-ke izizwe ezinengi zizamangala, lamakhosi athithibale ngenxa yayo; ngoba lokho abangakubikelwanga bazakubona, lalokho abangakuzwanga bazakuqedisisa." 
Isaiah53:1 Ngubani owayengakholwa esikuzwileyo? Amandla e Nkosi embulelwa bani? 
Isaiah53:2 Ngoba inceku yakhula njengehlumela phambi kwayo, lanjengempande emhlabathini owomileyo; yayingelasithunzi lobuhle ukuthi siyibuke, yayingabukeki ukuthi siyifune." 
Isaiah53:3 Yadelelwa, yaliwa ngabantu, yaba ngumuntu wezinhlupheko, ijwayele umkhuhlane; yaba njengomuntu owenza abantu ukuthi bangamkhangeli, yeyiswa, kasiyinanzanga." 
Isaiah53:4 Isibili yathwala eyethu imikhuhlane, yathwala insizi zethu. Kanti thina sathi itshayiwe, itshayiwe nguNkulunkulu, njalo ihlutshiwe." 
Isaiah53:5 Kodwa yalinyazwa ngenxa yeziphambeko zethu, yachotshozwa ngenxa yobubi bethu, ukujeziswa kokuthula kwethu kwakuphezu kwayo, langemivimvinya yayo siyasiliswa thina." 
Isaiah53:6 Thina sonke njengezimvu siduhile; saphenduka lowo lalowo ngendlela yakhe; njalo i Nkosi yehlisele phezu kwayo ububi bethu sonke. 
Isaiah53:7 Yacindezelwa, yahlutshwa, kanti kayivulanga umlomo wayo yalethwa ekuhlatshweni njengewundlu, lanjengemvu ethuleyo phambi kwabagundi bayo kayivulanga umlomo wayo." 
Isaiah53:8 Yabotshwa yagwetshwa, yasiwa ekufeni; ngubani owananza isiphetho sayo? Ngoba yaqunywa yasuka elizweni labaphilayo, itshaywa ngenxa yeziphambeko zabantu bami." 
Isaiah53:9 Bayingcwabela phakathi kwababi, ekufeni kwayo yayilomuntu onothileyo, ngoba yona ingenzanga okubi, kungekho inkohliso emlonyeni wayo." 
Isaiah53:10 Kanti i Nkosi yathanda ukuyichoboza, ya yi hlupha. Uba umphefumulo wayo usenza umnikelo wecala, izabona inzalo yayo, yelule izinsuku, lentando ye Nkosi izaphumelela esandleni sayo." 
Isaiah53:11 Izabona okuvela ekuhluphekeni komphefumulo wayo, yeneliswe; ngolwazi lwayo inceku yami elungileyo izalungisisa abanengi, ngoba izono zabo yona izazithwala." 
Isaiah53:12 Ngakho ngizayabela kanye labakhulu, yehlukaniselane impango labalamandla; ngoba yathululela umphefumulo wayo ekufeni, yabalwa kanye lezoni; njalo yona yathwala izono zabanengi, yalabhelela izoni." 
Isaiah54:1 Hlabela, wena nyumba; kekela uthokoze, wena ongawuzwanga umhelo. Ngoba umfazi otshiywe yindoda ulabantwana abanengi kulaye olendoda, itsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah54:2 Qhelisa indawo yomuzi wakho, welule kakhulu amakhetheni ethente lakho, udonse kakhulu intambo zalo, ubethelisise lezikhonkwane zakho." 
Isaiah54:3 Ngoba uzaqhela ugcwale indawo zonke, lenzalo yakho izabusa indawo ebanzi, yakhe futhi imizi esingamanxiwa." 
Isaiah54:4 Ungesabi, ngoba kawuyikuyangeka; ungabi lenhloni, ngoba kawuyikuyangiswa; ngoba uzakhohlwa ihlazo lobutsha bakho, ungabe usakhumbula ukuyangeka kobufelokazi bakho." 
Isaiah54:5 Ngoba uMenzi wakho nguye ongumkakho, obizwa ngokuthi yi Nkosi yamabandla; longcwele kaIsrayeli ungumhlengi wakho, obizwa ngokuthi nguNkulunkulu womhlaba wonke." 
Isaiah54:6 Ngoba i Nkosi ikubizile wena unjengomfazi olahliweyo lodabukileyo emoyeni, njengomfazi wobutsha lapho esaliwe, kutsho uNkulunkulu wakho." 
Isaiah54:7 Okomzuzwana omncinyane ngakutshiya, kodwa ngesihawu esikhulu ngizakubutha." 
Isaiah54:8 Olakeni oluncinyane ngakufihlela ubuso bami okomzuzwana, kodwa ngobubele obulaphakade ngizakuhawukela, kutsho i Nkosi, uMhlengi wakho." 
Isaiah54:9 Ngoba lokho ku njeng amanzi kaNowa kimi, lapho afunga ukuthi amanzi kaNowa kawayikubuya akhukhule phezu komhlaba, ngokunjalo ngifungile ukuthi kangiyikukuthukuthelela, ngikusole." 
Isaiah54:10 Ngoba izintaba zizasuka, lamaqaqa asuswe, kodwa umusa wami kawuyikusuka kuwe, lesivumelwano sami sokuthula kasiyikususwa, kutsho i Nkosi ekuhawukelayo." 
Isaiah54:11 Wena ohluphekayo lohlukuluzwayo ongelamduduzi, khangela, ngizakwakha amatshe akho abe mahle, ngizibeke izisekelo zakho ngamatshe athiwa ngamasafire*." 
Isaiah54:12 Ngizakwakha imiphotshongo yakho ngamatshe athiwa yi-agate*, lamasango akho ngamatshe athiwa yirubi*, lomduli wakho wonke ngamatshe amahle." 
Isaiah54:13 Wonke amadodana akho azafundiswa yi Nkosi, lokuphumelela kwawo kuzakuba kukhulu." 
Isaiah54:14 Uzaqiniswa ngokulunga; uzavikeleka kucindezelo, ungesabi; uvikeleke kokwesabekayo, kakuyikusondela kuwe." 
Isaiah54:15 Uba uhlaselwa, lokho kuzabe kungaveli kimi, loba ngubani olwa lawe, uzakwehlulwa ngenxa yakho." 
Isaiah54:16 Kuyimi odale umkhandi ovuthela umlilo wamalahle, enze izikhali zomsebenzi wakhe. Kuyimi futhi odale umchithi ukuthi achithe." 
Isaiah54:17 Kakulasikhali esikhandelwa wena esizaphumelela; bonke abakumangalelayo bazakwehluleka. Sinjalo isabelo senceku ze Nkosi, lokulunga kwazo okuvela kimi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah55:1 We lina lonke elomileyo, wozani kukha amanzi, laye ongelamali keze, athenge ukudla, adle. Wozani lithenge iwayini lochago okungabizi mali." 
Isaiah55:2 Lichithelani imali yenu kulokho okungeyisikho ukudla, lamaholo enu kulokho okungenelisiyo? Ngizwisisani, lidle okuhle, lizithokozise ngezibondlo." 
Isaiah55:3 Lalelani, lize kimi, lizwe ukuze liphile; ngizakwenza lani isivumelwano esilaphakade, ngothando olwathenjiswa kuDavida." 
Isaiah55:4 Khangela, ngimnikile abe ngumfakazi ebantwini, umkhokheli lomlawuli ebantwini." 
Isaiah55:5 Khangela, uzabiza isizwe ongasaziyo, lesizwe esingakwazi sizagijimela kuwe, ngenxa ye Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, langoNgcwele kaIsrayeli, ngoba ikudumisile." 
Isaiah55:6 Dingani i Nkosi iselokutholwa, likhuleke kuyo iseseduze;" 
Isaiah55:7 omubi katshiye indlela yakhe, lomuntu ongalunganga imicabango yakhe; kabuyele e Nkosi ni, njalo izakuba lomusa kuye, lakuNkulunkulu wethu, ngoba uyathethelela ngokukhulu." 
Isaiah55:8 Ngoba imicabango yami kayifanani leyenu, lendlela zami kazifanani lezenu, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah55:9 Ngoba njengamazulu ephakeme kulomhlaba, ngokunjalo indlela zami ziphakeme kulezenu, lemicabango yami kulemicabango yenu." 
Isaiah55:10 Ngoba njengalokhu izulu lisehla leliqhwa elikhithikayo livela emazulwini, kungabuyeli khona kodwa kuthambisa umhlaba, kuwenze ukuthi uthele uhlume, unike inhlanyelo kumhlanyeli, lokudla kodlayo," 
Isaiah55:11 lizakuba njalo ilizwi lami eliphuma emlonyeni wami; kaliyikubuyela kimi lize, kodwa lizafeza lokho engikufisayo, liphumelelise lokho engilithumele khona." 
Isaiah55:12 Lizaphuma lina ngentokozo, liholwe ngokuthula; izintaba lamaqaqa kuzahlokoma ngokuhlabela phambi kwenu, lezihlahla zonke zeganga ziqakeze izandla zazo." 
Isaiah55:13 Endaweni yameva kuzamila ifiri*, lendaweni yokhula kumile umtshekisane; lokhu kuzayenzela i Nkosi udumo, kube yisikhumbuzo esilaphakade esingayikususwa." 
Isaiah56:1 I Nkosi ithi: Nanzelela okufaneleyo, wenze ukulunga, ngoba usindiso lwami luseduze ukufika, lokukhulula kwami kuzabonakaliswa." 
Isaiah56:2 Ubusisiwe umuntu owenza lokhu, lendodana yomuntu ebambelela kukho, ogcina isabatha angalingcolisi, logcina isandla sakhe ukuthi singenzi loba yikuphi okubi." 
Isaiah56:3 Owezizweni ozihlanganise le Nkosi kangatsho ukuthi: Isibili i Nkosi izangehlukanisa labantu bayo; lomthenwa ungatsho ukuthi: Mina ngiyisihlahla esomileyo. 
Isaiah56:4 Ngoba itsho njalo i Nkosi kubathenwa abagcina amasabatha ami, abakhetha engikuthandayo, ababambelela esivumelwaneni sami." 
Isaiah56:5 Ngizabanika endlini yami langaphakathi kwemiduli yami isikhumbuzo lebizo elilaphakade elingayikukhohlakala. 
Isaiah56:6 Labantwana bowemzini abazihlanganisa le Nkosi ukuyikhonza lokuthanda ibizo le Nkosi, ukuba zinceku zayo, wonke ogcina isabatha engalingcolisi, bebambelela esivumelwaneni sami." 
Isaiah56:7 Labo ngizabaletha entabeni yami engcwele, ngibathokozise endlini yami yomkhuleko; iminikelo yabo yokutshiswa lemihlatshelo yabo izakwemukeleka elathini lami, ngoba indlu yami izabizwa ngokuthi yindlu yomkhuleko yezizwe zonke." 
Isaiah56:8 INkosi uJehova obuyisa abathunjiweyo bakoIsrayeli ithi: Ngisezabuyisa abanye futhi ngaphandle kwalabo asebebuyisiwe. 
Isaiah56:9 Lina lonke zilo zeganga, lani lonke zilo zehlathi, wozani lidle." 
Isaiah56:10 Abalindi babo bonke bayiziphofu, kabalakwazi; bonke banjengezinja eziyizimungulu ezingakwaziyo ukukhonkotha; balala nje baphuphe, bathanda ubuthongo." 
Isaiah56:11 Banjengezinja eziyizihwaba, ezingasuthiyo; yebo, bangabelusi abangaziyo; bonke bazenzela abakuthandayo, kube ngulowo lalowo enanzelela eyakhe inzuzo." 
Isaiah56:12 Bathi: Wozani, ngizaletha iwayini, sizazigcwalisa okunathwayo okulamandla; lakusasa kuzakuba njalo, kube lenjabulo enkulu." 
Isaiah57:1 Olungileyo uyabhubha, kakho olendaba lakho; abantu abaqotho bayasuswa, kakho okunanzayo lokho. Ngenxa yobubi olungileyo uyasuswa," 
Isaiah57:2 ukuthi angene ekuthuleni. Labo abahamba ngobuqotho balele phansi bephumula. 
Isaiah57:3 Sondelani, lina madodana omthakathi, lina nzalo yesifebe lewule;" 
Isaiah57:4 lidlala ngobani? Likhamisela ubani imilomo yenu, linyalize inlimi zenu? Angithi lingabantwana besiphambeko, lenzalo yenkohliso," 
Isaiah57:5 lina elitsha ngenkanuko phakathi kwezihlahla ezinkulu, ngaphansi kwazo zonke izihlahla eziluhlaza, elibulalela abantwana benu ezihotsheni, langaphansi kweminkenke yamawa?" 
Isaiah57:6 Wena omubi, onkulunkulu bakho bangamatshe abutshelezi asesihotsheni; kiwo uthululele umnikelo wokunathwayo, waletha lomnikelo wokudla. Ngizathokoziswa yilokhu yini?" 
Isaiah57:7 Phezu kwentaba ende ephakemeyo ubekile umbheda wakho, wakhwela ukuyanikela khona umhlatshelo." 
Isaiah57:8 Ubekile izithombe zakho ngemva kwesivalo langemva kwensika yomnyango; wangilahla, wakhulula izigqoko zakho, walala embhedeni wakho obanzi lezithandwa zakho ozithenga ukuthi ulale lazo, ukuze ukholisise inkanuko yakho." 
Isaiah57:9 Waziqhola ngamakha, wazigcoba ngamagcobo, wayakhonza unkulunkulu uMoleki; wathuma khatshana izithunywa zakho, wazehlisela esihogweni." 
Isaiah57:10 Wadiniswa yibude bendlela yakho, kodwa kawutshongo ukuthi: Lokhu kakusizi lutho; wazuza amandla amatsha, ngakho-ke kawuphelanga amandla." 
Isaiah57:11 Wesaba bani kangaka ukuze uqambe amanga ungangikhumbuli, ungangifaki enhliziyweni yakho? Kawusangesabi ngoba ngithule okwesikhathi eside yini?" 
Isaiah57:12 Uthi okwenzayo kulungile, ngizadalula izenzo zakho, ukwenza kwakho kakuyikukusiza." 
Isaiah57:13 Lapho uhlaba umkhosi, izithombe zakho ezinengi kazikusize! Kanti umoya uzaziphephula zonke, lokuphephetha nje kuzithathe. Kodwa yena othemba kimi uzahlala elizweni, adle ilifa, intaba yami engcwele." 
Isaiah57:14 Kuzakuthiwa: Candani indlela, liyicande liyilungise, lisuse izikhubekiso zonke endleleni yabantu bami." 
Isaiah57:15 Ngoba ophakemeyo lophezulu, ohlala kuze kube nininini, obizo lakhe lingoNgcwele, uthi: Ngihlala endaweni ephakemeyo lengcwele, lakuye olomoya odabukileyo lozithobayo, ukuze ngivuselele umoya wabazithobayo, lenhliziyo edabukileyo." 
Isaiah57:16 Ngoba kangiyikulwisa njalonjalo, futhi kangiyikuthukuthela njalonjalo; ngoba umoya waphuma kimi, ngadabula abantu." 
Isaiah57:17 Ngenxa yobubi bukaIsrayeli obukhulu ngathukuthela, ngamtshaya ekuthukutheleni kwami, ngamlahla; kodwa kwaqhubeka ukuhlamuka kwakhe." 
Isaiah57:18 Sengizibonile izindlela zakhe, kodwa ngizamsilisa, ngimkhokhele, ngimsize, ngiduduze laba abakhalayo." 
Isaiah57:19 Ukuthula, ukuthula kakube kubo abakhatshana labaseduze; ngizabasilisa abantu bami." 
Isaiah57:20 Kodwa ababi banjengolwandle olutshukumayo; ngoba kalulakuphumula, lamanzi alo akhafula udaka lengcekeza." 
Isaiah57:21 Kakulakuthula lakancinyane kwababi, kutsho uNkulunkulu wami." 
Isaiah58:1 Memeza ngelizwi elikhulu, ungathuli, uphakamise ilizwi lakho njengelophondo, utshele abantu bami iziphambeko zabo, lendlu kaJakobe izono zayo." 
Isaiah58:2 Bayangidinga insuku zonke, bathanda ukwazi indlela zami, kungathi bayisizwe esithanda ukwenza ukulunga, esingatshiyi ukwehlulela kukaNkulunkulu waso, bebuza kimi izahlulelo zokulunga, bethanda ukusondela kuNkulunkulu." 
Isaiah58:3 Besithi: Sizileleni ukudla, uba ungakunanzi? Sizihluphelani, uba ungalandaba ngakho? Khangela, ngosuku lokuzila ukudla kwenu lizilela imisebenzi yenu, licindezele zonke izisebenzi zenu." 
Isaiah58:4 Khangela, lizila ukudla lisenzela ukulwisa lokuphikisana, lokutshayana kubi ngenqindi ngesikhathi esinje ukuzila ukudla kwenu kakufinyelelisi ukucela kwenu phezulu." 
Isaiah58:5 Yikho lokhu kambe ukuzila ukudla engikuthandayo, losuku lokuzisola kwabantu yini, ukuze umuntu alengise ikhanda lakhe njengomhlanga, alale phansi elenjini lesaka lemlotheni? Lokhu kambe kungathiwa yikuzila ukudla, losuku olwemukelekayo e Nkosi ni?" 
Isaiah58:6 Kayisikho lokhu ukuzila ukudla engikukhethayo yini, ukuthukululwa kwezibopho zobubi, lokukhululwa kwemichilo yejogwe, ukuze bakhululeke abacindezelweyo, kwephulwe wonke amajogwe?" 
Isaiah58:7 Kayisikho yini ukuthi wehlukanisanele ukudla kwakho labalambileyo, lokungenisa abayanga emzini wakho, lokugqokisa ohambaze lapho umbona, lokungacatsheli inyama yakho?" 
Isaiah58:8 Khona-ke ukukhanya kwakho kuzavela njengokusa, lokusiliswa kwakho kuvele masinyane; kuthi ukulunga kwakho kuhambe phambi kwakho, lenkazimulo ye Nkosi ihambe ngemva kwakho;" 
Isaiah58:9 kuthi lapho ukhuleka, i Nkosi ikuphendule, lalapho umemeza, izakuthi: Khangela ngi lapha. Uba ukhawula ucindezelo, lokukhombana ngeminwe, lokukhuluma okubi," 
Isaiah58:10 unike olambileyo ukudla, usuthise ohluphekileyo, khona-ke ukukhanya kwakho kuzaphuma emnyameni, lokudana kwakho kube njengemini." 
Isaiah58:11 I Nkosi izakukhokhela njalonjalo, ikusuthise ezindaweni ezizingwadule, iqinise amathambo akho, ube njengensimu ethelelwayo, lanjengomthombo olamanzi angacitshiyo." 
Isaiah58:12 Amadodana akho azakwakha amanxiwa akho amadala, uvuse lezisekelo ezindala. Uzakuthiwa ungumvali wesikhala lomlungisi wezindlu ezadilikayo ukuze kuhlalwe kuzo." 
Isaiah58:13 Uba uphendula unyawo lwakho lusuka kusabatha, usenza intokozo yakho ngosuku lwami olungcwele; ulibize isabatha ngokuthi yintokozo, ubungcwele be Nkosi, obuhloniphekayo; uba ulihlonipha, ungenzi indlela zakho, ungatholi intokozo yakho, loba ukhuluma ilizwi lakho," 
Isaiah58:14 uzathola intokozo kimi, ngizakukhweza ezintabeni eziphakemeyo zomhlaba, ngikuphe ilifa likaJakobe uyihlo ukuze ulidle; ngoba umlomo we Nkosi ukhulumile." 
Isaiah59:1 Isandla se Nkosi kasifinyezwanga ukuze singasizi, lendlebe yayo kayibuthundu ukuze ingezwa." 
Isaiah59:2 Kodwa ububi benu bulehlukanisile loNkulunkulu wenu, lezono zenu zibusithile ubuso bakhe ukuze angezwa." 
Isaiah59:3 Ngoba izandla zenu zingcoliswe ligazi, leminwe yenu ingcoliswe yibubi, lomlomo wenu uqambe amanga, lolimi lwenu lukhuluma ububi." 
Isaiah59:4 Kakho omangala ngendlela eqondileyo, kakho oya emthethweni ngendlela eqotho. Bathemba okuyize, bakhulume amanga, bamitha kubi, bazale ububi." 
Isaiah59:5 Bachamusela amaqanda ebululu, beluke ubulembu; odlayo emaqanda alo uyafa, kuthi kulo elichamiselweyo kuphume ibululu." 
Isaiah59:6 Ubulembu babo kabuyikuba yizembatho, labantu kabayikwembatha lokho abakwenzileyo. Imisebenzi yabo ibanga ububi, lezandla zabo zenza isihluku." 
Isaiah59:7 Balamawala okwenza okubi, baphangisa ukuchitha igazi elingelacala; amacebo abo ngamacebo obubi, lemigwaqo yabo emikhulu igcwele ukuchitheka lokubhubhisa." 
Isaiah59:8 Kabayazi indlela yokuthula, lezindlela zabo kazilakho ukulunga; benze imigwaqo yabo yaba ngamazombazombe, kakho ohamba ngayo owaziyo ukuthula." 
Isaiah59:9 Ngalokho-ke okufaneleyo kukhatshana lathi, lokulunga kakufinyeleli kithi. Sidinga ukukhanya, kodwa, khangela, sithola umnyama; sidinge imini, kodwa sihambe emnyameni." 
Isaiah59:10 Siphuthaza umduli njengesiphofu, siphuthaze njengalabo abangelamehlo; sikhubeke emini kungathi kukusihlwa, sinjengabafileyo elizweni labafileyo." 
Isaiah59:11 Siyabhonga njengamabhere, sikhale njengamajuba; sidinga ukulunga, kodwa singakutholi, sidinge ukukhululwa, kodwa kukhatshana lathi." 
Isaiah59:12 Ngoba sonile kuwe kanenginengi, lezono zethu zifakaze ngathi; ngoba siyazikhumbula zonke iziphambeko zethu, lobubi bethu siyabazi;" 
Isaiah59:13 siyaphambeka, siyiphike i Nkosi, simhlamuke uNkulunkulu wethu, sikhulume ngocindezelo langokuhlamuka, sicabange ngamanga enhliziyweni zethu siwakhulume." 
Isaiah59:14 Okufaneleyo kubuyiselwa emuva, lokulunga kumi khatshana; ngoba iqiniso liyawa ezigcawini, lobuqotho kabulandawo." 
Isaiah59:15 Iqiniso kalikho, lowehlukana lobubi uzenza impango. I Nkosi yabona lokho, kwaba kubi kuyo ukuthi ukulunga kakukho." 
Isaiah59:16 Yabona ukuthi kwakungekho muntu osizayo, yamangala ukuthi kwakungekho muntu olamulayo; yasinqoba ngamandla ayo, lokulunga kwayo kwayisekela." 
Isaiah59:17 Yembatha ukulunga njengesivikelo sesifuba, yathwala ingowane yokunqoba ekhanda layo; yagqoka izembatho zempindiselo, yazigoqela ngentukuthelo njengejazi." 
Isaiah59:18 Izaphindisela njengokwenza kwabo, yehlisela ulaka ezitheni zayo, impindiselo kwabamelana layo; izaphindisela lakuzo izihlenge." 
Isaiah59:19 Bazalesaba ibizo le Nkosi entshonalanga, besabe ubukhulu bayo kusukela lapho eliphuma khona ilanga; ngoba izafika njengomfula okhukhulayo, ofuqwa nguMoya we Nkosi." 
Isaiah59:20 Izafika eZiyoni inguMhlengi, lakulabo abakoJakobe abatshiya iziphambeko zabo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah59:21 Mina-ke, lesi yisivumelwano sami labo, itsho i Nkosi; uMoya wami ophezu kwakho, lamazwi ami engiwafake emlonyeni wakho, kawayikusuka emlonyeni wakho, lemlonyeni wenzalo yakho, lemlonyeni wenzalo yenzalo yakho, itsho i Nkosi, kusukela khathesi kuze kube phakade." 
Isaiah60:1 Vuka, Jerusalema, ukhanye, ngoba ukukhanya kwakho sekufikile, lenkazimulo ye Nkosi isikhanya phezu kwakho." 
Isaiah60:2 Khangela, umnyama uyasibekela umhlaba, lomnyama onzima usibekele izizwe; kodwa i Nkosi izakhanya phezu kwakho, lenkazimulo yayo ibonakale phezu kwakho." 
Isaiah60:3 Izizwe zizakuza ekukhanyeni kwakho, lamakhosi eze ekuveleni kokukhanya kwakho." 
Isaiah60:4 Phakamisa amehlo akho inhlangothi zonke, ubone; bayabuthana bonke, beza kuwe; amadodana akho azavela khatshana, lamadodakazi akho azabelethwa njengabantwana." 
Isaiah60:5 Khona-ke uzabona, ugcwale intokozo, lenhliziyo yakho izaphuphuma; ngoba okunengi kolwandle kuzalethwa kuwe, lenotho yezizwe izanikwa wena." 
Isaiah60:6 Indwendwe zamakamela zizakuza kuwe, lamakamela eMidiyani leEfa, lawo wonke aweShebha azakuza; azaletha igolide lenhlaka, amemezele indumiso ye Nkosi." 
Isaiah60:7 Yonke imihlambi yeKedari izabuthelwa wena, lezinqama zeNebayothi zizahlatshelwa wena, zibe ngumnikelo owemukelekayo elathini lami, kwengezelelwe udumo lwendlu yami." 
Isaiah60:8 Ngobani laba abagijima njengeyezi, bephapha njengamajuba esiya ezidlekeni zawo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Yimikhumbi ebuthana ivela ezihlengeni, ikhokhelwa yimikhumbi emikhulu, ukuletha amadodana akho evela khatshana kanye lesiliva legolide lawo, ngenxa yebizo le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho, langenxa yoNgcwele kaIsrayeli, ngoba ikunikile udumo." 
Isaiah60:10 Abezizwe bazakwakha imiduli yakho, lamakhosi abo akukhonze; ngoba elakeni lwami ngakutshaya, kodwa sengikuhawukele." 
Isaiah60:11 Amasango akho azahlala evulekile, kawayikuvalwa emini lebusuku, ukuze abantu bakulethele inotho yezizwe. lamakhosi azo aqhutshwe ebotshiwe." 
Isaiah60:12 Ngoba isizwe lombuso okungayikukukhonza kuzachitheka; lezozizwe zizaphela nya. 
Isaiah60:13 Inotho yeLebhanoni izalethwa kuwe, ifiri, lomthidari, lomkhoba, ukucecisa indlu yami engcwele; ngizakwenza indawo yenyawo zami ibe ngekhazimulayo." 
Isaiah60:14 Amadodana abakucindezelayo azakuza kuwe ukukukhonza, labo bonke abakudelelayo bakhothamele kungaphansi yenyawo zakho, bakubize ngokuthi ungumuzi we Nkosi, iZiyoni yoNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Isaiah60:15 Esikhundleni sokuthi ubutshiyiwe, uzondwa, kungasekho odabula phakathi kwakho, ngizakwenza ube lodumo kuze kube nininini, uthokozise ezizukulwaneni zonke." 
Isaiah60:16 Uzamunya uchago lwezizwe, umunye amabele amakhosi; uzakwazi ukuthi mina Nkosi nginguMsindisi wakho, lomhlengi wakho, lomninimandla kaJakobe." 
Isaiah60:17 Endaweni yethusi ngizakulethela igolide, lendaweni yensimbi ngikulethele isiliva, endaweni yesigodo ngikulethele ithusi, lendaweni yamatshe ngikulethele insimbi. Ngizakwenza ukuthula kube ngumbusi wakho, lokulunga kube yinkosi yakho." 
Isaiah60:18 Isihluku kasisayikuba khona elizweni lakho, lokuchitheka lokubhubhisa phakathi kwelizwe lakho; uzakutha imiduli yakho uthi yikuKhululwa, lamasango akho uthi yiNdumiso." 
Isaiah60:19 Ilanga kalisayikuba yikukhanya kuwe emini, lenyanga kayisayikukukhanyisela ebusuku; kodwa i Nkosi izakuba yikukhanya kwakho okulaphakade, loNkulunkulu wakho abe ludumo lwakho." 
Isaiah60:20 Ilanga lakho kalisayikutshona, lenyanga yakho kayisayikuncipha; ngoba i Nkosi izakuba yikukhanya kwakho okulaphakade, lensuku zokulila kwakho zizaphela." 
Isaiah60:21 Abantu bakho bonke bazakuba ngabalungileyo, ilizwe libe ngelabo kokuphela, babe lugatsha oluhlanyelwa yimi, umsebenzi wezandla zami, ukuze ngibe lodumo." 
Isaiah60:22 Usendo oluncinyane luzakuba ngabantu abanengi, lomncane abe yisizwe esilamandla. Ngizakwenza lokhu ngesikhathi esifaneleyo. Mina ngiyi Nkosi." 
Isaiah61:1 UMoya weNkosi uJehova uphezu kwami, ngoba iNkosi ingigcobile ukuthi ngitshumayele indaba ezinhle kubayanga, ingithumile ukubopha abalenhliziyo ezidabukileyo, ngimemezele ukukhululwa kwabathunjiweyo, lokuvulelwa kwezibotshwa entolongweni;" 
Isaiah61:2 ngimemezele umnyaka womusa we Nkosi, losuku lwempindiselo kaNkulunkulu wethu; ngiduduze bonke abalilayo," 
Isaiah61:3 nginike labo abalilayo eZiyoni imiqhele endaweni yomlotha, lamafutha enjabulo endaweni yokulila, indumiso endaweni yomoya odanileyo; ukuze babizwe ngokuthi yizihlahla zobuqotho, ezihlanyelwe yi Nkosi, ukuze izuze udumo." 
Isaiah61:4 Bazakwakha amanxiwa amadala, bavuse izindawo zakudala ezichithekileyo, balungise imizi edilikileyo, lazo zonke indawo ezindala ezichithekileyo." 
Isaiah61:5 Abezizwe bazakwelusa imihlambi yenu, babe ngabalimi benu labaphathi bezivini benu." 
Isaiah61:6 Kodwa lina lizakuthiwa lingabapristi be Nkosi, libizwe ngokuthi yizikhonzi zikaNkulunkulu wethu; lizakudla imfuyo yezizwe, lithokoze ngenotho yazo." 
Isaiah61:7 Endaweni yehlazo lenu lizakwabelwa ngokuphindiwe kabili endaweni yokudunyazwa kwenu lizajabula ngesabelo senu; ngakho-ke elizweni lenu lesabelo esiphindiwe kabili, libe lentokozo elaphakade." 
Isaiah61:8 Ngoba mina Nkosi ngithanda ukulunga, ngizonda ukuphanga lobubi; ngizabanika umvuzo wabo ngeqiniso, ngenze labo isivumelwano esilaphakade." 
Isaiah61:9 Inzalo yabo izakwaziwa phakathi kwezizwe, labantwana babo phakathi kwabantu; bonke abababonayo bazavuma ukuthi bangabantu i Nkosi ebabusisileyo." 
Isaiah61:10 Ngizathokoza kakhulu nge Nkosi, umphefumulo wami uzajabula ngoNkulunkulu wami; ngoba ingigqokise isembatho sokukhululwa, iyangembesa ngebhatshi lokulunga, njengomyeni ezicecise ngezigqoko zompristi, lanjengomakoti ezicecisa ngamatshe amahle." 
Isaiah61:11 Ngoba njengomhlaba uveza ihlumela lawo, lanjengensimu ikhulisa okuhlanyelweyo kiyo, ngokunjalo-ke iNkosi uJehova izaveza ukulunga lodumo phambi kwezizwe zonke." 
Isaiah62:1 Ngenxa yeZiyoni kangiyikuthula, langenxa yeJerusalema kangiyikuphumula, kuze kuphume ukulunga kwayo njengokukhanya, lokukhululwa kwayo njengesihlanti* esivuthayo." 
Isaiah62:2 Izizwe zizabona ukulunga kwakho, lamakhosi wonke abone inkazimulo yakho; uzabizwa ngebizo elitsha umlomo we Nkosi ozakutha lona." 
Isaiah62:3 Uzakuba ngumqhele omuhle ophethwe yi Nkosi, lomqhele wobukhosi ophethwe nguNkulunkulu wakho." 
Isaiah62:4 Kawusayikubizwa ngokuthi ngoTshiyiweyo, lelizwe lakini kalisayikuthiwa ngoLahliweyo; kodwa uzabizwa ngokuthi yiNtokozo yami, lelizwe lakini ngokuthi ngoWendileyo; ngoba i Nkosi iyathokoza ngawe, lelizwe lakini libe ngelayo." 
Isaiah62:5 Ngoba njengejaha lithatha intombi emsulwa, ngokunjalo-ke okwakhayo uzakuthatha; lanjengomyeni ethokoziswa ngumakoti, uNkulunkulu wakho uzathokoza ngawe." 
Isaiah62:6 Ngibekile abalindi phezu kwemithangala yakho, wena Jerusalema; kabayikuthula lakanye emini lebusuku. Lina elingabakhumbuzi be Nkosi lingaphumuli," 
Isaiah62:7 lingayiyekeli iphumule, ize yakhe iJerusalema, iyenze ibe lodumo emhlabeni." 
Isaiah62:8 I Nkosi ifungile ngesandla sayo sokunene, langengalo yayo elamandla yathi: Kangisayikunika izitha zakho amabele akho abe yikudla kwazo, labezizwe kabayikunatha iwayini lakho elitsha olisebenzeleyo;" 
Isaiah62:9 kodwa labo abawavunileyo bazawadla badumise i Nkosi; lalabo abazibuthayo izithelo zevini bazanatha iwayini emagumeni endlu yami engcwele. 
Isaiah62:10 Phumani ngamasango, lilungisele abantu indlela; candani umgwaqo omkhulu, likhuphe amatshe, liphakamisele abantu uphawu." 
Isaiah62:11 Khangela, i Nkosi isimemezele emhlabeni wonke yathi: Tshonini kuyo iZiyoni lithi: Khangela, iNkosi iyeza ukukusindisa; iyeza lomvuzo wayo, lenkokhelo yayo iphambi kwayo." 
Isaiah62:12 Bazabizwa ngokuthi ngabantu abangcwele, abahlengiweyo be Nkosi; wena uzakuthiwa ngoDingiweyo, umuzi ongatshiywanga." 
Isaiah63:1 Ngubani lo ovela eEdoma, evela eBozira egqoke izembatho ezibomvu, lo ocecileyo ngezigqoko zakhe, ehamba ngobukhulu bamandla akhe? Yimi engikhuluma ngokulunga, engilamandla okusiza." 
Isaiah63:2 Kungani izigqoko zakho zibomvu, lezembatho zakho zinjengezonyathela esikhamelweni sewayini?" 
Isaiah63:3 Ngisinyathele ngedwa isikhamelo sewayini, kwakungekho loyedwa ebantwini kanye lami; ngibanyathele ekuthukutheleni kwami, ngabafihliza elakeni lwami; legazi labo lachaphakela ezembathweni zami, ngingcolisile izigqoko zami zonke." 
Isaiah63:4 Ngoba ngizimisele ukwenza usuku lwempindiselo, lomnyaka wokuhlenga abantu bami usufikile." 
Isaiah63:5 Ngakhangela, kodwa kwakungekho osizayo, ngamangala, kodwa kwakungekho osekelayo; ngakho nganqoba ngeyami ingalo, lolaka lwami lwangisekela." 
Isaiah63:6 Ngasenginyathela abantu ekuthukutheleni kwami, ngabadakisa ngolaka lwami, ngachithela igazi labo phansi." 
Isaiah63:7 Ngizalandisa ngothando lwe Nkosi, ngiyidumise, ngakho konke i Nkosi esenzele khona, lobuhle obukhulu ebenzele indlu kaIsrayeli, esenzele bona ngomusa wayo, langobukhulu bothando lwayo." 
Isaiah63:8 Yathi: Isibili bangabantu bami, bangamadodana angakhohlisiyo; yaba nguMsindisi wabo" 
Isaiah63:9 ekuhluphekeni kwabo konke. Kabakhululwanga yingilosi, kodwa yabasindisa yona uqobo; ngothando lwayo langesihawu sayo yabahlenga, yabaphakamisa, yabathwala zonke izinsuku zakuqala." 
Isaiah63:10 Kodwa bayivukela, badabukisa umoya wayo ongcwele; yaphenduka yaba yisitha sabo, yalwa imelene labo." 
Isaiah63:11 Basebekhumbula insuku zakuqala zikaMozisi inceku yayo. Bathi: Ungaphi lowo owakhupha olwandle abelusi bomhlambi wakhe? Ungaphi lowo owathela uMoya wakhe oNgcwele kubo," 
Isaiah63:12 owasebenzisa amandla akhe, wenza izinto ezimangalisayo ngoMozisi, owehlukanisa amanzi phambi kwabo ukuze azenzele ibizo elingakhohlakaliyo," 
Isaiah63:13 owabadabulisa ekujuleni njengebhiza lidabula inkangala, ukuze bangakhubeki?" 
Isaiah63:14 Njengezinkomo zisehlela esigodini, uMoya we Nkosi wamphumuza. Ngokunjalo wabakhokhela abantu bakho, ukuze uzenzele ibizo elilodumo." 
Isaiah63:15 Khangela phansi usemazulwini ubone, usendaweni yakho engcwele yobukhosi. Kungaphi ukutshiseka kwakho lamandla akho? Ukuvutha kwenhliziyo yakho lesihawu sakho kugodliwe." 
Isaiah63:16 Ngoba wena ungubaba, lanxa uAbrahama engasazi loIsrayeli engasivumi; wena Nkosi ungubaba, ibizo lakho lingumhlengi wethu kusukela endulo." 
Isaiah63:17 Kungani usenza siduhe ezindleleni zakho, Nkosi, wenze inhliziyo yethu ibe lukhuni ekukwesabeni? Phenduka ngenxa yenceku zakho, izizwe zelifa lakho." 
Isaiah63:18 Kungani abantu ababi besenza indlu yakho ibe yinhlekisa? Kungani izitha zethu zingcolisa indawo yakho engcwele? 
Isaiah63:19 Sinjengalabo ongazanga ubabuse, lanjengabangabizwanga ngebizo lakho." 
Isaiah64:1 Kungathi ungadabula amazulu, wehlele phansi, izintaba zinyikinyeke ekufikeni kwakho." 
Isaiah64:2 njengomlilo utshisa insaba, lalapho ubilisa amanzi, ukuze wazise izitha zakho ibizo lakho, uzenze zithuthumele phambi kwakho," 
Isaiah64:3 ngezenzo zakho ezesabekayo ezingazanga zicatshangwe. 
Isaiah64:4 Kusukela endulo abantu kabezwanga, kababekanga indlebe, kababonanga uNkulunkulu onjengawe, osebenzela labo abamthembayo." 
Isaiah64:5 Uhlangabeza othokozayo lowenza ukulunga, labo abakukhumbulayo ezindleleni zakho. Khangela, wena wathukuthela, ngoba sasonile; kubo kulephakade, njalo sizasindiswa." 
Isaiah64:6 Sonke sinjeng oku ngcolileyo, lakho konke ukulunga kwethu zinjezidwedwe ezingcolileyo. Sonke siyabuna njengehlamvu, lobubi bethu buyasiphephula njengomoya." 
Isaiah64:7 Njalo kakho obiza ibizo lakho, ozivusela ukubambelela kuwe; ngoba usifihlele ubuso bakho, wasincibilikisa ngenxa yezono zethu." 
Isaiah64:8 Kanti, i Nkosi, wena ungubaba; thina silibumba, wena ungumbumbi wethu; sonke singumsebenzi wezandla zakho." 
Isaiah64:9 Ungathukutheli kakhulu, Nkosi, ungakhumbuli ububi kokuphela. Khangela, bona, siyancenga, sonke singabantu bakho." 
Isaiah64:10 Imizi yakho engcwele isiphenduke yaba yinkangala, iZiyoni isiphenduke yaba yinkangala, iJerusalema isichithekile." 
Isaiah64:11 Indlu yethu engcwele lemangalisayo, lapho obaba ababekudumisela khona, itshisiwe ngomlilo, lazo zonke indawo zethu ezithandekayo sezingamanxiwa." 
Isaiah64:12 Uzazithinta kukho konke lokhu yini? Uzathula, usihluphe kakhulu yini?" 
Isaiah65:1 Ngangilungele ukudingwa yilaba abangangicelanga; ngangilungele ukutholwa yilabo abangangidinganga. Ngathi: Khangelani, ngi lapha, khangelani, ngi lapha; kuso isizwe esasingakhuleki ebizweni lami." 
Isaiah65:2 Ngelula izandla zami usuku lonke kubo abantu abahlamukayo, abahamba ngendlela engalunganga, belandela imicabango yabo;" 
Isaiah65:3 abantu abangithukuthelisayo njalonjalo, besenza imihlatshelo emasimini, betshisa impepha phezu kwezitina;" 
Isaiah65:4 abahlala emangcwabeni bekhonza imimoya emibi, balala endaweni ezisithekileyo, badle inyama yengulube, benatha umhluzi wokunengekayo emganwini yabo;" 
Isaiah65:5 abathi: Ungasondeli kimi, ngoba ngingcwele kulawe. Laba banjengentuthu emakhaleni ami, lomlilo otshisayo usuku lonke." 
Isaiah65:6 Khangela, kubhaliwe phambi kwami ukuthi: Kangiyikuthula, kodwa ngizaphindisela, yebo, ngizaphindisela" 
Isaiah65:7 ububi babo lobubi baboyise kanyekanye, itsho i Nkosi. Ngoba batshisa impepha phezu kwezintaba, bangithuka phezu kwamaqaqa, ngizabaphindisela ngokubafaneleyo." 
Isaiah65:8 I Nkosi ithi: Lapho ihlukuzo lezithelo zevini lilewayini elitsha, abantu bathi: Ungaloni, ngoba liphethe isibusiso; ngakho-ke ngenxa yenceku zami kangiyikubhubhisa bonke abantu." 
Isaiah65:9 Ngizamvezela abantwana uJakobe, ngimvezele loJuda indlalifa zentaba zami; okhethiweyo wami uzakwakha khona, lenceku zami zihlale khona." 
Isaiah65:10 ISharoni izakuba lidlelo lemihlambi, lesihotsha seAkori sibe yisibaya senkomo zabantu bami abangidingayo." 
Isaiah65:11 Kodwa lina elitshiya i Nkosi, likhohlwe intaba yami engcwele, liphakulele unkulunkulu uNhlanhla ukudla, limgcwalisele inkezo ngewayini elixutshiweyo unkulunkulu uSimiselo," 
Isaiah65:12 ngizalimisela inkemba, lonke lizakhothamela ukuhlatshwa; ngoba kwathi lapho ngilibiza, kalasabela, lalapho ngikhuluma, kalilalelanga, kodwa lenza okubi emehlweni ami, lakhetha lokho engingakuthandiyo." 
Isaiah65:13 Ngakho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, inceku zami zizakudla, kodwa lina lizalamba; khangela, inceku zami zizanatha, kodwa lina lome; khangela, inceku zami zizathokoza, lina liyangeke;" 
Isaiah65:14 khangela, inceku zami zizahlabela ngentokozo, kodwa lina likhale ngenxa yokudabuka kwenhliziyo, lilile ngenxa yobuhlungu bomoya." 
Isaiah65:15 Ibizo lenu lizasetshenziswa njengesiqalekiso ngabakhethiweyo bami, leNkosi uJehova izalibulala; kodwa inceku zayo izazibiza ngelinye ibizo." 
Isaiah65:16 Loba ngubani ozibusisayo emhlabeni uzazibusisa ngoNkulunkulu weqiniso, lalowo ofungayo emhlabeni uzafunga ngoNkulunkulu weqiniso; ngoba inhlupheko zakuqala sezikhohlakele, njalo ngoba zisithekile emehlweni ami." 
Isaiah65:17 Ngoba khangela, ngiyadala amazulu amatsha lomhlaba omutsha, izinto zakuqala kazisayikukhunjulwa, kazisayikuphinda zifike engqondweni." 
Isaiah65:18 Jabulani, lithokoze njalonjalo ngalokhu engikudalayo, ngoba khangela, ngenza iJerusalema ibe yintokozo, labantu bayo babe yinjabulo." 
Isaiah65:19 Ngizathokoza ngeJerusalema, ngijabule ngabantu bami; kakusayikuzwakala kuyo ilizwi lokukhala lelizwi lokulila." 
Isaiah65:20 Kusukela lapho kakusayikuba khona ofa ebantwaneni, lixhegu elingaphelelisi insuku zalo, ngoba ofa eselekhulu leminyaka kuzakuthiwa mutsha, lalowo ongafinyeleli ekhulwini leminyaka uzakuba ngoqalekisiweyo." 
Isaiah65:21 Abantu bazakwakha izindlu, bahlale kuzo, bahlanyele izivini, badle izithelo zazo." 
Isaiah65:22 Kabayikwakha, kuhlale omunye; kabayikuhlanyela, kudle omunye; ngoba insuku zabantu bami zizakuba njengensuku zesihlahla, labakhethiweyo bami bazakudla izithelo zomsebenzi wabo." 
Isaiah65:23 Kabayikusebenzela ize, loba bazalele abantwana ukuhlupheka; ngoba bazakuba yinzalo yababusisiweyo be Nkosi, kanye labantwana babo emva kwabo." 
Isaiah65:24 Kuzakuthi bengakakhuleki kimi ngibaphendule, lalapho besakhuluma ngizwe." 
Isaiah65:25 Impisi izakudla ndawonye lewundlu, lesilwane sidle amahlanga njengenkomo, lothuli lube yikudla kwenyoka. Kaziyikulimaza, zibhubhise, entabeni yami yonke engcwele, itsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah66:1 I Nkosi ithi: Amazulu ayisihlalo sami sobukhosi, lomhlaba uyisigcabha senyawo zami; ngenjani leyondlu ebelizangakhela yona, ngenjani lendawo yami yokuphumula?" 
Isaiah66:2 Ngoba zonke lezizinto isandla sami sazenza, lazo zonke lezizinto zikhona, kutsho i Nkosi. Kodwa kulo ngizakhangela, kulowo othobekileyo, olomoya odabukileyo, lothuthumelayo elizwini lami." 
Isaiah66:3 Ohlaba inkabi unjengotshaya umuntu; onikela umhlatshelo ngewundlu unjengowephula intamo yenja; onikela umnikelo wokudla unjengonikela umnikelo ngegazi lengulube; otshisa impepha kube ngumnikelo wesikhumbuzo unjengobusisa isithombe. Konke lokhu kuyizenzo abantu abazikhethela zona, labo abazithokozisa ngezinengiso zabo." 
Isaiah66:4 Ngakho-ke ngizabakhethela inhlupheko, ngibehlisele lokho abakwesabayo; ngoba ekubizeni kwami kakho owasabelayo, lekukhulumeni kwami kabalalelanga; kodwa benza okubi emehlweni ami, bakhetha lokho engingakuthandiyo." 
Isaiah66:5 Zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi, lina elithuthumela ngelizwi layo elokuthi: Abafowenu abalizondayo, abalixotsha ngenxa yebizo lami, bathi: Kayibe lodumo i Nkosi, ukuze sibone intokozo yenu; kodwa-ke yibo abazayangeka." 
Isaiah66:6 Zwanini umsindo phakathi komuzi; umsindo ophuma ethempelini ngumsindo wokuphindisela kwe Nkosi ezitheni zayo. 
Isaiah66:7 IZiyoni ingahelelwanga yabeletha, ingakehlelwa yibuhlungu yabeletha indodana." 
Isaiah66:8 Ngubani owake wezwa okunje? Ngubani owake wabona okunje? Kambe ilizwe lingazalwa ngosuku olulodwa? Lesizwe singabelethwa ngesikhatshana yini? Ngoba iZiyoni ithe isahelelwa, yazala abantwana bayo." 
Isaiah66:9 Ngizavula isizalo kodwa ngingenzi, ukuthi kuzalwe yini? kutsho i Nkosi. Kuzakuthi mina engenza ukuthi kuzalwe, ngibuye ngivale isizalo yini? utsho uNkulunkulu wakho." 
Isaiah66:10 Thokozani kanye leJerusalema, liyithabele, lina lonke eliyithandayo; jabulani kanye layo khathesi, lina lonke eliyililelayo;" 
Isaiah66:11 ukuze limunye, lisuthe emabeleni ayo anika induduzo, lokuze lithokoze ngochago lwayo olunengi." 
Isaiah66:12 Ngoba i Nkosi ithi: Khangelani, ngizalinika ukuthula okuzagelezela kini njengomfula, lenotho yezizwe enjengesifula esigcweleyo; lani lizamunya, liphathwe emathangazini alo, lidlaliswe emadolweni." 
Isaiah66:13 Njengonina eduduza umntwana wakhe, lami ngizaliduduza lina, liduduzeke eJerusalema." 
Isaiah66:14 Lizabona lokhu, lenhliziyo yenu ithokoze; lemizimba yenu ikhule iqine; kuzakwaziwa ukuthi isandla se Nkosi sesisencekwini zayo, izithukuthelele izitha zayo." 
Isaiah66:15 Ngoba khangela, i Nkosi izafika ngomlilo, izinqola zayo zibe njengesivunguzane, ukwehlisela intukuthelo yayo ngokufutheka, lokukhuza kwayo ngamalangabi omlilo." 
Isaiah66:16 Ngoba i Nkosi izakwehlulela ngomlilo langenkemba yayo yonke inyama, banengi ezababulala." 
Isaiah66:17 Labo abazehlukanisela ukungena ensimini yokukhonzela, bezihlambulula, belandelana, besidla inyama yezingulube, lesinengiso, lamagundwane, imisebenzi yabo lemicabango yabo izaphela, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah66:18 Ngiyeza ukubutha zonke izizwe lemihlobo yonke, kuzafika, kubone ubukhulu bami." 
Isaiah66:19 Ngizabeka isibonakaliso phakathi kwazo, ngithume abaseleyo ezizweni, eTarshishi, lePhuli, leLudi, badonsa idandili, leTubali, leJavani, kuzihlenge ezikhatshana ezingakezwa udumo lwami, ezingakaboni ubukhulu bami; bazalandisa ngodumo lwami phakathi kwezizwe." 
Isaiah66:20 Bazabuyisa bonke abafowenu bebakhupha kuzo zonke izizwe, babe yisipho e Nkosi ni; bazababuyisa ngamabhiza langezinqola, langamathala, langezimbongolo, langamakamela, entabeni yami engcwele iJerusalema, kutsho i Nkosi, njengabantwana bakoIsrayeli beletha iminikelo yabo yempuphu ngezitsha zabo ezihlambulukileyo endlini ye Nkosi." 
Isaiah66:21 Abanye babo ngizabenza babe ngabapristi lamaLevi, itsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah66:22 Njengalokhu amazulu amatsha lomhlaba omutsha engizakwenza kuzakuma kokuphela phambi kwami, kutsho i Nkosi, ngokunjalo-ke inzalo yakho lebizo lakho kuzakuma kokuphela." 
Isaiah66:23 Inyanga ngenyanga ekuthwaseni kwenyanga, ngeviki ngeviki ngesabatha, yonke inyama izakuza, idumise phambi kwami, itsho i Nkosi." 
Isaiah66:24 Bazaphuma, babone izidumbu zabantu abangivukelayo; impethu edla izidumbu kayiyikufa, lomlilo ozitshisayo kawuyikucitsha; bazakuba yisinengiso kuyo yonke inyama." 
Jeremiah1:1 Amazwi kaJeremiya, indodana kaHilikhiya omunye wabapristi ababeseAnathothi elizweni lakoBhenjamini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuye ensukwini zikaJosiya indodana kaAmoni, inkosi yakoJuda, ngomnyaka wetshumi lantathu wokubusa kwakhe;" 
Jeremiah1:3 lafika futhi ensukwini zikaJehoyakhimi indodana kaJosiya, inkosi yakoJuda, kwaze kwaba sekupheleni komnyaka wetshumi lanye kaZedekhiya indodana kaJosiya, inkosi yakoJuda, kwaze kwaba sekuthunjweni kweJerusalema enyangeni yesihlanu." 
Jeremiah1:4 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lisithi: 
Jeremiah1:5 Ngingakakubumbi esiswini ngakwazi, ungakazalwa ngakwehlukanisa, ngakubeka umprofethi ezizweni." 
Jeremiah1:6 Ngasengisithi: Hawu Nkosi Jehova! Khangela, angikwazi ukukhuluma ngoba ngingumntwana nje." 
Jeremiah1:7 Kodwa i Nkosi yathi kimi: Ungatsho ukuthi: Ngingumntwana nje, ngoba kubo bonke engikuthuma kubo uzakuya, lakho konke engikulaya khona uzakukhuluma." 
Jeremiah1:8 Ungabesabi, ngoba ngilawe ukukuvikela, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah1:9 I Nkosi yasiselula isandla sayo, yathinta umlomo wami, yathi kimi: Khangela, sengibekile amazwi ami emlonyeni wakho." 
Jeremiah1:10 Ngiyakubeka lamuhla phezu kwezizwe laphezu kwemibuso, ukusiphuna lokudiliza, ukubhubhisa lokuchitha, ukwakha lokuhlanyela." 
Jeremiah1:11 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lisithi: Jeremiya, ubonani? Ngathi: Ngibona uswazwi lwe-alimondi*." 
Jeremiah1:12 I Nkosi yasisithi kimi: Ubone kuhle, ngoba ngiyalilinda ilizwi lami ukuze ngilenze." 
Jeremiah1:13 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi ngokwesibili lisithi: Ubonani? Ngathi: Ngibona imbiza ebilayo, ifulathele enyakatho." 
Jeremiah1:14 I Nkosi yasisithi kimi: Okubi kuzaqubuka enyakatho, kubehlele bonke abakhileyo elizweni." 
Jeremiah1:15 Ngoba khangela, ngiyabiza izizwe zonke zemibuso yenyakatho, kutsho i Nkosi; amakhosi azo azafika, wonke azamisa izihlalo zawo zobukhosi emasangweni eJerusalema, azingelezele imiduli yayo yonke, lemizi yonke yakoJuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ngizabamemezelela izigwebo zami ngenxa yabo bonke ububi babo ngokungihlamuka kwabo. Batshisela abanye onkulunkulu impepha, bakhonza imisebenzi yezandla zabo." 
Jeremiah1:17 Kodwa wena, bopha ukhalo lwakho, usuke, ukhulume kibo konke engikulaya khona. Ungabesabi, hlezi ngehlisele phezu kwakho ukwesaba phambi kwabo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Ngoba khangela, ngikwenzile lamuhla waba njengomuzi obiyelweyo, lensika yensimbi, lemiduli yethusi, ukumelana lelizwe lonke, wonke amakhosi akoJuda, leziphathamandla zalo, labapristi balo, labantu balo." 
Jeremiah1:19 Bazakulwa bemelene lawe, kodwa kabayikukwehlula, ngoba ngilawe ukukuvikela, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah2:1 Laselifika kimi ilizwi le Nkosi lisithi: 
Jeremiah2:2 Hamba uyememezela eJerusalema uthi: I Nkosi ithi: Ngiyakhumbula uthembeko lwakho usemutsha, lothando lwakho usengumakoti, lokungilandela kwakho enkangala, elizweni elingahlanyelwanga." 
Jeremiah2:3 UIsrayeli wayengcwele e Nkosi ni, eyizithelo zokuqala zesivuno sayo. Bonke abazidlayo baba lecala, behlelwa ngokubi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah2:4 Zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi, lina ndlu kaJakobe, lani lonke sendo lwendlu yakoIsrayeli." 
Jeremiah2:5 I Nkosi ithi: Yibubi bani oyihlo ababuthola kimi ukuze basuke baye khatshana lami, balandele lokho okuyize, babe yize?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Kabatshongo ukuthi: Ingaphi i Nkosi eyasikhupha elizweni leGibhithe, yasikhokhela enkangala, elizweni eliligwadule lelilemigodi, elizweni elomileyo elimnyama kakhulu, elizweni elingahanjwa muntu, lalapho okungahlali muntu khona?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ngalingenisa elizweni elivundileyo ukuze lidle izithelo zalo lokuhle kwalo. Kodwa lapho selingenile lalingcolisa ilizwe lami, lenza ilizwe engalinika lona laba ngamanyala." 
Jeremiah2:8 Abapristi kabatshongo ukuthi: Ingaphi i Nkosi? Lalabo abaphatha umlayo kabangazanga. Ababusi baphambuka kimi, labaprofethi baprofetha ngoBhali, balandela izithombe ezingasizi lutho." 
Jeremiah2:9 Ngakho-ke ngilibeka icala, kutsho i Nkosi, ngizabeka icala labantwana babantwana benu." 
Jeremiah2:10 Hambani liye ezihlengeni zeKuprosi libone, lithume abantu eKedari lihlolisise, libone ukuthi yake yaba khona into enjengale yini?" 
Jeremiah2:11 Isizwe sake santshintsha onkulunkulu baso, loba bengesibo onkulunkulu balutho yini? Kodwa abantu bami bangintshintshile mina enginguNkulunkulu wabo obalethela udumo ngonkulunkulu ongasizi lutho." 
Jeremiah2:12 Mangalani ngalokho, lina mazulu, lithuthumele, lidane kakhulu, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah2:13 Ngoba abantu bami benzile izinto ezimbi ezimbili; bangihlamukele, mina mthombo wamanzi aphilayo, bazigebhela imithombo etshayo, engabambi manzi." 
Jeremiah2:14 UIsrayeli uyisigqili, wazalwa eyisigqili yini? Pho, waba yimpango njani?" 
Jeremiah2:15 Amabhongo ezilwane asembhongele, zakhonya kakhulu. Zenza ilizwe lakhe laba yinkangala, lemizi yakhe ingamanxiwa, kayiselamuntu." 
Jeremiah2:16 Futhi labantu baseMemfisi leTahafanesi baphucile ikhanda lakho. 
Jeremiah2:17 Wena Israyeli, kawuzehliseli lokhu ngokuhlamuka i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho lapho ikukhokhela endleleni yini?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Ngakho uzuzani ngokuya eGibhithe, ukuthi unathe amanzi eNile? Futhi uzuzani ngokuya eAsiriya, ukuthi unathe amanzi eYufrathi?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Ububi bakho buzakutshaya, lokuhlehlela kwakho emuva kuzakukhuza. Yazi, ubone ukuthi kuyinto embi lebabayo ukuyihlamukela i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho, lokuthi ukungesaba kakukho kuwe, kutsho iNkosi uJehova wamabandla." 
Jeremiah2:20 Wephula ijogwe lakho endulo, waziqamula izibopho zakho, wathi wena: Kangiyikukukhonza. Kodwa phezu kwalo lonke uqaqa oluphakemeyo, langaphansi kwezihlahla zonke eziluhlaza, walala njengesifebe." 
Jeremiah2:21 Kukanti mina ngakuhlanyela ulivini elihle, uyinhlanyelo elungileyo kuphela. Pho-ke, usuphenduke njani waba mubi, waba livini elibi?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Ngoba uba ugeza ngesoda, usebenzise isepa enengi, ububi bakho busekhona phambi kwami, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Jeremiah2:23 Ungatsho njani ukuthi: Kangingcolanga, kangilandelanga oBhali? Khangela ukuziphatha kwakho esigodini, wazi ukuthi wenzeni. Unjengekamela elisikazi elizulazulayo emzileni yalo," 
Jeremiah2:24 lanjengobabhemi weganga owejwayele inkangala, ophembela umoya ekukhanukeni kwakhe. Ngubani ongavimbela inkanuko yakhe? Bonke abamdingayo kabangazikhathazi, bazamthola ngesikhathi sokukhwelwa." 
Jeremiah2:25 Ungazidinisi ngokuhambahamba ulandela abanye onkulunkulu, loba uzibulale ngomhawu. Kodwa wena wathi: Hatshi, kangiyekeli, ngoba ngithandile abezizweni, ngizabalandela." 
Jeremiah2:26 Njengoba isela lilenhloni lapho selibanjiwe, kunjalo indlu kaIsrayeli izakuba lenhloni, bona kanye lamakhosi abo, leziphathamandla zabo, labapristi babo, labaprofethi babo," 
Jeremiah2:27 abathi esihlahleni: Wena ungubaba; abathi lelitsheni: Wena wasizala. Ngoba bangifulathela, kabangikhangelanga. Kodwa ngesikhathi sokuhlupheka kwabo bathi: Vuka, usikhulule!" 
Jeremiah2:28 Kanti bangaphi onkulunkulu bakho ozenzele bona? Kabavuke bona uba bengakukhulula ngesikhathi sokuhlupheka kwakho; ngoba onkulunkulu bakho banengi njengemizi yakho, wena Juda." 
Jeremiah2:29 Lingisolelani? Lingihlamukele lonke, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah2:30 Kwaba yize ukubatshaya kwami abantwana benu, kabakwemukelanga ukulaywa. Inkemba yenu ibadlile abaprofethi bakho njengesilwane esichithayo." 
Jeremiah2:31 Wena sizukulwana, lalela ilizwi le Nkosi. Benginjengenkangala kuIsrayeli, lelizwe elilomnyama omkhulu yini? Pho-ke, batsholoni abantu bami ukuthi: Sesikhululekile, kasisayikuza kuwe futhi?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Intombi emsulwa ingazikhohlwa yini iziceco zayo lomakoti izembatho zakhe? Kanti abantu bami bangikhohliwe insuku ezingelakubalwa. 
Jeremiah2:33 Uyazi kuhle indlela yokudinga amakhwa, uze wafundisa abesifazana ababi indlela zakho." 
Jeremiah2:34 Lezigqokweni zakho kutholakala igazi labayanga abangelacala; kawubatholanga befohlela. Kanti kukho konke lokho uthi: 
Jeremiah2:35 Kangilacala; ngakho intukuthelo yakhe isukile kimi. Khangela, ngizakugweba ngoba uthi: Kangonanga." 
Jeremiah2:36 Kulula kuwe kangaka ukuntshintsha indlela yakho. Uzayangiswa yiGibhithe, njengoba wayangiswa yiAsiriya." 
Jeremiah2:37 Uzaphuma lalapho uthwele imikhono yakho ekhanda, ngoba i Nkosi ibalahlile labo obathembayo, kawuyikuphumelela ngabo." 
Jeremiah3:1 Bathi: Uba indoda isehlukana lomkayo, abesesiba ngowenye indoda, isezambuyisa yini? Lelolizwe belingayikungcoliswa kakhulu yini? Kanti wena usufebile lezithandwa ezinengi, usabuya kimi yini? kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah3:2 Phakamisela amehlo akho emadundulwini angelalutho, ubone. Kungaphi lapho ongalalelwanga khona? Ezindleleni wahlalela izithandwa njengomArabhiya enkangala. Ulingcolisile ilizwe ngobufebe bakho obubi." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ngenxa yalokho izihlambo zinqandiwe, lezulu lentwasa kalinanga. Kanti ulesibindi sesifebe, kawulanhloni." 
Jeremiah3:4 Kawusand’ukumemeza kimi yini ukuthi: Baba, wena ungumngane wobutsha bami?" 
Jeremiah3:5 Uzahlala uthukuthele njalonjalo, elolaka kuze kube sekucineni yini? Khangela, utsho njalo wena, kodwa uphikilele ukwenza konke okubi." 
Jeremiah3:6 I Nkosi yathi kimi ensukwini zenkosi uJosiya: Ubonile yini okwenziwe nguIsrayeli ongathembekanga? Ukhwelile kuzo zonke intaba, langaphansi kwezihlahla zonke eziluhlaza uphingile khona." 
Jeremiah3:7 Ngathi uzabuya kimi esekwenzile konke lokhu; kodwa kabuyanga, lodadewabo ongathembekanga uJuda wakubona lokho." 
Jeremiah3:8 Wabona ukuthi ngenxa yobufebe bonke bukaIsrayeli ongathembekanga, ngamxotsha ngamnika lencwadi yesehlukaniso; kodwa udadewabo ongathembekanga uJuda kesabanga, laye wasuka wafeba." 
Jeremiah3:9 Ngoba ubufebe babuyinto elula kuye wangcolisa ilizwe ngokufeba kwakhe langokukhonza amatshe lezihlahla. 
Jeremiah3:10 Kodwa kukho konke lokho udadewabo ongathembekanga uJuda kabuyanga kimi ngenhliziyo yonke, kuphela ngokuzenzisa nje, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah3:11 I Nkosi yathi kimi: UIsrayeli ongathembekanga ungcono kuloJuda okhohlisayo. 
Jeremiah3:12 Hamba uyememezela lamazwi ngenyakatho uthi: Buya wena Israyeli ongathembekanga, kutsho i Nkosi. Kangiyikukuthukuthelela, ngoba ngilesihawu, itsho i Nkosi. Kangiyikuthukuthela kokuphela." 
Jeremiah3:13 Vuma kuphela icala lakho ukuthi uyihlamukele i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho, wakhonza onkulunkulu bezizweni ngaphansi kwazo zonke izihlahla eziluhlaza, lokuthi kawulalelanga ilizwi lami kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah3:14 Buyani, bantwana abangathembekanga, kutsho i Nkosi; ngoba ngiyiNkosi yenu. Ngizalithatha, abe munye emzini, babe babili kulo usendo, ngililethe eZiyoni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Ngizalinika abelusi abathandekayo kimi, abazalelusa ngokwazi langokuhlakanipha." 
Jeremiah3:16 Kuzakuthi lapho selandile laba banengi elizweni, ngalezonsuku kabasayikukhuluma ngomtshokotsho wesivumelwano se Nkosi, kutsho i Nkosi. Kakusayikucatshangwa ngawo, kawusayikukhunjulwa, kawusayikuhanjelwa, kakusayikwenziwa omunye." 
Jeremiah3:17 Ngalesosikhathi iJerusalema izakuthiwa yisihlalo sobukhosi se Nkosi; zonke izizwe zizabuthana khona, phambi kwe Nkosi eJerusalema; kazisayikulandela inhliziyo zazo ezilenkani." 
Jeremiah3:18 Ngalezonsuku indlu yakoJuda izahlangana lendlu yakoIsrayeli, ziphume kanyekanye elizweni lenyakatho, zize elizweni engalinika oyihlo ukuze libe ngelabo." 
Jeremiah3:19 Mina bengisithi ngizakubeka njani phakathi kwabantwana bami, ngikunike ilizwe elihle, ilizwe elihle kakhulu phakathi kwazo zonke izizwe. Ngathi uzangibiza ngokuthi Baba, ungadeli ukungilandela." 
Jeremiah3:20 Isibili, njengomfazi ongathembekanga etshiya umkakhe, lawe ungikhohlisile, wena ndlu kaIsrayeli, itsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah3:21 Ilizwi liyezwakala emadundulwini angelalutho, elokukhala lokukhuleka kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli, ngoba beyonile indlela yabo, bayikhohlwa i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Buyani, lina bantwana abangathembekanga. Ngizakwelapha ukungathembeki kwenu. Khangela, siyeza kuwe, ngoba wena uyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Isibili ukukhonza phezu kwamaqaqa kakusizi lutho kanye lomsindo wakhona. Isibili ukukhululwa kukaIsrayeli kuse Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wethu. 
Jeremiah3:24 UBhali, into elehlazo iqedile umsebenzi wabobaba kusukela ebutsheni bethu, izimvu zabo lenkomo zabo, amadodana abo lamadodakazi abo." 
Jeremiah3:25 Asilale phansi silenhloni, sibanjwe zinhloni zethu; ngoba sonile e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wethu, thina labobaba, kusukela ebutsheni bethu kuze kube lamuhla; kasilalelanga ilizwi le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu." 
Jeremiah4:1 Uba uphenduka, wena Israyeli, kutsho i Nkosi, phendukela kimi. Uba ususa phambi kwami izinengiso zakho, ungasuki kimi," 
Jeremiah4:2 futhi uzafunga: Kuphila kukaJehova, ngeqiniso, ngokwahlulela, langokulunga; lezizwe zizabusiswa kuyo, lakuyo zizincome." 
Jeremiah4:3 Ngoba i Nkosi ithi ebantwini bakoJuda labeJerusalema: Qhathani ingqatho yenu, lingahlanyeli phakathi kwameva." 
Jeremiah4:4 Zisokeleni e Nkosi ni, ukusoka kwenu kube ngokwenhliziyo, lina bantu bakoJuda labeJerusalema, hlezi ulaka lwami luphembeke njengomlilo, luthungele, kungabi khona ongalucitsha, ngenxa yezenzo zenu ezimbi." 
Jeremiah4:5 Khulumani koJuda, limemeze eJerusalema lithi: Vuthelani uphondo elizweni, limemeze kakhulu lithi: Buthanani, singene emizini ebiyelweyo." 
Jeremiah4:6 Misani uphawu olukhomba iZiyoni, libaleke lingemi, ngoba ngiletha okubi okuvela ngenyakatho, lokuchitheka okukhulu." 
Jeremiah4:7 Isilwane siphumile ehlathini laso, umchithi wezizwe uyeza, uphumile endaweni yakhe ukuze achithe ilizwe lakho; lemizi yakho izakuba ngamanxiwa, kungabi khona umuntu kuyo." 
Jeremiah4:8 Ngenxa yalokho yembatha amalembu amasaka, ukhale ulile; ngoba ulaka lwe Nkosi olwesabekayo kaluhlehlanga kithi." 
Jeremiah4:9 Kuzakuthi ngalolosuku, kutsho i Nkosi, amakhosi aphelelwe yisibindi kanye leziphathamandla; abapristi bazamangala, labaprofethi bethuke." 
Jeremiah4:10 Ngasengisithi: Hawu, Nkosi Jehova! ubakhohlisile isibili lababantu kanye leJerusalema ngokuthi: Lizakuba lokuthula; kanti inkemba ifinyelela emphefumulweni." 
Jeremiah4:11 Ngalesosikhathi kuzakuthiwa kulabobantu lakuyo iJerusalema: Umoya otshisayo ovela enkangala emadundulwini angelalutho, uyavunguza phezu kwabantu bami, ungeyisiwo wokwela lokuhlungula," 
Jeremiah4:12 kodwa umoya olamandla, uyeza uthunywe yimi. Mina uqobo ngizabagweba." 
Jeremiah4:13 Khangela, umufo uyeza njengamayezi, inqola zakhe zinjengesivunguzane, lamabhiza akhe alejubane kulokhozi. Maye babo, ngoba sichithekile!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Wena Jerusalema, hlambulula inhliziyo yakho kuphume ububi, ukuze uphephe. Koze kube nini imicabango yakho emibi ihlala phakathi kwakho?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ngoba ilizwi liyamemeza lisuka koDani, libika okubi kuvela entabeni yakoEfrayimi." 
Jeremiah4:16 Xwayisani izizwe ukuthi uyeza, khangela, bikani kuyo iJerusalema lithi: Kufika abavimbezeli bevela elizweni elikhatshana; bayamemeza kuyo imizi yakoJuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Njengabalindi bensimu balihanqa inhlangothi zonke, ngoba lingihlamukele, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah4:18 Ukuhamba kwakho lezenzo zakho kukulethele lokho. Lokhu kuyikuphela kwakho, kuyababa, sekufinyelele enhliziyweni yakho uqobo." 
Jeremiah4:19 Ngilobuhlungu obukhulu, ngiyazitshila ngenxa yobuhlungu. Maye inhliziyo yami! Inhliziyo yami iyatshaya, kangilakuthula; ngoba ngizwile ukukhala kophondo, lomkhosi wempi." 
Jeremiah4:20 Ukuchitheka kulandela ukuchitheka, ilizwe lonke lichithekile. Amathente ethu adilikile masinyane, lamakhetheni awo ngokucwayiza kwelihlo." 
Jeremiah4:21 Koze kube nini ngibona isiboniso, ngizwe ukukhala kophondo?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Abantu bami bayizithutha, kabangazi; bangabantwana abayiziphukuphuku, kabalakuqedisisa. Bahlakaniphele ukwenza okubi, kodwa ukwenza okuhle kabakwazi." 
Jeremiah4:23 Ngabona umhlaba, khangela, wawuze ungelalutho, lamazulu ayengelakukhanya." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ngabona izintaba, khangela, zazinyikinyeka, lamaqaqa wonke ayenyakazela." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ngabona, khangela, kakulamuntu, lenyoni zonke zamazulu zasezibalekile." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ngabona, khangela, ilizwe elivundileyo liyinkangala, lemizi yalo yonke yayidiliziwe phambi kwe Nkosi, laphambi kolaka lwayo oluvuthayo." 
Jeremiah4:27 Ngoba i Nkosi ithe: Ilizwe lonke lizachitheka, kodwa kangizukuliqeda ngokupheleleyo." 
Jeremiah4:28 Ngenxa yalokho umhlaba uzalila lamazulu aphezulu abe mnyama; ngoba sengikukhulumile engikuqondileyo; kangiyikuzisola, ngibuyele emuva." 
Jeremiah4:29 Imizi yonke iyabaleka ngenxa yomsindo wabagadi bamabhiza labaphathi bamadandili; bangena ezixukwini bakhwele emadwaleni, imizi yonke isele ize, kakho ohlala kiyo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Wena-ke, uzakwenzani? Loba ugqoka okubomvu, ufaka izigqizo zegolide, ugcoba amehlo akho ngomuthi, uzicecisela ize, ngoba izithandwa zakho ziyakudelela, zidinga ukukubulala." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ngoba ngizwile ilizwi kungathi ngelowesifazana ohelelwayo, ukukhala okubuhlungu okunjengokozibulayo; yikukhala kweZiyoni ekhefuzelayo, iselula izandla zayo isithi: Maye mina! Ngiphelelwa ngamandla ngoba nampa ababulali bayeza." 
Jeremiah5:1 Gijimani, lizulazule ezindleleni zeJerusalema, lizibonele; licinge emagumeni ayo, libone ukuthi lingathola umuntu owenza ukulunga, odinga iqiniso, ukuze ngiyithethelele." 
Jeremiah5:2 Loba besithi: Kuphila kukaJehova; kanti bafunga amanga nje. 
Jeremiah5:3 Nkosi, amehlo akho kawathandi ukubona iqiniso yini? Wena ubatshayile, kodwa kabezwanga ubuhlungu; ubaqothule, kodwa bala ukulaywa. Benza inhliziyo zabo zaba lukhuni kulelitshe, bala ukuphenduka." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ngasengisithi: Laba bangabayanga nje, ayiziphukuphuku; ngoba kabayazi indlela ye Nkosi lomlayo kaNkulunkulu wabo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Sengizakuya kwabakhulu, ngikhulume labo, ngoba bona bayayazi indlela ye Nkosi lomlayo kaNkulunkulu wabo. Kodwa labo babelephulile ijogwe, baqamula izibopho." 
Jeremiah5:6 Ngakho-ke isilwane sasehlathini sizabatshaya, babhujiswe yimpisi yasenkangala, lengwe iyicathamele imizi yabo, bonke abaphuma kiyo bazabanjwa; ngoba iziphambeko zabo zinengi, lokuhlehlela kwabo emuva kwandile." 
Jeremiah5:7 Ngingakuthethelela njani ngalokhu na? Abantwana bakho bangitshiyile, bafunga ngabangeyisibo onkulunkulu. Sengibasuthisile kodwa bafeba, baminyana endlini yesifebe." 
Jeremiah5:8 Babenjengamabhiza anonileyo akhwelayo, omunye lomunye ekhalela umfazi kamakhelwane wakhe." 
Jeremiah5:9 Kangiyikubajezisa ngenxa yezinto lezi yini? kutsho i Nkosi; kangiyikuphindisela esizweni esinje yini? 
Jeremiah5:10 Ngenani emavinini alo liwachithe, kodwa lingawaqedi ngokupheleleyo; susani ingatsha zalo, ngoba kazisizo ze Nkosi." 
Jeremiah5:11 Indlu kaIsrayeli lendlu kaJuda zingikhohlisile ngokupheleleyo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah5:12 Bayiphikile i Nkosi, bathi: Kayilamsebenzi. Kakuyikusehlela okubi, kasiyikubona inkemba lendlala." 
Jeremiah5:13 Abaprofethi bazakuba ngumoya nje, kabalalo ilizwi. Kuzakwenziwa njalo kibo!" 
Jeremiah5:14 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wamabandla, ithi: Khangela, njengoba batsho njalo, ngizakwenza amazwi ami emlonyeni wakho abe ngumlilo, lalabobantu babe zinkuni, umlilo ubaqede." 
Jeremiah5:15 Khangela, ngizakulethela isizwe esivela khatshana, wena ndlu kaIsrayeli, kutsho i Nkosi. Yisizwe esilamandla, yisizwe esidala, yisizwe ongalwaziyo ulimi lwaso, longayikuzwa lokho esikukhulumayo." 
Jeremiah5:16 Abatshoki baso bayesabeka, bonke bangamaqhawe." 
Jeremiah5:17 Bazakudla amabele akho lokudla kwakho, badle amadodana akho lamadodakazi akho, badle izimvu zakho lenkomo zakho, badle amavini akho lemikhiwa yakho; lemizi yakho ebiyelweyo othembela kiyo, bazayichitha." 
Jeremiah5:18 Kodwa langalezonsuku kangiyikuliqeda ngokupheleleyo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah5:19 Kuzakuthi lapho abakini besithi: I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wethu, yenzeleni zonke lezizinto kithi? uzakuthi kibo: Njengoba lingihlamukele, lakhonza abanye onkulunkulu elizweni lakini, lizasebenzela abantu bezizwe elizweni elingeyisilo elenu." 
Jeremiah5:20 Memezani lokhu endlini kaJakobe, likutshumayele lakoJuda ukuthi:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Zwanini lokhu, lina bantu abayizithutha labayiziphukuphuku, elilamehlo kodwa lingaboni, elilendlebe kodwa lingezwa." 
Jeremiah5:22 Kalingesabi yini? kutsho i Nkosi. Kalithuthumeli phambi kwami yini? Ngabeka itshebetshebe laba ngumngcele wolwandle, umngcele oqinileyo olungelakuwudlula; lanxa amagagasi etshayana angaweqe, lanxa ehlokoma, kawalakudlula phezu kwalo." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kodwa lababantu balenhliziyo elukhuni ehlamukayo, baphambukile, bangitshiya." 
Jeremiah5:24 Kabatsho enhliziyweni zabo ukuthi: Asiyesabe i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu, esinika izulu ngesikhathi salo, ehlobo lentwasa, isimisele amaviki akhethelwe isivuno." 
Jeremiah5:25 Ububi benu buvimbele konke lokhu, lezono zenu zilivalela okuhle." 
Jeremiah5:26 Ngoba phakathi kwabantu bami kukhona abantu ababi, abacathamayo njengabathiyi becathamele inyoni, bathiya abantu ngemijibila yabo." 
Jeremiah5:27 Njengesitsha sigcwele inyoni, indlu zabo zigcwele inkohliso; ngalokhu-ke sebebakhulu banothile," 
Jeremiah5:28 bakhuluphele; kabalamkhawulo ekwenzeni kwabo okubi, kabameli ukulunga lezintandane ukuze ziphumelele, kabavikeli amalungelo abaswelayo." 
Jeremiah5:29 Kangiyikubatshaya ngalezizinto yini? kutsho i Nkosi. Kangiyikuphindisela esizweni esinje yini? 
Jeremiah5:30 Okumangalisayo lokwesabekayo kwenzakele elizweni; 
Jeremiah5:31 abaprofethi baprofetha amanga, labapristi babusa ngokululeka kwabaprofethi; abantu bami bayakuthanda lokhu. Kodwa lizakwenza njani ekupheleni?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Balekani ukuze liphephe, lina bantwana bakoBhenjamini, liphume phakathi kweJerusalema. Vuthelani uphondo eThekhowa, liphakamise uphawu eBeti-Hakeremi, ngoba ububi bubonakala ngenyakatho lokuchitheka okukhulu." 
Jeremiah6:2 IZiyoni ebukekayo lenhle, kuseduze ukuchitheka kwayo."
