Jeremiah27:14 Ungawalaleli amazwi abaprofethi abathi kuwe: Kaliyikuyisebenzela inkosi yeBhabhiloni; ngoba baliprofetha amanga. 
Jeremiah27:15 Kangibathumanga mina, kutsho i Nkosi, kodwa baprofetha amanga ngebizo lami, ukuze ngilixotshe, libhubhe wena kanye lalabo abaprofethi abaliprofethayo." 
Jeremiah27:16 Ngasengikhuluma kubapristi lakubo bonke abantu ngisithi: I Nkosi ithi: Lingawalaleli amazwi abaprofethi benu abaliprofetha besithi: Khangelani, izitsha zethempeli zizabuyiswa masinyane zivela eBhabhiloni; ngoba lokhu kungamanga abaliprofethayo." 
Jeremiah27:17 Lingabalaleli; sebenzelani inkosi yeBhabhiloni ukuze lisile. Uzachithelwani lumuzi? 
Jeremiah27:18 Uba bengabaprofethi, belalo ilizwi le Nkosi, kabayincenge i Nkosi yamabandla, ukuthi izitsha eziseleyo ethempelini, lesigodlweni senkosi yakoJuda, leJerusalema, zingasiwa eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah27:19 Ngoba i Nkosi yamabandla ithi ngezinsika, langolwandle, langezinyawo, langezinye izitsha zethempeli eziseleyo kulumuzi," 
Jeremiah27:20 angazithathanga uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni ekuthumbeni kwakhe eJerusalema uJekoniya indodana kaJehoyakhimi, inkosi yakoJuda, lazo zonke iziphathamandla zakoJuda lezeJerusalema, ebasa eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah27:21 I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi mayelana lezitsha eziseleyo ethempelini, lesigodlweni senkosi yakoJuda, leJerusalema:" 
Jeremiah27:22 Zizasiwa eBhabhiloni, zihlale khona kuze kufike usuku lokuzihambela kwami, kutsho i Nkosi. Khona ngizazibuyisa kulindawo." 
Jeremiah28:1 Kwathi kulowomnyaka, ekuqaleni kokubusa kukaZedekhiya inkosi yakoJuda, ngenyanga yesihlanu yomnyaka wesine, uHananiya indodana kaAzuri, umprofethi ovela eGibeyoni, wathi kimi ethempelini phambi kwabapristi labantu bonke:" 
Jeremiah28:2 I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Ngilephulile ijogwe lenkosi yeBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah28:3 Ingakapheli iminyaka emibili ngizabuyisela kulindawo izitsha zonke zethempeli, ezathathwa nguNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni kulindawo, wazisa eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah28:4 Ngibuyise kulindawo futhi uJekoniya indodana kaJehoyakhimi, inkosi yakoJuda, labo bonke abathunjwayo koJuda basiwa eBhabhiloni, ngoba ngizalephula ijogwe lenkosi yeBhabhiloni, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah28:5 Umprofethi uJeremiya wasekhuluma kumprofethi uHananiya phambi kwabapristi laphambi kwabantu bonke ababemi ethempelini," 
Jeremiah28:6 esithi: Kungathi kungaba njalo! Kungathi i Nkosi ingenza njalo, yenze ukuthi amazwi owaprofethayo agcwaliseke, ibuyise kulindawo izitsha zethempeli, labo bonke abathunjelwa eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah28:7 Kanti zwana lelilizwi engilikhuluma kuwe laphambi kwalababantu. 
Jeremiah28:8 Abaprofethi ababephambi kwakho lababephambi kwami, kusukela endulo, baprofetha ngenkemba, langendlala, langomatshayabhuqe wesifo, emazweni amanengi lemibusweni emikhulu." 
Jeremiah28:9 Kodwa lowomprofethi oprofetha ngokuthula, lapho seligcwalisekile ilizwi lakhe, kuzabonakala ukuthi ungumprofethi othunywe yi Nkosi sibili." 
Jeremiah28:10 Umprofethi uHananiya waselisusa ijogwe entanyeni yomprofethi uJeremiya, walephula." 
Jeremiah28:11 UHananiya wakhuluma phambi kwabantu bonke esithi: I Nkosi ithi: Ngokunjalo ngizalephula ijogwe likaNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni entanyeni yezizwe zonke, ingakapheli iminyaka emibili. UJeremiya umprofethi wasesuka ehamba." 
Jeremiah28:12 Laselifika ilizwi le Nkosi kuJeremiya, uHananiya umprofethi eselephulile ijogwe entanyeni yomprofethi uJeremiya, lathi:" 
Jeremiah28:13 Hamba, utsho kuHananiya uthi: I Nkosi ithi: Wena wephule amajogwe esihlahla, kodwa mina ngizakwenza endaweni yawo amajogwe ensimbi." 
Jeremiah28:14 Ngoba i Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Ngigaxile ijogwe lensimbi entanyeni yazo zonke lezizizwe ukuze zisebenzele uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni, futhi zizamsebenzela, ngoba ngimnikile lenyamazana zeganga." 
Jeremiah28:15 Umprofethi uJeremiya wasesithi kumprofethi uHananiya: Zwana, Hananiya, i Nkosi kayikuthumanga, kodwa wenze lababantu ukuze bathembe amanga." 
Jeremiah28:16 Ngakho i Nkosi ithi: Khangela, ngizakususa emhlabeni; ngawona lo umnyaka nje uzakufa, ngoba utshumayele ukuhlamuka e Nkosi ni." 
Jeremiah28:17 Wafa uHananiya umprofethi ngawona lowomnyaka ngenyanga yesikhombisa. 
Jeremiah29:1 Nanka amazwi encwadi ayithumelayo uJeremiya umprofethi eseJerusalema kwabadala babathunjiweyo, lakubapristi labaprofethi, labantu bonke ayebathumbile uNebukadinezari eJerusalema, wabasa eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah29:2 Kwakusemva kokuthi sebesukile eJerusalema, inkosi uJekoniya, lendlovukazi, labathenwa, leziphathamandla zakoJuda lezeJerusalema, lezingcitshi zemisebenzi, kanye labakhandi." 
Jeremiah29:3 Incwadi yasiwa nguElasa indodana kaShafani, loGemariya indodana kaHilikhiya, ababethunywe nguZedekhiya, inkosi yakoJuda, eBhabhiloni kuNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni. Yathi:" 
Jeremiah29:4 I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi kibo bonke abathunjwe eJerusalema basiwa eBhabhiloni:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Yakhani izindlu, lihlale kizo, lilime amasimu, lidle izithelo zawo;" 
Jeremiah29:6 lithathe abafazi, lizale amadodana lamadodakazi, lithathele amadodana enu abafazi, lendise amadodakazi enu, ukuze azale amadodana lamadodakazi, lande lina, linganciphi." 
Jeremiah29:7 Sebenzelani ukuthula komuzi lapho engilithumbele khona, liwukhulekele e Nkosi ni, ngoba ekuthuleni kwawo lizakuba lokuthula lani." 
Jeremiah29:8 I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Lingavumeli abaprofethi benu labavumisi benu abakhona phakathi kwenu balikhohlise, lingawalaleli amaphupho abawaphuphayo;" 
Jeremiah29:9 ngoba baprofetha amanga kini ngebizo lami; kangibathumanga, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah29:10 I Nkosi ithi: Lapho iminyaka engamatshumi ayisikhombisa isiphelile eBhabhiloni, ngizalihambela, ngigcwalise isithembiso sami, ngilibuyise kulindawo." 
Jeremiah29:11 Ngoba ngiyazi mina imicabango engiyicabanga ngani, kutsho i Nkosi; yimicabango yokuthula, kayisiyo eyokubi, ukuthi ngilinike isikhathi esizayo esilethemba." 
Jeremiah29:12 Lizangibiza, lize, likhuleke kimi, ngilizwe." 
Jeremiah29:13 Lizangidinga, lingithole; lapho lingidingisisa ngenhliziyo yenu yonke," 
Jeremiah29:14 lizangithola, kutsho i Nkosi, ngilibuyise ekuthunjweni kwenu, ngiliqoqe kuzo zonke izizwe lakuzo zonke indawo lapho engilixotshele khona, ngilibuyise endaweni engalithumba kuyo." 
Jeremiah29:15 Litshilo ukuthi: I Nkosi uNkulunkulu isivusele abaprofethi eBhabhiloni. 
Jeremiah29:16 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu ikhuluma mayelana lenkosi ehlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi sikaDavida, langabo bonke abantu abahlala kulumuzi, abafowenu abangathunjwanga kanye lani;" 
Jeremiah29:17 ithi: Khangelani, ngiyathumela kibo inkemba lendlala lomatshayabhuqe wesifo, ngibenze babe njengomkhiwa omubi kakhulu ongadlekiyo ngenxa yobubi bawo." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ngizaxotshana labo ngenkemba langendlala langomatshayabhuqe wesifo, ngibenze babe yinto eyesabekayo kuyo yonke imibuso yomhlaba, babe yisiqalekiso, lesimangaliso, lento yokuncifelwa, lehlazo, phakathi kwazo zonke izizwe lapho engibaxotshele khona;" 
Jeremiah29:19 ngoba bengawalalelanga amazwi ami engawathumela kibo ngenceku zami abaprofethi, ngivuka ngovivi ngithumela, kodwa kabalalelanga, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah29:20 Zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi, lina lonke bathunjiweyo, engabasusa eJerusalema ngabasa eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah29:21 I Nkosi yamabandla uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi mayelana loAhabi indodana kaKolaya, loZedekhiya indodana kaMahaseya, aprofetha amanga ngebizo lami: Khangelani, ngizabanikela esandleni sikaNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni, ozabatshaya phambi kwamehlo enu." 
Jeremiah29:22 Ngenxa yabo, lamazwi azasetshenziswa kibo bonke abathunjiweyo koJuda abeBhabhiloni, abe yisiqalekiso okuthi: I Nkosi ikwenze ube njengoZedekhiya loAhabi, abosiwa yinkosi yeBhabhiloni ngomlilo;" 
Jeremiah29:23 ngoba benze ubuthutha koIsrayeli, bafeba labafazi babomakhelwane babo, baqamba amanga ngebizo lami, into engingabalayanga yona. Yimi engaziyo, ngingumfakazi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah29:24 Uzakutsho kuShemaya weNehelamu uthi: 
Jeremiah29:25 I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Uthumele izincwadi ngebizo lakho kubo bonke abantu abeJerusalema, lakuZefaniya indodana kaMahaseya umpristi, lakubo bonke abapristi, usithi:" 
Jeremiah29:26 I Nkosi isikumisile ukuthi ube ngumpristi esikhundleni sikaJehoyada umpristi, ukuze ulondoloze ithempeli; uba kukhona umuntu ohlanyayo ozitshaya umprofethi, uzamfaka esitokisini, umbophe ngeketane." 
Jeremiah29:27 Pho-ke, uyekeleleni ukumkhuza uJeremiya weAnathothi ozitshaya umprofethi yini?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Ngoba usethumile ilizwi kithi eBhabhiloni esithi: Ukuthunjwa kwenu kuzakuba ngokwesikhathi eside; ngakho yakhani izindlu, lihlale kizo, lilime amasimu, lidle izithelo zawo." 
Jeremiah29:29 UZefaniya umpristi wayifunda lincwadi, uJeremiya umprofethi esizwa." 
Jeremiah29:30 Laselifika ilizwi le Nkosi kuJeremiya lisithi: 
Jeremiah29:31 Thumela ilizwi kubo bonke abathunjiweyo uthi: I Nkosi ithi ngoShemaya weNehelamu: Njengoba uShemaya eprofethe kini ngingamthumanga mina, walenza ukuthi lithembe ize," 
Jeremiah29:32 ngakho khangela, ngizamtshaya yena kanye lenzalo yakhe; kakuyikuba lamuntu wakwakhe ozasala phakathi kwalababantu abone okuhle engizakwenzela abantu bami, ngoba ukhulumile ukuhlamuka kimi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah30:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi elafika kuJeremiya lathi: 
Jeremiah30:2 I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Bhala encwadini wonke amazwi engiwakhulume kuwe." 
Jeremiah30:3 Ngoba khangela, insuku ziyeza, lapho ngizabuyisa abantu bami uIsrayeli loJuda, kutsho i Nkosi. Ngizababuyisela elizweni engalinika oyise, libe ngelabo." 
Jeremiah30:4 La ngamazwi i Nkosi eyawakhuluma ngoIsrayeli loJuda," 
Jeremiah30:5 yathi: Sizwile ilizwi lokwethuka, lelokwesaba, lelokuswela ukuthula." 
Jeremiah30:6 Ake libuze lizwe, kumbe indoda ingazala umntwana yini? Pho-ke, kungani ngibona wonke amadoda ebambe inkalo zawo njengowesifazana ohelelwayo? Kungani ubuso bonke bunyukumele?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Maye! lukhulu lolosuku, kalukho olunye olunjengalo. Kuyisikhathi sokuhlupheka kukaJakobe, kanti uzakhululwa kukho." 
Jeremiah30:8 Kuzakuthi ngalolosuku, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla, ngilephule ijogwe entanyeni zabo, ngiqamule izibopho zabo, kabasayikusebenzela abezizwe," 
Jeremiah30:9 kodwa bazasebenzela mina Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wabo, loDavida inkosi yabo engizabavusela yena." 
Jeremiah30:10 Ngakho-ke ungesabi, wena Jakobe, nceku yami; ungatshaywa luvalo, wena Israyeli, kutsho i Nkosi; ngoba khangela, ngizakukhulula endaweni ekhatshana, lenzalo yakho elizweni lokuthunjwa kwayo. UJakobe uzabuya aphumule, ahlale kuhle, angethuswa muntu." 
Jeremiah30:11 Ngoba mina ngilawe ukukukhulula, kutsho i Nkosi. Ngoba ngizachitha ngokupheleleyo zonke izizwe engikuhlakazele phakathi kwazo, kodwa wena kangiyikukubhubhisa ngokupheleleyo; ngizakukhuza ngokufaneleyo, kangiyikukuyekela." 
Jeremiah30:12 I Nkosi ithi: Ukulimala kwakho kakwelapheki, lesilonda sakho sibi." 
Jeremiah30:13 Kakho onanzelela amanxeba akho, kakulamuthi ozakwelapha ukuthi usile." 
Jeremiah30:14 Zonke izithandwa zakho zikukhohliwe, kazisakudingi. Ngoba ngikutshayile njengesitha, ngokutshaya okulolunya, ngoba icala lakho likhulu, lezono zakho zandile." 
Jeremiah30:15 Ukhalelani ngokulimala kwakho? Ubuhlungu bakho kabelapheki. Ngoba ukona kwakho kukhulu, lezono zakho zandile. Ngikwenzile lokhu kuwe." 
Jeremiah30:16 Ngalokho-ke bonke abakudlayo bazakudliwa, lezitha zakho zonke zizathunjwa, labakuphangayo bazaphangwa, labo bonke abakwemukayo bazakwemukwa." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ngoba ngizabuyisa ukusila kwakho, ngelaphe amanxeba akho, kutsho i Nkosi. Ngoba bakubize ngokuthi: Ungolahliweyo, yiZiyoni, kakulamuntu oyidingayo." 
Jeremiah30:18 I Nkosi ithi: Khangela, ngizabuyisa abantwana bakoJakobe, ngihawukele wonke amakhaya abo. Yonke imizi izakwakhiwa futhi endaweni yayo, lazo zonke indlu zakhiwe njengakuqala." 
Jeremiah30:19 Kuzaphuma kubo ingoma zokubonga, lokumemeza kwabathokozayo. Ngizabandisa babebanengi, bazahlonitshwa, bangabi balutshwana." 
Jeremiah30:20 Abantwana babo bazakuba njengakuqala, lenhlangano yabo izakuma phambi kwami; ngizabatshaya bonke ababacindezelayo." 
Jeremiah30:21 Isiphathamandla sabo sizakuba ngomunye wabo, lombusi wabo uzavela phakathi kwabo; ngizamsondeza, asondele kimi, ngoba ngubani ongaba lesibindi sokusondela kimi? kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah30:22 Lizakuba ngabantu bami, lami ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu." 
Jeremiah30:23 Khangelani ulaka lwe Nkosi lunjengesivunguzane, luphumile, lunjengesiphepho esivunguzayo, luzakwehlela phezu kwababi." 
Jeremiah30:24 Ulaka oluvuthayo lwe Nkosi kaluyikudeda, ize iphelelise izifiso zenhliziyo yayo. Ensukwini zokuphela lizakuqedisisa lokhu." 
Jeremiah31:1 Ngalesosikhathi, kutsho i Nkosi, ngizakuba nguNkulunkulu wemizi yonke yakoIsrayeli; bazakuba ngabantu bami." 
Jeremiah31:2 I Nkosi ithi: Abantu abasele enkembeni bathola umusa enkangala. UIsrayeli wathi edinga ukuphumula," 
Jeremiah31:3 I Nkosi yabonakala kimi endulo isithi: Yebo, ngikuthandile ngothando olulaphakade, ngakho ngikudonsile ngobubele." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ngizabuya ngikwakhe, wakheke, wena ntombi emsulwa yakoIsrayeli. Uzavunula, uthathe amachacho akho, ungene ekugideni kwabathokozayo." 
Jeremiah31:5 Uzalima izivini phezu kwezintaba zeSamariya; abahlanyeli bazahlanyela, badle izithelo zazo." 
Jeremiah31:6 Ngoba luzakuba khona usuku lapho abalindi bazamemeza entabeni yakoEfrayimi, bathi: Sukani, siye eZiyoni, e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wethu." 
Jeremiah31:7 Ngoba i Nkosi ithi: Mhlabeleleni uJakobe ngentokozo, liyimemezele inhloko yezizwe; limemeze, lidumise lithi: I Nkosi yabakhulula abantu bayo abaseleyo koIsrayeli." 
Jeremiah31:8 Khangelani, ngizabakhupha elizweni lenyakatho, ngibabuthe emikhawulweni yomhlaba; phakathi kwabo kukhona iziphofu labaqhulayo, labesifazana abakhulelweyo kanye labahelelwayo, belibandla elikhulu bazabuya lapha." 
Jeremiah31:9 Bazabuya bekhala, ngibaduduze ekubakhokheleni kwami, ngibalethe emifuleni yamanzi, ngendlela enhle abangayikukhubeka kuyo; ngoba nginguyise kuIsrayeli, uEfrayimi ulizibulo lami." 
Jeremiah31:10 Zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi, lina zizwe, lilizwakalise ezihlengeni ezikhatshana, lithi: Yena owachitha uIsrayeli uzambutha, ameluse njengomelusi eselusa umhlambi wakhe." 
Jeremiah31:11 Ngoba i Nkosi imhlawulele uJakobe, yamhlenga kwabalamandla kulaye." 
Jeremiah31:12 Bazakuza bahlabele entabeni yeZiyoni, bazathokoza kakhulu ngokuhle kwe Nkosi, ngamabele lewayini elitsha, langamafutha, bathokoze ngamazinyane ezimvu, langamathole enkomo; umphefumulo wabo ube njengensimu ethelelwayo, bangabe besaba losizi futhi." 
Jeremiah31:13 Khona intombi emsulwa izathokoza ekugideni, amajaha labadala bajabule kanyekanye. Ngizaphendula ukukhala kwabo kube yintokozo, ngizabaduduza, ngibanike intokozo endaweni yosizi;" 
Jeremiah31:14 nginike abapristi ukudla okumnandi, labantu bami bazakholisiswa yikulunga kwami, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah31:15 I Nkosi ithi: Ilizwi liyezwakala eRama, ukulila lokukhala inyembezi okubabayo. URasheli ukhalela abantwana bakhe, uyala ukududuzwa ngabantwana bakhe, ngoba bengasekho." 
Jeremiah31:16 I Nkosi ithi: Thula, ungakhali, lamehlo akho angabi lezinyembezi; ngoba umsebenzi wakho uzakuba lomvuzo, bazabuya bevela elizweni lesitha, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah31:17 Kuzalunga esikhathini esizayo, kutsho i Nkosi; abantwana bakho bazabuya elizweni lakibo." 
Jeremiah31:18 Ngizwile lokuzwa uEfrayimi ezikhalela esithi: Ungitshayile, njalo ngatshaywa, njengethole elingathambanga; ngibuyisa, njalo ngizabuya, ngoba uyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wami." 
Jeremiah31:19 Isibili emva kokubuya kwami ngazisola, lemva kokulaywa kwami ngatshaya ithangazi lami; ngaba lenhloni, njalo ngayangeka, ngoba ngathwala ihlazo lobutsha bami." 
Jeremiah31:20 Kambe uEfrayimi uyindodana yami yini eligugu kimi, ungumntwana wami othandekayo? Ngoba lapho ngikhuluma ngokubi ngaye, ngiyamkhumbula. Ngakho inhliziyo yami iyamlangatha; isibili ngizakuba lesihawu kuye kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah31:21 Zimisele izitshengiso, uzimise, iziqondiso zendlela, uqaphelise kakhulu umgwaqo omkhulu, indlela owahamba ngayo. Buya, ntombi emsulwa yakoIsrayeli, ubuyele emizini yakini." 
Jeremiah31:22 Koze kube nini uzilazila, wena ndodakazi engathembekanga? I Nkosi idale into entsha emhlabeni, owesifazana uvukela indoda." 
Jeremiah31:23 I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Bazabuya batsho lamazwi elizweni lakoJuda lemizini yakhona, lapho sengibabuyisile abantu bakibo bathi: I Nkosi ikubusise, wena khaya lokulunga, lawe ntaba engcwele." 
Jeremiah31:24 UJuda layo yonke imizi yakhe izahlala khona, abalimi labahamba lemihlambi yabo." 
Jeremiah31:25 Ngizabenelisa bonke abakhatheleyo. ngiqinise labo bonke abasesizini. 
Jeremiah31:26 Ngasengiphaphama, ngakhangela; ubuthongo bami babumnandi kimi." 
Jeremiah31:27 Khangela, insuku ziyeza, kutsho i Nkosi, lapho ngizahlanyela indlu kaIsrayeli lendlu kaJuda ngenhlanyelo yabantu lenhlanyelo yenyamazana." 
Jeremiah31:28 Kuzakuthi njengalokho ngibalindile ukuthi ngisiphune lokuthi ngidilize lokuthi ngichithe lokuthi ngibhubhise, ngilethe okubi, ngokunjalo-ke sengizabalinda ukuze ngakhe, ngihlanyele, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah31:29 Ngalezonsuku kabasayikutsho ukuthi: Oyise badlile izithelo zevini ezimunyu, amazinyo abantwana asetshelela." 
Jeremiah31:30 Kodwa wonke umuntu uzakufa ngobubi bakhe; wonke umuntu odla izithelo zevini ezimunyu, ngawakhe amazinyo azatshelela." 
Jeremiah31:31 Khangela, insuku ziyeza, kutsho i Nkosi, lapho ngizakwenza isivumelwano esitsha lendlu kaIsrayeli lendlu kaJuda," 
Jeremiah31:32 esingenjengesivumelwano engasenza laboyise mhla ngibabamba ngesandla sami ukubakhupha elizweni leGibhithe, ngitsho isivumelwano sami abasephulayo, lanxa ngangiyiNkosi yabo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah31:33 Kodwa yilesi isivumelwano engizasenza lendlu kaIsrayeli emva kwalezonsuku, kutsho i Nkosi. Ngizafaka umlayo wami emibilini yabo, ngiwubhale enhliziyweni yabo, ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo, labo babe ngabantu bami." 
Jeremiah31:34 Kabasayikufundisa ngulowo lalowo umakhelwane wakhe, lalowo lalowo umfowabo esithi: Yazi i Nkosi. Ngoba bazangazi bonke, kusukela komncinyane wabo kuze kufike komkhulu wabo, kutsho i Nkosi. Ngoba ngizathethelela ububi babo, lesono sabo kangisayikusikhumbula." 
Jeremiah31:35 Itsho njalo i Nkosi, enika ilanga libe yikukhanya emini, izimiso zenyanga lezenkanyezi zibe yikukhanya ebusuku, evusa ulwandle ukuthi amagagasi alo ahlokome, i Nkosi yamabandla libizo layo." 
Jeremiah31:36 Uba ukumiswa kwalezizinto kungasuka phambi kwami, kutsho i Nkosi, lenzalo yakoIsrayeli izaphela, kumbe isaba yisizwe phambi kwami kuze kube nininini." 
Jeremiah31:37 I Nkosi ithi: Uba amazulu engalinganiswa, lomhlaba phansi ungahlolwa, khona mina ngingayilahla yonke inzalo yakoIsrayeli ngakho konke abakwenzileyo." 
Jeremiah31:38 I Nkosi ithi: Khangela, insuku ziyeza lapho umuzi we Nkosi uzakwakhiwa, kusukela eMphotshongweni kaHananeli kuze kufike esangweni leNgonsi." 
Jeremiah31:39 Lentambo yokulinganisa izasuka ize iyefika eqaqeni lweGarebi, itshibilike lapho iye eGowa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Sonke isihotsha sezidumbu lesomlotha, lawo wonke amasimu kuze kufike esifuleni seKidroni, kuze kufike engonsini yeSango lebhiza ngempumalanga, kuzakuba yindawo engcwele ye Nkosi. Kakusayikusitshunwa, kudilizwe futhi, kuze kube nininini." 
Jeremiah32:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya emnyakeni wetshumi wokubusa kukaZedekhiya, inkosi yakoJuda, ongumnyaka wetshumi lesificaminwembili kaNebukadinezari." 
Jeremiah32:2 Ngalesosikhathi ibutho lenkosi yeBhabhiloni layivimbezela iJerusalema; uJeremiya umprofethi wayevalelwe egumeni labalindi, elalisesigodlweni senkosi yakoJuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Ngoba uZedekhiya inkosi yakoJuda wayemvalele khona esithi: Kungani uprofetha usithi: I Nkosi ithi: Khangela, lumuzi ngiwunikela esandleni senkosi yeBhabhiloni, izawuthumba;" 
Jeremiah32:4 loZedekhiya inkosi yakoJuda kayiyikuphunyuka esandleni samaKhaladiya, kodwa uzanikelwa isibili esandleni seNkosi yaseBhabhiloni, akhulume layo bekhangelene;" 
Jeremiah32:5 izamthatha uZedekhiya, imuse eBhabhiloni, ahlale khona ngize ngimhambele mina, kutsho i Nkosi; lanxa usilwa lamaKhaladiya, kawuyikuphumelela?" 
Jeremiah32:6 UJeremiya wathi: Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lisithi: 
Jeremiah32:7 Khangela, uHanameli indodana kaShaluma uyihlo omncinyane, uzafika kuwe athi: Thenga insimu yami eseAnathothi, ngoba nguwe oyisihlobo sokuqala olelungelo lokuyithenga." 
Jeremiah32:8 Wasefika kimi uHanameli umfowethu egumeni labalindi, njengokutsho kwe Nkosi, wathi kimi: Thenga insimu yami eseAnathothi elizweni lakoBhenjamini, ngoba nguwe oyisihlobo sokuqala olelungelo lokuyithenga; zithengele yona. Ngasengisazi ukuthi lelilizwi livela e Nkosi ni." 
Jeremiah32:9 Ngayithenga insimu eseAnathothi kuHanameli umfowethu, ngamnika imali engamashekeli* alitshumi lesikhombisa esiliva." 
Jeremiah32:10 Ngaloba incwadi, ngayinamathisela, ngadinga labafakazi, ngayilinganisa imali ngezikali." 
Jeremiah32:11 Ngasengithatha incwadi yokuthenga enanyekiweyo elemithetho lezimiso, lenye incwadi evulekileyo," 
Jeremiah32:12 nganikela incwadi yokuthenga kuBaruki indodana kaNeriya, indodana kaMahaseya, phambi kukaHanameli umfowethu, laphambi kwabafakazi ababhala amabizo abo encwadini yokuthenga, laphambi kwawo wonke amaJuda ayehlezi egumeni labalindi." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ngamlaya uBaruki phambi kwabo ngathi: 
Jeremiah32:14 I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Thatha lezizincwadi, incwadi yokuthenga enanyekiweyo lencwadi evulekileyo, uzifake embizeni yebumba ukuze zihlale isikhathi eside." 
Jeremiah32:15 Ngoba i Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Izindlu lamasimu lezivini kuzabuya kuthengwe futhi kulelilizwe." 
Jeremiah32:16 Sengimnikile uBaruki indodana kaNeriya incwadi yokuthenga, ngakhuleka e Nkosi ni ngathi:" 
Jeremiah32:17 Hawu Nkosi Jehova! Khangela, kunguwe owenze amazulu lomhlaba ngamandla akho amakhulu langengalo yakho elamandla. Kakukho okungakwehlula wena" 
Jeremiah32:18 otshengisa uthando kwabayizinkulungwane, kodwa uphindisela ububi baboyise kubantwana babo emva kwabo. Wena Nkulunkulu omkhulu lolamandla, oyi Nkosi yamabandla," 
Jeremiah32:19 omkhulu ngokucabanga, lolamandla ekwenzeni, omehlo akho abona zonke indlela zabantu ukuze unike wonke umuntu umvuzo wendlela zakhe, lezenzo zakhe," 
Jeremiah32:20 owaveza izibonakaliso lezimangaliso elizweni leGibhithe, lakhathesi uyazenza koIsrayeli laphakathi kwabo bonke abantu; wazenzela ibizo ukuze ubizwe ngalo lalamuhla." 
Jeremiah32:21 Wabakhupha abantu bakho uIsrayeli elizweni leGibhithe ngezibonakaliso langezimangaliso, langesandla esilamandla, langengalo elamandla, langokwesabeka okukhulu;" 
Jeremiah32:22 wabanika lelilizwe, owafunga kuboyise ukubanika lona, ilizwe eligeleza uchago loluju;" 
Jeremiah32:23 bangena bahlala kilo, kodwa kabalilalelanga ilizwi lakho, kabahambanga ngomlayo wakho, kabakwenzanga lokho owabatshela khona. Ngakho-ke ubehlisele bonke lobububi." 
Jeremiah32:24 Khangela, amadundulu okuvimbezela umuzi asekhona ukuze umuzi uthathwe, langenxa yenkemba lendlala lomatshayabhuqe wesifo umuzi unikelwe ezandleni zamaKhaladiya alwa emelene lawo. Lokho owakutshoyo kwenzakele njengoba khangela, ubona." 
Jeremiah32:25 Kanti, wena Nkosi Jehova, utshilo kimi ukuthi: Thenga insimu ngemali, udinge labafakazi; lapho umuzi unikelwa ezandleni zamaKhaladiya." 
Jeremiah32:26 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya lathi: 
Jeremiah32:27 Khangela, mina ngiyi Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wayo yonke inyama; kambe kukhona okungehlulayo yini?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Ngakho khangela, ngiyawunikela lumuzi ezandleni zamaKhaladiya lezandleni zikaNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni ozawunqoba." 
Jeremiah32:29 AmaKhaladiya alwa emelene lumuzi azafika, awuthungele ngomlilo, awutshise kanye lezindlu obekunikelelwa phezu kwazo impepha kuBhali, lobekuthululelwa phezu kwazo iminikelo yokunathwayo kwabanye onkulunkulu ukungicunula." 
Jeremiah32:30 Ngoba amadodana akoIsrayeli lamadodana akoJuda enzile okubi kuphela phambi kwami, kusukela ebutsheni bawo; yebo, amadodana akoIsrayeli angicunule kuphela ngezenzo zabo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah32:31 Lumuzi uvuse ukuthukuthela kwami lolaka, kusukela mhla wakhiwayo kuze kube lamuhla, ukuze ngiwususe kimi," 
Jeremiah32:32 ngenxa yabo bonke ububi amadodana akoIsrayeli lawakoJuda abenza ukungithukuthelisa, ngitsho amakhosi abo leziphathamandla zabo, abapristi babo labaprofethi babo, abantu bakoJuda labakhileyo eJerusalema." 
Jeremiah32:33 Bangiphendulela intamo, kabakhangelanga kimi; lanxa ngibafundise ngivuke ngovivi ngifundisa, kabalalelanga ukufundisa kwami." 
Jeremiah32:34 Bamisa izinengiso zabo endlini lapho ibizo lami elidunyiselwa khona, ukuze bayingcolise." 
Jeremiah32:35 Bakha indawo eziphakemeyo zikaBhali esihotsheni sendodana kaHinomu, ukuze benze amadodana lamadodakazi adabule aye kuMoleki, into engingabalayanga yona lengafikanga engqondweni yami, ukuze benze uJuda one." 
Jeremiah32:36 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi mayelana lomuzi lo othi ngawo: Unikelwe esandleni senkosi yeBhabhiloni ngenkemba langendlala langomatshayabhuqe wesifo:" 
Jeremiah32:37 Khangela, ngizabaqoqa emazweni wonke lapho engibaxotshele khona ekuthukutheleni kwami langokufutheka kwami langolaka olukhulu; ngizababuyisa kulindawo, ngibenze ukuthi bahlale bevikelekile." 
Jeremiah32:38 Bazakuba ngabantu bami, lami ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ngizabanika inhliziyonye lendlelanye, ukuze bangesabe zonke izinsuku, kube kuhle kubo lakubantwana babo emva kwabo." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ngizakwenza labo isivumelwano esilaphakade, ukuze ngingaphenduki ekubalandeleni, ukuthi ngibenzele okuhle, ngifake ukungesaba enhliziyweni yabo ukuze bangasuki kimi." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ngizathokoza ngokubenzela okuhle, ngibagxumeke ngobuqotho kulelilizwe ngenhliziyo yami yonke langomoya wami wonke." 
Jeremiah32:42 Ngoba i Nkosi ithi: Njengoba ngehlisele phezu kwalababantu bonke lobububi, ngokunjalo ngizabehlisela konke okuhle engikukhulumileyo." 
Jeremiah32:43 Amasimu azathengwa kulelilizwe elilibiza ngokuthi: Liyinkangala engelamuntu lenyamazana, futhi linikelwe ezandleni zamaKhaladiya." 
Jeremiah32:44 Amasimu azathengwa ngemali, kulungiswe incwadi zokuthenga, kubhalwe kuzo amabizo abafakazi, zinamatheliswe elizweni lakoBhenjamini lemaphandleni eJerusalema lemizini yakoJuda lemizini yemaqaqeni lemizini yeShefela lemizini yeningizimu; ngoba ngizabuyisa abantu bakhona, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah33:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya ngokwesibili, esavalelwe egumeni labalindi, lathi:" 
Jeremiah33:2 I Nkosi eyenza umhlaba leyawubumba, yawumisa waqina, yona ethiwa yi Nkosi, ithi:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Ngibiza, ngizasabela, ngikutshele izinto ezinkulu ezifihlakeleyo ongazaziyo." 
Jeremiah33:4 Ngoba i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakoIsrayeli, ithi mayelana lezindlu zalumuzi langendlu yamakhosi akoJuda. ezidilizwe ukuthi kwenziwe indawo yokuvika phambi kwamadundulu okuvimbezela laphambi kwenkemba:" 
Jeremiah33:5 AmaKhaladiya azafika ukulwa, azigcwalise ngezidumbu zabantu engizabatshaya ekuthukutheleni kwami lekufuthekeni kwami; ngoba lumuzi ngiwufihlele ubuso bami ngenxa yobubi babo bonke." 
Jeremiah33:6 Khangela, ngizawulethela impilo enhle lokusiliswa; ngizabasilisa abantu bawo, ngibatshengise ukuphumelela lokulondoloza kwami okunengi." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ngizabuyisa abathunjwa bakoJuda labakoIsrayeli, ngibamise babe njengakuqala," 
Jeremiah33:8 ngibahlambulule kubo bonke ububi babo abona ngabo kimi, ngibathethelele isono sabo lobubi bokungihlamuka kwabo." 
Jeremiah33:9 IJerusalema izakuba libizo elingijabulisayo, udumo lwami lokuzincoma kwami, kuzo zonke izizwe zomhlaba ezizakuzwa ngokuhle konke engibenzela khona; zizakwesaba, zithuthumele ngokuhle konke langokuphumelela konke engibenzele khona." 
Jeremiah33:10 I Nkosi ithi: Kulindawo elithi iyinkangala engelamuntu lenyamazana, emizini yakoJuda lendleleni zeJerusalema eziyinkangala engelamuntu lenyamazana, kuzazwakala futhi" 
Jeremiah33:11 ilizwi lokuthaba lelizwi lentokozo, ilizwi lomyeni lelomakoti, lelizwi labahlabelayo lapho beletha iminikelo yabo yokubonga ethempelini lami besithi: Bongani i Nkosi yamabandla, ngoba ilungile, ngoba isihawu sayo simi kuze kube nininini. Ngoba ngizabuyisa abantu belizwe babe njengakuqala. kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah33:12 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Kuyona le indawo eyinkangala engelamuntu lenyamazana, lemizini yonke yakhona, kuzakuba khona futhi imizi yabelusi abazaphuma kuyo lemihlambi yabo." 
Jeremiah33:13 Emizini yemaqaqeni lemizini yeShefela lemizini yeningizimu, lelizweni lakoBhenjamini, ezindaweni eziseduze leJerusalema, lemizini yakoJuda, izimvu zizabuya zidlule phambi kwalabo abazibalayo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah33:14 Khangela, insuku ziyeza, kutsho i Nkosi, lapho ngizagcwalisa isithembiso engasenza endlini yakoIsrayeli lendlini yakoJuda." 
Jeremiah33:15 Ngalezonsuku langalesosikhathi ngizahlumisela uDavida uGatsha olulungileyo, oluzakwenza ukulunga lobuqotho elizweni." 
Jeremiah33:16 Ngalezonsuku uJuda uzakhululwa, leJerusalema ivikeleke. Yileli ibizo elizabizwa ngalo elithi: I Nkosi ukulunga kwethu." 
Jeremiah33:17 Ngoba i Nkosi ithi: UDavida kayikuswela umuntu wokuhlala esihlalweni sobukhosi sendlu kaIsrayeli," 
Jeremiah33:18 lakubapristi abangamaLevi kakuyikusweleka umuntu wokutshisa iminikelo yokutshiswa phambi kwami, lokutshisa iminikelo yempuphu, lokunikela imihlatshelo insuku zonke." 
Jeremiah33:19 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya lisithi: 
Jeremiah33:20 I Nkosi ithi: Uba lingasephula isivumelwano sami semini lesivumelwano sami sobusuku, ukuze kungabi khona imini lobusuku ngesikhathi sakho," 
Jeremiah33:21 khona lesivumelwano sami lenceku yami uDavida sizakwephulwa, ukuze angabi landodana yokubusa esihlalweni sakhe sobukhosi, lesivumelwano sami labapristi abangamaLevi abangikhonzayo sizakwephulwa." 
Jeremiah33:22 Njengoba amabutho amazulu engebalwe, letshebetshebe lolwandle lingalinganiseki, ngokunjalo ngizakwandisa inzalo kaDavida inceku yami labapristi abangamaLevi abangikhonzayo." 
Jeremiah33:23 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya lathi: 
Jeremiah33:24 Kawuqaphelisanga yini abakutshoyo lababantu ukuthi: I Nkosi izilahlile indlu zombili ebizikhethile? Ngalokho-ke babadelela abantu bami, babenza bangabe besaba yisizwe emehlweni abo." 
Jeremiah33:25 Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Uba isivumelwano sami singekho emini lebusuku, ngingamisanga izimiso zamazulu lomhlaba," 
Jeremiah33:26 ngizalahla inzalo kaJakobe lenzalo kaDavida inceku yami, kangiyikukhetha omunye wenzalo yakhe ukuze abuse phezu kwenzalo kaAbrahama loIsaka loJakobe. Ngoba ngizabuyisa abantu babo, ngibe lesihawu kibo." 
Jeremiah34:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi elafika kuJeremiya, lapho uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni lebutho lakhe lonke, lemibuso yonke yomhlaba eyayibuswa nguye, labo bonke abantu bakhe, babesilwa bemelene leJerusalema layo yonke imizi yayo," 
Jeremiah34:2 lathi: I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Hamba uyekuthi kuZedekhiya inkosi yakoJuda: I Nkosi ithi: Khangela, ngizanikela lumuzi esandleni senkosi yaseBhabhiloni, izawutshisa ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah34:3 Kawuyikuphunyuka esandleni sayo, kodwa uzabanjwa isibili, unikelwe ezandleni zayo; uzabonana lenkosi yeBhabhiloni, likhulumisane; futhi uzakuya eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah34:4 Zwana ilizwi le Nkosi, wena Zedekhiya, nkosi yakoJuda. I Nkosi ithi ngawe: Kawuyikufa ngenkemba." 
Jeremiah34:5 Kodwa uzakufa ngokuthula. Njengoba impepha yatshiselwa oyihlo, amakhosi ayephambi kwakho, ngokunjalo abantu bazakutshisela lawe impepha, bakulilele lawe, bathi: Maye ngenkosi! Ngoba ngilitshilo lelolizwi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah34:6 UJeremiya umprofethi wasewakhuluma wonke lamazwi kuZedekhiya inkosi yakoJuda eJerusalema," 
Jeremiah34:7 lapho ibutho lenkosi yeBhabhiloni lisilwa limelene leJerusalema layo yonke imizi yakoJuda eyayisisele, iLakishi leAzeka: ngoba yiyo imizi ebiyelweyo eyakoJuda eyayisisele." 
Jeremiah34:8 Ilizwi elafika kuJeremiya livela e Nkosi ni, emva kokuthi uZedekhiya inkosi esenzile isivumelwano labo bonke abantu eJerusalema ukubamemezela ukukhululeka," 
Jeremiah34:9 ukuthi wonke umuntu akhulule isigqili sakhe, laye wonke umuntu isigqilikazi sakhe, umHebheru kumbe umHebherukazi, ukuze kungabi khona umuntu owenza umfowabo umHebheru abe yisigqili." 
Jeremiah34:10 Bonke balalela, iziphathamandla zonke labantu bonke abenze lesosivumelwano sokuthi wonke umuntu akhulule isigqili sakhe lesigqilikazi sakhe ukuze zihambe, zingaphindi zenziwe zibe yizigqili futhi; balalela, bazikhulula." 
Jeremiah34:11 Kodwa emva kwalokho baphenduka, bazibuyisa izigqili lezigqilikazi zabo ababezikhulule, babuya bazehlisela phansi zaba yizigqili lezigqilikazi." 
Jeremiah34:12 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya lisithi: 
Jeremiah34:13 I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Mina ngenze isivumelwano laboyihlo mhla ngibakhupha elizweni leGibhithe, endaweni yobugqili, ngathi:" 
Jeremiah34:14 Ekupheleni kweminyaka eyisikhombisa lonke lizakhulula izihlobo zenu amaHebheru ezithengiswe kini, zalisebenzela iminyaka eyisithupha, lizikhulule ekulisebenzeleni kwazo. Kodwa oyihlo kabangilalelanga, kabangizwanga." 
Jeremiah34:15 Lina-ke seliphendukile lamuhla, lenza okulungileyo emehlweni ami, lamemezela ukukhululeka kubomakhelwane benu, lenza isivumelwano phambi kwami endlini lapho ibizo lami elidunyiselwa khona;" 
Jeremiah34:16 kodwa-ke seliphendukile futhi, lalingcolisa ibizo lami lapho ngulowo lalowo wenu ebuyisa isigqili sakhe lesigqilikazi sakhe ebelizikhululile njengokufisa kwazo, lazehlisela phansi, zaba yizigqili lezigqilikazi zenu." 
Jeremiah34:17 Ngakho-ke kutsho i Nkosi: Kalingilalelanga, kalimemezelanga inkululeko, kube ngulowo lalowo kumhlobo wakhe lakumakhelwane wakhe; khangelani, sengizavumela inkemba lomatshayabhuqe wesifo lendlala ukuze kulehlele. Ngizalenza libe yinto eyesabekayo kuyo yonke imibuso yomhlaba." 
Jeremiah34:18 Abantu abaseqileyo isivumelwano sami, abangagcinanga amazwi esivumelwano ababesenze phambi kwami, ngizabenza babe njengethole lesivumelwano abalidabula kabili, badlula phakathi kwalo," 
Jeremiah34:19 ngitsho iziphathamandla zakoJuda leziphathamandla zeJerusalema, abathenwa labapristi, labo bonke abantu belizwe abadabula phakathi kwenhlangothi zethole." 
Jeremiah34:20 Ngizabanikela ezandleni zezitha zabo lezandleni zalabo abadinga ukubabulala. Izidumbu zabo zizakuba yikudla kwenyoni zamazulu lenyamazana zeganga. 
Jeremiah34:21 LoZedekhiya inkosi yakoJuda leziphathamandla zakhe ngizabanikela ezandleni zezitha zabo, lezandleni zalabo abadinga ukubabulala, lesandleni sebutho lenkosi yeBhabhiloni esisukile kini." 
Jeremiah34:22 Khangelani, ngizalaya, kutsho i Nkosi, ngibabuyise kulumuzi; bazakulwa bemelene lawo, bawuthumbe, bawutshise ngomlilo, ngichithe imizi yakoJuda ibe yinkangala engelamuntu." 
Jeremiah35:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi elafika kuJeremiya ensukwini zikaJehoyakhimi indodana kaJosiya, inkosi yakoJuda, lathi:" 
Jeremiah35:2 Yana endlini yamaRekabi, ukhulume lawo, uwalethe ethempelini uwangenise kwenye indlu yalo, ubusuwanika iwayini ukuze anathe." 
Jeremiah35:3 Ngasengithatha uJahazaniya indodana kaJeremiya, indodana kaHabaziniya, labafowabo, lawo wonke amadodana akhe, lendlu yonke yamaRekabi." 
Jeremiah35:4 Ngabaletha ethempelini, ngabangenisa endlini yamadodana kaHanani indodana kaIgidaliya, umuntu kaNkulunkulu, eyayiseduze lendlu yeziphathamandla, ngaphezu kwendlu kaMahaseya indodana kaShaluma umlindisango." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ngasengibeka phambi kwamaRekabi izimbiza ezigcwele iwayini, kanye lezinkezo, ngathi kibo: Nathani nanti iwayini." 
Jeremiah35:6 Kodwa baphendula bathi: Kasilinathi iwayini, ngoba uJonadabi indodana kaRekabi, ubaba, wasilaya wathi: Lingalinathi iwayini lina labantwana benu kuze kube nininini," 
Jeremiah35:7 lingakhi izindlu, lingahlanyeli inhlanyelo, lingabi lazivini; kodwa lihlale emathenteni insuku zenu zonke ukuze lihlale insuku ezinengi elizweni elihlezi kilo." 
Jeremiah35:8 Salilalela ilizwi likaJonadabi indodana kaRekabi, ubaba, kukho konke asilaya ngakho, ukuthi singanathi iwayini insuku zethu zonke thina labomkethu lamadodana ethu lamadodakazi ethu," 
Jeremiah35:9 lokuthi singakhi izindlu zokuhlala; kasilazivini lamasimu, kasihlanyeli inhlanyelo," 
Jeremiah35:10 kodwa sihlala emathenteni, senze konke lokho ubaba uJonadabi asilaya khona." 
Jeremiah35:11 Kodwa kwathi lapho uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni ifika ukuhlasela ilizwe, sathi: Asihambeni siye eJerusalema, sibalekele ibutho lamaKhaladiya lebutho lamaSiriya. Sesihlala eJerusalema." 
Jeremiah35:12 Laselifika ilizwi le Nkosi kuJeremiya lisithi: 
Jeremiah35:13 I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli ithi: Hamba uyetshela abantu bakoJuda labakhileyo eJerusalema ukuthi: Kaliyikuvuma ukulaywa lokulalela amazwi ami yini? kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah35:14 Ugciniwe umlayo uJonadabi indodana kaRekabi awunika amadodana akhe wokuthi anganathi iwayini; kuze kube lamuhla kawalinathi, ngoba awulalele umlayo kayise. Lami ngikhulumile kini ngivuke ngovivi ngikhuluma, kodwa kalingilalelanga." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ngithume kini zonke inceku zami abaprofethi, ngivuke ngovivi ngithuma, ngisithi: Phendukani lonke endleleni yenu embi, lenze izenzo zenu zibe zinhle, lingalandeli abanye onkulunkulu ukuthi libakhonze, ukuze lihlale elizweni engalinika lina laboyihlo. Kodwa kalingilalelanga, kalingizwanga." 
Jeremiah35:16 Amadodana kaJonadabi indodana kaRekabi awugcinile umlayo uyise awanika wona, kodwa lababantu kabangilalelanga." 
Jeremiah35:17 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Khangela, ngizakwehlisela phezu kwabakoJuda laphezu kwabakhileyo bonke eJerusalema konke okubi engikukhulume ngabo; ngoba ngikhulumile kibo, kabangilalelanga, ngibabizile, kodwa kabasabelanga." 
Jeremiah35:18 UJeremiya wathi endlini yamaRekabi: I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Ngenxa yokuthi lilalele umlayo kaJonadabi uyihlo, lagcina yonke imilayo yakhe, lenza njengokulilaya kwakhe." 
Jeremiah35:19 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: UJonadabi indodana kaRekabi kayikuswela umuntu ozakuma phambi kwami insuku zonke." 
Jeremiah36:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wesine wokubusa kukaJehoyakhimi indodana kaJosiya, inkosi yakoJuda, lelilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya, lathi:" 
Jeremiah36:2 Thatha umqulu wencwadi, ubhale kiwo wonke amazwi engiwakhulume kuwe ngoIsrayeli langoJuda langazo zonke izizwe, kusukela esukwini engakhuluma kuwe ngoIsrayeli langoJuda langazo zonke izizwe, kusukela esukwini engakhuluma ngalo kuwe, ensukwini zikaJosiya, kuze kube lamuhla." 
Jeremiah36:3 Mhlawumbe indlu yakoJuda izakuzwa konke okubi engicabanga ukukwenza kiyo, ukuze baphenduke bonke endleleni yabo embi, ukuze ngithethelele ububi babo lesono sabo." 
Jeremiah36:4 UJeremiya wasebiza uBaruki indodana kaNeriya, uBaruki wabhala emqulwini wencwadi okuvela emlonyeni kaJeremiya wonke amazwi e Nkosi, eyayiwakhulume kuye." 
Jeremiah36:5 UJeremiya wasesithi kuBaruki: Mina ngivinjelwe ukungena ethempelini; 
Jeremiah36:6 hamba wena, mhla wosuku lokuzila ukudla, ufunde emqulwini wencwadi owubhalileyo, wonke amazwi e Nkosi engikutshele wona, uwafunde phambi kwabantu bonke ethempelini; uwafunde futhi phambi kwabantu bonke bakoJuda abavela emizini yabo." 
Jeremiah36:7 Mhlawumbe umkhuleko wabo ungezwakala e Nkosi ni, baphenduke bonke endleleni yabo embi, ngoba ulaka lwe Nkosi lukhulu kanye lokuthukuthela kwayo ngalababantu." 
Jeremiah36:8 UBaruki indodana kaNeriya wakwenza konke uJeremiya umprofethi ayemlaye khona, ukuze afunde amazwi e Nkosi asemqulwini ethempelini." 
Jeremiah36:9 Emnyakeni wesihlanu wokubusa kukaJehoyakhimi indodana kaJosiya, inkosi yakoJuda, ngenyanga yesificamunwemunye, bonke abantu abaseJerusalema, labantu bonke abavela emizini yakoJuda besiza eJerusalema, bamemezela usuku lokuzila ukudla phambi kwe Nkosi." 
Jeremiah36:10 UBaruki wawafunda wonke amazwi kaJeremiya asemqulwini wencwadi phambi kwabo bonke abantu ethempelini, endlini kaGemariya indodana kaShafani, umbhali, eyayisegumeni elingaphezulu, ekungeneni kweSango elitsha lethempeli." 
Jeremiah36:11 Kwathi lapho uMikhaya indodana kaGemariya, indodana kaShafani, esizwa wonke amazwi e Nkosi avela emqulwini wencwadi," 
Jeremiah36:12 waya esigodlweni, wangena endlini yombhali; khangela, zonke iziphathamandla zazikhona lapho, oElishama umbhali, loDelaya indodana kaShemaya, loElinathani indodana kaAkhibhori, loGemariya indodana kaShafani, loZedekhiya indodana kaHananiya, lezinye zonke iziphathamandla." 
Jeremiah36:13 UMikhaya wabatshela wonke amazwi ayewezwile, lapho uBaruki efunda umqulu wencwadi phambi kwabantu." 
Jeremiah36:14 Zonke iziphathamandla zasezithuma uJehudi indodana kaNethaniya, indodana kaShelemiya, indodana kaKushi, ukuze athi kuBaruki: Thatha umqulu wencwadi owufunde phambi kwabantu, uze lawo. Ngakho uBaruki indodana kaNeriya wawuthatha umqulu wencwadi, waya kuzo." 
Jeremiah36:15 Bathi kuye: Hlala phansi, uwufunde. UBaruki wasebafundela." 
Jeremiah36:16 Bathi ukuwezwa wonke amazwi, bakhangelana bethukile, bathi kuBaruki: Sizayitshela inkosi wonke amazwi la." 
Jeremiah36:17 Bambuza uBaruki bathi: Sitshele, wawabhala njani wonke lamazwi? UJeremiya wakutshela wona yini?" 
Jeremiah36:18 UBaruki wathi: UJeremiya wangitshela wonke lamazwi, ngawabhala ngeyinki emqulwini wencwadi." 
Jeremiah36:19 Iziphathamandla zasezisithi kuBaruki: Hamba uyecatsha, wena loJeremiya, ungatsheli muntu lapho elikhona." 
Jeremiah36:20 Zasezingena enkosini egumeni, seziwubekile umqulu wencwadi endlini kaElishama umbhali; zayibikela inkosi wonke amazwi." 
Jeremiah36:21 Inkosi yasithuma uJehudi ukuthi awulande umqulu wencwadi; wawuthatha endlini kaElishama umbhali; uJehudi wayifundela inkosi lazo zonke iziphathamandla ezazilenkosi. 
Jeremiah36:22 Kwakuyinyanga yesificamunwemunye, inkosi yayihlezi endlini yobusika, kubasiwe umlilo embawuleni phambi kwayo." 
Jeremiah36:23 Kwathi lapho uJehudi esefundile amakhasi amathathu loba amane, inkosi yawasika ngengqamu, yawaphosela emlilweni osembawuleni, waze watsha waphela umqulu wonke wencwadi." 
Jeremiah36:24 Kodwa inkosi lenceku zayo ezawezwayo wonke lamazwi kabesabanga, kabadabulanga izembatho zabo." 
Jeremiah36:25 Kwathi lalapho oElinathani loDelaya loGemariya beyincenga inkosi ukuthi ingawutshisi umqulu, kayibalalelanga." 
Jeremiah36:26 Inkosi yalaya uJerameli indodana yenkosi, loSeraya indodana kaAziriyeli, loShelemiya indodana kaAbideli, ukuze babambe uBaruki umbhali loJeremiya umprofethi; kodwa i Nkosi yabafihla." 
Jeremiah36:27 Kwathi lapho inkosi uJehoyakhimi isiwutshisile umqulu owawulamazwi kaJeremiya ayebhalwe nguBaruki, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya lathi:" 
Jeremiah36:28 Thatha omunye umqulu wencwadi, ubhale kuwo wonke amazwi ayesemqulwini wokuqala owatshiswa nguJehoyakhimi inkosi yakoJuda." 
Jeremiah36:29 Mayelana loJehoyakhimi inkosi yakoJuda uzakuthi: I Nkosi uNkulunkulu ithi: Uwutshisile umqulu wencwadi, wathi: Ubhaleleni kiwo ukuthi inkosi yeBhabhiloni izafika isibili, ilichithe lelilizwe, ibulale bonke abantu lenyamazana?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi ithi mayelana loJehoyakhimi inkosi yakoJuda: Kayikuba lamuntu wokuhlala esihlalweni sobukhosi sikaDavida; lesidumbu sakhe sizaphoselwa ekutshiseni kwelanga lekuqandeni kobusuku. 
Jeremiah36:31 Ngizamtshaya yena kanye lenzalo yakhe, lenceku zakhe ngenxa yobubi babo; ngizakwehlisela phezu kwabo laphezu kwabo bonke abakhileyo eJerusalema laphezu kwabantu bakoJuda konke okubi engikukhulume ngabo, ngoba bengalalelanga." 
Jeremiah36:32 UJeremiya wasethatha omunye umqulu, wawunika uBaruki umbhali indodana kaNeriya, owabhala kiwo wonke amazwi kaJeremiya, wonke amazwi omqulu wokuqala owatshiswa nguJehoyakhimi inkosi yakoJuda; kwengezelelwa kiwo amazwi amanengi afanana lawo." 
Jeremiah37:1 UZedekhiya indodana kaJosiya waba yinkosi esikhundleni sikaKoniya indodana kaJehoyakhimi, wabekwa nguNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni ukuze abuse elizweni lakoJuda." 
Jeremiah37:2 Kodwa yena lenceku zakhe labantu belizwe kabawalalelanga amazwi e Nkosi eyayiwakhulume ngoJeremiya umprofethi. 
Jeremiah37:3 Inkosi uZedekhiya yathuma uJehukali indodana kaShelemiya loZefaniya umpristi indodana kaMahaseya kuJeremiya umprofethi, yathi: Ake usikhulekele e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wethu." 
Jeremiah37:4 UJeremiya wayesahamba phakathi kwabantu engakafakwa entolongweni. 
Jeremiah37:5 Ibutho likaFaro laliphumile eGibhithe; kwathi lapho amaKhaladiya ayevimbezela iJerusalema ekuzwa lokho, asuka eJerusalema." 
Jeremiah37:6 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya umprofethi lathi: 
Jeremiah37:7 I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Lizakuthi enkosini yakoJuda elithume ukubuza kimi: Khangela, ibutho likaFaro elize ukulisiza selizabuyela eGibhithe, elizweni lalo." 
Jeremiah37:8 AmaKhaladiya azabuya, alwe emelene lumuzi, awuthumbe, awutshise ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah37:9 I Nkosi ithi: Lingazikhohlisi ngokuthi: AmaKhaladiya kawasayikubuya kithi. Ngoba azabuya isibili. 
Jeremiah37:10 Loba lilitshaya ibutho lonke lamaKhaladiya alwa emelene lani, kusale nje abantu abalimeleyo, bazasukuma bonke baphume emathenteni abo, bawutshise lumuzi ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah37:11 Kwathi lapho ibutho lamaKhaladiya selisukile eJerusalema selizwile ukuthi ibutho likaFaro liyeza," 
Jeremiah37:12 uJeremiya wasephuma eJerusalema ukuya elizweni lakoBhenjamini ukuthi emukele isabelo sakhe selifa khona phakathi kwabantu. 
Jeremiah37:13 Kwathi lapho eseSangweni lakoBhenjamini, induna yabalindi ethiwa nguIrija indodana kaShelemiya, kaHananiya, wambamba uJeremiya umprofethi, wathi: Uyabalekela kumaKhaladiya." 
Jeremiah37:14 UJeremiya wathi: Kungamanga; kangibalekeli kumaKhaladiya. Kodwa uJerija kazamlalela; wambamba uJeremiya, wamletha ezikhulwini." 
Jeremiah37:15 Iziphathamandla zathukuthela ngoJeremiya, zamtshaya, zamfaka entolongweni, endlini kaJonathani umbhali, ngoba zaziyenze yaba yintolongo." 
Jeremiah37:16 UJeremiya wafakwa endlini engumgodi, wahlala khona insuku ezinengi." 
Jeremiah37:17 Inkosi uZedekhiya yambiza, yamemukela. Yambuza ensitha endlini yayo yathi: Kambe likhona ilizwi elivela e Nkosi ni? UJeremiya wathi: Likhona. Uzanikelwa esandleni senkosi yeBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah37:18 UJeremiya wathi futhi kuZedekhiya inkosi: Ngoneni kuwe lezincekwini zakho lakulababantu ukuthi lingifake entolongweni? 
Jeremiah37:19 Bangaphi abaprofethi benu abaprofetha kini besithi: Inkosi yeBhabhiloni kayiyikufika ukulihlasela lina lalelilizwe? 
Jeremiah37:20 Zwana-ke, ngiyakuncenga wena nkosi, ake ulalele isikhalazo sami, ungangibuyiseli endlini kaJonathani umbhali, hlezi ngifele khona." 
Jeremiah37:21 Ngakho inkosi uZedekhiya waselaya ukuthi bamfake uJeremiya egumeni labalindi, lokuthi anikwe isinkwa sibe sinye insuku zonke esivela kubapheki bezinkwa, kwaze kwaphela zonke izinkwa emzini. Ngakho uJeremiya wahlala egumeni labalindi." 
Jeremiah38:1 UShefathiya indodana kaMathani, loGedaliya indodana kaPashuri, loJukali indodana kaShelemiya, loPashuri indodana kaMalikiya, bawezwa amazwi uJeremiya ayewakhuluma kubo bonke abantu esithi:" 
Jeremiah38:2 I Nkosi ithi: Osala kulumuzi uzabulawa ngenkemba langendlala langomatshayabhuqe wesifo; kodwa ophuma aye kumaKhaladiya uzasila, aphunyuke." 
Jeremiah38:3 I Nkosi ithi: Lumuzi uzanikelwa isibili esandleni sebutho lenkosi yeBhabhiloni, uthunjwe." 
Jeremiah38:4 Iziphathamandla zasezisithi enkosini: Kabulawe lumuntu, ngoba wenza amabutho asele kulumuzi abe buthakathaka, kanye labantu bonke, ngokukhuluma kibo amazwi anje. Ngoba lumuntu kaphisekeli okuhle kwalababantu, kodwa uphisekela okubi." 
Jeremiah38:5 Inkosi uZedekhiya yathi: Khangela, usezandleni zenu, ngoba inkosi kayilamandla okwenza ulutho oluphambene lani." 
Jeremiah38:6 Basebemthatha uJeremiya, bamphosela emgodini kaMalikiya indodana yenkosi, owawusegumeni labalindi, bamehlisela phakathi ngamagoda. Umgodi wawungelamanzi, kodwa wawugcwele udaka. UJeremiya watshona odakeni." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kwathi uEbedimeleki umEtiyopiya umthenwa, owayesebenza esigodlweni. esizwa ukuthi bamphosele emgodini uJeremiya, inkosi yayihlezi ithetha amacala eSangweni lakoBhenjamini," 
Jeremiah38:8 uEbedimeleki waphuma esigodlweni waya enkosini," 
Jeremiah38:9 wathi: Nkosi yami, abantu laba benzile okubi ngakho konke abakwenze kuJeremiya umprofethi, ngoba bamphosele emgodini, uzabulawa yindlala ngoba kakusekho ukudla emzini." 
Jeremiah38:10 Ngakho inkosi yasimlaya uEbedimeleki umEtiyopiya, yathi: Thatha lapha abantu abathathu, limkhuphe uJeremiya umprofethi emgodini engakafi." 
Jeremiah38:11 Ngakho uEbedimeleki wathatha abantu, waya esigodlweni, endaweni lapho okulondolozwa khona izigqoko, wathatha khona izembatho ezindala lezigqoko ezidabukileyo, wazehlisela emgodini kuJeremiya ngamagoda." 
Jeremiah38:12 UEbedimeleki umEtiyopiya wathi kuJeremiya: Faka izembatho lezi lezigqoko emakhwapheni akho ngaphansi kwamagoda. UJeremiya wenza njalo. 
Jeremiah38:13 Basebemdonsa uJeremiya ngamagoda, bamkhupha emgodini. UJeremiya wahlala egumeni labalindi." 
Jeremiah38:14 Inkosi uZedekhiya wambiza uJeremiya umprofethi, wamemukela esangweni lesithathu lethempeli lenkosi. Yathi kuJeremiya: Ngizakubuza umbuzo, ungangifihleli lutho." 
Jeremiah38:15 UJeremiya wathi enkosini: Uba ngikutshela, kawuyikungibulala yini? Loba ngikweluleka, kawuyikungilalela." 
Jeremiah38:16 Inkosi uZedekhiya yasifunga ekusithekeni kuJeremiya yathi: Kuphila kukaJehova owenza imimoya yethu, kangiyikukubulala, futhi kangiyikukunikela ezandleni zabantu laba abadinga ukukubulala." 
Jeremiah38:17 UJeremiya wasesithi kuZedekhiya: I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Uba uzinikela kuzo iziphathamandla zenkosi yeBhabhiloni uzasila, lalumuzi kawuyikutshiswa ngomlilo, uzasila wena lendlu yakho." 
Jeremiah38:18 Kodwa uba ungazinikeli ezikhulwini zeBhabhiloni, lumuzi uzathunjwa ngamaKhaladiya, awutshise ngomlilo, lawe kawuyikuphunyuka ezandleni zawo." 
Jeremiah38:19 Inkosi uZedekhiya yathi kuJeremiya: Ngiyawesaba amaJuda abalekele kumaKhaladiya, hlezi nginikelwe ezandleni zawo, adlale ngami." 
Jeremiah38:20 UJeremiya wathi: Kawuyikunikelwa kuwo; lalela ilizwi le Nkosi ngalokho engikutsho kuwe, kuzakulungela, futhi uzasila." 
Jeremiah38:21 Kodwa uba usala ukuzinikela, nanti ilizwi i Nkosi engibonise lona lokuthi:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Khangela-ke, bonke abesifazana abasele endlini yenkosi yakoJuda bazakhitshelwa ezikhulwini zenkosi yeBhabhiloni, bathi: Abangane bakho abathembekileyo bakukhohlisile, bakwehlula; kodwa lapho inyawo zakho sezitshone odakeni, bazakubalekela." 
Jeremiah38:23 Abafazi bakho bonke lamadodana akho bazakhitshelwa kumaKhaladiya, lawe kawuyikuphunyuka ezandleni zawo, kodwa uzabanjwa yinkosi yeBhabhiloni, lalumuzi utshiswe ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah38:24 UZedekhiya wasesithi kuJeremiya: Kakungabi khona umuntu owaziyo lamazwi hlezi ubulawe. 
Jeremiah38:25 Nxa iziphathamandla zisizwa ukuthi ngikhulume lawe, zize kuwe zithi: Ake usitshele ukuthi ubusithini enkosini, lokuthi inkosi itheni kuwe; ungasifihleli lutho, kasiyikukubulala;" 
Jeremiah38:26 uzakuthi kuzo: Bengincenga inkosi ukuthi ingangibuyiseli endlini kaJonathani ukuze ngifele khona. 
Jeremiah38:27 Zasezifika zonke iziphathamandla kuJeremiya, zambuza; yena waziphendula njengokutsho kwenkosi kuye. Zasezithula ukukhuluma laye, zasuka kuye, ngoba udaba lwalungezwakali." 
Jeremiah38:28 UJeremiya wahlala egumeni labalindi kwaze kwaba lusuku lokuthunjwa kweJerusalema. 
Jeremiah39:1 Ngomnyaka wesificamunwemunye wokubusa kukaZedekhiya inkosi yakoJuda, ngenyanga yetshumi, uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni lebutho lakhe lonke bafika bayivimbezela iJerusalema." 
Jeremiah39:2 Ngomnyaka wetshumi lanye wokubusa kukaZedekhiya, ngosuku lwesificamunwemunye lwenyanga yesine, umuzi wafohlelwa." 
Jeremiah39:3 Kwathi iJerusalema isithunjiwe, zonke iziphathamandla zenkosi yeBhabhiloni zeza zahlala esangweni eliphakathi, uNerigali-Sharezi, loSamiganebo, loSarisekimi induna yabathenwa, loNerigali-Sharezi induna yamabutho, lazo zonke ezinye induna zenkosi yeBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah39:4 Kwathi lapho uZedekhiya inkosi lawo wonke amabutho bebabona, babaleka, baphuma emzini ebusuku ngendlela yensimu yenkosi, ngesango eliphakathi kwemiduli emibili, baphuma ngendlela yamagceke." 
Jeremiah39:5 Kodwa ibutho lamaKhaladiya laxotshana labo, lamfica uZedekhiya emagcekeni eJeriko. Selimbambile lamletha kuNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni eRibila, elizweni leHamathi, wapha isigwebo phezu kwakhe." 
Jeremiah39:6 Inkosi yeBhabhiloni yawabulala amadodana kaZedekhiya phambi kwakhe eRibila, yabulala zonke iziphathamandla zakoJuda." 
Jeremiah39:7 Yamkhupha amehlo uZedekhiya, yambopha ngamaketane ukuze imuse eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah39:8 AmaKhaladiya atshisa indlu yenkosi lezindlu zabantu, adilizela phansi imiduli yeJerusalema." 
Jeremiah39:9 UNebuzaradani induna yabalindi yabathumba bonke abantu ababesele emzini, yabasa eBhabhiloni, labo ababebalekele kuye." 
Jeremiah39:10 UNebuzaradani induna yabalindi watshiya elizweni lakoJuda abantukazana ababengelalutho, ukuze balime izivini lamasimu ngalesosikhathi." 
Jeremiah39:11 UNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni walaya uNebuzaradani induna yabalindi ngoJeremiya wathi: 
Jeremiah39:12 Mthathe, umlondoloze kuhle, ungamenzeli okubi, kodwa wenze lokho akutshela khona." 
Jeremiah39:13 Ngakho uNebuzaradani induna yabalindi loNebushazibani induna yabathenwa, loNerigali-Sharezi induna yamabutho, lazo zonke induna zenkosi yeBhabhiloni," 
Jeremiah39:14 bamsusa uJeremiya egumeni labalindi, bamnikela kuGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu, indodana kaShafani, ukuze amuse ekhaya. Wasehlala phakathi kwabantu." 
Jeremiah39:15 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya esavalelwe egumeni labalindi, lathi:" 
Jeremiah39:16 Hamba uyekuthi kuEbedimeleki umEtiyopiya: I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Khangela, ngizagcwalisa amazwi ami ngalumuzi ngokubi kungeyisikho ngokuhle, azagcwaliseka phambi kwakho ngalolosuku." 
Jeremiah39:17 Kodwa wena ngizakukhulula ngalolosuku, kutsho i Nkosi, kawuyikunikelwa ezandleni zabantu obesabayo;" 
Jeremiah39:18 ngoba ngizakhulula isibili, kawuyikubulawa, kodwa uzaphunyuka, ngoba ungithembile, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah40:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya, uNebuzaradani induna yabalindi esemkhulule eRama; uJeremiya wayesiwe lapho ebotshiwe ngamaketane kanye labo bonke ababethunjwe eJerusalema lakoJuda, ababesiwa eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah40:2 Induna yabalindi yamthatha uJeremiya, yathi kuye: I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, yakhuluma lokhu okubi ngalindawo;" 
Jeremiah40:3 I Nkosi isikulethile, yakwenza njengokutsho kwayo. Njengoba lonile e Nkosi ni, kalililalelanga ilizwi layo, ngakho-ke lokhu kulehlele." 
Jeremiah40:4 Khangela, lamuhla ngiyakukhulula kulamaketane asezandleni zakho. Uba uthanda ukuya lami eBhabhiloni, ungahamba, ngizakulondoloza; kodwa uba ungathandi ukuya lami eBhabhiloni, ungahambi. Khangela, ilizwe lonke liphambi kwakho; hamba uye lapho obona ukuthi kuhle khona, lalapho othanda khona." 
Jeremiah40:5 Uba uthanda, buyela kuGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu, indodana kaShafani, emmisileyo inkosi yeBhabhiloni ukuthi abe ngumbusi wemizi yakoJuda, uhlale laye phakathi kwabantu; loba uye lapho othanda khona. Ngakho induna yabalindi yasimnika umphako lesipho, yamyekela ukuthi ahambe." 
Jeremiah40:6 UJeremiya wasesuka waya kuGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu eMizipa, wahlala laye labantu ababesele elizweni." 
Jeremiah40:7 Kwathi zonke induna zamabutho ezazisegangeni kanye labantu bazo zisizwa ukuthi inkosi yeBhabhiloni ibekile uGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu ukuba ngumbusi elizweni, lokuthi inikele kuye amadodana labesifazana labantwana, abangabayanga belizwe abangathunjelwanga eBhabhiloni," 
Jeremiah40:8 baya kuGedaliya eMizipa, oIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya, loJohanani indodana kaKareya, loSeraya indodana kaTanihumethi, lamadodana kaEfazi weNetofa, loJezaniya indodana kaMahakathi, bona labantu babo." 
Jeremiah40:9 UGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu, kaShafani, wafunga kibo labantu babo, wathi: Lingesabi ukukhonza amaKhaladiya. Hlalani elizweni, liyisebenzele inkosi yeBhabhiloni, kuzalilungela." 
Jeremiah40:10 Khangela-ke, ina ngizahlala eMizipa ukulincengela kumaKhaladiya azafika kithi; kodwa lina vunani iwayini, lezithelo zasehlobo, lamafutha, likulondoloze ezitsheni zenu, lihlale emizini eliyiphetheyo." 
Jeremiah40:11 Futhi, lapho wonke amaJuda ayekoMowabi leAmoni leEdoma lakwamanye amazwe esezwile ukuthi inkosi yeBhabhiloni itshiyile insali elizweni lakoJuda, yabeka uGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu, kaShafani, ukuba ngumbusi." 
Jeremiah40:12 Wonke amaJuda abuya endaweni zonke ayexotshelwe kuzo, eza elizweni lakoJuda, kuGedaliya eMizipa; avuna iwayini lezithelo zehlobo, zaba zinengi." 
Jeremiah40:13 Kwathi uJohanani indodana kaKareya lazo zonke induna zamabutho ayesegangeni beza kuGedaliya eMizipa," 
Jeremiah40:14 bathi kuye: Uyazi nje ukuthi uBhalisi inkosi yamaAmoni uthume uIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya ukukutshaya empilweni yini? Kodwa uGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu kabakholwanga. 
Jeremiah40:15 UJohanani indodana kaKareya wasekhuluma loGedaliya eMizipa ensitha wathi: Ngivumela ukuba ngihambe, ngiyetshaya uIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya, kungaziwa muntu. Uzakutshayelani empilweni, ukuze wonke amaJuda abuthene lapha ahlakazeke, kubhubhe insali koJuda?" 
Jeremiah40:16 Kodwa uGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu wathi kuJohanani indodana kaKareya: Kawuyikwenza into enje, ngoba uqamba amanga ngoIshmayeli." 
Jeremiah41:1 Kwathi ngenyanga yesikhombisa uIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya, kaElishama, owenzalo yenkosi, wafika lamadoda alitshumi kuGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu eMizipa. Kwathi besadla laye eMizipa," 
Jeremiah41:2 uIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya lamadoda alitshumi ayelaye bamtshaya ngenkemba uGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu, kaShafani, bambulala, yena inkosi yeBhabhiloni eyayimbeke ukuba ngumbusi elizweni." 
Jeremiah41:3 UIshmayeli watshaya lawo wonke amaJuda ayeloGedaliya eMizipa, kanye lamabutho amaKhaladiya ayekhona lapho." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ngosuku lwesibili sebembulele uGedaliya, kungakaziwa muntu," 
Jeremiah41:5 kwafika amadoda angamatshumi ayisificaminwembili evela eShekema leShilo leSamariya, ephucile indevu zawo, lezigqoko zawo zidatshuliwe, lemizimba yawo isikiwe, eletha iminikelo yempuphu kanye lempepha ukuyinikela ethempelini." 
Jeremiah41:6 UIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya wasuka eMizipa ukuwahlangabeza, ehamba ekhala inyembezi. Kwathi lapho ehlangana lawo, wathi kuwo: Wozani kuGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu." 
Jeremiah41:7 Kwathi esengenile emzini, uIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya lamadodana ayelaye bawabulala, bawaphosela emgodini." 
Jeremiah41:8 Kodwa kwakulamadoda alitshumi phakathi kwawo athi kuIshmayeli: Ungasibulali. ngoba sileziphala ezigcwele ingqoloyi lebhali* lamafutha kanye loluju, sikufihlile egangeni. Ngakho wawayekela, kaze awabulala." 
Jeremiah41:9 Umgodi uIshmayeli ayephosele kuwo izidumbu zabo bonke abantu ayebatshayile, wawungumgodi omkhulu owawenziwe yinkosi uAsa ukuzivikela kuBahasha inkosi yakoIsrayeli. UIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya wawugcwalisa ngezidumbu." 
Jeremiah41:10 UIshmayeli wasethumba bonke abantu ababesele eMizipa, amadodakazi enkosi labo bonke ababesele eMizipa, uNebuzaradani induna yabalindi ayebanikezele kuGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu. UIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya wabathumba, wabasa kumaAmoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Kodwa kwathi lapho uJohanani indodana kaKareya lazo zonke induna zamabutho ezazilaye besizwa konke okubi okwenziwe nguIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya," 
Jeremiah41:12 bathatha abantu babo bonke, bayakulwa loIshmayeli. Bamfica echibini elikhulu eliseGibeyoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Kwathi lapho bonke abantu ababeloIshmayeli bebona uJohanani indodana kaKareya lazo zonke induna zebutho ezazilaye bathokoza. 
Jeremiah41:14 Basebetshibilika abantu bonke uIshmayeli ayebathumbe eMizipa, babuya baya kuJohanani indodana kaKareya." 
Jeremiah41:15 Kodwa uIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya waphunyuka kuJohanani lamadoda ayisificaminwembili, wabalekela kumaAmoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 UJohanani indodana kaKareya lazo zonke induna zamabutho ezazilaye bathatha bonke abantu ababesele uIshmayeli indodana kaNethaniya ayebathumbe eMizipa, esetshaye uGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu, amadoda empi, labafazi, labantwana, labathenwa, labo uJohanani ayebuyele labo eGibeyoni." 
Jeremiah41:17 Basuka bayahlala eGeruthi-Kimihamu eduze leBhethelehema, bezama ukuya eGibhithe," 
Jeremiah41:18 bebalekela amaKhaladiya; ngoba babewesaba, ngoba uIshmayeli kaNethaniya wayetshaye uGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu, inkosi yeBhabhiloni eyayimbekile ukuba ngumbusi welizwe." 
Jeremiah42:1 Zasezisondela zonke induna zebutho, loJohanani indodana kaKareya, loAzariya indodana kaHoshaya, labo bonke abantu abancinyane labakhulu," 
Jeremiah42:2 bathi kuJeremiya umprofethi: Ake uzwe ukunxusa kwethu, usikhulekele e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wakho, ukhulekele bonke laba abaseleyo, ngoba sisele sibalutshwana nje kwabanengi, njengalokho lawe ubona," 
Jeremiah42:3 ukuze i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, isitshengise indlela esifanele ukuhamba ngayo, lalokho esifanele ukukwenza." 
Jeremiah42:4 UJeremiya umprofethi wathi kibo: Sengilizwile; khangela, ngizakhuleka e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wenu njengokucela kwenu, lalokho i Nkosi ekutshoyo ngizalitshela khona, kangiyikuthula." 
Jeremiah42:5 Basebesithi kuJeremiya: I Nkosi kayibe ngumfakazi oqinisileyo lothembekileyo ngathi, uba singenzi njengelizwi le Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, elithumela kithi ngawe." 
Jeremiah42:6 Loba kukuhle loba kukubi, sizalalela ilizwi le Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wethu, esikuthuma kuyo, ukuze kusilungele lapho sililalela ilizwi le Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wethu." 
Jeremiah42:7 Kwathi emva kwensuku ezilitshumi, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJeremiya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Wasebiza uJohanani indodana kaKareya, lazo zonke induna zebutho ezazilaye, labantu bonke abancinyane labakhulu;" 
Jeremiah42:9 wathi kibo: I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, elingithume kiyo ukuthi ngilinxusele, ithi:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Uba lihlala kulelilizwe, ngizalakha ngingalidilizi, ngiligxumeke, ngingalisiphuni; ngoba ngiyazisola ngokubi engikwenzileyo kini." 
Jeremiah42:11 Lingayesabi inkosi yeBhabhiloni eliyesabayo, kutsho i Nkosi; ngoba mina ngilani ukuze ngilisize ngilophule esandleni sayo." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ngizaliphatha ngomusa, ukuze ibe lomusa kini, iliyekele ukuthi lihlale elizweni lakini." 
Jeremiah42:13 Kodwa uba lisithi: Kasiyikuhlala kulelilizwe; lingalilaleli ilizwi le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu," 
Jeremiah42:14 lithi: Hatshi bo! sizakuya elizweni leGibhithe lapho esingayikubona impi khona, singayikuzwa ukukhala kophondo, singayikulamba, sihlale khona;" 
Jeremiah42:15 zwanini-ke ilizwi le Nkosi, lina eliseleyo koJuda. I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Uba lifisa ukuya eGibhithe ukuze lihlale khona," 
Jeremiah42:16 inkemba eliyesabayo izalifica khona elizweni leGibhithe, lendlala eliyesabayo izalinamathela eGibhithe, lifele khona." 
Jeremiah42:17 Bonke abantu abafisa ukuya eGibhithe ukuze bahlale khona bazabulawa ngenkemba langendlala langomatshayabhuqe wesifo, kungasali muntu aphunyuke kokubi engizabehlisela khona." 
Jeremiah42:18 I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Njengoba ukuthukuthela kwami lolaka lwami kwehlela kwabakhileyo eJerusalema, ngokunjalo ulaka lwami luzakwehlela kini nxa lisiya eGibhithe. Lizakuba yinto eyenyanyekayo leyesabekayo, into yokuthukwa lokuhlekwa, lingaphindi liyibone lindawo futhi." 
Jeremiah42:19 I Nkosi ithe kini, lina abaseleyo koJuda: Lingayi eGibhithe. Yazini isibili ukuthi ngilixwayisile lamuhla." 
Jeremiah42:20 Lizifake engozini ngokungithuma e Nkosi ni, uNkulunkulu wenu, lisithi: Sikhulekele e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wethu; lokho i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu ekutshoyo, sizakwenza." 
Jeremiah42:21 Sengilitshelile lamuhla, kodwa kalililalelanga ilizwi le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu kukho konke engitshele khona ukuthi ngilitshele." 
Jeremiah42:22 Yazini isibili ukuthi lizabulawa ngenkemba langendlala langomatshayabhuqe wesifo endaweni elifisa ukuyahlala kiyo. 
Jeremiah43:1 Kwathi lapho uJeremiya eseqedile ukukhuluma ebantwini wonke lamazwi e Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo eyayimthume wona kibo," 
Jeremiah43:2 uAzariya indodana kaHoshaya, loJohanani indodana kaKareya, labo bonke abantu abazikhukhumezayo, bathi kuJeremiya: Uqamba amanga. I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu kayikuthumanga ukuze uthi kithi: Lingayi eGibhithe ukuze lihlale khona;" 
Jeremiah43:3 kodwa uBaruki indodana kaNeriya uyakuxabanisa lathi ukuze asinikele kumaKhaladiya ukuze asibulale, kumbe asithumbe asise eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah43:4 Ngakho uJohanani indodana kaKareya, lazo zonke induna zebutho, labo bonke abantu kabalilalelanga ilizwi le Nkosi ukuze bahlale elizweni lakoJuda." 
Jeremiah43:5 UJohanani indodana kaKareya lazo zonke induna zebutho bathatha bonke abaseleyo bakoJuda ababebuyele ukuhlala elizweni lakoJuda bevela kuzo zonke izizwe ababexotshelwe kuzo, baya labo eGibhithe," 
Jeremiah43:6 amadoda, labafazi, labantwana, amadodakazi enkosi, bonke abantu uNebuzaradani induna yabalindi ayebatshiye kuGedaliya indodana kaAhikhamu, indodana kaShafani; bathatha loJeremiya umprofethi loBaruki indodana kaNeriya." 
Jeremiah43:7 Bayafika elizweni leGibhithe, ngoba kabalilalelanga ilizwi le Nkosi; bafikela eTahafanesi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Laselifika ilizwi le Nkosi kuJeremiya eseTahafanesi," 
Jeremiah43:9 lathi: Thatha amatshe amakhulu, uwafihle endaweni egandelweyo esangweni lesigodlo sikaFaro eTahafanesi, phambi kwabantu bakoJuda," 
Jeremiah43:10 uthi kibo: I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Khangela, ngizabiza uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni inceku yami; uzamisa isihlalo sakhe sobukhosi phezu kwalamatshe engiwabekileyo, amise ithente lakhe phezu kwawo." 
Jeremiah43:11 Uzafika, atshaye ilizwe leGibhithe, labo abamiselwe umkhuhlane abanikele emkhuhlaneni, abamiselwe ukuthunjwa abanikele ekuthunjweni, labamiselwe inkemba abanikele enkembeni;" 
Jeremiah43:12 aphembe umlilo emathempelini abonkulunkulu beGibhithe, abatshise, abathumbe, alicuthe ilizwe leGibhithe njengomelusi ecutha isigqoko sakhe esigcwele izibungu, asuke khona esenqobile." 
Jeremiah43:13 Uzakwephula insika zeHeliyopolisi eziyizithombe elizweni leGibhithe, atshise ngomlilo amathempeli abonkulunkulu beGibhithe." 
Jeremiah44:1 Ilizwi elafika kuJeremiya ngawo wonke amaJuda ayehlala elizweni leGibhithe eMigidoli leTahafanesi, leMemfisi, laselizweni lePatrosi," 
Jeremiah44:2 lathi: I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Likubonile konke okubi engakwehlisela phezu kweJerusalema laphezu kwayo yonke imizi yakoJuda. Khangela, lamuhla iyinkangala, kakulamuntu ohlala khona," 
Jeremiah44:3 ngenxa yobubi babo ababenzayo, bangivusa ulaka ngoba batshisa impepha, bakhonza abanye onkulunkulu abangabaziyo bona kanye lani laboyihlo." 
Jeremiah44:4 Kanti ngathuma inceku zami zonke abaprofethi, ngivuke ngovivi ngathuma, ngisithi: Lingayenzi linto enengisayo lengiyizondayo." 
Jeremiah44:5 Kodwa kabalalelanga kabezwanga, ukuthi baphenduke ebubini babo, bangatshiseli abanye onkulunkulu impepha." 
Jeremiah44:6 Ngakho ulaka lwami lokuthukuthela kwami kwavutha emizini yonke yakoJuda lendleleni zeJerusalema; zaphenduka zaba yinkangala, zachitheka njengalamuhla nje." 
Jeremiah44:7 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wamabandla. uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Likwenzelani phezu kwenu lokhu okubi kangaka, ukuthi liqume basuke kini indoda lomfazi, usane lomntwana, baphele koJuda, kungasali muntu?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Kungani lingithukuthelisa ngezithombe zenu, litshisela abanye onkulunkulu impepha elizweni leGibhithe lapho eselihlala khona, ukuze libhujiswe, liphenduke into yokuthukwa leyokuhlekwa phakathi kwazo zonke izizwe zasemhlabeni?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Selakhohlwa yini ububi baboyihlo, lobubi bamakhosi akoJuda, lobubi babomkabo, lobenu ububi, lobubi babomkenu, elabenza elizweni lakoJuda lendleleni zeJerusalema?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Kalizithobanga kuze kube lamuhla, futhi kalesabanga, kalihambanga ngomlayo wami langezimiso zami engazibeka phambi kwenu laphambi kwaboyihlo." 
Jeremiah44:11 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Khangela, ngizalenzela okubi ukuze ngiliqede elizweni lonke lakoJuda." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ngizathatha abaseleyo koJuda abafise ukuzahlala elizweni leGibhithe, bazabhubha bonke, babulawe ngenkemba layindlala elizweni iGibhithe, baphele bonke abancinyane labakhulu, babe yinto eyenyanyekayo, into eyesabekayo, leyokuthukwa, leyokuhlekwa." 
Jeremiah44:13 Ngizatshaya labo abahlezi elizweni leGibhithe, njengoba ngatshaya iJerusalema, ngenkemba langendlala langomatshayabhuqe wesifo," 
Jeremiah44:14 ukuze kungabi khona loyedwa kwabaseleyo koJuda, abafikileyo ukuhlala elizweni leGibhithe, ozaphunyuka asile, abuyele elizweni lakoJuda abafisa ukubuyela kulo, bahlale khona; ngoba kabayikubuyela kuphela abaphunyukileyo." 
Jeremiah44:15 Wonke amadoda ayesazi ukuthi omkabo batshisela abanye onkulunkulu impepha, labo bonke abesifazana ababekhona belibandla elikhulu, labo bonke abantu ababehlala ePatrosi elizweni leGibhithe, bamphendula uJeremiya bathi:" 
Jeremiah44:16 Ilizwi olikhulume kithi ebizweni le Nkosi kasiyikulilalela. 
Jeremiah44:17 Kodwa sizakwenza konke esizimisele ukukwenza; sizatshisela indlovukazi yamazulu impepha, siyithululele iminikelo yokunathwayo, njengoba besisenza thina, labobaba, lamakhosi ethu, leziphathamandla zethu, emizini yakoJuda lendleleni zeJerusalema; ngoba sasilokudla okunengi, sihlezi kuhle singaboni okubi." 
Jeremiah44:18 Kodwa lokhu sayekela ukutshisela indlovukazi yamazulu impepha lokuyithululela iminikelo yokunathwayo, siswele konke, siqedwe ngenkemba layindlala." 
Jeremiah44:19 Abesifazana bona bathi: Lapho sasitshisela indlovukazi yamazulu impepha, siyithululela iminikelo yokunathwayo, kumbe siyenzela izinkwa ezilomfanekiso wayo, siyithululela iminikelo yokuthululwa, sakwenza lokho ngaphandle kwemvumo yabomkethu yini?" 
Jeremiah44:20 UJeremiya wasesithi kubo bonke abantu, amadoda labesifazana, bonke ababemphendule ngalawomazwi:" 
Jeremiah44:21 Impepha elayitshisa emizini yakoJuda lendleleni zeJerusalema, lina laboyihlo, lamakhosi enu, leziphathamandla zenu, labantu belizwe, i Nkosi kayikukhumbulanga yini? Kakungenanga engqondweni yayo yini?" 
Jeremiah44:22 I Nkosi yayingaselakuthwala okubi kwemisebenzi yenu lezinengiso elazenzayo; ngakho-ke ilizwe lenu lachitheka, laba yinkangala, laba yisiqalekiso, kakusekho okuhlala khona njengoba kunjalo lamuhla." 
Jeremiah44:23 Kungenxa yokuthi litshisile impepha, lona e Nkosi ni, lingalilalelanga ilizwi layo, lingahambanga ngomlayo wayo langezimiso zayo langemithetho yayo, ngalokho okubi lokhu kwehlele phezu kwenu njengalamuhla nje." 
Jeremiah44:24 UJeremiya wathi kubo bonke abantu lakwabesifazana bonke: Zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi, lina lonke bakoJuda eliselizweni leGibhithe." 
Jeremiah44:25 Itsho njalo i Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Lina labomkenu likukhulumile ngemilomo yenu, lakugcwalisa ngezandla zenu, lisithi: Sizakwenza lokwenza izithembiso zethu esizithembisayo zokutshisela indlovukazi yamazulu impepha, lokuyithululela iminikelo yokunathwayo. Lizaqinisa lokuqinisa izithembiso zenu, lenze sibili izithembiso zenu!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Ngakho zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi, lonke Juda elihlala elizweni leGibhithe: Khangelani, mina ngifungile ngebizo lami elikhulu, kutsho i Nkosi, ukuthi isibili ibizo lami kalisayikubizwa ngumlomo waloba ngubani wakoJuda, elizweni lonke leGibhithe, esithi: Kuphila kweNkosi uJehova." 
Jeremiah44:27 Khangela, ngilindele ukubenza okubi, kungeyisikho okuhle; bonke abakoJuda elizweni leGibhithe bazaqedwa ngenkemba layindlala, baze baphele bonke." 
Jeremiah44:28 Labo abaphepha enkembeni bazabuyela elizweni lakoJuda bevela elizweni leGibhithe, bebalutshwana nje; labo bonke abaseleyo koJuda abeze elizweni leGibhithe ukuhlala khona, bazakwazi ukuthi ilizwi elizakuma ngelikabani, elami kumbe elabo." 
Jeremiah44:29 Lokhu kuzakuba yisibonakaliso kini, kutsho i Nkosi, ukuthi ngizalitshaya kulindawo, ukuze lazi ukuthi amazwi ami engiwakhuluma ngani azakuma isibili." 
Jeremiah44:30 I Nkosi ithi: Khangelani, ngizanikela uFaro Hofra inkosi yeGibhithe ezandleni zezitha zakhe, lezandleni zalabo abamzingelayo, njengoba nganikela uZedekhiya inkosi yakoJuda esandleni sikaNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni, owayeyisitha sakhe emzingela." 
Jeremiah45:1 Ilizwi uJeremiya umprofethi alikhuluma kuBaruki indodana kaNeriya, ekubhaleni kwakhe lamazwi encwadini, uJeremiya amtshela wona, ngomnyaka wesine wokubusa kukaJehoyakhimi indodana kaJosiya, inkosi yakoJuda," 
Jeremiah45:2 lathi: I Nkosi, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi kuwe Baruki:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Uthi wena: Maye mina! ngoba i Nkosi yengezelela usizi ebuhlungwini bami, sengikhathele yikukhala, kangitholi ukuphumula." 
Jeremiah45:4 Uzakuthi kuBaruki: I Nkosi ithi: Khangela, lokho engikwakhileyo ngiyakudiliza, lalokho engikuhlanyeleyo ngiyakusiphuna; yebo, ngizakwenza njalo elizweni lonke." 
Jeremiah45:5 Wena uzidingela ezinkulu yini? Ungazidingi; ngoba khangela, ngiletha okubi phezu kwayo yonke inyama, kutsho i Nkosi, kodwa wena uzasila, uphunyuke lempilo yakho kuzo zonke indawo lapho oya khona." 
Jeremiah46:1 Nanti ilizwi le Nkosi elafika kuJeremiya umprofethi ngezizwe. 
Jeremiah46:2 Mayelana leGibhithe. Ngebutho likaFaro Neko inkosi yeGibhithe, elalisemfuleni iYufrathi, eKarikemishi, alitshayayo uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni ngomnyaka wesine wokubusa kukaJehoyakhimi indodana kaJosiya, inkosi yakoJuda, ilizwi lathi:" 
Jeremiah46:3 Lungisani amahawu lezihlangu ezinkulu, liye empini." 
Jeremiah46:4 Bophelani amabhiza, ligade lina bagadi bamabhiza. Lisuke lime, lithwele ingowane zenu, lilole imikhonto yenu, ligqoke amabhatshi enu ensimbi." 
Jeremiah46:5 Ngibonani? Sebephele amandla, babuyele emuva. Lamaqhawe abo ayehlulwa, ayabaleka, kawanyemukuli emuva; lokwesaba kusenhlangothini zonke, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah46:6 Olejubane kalakubaleka, leqhawe kalilakuphunyuka; ngenyakatho eceleni komfula iYufrathi bakhubekile, bawa." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ngubani lo okhukhumala njengeNile, njengemifula elamanzi aqubukayo?" 
Jeremiah46:8 IGibhithe likhukhumala njengeNile, njengemifula elamanzi aqubukayo. Lithi: Ngizakhukhumala, ngiwusibekele umhlaba, ngichithe imizi kanye labahlala kiyo." 
Jeremiah46:9 Qhubekelani phambili, lina mabhiza, liye phambili njengabahlanyayo, lina zinqola. Kawaphume amaqhawe, amadoda eEtiyopiya lePuti aphatha izihlangu, lamadoda eLudi akwazi ukubamba lokugobisa idandili." 
Jeremiah46:10 Lolosuku lusuku lwe Nkosi, i Nkosi yamabandla, losuku lwempindiselo ukuze iziphindisele ezitheni zayo. Inkemba izakudla isuthe, yeneliswe ligazi labo. Ngoba iNkosi, i Nkosi yamabandla, izakwenza umhlatshelo elizweni lenyakatho emfuleni iYufrathi." 
Jeremiah46:11 Yehlela eGileyadi, uyethatha ibhalisamu*, ntombi emsulwa, ndodakazi yeGibhithe. Lokhu eyakho yonke iyize, ngoba kawusili." 
Jeremiah46:12 Izizwe zizwile ngehlazo lakho, lomhlaba ugcwele ukukhala kwakho; ngoba iqhawe likhutshwa ngelinye iqhawe, awele phansi womabili." 
Jeremiah46:13 Ilizwi le Nkosi eyalikhuluma kuJeremiya umprofethi ngokuza kukaNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni ukutshaya ilizwe leGibhithe, lathi:" 
Jeremiah46:14 Memezelani eGibhithe, lizwakalise eMigidoli, limemeze eMemfisi leTahafanesi, lithi: Sukumani, lime, lizilungiselele, ngoba umkhonto uzakudla inhlangothi zonke zenu." 
Jeremiah46:15 Ubalekeleni uApisi? Kayimanga ngani linkunzi yakho? Kungoba i Nkosi yayilahla phansi. 
Jeremiah46:16 Abanengi benu bakhubeka bawa, bakhulumisana besithi: Vukani, sibuyele ebantwini bakithi, lelizweni esazalelwa kilo, ngenxa yenkemba yomchithi." 
Jeremiah46:17 Bizani uFaro inkosi yeGibhithe ngokuthi: Ngumsindo okhutha ithuba. Wekele isikhathi esimisiweyo sedlula. 
Jeremiah46:18 Ngifunga ngami uqobo, kutsho iNkosi, mina engiyi Nkosi yamabandla. NjengeThabhori phakathi kwezintaba lanjengeKharmeli phansi kolwandle uzafika othile." 
Jeremiah46:19 Zilungiseleni umthwalo wokuthunjwa, lina beGibhithe. Ngoba iMemfisi izakuba yinkangala, lonxiwa olungahlalwa muntu." 
Jeremiah46:20 IGibhithe lilithokazi elihle, kodwa isibawu esivela enyakatho sesifikile kulo." 
Jeremiah46:21 Lamabutho alo aqatshiweyo akhona phakathi kwalo anjengamathole anonileyo; abuyela emuva, abaleka kanyekanye, kawemanga, ngoba usuku lokuhlupheka kwawo luwehlele, isikhathi sempindiselo yawo." 
Jeremiah46:22 Liyahotshoza njengenyoka ebalekayo; ngoba izitha zalo ziyeza zilibutho, ziphethe amahloka njengabantu abagamulayo izihlahla." 
Jeremiah46:23 Zizagamula amahlathi alo, kutsho i Nkosi, lanxa engangeneki, ngoba zinengi okwedlula isikhonyane, kazilakubalwa." 
Jeremiah46:24 AmaGibhithe azayangeka, azanikelwa ezandleni zabantu abavela enyakatho." 
Jeremiah46:25 I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Khangela, ngizatshaya uAmoni weNo, loFaro, leGibhithe kanye labonkulunkulu babo, lamakhosi alo, yebo uFaro kanye labamthembayo." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ngizabanikela ezandleni zalabo ababazingelayo, esandleni sikaNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni lenduna zakhe, emva kwalokho iGibhithe lakhiwe futhi njengensukwini zendulo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah46:27 Kodwa ungesabi, wena Jakobe nceku yami, ungatshaywa luvalo, wena Israyeli, ngoba khangela, ngizakukhulula usekhatshana, lenzalo yakho elizweni lokuthunjwa kwayo. UJakobe uzabuya aphumule, ahlale kuhle, angethuswa muntu." 
Jeremiah46:28 Ungesabi, wena Jakobe nceku yami, kutsho i Nkosi, ngoba ngilawe. Ngizachitha ngokupheleleyo zonke izizwe engikuxotshele kuzo, kodwa wena kangiyikukuqeda ngokupheleleyo. Ngizakukhuza ngokufaneleyo, kangiyikukuyekela." 
Jeremiah47:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi elafika kuJeremiya umprofethi ngamaFilisti, uFaro engakatshayi iGaza, lathi:" 
Jeremiah47:2 I Nkosi ithi: Khangela, amanzi ayaphuma enyakatho, azakuba ngumfula okhukhulayo, akhukhule ilizwe lakho konke okukulo, lemizi kanye labahlala kiyo. Abantu bazakhala, bonke abakhileyo elizweni balile." 
Jeremiah47:3 Ngomsindo wokugidiza kwamasondo amabhiza akhe, langomdumo wenqola zakhe, langomdumo wamasondo azo, oyise kabanyemukuli abantwana babo ngenxa yobuthakathaka babo," 
Jeremiah47:4 ngenxa yosuku oluzayo lokuchithwa kwawo wonke amaFilisti, lokuquma basuke eTire leSidoni bonke abasizi abaseleyo. Ngoba i Nkosi iyawachitha amaFilisti, labaseleyo esihlengeni seKafitori." 
Jeremiah47:5 IGaza igelile ikhanda layo, leAshikeloni iphelile. Lina baseleyo bamaAnaki lizazisika yini kuze kube nininini?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Hawu, nkemba ye Nkosi! Koze kube nini ungakhawuli? Buyela emgodleni wakho, uhlale uphumule." 
Jeremiah47:7 Kodwa ungaphumula njani lapho i Nkosi iwulayile? Iwumisele iAshikeloni lokhumbi lolwandle. 
Jeremiah48:1 Mayelana loMowabi. I Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Maye ngeNebo! ngoba ichithekile. IKiriyathayimi iyangekile, inqotshiwe; inqaba iyangekile, yadilika;" 
Jeremiah48:2 udumo lukaMowabi kalusekho. EHeshiboni baceba okubi ngayo, bathi: Wozani siyiqume, ingabe isaba yisizwe. Lani elihlala eMadimeni lizachitheka, baxotshane lani ngenkemba." 
Jeremiah48:3 Zwanini, ilizwi lokukhala livela eHoronayimi lisithi: Ukuchithwa, lokutshabalala okukhulu!" 
Jeremiah48:4 IMowabi uchithekile; ukukhala kuzwakala kuze kufike eZowari. 
Jeremiah48:5 Emadundulwini eLubithi bakhwela bekhala, lekwehleni ukuya eHoronayimi bazwile ukukhala kokuchitheka." 
Jeremiah48:6 Balekani, lisindise umphefumulo wenu, libe njengobabhemi weganga enkangala." 
Jeremiah48:7 Ngoba ngenxa yokuthi lathemba inqaba zenu lenotho yenu lani lizathunjwa; uKemoshi uzathunjwa kanye labapristi bakhe lezikhulu zakhe. 
Jeremiah48:8 Umchithi uzafikela yonke imizi, kawukho lowodwa ozasala; isihotsha sizachitheka, lamagceke aqothulwe, njengokutsho kwe Nkosi." 
Jeremiah48:9 Bekelani uMowabi ilitshe lengcwaba, ngoba uMowabi uzachitheka masinyane, imizi yakhe izakuba ngamanxiwa angelamuntu." 
Jeremiah48:10 Uqalekisiwe lowo owenza umsebenzi we Nkosi ngokungananzeleli; uqalekisiwe lalowo ogodla inkemba yakhe ekuchitheni igazi. 
Jeremiah48:11 UMowabi uchelesile kusukela ebutsheni bakhe, ubehlezi ezinzile; kathululelwanga embizeni ngembiza, kathunjwanga; ngakho ukunambitheka kwakhe kuhlala kunjalo, iphunga lakhe kaliphenduki." 
Jeremiah48:12 Ngakho khangela, insuku ziyeza, kutsho i Nkosi, lapho ngizathuma kuye abathambeki abazamthambeka, bathulule imbiza zakhe, babulale inqayi zakhe." 
Jeremiah48:13 Khona-ke uMowabi uzakuba lenhloni ngoKemoshi, njengalokho indlu kaIsrayeli yaba lenhloni ngeBhetheli, ithemba layo." 
Jeremiah48:14 Lingatsho njani ukuthi: Singamaqhawe lamadoda empi alamandla? 
Jeremiah48:15 Umchithi kaMowabi lemizi yakhe usefikile, lamajaha akhe akhethiweyo sehlele ekubulaweni, kutsho iNkosi eyi Nkosi yamabandla."
