Jeremiah48:16 Ukuhlupheka kukaMowabi kusondele, lokutshaywa kwakhe kuyaphangisa." 
Jeremiah48:17 Likhalelani, lina lonke elimzingelezeleyo, lani lonke elazi ibizo lakhe; lithi: Yeka ukwaphuka kwenduku elamandla, udondolo oluhle!" 
Jeremiah48:18 Yehla ebukhosini bakho, uhlale emhlabathini owomileyo, wena ohlala eDiboni. Ngoba umchithi kaMowabi usekufikele, wachitha inqaba zakho." 
Jeremiah48:19 Mana endleleni, ulinde, wena ohlala eAroweri. Ubuze obalekayo lalowo ophunyukileyo uthi: Kwenze njani?" 
Jeremiah48:20 UMowabi uyangekile, ngoba uchithekile; lilani likhale; libike eArinoni ukuthi uMowabi uchithekile." 
Jeremiah48:21 Isigwebo sehlele phezu kwelizwe elilamagceke, eHoloni leJahazi leMefahathi," 
Jeremiah48:22 leDiboni leNebo leBeti-Dibilathayimi," 
Jeremiah48:23 leKiriyathayimi, leBeti-Gamuli, leBeti-Meyoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 leKeriyothi leBozira, lakuyo yonke imizi yelizwe lakoMowabi, eduze lakhatshana." 
Jeremiah48:25 Uphondo lukaMowabi luqunyiwe, lengalo yakhe yephukile, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah48:26 Mdakiseni, ngoba ezikhukhumezile e Nkosi ni; uMowabi uzazibhixa emahlanzweni akhe, abe yinhlekisa." 
Jeremiah48:27 UIsrayeli kabanga yinhlekisa kuwe yini? Watholakala phakathi kwamasela yini ukuthi lapho ukhuluma ngaye, unikine ikhanda lakho?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Tshiyani imizi, lihlale phakathi kwamadwala, lina elihlala koMowabi. Libe njengejuba elakha isidleke salo emaweni." 
Jeremiah48:29 Sizwile ngokuzigqaja kukaMowabi; uyazigqaja kakhulu. Sizwile ngokuziphakamisa kwakhe, lokuziqakisa kwakhe, langokuzikhukhumeza kwakhe." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ngiyakwazi ukudelela kwayo, kutsho i Nkosi; ukuzincoma kwayo kuyinkohliso, lezenzo zayo ziyinkohliso." 
Jeremiah48:31 Ngalokho-ke ngiyalila ngoMowabi, ngikhale ngabo bonke abakoMowabi, ngililele abantu beKiri-Heresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ngiyakukhalela inyembezi wena vini leSibima ukudlula iJazeri. Ingatsha zakho zedlula phezu kolwandle, zaze zafinyelela eJazeri. Umchithi wehlele phezu kwezithelo zakho zehlobo lemavinini akho avuniweyo." 
Jeremiah48:33 Ukuthaba lentokozo kususiwe elizweni lakoMowabi elilenala enengi; ngiqedile iwayini ezikhamelweni; kakho osakhama izithelo zevini ngentokozo, lomsindo wentokozo kawusekho." 
Jeremiah48:34 Ukukhala kweHeshiboni leEleyale kuzwakala kuze kube seJahazi. Ukukhala okukhulu kuzwakala eZowari kuze kufike eJoronayimi leEgilathi-Shelishiya; ngoba amanzi aseMimrimi lawo asesitsha. 
Jeremiah48:35 Ngizaqeda koMowabi lowo onikela umhlatshelo endaweni ephakemeyo yokukhonzela, atshisele uNkulunkulu wakhe impepha, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah48:36 Ngakho-ke inhliziyo yami ikhalela uMowabi njengomhubhe, inhliziyo yami iyakhala njengomhubhe ngabantu beKiri-Heresi; inotho ababeyizuzile ichithekile." 
Jeremiah48:37 Ngoba wonke amakhanda aphuciwe, lazo zonke indevu zigeliwe; izandla zonke zilamanxeba, bonke bavunule amalembu amasaka enkalweni." 
Jeremiah48:38 Phezu kwazo zonke indlu zamaMowabi kanye lemagumeni akhona yikukhala kuphela; ngoba ngimbulele uMowabi njengembiza engananzwa muntu, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah48:39 Yeka ukufa kwayo! Yeka ukukhala kwayo! Yeka ukuphendula intamo kukaMowabi elenhloni! Ngakho uMowabi uphenduke waba yinhlekisa, lento eyesabekayo kibo bonke abaseduze laye." 
Jeremiah48:40 Ngoba i Nkosi ithi: Khangela, ukhona ozaphapha njengokhozi, elulele impiko zakhe koMowabi." 
Jeremiah48:41 Imizi izathunjwa, lezinqaba zithathwe, kuthi inhliziyo zamaqhawe koMowabi ngalolosuku zibe njengenhliziyo yowesifazana ohelelwayo." 
Jeremiah48:42 UMowabi uzachithwa, angabe esaba yisizwe, ngoba wazikhukhumeza e Nkosi ni." 
Jeremiah48:43 Ukwesaba lomgodi lomjibila kuphambi kwenu, lina elihlala koMowabi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah48:44 Obalekela ukwesaba uzawela emgodini, lophuma emgodini uzabanjwa ngumjibila. Ngoba lezizinto ngizazehlisela koMowabi ngomnyaka wempindiselo yabo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah48:45 Emthunzini weHeshiboni ababalekayo bayema bephelelwe ngamandla, ngoba umlilo uphumile eHeshiboni, lelangabi liphumile endlini kaSihoni, umlilo utshisile imingcele yakoMowabi, lezingqonga zabantu besiphithiphithi." 
Jeremiah48:46 Maye kuwe, wena Mowabi! Abantu bakaKemoshi baphelile, ngoba amadodana akho athunjiwe, lamadodakazi akho asiwe ekuthunjweni." 
Jeremiah48:47 Kodwa ngizabuyisa abantu bakoMowabi ensukwini ezizayo, kutsho i Nkosi. Siphela lapha isigwebo sakoMowabi." 
Jeremiah49:1 Mayelana lamaAmoni. I Nkosi ithi: UIsrayeli kalamadodana yini? Kalayo indlalifa yini? Abakhonza uMilkomu bathathelani ilizwe lakoGadi, bahlale emizini yalo?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Ngakho khangela, insuku ziyeza, kutsho i Nkosi, lapho ngizakwenza ukuthi kuhlatshwe umkhosi wempi ngeRaba elamaAmoni. Lizachitheka, lemizi yayo itshiswe ngomlilo; loIsrayeli alithathe futhi ilizwi lakhe kulabo abamemukayo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah49:3 Lila, Heshiboni, ngoba iAyi ichithekile. Khalani, lina besifazana beRaba. Ligqoke amalembu amasaka, lilile, lizisike ngezingqamu; ngoba uMilkomu uzathunjwa kanye labapristi bakhe leziphathamandla zakhe." 
Jeremiah49:4 Lizincomelani ngenotho yenu, lina elingathembekanga, elilenotho ephelayo, elithemba amandla enu lisithi: Ngubani ongasihlasela?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Khangelani, ngizakwehlisela ukwesaba okukhulu phezu kwenu, kutsho iNkosi, i Nkosi yamabandla, kuvela kubo bonke abaseduze lani, lizaxotshwa, kube ngulowo lalowo ngendlela yakhe, kungabi khona obutha abaphunyukileyo." 
Jeremiah49:6 Kodwa emva kwalokho ngizabuyisa abantu beAmoni, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah49:7 Mayelana leEdoma. I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Kakusekho yini ukuhlakanipha eThemani? Amacebo aphelile kwabaqondileyo yini? Ukuhlakanipha kwabo kuphelile yini? 
Jeremiah49:8 Balekani, libuyele emuva, licatshe endaweni eziminyeneyo, lina bahlala eDedani. Ngoba ngizakwehlisela inhlupheko phezu kukaEsawu ngesikhathi sokumphindisela kwami." 
Jeremiah49:9 Uba abavuna amavini befika kuwe kabayikutshiya yini ingcosana? Uba amasela efika ebusuku, kawayikuphanga yini aze azikholise?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Kodwa uEsawu ngimhlubule waze wasalaze, ngizembule indawo zakhe zokucatsha, kaselakho ukucatsha. Abantwana bakhe babulewe, labazalwane bakhe kanye labomakhelwane bakhe; yena kasekho." 
Jeremiah49:11 Tshiya izintandane zakho, ngizazilondoloza, abafelokazi bakho kabathembe kimi." 
Jeremiah49:12 Ngoba i Nkosi ithi: Khangela, uba labo ababengafanele ukuyinatha inkezo yesigwebo bemele ukuyinatha, wena uzayekelwa ungatshaywa yini? Kawuyikuyekelwa, kodwa lawe uzayinatha." 
Jeremiah49:13 Ngoba ngifungile ngami uqobo, kutsho i Nkosi, ukuthi iBozira izakuba yinto eyesabekayo, into yokuhlekwa, lenkangala, lesiqalekiso, lemizi yayo yonke izahlala iyinkangala kokuphela." 
Jeremiah49:14 Ngizwile imibiko evela e Nkosi ni, lesithunywa sithunyiwe phakathi kwezizwe, ukuthi: Buthanani, liyihlasele, lisukele impi." 
Jeremiah49:15 Ngoba khangela, ngizakwenza ube mncinyane phakathi kwezizwe, udeleleke phakathi kwabantu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Ukwesabeka kwakho kukukhohlisile, kanye lokuziqhenya kwenhliziyo yakho, wena ohlala ezingoxweni zamawa, lobamba ingqonga yoqaqa. Loba usakha isidleke sakho endaweni ephakemeyo njengokhozi, ngizakwehlisa khona, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah49:17 IEdoma lizakuba yinto eyesabekayo; wonke umuntu odlula kulo uzakwethuka, ancife ngenxa yakho konke ukuhlupheka kwalo." 
Jeremiah49:18 Njengasekuphezu kukaEsawu ngesikhathi sokugenqulwa kweSodoma leGomora, kanye lemizi yakhona, kutsho i Nkosi, kakuyikwakha indodana yomuntu khona, ihlale khona." 
Jeremiah49:19 Khangela, njengesilwane esiphuma ehlathini leJordani sisiya emadlelweni, ngokucwayiza kwelihlo ngibaxotshe basuke kulo, ngilibekele lowo engimkhethileyo. Ngoba ngubani ofanana lami? Ngubani ozangibiza? Nguwuphi umelusi ongema phambi kwami?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ngakho, zwanini icebo i Nkosi elenzayo ngeEdoma, lemikhumbulo elayo ngabantu abahlala eThemani ukuthi: Abancinyane bomhlambi bazadonswa basuswe; lendawo yabo imangale ngokuphela kwabo." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ngomsindo wokuwa kwabo umhlaba uzathuthumela, lelizwi lokukhala kwabo lizazwakala eLwandle oluBomvu." 
Jeremiah49:22 Khangela, ukhona ozaqonga njengokhozi, ehle ngesiqubu elulele impiko zakhe ngakuBozira; lenhliziyo zamaqhawe eEdoma ngalolosuku zizakuba njengenhliziyo yowesifazana ohelelwayo." 
Jeremiah49:23 Mayelana leDamaseko. IHamathi leArpadi kudidekile, ngoba kuzwile indaba ezimbi; kuncibilika kukhathazeke njengolwandle olungelakuthula." 
Jeremiah49:24 IDamaseko isibuthakathaka, itshibilike ukuze ibaleke, ifikelwe yibugwala, ukudabuka losizi kuyehlele njengowesifazana ohelelwayo." 
Jeremiah49:25 Yeka ukutshiywa komuzi olodumo, umuzi olentokozo!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Ngakho-ke amajaha awo azawela emagumeni awo, lawo wonke amabutho awo azabhujiswa ngalolosuku, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ngizaphemba umlilo emdulini weDamaseko, ozaqothula inqaba zikaBenihadadi." 
Jeremiah49:28 Mayelana leKedari lemibuso yeHazori owayitshayayo uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni. I Nkosi ithi: Sukani, liqonde eKedari, libachithe abantu basempumalanga." 
Jeremiah49:29 Thathani amathente abo lemihlambi yabo, kanye lamakhetheni abo lempahla yabo yonke, lisuse amakamela abo kibo; abantu bazamemeza kibo bathi: Ukwesaba kusenhlangothini zonke." 
Jeremiah49:30 Balekani, lizulazule khatshana, lihlale endaweni eziminyeneyo, lina bahlala eHazori, kutsho i Nkosi. Ngoba uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni wenze icebo ngani, kukhona lokho athanda ukukwenza kini." 
Jeremiah49:31 Sukani, liqonde kuso isizwe esichelesileyo, esihlala ngokuthula, kutsho i Nkosi, esingelamasango lemigoqo, esizihlalele sodwa." 
Jeremiah49:32 Amakamela aso azakuba yimpango, lemihlambi yaso yezifuyo izaphangwa. Ngizabachithachitha bonke abagela inwele zabo emaceleni, ngibehlisele inkathazo evela inhlangothi zonke, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah49:33 IHazori izakuba yindawo yamakhanka, ibe yinkangala kokuphela, kakuyikwakha indodana yomuntu khona, ihlale khona." 
Jeremiah49:34 Ilizwi le Nkosi elafika kuJeremiya umprofethi mayelana leElamu ekuqaleni kokubusa kukaZedekhiya, inkosi yakoJuda, lathi:" 
Jeremiah49:35 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Khangela, ngizakwephula idandili leElamu, obanika amandla amakhulu;" 
Jeremiah49:36 ngehlisele phezu kweElamu imimoya emine evela engonsini ezine zamazulu, ngibahlakazele abeElamu kuyo yonke leyomimoya; kakuyikuba khona isizwe lesisodwa abangeyikuxotshelwa kuso abeElamu." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ngizakwenza abeElamu besabe phambi kwezitha zabo laphambi kwalabo ababazingelayo; ngizabehlisela okubi, lolaka lwami oluvuthayo, kutsho i Nkosi, ngibalandelisele ngenkemba, ngize ngibaqede." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ngizamisa isihlalo sami sobukhosi eElamu, ngichithe inkosi yabo leziphathamandla zabo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah49:39 Kodwa kuzakuthi ensukwini ezizayo ngibabuyise abantu beElamu, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah50:1 Ilizwi i Nkosi eyalikhuluma ngeBhabhiloni, ngelizwe lamaKhaladiya, ngoJeremiya umprofethi, lisithi:" 
Jeremiah50:2 Memezani phakathi kwezizwe, litshumayele; misani uphawu, litshumayele, lingakufihli, lithi: IBhabhiloni inqotshiwe, uBhali uyangekile, loMerodaki uchithiwe. Izithombe zayo ziyangisiwe, lemifanekiso yayo emibi ichithekile." 
Jeremiah50:3 Ngoba kuzile kuyo isizwe esivela enyakatho, esizachitha ilizwe layo, abantu lenyamazana kuzabaleka, kungabi khona ohlala kuyo." 
Jeremiah50:4 Ngalezonsuku langalesosikhathi, kutsho i Nkosi, abantwana bakoIsrayeli labantwana bakoJuda bazabuthana ndawonye, bazahamba bekhala inyembezi, bedinga i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Bazabuza indlela eya eZiyoni, bekhangele ngakuyo, bathi: Wozani, sizihlanganise le Nkosi ngesivumelwano esilaphakade esingayikukhohlakala." 
Jeremiah50:6 Abantu bami bebeyizimvu ezilahlekileyo; abelusi babo babaduhisile, bebebelusela ezintabeni; besuka entabeni besiya eqaqeni, bakhohlwa isibaya sabo." 
Jeremiah50:7 Bonke ababatholayo babadla, lezitha zabo zathi: Kasilacala ngoba bonile e Nkosi ni, i Nkosi elikhaya labo eliqotho lethemba laboyise." 
Jeremiah50:8 Balekani liphume eBhabhiloni, liphume elizweni lamaKhaladiya, libe njengezintondolo phambi komhlambi." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ngoba khangela, ngivusela iBhabhiloni ixuku lezizwe ezinkulu; zizavela elizweni lenyakatho, zehlele ngakuyo, ziyithathe khona. Imitshoko yazo injengeqhawe elihlakaniphileyo elingabuyi lingelalutho." 
Jeremiah50:10 IKhaladiya izaphangwa, labayiphangayo bonke bazakweneliswa, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah50:11 Ngoba lithokoza, ngoba lijabula, lina baphangi belizwe lami, ngoba liqolotsha njengethokazi elisetshanini, likhale njengamabhiza amaduna," 
Jeremiah50:12 unyoko uzakuba lenhloni, lowalizalayo ayangeke. Khangela, iBhabhiloni izakuba ngeyokucina phakathi kwezizwe, ibe yinkangala eyomileyo legwadule." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ngenxa yolaka lwe Nkosi kayiyikuhlalwa muntu, kodwa izachitheka isibili; wonke umuntu odlula eBhabhiloni uzamangala, ancife ngenxa yazo zonke inhlupheko zayo." 
Jeremiah50:14 Zihleleleni iBhabhiloni inhlangothi zonke, lina lonke eligobisa amadandili, liyitshoke, lingatshiyi mtshoko, ngoba yonile e Nkosi ni." 
Jeremiah50:15 Memezani kuyo inhlangothi zonke; isizinikele, inqaba zayo sezidilikile, lemiduli yayo ibhidliziwe; ngoba lokho kuyimpindiselo ye Nkosi; phindiselani kuyo, lenze kuyo njengokwenza kwayo." 
Jeremiah50:16 Qumani umhlanyeli asuke eBhabhiloni, kanye laye ophatha isikela ngesikhathi sokuvuna; ngenxa yenkemba ecindezelayo, wonke umuntu uzabuyela kwabakibo, wonke umuntu uzabalekela kwelakibo ilizwe." 
Jeremiah50:17 UIsrayeli uyimvu ezingelwayo, exotshwa yizilwane. Kuqala wadliwa yinkosi yeAsiriya, emva kwalokho uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni uqhobile amathambo akhe." 
Jeremiah50:18 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: Khangela, ngizayitshaya inkosi yeBhabhiloni lelizwe layo, njengalokho ngayitshaya inkosi yeAsiriya." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ngizabuyisela uIsrayeli edlelweni lakhe, uzakudla eKharmeli leBashani, lokufisa kwakhe kukholisiswe entabeni yakoEfrayimi leGileyadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Ngalezonsuku langalesosikhathi, kutsho i Nkosi, kuzadingwa ukona koIsrayeli, kodwa kungatholakali; kudingwe lesono koJuda, kodwa singatholwa; ngoba ngizabathethelela labo engibatshiyayo." 
Jeremiah50:21 Hambani liye elizweni leMerathayimi lilwe lalo, lilwe labakhileyo ePekodi, libabulale, libatshabalalise, kutsho i Nkosi, lenze konke engililayele khona," 
Jeremiah50:22 Kukhona umsindo wempi elizweni, lokuchitheka okukhulu." 
Jeremiah50:23 Yeka ukufa lokwephuka kwesando somhlaba wonke! Yeka ukwenziwa kweBhabhiloni into eyesabekayo phakathi kwezizwe! 
Jeremiah50:24 Ngakuthiya ngomjibila, wabanjwa, wena Bhabhiloni, ungakakwazi; watholwa, wabanjwa, ngoba walwa le Nkosi." 
Jeremiah50:25 I Nkosi ivalile indlu yayo yezikhali, yakhupha izikhali zolaka lwayo, ngoba iNkosi uJehova wamabandla ilomsebenzi elizweni lamaKhaladiya." 
Jeremiah50:26 Lifikeleni, livela inhlangothi zonke, livule iziphala zayo, liyibuthelele njengenqumbi yamabele, liyitshabalalise, kungasali lutho kuyo." 
Jeremiah50:27 Bulalani amajongosi ayo wonke, kawasiwe ekuhlatshweni. Maye kuwo! Ngoba usuku lwawo lufikile, isikhathi sempindiselo yawo." 
Jeremiah50:28 Zwanini-ke, ababalekayo labaphunyukayo bavela elizweni leBhabhiloni, ukuze bamemeze eZiyoni impindiselo ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu, impindiselo yethempeli layo." 
Jeremiah50:29 Bizani abaphatha imitshoko, balwe leBhabhiloni bonke abagobisa idandili; limise inkamba limelane layo liyihanqe, kungabi khona ophunyukayo, liyiphindisele njengezenzo zayo, lenze kuyo njengakho konke ekwenzileyo; ngoba iyidelele i Nkosi, oNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ngakho-ke amajaha ayo azakuwa emagumeni ayo, lawo wonke amabutho ayo azabhujiswa ngalolosuku, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah50:31 Khangela, ngilwa lawe, wena ozikhukhumezayo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova wamabandla; ngoba usuku lwakho selufikile, isikhathi sokuphindiselwa kwakho." 
Jeremiah50:32 Ozikhukhumezayo uzakhubeka awe. kungabi khona omvusayo; ngizaphemba umlilo emizini yakhe ozatshisa konke okuseduze laye. 
Jeremiah50:33 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Abantwana bakoIsrayeli bacindezelwe kanye labantwana bakoJuda; bonke ababathumbileyo bababambile, bayala ukubayekela." 
Jeremiah50:34 Kanti umhlengi wabo ulamandla, ubizwa ngokuthi yi Nkosi yamabandla. Isibili uzamela udaba lwabo, ukuze anike umhlaba ukuthula, kodwa anyakazise abakhileyo eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah50:35 Kayifike inkemba phezu kwamaKhaladiya, kutsho i Nkosi, laphezu kwabakhileyo eBhabhiloni, phezu kweziphathamandla zayo, labahlakaniphileyo bayo." 
Jeremiah50:36 Kayifike inkemba phezu kwabavumisi ukuze baphenduke iziphukuphuku, laphezu kwamaqhawe ukuze abhujiswe." 
Jeremiah50:37 Kayifike inkemba phezu kwamabhiza laphezu kwenqola zayo, laphezu kwawo wonke amabutho awezizwe aphakathi kwayo, ukuze baphenduke babe ngabesifazana; inkemba ifike phezu kwenotho yayo, ukuze iphangwe." 
Jeremiah50:38 Kufike ukubalela kwelanga phezu kwamanzi ayo ukuze acitshe, ngoba iyilizwe lezithombe ezibaziweyo, lemifanekiso yabo iyabahlanyisa." 
Jeremiah50:39 Ngakho-ke amakhanka lezimpisi lezintshe kuzahlala eBhabhiloni; kakusayikuhlala abantu khona kuze kube nininini, kakusayikwakhelwa kulo ezizukulwaneni zonke." 
Jeremiah50:40 Njengoba uNkulunkulu wagenqula iSodoma leGomora lemizi eyakhelene layo, kutsho i Nkosi, ngokunjalo kakusayikusala muntu khona, kakusayikuhlala indodana yomuntu khona." 
Jeremiah50:41 Khangela, kuvela abantu enyakatho, isizwe esikhulu lamakhosi amanengi avuka emikhawulweni yomhlaba." 
Jeremiah50:42 Baphethe idandili lomkhonto, balesihluku, kabalasihawu. Umdumo wabo unjengowolwandle, bagade amabhiza, behleliwe njengabantu bempi lawe, Bhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah50:43 Inkosi yeBhabhiloni yezwa umbiko ngabo, izandla zayo zaba buthakathaka; usizi lwayibamba, lobuhlungu obunjengowesifazana ohelelwayo." 
Jeremiah50:44 Khangela, njengesilwane esiphuma ehlathini leJordani sisiya esibayeni sezimvu esiqinileyo, ngokucwayiza kwelihlo ngibaxotshe, basuke kuyo, ngilibekele lowo engimkhethileyo. Ngoba ngubani ofanana lami? Ngubani ozangibiza? Nguwuphi umelusi ongema phambi kwami?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Ngakho-ke zwanini icebo i Nkosi elenzayo ngeBhabhiloni, lemikhumbulo elayo ngelizwe lamaKhaladiya ukuthi: Abancinyane bomhlambi bazadonswa basuswe, lendawo yabo imangale ngokuphela kwabo." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ngomsindo wokuthunjwa kweBhabhiloni umhlaba uzathuthumela, lelizwi lokukhala kwayo lizazwakala phakathi kwezizwe." 
Jeremiah51:1 I Nkosi ithi: Khangela, ngizavusela iBhabhiloni labakhileyo eKhaladiya umoya ochithayo," 
Jeremiah51:2 ngithume eBhabhiloni abelayo, bazakuyela, bathulule ilizwe layo, lapho betheleka phezu kwayo bevela inhlangothi zonke ngosuku lokuhlupheka." 
Jeremiah51:3 Otshokayo kagobise idandili lakhe, kungasukumi muntu ogqoke ibhatshi lakhe lensimbi. Lingawayekeli amajaha ayo, lilitshabalalise ibutho layo lonke." 
Jeremiah51:4 Bazakuwa befelwe elizweni lamaKhaladiya, bagwazwe endleleni zayo." 
Jeremiah51:5 Ngoba uIsrayeli loJuda kabalahlwanga nguNkulunkulu wabo, i Nkosi yamabandla; kodwa ilizwe lamaKhaladiya lilecala koNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 Balekani eBhabhiloni, lizisindise lonke. Lingaqedwa ekutshayweni kwayo, ngoba lesi yisikhathi sempindiselo ye Nkosi, iyayiphindisela." 
Jeremiah51:7 IBhabhiloni yayiyinkezo yegolide esandleni se Nkosi, eyayidakisa umhlaba wonke; izizwe zanatha iwayini layo, ngakho zahlanya." 
Jeremiah51:8 IBhabhiloni isiwile masinyane, yachitheka; ikhaleleni, liyidingele umuthi wezilonda, mhlawumbe ingasila." 
Jeremiah51:9 Abezizwe bakhona bathi: Besizayelapha iBhabhiloni, kodwa kayelatshwanga; itshiyeni, asihambeni sonke siye emazweni akithi; ngoba isigwebo sayo sifinyelele emazulwini, siphakanyisiwe kwaze kwafika emkhathini." 
Jeremiah51:10 I Nkosi isitshengisile ukuthi thina siqondile; wozani, silandise eZiyoni umsebenzi we Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu." 
Jeremiah51:11 Lolani imitshoko, lithathe izihlangu. I Nkosi ivusile umoya wamakhosi amaMede, ngoba ilecebo lokuyichitha iBhabhiloni, ngoba lokho kuyimpindiselo ye Nkosi, impindiselo yethempeli layo." 
Jeremiah51:12 Misani isiboniso emidulini yeBhabhiloni, liqinise ukulinda, libeke abalindi, licathame, ngoba i Nkosi isikumisile, futhi izakwenza lokho ekukhulume ngabakhileyo eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah51:13 Wena muzi ohlala emanzini amanengi, olenotho enengi, ukuphela kwakho sekufikile, isilinganiso somhawu wakho." 
Jeremiah51:14 I Nkosi yamabandla ifungile ngayo uqobo yathi: Isibili ngizakugcwalisa ngabantu, babe ngangentethe, bazahlaba umkhosi wokunqoba ngawe." 
Jeremiah51:15 UNkulunkulu wawenza umhlaba ngamandla akhe, walimisa ilizwe ngokuhlakanipha kwakhe, langokuqedisisa kwakhe wendlala amazulu." 
Jeremiah51:16 Lapho ekhupha ilizwi lakhe, amanzi ayahlokoma emazulwini, uyakhupha inkungu emikhawulweni yomhlaba, enze imibane iphazime lapho lisina, akhuphe umoya eziphaleni zakhe." 
Jeremiah51:17 Bonke abantu bayizithutha, kabalakwazi; wonke umkhandi uyangiswa yizithombe zakhe, ngoba izithombe zakhe ezibunjiweyo ziyinkohliso, kazilamphefumulo." 
Jeremiah51:18 Ziyize nje, zingumsebenzi wenkohliso, ngesikhathi sempindiselo yazo zizabhubha." 
Jeremiah51:19 UNkulunkulu kaJakobe kanjengazo; ngoba yena nguye owadala zonke izinto, uIsrayeli yisizwe asikhethayo; yi Nkosi yamabandla ibizo lakhe." 
Jeremiah51:20 Wena Bhabhiloni uyisando sami lezikhali zami zempi; ngizakwephula izizwe ngawe, ngichithe imibuso," 
Jeremiah51:21 ngiphahlaze ngawe ibhiza lomgadi walo, lenqola lomkhweli wayo," 
Jeremiah51:22 ngiphahlaze ngawe amadoda labesifazana, amaxhegu labatsha, ijaha lentombi emsulwa," 
Jeremiah51:23 ngiphahlaze ngawe umelusi lomhlambi wakhe, umlimi lenkabi zakhe, ababusi lenduna zebutho." 
Jeremiah51:24 Ngizayiphindisela iBhabhiloni labo bonke abakhileyo eKhaladiya okubi kwabo konke abakwenzileyo eZiyoni phambi kwenu, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah51:25 Khangela, ngimelana lawe, wena ntaba echithayo, kutsho i Nkosi, echitha umhlaba wonke; ngizaphakamisela isandla sami kuwe, ngikugiqe ezintabeni, ngikwenze ube yintaba etshisiweyo." 
Jeremiah51:26 Kakuyikuthathwa ilitshe kuwe elengonsi, lelitshe lesisekelo; kodwa uzakuba yinkangala kuze kube nininini, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah51:27 Misani isiboniso emhlabeni, livuthele uphondo phakathi kwezizwe, lilungisele izizwe ukumelana leBhabhiloni, liyibizele imibuso ukumelana layo, iArarathi leMini leAshikenazi; liyibekele umlawuli wempi, likhuphe amabhiza abe njengomtshitshi wentethe." 
Jeremiah51:28 Lungisani izizwe ukumelana layo, amakhosi amaMede lenduna zayo lababusi bayo, lelizwe lonke elibuswa yiwo." 
Jeremiah51:29 Ilizwe liyathuthumela, liqhaqhazele, ngoba icebo le Nkosi limelana leBhabhiloni, ukuze yenze ilizwe leBhabhiloni libe yinkangala engelamuntu." 
Jeremiah51:30 Amaqhawe eBhabhiloni ayekele ukulwa, ahlezi enqabeni zawo, amandla awo aphelile, asenjengabesifazana; indlu zayo ziyatsha, lemigoqo yamasango ayo yephukile." 
Jeremiah51:31 Isigijimi siyagijima sihlangane lesinye, umbiki uhlangana lombiki, ukutshela inkosi yeBhabhiloni ukuthi umuzi wayo unqotshiwe inhlangothi zonke," 
Jeremiah51:32 amazibuko asethethwe, lezinqaba zitshisiwe ngomlilo, amadoda empi ethukile." 
Jeremiah51:33 Ngoba i Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ithi: IBhabhiloni injengebala lokubhulela ngesikhathi sokunyathelwa kwayo; kuseyisikhatshana nje isikhathi sokuvunwa kwayo sizafika." 
Jeremiah51:34 UNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni usidlile, usiqedile; wasenza saba yimbiza engelalutho, wasiginya njengomgobho, usuthi ngokumnandi kwethu, wasitsaka." 
Jeremiah51:35 Ububi obukhulu obenziwe kimi lenyameni yami bube phezu kweBhabhiloni, kabatsho njalo abeZiyoni. Ngokuhlupheka kwethu babe lomlandu abeKhaladiya, kabatsho njalo abeJerusalema." 
Jeremiah51:36 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi ithi: Khangela, ngizalumela udaba lwenu, ngiliphindisele; ngizakomisa ulwandle lwayo, ngomise lomthombo wayo." 
Jeremiah51:37 IBhabhiloni izakuba lunxiwa oludilikileyo, lendawo yamakhanka, into eyesabekayo leyokuncifelwa, kungabi khona ohlala khona." 
Jeremiah51:38 Abantu bayo bazabhonga njengamabhongo ezilwane, bakhale njengemidlwane yezilwane." 
Jeremiah51:39 Lapho sebebukhali, ngizabenzela idili, ngibadakise baze baqaleke, balale ubuthongo obulaphakade, bangaphindi bavuke, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ngizabaletha ekuhlatshweni njengamawundlu, njengezinqama lezimpongo." 
Jeremiah51:41 Yeka ukubanjwa kweBhabhiloni edumileyo emhlabeni wonke! Yeka iBhabhiloni esiphenduke yaba yinto eyesabekayo phakathi kwezizwe! 
Jeremiah51:42 Ulwandle lufikile eBhabhiloni, yasibekelwa ngamagagasi alo ahlokomayo." 
Jeremiah51:43 Imizi yayo isingamanxiwa, ilizwe elomileyo lenkangala, ilizwe elingahlalwa muntu, okungadluli kulo indodana yomuntu." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ngizamtshaya unkulunkulu uBeli eBhabhiloni, ngikhuphe emlonyeni wakhe lokho akuginyileyo. Izizwe kazisayikubekelela ziye kuye. Umduli weBhabhiloni uwile." 
Jeremiah51:45 Phumani phakathi kwayo, bantu bami, lizikhulule lonke elakeni olwesabekayo lwe Nkosi." 
Jeremiah51:46 Inhliziyo zenu kazingakhathali, lingesabi umbiko ozwakala elizweni, ngoba kufika umbiko ngomunye umnyaka, besekufika omunye umbiko ngomnyaka olandelayo, ukuthi kukhona isihluku elizweni, lombusi avukele umbusi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Ngalokho-ke khangela, insuku ziyeza, lapho ngizakwenza isigwebo phezu kwezithombe ezibaziweyo zeBhabhiloni; ilizwe lonke layo lizayangeka, bonke ababuleweyo baye bawele phakathi kwayo." 
Jeremiah51:48 Kuthi-ke amazulu lomhlaba, lakho konke okukukho, kuhlabele ngentokozo ngeBhabhiloni, ngoba abachithi bazayifikela bevela enyakatho, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah51:49 IBhabhiloni imele ukuwa ngenxa yabafileyo bakoIsrayeli, njengoba ngeBhabhiloni abantu babulawa emhlabeni wonke." 
Jeremiah51:50 Lina eliphephileyo ekufeni, hambani, lingemi. Khumbulani i Nkosi lisekhatshana, leJerusalema ibe semkhumbulweni wenu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Siyangekile ngoba sizwile ihlazo; ubuso bethu bulenhloni, ngoba abezizwe sebefikile ezindaweni ezingcwele zethempeli." 
Jeremiah51:52 Ngakho khangela, insuku ziyeza, kutsho i Nkosi, lapho ngizakwenza isigwebo phezu kwezithombe ezibaziweyo zeBhabhiloni, labagwaziweyo babubule elizweni layo lonke." 
Jeremiah51:53 Loba iBhabhiloni ingaphakamela emazulwini, loba ingaqinisa amadundulu ayo aqinileyo, kodwa abachithi bayo bazayifikela bevela kimi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Jeremiah51:54 Zwanini, ukukhala kuvela eBhabhiloni, umsindo wokuchitheka okukhulu uvela elizweni lamaKhaladiya." 
Jeremiah51:55 Ngoba i Nkosi iyayichitha iBhabhiloni, iyayithulisa ilizwi layo elilamandla. Amagagasi ayo ayahlokoma njengamanzi amanengi, lomsindo wokuhlokoma kwawo uyezwakala." 
Jeremiah51:56 Ngoba umchithi uyehlela phezu kweBhabhiloni; amaqhawe ayo ayabanjwa, lamadandili awo ayephulwa. Ngoba i Nkosi inguNkulunkulu onika umvuzo, izawukhokha umvuzo isibili." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ngizadakisa iziphathamandla zayo lezihlakaniphi zayo, ababusi bayo, lenduna zamabutho ayo, lamaqhawe ayo; bazalala ubuthongo obulaphakade, bangavuki, kutsho iNkosi, eyi Nkosi yamabandla." 
Jeremiah51:58 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Umduli obanzi weBhabhiloni uzabhidlizwa, lamasango ayo aphakemeyo atshiswe ngomlilo. Abantu basebenzela ize, lomsebenzi wezizwe uphelela emlilweni." 
Jeremiah51:59 Ilizwi likaJeremiya umprofethi alaya ngalo uSeraya indodana kaNeriya, kaMahaseya, ekuhambeni kwakhe loZedekhiya inkosi yakoJuda, ukuya eBhabhiloni emnyakeni wesine wokubusa kwakhe. USeraya wayeyisikhulu sezindawo zokuphumula." 
Jeremiah51:60 UJeremiya wabhala encwadini konke okubi okuzakwehlela iBhabhiloni, wonke lamazwi abhaliweyo ngeBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah51:61 UJeremiya wathi kuSeraya: Lapho usufikile eBhabhiloni, ubone ukuthi uyawafunda wonke lamazwi," 
Jeremiah51:62 uthi: Wena Nkosi, ukhulumile ngalindawo ukuthi uzayichitha, ukuze kungabi khona okuhlala kiyo, umuntu loba inyamazana, ibe yinkangala kuze kube nininini." 
Jeremiah51:63 Kuthi lapho usuqedile ukuyifunda lincwadi, ubophele ilitshe kuyo, uyiphosele emfuleni iYufrathi," 
Jeremiah51:64 uthi: IBhabhiloni izatshona, ingabe isavela futhi, ngenxa yokubi, engizayehlisela khona. Aphelela lapha amazwi kaJeremiya." 
Jeremiah52:1 UZedekhiya wayeleminyaka engamatshumi amabili lanye ekuqaleni kwakhe ukubusa; wabusa iminyaka elitshumi lanye eJerusalema. Ibizo likanina lalinguHamuthali, indodakazi kaJeremiya weLibhina." 
Jeremiah52:2 Wenza okubi emehlweni e Nkosi, njengakho konke okwenziwa nguJehoyakhimi." 
Jeremiah52:3 Ngenxa yokuthukuthela kwe Nkosi, izinto zenzeka eJerusalema lakoJuda yaze yabalahla phambi kwayo. UZedekhiya wawuvukela umbuso weBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah52:4 Ngomnyaka wesificamunwemunye wokubusa kwakhe, ngosuku lwetshumi lwenyanga yetshumi, uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni wafika lebutho lakhe lonke ukumelana leJerusalema; bamisa inkamba bemelene layo, bayakhela imiduli yokuvimbezela inhlangothi zonke." 
Jeremiah52:5 Umuzi wavinjezelwa kwaze kwaba ngumnyaka wetshumi lanye wokubusa kwenkosi uZedekhiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ngosuku lwesificamunwemunye lwenyanga yesine indlala yaba nkulu phakathi komuzi, kwasweleka ukudla kwabantu elizweni." 
Jeremiah52:7 Basebewufohlela umuzi; wonke amadoda empi abaleka, aphuma emzini ebusuku, ngendlela yesango eliphakathi kwemiduli emibili, esangweni lensimu yenkosi. AmaKhaladiya ayewuzingelezele umuzi. Aphuma ngendlela yamagceke." 
Jeremiah52:8 Ibutho lamaKhaladiya laxotshana layo inkosi uZedekhiya; lamfica emagcekeni eJeriko; lebutho lakhe lonke lahlakazeka. 
Jeremiah52:9 Basebeyibamba inkosi, bayiletha enkosini yeBhabhiloni eRibila elizweni leHamathi, yakhuluma izigwebo phezu kwayo." 
Jeremiah52:10 Inkosi yeBhabhiloni yabulala amadodana kaZedekhiya phambi kwakhe, yazibulala lazo zonke iziphathamandla zakoJuda eRibila." 
Jeremiah52:11 Yamkhupha amehlo uZedekhiya, yambopha ngamaketane, yamusa eBhabhiloni, yamfaka entolongweni, kwaze kwaba lusuku lokufa kwakhe." 
Jeremiah52:12 Ngosuku lwetshumi lwenyanga yesihlanu, ngomnyaka wetshumi lesificamunwemunye wokubusa kukaNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni, uNebuzaradani induna yabalindi benkosi, owayengaphansi kwenkosi yeBhabhiloni, wangena eJerusalema." 
Jeremiah52:13 Walitshisa ithempeli, lesigodlo senkosi, lendlu zonke ezinkulu zeJerusalema." 
Jeremiah52:14 Kwathi ibutho lonke lamaKhaladiya, elalilenduna yabalindi, labhidliza yonke imiduli ezingelezele iJerusalema." 
Jeremiah52:15 UNebuzaradani induna yabalindi wathumba bonke abantu ababesele emzini, lalabo ababehlamukele enkosini yeBhabhiloni kanye lezingcitshi zemisebenzi." 
Jeremiah52:16 Kodwa uNebuzaradani induna yabalindi watshiya abanye abantukazana elizweni ukuba ngabaphathi bezivini labalimi. 
Jeremiah52:17 Insika zethusi ezazisethempelini, lezinyawo, lolwandle lwethusi, amaKhaladiya akuphahlaza, athatha ithusi lonke, alisa eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah52:18 Athatha izimbiza, lamafotsholo, lezindlawu, lemiganu yokufafaza, lezinkezo, lazo zonke izitsha zethusi ezazisetshenziswa enkonzweni yethempeli," 
Jeremiah52:19 kanye lemiganywana, lezitsha zokuthwala umlilo, lemiganu yokufafaza, lezimbiza, lezinti zezibane, lezinkezo, lemiganu yomnikelo wokuthululwa. Okwakwenziwe ngegolide induna yabalindi yakuthatha, lalokho okwakwenziwe ngesiliva yakuthatha." 
Jeremiah52:20 Insika zombili, lolwandle olwalulunye nje, lenkabi zethusi ezazilitshumi lambili ezazingaphansi kolwandle kanye lezinyawo inkosi uSolomoni ayekwenzele ithempeli, ithusi lazo zonke lezizinto lalingelakulinganiswa ngesisindo." 
Jeremiah52:21 Ubude bensika babuzingalo ezilitshumi lesificaminwembili, ububanzi bayo babuzingalo ezilitshumi lambili, lohlonzi lwayo lwaluyiminwe emine, futhi yayigujiwe." 
Jeremiah52:22 Kwakukhona isiduku sethusi, ubude baso sisinye babuzingalo ezinhlanu, lesihlengo lamapomegranati*, konke kwenziwe ngethusi, kwakuzingelezele isiduku phezulu. Lensika yesibili yayinjalo ilamapomegranati." 
Jeremiah52:23 Kwakubonakala amapomegranati* angamatshumi ayisificamunwemunye lesithupha; wonke amapomegranati ayephezu kwesihlengo inhlangothi zonke ayelikhulu. 
Jeremiah52:24 Induna yabalindi yathatha uSeraya umpristi oyinhloko loZefaniya umpristi omlandelayo, labalindi besango abathathu," 
Jeremiah52:25 yathatha emzini induna eyayiphethe amadoda empi, lamadoda ayisikhombisa awenkundla yenkosi ayeficakale emzini, lomabhalane wenduna yebutho eyayibuthela abantu emabuthweni, lamadoda angamatshumi ayisithupha elizwe ayeficakele phakathi komuzi." 
Jeremiah52:26 UNebuzaradani induna yabalindi wabathatha, wabasa enkosini yeBhabhiloni eRibila." 
Jeremiah52:27 Inkosi yeBhabhiloni yabatshaya, yababulalela eRibila elizweni leHamathi. Wathunjwa ngokunjalo uJuda elizweni lakhe." 
Jeremiah52:28 Nanti inani labantu abathunjwa nguNebukadinezari; ngomnyaka wesikhombisa, amaJuda azinkulungwane ezintathu, lamatshumi amabili, lantathu;" 
Jeremiah52:29 ngomnyaka wetshumi lesificaminwembili wokubusa kukaNebukadinezari wathumba eJerusalema abantu abangamakhulu ayisificaminwembili, lamatshumi amathathu, lambili;" 
Jeremiah52:30 ngomnyaka wamatshumi amabili lantathu wokubusa kukaNebukadinezari, uNebuzaradani induna yabalindi wathumba amaJuda angamakhulu ayisikhombisa, lamatshumi amane lanhlanu; bonke abantu sebehlangene baba zinkulungwane ezine, lamakhulu ayisithupha." 
Jeremiah52:31 Kwathi ngomnyaka wamatshumi amathathu lesikhombisa wokuthunjwa kukaJehoyakhini inkosi yakoJuda, ngosuku lwamatshumi amabili lanhlanu lwenyanga yetshumi lambili, uEvili-Merodaki inkosi yeBhabhiloni, ngomnyaka abekwa ngawo abe yinkosi, waba lomusa kuJehoyakhini, wamkhupha entolongweni," 
Jeremiah52:32 wakhuluma laye kuhle, wamnika isihlalo esedlula zonke izihlalo zamakhosi ayelaye eBhabhiloni." 
Jeremiah52:33 Ngakho-ke uJehoyakhini wakhulula izigqoko zokubotshwa; insuku zonke zempilo yakhe wadla lenkosi; 
Jeremiah52:34 wayelesabelo esimiyo esensuku zonke, asinikwa yinkosi njengenswelo yakhe insuku zonke zokuhamba kwakhe, waze wafa." 
Lamentations1:1 Yeka ukuhlala kwawo wodwa umuzi owawugcwele abantu! Usunjengomfelokazi wona owawumkhulu phakathi kwezizwe. Wona owawuyinkosikazi phakathi komuzi usuyisibhalwa. 
Lamentations1:2 Uyakhala lokukhala inyembezi ebusuku, inyembezi zawo zehla ezihlathini zawo. Phakathi kwazo zonke izithandwa zawo kakho owududuzayo. Bonke abangane bawo bawuphethe ngenkohliso, sebeyizitha zawo." 
Lamentations1:3 UJuda wathunjwa waya kwezinye izizwe ngenxa yokuhlupheka lobugqili obukhulu. Usehlezi phakathi kwezizwe, katholi ukuphumula. Bonke abamzingelayo bamficile ephakathi kobuhlungu." 
Lamentations1:4 Imigwaqo eya eZiyoni iyalila, ngoba kakho ozayo kuyo emikhosini emisiweyo. Emasangweni ayo kakulabantu, labapristi bayo bayabubula. Intombi zayo ziyahlupheka. Isekubabeni." 
Lamentations1:5 Izitha zayo seziyibusa, ziyaphumelela, ngoba i Nkosi yenze yahlupheka ngenxa yobunengi beziphambeko zayo. Abantwana bayo bathunjiwe yizitha." 
Lamentations1:6 Bonke ubukhosi buphelile eZiyoni. Izikhulu zayo sezinjengendluzele ezingatholi idlelo, zibalekile zingelamandla phambi kwabazixotshayo." 
Lamentations1:7 IJerusalema iyakhumbula ensukwini zokuhlupheka lezosizi lwayo konke okuhle okwakukhona ensukwini zasendulo. Nxa abantu bayo bewela ezandleni zesitha, kwakungekho olisizayo; isitha sathokoza ngayo, sahleka ukuchitheka kwayo." 
Lamentations1:8 IJerusalema yonile kakhulu, ngakho isiyisinengiso. Bonke ababeyihlonipha sebeyidelela, ngoba sebebonile ubuze bayo. Yebo, isibubula, ikhangele eceleni." 
Lamentations1:9 Ukungcola kwayo kwakusezidwabeni zayo, kayikhumbulanga ngokuchitheka kwayo. Ngakho-ke ukuwa kwayo kukhulu, kayilaye umduduzi. Nkosi, akukhangele ukuhlupheka kwayo, ngoba isitha sesinqobile." 
Lamentations1:10 Isitha selula izandla zaso ukuthatha konke okuhle kwayo. Ibonile izizwe zihlasela indlu yayo engcwele, zona owazalela ukungena phakathi kwebandla lakho." 
Lamentations1:11 Bonke abantu bayo bayabubula bedinga ukudla; banike okuligugu kwayo ngokudla ukuze baqinise amandla abo. Nkosi, ake ukhangele ngoba mina Jerusalema ngiyadelelwa." 
Lamentations1:12 Kakusilutho kini yini lonke elidlulayo? Khangelani libone ukuthi kukhona yini usizi olunjengolwami, olwehliselwe phezu kwami, i Nkosi engehlisele lona esukwini lokuthukuthela kwayo." 
Lamentations1:13 Iphezulu ithumele umlilo, yawehlisela emathanjeni ami. Yathiya inyawo zami ngembule, yangibuyisela emuva. Yangitshiya ngithithibele, ngiphele amandla usuku lonke." 
Lamentations1:14 Iziphambeko zami zabotshelwa kimi, isandla sayo sazithandela kimi. Ijogwe layo lafakwa entanyeni yami, ngaphela amandla ngenxa yobunzima balo. INkosi yangiyekelela kilo, ngehluleka ukuma." 
Lamentations1:15 INkosi yeyisile wonke amaqhawe ami phakathi kwami, yabiza umhlangano omelene lami ukubulala amajaha ami. INkosi inyathele isikhamelo sewayini sentombi emsulwa, indodakazi yakoJuda." 
Lamentations1:16 Ngiyakhala inyembezi ngenxa yalezizinto, amehlo ami ajuluka inyembezi; ngoba umduduzi ukhatshana lami obezangimisa isibindi. Abantwana bami bachithekile ngoba isitha sinqobile." 
Lamentations1:17 IZiyoni iyelula izandla zayo, kodwa kakho oyiduduzayo. I Nkosi ilayile ngoJakobe ukuthi abakhelene laye babe yizitha zakhe. IJerusalema injengowesifazana owehlukanisiweyo phakathi kwabo." 
Lamentations1:18 I Nkosi ilungile, ngoba ngilihlamukile ilizwi layo. Kodwa ake lizwe, bantu lonke, libone ukuhlupheka kwami. Intombi zami lamajaha ami kuthunjiwe." 
Lamentations1:19 Ngabiza izithandwa zami, kodwa zangikhohlisa. Abapristi labadala bami baphelela phakathi komuzi, besadinga ukudla ukuze baqinise amandla abo." 
Lamentations1:20 Ake ukhangele, Nkosi, ngoba sengihluphekile. Imibilini yami idungekile, inhliziyo yami ikhathazekile phakathi kwami, ngoba ngihlamukile kakhulu. Phandle yinkemba ebulalayo, endlini yikufa." 
Lamentations1:21 Ake uzwe ukububula kwami, kakho ongiduduzayo. Zonke izitha zami zizwile ngokuhlupheka kwami, ziyathokoziswa yikuthi nguwe okwenzileyo. Lufikise usuku osulumemezile, uzenze ukuthi zibe njengami." 
Lamentations1:22 Kakufike bonke ububi bazo phambi kwakho, wenze kizo njengokwenza kwakho kimi ngenxa yazo zonke iziphambeko zami. Ngoba ukububula kwami kukhulu, lenhliziyo yami ikhathele." 
Lamentations2:1 Yeka umnyama iNkosi ekuthukutheleni kwayo ewehlisele phezu kweZiyoni. Iphosele ubuhle bukaIsrayeli emhlabeni busuka emazulwini; kayikhumbulanga ithempeli layo ngosuku lokuthukuthela kwayo. 
Lamentations2:2 INkosi ichithile yonke imizi kaJakobe ingayihawukeli. Ekuthukutheleni kwayo idilizile izinqaba zakoJuda. Yaphosela phansi yangcolisa umbuso lamakhosi awo. 
Lamentations2:3 Yaquma ngokuvutha kolaka lwayo wonke amandla akoIsrayeli. Yasusa isandla sayo sokusiza phambi kwezitha. Yatshisa kuJakobe njengomlilo welangabi oqothula konke. 
Lamentations2:4 Isigobise idandili layo njengesitha, yathiya isandla sayo esilamandla; njengesitha ibulele bonke abathandeka emehlweni ethu; lethenteni leZiyoni yehlisela ulaka lwayo njengomlilo." 
Lamentations2:5 INkosi isinjengesitha ichithile uIsrayeli; ichithile zonke izigodlo zakhe, yadilizela phansi inqaba zakhe. Yandisa ukulila lokukhala koJuda." 
Lamentations2:6 Iphundlile ithempeli layo njengokuphundlwa kwevini, yadiliza indlu yokukhonzela. I Nkosi yenza ukuthi kukhohlakale eZiyoni imikhosi emisiweyo lesabatha. Yadelela ngokuvutha kolaka lwayo umbusi lompristi." 
Lamentations2:7 INkosi ilidelele ilathi layo, yalahla indlu yayo engcwele; yanikela esandleni sesitha imiduli yezigodlo zayo. Kwaba khona umsindo wokunqoba endlini yayo engcwele njengosukwini lomkhosi omisiweyo." 
Lamentations2:8 I Nkosi ikhethile ukudiliza umduli weZiyoni, iwulinganisile ngentambo yokulinganisa, kayiyekelanga ukudiliza; yenza ukuthi kukhale umthangala lomduli, iphele amandla kanyekanye." 
Lamentations2:9 Amasango ayo atshonile phansi, idilizile yephula imigoqo yayo. Inkosi yayo leziphathamandla zayo sebesezizweni, kakuselamthetho; labaprofethi bayo kabasemukeli umbono e Nkosi ni." 
Lamentations2:10 Abadala beZiyoni bahlezi phansi bethule, bathele uthuli emakhanda abo, bagqoke amalembu amasaka. Intombi ezigcweleyo zeJerusalema zikhothamisele phansi amakhanda azo." 
Lamentations2:11 Amehlo ami asediniwe yikukhala, imibilini yami idungekile. Inhliziyo yami idabukile ngosizi ngenxa yokuchitheka kwabantu bami, ngoba ingane labamunyayo bafela endleleni zomuzi." 
Lamentations2:12 Bathi kubonina: Kungaphi ukudla lewayini? Lapho besifa njengabantu abalinyaziweyo endleleni zomuzi, lapho befela ezifubeni zabonina." 
Lamentations2:13 Ngingathini ngawe? Ngingakufananisa lani, wena Jerusalema? Ngingakufananisa lani ukuze ngikududuze, ntombi emsulwa, ndodakazi yeZiyoni? Ngoba ukuchitheka kwakho kukhulu njengolwandle. Ngubani ongakwelapha?" 
Lamentations2:14 Abaprofethi bakho babonile imibono engamanga leyinkohliso ngawe. Kabakuvezanga ukona kwakho ukuze babuyise inhlanhla yakho, kodwa babonile imibono yamanga leduhisayo ngawe." 
Lamentations2:15 Bonke abadlulayo bakutshayela izandla, bayakuncifela bakunikinele amakhanda abo, Jerusalema. Bathi: Yiwo lo umuzi owawubizwa ngokuthi yibuhle obupheleleyo lentokozo yomhlaba wonke yini?" 
Lamentations2:16 Zonke izitha zakho ziyakuklolodela, ziyancifa, zigedle amazinyo azo zithi: Siwuchithile; lolu yilo usuku ebesilulindele; sesilutholile, silubonile." 
Lamentations2:17 I Nkosi yenzile lokho ebikumisile, igcwalisile ilizwi layo. Njengokumisa kwayo endulo isidilizile ingelasihawu. Yenzile ukuthi isitha sithokoze ngawe, yaphakamisa amandla ezitha zakho." 
Lamentations2:18 Khala kakhulu eNkosini, wena Ziyoni! Inyembezi zakho zigeleze njengemifula emini lebusuku. Ungaphumuli, lenyembezi zakho zingaqamuki." 
Lamentations2:19 Vuka, ukhale ebusuku, ekuqaleni kwemilindo, uvule inhliziyo yakho yonke phambi kweNkosi, uphakamisele izandla zakho kuyo, ngenxa yempilo yabantwana bakho, ababulawa yindlala ekuhlanganeni kwendlela zonke." 
Lamentations2:20 Ake ukhangele, Nkosi, ubone. Ngubani owake wamphatha ngokunje? Abesifazana bazakudla inzalo yabo yini, abantwana babo ababazeleyo? Umpristi lomprofethi bazabulawa endlini engcwele yeNkosi yini?" 
Lamentations2:21 Obhuqwini lwezindlela kulele abatsha labadala; intombi zami ezigcweleyo lamajaha ami kubulewe; esukwini lokuthukuthela kwakho uzibulele wena, wazibulala ungelasihawu." 
Lamentations2:22 Wangibizela izitha zami, zavela inhlangothi zonke, njengabantu abeza emkhosini omisiweyo, kakho loyedwa owaphunyukayo, kakho owasilayo esukwini lokuthukuthela kwe Nkosi. Bonke engabazala ngabondla babhujiswa yizitha zami." 
Lamentations3:1 Ngingumuntu obone ukuhlupheka ngentonga yolaka lwayo. 
Lamentations3:2 Ingiqhubile yangingenisa emnyameni ongelakukhanya. 
Lamentations3:3 Isibili ingiphendulele isandla sayo, iphinde futhifuthi usuku lonke." 
Lamentations3:4 Igugisile inyama yami lesigogo sami, yephula amathambo ami." 
Lamentations3:5 Ingihanqile yangembesa ngosizi langokuhlupheka. 
Lamentations3:6 Yangenza ngahlala emnyameni njengabakade bafa. 
Lamentations3:7 Ingibiyele ukuze ngingaphumi, yangibopha ngamaketane anzima." 
Lamentations3:8 Njalo nxa ngikhala ngicela ukusizwa, iyawala umkhuleko wami." 
Lamentations3:9 Iyivalile indlela yami ngamatshe abaziweyo, yaphambula izindlela zami." 
Lamentations3:10 Kimi injengebhere elicathemeyo, lanjengesilwane esicatshileyo." 
Lamentations3:11 Ingiphambule endleleni yami, yangidabudabula, yangitshiya ngize." 
Lamentations3:12 Igobisile idandili layo, yangibeka ngaba yinto yokunengwa ngomtshoko wayo." 
Lamentations3:13 Ihlabile inhliziyo yami ngemitshoko yesamba sayo. 
Lamentations3:14 Sengiyinhlekisa kibo bonke abantu, into yokuhaywa zingoma zabo insuku zonke." 
Lamentations3:15 Ingehlisele ukubaba, yanginathisa umhlonyane." 
Lamentations3:16 Yephule amazinyo ami ngokhethe, yangidlisa umlotha." 
Lamentations3:17 Umphefumulo wami uphelelwe yikuthula, sengikhohliwe ukuthi intokozo iyini." 
Lamentations3:18 Ngakho ngithi: Amandla ami aphelile, lethemba lami elivela e Nkosi ni." 
Lamentations3:19 Nxa ngikhumbula ukuhlupheka kwami lobuhlungu bami, kubaba njengomhlonyane lenyongo." 
Lamentations3:20 Umoya wami uhlala ukukukhumbula, kukhathazeke phakathi kwami." 
Lamentations3:21 Kodwa ngikhumbula lokhu ngibe lethemba. 
Lamentations3:22 Uthando lwe Nkosi luhlala njalo, lesihawu sayo kasilakucina." 
Lamentations3:23 Kutsha insuku zonke ekuseni, lothembeko lwayo lukhulu." 
Lamentations3:24 Umoya wami uthi: I Nkosi iyisabelo sami, ngakho ngizathemba kiyo." 
Lamentations3:25 I Nkosi ilungile kwabayithembayo, kulabo abayidingayo." 
Lamentations3:26 Kuhle ukuyithemba, lokulindela ngokuthula ukukhulula kwayo." 
Lamentations3:27 Kuhle emuntwini ukuthi athwale ijogwe ebutsheni bakhe. 
Lamentations3:28 Kahlale yedwa athule lapho esefakiwe lona," 
Lamentations3:29 athi mbo ngobuso ethulini; mhlawumbe kungaba khona ithemba. 
Lamentations3:30 Kanikele isihlathi sakhe kwabamtshayayo asuthe inhlamba. 
Lamentations3:31 Ngoba iNkosi kayiyikulahla kuze kube phakade. 
Lamentations3:32 Ngoba uba isehlisa ubuhlungu, izakuba lesihawu ngobukhulu bothando lwayo." 
Lamentations3:33 Ngoba kayihluphi, idabukise abantu ngoba ikuthanda." 
Lamentations3:34 Ukucindezela phansi zonke izibotshwa ezisemhlabeni," 
Lamentations3:35 lokwemuka umuntu ilungelo lakhe phambi koPhezukonke," 
Lamentations3:36 lokona umuntu endabeni yakhe, iNkosi kayiyikukuvuma lokho." 
Lamentations3:37 Ngubani ongalawula, kwenzeke, nxa iNkosi ikwalile?" 
Lamentations3:38 Kakuphumi okuhle lokubi emlonyeni woPhezukonke yini? 
Lamentations3:39 Usolelani umuntu ophilayo, umuntu ngesijeziso sezono zakhe?" 
Lamentations3:40 Asilinge sihlole indlela zethu, sibuyele e Nkosi ni." 
Lamentations3:41 Asiphakamisele inhliziyo zethu lezandla zethu kuNkulunkulu emazulwini. 
Lamentations3:42 Sithi: Siphambukile, sakuhlamuka, wena kawuthethelelanga." 
Lamentations3:43 Wena uthukuthele, waxotshana lathi, wasibulala ungelasihawu." 
Lamentations3:44 Wacatsha emayezini, ukuze imikhuleko yethu ingakufinyeleli." 
Lamentations3:45 Usenze saba yimfucuza lezibi phakathi kwabantu. 
Lamentations3:46 Zonke izitha zethu ziyasiklolodela. 
Lamentations3:47 Phambi kwethu kukhona umjibila lomgodi, ukuchitheka lokufa." 
Lamentations3:48 Amehlo ami agobhoza inyembezi ngenxa yokubhujiswa kwabantu bami. 
Lamentations3:49 Inyembezi zami zizagobhoza zingapheli, ngingaduduzeki," 
Lamentations3:50 ize ikhangele i Nkosi ibone isemazulwini; 
Lamentations3:51 amehlo ami asebuhlungu ngokukhalela izintombi zomuzi wakithi. 
Lamentations3:52 Abayizitha zami ngeze bangizingele njengenyoni; 
Lamentations3:53 bangiphosela emgodini ngisizwa, bangigxoba ngamatshe;" 
Lamentations3:54 ngatshona emanzini ngathi: Ngafa. 
Lamentations3:55 Ngakhuleka ebizweni lakho, Nkosi, ngiphakathi komgodi;" 
Lamentations3:56 wezwa umkhuleko wami wokuthi: Ungangivaleli indlebe zakho nxa ngicela ukusizwa. 
Lamentations3:57 Wasondela kimi lapho ngikhuleka kuwe, wathi: Ungesabi." 
Lamentations3:58 Nkosi, ulumele udaba lwami, wahlenga impilo yami." 
Lamentations3:59 Nkosi, ukubonile ukoniwa kwami; akuthethe udaba lwami." 
Lamentations3:60 Ubonile impindiselo yabo, lawo wonke amacebo abo ngami." 
Lamentations3:61 Uzwile ukungiklolodela kwabo, Nkosi, lawo wonke amacebo abo ngami." 
Lamentations3:62 Ukukhuluma lemicabango yezitha zami kumelana lami usuku lonke. 
Lamentations3:63 Ake ubone ukuthi lapho behlala loba besukuma bayangiklolodela kakhulu. 
Lamentations3:64 Uzabaphindisela, Nkosi, ngokufanele izenzo zabo." 
Lamentations3:65 Uzabanika inhliziyo ezilukhuni, lesiqalekiso sakho sibe phezu kwabo." 
Lamentations3:66 Uxotshane labo ekuthukutheleni kwakho, ubabhubhise, bangabe besaba khona ngaphansi kwamazulu akho, Nkosi." 
Lamentations4:1 Yeka ukufiphala kwegolide lokuphenduka kwegolide elihle! Amatshe endlu engcwele achithekile ekuhlanganeni kwazo zonke indlela. 
Lamentations4:2 Bona amadodana aligugu eZiyoni, abekade elingana legolide elihle kakhulu, khathesi aselingana lembiza zebumba nje ezenziwa yizandla zombumbi." 
Lamentations4:3 Lamakhanka ayehlisa, amunyise imidlwane yawo, kodwa abantu bami sebelesihluku njengezintshe zasenkangala." 
Lamentations4:4 Ulimi lomunyayo lunamathela olwangeni lwakhe ngenxa yokoma, abantwana bacela isinkwa kodwa kakho obaphayo." 
Lamentations4:5 Ababesidla okumnandi bafela ezindleleni, lalabo ababekhuliswa begqoka okuyibubende sebelala ezilotheni." 
Lamentations4:6 Ngoba ukutshaywa kwabantu bami kube kukhulu kulokutshaywa kwabeSodoma elachithwa ngokucwayiza kwelihlo, kungekho okhalayo." 
Lamentations4:7 Iziphathamandla zabo zazihlambulukile kuleliqhwa elikhithikayo, zimhlophe kulochago, lemizimba yazo ibomvu okwedlula amatshe athiwa yikorali*, lobuhle besimo sazo babunjengamatshe athiwa yisafire*." 
Lamentations4:8 Kodwa khathesi ubuso bazo sebumnyama kulomsizi, kazisaziwa ezindleleni, lesigogo sazo sesitshwabhene phezu kwamathambo azo, soma njengogodo." 
Lamentations4:9 Babengcono ababulawa ngenkemba kulabo ababulawa yindlala, abafa bebulawa yikuswela izithelo zasemasimini." 
Lamentations4:10 Izandla zabesifazana abalesihawu zapheka abantwana babo, baba yikudla kwabo ekubhujisweni kwabantu bami." 
Lamentations4:11 I Nkosi yaphelelisa ukuthukuthela kwayo, yehlisa ulaka lwayo olutshisayo, yaphemba umlilo eZiyoni owaqothula izisekelo zalo." 
Lamentations4:12 Amakhosi omhlaba kawakholwanga, kanye labakhileyo emhlabeni, ukuthi omelene lawe lesitha bangangena emasangweni eJerusalema." 
Lamentations4:13 Kwakungenxa yezono zabaprofethi bayo lobubi babapristi bayo, ababechitha igazi labalungileyo phakathi kwayo." 
Lamentations4:14 Bazula njengeziphofu ezindleleni, begcwele igazi, kungekho ongathinta izembatho zabo." 
Lamentations4:15 Abantu bathi: Sukani, lingcolile! Sukani, sukani! Lingasithinti. Ngakho basebesiba ngabazingelwayo labazulayo. Abantu bathi phakathi kwezizwe: Kabasayikuhlala lathi." 
Lamentations4:16 I Nkosi uqobo ibahlakazile, kayisayikubananza. Abapristi kabasahlonitshwanga, labadala kabasenzelwanga umusa." 
Lamentations4:17 Amehlo ethu afiphala lokhu silindele ukusizwa, ekulindeleni kwethu salindela isizwe esingelakusiza." 
Lamentations4:18 Abantu basizingela ukuze singahambi endleleni zethu. Ukuphela kwethu kwasondela, lensuku zethu zaphela, ngoba ukuphela kwethu kwasekufikile." 
Lamentations4:19 Abasizingelayo babelejubane kulamanqe amazulu, baxotshana lathi ezintabeni, basicathamela enkangala." 
Lamentations4:20 Ogcotshiweyo we Nkosi, umoya wamakhala ethu, wabanjwa emigodini yabo, yena esasithi ngaye: Ngaphansi komthunzi wakhe siyahlala phakathi kwezizwe." 
Lamentations4:21 Jabula uthabe, wena Edoma, ohlala elizweni leUzi, inkezo izadlulela lakuwe, uzadakwa, uzinqunule." 
Lamentations4:22 Ukutshaywa ngenxa yobubi bakho sekuphelele, wena Ziyone. Kayisayikuliyekela ekuthunjweni. Kodwa, wena Edoma, uzaphindiselwa ngenxa yobubi bakho, izakwembula izono zakho." 
Lamentations5:1 Khumbula, Nkosi, okusehleleyo, khangela ubone ihlazo lethu." 
Lamentations5:2 Ilizwe lethu selinikwe abezizwe, lemizi yethu yanikwa abemzini." 
Lamentations5:3 Sesiyizintandane, kasilabo obaba, labomama sebenjengabafelokazi." 
Lamentations5:4 Sihlawulela amanzi esiwanathayo, lenkuni siyazithenga." 
Lamentations5:5 Sifakwe ijogwe entanyeni sisetshenziswa kakhulu, sidiniwe, kasivunyelwa ukuphumula." 
Lamentations5:6 Sicela iGibhithe, sicele iAsiriya, ukuzuza ukudla." 
Lamentations5:7 Obaba bafa, kabasekho, thina sithwele izono zabo." 
Lamentations5:8 Izigqili ziyasibusa, kakho ongasikhulula kuzo." 
Lamentations5:9 Sizuza ukudla kwethu ngokudela ukusila kwethu, ngenxa yengozi zasenkangala." 
Lamentations5:10 Isigogo sethu sitshisa njengomlilo, ngokutshisa kwendlala." 
Lamentations5:11 Badlova abesifazana eZiyoni, lezintombi ezigcweleyo emizini yakoJuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Iziphathamandla ziphanyekwa ngezandla zazo, labadala kabahlonitshwa." 
Lamentations5:13 Amajaha asetshenziswa ngamandla ukuchola, labafana basindwa yiminyaba yenkuni." 
Lamentations5:14 Abadala sebatshiya inkundla, lamajaha ayekela ukuhlabela." 
Lamentations5:15 Intokozo yenhliziyo zethu iphelile, lokugida kwethu kuphenduke ukukhala." 
Lamentations5:16 Umqhele uwile emakhanda ethu. Maye thina, ngoba sonile!" 
Lamentations5:17 Ngenxa yalokhu inhliziyo zethu zidabukile, langalezizinto amehlo ethu afiphele," 
Lamentations5:18 ngoba intaba yeZiyoni isisele ize, ihanjwa ngamakhanka." 
Lamentations5:19 Kodwa wena, Nkosi, ubusa kuze kube nininini, lesihlalo sakho sobukhosi simi njalo ezizukulwaneni zonke." 
Lamentations5:20 Usikhohlweleni kokuphela? Usitshiyeleni isikhathi eside kangaka? 
Lamentations5:21 Sibuyise kuwe, Nkosi, sizabuya. Yenza insuku zethu zibe zintsha njengendulo." 
Lamentations5:22 Ngoba uba usilahlile kokuphela, kukhulu kakhulu ukusithukuthela kwakho." 
Ezekiel1:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wamatshumi amathathu, ngosuku lwesihlanu lwenyanga yesine, lapho ngangiphakathi kwabathunjiweyo emfuleni iKebari, avuleka amazulu, ngabona imibono kaNkulunkulu." 
Ezekiel1:2 Ngosuku lwesihlanu enyangeni, ngomnyaka wesihlanu wokuthunjwa kwenkosi uJehoyakhini," 
Ezekiel1:3 ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi uHezekeli umpristi, indodana kaBuzi, elizweni lamaKhaladiya emfuleni iKebari. Isandla se Nkosi saba phezu kwami lapho." 
Ezekiel1:4 Kwathi lapho ngibona, khangela-ke, umoya wesivunguzane ovela enyakatho, leyezi elikhulu elicwazimulayo, lomlilo ovuthayo njalonjalo, phakathi komlilo kwakukhona okungathi lithusi elikhazimulayo." 
Ezekiel1:5 Phakathi kwalo kwavela umfanekiso wezidalwa ezine eziphilayo. Izimo zazo zazinje, zazifanana labantu," 
Ezekiel1:6 kodwa yileso laleso silobuso obune lempiko ezine. 
Ezekiel1:7 Imilenze yazo yayiqondile, lengaphansi yenyawo zazo yayifanana lengaphansi yonyawo lwenkonyana, ecwazimula njengethusi elilolongiweyo." 
Ezekiel1:8 Zazilezandla zomuntu ngaphansi kwempiko zazo enhlangothini zazo ezine. Izidalwa zozine zazilobuso lempiko. 
Ezekiel1:9 Impiko zazo zazithintana, zazingatshibiliki ekuhambeni kwazo. Kwaba yileso laleso sahamba saqonda phambili." 
Ezekiel1:10 Izimo zobuso bazo zazinje; zozine zazilobuso bomuntu ngaphambili, zilobuso besilwane ngakwesokunene. zilobuso benkabi ngakwesokhohlo. zilobuso belinqe ngemuva." 
Ezekiel1:11 Babunjaloke ubuso bazo. Impiko zazo zazivulekile ngaphezulu. Kuyileso laleso isidalwa silempiko ezine, ezimbili zazithintana lezezinye izidalwa, lezimbili zigubuzele umzimba wazo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Zaqonda zonke phambili, zaya lapho umoya ozisa khona, zingatshibiliki ekuhambeni kwazo." 
Ezekiel1:13 Phakathi kwezidalwa eziphilayo kwakukhona okunjengamalahle omlilo ovuthayo, kunjengezihlanti* ezihambahamba phakathi kwazo. Umlilo wawukhazimula, lemlilweni kwakuphuma umbane." 
Ezekiel1:14 Izidalwa eziphilayo zazigijima zisiya le lale, njengokuphazima kombane." 
Ezekiel1:15 Ngisabone izidalwa eziphilayo, khangela, amavili ngaphansi, ivili elilodwa liseceleni kwaleso laleso isidalwa." 
Ezekiel1:16 Amavili ayecwazimula njengelitshe elihle elithiwa yitopazi*, wonke ayefanana; izimo zawo lokusebenza kwawo kwakufanana levili eliphakathi kwevili." 
Ezekiel1:17 Ekuhambeni kwawo aqonda loba kuluphi lwezinhlangothi zawo zozine, engatshibiliki." 
Ezekiel1:18 Amavili womane ayephakeme kangangokuthi ayesesabeka, imiphetho yawo yayigcwele amehlo." 
Ezekiel1:19 Lapho izidalwa eziphilayo zihamba, lamavili ahamba eceleni kwazo; lalapho izidalwa eziphilayo zisuka emhlabathini, lamavili aphakama." 
Ezekiel1:20 Lapho umoya owawuthanda ukuya khona, zaya khona lazo, lamavili aphakama, ngoba umoya wezidalwa eziphilayo wawusemavilini." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ekuhambeni kwazo lawo ahamba; ekumeni kwazo lawo ema; ekuphakameni kwazo emhlabeni aphakama lamavili kanye lazo; ngoba umoya wezidalwa eziphilayo wawusemavilini. 
Ezekiel1:22 Ngaphezu kwamakhanda ezidalwa eziphilayo kwakukhona okunjengomkhathi kucwazimula njengelitshe elihle elithiwa yikristali*, kwendlaliwe ngaphezu kwamakhanda azo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ngaphansi komkhathi impiko zazo zazinatshululiwe zithintana, yileso laleso isidalwa silempiko ezimbili ezembese umzimba waso." 
Ezekiel1:24 Lapho ziphapha, ngezwa umsindo wempiko zazo unjengomdumo wamanzi amanengi, unjengomdumo kaSomandla, unjengokuxokozela kwexuku. Lapho zisima zehlisa impiko zazo," 
Ezekiel1:25 kodwa kwakuzwakala ilizwi livela emkhathini ongaphezu kwamakhanda azo lalapho sezimi zehlise impiko zazo. 
Ezekiel1:26 Ngaphezu komkhathi owawuphezu kwamakhanda azo kwakukhona okunjengelitshe elithiwa yisafire*, kunjengesihlalo sobukhosi; ngaphezu kwakho konke kukhona okuhlezi esihlalweni sobukhosi okufanana lomuntu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ngabona okunjengethusi okukhanya njengomlilo eziko; kusukela okhaIweni lwakhe kusiya phezulu, kusukela ekhalweni lwakhe kusiya phansi ngabona okunjengomlilo okuvutha indawo zonke." 
Ezekiel1:28 Ukukhanya lokho okuvuthayo kwakunjengedandili emayezini lapho izulu lisina; kunjengokubonakala kobukhosi be Nkosi. Lapho ngibona lokho, ngathi mbo ngobuso phansi, ngezwa ilizwi likhuluma lami." 
Ezekiel2:1 Lathi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, sukuma ume ngenyawo, ngizakhuluma kuwe." 
Ezekiel2:2 Lisakhuluma lami kwangena kimi uMoya; wangimisa ngenyawo zami; ngalilalela likhuluma," 
Ezekiel2:3 lathi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, ngiyakuthuma ebantwaneni bakoIsrayeli, esizweni esihlamukayo, esingivukelayo. Bona laboyise bonile kimi kuze kube lamuhla." 
Ezekiel2:4 Lalesisizukulwana engikuthuma kiso silukhuni, kasizwa lapho usithi kiso: Nanka amazwi eNkosi uJehova;" 
Ezekiel2:5 bazakwazi ukuthi kukhona umprofethi phakathi kwabo loba belalela, loba bengalaleli, ngoba bayisizwe esihlamukayo." 
Ezekiel2:6 Ndodana yomuntu, ungabesabi, ungawesabi lamazwi abo, lanxa usemeveni, uhlezi phezu kwabofezela. Ungawesabi amazwi abo, ungabesabi, ngoba bayisizwe esihlamukayo." 
Ezekiel2:7 Uzakhuluma amazwi ami kibo, loba besizwa loba bengezwa; ngoba bayisizwe esihlamukayo." 
Ezekiel2:8 Kodwa wena ndodana yomuntu, zwana engikutshoyo kuwe; ungabi ngohlamukayo njengalesisizwe esihlamukayo; vula umlomo wakho, udle engikunika khona." 
Ezekiel2:9 Kwathi lapho ngibona, khangela-ke, isandla eselulelwe kimi siphethe umqulu wencwadi." 
Ezekiel2:10 Sawutshombulula phambi kwami, wawubhaliwe ngaphakathi langaphandle amazwi okulila lokukhala lokububula." 
Ezekiel3:1 Yasisithi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, dlana okunikwayo, dlana lumqulu, uhambe uyekhuluma koIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel3:2 Ngasengivula umlomo wami, yanginika umqulu ukuthi ngiwudle." 
Ezekiel3:3 Yathi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, dlana lumqulu engikunika wona, ukuze usuthe. Ngasengiwudla, waba mnandi njengoluju emlonyeni wami." 
Ezekiel3:4 Yasisithi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, hamba uye koIsrayeli, ukhulume amazwi ami kibo." 
Ezekiel3:5 Ngoba kangikuthumi ebantwini abakhuluma ulimi lwezizweni lolimi olulukhuni, kodwa ngikuthuma koIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel3:6 Kangikuthumi ebantwini abakhulu abakhuluma ulimi lwezizweni lolulukhuni, abalamazwi ongeke uwezwe. Uba bengikuthuma kwabanjalo, bebezakuzwa." 
Ezekiel3:7 Kodwa indlu kaIsrayeli kayiyikukuzwa, ngoba kabathandi ukungizwa mina; bonke balukhuni, kabezwa." 
Ezekiel3:8 Khangela, lawe ngizakwenza ufanane labo, ngizakwenza ube lukhuni njengabo, ngikwenze ukuthi ungezwa njengabo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Ngizakwenza ube njengendayimana elukhuni kulensengetshe. Ungabesabi, ungathuthumeli ngabo ngoba bengabahlamukileyo." 
Ezekiel3:10 Futhi yathi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, wonke amazwi ami engiwatshoyo kuwe emukele enhliziyweni yakho, uwezwe ngendlebe zakho." 
Ezekiel3:11 Suka, uye ebantwini bakini abathunjiweyo, ukhulume kibo, loba bezakuzwa loba bengayikukuzwa, uthi: Nanka amazwi eNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel3:12 UMoya wasengiphakamisa; ngezwa emva kwami ilizwi lomdumo omkhulu, lisithi: Kabubusiswe ubukhosi be Nkosi busuka endaweni yabo." 
Ezekiel3:13 Kwakungumdumo wokuthintana kwempiko zezidalwa eziphilayo, lomsindo wamavili ayeseceleni kwazo, okwezwakala njengokunyikinyeka komhlaba." 
Ezekiel3:14 UMoya wasengiphakamisa, wangisusa; ngahamba ekubabeni, ngifutheka emoyeni wami, isandla se Nkosi sinzima phezu kwami." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ngafika-ke kwabathunjiweyo eTelabibi, ababehlala emfuleni iKebari. Ngahlala phakathi kwabo insuku eziyisikhombisa ngithithibele." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ekucineni kwensuku eziyisikhombisa ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi," 
Ezekiel3:17 lathi: Ndodana yomuntu, ngikwenzile waba ngumlindi wendlu kaIsrayeli. Lapho usizwa ilizwi elivela kimi, ungixwayisele bona." 
Ezekiel3:18 Lapho ngisithi komubi: Uzakufa isibili; wena uba ungamxwayisi, loba ungakhulumi ukumxwayisa omubi endleleni yakhe embi ukuze aphephe, lowomuntu omubi uzafela ebubini bakhe; kodwa igazi lakhe ngizalibiza kuwe." 
Ezekiel3:19 Kodwa uba wena umxwayisa omubi, angabuyi ebubini bakhe loba endleleni yakhe embi, uzafela ebubini bakhe; kodwa wena uzaphepha." 
Ezekiel3:20 Lalapho olungileyo ephambuka ekulungeni kwakhe, enze okubi, ngibeke isikhubekiso phambi kwakhe, uzakufa. Ngoba ungamxwayisanga yena, uzafela ezonweni zakhe kuthi izenzo zakhe ezilungileyo azenzileyo zingakhunjulwa. Kodwa igazi lakhe ngizalibiza kuwe." 
Ezekiel3:21 Kodwa lapho umxwayisa olungileyo ukuze angoni, angaze ona, uzaphila, ngoba ezwile ukuxwayisa kwakho; wena uzaphepha." 
Ezekiel3:22 Isandla se Nkosi saba phezu kwami lapho, yathi kimi: Sukuma, uye esigodini, ngizakhuluma kuwe khona." 
Ezekiel3:23 Ngasengisukuma ngisiya esigodini. Khangela, inkazimulo ye Nkosi yayimi khona, injengenkazimulo engangiyibonile emfuleni iKebari; ngathi mbo ngobuso." 
Ezekiel3:24 UMoya wangena kimi, wangimisa ngenyawo zami, wakhuluma kimi wathi: Hamba uyezivalela endlini yakho." 
Ezekiel3:25 Wena-ke, ndodana yomuntu, khangela, uzabotshwa ngamagoda ukuze ungaphumeli ebantwini;" 
Ezekiel3:26 ngizakwenza ukuthi ulimi lwakho lunamathele olwangeni lomlomo wakho ube yisimungulu, ungabakhuzi, ngoba bayisizwe esihlamukileyo." 
Ezekiel3:27 Kodwa lapho sengikhuluma kuwe, ngizavula umlomo wakho, uzakuthi kibo: Nanka amazwi eNkosi uJehova. Lowo othanda ukuzwa kezwe; ongathandiyo ukuzwa angezwa; ngoba bayisizwe esihlamukileyo." 
Ezekiel4:1 Wena, ndodana yomuntu, zithathela isitina, usibeke phambi kwakho, ubhale kiso ngokugubha umfanekiso womuzi, umuzi weJerusalema;" 
Ezekiel4:2 udwebe indawo zokuwuvimbezela, lomduli wokuwuvimbezela, ledundulu; udwebe lenkamba futhi, lezigodo zokudiliza inhlangothi zonke." 
Ezekiel4:3 Uthathe umganu oyincence wensimbi, uwumise phakathi kwakho lomuzi, ube ngumduli wensimbi; wena ukhangele ngakuwo umuzi, umuzi ube ngovinjezelweyo, wena ube ngumvimbezeli. Lokhu kuzakuba yisibonakaliso kundlu kaIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 Ubusulala ngomhlubulo wakho wangasekhohlo, ngizabeka phezu kwakho isono sikaIsrayeli; uzathwala isono sabo insuku zonke zokulala kwakho ngalowomhlubulo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Usuku olulodwa luzamela umnyaka wokona kwabo; ngimisile ukuthi ukuthwale insuku ezilikhulu lamatshumi ayisificamunwemunye. Ngokunjalo-ke uzathwala ukona kwakoIsrayeli. 
Ezekiel4:6 Lapho usuziphelelisile lezonsuku, uzalala phansi ngokwesibili, kodwa ngomhlubulo wangakwesokunene, uthwale ukona kwakoJuda insuku ezingamatshumi amane; usuku olulodwa ngilumisele umnyaka." 
Ezekiel4:7 Uzakhangela ekuvinjezelweni kweJerusalema, ingalo yakho yembuliwe, uprofethe ngawo umuzi." 
Ezekiel4:8 Khangela, ngizakubopha ngamagoda ukuze ungatshibilikeli emhlubulweni omunye lomunye kuze kuphelele insuku zokuvinjezelwa kwakho." 
Ezekiel4:9 Uthathe ingqoloyi lebhali* lendumba lendlubu lenyawuthi lophoko, ukuhlanganise esitsheni sinye, wenze ngakho ukudla. Insuku olala ngazo ngomhlubulo wakho ezingamakhulu amathathu lezificamunwemunye uzakudla khona." 
Ezekiel4:10 Uzalinganisa ukudla kwakho, udle amashekeli* angamatshumi amabili ngelanga, ukudle ngesikhathi ngesikhathi." 
Ezekiel4:11 Amanzi akho okunatha lawo uwalinganise, unathe ingxenye yesithupha yehini*, uwanathe ngesikhathi ngesikhathi." 
Ezekiel4:12 Ukudla kwakho uzakudla kwenziwe njengezinkwa zebhali*, ukupheke ngamalongwe abantu, ukuphekele lapho abantu abangakubona khona." 
Ezekiel4:13 I Nkosi yathi: Ngokunjalo-ke abantwana bakoIsrayeli bazakudla ukudla okungcolileyo ezizweni engizabaxotshela kizo. 
Ezekiel4:14 Ngasengisithi: O Nkosi Jehova! Khangela, kangizanga ngingcoliswe. Kusukela ebutsheni bami kuze kube lamuhla kangizanga ngidle ingcuba lokubulewe zinyamazana, lenyama engcolileyo kayizanga ingene emlonyeni wami." 
Ezekiel4:15 Yasisithi kimi: Khangela, ngikunika amalongwe enkomo endaweni yamalongwe abantu ukuze upheke ngawo ukudla kwakho." 
Ezekiel4:16 Yathi futhi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, khangela, ngizanciphisa ukudla kwabo kwensuku zonke eJerusalema; abantu bazakudla ukudla ngesisindo benqineka, balinganise lamanzi abawanathayo benqineka." 
Ezekiel4:17 Ukudla kwabo lamanzi abo kuzancipha, baze baphelelwe ngamandla lapho bebonana, baphele nya ngenxa yezono zabo." 
Ezekiel5:1 Ndodana yomuntu, thatha inkemba ebukhali, uyisebenzise njengempuco yomgeli, uyihambise ekhanda lakho lesilevini sakho; ubusuthatha izilinganiso zokulinganisa, ulinganise inwele uzehlukanise." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ingxenye yesithathu uzayitshisa ngomlilo phakathi komuzi lapho insuku zokuvimbezela seziphelile. Enye ingxenye yesithathu uyithathe, uyitshayatshayele endaweni zonke zomuzi ngenkemba; lenye ingxenye yesithathu uyichithachithe emoyeni, ngizayilandela ngiphethe inkemba." 
Ezekiel5:3 Uzathatha inwele eziyingcosana, uzigoqele ngomphetho wesembatho sakho." 
Ezekiel5:4 Ubusuthatha ezinye zazo, uziphosele emlilweni zitshe; umlilo uzavela kuzo utshise uIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel5:5 INkosi uJehova ithi: Lumuzi weJerusalema ngiwumisile phakathi kwezizwe, amanye amazwe awuphahlile." 
Ezekiel5:6 Uhlamukele imithetho yami lezimiso zami ngokwenza okubi okwedlula ezinye izizwe lamazwe awuphahlileyo; bayilahlile imithetho yami, kabahambanga ngezimiso zami." 
Ezekiel5:7 Ngakho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Njengoba lihlamukile okwedlula izizwe eziliphahlileyo, lingalondolozi imithetho yami, lingagcini lezimiso zami, lingagcini lezimiso zezizwe eziliphahlileyo." 
Ezekiel5:8 Ngalokho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, mina ngimelene lani, ngizakwenza izigwebo phakathi kwenu, ukuze izizwe zonke zibone." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ngenxa yamanyala enu wonke ngizakwenza kini engingazake ngikwenze lengingasayikukwenza futhi. 
Ezekiel5:10 Ngakho oyise bazakudla abantwana babo phakathi kwenu, labantwana badle oyise. Ngizakwenza izigwebo phakathi kwenu, labo abaseleyo ngizabachithachithela emimoyeni yonke." 
Ezekiel5:11 Ngakho-ke ngiyazifunga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, ngoba lingcolisile isibili indlu yami engcwele ngakho konke okuzondekayo langamanyala enu wonke, ngizalibhubhisa ngingalihawukeli, ngingaliyekeli." 
Ezekiel5:12 Ingxenye yesithathu yenu izabulawa ngomatshayabhuqe wesifo, iqedwe yindlala phakathi kwenu; ingxenye yesithathu izabulawa ngenkemba endaweni zonke zenu; lengxenye yesithathu ngiyichithachithele emimoyeni yonke, ngiyilandele ngiphethe inkemba." 
Ezekiel5:13 Kuzaphela-ke ukuthukuthela kwami, ngenelise ukufutheka kwami ngabo, bazakwazi ukuthi mina, Nkosi, ngikhulumile ngomona wami lapho sengiphelelise ukufutheka kwami kibo." 
Ezekiel5:14 Futhi ngizalichitha, ngilenze libe lihlazo phakathi kwezizwe eziliphahlileyo lakubo bonke abadlulayo." 
Ezekiel5:15 Lizakuba lihlazo lenhlekisa lesixwayiso lento eyesabekayo ezizweni eziliphahlileyo nxa ngisenza izigwebo phakathi kwenu ngokuthukuthela langokufutheka, ngilitshaya ngokubuhlungu; mina Nkosi ngikhulumile." 
Ezekiel5:16 Lapha ngilitshoka ngemitshoko ebulalayo yendlala, imitshoko yokubhubhisa, ngizayitshokela ukulibhubhisa ngayo, ngizalilethela indlala nginciphise ukudla kwenu kwensuku zonke." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ngizalithumela indlala lezilo zeganga, zibulale abantwana benu; umatshayabhuqe wesifo legazi kudabule phakathi kwenu; ngizalilethela inkemba. Mina Nkosi ngikhulumile." 
Ezekiel6:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel6:2 Ndodana yomuntu, khangela entabeni zakoIsrayeli, uprofethe ngazo," 
Ezekiel6:3 uthi: Lina zintaba zakoIsrayeli, zwanini ilizwi leNkosi uJehova. INkosi uJehova ithi ezintabeni lemaqaqeni lezifuleni lezihotsheni: Khangelani, mina uqobo ngizakwehlisela phezu kwenu inkemba, ngivale indawo zenu eziphakemeyo zokukhonzela." 
Ezekiel6:4 Amalathi enu azadilizwa, kubulawe lamalathi okutshisela impepha; lababuleweyo bakini ngibaphosele phambi kwezithombe zenu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ngizabeka izidumbu zabantwana bakoIsrayeli phambi kwezithombe zabo, ngichithachithe amathambo enu kumalathi enu inhlangothi zonke." 
Ezekiel6:6 Kuzo zonke indawo lapho elihlala khona imizi yenu izachitheka, lendawo zenu eziphakemeyo zokukhonzela zivalwe, lamalathi enu adilike aphele nya, lezithombe zenu zibulawe ziphele, lamalathi enu okutshisela impepha adilizwe, lemisebenzi yenu ibhidlizwe." 
Ezekiel6:7 Nxa abantu bebulawa phakathi kwenu, lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel6:8 Kanti ngizayekela abanye benu baphephe bahlakazeke phakathi kwezizwe. 
Ezekiel6:9 Abaseleyo bakini bazangikhumbula phakathi kwezizwe abathunjelwe kizo; bazakhumbula ukudabuka kwami ngenxa yenhliziyo zabo ezasuka kimi ngenxa yobubi langenxa yamehlo abo ayelandele izithombe. Khona bezanengwa yibo bonke ububi ababenzileyo langamanyala abo wonke. 
Ezekiel6:10 Bazakwazi ukuthi mina ngiyi Nkosi. Kangikhulumanga ize nxa ngisithi ngizakwenza lokho okubi kibo. 
Ezekiel6:11 INkosi uJehova ithi: Tshaya ngezandla zakho, ugide ngenyawo zakho uthi: Maye! ngenxa yawo wonke amanyala amabi akoIsrayeli; ngoba bazakuwa ngenkemba, langendlala, langomatshayabhuqe wesifo." 
Ezekiel6:12 Okhatshana uzabulawa ngomatshayabhuqe wesifo, oseduze uzakuwa ngenkemba, loseleyo abulawe yindlala. Kuzaphela ngokunjalo ukufutheka kwami phezu kwabo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi nxa ababuleweyo babo sebelele phakathi kwezithombe zabo, behanqe amalathi abo, phezu kwawo wonke amaqaqa amade, lezingqongeni zonke zezintaba, langaphansi kwazo zonke izihlahla eziluhlaza, langaphansi kwazo zonke izihlahla ezinkulu ezilamahlamvu, loba ngaphi lapho ababenikela khona ngephunga elimnandi kuzo zonke izithombe zabo." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ngizabaphakamisela isandla sami, ngilichithe ilizwe liphele, kuzo zonke indawo abahlala kuzo, kusukela enkangala kuze kufike eRibila. Khona-ke bezakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel7:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel7:2 Ndodana yomuntu, mina Nkosi uJehova ngithi elizweni lakoIsrayeli: Ukuphela kuyeza, ukuphela kuyeza emagumbini womane elizwe." 
Ezekiel7:3 Ukuphela sekufikile kini, ngizakwehlisela ukuthukuthela kwami phezu kwenu, ngiligwebe ngezenzo zenu, ngehlisele phezu kwenu amanyala enu." 
Ezekiel7:4 Kangiyikuliyekela, kangiyikulihawukela, kodwa ngizalitshaya ngenxa yezindlela zenu lapho amanyala enu esephakathi kwenu. Khona lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel7:5 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ukuchitheka kulandela ukuchitheka. Khangela, kuyeza." 
Ezekiel7:6 Ukuphela sekufikile, ukuphela sekufikile, sekulehlele; khangela, kuyeza." 
Ezekiel7:7 Ukuchitheka kwakho sekufikile, wena owakhileyo elizweni; isikhathi sesifikile, losuku lusondele, usuku lokukhala olungesilo usuku lomsindo wentokozo phezu kwezintaba." 
Ezekiel7:8 Ngizakwehlisela ulaka lwami phezu kwenu, ngiqedele ukuthukuthela kwami kini, ngiligwebe ngokufanele indlela zenu, ngilitshaye ngenxa yawo wonke amanyala enu." 
Ezekiel7:9 Kangiyikuliyekela, kangiyikulihawukela, kodwa ngizalitshaya ngenxa yezenzo zenu langamanyala enu asesephakathi kwenu. Khona lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi etshayayo." 
Ezekiel7:10 Khangela usuku, khangela luyeza. Ukuchitheka kwenu sekufikile, ububi buyahluma, lokuziqhenya kukhahlele," 
Ezekiel7:11 isihluku sikhule saba yibubi. Kakuyikusala lutho lwabo, lenothweni yabo, lezifuyweni zabo, lebukhosini babo." 
Ezekiel7:12 Isikhathi sesifikile, losuku lusondele. Umthengi kangathokozi, lothengisayo angazisoli, ngoba ulaka lwehlela phezu kwabo bonke." 
Ezekiel7:13 Umthengisi kayikubuya azuze lokho akuthengisileyo besaphila bobabili; ngoba okuthengisiweyo kakuyikubuyiselwa ngenxa yesiphithiphithi; futhi kakuyikuba khona umuntu ozaphila ngenxa yobubi bakhe. 
Ezekiel7:14 Seluvuthelwe uphondo, bazilungiselela bonke, kodwa kakho ophumayo ukuya empini, ngoba ukuthukuthela kwami kwehlele phezu kwabo bonke." 
Ezekiel7:15 Ngaphandle kukhona inkemba, ngaphakathi kukhona umatshayabhuqe wesifo lendlala; osegangeni uzakufa ngenkemba, lophakathi komuzi abulawe ngendlala lomatshayabhuqe wesifo." 
Ezekiel7:16 Uba kukhona ababalekela ezintabeni bazakuba njengamajuba avela esihotsheni; bakhale bonke bekhalela ububi babo. 
Ezekiel7:17 Zonke izandla zizakuba buthakathaka, lamadolo axege." 
Ezekiel7:18 Bonke bazagqoka amalembu amasaka, behlelwe yikwesaba, babanjwe zinhloni, baphuce amakhanda." 
Ezekiel7:19 Bazalahlela isiliva sabo ezindleleni, legolide labo lizakuba njengento engcolileyo. Isiliva sabo legolide labo kakuyikuba lamandla okubakhulula ngosuku lokuthukuthela kwe Nkosi. Kabayikukudla basuthe; ngoba ububi babo buyisikhubekiso sabo." 
Ezekiel7:20 Babeziqhenya ngobuhle beziceciso zabo abenza ngazo imifanekiso lezithombe ezinengisayo. Ngakho-ke ngizazenza zibe yizinto ezingcolileyo kibo. 
Ezekiel7:21 Ngizazinikela ezandleni zabezizwe bazithumbe, lakwababi bomhlaba zibe yimpango yabo, bazazingcolisa." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ngizafihla ubuso bami kibo ukuze bangcolise indawo yami eligugu. Abaphangi bazangena bayingcolise. 
Ezekiel7:23 Zilungiselele, ngoba ilizwe ligcwele amacala egazi, lomuzi ugcwele isihluku;" 
Ezekiel7:24 ngizaletha izizwe ezimbi kakhulu ukuthumba indlu zabo, ngiqede ukuziqhenya kwabo lamandla abo, kungcoliswe indawo zabo ezingcwele." 
Ezekiel7:25 Lapho usizi selufikile, bazadinga ukuthula, kodwa kakuyikuba khona." 
Ezekiel7:26 Ukuchitheka kuzalandela ukuchitheka, amahungahunga alandele amanye amahungahunga. Bazadinga umbono kumprofethi, kodwa kakusayikuba khona ukuqondisa kompristi leseluleko sabadala." 
Ezekiel7:27 Inkosi izalila, leziphathamandla zigcwale ukudana, labantu belizwe bazathuthumela. Ngizakwenza kibo njengokufanele indlela zabo, ngibagwebe njengokufanele izigwebo zabo; bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel8:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wesithupha, ngosuku lwesihlanu lwenyanga yesithupha, ngihlezi endlini yami, labadala bakoJuda behlezi lami, isandla seNkosi uJehova sehlela phezu kwami." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ngabona, khangela-ke, okwakufanana lomuntu; kwakuvutha umlilo kusukela ekhalweni kusiya phansi, kucwazimula njengethusi kusukela ekhalweni kusiya phezulu." 
Ezekiel8:3 Waseselula okwakungathi yisandla, wangibamba ngenwele. Umoya wangiphakamisela phakathi komhlaba lamazulu, wangiletha ngemibono kaNkulunkulu eJerusalema, entubeni yeguma elingaphakathi, elikhangele inyakatho, lapho okwakukhona isihlalo sesithombe somona esibanga umona." 
Ezekiel8:4 Khangela-ke, inkazimulo kaNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli yayilapho injengokuyibona kwami esihotsheni." 
Ezekiel8:5 Wasesithi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, ake ukhangele ngenyakatho. Ngasengiphakamisa amehlo ami ngenyakatho, khangela-ke, lesosithombe somona ngenyakatho kwesango lelathi, entubeni yalo." 
Ezekiel8:6 Wasesithi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, uyakubona yini lokho abakwenzayo, amanyala amakhulu enziwa yindlu kaIsrayeli lapha, ukungixotshela khatshana lendawo yami engcwele? Kodwa usezabona amanyala adlula la." 
Ezekiel8:7 Wasengisa emnyango weguma; kwathi lapho ngibona, khangela, kulembobo emdulini." 
Ezekiel8:8 Wasesithi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, bhoboza umduli. Ngathi ngiwubhoboze umduli, khangela, kulomnyango." 
Ezekiel8:9 Wasesithi kimi: Ngena, ubone amanyala angcolileyo abawenzayo lapha." 
Ezekiel8:10 Ngasengingena, ngabona, khangela, lapho kudwetshiwe emidulini inhlangothi zonke imifanekiso yazo zonke izinto ezihahabayo, lezilo ezenyanyekayo, lazo zonke izithombe zakoIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel8:11 Kwakumi phambi kwazo abadala bendlu kaIsrayeli abangamatshumi ayisikhombisa bekanye loJahazaniya indodana kaShafani. Bonke babephethe indengezi zempepha, zithunqa intuthu yempepha." 
Ezekiel8:12 Wasesithi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, uyakubona yini lokho abakwenzayo emnyameni abadala bendlu kaIsrayeli endlini zabo zemifanekiso? Ngoba bathi: I Nkosi kayisiboni; i Nkosi ilitshiyile ilizwe layo." 
Ezekiel8:13 Wasesithi kimi futhi: Uzabuya ubone amanyala amakhulu edlula la abawenzayo. 
Ezekiel8:14 Wasengisa entubeni yesango langenyakatho kwendlu ye Nkosi; khangela-ke, lapho abesifazana bekhala inyembezi ngoTamuzi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Wasesithi kimi: Uyakubona lokhu yini, wena ndodana yomuntu? Khona usuzabona amanyala amakhulu okwedlula la." 
Ezekiel8:16 Wangingenisa egumeni elingaphakathi kwethempeli; khangela-ke, emnyango wethempeli le Nkosi phakathi komkoto lelathi abantu abangamatshumi amabili lanhlanu befulathele ithempeli le Nkosi, bekhangele ngempumalanga, bekhonza ilanga eliphumayo." 
Ezekiel8:17 Wasesithi kimi: Uyakubona lokhu yini, wena ndodana yomuntu? Kuyinto elula koJuda ukwenza amanyala abawenzayo lapha yini, ukuthi bagcwalise ilizwe ngokubi, bavuse ulaka lwami? Khangela, babeka ingatsha empumulweni zabo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Ngizabasulela ekuthukutheleni kwami. Kangiyikubayekela ngibahawukele; lanxa bekhala kakhulu, kangiyikubezwa." 
Ezekiel9:1 Ngezwa ilizwi elikhulu limemeza lisithi: Sondelani lina eliphatha umuzi, lonke liphathe izikhali zenu zokuchitha." 
Ezekiel9:2 Khangela-ke, kwasekusiza amadoda ayisithupha evela esangweni langaphezulu elikhangele ngenyakatho, wonke ephethe izikhali zokubulala, ayehamba lomuntu ogqoke ilembu elicolekileyo elezinto zokubhala ekhalweni lwakhe; angena, ema elathini lethusi." 
Ezekiel9:3 Inkazimulo kaNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli yasuka ngaphezu kwamakherubi* lapho eyayikhona, yayahlala emnyango wendlu. Yasibiza umuntu owayegqoke ilembu elicolekileyo elezinto zokubhala," 
Ezekiel9:4 yathi kuye: Dabula phakathi komuzi weJerusalema, ufake uphawu emabunzini abantu ababubulayo bekhala ngawo wonke amanyala enziwa phakathi kwawo." 
Ezekiel9:5 Ngezwa isithi kwabanye: Dabulani phakathi komuzi limlandele, litshaye, lingayekeli, lingabi lasihawu," 
Ezekiel9:6 libulale liqede amaxhegu, amajaha lezintombi ezigcweleyo, abantwana abancinyane labesifazana; kodwa lingathinti loyedwa olophawu, liqalise endlini yami engcwele. Baqala ngamadoda amadala ayephambi kwethempeli." 
Ezekiel9:7 Yasisithi kibo: Ngcolisani ithempeli, ligcwalise amaguma alo ngabatshayiweyo. Phumani-ke. Basebephuma, babulala abantu phakathi komuzi." 
Ezekiel9:8 Kwathi besabatshaya, ngasala ngedwa, ngathi mbo ngobuso, ngakhala ngathi: Hawu, Nkosi Jehova! Uzababulala bonke abaseleyo koIsrayeli ekwehliseleni kwakho ukuthukuthela phezu kweJerusalema yini?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Yathi kimi: Ububi bakoIsrayeli lobakoJuda bukhulu kakhulu, ilizwe ligcwele igazi, lomuzi ugcwele ukungalungi, ngoba bathi: I Nkosi ilitshiyile ilizwe leli, kayiboni." 
Ezekiel9:10 Lami-ke kangiyikubayekela, kangiyikuba lesihawu, kodwa ngizakwehlisela izenzo zabo phezu kwabo." 
Ezekiel9:11 Khangela-ke, lowomuntu owayegqoke ilembu elicolekileyo elezinto zokubhala ekhalweni lwakhe wabuya wazabika eNkosini wathi: Ngenzile njengokungilaya kwakho." 
Ezekiel10:1 Ngasengibona, khangela, emkhathini owawungaphezu kwamakherubi* okunjengelitshe elithiwa yisafire* kufanana lesihlalo sobukhosi." 
Ezekiel10:2 Yasisithi emuntwini ogqoke ilembu elicolekileyo: Ngena phakathi kwamavili atshibilika ngaphansi kwamakherubi*, ugcwalise izandla zakho ngamalahle avuthayo avela phakathi kwamakherubi*, uwachithele phakathi komuzi. Ngambonake engena." 
Ezekiel10:3 Amakherubi* ayemi ngeningizimu kwethempeli ekungeneni kwalowomuntu, lamayezi ayegcwele egumeni elingaphakathi." 
Ezekiel10:4 Inkazimulo ye Nkosi yasuka emakherubini*, yaya emnyango wethempeli; ithempeli lagcwala amayezi, leguma lagcwala ukukhanya kwenkazimulo ye Nkosi." 
Ezekiel10:5 Umdumo wempiko zamakherubi* wezwakala legumeni elingaphandle, njengelizwi likaNkulunkulu uSomandla nxa ekhuluma." 
Ezekiel10:6 Lapho imtshela umuntu ogqoke ilembu elicolekileyo isithi: Thatha umlilo phakathi kwamavili atshibilikayo phakathi kwamakherubi*; wangena wema phansi kwevili. 
Ezekiel10:7 Elinye lamakherubi lelulela isandla salo emlilweni owawuphakathi kwamakherubi*, lawuthatha, lawufaka ezandleni zalowomuntu owayembethe ilembu elicolekileyo; yena wawuthatha, waphuma." 
Ezekiel10:8 Kwabonakala kiwo amakherubi* okufanana lesandla somuntu kungaphansi kwempiko zawo. 
Ezekiel10:9 Ngabona, khangela, amavili amane eceleni kwamakherubi*, ivili elilodwa liphansi kwekherubi* ngalinye. Amavili ayecwazimula njengelitshe elithiwa yitopazi*." 
Ezekiel10:10 Amavili womane ayefanana kungathi alivili phakathi kwevili. 
Ezekiel10:11 Ekuhambeni kwawo amakherubi aqonda loba kuluphi lwezinhlangothi zozine, engatshibiliki, kodwa aqonda lapho akhangele khona." 
Ezekiel10:12 Yonke imizimba yawo lemihlana yawo lezandla zawo lempiko zawo lamavili kwakugcwele amehlo indawo zonke. 
Ezekiel10:13 Amavili wona ngezwa kuthiwa ngamavili atshibilikayo. 
Ezekiel10:14 Wonke ayelobuso obune; ubuso bokuqala bungobekherubi*, ubuso besibili bungobomuntu, ubuso besithathu bungobesilwane, lobuso besine bungobelinqe." 
Ezekiel10:15 Amakherubi* aphakama-ke, ayeyizo izidalwa eziphilayo engazibona emfuleni iKebari."
