Ezekiel10:16 Lapho amakherubi* ehamba, lamavili ahamba eceleni kwawo; lalapho amakherubi* ephakamisa impiko zawo ukuze aphaphe, amavili kawasukanga kiwo." 
Ezekiel10:17 Lapho esima, lawo ema; lalapho ephakama, lawo aphakama; ngoba umoya wezidalwa eziphilayo wawukiwo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Yasisuka inkazimulo ye Nkosi emnyango wethempeli, yema ngaphezu kwamakherubi.*" 
Ezekiel10:19 Amakherubi* aphakamisa impiko zawo, asuka phansi ngiwabona, lamavili ehamba lawo, aze ema esangweni elingempumalanga kwethempeli; inkazimulo kaNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli yayingaphezu kwawo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Yizo lezi izidalwa eziphilayo engazibona ngaphansi kukaNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli emfuleni iKebari; ngazi ukuthi ngamakherubi*. 
Ezekiel10:21 Zonke zazilobuso obune, zilempiko ezine, langaphansi kwempiko zazo kwakukhona okufanana lezandla zomuntu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Ubuso bazo babunjengalobo engabubona embonweni emfuleni iKebari. Zazihamba zonke ziqonda phambili. 
Ezekiel11:1 UMoya wangiphakamisa, wangisa esangweni lendlu ye Nkosi elingempumalanga, elikhangele ngempumalanga. Khangela, emnyango wesango kwakukhona amadoda angamatshumi amabili lanhlanu; phakathi kwawo ngabona uJahazaniya indodana kaAzuri, loPelatiya indodana kaBhenaya, iziphathamandla zabantu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Yathi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, yiwo la amadoda enza amacebo amabi, anika izelukeko ezimbi kulumuzi," 
Ezekiel11:3 athi: Isikhathi kasikafiki sokuthi kwakhiwe izindlu; lumuzi uyimbiza, thina siyinyama." 
Ezekiel11:4 Ngakho-ke profetha ngawo, profetha wena ndodana yomuntu." 
Ezekiel11:5 UMoya we Nkosi wasewela phezu kwami, wathi kimi: Khuluma: Itsho njalo i Nkosi: Litsho njalo, ndlu kaIsrayeli, ngoba ngiyakwazi okuvela engqondweni zenu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Libulele abantu abanengi kulumuzi, lagcwalisa indlela zawo ngezidumbu." 
Ezekiel11:7 Ngakho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Izidumbu zabakini elizibeke phakathi kwawo yizo eziyinyama, lumuzi uyimbiza; kodwa lina lizakhutshwa phakathi kwawo." 
Ezekiel11:8 Liyesabile inkemba, ngizalilethela yona, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ngizalikhupha phakathi kwalumuzi, ngilinikele ezandleni zabezizwe, ngenze izigwebo phakathi kwenu." 
Ezekiel11:10 Lizakuwa ngenkemba, ngiligwebe emingceleni yakoIsrayeli; lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel11:11 Lumuzi kawuyikuba yimbiza yenu, lani kaliyikuba yinyama phakathi kwayo. Ngizaligweba emingceleni yakoIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel11:12 Lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi. Ngoba kalihambanga ngezimiso zami, lemithetho yami kaliyenzanga, kodwa lenze imithetho yezizwe ezilihanqileyo." 
Ezekiel11:13 Kwathi lokhu ngisaprofetha, uPelatiya indodana kaBhenaya wafa. Ngasengisithi mbo ngobuso phansi, ngamemeza ngelizwi elikhulu ngathi: Hawu, Nkosi Jehova, uzabaqeda abaseleyo koIsrayeli yini?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel11:15 Ndodana yomuntu, abafowenu, yebo abafowenu abayizihlobo zakho, uIsrayeli wonke, yibo abatshelwe ngabakhileyo eJerusalema ukuthi: Selikhatshana le Nkosi. Ilizwe selinikwe thina ukuze libe yilifa lethu." 
Ezekiel11:16 Ngakho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Loba ngibese khatshana phakathi kwezizwe, ngabachithachithela emazweni, kanti ngibe yindlu engcwele kibo okwesikhatshana emazweni engabachithachithela kiwo." 
Ezekiel11:17 Ngakho-ke tshono uthi iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ngizabaqoqa ezizweni ngibabuthe emazweni engibachithachithele kiwo, ngibanike ilizwe lakoIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Lapho befika kulo, bazasusa lapho konke okunengisayo kwalo, lawo wonke amanyala alo." 
Ezekiel11:19 Njalo ngizabanika inhliziyonye, ngifake umoya omutsha phakathi kwenu, ngikhuphe inhliziyo yelitshe enyameni yabo, ngibanike inhliziyo yenyama," 
Ezekiel11:20 ukuze bahambe ngezimiso zami, bagcine izimiselo zami bazilalele; bazakuba ngabantu bami, lami ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo." 
Ezekiel11:21 Kodwa labo abanhliziyo zabo zithanda okunengisayo kwabo lamanyala abo, ngizaphindisela izenzo zabo phezu kwabo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel11:22 Amakherubi* asephakamisa impiko zawo, amavili asuka lawo; inkazimulo kaNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli yayingaphezu kwawo." 
Ezekiel11:23 inkazimulo ye Nkosi yasuka phakathi komuzi, yema phezu kwentaba engempumalanga komuzi." 
Ezekiel11:24 UMoya wangiphakamisa, wangisa kwabathunjiweyo eKhaladiya. Konke lokhu kwafika ngombono owawuthunywe nguMoya kaNkulunkulu; kwathi umbono engangiwubonile wasusuka kimi." 
Ezekiel11:25 Ngasengibatshela abathunjiweyo zonke izinto i Nkosi eyayingitshengise zona. 
Ezekiel12:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel12:2 Ndodana yomuntu, wena uhlala phakathi kwabantu abahlamukayo abalamehlo okubona, kodwa bengaboni, abalendlebe zokuzwa, kodwa bengezwa;" 
Ezekiel12:3 ngoba bangabantu abahlamukayo. Ngakho-ke, wena ndodana yomuntu, lungisa umthwalo womuntu othunjiweyo, usuke emini uhambe phambi kwabo njengomuntu othunjiweyo, usuke endaweni yakho uye kwenye indawo phakathi kwabo. Mhlawumbe bazaqedisisa lanxa bengabantu abahlamukayo." 
Ezekiel12:4 Uzakhupha umthwalo wakho emini phambi kwabo, ube njengomthwalo womuntu othunjiweyo, usuke wena ntambama phambi kwabo, uhambe njengomuntu othunjiweyo." 
Ezekiel12:5 Ubhoboze umduli phambi kwabo, untshungubale kiwo." 
Ezekiel12:6 Nxa sekuhwalala uthathe umthwalo wakho, uwetshate ehlombe phambi kwabo, uwuthwale ugubuzele ubuso bakho ukuze ungaboni ilizwe. Ngikwenza ube yisixwayiso koIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel12:7 Ngasengisenza njengokutshelwa kwami. Ngawukhupha umthwalo wami emini, waba njengomthwalo wothunjiweyo. Kwathi kusihlwa ngabhoboza umduli ngezandla zami, ngantshungubala emnyameni, ngetshete umthwalo wami phambi kwabo." 
Ezekiel12:8 Kusasa ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel12:9 Ndodana yomuntu, kabatshongo kuwe yini indlu kaIsrayeli, abantu abahlamukayo, ukuthi: Wenzani?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Ubokuthi kibo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Lelilizwi lingesikhulu seJerusalema langendlu yonke kaIsrayeli ayephakathi kwabo. 
Ezekiel12:11 Ubatshele ukuthi uyisixwayiso kibo; lokho okwenzileyo kuzakwenziwa kibo, bazathunjwa." 
Ezekiel12:12 Isiphathamandla sabo sizakwetshata umthwalo waso emnyameni, sintshungubale embotsheni sigubuzele ubuso baso, ukuze singaboni ilizwe." 
Ezekiel12:13 Kodwa ngizaphosa imbule lami phezu kwaso, ngisibambe ngalo, ngisise eBhabhiloni elizweni lamaKhaladiya; kanti kasiyikulibona, loba sizafela khona." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ngizabachithachithela emimoyeni yonke wonke amanxusa aso, labasizi baso lawo wonke amabutho aso, ngibalandele ukubabulala." 
Ezekiel12:15 Bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi nxa sengibahlakazele ezizweni zonke, ngabachithachithela emazweni." 
Ezekiel12:16 Kodwa ngizatshiya abalutshwana baphephe enkembeni lendlaleni lakumatshayabhuqe wesifo, ukuze bafakaze ngawo wonke amanyala abo phakathi kwezizwe abazahamba kuzo, ukuze zazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel12:17 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi futhi lathi: 
Ezekiel12:18 Ndodana yomuntu, dlana ukudla kwakho ngokuthuthumela, unathe amanzi ngokuqhaqhazela lokwesaba," 
Ezekiel12:19 uthi ebantwini belizwe: INkosi uJehova ithi ngabakhileyo eJerusalema abasekhona elizweni lakoIsrayeli: Bazakudla ukudla kwabo besesaba, banathe amanzi beqhaqhazela, ngoba ilizwe labo lizaphundlwa konke elilakho ngenxa yesihluku salabo abahlala kilo." 
Ezekiel12:20 Imizi okuhlalwa kiyo izachithwa, lelizwe libe yinkangala; lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel12:21 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel12:22 Ndodana yomuntu, sithini lesisaga esitshiwoyo ngelizwe lakoIsrayeli esokuthi: Insuku ziyadlula, lemibono yonke ilize?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Batshele uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngizasiqeda lesisaga, kabasayikusisebenzisa koIsrayeli. Uthi kibo: Insuku zisondele, kanye lokugcwaliseka kwemibono yonke." 
Ezekiel12:24 Ngoba kakusayikuba khona umbono wamanga, lokuvumisa okukhohlisayo koIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel12:25 Kodwa mina Nkosi ngizakhuluma engikuthandayo; engikutshoyo yikho okuzakwenzeka, kungaphuzi lokho engikukhulumayo; ngizakwenza ensukwini zenu, lina bantu abahlamukayo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel12:26 Laselifika ilizwi le Nkosi lisithi 
Ezekiel12:27 Ndodana yomuntu, khangela, abakoIsrayeli bathi: Umbono awubonayo ungowe nsuku ezikhatshana, lalokho akuprofethayo kungokwesikhathi esikhatshana." 
Ezekiel12:28 Ngakho wothi kibo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Kakusayikuphuza lelilodwa emazwini ami, kodwa ilizwi engilikhulumayo lizakwenzeka, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel13:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel13:2 Ndodana yomuntu, profetha ngabaprofethi bakoIsrayeli, uthi kulabo abaprofethayo okwengqondo zabo: Zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi." 
Ezekiel13:3 INkosi uJehova ithi: Maye kubaprofethi abayizithutha abalandela owabo umoya, bengabonanga mibono!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Wena Israyeli, abaprofethi bakho banjengamakhanka asemanxiweni." 
Ezekiel13:5 Kabayanga ezikhaleni ukulungisela uIsrayeli umduli odilikileyo ukuze aqine empini esukwini lwe Nkosi. 
Ezekiel13:6 Bakhohlisile, bavumisa amanga, besithi: Nanka amazwi e Nkosi; yona i Nkosi ingabathumanga, baqaphele ukuthi izagcwalisa ilizwi labo." 
Ezekiel13:7 Kakusiwo umbono wenkohliso eliwubonileyo yini, lina baprofethi? Ukuvumisa kwenu kakusiwo amanga yini? Lithi kuyilizwi le Nkosi uqobo, kodwa kungeyisimi engikhulumileyo." 
Ezekiel13:8 Ngakho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba likhulume inkohliso, labona amanga, ngakho, khangelani, ngizamelana lani, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel13:9 Isandla sami sizamelana labaprofethi ababona imibono yenkohliso, bavumise amanga. Kabayikuba semhlanganweni wabantu bami, loba babhalwe eluhlwini lwakoIsrayeli, kabayikungena elizweni lakoIsrayeli; lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyiNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel13:10 Yebo, ngoba beduhisa abantu bami besithi: Kulungile! Khona kungalunganga; kunjengabantu abakha umduli, khangela, lababaprofethi bawucombe ngekalaga engavuthwanga." 
Ezekiel13:11 Tshela labo abawucombayo ngekalaga ukuthi uzakuwa. Kuzakuba khona impophoma zezulu, kukhithike isiqhotho esikhulu, kuvuke isiphepho somoya;" 
Ezekiel13:12 khangela, nxa umduli lowo ususiwa, kakuyikutshiwo kuwe ukuthi: Kungaphi lokho ababewucomba ngakho?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Ngakho-ke, iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ekuthukutheleni kwami ngizavusa isiphepho somoya, langolaka lwami nginise impophoma zezulu lesiqhotho esikhulu ukuze ngiwudilize." 
Ezekiel13:14 Ngizadiliza umduli eliwucombe ngekalaga, ngiwuwisele phansi ukuze kwembuleke izisekelo zawo; lekuweni kwawo uzalibulala; lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel13:15 Ngokunjalo-ke ngizakwehlisela emdulini ulaka lwami laphezu kwalabo abawucomba ngekalaga, besengisithi kuwe: Umduli kawusekho, kanye lalabo abawucombileyo," 
Ezekiel13:16 abangabaprofethi bakoIsrayeli abaprofetha ngeJerusalema, ababona imibono besithi kulungile, khona kungalunganga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel13:17 Wena ndodana yomuntu, phendukela kwabesifazana bakini abaprofetha okwengqondo zabo, uprofethe ngabo," 
Ezekiel13:18 uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Maye kwabesifazana abathungela intebe ezihlakaleni zabo bonke abantu, babenzele lezimbombozo zokufaka emakhanda ukuze babathiye. Lizathiya abantu bami, ukuze lisizakale lina yini?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Lingingcolisile phakathi kwabantu bami ngenxa yengcosana nje yebhali, langezihletshana zezinkwa, labulala abantu abangafanelanga ukufa, layekela abantu abangafanelanga ukuphila ngamanga enu ebantwini bami abalalela amanga." 
Ezekiel13:20 Ngakho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Khangelani, ngimelene lentebe zenu elithiya ngazo abantu; ngizazidabula engalweni zenu, ngiyekele abantu elibathiyileyo njengezinyoni bakhululeke." 
Ezekiel13:21 Lezimbombozo zenu lazo ngizazidabula, ngikhulule abantu bami ezandleni zenu, lingabe lisaba lamandla okubathiya futhi; lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel13:22 Ngoba lidabukisile abalungileyo ngamanga, lapho ngingabadabukisanga mina, lakhuthaza ababi ukuze bangaphenduki endleleni zabo ezimbi, basile." 
Ezekiel13:23 Ngakho kalisayikubona imibono yenkohliso, lenze ukuvumisa; ngizakhulula abantu bami ezandleni zenu. Lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel14:1 Kwasekufika kimi amadoda abadala bakoIsrayeli, bahlala phambi kwami." 
Ezekiel14:2 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel14:3 Ndodana yomuntu, lamadoda anikele inhliziyo zawo ezithombeni zawo, athanda ukukhangela izinto ezimbi eziwakhubayo. Ngizavuma ukubuzwa yiwo yini?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Ngakho-ke khuluma kuwo uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Wonke umuntu wendlu kaIsrayeli onikela inhliziyo zabo ezithombeni zakhe, othanda ukukhangela izinto ezimbi ezimkhubayo, kodwa eze kumprofethi, mina Nkosi uqobo ngizamphendula ngenxa yobunengi bezithombe zakhe," 
Ezekiel14:5 ukuze ngibambe inhliziyo yendlu kaIsrayeli abehlukene lami ngenxa yezithombe zabo. 
Ezekiel14:6 Ngakho-ke tshono kuIsrayeli uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Phendukani, lehlukane lezithombe zenu, lidele wonke amanyala enu." 
Ezekiel14:7 Ngoba wonke wendlu kaIsrayeli labezizweni abahlala koIsrayeli abazehlukanisa lami, banikela inhliziyo zabo ezithombeni zabo, bethanda ukukhangela izinto ezimbi ezibakhubayo, kodwa beze kumprofethi ukubuza ngami, mina Nkosi uqobo ngizabaphendula." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ngizamelana lalabobantu, ngibenze babe yizibonakaliso leziga, ngibaquma basuke phakathi kwabantu bami; lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel14:9 Uba umprofethi ekhohliseka, akhulume ilizwi, mina Nkosi ngimkhohlisile lowomprofethi; ngizaphakamisela isandla sami, ngimbhubhise phakathi kwabantu bami uIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Bonke bazatshaywa, umprofethi lomuntu obuzayo, bayona bonke," 
Ezekiel14:11 ukuze uIsrayeli angabe esehlukana lami futhi, angabuyi azingcolise ngeziphambeko zabo zonke, kodwa babe ngabantu bami, lami ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel14:12 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel14:13 Ndodana yomuntu, lapho ilizwe lisona kimi ngokwenza okubi, mina ngizaphakamisela isandla sami kulo, nginciphise ukudla kwalo kwensuku zonke, ngilehlisele indlala, ngiqume ngisuse kulo abantu lezinyamazana." 
Ezekiel14:14 Loba lamadoda amathathu ebehlala khona, uNowa loDaniyeli loJobe, abezazikhulula wona kuphela ngokulunga kwawo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel14:14 Loba lamadoda amathathu ebehlala khona, uNowa loDaniyeli loJobe, abezazikhulula wona kuphela ngokulunga kwawo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel14:15 Loba ngidlulisa phakathi kwelizwe izilo zeganga, ziliphange, lize libe yinkangala, ukuze kungadluli muntu kilo ngenxa yezilo," 
Ezekiel14:16 uba lamadoda amathathu abehlala kilo, ngiyazifunga mina, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, abengayikukhulula amadodana lamadodakazi awo; wona wodwa abezazikhulula, kodwa ilizwe libe yinkangala." 
Ezekiel14:17 Uba ngisehlisela inkemba kulelolizwe ngithi: Nkemba, dabula phakathi kwelizwe, ukuze ngiqume ngisuse kulo abantu lezinyamazana," 
Ezekiel14:18 loba lamadoda abehlala khona, ngiyazifunga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, abengayikukhulula amadodana lamadodakazi awo, kodwa wona wodwa abezazikhulula." 
Ezekiel14:19 Uba ngithumela umatshayabhuqe wesifo kulelolizwe, ngehlisele ukuthukuthela kwami kulo ngokuchitha igazi, ukuze ngiqume ngisuse kulo abantu lezinyamazana," 
Ezekiel14:20 loba uNowa loDaniyeli loJobe bebehlala khona, ngiyazifunga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, bebengayikukhulula indodana loba indodakazi; kodwa bebezazikhulula bona kuphela ngokulunga kwabo." 
Ezekiel14:20 loba uNowa loDaniyeli loJobe bebehlala khona, ngiyazifunga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, bebengayikukhulula indodana loba indodakazi; kodwa bebezazikhulula bona kuphela ngokulunga kwabo." 
Ezekiel14:21 INkosi uJehova ithi: Pho-ke, kuzakuba njani eJerusalema nxa ngiyehlisela lezizigwebo zami ezine ezibuhlungu, inkemba, lendlala, lezilo ezimbi, lomatshayabhuqe wesifo, ukuze ngiqume ngisuse kiyo abantu lezinyamazana." 
Ezekiel14:22 Kodwa khangela, abanye bazasala kilo, abasilileyo ukuze bakhutshwe kilo, amadodana lamadodakazi; khangela, bazaphuma besiza kuwe, ubone ukuthi baziphathe njani lokuthi benzeni; lokhu kuzakutshengisa wena ukuthi konke okubi engikwenzileyo eJerusalema kufanele, lakho konke engiyehlisele khona." 
Ezekiel14:23 Kuzakutshengisa ukuthi kufanele nxa usubonile ukwenza kwabo lalokho abakwenzileyo, ngoba uzakwazi ukuthi kangikwenzanga lokhu kibo ngaphandle kwesizatho, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel15:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel15:2 Ndodana yomuntu, isihlahla sevini sedlula ngani ezinye, singcono kulogatsha lwesinye isihlahla eguswini?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Kuyazuzakala isigodo kiso esifanele ukwenza ulutho olusizayo yini? Abantu bangenza isikhonkwane ngaso, balengise izinto kiso yini?" 
Ezekiel15:4 Khangela, uba sibaswa emlilweni, lezihloko zaso zitshiswe ngumlilo, kuhaqazeke umzaca waso, singenza ulutho olusizayo yini?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Khangela, sisaphelele sasingasetshenziswa lutho; pho, lapho umlilo ususitshisile sesihaqazekile, singabe sisasetshenziswa yini?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Ngakho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Njengenkuni zevini ezihlahleni zeGusu engizenze zaba zinkuni zomlilo, ngokunjalo ngizaphatha abakhileyo eJerusalema." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ngizamelana labo; bephunyuka emlilweni, umlilo uzabaqeda; lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi, nxa sengimelana labo." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ngizalenza ilizwe libe yinkangala, ngoba bangidelile; kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel16:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi futhi lathi: 
Ezekiel16:2 Ndodana yomuntu, yazisa iJerusalema ngamanyala ayo," 
Ezekiel16:3 uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi kuyo iJerusalema: Ngokudabuka ungowelizwe leKhanani; uyihlo,wayengumAmori lonyoko wayengumHethi." 
Ezekiel16:4 Ngosuku owazalwa ngalo inkaba yakho kayiqunywanga, kawugeziswanga langamanzi ukuze uhlambuluke, kawugcotshwanga langetswayi, kawugoqelwanga ngamalembu." 
Ezekiel16:5 Kakho owaba lomusa kuwe ukuthi akwenzele lezizinto; kakho lowakuthandayo. Kodwa walahlelwa endle, ngoba wawunengeka esukwini owazalwa ngalo." 
Ezekiel16:6 Nxa ngidlula ngakubona uqhatsha egazini lakho, ngakhuluma lawe usegazini lakho, ngakutshela ukuze uphile." 
Ezekiel16:7 Ngakuhlakulela njengesihlahla esiluhlaza esikhulayo egangeni. Waqina wakhula, waba ngowesifazana opheleleyo, waphuhla, lenwele zakho zakhula; kodwake wawulokhu unqunu." 
Ezekiel16:8 Lapho ngidlula kuwe futhi ngakubona, njalo khangela, ususesikhathini sothando; ngendlala isembatho sami phezu kwakho, ngembathisa ubunqunu bakho; ngathembisa ukukuthatha, ngenza isivumelwano lawe, waba ngowami, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel16:9 Ngakugezisa ngamanzi, ngahlambulula igazi kuwe, ngakugcoba ngamafutha." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ngakugqokisa ilembu elicecisiweyo, ngakufaka amanyathela ezikhumba zikamantswane, ngakugoqela ngelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, ngakugqokisa isilika." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ngakucecisa ngezinto ezinhle, ngafaka amasongo engalweni zakho, ngakugqizisa iketane entanyeni." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ngakufaka isongo emakhaleni, lamadikazi endlebeni zakho, lomqhele omuhle ekhanda lakho." 
Ezekiel16:13 Waceciswa ngegolide langesiliva, lezembatho zakho zazingezamalembu acolekileyo kakhulu, lezesilika, lezelembu elicecisiweyo; wadla impuphu ecolekileyo loluju lamafutha; waba muhle kakhulu, waba yinkosikazi." 
Ezekiel16:14 Udumo lwakho lwafinyelela ezizweni ngenxa yobuhle bakho, ngoba babuphelele ngezinto ezinhle engangikwembathise zona, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel16:15 Kodwa wathemba ubuhle bakho, waba liwule ngenxa yodumo lwakho, wawula labo bonke abedlulayo." 
Ezekiel16:16 Wathatha ezinye izembatho zakho, wacecisa ngazo indawo zokukhonzela, wawulela lapho." 
Ezekiel16:17 Wathatha futhi iziceco zakho ezinhle zegolide lami lezesiliva sami engakunika zona, wazenzela izithombe zabantu, wawula lazo." 
Ezekiel16:18 Wathatha izembatho zakho ezicecisiweyo, wazembesa ngazo, wanikela amafutha ami langempepha yami kuzo." 
Ezekiel16:19 Wathatha ukudla engakunika khona, impuphu ecolekileyo lamafutha kanye loluju engangikondla ngakho, wakunikela kuzo, kwaba ngumnikelo olephunga elimnandi, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel16:20 Wasuthatha amadodana akho lamadodakazi akho owawungizalele wona, wawahlabela zona ukuze adliwe. Kuyinto encinyane yini yokuphinga kwakho?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Wahlaba abantwana bami, wabanikela, babadabulisa baye kuzo." 
Ezekiel16:22 Kuwo wonke amanyala akho lakukho konke ukuwula kwakho kawukhumbulanga insuku zobutsha bakho lapho wawunqunu, uqhatsha egazini lakho." 
Ezekiel16:23 Emva kwabo bonke ububi bakho maye, maye kuwe, kutsho iNkosi uJehova," 
Ezekiel16:24 wazakhela ithala, wazenzela indawo ephakemeyo emidangeni yonke;" 
Ezekiel16:25 emahlanganweni endlela zonke wazakhela indawo ephakemeyo, wangcolisa ubuhle bakho uzinikela kibo bonke abadlulayo, usandisa ukuwula kwakho." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wabuya wawula lamaGibhithe, omakhelwane bakho, abakhulu enyameni, usandisa ukuwula kwakho ukuze ungithukuthelise." 
Ezekiel16:27 Khangela, ngakho ngikuphakamisele isandla sami, nginciphisile isabelo sakho, ngakunikela ekuphangeni kwezitha zakho amaFilisti, abe lenhloni ngokuziphatha kwakho ngokubi." 
Ezekiel16:28 Futhi uwulile lamaAsiriya ngoba ungakholisanga; uwulile lawo, kawaze wakholwa." 
Ezekiel16:29 Wandisa ukuwula kwakho futhi lelizwe labathengi iKhaladiya, kodwa langalokhu kawukholwanga." 
Ezekiel16:30 Wakwenza konke lokhu njengewule elingelanhloni, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel16:31 Wazakhela ithala emahlanganweni endlela zonke, wenza indawo zakho eziphakemeyo zokukhonzela emidangeni yonke. Kanti kawubanga njengewule ngoba wadelela inkokhelo." 
Ezekiel16:32 Waba ngumfazi oliwule, ongenisa izihambi endaweni yendoda yakhe." 
Ezekiel16:33 Amadoda anika inkokhelo kuwo wonke amawule. Kodwa wena wanika izipho zakho kuzo zonke izithandwa zakho, uzithenga ukuze zize kuwe zivela endaweni zonke, zilanda ukuwula lawe." 
Ezekiel16:34 Ngalokho wawehlukile kwabanye abesifazana ekuwuleni kwakho; kakho owawunxusa ukuwula lawe; kawunikwanga inkokhelo, kodwa wena wazinika izithandwa zakho. Ngalokho-ke wawehlukile." 
Ezekiel16:35 Ngakho-ke, wena wule, zwana ilizwi le Nkosi." 
Ezekiel16:36 INkosi uJehova ithi: Njengoba unqunule, kwabonwa ubunqunu bakho lapho uwula lezithandwa zakho, langenxa yazo zonke izithombe zakho, langenxa yegazi labantwana bakho olinike zona," 
Ezekiel16:37 ngakho, khangela, ngizaqoqa zonke izithandwa zakho obuthokoza lazo, lazo zonke obuzithanda, lazo zonke obuzenyanya. Ngizaziqoqa ukuze zilwe lawe zivela endaweni zonke, ngikunqunulise phambi kwazo ukuze zibone bonke ubunqunu bakho." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ngizakugweba njengabesifazana abafebayo lababulalayo, ngehlisele phezu kwakho igazi elachithwayo ngenxa yokuthukuthela lomona." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ngizakunikela ezandleni zezithandwa zakho, zizadiliza ithala lakho, zibhidlize indawo zakho eziphakemeyo, zikuhlubule izembatho zakho, zikuthathele iziceco zakho ezinhle, zikutshiye unqunu." 
Ezekiel16:40 Zizakulethela ixuku, zikukhande ngamatshe, zikuqumaqume iziqa ngenkemba zazo." 
Ezekiel16:41 Zizatshisa izindlu zakho, zenze izigwebo phezu kwakho phambi kwabesifazana abanengi. Ngizakukhawulisa ukuwula ungabe usanika izithandwa zakho inkokhelo." 
Ezekiel16:42 Ngalokho ngiqede ukuthukuthela kwami kuwe, lobukhwele bami buphele kuwe. Ngizadeda, ngingabe ngisathukuthela." 
Ezekiel16:43 Ngoba ungakhumbulanga insuku zobutsha bakho, kodwa ungithukuthelisile ngazo zonke lezizinto, ngizaphindisela izenzo zakho phezu kwakho, kutsho iNkosi uJehova. Kawuzenzanga yini lezizinengiso kanye lawo wonke amanye amanyala akho?" 
Ezekiel16:44 Khangela, bonke abasebenzisa izaga bazakutsho lesisaga ngawe bathi: Udiwo lufuze imbiza." 
Ezekiel16:45 Wena uyindodakazi eqotho kanyoko owayesenyanya indoda yakhe labantwana bakhe; ungudade oqotho wabodadewenu ababesenyanya amadoda abo labantwana babo. Unyoko wayengumHethi loyihlo wayengumAmori. 
Ezekiel16:46 Udadewenu omdala yiSamariya eyayihlala lamadodakazi ayo ngenyakatho kwakho; lomnawakho owayehlala ngeningizimu kwakho yiSodoma lamadodakazi ayo. 
Ezekiel16:47 Kanti kawukholwanga yikuhamba ngezindlela zabo, layikwenza amanyala abo. Ngesikhatshana nje esincinyane waba mubi kulabo kuzo zonke indlela zakho." 
Ezekiel16:48 Ngiyazifunga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, udadewenu iSodoma kalenzanga lona lamadodakazi alo njengokwenza kwakho lamadodakazi akho." 
Ezekiel16:49 Khangela, ukona kukadadewenu iSodoma; lona lamadodakazi alo lalizigqaja, lisutha okunengi, lichelesile, kodwa kalibasizanga abayanga labaswelayo." 
Ezekiel16:50 Babezigqaja, besenza amanyala phambi kwami; ngalokho ngabasusa njengalokhu usubonile." 
Ezekiel16:51 ISamariya kayenzanga ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yezono zakho. Wena wenzile amanyala amanengi okwedlula yona, wenza odadewenu babonakale belungile ngamanyala akho owenzileyo." 
Ezekiel16:52 Ithwale ihlazo lakho lawe ngoba wenzile ukugwetshwa kwabodadewenu kube lula ngenxa yezono zakho owazenzayo okwedlula bona; bona balungile kulawe. Ngakho woba lenhloni lawe, uthwale ihlazo lakho, ngoba wenze ukuthi odadewenu babonakale belungile." 
Ezekiel16:53 Ngizabuyisa abantu babo, abantu beSodoma lamadodakazi ayo, labantu beSamariya lamadodakazi ayo, ngibuyise labantu bakho kanye labo." 
Ezekiel16:54 Uzathwala ihlazo lakho, ube lenhloni ngakho konke okwenzileyo, ukuze ube yinduduzo kibo." 
Ezekiel16:55 Odadewenu, iSodoma lamadodakazi ayo, bazabuyela esimeni sabo sakuqala, leSamariya lamadodakazi ayo babuyele esimeni sabo sakuqala, lawe lamadodakazi akho libuyele esimeni senu sakuqala." 
Ezekiel16:56 Udadewenu iSodoma yayingesiso isiga emlonyeni wakho esukwini lokuziphakamisa kwakho," 
Ezekiel16:57 kungabonakali ububi bakho yini? Khathesi-ke usuphenduke waba njengalo, usuyinto yokuthukwa ngamadodakazi eEdoma labo bonke abakhelene lalo, lamadodakazi eFilisti, abakuhanqileyo labakuzondayo." 
Ezekiel16:58 Ufanele ukuthwala umvuzo wobubi bakho lamanyala akho, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Ezekiel16:59 Yebo, iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ngizakuphatha njengokwenza kwakho. wena odelele isifungo, wephula isivumelwano;" 
Ezekiel16:60 kanti ngizakhumbula isivumelwano sami lawe, esensukwini zobutsha bakho, ngenze lawe isivumelwano esilaphakade." 
Ezekiel16:61 Khona uzakhumbula indlela zakho, ube lenhloni lapho uzakwemukela odadewenu, abadala bakho labancinyane bakho, njalo ngikunike babe ngamadodakazi, kodwa kungabi ngenxa yesivumelwano sakho." 
Ezekiel16:62 Mina sengizamisa isivumelwano sami lawe, njalo uzakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel16:63 Ukuze ukhumbule, ube lenhloni, ungaphindi ukuvula umlomo wakho ngenxa yehlazo lakho, nxa sengibuyisene lawe ngakho konke okwenzileyo, itsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel17:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel17:2 Ndodana yomuntu, tshono umzekeliso, ukhulume ngomfanekiso kuIsrayeli," 
Ezekiel17:3 uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Ukhozi olukhulu olulempiko ezinkulu lensiba ezinde, lensiba ezinengi zemibala eminengi, lwafika eLebhanoni, lwathatha isihloko sesihlahla somsedari," 
Ezekiel17:4 lwephula insaba zawo eziphezulu, lwazithatha lwazisa elizweni labathengi, lwazibeka emzini wabathengisi." 
Ezekiel17:5 Lwaseluthatha inhlanyelo yalelolizwe, lwayihlanyela emhlabathini ovundileyo, lwayibeka emanzini amanengi. lwayigxumeka njengosaba lomdubu," 
Ezekiel17:6 yahluma, yaba livini elinabayo, ingatsha zalo zaqonda phezulu okhozini, impande zalo zagxumeka. Laba livini, lakhupha ingatsha, lahluma amahlamvu." 
Ezekiel17:7 Kodwa kwakukhona olunye ukhozi olukhulu, olulempiko ezinkulu lensiba ezinengi. Khangela, lelivini lanabisela impande zalo ngakulo, lakhuphela lengatsha zalo ngakulo, ukuze lulithelele amanzi. Lwalisiphuna lapho elalihlanyelwe khona;" 
Ezekiel17:8 lwalisa emhlabathini omuhle emanzini amanengi ukuze likhuphe ingatsha, lithele isithelo, libe livini elihle." 
Ezekiel17:9 Wothi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Kambe ivini leli lizaphumelela yini? Ukhozi kaluyikusiphuna yini impande zalo, lwephule ingatsha zalo, ukuze wonke amahlamvu alo amatsha ahlumayo abune? Kakuyikudinga amandla labantu abanengi ukulisiphuna." 
Ezekiel17:10 Nxa, khangela, selisitshuniwe, lizaphumelela yini? Kaliyikubuna yini nxa umoya wempumalanga ulibetha, libunele endaweni elakhula kiyo?" 
Ezekiel17:11 Laselifika ilizwi le Nkosi kimi lisithi: 
Ezekiel17:12 Tshono ebantwini abahlamukayo, uthi: Kalazi yini ukuthi lezizinto zitshoni? Batshele: Khangela, inkosi yeBhabhiloni yafika eJerusalema, yathumba inkosi yayo leziphathamandla zayo, yabaletha eBhabhiloni." 
Ezekiel17:13 Yathatha omunye wozalo lwesikhosini, yenza isivumelwano laye, yamfungisa. Yathumba amadoda amakhulu esizwe," 
Ezekiel17:14 ukuze umbuso uzehlisele phansi, ungaziphakamisi, ukuthi ume ngokulondoloza isivumelwano sakhe." 
Ezekiel17:15 Kodwa lowo wayivukela ngokuthuma izithunywa eGibhithe, ukuze bamnike amabhiza labantu abanengi. Uzaphumelela yini? Kambe umuntu owenza okunje angaphepha yini? Angasephula isivumelwano aphephe yini?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Kuphila kwami, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, isibili endaweni yenkosi eyambeka ukuthi abe yinkosi, osifungo sayo wasidelela, losivumelwano sayo wephula, uzakufa layo phakathi kweBhabhiloni." 
Ezekiel17:17 UFaro lebutho lakhe elikhulu lexuku elikhulu kayikumsiza empini, lapho sekumiswe amadundulu, kwamiswa imiduli yokuvimbezela ukuze kubulawe abanengi." 
Ezekiel17:18 Ngoba esidelele isifungo, ngokwephula isivumelwano, khangela, lanxa enike isandla sakhe, esenze zonke lezizinto, kayikuphunyuka." 
Ezekiel17:19 Ngakho, itsho njalo iNkosi uJehova ithi: Kuphila kwami, isibili, isifungo sami asidelelayo, lesivumelwano sami asephulayo, ngizakwehlisela phezu kwekhanda lakhe." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ngizaphosela imbule lami phezu kwakhe, ngimbambe ngalo, ngimuse eBhabhiloni, ngimgwebe khona ngokungathembeki kwakhe akwenzileyo kimi." 
Ezekiel17:21 Wonke amaqhawe ebutho lakhe azakuwa ngenkemba, abaseleyo bachithachithelwe emimoyeni yonke. Lizakwazi ukuthi mina i Nkosi ngikhulumile." 
Ezekiel17:22 INkosi uJehova ithi: Mina uqobo ngizathatha isihlokwana esicolo somsedari omude, ngisigxumeke. Ngizakwephula ihlumela ogatsheni olusengqongeni, ngilihlanyele phezulu entabeni ende," 
Ezekiel17:23 ngilihlanyele engqongeni yentaba koIsrayeli, likhuphe ingatsha, lithele izithelo, libe ngumsedari omuhle; inyoni zenhlobo zonke zizalala ngaphansi kwawo, zilale emthunzini wengatsha zawo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Zonke izihlahla zeganga zizakwazi ukuthi mina Nkosi ngiyawisa isihlahla eside, ngikhulise isihlahla esifitshane, ngomise isihlahla esiluhlaza, ngihlumise esomileyo. Mina Nkosi ngikhulumile, ngizakukwenza." 
Ezekiel18:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi futhi lathi: 
Ezekiel18:2 Litsho ukuthini ngalesisaga koIsrayeli sokuthi: Oyise badlile izithelo zevini ezimunyu, amazinyo abantwana asetshelela?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Ngiyazifunga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, lesisaga kasisayikutshiwo futhi koIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel18:4 Khangela, yonke imiphefumulo ngeyami; umphefumulo kayise kanye lomphefumulo womntwana ungokwami. Lowomuntu owonayo uzakufa." 
Ezekiel18:5 Uba umuntu elungile, esenza okufaneleyo lokulungileyo," 
Ezekiel18:6 engadleli emathempelini aphezu kwezintaba, engaphakamiseli amehlo akhe ezithombeni zakoIsrayeli, engangcolisi umfazi womakhelwane wakhe, engasondeli kowesifazana owehlukanisiweyo," 
Ezekiel18:7 engacindezeli muntu, ebuyisela kowebolekayo isibambiso sakhe, engaphangi muntu, enika olambileyo ukudla, enika abahambaze izigqoko," 
Ezekiel18:8 engabolekisi ukuze azuze inzuzo, engathathi umvuzo, ezinqanda kokubi, enze isahlulelo ngokuqondileyo phakathi komuntu lomuntu," 
Ezekiel18:9 ehamba ngezimiso zami, egcina imithetho yami, onjalo ulungile; uzaphila isibili, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel18:10 Uba ezala indodana engumphangi lomchithi wegazi," 
Ezekiel18:11 edelela lezizinto, edlela emathempelini aphezu kwezintaba, ingcolise umfazi womakhelwane wayo," 
Ezekiel18:12 icindezela abayanga labaswelayo, iphanga abantu, ingabuyiseli isibambiso, iphakamisela amehlo ayo ezithombeni, yenze amanyala," 
Ezekiel18:13 isebolekisa ukuze izuze inzuzo, ithathe umvuzo, enjalo izaphila yini? Kayiyikuphila; yenzile wonke la amanyala; izakufa isibili, legazi layo libe phezu kwayo." 
Ezekiel18:14 Khangela, uba lowomuntu ezala indodana ebona izono zonke lezi ezenziwe nguyise, yesabe, ingenzi njengaye," 
Ezekiel18:15 ingadleli emathempelini aphezu kwezintaba, ingaphakamiseli amehlo ayo ezithombeni zakoIsrayeli, ingangcolisi umfazi womakhelwane wayo," 
Ezekiel18:16 ingoni muntu, ingathathi isibambiso, ingaphangi muntu, kodwa iphe abalambileyo ukudla, inike abahambaze izigqoko," 
Ezekiel18:17 izinqande kokubi, ingathathi inzuzo lomvuzo, igcine imithetho yami, ihambe ngezimiso zami, kayiyikufela izono zikayise, kodwa izaphila isibili." 
Ezekiel18:18 Uyise-ke, ngoba ecindezele, waphanga umfowabo, wenza okungalunganga phakathi kwabantu bakibo, khangela, uzakufa ngenxa yezono zakhe." 
Ezekiel18:19 Kanti lina lithi: Kungani indodana ingahlupheki ngenxa yezono zikayise yini? Nxa indodana isikwenzile okufaneleyo lokulungileyo, isigcinile izimiso zami, izaphila isibili." 
Ezekiel18:20 Lowomuntu owonayo uzakufa. Indodana kayiyikuhlupheka ngenxa yezono zikayise, loyise kayikuhlupheka ngenxa yezono zendodana. Olungileyo uzavuna umvuzo wokulunga kwakhe, lomubi avune umvuzo wobubi bakhe." 
Ezekiel18:21 Uba omubi ephenduka ebubini bakhe bonke abenzileyo, agcine izimiso zami, enze okufaneleyo lokulungileyo, uzaphila isibili, kayikufa." 
Ezekiel18:22 Iziphambeko zakhe zonke azenzileyo kazisayikukhunjulwa; kodwa uzaphila ngenxa yokulunga kwakhe akwenzileyo. 
Ezekiel18:23 Ngiyathokoziswa yini yikufa komubi, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, kungabi yikuphenduka kwakhe endleleni yakhe aphile?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Kodwa nxa olungileyo ephambuka ekulungeni kwakhe, enze okubi, enze amanyala enziwa ngomubi, uzaphila yini? Izenzo zakhe zonke ezilungileyo abezenzile kazisayikukhunjulwa; ngenxa yenkohliso alecala ngayo, lesono asenzileyo, uzakufa." 
Ezekiel18:25 Kanti lithi: Indlela yeNkosi kayiqondanga. Zwanini-ke, lina Israyeli; indlela yami kayiqondanga yini? Kakusizo yini ezenu indlela ezingaqondanga?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Lapho umuntu olungileyo ephambuka ekulungeni kwakhe, enze okubi, uzakufa ngenxa yakho; yebo, ngenxa yobubi abenzileyo uzakufa." 
Ezekiel18:27 Futhi nxa umuntu omubi ephenduka ebubini bakhe abenzileyo, enze okufaneleyo lokulungileyo, uzasindisa umphefumulo wakhe." 
Ezekiel18:28 Ngoba wabona, waphenduka eziphambekweni zakhe zonke abezenzile, uzaphila isibili kayikufa." 
Ezekiel18:29 Kodwa uIsrayeli uthi: Indlela yeNkosi kayiqondanga. Wena Israyeli, indlela zami kaziqondanga yini? Kakusizo ezenu indlela ezingaqondanga yini?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Ngakho ngizalahlulela, lina ndlu kaIsrayeli, ngulowo lalowo ngokwendlela zakhe, itsho iNkosi uJehova. Phendukani, libuye eziphambekweni zenu zonke; ngakho ububi bungabi yincithakalo yenu." 
Ezekiel18:31 Lahlani kini zonke iziphambeko zenu eliphambeke ngazo, lizenzele inhliziyo entsha lomoya omutsha; ngoba lizafelani, ndlu Israyeli?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Ngoba kangithokoziswa yikufa komuntu, kutsho iNkosi uJehova; ngakho-ke phendukani ukuze liphile." 
Ezekiel19:1 Khala isililo ngezikhulu zakoIsrayeli," 
Ezekiel19:2 uthi: Yeka isilwanekazi esasingunyoko! Salala phakathi kwezilwane, sondla imidlwane yaso phakathi kwamabhongo ezilwane." 
Ezekiel19:3 Sakhulisa omunye wemidlwane yaso, waba libhongo lesilwane, wafunda ukubamba impango, wadla abantu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Izizwe zahlabelana umkhosi ngawo, wawela emgodini wazo, zawukhupha ngezingwegwe, zawusa elizweni leGibhithe." 
Ezekiel19:5 Nxa sibona ukuthi sehlulekile, lokuthi ithemba laso liphelile, sathatha omunye wemidlwane yaso, sawenza waba libhongo lesilwane." 
Ezekiel19:6 Wahambahamba phakathi kwezilwane, waba libhongo lesilwane, wafunda ukubamba impango, wadla abantu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Wabhidliza inqaba zabo, wachitha imizi yabo. Ilizwe lamangala labo bonke ababekilo ngenxa yokubhonga kwawo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Izizwe zaseziwuhlasela zivela emazweni awuzingelezeleyo; zaphosela amambule azo phezu kwawo, wawela emgodini wazo." 
Ezekiel19:9 Zawufaka endlwaneni ngezingwegwe, zawusa enkosini yeBhabhiloni, zawuvalela enqabeni ukuze ilizwi lawo lingabe lisazwakala futhi phezu kwentaba zakoIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 Unyoko wayenjengesihlahla sevini esivinini esigxunyekwe emanzini, esilezithelo lamahlamvu amanengi ngenxa yamanzi amanengi." 
Ezekiel19:11 Isigodo saso esiqinileyo saba yintonga yombusi; isihlahla sasiside siphakeme phakathi kwengatsha eziqatha, sibonakala ngobude baso langobunengi bengatsha zaso." 
Ezekiel19:12 Kodwa isihlahla sevini sasitshunwa ngokuthukuthela saphoselwa phansi, lomoya wempumalanga wasomisa, lezithelo zaso zaphephuka, isigodo saso esiqinileyo soma, umlilo wasitshisa." 
Ezekiel19:13 Khathesi sesigxunyekwe enkangala, elizweni elitshisayo lelomileyo." 
Ezekiel19:14 Umlilo ulumethe esigodweni saso, watshisa ingatsha zaso lezithelo zaso, ukuze kungasali isigodo esiqinileyo sokwenza intonga yombusi. Lesi yisililo esesisetshenziswa." 
Ezekiel20:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wesikhombisa, ngosuku lwetshumi enyangeni yesihlanu, abadala abathile bakoIsrayeli beza ukubuza e Nkosi ni, bahlala phambi kwami." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel20:3 Ndodana yomuntu, khuluma kwabadala bakoIsrayeli, uthi kibo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Kambe lizile ukubuza kimi yini? Ngiyazifunga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, kangiyikubuzwa yini." 
Ezekiel20:4 Uzabahlulela, ndodana yomuntu, uzabahlulela yini? Ngakho batshele amanyala aboyise," 
Ezekiel20:5 uthi kibo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngosuku engakhetha ngalo uIsrayeli, ngaphakamisa isandla sami kuyo inzalo kaJakobe, ngazibonakalisa kibo elizweni leGibhithe, ngaphakamisa isandla sami kibo ngathi: Mina ngiyiNkosi uJehova wenu." 
Ezekiel20:6 Ngalolosuku ngafunga kibo ukuthi ngibakhuphe elizweni leGibhithe, ngibese elizweni engabadingela lona, ilizwe eligeleza uchago loluju, ilizwe elihle kulawo wonke amazwe." 
Ezekiel20:7 Ngathi kibo: Lahlani izinto ezenyanyekayo elizibukayo lina lonke, lingazingcolisi ngezithombe zeGibhithe. Ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Ezekiel20:8 Kodwa bangihlamuka, kabaze bangilalela. Bonke kabazilahlanga izinto ezenyanyekayo ababezibuka, kabazitshiyanga lezithombe zeGibhithe. Ngasengisithi ngizakwehlisa ukuthukuthela kwami phezu kwabo, ngibaqede ngolaka lwami phakathi kwelizwe leGibhithe." 
Ezekiel20:9 Kodwa kangikwenzanga ngenxa yebizo lami ukuze lingangcoliswa phambi kwezizwe ababehlala phakathi kwazo, engaziveza kibo phambi kwazo ukuze ngibakhuphe elizweni leGibhithe." 
Ezekiel20:10 Ngakho-ke ngabakhupha elizweni leGibhithe, ngabasa enkangala." 
Ezekiel20:11 Ngabanika izimiso zami, ngabatshengisa lemithetho yami, umuntu azaphila ngayo uba eyenza." 
Ezekiel20:12 Futhi ngabanika amasabatha ami ukuze abe yisibonakaliso phakathi kwami labo, ukuze bazi ukuthi mina Nkosi ngiyabenza babe ngcwele." 
Ezekiel20:13 Kodwa abakoIsrayeli bangihlamuka enkangala, kabahambanga ngezimiso zami, bala imithetho yami, umuntu azaphila ngayo uba eyenza, lamasabatha ami bawangcolisa kakhulu. Ngasengisithi ngizakwehlisela ukuthukuthela kwami phezu kwabo enkangala, ngibaqede nya." 
Ezekiel20:14 Kodwa kangikwenzanga ngenxa yebizo lami ukuze lingangcoliswa phambi kwezizwe engabakhupha phambi kwazo. 
Ezekiel20:15 Futhi ngafunga kibo enkangala ukuthi kangiyikubaletha elizweni engangilinike bona, ilizwe eligeleza uchago loluju, ilizwe elihle kulawo wonke amazwe," 
Ezekiel20:16 ngoba bala imithetho yami, kabahambanga ngezimiso zami, bangcolisa amasabatha ami, ngoba inhliziyo zabo zathanda izithombe zabo." 
Ezekiel20:17 Kanti ngabahawukela, kangibabhubhisanga ngabaqeda nya enkangala." 
Ezekiel20:18 Ngatsho kubantwana babo enkangala ngathi: Lingahambi ngezimiso zaboyihlo, lingagcini imithetho yabo, lingazingcolisi ngezithombe zabo." 
Ezekiel20:19 Mina Nkosi nginguNkulunkulu wenu. Hambani ngezimiso zami, liqaphelise ukugcina imithetho yami," 
Ezekiel20:20 lihloniphe amasabatha ami ukuze abe yisibonakaliso phakathi kwami lani, ukuze lazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Ezekiel20:21 Kodwa labantwana bangihlamuka, kabaze bahamba ngezimiso zami, kabaqaphelisanga ukugcina imithetho yami, umuntu azaphila ngayo uba eyenza; bawangcolisa amasabatha ami. Ngasengisithi ngizakwehlisela ukuthukuthela kwami phezu kwabo, ngibaqede ngolaka lwami enkangala." 
Ezekiel20:22 Kodwa ngazinqanda ngenxa yebizo lami, ukuze lingangcoliswa phambi kwezizwe engangibakhuphe phambi kwazo." 
Ezekiel20:23 Ngafunga kibo futhi enkangala ukuthi ngizabachithachitha phakathi kwezizwe, ngibahlakazele emazweni wonke," 
Ezekiel20:24 ngoba bengayenzanga imithetho yami, bezalile izimiso zami, bangcolisa amasabatha ami, bathanda ukukhonza izithombe zaboyise." 
Ezekiel20:25 Futhi ngabanika izimiso ezazingalunganga lemithetho ababengeke baphile ngayo; 
Ezekiel20:26 ngabayekela ukuze bazingcolise ngeminikelo yabo uqobo, ngoba babenza konke okuvula isizalo kudabule emlilweni ukuze ngibesabise. Ngakwenza lokho ukuze bazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel20:27 Ngalokho, ndodana yomuntu, khuluma kundlu kaIsrayeli, uthi kibo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Lakulokho futhi oyihlo bangihlambaza ngokungikhohlisa." 
Ezekiel20:28 Ngoba ngathi sengibalethile elizweni engangifunge ukubanika lona, kwathi lapho bebona lonke uqaqa oluphakemeyo lezihlahla ezilamahlamvu amanengi, banikela imihlatshelo yabo lapho, kanye leminikelo eyangithukuthelisayo; banikela lapho iminikelo elephunga elihle, leminikelo yokunathwayo." 
Ezekiel20:29 Ngathi kibo: Iyini indawo ephakemeyo yokukhonzela eliya kiyo? Ngakho ibizo layo lithiwa yiNdawo ephakemeyo yokukhonzela kuze kube lamuhla. 
Ezekiel20:30 Ngalokho-ke tshono kundlu kaIsrayeli uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Lisazingcolisa njengoyihlo, lilandele izinto zabo ezenyanyekayo yini?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Lapho linikela iminikelo yenu, lisenza abantwana benu badabule emlilweni, liyazingcolisa ngezithombe zenu zonke kuze kube lamuhla. Ngizabuzwa yini, Israyeli yini? Ngiyazifunga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, kangiyikubuzwa yini." 
Ezekiel20:32 Umcabango elilawo kawuyikwenzeka othi: Asifanane lezizwe, labantu bamanye amazwe abakhonza isigodo lelitshe." 
Ezekiel20:33 Ngiyazifunga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, isibili ngizalibusa ngesandla esilamandla lengalo eqinileyo langolaka lwami;" 
Ezekiel20:34 ngilikhuphe phakathi kwezizwe, ngiliqoqe lemazweni lapho elichithachithelwe khona ngesandla esilamandla langengalo eqinileyo langolaka lwami," 
Ezekiel20:35 ngililethe enkangala yezizwe, ngiligwebe lapho sikhangelene ubuso lobuso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Njengalokhu ngabahlulela laboyihlo enkangala yelizwe leGibhithe, ngokunjalo ngizalahlulela lani, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ngizalidlulisa ngaphansi kwentonga, ngilingenise esivumelwaneni," 
Ezekiel20:38 ngikhuphe phakathi kwenu abahlamukayo labo bonke abonayo kimi, ngibakhuphe elizweni abahlala kilo, kodwa kabayikungena elizweni lakoIsrayeli. Khona lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel20:39 Lina-ke, Israyeli, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, hambani lonke liyekhonza izithombe zenu! Kodwa ngithi lizangilalela ekucineni; lizayekela ukungcolisa ibizo lami elingcwele ngeminikelo yenu langezithombe zenu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Ngoba entabeni engcwele, entabeni ende yakoIsrayeli, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, lapho indlu yonke kaIsrayeli, bonke ngoluthi lwabo, bazangikhonza elizweni; ngizabemukela khona, ngibize khona iminikelo yenu, lezipho zenu ezinhle, lakho konke okungcwele kwenu." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ngizalemukela njengephunga elimnandi nxa ngilikhupha ezizweni, ngiliqoqa emazweni lapho ebelichithachithelwe khona; ngizabonakalisa ubungcwele bami phakathi kwenu phambi kwezizwe." 
Ezekiel20:42 Lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi lapho sengilibuyise elizweni lakoIsrayeli, ilizwe engafunga ukulinika oyihlo." 
Ezekiel20:43 Lapho-ke lizakhumbula indlela zenu lezenzo zenu zonke elazingcolisa ngazo; lizazizonda ngenxa yazo zonke izinto ezimbi elazenzayo. 
Ezekiel20:44 Lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi nxa ngiliphatha ngenxa yebizo lami, ngingaliphathi ngokwendlela zenu ezimbi langokwezenzo zenu ezimbi, lina ndlu kaIsrayeli, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel20:45 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel20:46 Ndodana yomuntu. Khangelisa ubuso bakho ngeningizimu, uprofethe ngeningizimu, uprofethe ngelizwe lamaGusu eliseningizimu." 
Ezekiel20:47 Uthi kilo igusu leningizimu: Zwana ilizwi le Nkosi. INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngizaphemba umlilo phakathi kwakho ozatshisa zonke izihlahla eziluhlaza ezikuwe lezihlahla ezomileyo; ilangabi elivuthayo kaliyikucitsheka, lizatshisa konke kusukela eningizimu kuze kufike enyakatho." 
Ezekiel20:48 Yonke inyama izabona ukuthi mina Nkosi ngiwuphembile, kawuyikucitsheka." 
Ezekiel20:49 Ngasengisithi: Hawu, Nkosi Jehova! sebesithi ngami: Yena kasumqambi wemifanekiso yini?" 
Ezekiel21:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel21:2 Ndodana yomuntu, khangela eJerusalema, uprofethe ngezindawo zakhona ezingcwele, uprofethe ngelizwe lakoIsrayeli," 
Ezekiel21:3 uthi kiyo: I Nkosi ithi: Khangela, ngimelene lawe, ngizahwatsha inkemba yami esikhwameni sayo, ngiqume ngisuse kuwe abalungileyo lababi." 
Ezekiel21:4 Ngoba ngizaquma ngisuse kuwe abalungileyo lababi, inkemba yami izahwatshelwa yonke inyama, kusukela eningizimu kuze kufike enyakatho." 
Ezekiel21:5 Yonke inyama izakwazi ukuthi mina Nkosi ngiyihwatshile inkemba yami esikhwameni sayo, kayisayikubuyiselwa kuso futhi." 
Ezekiel21:6 Bubula, ndodana yomuntu, ngokudabuka kokhalo, langokubaba phambi kwabo." 
Ezekiel21:7 Nxa besithi kuwe: Ububulelani? wena uthi: Kungenxa yezindaba ezizayo. Lapho sezifikile, zonke inhliziyo zizagcwala ukwesaba, lezandla zibe buthakathaka, lemimoya yonke ihlupheke, lamadolo wonke atshayane. Khangela, sezifikile, zizagcwaliseka, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel21:8 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel21:9 Ndodana yomuntu, profetha amazwi eNkosi, uthi: Inkemba, inkemba iloliwe, yabuya yalolongwa," 
Ezekiel21:10 ilolelwe ukubulala, yalolongelwa ukuphazima njengombane. Intonga iyagwetshwa, ndodana yami, ukudelela zonke izithombe zesigodo." 
Ezekiel21:11 Inkemba inikelwe ukulolongwa ukuze iphathwe, iyalolwa ilolongwe ukunikelwa esandleni sombulali." 
Ezekiel21:12 Khala ulile, ndodana yomuntu, ngoba linkemba ngeyokumelana labantu bami, ngeyokumelana lazo zonke iziphathamandla zakoIsrayeli; zinikelwe kuyo kanye labantu bami. Ngakho tshaya isifuba sakho ngenxa yosizi," 
Ezekiel21:13 ngoba kuyikuhlolwa, pho-ke, kuzakuba njani uba kungesiyo sibili intonga yokudelela? kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel21:14 Profetha, wena ndodana yomuntu, utshaye isandla esandleni, ngoba inkemba izagwaza kabili lakathathu, iyinkemba yokubulala, inkemba yokubulawa kwabakhulu ebahanqayo," 
Ezekiel21:15 ukuze inhliziyo zabo zincibilike. Sengibasongela ngenkemba emasangweni abo wonke, inkemba ekhazimulayo njengombane, yalolongelwa ukubulala." 
Ezekiel21:16 Wena nkemba, gwaza ngakwesokunene langakwesokhohlo, lalapho ongaqonda khona." 
Ezekiel21:17 Lami ngizatshaya isandla sami esandleni sami, ngiphelelise ukufutheka kwami. Mina Nkosi, sengikhulumile." 
Ezekiel21:18 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi futhi lathi: 
Ezekiel21:19 Ndodana yomuntu, dweba indlela ezimbili zokufika kwenkosi yeBhabhiloni, ilenkemba yayo, zombili zisuke elizweni linye. Umise isiqondiso sendlela, usimise ekuhlanganeni kwezindlela." 
Ezekiel21:20 Dweba indlela yokufika kwayo eRaba elakoAmoni lakoJuda leJerusalema ebiyelwe ngomthangala. 
Ezekiel21:21 Ngoba inkosi yeBhabhiloni isimi ekwehlukaneni kwendlela, ekuhlanganeni kwendlela ezimbili, ukuvumisa khona; ikhahlazisa imitshoko, ibuza izithombe ezithiwa ngamatherafi, ihlole izibindi zomhlatshelo." 
Ezekiel21:22 Umtshoko wokuvumisa obhalwe ukuthi iJerusalema iwele ngakwesokunene sayo; kulapho okufanele imemeze khona, ihlabe umkhosi wempi, imise izigodo zokudiliza amasango, lamadundulu okuvimbezela, yakhe lezinqaba." 
Ezekiel21:23 Ebantwini kuzakhanya kuyikuvumisa kwamanga, kanti kuzangikhumbuza izenzo zabo ezimbi, bazawela ezandleni zezitha zabo." 
Ezekiel21:24 Ngakho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba lingikhumbuze ukona kwenu ngokubeka obala iziphambeko zenu, ukuze kuvele izono zenu ekwenzeni kwenu konke, langoba selikhunjulwa, lizatshaywa ngenxa yazo." 
Ezekiel21:25 Wena-ke, sikhulu sakoIsrayeli oyisixhwali esibi, usuku lwakho selufikile, isikhathi sokutshaywa kwakho kokucina." 
Ezekiel21:26 INkosi uJehova ithi: Susa iqhiye yakho, wethule umqhele; izinto kaziyikuhlala zinjalo. Phakamisa labo abehliselwe phansi, wehlisele phansi abaphakanyisiweyo." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ukuchitheka, ukuchitheka, ngizaletha ukuchitheka emzini okungazanga kube khona ngaphambili, kuze kufike umuntu onguye okhethiweyo ukuze awahlulele." 
Ezekiel21:28 Wena, ndodana yomuntu, profetha uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi ngamaAmoni ahleka uIsrayeli: Inkemba, inkemba isihwatshelwe ukubulala, yalolongwa ukuze ikhazimule, iphazime njengombane." 
Ezekiel21:29 Usabona imibono yamanga, uvumise amanga ubekwe ezintanyeni zezixhwali ezimbi, ezilensuku esezifikile, isikhathi sokutshaywa kwazo kokucina." 
Ezekiel21:30 Ubuyisele endaweni yawo. Endaweni lapha wadalelwa khona, elizweni owadabuka kilo, ngizakwahlulela khona;" 
Ezekiel21:31 ngehlisele ukuthukuthela kwami phezu kwakho, ngikuthungele ngomlilo wolaka lwami, ngikunikele ezandleni zabantu abalolunya, abakwaziyo ukubulala." 
Ezekiel21:32 Uzakuba zinkuni zomlilo, le lakho lichithekele phakathi kwezizwe, ungabe usakhunjulwa; ngoba mina Nkosi ngikhulumile." 
Ezekiel22:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel22:2 Wena ndodana yomuntu, uzawahlulela, uwahlulele umuzi ogcwele igazi yini? Wazise zonke izenzo zawo ezenyanyekayo." 
Ezekiel22:3 Uzakuthi kuwo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Maye kumuzi ochitha igazi phakathi kwawo ukuze isikhathi sawo sifike, owenza izithombe ukuzingcolisa." 
Ezekiel22:4 Wena ulecala ngegazi olichithileyo, usungcoliswe yizithombe ozenzileyo, ulusondezile eduze usuku lwakho, lesikhathi esimisiweyo seminyaka yakho sifikile. Ngalokho ngikwenzile waba lihlazo ezizweni lenhlekisa emazweni wonke." 
Ezekiel22:5 Abaseduze labakhatshana lawe bazahleka, wena omubi ogcwele isiphithiphithi." 
Ezekiel22:6 Khangela, zonke iziphathamandla zakoIsrayeli ezikuwe zisebenzisa amandla azo ukuchitha igazi." 
Ezekiel22:7 Phakathi kwakho abazali benziwa inhlekisa, owezizweni uyacindezela phakathi kwakho, koniwe intandane lomfelokazi." 
Ezekiel22:8 Udelele izinto zami ezingcwele, wangcolisa amasabatha ami." 
Ezekiel22:9 Kukhona kuwe abantu abahlebayo ukuze bachithe igazi, labadlela phezu kwezintaba emathempelini, labawulayo." 
Ezekiel22:10 Phakathi kwakho abantu bayanqunulisa oyise, bone abesifazana abangcole ngokwehlukaniswa." 
Ezekiel22:11 Omunye wenza amanyala lomfazi womakhelwane wakhe, lomunye awule lomalokazana wakhe, omunye angcolise udadewabo, indodakazi kayise." 
Ezekiel22:12 Phakathi kwakho abantu bazuza imivuzo yokuthengwa ngokuchitha igazi; uyazinothisa ngokuthatha inzuzo lomvuzo kubomakhelwane bakho ngobuqili. Usungikhohliwe, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel22:13 Khangela-ke ngiyatshaya isandla sami ngenzuzo yakho yenkohliso oyenzileyo, langegazi ebeliphakathi kwakho." 
Ezekiel22:14 Isibindi sakho sizakuma yini, lezandla zakho ziqine, ensukwini engizaphathana lawe kuzo yini? Mina Nkosi ngikhulumile, ngizakwenza." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ngizakuchithachitha phakathi kwezizwe, ngikuhlakazele emazweni, ngiqede ukungcola kwakho konke kuwe." 
Ezekiel22:16 Uzangcoliswa phakathi kwezizwe; uzakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi. 
Ezekiel22:17 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel22:18 Ndodana yomuntu, uIsrayeli wonke usenjengamanyele kimi, wonke ngoluthi lwakhe, unjengamanyele esiliva lethusi lensimbi lomnuso phakathi kwesithando." 
Ezekiel22:19 Ngakho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba lonke selinjengamanyele, khangelani, ngizalibuthelela phakathi kweJerusalema." 
Ezekiel22:20 Njengoba abantu bebuthelela isiliva lethusi lensimbi lomnuso esithandweni somlilo ukuze kufuthwe ngomlilo ukuze kuncibilike, ngokunjalo-ke ngizalibuthelela ekuthukutheleni kwami lasolakeni lwami, ngilifake phakathi. ngilincibilikise." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ngizalibuthelela, ngilifuthe ngomlilo wokuthukuthela kwami, lincibilike phakathi komuzi." 
Ezekiel22:22 Njengesiliva sincibilikiswa esithandweni somlilo, ngokunjalo lizancibilikiswa phakathi kwawo. Lizakwazi ukuthi mina Nkosi ngehlisele ulaka lwami phezu kwenu." 
Ezekiel22:23 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel22:24 Ndodana yomuntu, tshono kiyo iJerusalema uthi: Wena uyilizwe elingahlanjululwanga lelinganethwanga ngosuku lwentukuthelo." 
Ezekiel22:25 Iziphathamandla eziphakathi kwalo zifanana lezilwane ezibhongayo leziphangayo; zibadlile abantu; zathatha inotho lezinto eziligugu; zenza abanengi baba ngabafelokazi phakathi kwalo. 
Ezekiel22:26 Abapristi bayo bawephule umlayo wami, bangcolisa izinto zami ezingcwele; kabenzanga umehluko phakathi kwezinto ezingcwele lezingangcwele; futhi kabawufundisanga umehluko phakathi kwezinto ezingcolileyo lezihlambulukileyo, badelile amasabatha ami; ngangcoliswa phakathi kwabo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Iziphathamandla eziphakathi kwayo zifanana lempisi eziphangayo, ezichitha igazi zibulala abantu, ukuze zizuze umvuzo ngobuqili." 
Ezekiel22:28 Abaprofethi bayo bayacomba izenzo zazo ngekalaga, babona imibono yamanga, bavumise amanga, besithi: Nanti ilizwi leNkosi uJehova; yona i Nkosi ingakhulumanga." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abantu belizwe bayaqilibezela, baphange abanye, bahluphe abayanga labaswelayo, bacindezele kakhulu abezizweni." 
Ezekiel22:30 Ngadinga umuntu phakathi kwabo ongakha umduli, avimbe esikhaleni phambi kwami, avikele ilizwe ukuze ngingalichithi, kodwa kangitholanga muntu," 
Ezekiel22:31 Ngalokho ngehlisele ukuthukuthela kwami phezu kwabo, ngabaqeda ngomlilo wolaka lwami, ngaphindisela indlela yabo kibo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel23:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel23:2 Ndodana yomuntu, kwakukhona abesifazana ababili, amadodakazi omfazi munye." 
Ezekiel23:3 Bawula eGibhithe, bawula ebutsheni babo, babanjwa amabele abo lamathangazi abo." 
Ezekiel23:4 Omdala wayethiwa nguOhola, lomnawakhe wayethiwa nguOholiba. Baba ngabami, bangizalela amadodana lamadodakazi. UOhola uyiSamariya, loOholiba uyiJerusalema." 
Ezekiel23:5 UOhola wawula esesengowami, wakhanuka izithandwa zakhe amaAsiriya," 
Ezekiel23:6 amabutho agqoke okuluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, lababusi lenduna zebutho, bonke bengamajaha athandekayo, labakwaziyo ukugada amabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:7 Wawula labo, ikhethelo labantu beAsiriya; wazingcolisa ngazo zonke izithombe zabo bonke ayebakhanuka." 
Ezekiel23:8 Kakuyekelanga ukuwula kwakhe akwenza kusukela ensukwini zakhe eGibhithe, ngoba ebutsheni bakhe amadoda alala laye, abamba amathangazi akhe, akholisisa ukukhanuka kwawo kuye." 
Ezekiel23:9 Ngalokho-ke ngamnikela ezandleni zezithandwa zakhe, ezandleni zamaAsiriya awakhanukayo." 
Ezekiel23:10 Wona amnqunulisa, abamba amadodana lamadodakazi akhe, ambulala ngenkemba; waba yisiga phakathi kwabesifazana emva kokwenza isigwebo phezu kwakhe." 
Ezekiel23:11 Umnawakhe uOholiba wakubona lokhu, yena wayemubi kulaye ekukhanukeni kwakhe lekuwuleni kwakhe, okwakusedlula okukadadewabo." 
Ezekiel23:12 Wakhanuka amaAsiriya, ababusi lenduna zebutho, lamabutho agqoke izigqoko zensimbi, labagadi bamabhiza abagadileyo, bonke bengamajaha abukekayo." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ngabona ukuthi ungcolisiwe; bobabili babehamba unyawo lunye. 
Ezekiel23:14 Kodwa yena wengezelela ekuwuleni kwakhe. Wabona abesilisa befanekisiwe emdulini, izithombe zamaKhaladiya zifanekisiwe ngokubomvu," 
Ezekiel23:15 zibotshwe ngamabhanti ezinkalweni zazo, zilamaqhiye alengayo emakhanda azo, zonke zikhangeleka njengezinduna, kungumfanekiso wamaBhabhiloni azalelwa eKhaladiya." 
Ezekiel23:16 Lapho ebabona, wabakhanuka, wathuma izithunywa kubo eKhaladiya." 
Ezekiel23:17 AmaBhabhiloni afika, alala laye, amngcolisa ngenkanuko zawo; emva kokungcoliswa kwakhe wawatshiya esenengiwe yiwo." 
Ezekiel23:18 Lapho ewula ngokusobala, echaya ubunqunu bakhe, ngamtshiya senginengwe nguye njengalokhu ngamtshiya udadewabo." 
Ezekiel23:19 Kodwa wandisa ukuwula kwakhe, wakhumbula insuku zobutsha bakhe ezokuwula kwakhe elizweni leGibhithe," 
Ezekiel23:20 ekhanuka izithandwa zakhe khona, ezilenyama efanana lenyama yabobabhemi, lenzalo yazo ifanana leyamabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:21 Ngakho wena Oholiba watshisekela amanyala obutsha bakho lapho amaGibhithe ayebamba amathangazi akho lamabele akho. 
Ezekiel23:22 Ngalokho-ke, wena Oholiba, iNkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngizakuvusela izithandwa zakho owazitshiya usunengwa yizo, ngizilethe kuwe zivela inhlangothi zonke," 
Ezekiel23:23 amaBhabhiloni lamaKhaladiya wonke, amadoda ePekodi leShowa leKowa, lawo wonke amaAsiriya, amajaha abukekayo, ababusi lenduna zamabutho, bonke ngoluthi lwabo, izinduna lamabutho, bonke begade amabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:24 Bazakuza kuwe bevela ngenyakatho belezinqola lezinqola zokuthwala impahla, lexuku labantu, bakuhanqe indawo zonke belamahawu lezihlangu ezinkulu lamakhowa; ngizabeka isigwebo phambi kwabo, bazakugweba njengezigwebo zabo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ngizakwenzela umona ukuze bakuphathe ngolaka. Bazaquma impumulo yakho lendlebe zakho, labaseleyo emzini wakho babulawe. Bazathumba amadodana lamadodakazi akho, labaseleyo emzini wakho batshiswe ngomlilo." 
Ezekiel23:26 Bazakukhulula lawe izigqoko zakho, bathathe iziceco zakho ezinhle." 
Ezekiel23:27 Ngokunjalo ngizaqeda amanyala akho lokuwula kwakho owasuka lakho elizweni leGibhithe, ukuze ungabe usakhanuka amaGibhithe futhi, uwakhumbule." 
Ezekiel23:28 INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngizakunikela ezandleni zalabo obazondayo, ezandleni zalabo owabatshiya usunengiwe yibo." 
Ezekiel23:29 Bazakuzonda, bakuphathe kubi, bakuthathele zonke izithelo zomsebenzi wakho, usale unqunu uze, lokuwula kwakho kuvele obala." 
Ezekiel23:30 Amanyala akho lokuwula kwakho kukwehlisele lokho, ngoba uwulile lezizwe, wazingcolisa ngezithombe zazo." 
Ezekiel23:31 Ulandele indlela kadadewenu; ngalokho ngizakunika inkezo yakhe yokujeziswa. 
Ezekiel23:32 INkosi uJehova ithi: Uzanatha inkezo kadadewenu ezikileyo lebanzi; uzahlekwa ube yinhlekisa, ngoba igcwele okunengi;" 
Ezekiel23:33 uzadakwa ube losizi. Inkezo kadadewenu iSamariya iyinkezo yokwesaba lokuchitheka. 
Ezekiel23:34 Uzayinatha uyibhije, uyiphahlaze ibe yizicucu, udabule amabele akho. Sengikhulumile, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel23:35 Ngalokho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba ungikhohliwe, wangilahla nyovane, thwala umvuzo wamanyala akho lokuwula kwakho." 
Ezekiel23:36 I Nkosi yathi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, uzagweba uOhola loOholiba yini? Batshele-ke izenzo zabo ezingamanyala." 
Ezekiel23:37 Ngoba bafebile, lezandla zabo zigcwele igazi. Bafebile lezithombe zabo, benza amadodana abo abangizalele wona ukuthi badabule baye kizo." 
Ezekiel23:38 Futhi benze lokho kimi, bangcolisa indlu yami engcwele, bona lamasabatha ami." 
Ezekiel23:39 Ngoba ekubulaleni abantwana babo ukuze babe ngumhlatshelo wezithombe zabo, bangena endlini yami engcwele bayingcolise. Khangela, yikho lokho abakwenza endlini yami." 
Ezekiel23:40 Babiza abantu ukuthi beze bevela khatshana, okwathunyelwa kibo isithunywa, khangela, labo beza. Wabagezela, wacomba amehlo akho, wagqiza iziceco zakho." 
Ezekiel23:41 Wahlala ethaleni elihle eliletafula phambi kwalo, owabeka kulo impepha yami lamafutha ami." 
Ezekiel23:42 Wawumkhulu umsindo wexuku elithokozayo; kanye labantukazana kwakukhona labeShebha ababevela enkangala, befake amasongo ezandleni zabesifazana lemiqhele emihle emakhanda abo." 
Ezekiel23:43 Ngasengisithi: Yeka lo owesifazana osejwayele ukufeba! Sebezafeba laye, bafebe laye yena lo." 
Ezekiel23:44 Ngoba baye kuye njengoba kuyiwa ewuleni. Ngokunjalo baya kuOhola lakuOholiba ukwenza amanyala. 
Ezekiel23:45 Kodwa abantu abalungileyo bazabagweba, babagwebe ngesigwebo esifanele isifebekazi, langesigwebo esifanele abesifazana abachitha igazi; ngoba beyizifebekazi, lezandla zabo zigcwele igazi." 
Ezekiel23:46 INkosi uJehova ithi: Baletheleni ixuku, libenze into eyesabekayo lempango." 
Ezekiel23:47 Ixuku lizabakhanda ngamatshe, libaqedisele ngenkemba zalo, lizabulala amadodana lamadodakazi abo, litshise lezindlu zabo." 
Ezekiel23:48 Ngokunjalo ngizaqeda amanyala elizweni ukuze bonke abesifazana baxwayiseke, bangenzi amanyala njengani." 
Ezekiel23:49 Amanyala enu azaphindiselwa phezu kwenu, lithwale umvuzo wokuwula kwenu okubi. Lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyiNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel24:1 Ngomnyaka wesificamunwemunye, ngosuku lwetshumi enyangeni yetshumi, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi:" 
Ezekiel24:2 Ndodana yomuntu, bhala ibizo lalolusuku, lona lolusuku kanye, ngoba inkosi yeBhabhiloni isivimbezele iJerusalema ngalona lolusuku." 
Ezekiel24:3 Utsho umfanekiso ebantwini abahlamukayo uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Beka imbiza eziko, ibeke, uthele lamanzi futhi," 
Ezekiel24:4 uqobele inyama kiyo, wonke amaqatha amahle, ithebe lesiphanga, uyigcwalise ngamathambo amahle." 
Ezekiel24:5 Thatha okuhle emhlanjini, ubuthelele inkuni ngaphansi kwayo, ukuze imbiza ibile iphuphume, kuze kuvuthwe lamathambo." 
Ezekiel24:6 Ngakho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Maye kuwo umuzi ogcwele igazi, kuyo imbiza ethombileyo, ukuthomba kwayo okungelakususwa! Khupha kiyo iqatha ngeqatha, ungakhethi." 
Ezekiel24:7 Ngoba igazi umuzi olichithileyo lisekhona kuwo, ulithululele phezu kwedwala, kawulichithelanga phansi ukuligqibela ngenhlabathi." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ukuze kuvuswe ukuthukuthela kwami, ukuze kuphindisele, ngichithele phezu kwedwala igazi olichithileyo ukuze lingagqitshelwa." 
Ezekiel24:9 Ngakho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Maye kuwo umuzi ogcwele igazi! Lami ngizabasa umlilo omkhulu. 
Ezekiel24:10 Faka izigodo, uwuphembe umlilo, uyipheke kuhle inyama, uthulule isinongo, uyekele amathambo atshe." 
Ezekiel24:11 Ubusuyibeka phezu kwamalahle ingelalutho, ukuze itshise, kutshe ithusi layo, kuncibilike ingcekeza yayo, kuphele lokuthomba kwayo." 
Ezekiel24:12 Ngizidinise ngeze, ukuthomba kwayo okunengi kakusasuki ngomlilo." 
Ezekiel24:13 Ukuthomba kwayo kungamanyala enu angcolileyo. Ngoba bengithanda ukulihlambulula, kodwa kalihlambulukanga ekungcoleni kwenu, kalisayikuhlanjululwa ngize ngikholisise ukuthukuthela kwami phezu kwenu." 
Ezekiel24:14 Mina Nkosi ngikhulumile. Kuzakwenzeka, ngizakwenza. Kangiyikukuyekela, kangiyikuba lesihawu, kangiyikuphenduka. Ngizakugweba ngokufanele indlela zakho lezenzo zakho, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel24:15 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika futhi kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel24:16 Ndodana yomuntu, khangela, sengizasusa othandekayo kuwe ngokuphangisa; kodwa ungalili, ungakhali inyembezi, ungehlisi inyembezi." 
Ezekiel24:17 Bubula, ungakhali, ungalileli abafileyo. Thwala iqhiye yakho, ufake amanyathela enyaweni zakho, ungagubuzeli umlomo wakho, ungadli ukudla kwabalilayo." 
Ezekiel24:18 Ngakho ngakhuluma labantu ekuseni, kusihlwa umkami wafa. Kwathi kusasa ngenza njengokulaywa kwami." 
Ezekiel24:19 Abantu bathi kimi: Kawuyikusitshela yini ukuthi lezizinto zitshoni kithi ukuthi wenze nje? 
Ezekiel24:20 Ngasengisithi kibo: Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi," 
Ezekiel24:21 lathi: Tshono kuIsrayeli ukuthi iNkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngizangcolisa indlu yami engcwele, eligugu lamandla enu, ethandekayo emehlweni enu, efiswa ngumoya wenu. Amadodana enu lamadodakazi enu eliwatshiyileyo azakuwa ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel24:22 Lizakwenza njengami, kaliyikugubuzela imilomo yenu, lidle ukudla kwabakhalayo." 
Ezekiel24:23 Lizathwala amaqhiye enu, lifake amanyathela enu enyaweni zenu, lingalili likhale inyembezi, kodwa lizaphela amandla ezonweni zenu, libubule omunye komunye." 
Ezekiel24:24 Ngalokho uHezekeli uzakuba yisibonakaliso kini, lizakwenza njengokwenza kwakhe. Lapho sekufika lokhu, lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyiNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel24:25 Ndodana yomuntu, ngizasusa kibo ithempeli labo eliyinqaba yabo, eliyintokozo yabo lodumo lwabo, lelithandekayo emehlweni abo, lelifiswe zinhliziyo zabo, ngisuse amadodana abo lamadodakazi abo." 
Ezekiel24:26 Ngalolosuku kuzafika kuwe ophunyukileyo ukwenza indlebe zakho zikuzwe. 
Ezekiel24:27 Ngalolosuku umlomo wakho uzavuleka kophunyukileyo, ukhulume laye, ungabe usaba yisimungulu, ube yisibonakaliso ebantwini; bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel25:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel25:2 Ndodana yomuntu, khangela kumaAmoni, utshumayele ngawo." 
Ezekiel25:3 Uthi kuwo: Zwanini ilizwi leNkosi uJehova; ithi: Ngoba lathi: Iya! nxa libona indlu yami engcwele ingcoliswa, lelizwe lakoIsrayeli lichitheka, loJuda ethunjwa," 
Ezekiel25:4 ngalokho khangelani, ngizalinikela ebantwini bempumalanga ukuze balibuse; bazamisa inkamba zabo phakathi kwenu, benze imizi yabo phakathi kwenu; bazakudla izithelo zenu, banathe lochago lwenu." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ngizakwenza iRaba libe lidlelo lamakamela, lemizi yamaAmoni ibe yisibaya semihlambi. Khona lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel25:6 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba uqakezile izandla zakho, wagida ngenyawo zakho, wathokoza ugcwele umona ngelizwe lakoIsrayeli," 
Ezekiel25:7 ngalokho khangela, ngizakuphakamisela isandla sami, ngikunikele ube yimpango yezizwe, ngikuqume usuke ezizweni, ngikuqede kuwo wonke amazwe, ngikuchithe nya. Khona uzakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel25:8 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba uMowabi wathi: Khangela, uJuda uyafanana nje lazo zonke ezinye izizwe;" 
Ezekiel25:9 ngalokho khangela, ngizachaya umngcele wakoMowabi ukuze imizi esemngceleni eligugu lelizwe inqotshwe, iBeti-Jeshimothi, leBhali-Meyoni, leKiriyathayimi." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ngizanikela uMowabi lamaAmoni ebantwini bempumalanga ukuwabusa, ukuze amaAmoni angabe esakhunjulwa futhi phakathi kwezizwe," 
Ezekiel25:11 ngenze izigwebo phezu kukaMowabi. Khona bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi. 
Ezekiel25:12 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba iEdoma liphindisele koJuda, lonile kakhulu ngokuphindisela kwalo," 
Ezekiel25:13 ngalokho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ngizaphakamisela isandla sami ngakilo iEdoma, ngiqume ngisuse kilo abantu lezinyamazana, ngilenze libe yinkangala; kusukela eThemani kuze kufike eDedani bazakuwa ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ngizaphindisela kulo iEdoma ngesandla sabantu bami uIsrayeli, benze kilo okufanele ukuthukuthela kwami lolaka lwami; bazakwazi impindiselo yami, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel25:15 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba amaFilisti ephindisele, aphindisela ezitheni ngolunya langenzondo elaphakade, bazama ngamandla wonke ukuzichitha," 
Ezekiel25:16 ngalokho, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, khangela, ngizaphakamisela isandla sami ngakuwo amaFilisti, ngichithe abeKerethi, ngibhubhise insali yokhumbi lolwandle." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ngizabaphindisela ngokwesabekayo. ngibatshaye ekuthukutheleni kwami, lapho sengiphindisela, bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel26:1 Kwathi ngomnyaka wetshumi lanye, esukwini lokuqala lwenyanga yokuqala, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi:" 
Ezekiel26:2 Ndodana yomuntu, iTire litshilo ngeJerusalema ukuthi: Iya! isango lezizwe selidilikile, langivulekela, sengizanotha lokhu selichithekile." 
Ezekiel26:3 Ngalokho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngimelene lawe, wena Tire, ngizakulethela izizwe ezinengi njengolwandle luletha amagagasi alo." 
Ezekiel26:4 Zizadiliza imiduli yeTire, zibhidlizele phansi inqaba zayo. Ngizakhukhula inhlabathi yayo, ngiyenze ibe lidwala elingelalutho." 
Ezekiel26:5 Lizakuba yindawo yokuchayela amambule phakathi kolwandle, ngoba ngikhulumile, kutsho iNkosi uJehova. Lizakuba yimpango yezizwe," 
Ezekiel26:6 lamadodakazi alo phakathi kwelizwe azabulawa ngenkemba. Khona-ke bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi. 
Ezekiel26:7 INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngizaletha eTire uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni, ivela enyakatho, eyinkosi yamakhosi, elamabhiza lezinqola, labagadi bamabhiza, lexuku elikhulu lamabutho." 
Ezekiel26:8 Yena uzabulala amadodakazi akho phakathi kwelizwe ngenkemba, akumisele umduli wokuvimbezela, akwakhele idundulu, akuphakamisele izihlangu ezinkulu ezinengi." 
Ezekiel26:9 Uzaqondisa izigodo zakhe zokudiliza emidulini yakho, adilizele phansi inqaba zakho ngamahloka akhe." 
Ezekiel26:10 Ngenxa yobunengi bamabhiza akhe uthuli lwawo luzakusibekela, lemiduli yakho izanyikinywa ngumsindo wabagadi bamabhiza lowezinqola, nxa engena emasangweni akho njengomuntu ofohlela emzini." 
Ezekiel26:11 Uzanyathela indlela zakho ngamasondo amabhiza akhe, abulale abantu bakho ngenkemba, lensika zakho eziqinileyo ziwele phansi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Bazaphanga inotho yakho, bathathe impahla yakho ethengiswayo. badilizele phansi imiduli yakho, babhidlize izindlu zakho ezinhle, baphosele emanzini amatshe akho, lezigodo zakho lenhlabathi yakho." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ngizaqeda ukuhlatshelwa kwengoma zakho, lokukhala kwamachacho akho kakusayikuzwakala futhi." 
Ezekiel26:14 Ngizakwenza ube lidwala elingelalutho, indawo yokuchaya amambule, ungaphindi wakhiwe futhi; ngoba mina Nkosi ngikhulumile, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel26:15 INkosi uJehova ithi kuyo iTire: Kaziyikuthuthumela yini izihlenge ngomdumo wokuwa kwakho, lapho abagwaziweyo bebubula labafayo besifa phakathi kwakho?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Khona-ke zonke iziphathamandla zolwandle zizakwehla ezihlalweni zazo zobukhosi, zikhulule izigqoko zazo, zikhuphe amabhatshi azo ezicecisiweyo; zigcwale ukuthuthumela, zihlale phansi zithuthumele isikhathi sonke, zimangale zonke." 
Ezekiel26:17 Zizakulilela zithi: Yeka ukunyamalala kwakho olwandle, wena muzi odumileyo, owawulamandla olwandle, wena labakhileyo kuwe, owenza ukuthi wesatshwe yilo lonke ilizwe." 
Ezekiel26:18 Khathesi izihlenge ziyathuthumela esukwini lokuwa kwakho, yebo, izihlenge eziselwandle ziyamangala ngokuphela kwakho." 
Ezekiel26:19 INkosi uJehova ithi: Lapho ngikwenza ube ngumuzi ochithekileyo ongaselabantu, nxa ngiletha ulwandle phezu kwakho lamanzi amanengi akusibekele," 
Ezekiel26:20 khona ngizakuphosela phansi kanye lalabo abehlela egodini, ebantwini basendulo, ngikwenze uhlale, elizweni elingaphansi, emanxiweni asendulo, kanye lalabo abehlela egodini, ukuze kungahlali muntu kuwe, ungabi landawo elizweni labaphilayo." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ngizakuchitha ngendlela eyesabekayo, ungabi khona futhi; lanxa udingwa, ungatholakali futhi, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel27:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel27:2 Wena ndodana yomuntu, khala isililo ngeTire," 
Ezekiel27:3 uthi kiyo iTire emi ekungeneni kolwandle, ethengisayo ebantwini emazweni amanengi angasolwandle, iNkosi uJehova ithi: Wena Tire, utshilo ukuthi: Ngiphelele ngobuhle." 
Ezekiel27:4 Imingcele yakho iphakathi kolwandle, labakhi bakho benza ubuhle bakho buphelele." 
Ezekiel27:5 Benza wonke amapulanka akho ngezihlahla zefiri ezivela eSeniri; bathatha umsedari ovela eLebhanoni ukukwenzela insika. 
Ezekiel27:6 Langezihlahla zamaokhi* zeBashani bakwenzela amaphini okugwedla; benza izitezi zakho ngezihlahla zomnundu ezivela ezinkunjini zeKuprosi, bazendlala ngempondo zendlovu." 
Ezekiel27:7 Isayili lakho lenziwa ngelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, lelicecisiweyo elivela eGibhithe, elaba luphawu lwakho, lethente lakho lenziwa ngelembu eliluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka leliyibubende elivela ezihlengeni zeElisha." 
Ezekiel27:8 Abakhileyo eSidoni leArvadi babengabagwedli bakho; izihlakaniphi ezazikuwe, wena Tire, zaba ngabaqondisi bakho." 
Ezekiel27:9 Abadala beGebali lezihlakaniphi zayo zakhona, zinameka izimfa zakho; imikhumbi yonke yolwandle labatshayeli bayo yeza kuwe ukuthenga impahla yakho." 
Ezekiel27:10 Amadoda ePerisiya laweLudi lawePuti ayesebuthweni yakho elibutho lakho; aphanyeka izihlangu zawo lengowane zawo kuwe, akunika udumo." 
Ezekiel27:11 Amadoda eArvadi leKilikhiya ayephezu kwemiduli yakho ekuhanqile, lamadoda eGamadi ayesezinqabeni zakho; aphanyeka izihlangu zawo emidulini yakho inhlangothi zonke, enza ubuhle bakho buphelele." 
Ezekiel27:12 ITarshishi lathengiselana lawe ngenxa yobunengi benotho yakho yenhlobo zonke, benana impahla yakho ngesiliva langensimbi langomnuso." 
Ezekiel27:13 IJavani leTubali leMesheki zathengiselana lawe, zenana impahla yakho ngabantu uqobo, langezitsha zethusi." 
Ezekiel27:14 IBeti-Togarima yenana impahla yakho ngamabhiza, langamabhiza empi, langezimbongolo." 
Ezekiel27:15 Abantu beRodesi bathengiselana lawe, lezihlenge ezinengi zazingezithengiswa ezandla zakho; bakuhlawula ngempondo zendlovu, langesihlahla esithiwa yi-eboni." 
Ezekiel27:16 ISiriya yathengiselana lawe ngenxa yempahla zakho ezinengi benana impahla zakho ngamatshe athiwa ngama-emeraldi*, langokuyibubende, langomsebenzi ocecisiweyo, langelembu elicolekileyo kakhulu, langamatshe athiwa yikorali* le-agate*." 
Ezekiel27:17 UJuda lelizwe lakoIsrayeli bathengiselana lawe, benana impahla zakho ngengqoloyi yeMinithi, langempuphu, langoluju, langamafutha, langamakha." 
Ezekiel27:18 IDamaseko lathengiselana lawe ngenxa yobunengi bempahla zakho langenxa yenotho yakho enkulu yenhlobo zonke, benana impahla zakho ngewayini leHeliboni langoboya obumhlophe," 
Ezekiel27:19 langewayini elivela eUzali, langensimbi ekhandiweyo, langekhasiya* langekalamu*; konke lokhu benanisa ngakho." 
Ezekiel27:20 IDedani lathengiselana lawe ngamalembu amahle ezihlalo zokugada. 
Ezekiel27:21 IArabhiya lazo zonke iziphathamandla zeKedari babengabathengi bakho abathandekayo, bethengiselana lawe ngamawundlu langezinqama langezimbuzi." 
Ezekiel27:22 Abathengi beShebha leRahama bathengiselana lawe, benana impahla zakho ngenhlobo zonke ezinhle zamakha, langamatshe wonke amahle, langegolide." 
Ezekiel27:23 IHarani leKane leEdeni, labathengi beAsiriya, leKilimadi, bathengiselana lawe." 
Ezekiel27:24 Laba bathengiselana lawe ngezembatho ezinhle, langamalembu aluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka, langomsebenzi ocecisiweyo, langamacansi amabalabala, elukwe ngentambo, aqina; bathengiselana lawe ngakho konke lokhu." 
Ezekiel27:25 Imikhumbi emikhulu yakuthwalela impahla zakho. Waba njengomkolo ogcwele usindwa kakhulu enhliziyweni zenlwandle. 
Ezekiel27:26 Abagwedli bakho bakukhuphelela emanzini amanengi. Umoya wempumalanga usukwephulele enhliziyweni zenlwandle. 
Ezekiel27:27 Inotho yakho lempahla yakho, lalokho okuthengisayo, labatshayeli bakho, labaqondisi bakho, labavimbi bezimfa zakho, labathengi bakho, lawo wonke amadoda empi akhona kuwe, ixuku lonke eliphakathi kwakho, lizatshona enhliziyweni zenlwandle ngosuku lokuchitheka kwakho." 
Ezekiel27:28 Ngelizwi lokukhala kwabaqondisi bakho ilizwe lonke liyathuthumela. 
Ezekiel27:29 Lapho bonke abagwedli besehla emikhunjini yabo, lalapho abatshayeli labaqondisi bekhuphukela ekhunjini kanyekanye," 
Ezekiel27:30 bayahlaba umkhosi, bekukhalela ngokubaba; bathela uthuli emakhanda abo, bazibhuqe emlotheni," 
Ezekiel27:31 baziphuce amakhanda, bagqoke amalembu amasaka, bakukhalele inyembezi kakhulu, bakhale inyembezi ngokubaba bomphefumulo, ngokukhala okubabayo." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ekukhaleni kwabo bayalila ngawe, bathi: Ngubani owayenjengeTire elizigqajayo elizingelezelwe lulwandle?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ekuphumeni kwempahla yakho olwandle, wenelisa abantu abanengi; ngenotho enengi langempahla yakho wanothisa amakhosi omhlaba." 
Ezekiel27:34 Khathesi usuwephulwe lulwandle enzikini zamanzi; impahla yakho lalo lonke ixuku lakho kutshone kanye lawe. 
Ezekiel27:35 Bonke abakhileyo ezihlengeni bayamangala ngawe, lamakhosi abo ayesaba kakhulu, lobuso bawo bunyukumele." 
Ezekiel27:36 Abathengi phakathi kwabantu bayakuncifela. Usuchitheke kubi, kawusayikuba khona kuze kube nininini." 
Ezekiel28:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel28:2 Ndodana yomuntu, tshono kusiphathamandla seTire, uthi iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba inhliziyo yakho iziphakamisile, utshilo ukuthi: Mina nginguNkulunkulu, ngihlezi esihlalweni sabonkulunkulu enzikini zolwandle; kanti ungumuntu nje, kawusunkulunkulu, lanxa uzitshaya ohlakaniphileyo njengonkulunkulu." 
Ezekiel28:3 Khangela, impela uhlakaniphile kuloDaniyeli, kakukho okufihlakeleyo kuwe." 
Ezekiel28:4 Ngokuhlakanipha kwakho langokuqedisisa kwakho uzinothisile, wabuthela endlini zenotho yakho igolide lesiliva." 
Ezekiel28:5 Ngokuhlakanipha kwakho okukhulu ekuthengeni wandisile inotho yakho, lenhliziyo yakho isizigqaja ngenotho yakho." 
Ezekiel28:6 Ngalokho iNkosi uJehova, ithi: Ngoba uzitshaya ohlakaniphileyo njengonkulunkulu," 
Ezekiel28:7 khangela, ngizakulethela abezizwe, ngilethe izizwe ezesabekayo kakhulu; zizahwatsha inkemba zazo, zichithe ubuhle bokuhlakanipha kwakho, zone udumo lwakho." 
Ezekiel28:8 Zizakuphosela phansi egodini, ufe kubi enhliziyweni zenlwandle." 
Ezekiel28:9 Uzakutsho yini uthi: Ngingunkulunkulu, phambi kwalabo abakugwazayo, lanxa wena ungumuntu ungesuye uNkulunkulu, ezandleni zalabo abakugwazayo?" 
Ezekiel28:10 Uzakufa njengabangasokanga ngezandla zabezizwe; ngoba sengikhulumile, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel28:11 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel28:12 Ndodana yomuntu, khala isililo ngenkosi yeTire, uthi kiyo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Wawuyisiboniso sokupheleleyo, ugcwele ukuhlakanipha, uphelele ngobuhle." 
Ezekiel28:13 WawuseEdeni, insimu kaNkulunkulu, ucecile ngawo wonke amatshe amahle, ngitsho ikorneliya* letopazi* lejaspi* lekrisolite* lebherule* le-onikse* lesafire* lerubi* le-emeraldi*. Amahlwayi akho ayengawegolide, lamasongo owawuwagqizile ayenzelwe wena ngosuku lokuzalwa kwakho." 
Ezekiel28:14 Ngakunika ikherubhi* lokukulinda, usentabeni engcwele kaNkulunkulu, wahamba phakathi kwamatshe avutha umlilo." 
Ezekiel28:15 Wawuphelele endleleni zakho, kusukela esukwini owadalwa ngalo kwaze kwatholwa ububi kuwe." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ngenxa yobunengi bokuthenga kwakho wagcwala ulunya, wasusona. Ngakuxotsha njengento engcolileyo entabeni kaNkulunkulu, lekherubi* lokukulinda lakukhupha phakathi kwamatshe avutha umlilo." 
Ezekiel28:17 Inhliziyo yakho yaziphakamisa ngenxa yobuhle bakho; wona ukuhlakanipha kwakho ngenxa yodumo lwakho. Ngakuphosa phansi, ngakuchaya phambi kwamakhosi ukuze akukhangele ngamehlo awo." 
Ezekiel28:18 Ngobunengi bezono zakho zokukhohlisa kwakho ekuthengiseni ungcolise indawo zakho ezingcwele; ngaphemba umlilo phakathi kwakho, wakutshisa du, ngakutshisa waba ngumlotha emhlabathini ukuze bonke bakubone." 
Ezekiel28:19 Bonke abakwaziyo phakathi kwabantu bamangala ngawe. Usuchitheke kubi, kawusayikuba khona kuze kube nininini." 
Ezekiel28:20 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel28:21 Ndodana yomuntu, khangela ngakuyo iSidoni, uprofethe ngayo," 
Ezekiel28:22 uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngimelene lawe, wena Sidoni, ngizabonakalisa udumo lwami phakathi kwakho. Bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi lapho sengenze izigwebo phakathi kwayo, ngibonakalise ubungcwele bami kiyo." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ngoba ngizathumela umatshayabhuqe wesifo kiyo, kuchitheke legazi endleleni zayo; abantu bazakufela phakathi kwayo, besiwa ngenkemba eyihanqileyo inhlangothi zonke. Khona bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel28:24 KoIsrayeli kakusayikuba khona ukhula oluhlabayo lameva alimazayo phakathi kwabo bonke omakhelwane babo ababenze inhlekisa. Khona bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyiNkosi uJehova. 
Ezekiel28:25 INkosi uJehova ithi: Nxa sengibutha uIsrayeli ebantwini abachithachithwe kibo, ngizabonakalisa ubungcwele bami kibo phambi kwezizwe; bazahlala elizweni lazo engalinika inceku yami uJakobe." 
Ezekiel28:26 Bazahlala kilo belondolozekile, bakhe imizi, bahlanyele izivini. Bazahlala belondolozeka nxa sengisenza izigwebo phezu kwabo bonke omakhelwane babo ababenze inhlekisa. Khona bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyiNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel29:1 Ngomnyaka wetshumi, ngosuku lwetshumi lambili lwenyanga yetshumi, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi:" 
Ezekiel29:2 Ndodana yomuntu, khangela ngakuFaro inkosi yeGibhithe, uprofethe ngaye langeGibhithe lonke," 
Ezekiel29:3 ukhulume uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngimelene lawe, wena Faro nkosi yeGibhithe, wena mgobho omkhulu olele phakathi kwemifula yayo, othi: Umfula iNile ungowami, ngawenza." 
Ezekiel29:4 Ngizafaka ingwegwe emihlathini yakho, nginamathelise inhlanzi zemifula yakho emaxolweni akho, ngikukhuphe emifuleni yakho, lazo zonke inhlanzi zemifula yakho ezinamathele emaxolweni akho." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ngikuphosele enkangala, wena lazo zonke inhlanzi zemifula yakho, liwele endle lingabuthwa lingcwatshwe. Ngizakunikela ube yikudla kwezilo zomhlaba lenyoni zamazulu." 
Ezekiel29:6 Bonke abakhileyo eGibhithe bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi. Ngoba wawuludondolo olunjengomhlanga nje koIsrayeli," 
Ezekiel29:7 lapho bekubamba ngesandla, wephuka, wabakhumula iziphanga, lalapho beseyama kuwe, waqamuka, wabawisela phansi." 
Ezekiel29:8 Ngakho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngizakulethela inkemba, ngiqede phakathi kwakho abantu lezinyamazana;" 
Ezekiel29:9 lelizwe leGibhithe lichitheke libe yinkangala. Khona bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi. Lokhu uthe: Umfula iNile ungowami, ngiwenzile;" 
Ezekiel29:10 ngalokho khangela, ngimelene lawe lomfula wakho; ngizalichitha ilizwe leGibhithe libe yinkangala isibili, kusukela eMigidoli ngenyakatho kuze kube seSiyene ngeningizimu, kuze kube lemingceleni yeEtiyopiya." 
Ezekiel29:11 Kakusayikudlula muntu kilo, kakusayikudlula lanyamazana; kaliyikuhlalwa muntu iminyaka engamatshumi amane." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ngizalichitha ilizwe leGibhithe okwedlula amazwe wonke achithekileyo; imizi yalo izachitheka okweminyaka engamatshumi amane phakathi kwemizi echithekileyo. Ngizawachithachitha amaGibhithe phakathi kwezizwe, ngiwahlakazele phakathi kwamazwe."
