Ezekiel29:13 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ekupheleni kweminyaka engamatshumi amane ngizabutha amaGibhithe ebantwini engiwachithachithe phakathi kwabo. 
Ezekiel29:14 Ngizababuyisela abantu beGibhithe elizweni lePatrosi, ilizwe abadabuka kilo; lapho bazakuba ngumbuso ophansi." 
Ezekiel29:15 Bazakuba ngumbuso ophansi kulayo yonke, bangaphindi baphakanyiswe phezu kwezinye izizwe; ngizabenza babe bancinyane kakhulu ukuze bangabusi ezinye izizwe futhi." 
Ezekiel29:16 Indlu kaIsrayeli ingeke ilithembe iGibhithe futhi; lokhu kuzabakhumbuza izono zabo zokuya eGibhithe ukudla usizo. Bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyiNkosi uJehova. 
Ezekiel29:17 Ngomnyaka wamatshumi amabili lesikhombisa, esukwini lokuqala lwenyanga yokuqala, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi:" 
Ezekiel29:18 Ndodana yomuntu, uNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni walwisa ibutho lakhe leTire okwesikhathi eside, kwaze kwaphucuka amakhanda wonke. Kwafutha amahlombe wonke; kodwa yena lebutho lakhe kabazuzanga lutho eTire ngomsebenzi wabo isikhathi eside." 
Ezekiel29:19 Ngalokho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngizanikela ilizwe leGibhithe kuNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni; uzathumba yonke inotho yalo, aliphundle aliphange, aliholise ibutho lakhe." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ngimnikile ilizwe leGibhithe libe ngumvuzo womsebenzi wakhe, ngoba ungisebenzele, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel29:21 Ngalolosuku ngizakhupha amahlumela amatsha koIsrayeli, ngikunike wena Hezekeli, amandla okukhuluma phakathi kwabo. Bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel30:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel30:2 Ndodana yomuntu, profetha uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Maye ngalolosuku!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Usuku selusondele, usuku lwe Nkosi selusondele, luzakuba lusuku olulamayezi, isikhathi sokuchitheka kwezizwe." 
Ezekiel30:4 Inkemba izakwehlela eGibhithe, losizi lube khona eEtiyopiya, lapho abanengi bebulawa eGibhithe, lenotho yalo ithunjwa, lezisekelo zalo zidilizelwa phansi." 
Ezekiel30:5 IEtiyopiya lePuti leLudi leArabhiya lonke leLibiya labantu belizwe abahlangene labo bazabulawa kanye labo. 
Ezekiel30:6 I Nkosi ithi: Labo abasekela iGibhithe bazakufa, lamandla ayo aziphakamisileyo ehliselwe phansi; kusukela eMigidoli ngenyakatho kuze kube seSiyene ngeningizimu bazakuwa ngenkemba, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ilizwe lizachitheka okwedlula amazwe wonke achithekileyo, lemizi yalo ibe phakathi kwemizi echithekileyo." 
Ezekiel30:8 Khona bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi, lapho sengithungele iGibhithe ngomlilo labo bonke abasizi bayo sebechithiwe." 
Ezekiel30:9 Ngalolosuku izithunywa ezilesiqubu zizasuka kimi ukwesabisa amaEtiyopiya angethuswanga lutho, ehlelwe lusizi ngalolosuku lokuchitheka kwamaGibhithe, ngoba khangela, usuku luyeza." 
Ezekiel30:10 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngizaqeda inotho yeGibhithe ngesandla sikaNebukadinezari inkosi yeBhabhiloni. 
Ezekiel30:11 Yena labantu bakhe, abesabeka okwedlula izizwe zonke, bazakuza ukulichitha ilizwe; bazayihlasela iGibhithe ngenkemba zabo, bagcwalise ilizwe ngezidumbu." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ngizakwenza umfula iNile utshe, ngithengise ilizwe ebantwini ababi, ngilichithe ilizwe lakho konke okukilo ngezandla zabezizwe; mina Nkosi ngikhulumile." 
Ezekiel30:13 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngizachitha izithombe, ngiqede onkulunkulu bamanga eMemfisi; kungabe kusaba khona isiphathamandla elizweni leGibhithe, ngilethe ukwesaba elizweni leGibhithe." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ngizachitha iPatrosi, ngithungele iZowani ngomlilo, ngizenze izigwebo phakathi kweNo." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ngizakwehlisela ulaka lwami phezu kweSini, eyinqaba yeGibhithe, ngiqede ixuku leNo." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ngizathungela iGibhithe ngomlilo, leSini ibe lobuhlungu obukhulu. Imiduli yeNo izafohlelwa, lezimpophoma zamanzi zitheleke phakathi kwayo." 
Ezekiel30:17 Amajaha eOni lawePibesethi azakuwa ngenkemba, labesifazana bathunjwe." 
Ezekiel30:18 ETahafanesi ukukhanya kuzakuba mnyama, lapho engiqeda khona ukubusa kweGibhithe, lamandla aziphakamisileyo azaphela, lamayezi afike phezu kwayo, kuthunjwe lamadodakazi ayo." 
Ezekiel30:19 Ngokunjalo ngizakwenza izigwebo eGibhithe. Khona-ke bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi. 
Ezekiel30:20 Ngomnyaka wetshumi lanye, ngosuku lwesikhombisa enyangeni yokuqala, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi:" 
Ezekiel30:21 Ndodana yomuntu, ngiyephule ingalo kaFaro inkosi yeGibhithe, khangela, kayibotshwanga, ukuthi ipholiswe yikufakwa uhlaka, ukuze iqinele ukuphatha inkemba." 
Ezekiel30:22 Ngakho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngimelene loFaro inkosi yeGibhithe, ngizakwephula ingalo zakhe, ingalo eqinileyo lengalo eyephukileyo, ngenze inkemba iphunyuke esandleni sakhe." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ngizachithachitha amaGibhithe phakathi kwezizwe, ngiwahlakazele emazweni wonke." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ngizaqinisa ingalo zenkosi yeBhabhiloni, ngibeke inkemba yami esandleni sayo; kodwa ngizakwephula ingalo zikaFaro, abubule phambi kwayo njengomuntu olimele kubi." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ngizaqinisa ingalo zenkosi yeBhabhiloni, kodwa ingalo zikaFaro zizakuwa; bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi. Nxa sengifakile inkemba yami esandleni senkosi yeBhabhiloni, izayiphakamisela elizweni leGibhithe;" 
Ezekiel30:26 ngizachithachitha amaGibhithe phakathi kwezizwe, ngiwahlakazele emazweni wonke. Khona bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel31:1 Ngomnyaka wetshumi lanye, ngosuku lokuqala enyangeni yesithathu, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi:" 
Ezekiel31:2 Ndodana yomuntu, tshono kuFaro inkosi yeGibhithe lakubo bonke abantu bakhe uthi: Ufanana lobani ebukhulwini bakho?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Khangela, ngizafananisa iAsiriya lomsedari oseLebhanoni, olengatsha ezinhle ezinika umthunzi eguswini, omude kakhulu, olezihloko ezifinyelela emayezini." 
Ezekiel31:4 Amanzi awuthelela, lamanzi angaphansi awukhulisa, imifula yawo yageleza yazingelezela indawo ohlanyelwe kiyo, yakhuphela imisele yayo kuzo zonke izihlahla zeganga." 
Ezekiel31:5 Waphakama-ke, wazedlula zonke izihlahla zegusu, ingatsha zawo zaba zinkulu zabande, ngenxa yobunengi bamanzi empandeni zawo." 
Ezekiel31:6 Zonke inyoni zamazulu zakhela izidleke zazo engatsheni zawo, lenyamazana zonke zeganga zazalela ngaphansi kwengatsha zawo, langaphansi komthunzi kwahlala izizwe zonke ezinkulu." 
Ezekiel31:7 Wawumuhle ngobukhulu bawo, langobude bengatsha zawo, ngoba impande zawo zatshona zafika emanzini amanengi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Imisedari yensimini kaNkulunkulu yayingeke ilinganiswe lawo, lamafiri ayingalingani lengatsha zawo; lomangwe wawungeke ulinganiswe lengatsha zawo, kwakungekho isihlahla ensimini kaNkulunkulu esihle njengawo." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ngawenza wamuhle ngobunengi bengatsha zawo, lazo zonke izihlahla zeEdeni zawuhawukela, izihlahla ezazisensimini kaNkulunkulu." 
Ezekiel31:10 Ngakho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ngenxa yokuthi waba mude, izihloko zawo zathinta amayezi, inhliziyo yawo yaziphakamisa ngobude bawo," 
Ezekiel31:11 ngizawunikela esandleni sesikhulu sezizweni; sizawuphatha ngokufanele ububi bawo. Sengiwulahlile. 
Ezekiel31:12 Abezizweni abalesihluku kulazo zonke izizwe bazawuquma bawulahle; ingatsha zawo zizawela ezintabeni lezihotsheni; zizakwephukela ezifuleni zelizwe, labantu bonke bomhlaba basuke emthunzini wawo, bawutshiye." 
Ezekiel31:13 Nxa usuwile, zonke inyoni zamazulu zizahlala phezu kwawo, lenyamazana zonke zeganga zihlale phezu kwengatsha zawo." 
Ezekiel31:14 Lokhu kwenzelwa ukuze kungabi lasihlahla emanzini esikhula sibe side kakhulu, lezihloko zaso zithinte amayezi, kungabi lasihlahla esinatha amanzi esifinyelela emayezini; ngoba zonke zimiselwe ukufa, ziye elizweni elingaphansi komhlaba, njengabantu abafileyo abehlela phansi egodini." 
Ezekiel31:15 INkosi uJehova ithi: Lapho umkusu usuwehlele endaweni yabafileyo, ngizakwenza okungaphansi komhlaba kuwulilele, ngimise imifula yawo, ngivimbele amanzi amanengi. Ngizasibekela iLebhanoni ngomnyama ngenxa yawo, lezihlahla zonke zizadana ngenxa yawo." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ngizakwenza zonke izizwe zithuthumele ngomdumo wokuwa kwawo, lapho ngiwuphosela esihogweni kanye lalabo abehlela egodini. Zonke izihlahla zeEdeni, ezikhethiweyo lezinhle zeLebhanoni, zonke ezinatha amanzi, zizaduduzwa elizweni elingaphansi komhlaba." 
Ezekiel31:17 Lazo zizakuya esihogweni kanye lawo, kubo ababulewe ngenkemba. Yebo, labo abahlala ngaphansi komthunzi wawo phakathi kwezizwe bazabhubha." 
Ezekiel31:18 Pho-ke, wena ufanana lobani ngodumo langobukhulu ezihlahleni zeEdeni? Uzakwehliselwa elizweni elingaphansi komhlaba lezihlahla zeEdeni, ulale phakathi kwabangasokanga, kanye labo ababulewe ngenkemba. Lo nguFaro lexuku lakhe lonke, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel32:1 Ngomnyaka wetshumi lambili, ngosuku lokuqala enyangeni yetshumi lambili, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi:" 
Ezekiel32:2 Ndodana yomuntu, khala isililo ngoFaro inkosi yeGibhithe, uthi kuye: Wena uzifananise lebhongo lesilwane phakathi kwezizwe, kodwa wena ufanana lomgobho emanzini omfula iNile; uvuthela amanzi ngamakhala akho, uvube amanzi ngenyawo zakho, ungcolise imifula." 
Ezekiel32:3 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngizaphosela imbule lami phezu kwakho embuthanweni kwezizwe ezinengi, ngikukhuphe ngembule lami," 
Ezekiel32:4 ngikuphosele emhlabathini, ngikuphose endle, ngihlalise phezu kwakho zonke inyoni zamazulu, zonke izilo zeganga zizitike ngawe." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ngizalahla inyama yakho ezintabeni, ngigcwalise izihotsha ngempethu zesidumbu sakho." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ilizwe lizagcwala igazi lakho eligelezayo, lize lifike ezintabeni, lezifudlana zonke zigcwale lona." 
Ezekiel32:7 Lapho sengikuchitha, ngizasibekela amazulu, ngenze inkanyezi zalo zibe mnyama, ngisibekele ilanga ngeyezi, lenyanga ingabe isakhanya." 
Ezekiel32:8 Konke ukukhanya kwamazulu ngikwenze kube mnyama kuwe, ngehlisele umnyama elizweni lakho, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel32:9 Ngizakhathaza inhliziyo zabantu abanengi nxa ngikuthumba phakathi kwezizwe, ngikusa emazweni ongawaziyo." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ngizakwenza abantu abanengi bamangale ngawe, lamakhosi abo athuthumele ngenxa yakho nxa ngigweba inkemba yami phambi kwabo; bazathuthumela isikhathi sonke, bonke babe lovalo ngokuphila kwabo mhla wosuku lokuwa kwakho." 
Ezekiel32:11 Ngoba iNkosi uJehova ithi: Inkemba yenkosi yeBhabhiloni izakwehlela. 
Ezekiel32:12 Ngizabulala ixuku lakho ngezinkemba zamaqhawe asabeka kuzo zonke izizwe. Azaqeda ukuziphakamisa kweGibhithe, kubhubhe lexuku lonke lalo." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ngizabulala inyamazana zonke emanzini amanengi, kungabi khona lonyawo lomuntu oluwadungayo futhi, kungabi khona lesondo lenyamazana eliwavubayo." 
Ezekiel32:14 Besengisenza amanzi abo azike, lemifula yabo igeleze njengamafutha, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel32:15 Lapho ngichitha ilizwe leGibhithe, lalapho ilizwe liphundlwa konke okukilo, lalapho ngitshaya bonke abahlala kilo, bazakwazi-ke ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel32:16 Lokhu kuyisililo esizahlatshelwa; abesifazana bezizwe bazasihlabela; bazasihlabela ngeGibhithe langexuku lonke lalo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel32:17 Ngomnyaka wetshumi lambili, ngosuku lwetshumi lanhlanu lwenyanga yokuqala, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi:" 
Ezekiel32:18 Ndodana yomuntu, khalela abantu bonke beGibhithe, ubehlisele elizweni elingaphansi komhlaba kulabo abehlela egodini, bona labesifazana bezizwe ezilodumo." 
Ezekiel32:19 Uthi kibo: Ledlula bani ngobuhle? Yehlani, lilaliswe labangasokanga." 
Ezekiel32:20 Labo abahamba labo, kanye labo bonke abantu babo, bazakufa kanye lalabo ababulawa ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel32:21 Iziphathamandla ezilamandla zizakhuluma ngabo labasizi babo, zisendaweni zabafileyo zithi: Sebehlile, balele abangasokanga bebulewe ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel32:22 LeAsiriya ikhona lapho kanye lexuku layo lonke, lamangcwaba ayo elihanqile inhlangothi zonke, bonke babulewe bawile ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel32:23 Amangcwaba abo enziwe ekutshoneni kwegodi, lexuku layo lihanqe ingcwaba layo, bonke bebulewe bawa ngenkemba, bona ababesesatshwa elizweni labaphilayo." 
Ezekiel32:24 Likhona lapho iElamu lexuku layo lonke lihanqe ingcwaba layo, bonke bebulewe bawa ngenkemba, behlela elizweni elingaphansi komhlaba bengasokanga, bona ababesesatshwa elizweni labaphilayo, bathwele ihlazo labo kanye labo abehlela egodini." 
Ezekiel32:25 Balenzela indawo yokulala phakathi kwabafileyo kanye lexuku layo lonke, amangcwaba abo elihanqile, bonke bengasokanga, bebulewe ngenkemba. Ukwesabeka kwabo kwakugcwele elizweni labaphilayo, bathwala ihlazo labo kanye labo abehlela egodini, babekwa phakathi kwabafileyo." 
Ezekiel32:26 IMesheki leTubali zikhona lapho kanye lamaxuku azo wonke, lamangcwaba awo ezihanqile, bonke bengasokanga, bebulewe ngenkemba, ngoba babesesatshwa elizweni labaphilayo." 
Ezekiel32:27 Kabayikulala lamaqhawe afa kudala ehlela esihogweni lezikhali zawo, aqanyeliswa inkemba zawo, lamathambo awo endlalelwa ngezihlangu zawo; ukwesabeka kwamaqhawe kwakuselizweni labaphilayo." 
Ezekiel32:28 Lawe Faro uzabulawa, ulaliswe phakathi kwabangasokanga, labo ababuleweyo ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel32:29 LeEdoma ikhona lapho, kanye lamakhosi leziphathamandla zayo, loba babelamandla balaliswe kanye lalabo ababuleweyo ngenkemba, belele labangasokanga labehlela phansi egodini." 
Ezekiel32:30 Iziphathamandla zenyakatho zikhona lapho, zonke ngoluthi lwazo, labo bonke abeSidoni, abehlele phansi kanye labafileyo belenhloni ngenxa yokwesabeka konke abakwenza ngamandla abo; balele bangasokanga kanye labo ababuleweyo ngenkemba, bethwele ihlazo labo lalabo abehlela egodini." 
Ezekiel32:31 Lapho uFaro ebabona, uzaziduduza ngenxa yamaxuku akhe wonke, uFaro lebutho lakhe lonke, bebulewe ngenkemba, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel32:32 Ngoba yena owagcwalisa ukwesabeka kwakhe elizweni labaphilayo uzabekwa phakathi kwabangasokanga kanye lalabo ababuleweyo ngenkemba, uFaro lexuku lakhe lonke, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel33:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel33:2 Ndodana yomuntu, tshono kibo abantu bakini uthi: Uba ngiletha inkemba elizweni, labantu belizwe bathathe omunye phakathi kwabo, bambeke abe ngumlindi wabo," 
Ezekiel33:3 nxa ebona inkemba isiza elizweni, avuthele uphondo, axwayise abantu," 
Ezekiel33:4 uba omunye esizwa ukukhala kophondo angananzi, inkemba ifike imsuse, kuzakuba ngumlandu wakhe." 
Ezekiel33:5 Uzwile ukukhala kophondo, kazananza, ngoba umlandu uzakuba ngowakhe. Kodwa uba ebexwayisekile, ubezaphepha." 
Ezekiel33:6 Kodwa nxa umlindi ebona inkemba isiza, angaluvutheli uphondo, abantu bengaxwayiswa, inkemba ifike isuse omunye wabo, lowomuntu afele esonweni sakhe, umlandu uzakuba ngowomlindi." 
Ezekiel33:7 Wena-ke, ndodana yomuntu, ngikubeke ube ngumlindi koIsrayeli; nxa usizwa ilizwi elivela kimi, ubaxwayise." 
Ezekiel33:8 Uba ngisithi komubi: Wena muntu omubi, uzakufa isibili; uba ungakhulumi wena ukumxwayisa omubi ukuze atshiye indlela yakhe, lowomuntu omubi uzafela esonweni sakhe, kodwa umlandu uzakuba ngowakho." 
Ezekiel33:9 Kodwa uba umxwayisa omubi ukuze aphenduke endleleni yakhe, angatshiyi indlela yakhe, uzafela esonweni sakhe, kodwa wena uzaphepha." 
Ezekiel33:10 Wena-ke, ndodana yomuntu, tshono kuIsrayeli uthi: Lina lithi: Iziphambeko zethu lezono zethu zisehlele, siyaphela ngenxa yazo; sizaphila njani?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Tshono kibo uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngiyazifunga mina, kangithokozi ngokufa komubi, kodwa ngokuthi omubi atshiye indlela yakhe aphile; tshiyani-ke, tshiyani indlela zenu ezimbi, ngoba lizafelani, lina ndlu kaIsrayeli?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Wena-ke, ndodana yomuntu, tshono ebantwini bakini uthi: Ukulunga kolungileyo kakuyikumkhulula uba esona; lobubi bomubi kabuyikumbulala uba etshiya ububi bakhe; lolungileyo kayikuphila ngokulunga kwakhe uba esona." 
Ezekiel33:13 Lapho ngisitsho kolungileyo ukuthi uzaphila isibili, kanti uba ethemba ukulunga kwakhe, enze isono, kakuyikukhunjulwa lesisodwa isenzo sakhe esilungileyo, kodwa uzafela esonweni asenzileyo." 
Ezekiel33:14 Futhi uba ngisitsho komubi ukuthi uzakufa isibili, kanti uba ephenduka ezonweni zakhe, enze okufaneleyo lokulungileyo," 
Ezekiel33:15 uba ebuyisela isibambiso, abuyisele lokho akuphangileyo, ahambe ngezimiso zempilo, angenzi okubi, uzaphila isibili, angafi." 
Ezekiel33:16 Kakusayikukhunjulwa lesisodwa sezono azenzileyo; ngoba wenzile okufaneleyo lokulungileyo, uzaphila isibili." 
Ezekiel33:17 Kodwa abantu bakini bathi: Indlela yeNkosi kayilunganga, kanti ngezabo indlela ezingalunganga." 
Ezekiel33:18 Nxa olungileyo etshiya ukulunga kwakhe, enze okubi, uzakufa ngenxa yakho." 
Ezekiel33:19 Nxa omubi etshiya ububi bakhe, enze okufaneleyo lokulungileyo, uzaphila ngenxa yakho." 
Ezekiel33:20 Kanti lina lithi: Indlela yeNkosi kayilunganga. Lina ndlu kaIsrayeli, ngizalahlulela lonke ngokufanele izindlela zenu." 
Ezekiel33:21 Ngomnyaka wetshumi lambili wokuthunjwa kwethu, ngosuku lwesihlanu lwenyanga yetshumi, umuntu owayephunyukile eJerusalema wafika kimi wathi: Umuzi usutshayiwe." 
Ezekiel33:22 Isandla se Nkosi sasiphezu kwami kusihlwa kungakafiki ophunyukileyo; yavula umlomo wami ngesikhathi lowomuntu engakafiki kimi ekuseni. Umlomo wami wavuleka, angabe ngisaba yisimungulu." 
Ezekiel33:23 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel33:24 Ndodana yomuntu, abakhileyo endaweni ezichithekileyo elizweni lakoIsrayeli, balokhu besithi: UAbrahama wayemunye lapho enikwa ilizwe, kodwa thina sibanengi; ilizwe silinikiwe isibili ukuhlala kilo." 
Ezekiel33:25 Ngalokho-ke tshono kibo uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Lidla inyama elegazi, liphakamisele amehlo enu ezithombeni zenu, lichithe igazi; lizahlala kilo ilizwe yini?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Lithemba inkemba, lenze amanyala, lowo lalowo angcolise umfazi womakhelwane wakhe; kambe lizahlala kilo ilizwe yini?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Tshono lokhu kibo uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngiyazifunga mina, isibili labo abasendaweni ezichithekileyo bazabulawa; labo abasendle ngizabanikela ezilweni zibabulale, lalabo abasezinqabeni labasembalwini bazabulawa ngomatshayabhuqe wesifo." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ngizalichitha ilizwe libe yinkangala, lamandla alo aziphakamisayo azaphela, lentaba zakoIsrayeli zibe yinkangala ukuze kungadluli muntu kuzo." 
Ezekiel33:29 Khona bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi lapho sengilichithile ilizwe laba yinkangala ngenxa yamanyala abo wonke abawenzileyo. 
Ezekiel33:30 Wena-ke, ndodana yomuntu, abantu bakini bakhuluma ngawe emidulini leminyango yezindlu, lowo lalowo uthi kumfowabo: Woza, sizwe ukuthi ilizwi lithini elivela e Nkosi ni." 
Ezekiel33:31 Ngakho abantu bami bayeza kuwe, bahlale phambi kwakho, bezwe okutshoyo, kodwa kabayikukwenza. Ngoba bathanda ngomlomo wabo, kodwa inhliziyo zabo zisenzuzweni yabo." 
Ezekiel33:32 Khangela, kibo unjengomuntu ohlabela ingoma ezinhle, olelizwi elihle, owazi ukutshaya kuhle ichacho, ngoba bayezwa okutshoyo kodwa kabayikukwenza." 
Ezekiel33:33 Nxa lokhu kufika, khangela, kuzafika isibili, khona bazakwazi ukuthi bekukhona umprofethi phakathi kwabo." 
Ezekiel34:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel34:2 Ndodana yomuntu, profetha ngabelusi bakoIsrayeli, uprofethe uthi kibo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Maye kini, belusi bakoIsrayeli elizondlayo lina! Abelusi kabafanele ukwelusa izimvu yini?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Liyadla amahwahwa, lizigqokise ngoboya, lihlabe ezinonileyo, kodwa lingazelusi izimvu." 
Ezekiel34:4 Kaliziqinisanga ezibuthakathaka, kalizelaphanga ezigulayo, lezephukileyo kalizibophanga, kalizibuyisanga eziduhileyo, lezilahlekileyo kalizidinganga, lizibusile ngamandla langolunya." 
Ezekiel34:5 Ngakho zichithekile ngoba bekungelamelusi, zaba yikudla kwazo zonke izilo zeganga." 
Ezekiel34:6 Izimvu zami zachitheka, zazulazula kuzo zonke intaba, lakiwo wonke amaqaqa aphakemeyo; izimvu zami zachitheka endaweni zonke zomhlaba, kungekho loyedwa ozilandelayo azidinge." 
Ezekiel34:7 Ngalokho-ke, lina belusi, zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi." 
Ezekiel34:8 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngiyazifunga mina, ngoba izimvu zami seziyimpango, seziyikudla kwazo zonke izilo zeganga, ngoba kungelamelusi, langoba abelusi bami bengazidinganga izimvu zami, kodwa bezondlile bona, bengazelusanga izimvu zami." 
Ezekiel34:9 Ngakho, lina belusi, zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi." 
Ezekiel34:10 INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngimelene labelusi, ngizafuna izimvu zami kibo, ngibayekelise ukwelusa izimvu zami, bangaphindi ukuzondla bona. Ngizakhupha izimvu zami emilonyeni yabo ukuze zingabi yikudla kwabo." 
Ezekiel34:11 INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, mina uqobo lwami ngizazilandela izimvu zami, ngizidinge." 
Ezekiel34:12 Njengomelusi edinga umhlambi wakhe lapho ezinye izimvu zakhe sezichithekile, ngokunjalo-ke ngizadinga izimvu zami, ngizikhuphe kuzo zonke indawo lapho ezihlakazekele khona ngosuku lwamayezi lomnyama onzima." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ngizazikhupha phakathi kwabantu, ngizibuthe emazweni, ngizibuyisele elizweni lazo, ngizidlise entabeni zakoIsrayeli, lemithonjeni, lakuzo zonke indawo zelizwe okwakhiwe kizo." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ngizazidlisa edlelweni elihle, ledlelo lazo lizakuba sezingqongeni zentaba zakoIsrayeli. Zizalala phansi elizweni eliledlelo elihle, zidle emadlelweni amahle entabeni zakoIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Mina uqobo ngizakuba ngumelusi wezimvu zami, ngizilalise phansi, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel34:16 Ngizadinga ezilahlekileyo, ngibuyise eziduhileyo, ngibophe ezephukileyo, ngiqinise ezibuthakathaka; lezinonileyo leziqinileyo ngizazilondoloza, ngizidlise ngokulunga." 
Ezekiel34:17 Lina-ke, mhlambi wami, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, khangelani, ngizakwahlulela phakathi kwemvu lemvu, laphakathi kwenqama lentondolo." 
Ezekiel34:18 Kakwenelanga yini ukuthi lidle edlelweni elihle, lize linyathele ngenyawo ledlelo lenu eliseleyo, lokuthi linathe amanzi ahlambulukileyo lize lingcolise lamanye ngenyawo zenu?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Izimvu zami zimele zidle lokhu okunyathelwe ngenyawo zenu, zinathe okungcoliswe ngenyawo zenu yini?" 
Ezekiel34:20 Ngakho iNkosi uJehova ithi kuzo: Khangelani, mina uqobo lwami ngizakwahlulela phakathi kwezimvu ezinonileyo lezicakileyo." 
Ezekiel34:21 Ngoba liyasunduza ngemihlubulo langamalunda, lihlabe ezibuthakathaka ngempondo zenu, zize zihlakazekele khatshana," 
Ezekiel34:22 ngizazisa izimvu zami, kazisayikuba yimpango; ngizakwahlulela phakathi kwemvu lemvu." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ngizazimisela umelusi abe munye, inceku yami uDavida, yena uzazelusa. Uzazidlisa abe ngumelusi wazo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Mina Nkosi ngizakuba nguNkulunkulu wazo, lenceku yami uDavida ibe yisiphathamandla phakathi kwazo. Mina Nkosi ngikhulumile." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ngizakwenza lazo isivumelwano sokuthula, ngixotshe izilo zeganga elizweni, ukuze zilondolozeke enkangala, zilale ehlathini." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ngizazenza zibe yisibusiso zona lezindawo ezihanqe uqaqa lwami, ngithumele, izulu ngesikhathi salo, izulu elihle." 
Ezekiel34:27 Izihlahla zeganga zizathela izithelo zazo, lomhlaba uveze inala, zilondolozeke elizweni lazo. Zizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi nxa sengephule ijogwe lazo, ngazikhulula kulabo abazithumbileyo." 
Ezekiel34:28 Kazisayikuba yimpango yezizwe, kazisayikudliwa yizilo zelizwe; zizalondolozeka, zingesatshiswa muntu." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ngizazinika amasimu avundileyo ukuze zingabe zisaqedwa yindlala elizweni, zingabe zisaba lihlazo lezizwe." 
Ezekiel34:30 Zizakwazi ukuthi mina Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wazo, ngilazo, lokuthi bona abantu bangabantu bami, indlu kaIsrayeli, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel34:31 Lina, bantu bami, liyizimvu zami, izimvu engizelusayo, mina nginguNkulunkulu wenu, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel35:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel35:2 Ndodana yomuntu, khangela entabeni yeSeyiri, uprofethe ngayo," 
Ezekiel35:3 uthi kuyo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngimelene lawe, wena ntaba yeSeyiri, ngizakuphakamisela isandla sami, ngikuchithe ube yinkangala." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ngizachitha imizi yakho, uzakuba yinkangala; uzakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel35:5 Ngoba waba lenzondo elaphakade, wanikela abantwana bakoIsrayeli ekubulaweni ngesikhathi sokuhlupheka kwabo, ngesikhathi sokutshaywa kwabo kokucina." 
Ezekiel35:6 Ngalokho, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, ngiyazifunga mina ukuthi ngizakunikela ekuchithekeni kwegazi, ukuchitheka kwegazi kuthomane lawe; ngoba ulecala lokuchitha igazi, ukuchitheka kwegazi kuzathomana lawe." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ngizachitha intaba yeSeyiri ibe yinkangala, ngiqume kusuke kiyo bonke abafikayo labasukayo." 
Ezekiel35:8 Ngizagcwalisa intaba zakho ngababuleweyo; ababuleweyo ngenkemba bazawela emaqaqeni akho lezihotsheni zakho lezindongeni zakho. 
Ezekiel35:9 Ngizakwenza ube yinkangala elaphakade, kungahlali muntu emizini yakho. Khona uzakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel35:10 Ngoba utshilo wathi: Lezizizwe ezimbili, oJuda loIsrayeli, lamazwe azo kuzakuba ngokwami, sizahlala kukho, lapho i Nkosi eyayihlala khona;" 
Ezekiel35:11 ngalokho ngiyazifunga, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, ngizakuphatha ngokufanele ukuzonda kwakho lomona wakho owawenzayo ngenxa yokubazonda kwakho; ngizakwenza ukuthi ungazi nxa ngikugweba." 
Ezekiel35:12 Uzakwazi ukuthi mina Nkosi ngizwile ukuthuka kwakho owakutsho ngezintaba zakoIsrayeli usithi: Zichithekile, zinikiwe thina ukuze sizidle." 
Ezekiel35:13 Lakhuluma kubi ngami, landisa amazwi enu ngami, ngikuzwile." 
Ezekiel35:14 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ukuze umhlaba wonke uthokoze, ngizalichitha." 
Ezekiel35:15 Njengoba lathokoza ngelizwe lami uIsrayeli ngoba lachitheka, ngizakwenza njalo kuwe, uzachitheka, wena ntaba yeSeyiri, leEdoma lonke. Khona bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel36:1 Ndodana yomuntu, profetha ngentaba zakoIsrayeli uthi: Lina zintaba zakoIsrayeli, zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi." 
Ezekiel36:2 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba izitha zatsho kini zathi: Iya! khathesi intaba zasendulo sezingezethu; 
Ezekiel36:3 ngalokho-ke profetha uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngoba abantu abalihanqileyo balichitha, balichoboza laze lanqotshwa langezinye izizwe, laba yingxoxo lokunyeya okubi kwabantu." 
Ezekiel36:4 Ngalokho, lina zintaba zakoIsrayeli, zwanini ilizwi leNkosi uJehova ezintabeni lemaqaqeni, lezindongeni lezihotsheni, lemizini echithekileyo langamanxiwa asephenduke impango lenhlekisa yezizwe ezizingelezeleyo." 
Ezekiel36:5 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngikhuluma ngomona wami otshisayo ngezinye izizwe, ikakhulu ngeEdoma lonke, abazithathela ilizwe lami ngentokozo langokudelela ukuze libe ngelabo, bahlale kilo." 
Ezekiel36:6 Ngalokho profetha ngelizwe lakoIsrayeli, utsho ezintabeni lemaqaqeni, lezindongeni lezihotsheni uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngikhuluma ngomona wami langolaka lwami, ngoba lithwele ihlazo lezizwe." 
Ezekiel36:7 Ngalokho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Ngiyazifunga ukuthi izizwe ezilihanqileyo yizo ezizathwala ihlazo. 
Ezekiel36:8 Kodwa, lina zintaba zakoIsrayeli, lizahluma ingatsha zenu, livezele abantu bami uIsrayeli izithelo, ngoba sebezabuya ekhaya." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ngoba khangelani, mina ngilani, ngizaphendukela ngakini, lizalinywa lihlanyelwe." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ngizakwandisa abantu phezu kwenu, uIsrayeli wonke, wonke ngoluthi lwakhe; imizi izahlala abantu, kwakhiwe lendawo ezichithekileyo;" 
Ezekiel36:11 ngandise phezu kwenu abantu lenyamazana, kuzalane kwande. Ngizakwenza ukuthi kwakhiwe kini njengakudala, ngilenzele okuhle kakhulu kulakuqala. Ngalokho, lina zintaba, lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ngizahambisa abantu phezu kwenu, yebo abantu bami uIsrayeli. Bazahlala kini, libe zintaba zabo, kalisayikubabulala abantwana babo." 
Ezekiel36:13 INkosi uJehova ithi: Abantu bathi liyilizwe elidla abantu, libulala abantwana besizwe sakini." 
Ezekiel36:14 Kodwa kalisayikudla abantu, kalisayikubulalela isizwe sakini abantwana baso, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel36:15 Kangisayikuliyekela lizwe inhlamba yezizwe futhi, kalisayikuthwala ihlazo labantu loba likhubekise isizwe sakini, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel36:16 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel36:17 Ndodana yomuntu, lapho uIsrayeli esahlala elizweni lakhe, walingcolisa ngendlela zakhe langezenzo zakhe, ukuziphatha kwakhe phambi kwami kwakufanana lokungcola kowesifazana owehlukanisiweyo." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ngakho ngasengehlisela phezu kwabo ulaka lwami ngenxa yegazi abalichitha elizweni, langenxa yezithombe abalingcolisa ngazo." 
Ezekiel36:19 Ngabachithachitha phakathi kwezizwe, bahlakazekela emazweni wonke; ngabagweba ngokufanele ukuziphatha kwabo lezenzo zabo." 
Ezekiel36:20 Kodwa nxa befika ezizweni lakuyiphi indawo abafika kiyo, bangcolisa ibizo lami elingcwele, abantu baze bathi ngabo: Laba bangabantu be Nkosi, kodwa bakhutshiwe elizweni layo." 
Ezekiel36:21 Kodwa ngalikhathalela ibizo lami elingcwele abalingcolisayo indlu kaIsrayeli phakathi kwezizwe abaya kizo. 
Ezekiel36:22 Ngalokho tshono kuIsrayeli uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Kangikwenzi lokhu ngenxa yenu, lina Israyeli, kodwa ngikwenza ngenxa yebizo lami elingcwele elilingcolisileyo phakathi kwezizwe elaya kizo." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ngizabonakalisa ubungcwele bebizo lami elikhulu elingcoliswe phakathi kwezizwe, elilingcolisileyo lina phakathi kwazo; lezizwe zizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, nxa sengibonakalisa ubungcwele bebizo lami ngani phambi kwazo." 
Ezekiel36:24 Ngoba ngizalithatha ezizweni, ngilibuthe emazweni wonke, ngililethe elizweni lenu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ngizalifafaza ngamanzi ahlambulukileyo, lihlambuluke kukho konke ukungcola kwenu, ngilihlambulule lakuzo zonke izithombe zenu." 
Ezekiel36:26 Njalo ngizalinika inhliziyo entsha, ngifake lomoya omutsha phakathi kwenu, ngikhuphe inhliziyo yelitshe enyameni yenu, ngilinike inhliziyo yenyama." 
Ezekiel36:27 Njalo ngizafaka uMoya wami phakathi kwenu, ngilenze ukuthi lihambe ngezimiso zami, ligcine izahlulelo zami lizenze." 
Ezekiel36:28 Lizahlala elizweni engalinika oyihlo, libe ngabantu bami, lami ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ngizalikhulula kukho konke okulingcolisayo. Ngizabiza amabele, ngiwenze abe manengi, ngingalehliseli indlala." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ngizakwenza izithelo zezihlahla lezithelo zeganga zibe zinengi, ukuze lingaphindi futhi lithwale ihlazo lendlala phakathi kwezizwe." 
Ezekiel36:31 Khona lizakhumbula izindlela zenu ezimbi, lezenzo zenu ezingalunganga; lizanengeka ngani ngokwenu ngenxa yezono zenu langenxa yamanyala enu." 
Ezekiel36:32 Kangi kw enzi lokhu ngenxa yenu, itsho iNkosi uJehova; kakwaziwe yini. Banini lenhloni, liyangeke ngenxa yendlela zenu, ndlu kaIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel36:33 INkosi uJehova ithi: Mhla ngilihlambulula ebubini benu bonke, ngizakwenza ukuthi imizi ihlale abantu, kwakhiwe indawo ezichithekileyo." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ilizwe ebeselichithekile lizalinywa futhi, endaweni yokuthi libe yinkangala kubo bonke abedlula khona." 
Ezekiel36:35 Bazakuthi: Lelilizwe ebeseliyinkangala selifanana lensimu yeEdeni; lemizi ebisichithekile isiyinkangala isingamanxiwa, isibiyelwe ngemithangala ihlala abantu." 
Ezekiel36:36 Izizwe ezisele zilizingelezele zizakwazi ukuthi mina Nkosi ngizakhile indawo ezingamanxiwa, ngahlanyela kutsha ilizwe ebeseliyinkangala. Mina Nkosi ngikhulumile, ngizakwenza." 
Ezekiel36:37 INkosi uJehova ithi: Lalokhu indlu kaIsrayeli izangicela ukuthi ngiyenzele khona, ukuze ngandise abantu babo ngangomhlambi," 
Ezekiel36:38 ngangomhlambi womhlatshelo, ngangomhlambi eJerusalema ngesikhathi semikhosi emisiweyo. Ngokunjalo imizi echithekileyo izagcwala abantu. Khona bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel37:1 Isandla se Nkosi sasiphezu kwami, sangikhupha ngomoya we Nkosi, sangibeka phansi esihotsheni, sasigcwele amathambo." 
Ezekiel37:2 Yangizulisa phakathi kwawo, khangela, ayemanengi kakhulu esihotsheni, njalo khangela, ayomile kakhulu." 
Ezekiel37:3 Yathi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, kambe amathambo la angaphila yini? Ngaphendula ngathi: Nkosi Jehova, nguwe owaziyo." 
Ezekiel37:4 Yasisithi kimi futhi: Profetha kulamathambo, uthi kiwo: Lina mathambo omileyo, zwanini ilizwi le Nkosi." 
Ezekiel37:5 INkosi uJehova ithi kulamathambo omileyo: Khangelani, ngizangenisa umoya kini, liphile." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ngizabeka imisipha phezu kwenu, ngihlumise inyama phezu kwenu, ngilifake isigogo, ngilifake umoya, liphile. Lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel37:7 Ngasengiprofetha njengokulaywa kwami. Kwathi ngisaprofetha, khangela, kwaba khona umsindo lokukhehlezela. Amathambo abuthana ndawonye, ithambo laba sethanjeni lalo." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ngabona, khangela-ke, imisipha kiwo, lenyama yahluma phezu kwawo, lesigogo sawembesa. Kodwa kwakungelamoya kiwo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Yasisithi kimi: Profetha emoyeni, profetha ndodana yomuntu, uthi emoyeni: INkosi uJehova ithi: Woza moya, uvele endaweni zonke, uphefumulele kulaba ababuleweyo ukuze baphile." 
Ezekiel37:10 Ngasengiprofetha njengokungilaya kwayo; umoya wangena kiwo, aphila, ema ngenyawo zawo, aba lixuku elikhulu kakhulu." 
Ezekiel37:11 Yasisithi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, amathambo la anguIsrayeli wonke. Khangela, bathi: Amathambo ethu omile, lethemba lethu lilahlekile, sesiphelile." 
Ezekiel37:12 Ngakho-ke profetha uthi kibo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngizavula amangcwaba enu, ngilivuse emalibeni enu, lina bantu bami, ngilibuyise elizweni lakoIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi nxa ngivula amangcwaba enu, ngilivusa emalibeni enu, bantu bami." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ngizafaka umoya wami kini, liphile, ngizalibeka kwelenu ilizwe; khona lizakwazi ukuthi mina Nkosi ngikhulumile, lokuthi ngikwenzile, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Ezekiel37:15 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel37:16 Ndodana yomuntu, thatha intonga, ubhale kiyo uthi: NgekaJuda loIsrayeli ahlangene laye. Uthathe enye intonga, ubhale kiyo uthi: NgekaJosefa, intonga kaEfrayimi, loIsrayeli wonke ahlangene laye." 
Ezekiel37:17 Uzixhume zibe yintonganye esandleni sakho. 
Ezekiel37:18 Lapho abantu bakini besithi kuwe: Ungasitshela yini ukuthi zitshoni lezi? 
Ezekiel37:19 uthi kibo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, sengizathatha intonga kaJosefa, esesandleni sikaEfrayimi, lezizwe zonke zakoIsrayeli ezihlangene laye, ngiyixhume entongeni kaJuda, zibe yintonganye esandleni sami." 
Ezekiel37:20 Ziphathe intonga obhala kizo ukuze abantu bazibone," 
Ezekiel37:21 uthi kibo: INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngizathatha abantwana bakoIsrayeli ezizweni abaya kizo, ngibabuyise bevela endaweni zonke, ngibalethe elizweni labo;" 
Ezekiel37:22 ngizabenza babe yisizwe sinye elizweni phezu kwezintaba zakoIsrayeli, babuswe yinkosinye, bangabe besaba yizizwe ezimbili lemibuso emibili eyehlukeneyo." 
Ezekiel37:23 Kabasayikuzingcolisa futhi ngezithombe zabo langezinto zabo ezenyanyekayo, langeziphambeko zabo. Kodwa ngizabakhupha kukho konke ukuhlamuka abona ngakho, ngibahlambulule babe ngabantu bami, mina ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo." 
Ezekiel37:24 Inceku yami uDavida uzakuba yiNkosi yabo, babe lomelusi munye. Bazalandela imithetho yami, bananzelele ukugcina izimiso zami." 
Ezekiel37:25 Bazahlala elizweni elalihlala oyihlo engalinika inceku yami uJakobe; bona kanye labantwana babo labantwana babantwana babo bahlale khona kokuphela. UDavida inceku yami uzakuba yisiphathamandla sabo kokuphela. 
Ezekiel37:26 Ngizakwenza labo isivumelwano sokuthula, sibe yisivumelwano esilaphakade. Ngizababusisa ngibandise, ngakhe indlu yami engcwele phakathi kwabo kokuphela." 
Ezekiel37:27 Indawo yami yokuhlala izakuba kibo, ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo, babe ngabantu bami." 
Ezekiel37:28 Khona izizwe zizakwazi ukuthi mina Nkosi ngenza uIsrayeli abe ngcwele nxa indlu yami engcwele isiphakathi kwabo kokuphela. 
Ezekiel38:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Ezekiel38:2 Ndodana yomuntu, khangela kuGogi, isiphathamandla seRoshi leMesheki leTubali, elizweni leMagogi, uprofethe ngaye," 
Ezekiel38:3 uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngimelene lawe, Gogi, sikhulu seRoshi leMesheki leTubali." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ngizakuphendula, ngifake ingwegwe emihlathini yakho, ngikukhuphe wena lebutho lakho lonke, amabhiza labagadi bamabhiza, bonke begqoke izigqoko zensimbi. bephelele, belixuku elikhulu, bonke bephethe ihawu lesihlangu esikhulu, begweba ngezinkemba." 
Ezekiel38:5 AbePerisiya labeKushi labePuti balabo, belezihlangu lezingowane bonke," 
Ezekiel38:6 iGomeri lamaxuku alo wonke, iBeti-Togarima lamaxuku alo elivela endaweni ezikhatshana zenyakatho, abantu abanengi abakanye lawe." 
Ezekiel38:7 Lunga, uhlale ulungile, wena kanye lawo wonke amaxuku abuthene kuwe, ube ngumkhokheli wawo." 
Ezekiel38:8 Emva kwensuku ezinengi uzahanjelwa; eminyakeni ezayo uzahlasela ilizwe elathathwa enkembeni, elilabantu ababuthwa ezizweni ezinengi, babekwa entabeni zakoIsrayeli ebeziyinkangala isikhathi eside. Bona abakhutshwa ezizweni bazahlala khona bangethuki, bonke ngoluthi lwabo." 
Ezekiel38:9 Uzaqhubeka, uze njengesiphepho, ube njengeyezi elisibekele umhlaba, wena lawo wonke amaxuku akho, abantu abanengi belawe." 
Ezekiel38:10 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngalolosuku kuzafika imicabango engqondweni yakho, wenze amacebo amabi," 
Ezekiel38:11 uthi: Ngizahlasela ilizwe elilemizi engabiyelwanga, ngibulale abantu abahlala ngokuthula bengethuki lutho, bonke behlala emizini engelamiduli, lengelamasango lemigoqo," 
Ezekiel38:12 ngithathe impango ngiyithumbe, ngihlasele indawo ebezichithekile esezilabantu, ngihlasele abantu ababuthwe ezizweni abazuze izifuyo lempahla, abahlala enkabeni yomhlaba." 
Ezekiel38:13 IShebha leDedani, labathengisi beTarshishi lawo wonke amabhongo ezilwane layo bazakuthi kuwe: Uzile yini ukuthatha impango yini? Ubuthanisile ixuku lakho ukuthumba impango, uthathe isiliva legolide, uthathe izifuyo lempahla, uthumbe impango enengi yini?" 
Ezekiel38:14 Ngalokho-ke, ndodana yomuntu, profetha kuGogi uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngalolosuku nxa isizwe sami uIsrayeli sesihlala singethuki, uzavuka," 
Ezekiel38:15 uphume endaweni yakini, endaweni ezikhatshana zenyakatho, wena labantu abanengi kanye lawe, bonke begade amabhiza, belixuku elikhulu lebutho elilamandla." 
Ezekiel38:16 Uzahlasela abantu bami uIsrayeli njengeyezi lisibekela umhlaba. Ensukwini zokucina ngizakuqhubeza lelizwe lami ukuze izizwe zingazi, nxa ngibonakalisa ngawe ubungcwele bami phambi kwazo, wena Gogi." 
Ezekiel38:17 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ekukhulumeni kwami ngenceku zami abaprofethi ensukwini zasendulo, abaprofetha futhifuthi ngalezonsuku, kwakungawe engasonga ukumletha ukuhlasela koIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel38:18 Kodwa ngalolosuku azafika ngalo uGogi elizweni lakoIsrayeli, ulaka lwami luzavutha, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ngoba ngomona wami langolaka lwami oluvuthayo ngithi: Ngalolosuku kuzakuba khona ukunyikinyeka okukhulu elizweni lakoIsrayeli. 
Ezekiel38:20 Inhlanzi zolwandle, lenyoni zamazulu, lenyamazana zeganga, lazo zonke izinto ezihahabayo phansi, labo bonke abantu abakhona emhlabeni, kuzathuthumela phambi kwami; intaba zizadilizelwa phansi, kudilike amawa, lemiduli yonke iwele phansi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ngizambizela konke okwesabekayo uGogi, kutsho iNkosi uJehova. Abantu bakhe bonke bazabulalana." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ngizamjezisa ngomatshayabhuqe wesifo langokuchitheka kwegazi, ngehlisele phezu kwakhe lamaxuku akhe labo bonke abantu abalaye izulu lesiqhotho lomlilo lesolufa*." 
Ezekiel38:23 Ngalokho ngizaveza ubukhulu bami lobungcwele bami, ngizibonakalise ezizweni ezinengi; khona-ke bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi." 
Ezekiel39:1 Wena-ke, ndodana yomuntu, profetha ngoGogi uthi: INkosi uJehova ithi: Khangela, ngimelene lawe, Gogi, sikhulu esikhulu seRoshi leMesheki leTubali." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ngizakuphendula, ngikuqhube, ngikukhuphe endaweni ezikhatshana zenyakatho, ngikuse entabeni zakoIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel39:3 Besengitshayela phansi idandili elisesandleni sakho sokhohlo, ngiwisele phansi imitshoko esandleni sakho sokunene." 
Ezekiel39:4 Uzawela phezu kwezintaba zakoIsrayeli, wena lamaxuku akho wonke labantu abalawe. Ngizakunikela emanqeni lezilweni zeganga ukuze kukudle." 
Ezekiel39:5 Uzawela endle, ngoba ngikhulumile, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ngizathumela umlilo kuMagogi lakulabo abahlala ngokulondolozeka ezihlengeni. Bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi. 
Ezekiel39:7 Ngizakwenza ukuthi ibizo lami laziwe phakathi kwabantu bami uIsrayeli, kangisayikuyekela ibizo lami elingcwele lingcoliswe futhi; lezizwe zizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi, oNgcwele kaIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel39:8 Khangelani, kuyeza kuzakwenzeka, kutsho iNkosi uJehova; yilo lolosuku engakhuluma ngalo." 
Ezekiel39:9 Kuzakuthi labo abahlala emizini yakoIsrayeli baphume, babuthe izikhali, babase umlilo ngazo, izihlangu ezikhulu lamahawu lamadandili lemitshoko lezinduku lemikhonto, bakubase iminyaka eyisikhombisa," 
Ezekiel39:10 ukuze bangathezi inkuni egangeni, loba bazigamule eguswini, ngoba bazabasa imililo yabo ngezikhali; bazakwemuka labo ababemukayo, baphange labo ababaphangayo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel39:11 Ngalolosuku ngizanika uGogi indawo yokungcwabela koIsrayeli isihotsha saseAbarimi, esingempumalanga kolwandle. Bazangcwatshelwa lapho uGogi lawo wonke amaxuku akhe, ligcwale lonke iAbarimi, balibize ngokuthi yisiHotsha samaxuku kaGogi." 
Ezekiel39:12 UIsrayeli uzabangcwaba inyanga eziyisikhombisa ukuze ilizwe lihlambuluke. 
Ezekiel39:13 Bonke abantu belizwe bazasiza ukubangcwaba, kubalethele udumo mhla ngibonakalisa inkazimulo yami, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel39:14 Bazamisa abantu abazahambahamba phakathi kwelizwe, bangcwabe labo abaseleyo elizweni ukuze lihlambuluke. Ekupheleni kwenyanga eziyisikhombisa bazaqalisa ukuhlola." 
Ezekiel39:15 Nxa behambahamba phakathi kwelizwe, omunye abone ithambo lomuntu, uzamisa isibonakaliso phansi kwalo, baze balingcwabe abangcwabayo esiHotsheni samaxuku kaGogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Kukhona umuzi lapho othiwa iHamona. Bazahlambulula ilizwe ngokunjalo. 
Ezekiel39:17 Wena-ke, ndodana yomuntu, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, khuluma lenyoni zenhlobo zonke lenyamazana zonke zeganga, uthi: Hlanganani lize, buthanani livela indawo zonke lize edilini lomhlatshelo engililungiselele lona, idili elikhulu lomhlatshelo eliphezu kwentaba zakoIsrayeli, lizakudla inyama linathe igazi." 
Ezekiel39:18 Lizakudla inyama yamaqhawe, linathe igazi leziphathamandla zomhlaba; banjengezinqama, lamawundlu, lezimbuzi, lamajongosi, lezinonileyo zeBashani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Lizakudla amahwahwa lize lisuthe, linathe igazi lize lidakwe, edilini lomhlatshelo engililungisela lona." 
Ezekiel39:20 Lizasutha etafuleni lami amabhiza labagadi lamaqhawe lamadoda wonke empi, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel39:21 Ngizamisa inkazimulo yami phakathi kwezizwe; izizwe zonke zizabona isigwebo engisenzileyo, lesandla sami engisehlisele phezu kwabo." 
Ezekiel39:22 Indlu kaIsrayeli izakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo kusukela kulolosuku. 
Ezekiel39:23 Lezizwe zizakwazi ukuthi indlu kaIsrayeli yathunjwa ngenxa yesono sayo, ngoba bangikhohlisa kakhulu ngaze ngafihla ubuso bami kibo, ngabanikela ezandleni zezitha zabo, bawa ngenkemba." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ngabaphatha ngokufanele ukungcola kwabo leziphambeko zabo, ngabafihlela ubuso bami." 
Ezekiel39:25 Ngalokho-ke iNkosi uJehova ithi: Sengizabuyisa abantu bakaJakobe, ngibe lesihawu kuIsrayeli wonke, ngibe lobukhwele langebizo lami elingcwele." 
Ezekiel39:26 Bazakhohlwa ihlazo labo lokungikhohlisa kwabo konke, nxa sebehlale elizweni labo kungasekho lobethusayo," 
Ezekiel39:27 lapho sengibakhuphile ebantwini, ngabaqoqa emazweni ezitha zabo, ngabonakalisa ubungcwele bami ngabo phambi kwezizwe." 
Ezekiel39:28 Bazakwazi ukuthi ngiyiNkosi uJehova wabo ngoba ngabaxotshela phakathi kwezizwe, ngabuye ngabaqoqela elizweni labo. Kangisayikutshiya loyedwa wabo phakathi kwezizwe." 
Ezekiel39:29 Kangisayikubafihlela ubuso bami nxa sengithela umoya wami phezu kukaIsrayeli, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel40:1 Ngomnyaka wamatshumi amabili lanhlanu wokuthunjwa kwethu, ekuqaliseni komnyaka, ngosuku lwetshumi lwenyanga, ngomnyaka wetshumi lane emva kokutshaywa komuzi, ngalolosuku, isandla se Nkosi saba phezu kwami." 
Ezekiel40:2 Ngombono uNkulunkulu wangisa elizweni lakoIsrayeli, wangibeka phezu kwentaba ende kakhulu, lapho engabona khona okwakungathi yindlu zomuzi kuphambi kwami." 
Ezekiel40:3 Lapho angiletha khona, khangela, kwakukhona umuntu olesimo esifanana lethusi, ephethe intambo ephothiweyo lomhlanga wokulinganisa, emi esangweni." 
Ezekiel40:4 Lowomuntu wathi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, khangela ngamehlo akho, uzwe ngendlebe zakho, ubeke ingqondo yakho kulokho konke engizakutshengisa khona, ngoba ulethelwe ukuthi ngikutshengise khona, utshumayele koIsrayeli konke lokho ozakubona." 
Ezekiel40:5 Khangela, kwakukhona umduli ngaphandle ozingelezele indawo yethempeli, ubude bomhlanga wokulinganisa owawuphethwe ngulowomuntu babuzingalo eziyisithupha, ubude bengalo inye buyingalo lesandla. Waselinganisa ubuqatha bomduli, balingana lomhlanga munye, lobude balingana lomhlanga munye." 
Ezekiel40:6 Wasesiya esangweni elikhangele impumalanga, wakhwela ngezinyathelo, walinganisa umbundu wesango, walingana lomhlanga munye ukutshona kwawo." 
Ezekiel40:7 Walinganisa izindlu eziseceleni, zaba ngumhlanga munye ubude, lomhlanga munye ububanzi. Walinganisa umkhandlo ophakathi kwezindlu eziseceleni, waba zingalo ezinhlanu. Umbundu wesango ongasendlini engasekungeneni kwesango langaphakathi waba ngumhlanga munye." 
Ezekiel40:8 Waselinganisa indlu engasekungeneni, yaba zingalo eziyisificaminwembili," 
Ezekiel40:9 lensika zayo zaba zingalo ezimbili. Indlu esesangweni yayisekucineni ngaphakathi. 
Ezekiel40:10 Kwakukhona izindlu ezintathu ngapha langapha kwesango langasempumalanga, zontathu zazilingana, lensika zangapha langapha zazilingana." 
Ezekiel40:11 Waselinganisa ububanzi besango, baba zingalo ezilitshumi, lobude besango baba zingalo ezilitshumi lantathu." 
Ezekiel40:12 Kwakukhona umnxibo phambi kwezindlu eziseceleni, uyingalo ngapha langapha. Izindlu eziseceleni zazizingalo eziyisithupha ngapha langapha." 
Ezekiel40:13 Waselinganisa isango kusukela ngasemva kwenye indlu kusiya ngasemva kwenye, kwaba zingalo ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu ububanzi, kusukela emnyango kusiya emnyango." 
Ezekiel40:14 Waselinganisa indlu esekungeneni, yaba zingalo ezingamatshumi amabili; kwakukhona iguma elizingelezele indlu engasekungeneni kwesango." 
Ezekiel40:15 Kusukela ngaphambi kwesango ekungeneni kuze kube sekucineni ngaphakathi endlini esekungeneni kwesango kwaba zingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu. 
Ezekiel40:16 Emaceleni womabili esango kwakulamawindi, ezindlini eziseceleni emkhandlweni ophakathi kwazo; kwakukhona amawindi indawo zonke zendlu engasekungeneni kwesango, lezihlahla zelala zicecise izinsika." 
Ezekiel40:17 Wasengisa egumeni elingaphandle, khangela, kwakukhona lapho izindlwana lendawo egandelweyo kuzingelezele iguma, izindlwana ezingamatshumi amathathu zingaphambi kwendawo egandelweyo." 
Ezekiel40:18 Indawo egandelweyo yayisemasangweni, ilingana lobude bamasango, yayiyindawo engaphansi." 
Ezekiel40:19 Waselinganisa ububanzi beguma, kusukela ngaphambi kwesango elingaphansi kusiya ngaphandle kwesango elingaphakathi, kwaba zingalo ezilikhulu. Wasengisa ngenyakatho." 
Ezekiel40:20 Kwakukhona lapho isango elalikhangele inyakatho, lilisango leguma langaphakathi. Walinganisa ubude balo lobubanzi balo." 
Ezekiel40:21 Lezindlu zalo ezintathu ngapha langapha lensika zalo lendlu yazo engasekungeneni kwakulingana lokwesango lokuqala. Ubude balo babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu, lobubanzi balo babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu." 
Ezekiel40:22 Amawindi alo, lendlu yalo engasekungeneni, lezihlahla zalo zamalala kwakulingana lokwesango elikhangele impumalanga. Kwakulezinyathelo eziyisikhombisa eziya kilo, lendlu esekungeneni yayingaphakathi." 
Ezekiel40:23 Maqondana lesango ngenyakatho, njengempumalanga, kwakukhona isango leguma, walinganisa kusukela esangweni kusiya esangweni, kwaba zingalo ezilikhulu." 
Ezekiel40:24 Wasengisa ngeningizimu, khangela, kwakukhona isango ngeningizimu; walinganisa insika zalo lendlu yalo esekungeneni, kwakulingana lezinye." 
Ezekiel40:25 Kwakukhona kilo amawindi inhlangothi zonke lendlini yalo ekungeneni, ayefanana lamanye amawindi. Ubude balo babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu, lobubanzi balo buzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu." 
Ezekiel40:26 Kwakukhona izinyathelo eziyisikhombisa eziya kilo, lendlu esekungeneni yayiphakathi; kwakulezihlahla zamalala ensikeni zalo, ngapha langapha kwalo." 
Ezekiel40:27 Kwakukhona isango ngeningizimu kweguma elingaphakathi; walinganisa kusukela esangweni kusiya esangweni ngeningizimu, kwaba zingalo ezilikhulu." 
Ezekiel40:28 Wasengiletha egumeni elingaphakathi ngesango leningizimu, walinganisa isango leningizimu, lalilingana lamanye." 
Ezekiel40:29 Indlu zalo eziseceleni lensika zalo lendlu yalo esekungeneni zazilingana lezinye. Kwakukhona kilo amawindi inhlangothi zonke lendlini yalo ekungeneni. Ubude balo babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu, lobubanzi balo buzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu." 
Ezekiel40:30 Kwakukhona izindlu ezisekungeneni inhlangothi zonke, ubude bazo buzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu, lobubanzi bazo buzingalo ezinhlanu." 
Ezekiel40:31 Indlu yalo esekungeneni yayikhangele iguma elingaphandle, kukhona izihlahla zamalala ensikeni zalo; kwakukhona izinyathelo eziyisificaminwembili zokuya kilo." 
Ezekiel40:32 Wasengisa egumeni elingaphakathi ngempumalanga, walinganisa isango, lalilingana lamanye." 
Ezekiel40:33 Indlu zalo eziseceleni, lensika zalo, lendlu yalo esekungeneni zazilingana lezinye; kwakukhona kilo amawindi inhlangothi zonke lendlini yalo ekungeneni. Ubude balo babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu, lobubanzi balo buzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu." 
Ezekiel40:34 Indlu yalo esekungeneni yayikhangele iguma elingaphandle, kukhona izihlahla zamalala ensikeni zalo, ngapha langapha kwalo; kwakukhona izinyathelo eziyisificaminwembili zokuya kilo." 
Ezekiel40:35 Wasengisa esangweni elingenyakatho, walilinganisa, lalilingana lamanye." 
Ezekiel40:36 Indlu zalo eziseceleni, lensika zalo, lendlu yalo esekungeneni zazilingana lezinye; lalilamawindi inhlangothi zonke; ubude balo babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu, lobubanzi balo buzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu." 
Ezekiel40:37 Indlu yalo esekungeneni yayikhangele iguma elingaphandle, kwakukhona izihlahla zamalala ensikeni zalo. ngapha langapha kwalo, kwakukhona izinyathelo eziyisificaminwembili zokuya kilo." 
Ezekiel40:38 Kwakukhona indlu eyayilomnyango ongasendlini esekungeneni kwesango, lapho okwakuzageziselwa khona umnikelo wokutshiswa." 
Ezekiel40:39 Endlini esekungeneni kwesango kwakukhona amatafula amabili ngapha langapha, okwakuzahlatshelwa kiwo umnikelo wokutshiswa lomnikelo wesono lomnikelo wecala." 
Ezekiel40:40 Ngaphandle kwendlu esekungeneni, ekungeneni kwesango elingenyakatho, kwakukhona amatafula amabili, langaphakathi kwendlu esekungeneni kwesango kwakukhona amatafula amabili." 
Ezekiel40:41 Amatafula amane ayengaphakathi, lamatafula amane ayengaphandle, eceleni kwesango, wonke ayeyisificaminwembili lapho okwakuzahlatshelwa khona umhlatshelo." 
Ezekiel40:42 Kwakukhona futhi amatafula amane ayenziwe ngamatshe abaziweyo, angawomnikelo wokutshiswa. ubude bawo buyingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili, lobubanzi bawo buyingalo lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili, lokuphakama kwawo kuyingalo, okwakuzabekwa kiwo izinto zokuhlaba umnikelo wokutshiswa leminye iminikelo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Imibundu, ubude bayo bungangesandla, yayifakiwe ngaphakathi inhlangothi zonke. Ematafuleni kwakuzabekwa inyama yomnikelo." 
Ezekiel40:44 Wasengingenisa egumeni elingaphakathi. kwakukhona egumeni elingaphakathi izindlu ezimbili. Enye isesangweni elingenyakatho, ikhangele iningizimu, lenye ingasesangweni elingeningizimu, ikhangele inyakatho." 
Ezekiel40:45 Wasesithi kimi: Lindlu ekhangele iningizimu ngeyabapristi abaphethe ithempeli," 
Ezekiel40:46 lendlu ekhangele inyakatho ngeyabapristi abaphethe ilathi. Ngitsho amadodana kaZadoki okuyiwona wodwa phakathi kwamadodana kaLevi angasondela e Nkosi ni ukuyikhonza. 
Ezekiel40:47 Waselinganisa iguma, ubude balo baba yizingalo ezilikhulu. lobubanzi balo buzingalo ezilikhulu. inhlangothi zonke, lelathi laliphambi kwethempeli." 
Ezekiel40:48 Wasengiletha endlini esekungeneni kwethempeli, walinganisa insika zendlu, zaba zingalo ezinhlanu inhlangothi zonke; ububanzi besango baba zingalo ezilitshumi lane; lobubanzi bemiduli eseceleni kwesango baba zingalo ezintathu ngapha langapha." 
Ezekiel40:49 Ubude bendlu esekungeneni babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili, lobubanzi bayo buzingalo ezilitshumi lambili; kwakukhona izinyathelo ezilitshumi eziya kilo; kwakukhona insika ekungeneni kwesango inhlangothi zombili." 
Ezekiel41:1 Wasengingenisa ethempelini, walinganisa insika, ububanzi bazo babuzingalo eziyisithupha inhlangothi zonke." 
Ezekiel41:2 Ububanzi bomnyango babuzingalo ezilitshumi, lobubanzi bemiduli eseceleni kwesango babuzingalo ezinhlanu ngapha langapha. Waselinganisa ubude bethempeli, baba zingalo ezingamatshumi amane, lobubanzi balo baba zingalo ezingamatshumi amabili." 
Ezekiel41:3 Wasengena endlini engaphakathi, walinganisa insika zomnyango, zaba zingalo ezimbili, lobubanzi bomnyango baba zingalo eziyisithupha; lemiduli eseceleni kwesango yaba zingalo eziyisikhombisa." 
Ezekiel41:4 Walinganisa ubude bendlu esekucineni, baba zingalo ezingamatshumi amabili, lobubanzi bayo baba zingalo ezingamatshumi amabili. Wasesithi kimi: Lokhu kuyingcwele yezingcwele." 
Ezekiel41:5 Waselinganisa umduli wethempeli, ubuqatha bawo baba zingalo eziyisithupha. Ububanzi bezindlu eziseceleni baba zingalo ezine, inhlangothi zonke zethempeli." 
Ezekiel41:6 Izindlu eziseceleni zazelekene zintathu, enye phezu kwenye, zingamatshumi amathathu mzila munye. Kwakulezisekelo emdulini wethempeli ezisekele izindlu eziseceleni ukuze zingaqiniswa ngumduli wethempeli." 
Ezekiel41:7 Izindlu eziseceleni zaqhela zaba banzi ekuphakameni kwazo kusukela kwenye indlu kusiya kwenye, zivumelana lokuqhela kwezisekelo kusukela kwenye indlu kusiya kwenye, inhlangothi zonke zethempeli. Ethempelini kwakukhona ilele, ukuze umuntu asuke endlini engaphansi, adabule kwephakathi, ukuya kwephezulu." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ngabona futhi ukuthi ithempeli lalilendawo edundubeleyo inhlangothi zonke. Izisekelo zezindlu eziseceleni zazilingana lomhlanga owodwa olobude obuzingalo eziyisithupha. 
Ezekiel41:9 Ubuqatha bomduli wangaphandle wezindlu eziseceleni babuzingalo ezinhlanu; lengxenye yendawo edundubeleyo eyayisele yayizingalo ezinhlanu. 
Ezekiel41:10 Indawo edundubeleyo engaphandle kwezindlu eziseceleni ezizingelezele ithempeli ububanzi bayo babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili. 
Ezekiel41:11 Izivalo zezindlu eziseceleni zavulelwa endaweni edundubeleyo eseleyo, esinye isivalo sivulelwa enyakatho lesinye sivulelwa eningizimu; ububanzi bendawo eseleyo babuzingalo ezinhlanu inhlangothi zonke." 
Ezekiel41:12 Indlu eyayikhangele iguma lethempeli ngentshonalanga, ububanzi bayo babuzingalo ezingamatshumi ayisikhombisa, lobuqatha bomduli wayo babuzingalo ezinhlanu inhlangothi zonke, lobude bawo babuzingalo ezingamatshumi ayisificamunwemunye." 
Ezekiel41:13 Waselinganisa ithempeli, ubude balo baba zingalo ezilikhulu. Igceke lendlu lilemiduli yalo kwaba zingalo ezilikhulu ubude;" 
Ezekiel41:14 lobubanzi bethempeli ngempumalanga kanye leguma baba zingalo ezilikhulu. 
Ezekiel41:15 Waselinganisa indlu ekhangele iguma engentshonalanga kanye lemiduli yayo inhlangothi zonke, yaba zingalo ezilikhulu ubude. Ithempeli, lendlu engaphakathi, lendlu esekungeneni ngaphandle," 
Ezekiel41:16 zazilemiduli yamapulanka; izindlu lezi ezintathu zazilamawindi alemigubazi. Kusukela phansi kuze kufike emawindini langaphezu komnyango," 
Ezekiel41:17 endlini engaphakathi lezindlini ekungeneni lakuyo yonke imiduli ngaphandle langaphakathi," 
Ezekiel41:18 kwakukhona izithombe ezibaziweyo, ezamakherubi, lezihlahla zelala, isihlahla selala simi phakathi kwamakherubi* amabili. Ikherubhi* lilinye lalilobuso obubili," 
Ezekiel41:19 obunye buyibuso bomuntu bukhangelene lesihlahla selala, lobunye buyibuso bebhongo lesilwane bukhangelene lesihlahla selala. Zazinjalo izithombe ezibaziweyo ethempelini lonke." 
Ezekiel41:20 Amakherubi* lezihlahla zelala kwakubaziwe kusukela phansi kwaze kwafika ngaphezu komnyango, lemdulini wethempeli." 
Ezekiel41:21 Imigubazi yomnyango wethempeli yayilingana inhlangothi zonke; laphambi kwendawo engcwele kwakukhona into," 
Ezekiel41:22 efanana lelathi eyakhiwe ngezigodo, ukuphakama kwayo kuzingalo ezintathu, ubude bayo buzingalo ezimbili, lobubanzi bayo buzingalo ezimbili; izingonsi zayo lesidindi sayo kanye lemiduli yayo kwenziwe ngezigodo. Wathi kimi: Lokhu kulitafula eliphambi kwe Nkosi." 
Ezekiel41:23 Ithempeli lendawo engcwele kokubili kwakulezivalo ezihlanganayo. 
Ezekiel41:24 Izivalo zazilempiko ezimbili, ileso laleso isivalo silempiko ezimbili ezivulekayo." 
Ezekiel41:25 Ezivalweni zethempeli kwakubazwe amakherubi* lezihlahla zelala, njengalokho okwakusemidulini. Kwakukhona uphahla lwezigodo ngaphambi kwendlu engasekungeneni." 
Ezekiel41:26 Kwakukhona amawindi alemigubazi lezihlahla zelala ngapha langapha kwamawindi, emidulini esemaceleni endlu esekungeneni." 
Ezekiel42:1 Wasengikhuphela egumeni elingaphandle, ngenyakatho, wangisa ezindlini ezaziqondene legceke lethempeli maqondana lendlu engenyakatho." 
Ezekiel42:2 Ubude bendlu eyayingenyakatho babuzingalo ezilikhulu, lobubanzi bayo buzingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu." 
Ezekiel42:3 Endaweni eseleyo eyizingalo ezingamatshumi amabili eyayihlangene lendlu engaphakathi ledundulwini eligandelweyo elegceke elingaphandle, kwakukhona imikhandlo emithathu eyclekeneyo efananayo." 
Ezekiel42:4 Ngaphambi kwezindlu kwakukhona indlela, ububanzi bayo buzingalo ezilitshumi, lobude bayo buzingalo ezilikhulu eyayiqonda egumeni elingaphakathi; iminyango yazo yayikhangele ngenyakatho." 
Ezekiel42:5 Izindlu ezingaphezulu zazinciphile kulezindlu ezingaphansi leziphakathi. ngoba imikhandlo yayiziminyanisile. 
Ezekiel42:6 Ngoba zonke zazelekene zintathu, zingelansika njengeguma; eziphezulu zinciphile kuleziphakathi lezingaphansi." 
Ezekiel42:7 Umduli wangaphandle ubude bawo buzingalo ezingamakhulu amahlanu, wahamba ngaphambi kwezindlu, ulinganisene lazo, endaweni yeguma elingaphandle." 
Ezekiel42:8 Izindlu ezazixhumene leguma elingaphandle ubude bazo babuzingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu; khangela, lalezo ezazikhangelene lethempeli ubude bazo buzingalo ezilikhulu." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ngaphansi kwalezizindlu kwakukhona umnyango ovelela ngempumalanga lapho umuntu engena evelela egumeni elingaphandle," 
Ezekiel42:10 lapho okwakuqalisa khona umduli weguma. Lendaweni engeningizimu, ukudlula igceke eliseleyo kanye lendlu, kwakukhona ezinye izindlu," 
Ezekiel42:11 kulendlela phambi kwazo. Lezindlu zazifanana ngobude langobubanzi langesinye isimo lalezo ezikhangele inyakatho, leminyango yazo yokuphuma leyokungena eyayifanana leyezindlu ezingeningizimu." 
Ezekiel42:12 Lapho umuntu eqonda ngempumalanga, lapho okuqalisa indlela khona, kwakulomnyango emdulini wangaphakathi." 
Ezekiel42:13 Wasesithi kimi: Izindlu ezingenyakatho leziqondene lazo ngeningizimu ziyizindlu ezingcwele, lapho abapristi abeza e Nkosi ni abazadlela khona iminikelo engcwelengcwele; babeke khona iminikelo engcwelengcwele, umnikelo wokudla, lomnikelo wesono, lomnikelo wecala, ngoba indawo ingcwele." 
Ezekiel42:14 Lapho abapristi bengena endaweni engcwele, kabayikuphumela egumeni elingaphandle bengazibekanga lapho izembatho abakhonza ngazo, ngoba lezi zingcwele. Bazagqoka ezinye izembatho bengakasondeli eduze lalokho okungokwabantu." 
Ezekiel42:15 Kwathi nxa eseqedile ukulinganisa ngaphakathi kwethempeli, wangikhupha ngesango elikhangele impumalanga, walinganisa ithempeli ngakuleyondawo." 
Ezekiel42:16 Ngomhlanga wokulinganisa walinganisa indawo engempumalanga, yaba zingalo ezingamakhulu amahlanu." 
Ezekiel42:17 Wasephenduka elinganisa indawo engenyakatho, yaba zingalo ezingamakhulu amahlanu." 
Ezekiel42:18 Wasephenduka elinganisa indawo engeningizimu, yaba zingalo ezingamakhulu amahlanu." 
Ezekiel42:19 Wasephenduka elinganisa indawo engentshonalanga, yaba zingalo ezingamakhulu amahlanu." 
Ezekiel42:20 Walinganisa indawo zozine. Lalilomduli olizingelezeleyo, uzingalo ezingamakhulu amahlanu ubude, lezingalo ezingamakhulu amahlanu ububanzi, ukwehlukanisa okungcwele lokungangcwele." 
Ezekiel43:1 Wasengiletha esangweni, isango elikhangele impumalanga." 
Ezekiel43:2 Khangela, inkazimulo kaNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli yavelela ngempumalanga, lomdumo wokuza kwakhe wawunjengowamanzi amanengi, lomhlaba wakhanya ngenkazimulo yakhe." 
Ezekiel43:3 Umbono engawubonayo wawunjengombono engawubona lapho uNkulunkulu esiza ukuchitha iJerusalema, unjengombono engawubona emfuleni iKebari; ngathi mbo ngobuso phansi." 
Ezekiel43:4 Nxa inkazimulo ye Nkosi ingena ethempelini ngesango elikhangele impumalanga," 
Ezekiel43:5 umoya wangiphakamisa, wangiletha egumeni elingaphakathi; khangela-ke, inkazimulo ye Nkosi yayigcwele ithempeli." 
Ezekiel43:6 Lapho lowomuntu emi phansi kwami, ngezwa omunye ekhuluma lami ethempelini." 
Ezekiel43:7 Wathi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, le yindawo yesihlalo sami sobukhosi lendawo yengaphansi yenyawo zami, lapho engizahlala khona phakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli kokuphela. Indlu kaIsrayeli kayisayikungcolisa ibizo lami elingcwele, bona lamakhosi abo, ngokuwula kwabo langezidumbu zamakhosi abo," 
Ezekiel43:8 ngokumisa umbundu womnyango wabo phansi kowami, lensika zeminyango yabo phansi kwezami, sehlukaniswe ngumduli kuphela. Bangcolisile ibizo lami elingcwele ngamanyala abo abawenzileyo, ngakho ngibaqedile ngolaka lwami." 
Ezekiel43:9 Ngakhoke kabalahle izithombe zabo lezidumbu zamakhosi abo khatshana lami, ngizahlala phakathi kwabo kokuphela." 
Ezekiel43:10 Wena-ke, ndodana yomuntu, tshela indlu kaIsrayeli ngalelithempeli, ngokukhangeleka kwalo langesimo salo, ukuze babe lenhloni ngobubi babo." 
Ezekiel43:11 Uba belenhloni ngakho konke abakwenzileyo, ubatshengise ithempeli, ukuma kwezinto zalo, intuba zalo zokuphuma lezokungena, lesimo salo sonke, ubatshele imithetho yalo yonke lemilayo yalo yonke. Ukubhale konke phambi kwabo ukuze bayigcine bayenze yonke imilayo yalo lemithetho yalo." 
Ezekiel43:12 Nanku umlayo wethempeli, indawo yonke esengqongeni yentaba izakuba yingcwelengcwele. Khangela, yiwo lowo umlayo wethempeli." 
Ezekiel43:13 Nanzi izilinganiso zelathi ngezingalo, ubude bengalo inye buyingalo lesandla; ukuphakama kwesidindi salo kuzakuba yingalo, lobubanzi baso bube yingalo, lomqolo olingana lesandla emphethweni waso. Lobu buzakuba yibude belathi;" 
Ezekiel43:14 ingalo ezimbili kusukela esidindini phansi kusiya ngaphezu kwelitshe lokuqala, ububanzi buyingalo; kusukela ngaphezu kwelitshe elincinyane kusiya ngaphezu kwelitshe elikhulu kube zingalo ezine, ububanzi buyingalo." 
Ezekiel43:15 Iziko lelathi libe zingalo ezine ukuphakama; kusukela eziko lelathi kusiya phezulu kulempondo ezine, ubude bazo buyingalo." 
Ezekiel43:16 Iziko lelathi lizalingana inhlangothi zonke, ubude balo bube zingalo ezilitshumi lambili lobubanzi bube zingalo ezilitshumi lambili." 
Ezekiel43:17 Umphetho walo uzalingana inhlangothi zonke, ubude bube zingalo ezilitshumi lane, lobubanzi bube zingalo ezilitshumi lane, ube lomqolo emaceleni awo. ububanzi balo bube yingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yengalo, ngaphansi kube yingalo inhlangothi zonke. Izinyathelo zelathi zizakhangela empumalanga." 
Ezekiel43:18 Wasesithi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, iNkosi uJehova ithi: Nansi imithetho emayelana lokunikela elathini. Mhla lisakhelwa ukunikela iminikelo yokutshiselwa kilo lokufafaza igazi kilo," 
Ezekiel43:19 uzanika abapristi abangamaLevi abosendo lukaZadoki, abasondela ukukhonza kimi ijongosi ithole lenkomo, lomnikelo wesono, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel43:20 Uthathe elinye legazi layo, ulifake empondweni zozine zelathi, lezingonsini zozine zomphetho walo, lemqolweni olizingelezeleyo. Ngokunjalo-ke uzalihlambulula ilathi, ulenzele inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Ezekiel43:21 Uthathe ijongosi lomnikelo wesono, ulitshise endaweni elungisiweyo yethempeli ngaphandle kwendawo engcwele." 
Ezekiel43:22 Ngosuku lwesibili uzanikela izinyane lembuzi elipheleleyo libe ngumnikelo wesono; lihlambuluke ilathi njengoba lihlanjululwe ngejongosi. 
Ezekiel43:23 Nxa usuqedile ukulihlambulula, uzanikela ijongosi ithole lenkomo elingelasici lenqama engelasici ephuma emhlanjini." 
Ezekiel43:24 Uzilethe phambi kwe Nkosi, abapristi bazifafaze ngetswayi, bazinikele zibe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa e Nkosi ni." 
Ezekiel43:25 Insuku eziyisikhombisa insuku zonke uzanika imbuzi ibe ngumnikelo wesono, unikele lejongosi ithole lenkomo lenqama okuvela emhlanjini kungelasici." 
Ezekiel43:26 Insuku eziyisikhombisa bazakwenzela ilathi inhlawulo yokuthula, balihlambulule, balenze libe ngcwele." 
Ezekiel43:27 Nxa seziphelile lezonsuku, kusukela esukwini lwesificaminwembili abapristi bazanikela phezu kwelathi iminikelo yenu yokutshiswa leminikelo yokuthula; ngizalemukela, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel44:1 Wasengibuyisela esangweni elingaphandle lendlu engcwele, elikhangele empumalanga, lalivaliwe." 
Ezekiel44:2 Wathi kimi: Isango leli lizahlala livaliwe, kaliyikuvulwa, kakuyikungena muntu ngalo; ngoba iNkosi uJehova kaIsrayeli ingene ngalo, ngakho lizahlala livaliwe." 
Ezekiel44:3 Yisiphathamandla sodwa esingahlala kilo sidle isinkwa phambi kwe Nkosi. Sizangena ngendlela yendlu esekungeneni kwesango, siphume ngayo futhi." 
Ezekiel44:4 Wasengihambisa ngendlela yesangweni elingenyakatho, wangiletha ngaphambi kwethempeli. Ngabona, khangela, inkazimulo ye Nkosi igcwalise ithempeli le Nkosi, ngathi mbo ngobuso." 
Ezekiel44:5 I Nkosi yathi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, qaphelisa kuhle ubone ngamehlo akho uzwe ngendlebe zakho konke engizakutshela khona mayelana lemithetho yethempeli le Nkosi lemilayo yalo yonke. Uqaphelise kuhle labo abangavunyelwa ukungena ethempelini lalabo abazatshiywa phandle kwendlu engcwele." 
Ezekiel44:6 Utsho kibo abakoIsrayeli abahlamukayo ukuthi iNkosi uJehova ithi: Wena Israyeli, kawaphele wonke amanyala akho," 
Ezekiel44:7 okungenisa abezizwe labangasokanga enhliziyweni lenyameni endlini yami engcwele liyingcolisa, lapho linikela kimi ukudla kwami, amahwahwa legazi. Futhi lisephulile isivumelwano sami ngamanyala enu wonke." 
Ezekiel44:8 Kalilondolozanga izinto zami ezingcwele, kodwa limisile abezizwe ukwenza umsebenzi wami endlini yami engcwele." 
Ezekiel44:9 Ngalokho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Kakulamuntu wezizwe ongasokanga enhliziyweni lenyameni kubo bonke abezizwe abaphakathi kwabantwana bakoIsrayeli ozangena endlini yami engcwele. 
Ezekiel44:10 Kodwa amaLevi asuka kimi, ayakhatshana, eduhela ezithombeni zawo ekuduheni kukaIsrayeli, azathwala ukutshaywa kwawo." 
Ezekiel44:11 Azakuba yizikhonzi endlini yami engcwele, alinde amasango ethempeli, asebenze ethempelini, ahlabe umnikelo wokutshiswa lomhlatshelo wabantu, akhangele abantu ukuze abasebenzele." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ngoba abasebenzela phambi kwezithombe zabo, aba yisikhubekiso sobubi kuIsrayeli, ngakho ngifungile mayelana labo ukuthi azathwala ukutshaywa kwawo, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel44:13 Kawayikusondela kimi ukuze angisebenzela njengabapristi, angasondeli ezintweni zami ezingcwele lezintweni ezingcwelengcwele, kodwa azathwala ihlazo lawo ngenxa yamanyala awenzayo." 
Ezekiel44:14 Kanti ngizawamisa ukulondoloza indlu, lokwenza umsebenzi walo lakho konke okufanele ukwenziwa kilo." 
Ezekiel44:15 Kodwa abapristi abangamaLevi, amadodana kaZadoki, abalondoloza indlu yami engcwele ekuduheni kwabakoIsrayeli, bazasondela kimi ukukhonza, beme phambi kwami ukunginika amahwahwa legazi, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel44:16 Bazangena endlini yami engcwele basondele etafuleni lami ukungikhonza, bagcine umlindo wami." 
Ezekiel44:17 Nxa bengena ngamasango eguma elingaphakathi, bazagqoka izembatho ezenziwe ngelembu elicolekileyo, bangagqoki lutho olwenziwe ngoboya lapho bekhonza emasangweni eguma elingaphakathi, laphakathi ethempelini." 
Ezekiel44:18 Bathwale amaqhiye enziwe ngelembu elicolekileyo emakhanda abo, bagqoke okabhudula bangaphansi abenziwe ngelembu elicolekileyo enkalweni zabo, kabayikuzibopha ngalutho oluginqisayo." 
Ezekiel44:19 Nxa sebephumela egumeni elingaphandle besiya ebantwini, bazakhulula izembatho abebezigqoke ekukhonzeni kwabo, bazibeke ezindlini ezingcwele, bagqoke ezinye izigqoko hlezi bathelele abantu ubungcwele ngezembatho zabo." 
Ezekiel44:20 Kabayikuphuca amakhanda abo, kabayikuyekela inwele zabo zikhule zibe zinde, kodwa bazaquma inwele zamakhanda abo." 
Ezekiel44:21 Kakulampristi ozanatha iwayini lapho ezangena egumeni elingaphakathi. 
Ezekiel44:22 Kabayikuthatha umfelokazi loba owesifazana owehlukene lendoda, kodwa bazathatha intombi ezigcweleyo eyosendo lwakoIsrayeli, loba umfelokazi ongumfelokazi wompristi." 
Ezekiel44:23 Bazafundisa abantu bami umehluko phakathi kokungcwele lokungangcwele, babatshengise ukwehlukanisa phakathi kokungcolileyo lokuhlambulukileyo." 
Ezekiel44:24 Lapha kukhona ukuphikisana bazakwahlulela, bahlulele ngokufanele izahlulelo zami. Bazagcina imilayo yami lezimiso zami kiyo yonke imikhosi yami emisiweyo, bagcine amasabatha ami abe ngcwele." 
Ezekiel44:25 Kabayikuzingcolisa ngokusondela emuntwini ofileyo Kodwa ngaboyise langabonina, ngendodana langendodakazi, ngomfowabo langabodadewabo abangendanga bangazingcolisa." 
Ezekiel44:26 Emva kokungcola kwabo bazabala insuku eziyisikhombisa besebehlambuluka. 
Ezekiel44:27 Mhla bengenayo endaweni engcwele, egumeni elingaphakathi, ukukhonza endaweni engcwele, bazanikela umnikelo wabo wesono, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel44:28 Kabayikuba lelifa, mina ngiyilifa labo; kaliyikubanika isabelo selizwe koIsrayeli; mina ngiyisabelo sabo." 
Ezekiel44:29 Bazakudla umnikelo wokudla lomnikelo wesono lomnikelo wecala, konke okwehlukanisiweyo koIsrayeli kuzakuba ngokwabo." 
Ezekiel44:30 Okokuqala kwazo zonke izithelo zokuqala zakho konke, lokweminikelo yenu yonke yenhlobo zonke kuzakuba ngokwabapristi; linike futhi abapristi okokuqala kwempuphu yenu egayekileyo, ukuze isibusiso sehlele endlini yenu." 
Ezekiel44:31 Abapristi kabayikudla inyoni kumbe ingcuba loba ebanjwe ngenye. 
Ezekiel45:1 Ekwehlukaniseni kwenu ilizwe ngenkatho ukuthi zonke izizwe zinikwe isabelo, lizakwehlukanisela i Nkosi ingxenye yelizwe ibe yindawo engcwele, ubude bayo bube zingalo ezizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu, lobubanzi bayo bube zingalo ezizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili. Yonke izakuba ngcwele." 
Ezekiel45:2 Kulokhu indawo eyizingalo ezingamakhulu amahlanu ubude, lamakhulu amahlanu ububanzi, izakuba yindawo yendlu engcwele, ibe legceke eliyibhodayo elizingalo ezingamatshumi amahlanu." 
Ezekiel45:3 Endaweni engcwele lizalinganisa isigaba, ubude baso bube zingalo ezizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu, lobubanzi baso bube zingalo ezizinkulungwane ezilitshumi, okuzakuba khona indlu engcwele, lengcwele yezingcwele." 
Ezekiel45:4 Sibe yingxenye engcwele yelizwe, sizakuba ngesabapristi abakhonzayo endlini engcwele, abasondela ukukhonza i Nkosi, sizakuba yindawo yendlu zabo lendawo engcwele yendlu engcwele." 
Ezekiel45:5 Esinye isigaba ubude baso buzingalo ezizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu, lobubanzi baso bube zingalo ezizinkulungwane ezilitshumi, sizakuba ngesamaLevi akhonzayo ethempelini, sibe ngesemizi yawo ahlala kiyo." 
Ezekiel45:6 Lizanika umuzi indawo phansi kwelizwe lendlu engcwele, ubude bayo bube zingalo ezizinkulungwane ezingamatshumi amabili lanhlanu, lobubanzi bayo bube zingalo ezizinkulungwane ezinhlanu, izakuba ngokukaIsrayeli wonke." 
Ezekiel45:7 Indawo esemaceleni womabili endawo engcwele lawendawo yomuzi izakuba ngeyesikhulu, lendawo eseduze lendawo engcwele leseduze lomuzi, esuka entshonalanga eqonda entshonalanga, lesuka empumalanga eqonda empumalanga, ubukhulu bayo bulingana lesinye sezigaba phakathi kwentshonalanga lempumalanga yemingcele yelizwe." 
Ezekiel45:8 Izakuba yindawo yesiphathamandla koIsrayeli. Iziphathamandla zami kaziyikubacindezela abantu bami, kodwa zizavumela abakoIsrayeli balisebenzise ilizwe libe ngelezizwe zabo." 
Ezekiel45:9 INkosi uJehova ithi: Kwenele, lina ziphathamandla zakoIsrayeli! Lahlani isihluku locindezelo, lenze isahlulelo lokulunga, likhawule ukuxotsha abantu bami, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel45:10 Lizakuba lezilinganiso ezilungileyo, i-efa* eliqondileyo lebhathi* eliqondileyo." 
Ezekiel45:11 l-efa* lebhathi* kuzakuba yizilinganiso ezifananayo, ibhathi libe yingxenye yetshumi yehomeri*, le-efa* libe yingxenye yetshumi yehomeri*; ihomeri* libe yisilinganiso esikhulu." 
Ezekiel45:12 Ishekeli* lizakuba ngamagera* angamatshumi amabili; amashekeli* amahlanu abe ngamashekeli* amahlanu, lamashekeli alitshumi abe ngamashekeli* alitshumi, lemina* yenu ibe ngamashekeli* angamatshumi amahlanu." 
Ezekiel45:13 Nanku umnikelo abantu abazawunikela; ingxenye yesithupha ye-efa evela kuwo wonke amahomeri* engqoloyi, lengxenye yesithupha, i-efa* evela kuwo wonke amahomeri ebhali," 
Ezekiel45:14 lamafutha amisiweyo ingxenye yetshumi yebhathi* kuwo wonke amakhori* ikhori* lilinye, lifanana lehomeri*, lilamabhathi alitshumi" 
Ezekiel45:15 imvu eyodwa emhlanjini wezimvu ezingamakhulu amabili, emizini yakoIsrayeli. Nanku umnikelo weminikelo yokudla, leminikelo yokutshiswa, leminikelo yokuthula yokubenzela inhlawulo yokuthula, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Ezekiel45:16 Bonke abantu belizwe bazanika isiphathamandla sakoIsrayeli lumnikelo. 
Ezekiel45:17 Kuzakuba ngumsebenzi wesiphathamandla ukunika iminikelo yokutshiswa leminikelo yempuphu leminikelo yokunathwayo emikhosini, ngesikhathi sokuthwasa kwenyanga, langamasabatha, lakuyo yonke imikhosi emisiweyo yakoIsrayeli. Sizanikela umnikelo wesono lomnikelo wokudla lomnikelo wokutshiswa leminikelo yokuthula ukuyenzela inhlawulo yokuthula indlu yakoIsrayeli." 
Ezekiel45:18 INkosi uJehova ithi: Ngenyanga yokuqala, ngosuku lokuqala lwenyanga, uzathatha ijongosi ithole lenkomo elingelasici, uhlambulule indlu engcwele." 
Ezekiel45:19 Umpristi uzathatha elinye igazi lomnikelo wesono, alicombe emgubazini wethempeli lezingonsini zelathi lezinsikeni zamasango eguma langaphakathi." 
Ezekiel45:20 Uzakwenza okufananayo ngosuku lwesikhombisa lwenyanga ngenxa yomuntu owonileyo ngokuphosisa langokungazi, ukuze uyenzele indlu inhlawulo yokuthula." 
Ezekiel45:21 Ngenyanga yokuqala, ngosuku lwetshumi lane lwenyanga, lizakuba lomkhosi wephasika, lidle isinkwa esingelamvubelo okwensuku eziyisikhombisa." 
Ezekiel45:22 Ngalolosuku isiphathamandla sizazidingela kanye labo bonke abantu belizwe ijongosi libe ngumnikelo wesono. 
Ezekiel45:23 Ngensuku eziyisikhombisa zomkhosi sizanika i Nkosi amajongosi ayisikhombisa lenqama eziyisikhombisa ezingelasici zibe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa kuzo zonke izinsuku eziyisikhombisa, lezinyane lembuzi insuku zonke libe ngumnikelo wesono." 
Ezekiel45:24 Sizanika kube ngumnikelo wokudla i-efa* libe linye ngalelo lalelojongosi, le-efa libe linye ngaleyo laleyonqama, lehini* yamafutha kulelo lalelo-efa*." 
Ezekiel45:25 Ngenyanga yesikhombisa, ngosuku lwetshumi lanhlanu lwenyanga, lensukwini eziyisikhombisa zomkhosi uzanika okufananayo ngomnikelo wesono lomnikelo wokutshiswa lomnikelo wokudla lamafutha." 
Ezekiel46:1 INkosi uJehova ithi: Isango leguma elingaphakathi elikhangele impumalanga, lizavalwa insuku eziyisithupha okusetshenzwa ngazo. Kodwa ngosuku lwesabatha lizavulwa lekuthwaseni kwenyanga." 
Ezekiel46:2 Isiphathamandla sizangena endlini esekungeneni kwesango sivela ngaphandle, sime ensikeni yesango. Abapristi banikele umnikelo waso wokutshiswa leminikelo yaso yokuthula, sona sizakhonza sisedundulwini lesango. Besesiphumake, kodwa isango kaliyikuvalwa kuze kube kusihlwa." 
Ezekiel46:3 Abantu belizwe bazakhonza ekungeneni kwesango phambi kwe Nkosi mhla wesabatha, lamuhla wokuthwasa kwenyanga." 
Ezekiel46:4 Umnikelo wokutshiswa isiphathamandla esizawunikela e Nkosi ni ngesabatha uzakuba ngamawundlu ayisithupha angelasici, lenqama engelasici." 
Ezekiel46:5 Umnikelo wokudla onikelwa lenqama uzakuba yi-efa*, lomnikelo wokudla onikelwa lamawundlu uzakuya ngamandla aso kanye lehini yamafutha kulelo lalelo-efa*." 
Ezekiel46:6 Mhla wokuthwasa kwenyanga sizanikela ijongosi ithole lenkomo elingelasici lamawundlu ayisithupha lenqama engelasici. 
Ezekiel46:7 Okomnikelo wokudla sizanika i-efa* kanye lejongosi, le-efa* kanye lenqama, okukanye lamawundlu kuzakuya ngamandla aso kanye lehini* lamafutha kulelo lalelo-efa*." 
Ezekiel46:8 Lapho isiphathamandla singena, sizangena endlini esekungeneni kwesango, siphume ngayona leyondlela." 
Ezekiel46:9 Lapho abantu belizwe besiza phambi kwe Nkosi ngesikhathi semikhosi emisiweyo, lowo ongena ngesango elingenyakatho ukukhonza uzaphuma ngesango elingeningizimu, lalowo ongena ngesango elingeningizimu uzaphuma ngesango elingenyakatho, kakho ozaphuma ngesango angena ngalo, kodwa uzahamba aqonde phambili." 
Ezekiel46:10 Nxa bengena, lesiphathamandla sizangena kanye labo, lalapho bephuma, sizaphuma kanye labo." 
Ezekiel46:11 Ngesikhathi semikhosi langezikhathi ezimisiweyo umnikelo wokudla onikelwa lejongosi uzakuba yi-efa, lonikelwa lenqama ube yi-efa*, lonikelwa lamawundlu uzakuya ngamandla omuntu kanye lehini* lamafutha kulelo lalelo-efa." 
Ezekiel46:12 Nxa isiphathamandla sinika umnikelo wesihle e Nkosi ni, kungaba ngumnikelo wokutshiswa loba iminikelo yokuthula, sizavulelwa isango elikhangele empumalanga; sizanikela umnikelo waso wokutshiswa loba iminikelo yokuthula njengokwenza kwaso ngosuku lwesabatha. Siphumeke, nxa sesiphumile lizavalwa isango." 
Ezekiel46:13 Sizanika iwundlu elingelasici elilomnyaka owodwa, libe ngumnikelo wokutshiswa e Nkosi ni insuku zonke, silinike ekuseni." 
Ezekiel46:14 Sinike lomnikelo wokudla kanye lalo insuku zonke ekuseni, lengxenye yesithupha ye-efa lengxenye yesithathu yehini* lamafutha okuthambisa impuphu, kube ngumnikelo wokudla e Nkosi ni. Yiwo lo umlayo womnikelo wokutshiswa kokuphela." 
Ezekiel46:15 Ngokunjalo kuzanikwa iwundlu lomnikelo wokudla lamafutha insuku zonke, kube ngumnikelo wokutshiswa." 
Ezekiel46:16 INkosi uJehova ithi: Uba isiphathamandla sinika enye indodana yaso isipho empahleni yaso, sizakuba ngokwamadodana aso, ngoba kuyimpahla yabo." 
Ezekiel46:17 Kodwa uba sinika enye inceku yaso isipho empahleni yaso, sizakuba ngokwayo ize ikhululwe. Besesisiba ngesesikhulu; ngamadodana aso kuphela angalondoloza isipho esivela empahleni yaso." 
Ezekiel46:18 Isiphathamandla kasiyikuthatha ulutho empahleni zabantu; kasiyikubaxotsha empahleni zabo. Sizanika amadodana aso impahla ngempahla yaso, ukuze kungabi khona omunye wabantu bami owemukwa impahla yakhe." 
Ezekiel46:19 Wasengikhupha ngentuba eyayisesangweni elingenyakatho eqonda endlini zendawo engcwele eyehlukaniselwa abapristi. Khangela, lapho ekhomba indawo esekucineni ngentshonalanga kwazo." 
Ezekiel46:20 Wathi kimi: Yiyo le indawo lapho abapristi abazaphekela khona umnikelo wecala lomnikelo wesono, lalapho abazaphekela khona umnikelo wokudla ukuze bangayikhupheli egumeni elingaphandle, bathelele abantu ubungcwele." 
Ezekiel46:21 Wasengikhuphela egumeni elingaphandle, wangisa engonsini ezine zeguma; khangela, lakuleyo laloyo ingonsi yeguma kwakukhona elinye iguma." 
Ezekiel46:22 Ezingonsini zozine zeguma kwakulamaguma amancinyane, ubude bawo buzingalo ezingamatshumi amane, lobubanzi bawo buzingalo ezingamatshumi amathathu; ayelingana womane." 
Ezekiel46:23 Ngaphakathi kuzingelezele lelo laleloguma, kwakulomzila wezitina, kulamaziko ngaphansi komzila indawo zonke." 
Ezekiel46:24 Wasesithi kimi: Le yimikulu lapho abakhonzayo ethempelini abazaphekela imihlatshelo yabantu khona. 
Ezekiel47:1 Wasengibuyisela emnyango wethempeli, khangela-ke, amanzi egobhoza ngaphansi kwedundulu lomnyango wethempeli eqonda empumalanga, ngoba ithempeli lalikhangele impumalanga; amanzi ayegeleza ngakwesokunene ngeningizimu kwelathi." 
Ezekiel47:2 Wasengikhupha ngendlela yesango langenyakatho, wangibhodisa ngaphandle kwesango elingaphandle elikhangele impumalanga. Khangela, amanzi ayegeleza ngeningizimu." 
Ezekiel47:3 Waseqonda empumalanga ephethe intambo esandleni sakhe, waselinganisa ingalo eziyizinkulungwane, wasengidabulisa phakathi kwamanzi, ayefika enqagaleni." 
Ezekiel47:4 Waselinganisa futhi ingalo eziyizinkulungwane, wangidabulisa phakathi kwamanzi, akhawula emadolo. Walinganisa futhi ingalo eziyizinkulungwane, wangidabulisa phakathi kwamanzi, afika ekhalweni." 
Ezekiel47:5 Walinganisa futhi ingalo eziyizinkulungwane, aba ngumfula engehluleka ukuwuchapha, ngoba amanzi ayesephakeme, esilingene ukuntsheza, esengumfula owawungeke wachatshwa." 
Ezekiel47:6 Wasesithi kimi: Ndodana yomuntu, ukubonile lokhu yini? Wasengibuyisela emuva enginqumisa ukhumbi lomfula." 
Ezekiel47:7 Ekubuyeleni kwami, khangela, ekhunjini lomfula izihlahla ezinengi kakhulu inhlangothi zonke." 
Ezekiel47:8 Wasesithi kimi: Lamanzi agelezela endaweni ezingempumalanga, aze ehlele emagcekeni; nxa esengena emanzini emiyo olwandle, azakuba matsha."
