Hosea7:2 Kabananzi ukuthi ngiyakhumbula yonke imisebenzi yabo emibi. Khathesi izenzo zabo zibahanqile, zikhona phambi kwami." 
Hosea7:3 Ngobubi babo bayayikhohlisa iNkosi, lababusi ngenkohliso yabo." 
Hosea7:4 Bayizifebe bonke, banjengeziko elitshisayo, elingakhwezelwa ngumphekizinkwa, kusukela esikhathini sokuxova inhlama kuze kube sekubileni kwayo." 
Hosea7:5 Ngosuku lwedili lenkosi ababusi bayadakwa liwayini elibukhali, lenkosi izihlanganise lezidakwa." 
Hosea7:6 Ngenxa yamacebo abo inhliziyo zabo ziyavutha njengeziko; ukufutheka kwabo kudede ubusuku bonke, kodwa ekuseni kubhebhe njengamalangabi." 
Hosea7:7 Bonke bayatshisa njengeziko, bayabulala ababusi babo. Amakhosi abo wonke asephelile, kakho loyedwa okhuleka kimi." 
Hosea7:8 UEfrayimi uyadinga ubungane bezizwe; unjengesinkwa esingavuthwanga. 
Hosea7:9 Abezizwe badla amandla akhe, kodwa yena kakwazi lokho. Izimvu seziphumile ekhanda lakhe, kodwa yena kakwazi." 
Hosea7:10 Ukuzigqaja kukaIsrayeli kuyafakaza ngaye, kodwa kababuyeli e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wabo, kabamdingi ngakho konke lokhu." 
Hosea7:11 UEfrayimi unjengejuba eliyisiphukuphuku elingelangqondo; ucela usizo eGibhithe, abuye alucele eAsiriya." 
Hosea7:12 Loba ngaphi lapho abaphendukela khona, ngizabathiya ngembule lami, ngibaphosele phansi njengenyoni zamazulu, ngibatshaye ngenxa yezenzo zabo ezimbi." 
Hosea7:13 Maye kibo, ngoba basukile kimi! Kabachitheke, ngoba bangihlamukile. Mina bengithanda ukubahlenga, kodwa bona baqamba amanga ngami." 
Hosea7:14 Kabamemezi kimi ngenhliziyo zabo, kodwa bakhala besemibhedeni yabo; lapho bekhalela amabele lewayini elitsha, bayazisika, kodwa mina bayangihlamuka." 
Hosea7:15 Loba ngabafundisa ngabaqinisa, kodwa bangenzela amacebo amabi." 
Hosea7:16 Baphendukela kuBhali, banjengedandili elikhohlisayo, ababusi babo bazabulawa ngenkemba ngenxa yokuziphakamisa kwabo. Lokhu kuzakuba yinhlekisa ngabo elizweni leGibhithe." 
Hosea8:1 Khalisa uphondo, ngoba ukhozi Iuzula phezu kwendlu ye Nkosi; abantu bami sebeqe isivumelwano sami, baphambuka emlayweni wami." 
Hosea8:2 Bamemeza kimi bathi: Siyakwazi, Nkulunkulu kaIsrayeli." 
Hosea8:3 UIsrayeli ulahlile okuhle, isitha sizaxotshana laye." 
Hosea8:4 Bazibekela amakhosi ngaphandle kwemvumo yami. Bamisa ababusi ngingazi mina. Ngesiliva sabo langegolide labo bazenzela izithombe ezabalethela ukuchitheka. 
Hosea8:5 Ngaleyisa ithole eladunyiswa nguwe, wena Samariya. Ukuthukuthela kwami kuyabavuthela. Koze kube nini uIsrayeli engahlanjululwanga?" 
Hosea8:6 Umbazi walenza, kalisuye Nkulunkulu. Ithole leSamariya lizaphahlazwa libe yizihlephu." 
Hosea8:7 Ngoba behlanyela umoya, bazavuna isivunguzane. Amabele abo kawayikukhahlela, kawayikuba lanhlamvu; uba engaba lazo, zizadliwa ngabezizwe." 
Hosea8:8 UIsrayeli useginyiwe, wanyamalala phakathi kwezizwe usenjengesitsha esingelamsebenzi." 
Hosea8:9 Ngoba njengobabhemi oduhileyo bayile eAsiriya ukudinga usizo. UEfrayimi uqatshile izithandwa ukuthi zimsize. 
Hosea8:10 Lanxa beqatsha abasizi phakathi kwezizwe, sengizabaqoqa; khona bezakhawula ukubeka amakhosi lababusi." 
Hosea8:11 Ngoba uEfrayimi akhile amalathi amanengi, asephenduke aba ngamalathi okona." 
Hosea8:12 Loba bengingambhalela imilayo yami ibe zinkulungwane ezilitshumi, bebezayitshaya into engaziwayo." 
Hosea8:13 Lanxa benikela inyama yemihlatshelo, babuye bayidle, mina Nkosi kangiyikuyemukela. Ngizakhumbula ububi babo, ngibaphindisele ngenxa yezono zabo, babuyele eGibhithe." 
Hosea8:14 UIsrayeli umkhohliwe uMenzi wakhe, wazakhela indlu zamakhosi; uJuda wandisile imizi ebiyelwe ngemithangala; kodwa ngizathumela umlilo phezu kwemizi yakhe, ozaqothula inqaba zakhe." 
Hosea9:1 Ungajabuli, wena Israyeli, ungathokozi njengabezizwe, ngoba uwulile ngokutshiya uNkulunkulu wakho; uthandile umvuzo wewule emabaleni wonke okubhulela amabele." 
Hosea9:2 Ibala lokubhulela lesikhamelo sewayini kakuyikubanika abantu ukudla, lewayini elitsha lizabaphelela." 
Hosea9:3 Kabayikuhlala elizweni le Nkosi, kodwa abakoEfrayimi bazabuyela eGibhithe, badle ukudla okungcolileyo eAsiriya." 
Hosea9:4 Kabayikuthululela iminikelo yewayini e Nkosi ni, kabayikuyithokozisa ngemihlatshelo yabo. Ukudla kwabo kuzakuba njengokudla kwabalilayo, bonke abakudlayo bazangcola; ngoba ukudla kwabo kuzakuba ngokwabo kuphela, kakuyikunikelwa ethempelini le Nkosi." 
Hosea9:5 Bazakwenza njani ngosuku lomkhosi omisiweyo, langosuku lwedili le Nkosi?" 
Hosea9:6 Ngoba khangela, bazabaleka endaweni yokuchitheka, iGibhithe lizabemukela, iMemfisi libe lingcwaba labo, izinto zabo eziligugu zesiliva zigcwale imbabazane, lameva agcwale emathenteni abo." 
Hosea9:7 Insuku zokuhanjelwa sezifikile, lensuku zempindiselo sezifikile. UIsrayeli uzakwazi lokhu. Umprofethi uzakuba njengesithutha. lomuntu olomoya abe njengohlanyayo ngenxa yobubi benu obukhulu lenzondo yenu enkulu." 
Hosea9:8 Ngolaka olukhulu uEfrayimi ucathamele abantu bakaNkulunkulu umprofethi uyisifu endleleni zabo zonke, lomjibila endlini kaNkulunkulu." 
Hosea9:9 Bazonakalisile kakhulu njengensukwini zeGibeya. UNkulunkulu uzakhumbula ububi babo, abaphindisele ngenxa yezono zabo." 
Hosea9:10 Ngamthola uIsrayeli njengezithelo zevini egangeni, ngababona oyihlo njengezithelo zokuqala zomkhiwa. Kodwa bafika eBhali-Peyori, bazinikela kuBhali, baba yisinengiso njengento abayithandileyo." 
Hosea9:11 Udumo lukaEfrayimi luzaphapha luhambe njengenyoni, kungabikho ukuzala, lokuthatha isisu, lokukhulelwa." 
Hosea9:12 Loba bekhulisa abantwana, ngizabemuka bona, kungasali loyedwa. Maye kibo lapho ngisuka kibo!" 
Hosea9:13 Njengokubona kwami abantwana bakoEfrayimi bazakuba yimpango; uEfrayimi kakhuphele abantwana bakhe ukubulawa. 
Hosea9:14 Banike, Nkosi! Uzabanikani? Banike isisu esiphumayo lamabele angelalutho." 
Hosea9:15 Bonke ububi babo baqala eGiligali, ngalokho ngabazonda khona. Ngenxa yobubi bezenzo zabo ngizabaxotsha endlini yami. Kangisayikubathanda; bonke ababusi babo bayahlamuka." 
Hosea9:16 AbakoEfrayimi batshayiwe; impande yabo yomile, kabayikuthela izithelo. Loba bezala, ngizabulala isithelo sesizalo sabo esithandekayo." 
Hosea9:17 UNkulunkulu wami uzabalahla, ngoba kabamlalelanga; bazakuba ngabazulayo phakathi kwezizwe." 
Hosea10:1 UIsrayeli ulivini elihle kakhulu elithelayo izithelo. Ngokwanda kwezithelo zakhe wandisa amalathi akhe; langokwanda kobuhle belizwe lakhe wenza insika zakhe eziyizithombe zibe zinhle. 
Hosea10:2 Inhliziyo yabo ikhohlakele, khathesi sebezathwala icala labo. Izabhidliza amalathi abo, idilize lensika zabo eziyizithombe." 
Hosea10:3 Ngoba khathesi sebezakuthi: Kasilankosi thina, ngoba kasiyesabi i Nkosi; inkosi-ke ingasenzelani?" 
Hosea10:4 Bakhuluma amazwi nje, benze izivumelwano ngezifungo zamanga; isigwebo sesinjengokhula olubulalayo olukhula emifolweni yensimu." 
Hosea10:5 Abakhileyo eSamariya bayathuthumela ngethole leBeti-Aveni. Abantu balo bazalililela, labapristi bezithombe balikhalele, bekhalela ubuhle balo osebususiwe kulo." 
Hosea10:6 Yebo, lona lizathwalelwa eAsiriya, libe ngumthelo enkosini enkulu. UEfrayimi uzayangeka, loIsrayeli abe lenhloni ngokungalaleli kwakhe." 
Hosea10:7 ISamariya lenkosi yayo kuzanyamalala njengebazelo elindendayo emanzini. 
Hosea10:8 Indawo eziphakemeyo zokukhonzela ezilize eziyisono sikaIsrayeli zizachithwa; ameva lokhula oluhlabayo kuzamila emalathini abo. Bazakuthi ezintabeni: Sisibekeleni; bathi lemaqaqeni: Welani phezu kwethu. 
Hosea10:9 Kusukela ensukwini zeGibeya wonile, Israyeli, kulokhu kusenjalo lalamuhla." 
Hosea10:10 Ngizabasukela abantu abahlamukayo, ngibatshaye; izizwe zizababuthanela nxa betshayelwa izono zabo ezinengi." 
Hosea10:11 UEfrayimi ulithokazi elithambileyo elithanda ukubhula amabele; ngilibophele ejogweni; ngambophela uEfrayimi, ukuze alime, loJakobe wambulalela amagade." 
Hosea10:12 Zihlanyeleleni ukulunga, livune izithelo zothando; qhathani ingqatho yenu, ngoba kuyisikhathi sokuyidinga i Nkosi, ukuze ifike, ithele ukulunga phezu kwenu." 
Hosea10:13 Lilime ububi, lavuna ukungalungi, lidlile izithelo zamanga. Ngoba lithembile indlela yenu, lobunengi bamaqhawe enu;" 
Hosea10:14 ngalokho kuzakuba khona ukuxokozela kwempi phakathi kwabantu bakini, kudilizwe lenqaba zenu zonke njengalokhu ushalimani wachitha iBetiAribeli ngosukulwempi, kwachotshozwa onina labantwana babo." 
Hosea10:15 Kuzakuba njalo kuwe, Israyeli, ngenxa yobubi bakho obukhulu; njengoba ilanga lingaphuthi ukuphuma, kunjalo-ke lenkosi kuIsrayeli izachithwa." 
Hosea11:1 UIsrayeli esengumntwana ngamthanda, ngayibiza indodana yami ukuthi iphume eGibhithe." 
Hosea11:2 Kwathi ngibabiza, kwaba khona besuka kimi; baqhubeka ukuhlabela oBhali lokutshisela izithombe ezibaziweyo impepha." 
Hosea11:3 Kanti kwakuyimi engacathulisa uEfrayimi, ngabaphatha abantu bami ezingalweni zami, kodwa kabazanga ukuthi ngibelaphile." 
Hosea11:4 Ngabadonsa ngamagoda omusa langentambo zothando, ngenza kibo njengomuntu ophakamisela umntwana emlonyeni ukumanga, ngakhothama kibo, ngabanika ukudla." 
Hosea11:5 Bazabuyela elizweni leGibhithe, leAsiriya lizakuba yinkosi yabo, ngoba balile ukubuya kimi." 
Hosea11:6 Inkemba izatheleka emizini yabo, yephule lemigoqo yamasango ayo, ibadle ezinqabeni zabo." 
Hosea11:7 Abantu bami baqonde ukuhlehla kimi, lanxa bekhuleka kuNkulunkulu wabo ophakemeyo, kodwa kayikubasiza." 
Hosea11:8 Ngizakulahla njani, Efrayimi? Ngizakunikela njani, Israyeli? Ngizakwenza njani ube njengeAdima? Ngizakuphatha njani njengeZeboyimi? Inhliziyo iyala phakathi kwami, lesihawu sami siyaqubuka." 
Hosea11:9 Kangiyikwenza njengokuthukuthela kwami okukhulu. Kangiyikuphinda ngimchithe uEfrayimi; ngoba mina nginguNkulunkulu, kangisuye umuntu, ngingoNgcwele ophakathi kwenu, kangiyikuza ukuchitha," 
Hosea11:10 Bazayilandela i Nkosi ezabhonga njengesilwane; yebo, izabhonga, lamadodana ayo azavela entshonalanga ngokuphangisa." 
Hosea11:11 Azavela eGibhithe ngokuphangisa njengenyoni, lanjengamajuba evela elizweni leAsiriya; ngizababuyisela emizini yabo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Hosea11:12 UEfrayimi ungizingelezele ngamanga, loIsrayeli ungiphahlile ngenkohliso; loJuda uyangihlamuka, mina othembekileyo longcwele." 
Hosea12:1 UEfrayimi uhamba lomoya, alandele umoya wempumalanga usuku lonke; bayandisa amanga lesihluku, benze isivumelwano leAsiriya, base amafutha eGibhithe." 
Hosea12:2 I Nkosi ilecala loJuda, izamtshaya uJakobe ngokufanele indlela zakhe, imphindisele ngokufanele izenzo zakhe." 
Hosea12:3 Lesiswini waphica umfowabo, eseyindoda wabindana lonkulunkulu." 
Hosea12:4 Wabindana lengilosi wanqoba, wakhala inyembezi ecela umusa kuyo. Wahlangana lonkulunkulu eBhetheli, uNkulunkulu wakhuluma laye lapho." 
Hosea12:5 Uyi Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wamabandla, yi Nkosi ibizo lakhe." 
Hosea12:6 Ngakho-ke, wena, ngokusizwa nguNkulunkulu wakho, buyela, ubambelele othandweni lakokufaneleyo, uthembe kuNkulunkulu wakho njalonjalo." 
Hosea12:7 Wena Israyeli, unjengomthengi ophethe izilinganiso ezikhohlisayo othanda ukuqilibezela." 
Hosea12:8 UEfrayimi uthe: Senginothile, ngizizuzele inotho. Kodwa yonke inotho yakhe ingelihlawulele icala alenzileyo." 
Hosea12:9 Mina ngiyi Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, kusukela ekuhlaleni kwakho elizweni leGibhithe. Ngisazakuhlalisa emathenteni njengensukwini zomkhosi omisiweyo." 
Hosea12:10 Ngakhuluma kubaprofethi, yimi engandisa imibono, ngakhuluma ngemifanekiso ngabaprofethi." 
Hosea12:11 Kwakukhonzwa izithombe eGileyadi yini? Yebo, babonakele, bahlabela onkulunkulu bezinkunzi eGiligali. Amalathi abo anda njengenqumbi zamatshe emasimini." 
Hosea12:12 UJakobe wabalekela elizweni leSiriya, lapho uIsrayeli asebenzela khona ukuthola umfazi, welusa izimvu ngenxa yomfazi." 
Hosea12:13 I Nkosi yamkhupha uIsrayeli eGibhithe ngomprofethi, walondolozwa ngumprofethi." 
Hosea12:14 UEfrayimi ucunule ngokubabayo kakhulu; ngakho iNkosi yakhe izakwehlisela phezu kwakhe icala lakhe legazi, ibuyisele kuye inhlamba yakhe." 
Hosea13:1 Kwakusithi lapho uEfrayimi ekhuluma, abantu bathuthumele, wayemkhulu kuIsrayeli wonke; kodwa wazehlisela icala ngokukhonza uBhali, wafa." 
Hosea13:2 Khathesi sebesona kakhulu, bazenzela izithombe ezibunjwe ngokuncibilikisa, izithombe ezenziwe kuhle ngesiliva sabo, zonke ziyimisebenzi yezingcitshi. Bathi: Hlabelani lezi imihlatshelo. Abantu banga izithombe zamathole." 
Hosea13:3 Ngalokho-ke bazakuba njengenkungu yasekuseni, babe njengamazolo aphela ekuseni, njengomule ophephuka ebaleni lokubhulela, njengentuthu ethunqa ngetshimini." 
Hosea13:4 Mina ngiyi Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wakho, kusukela ekuhlaleni kwakho elizweni leGibhithe; kawumazi omunye uNkulunkulu ngaphandle kwami, kakho omunye umsindisi ngaphandle kwami." 
Hosea13:5 Yimi engakulondoloza enkangala, elizweni lokoma." 
Hosea13:6 Kodwa nxa usudlile kakhulu, wasutha, lenhliziyo yakho yazikhukhumeza; wasungikhohlwa." 
Hosea13:7 Ngalokho-ke ngizakuba njengesilwane kuwe, njengengwe ngizakucathamela," 
Hosea13:8 ngikudumele njengebhere elithathelwe imidlwane yalo, ngidabule isifuba sakho, ngikudlele lapho njengesilwane, ngikudabudabule njengesilo." 
Hosea13:9 Ngizakuchitha, Israyeli; ngubani ongakusiza?" 
Hosea13:10 Ingaphi inkosi yakho khathesi ukuze ikusize? Bangaphi ababusi bakho bonke ukuze bakuvikele? labo owathi ngabo: Nginike inkosi lababusi. 
Hosea13:11 Ngikunikile amakhosi ekuthukutheleni kwami, ngawasusa ngolaka lwami." 
Hosea13:12 Ububi bukaEfrayimi bubhaliwe egwalweni, lesono sakhe usibekelwe." 
Hosea13:13 Umhelo uyamfikela, kodwa unjengomntwana oyisiphukuphuku, othi isikhathi sakhe sesifikile, kodwa kaphumi esiswini." 
Hosea13:14 Ngizabahlawulela emandleni esihogweni yini? ngibahlenge ekufeni yini? Kufa, bangaphi omatshayabhuqe wesifo bakho? Sihogo, kungaphi ukuchitheka kwakho? Isihawu kasisekho kimi." 
Hosea13:15 Loba uIsrayeli ekhahlela phakathi kwemihlanga, kuzafika umoya wempumalanga, isivunguzane esivela e Nkosi ni siphuma enkangala; imithombo yakhe izakutsha, kome lamaxhaphozi akhe; sithathe inotho yakhe, izinto zonke eziligugu." 
Hosea13:16 ISamariya izathwala icala layo, ngoba ihlamukele uNkulunkulu wayo,bazakuwa ngenkemba, labantwana babo bachotshozwe, labakhulelweyo babo baqhaqhwe." 
Hosea14:1 Buyela e Nkosi ni, uNkulunkulu wakho, Israyeli. Ngoba ukhutshwe yibubi bakho." 
Hosea14:2 Thathani amazwi lani, libuyele e Nkosi ni; lithi kiyo: Susa konke okubi, wemukele okuhle; ngakho sizanikela amajongosi endebe zethu." 
Hosea14:3 leAsiriya kayiyikusisiza, kasisayikugada amabhiza; kasisayikutsho kuzo izithombe zethu ukuthi: Ungunkulunkulu wethu. Kuwe intandane iyathola umusa." 
Hosea14:4 Ngizakwelapha ukuhlehlela kwabo emuva, ngibathande ngesihle, ngoba intukuthelo yami iphindile kuye." 
Hosea14:5 Ngizakuba njengamazolo kuIsrayeli; uzakhahlela njengomduze, agxumekeke njengomkhaya omhlophe." 
Hosea14:6 Amahlumela akhe azanaba, lobuhle bakhe bube njengesihlahla somhlwathi, lephunga lakhe libe njengeLebhanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Bazabuya bahlale emthunzini wami, batshaye inala yamabele, bakhahlele njengevini, babe lodumo njengewayini leLebhanoni." 
Hosea14:8 UEfrayimi uselendaba lezithombe yini? Mina ngiyamphendula ngimcinge. Mina nginjengefiri elihlala liluhlaza, izithelo zakhe zivela kimi." 
Hosea14:9 Lowo ohlakaniphileyo aziqedisise lezizinto; lowo oqondayo azazi; ngoba indlela ze Nkosi zilungile, labaqotho bayahamba ngazo, kodwa abaphambuki bayakhubeka kuzo." 
Joel1:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJoweli. indodana kaPethuweli, lisithi:" 
Joel1:2 Zwanini lokhu, lina badala, libeke indlebe lonke abakhileyo elizweni. Kwake kwenzeka okunje ensukwini zenu lensukwini zaboyihlo yini?" 
Joel1:3 Kutsheleni abantwana benu, labantwana benu bakutshele abantwana babo, labantwana babo bakutshele esinye isizukulwana esibalandelayo." 
Joel1:4 Okutshiywe yintothoviyane kwadliwa yisikhonyane; okutshiywe yisikhonyane kwadliwa liqhwagi; lokutshiywe liqhwagi kwadliwa yinswabanda. 
Joel1:5 Phaphamani, lina zidakwa, likhale inyembezi; lilani lonke, lina banathi bewayini, lililele iwayini elitsha, ngoba liqunyiwe lisuke emlonyeni wenu." 
Joel1:6 Ngoba isizwe sihlasele ilizwe lami, silamandla, kasilakubalwa, Amazinyo aso anjengawesilwane, silamazinyo amakhulu njengesiIwane esisikazi." 
Joel1:7 Siqedile amavini ami, sakhwixula izihlahla zami zemikhiwa, sazebula amaxolo azo. sawaphosela phansi, ingatsha zaso zaba mhlophe qhwa." 
Joel1:8 Lilani njengentombi emsulwa egqoke ilembu lesaka, ililela umyeni wobutsha bayo." 
Joel1:9 Umnikelo wokudla lowokunathwayo uqunyiwe wasuka endlini ye Nkosi. Izikhonzi ze Nkosi, abapristi, ziyakhala." 
Joel1:10 Amasimu aphelile, umhlabathi uyakhala, ngoba amabele aphelile, lewayini elitsha kalisekho, lamafutha ayancipha." 
Joel1:11 Danani, lina balimi bomhlabathi, likhale, lina baphathi bezivini, ngenxa yengqoloyi lebhali*; ngoba isivuno semasimini siphelile." 
Joel1:12 Ivini liyabuna, lomkhiwa wome, ipomegranati*, lesihlahla selala, lomkhuna, zonke izihlahla zeganga sezomile, lentokozo iphelile ebantwini." 
Joel1:13 Gqokani izembatho zokulila, likhale, lina bapristi, lilani, lina zikhonzi zaselathini. Ngenani, lilale emalenjini amasaka bonke ubusuku, lina zikhonzi zikaNkulunkulu wami. Ngoba umnikelo wokudla lomnikelo wokunathwayo igodliwe ukunikelwa endlini kaNkulunkulu wenu." 
Joel1:14 Zilani ukudla, lenze umhlangano onzulu lina badala, buthanisani bonke abakhileyo elizweni, endlini ye Nkosi uNkulunkulu wenu, likhuleke kuyo." 
Joel1:15 Maye ngalolosuku! Ngoba usuku lwe Nkosi luseduze, luzafika njengokuchitheka okulethwa nguSomandla." 
Joel1:16 Ukudla kakuqunywanga phambi kwamehlo ethu yini? Lokuthaba lentokozo kakuphelanga yini endlini kaNkulunkulu? 
Joel1:17 Inhlanyelo iyabola ngaphansi kwamagade; indlu zamabele kazilalutho, leziphala zidilikile, ngoba amabele kawakho." 
Joel1:18 Yeka ukukhala kwezifuyo! Imihlambi yenkomo ididekile ngoba kayilalo idlelo; lemihlambi yezimvu ihluphekile. 
Joel1:19 Ngiyakhala kuwe, Nkosi, ngoba umlilo utshisile amadlelo, lamalangabi atshisa zonke izihlahla zeganga." 
Joel1:20 Lenyamazana zeganga ziyakhala kuwe, ngoba imifula yamanzi itshile, lomlilo utshisile amadlelo eganga." 
Joel2:1 Vuthelani uphondo eZiyoni, lihlabe umkhosi entabeni yami engcwele. Kabathuthumele bonke abakhileyo elizweni, ngoba usuku lwe Nkosi luyeza, seluseduze," 
Joel2:2 usuku lomnyama losizi, usuku lwamayezi lomnyama onzima. Njengobumnyama obembese izintaba, abantu abalamandla abangelakubalwa. Kakuzanga kube khona abanje ngabo kusukela endulo, futhi kabayikuba khona emva kwabo kuyo yonke iminyaka ezayo." 
Joel2:3 Umlilo uyatshisa phambi kwabo, langemva kwabo kuvutha ilangabi. Phambi kwabo ilizwe lifanana lensimu yeEdeni, kodwa ngemva kwabo liyinkangala elugwadule; kakukho okungabaleka kubo." 
Joel2:4 Bafanana lamabhiza, bagijima njengamabhiza." 
Joel2:5 Umsindo wokweqa kwabo ezingqongeni zezintaba unjengomsindo wezinqola zempi, unjengokufahlaza kwelangabi lomlilo otshisa amabibi, banjengabantu abalamandla abahlelelwe impi." 
Joel2:6 Phambi kwabo abantu bayathuthumela, bethuke bonke." 
Joel2:7 Bayahlasela njengamaqhawe, bakhwele imiduli njengamadoda empi, baqhubekele phambili bonke bengaphambuki endleleni zabo." 
Joel2:8 Kabasunduzani, ngulowo lalowo uhamba ngomgwaqo wakhe omkhulu; bafohla phakathi kwezikhali, bengavinjelwa." 
Joel2:9 Bayatheleka emzini, bagijime phezu kwemiduli, bangene ezindlini, bengena ngamawindi njengesela." 
Joel2:10 Nxa besiza, umhlaba uyanyikinyeka phambi kwabo, lamazulu athuthumele. Ilanga lenyanga kuphenduka kube mnyama, lezinkanyezi kucitshe ukukhanya kwazo." 
Joel2:11 I Nkosi izwakalisa ilizwi layo phambi kwebutho layo, ngoba ibutho layo likhulu kakhulu; logcina ilizwi layo ulamandla. Ngoba usuku lwe Nkosi lukhulu, luyesabeka kakhulu; ngubani ongalumela?" 
Joel2:12 Kanti lakhathesinje, itsho i Nkosi, phendukelani kimi ngenhliziyo yenu yonke, langokuzila ukudla, langokukhala, langokulila," 
Joel2:13 lidabule inhliziyo yenu, hatshi izembatho zenu. Phendukelani e Nkosi ni, uNkulunkulu wenu, ngoba ilesisa lesihawu, iphuza ukuthukuthela, ilobubele obukhulu, izisola ngobubi." 
Joel2:14 Mhlawumbe izaphenduka isihawukele, isitshiyele isibusiso, isibusiso somnikelo wokudla lomnikelo wokunathwayo we Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wenu." 
Joel2:15 Vuthelani uphondo eZiyoni, lizile ukudla, lenze umhlangano onzulu;" 
Joel2:16 buthanisani abantu, libize ibandla, lihlanganise abadala labantwana lensane ezimunyayo. Umyeni kaphume endlini yakhe, lomakoti exhibeni lakhe." 
Joel2:17 Abapristi, izikhonzi ze Nkosi, kabakhale inyembezi phakathi komkoto lelathi, bathi: Bahawukele abantu bakho, Nkosi. ungabenzi babe yinhlamba, lesiga phakathi kwezizwe. Bazatsholoni phakathi kwezizwe ukuthi: Ungaphi uNkulunkulu wabo?" 
Joel2:18 I Nkosi yaliphisekela ilizwe layo, yaba lesihawu ebantwini bayo." 
Joel2:19 I Nkosi yabaphendula abantu bayo yathi: Khangelani, sengizalinika amabele lewayini elitsha lamafutha, lisuthe; kangisayikuphinda ngilenze inhlamba phakathi kwezizwe." 
Joel2:20 Ngizasusela khatshana lani ibutho elivela enyakatho, ngilixotshele elizweni elomileyo leliyinkangala, uphondo lwalo ngiluxotshele elwandle lwempumalanga, lomsila walo elwandle lwentshonalanga; kwenyuke ivumba lalo kwenyuke umnuko walo, ngoba lenzile izinto ezinkulu." 
Joel2:21 Ungesabi, lizwe, kodwa jabula uthokoze, ngoba i Nkosi yenzile izinto ezinkulu." 
Joel2:22 Lingesabi, zinyamazana zeganga, ngoba amadlelo enkangala asehlumile; izihlahla zithela izithelo zazo, umkhiwa levini kuthelile kakhulu." 
Joel2:23 Thabani, lina beZiyoni, lithokoze nge Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wenu; ngoba ilinikile izulu lensewula ukuze ilibusise, yalinisela izulu elinengi, lensewula lelamuva njengakuqala." 
Joel2:24 Amabala okubhulela azagcwala amabele, lezikhamelo zewayini ziphuphume ngewayini elitsha lamafutha." 
Joel2:25 Ngizabuyisela kini okwadliwa eminyakeni yesikhonyane leqhwagi lenswabanda lentothoviyane, ibutho lami elikhulu engalithumela kini." 
Joel2:26 Lizakudla okunengi, lisuthe, lidumise ibizo le Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wenu, oliphethe ngokumangalisayo. Abantu bami kabasayikuphinda bayangiswe futhi" 
Joel2:27 Lizakwazi ukuthi ngikhona phakathi kukaIsrayeli, lokuthi mina Nkosi nginguNkulunkulu wenu, kakho omunye. Abantu bami kabasayikuphinda bayangiswe futhi." 
Joel2:28 Kuzakuthi emva kwalokho ngithele umoya wami phezu kwayo yonke inyama; amadodana enu lamadodakazi enu azaprofetha, labadala benu baphuphe amaphupho, lamajaha enu abone imibono." 
Joel2:29 Laphezu kwenceku lencekukazi ngizathela umoya wami ngalezonsuku. 
Joel2:30 Ngizaveza izimangaliso emazulwini lemhlabeni, igazi, lomlilo, lentuthu ethunqayo." 
Joel2:31 Ilanga lizaphenduka umnyama, lenyanga ibe ligazi, lungakafiki usuku lwe Nkosi olukhulu lolwesabekayo." 
Joel2:32 Kuzakuthi bonke abakhuleka ebizweni le Nkosi bakhululwe; ngoba entabeni yeZiyoni kuzakuba khona labo abaphunyukileyo, njengokutsho kwe Nkosi, leJerusalema kube khona abaseleyo ababizwe yi Nkosi." 
Joel3:1 Ngoba khangela, ngalezonsuku langalesosikhathi lapho ngibuyisa impumelelo yamaJuda labeJerusalema," 
Joel3:2 ngizabutha zonke izizwe, ngizilethe esihotsheni sikaJehoshafathi, ngizigwebe khona ngenxa yabantu bami lesizwe sami uIsrayeli, ngoba zabachithachitha phakathi kwezizwe, zabelana ilizwe lami," 
Joel3:3 zenza inkatho yokuphosa ngabantu bami, zenanisa abafana ngamawule, zathengisa amankazana ngewayini, zalinatha." 
Joel3:4 Liyini kimi, lina Tire leSidoni, lani lonke zabelo zeFilisti? Liyangiphindisela ngolutho yini? Uba lingiphindisela ngolutho, ngizaphangisa ukulibuyisela ngezenzo zenu." 
Joel3:5 Ngoba lithethe isiliva sami legolide lami, lathwalela inotho yami eligugu emathempelini enu." 
Joel3:6 Lathengisa abantu bakoJuda labeJerusalema kumaGriki, labasusela khatshana lelizwe labo." 
Joel3:7 Khangela, ngizabavusa endaweni elabathengisa kiyo, ngilibuyisele ngezenzo zenu." 
Joel3:8 Ngizathengisa amadodana lamadodakazi enu ebantwini bakoJuda, bona bazabathengisa ebantwini beShebha esizweni esikhatshana; ngoba i Nkosi ikhulumile." 
Joel3:9 Memezelani lokhu phakathi kwezizwe lithi: Lungiselani impi, livuse amaqhawe. Kawasondele wonke amadoda empi, azilungisele impi." 
Joel3:10 Khandani amakhuba enu abe yizinkemba, lengqamu zenu zokuthena izihlahla zibe yimikhonto, lobuthakathaka athi: Ngiliqhawe" 
Joel3:11 Phangisani lize, lina zizwe zonke elizingelezeleyo, libuthane esihotsheni sikaJehoshafathi. Thuma amaqhawe akho, Nkosi." 
Joel3:12 Kazizivuse izizwe, zizwe esihotsheni sikaJehoshafathi; ngoba kulapho engizahlala khona ukugweba zonke izizwe ezizingelezeleyo." 
Joel3:13 Fakani isikela, ngoba okuvunwayo sekuvuthiwe. Ngenani linyathele izithelo zevini, ngoba isikhamelo sewayini sesigcwele, lamafatshi asephuphuma, sebubukhulu kangaka ububi bezizwe." 
Joel3:14 Amaxuku ngamaxuku akhona esihotsheni sokugweba. Ngoba usuku lwe Nkosi selusondele esihotsheni sokugweba. 
Joel3:15 Ilanga lenyanga kuzaphenduka kube mnyama, lezinkanyezi kucitshe ukukhanya kwazo." 
Joel3:16 I Nkosi iyavungama iseZiyoni, izwakalisa ilizwi layo iseJerusalema, kunyikinyeke amazulu lomhlaba. Kodwa i Nkosi iyisiphephelo sabantu bayo, lenqaba yabantwana bakoIsrayeli." 
Joel3:17 Ngalokho-ke lizakwazi ukuthi ngiyi Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wenu ohlala eZiyoni, intaba yami engcwele. IJerusalema izakuba ngcwele, abezizwe kabasayikuphinda badlule phakathi kwayo futhi." 
Joel3:18 Kuzakuthi ngalolosuku intaba zigobhoze iwayini elitsha, lamaqaqa ageleze uchago, layo yonke imifula yakoJuda igeleze amanzi, kuzabhoboka umthombo endlini ye Nkosi, uthelele isihotsha seShithimi." 
Joel3:19 IGibhithe lizakuba yinkangala, leEdoma libe yinkangala engelalutho, ngenxa yesihluku esenziwa kwabakoJuda, langenxa yegazi elingelacala abalichitha elizweni labo." 
Joel3:20 Kodwa koJuda kuzakwakhiwa kuze kube nininini, leJerusalema kuze kube sezizukulwaneni zonke." 
Joel3:21 Ngizaphindisela igazi labo, kangiyikumyekela olecala, ngoba i Nkosi ihlala eZiyoni." 
Amos1:1 La ngamazwi kaAmosi owayengomunye wabelusi beThekhowa, awaboniswa ngoIsrayeli ensukwini zikaUziya inkosi yakoJuda, lensukwini zikaJerobowamu indodana kaJowashi inkosi yakoIsrayeli iminyaka emibili ngaphambi kokuzamazama komhlaba." 
Amos1:2 Wathi: I Nkosi iyaduma iseZiyoni, izwakalise ilizwi layo iseJerusalema; amadlelo abelusi atshe, lezingqonga zeKharmeli zibune." 
Amos1:3 I Nkosi ithi: Ngenxa yeziphambeko ezinengi zabeDamaseko kangiyikubayekela, ngoba babhula iGileyadi ngembulo zensimbi." 
Amos1:4 Ngakho ngizathumela umlilo endlini kaHazayeli ozaqeda izinqaba zikaBenihadadi. 
Amos1:5 Ngizakwephula imigoqo yamasango eDamaseko, ngibaqume abakhileyo basuke esihotsheni seAveni, kanye laye obusayo eBetiEdeni, labantu beSiriya bazathunjelwa eKiri; kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos1:6 I Nkosi ithi: Ngenxa yeziphambeko ezinengi zabeGaza kangiyikubayekela, ngoba bathumba isizwe sonke ukuze basinikele kuEdoma." 
Amos1:7 Ngakho ngizathumela umlilo phezu kwemithangala yeGaza ozatshisa izinqaba zalo. 
Amos1:8 Ngizaquma abakhileyo basuke eAshidodi, kanye laye obusayo eAshikeloni, ngiphendulele isandla sami eEkhironi; labaseleyo bamaFilisti bazabhubha; kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Amos1:9 I Nkosi ithi: Ngenxa yeziphambeko ezinengi zabeTire kangiyikubayekela, ngoba banikela isizwe sonke kuEdoma, kabaze bakhumbula isivumelwano sobuzalwane." 
Amos1:10 Ngakho ngizathumela umlilo phezu kwemithangala yeTire ozaqeda izinqaba zalo. 
Amos1:11 I Nkosi ithi: Ngenxa yeziphambeko ezinengi zamaEdoma kangiyikuwayekela, ngoba axotshana labafowabo ngenkemba, aswela isihawu, lolaka lwawo lwavutha njalonjalo, ahlala ethukuthela kokuphela." 
Amos1:12 Ngakho ngizathumela umlilo phezu kweThemani ozaqeda izinqaba zeBozira. 
Amos1:13 I Nkosi ithi: Ngenxa yeziphambeko ezinengi zamaAmoni kangiyikuwayekela, ngoba aqhaqha abesifazana abakhulelwayo eGileyadi, ukuze andise ilizwe labo." 
Amos1:14 Ngakho ngizaphemba umlilo emithangaleni yeRaba ozaqeda izinqaba zalo ngoku memeza esukwini lwempi, langesiphepho esukwini lwesivunguzane;" 
Amos1:15 lenkosi yabo izathunjwa, yona kanye leziphathamandla zayo; kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos2:1 I Nkosi ithi: Ngenxa yeziphambeko ezinengi zamaMowabi kangiyikuwayekela, ngoba atshisa amathambo enkosi yeEdoma aze aba likalaga." 
Amos2:2 Ngakho ngizathumela umlilo koMowabi ozaqeda izinqaba zeKeriyothi, uMowabi afele phakathi kokuxokozela lokumemeza lokukhala kophondo;" 
Amos2:3 ngizaquma umahluleli asuke phakathi kwakhe, ngibulale zonke izikhulu kanye laye; kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos2:4 I Nkosi ithi: Ngenxa yeziphambeko ezinengi zakoJuda kangiyikubayekela, ngoba bawalile umlayo we Nkosi, kabagcinanga izimiso zayo, baduhiswe yizithombe zabo abazikhonzayo oyise." 
Amos2:5 Ngakho ngizathumela umlilo koJuda ozaqeda izinqaba zeJerusalema. 
Amos2:6 I Nkosi ithi: Ngenxa yeziphambeko ezinengi zakoIsrayeli kangiyikubayekela, ngoba bathengisa abalungileyo ngesiliva labaswelayo ngamanyathela;" 
Amos2:7 abalangatha uthuli lomhlaba phezu kwekhanda labayanga, baphambukisa indlela yabamnene. Umuntu loyise baya entombini nye, ukuze bangcolise ibizo lami elingcwele." 
Amos2:8 Bacambalala emaceleni awo wonke amalathi ezembathweni ezinikwe zaba yisibambiso, banathe endlini kaNkulunkulu wabo iwayini labahlawulisiweyo." 
Amos2:9 Kanti mina ngachitha amaAmori phambi kwabo, ubude bawo babulingana lobude bezihlahla zomsedari ezinde, lokuqina kwawo kunjengezihlahla zamaokhi*; kodwa ngachitha izithelo zawo ngaphezulu, lempande zawo ngaphansi." 
Amos2:10 Futhi mina ngalikhupha elizweni leGibhithe, ngalikhokhela enkangala iminyaka engamatshumi amane, ukuze lithumbe ilizwe lamaAmori." 
Amos2:11 Ngavusa abanye emadodaneni enu ukuze babe ngabaprofethi, labanye emajaheni enu ukuze babe ngamaNaziri. Kakunjalo yini lina bantwana bakoIsrayeli? kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos2:12 Kodwa lawanathisa iwayini amaNaziri, labatshela abaprofethi ukuthi bangaprofethi." 
Amos2:13 Khangelani, ngizalinyathela endaweni yenu njengenqola egcwele izithungo inyathela umuntu." 
Amos2:14 Olejubane uzaphelelwa yisiqubu, lolamandla ephelelwe ngamandla, leqhawe kaliyikuzisiza;" 
Amos2:15 ophethe idandili kayikuqina, lolejubane kayikuphunyuka, logade ibhiza kayikuzikhulula," 
Amos2:16 lolesibindi phakathi kwamaqhawe uzabaleka eze ngalolosuku; kutsho i Nkosi. 
Amos3:1 Zwanini lelilizwi i Nkosi elikhulume ngani, lina bantwana bakoIsrayeli, ngesizwe sonke eyasikhupha elizweni leGibhithe, ithi:" 
Amos3:2 Yini kuphela engilikhethileyo, ngalilondoloza ezizweni zonke zomhlaba; ngakho-ke ngizalitshaya ngenxa yabo bonke ububi benu." 
Amos3:3 Ababili bangahamba bonke kanyekanye uba bengavumelananga yini? 
Amos3:4 Isilwane singabhonga ehlathini singabambanga lutho yini? Ibhongo lesilwane libhonge ebhalwini lwaso singelalutho yini? 
Amos3:5 Inyoni ingabanjwa lapho engathiywanga khona yini? lomjibila ungathanya uba ungabambanga lutho yini? 
Amos3:6 Uphondo lungavuthelwa emzini abantu bengethuki yini? Umuzi ungehlelwa ngokubi i Nkosi ingakuvumelanga yini? 
Amos3:7 Isibili iNkosi uJehova kayenzi lutho ingazambulelanga inceku zayo abaprofethi imfihlakalo yayo. 
Amos3:8 Isilwane sesibhongile, ngubani ongayikwesaba? INkosi uJehova isikhulumile, ngubani ongayekela ukuprofetha?" 
Amos3:9 Memezelani ezinqabeni zeAsiriya lezinqabeni zelizweni leGibhithe, lithi: Buthanani phezu kwezintaba zeSamariya, libone iziphithiphithi ezinkulu eziphakathi kwayo locindezelo olukiyo." 
Amos3:10 Ngoba kabakwazi ukwenza okulungileyo, kutsho i Nkosi, bagcwalisa inqaba zabo ngomvuzo wokugebenga lokuphanga." 
Amos3:11 Ngakho iNkosi uJehova ithi: Izitha zizazingelezela ilizwe lakini, zichithe amandla enu, ziphangwe inqaba zenu." 
Amos3:12 I Nkosi ithi: Njengalokho umelusi ekhupha emlonyeni wesilwane imilenze emibili loba isiqa sendlebe, ngokunjalo-ke abantwana bakoIsrayeli abahlala eSamariya bazakhutshwa, abalala emibhedeni elamalembu amahle." 
Amos3:13 Zwanini lifakaze ngendlu kaJakobe, kutsho iNkosi uJehova wamabandla; ithi:" 
Amos3:14 Mhla ngiphindisela uIsrayeli ngenxa yeziphambeko zakhe ngizaphindisela amalathi eBhetheli, kwaphuke impondo zelathi ziwele phansi." 
Amos3:15 Ngizatshaya indlu yasebusika lendlu yasehlobo, izindlu zempondo zendlovu zizadilika, lezindlu ezinengi ziwohloke; kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos4:1 Zwanini lelilizwi, lina mankomokazi eBashani, elisentabeni yeSamariya, elicindezela abayanga, linyathezela phansi abaswelayo, elithi kubomkenu: Lethani sinathe." 
Amos4:2 INkosi uJehova ifungile ngebizo layo elingcwele, yathi: Khangelani, insuku zizalifikela lapho bazalihudula ngezingwegwe, labokucina kini ngengwegwe zokubamba inhlanzi." 
Amos4:3 Lizakhutshwa ngezikhala kube ngulowo lalowo ngesiqondene laye, lilahlelwe ngaphandle; kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos4:4 Wozani eBhetheli, lizekona, leGiligali, lizekwandisa izono zenu. lilethe imihlatshelo yenu ekuseni insuku zonke, lengxenye yetshumi yenu kanye ngensuku ezintathu!" 
Amos4:5 linikele umhlatshelo wenu wokubonga ngokuwutshelweyo, limemezele iminikelo yesihle liyizwakalise! ngoba lithanda ukwenza njalo lina bantwana bakoIsrayeli, kutsho iNkosi uJehova." 
Amos4:6 Yimi engalethela indlala emizini yenu yonke, lokusweleka kokudla kuzo zonke indawo zenu; kanti kaliphendukelanga kimi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos4:7 Futhi ngalincitsha izulu kusasele inyanga ezintathu ukuthi kuvunwe; ngalinisa komunye umuzi, kangaze ngalinisa komunye. esinye isiqinti sanethwa, kwathi leso esinganethwanga satsha." 
Amos4:8 Kwasekuhamba imizi emibili loba emithathu. yayanatha amanzi emzini owodwa, kodwa kayikholwanga; kanti kaliphendukelanga kimi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos4:9 Ngalitshaya ngalilethela ukutshisa lengumane, ngatshisa izivande zenu lezivini zenu, izihlahla zenu zemikhiwa lezihlahla zenu zemihlwathi zadliwa zintethe; kanti kaliphendukelanga kimi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos4:10 Ngathumela phakathi kwenu umatshayabhuqe wesifo ofanana loweGibhithe, ngabulala amajaha enu ngenkemba, ngathumba amabhiza enu; ngenza ivumba lenkamba yenu lenyuke; kanti kaliphendukelanga kimi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos4:11 Ngachitha abanye benu njengalokho uNkulunkulu wachitha iSodoma leGomora, lalinjengesikhuni esophulwe eziko; kanti kaliphendukelanga kimi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos4:12 Ngakho-ke ngizakwenza lokhu kuwe, Israyeli; ngoba ngizakwenza lokhu kuwe, zilungiselele ukuhlangana loNkulunkulu wakho, Israyeli." 
Amos4:13 Ngoba khangela, lowo owabumba izintaba, wadala umoya, lotshela umuntu ukuthi imicabango yakhe iyini, owenza ukusa kube mnyama, onyathela ezindaweni eziphakemeyo zomhlaba, yi Nkosi, uNkulunkulu wamabandla, ibizo lakhe." 
Amos5:1 Zwanini lelilizwi engilitsho ngani, libe yisililo, lina ndlu kaIsrayeli." 
Amos5:2 Iwile intombi emsulwa yakoIsrayeli, kayisayikuvuka futhi; iwele phansi emhlabathini wayo, kakho ongayivusa." 
Amos5:3 INkosi uJehova ithi: Emzini okwaphuma kiwo abayinkulungwane kuzasala ikhulu nje, lokwaphuma kiwo abalikhulu kuzasala itshumi nje koIsrayeli." 
Amos5:4 Ngoba i Nkosi ithi kuIsrayeli: Ngidingani ukuze liphile; 
Amos5:5 kodwa lingadingi iBhetheli, lingangeni eGiligali, loba lidlulele eBherishebha, ngoba iGiligali lizathunjwa, leBhetheli lizachitheka." 
Amos5:6 Dingani i Nkosi ukuze liphile, hlezi ilumathe endlini kaJosefa njengomlilo otshisa uqothule, kungabi khona owucitshayo eBhetheli," 
Amos5:7 lina elihlanekela isahlulelo likwenze kube yinto ebabayo, liphosele phansi ukulunga." 
Amos5:8 Yiyo eyenza inkanyezi ezithiwa yisiLimela lezithiwa yiziNja, lephendula umnyama omkhulu ube yikusa, iphendule imini ibe yibusuku, ibize amanzi olwandle iwanisele phezu komhlabathi; yi Nkosi ibizo layo." 
Amos5:9 Yehlisela abalamandla ukuchitheka. lencithakalo phezu kwenqaba. 
Amos5:10 Liyamzonda obakhuzayo enkundleni abonayo, linengwe ngokhuluma iqiniso." 
Amos5:11 Ngenxa yokuthi linyathezela phansi abayanga, libize kibo isipho samabele, kaliyikuhlala kuzo izindlu zamatshe abaziweyo elizakhileyo; lihlanyela izivini ezinhle, kodwa kaliyikunatha iwayini lazo." 
Amos5:12 Ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi iziphambeko zenu zinengi kangakanani, lokuthi izono zenu zinkulu kangakanani, lina elihlupha abalungileyo, lemukele umvuzo wokuthengwa, lixotshe abaswelayo enkundleni." 
Amos5:13 Ngakho-ke ohlakaniphileyo uzazithulela ngalesosikhathi, ngoba kuyisikhathi esibi." 
Amos5:14 Dingani okuhle, hatshi okubi, ukuze liphile, ukuze ibe lani iNkosi uJehova wamabandla njengokutsho kwenu." 
Amos5:15 Zondani ububi lithande okuhle, limise ukwahlulela esangweni; mhlawumbe i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wamabandla ingaba lomusa kunsali yakoJosefa." 
Amos5:16 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wamabandla, iNkosi, ithi: Edangeni yenu yonke kuzakuba khona ukulila, lakuzo zonke indlela bazakuthi: Maye! Maye! Bazabiza abalimi ukuze balile, labakwaziyo ukukhala ukuze balile." 
Amos5:17 Lakuzo zonke izivini kuzakuba khona ukulila, ngoba ngizadabula phakathi kwenu, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos5:18 Maye kini, lina elifisa usuku lwe Nkosi! Usuku lwe Nkosi luzalisizani? Ngoba lungumnyama, kalusikho ukukhanya." 
Amos5:19 Kunjengomuntu obalekele isilwane, ehlangane lebhere, loba angene endlini abambelele ngesandla emdulini, alunywe yinyoka." 
Amos5:20 Angithi usuku lwe Nkosi lungumnyama, kalusikho ukukhanya, usuku lomnyama ongelakukhanya?" 
Amos5:21 Ngiyayizonda, ngiyayidelela imikhosi yenu, kangithokozi ngemihlangano yenu enzulu." 
Amos5:22 Lanxa linikela kimi iminikelo yenu yokutshiswa leminikelo yenu yokudla, kangiyikuyemukela, leminikelo yokuthula yezifuyo yenu ezinonileyo kangiyikuyinanza." 
Amos5:23 Susani kimi umsindo wezingoma zenu. kangiyikulalela lokukhala kwamachacho enu. 
Amos5:24 Kodwa okufaneleyo kakugobhoze njengamanzi, lokulunga kugeleze njengemifula engacitshiyo." 
Amos5:25 Lina ndlu kaIsrayeli lake laletha kimi imihlatshelo leminikelo enkangala okweminyaka engamatshumi amane yini? 
Amos5:26 Lizathwala uSakuthi inkosi yenu loKayiwane inkanyezi kaNkulunkulu wenu, izithombe zenu elizenzele zona." 
Amos5:27 Ngakho-ke ngizalenza ukuthi lithunjelwe ngaphambi kweDamaseko, kutsho i Nkosi, ebizwa ngokuthi nguNkulunkulu wamabandla." 
Amos6:1 Maye kubo abachelesileyo eZiyoni labalondolozekileyo entabeni yeSamariya, amadoda adumileyo esizwe sokuqala abaya kuyo indlu kaIsrayeli!" 
Amos6:2 Dlulelani eKaline libone, lisuke lapho liye eHamathi elikhulu, beselisehlela eGathi lamaFilisti. Bona bangcono kulalimibuso yini? Ilizwe labo likhulu kulelizwe lenu yini?" 
Amos6:3 Lina elibeka khatshana usuku olubi lisondeze eduze isikhathi sobubi. 
Amos6:4 Maye kulabo abalala phezu kwemibheda eyenziwe ngophondo lwendlovu, bacambalale phezu kwemibheda yabo, badle inyama yamawundlu avela emhlanjini, leyamankonyana avela esibayeni," 
Amos6:5 betshotsha izingoma ngechacho beziqambela izinto zokukhaliswa njengoDavida," 
Amos6:6 benatha iwayini ngemiganu yokufafaza, bazigcobe ngamagcobo amahle, kodwa kabadabukeli ukuchitheka kukaJosefa." 
Amos6:7 Ngakho-ke bazathunjwa kuqala, kuphele ukuxokozela kwabacambalalayo." 
Amos6:8 INkosi uJehova ifungile ngayo uqobo, yathi: Ngiyanengwa yikuzigqaja kukaJakobe, ngizonda inqaba zakhe; ngizawunikela umuzi lakho konke okukuwo." 
Amos6:9 Kuzakuthi uba kusele amadoda alitshumi endlini yinye azakufa. 
Amos6:10 Lapho isihlobo somunye wawo esitshisa amathambo akhe sithatha amathambo ukuze siwakhuphe endlini, sithi kophakathi endlini isibili: Kusekhona omunye umuntu olawe yini? Yena uzakuthi: Hatshi. Thula, ungaliphathi ibizo le Nkosi." 
Amos6:11 Ngoba khangela, ngokulaya kwe Nkosi, izatshaya indlu enkulu ibe yizihlephu, lencinyane ibe yizicucu." 
Amos6:12 Kambe amabhiza angagijima emadwaleni yini? Kuyalinywa khona ngezinkabi yini? Liphendulele okufaneleyo kwaba ngumuthi obulalayo, lezithelo zokulunga zaba yinto ebabayo." 
Amos6:13 Lina elithokoza ngeLodebari lithi: Kasizithumbelanga iKarnayimi yini ngamandla ethu? 
Amos6:14 Ngoba khangelani, ng izalivusela isizwe, lina ndlu kaIsrayeli, kutsho i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wamabandla; sizalicindezela kusukela ekuyeni eHamathi kuze kube semfuleni wenkangala." 
Amos7:1 INkosi uJehova yangitshengisa lokhu; khangela, yenza isikhonyane ekuhlumeni kotshani bamuva, njalo khangela, kwakungutshani bamuva emva kokusikwa kotshani benkosi." 
Amos7:2 Kwathi lapho sesidlile utshani belizwe, ngathi: Nkosi uJehova, ake uthethelele, ngiyakuncenga. Uzaphepha njani uJakobe emncinyane kangaka?" 
Amos7:3 I Nkosi yazisola ngalokhu, yathi: Lokhu kakuyikwenzeka." 
Amos7:4 INkosi uJehova yasingitshengisa lokhu; khangela, yehlisa umlilo ukugweba ngawo, owaqothula amanzi amanengi, owawusuzaqeda ilizwe." 
Amos7:5 Ngasengisithi: Nkosi Jehova, ake ume, ngiyakuncenga. Uzaphepha njani uJakobe emncinyane kangaka?" 
Amos7:6 I Nkosi yazisola ngalokhu, yathi iNkosi uJehova: Lokhu lakho kakuyikwenzeka." 
Amos7:7 Yasingitshengisa lokhu; khangela, iNkosi yayimi emdulini owakhiwa ngentambo yokumisa iphethe intambo yokumisa esandleni sayo." 
Amos7:8 Yathi kimi: Amosi, ubonani? Ngathi: Ngibona intambo yokumisa. INkosi yasisithi: Khangela, ngiyabeka intambo yokumisa phakathi kwabantu bami uIsrayeli; kangisayikubayekela futhi;" 
Amos7:9 indawo eziphakemeyo zokukhonzela zikaIsaka zizavalwa, lezindlu ezingcwele zakoIsrayeli zizadilizwa; ngizayivukela indlu kaJerobowawamu ngenkemba." 
Amos7:10 UAmaziya umpristi weBhetheli wasethumela ilizwi kuJerobowamu inkosi yakoIsrayeli, wathi: UAmosi uvusela indlu kaIsrayeli, lelizwe kalilakuwamela wonke amazwi akhe." 
Amos7:11 Ngoba uAmosi uthe: UJerobowamu uzakufa ngenkemba, loIsrayeli athunjelwe elizweni elikhatshana." 
Amos7:12 UAmaziya wasesithi kuAmosi: Wena mboni, hamba ubalekele elizweni lakoJuda, udle ukudla khona, uprofethe lapho," 
Amos7:13 ungaprofethi futhi eBhetheli, ngoba liyindlu yokukhonzela yenkosi lethempeli lombuso." 
Amos7:14 UAmosi wasemphendula uAmaziya esithi: Kangisuye umprofethi mina, futhi kangisindodana yomprofethi; kodwa ngingumelusi lomhlanyeli wemikhiwa yesikhamore." 
Amos7:15 I Nkosi yangithatha ekweluseni, yathi kimi: Hamba uyeprofetha ebantwini bami uIsrayeli." 
Amos7:16 Ngakho-ke zwana ilizwi le Nkosi. Wena uthi: Ungaprofethi ngoIsrayeli, ungakhulumi ngendlu kaIsaka." 
Amos7:17 I Nkosi yona ithi: Umkakho uzakuba liwule phakathi komuzi; amadodana lamadodakazi akho azakuwa ngenkemba, lelizwe lakini lizadatshulwa phakathi ngentambo; wena-ke uzafela elizweni elingcolileyo, uIsrayeli athunjelwe elizweni elikhatshana." 
Amos8:1 INkosi uJehova yangitshengisa lokhu, khangela, isitsha sezithelo zasehlobo." 
Amos8:2 Yathi kimi: Amosi, ubonani? Ngathi: Ngibona isitsha sezithelo zasehlobo. I Nkosi yasisithi kimi: Ukuphela sekufikile ebantwini bami uIsrayeli; kangisayikubayekela futhi." 
Amos8:3 Izingoma zethempelini zizaphenduka zibe yikukhala mhlalokho, kutsho iNkosi uJehova; izidumbu zizagcwala yonke indawo, zikhutshelwe phandle. Thulanike!" 
Amos8:4 Zwanini lokhu, lina elinyathelela phansi abaswelayo, elichitha abayanga belizwe," 
Amos8:5 elithi: Ukuthwasa kwenyanga kuzadlula nini ukuze sithengise amabele? lesabatha lizaphela nini ukuze sidingise amabele ethu, senze isikali sokulinganisa sibe sincinyane, lemali ibe nengi, sikhohlise ngesilinganiso," 
Amos8:6 ukuze sithenge abayanga ngesiliva labaswelayo ngamanyathela, sithengise amakhoba amabele yini?" 
Amos8:7 I Nkosi ifungile ngokuzigqaja kukaJakobe, yathi: Isibili kangiyikuzikhohlwa izenzo zabo kuze kube nininini." 
Amos8:8 Kawuyikuqhaqhazela umhlaba wonke ngalokhu, balile bonke abakhileyo kiwo, ukhukhumale wonke njengomfula inile, uphoseke le lale, ubuye ubohle njengeNile leGibhithe yini?" 
Amos8:9 Ngalolosuku, itsho iNkosi uJehova, ngizatshonisa ilanga emini, ngenze kube mnyama emhlabeni emini ekhanyayo." 
Amos8:10 Ngizaphendula imikhosi yenu ibe yikukhala, lengoma zenu zonke zibe yikulila, livunule amalembu amasaka enkalweni zonke liphuce amakhanda enu, kube yisililo esinjengesokulilela indodana eyodwa, kube lusuku olubabayo." 
Amos8:11 Khangelani, insuku ziyeza, kutsho iNkosi uJehova, lapho ngizathumela indlala elizweni, kungabi yindlala yokudla, kungabi ngeyokomela amanzi, kodwa kube ngeyokuzwa amazwi e Nkosi." 
Amos8:12 Abantu bazazula kusukela elwandle kuze kube selwandle, kusukela enyakatho kuze kube sempumalanga, bagijimele le lale, bedinga ilizwi le Nkosi, bangalitholi." 
Amos8:13 Ngalolosuku intombi ezigcweleyo ezinhle lamajaha azaqaleka ngenxa yokoma. 
Amos8:14 Abafunga isithombe seSamariya besithi: Unkulunkulu wakho, Dani, uyaphila! lokuthi: Indlela yeBherishebha; bazakuwa, bangabe besavuka." 
Amos9:1 Ngayibona iNkosi imi phansi kwelathi, yathi: Tshaya izihloko zezinsika ukuze iminyango inyikinyeke, uzephulele amakhanda abo bonke abantu; abaseleyo ngizababulala ngenkemba; kakuyikuphunyuka loyedwa abaleke." 
Amos9:2 Loba besehlela esihogweni, isandla sami sizabakhupha khona; loba bakhwela besiya emazulwini, ngizabehlisa khona;" 
Amos9:3 loba becatsha engqongeni yeKharmeli, ngizabadinga ngibehlise lalapho; loba becatsha kubuphansi bolwandle, ngizathumela umgobho ukuze ubalume;" 
Amos9:4 loba bethunjwa yizitha zabo, lalapho ngizathumela inkemba ukuze ibabulale; ngizabehlisela okubi ngingabehliseli okuhle." 
Amos9:5 INkosi uJehova wamabandla yiyo ethinta umhlaba uncibilike, bakhale bonke abakhileyo kuwo, ukhukhumale wonke njengomfula iNile, ubuye ubohle njengeNile leGibhithe." 
Amos9:6 Yiyo eyakha indlu zayo emazulwini, yamisa umkhathi wayo phezu komhlaba, ebiza amanzi olwandle, iwanisele phezu komhlaba; yi Nkosi ibizo layo." 
Amos9:7 Kimi kalinjengamaEtiyopiya yini, lina bantwana bakoIsrayeli? itsho i Nkosi. Mina engakhupha uIsrayeli elizweni leGibhithe kangikhuphulanga yini amaFilisti eKafitori lamaSiriya eKiri?" 
Amos9:8 Khangela, amehlo eNkosi Jehova aphezu kombuso owonayo; ngizawuchitha ngiwususe ebusweni bomhlaba, kube kanti kangiyikuyichitha ngokupheleleyo indlu kaJakobe, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Amos9:9 Ngoba khangela, ngizalaya njalo ngizahlungula indlu kaIsrayeli phakathi kwazo zonke izizwe njengo muntu ehlungula ngokhomane, kodwa kakuyikuwela emhlabathini uhlamvu." 
Amos9:10 Zonke izoni ebantwini bami zizakufa ngenkemba, zona ezithi: Okubi kakuyikufinyelela kithi." 
Amos9:11 Ngalolosuku ngizavusa idumba likaDavida eliwileyo, ngivale izikhala zalo, ngilungise okudilikileyo kwalo, ngilakhe kutsha njengensukwini zendulo;" 
Amos9:12 ukuze badle ilifa lokuseleyo eEdoma, lezizweni zonke ezibizwa ngebizo lami, kutsho i Nkosi eyenza lokhu." 
Amos9:13 Khangelani, insuku ziyeza, kutsho i Nkosi, lapho olimayo ezaficana lovunayo. lokhama izithelo zevini aficane lohlanyela inhlanyelo; intaba zizathonta iwayini elimnandi, lamaqaqa wonke ancibilike." 
Amos9:14 Ngizabuyisa abantu bami uIsrayeli bayakhe futhi imizi echithekileyo, bahlale kiyo; bahlanyele izivini, banathe iwayini lazo, balime amasimu, badle izithelo zawo." 
Amos9:15 Ngizabagxumeka elizweni labo, bangabe besasitshulwa futhi elizweni engibanike lona, kutsho i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho." 
Obadiah1:1 Lo ngumbono kaObadiya. INkosi uJehova ithi ngoEdoma: Sizwile imibiko evela e Nkosi ni, kuthunywe isithunywa phakathi kwezizwe ukuze sithi: Vukani, simvukele silwe laye!" 
Obadiah1:2 Khangela, ngizakwenza ube mncinyane phakathi kwezizwe, udeleleke kakhulu." 
Obadiah1:3 Ukuziqhenya kwenhliziyo yakho kukukhohlisile, wena ohlala ezimbalwini zamawa, olendawo ephakemeyo yokuhlala, othi enhliziyweni yakho: Ngubani ozangehlisela phansi?" 
Obadiah1:4 Loba uqonga njengokhozi, loba isidleke sakho sakhiwe phakathi kwezinkanyezi, ngizakwethula khona, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Obadiah1:5 Uba amasela efika kuwe labaphangi ebusuku, kungakanani ukulahlekelwa kwakho, bebengayikuthatha yini lokho abakufunayo? Uba abavuna izithelo zevini befika kuwe, bebengayikutshiya ingcosana yini?" 
Obadiah1:6 Yeka ukuphangwa kukaEsawu! Yeka ukudingisiswa kwamagugu akhe! 
Obadiah1:7 Bonke abangane bakho besivumelwano bakukhohlisile, bakuxotshela emngceleni; ababehlalisene lawe ngokuthula bakwehlule, labangane bakho abathembekileyo bakuthiyile; kakho okuqedisisayo lokhu." 
Obadiah1:8 I Nkosi ithi: Ngalolosuku ngizachitha abahlakaniphileyo eEdoma, ngiqede lokuhlakanipha entabeni yakoEsawu." 
Obadiah1:9 Amaqhawe akho, Themani, azatshaywa luvalo, ukuze lowo lalowo abulawe entabeni kaEsawu." 
Obadiah1:10 Ngenxa yesihluku esenziwa kumfowenu uJakobe uzabanjwa zinhloni, uchithwe uphele du." 
Obadiah1:11 Ngosuku owema ngalo khatshana, ngosuku abezizweni abathumba ngalo impahla yakhe, bangena emasangweni akhe, benza inkatho yokuphosa ngeJerusalema lawe wawunjengomunye wabo." 
Obadiah1:12 Kodwa wawungafanelanga intokozo ngomfowenu esukwini lokuhlupheka kwakhe; wawungafanelanga intokozo ngabantu bakoJuda esukwini lokuchitheka kwabo; wawungafanelanga ukukloloda esukwini losizi lwakhe. 
Obadiah1:13 Ngabe kawungenanga ngesango labantu bami esukwini lokuhlupheka kwabo; ngabe kawuthokozanga ngezinhlupheko zabo esukwini lokuhlupheka kwabo; ngabe kawuphanganga impahla yabo esukwini lokuhlupheka kwabo. 
Obadiah1:14 Wawungafanelanga ukuma emehlukanweni endlela ukumvimbela ekubalekeni kwakhe; wawungafanelanga ukunikela abaphunyukileyo bakhe esukwini losizi lwakhe. 
Obadiah1:15 Ngoba usuku lwe Nkosi lusondele ezizweni zonke. Njengokwenza kwakho kuzakwenziwa njalo lakuwe, Edoma, izenzo zakho zizakwehliselwa ekhanda lakho." 
Obadiah1:16 Njengoba lina linathile inkezo yolaka entabeni yami engcwele, zonke izizwe ezikhona inhlangothi zonke zizanatha kuyo kakhulu zinyamalale." 
Obadiah1:17 Kodwa entabeni yeZiyoni kuzakuba khona abaphunyukileyo, izakuba ngcwele; lendlu kaJakobe izakudla ilifa layo." 
Obadiah1:18 Indlu kaJakobe izakuba ngumlilo, lendlu kaJosefa ibe lilangabi, indlu kaEsawu ibe ngamabibi; bazawatshisa bawaqede; kakuyikuba khona oseleyo endlini kaEsawu; ngoba i Nkosi isikhulumile." 
Obadiah1:19 Abeningizimu bazathumba intaba kaEsawu, abeShefela bathumbe ilizwe lamaFilisti, kanye lelizwe lakoEfrayimi lelizwe iSamariya, loBhenjamini athumbe iGileyadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Abathunjiweyo bebutho lakoIsrayeli bazabuya bathumbe ilizwe lamaKhanani, kuze kufike eZarefathi; labathunjiweyo beJerusalema abaSerafadi bazabuya bathumbe imizi yeningizimu." 
Obadiah1:21 Abasilileyo bakhwele entabeni yeZiyoni ukubusa intaba kaEsawu; i Nkosi yiyo ezabusa. 
Jonah1:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJona indodana kaAmithayi," 
Jonah1:2 lathi: Suka uye eNineve kulowana umuzi omkhulu, umemezele kuwo ukuthi ububi babantu bawo bufinyelele kimi." 
Jonah1:3 Kodwa uJona wasuka waya eTarshishi ukuze abalekele i Nkosi. Wehlela eJafo, wathola khona umkhumbi oya eTarshishi; wakhupha imali yokukhwela, wakhwela kuwo ukuze ahambe labaya eTarshishi, abaleke e Nkosi ni." 
Jonah1:4 I Nkosi yathumela umoya omkhulu olwandle, kwaba khona isiphepho esikhulu, lomkolo wafuna ukudabuka phakathi." 
Jonah1:5 Abawuqhubayo besaba, lowo lalowo wakhala kuNkulunkulu wakhe; baphosela olwandle impahla eyayisemkhunjini ukuze ube lula. Kodwa uJona wayehlele phakathi komkolo, walala khona." 
Jonah1:6 Induna yomkolo, yamfica khona yathi kuye: Ulani wena olele ubuthongo? Vuka, ukhuleke kuNkulunkulu wakho; mhlawumbe luNkulunkulu uzasikhumbula ukuze singabhubhi." 
Jonah1:7 Basebekhulumisana besithi: Wozani senze inkatho yokuphosa, ukuze sibone ukuthi ngubani osibangele lobububi. Basebesenza inkatho yokuphosa, inkatho yabo yawela phezu kukaJona." 
Jonah1:8 Basebesithi kuye: Akusitshele ukuthi ngubani osibangele lobububi. Wenzani lapha? Uvela ngaphi? Ungowangaphi? Ungowesiphi isizwe? 
Jonah1:9 Yena wathi kibo: NgingumHebheru, ngikhonza i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wamazulu owenza ulwandle lomhlabathi owomileyo." 
Jonah1:10 Basebesethuka kakhulu labobantu, bathi: Wenzeni? Ngoba basebesazi ukuthi ubalekile e Nkosi ni lokhu wayesebatshelile." 
Jonah1:11 Basebesithi kuye: Sizakwenzani kuwe ukuze ulwandle luthule? Ngoba ulwandle lwalulokhu luvubeka. 
Jonah1:12 Wathi kibo: Ngithathani, lingiphosele olwandle; khona-ke ulwandle luzathula; ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi lesisiphepho esikhulu silifikele ngenxa yami." 
Jonah1:13 Kodwa-ke amadoda agwedla ngamandla ukuze abuyisele umkhumbi emhlabathini, ehluleka, ngoba ulwandle lwalulokhu luvubeka." 
Jonah1:14 Ngakho-ke basebekhuleka e Nkosi ni besithi: Siyakuncenga, Nkosi, asingabhubhi ngenxa yalumuntu, ungasibekeli umlandu wegazi lomuntu ongelacala; ngoba wena, Nkosi, wenzile njengokuthanda kwakho." 
Jonah1:15 Basebemthatha uJona, bamphosela olwandle; ulwandle lwaseluthula ukuvubeka." 
Jonah1:16 Amadoda ayesaba kakhulu i Nkosi, ayihlabela umhlatshelo, enza izithembiso." 
Jonah1:17 I Nkosi yaletha inhlanzi enkulu ukuze imginye uJona; uJona waba sesiswini senhlanzi insuku ezintathu lobusuku obuthathu. 
Jonah2:1 UJona wasekhuleka e Nkosi ni uNkulunkulu wakhe esesiswini senhlanzi," 
Jonah2:2 esithi: Ekuhluphekeni kwami ngakhala e Nkosi ni, yangiphendula; ngisengcwabeni ngamemeza. wena walizwa ilizwi lami." 
Jonah2:3 Wangiphosela ekujuleni, enhliziyweni zenlwandle, impophoma yangihanqa inhlangothi zonke; wonke amagagasi lamaza akho edlula phezu kwami." 
Jonah2:4 Ngasengisithi: Ngixotshiwe ebusweni bakho; ngizabuya ngilibone njani ithempeli lakho elingcwele? 
Jonah2:5 Amanzi angihanqileyo asefike entanyeni yami, amanzi amanengi angisibekela; ukhula lwathandela ikhanda lami" 
Jonah2:6 ezisekelweni zentaba. Ngatshona elizweni, imigoqo yalo yangivalela kwaze kwaba nini lanini; kanti wangikhupha emgodini, Nkosi Nkulunkulu wami." 
Jonah2:7 Lapho umphefumulo wami uphela amandla, ngayikhumbula i Nkosi; umkhuleko wami wafinyelela kuwe ethempelini lakho elingcwele." 
Jonah2:8 Labo abakhonza izithombe eziyize balahla uthembeko lwabo kuwe. 
Jonah2:9 Kodwa mina ngizanikela umnikelo ngikudumise ngelizwi lokubonga, ngikhokhe izithembiso zami; ukukhulula kungokwe Nkosi." 
Jonah2:10 I Nkosi yakhuluma enhlanzini; inhlanzi yamhlanzela uJona emhlabathini owomileyo. 
Jonah3:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuJona ngokwesibili lisithi: 
Jonah3:2 Suka uye eNineve kulowana umuzi omkhulu, umemezele kulo ilizwi engikutshela lona." 
Jonah3:3 Ngakho uJona wasuka waya eNineve njengokutsho kwelizwi le Nkosi. INineve yayingumuzi omkhulu kakhulu ohanjwa insuku ezintathu. 
Jonah3:4 UJona waqala ukungena emzini, wawuhamba usuku lwaba lunye. Wamemeza wathi: Kusele insuku ezingamatshumi amane ukuthi iNineve lichitheke." 
Jonah3:5 Abantu baseNineve bakholwa kuNkulunkulu, bamemezela ukuthi kuzilwe ukudla, bagqoka amalembu amasaka, kusukela komkhulu wabo kwaze kwafika komncinyane." 
Jonah3:6 Ilizwi lafinyelela enkosini yeNineve; yasuka esihlalweni sayo sobukhosi, yakhulula isembatho sayo, yagqoka ilembu lesaka, yahlala emlotheni." 
Jonah3:7 Yamemezela eNineve yathi: Ngomthetho wenkosi leziphathamandla zayo kakungadli kunathe umuntu lenyamazana lenkomo lemvu; 
Jonah3:8 bonke kabembathe amalembu amasaka, bakhale kakhulu kuNkulunkulu, baphenduke bonke endleleni zabo ezimbi lebubini bonke ababenzayo." 
Jonah3:9 Kwazi bani ukuthi uNkulunkulu angezisole, ludede ulaka lwakhe olukhulu ukuze singabhubhi." 
Jonah3:10 Lapho uNkulunkulu ebona izenzo zabo ukuthi baphendukile ebubini babo, wazisola ngobubi ayezabenza kibo, kasabenzanga." 
Jonah4:1 Kodwa lokho kwaba kubi kakhulu kuJona, wathukuthela." 
Jonah4:2 Wakhuleka eNkosini wathi: Ngiyakuncenga, Nkosi, kayisikho lokhu engakutshoyo ngiseselizweni lakithi yini? Yikho lokhu ngaphangisa ukubalekela eTarshishi; ngoba ngangisazi ukuthi wena unguNkulunkulu olomusa lolesihawu, ophuza ukuthukuthela, ogcwele uthando olungapheliyo, ozisola ngokubi." 
Jonah4:3 Ngakho-ke, Nkosi, ake ungibulale, ngiyakuncenga, ngoba kungcono kimi ukufa kulokuphila." 
Jonah4:4 INkosi yathi: Kambe wenza kuhle ngokuthukuthela? 
Jonah4:5 UJona wasephuma emzini, wayehlala ngasempumalanga komuzi, wazakhela idumba khona, wahlala ngaphansi kwalo emthunzini ukuba abone ukuthi uzakwehlelwa yini umuzi." 
Jonah4:6 INkosi uNkulunkulu yenza ukuba isihlahla somhlafutho sikhule sisithe uJona, sibe ngumthunzi kuye, ukuze simlamulele kokumkhathazayo. UJona wathokoza kakhulu ngenxa yomhlafutho." 
Jonah4:7 Kodwa kusasa ekuphumeni kwelanga uNkulunkulu wenza ukuba impehlane iwutshaye umhlafutho, wasubuna." 
Jonah4:8 Kwathi ekuphumeni kwelanga uNkulunkulu wathumela umoya otshisayo wasempumalanga, ilanga lamtshaya uJona waze wayatha. Wakhulekela ukuba afe. wathi: Kungcono kimi ukufa kulokuphila." 
Jonah4:9 Kodwa unkulunkulu wathi kuye: Kambe wenza kuhle ngokuthukuthela ngenxa yomhlafutho? Yena wathi: Ngenza kuhle ukuthukuthela ngize ngiphose ukufa. 
Jonah4:10 INkosi yathi: Wena ulesihawu ngomhlafutho ongawusebenzelanga, ongawenzanga ukuba ukhule, okhule ngobusuku bunye, wafa futhi ngobusuku bunye." 
Jonah4:11 Mina-ke kangifanelanga yini ukuba lesihawu ngeNineve lowana umuzi omkhulu, okukuwo abantwana abadlula izinkulungwane ezilikhulu lamatshumi amabili abangakwaziyo ukwahiukanisa isandla sokunene esandleni sokhohlo, futhi kukhona inkomo ezinengi?" 
Micah1:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuMika weMoreshethi ensukwini zikaJothamu loAhazi loHezekhiya, amakhosi akoJuda aliboniswa ngeSamariya langeJerusalema." 
Micah1:2 Wathi: Zwanini, bantu lonke, ulalele lawe mhlaba lakho konke okukuwo; iNkosi uJehova kayibe ngumfakazi ngani, iNkosi isethempelini layo elingcwele." 
Micah1:3 Ngoba khangela, i Nkosi iyasuka endaweni yayo, izakwehla inyathele endaweni eziphakemeyo zomhlaba." 
Micah1:4 intaba zizancibilika ngaphansi kwayo lezihotsha ziqekezeke, zincibilike njengengcino phambi komlilo. zibe njengamanzi ageleza emaweni." 
Micah1:5 Konke lokhu kungenxa yezono zikaJakobe, langenxa yezono zikaIsrayeli. Siyini isono sikaJakobe yini? Kasisiyo iSamariya yini? Siyini isono sikaJuda yini? Kasisiyo iJerusalema yini?" 
Micah1:6 Ngakho ngizadiliza iSamariya ngiyenze ibe yindawo yezivini, ngiphosele amatshe ayo esihotsheni, ngiphande izisekelo zayo." 
Micah1:7 Zonke izithombe zalo ezibaziweyo zizaphahlazwa, lawo wonke amahlawulo alo okuwula azatshiswa ngomlilo, lezifanekiso zonke zalo zibulawe; ngoba lizizuze ngamahlawulo amawule, zizabuyiselwa emahlawulweni okuwula." 
Micah1:8 Ngenxa yalokhu ngizalila ngikhaIe, ngihlubule ngihambeze, ngikhale njengamakhanka, ngilile njengezintshe." 
Micah1:9 Ngoba amanxeba alo kawapholi, lokhu sekufikile lakoJuda; kufinyelele esangweni labantu bami eJerusalema." 
Micah1:10 Lingakuxoxi eGathi, lingakhali inyembezi; lizibhuqe ethulini eBetiLeyafra." 
Micah1:11 Dlulani, lina beShafiri, lihambeze lilenhloni; abakhe eZanani kabaphumanga emzini wabo; abeBetiEzeli bayakhala, kabalamandla okulisiza." 
Micah1:12 Ngoba abakhe eMarothi balindele okuhle belovalo. ngoba okubi kwehlile kuvela e Nkosi ni, kwafika esangweni leJerusalema." 
Micah1:13 Bophelani enqoleni amabhiza ale jubane, lina beLakishi; laliyikuqala kwezono zeZiyoni, ngoba iziphambeko zakoIsrayeli zatholakala kini." 
Micah1:14 Ngakho-ke lizanika uMoreshethiGathi isipho sokuvalelisana; iBetiAkizibi lizakuba yinkohliso emakhosini akoIsrayeli. 
Micah1:15 Ngizalilethela umnqobi, lina beMaresha; udumo lukaIsrayeli luzayacatsha ebhalwini lweAdulamu." 
Micah1:16 Phucani inwele zenu ukuze likhalele abantwana elibathandayo; phucani libe njengokhozi, ngoba bazathunjwa kini." 
Micah2:1 Maye kulabo abenza amacebo obubi, benze okubi emibhedeni yabo! Lapho sekusile bazakwenza, ngoba balamandla okukwenza." 
Micah2:2 Bahawukela amasimu, bawathathe ngodlakela, lezindlu bayazithatha; bathathela umuntu umuzi wakhe, bamthathele lelifa lakhe." 
Micah2:3 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi ithi: Khangela, ngenza amacebo amabi ngalesisizwe, elingayikukhupha intamo zenu kuwo; futhi kalisayikuhamba ngokuzikhukhumeza, ngoba kuzakuba yisikhathi esibi leso." 
Micah2:4 Ngalolosuku bazahlabela ingoma eyinhlekisa ngani, bakhale isililo esikhulu, bathi: Ilizwe labantu bakithi labiwe; kakho ongalibuyisa kithi; labo abasithumbileyo basithathele amasimu ethu; sichithekile isibili!" 
Micah2:5 Ngenxa yalokhu kakuyikuba khona ozalenzela inkatho yokuphosa ngentambo ebandleni le Nkosi. 
Micah2:6 Abantu batshumayela bathi: Lingatshumayeli, lingatshumayeli ngalezizinto; ihlazo kaliyikusehlela." 
Micah2:7 Lithi ndlu kaJakobe baqalekisiwe yini? I Nkosi iyaphangisa ukuthukuthela yini? Lezi ziyizenzo zayo yini? Kawamsizi yini amazwi ayo ohamba ngobuqotho? 
Micah2:8 Kanti liyizitha zabantu bami, libahlubule izembatho zabo abathanda ukuthula, lalabo abadlulayo bevela empini, besithi bavikelekile." 
Micah2:9 Lixotshe abesifazana babantu bami ezindlini abazithandayo; ebantwaneni babo lisuse udumo lwami kokuphela. 
Micah2:10 Sukani lihambe, ngoba lapha kakusiyo indawo yokuphumula, ngenxa yokungcola okuletha ukuchitheka okukhulu." 
Micah2:11 Uba kuhambahamba umuntu okhuluma umoya lamanga esithi: Ngizaprofetha kini ngewayini lokunathwayo okulamandla; uzakuba ngumtshumayeli abamthandayo lababantu. 
Micah2:12 Ngizalibutha lonke, lina bakoJakobe, ngibuthe insali yakoIsrayeli, ngibabuthelele ndawonye njengezimvu esibayeni, njengomhlambi osedlelweni lawo, libe lixuku labantu ababanga umsindo." 
Micah2:13 Umkhokheli wabo uzabavulela indlela, bonke bazafohla, bafike esangweni, baphume ngalo. Inkosi yabo izahamba phambi kwabo, bekhokhelwa yiyo." 
Micah3:1 Ngathi: Zwanini, lina nhloko zakoJakobe, lani ziphathamandla zakoIsrayeli. Kakusikho okwenu yini ukwazi ukulunga?" 
Micah3:2 lina elizonda okuhle, lithande okubi, elebula isikhumba sabantu bami, lihlubule inyama emathanjeni abo," 
Micah3:3 elibadla inyama abantu bami, lihlinze isikhumba sabo, lephule amathambo abo, libaqobe njengenyama esembizeni lanjengenyama esebhodweni." 
Micah3:4 Lizakhuleka e Nkosi ni, kodwa kayiyikuliphendula; izalifihlela ubuso bayo ngalesosikhathi, ngoba lenzile okubi." 
Micah3:5 I Nkosi ithi ngabaprofethi abaduhisa abantu bami, ababathembisa ukuthula lapho besazuza ukudla, kodwa lowo ongabaniki ukudla balwe laye:" 
Micah3:6 Ngakho lizafikelwa yibusuku obungelambono, kube mnyama, lingabe lisavumisa; ilanga lizabatshonela abaprofethi, losuku lube mnyama tshu." 
Micah3:7 Ababoni bazayangeka, labavumisi babe lenhloni, bambomboze imilomo yabo, ngoba kungaveli impendulo kuNkulunkulu." 
Micah3:8 Kodwa mina nginikwe amandla, lokulunga lesibindi, ukuze ngimtshele uJakobe iziphambeko zakhe loIsrayeli isono sakhe." 
Micah3:9 Zwanini lokhu, lina nhloko zendlu kaJakobe, lani ziphathamandla zendlu kaIsrayeli, elinenga ukulunga, lihlanekele bonke ubuqotho," 
Micah3:10 elakha iZiyoni ngegazi, leJerusalema ngobubi." 
Micah3:11 Inhloko zayo zahlulelela izipho, labapristi bayo bafundisela inkokhelo, labaprofethi bayo bavumisela imali; kanti beyama e Nkosi ni besithi: I Nkosi kayikho phakathi kwethu yini? Okubi kakuyikusehlela." 
Micah3:12 Ngakho ngenxa yenu iZiyoni izalinywa njengensimu, leJerusalema ibe lunxiwa oludilikileyo, lentaba yethempeli iphenduke ibe lihlathi." 
Micah4:1 Kuzakuthi ensukwini ezizayo intaba yendlu ye Nkosi iphakanyiswe phezu kwazo zonke intaba, yengame wonke amaqaqa; abantu bazabekelela baye kuyo," 
Micah4:2 lezizwe ezinengi zizafika zithi: Wozani sikhwele entabeni ye Nkosi, siye endlini kaNkulunkulu kaJakobe, ukuze asifundise indlela zakhe, ukuze sihambe endleleni zakhe. Ngoba kuzaphuma ukufundisa eZiyoni, lelizwi le Nkosi eJerusalema." 
Micah4:3 Izakwahlulela phakathi kwezizwe ezinengi, equmele izizwe ezilamandla ezikhatshana; zizakhanda inkemba zazo zibe yimilomo yamakhuba, lemikhonto yazo ibe zingqamu zokuthena izihlahla; izizwe kazisayikuphuma impi, kazisayikufunda impi futhi;" 
Micah4:4 kodwa abantu bazazihlalela ngaphansi kwezihlahla zabo zevini, langaphansi kwezomkhiwa, kabayikwethuswa lutho; ngoba umlomo we Nkosi yamabandla ukhulumile." 
Micah4:5 Ngoba bonke abantu balalela uNkulunkulu wabo, kodwa thina sizalalela i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wethu kuze kube nininini." 
Micah4:6 Ngalolosuku, kutsho i Nkosi, ngizababuthanisa abaqhulayo, ngiqoqe abaxotshiweyo lalabo engibahluphileyo." 
Micah4:7 Abaqhulayo ngizabenza babe lixukwana labaseleyo, labadeliweyo babe yisizwe esilamandla; i Nkosi izababusa entabeni yeZiyoni, kusukela khathesi kuze kube nininini." 
Micah4:8 Wena, umphotshongo yomhlambi, ntaba yeZiyoni, kuzafika kuwe ukubusa kwakuqala, umbuso weJerusalema." 
Micah4:9 Usumemezelani kangaka? Kawuselankosi yini? Ubhubhile ummeli wakho yini ukuze wehlelwe ngumhelo njengobelethayo? 
Micah4:10 Zitshile, ububule, Ziyoni, njengowesifazana ohelelwayo; ngoba khathesi uzaphuma emzini, uhlale egangeni; uzakuya leBhabhiloni lapho ozakhululwa khona, lapho i Nkosi ezakuhlenga khona ezitheni zakho." 
Micah4:11 Izizwe ezinengi zibuthene zisithi: Kangcoliswe, lamehlo ethu ajolozele eZiyoni." 
Micah4:12 Kodwa kabayazi imicabango ye Nkosi, kabawaqedisisi amacebo ayo, ukuthi ubabuthelele njengezithungo ebaleni lokubhulela." 
Micah4:13 Sukuma, ubhule, Ziyoni, ngoba ngizakwenza impondo zakho zibe yinsimbi, lamasondo akho abe lithusi. Uzahoboza abantu abanengi, wehlukanisele i Nkosi inzuzo yabo lemfuyo yabo iNkosi yomhlaba wonke." 
Micah5:1 Hlomisa amabutho akho, wena Jerusalema! izitha zikuvimbezele; zizatshaya umbusi wakho, wena Israyeli, esihlathini ngenduku." 
Micah5:2 Kodwa wena, Bhethelehema Efratha, omncinyane ukuthi ube phakathi kwezizwe zakoJuda, kuzavela kuwe othile ozakuba ngumbusi wakoIsrayeli, okudabuka kwakhe kusukela endulo." 
Micah5:3 Ngakho-ke uzabanikela, aze abelethe ohelelwayo, besekubuya koIsrayeli abaseleyo kubafowabo." 
Micah5:4 Uzakuma eluse umhlambi wakhe ngamandla e Nkosi, ngobukhosi bebizo le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakhe. Bazavikeleka, ngoba khathesi esemkhulu kuze kube semingceleni yomhlaba;" 
Micah5:5 uzaletha ukuthula. Lapho umAsiriya engena elizweni lakithi, enyathela emhlabathini wethu, sizahlomisa abelusi abayisikhombisa leziphathamandla zabantu eziyisificaminwembili;" 
Micah5:6 bazabusa ilizwe iAsiriya ngenkemba, lelizwe likaNimrodi, basophule kumaAsiriya lapho engena elizweni lakithi lalapho enyathela phakathi kwalo." 
Micah5:7 Abaseleyo bakoJakobe bephakathi kwabantu abanengi bazakuba njengamazolo avela e Nkosi ni lanjengomkhizo phezu kotshani, okungalindeli muntu, okungahlaleli muntu." 
Micah5:8 Abaseleyo bakaJakobe phakathi kwezizwe, bephakathi kwabantu abanengi bazakuba njengesilwane esiphakathi kwenyamazana zeganga, njengebhongo lesilwane eliphakathi komhlambi wezimvu, esithi lapho sidabula phakathi kwawo sibambe, sinyathele sidabule iziqa, kungabi khona osizayo." 
Micah5:9 Isandla sakho, Israyeli, sizaphakanyiswa phezu kwezitha zakho, zichithwe zonke izitha zakho." 
Micah5:10 Kuzakuthi ngalezonsuku, itsho i Nkosi, ngiqede amabhiza akho phakathi kwakho, ngichithe inqola zakho," 
Micah5:11 ngichithe lemizi yelizwe lakini, ngidilizele phansi inqaba zakini." 
Micah5:12 Ngizaqeda abathakathi phakathi kwenu, kungabe kusaba khona labachasisa ngemibono," 
Micah5:13 ngibulale izithombe zenu ezibaziweyo, ngidilize imizi yenu; kalisayikuphinda likhothamele umsebenzi wezandla zenu." 
Micah5:14 Ngizasiphuna elizweni izixuku zenu, ngichithe lemizi yenu," 
Micah5:15 ngiphindisele ngokuthukuthela langolaka ezizweni ezingalalelanga. 
Micah6:1 Ake lizwe okutshiwo yi Nkosi: Sukumani, lwisana lezintaba, lamaqaqa alizwe ilizwi lenu." 
Micah6:2 Zwanini ukuphikisa kwe Nkosi, lina zintaba, lani zisekelo zomhlaba ezilamandla; ngoba i Nkosi iphikisana labantu bayo, izamelana loIsrayeli." 
Micah6:3 Lina bantu bami, ngenzeni kini? Kuyini engilikhathaze ngakho? Ngiphendulani." 
Micah6:4 Ngoba ngalikhupha elizweni leGibhithe, ngalihlenga endaweni yobugqili; ngathuma oMozisi loAroni loMiriyamu ukuze balikhokhele." 
Micah6:5 Bantu bami, ake likhumbule ugobe lukaBalaki inkosi yakoMowabi, lokuthi uBalami indodana kaBeyori wamphendula njani, likhumbule lalokho okwenzekayo kusukela eShitimi kwaze kwaba seGiligali, ukuze lazi izenzo ezilungileyo ze Nkosi." 
Micah6:6 Ngizakuza ngiphetheni e Nkosi ni, ngikhothame phambi kukaNkulunkulu ophezulu yini? Ngizakuza kuyo ngiphethe umnikelo wokutshiswa, ngilamathole alomnyaka owodwa yini?" 
Micah6:7 I Nkosi izakweneliswa zinqama eziyinkulungwane, lezinkulungwane ezilitshumi zemifula yamafutha yini? Ngizanikela izibulo lami ngenxa yesiphambeko sami, isithelo sesizalo sami ngenxa yesono senhliziyo yami yini?" 
Micah6:8 Ikutshengisile, muntu, okuhle; le Nkosi ifunani kuwe, kodwa ukwenza ukulunga, lokuthanda umusa, lokuhamba ngokuzithoba loNkulunkulu wakho?" 
Micah6:9 Ilizwi le Nkosi liyamemeza kuwo umuzi kuyikuhlakanipha okuqotho ukwesaba ibizo lakho. Zwanini, lina bantu lomphakathi womuzi." 
Micah6:10 Ngingayikhohlwa inotho ezuzwa ngokubi esendlini yababi, lezilinganiso ezikhohlisayo yini?" 
Micah6:11 Ngingamyekela umuntu olezikali ezimbi lesaka eligcwele izilinganiso ezikhohlisayo yini? 
Micah6:12 Abanothileyo benu bagcwele okubi, labakhileyo bakhuluma amanga, lolimi lwabo luyakhohlisa." 
Micah6:13 Ngakho-ke sengizalitshaya, ngilichithe ngenxa yezono zenu." 
Micah6:14 Lizakudla, kodwa lingasuthi, kube khona ukulamba ngaphakathi kwenu; lizalondoloza, kodwa kungalondolozeki; lalokhu elikulondolozayo ngizakunikela enkembeni." 
Micah6:15 Lizahlanyela, kodwa lingavuni; likhame izithelo zemihlwathi, kodwa lingagcobi ngamafutha awo; lizakhama izithelo zevini, kodwa linganathi iwayini lazo elitsha." 
Micah6:16 Ngoba ligcinile izimiso zikaOmri, lenzile yonke imisebenzi yendlu kaAhabi, lahamba ngamacebo abo, ngakho ngizalichitha, labakhileyo benu babe yinhlekisa; lizakweyiswa ngabantu." 
Micah7:1 Maye mina! ngoba senginjengokuvunwa kwezithelo zasehlobo, njengevini eselivunwe laphela; kakuselahlukuzo lokudliwa, lemikhiwa yokuqala engiyithandayo." 
Micah7:2 Abalungileyo babhubhile emhlabeni. kakusekho oqotho phakathi kwabantu; bonke bacathamela ukuchitha igazi, lowo lalowo uzingela umfowabo ngembule." 
Micah7:3 Izandla zabo zikhuthalele ukwenza okubi, isiphathamandla lomahluleli bathengwa ngemali, loyisiphathamandla wahlulela ngokuthanda kwakhe, kuhlanekelwe ukulunga." 
Micah7:4 Omuhle wabo unjengameva, lolungileyo wabo unjengothango lwameva. Usuku lwempindiselo yabo, abatshumayela ngalo abalindi babo, selufikile, lokudideka kwabo sekusondele." 
Micah7:5 Ungamthembi umakhelwane, ungamkholwa umngane; umvalele umlomo umkakho olala lawe." 
Micah7:6 Indodana iyadelela uyise, lendodakazi ivukela unina, umalokazana uvukela uninazala, lezitha zomuntu zingamadoda endlu yakhe." 
Micah7:7 Kodwa mina ngizalindela i Nkosi, ngilindele uNkulunkulu wosindiso lwami; uNkulunkulu wami uzangizwa." 
Micah7:8 Ungathokozi ngami, sitha sami, ngoba lapho ngisiwa, ngizavuka; lapho ngihlezi emnyameni, i Nkosi izakuba yikukhanya kimi." 
Micah7:9 Ngizathwala intukuthelo ye Nkosi, ngoba ngonile kuyo, ize imele indaba yami, ingenzele ukwahlulela. Izangikhuphela ekukhanyeni, ngizabona ukulunga kwayo." 
Micah7:10 Isitha sami sizakukubona, zimbambe inhloni yena owathi kimi: Ingaphi iNkosi uNkulunkulu wakho? Ngizathokoza nxa ngimbona esenyathelwe phansi njengodaka lwendlela." 
Micah7:11 Kuzakufika usuku lokwakhiwa kwemiduli yakho; ngalolosuku imingcele yakho izadediselwa khatshana. 
Micah7:12 Ngalolosuku bazafika kuwe bevela eAsiriya laseGibhithe, kusukela eGibhithe kuze kube semfuleni iYufrathi, bevela kuzo zonke inlwandle lezintaba." 
Micah7:13 Kodwa ilizwe lizachitheka ngenxa yobubi babakhileyo kilo. 
Micah7:14 Yelusa abantu bakho ngentonga yakho, umhlambi ongowakho impela ohlala wodwa ehlathini lasezihotsheni; kawalukele eBashani leGileyadi njengasendulo." 
Micah7:15 Sitshengise izimangaliso njengensukwini zokuphuma kwakho eGibhithe. 
Micah7:16 Izizwe zizabona, zibe lenhloni lanxa zilamandla, zibambe imilomo yazo, lendlebe zazo zibe yizacuthe," 
Micah7:17 Zizahuba ngesisu othulini njengenyoka, lanjengezinto ezihahabayo zomhlaba; zizaphuma enqabeni zazo zithuthumela, ziphendukele eNkosini unkulunkulu wethu ngokwesaba, zitshaywe luvalo ngenxa yakho." 
Micah7:18 Ngubani uNkulunkulu onjengawe, othethelela isono sabantu bakhe abaseleyo ayekele isiphambeko sabo? Kathukutheli kokuphela, ngoba uthokoza ngothando olungapheliyo." 
Micah7:19 Uzasihawukela futhi, anyathele phansi ububi bethu. Wena uzaphosela enzikini yolwandle izono zethu zonke;" 
Micah7:20 uzanika uJakobe ukuthembeka, lenzalo kaAbrahama uthando olungapheliyo, njengokufunga kwakho kubo endulo." 
Nahum1:1 Leli yilizwi ngeNineve. Le yincwadi yombono kaNahume weElikoshi. 
Nahum1:2 I Nkosi inguNkulunkulu olobukhwele ophindiselayo; i Nkosi ingumphindiseli, igcwele ulaka; i Nkosi iphindisela ezitheni zayo, igcinela izitha zayo intukuthelo." 
Nahum1:3 I Nkosi iyaphuza ukuthukuthela, kodwa ilamandla amakhulu, kayiyikumyekela ngitsho olecala; indlela yayo isesivunguzaneni lesiphepheni, lamayezi aluthuli lwenyawo zayo." 
Nahum1:4 Ikhuza ulwandle lutshe, yenze imifula yonke itshe; iBashani leKharmeli kubone, lempoko zeLebhanoni zibune." 
Nahum1:5 Intaba ziyanyikinyeka phambi kwayo, lamaqaqa ayancibilika; ilizwe liyachitheka phambi kwayo, umhlaba labo bonke abakhileyo kuwo." 
Nahum1:6 Ngubani ongema phambi kwentukuthelo yayo? Ngubani ongema ekuvutheni kolaka lwayo? Ulaka lwayo luthululeka njengomlilo, lamadwala aqekezeke phambi kwayo." 
Nahum1:7 I Nkosi ilungile, iyinqaba esukwini lokuhlupheka; iyabakhumbula abaphephela kuyo," 
Nahum1:8 lapho izikhukhula zibafikela; kodwa labo abamelana layo izabachitha bathi nya, ixotshele izitha zayo emnyameni." 
Nahum1:9 Lenza amacebo bani nge Nkosi? Izaqeda konke, kayiyikuphindisela kabili ezitheni zayo." 
Nahum1:10 Njengameva abambeneyo bayaqedwa bonke, baphele njengamabibi omileyo." 
Nahum1:11 Kavelanga yini kuwe, Nineve, owenza amacebo amabi nge Nkosi, wanika iseluleko esibi?" 
Nahum1:12 I Nkosi ithi: Loba amaAsiriya elamandla, futhi emanengi, azaqedwa anyamalale. Loba ngikuhluphile, Juda, kangisayikukuhlupha futhi." 
Nahum1:13 Sengizakwephula ijogwe elikuwe, ngiqamule izibopho zakho." 
Nahum1:14 I Nkosi ilayile ngawe, Nineve, yathi: Kalisayikukhunjulwa ibizo lakho; endlini yabonkulunkulu bakho ngizachitha izithombe ezibaziweyo lezithombe ezibunjwe ngokuncibilikisa; ngizagebhela ingcwaba, ngoba ungcolile." 
Nahum1:15 Khangelani ezintabeni inyawo zakhe oletha indaba ezinhle, omemezela ukuthula. Gcina imikhosi yakho, Juda, ugcwalise izithembiso zakho, ngoba omubi kasayikumelana lawe futhi, uchithiwe waphela nya." 
Nahum2:1 Umchithi ukufikele, wena Nineve, gcina inqaba zakho, ulinde indlela, uqinise ukhalo lwakho, uqinise amandla akho." 
Nahum2:2 Ngoba i Nkosi ibuyisa ubukhosi bukaJakobe bube njengobukhosi bukaIsrayeli; ngoba abahlaselayo balikhwexule ivini. baqeda ingatsha zalo 
Nahum2:3 Izihlangu zamaqhawe akhe zibomvu, amabutho akhe agqoke okuyibubende, lenqola zakhe ziphazima njengamalangabi lapho sezilungisa; amabhiza ayagidagida." 
Nahum2:4 Izinqola ziyatheleka emigwaqweni, ziphoseka le lale ezigcawini, zikhanye njengezihlanti, ziphazime njengemibane." 
Nahum2:5 Kubizwe izinduna, zikhubeke ekuhambeni kwazo, zigijimele emithangaleni, zimise izivikelo." 
Nahum2:6 Kuvulwe amasango asemfuleni, lesigodlo sizancibilika." 
Nahum2:7 Inkosikazi ithunjwe, incekukazi zayo zikhale njengamajuba, zitshaye izifuba zazo ngenxa yosizi." 
Nahum2:8 INineve injengechibi elilamanzi afohlayo. Bamemeza besithi: Manini! manini! kodwa kakho ophendukayo. 
Nahum2:9 Phangani isiliva, phangani igolide. Inotho yalo lezinto zalo ezinhle kazilakuphela." 
Nahum2:10 Seliseleze, kaliselalutho, lichithekile; inhliziyo ziphele amandla, amadolo ayatshayana, lobuhlungu busenkalweni zonke, bamukumele." 
Nahum2:11 Singaphi isikhundla sesilwane lezimbalu zezilwane lapho isilwane esasiletha khona esikubambileyo, lalapho amabhongo aso ayehlala khona engethuki lutho?" 
Nahum2:12 Isilwane sabamba okwenele imidlwane yaso, sabambela lezilwanekazi zaso; sagcwalisa izimbalu ngesikubambileyo lezikhundla zaso ngenyama." 
Nahum2:13 Khangela, ngimelene lawe, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla; ngizatshisa ngomlilo inqola zakho, lenkemba izaqeda amabhongo ezilwane akho; ngizaquma konke okubambayo kusuke emhlabeni, lelizwi lezithunywa zakho kalisayikuzwakala." 
Nahum3:1 Maye kumuzi ogcwele igazi, wonke ugcwele amanga lempango! Ukuphanga kakupheli kiwo." 
Nahum3:2 Zwanini ukukhala kwesiswepu lomsindo wokugedlezela kwamavili, lowamabhiza amathayo, lowenqola ezigijimayo." 
Nahum3:3 Abagadi bamabhiza bayasukela; kubonakala ukuphazima kwenkemba, lokucwazimula komkhonto; banengi ababuleweyo; kukhona inqwaba zezidumbu, izidumbu ezinengi ezingelakuphela; abantu bayakhubeka phezu kwazo." 
Nahum3:4 Konke lokhu kungenxa yokuphinga okunengi kwesiphingi esibukekayo langenxa yobuthakathi baso abulalayo, esithengisa izizwe ngokuphinga kwaso labantu ngobuthakathi baso." 
Nahum3:5 Khangela, ngimelene lawe, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla; ngizakwembula izidwaba zakho, ngitshengise izizwe ubunqunu bakho, lemibuso ihlazo lakho." 
Nahum3:6 Ngizaphosela amanyala phezu kwakho, ngikuthele ihlazo, ngikwenze ube yinto yokubukelwa." 
Nahum3:7 Bonke abakubonayo bazakubalekela, bathi: INineve lichithekile. Ngubani ozalililela? Ngizalidingela ngaphi abaduduzi?" 
Nahum3:8 Wena Nineve, ungcono yini kulomuzi weNo owawusemfuleni uNile, uzingelezelwe ngamanzi, omthangala wawo wawululwandle, lamanzi engumduli wawo?" 
Nahum3:9 IEtiyopiya leGibhithe kwakungamandla alo angelakuphela; iPuti leLibiya kwakungabasiz balo. 
Nahum3:10 Kanti lathunjwa laya ekuthunjweni, lezingane zalo zachotshozwa engonsini zazo zonke indlela; kwenziwa inkatho yokuphosa ngezikhulu zalo, labo bonke abakhulu balo babotshwa ngamaketane." 
Nahum3:11 Laweke uzadakwa, uyendezele; udinge isiphephelo sokubalekela izitha." 
Nahum3:12 Inqaba zakho zonke zinjengezihlahla zemikhiwa elezithelo zokuqala, uba zinyikinywa, izithelo ziwela emlonyeni wodlayo." 
Nahum3:13 Khangela, amabutho akho anjengabesifazana nje. Amasango elizwe lakho avulekele izitha zakho; umlilo uyiqedile imigoqo yawo." 
Nahum3:14 Zikhelela amanzi ulungisele ukuvinjezelwa, uqinise inqaba zakho; ngena odakeni, uxove ibumba, ulungise ibhokisi lokubumba izitina." 
Nahum3:15 Lalapho umlilo uzakuqeda, lenkemba ikubulale. Zandise njengesikhonyane, uzandise njengezintethe." 
Nahum3:16 Wandise abathengisi bakho baze badlule inkanyezi zamazulu. Kodwa kabasekho njengesikhongwane eselula impiko zaso siphaphe, sihambe." 
Nahum3:17 Iziphathamandla zakho zinjengezintethe, lababhali bakho banjengomhlambi wesikhonyane esimisa inkamba othangweni ngosuku oluqandayo; lapho ilanga seliphumile, siyasuka siphaphe, singabe sizaziwa ukuthi singaphi." 
Nahum3:18 Abelusi bakho balele, nkosi yeAsiriya, leziphathamandla zakho ziyawozela. Abantu bakho bahlakazekile ezintabeni, kakho obabuthayo." 
Nahum3:19 Kakukho okukupholisa ukulimala kwakho, inxeba lakho libi; bonke abezwa umbiko ngawe batshaya izandla. Ngoba ngubani obungafinyelelanga kuye ububi bakho?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Leli yilizwi aliboniswayo uHabakuki umprofethi. 
Habakkuk1:2 Ngizakuncenga kuze kube nini, Nkosi, ukuze ungizwe, loba ngimemeze kuwe ngobubi, ungangisizi?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Ungitshengiselani okubi lenkathazo? Ukuchitheka lobubi kuphambi kwami, kukhona ukulwisa lokuxabana." 
Habakkuk1:4 Umlayo ubuthakathaka, lesahlulelo kasiphumeleli. Ngoba omubi uphica olungileyo, ngakho ukulunga kuyahlanekelwa." 
Habakkuk1:5 Khangelani phakathi kwezizwe, libone limangale kakhulu. Ngoba mina ngenza imisebenzi ensukwini zenu elingayikuyikholwa lapho ulilandiselwa." 
Habakkuk1:6 Ngoba, khangelani, ngivusa amaKhaladiya, isizwe esibabayo lesiphangisayo, esidabula emhlabeni wonke ukuyathumba indawo zokuhlala ezingeyisizo ezaso." 
Habakkuk1:7 Siyesabeka, sitshayisa uvalo, isahlulelo lodumo lwaso kuvela kuso." 
Habakkuk1:8 Amabhiza aso alejubane kulezingwe, ayesabeka kulempisi ehamba kusihlwa; abagadi bamabhiza aso baqhubekela phambili, bevela elizweni elikhatshana, bandize njengokhozi oluphangisa ukudla." 
Habakkuk1:9 Bonke bafikela ukwenza ububi, lokwesabeka kwabo kuhambela phambi kwabo; babuthe abathunjiweyo babe ngangetshebetshebe." 
Habakkuk1:10 Yisizwe esiklolodela amakhosi, lababusi sibahleka usulu, sihlekisane ngazo zonke inqaba, ngoba sibuthelela umhlabathi, sizithathe." 
Habakkuk1:11 Sivunguze njengomoya, sedlule, singabantu abamandla abo angunkulunkulu wabo." 
Habakkuk1:12 Kawusuye owasendulo yini, wena Nkosi Nkulunkulu wami oNgcwele? Kasiyikufa. Nkosi, wenzile lesisizwe ukuthi sibe yisigwebo; wena Dwala, usimisele ukutshaya." 
Habakkuk1:13 Wena omehlo akho ahlambulukile kakhulu ukuthi abone okubi, ongelakukhangela okungalunganga. ubakhangelelani abakhohlisayo? Uthulelani lapho ababi beqeda abalungileyo kulabo?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Wenza abantu babe njengenhlanzi zolwandle, njengezinto ezibahabayo ezingelankosi." 
Habakkuk1:15 Isizwe samaKhaladiya siyabakhupha bonke ngengwegwe, sibadonse ngembule, sibabuthe ngembule laso elihudulwayo; ngalokho-ke siyathokoza sijabule." 
Habakkuk1:16 Ngakho-ke siyalihlabela imbule laso, sitshisele imbule laso elihudulwayo impepha; ngoba lisizuzela ukudla okunengi lokumnandi." 
Habakkuk1:17 Sizaqhubeka ukusebenzisa amambule aso kokuphela, langokubulala izizwe kokuphela uomo yini?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Ngizakuma endaweni yami yokulinda, ngime enqabeni yami, ngikhangele ukuze ngibone ukuthi izakuthini kimi, lokuthi izaphendula ithini ekukhaleni kwami." 
Habakkuk2:2 I Nkosi yangiphendula yathi: Bhala umbono, uwenze ucace ematsheni, ukuze ufundwe kalula nguye ogijimayo."
