Habakkuk2:3 Ngoba umbono ungowesikhathi esimisiweyo; uyaphangisa ukuya ekupheleni, kawuyikukhohlisa. Uba uphuza, uwulindele; ngoba uzafika isibili, kawuyikuphuza." 
Habakkuk2:4 Khangela, lowo ongelabuqotho uzakwehluleka, kodwa olungileyo uzaphila ngokholo lwakhe." 
Habakkuk2:5 Iwayini liyakhohlisa; umuntu ozikhukhumezayo kayikuma; ubuhwaba bakhe bubanzi njengengcwaba; kasuthi njengokufa; uzibuthela zonke izizwe. aziqoqele bonke abantu. 
Habakkuk2:6 Bonke bayahlekisana ngaye yini bemklolodela besithi: Maye kuye owandisa okungeyisikho okwakhe. Koze kube nini? Kozethwesa ngezibambiso. 
Habakkuk2:7 Labo olezikwilidi zabo kabayikukujuma yini? Bakuvukele labo abazakwenza uthuthumele yini? Uzakuba yimpango yabo. 
Habakkuk2:8 Ngoba uziphangile izizwe ezinengi, wachitha igazi labantu, wenza ububi emhlabeni, emizini yonke lakubo bonke abahlala kiyo, bonke abaseleyo emhlabeni bazakuphanga." 
Habakkuk2:9 Maye kulowo ozuzela indlu yakhe inzuzo embi, ukuze akhele isidleke sakhe phezulu ukuze avikeleke engozini!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Indlu yakho uyenzele ihlazo ngokuchitha abantu abanengi, ukulahlile impilo yakho." 
Habakkuk2:11 Ngoba ilitshe lizakhala lisemdulini, lothungo luphendule lusephahleni." 
Habakkuk2:12 Maye kuye owakha umuzi ngegazi. awuqinise ngobubi! 
Habakkuk2:13 Khangela, kakumiswanga yi Nkosi yamabandla yini ukuthi umsebenzi wezizwe uphelele emlilweni, labantu basebenzele ize?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Ngoba umhlaba uzagcwala ukwazi ngobukhulu be Nkosi njengamanzi agcwalisa ulwandle. 
Habakkuk2:15 Maye kuye onathisa omakhelwane bakhe inkezo yolaka lwakhe, abenze ukuthi badakwe, ukuze abukele ubuze babo!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Wena uzazisuthisa ngehlazo endaweni yodumo; natha lawe, udakwe! Inkezo esesandleni se Nkosi izafinyelela kuwe, lehlazo lehlele phezu kodumo lwakho." 
Habakkuk2:17 Ububi obenziwa eLebhanoni buzakwehlela kuwe, ukuchitheka kwenyamazana kukwethuse ngenxa yegazi labantu lobubi obenziwa emhlabeni, emizini lakubo bonke abahlala kiyo." 
Habakkuk2:18 Sisizani isithombe esibaziweyo, lokhu umenzi waso esibazile? Kumbe isithombe esibunjwe ngokuncibilikisa? Siyinto ebunjiweyo eqamba amanga. Kusizani ukuthi umenzi waso athembe kiso, lokuthi enze isithombe esingakhulumiyo?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Maye kulowo otshoyo esigodweni esibaziweyo ukuthi: Vuka! lelitsheni eliyisimungulu ukuthi Phaphama! Lokhu kungamfundisa ulutho yini? Khangela, kunanyekwe ngegolide langesiliva, kakulamoya wokuphefumula." 
Habakkuk2:20 Kodwa i Nkosi isethempelini layo elingcwele; umhlaba wonke kawuthule phambi kwayo. 
Habakkuk3:1 Nanku umkhuleko kaHabakuki umprofethi. 
Habakkuk3:2 Nkosi, ngizwile umbiko ngawe, ngiyesaba izenzo zakho. Ziphinde futhi kuliminyaka, wenze ukuthi zaziwe kuliminyaka; ukhumbule umusa elakeni." 
Habakkuk3:3 UNkulunkulu wavela eThemani, oNgcwele wavela entabeni yeParani. Selah. Inkazimulo yakhe yasibekela amazulu, umhlaba wagcwala indumiso yakhe." 
Habakkuk3:4 Ukucwazimula kwakhe kwakunjengokukhanya, imisebe yavela esandleni sakhe, efihla lapho amandla akhe." 
Habakkuk3:5 Umatshayabhuqe wesifo wahamba phambi kwakhe, lomkhuhlane walandela eduze." 
Habakkuk3:6 Ekusukumeni kwakhe umhlaba wanyikinyeka, ekukhangeleni kwakhe kwathuthumela izizwe; intaba zendulo zahlakazeka, amaqaqa alaphakade atshona. Indlela zakhe zazilaphakade." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ngabona amathente akoKushani ephansi kosizi, lamakhetheni elizwe leMidiyani ethuthumela." 
Habakkuk3:8 Nkosi, ulaka lwakho lwaluvuthela imifula yini? Wawuthukuthelele imifula yini, lentukuthelo yakho yayivuthela ulwandle lapho ugade amabhiza akho, ukhwele phezu kwenqola yakho yokunqoba yini?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Idandili lakho livele obala, lembuliwe, ufakile imitshoko yakho entanjeni. Selah. Waqhekeza umhlaba ngemifula." 
Habakkuk3:10 Intaba zakubona wena, zathuthumela, lezikhukhula zamanzi zedlula; amanzi amanengi akhupha ilizwi lawo, aphakamisela izandla zawo phezulu." 
Habakkuk3:11 Ilanga lenyanga kwema endaweni yakho ekukhanyeni kwemitshoko yakho egijimayo, lekuphazimeni komkhonto wakho ocwazimulayo." 
Habakkuk3:12 Wadabula umhlaba ngokuthukuthela, wanyathela isizwe ngentukuthelo." 
Habakkuk3:13 Waphumela ukukhulula abantu bakho, ukukhulula ogcotshiweyo wakho. Ubhidlizele phansi indlu yomubi, waquphula lezisekelo zayo. Selah." 
Habakkuk3:14 Ngemitshoko yakho ucibile umkhokheli wamabutho akhe, afika njengesivunguzane ukusichitha, ethokoza kungathi azakudla abahluphekayo ekusithekeni." 
Habakkuk3:15 Wanyathela ulwandle ngamabhiza akho, kwavubana amanzi amanengi." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ngiyezwa, kuthuthumela umzimba wami, indebe zami ziqhaqhazele ngenhlokomo; ukubola kungena emathanjeni ami, kutshayane amadolo ami. Ngizalindela ngokuthula ukuthi usuku lokuhlupheka lufike phezu kwalabo abasihlaselayo." 
Habakkuk3:17 Loba umkhiwa ungavezi impoko, loba kungekho izithelo evinini lomhlwathi liphuthe ukuthela, amasimu angavezi ukudla, izimvu ziqunywe zisuka esibayeni, kungabi khona inkomo esibayeni," 
Habakkuk3:18 kanti mina ngizathokoza nge Nkosi, ngijabule ngoNkulunkulu wokukhululwa kwami." 
Habakkuk3:19 UNkulunkulu, iNkosi, ungamandla ami, wenza inyawo zami zibe njengezempala, engenze ukuthi ngihambe endaweni zami eziphakemeyo. Ngeyomqondisi womculo. Ezigincini zami." 
Zephaniah1:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuZefaniya indodana kaKushi, kaGedaliya, kaAmariya, kaHezekhiya, ensukwini zikaJosiya indodana kaAmoni inkosi yakoJuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Lathi: Ngizaqothula konke kuthi nya emhlabeni, itsho i Nkosi;" 
Zephaniah1:3 ngizaqothula abantu lenyamazana, ngiqothule inyoni zamazulu lenhlanzi zolwandle. Ngizachitha ababi, ngiqume abantu basuke emhlabeni, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Zephaniah1:4 Ngizaphakamisela isandla sami phezu kukaJuda laphezu kwabo bonke abakhileyo eJerusalema, ngiqume konke okuseleyo kukaBhali kusuke kulindawo lebizo labapristi bezithombe," 
Zephaniah1:5 ngiqede labakhonza ibutho lamazulu phezu kwezindlu, labakhuleka kimi bangifunge, bafunge futhi loMilkomu," 
Zephaniah1:6 labangidelileyo abangangidingiyo, bangabuzi kimi." 
Zephaniah1:7 Thula phambi kweNkosi uJehova! Ngoba usuku lwe Nkosi selusondele. I Nkosi isilungisile umhlatshelo, yahlambulula labanxusiweyo bayo." 
Zephaniah1:8 Kuzakuthi ngosuku lomhlatshelo wami ngitshaye iziphathamandla lamadodana e Nkosi labo bonke abagqoka izigqoko zabezizwe. 
Zephaniah1:9 Ngalolosuku ngizatshaya bonke abeqayo umbundu womnyango, labagcwalisa indlu yenkosi yabo ngobubi langenkohliso." 
Zephaniah1:10 Ngalolosuku, itsho i Nkosi, kuzazwakala ilizwi lokukhala eSangweni lenhlanzi, lokulila esigabeni sesibili somuzi lokufohloza okukhulu kuzwakala emaqaqeni." 
Zephaniah1:11 Khalani. lina elakhe endaweni yokuthengisela, ngoba bonke abathengisayo kabasekho, bonke abalinganisa isiliva baphelile." 
Zephaniah1:12 Kuzakuthi ngalesosikhathi ngihlole iJerusalema ngezibane, ngitshaye bonke abantu abazithokozisayo abazithembayo, abathi enhliziyweni zabo: I Nkosi kayiyikwenza lutho." 
Zephaniah1:13 Impahla yabo izaphangwa, lezindlu zabo zidilizwe. Loba besakha izindlu, kabayikuhlala kuzo, loba belima izivini, kabayikunatha iwayini lazo." 
Zephaniah1:14 Usuku olukhulu lwe Nkosi selusondele, luyeza ngokuphangisa; usuku lwe Nkosi lulobuhlungu, iqhawe liyakhala ngokubabayo kulo." 
Zephaniah1:15 Lolosuku lusuku lolaka, usuku lokuhlupheka losizi, usuku lokuchitheka lokubhidlika, usuku lomnyama, lolwamayezi, lomnyama onzima," 
Zephaniah1:16 usuku lokutshaya uphondo lokuhlaba umkhosi emizini ebiyelwe ngemithangala lezinqabeni eziphakemeyo. 
Zephaniah1:17 Ngizakwehlisela abantu usizi ukuze bahambe njengeziphofu, ngoba bonile e Nkosi ni; igazi labo lizachithwa njengothuli; lenyama yabo njengobulongwe." 
Zephaniah1:18 Isiliva sabo legolide labo kakuyikuba lamandla okubakhulula ngosuku lolaka lwe Nkosi. Umhlaba wonke uzaqedwa ngumlilo wolaka lwayo lobukhwele bayo; ngoba izaqeda, yebo izabajuma ibaqede bonke abakhileyo elizweni." 
Zephaniah2:1 Buthana, yebo buthana, wena sizwe esingelanhloni," 
Zephaniah2:2 ungakadudulwa njengamakhoba aphephukayo, ungakehlelwa yintukuthelo eyesabekayo ye Nkosi, ungakafikelwa lusuku lolaka lwe Nkosi." 
Zephaniah2:3 Dingani i Nkosi, lina lonke abathobekileyo bomhlaba abenza imilayo yayo, dingani ukulunga, lidinge ukuthobeka; mhlawumbe lingavikelwa ngosuku lolaka lwe Nkosi." 
Zephaniah2:4 Ngoba iGaza lizatshiywa, leAshikeloni lizakuba lunxiwa, labantu beAshidodi bazaxotshwa emini, leEkhironi lidilizwe." 
Zephaniah2:5 Maye kwabakhileyo ekhunjini lolwandle, lina sizwe samaKerethi! Ilizwi le Nkosi lingawe, Khanani, lizwe lamaFilisti; ngizalichitha kuze kungabi khona ohlala khona." 
Zephaniah2:6 Wena khumbi lolwandle, uzakuba ngamadlelo, ube yizihotsha zabelusi lezibaya zezimvu." 
Zephaniah2:7 ukhumbi uzakuba ngelabaseleyo endlini kaJuda belusele kibo, endlini zeAshikeloni bazalala khona kusihlwa. Ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo izabahambela, ibenzele inhlanhla." 
Zephaniah2:8 Ngizwile ukukloloda kukaMowabi lokuthuka kwamaArnoni, ukuthi babaklolodela njani abantu bami, bezincoma ngelizwe labo." 
Zephaniah2:9 Ngifunga impilo yami, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli, ngithi: UMowabi uzakuba njengeSodoma, lamaAmoni abe njengeGomora, ilizwe lezimbabazane lemigodi yetswayi elachitheka kokuphela. Abaseleyo ebantwini bami bazabaphanga, labasilileyo esizweni sami babathumbe." 
Zephaniah2:10 Lokhu kuzakuba ngumvuzo wokuziphakamisa kwabo, ngoba bakloloda, bazikhukhumeza ngabantu be Nkosi yamabandla." 
Zephaniah2:11 I Nkosi izakwenza okwesabekayo kibo; ngoba izabaqeda bonke onkulunkulu bomhlaba, akhuleke kuyo wonke amazwe ezizwe, wonke umuntu esendaweni yakibo." 
Zephaniah2:12 Lani futhi, maEtiyopiya, lizabulawa ngenkemba yami." 
Zephaniah2:13 Izaphakamisela isandla sayo ngenyakatho, ichithe iAsiriya, yenze iNineve ukuthi ibe lunxiwa, lome njengenkangala." 
Zephaniah2:14 Imihlambi izalala phakathi kwalo, lazo zonke inyamazana zeganga, ingabuzane lodwayi kulale ebusuku ezinsikeni zalo, kukhale isidlova ewindini, lewabayi likhale emnyango." 
Zephaniah2:15 Yiwo lumuzi owajabula, owawulondolozekile, owawusithi: Mina ngikhona; kakho futhi omunye. Yeka ukuchitheka kwawo! Usuyindawo yokubuthanela inyamazana; bonke abadlula kiwo bayancifa, bawukhombe ngengqindi." 
Zephaniah3:1 Maye kuwo umuzi oxhwalileyo ongcolileyo, ocindezelayo!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Kawulaleli lizwi, kawemukeli kulaywa, kawuthembeli e Nkosi ni, kawusondeli kuNkulunkulu wawo." 
Zephaniah3:3 Iziphathamandla zawo zinjengezilwane ezibhongayo; labahluleli bawo banjengezimpisi eziyizihwaba ezingatshiyi lutho kuze kuse. 
Zephaniah3:4 Abaprofethi bawo kabananzeleli, bayakhohlisa; abapristi bawo bangcolisa okungcwele, bephule umthetho." 
Zephaniah3:5 I Nkosi iphakathi kwawo ilungile, kayenzi okubi; insuku zonke ekuseni iletha ilungelo layo ekukhanyeni, futhi kayiphuthi; kodwa omubi kalanhloni." 
Zephaniah3:6 Ngizichithile izizwe, lenqaba zazo zidilikile; ngidilizile imigwaqo yazo ukuze kungahambi muntu ngayo; imizi yazo yenziwe yaba ngamanxiwa, kakusekho loyedwa ohlala kiyo." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ngathi: isibili umuzi uzangesaba, wemukele ukulaywa; kawuyikukhohlwa ukulaya kwami konke. Kodwa bavuke ngovivi bekhuthalela ngamandla ukwenza okungalunganga." 
Zephaniah3:8 Ngakho-ke ngilindela, itsho i Nkosi, kuze kube lusuku engizavuka ngalo ngahlulele izizwe. Ngoba isinqumo sami siyikubuthelela izizwe, ngiqoqe imibuso, ngithululele phezu kwayo intukuthelo yami, konke ukuvutha kolaka lwami; ngoba ngomlilo wolaka lwami lobukhwele bami wonke umhlaba uzaqotshulwa." 
Zephaniah3:9 Ngalesosikhathi ngizanika abantu ukukhuluma okuhlambulukileyo, ukuthi bonke bakhuleke ebizweni lami, bangikhonze nganhliziyonye." 
Zephaniah3:10 Kusukela phetsheya kwemifula yeEtiyopiya abacela kimi phakathi kwabahlakazekileyo bami bazaletha umnikelo. 
Zephaniah3:11 Ngalolosuku lina bantu bami, kaliyikuyangeka ngenxa yezenzo eliphambuka ngazo kimi, ngoba ngizakhupha phakathi kwenu labo abazikhukhumezayo; kalisayikuziphakamisa entabeni yami engcwele." 
Zephaniah3:12 Ngoba ngizatshiya phakathi kwenu abantu abazithobileyo labathulayo. Bazathemba ebizweni lami 
Zephaniah3:13 abaseleyo koIsrayeli; kabayikwenza okubi, kabayikukhuluma amanga, kakuyikuphuma emlonyeni wabo amazwi akhohlisayo. Ngoba bazakweluka balale phansi, kungabi khona obethusayo." 
Zephaniah3:14 Hlabela kakhulu, wena Ziyoni, umemeze, Israyeli. Thokoza, uthabe ngenhliziyo yakho yonke, wena Jerusalema." 
Zephaniah3:15 I Nkosi isusile izigwebo zakho, izixotshile izitha zakho. UMbusi kaIsrayeli, i Nkosi, uphakathi kwakho; kawuyikwesaba okubi." 
Zephaniah3:16 Ngalolosuku kuzakuthiwa eJerusalema: Ungesabi, wena Ziyoni; kazingadinwa izandla zakho." 
Zephaniah3:17 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wakho iphakathi kwakho, injengeqhawe elinqobayo; izajabula ngawe ngentokozo, ikuvuselele ngothando lwayo, ithabe ngawe ngokuhlabelela." 
Zephaniah3:18 Njengasosukwini lomkhosi omisiweyo. Ngizasusa inhlupheko zakho ukuze ungathwali ihlazo. 
Zephaniah3:19 Khangela, ngalesosikhathi ngizakuba lokwenza labo bonke abakucindezelayo; ngizasiza bonke abaqhulayo, ngibuthe abaxotshiweyo, ngiphendule ihlazo labo libe yingoma yokudumisa lodumo emhlabeni wonke." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ngalesosikhathi ngizaliletha ekhaya esikhathini sokulibutha, kwami. Ngizalenza ukuthi libe lodumo, libongwe phakathi kwabantu bonke bomhlaba lapho sengibuyisa inhlanhla yenu futhi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Haggai1:1 Ngomnyaka wesibili kaDariyusi inkosi, ngosuku lokuqala lwenyanga yesithupha, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika ngoHagayi umprofethi kuZerubhabheli indodana kaSalatiyeli umbusi wakoJuda, lakuJoshuwa indodana kaJehozadaki umpristi omkhulu;" 
Haggai1:2 lathi: I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Lababantu bathi kakukabi yisikhathi sokwakha kithi ithempeli le Nkosi. 
Haggai1:3 Laselifika ilizwi le Nkosi ngoHagayi umprofethi 
Haggai1:4 lisithi: Kuyisikhathi yini sokuthi lina lihlale ezindlini zenu ezinhle, kanti lindlu ilunxiwa?" 
Haggai1:5 Ngakho-ke i Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Ake libone ukuthi izinto zilimele njani. 
Haggai1:6 Lihlanyele okunengi, lavuna okuyingcosana; liyadla, kodwa kalisuthi; liyanatha, kodwa kalikholwa; ligqoke lingakhudumali, lohola imali uholela ukuyifaka esikhwameni esivuzayo." 
Haggai1:7 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Ake libone ukuthi izinto zilimele njani. 
Haggai1:8 Khwelani ezintabeni ligamule izigodo, lakhe indlu engithokozisayo, lapho engingabonakalisa khona udumo lwami, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Haggai1:9 Beliqaphele okunengi, kodwa khangelani, kube yingcosana elikuzuzileyo; lapho likuletha ekhaya, ngikuphephule konke. Kungani? kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla. Kungenxa yendlu yami elunxiwa, lina lilibele ngendlu zenu." 
Haggai1:10 Ngenxa yalokhu-ke amazulu avalekile ukuze kungabi lamazolo, lomhlabathi uvalekile ukuze lingazuzi izithelo zawo." 
Haggai1:11 Ngilethile ukoma elizweni lezintabeni laphezu kwamabele laphezu kwewayini elitsha lamafutha laphezu kwakho konke okuvela emhlabathini, ebantwini lezifuyweni lakho konke abakwenzayo." 
Haggai1:12 Ngakho uZerubhabheli indodana kaSalatiyeli loJoshuwa indodana kaJehozadaki umpristi omkhulu, labo bonke abantu ababesele, balilalela ilizwi le Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo, lamazwi kaHagayi umprofethi owayethunywe yi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo; abantu bayesaba i Nkosi." 
Haggai1:13 UHagayi isithunywa se Nkosi wasekhuluma ebantwini ilizwi le Nkosi, wathi: Ngilani, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Haggai1:14 I Nkosi yavusa umoya kaZerubhabheli indodana kaSalatiyeli umbusi wakoJuda, lomoya kaJoshuwa indodana kaJehozadaki umpristi omkhulu, lomoya wabo bonke abantu ababesele; beza ukuze basebenze endlini ye Nkosi yamabandla uNkulunkulu wabo," 
Haggai1:15 ngosuku lwamatshumi amabili lane lwenyanga yesithupha. 
Haggai2:1 Ngomnyaka wesibili, ngosuku lwamatshumi amabili lanye lwenyanga yesikhombisa, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika ngoHagayi umprofethi" 
Haggai2:2 lisithi: Tshela uZerubhabheli indodana kaSalatiyeli umbusi wakoJuda, loJoshuwa indodana kaJehozadaki umpristi omkhulu, labo bonke abantu abaseleyo," 
Haggai2:3 ithi: Ngubani osekhona phakathi kwenu owabona lindlu ebuhleni bayo bakuqala? Kambe injani khathesi? Kayisize emehlweni enu yini? 
Haggai2:4 Kodwa qina, wena Zerubhabheli, kutsho i Nkosi, ume isibindi lawe Joshuwa, ndodana kaJehozadaki, mpristi omkhulu; qinani lani lonke, bantu belizwe. Sebenzani, ngoba mina ngilani, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla," 
Haggai2:5 njengokuthembisa kwami engakwenza kini ekuphumeni kwenu eGibhithe. Umoya wami uhlala phakathi kwenu, lingesabi." 
Haggai2:6 Ngoba i Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Kuseyisikhatshana nje ngibuye nginyikinye futhi amazulu lomhlaba, ulwandle lomhlabathi owomileyo;" 
Haggai2:7 ngizanyikinya izizwe zonke ukuze inotho yazo ifike lapha, igcwalise indlu le ngobuhle, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Haggai2:8 Isiliva singesami legolide ngelami, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Haggai2:9 Ubuhle bokucina balindlu buzakuba bukhulu kulobokuqala, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla; lakulindawo ngizanika ukuthula." 
Haggai2:10 Ngosuku lwamatshumi amabili lane, lwenyanga yesificamunwemunye, emnyakeni wesibili kaDariyusi, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuHagayi umprofethi" 
Haggai2:11 lisithi: I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Ake ubabuze abapristi lumbuzo uthi: 
Haggai2:12 Uba umuntu ethwele inyama engcwele ngesembatho sakhe, athinte ngesembatho sakhe isinkwa, loba isitshwala, loba iwayini, loba amafutha, loba okunye ukudla, kuzakuba ngcwele yini? Abapristi baphendula bathi: Hatshi." 
Haggai2:13 Wasesithi uHagayi: Uba umuntu ongcoliswe yisidumbu ethintana lalezizinto, ziyangcola yini? Abapristi bamphendula bathi: Yebo, ziyangcola." 
Haggai2:14 Khona uHagayi waphendula wathi: Banjalo lababantu sinjalo lesisizwe phambi kwami, kutsho i Nkosi, futhi unjalo wonke umsebenzi wezandla zabo, lalokho abakusondeza lapha kungcolile." 
Haggai2:15 Ake licabange ngokwenzakayo kusukela ngaphambili kuze kube lamhlanje; kungakabekwa ilitshe phezu kwelinye ethempelini le Nkosi," 
Haggai2:16 kwakunjani kini? Lapho umuntu esiya enqwabeni yezilinganiso ezingamatshumi amabili zamabele, wathola itshumi nje; lalapho esiya esikhamelweni sewayini ukukha imbiza ezingamatshumi amahlanu, wathola amatshumi amabili nje." 
Haggai2:17 Ngalitshaya kanye layo yonke imisebenzi yenu ngokutshisa langengumane langesiqhotho; kanti kaliphendukelanga kimi, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Haggai2:18 Ake licabange kuhle kusukela lamuhla, kusukela kulolusuku lwamatshumi amabili lane, enyangeni yesificamunwemunye, kusukela esukwini lokubekwa kwezisekelo zethempeli; cabangani kuhle." 
Haggai2:19 Inhlanyelo isesesilulwini yini? Ivini lomkhiwa lepomegranati* lomhlwathi, lokhu kungatheli yini? Kusukela lamuhla ngizalibusisa." 
Haggai2:20 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika ngokwesibili kuHagayi, ngosuku lwamatshumi amabili lane enyangeni," 
Haggai2:21 lathi: Tshela uZerubhabheli umbusi wakoJuda uthi: Sengizanyikinya amazulu lomhlaba," 
Haggai2:22 ngigenqule isihlalo sobukhosi semibuso, ngichithe amandla emibuso yezizwe, ngigenqule izinqola labakhweli baze amabhiza labagadi bawo azakuwa, lowo lalowo awe ngenkemba yomfowabo." 
Haggai2:23 Ngalolosuku, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla, ngizakuthatha, wena Zerubhabheli, inceku yami, indodana kaSalatiyeli, ngikwenze ube njengendandatho elophawu yodumo; ngoba nguwe engikukhethileyo, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Zechariah1:1 Ngenyanga yesificaminwembili, ngomnyaka wesibili kaDariyusi, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuZekariya umprofethi. indodana kaBerekiya kaldo, lisithi:" 
Zechariah1:2 I Nkosi yabathukuthelela oyihlo. 
Zechariah1:3 Ngakho-ke tshono ebantwini uthi: I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Buyelani kimi, lami ngizabuyela kini, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Zechariah1:4 Lingabi njengoyihlo abaprofethi bakuqala abamemeza kibo besithi: I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Phendukani ezindleleni zenu ezimbi lezenzweni zenu ezimbi. Kodwa kabezwanga, kabanginanzanga, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Zechariah1:5 Oyihlo bangaphi? Labaprofethi baphila kokuphela yini? 
Zechariah1:6 Kodwa amazwi ami lezimiso zami, engalaya ngakho inceku zami abaprofethi, kakubaficanga oyihlo yini? Ngakho baphenduka bathi: Njengalokhu i Nkosi yamabandla yazimisela ukusiphatha ngokufanele indlela zethu lezenzo zethu, yenze njalo." 
Zechariah1:7 Ngosuku lwamatshumi amabili lane lwenyanga yetshumi lanye ethiwa nguShebati, ngomnyaka wesibili kaDariyusi, ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuZekariya umprofethi, indodana kaBerekiya kaldo. UZekariya wathi:" 
Zechariah1:8 Ngabona ebusuku, khangela, umuntu ogade ibhiza elibomvu. Wayemi phakathi kwezihlahla zomtshekisane esigodini, kukhona ngemva kwakhe amabhiza abomvu lalubhidi lamhlophe." 
Zechariah1:9 Ngasengisithi: Kutshoni lokhu, Nkosi? Ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami yathi kimi: Ngizakutshengisa ukuthi kuyini." 
Zechariah1:10 Ngakho-ke lowomuntu owayemi phakathi kwezihlahla zomtshekisane waphendula wathi: Laba yibo i Nkosi ebathumileyo ukuhlola umhlaba. 
Zechariah1:11 Bona basebeyiphendula ingilosi ye Nkosi eyayimi phakathi kwezihlahla zomtshekisane, bathi: Sesiwuhlolile umhlaba, khangela, umhlaba wonke uhlezi kuhle." 
Zechariah1:12 Ingilosi ye Nkosi yasisithi: Nkosi yamabandla, koze kube nini ungabanga lasihawu kiyo iJerusalema lakuyo imizi yakoJuda, oyithukutheleleyo okweminyaka engamatshumi ayisikhombisa?" 
Zechariah1:13 I Nkosi yasiphendula ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami ngamazwi omusa laduduzayo. 
Zechariah1:14 Ngakho ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami yathi kimi: Memeza uthi i Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Ngilobukhwele obukhulu ngeJerusalema langeZiyoni. 
Zechariah1:15 Ngithukuthele kakhulu ngezizwe ezichelesileyo, ngoba ngathi ngisazondile kancinyane, zandisa ububi." 
Zechariah1:16 Ngalokho-ke, ithi i Nkosi, sengibuyile eJerusalema ngilesihawu; indlu yami izakwakhiwa kuyo, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla, lentambo yokulinganisa izatshonjululwa phezu kweJerusalema." 
Zechariah1:17 Memeza futhi ithi: I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Imizi yami izagcwala iphuphume futhi izinto ezinhle. I Nkosi izaduduza futhi iZiyoni, ibuye iyikhethe iJerusalema." 
Zechariah1:18 Ngaphakamisa amehlo ami, ngabona, khangela-ke, impondo ezine." 
Zechariah1:19 Ngathi kuyo ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami: Kuyini lokhu? Yangiphendula yathi: Lezi zimpondo ezachithachitha uJuda loIsrayeli leJerusalema. 
Zechariah1:20 I Nkosi yasingitshengisa abakhandi abane. 
Zechariah1:21 Ngasengisithi: Laba bazekwenzani? Yangiphendula yathi: Leziya impondo zachithachitha uJuda, kwaze kwasweleka loyedwa ongaphakamisa ikhanda. Lababakhandi bezile ukwesabisa izizwe, lokwephula impondo zezizwe ezaphakamisela impondo zazo ilizwe lakoJuda ukulichithachitha." 
Zechariah2:1 Ngaphakamisa amehlo ami, ngabona, khangela, umuntu ephethe intambo yokulinganisa." 
Zechariah2:2 Ngasengisithi kuye: Uya ngaphi? Wathi kimi: Ngiyalinganisa iJerusalema, ngibone ukuthi bungakanani ububanzi bayo lobude bayo." 
Zechariah2:3 Khangela, kwasekusiza ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami, lenye ingilosi yayihlangabeza." 
Zechariah2:4 Yona yathi: Gijima, utshele leliyana ijaha uthi: iJerusalema lizakuba ngumuzi ongelamiduli ngenxa yobunengi babantu lezifuyo ezikilo." 
Zechariah2:5 Ngoba mina ngizakuba ngumduli womlilo olizingelezeleyo, lolivikeleyo, kutsho i Nkosi, ngibe yinkazimulo phakathi kwalo." 
Zechariah2:6 Heyi! Balekani elizweni lenyakatho, kutsho i Nkosi; ngilihlakazele emazweni wonke njengemimoya yomine yamazulu." 
Zechariah2:7 Heyi! Balekani, lina bantu beZiyoni abahlala eBhabhiloni." 
Zechariah2:8 Ngoba i Nkosi yamabandla yangithuma ngenxa yodumo lwayo ezizweni ezaliphangayo, ngoba olithintayo uthinta igugu layo, yathi:" 
Zechariah2:9 Ngoba khangela, ngizaziphakamisela isandla sami, zibe yimpango yalabo ababezikhonza. Khona lizakwazi ukuthi i Nkosi yamabandla ingithumile." 
Zechariah2:10 I Nkosi ithi: Hlabela ngokuthaba, wena Ziyoni, ngoba khangela, ngiyeza, ngizahlala phakathi kwakho." 
Zechariah2:11 Izizwe ezinengi zizazihlanganisa le Nkosi ngalolosuku, zibe ngabantu bayo. Izahlala phakathi kwakho, uzakwazi ukuthi i Nkosi yamabandla ingithumile kuwe." 
Zechariah2:12 I Nkosi izathatha uJuda, abe yisabelo sayo elizweni elingcwele, ibuye ikhethe iJerusalema futhi." 
Zechariah2:13 Thulani, nyama yonke, phambi kwe Nkosi, ngoba ivukile, yaphuma endaweni yayo engcwele." 
Zechariah3:1 Yasingitshengisa uJoshuwa umpristi omkhulu emi phambi kwengilosi ye Nkosi, loSathane emi ngakwesokunene sikaJoshuwa emmangalela." 
Zechariah3:2 Ingilosi ye Nkosi yathi kuSathane: I Nkosi kayikukhuze, wena Sathane. I Nkosi eyikhethileyo iJerusalema kayikukhuze. Lumuntu kanjengesikhuni esikhutshwe emlilweni yini?" 
Zechariah3:3 UJoshuwa wayemi phambi kwengilosi egqoke izigqoko ezingcolileyo. 
Zechariah3:4 Ingilosi yathi kulabo ababemi phambi kwayo: Mkhupheni izigqoko ezingcolileyo. Yasisithi kuye: Khangela, sengisusile ububi bakho kuwe, ngizakugqokisa izigqoko ezinhle." 
Zechariah3:5 Yasisithi: Mthwaliseni iqhiye ehlambulukileyo. Basebemthwalisa iqhiye ehlambulukileyo, bamgqokisa izigqoko; ingilosi ye Nkosi yayimi phansi kwakhe." 
Zechariah3:6 Ingilosi ye Nkosi yasimlaya uJoshuwa isithi: 
Zechariah3:7 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Uba uzahamba endleleni zami, ugcine imilayo yami, uzaphatha indlu yami, ugcine lamaguma ami, ngizakunika ilungelo lokungena phakathi kwabo abemiyo lapha." 
Zechariah3:8 Zwana-ke, wena Joshuwa, mpristi omkhulu, wena labangane bakho abahlezi phambi kwakho, ngoba khangelani, lingabantu abayisibonakaliso esihle. Ngizaveza inceku yami elillumela." 
Zechariah3:9 Ngoba khangela, ngelitshe engalibeka phambi kukaJoshuwa, ilitshe okukhonakilo amacele ayisikhombisa; mina ngizabaza ukubaza kilo, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla; ngizasusa ububi balelilizwe ngosuku olulodwa." 
Zechariah3:10 Ngalolosuku, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla, ngulowo lalowo wenu uzanxusa umngane wakhe ukuze azehlala ngaphansi kwesihlahla sakhe sevini langaphansi kwesomkhiwa." 
Zechariah4:1 Ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami yabuya futhi, yangivusa njengomuntu ovuswa ebuthongweni." 
Zechariah4:2 Yathi kimi: Ubonani? Ngathi: Ngibona, khangela, uluthi lwesibane olwenziwe ngegolide kuphela, phezu kwalo lulomganu wamafutha, lezibane eziyisikhombisa, lezimbobo zezibane eziyisikhombisa." 
Zechariah4:3 Kulezihlahla zomhlwathi ezimbili phansi kwalo, esinye singakwesokunene somganu, lesinye singakwesokhohlo sawo." 
Zechariah4:4 Ngasengisithi kuyo ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami: Nkosi yami, kutshoni lokhu?" 
Zechariah4:5 Yasingiphendula ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami isithi: Kawazi ukuthi kutshoni lokhu? Ngathi: Hatshi, Nkosi yami." 
Zechariah4:6 Yasisithi kimi: Nanti ilizwi le Nkosi kuZerubhabheli lithi: Ukuphumelela kwakho kakusikho ngengalo langamandla, kodwa ngomoya wami, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Zechariah4:7 Wena uyini, ntaba enkulu? Phambi kukaZerubhabheli uzakuba ligceke. Yena uzabeka ilitshe lokucina, abantu besithi: Kuhle, kuhle!" 
Zechariah4:8 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lisithi: 
Zechariah4:9 Izandla zikaZerubhabheli zabeka isisekelo salindlu, zizaqeda ukulakha. Khona-ke lizakwazi ukuthi i Nkosi yamabandla ingithumile kini." 
Zechariah4:10 Ngubani odelele usuku lwezinto ezincinyane? Uzathokoza lapho ebona uZerubhabheli ephethe ilitshe elikhethiweyo. Ingilosi yasisithi: Izibane eziyisikhombisa zingamehlo e Nkosi athalazayo umhlaba wonke. 
Zechariah4:11 Ngasengisithi kuyo: Zitshoni lezizihlahla zomhlwathi ezingakwesokunene soluthi lwesibane langakwesokhohlo yini? 
Zechariah4:12 Ngasengisitsho ngokwesibili ngisithi: Zitshoni izingatsha ezimbili zezihlahla zomhlwathi eziseceleni kwembobo ezimbili zegolide okuthululwa ngazo amafutha? 
Zechariah4:13 Yathi kimi: Kawazi ukuthi kutshoni lokhu? Ngathi: Hatshi, Nkosi yami." 
Zechariah4:14 Yathi: Laba bangabagcotshiweyo ababili abema eNkosini yomhlaba wonke. 
Zechariah5:1 Ngabuya ngaphakamisa amehlo ami, ngabona, khangela, umqulu wencwadi ondizayo." 
Zechariah5:2 Ingilosi yathi kimi: Ubonani? Ngaphendula ngathi: Ngibona umqulu wencwadi ondizayo; ubude bawo buzingalo ezingamatshumi amabili, lobubanzi bawo buzingalo ezilitshumi." 
Zechariah5:3 Yasisithi kimi: Lokhu kuyisiqalekiso esiphumela emhlabeni wonke; ngoba ngokutsho kwaso umuntu owebayo uzalahlwa, langokutsho kwaso wonke umuntu ofunga amanga uzalahlwa." 
Zechariah5:4 Ngizasithwalela, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla, singene endlini yesela lendlini yalowo ofunga amanga ngebizo lami, sihlale endlini yakhe, siyidilize, izigodo lamatshe." 
Zechariah5:5 Yasisondela ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami, yathi kimi: Phakamisa amehlo akho, ubone ukuthi kuyini lokhu okuvelayo." 
Zechariah5:6 Ngasengisithi: Kuyini? Yathi: Yifatshi enkulu le evelayo. Yathi: Lokhu kuyibubi babantu elizweni lonke. 
Zechariah5:7 Khangela, isisibekelo somnuso sasuswa; kwakukhona owesifazana ehlezi phakathi kwefatshi." 
Zechariah5:8 Ingilosi yasisithi: Lokhu kuyiBubi. Yasimsunduzela phakathi kwefatshi, yayisibekela ifatshi ngesisibekelo somnuso." 
Zechariah5:9 Ngasengiphakamisa amehlo ami, ngabona, khangela, abesifazana ababili besiza, belezimpiko ezifanana lezengabuzane. Babephapha emoyeni, bayiphakamisela emazulwini ifatshi." 
Zechariah5:10 Ngasengisithi kuyo ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami: Bayisa ngaphi ifatshi? 
Zechariah5:11 Yona yathi: Bayisa elizweni leShinari ukuyakhela indlu khona; lapho isiyakhiwe, bazayibeka phezu kwesisekelo sayo." 
Zechariah6:1 Ngabuya ngaphakamisa amehlo ami, ngabona, khangela-ke, inqola ezine ziphuma phakathi kwentaba ezimbili ezazingezethusi." 
Zechariah6:2 Inqola yokuqala yayilamabhiza abomvu, eyesibili ilamabhiza amnyama," 
Zechariah6:3 eyesithathu ilamabhiza amhlophe, leyesine ilamabhiza alamabala." 
Zechariah6:4 Ngasengisithi kuyo ingilosi eyayikhuluma lami: Lokhu kuyini, Nkosi yami?" 
Zechariah6:5 Ingilosi yangiphendula yathi: Lokhu kuyimimoya emine yamazulu esuka ekumeni phambi kweNkosi yomhlaba wonke. 
Zechariah6:6 Inqola elamabhiza amnyama iya elizweni lenyakatho, elamabhiza amhlophe iya elizweni lentshonalanga, lelamabhiza alamabala iya elizweni leningizimu." 
Zechariah6:7 Ekuphumeni kwawo ayephitshekela ukuhamba, ayehlola ilizwe. Yathi: Hambani liyehlola umhlaba. Ngakho awuhlola umhlaba." 
Zechariah6:8 Yasingimemeza isithi: Khangela, lawo aya elizweni lenyakatho aphumuzile umoya wami elizweni lenyakatho." 
Zechariah6:9 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kimi lathi: 
Zechariah6:10 Hamba uye kwabathunjiweyo, oHelidayi loTobiya loJedaya loJosiya indodana kaZefaniya, abafike bevela eBhabhiloni," 
Zechariah6:11 wemukele kibo isiliva legolide, wenze umqhele, uwuthwalise uJoshuwa indodana kaJehozadaki umpristi omkhulu," 
Zechariah6:12 uthi kuye: I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Khangela, umuntu obizo lakhe lithiwa ngulhlumela, ngoba uzakhula endaweni yakhe, akhe ithempeli le Nkosi." 
Zechariah6:13 Nguye ozakwakha ithempeli le Nkosi, abe lobukhosi; uzahlala esihlalweni sobukhosi, abuse. Kuzakuba khona umpristi ngakwesokunene sakhe, bazazwana bobabili." 
Zechariah6:14 Umqhele uzakuba sethempelini le Nkosi, ube yisikhumbuzo kuHelidayi loTobiya loJedaya loJosiya indodana kaZefaniya." 
Zechariah6:15 Lalabo abakhatshana bazafika ukusiza ukwakha ithempeli le Nkosi; lizakwazi ukuthi i Nkosi yamabandla ingithumile kini. Lokhu kuzakwenzeka, uba lilalela ilizwi le Nkosi uNkulunkulu ngenhliziyo zenu zonke." 
Zechariah7:1 Ngomnyaka wesine wenkosi uDariyusi ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuZekariya ngosuku lwesine lwenyanga yesificamunwemunye ethiwa nguKisilevi. 
Zechariah7:2 Abantu beBhetheli babethume oSharezeri loRegemeleki labantu babo ukucela umusa e Nkosi ni," 
Zechariah7:3 lokubuza abapristi bendlu ye Nkosi yamabandla labaprofethi ukuthi: Sizakhala inyembezi ngenyanga yesihlanu njengokwenza kwethu iminyaka yonke yini? 
Zechariah7:4 Laselifika kimi ilizwi le Nkosi yamabandla lisithi: 
Zechariah7:5 Tshono ebantwini bonke belizwe lakubapristi uthi: Ekuzileni kwenu ukudla lekulileni kwenu enyangeni yesihlanu lenyangeni yesikhombisa, kule iminyaka engamatshumi ayisikhombisa, lalizilela mina ukudla yini?" 
Zechariah7:6 Nxa lisidla linatha, kalizidleli lizinathele lina yini?" 
Zechariah7:7 Nxa iJerusalema yayisakhiwe iphumelele, lemizi yayo yonke iyihanqile, leningizimu leShefela kwakhiwe kuzo, la ayengesiwo amazwi i Nkosi eyawatshumayela ngabaprofethi bakuqala yini?" 
Zechariah7:8 Ilizwi le Nkosi lafika kuZekariya lisithi: 
Zechariah7:9 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Lenze isahlulelo esiqotho, lenze umusa lesihawu kubafowenu," 
Zechariah7:10 lingacindezeli umfelokazi lentandane lowezizweni lomyanga, kungabi khona loyedwa wenu owenza amacebo amabi enhliziyweni yakhe ngomfowabo." 
Zechariah7:11 Kodwa bona bala ukulalela, baqinisa amakhanda abo, bavimba indlebe zabo ukuze bangezwa." 
Zechariah7:12 Benza inhliziyo zabo zaba lukhuni njengendayimana, hlezi bezwe ukulaya lamazwi i Nkosi yamabandla ebathumele wona ngomoya wayo ngabaprofethi bakuqala. Lokhuke kwayithukuthelisa kakhulu i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Zechariah7:13 I Nkosi yamabandla yathi: Njengoba ngababiza, kabaze bezwa, labo babiza, lami kangaze ngezwa." 
Zechariah7:14 Ngabachithachitha phakathi kwezizwe zonke ababekade bengazazi. Ngakho ilizwe abalitshiyayo lachitheka, kakusadabulanga muntu kulo, lelizwe elihle laba yinkangala." 
Zechariah8:1 Ilizwi le Nkosi yamabandla lafika kimi lisithi: 
Zechariah8:2 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Ngilobukhwele ngeZiyoni, ubukhwele obuvuthayo kakhulu." 
Zechariah8:3 I Nkosi ithi: Ngizabuyela eZiyoni, ngihlale phakathi kweJerusalema, leJerusalema izakuthiwa ngumuzi othembekileyo, lentaba ye Nkosi yamabandla izakuthiwa yintaba engcwele." 
Zechariah8:4 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Amaxhegu lezalukazi bazahlala futhi endleleni zeJerusalema, ngulowo lalowo ephethe udondolo ngenxa yokuluphala." 
Zechariah8:5 Lezindlela zomuzi zizagcwala abafana lamankazana bedlala kizo. 
Zechariah8:6 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Uba kumangalisa emehlweni alabo abaseleyo balababantu kulezinsuku, kuzamangalisa yini lemehlweni ami yini?" 
Zechariah8:7 Khangela, ngizakhulula abantu bami elizweni lapho eliphuma khona lalapho elitshona khona ilanga," 
Zechariah8:8 ngibalethe ukuze bahlale phakathi kweJerusalema, babe ngabantu bami, lami ngibe nguNkulunkulu wabo ngeqiniso langokulunga." 
Zechariah8:9 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Qungani isibindi, lina elizwa kulezinsuku amazwi avela kubaprofethi, ababekhona kusukela esikhathini sokubekwa kwesisekelo sethempeli lami, ukuze lakhiwe." 
Zechariah8:10 Ngoba ngaphambi kwalezonsuku kwakungelakuqatshwa umuntu lokwenyamazana, kungekho lokuvikelwa ezitheni kwabasebenzayo. Ngoba wonke umuntu ngamxega lomfowabo." 
Zechariah8:11 Kodwa khathesi kangisayikubaphatha abaseleyo balababantu njengensukwini zakuqala, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Zechariah8:12 Ngoba kuzahlanyelwa ngokuthula, ivini lizathela izithelo zalo lomhlabathi wandise inala yawo, lamazulu ehlise amazolo awo; ngizabanika abaseleyo balababantu zonke lezizinto." 
Zechariah8:13 Njengoba beliyisiqathekiso phakathi kwezizwe, wena Juda lawe Israyeli, ngakho ngizalikhulula libe yisibusiso. Lingesabi, kodwa manini isibindi." 
Zechariah8:14 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Njengoba ngazimisela ukwenza okubi kini ekungithukutheliseni kwaboyihlo, ngingaliyekelanga, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla," 
Zechariah8:15 ngakho-ke ngizimisele kulezinsuku ukwenza okulungileyo eJerusalema lakoJuda; lingesabi. 
Zechariah8:16 Nanzi izinto elizazenza. Khulumani iqiniso omunye komunye; lahlulele ngokuqotho langokuqonda enkundleni; 
Zechariah8:17 lingenzelani amacebo amabi enhliziyweni zenu; lingathandi izifungo zamanga; ngoba ngiyazizonda zonke lezizinto, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Zechariah8:18 Ilizwi le Nkosi yamabandla lafika kimi lisithi: 
Zechariah8:19 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Ukuzila ukudla kwenyanga yesine, lenyanga yesihlanu, lenyanga yesikhombisa, lenyanga yetshumi, kuzakuba yizikhathi zentokozo lezokuthaba lezikhathi ezimisiweyo zenjabulo koJuda. Ngakho-ke thandani iqiniso lokuthula." 
Zechariah8:20 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Izizwe labantu abakhe imizi emikhulu bazafika," 
Zechariah8:21 kuthi abakhileyo komunye umuzi baye kwabakhe komunye, bathi: Asihle sihambeni, siyedinga i Nkosi yamabandla, sicele umusa wayo; siyahamba khathesi." 
Zechariah8:22 Abantu abanengi lezizwe ezilamandla zizakuza ukuyidinga i Nkosi yamabandla eJerusalema lokucela umusa wayo. 
Zechariah8:23 I Nkosi yamabandla ithi: Ngalezonsuku abantu abalitshumi abavela ezizweni zezindimi zonke bazabamba umJuda ngesembatho sakhe, bathi kuye: Sizahamba lawe ngoba sesizwile ukuthi uNkulunkulu ukini." 
Zechariah9:1 Nanti ilizwi. Yilizwi le Nkosi elimelana lelizwe leHadiraki, lizakwehlela phezu kweDamaseko. Ngoba imizi yeSiriya ingeye Nkosi, njengazo zonke izizwe zakoIsrayeli;" 
Zechariah9:2 leHamathi lalo elikhawula kilo, leTire leSidoni lanxa kuhlakaniphile." 
Zechariah9:3 ITire izakhele inqaba, yabuthelela isiliva njengothuli, legolide njengezibi zezindlela." 
Zechariah9:4 Khangela, i Nkosi izaliphundla impahla yalo, itshaye amandla alo elwandle, lona liqedwe ngumlilo." 
Zechariah9:5 IAshikeloni izakubona lokho, yesabe, leGaza lalo ithuthumele kakhulu, leEkhironi layo ngoba ithemba lato liphelile. Inkosi yeGaza izabhubha, leAshikeloni kalisayikuhlalwa muntu." 
Zechariah9:6 Abantu abazalwa ngokufeba bazahlala eAshidodi; ngizaqeda ukuzigqaja kwamaFilisti. 
Zechariah9:7 Ngizakhupha igazi lemihlatshelo emilonyeni yawo, leminikelo yawo enengekayo phakathi kwamazinyo awo; abaseleyo bawo bazakuba ngabakankulunkulu wethu, abe njengesizwe koJuda, leEkhironi libe njengamaJebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Besengimisa inkamba izingelezele indlu yami ngibe ngumlindi, ukuze kungabi khona ongenayo lophumayo, kungabi lamcindezeli obanqobayo; sengikubonile lokhu ngawami amehlo." 
Zechariah9:9 Thokoza kakhulu, wena Ziyoni! Memeza kakhulu, Jerusalema! Khangela, iNkosi yakho iyeza kuwe, inqobile yehlula, imnene, ikhwele ubabhemi, ithole, inkonyana kababhemi." 
Zechariah9:10 Ngizaquma inqola isuke koEfrayimi, lamabhiza eJerusalema; ledandili lempi lizaqunywa. Izamemezela ukuthula ezizweni; lokubusa kwayo kuzasukela elwandle kusiya elwandle, kusukele emfuleni iYufrathi kuze kube sekucineni komhlaba." 
Zechariah9:11 Laweke, ngenxa yesivumelwano sakho lami esiqiniswe ngegazi, ngizakhupha izibotshwa zakho emgodini ongelamanzi." 
Zechariah9:12 Buyelani enqabeni yenu, lina zibotshwa esezilethemba; lamuhla ngiyalitshela ukuthi ngizalibusisa ngokuphindwe kabili." 
Zechariah9:13 Ngoba sengimgobisile uJuda njengedandili lami, ngenza uEfrayimi waba ngumtshoko wakho. Ngizavusela amadodana akho, Ziyoni, kumadodana akho, Javani, ngikwenze ube njengenkemba yeqhawe." 
Zechariah9:14 I Nkosi izabonakala ngaphezu kwabo, lomtshoko wayo uphazime njengombane; iNkosi uJehova izavuthela uphondo, iphume ngezivunguzane zaseningizimu." 
Zechariah9:15 I Nkosi yamabandla izabavikela, banqobe, behlisele phansi amatshe ezavutha; bazanatha igazi labo njengewayini, bagcwale lona njengomganu yokufafaza, lanjengezingonsi zelathi." 
Zechariah9:16 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo izabakhulula ngalolosuku, ngoba bangumhlambi wayo labantu bayo, ngoba njengeziceco ezinhle zomqhele, bazakhanya elizweni lakhe." 
Zechariah9:17 Yeka ubuhle balo lokubukeka kwalo! Amabele azakhulisa amajaha, lewayini elitsha likhulise izintombi ezigcweleyo." 
Zechariah10:1 Celani e Nkosi ni izulu ngesikhathi sentwasa, e Nkosi ni eyenza amayezi eziphepho, enika abantu izihlambo zezulu, enika bonke utshani egangeni." 
Zechariah10:2 Ngoba izithombe ezithiwa amatherafi zikhuluma ize, labavumisi babona okungamanga, labaphuphi balandisa amaphupho ayinkohliso, ukududuza kwabo kuyize. Ngakho-ke abantu bayahambahamba njengezimvu, bahlupheke ngoba bengelamelusi." 
Zechariah10:3 Ukuthukuthela kwe Nkosi kuyavutha ngabelusi, izaphindisela abakhokheli; ngoba i Nkosi yamabandla izawuhambela umhlambi wayo uJuda, izabenza babe njengebhiza lobukhosi empini." 
Zechariah10:4 Kuzaphuma ilitshe lengonsi kibo, kuphume isikhonkwane sethente, kuphume idandili lempi, kuphume bonke ababusi." 
Zechariah10:5 Bebonke bazakuba njengamaqhawe empini anyathela udaka lwezindlela; bazakulwa ngoba i Nkosi ilabo, bayangise abagadi bamabhiza." 
Zechariah10:6 Mina ngizamqinisa uJuda. ngikhulule uJosefa. Ngizababuyisa ngoba ngilesihawu kibo, babe njengokungathi kangizanga ngibalahle; ngoba ngiyi Nkosi uNkulunkulu wabo, ngizabaphendula." 
Zechariah10:7 UEfrayimi uzakuba njengeqhawe, inhliziyo yabo ithokoze njengokungathi ithokoziswa liwayini. Abantwana babo bazabona lokho bathabe, inhliziyo zabo zizajabula e Nkosi ni." 
Zechariah10:8 Ngizabatshayela ikhwelo, ngibabuthe, ngoba ngibahlengile, babebanengi njengakudala." 
Zechariah10:9 Njalo ngibachithachithe phakathi kwezizwe, kanti lemazweni akhatshana bazangikhumbula, bazakondla abantwana babobabuye." 
Zechariah10:10 Ngizababuyisa ekhaya bevela elizweni leGibhithe, ngibaqoqe eAsiriya; ngizabaletha elizweni leGileyadi leLebhanoni, kuwo kungasali ndawo." 
Zechariah10:11 Ulwandle luzakwehlelwa yikuhlupheka okukhulu, lamagagasi olwandle azatshaywa, kutshe lenziki zonke zeNile; kwehliswe ukuzigqaja kweAsiriya, kusuke intonga yobukhosi yeGibhithe." 
Zechariah10:12 Amandla abo azakuba se Nkosi ni, bahambe bethokoza ebizweni layo, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Zechariah11:1 Vula iminyango yakho, Lebhanoni, ukuze umlilo utshise imisedari yakho." 
Zechariah11:2 Khala wena firi, ngoba umsedari usuwile, ngoba izihlahla ezinhle ziphundlekile. Khalani lina zihlahla zamaokhi* zeBashani, ngoba igusu elingangenekiyo seliwile." 
Zechariah11:3 Ilizwi lokukhala kwabelusi liyezwakala, ngoba udumo lwabo luchithekile. Ukubhonga kwamabhongo ezilwane kuyezwakala ngoba ihlathi leJordani liqothulwe." 
Zechariah11:4 I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wami yathi: Yelusa izimvu zokuhlatshwa. 
Zechariah11:5 Abazithengayo bayazihlaba, bengabilacala; labazithengisayo bathi: Kayibusiswe i Nkosi, senginothile; abelusi bazo kabazihawukeli." 
Zechariah11:6 Ngoba kangisayikubahawukela abakhileyo kulelilizwe, kutsho i Nkosi. Kodwa khangela, ngizabanikela abantu ezandleni zabomakhelwane babo, lezamakhosi abo; bazachitha ilizwe, kangiyikophula loyedwa ezandleni zabo." 
Zechariah11:7 Ngasengizelusa izimvu zokuhlatshwa yilabo abathenga izimvu. Ngathatha intonga ezimbili, enye ngayibiza ngokuthi nguMusa, lenye ngayibiza ngokuthi nguNhlanganiso. Ngazelusa-ke izimvu." 
Zechariah11:8 Ngaxotsha abelusi abathathu ngenyanganye, ngoba basebengidinile, lami sengiyisinengiso kibo." 
Zechariah11:9 Ngakho-ke ngasengisithi: Kangisayikulelusa; efayo kayife, lelahlekayo kayilahleke; lalezo eziseleyo zidlane inyama." 
Zechariah11:10 Ngasengithatha intonga yami ethiwa nguMusa, ngayephula ukuze ngephule isivumelwano sami engangisenze labantu bonke." 
Zechariah11:11 Sephulwa-ke ngalolosuku, labathengi bezimvu ababengikhangele bazi ukuthi kwakuyilizwi le Nkosi." 
Zechariah11:12 Ngasengisithi kibo: Uba kulungile kini, ngiphani iholo lami; kodwa uba kungalunganga, yekelani. Basebengilinganisela iholo lami amashekeli* esiliva angamatshumi amathathu." 
Zechariah11:13 I Nkosi yasisithi kimi: Aphosele endaweni yokugcinela imali; yeka inani elinje ababengihlawule ngalo! Ngakho-ke ngasengiwathatha amashekeli esiliva angamatshumi amathathu, ngawaphosela endaweni yokugcinela imali ethempelini." 
Zechariah11:14 Ngasengisephula intonga yami yesibili ethiwa nguNhlanganiso ukuze kwaphuke ukuzalana kukaJuda loIsrayeli. 
Zechariah11:15 I Nkosi yasisithi kimi: Thatha futhi izikhali zomelusi oyisithutha. 
Zechariah11:16 Ngoba khangela, ngizabeka elizweni umelusi ongahambeli labo abaqunyiweyo, ongazidingiyo ezilahlekileyo, longazelaphiyo ezilimeleyo, longaziboneliyo eziphilayo, kodwa adle inyama yezinonileyo, adabule amasondo azo." 
Zechariah11:17 Maye kumelusi oyisithutha otshiya izimvu! Kungathi inkemba ingagwaza ingalo yakhe lelihlo lakhe lokunene. Ingalo yakhe kayitshwabhane, lelihlo lokunene lifiphale." 
Zechariah12:1 Nanti ilizwi. Yilizwi le Nkosi ngoIsrayeli. I Nkosi eyendlala amazulu, yamisa umhlaba, yenza umoya womuntu phakathi kwakhe," 
Zechariah12:2 ithi: Khangela, ngizakwenza iJerusalema ibe njengenkezo edakisayo kibo bonke abayizingelezeleyo; loJuda laye uzavinjezelwa ekuvinjezelweni kweJerusalema." 
Zechariah12:3 Ngalolosuku ngizakwenza iJerusalema ibe njengelitshe elisindayo kubo bonke abantu; bonke abalithwalayo bazazilimaza kakhulu; lazo zonke izizwe zomhlaba zizayihlanganyela. 
Zechariah12:4 Ngalolosuku ngizatshaya wonke amabhiza ngokusanganiseka, labagadi bawo ngokuhlanya. UJuda ngizamlinda, kodwa ngizaphumputhekisa wonke amabhiza abezizwe." 
Zechariah12:5 Izizwe zakoJuda zizakuthi: Abakhileyo eJerusalema balamandla ngenxa ye Nkosi yamabandla, uNkulunkulu wabo." 
Zechariah12:6 Ngalolosuku ngizakwenza izizwe zakoJuda zibe njengembawula yomlilo phakathi kwezihlahla, lanjengesihlanti* esibhebhayo phakathi kwezithungo. Bazabaqeda bonke abantu ababazingelezeleyo, abangakwesokunene labangakwesokhohlo; kodwa abantu beJerusalema babelokhu besahlala kuhle endaweni yabo." 
Zechariah12:7 I Nkosi izakhulula kuqala imizi yakoJuda ukuze udumo lwendlu kaDavida lodumo lwabakhileyo eJerusalema lungedluli olukaJuda. 
Zechariah12:8 Ngalolosuku i Nkosi izavikela abakhileyo eJerusalema ukuze ngalolosuku obuthakathaka phakathi kwabo abe lamandla njengoDavida, lendlu kaDavida ibe njengonkulunkulu, njengengilosi ye Nkosi eyahamba phambi kwabo." 
Zechariah12:9 Ngalolosuku ngizazama ukuchitha zonke izizwe ezihlasela iJerusalema. 
Zechariah12:10 Ngizathululela phezu kwendlu kaDavida laphezu kwabakhileyo eJerusalema umoya womusa lowokulabhela, njalo bazangikhangela abamgwazileyo, bamlilele, njengokulilelwa kozelwe yedwa, bamkhalele ngokubabayo njengokukhalelwa ngokubabayo kolizibulo." 
Zechariah12:11 Ngalolosuku kuzakuba khona ukulila eJerusalema okunjengokulilelwa kukaHadadi-Rimoni egcekeni leMegido. 
Zechariah12:12 Ilizwe lizalila, yileyo laleyondlu iyodwa; indlu kaDavida layo ilile iyodwa, labesifazana bayo bebodwa; indlu kaNathani iyodwa, labesifazana bayo bebodwa;" 
Zechariah12:13 indlu kaLevi iyodwa, labesifazana bayo bebodwa; indlu kaShimeyi iyodwa, labesifazana bayo bebodwa;" 
Zechariah12:14 lazo zonke izindlu eziseleyo, indlu leyo laleyo iyodwa, labesifazana bayo bebodwa." 
Zechariah13:1 Ngalolosuku umthombo uzavulelwa indlu kaDavida labakhileyo eJerusalema ukuze bahlanjululwe ezonweni lekungcoleni. 
Zechariah13:2 Kuzakuthi ngalolosuku, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla, ngiqume amabizo ezithombe asuke elizweni, zingabe zisakhunjulwa; futhi ngizadlulisa abaprofethi lomoya ongcolileyo ngibasuse elizweni." 
Zechariah13:3 Kuzakuthi-ke, uba umuntu ezaprofetha njalo, ng’khona uyise lonina-ke abamzalayo bazakuthi kuye: Kawuyikuphila, ngoba ukhulume amanga ebizweni le Nkosi. Uyise lonina abamzalayo babesebemgwaza esaprofetha." 
Zechariah13:4 Ngalolosuku bonke abaprofethi bazakuba lenhloni ngemibono yabo nxa beprofetha; kabayikugqoka izigqoko zoboya ukuze bakhohlise," 
Zechariah13:5 kodwa omunye lomunye wabo uzakuthi: Kangisuye mprofethi mina, ngingumlimi womhlabathi; ngoba ilizwe laba yilifa lami kusukela ebutsheni bami." 
Zechariah13:6 Uba sekuthiwa kuye: Ngawani lamanxeba asemzimbeni wakho? uzakuthi: Ngamanxeba okutshaywa kwami endlini yabangane bami," 
Zechariah13:7 Vuka, nkemba, uvukele umelusi wami, uvukele umuntu ongumngane wami, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla. Tshaya umelusi ukuze izimvu zichitheke; ngizaphendulela isandla sami kwezincinyane." 
Zechariah13:8 Kuzakuthi elizweni lonke kuqunywe kuphele ebantwini ingxenye ezimbili kwezintathu, kutsho i Nkosi." 
Zechariah13:9 Ngizayifaka emlilweni lingxenye yesithathu, ngibancibilikise njengomuntu encibilikisa isiliva, ngibahlole njengokuhlolwa kwegolide. Bazabiza ibizo lami, ngibaphendule; ngithi: Bangabantu bami; labo bathi: I Nkosi inguNkulunkulu wethu." 
Zechariah14:1 Khangela, luyeza usuku lwe Nkosi, lapho impango ethethwe kuwe izakwehlukaniswa phakathi kwakho." 
Zechariah14:2 Ngizabuthanisa zonke izizwe ukuze zilwe leJerusalema, umuzi uzathathwa lendlu ziphangwe, kudlwengulwe abesifazana; kuthunjwe ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yomuzi, kodwa abantu abaseleyo kabayikuqunywa basuke emzini." 
Zechariah14:3 I Nkosi izaphuma, ilwe imelene lalezozizwe njengekulweni kwayo ngosuku lwempi." 
Zechariah14:4 Ngalolosuku inyawo zayo zizakuma entabeni ethiwa ngeyeMihlwathi emaqondana leJerusalema empumalanga; intaba yeMihlwathi izadabuka phakathi kuvele isigodi esikhulu kusukela empumalanga kusiya entshonalanga, ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yentaba izatshedela enyakatho, lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili itshedele eningizimu." 
Zechariah14:5 Isihotsha esiphakathi kwezintaba sizavaleka, ngoba isihotsha esitsha phakathi kwezintaba sizafinyelela eceleni kwaso. Lizabaleka njengalokho labalekela ukunyikinyeka komhlaba ensukwini zikaUziya inkosi yakoJuda. I Nkosi uNkulunkulu wami ibisifika ilabo bonke abangcwele bayo." 
Zechariah14:6 Ngalolosuku kakuyikuba khona umqando longqwaqwane. 
Zechariah14:7 Kuzakuba yimini kokuphela eyaziwa yi Nkosi, kungabi lamini labusuku, ngoba kuzakuthi kusihlwa kube khona ukukhanya." 
Zechariah14:8 Ngalolosuku amanzi agobhozayo azaphuma eJerusalema, ingxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yawo igelezele elwandle lwasempumalanga, lengxenye eyodwa kwezimbili yawo igelezele elwandle lwentshonalanga, igeleza ehlobo lebusika." 
Zechariah14:9 I Nkosi izakuba yiNkosi yomhlaba wonke; ngalolosuku i Nkosi izabanye lebizo layo libe linye. 
Zechariah14:10 Ilizwe lonke lizaphenduka igceke kusukela eGeba kuze kube seRimoni eningizimu kweJerusalema. Kodwa iJerusalema izasala iphakeme endaweni yayo, igcwele abantu kusukela eSangweni lakoBhenjamini kuze kube sendaweni yesango lakuqala, isango leGonsini, kusukela eMphotshongweni kaHananeli kuze kube sezikhamelweni zewayini zenkosi." 
Zechariah14:11 Kuzahlalwa kiyo, kungabe kusaba khona ukutshabalala; iJerusalema izahlala ilondolozekile." 
Zechariah14:12 Nansi isifo i Nkosi ezasehlisela bonke abantu abahlasela iJerusalema; inyama yabo izabola besemi ngenyawo zabo, lamehlo abo abolele emikhoxweni yawo, lenlimi zabo zibolele emilonyeni yabo." 
Zechariah14:13 Ngalolosuku i Nkosi izabehlisela ukwesaba okukhulu, kuthi lowo lalowo abambe isandla sikamakhelwane wakhe ukuze asizwe nguye, kodwa isandla sikamakhelwane siphakamele ukumtshaya." 
Zechariah14:14 LoJuda uzakulwa leJerusalema, kubuthwe inotho yazo zonke izizwe ezizizingelezeleyo, igolide, lesiliva, lezembatho ezinengi kakhulu." 
Zechariah14:15 Isifo esinjengalesi sizafikela amabhiza lembongolo, lamakamela, labobabhemi, lezifuyo zonke ezikhona kulezo zihonqo." 
Zechariah14:16 Kuzakuthi bonke abaseleyo kuzo zonke izizwe ezazihlasele iJerusalema bahambe iminyaka ngeminyaka ukuyakhonza uNkulunkulu i Nkosi yamabandla, lokugcina umkhosi wamadumba." 
Zechariah14:17 Uba ezinye zezizwe zomhlaba zingayi eJerusalema ukukhonza uNkulunkulu i Nkosi yamabandla, kungani izulu kuzo." 
Zechariah14:18 Uba isizwe seGibhithe singayi eJerusalema ukukhonza, sizakwehlelwa yisifo leso i Nkosi ezasehlisela izizwe ezingayi emzini ukugcina umkhosi wamadumba." 
Zechariah14:19 Likutshaywa ngokunje iGibhithe lazo zonke izizwe ezingayi ukugcina umkhosi wamadumba. 
Zechariah14:20 Ngalolosuku kuzabe sekubhaliwe emabhereni amabhiza ukuthi: Zehlukaniselwe i Nkosi. Lezimbiza zethempelini zizakuba njengemiganu yokufafaza engaphambi kwelathi. 
Zechariah14:21 Zonke imbiza eJerusalema lakoJuda zizakwehlukaniselwa i Nkosi yamabandla, ukuze bonke abanikela umhlatshelo bazithathe, bapheke ngazo inyama yomhlatshelo. Kakusayikuba khona umthengi endlini ye Nkosi yamabandla ngalolosuku." 
Malachi1:1 Umthwalo welizwi le Nkosi kuIsrayeli ngesandla sikaMalaki. 
Malachi1:2 Ngilithandile, kutsho i Nkosi. Kodwa lithi: Usithande ngani? UEsawu kasuye yini umfowabo kaJakobe? kutsho i Nkosi. Kanti ngamthanda uJakobe," 
Malachi1:3 loEsawu ngamzonda; ngenza izintaba zakhe incithakalo, lelifa lakhe laba ngelamakhanka enkangala." 
Malachi1:4 Lanxa uEdoma esithi: Senziwe abayanga, kodwa sizabuyela si ye kwakha amanxiwa; itsho njalo i Nkosi yamabandla: Bona bangakha, kodwa mina ngizadiliza, njalo bazababiza ngokuthi: Ngumngcele wobubi, labantu i Nkosi ebathukutheleleyo kuze kube phakade." 
Malachi1:5 Lamehlo enu azabona, lani lithi: I Nkosi izakhuliswa ngale komngcele wakoIsrayeli." 
Malachi1:6 Indodana iyamhlonipha uyise, lenceku inkosi yayo. Uba-ke nginguyihlo, kungaphi ukuhlonitshwa kwami? Uba-ke ngiyiNkosi, kungaphi ukwesatshwa kwami? itsho i Nkosi yamabandla kini, bapristi elidelela ibizo lami; kodwa lithi: Silidelele ngani ibizo lakho?" 
Malachi1:7 Lisondeza isinkwa esingcolileyo phezu kwelathi lami, lisithi: Sikungcolise ngani? Ngokuthi kwenu: Itafula le Nkosi liyadeleleka." 
Malachi1:8 Njalo nxa lisondeza okuyisiphofu kube ngumhlatshelo, kakukubi yini? Lalapho lisondeza okuqhulayo lokugulayo, kakukubi yini? Ake ukusondeze kumbusi wakho; angaba lomusa kuwe yini? kumbe angabemukela yini ubuso bakho? itsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Malachi1:9 Khathesi-ke ake lincenge ubuso bukaNkulunkulu ukuze abe lomusa kithi; lokhu kube ngesandla senu; uzakwemukela ubuso benu yini? kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla. 
Malachi1:10 Ngubani okhona ngitsho phakathi kwenu ongavala izivalo? Yebo, lingabaseli ize umlilo phezu kwelathi lami. Kangithokozi ngani, kutsho i Nkosi yamabandla, njalo kangiyikwemukela umnikelo esandleni senu ngentokozo." 
Malachi1:11 Ngoba kusukela ekuphumeni kwelanga kuze kube sekutshoneni kwalo, ibizo lami li za kuba likhulu phakathi kwezizwe; lakuyo yonke indawo impepha izatshiselwa ibizo lami, lomnikelo ohlambulukileyo; ngoba ibizo lami li za kuba likhulu phakathi kwezizwe, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Malachi1:12 Kodwa liyalingcolisa ngokuthi kwenu: Itafula leNkosi lingcolisiwe, lesithelo salo, ukudla kwalo, kudelelekile." 
Malachi1:13 Njalo lithi: Khangela, kudinisa kangakanani! Njalo likuchilela amakhala, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla: njalo lilethe impango, lokuqhulayo, lokugulayo; ngokunjalo lilethe umnikelo. Ngikwemukele lokhu yini ngokuthokoza esandleni senu? itsho i Nkosi." 
Malachi1:14 Kaqalekiswe-ke umkhohlisi oleduna emhlanjini wakhe, ofunga ahlabele iNkosi okonakeleyo; ngoba ngiyiNkosi enkulu, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla, lebizo lami liyesabeka phakathi kwezizwe." 
Malachi2:1 Khathesi-ke, bapristi, umlayo lo ngowenu." 
Malachi2:2 Uba lingalaleli, njalo uba lingakubeki enhliziyweni ukunika ibizo lami udumo, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla, sengizathumela isiqalekiso phakathi kwenu, ngiqalekise izibusiso zenu. Yebo, sengiziqalekisile, ngoba kalikubeki enhliziyweni." 
Malachi2:3 Khangelani, ngizakona inzalo yenu, ngithele umswane ebusweni benu, umswane wamadili enu, lisuswe lawo." 
Malachi2:4 Njalo lizakwazi ukuthi ngithumele lumlayo kini, ukuze isivumelwano sami sibe loLevi, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Malachi2:5 Isivumelwano sami besilaye siyikuphila lokuthula; ngamnika khona kube yikwesaba angesaba ngakho; wathuthumela phambi kwebizo lami. 
Malachi2:6 Umlayo weqiniso wawusemlonyeni wakhe, lesiphambeko kasitholakalanga endebeni zakhe. Wahamba lami ngokuthula langobuqotho, waphendula abanengi ebubini." 
Malachi2:7 Ngoba indebe zompristi ziyagcina ulwazi, njalo bayadinga umlayo emlonyeni wakhe, ngoba uyisithunywa se Nkosi yamabandla." 
Malachi2:8 Kodwa lina liphambukile endleleni, lakhubekisa abanengi emlayweni; lona isivumelwano sikaLevi, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Malachi2:9 Ngakho lami ngilenzile laba ngabadelelekayo labehliselwe phansi phambi kwabantu bonke, njengokuba lingagcinanga izindlela zami, kodwa lamukele ubuso emlayweni." 
Malachi2:10 Kasilababa munye yini thina sonke? UNkulunkulu munye kasidalanga yini? Kungani sisenza ngenkohliso, omunye emelene lomfowabo, ngokungcolisa isivumelwano sabobaba?" 
Malachi2:11 UJuda wenze ngenkohliso, njalo kwenziwe amanyala koIsrayeli leJerusalema; ngoba uJuda ungcolisile ubungcwele bukaJehova abuthandayo, uthethe indodakazi kankulunkulu wezizweni." 
Malachi2:12 I Nkosi izaquma umuntu owenza lokhu, umfundisi lofundiswayo, asuke emathenteni kaJakobe, lalowo oletha umnikelo e Nkosi ni yamabandla." 
Malachi2:13 Lalokhu likwenzile kabili; lisibekela ilathi le Nkosi ngezinyembezi, ngokukhala, langokububula, okungangokuthi kayisawunanzi umnikelo, kumbe ukuwemukela ngokuthokoza esandleni senu." 
Malachi2:14 Kanti lithi: Kungani? Kungoba i Nkosi yayingumfakazi phakathi kwakho lomfazi wobutsha bakho, wena omphethe ngenkohliso, kanti engumngane wakho, lomfazi wesivumelwano sakho." 
Malachi2:15 Kenzanga yini oyedwa, lanxa elomoya oseleyo? Njalo kungani oyedwa? Wadinga inzalo kaNkulunkulu. Ngakho qaphelisani ngomoya wenu, njalo kakungabi lamunye ophatha umfazi wobutsha bakhe ngenkohliso." 
Malachi2:16 Ngoba i Nkosi uNkulunkulu kaIsrayeli ithi iyazonda ukwala. Ngoba omunye usibekela udlakela ngesembatho sakhe, itsho iNkosi yamabandla. Ngakho qaphelisani ngomoya wenu, ukuze lingenzi ngenkohliso." 
Malachi2:17 Liyidinisile i Nkosi ngamazwi enu. Kanti lithi: Siyidinise ngani? Ngokuthi kwenu: Wonke owenza okubi ulungile emehlweni e Nkosi, njalo uyathokoza ngabo; kumbe: Ungaphi uNkulunkulu wesahlulelo?" 
Malachi3:1 Khangelani, ngithuma isithunywa sami, esizalungisa indlela phambi kwami; leNkosi eliyidingayo izafika masinyane ethempelini layo, ngitsho isithunywa sesivumelwano elithokoza ngaso; khangela siyeza, itsho iNkosi yamabandla." 
Malachi3:2 Kodwa ngubani ongalumela usuku lokuza kwaso, njalo ngubani ongema ekubonakaleni kwaso? Ngoba sinjengomlilo womcwengi wegolide, lanjengesepa yomwatshi." 
Malachi3:3 Sizahlala njeng omcwengi lomhlambululi wesiliva, sihlambulule amadodana kaLevi, siwacwenge njengegolide lanjengesiliva, aze asondeze iminikelo ngokulunga e Nkosi ni." 
Malachi3:4 Khona umnikelo wakoJuda loweJerusalema uzakuba mnandi e Nkosi ni njengensukwini zendulo, lanjengeminyakeni yakuqala." 
Malachi3:5 Njalo ngizasondela kini ngokwahlulela; ngibe ngumfakazi ophangisayo ngimelene labathakathi, ngimelene lezifebe, ngimelene labafungi bamanga, ngimelene labacindezeli bamaholo abaqatshiweyo, abafelokazi, lezintandane, labasunduzela abezizweni eceleni, njalo abangangesabiyo, itsho iNkosi yamabandla." 
Malachi3:6 Ngoba ngiyi Nkosi, kangiphenduki; ngakho lina madodana kaJakobe kaliqedwa." 
Malachi3:7 Ngitsho kusukela ensukwini zaboyihlo liphambukile ezimisweni zami, kalizigcinanga. Buyelani kimi, lami ngizabuyela kini, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla. Kanti lithi: Sizabuyela ngani?" 
Malachi3:8 Umuntu angamphanga yini uNkulunkulu? Kanti lina lingiphangile. Kodwa lithi: Sikuphange ngani? Ng okwetshumi lomnikelo. 
Malachi3:9 Liqalekisiwe ngesiqalekiso, ngoba lingiphangile, isizwe sonke." 
Malachi3:10 Lethani konke okwetshumi esiphaleni ukuze kube lokudla endlini yami. Lingihlole-ke khathesi kukho, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla, uba ngingayikulivulela amawindi amazulu, ngilithululele isibusiso kuze kungabi le ndawo eyaneleyo." 
Malachi3:11 Ngizakhuza okudlayo ngenxa yenu, njalo kakuyikulichithela izithelo zomhlabathi; levini kaliyikulibozisela ensimini, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Malachi3:12 Njalo zonke izizwe zizakuthi libusisiwe, ngoba lina lizakuba yilizwe elithokozisayo, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Malachi3:13 Amazwi enu abelukhuni emelene lami, itsho i Nkosi. Kanti lithi: Sikhulumeni simelene lawe?" 
Malachi3:14 Lithe: Kuyize ukukhonza uNkulunkulu. Njalo kuyinzuzo bani ukuthi sigcine imfanelo yakhe, lokuthi sihambe sikwezimnyama phambi kwe Nkosi yamabandla?" 
Malachi3:15 Khathesi-ke sithi abaziqhenyayo babusisiwe; yebo, labo abenza inkohlakalo bayakhiwa; yebo balinga uNkulunkulu, baphephe." 
Malachi3:16 Khona abayesabayo iNkosi bakhuluma, lowo lalowo kumngane wakhe; njalo i Nkosi yalalela, yezwa; logwalo lwesikhumbuzo lwalotshwa phambi kwayo ngabo abayesabayo i Nkosi, langalabo abazindla ngebizo layo." 
Malachi3:17 Njalo bazakuba ngabami, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla, ngalolosuku engizakwenza ngalo okuligugu kwami, njalo ngizabayekela njengendoda eyekela indodana yayo eyisebenzelayo." 
Malachi3:18 Beselibuya libona umehluko phakathi kolungileyo lomubi, phakathi kokhonza uNkulunkulu lalowo ongamkhonziyo." 
Malachi4:1 Ngoba khangelani, luyeza usuku oluvutha njengeziko; labo bonke abazigqajayo, yebo, bonke abenza ngenkohliso bazakuba libibi; losuku oluzayo luzabatshisa, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla, ukuze lungabatshiyeli impande kumbe ugatsha." 
Malachi4:2 Kodwa kini elesaba ibizo lami, ilanga lokulunga lizaphuma lilokusilisa empikweni zalo. Njalo lizaphuma liqolotsha njengamathole esibaya." 
Malachi4:3 Lizanyathelela phansi ababi, ngoba bazakuba ngumlotha ngaphansi kwengaphansi yenyawo zenu ngosuku engizakwenza, itsho i Nkosi yamabandla." 
Malachi4:4 Khumbulani umlayo kaMozisi inceku yami, engamlaya wona eHorebe ngoIsrayeli wonke, izimiso lezahlulelo." 
Malachi4:5 Khangelani, ngizathuma uElija umprofethi kini lungakafiki usuku lwe Nkosi olukhulu lolwesabekayo." 
Malachi4:6 Uzaphendulela-ke inhliziyo yaboyise ebantwaneni, lenhliziyo yabantwana kuboyise, hlezi ngize ngitshaye ilizwe ngesiqalekiso." 
Matthew1:5 uSalimoni wasezala uBowosi kuRahabi; uBowosi wasezala uObedi kuRuthe; uObedi wasezala uJese; 
Luke3:25 kaMatathiya, kaAmosi, kaNahume, kaEseli, kaNagayi," 
Luke3:25 kaMatathiya, kaAmosi, kaNahume, kaEseli, kaNagayi," 
James5:11 Khangela, sithi babusisiwe ababekezelayo; lizwile ukubekezela kukaJobe, laselibona ukucina kweNkosi, ukuthi iNkosi ilesihawu esikhulu lobubele."
